Genesis1:1 Koke kwathoma lokha uZimu nakadala izulu nephasi. 
Genesis1:2 Nje-ke iphasi belinganabubono begodu linganabuphilo. Bekumnyama koke, iphasi libhibezwe mamanzi amanengi. Kodwana ummoya kaZimu wavunguza phezu kwamanzi." 
Genesis1:3 Nje-ke uZimu wathi: “Akubekhona ukukhanya.” Ukukhanya kwavela. 
Genesis1:4 UZimu wabona bonyana ukukhanya kuhle; yeke wahlukanisa ukukhanya nobumnyama. 
Genesis1:5 UZimu wabiza ukukhanya bona yimini, ubumnyama wathi busuku. Kwahlwa, kwasa; kwaba lilanga lokuthoma." 
Genesis1:6 UZimu wathi: “Akubekhona isibanga hlangana kwamanzi, kuhlukaniseke amanzi namanzi.”" 
Genesis1:7 Kungendlela leyo uZimu enza ngayo isibanga, wahlukanisa amanzi angaphasi kwesibanga namanzi angehla kwaso. Mbala kwaba njalo." 
Genesis1:8 UZimu wabiza isibanga bona mkayi. Kwahlwa, kwasa; kwaba lilanga lesibili." 
Genesis1:9 UZimu wathi: “Amanzi angaphasi komkayi akabuthane ndawonye, kubekhona indawo eyomileko.” Mbala kwaba njalo." 
Genesis1:10 UZimu wabiza indawo eyomileko bona liphasi, kwathi amanzi abuthene ndawonye wawabiza bona malwandle. UZimu wabona lokho kukuhle." 
Genesis1:11 UZimu wathi: “Iphasi aliveze iimila: iintjalo ezinembewu, imithi ethela iinthelo ezinembewu ukuya ngemihlobayo.” Mbala kwaba njalo." 
Genesis1:12 Yeke iphasi laveza iimila: iintjalo ezinembewu ukuya ngemihlobazo nemithi ethela iinthelo ezinembewu ukuya ngemihlobayo. UZimu wabona lokho kukuhle. 
Genesis1:13 Kwahlwa, kwasa; kwaba lilanga lesithathu." 
Genesis1:14 UZimu wathi: “Akube khona iinkhanyisi emkayini ukuze zihlukanise ubusuku nemini; azibe matshwayo weenkhathi zeminyanya, zikhombe amalanga neminyaka." 
Genesis1:15 Azibe ziinkhanyisi zomkayi zikhanyisele iphasi.” Mbala kwaba njalo. 
Genesis1:16 UZimu wenza iinkhanyisi ezimbili ezikulu; esikhudlwana kunesinye wasenza bona sibuse imini, esincani wasenza bona sibuse ubusuku. Godu wenza neenkwekwezi." 
Genesis1:17 UZimu wathatha iinkhanyisezi wazibeka phezulu emkayini bona zikhanyisele iphasi. 
Genesis1:18 Wazenza bonyana zibuse phezu kobusuku nemini, nokobana zihlukanise umkhanyo nobumnyama. UZimu wabona lokho kukuhle." 
Genesis1:19 Kwahlwa, kwasa; kwaba lilanga lesine." 
Genesis1:20 UZimu wathi: “Amanzi akaphithizele yoke imihlobo yeemphili, iinyoni ziphaphe phezulu emkayini.”" 
Genesis1:21 Kungendlela leyo uZimu adala ngayo iimbandana ezikulu zelwandle neemphili zoke eziphithizela ngemanzini ngemihlobazo. Godu wadala iinyoni eziphaphako ngemihlobazo. UZimu wabona lokho kukuhle. 
Genesis1:22 Wazibusisa wathi: “Zalanani nande, nigcwale amalwandle neenyoni zande ephasini.”" 
Genesis1:23 Kwahlwa, kwasa; kwaba lilanga lesihlanu." 
Genesis1:24 UZimu wathi: “Iphasi nalo aliveze iimphili ngemihlobazo: ezifuywako, ezikhakhabako nezommango, zoke zibe ngokuhlukahlukana kwazo.” Mbala kwaba njalo." 
Genesis1:25 UZimu wenza iinlwana zommango, ezifuywako kanye nakho koke okukhakhabako ukuya ngemihlobazo. Wabona lokho kukuhle." 
Genesis1:26 UZimu wathi: “Asenze umuntu ngomfanekiswethu asifuze, abuse phezu kweenhlambi zelwandle, iinyoni zomkayi, zoke iinlwana zephasi, kanye nakho koke okukhakhaba phezu kwalo.”" 
Genesis1:27 Yeke uZimu wadala umuntu ngomfanekiswakhe; umuntu waba mfuziselo kaZimu; wadala wembaji nowengubo. 
Genesis1:28 UZimu wababusisa wathi kibo: “Belethani nande, nizalise iphasi nilibuse; nibuse phezu kweenhlambi zelwandle, iinyoni zomkayi naphezu kwenyabanyaba yoke ekhamba phezu kwephasi.”" 
Genesis1:29 UZimu wathi: “Qala, ngininikela zoke iintjalo ezithela imbewu ephasini, nemithi yoke ehloma iinthelo ezinembewu; lokho kuzakuba kukudla kwenu." 
Genesis1:30 Koke okulihlaza okumilako ngikunikela bona kube kukudla kweenlwana zephasi, iinyoni zomkayi kanye neenkhakhabi zoke zephasi, okutjho zoke iimphili.” Mbala kwaba njalo." 
Genesis1:31 UZimu wabona koke akwenzileko bona kuyakarisa. Kwahlwa, kwasa; kwaba lilanga lesithandathu." 
Genesis2:1 Yeke kwapheleliswa izulu nephasi kanye nendalo yoke. 
Genesis2:2 Ngelanga lekhomba uZimu gade asele aqedile umsebenzakhe. Ngelanga lekhomba waphumula kiwo woke umsebenzakhe. 
Genesis2:3 Yeke uZimu wabusisa ilanga lekhomba bewalicwengisa ngombana kwaba lilanga aphumula ngalo kiwo woke umsebenzi wokudala. 
Genesis2:4 Nasi indaba yezulu nephasi: Lokha uSomnini uZimu nakenza iphasi nezulu," 
Genesis2:5 bekunganamsesana emmangweni begodu kunganasimila esele similile ehlabathini ngombana uSomnini uZimu gade angakanisi izulu ephasini. Begodu gade kunganamuntu ongalima ihlabathi. 
Genesis2:6 Kodwana kwenyuka ikungu phasi yaswakamisa ihlabathi. 
Genesis2:7 Yeke uSomnini uZimu wabumba umuntu ngethuli lehlabathi, waphefumulela eempumulweni zakhe umphefumulo wokuphila. Ngaleyondlela umuntu waba nokuphila." 
Genesis2:8 USomnini uZimu gade ahlome isivande e-Edeni ngepumalanga; wathatha umuntu agade ambumbile wambeka lapho. 
Genesis2:9 Yeke uSomnini uZimu wamilisa yoke imihlobo yemithi eganukejako nelungele ukudliwa. Kwathi phakathi kwesivandeso wamilisa umuthi wokuphila nomuthi wokwazi koke. 
Genesis2:10 Kwavinyilika umlambo e-Edeni wathelelela isivande; ukusukela lapho umlambo lo wahlukana waba maphakgha amane. 
Genesis2:11 Ibizo lephakgha lokuthoma yiPitjhoni; lona ligeleza libhoduluke inarha yeRhavila lapha kunegolide khona. 
Genesis2:12 Igolide lenarha leyo lihle khulu kunoburegu obunuka kamnandi nelitje le-oniksi. 
Genesis2:13 Ibizo lephakgha lesibili yiGirhoni; lona ligeleza libhoduluke yoke inarha yeKutjhe. 
Genesis2:14 Ibizo lephakgha lesithathu yiThigrisi; lona ligeleza magegana nepumalanga ye-Asiriya. Bese kuthi lesine kube yiYufrathe. 
Genesis2:15 Kwathi lokha uSomnini uZimu nathatha umuntu ambeka esivandeni se-Edeni bona asisebenze abe asitjheje," 
Genesis2:16 wamyala wathi: “Ungazidlela ngokuthanda kwakho nanyana ngimuphi umuthi osesivandeni," 
Genesis2:17 kodwana ungawudli umuthi wokwazi koke ngombana mhlana uwudlako uzokufa kokufa.” 
Genesis2:18 USomnini uZimu wathi: “Akusikuhle bona umuntu ahlale yedwa. Yeke ngizomenzela umsizi omfaneleko.” 
Genesis2:19 Nje-ke uSomnini uZimu wabumba ngehlabathi zoke iinlwana zommango neenyoni zoke zomkayi. Waziletha emuntwini ukuze abone bonyana uzithiya amabizo athini. Lokho umuntu agade azakuthiya isilwana ngakho, bekuzakuba libizo laso." 
Genesis2:20 Yeke umuntu wathiya yoke ifuyo, zoke iinyoni zomkayi neenlwana zoke zommango amabizo. Kodwana umuntu akhange azifunyanele umsizi omfaneleko kizo." 
Genesis2:21 Nje-ke uSomnini uZimu wenza umuntu bona alale ubuthongo obukhulu. Kwathi asalele njalo, uZimu wakhupha linye leembambo zomuntu wabese uvala itjhubelo ngenyama." 
Genesis2:22 Yeke uSomnini uZimu wabumba umuntu wengubo ngembambo ayithatha emuntwini wembaji, wamthatha wamusa emuntwini wembaji loyo." 
Genesis2:23 Umuntu wembaji wathi: “Lo, lithambo lamathambami nenyama yenyamami! Uzakubizwa bona mfazi ngombana uthethwe endodeni.”" 
Genesis2:24 Ngebangeli indoda izakutjhiya uyise nonina inamathele emfazinayo bese baba nyamanye. 
Genesis2:25 Bobabili, indoda nomfazayo gade bahlubule nokho bangananhloni ngalokho." 
Genesis3:1 Inyoka gade inobuqili ukudlula ezinye iinlwana zommango uZimu azenzileko. Yabuza umfazi yathi: “Kuliqiniso bona uZimu unalele ukudla kinanyana ngimuphi umuthi osesivandeni na?” 
Genesis3:2 Umfazi waphendula wathi: “Awa, singadla isithelo sananyana ngimuphi umuthi esivandeni," 
Genesis3:3 kodwana uZimu uthe, ‘Ningadli isithelo somuthi ophakathi nesivande begodu ningawuthinti ukuze ningafi.’ ”" 
Genesis3:4 Inyoka yathi: “Awa, anikazukufa!" 
Genesis3:5 Kuhlekuhle uZimu uyazi bonyana mhlazana nisidlako, amehlwenu azokuvuleka, nibe nokwazi koke njengoZimu.”" 
Genesis3:6 Umfazi waqala umuthi, wabona iinthelo ezihle neziyengako. Phezu kwalokho beziganukeja ngombana ziyahlakaniphisa. Yeke wakha iinthelo kiwo wadla, wanikela nendodakhe egade inaye, nayo yadla." 
Genesis3:7 Ngalokho bobabili amehlwabo avuleka, bazibona bakhamba hlubule. Nje-ke bazithungela iimvunulo ngamakari wamakhiwani." 
Genesis3:8 Ekupholeni kwelanga bezwa uSomnini uZimu akhamba esivandeni, yeke umuntu nomkakhe babhaqela uZimu hlangana nemithi yesivande." 
Genesis3:9 USomnini uZimu wabiza umuntu wathi: “Kanti ukuphi na?” 
Genesis3:10 Yena waphendula wathi: “Ngikuzwe ukhamba esivandeni, ngesaba ngombana ngihlubule; nje-ke ngizifihlile.”" 
Genesis3:11 UZimu wathi kuye: “Ngubani okutjele bonyana uhlubule? Kghani udle emthini engakuyala ngawo bona ungawudli?” 
Genesis3:12 Umuntu wathi: “Awa, umfazi owangipha yena bona abe nami, nguye ongiphe isithelo somuthi, yeke nami ngadla.”" 
Genesis3:13 Nje-ke uSomnini wathi emfazini: “Yintobani oyenzileko le?” Umfazi waphendula wathi: “Yinyoka engirhwalileko, yeke ngadla.”" 
Genesis3:14 USomnini uZimu wathi enyokeni: “Ngebanga lokobana wenze lokhu, wena unikelelwe: yoke ifuyo yekhaya izokubaleka neenlwana zoke zommango zikunine. Uzakurhurhuba ngesisu, udle ithuli lehlabathi imihla yoke yepilwakho." 
Genesis3:15 Ngizakubeka ubutha phakathi kwakho nomfazi, naphakathi kweenzukulwana zakho neenzukulwana zakhe; zona zizakutshidlha ihlokwakho wena ulume isithende sazo.”" 
Genesis3:16 Emfazini uZimu wathi: “Ngizokwandisela ubuhlungu ekuzithwaleni kwakho, ubelethe ngobudisi obukhulu. Uzakutjhisakalela indodakho, kodwana yona izakukubusa.”" 
Genesis3:17 Endodeni uZimu wathi: “Njengombana ulalele umfazi wabe wadla emthini engakwalela bonyana udle kiwo; ihlabathi seyinikelelwe ngebanga lakho: Imihla yoke yepilwakho uzakusebenza nzima ukufumana ukudla kwakho kiyo," 
Genesis3:18 kodwana izakuvezela ameva nabosotokolo bewudle iimila zommango. 
Genesis3:19 Ukudla kwakho uzakujulukela bewubuyele ehlabathini. Iye, wathathwa kiyo begodu njengombana ulithuli nje, uzakubuyela ethulini.”" 
Genesis3:20 Indoda yathiya umkayo bona ngu-Eva ngombana gade azokuba ngunina wabo boke abaphilako. 
Genesis3:21 USomnini uZimu wenza iimvunulo zesikhumba, nje-ke wembathisa indoda nomkayo." 
Genesis3:22 USomnini uZimu wathi: “Kazi umuntu sele anokwazi koke. Ngaleyondlela sese afana nathi. Yeke akukafaneli avunyelwe bona elule isandla sakhe adle emthini wokuphila ukuze aphile isiphelani.” 
Genesis3:23 Nje-ke uSomnini uZimu wamqotjha umuntu esivandeni se-Edeni ukuze alime ihlabathi athethwe kiyo. 
Genesis3:24 Kuthe sele amqotjhile umuntu, wabeka amakerubhi ngepumalanga esangweni lesivande. Amakerubhi lawo gade anesabula yomlilo ebenyezelako, alinde indlela eya emthini wokuphila." 
Genesis4:1 Indoda yeyama umkayo, wazithwala, wabeletha uKhayini wathi: “Ngiveze indoda ngokusizwa nguSomnini.”" 
Genesis4:2 Godu wabeletha u-Abela umfowabo. Nje-ke u-Abela waba ngumelusi wezimvu neembuzi kwathi uKhayini waba mlimi wehlabathi. 
Genesis4:3 Ngokukhamba kwesikhathi uKhayini waletha ezinye zeenthelo zehlabathi zaba mnikelwakhe kuSomnini. 
Genesis4:4 U-Abela naye waletha umnikelo kuSomnini, okutjho umhlwehlwe wamazibulo womhlambakhe. USomnini uZimu wayelela u-Abela nomnikelwakhe," 
Genesis4:5 kodwana akhange ayelele uKhayini nomnikelwakhe. Ngebangelo uKhayini wasilingeka khulu nobuso bakhe banyukubala. 
Genesis4:6 Nje-ke uSomnini wathi kuKhayini: “Usilingwe yini? Kubayini ubuso bakho bunyukubele nje? 
Genesis4:7 Kanti nawenza okuhle azakhe umomotheke na? Nawenza okungakalungi, yelela isono sikulindile nawusuka lapha. Sikhanukela ukukubinda kodwana wena kufuze uqine kunaso.”" 
Genesis4:8 Nje-ke uKhayini wathi ku-Abela umfowabo: “Namba khesiye emmangweni.” Kwathi basese semmangwenapho, uKhayini wadumela umfowabo u-Abela wambulala." 
Genesis4:9 USomnini wathi kuKhayini: “Uphi umfowenu u-Abela?” Yena waphendula wathi: “Awa, mina angimazi. Kanti sengingumelusi womfowethu na?”" 
Genesis4:10 USomnini wathi: “Yintobani oyenzileko le? Lalela bona iingazi zomfowenu zingililela kangangani ehlabathini! 
Genesis4:11 Unikelelwe wena! Sekufanele uqotjhwe ehlabathini ovule umlomayo bona yamukele iingazi zomfowenu ngezandla zakho. 
Genesis4:12 Lokha nawulima ihlabathi, ayisazukuvezela iinthelo zayo. Sewuzakundinda nephasi.”" 
Genesis4:13 UKhayini wathi kuSomnini: “Isibetho sami singaphezu kwamandlami. 
Genesis4:14 Namhlanje ungiqotjhile ehlabathini begodu angisazukuba sebukhoneni bakho. Sengizokuba ngondindako ephasini, nanyana ngubani ongifunyanako uzongibulala.”" 
Genesis4:15 Kodwana uSomnini wathi: “Akusinjalo! Nakukhona obulala uKhayini, kuzakubuyiselelwa emuntwini loyo ngokubulawa kwabalikhomba bakhe.” Yeke uSomnini watshwaya uKhayini ukuze kungabikhona noyedwa ozakuthi namfunyanako ambulale." 
Genesis4:16 Nje-ke uKhayini wasuka phambi kwakaSomnini wayokwakha enarheni yeNodi, ngepumalanga ye-Edeni." 
Genesis4:17 UKhayini weyama umkakhe, wazithwala bewabeletha u-Inogo. UKhayini wakha idorobho walithiyelela ngendodanakhe u-Inogo." 
Genesis4:18 U-Inogo wabelethelwa u-Iradi; u-Iradi wabeletha uMerhiyayeli, uMerhiyayeli wabeletha uMetutjhayeli owabeletha uLemeki." 
Genesis4:19 ULemeki wathatha abafazi ababili, omunye abizwa bona ngu-Ada omunye kuthiwa nguTsila." 
Genesis4:20 U-Ada wabeletha uJabali. UJabali lo, gade anguyise wabomahlala etendeni nabafuyi." 
Genesis4:21 Ibizo lomfowabo bekunguJubali. UJubali yena gade anguyise wabo boke abancinzi bamaharibha namanghwani. 
Genesis4:22 UTsila naye wabeletha indodana okuthiwa nguTubali-Khayini. Yena gade amkhandi noyise walabo abasebenza ngekoporo nesimbi. Udadwabo lakaTubali-Khayini bekunguNama. 
Genesis4:23 ULemeki wathi ebafazini bakhe: “Ada nawe Tsila, lalelani mina; bafazi bami lalelani amezwami: Indoda elimaza mina, ngizoyibulala nya, kuzakuba njalo nesokaneni elingiphobolako." 
Genesis4:24 Iye, uKhayini uzakubuyiselelwa kalikhomba kodwana uLemeki yena kuzakuba kamatjhumi alikhomba nalikhomba!”" 
Genesis4:25 U-Adamu weyama umkakhe godu wabeletha indodana wayithiya bona nguSethi ngombana wathi: “UZimu ungiphe omunye umntwana esikhundleni saka-Abela obulewe nguKhayini.” 
Genesis4:26 USethi naye wabeletha indodana wayithiya bona ngu-Enotjhi. Ngesikhatheso abantu bathoma ukubiza ibizo lakaSomnini. 
Genesis5:1 Nanti irhelo leenzukulwana zaka-Adamu: Lokha uZimu nakadala umuntu amenza ngomfanekiso kaZimu," 
Genesis5:2 wabenza kwaba ngowembaji nowengubo, wababusisa. Mhlana abenzako wababiza bona babantu." 
Genesis5:3 Kuthe lokha umuntu ongu-Adamu nasele aphile iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amathathu, wabeletha indodana emfanekiswakhe nefuze yena, wayithiya ibizo bona nguSethi." 
Genesis5:4 Emva kokobana kubelethwe uSethi, u-Adamu waphila iminyaka emakhulu abunane. Wabeletha amadodana amanye kanye namadodakazi." 
Genesis5:5 Yoke iminyaka u-Adamu ayiphilako imakhulu alithoba namatjhumi amathathu, emva kwalapho wahlongakala." 
Genesis5:6 Kuthe lokha uSethi nasele aphile iminyaka elikhulu namihlanu, wabeletha u-Enotjhi." 
Genesis5:7 Emva kokobana kubelethwe u-Enotjhi, uSethi waphila iminyaka emakhulu abunane nalikhomba. Wabeletha amadodana amanye namadodakazi." 
Genesis5:8 Yoke iminyaka uSethi ayiphilako imakhulu alithoba netjhumi nambili, emva kwalapho wahlongakala." 
Genesis5:9 Kuthe lokha u-Enotjhi nasele aphile iminyaka ematjhumi alithoba, wabeletha uKhenani." 
Genesis5:10 Emva kokobana kubelethwe uKhenani, u-Enotjhi waphila iminyaka emakhulu abunane netjhumi namihlanu. Wabeletha amadodana amanye namadodakazi." 
Genesis5:11 Yoke iminyaka u-Enotjhi ayiphilako imakhulu alithoba namihlanu, emva kwalapho wahlongakala." 
Genesis5:12 Kuthe lokha uKhenani nasele aphile iminyaka ematjhumi alikhomba, wabeletha uMahalalela." 
Genesis5:13 Emva kokobana kubelethwe uMahalalela, uKhenani waphila iminyaka emakhulu abunane namatjhumi amane. Wabeletha amadodana amanye namadodakazi." 
Genesis5:14 Yoke iminyaka uKhenani ayiphilako imakhulu alithoba netjhumi, emva kwalapho wahlongakala." 
Genesis5:15 Kuthe lokha uMahalalela nasele aphile iminyaka ematjhumi amathandathu nahlanu, wabeletha uJeredi." 
Genesis5:16 Emva kokobana kubelethwe uJeredi, uMahalalela waphila iminyaka emakhulu abunane namatjhumi amathathu. Wabeletha amadodana amanye namadodakazi." 
Genesis5:17 Yoke iminyaka uMahalalela ayiphilako imakhulu abunane namatjhumi alithoba namihlanu, emva kwalapho wahlongakala." 
Genesis5:18 Kuthe lokha uJeredi nasele aphile iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi asithandathu nambili, wabeletha u-Inogo." 
Genesis5:19 Emva kokobana kubelethwe u-Inogo, uJeredi waphila iminyaka emakhulu abunane. Wabeletha amadodana amanye namadodakazi." 
Genesis5:20 Yoke iminyaka uJeredi ayiphilako imakhululu alithoba namatjhumi asithandathu nambili, emva kwalapho wahlongakala." 
Genesis5:21 Kuthe lokha u-Inogo nasele aphile iminyaka ematjhumi amathandathu nahlanu, wabeletha uMetutjhelarhi." 
Genesis5:22 Emva kokobana kubelethwe uMetutjhelarhi, u-Inogo waphila iminyaka emakhulu amathathu atjhidelene noZimu. Wabeletha amadodana amanye namadodakazi." 
Genesis5:23 Yoke iminyaka u-Inogo ayiphilako imakhulu amathathu namatjhumi asithandathu nahlanu. 
Genesis5:24 U-Inogo gade atjhidelene noZimu; akhange abe asabonwa ngombana uZimu wamhlwitha ebantwini. 
Genesis5:25 Kuthe lokha uMetutjhelarhi nasele aphile iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi abunane nalikhomba, wabeletha uLemeki." 
Genesis5:26 Emva kokobana kubelethwe uLemeki, uMetutjhelarhi waphila iminyaka emakhulu alikhomba namatjhumi abunane nambili. Wabeletha amadodana amanye namadodakazi." 
Genesis5:27 Yoke iminyaka uMetutjhelarhi ayiphilako imakhulu alithoba namatjhumi asithandathu nethoba, emva kwalapho wahlongakala." 
Genesis5:28 Kuthe lokha uLemeki nasele aphile iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi abunane nambili, wabeletha indodana." 
Genesis5:29 Wayithiya bona nguNowa, bewathi: “Yena uzasiduduza ekusebenzeni nzima nebuhlungwini bamatjhatjhazi wezandla zethu ngebanga lehlabathi eyanikelelwa nguZimu.”" 
Genesis5:30 Emva kokobana kubelethwe uNowa, uLemeki waphila iminyaka emakhulu amahlanu namatjhumi alithoba namihlanu. Wabeletha amadodana amanye namadodakazi." 
Genesis5:31 Yoke iminyaka uLemeki ayiphilako imakhulu alikhomba namatjhumi alikhomba nalikhomba, emva kwalapho wahlongakala." 
Genesis5:32 Kuthe lokha uNowa nasele aphile iminyaka emakhulu amahlanu, wabeletha uTjhemu, uRhamu noJafethi." 
Genesis6:1 Lokha abantu nasele banda ephasini namadodakazi andile," 
Genesis6:2 amadodana kaZimu abona bonyana amadodakazi wabantu mahle, azithathela abafazi abathandekako kiwo." 
Genesis6:3 Yeke uSomnini wathi: “Ummoya engawuphefumulela emuntwini awusoze wahlala ebantwinaba isiphelani ngombana umuntu uyinyama nje. Yeke ipilo yomuntu ayisoze yadlula eminyakeni elikhulu namatjhumi amabili.” 
Genesis6:4 Ngeenkhathezo nangemuva kwalokho bekukhona iintsitsirimba ephasini ngombana amadodana kaZimu alalana namadodakazi wabantu abelethelwa abantwana. Labo-ke bekuziingorho zeenkhathi zakade, okubabantu abanedumo." 
Genesis6:5 Lokha uSomnini nakabona bonyana ubukhohlakali bomuntu bukhulu ephasini nokobana imizindlo yehliziywakhe isophe okumbi ngesikhathi soke," 
Genesis6:6 wazisola bewanyama bona umenzeleni umuntu ephasini. 
Genesis6:7 Yeke uSomnini wathi: “Umuntu engimenzileko ngizomthanyela ebusweni bephasi. Ngizokuthanyela kusukela emuntwini ukuya eenlwaneni, iimphili zoke ezikhakhaba ehlabathini kanye neenyoni zomkayi ngombana ngiyazisola bona ngikudalile koke lokhu.”" 
Genesis6:8 Kodwana uNowa wafunyana umusa emehlweni kaSomnini. 
Genesis6:9 Naku-ke umlando kaNowa: UNowa gade ayindoda elungileko, angasoleki ebantwini besikhathi aphila kiso begodu gade atjhidelene noZimu." 
Genesis6:10 UNowa gade anamadodana amathathu, uTjhemu, uRhamu noJafethi." 
Genesis6:11 Iphasi belonakele phambi kwakaZimu begodu ligcwele umguruguru. 
Genesis6:12 Lokha uZimu nakahlola iphasi, ngambala lalonakele. Iye, boke abantu ebusweni bephasi bebaziphethe ngameswe." 
Genesis6:13 Nje-ke uZimu wathi kuNowa: “Sengiqunte bona ngibaphelise bokanyana nje ngombana iphasi ligcwele umguruguru ngenca yabo. Yelela-ke, ngiqinisile ngizobaphelisa kanye nephasi." 
Genesis6:14 Yeke yewuzenzele umkhumbi ngesigodo segofere, uwenze ube namalawana bese uwusinda ngesikontiri ngaphakathi nangaphandle." 
Genesis6:15 Nasi indlela ozowakha ngayo: Umkhumbi kufuze ube mamitha alikhulu namatjhumi amathathu nahlanu ubude, amamitha amatjhumi amabili nambili nesiquntu ububanzi namamitha alitjhumi nantathu nesiquntu ukuphakama." 
Genesis6:16 Wenzele isivalo ngaphezulu sibe siquntu semitha ukusuka emqoqweni. Umnyangwawo ube ngeqadi bese kuba nemigangadelo emithathu, ongenzasi, ophakathi nongehla." 
Genesis6:17 Mina ngizakunisa umthwalela ephasini bona ngiphelise yoke ipilo engaphasi kwezulu, okuziimbunjwa zoke ezinomphefumulo phezu kwephasi. Koke okusephasini kuzakubhujiswa." 
Genesis6:18 Kodwana ngenza nawe isivumelwano: Wena nomkakho, amadodanakho kanye nabomalukazana bakho kuzakufanela bona ningene emkhunjini." 
Genesis6:19 Kufuze ungenise ngemkhunjini ngakubili kwazo zoke iindalwa eziphilako, kube ngokuduna nokusikazi bonyana kuphile kanye nawe kuphephile." 
Genesis6:20 Iinyoni ngemihlobazo, iinlwana ngemihlobazo kanye neembandana ezikhakhaba phasi ngemihlobazo, koke lokhu akube ngakubili ukwenzela bonyana kusinde kanye nawe." 
Genesis6:21 Yeke wena thatha loke ihlobo lokudla ungene nalo bona kube kukudla kwenu nekwazo.” 
Genesis6:22 UNowa wenza koke uZimu agade amyale ngakho. Iye, wakwenza koke." 
Genesis7:1 USomnini wabuya wathi kuNowa: “Ngena ngemkhunjini wena nomzakho woke ngombana ngikufunyene ungolungileko esizukulwanenesi. 
Genesis7:2 Kiwo woke umhlobo weenlwana ezihlambulukileko, thatha ngazimbili zibe likhomba, eduna nesikazayo, kodwana kwezingakahlambuluki uthathe ngazimbili kube ngesiduna nesisikazi." 
Genesis7:3 Godu nemihlobeni yazo zoke iinyoni, thatha zibe likhomba eziduna nalikhomba ezisikazi ukuqinisekisa bonyana zihlala zikhona ephasini mazombe." 
Genesis7:4 Iye, emalangeni alikhomba kusukela nje, ngizokuthumela izulu ephasini elizakuna amalanga amatjhumi amane, imini nobusuku. Ngizokuthanyela ebusweni bephasi koke okuphilako engikubumbileko.”" 
Genesis7:5 UNowa wenza koke uSomnini amyala ngakho. 
Genesis7:6 UNowa gade aneminyaka emakhulu asithandathu lokha umthwalela nawufika ephasini. 
Genesis7:7 Yena nomkakhe, amadodanakhe kanye nabomalokazana bakhe bangena ngemkhunjini kobana basinde emanzini womthwalela." 
Genesis7:8 Ngakubili kweenlwana neembandana ezihlambulukileko nezingakahlambuluki, iinyoni kanye neembandana ezikhakhaba ehlabathini," 
Genesis7:9 okuduna nokusikazi, kwangena noNowa ngemkhunjini kanjengombana uZimu gade ayale uNowa." 
Genesis7:10 Kwathi emva kwamalanga alikhomba amanzi womthwalela afika ephasini. 
Genesis7:11 Kuthe ngomnyaka wamakhulu asithandathu wokuphila kwakaNowa, inyanga yesibili nayinamalanga alitjhumi nalikhomba, kwathumbuka mhlokho yoke imithombo yamanzi amanengi ngaphasi neentunja zemazulwini zatloroza amanzi." 
Genesis7:12 Kwawuluka ephasini izulu elathatha amatjhumi amane wamalanga nobusuku bakhona. 
Genesis7:13 Kwaba kumhlokho-ke mhlana uNowa namadodanakhe, uTjhemu, uRhamu noJafethi, umkakhe nabomalukazana bakhe abathathu bangena ngemkhunjini." 
Genesis7:14 Gade bangene neenyamazana zommango ngemihlobazo, yoke ifuyo ngemihlobayo, zoke iimbandana ezikhakhaba ehlabathini ngemihlobazo, neenyoni zomkayi ngemihlobazo kanye nazo zoke izinto ezinamaphiko." 
Genesis7:15 Koke okudaliweko okunokuphila, kweza ngakubili kuNowa kwangena ngemkhunjini." 
Genesis7:16 Zoke iimphili ebezingena ngemkhunjini bekungesiduna nesisikazi, kanjengombana uZimu agade ayale uNowa. USomnini wavalela uNowa ngaphakathi." 
Genesis7:17 Umthwalela wembatha iphasi amalanga amatjhumi amane. Amanzi aya ngokwanda aphakamisa umkhumbi ehlabathini wazakama. 
Genesis7:18 Aphakama, anda khulu ephasini, umkhumbi wathaya phezu kwawo." 
Genesis7:19 Amanzi akhula khulu ephasini bekwathi zoke iintaba eziphakamileko ngaphasi kwezulu zavaleleka. 
Genesis7:20 Aya ngokwanda njalo aba ngehla kweentaba eziphakeme khulu pheze ngamamitha alikhomba. 
Genesis7:21 Yoke into ephilako ekhambakhamba ephasini yabhubha: iinyoni, ifuyo, iinyamazana, zoke iimphili ezikhakhaba ephasini kanye nabantu boke." 
Genesis7:22 Zafa zoke iimphili ebeziphila ehlabathini eyomileko. 
Genesis7:23 UZimu wathanyela yoke into egade iphila ebusweni bephasi: Ukusukela ebantwini ukuya eenlwaneni, koke okukhakhabako ngitjho neenyoni kwathanyeleka ephasini. Kwasala kwaphela uNowa nalabo agade anabo ngemkhunjini." 
Genesis7:24 Amanzi agubuzesa iphasi amalanga alikhulu namatjhumi amahlanu. 
Genesis8:1 Nje-ke uZimu wakhumbula uNowa neenyamazana zommango kanye nefuyo yoke egade inaye ngemkhunjini. Wathumela ummoya ebusweni bephasi bonyana uvunguze ukuze amanzi athome ukubohla. 
Genesis8:2 Imithombo yamanzi amanengi ngaphasi neentunja zezulu kwavaleka, izulu lathula." 
Genesis8:3 Amanzi aya ngokuya abohla ephasini. Emva kwamalanga alikhulu namatjhumi amahlanu amanzi gade sele ehlile. 
Genesis8:4 Ngelanga lekhomba enyangeni yekhomba umkhumbi wahlala phezu kweentaba ze-Ararathi. 
Genesis8:5 Amanzi aya njalo abohla bekwaba selangeni lokuthoma lenyanga yetjhumi lapha iinqongo zeentaba zathoma khona ukubonakala. 
Genesis8:6 Emva kwamalanga amatjhumi amane uNowa wavula intunja yomkhumbi ebegade ayenze ephahleni. 
Genesis8:7 Wathuma igubulu, laphapha kodwana langasabuyi; lazulazula amanzi abe arhobha ephasini." 
Genesis8:8 Yeke wathumela izuba bonyana liyokuhlola nakube amanzi sele abohlile phezu kwehlabathi. 
Genesis8:9 Kodwana izuba akhange lifunyane indawo yokuhlala ngombana amanzi gade asagubuzese yoke ihlabathi. Ngalokho labuyela kuNowa emkhunjini. Yena welula isandla sakhe walibamba walibuyisela kuye ngemkhunjini. 
Genesis8:10 Walinda amalanga alikhomba, walikhupha izubelo ngemkhunjini, walithuma godu." 
Genesis8:11 Kuthe lokha nalibuyako izuba ntambama, qala, emlonyenalo bekunekari elilihlaza lomuthi we-oliva. Nje-ke uNowa walemuka bonyana amanzi sele abohlile ephasini." 
Genesis8:12 Walinda amanye amalanga alikhomba, wathuma izubelo godu. Kodwana kilelihlandla izuba lakhamba umlibe." 
Genesis8:13 Kwathi ngomnyaka wamakhulu asithandathu nanye kaNowa, ngelanga lokuthoma enyangeni yokuthoma kwabe amanzi arhobhile ephasini. Yeke uNowa wavula umnyango womkhumbi, wabona bonyana ngambala seyomile ihlabathi." 
Genesis8:14 Elangeni lamatjhumi amabili nalikhomba enyangeni yesibili iphasi besele lome kere. 
Genesis8:15 Nje-ke uZimu wakhuluma noNowa wathi: 
Genesis8:16 “Phuma ngemkhunjini wena nomkakho, amadodanakho kanye nabomalukazana bakho." 
Genesis8:17 Zoke iimphili ezinawe, okutjho iinyoni, iinlwana neembandana zoke ezikhakhaba ehlabathini aziphume kanye nawe ukuze zizale iphasi lokhe zizalane zande ngesibalo phezu kwalo.”" 
Genesis8:18 Yeke uNowa waphuma yena nomkakhe, amadodanakhe kanye nabomalukazana bakhe." 
Genesis8:19 Baphuma ngemkhunjini nazo zoke iinlwana neembandana ezikhakhaba ehlabathini kanye neenyoni zoke, koke okukhambakhamba ephasini ngemihlobo yakhona." 
Genesis8:20 Nje-ke uNowa wakhela uSomnini i-aldari, wathatha kizo zoke iinlwana neenyoni ezihlambulukileko, wanikela umhlabelo wokutjhiswa kilo." 
Genesis8:21 USomnini wezwa umnuko omnandi wathi ehliziywenakhe: “Angisoze nganikelela ihlabathi ngenca yomuntu, nanyana imizindlo yomuntu imimbi kwasebuntwaneni bakhe. Angisoze godu ngabhubhisa iinlwana njengombana ngenzile." 
Genesis8:22 “Qobe iphasi lisekhona, ukutjala nokuvuna, amakhaza nokutjhisa, ihlobo nobusika, imini nobusuku akusoze kwaphela.”" 
Genesis9:1 Nje-ke uZimu wabusisa uNowa namadodanakhe, wathi kibo: “Belethani nande nizalise iphasi." 
Genesis9:2 Zoke iinlwana zephasi, iinyoni zomkayi neembandana zoke ezikhakhaba ehlabathini, iinhlambi zoke zelwandle zizakwethukwa zesabe ngani; zona-ke ngizinikele ezandleni zenu." 
Genesis9:3 Yoke into ephilako nekhambako izakuba kukudla kwenu. Njengombana nganinikela iintjalo ezilihlaza, njenganje ngininikela koke." 
Genesis9:4 “Kodwana akukameli nidle inyama eneengazi ngombana eengazini kunepilo. 
Genesis9:5 Ngiqinisile, lokha iingazi nazithululwako, ngizazibiza kozithululako. Kungaba silwana namkha umuntu nakasusa ipilo yenu, kuzakuba mlandu. Iye, umuntu osusa ipilo yomfowabo ngizakubiza neengazi zomfowabo kuye." 
Genesis9:6 “ ‘Othulula iingazi zomuntu uzakugwetjwa nezakhe iingazi zithululwe phambi kwabantu.’ “Lokhu kunjalo ngombana umuntu wenziwa ngomfanekiso kaZimu. 
Genesis9:7 Nina-ke belethani nande; yandani ephasini nilizalise.” 
Genesis9:8 Nje-ke uZimu wathi kuNowa namadodanakhe: 
Genesis9:9 “Mina-ke ngenza nani isivumelwano sami nesizukulwana senu esizakunilandela. 
Genesis9:10 Godu kuzakuba sivumelwano kanye neendalwa zoke ezikanye nani, okutjho iinyoni, ifuyo, neenlwana zoke ezaphuma nawe ngemkhunjini, okungesinye nesinye isidalwa esiphila ephasini." 
Genesis9:11 Ngijamisa isivumelwano sami nani: Angeze bekusenzeka bona kubhujiswe ipilo ngamanzi womthwalela. Iye, godu nomthwalela awusoze usabhubhisa iphasi.”" 
Genesis9:12 UZimu wathi: “Nanti itshwayo lesivumelwano engisenza phakathi kwami nani naphakathi kweendalwa zoke ezinani, okusivumelwano seenzukulwana ngeenzukulwana:" 
Genesis9:13 Ngibeka izungu leKosi emafini, lizakuba litshwayo lesivumelwano phakathi kwami nephasi." 
Genesis9:14 Ngaso soke isikhathi lokha nangiveza amafu wezulu phezu kwephasi bese kubonakala izungu leKosi 
Genesis9:15 ngizakukhumbula isivumelwano sami nani neendalwa eziphilako zemihlobo yoke. Amanzi awasoze abe mthwalela wokubhubhisa zoke iimphili. 
Genesis9:16 Lokha izungu leKosi nalibonakala emafini, ngizalibona bese ngikhumbula isivumelwano sanini nanini phakathi kwakaZimu neendalwa zomhlobo woke ophila ephasini.”" 
Genesis9:17 UZimu wathi kuNowa: “Leli litshwayo lesivumelwano engisijamise phakathi kwami nepilo yoke ephasini.” 
Genesis9:18 Amadodana kaNowa aphuma emkhunjini nguTjhemu, uRhamu noJafethi. URhamu gade anguyise kaKanana." 
Genesis9:19 Lawo bekumadodana amathathu kaNowa, okwathi kiwo kwavela boke abasabalala nephasi." 
Genesis9:20 UNowa wathoma ukuba mlimi. Watjala isidiribe 
Genesis9:21 bewasela iwayini laso. Wadakwa kangangobana walala ngetendeni lakhe abhunubhunu. 
Genesis9:22 URhamu, uyise kaKanana, wabona ububhunubhunu bakayise, watjela abafowabo ababili ebebangaphandle." 
Genesis9:23 UTjhemu noJafethi bathatha ingubo bayiphakamisela emahlombabo; bakhamba sinyava bangena babhibha ububhunubhunu bakayisabo. Ubuso babo bebufulathele ukuze bangaboni ububhunubhunu bakayisabo. 
Genesis9:24 Kuthe lokha uNowa nakaqaquluka ewayinini lakhe nokufunyana bona yenzeni kuye indodanakhe encani," 
Genesis9:25 wathi: “Akanikelelwe uKanana! Uzakuba likhoboka lakokhoboka kibomnakwabo.” 
Genesis9:26 Godu wathi: “Akudunyiswe uSomnini uZimu kaTjhemu! UKanana uzakuba likhoboka lakaTjhemu. 
Genesis9:27 UZimu uzakwelula imikhawulo kaJafethi; abe sithekeli ematendeni kaTjhemu. UKanana uzakuba likhoboka lakaJafethi.” 
Genesis9:28 Emva komthwalela uNowa waphila iminyaka emakhulu amathathu namatjhumi amahlanu. 
Genesis9:29 Yoke iminyaka uNowa ayiphilako imakhulu alithoba namatjhumi amahlanu, emva kwalokho wahlongakala." 
Genesis10:1 Naku-ke umlando kaTjhemu, uRhamu noJafethi, amadodana kaNowa: Babelethelwa abantwana emva komthwalela." 
Genesis10:2 Iinzukulwana zakaJafethi bekunguGomere, uMagogi, uMadayi, uJavani, uTubali, uMetjheki noTirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Iinzukulwana zakaGomere bekungu-Atjhikenazi, uRifathi noTogarima." 
Genesis10:4 Iinzukulwana zakaJavani bekungu-Elitjha, uTaratjhitjhi, amaKithi namaDodani." 
Genesis10:5 Kilabo kwavela abantu abahlala ngokusabalala eduze kwelwandle bonyana kuthi ngemva kwesikhathi ikoro enye nenye yabantwabo ikhulume ilimi layo enarhenayo. 
Genesis10:6 Iinzukulwana zakaRhamu bekunguKutjhe, uGibhide, uPhuthi noKanana." 
Genesis10:7 Iinzukulwana zakaKutjhe bekunguSeba, uRhavila, uSabeta, uRama noSabiteka. Iinzukulwana zakaRama kunguTjheba noDedani." 
Genesis10:8 UKutjhe godu wabeletha uNimrodi owaba yindlhondlho yokuthoma ephasini. 
Genesis10:9 Gade amuzumi onamandla nowaziwako, kungebangelo kuthiwa: “NjengoNimrodi umzumi onamandla khulu.”" 
Genesis10:10 Ikaba yombuswakhe beyiseBhabheli, e-Ereke, e-Akadi neKaline enarheni yeTjhinari." 
Genesis10:11 Ukusukela lapho umbuswakhe wanabela e-Asiriya, lapha akha khona iNiniva, iRerhobhothi, i-Iri neKalarha" 
Genesis10:12 kanye neReseni, idorobho elikhulu phakathi kweNiniva neKalarha." 
Genesis10:13 UGibhide gade anguyise wamaLudi, ama-Anamu, amaLehabi, amaNafiturhi," 
Genesis10:14 amaPatrusi, amaKasilurhi (lapha amaFilista avela khona) namaKafitori." 
Genesis10:15 UKanana wabeletha uTsidoni izibulo lakhe walanywa nguRhethi," 
Genesis10:16 godu waba nguyise wamaJebusi, ama-Amori, amaGirigatjhi," 
Genesis10:17 amaRhivi, ama-Ariki, amaSini," 
Genesis10:18 ama-Arivadi, amaTsemari namaRhamathi. Emva kwalokho iinkoro zamaKanana zasabalala." 
Genesis10:19 Imikhawulo yamaKanana yanaba ukusuka eTsidoni ukufika eGerari ngitjho nakude ukuya eGaza. Ukusuka lapho beyinabela eSodoma, eGomora, e-Adama, eTseboyimu ukuyokubetha eLatjha." 
Genesis10:20 Lezo bekuziinzukulwana zakaRhamu ngokuya ngezizwe neenkoro zazo namalimazo eenarheni zazo. 
Genesis10:21 UTjhemu ongumnakwabo lakaJafethi, naye wabelethelwa amadodana. Yena ungukhokho wazo zoke iinzukulwana zaka-Ebhere." 
Genesis10:22 Amadodana kaTjhemu bekungu-Elamu, u-Atjhuri u-Aripakitjhadi, uLudi, no-Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Amadodana ka-Aramu bekungu-Utsi, uRhuli, uGeteri noMatjhi." 
Genesis10:24 U-Aripakitjhadi wabeletha uTjhelarhi. UTjhelarhi wabeletha u-Ebhere. 
Genesis10:25 U-Ebhere wabeletha amadodana amabili, enye beyibizwa bona nguPelegi ngombana ngeenkhathi zakhe izizwe zephasi bezihlukene. Umnakwabo gade abizwa bona nguJokhithani." 
Genesis10:26 UJokhithani wabeletha u-Almodadi, uTjhelefi, uRhatsarimavethi, uJerarhi," 
Genesis10:27 uHadoramu, u-Uzali, uDikhila," 
Genesis10:28 u-Obhali, u-Abimayeli, uTjheba," 
Genesis10:29 u-Ofira, uRhavila noJobabi. Boke labo bekumadodana kaJokhithani." 
Genesis10:29 u-Ofira, uRhavila noJobabi. Boke labo bekumadodana kaJokhithani." 
Genesis10:30 Isifunda agade ahlala kiso besinabe ukusuka eMetjha ukuya eSefari eentabeni zepumalanga. 
Genesis10:31 Lezo bekuziinzukulwana zakaTjhemu ngokuya ngezizwe neenkoro zazo namalimazo eenarheni zazo. 
Genesis10:32 Lezo-ke bekuziinkoro ezadabuka emadodaneni kaNowa ngokuya ngokulandelana kwazo ezizweni zazo. Ukusukela kilezonkoro, izizwe zasabalala nephasi loke emva komthwalela." 
Genesis11:1 Iphasi loke belinelimi linye nekulumo yinye. 
Genesis11:2 Kwathi lokha abantu nabakhambakhamba ngepumalanga, bafunyana ibala enarheni yeTjhinari, banzinza lapho." 
Genesis11:3 Bathi omunye komunye: “Yizani senzeni iintina sizibhage ziqine.” Basebenzisa iintina esikhundleni samatje, isikontiri esikhundleni sedaka." 
Genesis11:4 Bathi: “Yizani sizakhele idorobho libe nombhotjhongo ophakamela ezulwini. Lokhu kuzasenzela ibizo begodu singasabalali nephasi loke.” 
Genesis11:5 Nje-ke uSomnini wehla bonyana azokubona idorobho nombhotjhongo ogade wakhiwa babantu. 
Genesis11:6 USomnini wathi: “Akhese nithi niyaqala, abantwaba bamunye begodu boke bakhuluma limi linye. Yeke bazakghona ukwenza nanyana yini abayitlamako." 
Genesis11:7 Nambani sehleni, sifese siraranise ilimi labo ukuze bangasakwazi ukuzwana nabakhulumisanako.”" 
Genesis11:8 Ukusuka lapho uSomnini wabasabalalisa iphasi loke, bebalisa ukwakha idorobho." 
Genesis11:9 Kungebangelo libizwa bona yiBhabheli ngombana lapho uSomnini wararanisa ilimi labantu boke begodu ukusuka lapho wabasabalalisa iphasi loke. 
Genesis11:10 Naku-ke umlando weenzukulwana zakaTjhemu: Iminyaka emibili emva komthwalela, lokha uTjhemu nakaneminyaka elikhulu ubudala, wabeletha u-Aripakitjhadi." 
Genesis11:11 Emva kobana abelethe u-Aripakitjhadi, uTjhemu waphila iminyaka emakhulu amahlanu. Wabeletha amanye amadodana namadodakazi." 
Genesis11:12 Kuthe lokha u-Aripakitjhadi naneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu namihlanu wabeletha uTjhelarhi. 
Genesis11:13 Emva kobana abelethe uTjhelarhi, u-Aripakitjhadi waphila iminyaka emakhulu amane nantathu. Wabeletha amanye amadodana namadodakazi." 
Genesis11:14 Kuthe lokha uTjhelarhi naneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu wabeletha u-Ebhere. 
Genesis11:15 Emva kobana abelethe u-Ebhere, uTjhelarhi waphila iminyaka emakhululu amane namithathu. Wabeletha amanye amadodana namadodakazi." 
Genesis11:16 Kuthe lokha u-Ebhere naneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu nane wabeletha uPelegi. 
Genesis11:17 Emva kobana abelethe uPelegi, u-Ebhere waphila iminyaka emakhulu amane namatjhumi amathathu. Wabeletha amanye amadodana namadodakazi." 
Genesis11:18 Kuthe lokha uPelegi naneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu wabeletha uRewu. 
Genesis11:19 Emva kobana abelethe uRewu, uPelegi waphila iminyaka emakhulu amabili nethoba. Wabeletha amanye amadodana namadodakazi." 
Genesis11:20 Kuthe lokha uRewu naneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu nambili wabeletha uSerugu. 
Genesis11:21 Emva kobana abelethe uSerugu, uRewu waphila iminyaka emakhulu amabili namikhomba. Wabeletha amanye amadodana namadodakazi." 
Genesis11:22 Kuthe lokha uSerugu naneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu wabeletha uNarhori. 
Genesis11:23 Emva kobana abelethe uNarhori, uSerugu waphila iminyaka emakhulu amabili. Wabeletha amanye amadodana namadodakazi." 
Genesis11:24 Kuthe lokha uNarhori naneminyaka ematjhumi amabili nethoba wabeletha uTerarhi. 
Genesis11:25 Emva kobana abelethe uTerarhi, uNarhori waphila iminyaka elikhulu netjhumi nethoba. Wabeletha amanye amadodana namadodakazi." 
Genesis11:26 Kuthe lokha uTerarhi naneminyaka ematjhumi alikhomba wabeletha u-Abramu, uNarhori noHarana." 
Genesis11:27 Naku-ke umlando kaTerarhi: UTerarhi wabeletha u-Abramu, uNarhori noHarana. UHarana wabeletha uLothi." 
Genesis11:28 UHarana wahlongakalela e-Uri lamaKasidi, inarha abelethelwa kiyo, uyise uTerarhi asaphila." 
Genesis11:29 U-Abramu noNarhori bathatha abafazi bobabili. Ibizo lomka-Abramu bekunguSarayi, lomkaNarhori kunguMilika ogade ayindodakazi kaHarana. UHarana gade anguyise kaMilika noJisika." 
Genesis11:30 USarayi gade ayinyumba, ubenganaye umntwana." 
Genesis11:31 UTerarhi wathatha indodanakhe u-Abramu nomntanomntanakhe uLothi umsa kaHarana kanye nomalukazanakhe uSarayi umka-Abramu; boke baphuma e-Uri lamaKasidi batjhinga eKanana. Kodwana kuthe nabafika eRharana, bafese banzinza lapho." 
Genesis11:32 UTerarhi waphila iminyaka emakhulu amabili nahlanu, wahlongakalela eRharana." 
Genesis12:1 USomnini wathi ku-Abramu: “Tjhiya inarhekhenu, abantu bekhenu nendlu kayihlo, uye enarheni engizakutjengisa yona." 
Genesis12:2 Ngizokwenza ube sisizwe esikhulu, begodu ngizokubusisa: Ngizokwenza ibizo lakho libe likhulu, ube sibusiso." 
Genesis12:3 Ngizokubusisa abakubusisako, nabakunyazako ngizabanikelela; zoke iinkoro zephasi zikhanukele ukubusiswa njengawe.”" 
Genesis12:4 Nje-ke u-Abramu waphuma njengombana uSomnini gade atjhwile kuye, uLothi waphuma naye. U-Abramu gade aneminyaka ematjhumi alikhomba namihlanu lokha nakatjhiya iRharana." 
Genesis12:5 Wathatha umkakhe uSarayi, umntakamfowabo uLothi, yoke ifuywabo egade bayibuthelele eRharana kanye namakhoboka abawazuza lapho. Baphuma balunga enarheni yeKanana. Kuthe lokha nabafika eKanana," 
Genesis12:6 u-Abramu waratha inarha ukuyela ngemthini omkhulu weMore eTjhekemu. Ngesikhatheso amaKanana gade asenarhenapho. 
Genesis12:7 USomnini wabonakala ku-Abramu khonapho wathi: “Nginikela isizukulwana sakho inarha le.” Nje-ke u-Abramu wakhela uSomnini owabonakala kuye i-aldari lapho. 
Genesis12:8 Ukusuka lapho kwafanela bona aragele phambili ukuyela ngentatjaneni engepumalanga yeBhethe-Eli. Wafese wahloma itende lakhe lapho, iBhethe-Eli ayiqalela ngetjingalanga, i-Ayi ngepumalanga. Khonapho u-Abramu wakhela uZimu i-aldari bewamthandaza." 
Genesis12:9 Emva kwalokho waragela phambili ukuyela ngesewula yeKanana. 
Genesis12:10 Bekukhona indlala enarheni. Ngebanga lokobana indlala beyirhagele khulu, u-Abramu kwambiza bona ehlele eGibhide ayokukhonza lapho." 
Genesis12:11 Kuthe nasele abandamele ukungena eGibhide, wathi kuSarayi umkakhe: “Ngiyazi bona umfazi omuhle kangangani," 
Genesis12:12 yeke lokha amaGibhide nakakubonako azokuthi, ‘Lo, mfazakhe.’ Nje-ke bazongibulala mina kodwana wena bakulise uphile." 
Genesis12:13 Manje-ke wena yithi kibo, ungudadwethu ukuze ngiphathwe kuhle ngenca yakho nepilwami isinde ngawe.”" 
Genesis12:14 Kuthe lokha nabangena eGibhide, amaGibhide abona bonyana mbala simomondiya somfazi." 
Genesis12:15 Kwathi lokha iinduna zakaFaro nazimbonako, zambuka khulu kuFaro; yeke wathathwa wasiwa esigodlweni." 
Genesis12:16 UFaro waphatha u-Abramu kuhle ngenca kaSarayi, bewaphiwa izimvu neembuzi, iinkomo, abodumbana, iinceku neencekukazi kanye namakamela." 
Genesis12:17 Kodwana uSomnini wehlisela izifo ezesabekako phezu kwakaFaro nomndenakhe ngenca kaSarayi umka-Abramu. 
Genesis12:18 Nje-ke uFaro wabiza u-Abramu, wathi kuye: “Yintobani ongenze yona le? Njekhona kubayini ungangitjeli bonyana mkakho lo?" 
Genesis12:19 Wenzeleleni uthi, ‘Ngudadwethu lo,’ beze ngimthathe abe mkami? Nje-ke, nangu umfazakho, mthathe ukhambe!”" 
Genesis12:20 Ngelizwi lakaFaro u-Abramu nomkakhe nakho koke anakho bakhutjhwa eGibhide. 
Genesis13:1 Nje-ke u-Abramu wanyuka asuka eGibhide yena nomkakhe kanye nakho koke egade kungekwakhe wanqomba ngesewula yeKanana. ULothi naye wakhamba naye. 
Genesis13:2 U-Abramu wanjinga khulu ngefuyo, ngesiliva nangegolide." 
Genesis13:3 Ukusuka ngesewula wakhamba iindawo ngeendawo ukuyela ngeBhethe-Eli, lapha itende lakhe belikhona phambilini phakathi kweBhethe-Eli ne-Ayi." 
Genesis13:4 Endaweni lapha akha khona i-aldari phambilini wafese wathandaza uSomnini. 
Genesis13:5 ULothi ogade asoloko agega no-Abramu, naye gade anezimvu, iimbuzi, iinkomo namatende." 
Genesis13:6 Inarha akhange isabanela bona bangahlala bobabili. Bebanefuyo enengi sele kungasakghoneki bona ingakarula ndawonye. 
Genesis13:7 Nje-ke kwavela ukurhitjhana phakathi kwabelusi baka-Abramu nebakaLothi. Ngesikhatheso amaKanana namaPerizi nawo gade asahlala enarhenapho. 
Genesis13:8 Yeke u-Abramu wathi kuLothi: “Akungabi khona ukurhitjhana phakathi kwami nawe namkha phakathi kwabelusi bami nebakho ngombana thina sibomfo. 
Genesis13:9 Yeke kungcono sihlukane mfo. Ummango unabile. Wena nawukhetha ihlangothi langetlhagwini, mina ngizakuthatha langesewula. Nawukhetha ihlangothi langesewula, mina ngizakuthatha langetlhagwini.”" 
Genesis13:10 Kodwana uLothi waphakamisela amehlo ngepumalanga, wabona umrhoba weJordani bona uswakamile. Ngaphambi kobana uSomnini atjhabalalise iSodoma neGomora umrhoba weJordani nca ngeTsowari bewunjengesivande sakaZimu nanjengenarha yeGibhide." 
Genesis13:11 Yeke uLothi wazikhethela woke umrhoba weJordani. Wanqomba ngepumalanga. Bahlukana njalo-ke abafo laba: 
Genesis13:12 U-Abramu wahlala enarheni yeKanana, uLothi wayokuhlala emrhobeni weJordani. Wahloma amatendakhe hlanu kwamadorobho ukuyela ngeSodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Abantu beSodoma bebakhohlakele begodu bebasona khulu kuSomnini. 
Genesis13:14 UZimu wakhuluma no-Abramu emva kobana uLothi ahlukene naye wathi: “Phakamisa amehlwakho lapho ukhonapho uqale ngetlhagwini nesewula, epumalanga netjingalanga," 
Genesis13:15 ngombana yoke inarha oyibonako le ngikunikela yona wena neenzukulwana zakho nini nanini. 
Genesis13:16 Ngizakwenza isizukulwana sakho sibe ngangethuli lehlabathi ukuze kuthi nange kungaba nomuntu obala ithuli lehlabathi, khona-ke neenzukulwana zakho zingabaleka." 
Genesis13:17 Yeke sikima, udabule inarha ubude nobubanzi bayo ngombana ngiyinikela wena.”" 
Genesis13:18 Nje-ke u-Abramu wathutha amatendakhe wayokuhlala eduze nemithi yeMamre eRhebroni, lapha akhela khona uSomnini i-aldari." 
Genesis14:1 Kilesisikhathi u-Amrafeli ikosi yeTjhinari, u-Ariyoki ikosi ye-Elasari, uKedorolawomeri ikosi ye-Elamu noTidali ikosi yeGoyimu" 
Genesis14:2 basahlela uBhera ikosi yeSodoma, uBhiritjha ikosi yeGomora, uTjhinabu ikosi ye-Adma, uTjhemebheri ikosi yeTseboyimu nekosi yeBhela okuyiTsowari." 
Genesis14:3 Woke amakhosi lawo ahlangana aba libutho emrhobeni weSidimu okuliLwandle leTswayi namhlanje. 
Genesis14:4 Amakhosi lawo gade aziinkhonzi zakaKedorolawomeri iminyaka elitjhumi nambili, kwathi emnyakeni wetjhumi nantathu amhlubuka." 
Genesis14:5 Ngomnyaka wetjhumi nane, uKedorolawomeri namakhosi agade alibutho naye basahlela bebahlula amaRefayi ange-Atjhiterothi-Kharinayimu, amaZuzi ngeHamu, ama-Emi ngeTjhave-Khiriyatayimu" 
Genesis14:6 namaRhori eentatjaneni zenarha yeSeyiri ukuyela nge-Eli-Parana eduze kwerhalawumba. 
Genesis14:7 Bajika babuyela emuva baya e-Eni-Mitjhipathi okuyiKhadetjhi, bahlula yoke imikhawulo yama-Amalekhi kanye nama-Amori agade ahlala ngeRhatsetsoni-Tamari." 
Genesis14:8 Nje-ke ikosi yeSodoma yarhwanta yahlela ipi ngemrhobeni weSidimu isekelwe yikosi yeGomora, ye-Adma, yeTseboyimu neyeBhela okuyiTsowari." 
Genesis14:9 Wona gade ajamelene noKedorolawomeri ikosi ye-Elamu, uTidali ikosi yeGoyimu, u-Amrafeli ikosi yeTjhinari no-Ariyoki ikosi ye-Elasari, kwaba makhosi amane ajamelene namahlanu." 
Genesis14:10 Umrhoba weSidimu bewuzele amadonga lapha kwenjiwa khona isikontiri. Nje-ke kwathi lokha amakhosi weSodoma neGomora nakabalekako, amanye wamajonawo awela ngakiwo, amanye abalekela eentatjaneni." 
Genesis14:11 Amakhosi amane aphanga yoke ifuyo yeSodoma neGomora ngitjho kanye nokudla, akhamba." 
Genesis14:12 Godu bathatha noLothi umntakamfowabo laka-Abramu nefuywakhe ngombana gade ahlala eSodoma. 
Genesis14:13 Owaphunyurhako weza wazokubikela u-Abramu omHebheru indaba leyo. Ngesikhatheso u-Abramu gade ahlala eduze kwemithi kaMamre umAmori omfowabo laka-Etjhikolo no-Aneri. Boke labo bebalijima no-Abramu. 
Genesis14:14 Kuthe bona u-Abramu ezwe bonyana umntakamfowabo uthunjiwe, wahlomisa iinceku ezithembekileko ezazibelethelwe emzinakhe. Walandelela amakhosi lawo bekwaba seDani akhamba namadoda amakhulu amathathu netjhumi nobunane." 
Genesis14:15 Kwathi phakathi kobusuku, u-Abramu wahlela iinceku zakhe ngeenqhema. Wasahlela amakhosi lawo, wawagijimisa ukufika eRhoba, etlhagwini yeDamaseku." 
Genesis14:16 Wabuyisa yoke ifuyo kanye noLothi umntakamfowabo nefuywakhe sekufakwa hlangana abafazi nabanye abantu beSodoma. 
Genesis14:17 Kuthe bona u-Abramu abuye ekuhluleni uKedorolawomeri namakhosi ajame naye, ikosi yeSodoma yaphuma bona imhlangabeze ngemrhobeni weTjhave okumrhoba wekosi." 
Genesis14:18 UMalkitsedekhi ikosi yeSalema ogade amphristi kaZimu ongoPhezulu, wamlethela isikwa newayini." 
Genesis14:19 Yena wabusisa u-Abramu wathi: “U-Abramu akabusiswe nguZimu ongoPhezulu uMdali wezulu nephasi. 
Genesis14:20 Akudunyiswe uZimu ongoPhezulu onikele izitha zakho esandleni sakho.” Yeke u-Abramu wamnikela kwetjhumi kwakho koke. 
Genesis14:21 Ikosi yeSodoma yathi ku-Abramu: “Nginikela abantu bese wena uzigcinela ifuyo.” 
Genesis14:22 Kodwana u-Abramu wathi ekosini yeSodoma: “Sengiphakamisele isandla sami kuSomnini uZimu ongoPhezulu, uMdali wezulu nephasi," 
Genesis14:23 ngafunga bonyana angisoze ngamukela litho okungelakho, ngitjho nanyana kungaba mumucwana namkha umtjana wamapatlagwana ukuze ungazibethi isifuba ngami uthi, ‘Nakungu-Abramu, unjingiswe ngimi.’" 
Genesis14:24 Angifuni litho ngaphandle kwalokho okudliwe ziinceku kanye nesabelo ekungesamadoda akhamba nami okungu-Aneri, u-Etjhikolo noMamre. Labo-ke abafunyane isabelo sabo.”" 
Genesis15:1 Emva kwesikhathi esithileko ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika ku-Abramu ngesambulo lathi: “Ungesabi Abramu. Ngisihlangu sakho, nomvuzwakho uzaba mkhulu.”" 
Genesis15:2 Kodwana u-Abramu wathi: “Somnini, Somandla, kusizani bona uSomnini angiphe umvuzo njengombana ngizakukhamba ngingakatjhiyi intonga ebandla nje begodu nendlalifa yendlwami angithi ngu-Eliyezeri weDamaseku?”" 
Genesis15:3 Godu wathi: “Iye, uSomnini akhange angiphe imbeleko; nje-ke inceku ebelethelwa emzinami izakuba yindlalifami.”" 
Genesis15:4 Yeke ilizwi lakaSomnini leza kuye lathi: “Indoda leyo angekhe ibe yindlalifakho, kodwana indodanakho yeengazi ngiyo ezakuba yindlalifakho.”" 
Genesis15:5 Ngalokho uSomnini wamthatha wamusa ngaphandle kwetende wathi kuye: “Qala phezulu emkayini, ubale iinkwekwezi nakube mbala ungakghona ukuzibala. Sizakuba njalo-ke isizukulwana sakho.”" 
Genesis15:6 U-Abramu wakholwa uSomnini. Yena wambalela bona uqotho. 
Genesis15:7 UZimu wathi ku-Abramu: “NginguSomnini owakukhupha e-Uri lamaKasidi bona ngikuphe inarha le ibe ngeyakho.” 
Genesis15:8 Kodwana u-Abramu wabuza wathi: “Somnini, Somandla, ngizakwazi ngani bona izakuba ngeyami?”" 
Genesis15:9 USomnini wamphendula wathi: “Ngilethela ithole, imbuzi neqama, zoke njalo kufuze zibe neminyaka emithathu ubudala begodu uzilethe nezuba nesagwayi.”" 
Genesis15:10 U-Abramu wakuletha koke lokho kuZimu. Wahlahlela iinlwana phakathi, walunganisa amahlangothazo. Kodwana iinyoni zona akhange azihlahlele phakathi." 
Genesis15:11 Amadlanga ehla bona adle inyama leyo, u-Abramu wawaqotjha." 
Genesis15:12 Yeke kuthe ilanga nalitjhingako wabanjwa buthongo obukhulu; khonapho wafikelwa kukwesaba ngombana gade kunzima tshu. 
Genesis15:13 USomnini wathi kuye: “Yazi mbala bona iinzukulwana zakho zizakuba ziinkhonzi enarheni engasiyo yazo. Zizakulotjha abantu benarha leyo abazazigandelela iminyaka emakhulu amane. 
Genesis15:14 Kodwana ngizakugweba isizwe esibagandelelekweso bekuthi nabaphumako enarheni leyo, baphume nefuyo enengi." 
Genesis15:15 Wena ngokwakho uzakuhlongakala ngokuthula, ubulungwe sewuluphele khulu." 
Genesis15:16 Kuzakuthi esizukulwaneni sesine, abantwabakho babuye godu lapha ngombana ngesikhatheso izono zama-Amori zizabe sele zifike esilinganisweni esipheleleko.”" 
Genesis15:17 Kuthe bona ilanga litjhinge sele kurhwalele, qala kwakhamba umtjhitjhi wentuthu nesihlothi esivuthako hlangana namahlangothi weenyama." 
Genesis15:18 Khona mhlokho uSomnini wenza isivumelwano no-Abramu wathi: “Ngithembisa ukunikela iinzukulwana zakho inarha le kusukela emlanjeni weGibhide ukuyofika emlanjeni omkhulu, iYufrathe," 
Genesis15:19 okutjho inarha yamaKheni, yamaKhenizi, yamaKhadimoni," 
Genesis15:20 yamaRhithi, yamaPerizi, yamaRefayi," 
Genesis15:21 yama-Amori, yamaKanana, yamaGirigatjhi neyamaJebusi.”" 
Genesis16:1 USarayi, umka-Abramu, azange akhe abelethe umntwana. Begade anekhobokakazi lomGibhide, libizwa bona nguHagari." 
Genesis16:2 Nje-ke uSarayi wathi ku-Abramu: “Uthi uyabona nje bona uZimu ungivale isibeletho na? Yeke yewungene ikhobokakazi lameli. Mhlamunye lona lingangivusela umndeni.” U-Abramu walalela umkakhe," 
Genesis16:3 yeke uSarayi umka-Abramu wathatha uHagari olikhobokakazi lakhe lomGibhide walinikela ku-Abramu umyenakhe bona abe yisimakhe. Lokhu kwenzeka ngemva kokobana u-Abramu ahlezi eKanana iminyaka elitjhumi. 
Genesis16:4 U-Abramu walala noHagari. UHagari wazithwala. Kuthe lokha nakabona bonyana uzithwele wanyaza uSarayi ikosikazi. 
Genesis16:5 Yeke uSarayi wathi ku-Abramu: “Nguwe ongingeniselele amanzi ngomsele! Mina ngakunikela yena bona umeyame, kodwana soloko azibone bonyana uzithwele, uyanginyaza. Sengathi uSomnini angagweba phakathi kwami nawe.”" 
Genesis16:6 U-Abramu wamphendula wathi: “Usesenamandla kuye godu. Yeke yenza nanyana yini oyithandako ngaye.” Ngalokho uSarayi waphatha uHagari kumbi khulu, wabe wabaleka." 
Genesis16:7 Ingilozi kaSomnini yafunyana uHagari hlanu komthombo oserhalawumbeni; lowo bekumthombo ongeqadi kwendlela eya eTjhuri. 
Genesis16:8 Yathi kuye: “Hagari, khobokakazi lakaSarayi, ubuyaphi, nawulibangisephi?” Waphendula wathi: “Ngibalekela ikosikazi enguSarayi.”" 
Genesis16:9 Ingilozi kaSomnini yathi kuye: “Khamba ubuyele ekosikazini ekuphetheko, ufese uzithobe kiyo.”" 
Genesis16:10 Ingilozi kaSomnini yangezelela yathi: “Ngizokupha iinzukulwana ezinengi kangangobana angekhe kukghonakale bona zibalwe.” 
Genesis16:11 Godu ingilozi kaSomnini yathi: “Njengombana usidisi nje, uzakubeletha indodana uyithiye ibizo bona ngu-Itjhimayeli, ngombana uSomnini usizwile isililo sokurhubutjhwa kwakho." 
Genesis16:12 Indodana leyo izakuba njengodumbana wommango: Isandla sayo sizakujamelana naye woke umuntu, nesandla sabantu boke sijamelane nayo; izakuhlala iphehla inturhu kibo boke abafowayo.”" 
Genesis16:13 UHagari wathi: “Ingabe kuliqiniso bona ngibone umTjhejami lapha na?” Yeke wathiya uSomnini akhuluma naye ibizo wathi: “UnguZimu ongibonako.” 
Genesis16:14 Ngikho umthombo wabizwa bona yiBheyeri-Larhayi-Royi. Umthombo lowo usese phakathi kweKhadetjhi neBeredi. 
Genesis16:15 UHagari wabelethela u-Abramu indodana. Nje-ke u-Abramu wathiya indodanakhe leyo ayibelethelwa nguHagari ibizo bona ngu-Itjhimayeli. 
Genesis16:16 U-Abramu gade aneminyaka ematjhumi abunane nantandathu lokha uHagari nakabeletha u-Itjhimayeli. 
Genesis17:1 Kuthe u-Abramu naneminyaka ematjhumi alithoba nethoba, uSomnini wabonakala kuye wathi: “NginguZimu oSabekako, nawukhamba nami uzakuba msulwa." 
Genesis17:2 Isivumelwano engisijamisa phakathi kwami nawe kukuthi: Ngizakupha iinzukulwana ezinenginengi.” 
Genesis17:3 Yeke u-Abramu wahloma ihloko phasi. UZimu godu wathi kuye: 
Genesis17:4 “Isithembiso sami kuwe siqinile: Uzakuba nguyise wezizwe ezinengi. 
Genesis17:5 Ibizo lakho angekhe lisaba ngu-Abramu, kodwana lizakuba ngu-Abrahamu ngombana ngizakwenza ube nguyise wezizwe ezinengi." 
Genesis17:6 Ngizakupha imbeleko kangangobana kuwe kuzakuvela izizwe ngezizwe; iye, namakhosi azakuvela kuwe." 
Genesis17:7 “Ngizakujamisa isivumelwano phakathi kwami nawe kanye neenzukulwana zakho ngokungapheliko. Kuzakuba sivumelwano sanini nanini: Ngibe nguZimakho noZimu weenzukulwana zakho emva kwakho. 
Genesis17:8 Yoke inarha yeKanana okhonze kiyo le, ngizayipha wena neenzukulwana zakho eziza emva kwakho ibe lilifa lakho neenzukulwana zakho unomphela bengibe nguZimazo.”" 
Genesis17:9 UZimu wathi ku-Abrahamu: “Nawe-ke kufuze ulonde isivumelwano sami, iye, wena neenzukulwana zakho ezizako." 
Genesis17:10 Nasi-ke isivumelwano sami okuzakufanela bona nisilonde wena neenzukulwana zakho eziza emva kwakho: Kufuze kusokwe woke omduna phakathi kwenu. 
Genesis17:11 Nizakusoka ijwabu lakhe, lokhu kube litshwayo lesivumelwano phakathi kwami nani." 
Genesis17:12 Eenzukulwaneni zakho ezizako, kuzakufanela bona nisoke woke omduna onamalanga abunane. Labo abangasizo iinzukulwana zakho, okutjho amakhoboka abelethelwe emzinakho namkha athengwe kebakosozizwe, nabo kufuze basokwe." 
Genesis17:13 Iye, ababelethwe endlinakho namkha obathenge ngemalakho kufuze nakanjani basokwe. Nje-ke isivumelwanesi sizakuba litshwayo elisemzimbenenu nini nanini." 
Genesis17:14 Woke omduna ongasokiko, okungakasuswa kuye ijwabu emzimbenakhe, akasuswe ebantwini bekhabo ngombana wephule isivumelwano sami.”" 
Genesis17:15 UZimu wathi ku-Abrahamu: “Ungasabizi umkakho bona nguSarayi; ukusukela namhlanjesi umbize bona nguSara. 
Genesis17:16 Ngizambusisa, ngikuphe indodana ngaye. Iye, ngizambusisa bona abe ngunina wezizwe; amakhosi wezizwe azakuvela kuye.”" 
Genesis17:17 Yeke u-Abrahamu wahloma ihloko phasi kodwana wahleka ngombana wadlumbana wathi: “Ha! Indoda ibe nomntwana sele ineminyaka elikhulu? NoSara abe nomntwana asele aneminyaka ematjhumi alithoba?” 
Genesis17:18 Nje-ke u-Abrahamu wathi kuZimu: “Kwanga u-Itjhimayeli angafunyana isisa eKosinami!” 
Genesis17:19 Kodwana uZimu wathi: “Awa! Umkakho uSara uzakukubelethela indodana. Ithiye ibizo bona ngu-Isaka. Ngizakujamisa isivumelwano sami naye sibe ngesanini nanini, kanye neenzukulwaneni zakhe emva kwakhe." 
Genesis17:20 Ngisizwile isibawo sakho ngo-Itjhimayeli, nje-ke ngizambusisa ngimuphe abantwana abanengi bengimandise. Uzakubeletha amakhosana alitjhumi nambili, ngimenze isizwe esikhulu." 
Genesis17:21 Kodwana ngizakuqinisa isivumelwano sami nendodanakho u-Isaka ozakubelethwa nguSara ngesikhathesi umnyaka ozako.” 
Genesis17:22 Kuthe bona uZimu aqede ukukhuluma no-Abrahamu, wakhuphuka wamtjhiya." 
Genesis17:23 Khona mhlokho u-Abrahamu wenza njengombana uZimu atjhwile. Wasoka amajwabu wabo boke abaduna emzinakhe: indodanakhe u-Itjhimayeli namakhoboka woke abelethelwe emzinakhe nathengwe ngemalakhe. 
Genesis17:24 U-Abrahamu wasokwa aneminyaka ematjhumi alithoba nethoba," 
Genesis17:25 indodanakhe u-Itjhimayeli beyineminyaka elitjhumi namithathu ubudala nayisokako. 
Genesis17:26 Basokwa bobabili langa linye 
Genesis17:27 kanye nabo boke abaduna abagade basemzinakhe, ababelethelwe emzinakhe nabathengwe ngemali kebakosozizwe." 
Genesis18:1 USomnini wabonakala ku-Abrahamu hlanu kwemithi yeMamre ahlezi phambi komnyango wetende lakhe nelanga libabula kusemini. 
Genesis18:2 Wavusa amehlo msinyazana wabona amadoda amathathu ajame kudanyana phambi kwakhe. Kwathi bona awabone wasuka emnyangweni wetende warhaba wawahlangabeza, waguqa wahloma ihloko phasi." 
Genesis18:3 Wathi: “Bahlonitjhwa, nakube ngifunyene isisa emehlwenenu, bengithi ningadluli incekwenu ngendlela." 
Genesis18:4 Akhe kulethwe amanzana niqophe iinyawo zenu, nizigedle ngaphasi komuthi." 
Genesis18:5 Mina ngizaje nginifunyanela isiphaphatha ukuze nifunyane amandla amatjha. Kuzakuthi emva kwalokho nikwazi ukuragela phambili nekhambo lenu. Angithi ngilo ibanga elinenze nadlula kwamapha?” Wona aphendula athi: “Siyathokoza; siyakwamukela lokho.” 
Genesis18:6 U-Abrahamu warhabela ngetendeni wathi kuSara: “Rhaba uthathe upumpana weflowuru esefiweko, uyibhice wenze iimphaphatha.”" 
Genesis18:7 U-Abrahamu wagijimela emhlambini weenkomo wafese wakhetha ikunzana ehle nenonileko wayinikela inceku yarhaba yayihlaba. 
Genesis18:8 U-Abrahamu wathatha amakghamatha nebisi elihlaza kanye nenyama yekunzana ebe seyilungisiwe, wabeka ukudlokho phambi kwamadoda lawo. Wawatenda ngaphasi komuthapho, adla." 
Genesis18:9 Wona ambuza athi: “Uphi umkakho uSara?” U-Abrahamu waphendula wathi: “Ukhona, ungetendeni.”" 
Genesis18:10 Enye yawo (okutjho uSomnini) yathi: “Ngiqinisile, umnyaka ozako ngesikhathesi ngizakubuya kuwe. USara umkakho uzabe sele anendodana.” USara walalela indaba leyo angetendeni ngemva komnyango." 
Genesis18:11 U-Abrahamu banoSara bebasele baluphele khulu, uSara bekangasayi esikhathini sakhe." 
Genesis18:12 Nje-ke uSara wahleka yedwa adlumbana athi: “Njengombana ngimdala ngiphelile nje, nomyenami naye selaluphele kangaka, uthi ngingabe ngisakitwakitwa yindoda na?”" 
Genesis18:13 Yeke uSomnini wabuza u-Abrahamu wathi: “USara uhlekeleni abe azibuze athi, ‘Kodwana kungenzeka ngibe nomntwana sele ngiluphele kangaka’?" 
Genesis18:14 Kungabe kukhona okungabhalela uSomnini na? Ngesikhathi esifaneleko, umnyaka ozako ngesikhathesi ngizakubuya begodu noSara uzabe sele anendodana.”" 
Genesis18:15 Ngebanga lokobana uSara gade asesaba, wakuphika lokho wathi: “Azange khengihleke mina.” Kodwana uSomnini wathi: “Hawu, Sara, uhlekile.”" 
Genesis18:16 Amadoda lawo asikima akhuphuka bona ayokuqala iSodoma ngenzasi emrhobeni; u-Abrahamu wawaphekelela. 
Genesis18:17 Yeke uSomnini wadlumbana wathi: “Ngingamfihlelelani u-Abrahamu lokho engizokwenza na? 
Genesis18:18 Angithi vele uzokuba nguyise wesizwe esikhulu nesinamandla begodu neenkoro zoke zephasi zikhanukele ukubusiswa njengaye? 
Genesis18:19 Iye, ngimkhethe bona ayale abantwabakhe neenzukulwana zakhe emva kwakhe bonyana babulunge iindlela zami ukuze benze okufaneleko nokulungileko. Khona-ke ngizakwenzela u-Abrahamu engimthembise khona.”" 
Genesis18:20 Nje-ke uSomnini wathi ku-Abrahamu: “Isililo ngeSodoma neGomora sikhulu nesono sakhona sikhulu kangangobana 
Genesis18:21 ngizokwehla bonyana ngiyokuhlola ukuthi ubukhohlakali beSodoma engibubonileko ngebabantu boke na? Nakungasinjalo ngizakwazi bona kufanele ngenzeni.” 
Genesis18:22 Yeke amadoda amabili asuka anqopha ukuyela ngeSodoma, kodwana u-Abrahamu wasala ajame phambi kwakaSomnini." 
Genesis18:23 Kamva watjhidela kuSomnini wambuza wathi: “Ingabe kwamambala uSomnini uzokubhubhisa abalungileko kanye neenkhohlakali na? 
Genesis18:24 Nangabe kungaba khona abantu abamsulwa abamatjhumi amahlanu ngedorobheni, uSomnini uzalibhubhisa na? Angekhe uSomnini ababalele indawo ngebanga labamsulwa abangaphakathi kwayo na?" 
Genesis18:25 Angiboni bona uSomnini angayenza into yokobana abhubhise abamsulwa kanye neenkhohlakali! Akukghoneki lokho! Umgwebi wephasi loke uzagweba ngokulungileko!” 
Genesis18:26 USomnini wathi: “Nakube ngingafumana abantu abamsulwa abamatjhumi amahlanu edorobheni leSodoma, ngizakusindisa yoke indawo ngenca yabo.”" 
Genesis18:27 U-Abrahamu godu wathi: “Ngombana ngibe nesibindi sokukhuluma noSomnini, nanyana ngilithuli nomlotha nje, akhe ngibawe:" 
Genesis18:28 Asithi mhlamunye abamsulwa bazakuba ngaphasana ngabahlanu ematjhumini amahlanu? Nalapho uSomnini uzokubhubhisa idorobho loke ngebanga labahlanu tle?” USomnini waphendula wathi: “Nangingafumana abantu abamatjhumi amane nabahlanu abamsulwa angekhe ngalibhubhisa.” 
Genesis18:29 U-Abrahamu godu wathi kuSomnini: “Alo, mhlamunye nakufunyaneka lapho abantu abamatjhumi amane kwaphela-ke?” USomnini wathi: “Angekhe ngabhubhisa idorobho nangabe kukhona amatjhumi amane.”" 
Genesis18:30 U-Abrahamu wathi: “USomnini angangipheleli ihliziyo hle nangikhulumako godu. Alo, mhlamunye nakufunyaneka lapho abantu abamatjhumi amathathu kwaphela-ke?” USomnini waphendula wathi: “Angekhe ngabhubhisa idorobho nangabe kukhona abamatjhumi amathathu lapho.”" 
Genesis18:31 U-Abrahamu wathi: “Ngombana ngibe nesibindi sokukhuluma noSomnini akhe ngibawe: Asithi-ke mhlamunye kufunyanwe abamatjhumi amabili kwaphela?” USomnini waphendula wathi: “Ngebanga labamatjhumi amabilabo angekhe ngabhubhisa idorobho.” 
Genesis18:32 U-Abrahamu wathi: “USomnini angangipheleli ihliziyo hle, nokho sengikhuluma kwamaphelelo. Alo, mhlamunye nakufunyaneka lapho abantu abalitjhumi kwaphela-ke?” USomnini wathi: “Ngebanga labalitjhumabo angekhe ngabhubhisa idorobho.”" 
Genesis18:33 Kuthe bona uSomnini aqede ukukhuluma no-Abrahamu, wakhamba. U-Abrahamu naye wabuyela ekhaya." 
Genesis19:1 Iingilozi ezimbili zafika eSodoma khona mhlokho ntambama, uLothi begade ahlezi esangweni ledorobho. Kuthe nakazibonako wasikima wayozihlangabeza wafese waguqa phambi kwazo wahloma ihloko phasi." 
Genesis19:2 Wathi kizo: “Bahlonitjhwa, ngiyarabhela hle, phambukelani endlini yencekwenu niqophe iinyawo zenu nilale ubusukobu. Seningavuka ekuseni ningene indlelenu.” Kodwana zaphendula zathi: “Awa, ungatshwenyeki, nokho besingase silale ecabazinapha.”" 
Genesis19:3 ULothi wasoloko azitomatomela bezaphambukela ngakwakhe. Yeke wazilungiselela okugonywako ngokuzibhagela isikwa esinganangumelo, zagoma." 
Genesis19:4 Kwathi iinthekeli zingakayi ukuyolala, kwafika woke amadoda weSodoma ngokungasakhethi, kungamakhulu namancani, aphuma iindawo ngeendawo, abungelela indlu kaLothi." 
Genesis19:5 Abiza uLothi, ambuza athi: “Aphi amadoda aphambukele kwakho lawo, entambama nje? Sikhuphele wona, sifuna ukuwalala!”" 
Genesis19:6 ULothi waphuma ngendlini wavala umnyango," 
Genesis19:7 wathi kiwo: “Bomngani ngiyanirabhela hle, ningenzi ubuhlola obunje!" 
Genesis19:8 Qalani lapha, nginabantazana ababili abasese matlawana. Ngizanikhuphela bona, nje-ke ningenza intando yenu ngabo. Kodwana ningenzi litho ngabantwaba ngombana bangaphasi kwephahla lendlwami.”" 
Genesis19:9 Kodwana amadoda weSodoma athi: “Suka lapha wena.” Arhuwelela athi: “Umrhali lo weza lapha njengesikhonzi, khonanje sele afuna ukuzenza umgwebi! Nakunguwe sizakuhlolela ukudlula amadoda lawo!” Adudulela uLothi emnyango bona awufohloze." 
Genesis19:10 Kodwana amadoda amabili ebegade angendlini, alalamela uLothi, amdosela kiwo ngaphakathi abe avala umnyango." 
Genesis19:11 Abetha woke amadoda wedorobho agade asemnyango lawo ngobuphofu bona angasazi ukuthi umnyango ungakuphi. 
Genesis19:12 Yeke amadoda amabili lawo athi kuLothi: “Kukhona abanye onabo lapha na? Unabakhwenyani, amadodana, amadodakazi nanyana ngiziphi iinhlobo zakho ngedorobhenapha na? Bakhuphe endaweni le," 
Genesis19:13 ngombana sizoyibhubhisa. Sizwakele isililo kuSomnini ngabantu bedorobheli, yeke usithume bona sizolibhubhisa.”" 
Genesis19:14 Yeke uLothi waphuma wakhuluma nabakhwenyani bakhe ebe babone abantazana bakwakhe, wathi kibo: “Rhabani niphume lapha ngombana uSomnini sele abandamele ukuzolibhubhisa idorobheli.” Kodwana bathatha bonyana lihlaya." 
Genesis19:15 Kwathi nakusako iingilozi zarhabisa uLothi zathi: “Yenza msinyana, thatha umkakho namadodakazakho amabili la nibaleke ukuze ningabhubhi ngebanga lezono zedorobheli!”" 
Genesis19:16 Kodwana uLothi wadidizela. Nje-ke amadoda lawo amdzwebula ngomkhono kanye nomkakhe namadodakazakhe amabili abakhuphela ngaphandle kwedorobho, bajama lapho. Lokhu kwenzeka ngombana uSomnini waba nezwelo kuLothi." 
Genesis19:17 Kuthe bona abakhuphele ngaphandle kwedorobho enye yawo yathi: “Balekani, nisindise ipilwenu! Ningaqali emuva beningajami emrhobeni. Balekelani eentatjaneni, khona ningazukubhujiswa.”" 
Genesis19:18 Kodwana uLothi waphendula wathi: “Awa, kungakhe kungaba njalo Kosami, ngiyakurabhela." 
Genesis19:19 Qala, incekwakho ifumene umusa omkhulu phambi kwakho begodu ungitjengise isirhawu esikhulu ngokusindisa ipilwami. Yeke angikwazi ukubalekela eentatjaneneziya ngombana ihlekelele le ingahle ingehlele ngife." 
Genesis19:20 Qala nakuya umuzi oseduze ngaphetjheya begodu mncani nabantu bakhona balidlanzana. Yeke ngivumela ngiphephele kiwo ukuze ipilwami isinde.” 
Genesis19:21 Yona yathi: “Kulungile ngiyavuma, angekhe ngawubhubhisa umuzi owutjhoko lowo." 
Genesis19:22 Kodwana rhaba ubalekele khona ngombana angikwazi ukwenza litho ungakafiki lapho.” (Kungebangelo umuzi lowo wabizwa bona iTsowari.) 
Genesis19:23 Lokha uLothi nakangena eTsowari, ilanga bese liphumile." 
Genesis19:24 Nje-ke uSomnini wanisa isibabuli esivuthako phezu kwedorobho leSodoma neGomora. Umlilo lowo bewehla uvela ezulwini. 
Genesis19:25 USomnini wawarhayila bunjalo-ke amadorobho lawo nemirhula yakhona yoke, boke abahlali bawo kanye neemila zoke zehlabathi." 
Genesis19:26 Kwathi lokha nakwenzeka lokhu, umkaLothi waqala emuva, yeke waphenduka isiduli setswayi." 
Genesis19:27 Ekuseni ngelanga elilandelako u-Abrahamu wavuka wabuyela endaweni lapha agade ajame khona phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Genesis19:28 Waqalela enzasi iSodoma neGomora, inarha nomrhoba woke. Wabona ilifu lentuthu lithunya liphuma ehlabathini njengentuthu yembawula." 
Genesis19:29 Lokha uZimu nakabhubhisa amadorobho womrhoba, lapha bekuhlala khona uLothi, wasindisa uLothi loyo ekubhujisweni. Ngokwenza njalo wakhumbula u-Abrahamu nakarhayila amadorobho lawo." 
Genesis19:30 ULothi gade esaba ukuhlala eTsowari, yeke wakhuphuka wayokuhlala eentabeni, yena namadodakazakhe womabili. Bahlala ngerholweni bobathathu njalo." 
Genesis19:31 Indodakazi ekulu yathi kumntanabo: “Ubaba selaluphele begodu ayikho enye indoda endaweni le esingalala nayo njengemvelo yabantu boke. 
Genesis19:32 Yeke namba, sidakise ubaba ngewayini khona sizakghona ukulalana naye ukuze sizizuzele iinzukulwana ngobabethu lo.”" 
Genesis19:33 Khona ngobusuku bamhlokho baseza uyisabo iwayini. Indodakazi ekulu yangena, yalalana noyise. Kodwana uyise akhange ezwe lokha indodakazi leyo nayilalako nalokha nayivukako." 
Genesis19:34 Ngelanga elilandelako indodakazi ekulu yathi kencani: “Ngilele nobaba izolo ebusuku. Nje-ke asimdakise godu nanamhlanjesi ebusuku bona nawe ulale naye ukuze sobabili sizizuzele iinzukulwana ngobabethu lo.” 
Genesis19:35 Iye, namhlokho baseza uyise iwayini godu, indodakazi encani yazilungiselela, yalalana noyise. Kodwana uyise akhange ezwe lokha indodakazi leyo nayilalako nalokha nayivukako." 
Genesis19:36 Ngokunjalo-ke womabili amadodakazi kaLothi aba sidisi ngemva kokulalana noyise. 
Genesis19:37 Indodakazi ekulu yabeletha indodana yayithiya ibizo lakaMowabi. Waba ngukhokho wamaMowabi wanamhlanje. 
Genesis19:38 Indodakazi encani nayo yabeletha indodana, yayithiya ibizo bona nguBhen-Ami. Yena-ke waba ngukhokho wama-Amoni wanamhlanje." 
Genesis20:1 U-Abrahamu wafuduka eMamre waya esewula yeKanana wafese wahlala hlangana neKadetjhi neTjhuri. Lokha nasese sikhonzi eGerari 
Genesis20:2 wabiza uSara ongumkakhe bona ngudadwabo. Yeke u-Abimeleki, ikosi yeGerari, yathumela iinceku zayo bona ziyokuthatha uSara abe mkayo." 
Genesis20:3 Kodwana ebusuku uZimu wabonakala ku-Abimeleki ngebhudango wathi: “Ufile wena ngebanga lomfazi omthetheko ngombana umfazi lo ungowenye indoda.” 
Genesis20:4 U-Abimeleki bekangakamnamathi, yeke wathi: “Somnini, alo uzakuhlunguphaza abantu abanganamlandu na?" 
Genesis20:5 Angithi ngu-Abrahamu othe kimi uSara ngudadwabo. Naye uSara loyo uthe iye, u-Abrahamu mnakwabo. Nje-ke ngenze lokhu ngesazelo esimsulwa nezandla zami zimhlophe.”" 
Genesis20:6 Yeke uZimu wamphendula ebhudangweni wathi: “Iye, ngiyazi bona ukwenze lokhu ngesazelo esimsulwa. Ngimi okulondileko bona ungenzi isono kimi, ngikho ngingakhange ngikuvumele bona umnamathe." 
Genesis20:7 Nje-ke buyisela umfazi endodenakhe ngombana imuphorofidi begodu izakuthandazela bona uphile. Kodwana nawungambuyiseliko angikutjeli, ngiyakuhlebela uzokufa wena kanye nakho koke kwakho.”" 
Genesis20:8 Kwathi ekuseni ngakusasa u-Abimeleki wabiza iimphathimandla zakhe, kuthe bona azitjele koke okwenzekileko, zethuka kokwethuka." 
Genesis20:9 Yeke u-Abimeleki wabiza u-Abrahamu wambuza wathi: “Yintobani osenze yona le? Ngikwenzeni into embi kangaka bona ungabeze ungibangele isonokazi esingaka nombuswami? Uyazi ungenze into engenziwako.” 
Genesis20:10 Wangezelela wathi: “Ubangelwe yini bona wenze into enje?” 
Genesis20:11 U-Abrahamu waphendula wathi: “Bengizitjela bona akukho nakanye ukwesaba uZimu endaweni le, nje-ke ngadlumbana bona abantu balapha bazangibulala ngenca yomkami lo." 
Genesis20:12 Yena mkami, kodwana eqinisweni ungudadwethu, sibantwana bendoda yinye, sahlukene ngabomma." 
Genesis20:13 Nje-ke kwathi uZimu nangenze bona ngizulazule kude nobuphephelo bendlu kababa, ngathi kuye, ‘Nasi indlela ongabonakalisa ngayo ukwethembeka kimi, nanyana kukuphi lapha siya khona: Batjele bona ngingumnakwenu.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 U-Abimeleki wathatha izimvu, iimbuzi neenkomo kanye namakhoboka namakhobokakazi, wanikela u-Abrahamu lokha nakabuyisela uSara umkakhe kuye." 
Genesis20:15 Wathi ku-Abrahamu: “Inarhami inabile, hlala nanyana kukuphi lapha uthanda khona.”" 
Genesis20:16 KuSara wathi: “Nginikele umnakwenu amakhilogremu alitjhumi nanye nesiquntu wesiliva. Lokhu kulitshwayo lobumsulwa bakho phambi kwabo boke abanawe kanye nabanye abantu.” Ngalokho uSara wahlanjululwa. 
Genesis20:17 U-Abrahamu wathandaza kuZimu. UZimu waphilisa u-Abimeleki, umkakhe kanye namakhobokakazi ukuze kukghoneke ukuba nabantwana godu." 
Genesis20:18 Iye, uSomnini bekavale yoke imbeleko yabantu bengubo esigodlweni saka-Abimeleki ngenca kaSara umka Abrahamu." 
Genesis21:1 USomnini watjheja uSara, wenza kuye njengombana athembisa." 
Genesis21:2 U-Abrahamu gade sele aluphele, uSara waba sidisi, wambelethela indodana ngesikhathi uZimu athi izakubelethwa ngaso." 
Genesis21:3 U-Abrahamu wathiya umsanakhe ambelethelwa nguSara loyo bona ngu-Isaka. 
Genesis21:4 Wasoka u-Isaka, umsanakhe, lokha nakanamalanga abunane njengombana uZimu gade amyalile." 
Genesis21:5 U-Abrahamu besele aneminyaka elikhulu lokha nakabelethelwa u-Isaka, umsanakhe." 
Genesis21:6 USara wathi: “UZimu ungilethele isihleko; woke okuzwako lokhu uzokuhleka nami.” 
Genesis21:7 Godu wathi: “Ngubani obekangatjho ku-Abrahamu bona uSara angabe asamunyisa na? Nokho ngimbelethele indodana asele aluphele.” 
Genesis21:8 Umntwana wakhula. Kwathi mhlana alunyulwako, u-Abrahamu wenza umnyanya omkhulu." 
Genesis21:9 USara wabona u-Itjhimayeli owabelethelwa u-Abrahamu nguHagari umGibhide, ahleka ngokukokomeja." 
Genesis21:10 Wathi ku-Abrahamu: “Qotjha ikhobokakazeli kanye nendodanalo ngombana indodana yekhobokakazeli akukafuzi bona idle ilifa nendodanami, u-Isaka.”" 
Genesis21:11 Lokhu kwamtshwenya u-Abrahamu ngombana u-Itjhimayeli naye bekuyindodanakhe. 
Genesis21:12 Kodwana uZimu wathi ku-Abrahamu: “Ungatshwenyeki ngomsana nekhobokakazi lakho. Yenza koke uSara akutjela khona ngombana iinzukulwana zakho zizokuthiyelelwa ngo-Isaka. 
Genesis21:13 Begodu ngizakwenza nendodana yekhobokakazi bona ibe sisizwe esikhulu ngombana nayo iziingazi zakho.” 
Genesis21:14 Kwathi ekuseni ngelanga elilandelako, u-Abrahamu wathatha isikwa nesikhumba samanzi wakubeka emahlombe kaHagari. Yeke wathi akakhambe nomntwana. Wakhamba-ke uHagari kodwana walahleka erhalawumbeni leBheritjheba." 
Genesis21:15 Kwathi bona amanzi aphele ngesikhumbeni, uHagari watjhiya umntwana ngaphasi komutjhana." 
Genesis21:16 Wakhamba wayozihlalela kudanyana naye ibanga elingaba mujikijelo womsebe ngombana wadlumbana wathi: “Angifuni ukubona umntwana nakahlongakalako.” Kwathi asahlezi lapho, wakhihla isililo." 
Genesis21:17 UZimu wezwa umsana abubula, yeke ingilozi yakaZimu yarhuwelela uHagari isezulwini yathi kuye: “Kwenzenjani ngawe wena Hagari? Ungasabi ngombana uZimu uzwile ukububula komsana lapha alele khona." 
Genesis21:18 Sikima! Khamba usikimise umsana, umbambe ngesandla umqinise ngombana mina ngizomenza abe sisizwe esikhulu.”" 
Genesis21:19 Yeke uZimu wavula amehlwakhe, wabona umthombo wamanzi. Waya wazalisa isikhumba bewaseza nomsana." 
Genesis21:20 UZimu gade anomsana loyo, yeke wakhula kuhle erhalawumbeni. Waba ngusomsebe" 
Genesis21:21 ahlala erhalawumbeni leParana. Unina wamthathela umfazi eGibhide. 
Genesis21:22 Kwathi ngesikhatheso u-Abimeleki nendunakhe emphathi webutho uPhikoli, waya ku-Abrahamu wafese wathi: “Mbala uZimu unawe kikho koke okwenzako ndoda." 
Genesis21:23 Nje-ke funga kimapha ngoZimu bona angekhe ube mkhohlisi kimi, ebantwaneni neenzukulwaneni zami. Njengombana bengithembekile kuwe, nawe thembeka kimi nenarheni okhonze kiyo.”" 
Genesis21:24 U-Abrahamu wathi uzakufunga," 
Genesis21:25 kodwana wakhalala ku-Abimeleki ngomthombo wamanzi obugade uthunjwe ziinsebenzi zaka-Abimeleki. 
Genesis21:26 U-Abimeleki wathi: “Angazi bona ngubani owenze lokhu. Nawe akhange ungitjele ngendaba le, yeke nami ngiyitjhwama namhlanjesi nje.”" 
Genesis21:27 U-Abrahamu wathatha izimvu, iimbuzi neenkomo wazinikela u-Abimeleki. Yeke amadoda amabili lawo enza isivumelwano." 
Genesis21:28 Kodwana u-Abrahamu wagodla iimvana ezisikazi ezilikhomba kilezo azinikele u-Abimeleki. 
Genesis21:29 Khonapho u-Abimeleki wambuza wathi: “Sitjho ukuthini isenzo sakhwesi, sokobana ugodle iimvana ezisikazi ezilikhomba na?”" 
Genesis21:30 U-Abrahamu waphendula wathi: “Nawamukela iimvana ezilikhombezi, khona-ke uzakuba ngufakazami bonyana ngimi owemba umthombo lo.”" 
Genesis21:31 Yeke, indawo leyo yathiywa ibizo bona yiBheritjheba ngombana kwaba kulapha amadoda amabili la enza khona isifungo." 
Genesis21:32 Kwathi emva kokobana sebasenzile isivumelwaneso eBheritjheba, u-Abimeleki noPhikoli induna yebutho babuyela enarheni yamaFilista." 
Genesis21:33 Yeke u-Abrahamu watjala umuthi womtamariski eBheritjheba, bewalotjha uSomnini uZimu onguSiphelani khonapho." 
Genesis21:34 U-Abrahamu wahlala enarheni yamaFilista isikhathi eside. 
Genesis22:1 Emva kwesikhathi esithize uZimu wazizinya u-Abrahamu. Wambiza wathi: “Abrahamu!” U-Abrahamu wasabela wathi: “Somnini, ngilapha.”" 
Genesis22:2 Nje-ke uZimu wathi: “Thatha indodanakho ekukuphela kwayo leyo noyithandako u-Isaka, ukhambe nayo uye endaweni yeMoriya. Ufike lapho uyenze isihlabelo phezu kwenye yeentaba engizakutjengisa yona.”" 
Genesis22:3 Kwathi ekuseni ngakusasa, wavuka wabophela udumbanakhe. Kuthe sele abande iinkuni zomhlabelo, wathatha iinceku ezimbili nendodanakhe u-Isaka, wakhamba waya endaweni uZimu amlayele yona." 
Genesis22:4 Elangeni lesithathu u-Abrahamu waphakamisa amehlo, wayibonela kude indawo leyo." 
Genesis22:5 Nje-ke wathi eencekwini zakhe: “Salani lapha nodumbana, mina nomsana lo sisaya phetjheyapha. Sisayokulotjha khona, sizakubuya godu kinapha.”" 
Genesis22:6 U-Abrahamu wathwesa u-Isaka iinkuni zomhlabelo, yena-ke waphatha umukhwa namalahle avuthako. Bakhamba bobabili njalo." 
Genesis22:7 U-Isaka wabiza uyise wathi: “Baba!” U-Abrahamu wasabela wathi: “Iye ndodanami!” U-Isaka wathi: “Amalahle avuthako neenkuni nanzi sinazo; alo, imvana yomhlabelo yona iphi?”" 
Genesis22:8 U-Abrahamu waphendula wathi: “Ndodanami, uZimu uzazibonela yena imvana yomhlabelo.” Bakhamba bobabili njalo." 
Genesis22:9 Kwathi bona bafike endaweni lapho uZimu abalayele khona, u-Abrahamu wakha i-aldari, wabeka neenkuni phezu kwalo. Wabopha indodanakhe u-Isaka izandla neenyawo, wayilalisa e-aldarini phezu kweenkuni." 
Genesis22:10 Welula isandla wathatha umukhwa bona aqunte indodanakhe intamo. 
Genesis22:11 Kodwana ingilozi kaSomnini yamrhuwelela isezulwini yathi: “Abrahamu! Abrahamu!” Waphendula wathi: “Somnini, ngilapha!”" 
Genesis22:12 USomnini wathi: “Ungabeki isandla sakho phezu komsana! Ungasamenzi litho! Nje-ke sengiyazi bona uyamesaba uZimu ngombana ungakhange ungigodlele indodanakho okukuphela kwayo.” 
Genesis22:13 U-Abrahamu wathi nakaphakamisa amehlo wabona iqama ngemva kwakhe libanjwe ngeempondo emthini ositjhutha. Waya walithatha wenza umhlabelo wokutjhiswa esikhundleni sendodanakhe. 
Genesis22:14 U-Abrahamu wathiya indawo leyo ibizo elithi: “Mbala uSomnini wabonelela.” Njengombana kusatjhiwo nanamhlanjesi kuthiwa: “Entabeni kaSomnini, kuzakubonelelwa.”" 
Genesis22:15 Ingilozi kaSomnini yarhuwelela u-Abrahamu kwesibili isezulwini 
Genesis22:16 yathi: “Ngizifunga ngokwami, kutjho mina uSomnini, njengombana ukwenzile lokhu, wangagodla indodanakho, iye ekukuphela kwayo," 
Genesis22:17 ngiqinisile ngizokubusisa ngenze iinzukulwana zakho zibe njengeenkwekwezi emkayini nanjengetjhwabatjhwaba magegana nelwandle. Iinzukulwana zakho zizakuthumba amadorobho wezitha zazo. 
Genesis22:18 Zoke iinkoro zephasi zikhanukele ukubusiswa njengeenzukulwana zakho ngombana ulalele ilizwi lami.” 
Genesis22:19 Nje-ke u-Abrahamu wabuyela eencekwini zakhe, bakhamba babuyela eBheritjheba, lapha u-Abrahamu anzinza khona." 
Genesis22:20 Isikhatjhana ngemva kwalokho kwabikwa ku-Abrahamu bona uMilika umkaNarhori umfowabo naye ubelethe amadodana. 
Genesis22:21 Wona ngu-Utsi izibulo, uBhuzi umntanabo, uKhemuyeli, uKesedi, uRhazo, uPilidatjhi, uYidilafu noBhetuweli. UMilika wabelethela uNarhori umfowabo ka-Abrahamu abantwana ababunanabo. UKhemuyeli waba nguyise laka-Aramu. UBhetuweli waba nguyise lakaRabega." 
Genesis22:22 URewuma umngena wakaNarhori naye waba namadodana, wona bekunguThebarha, uGarhamu, uTarhatjhi noMaka." 
Genesis23:1 USara waphila iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amabili nalikhomba. 
Genesis23:2 Wahlongakalela eKhiriyathi-Araba okuyiRhebroni enarheni yeKanana. U-Abrahamu wangena ngetendeni lakaSara bona amhloboke abe amlilele. 
Genesis23:3 Kuthe bona asikime hlanu kwesidumbu somkakhe wakhamba wayokukhuluma namaRhithi wathi: 
Genesis23:4 “Ngisikhonzi nomqhamuka phakhathi kwenu, yeke ngithengiselani indawo yamazindla khona ngizakubulunga ohlongakeleko wami.”" 
Genesis23:5 AmaRhithi aphendula u-Abrahamu athi: 
Genesis23:6 “Mhlonitjhwa, besithi akhese usilalele! Thina sikuthatha njengekosana enamandla kithapha. Ohlongakeleko wakho ungambulunga kinanyana ngiliphi lamazindla wethu elikhethwa nguwe. Akakho noyedwa wethu ongagodla izindla lakhe bona ubulunge ohlongakeleko wakho.”" 
Genesis23:7 Yeke u-Abrahamu wasikima, wahloma ihloko phasi phambi kwamaRhithi okubabantu bendawo leyo," 
Genesis23:8 wathi kibo: “Nangabe niyavuma bona ngimbulunge ohlangakeleko wami lapha, nje-ke ngizweni bese ningirabhelela ku-Efroni umsa kaTsorhari" 
Genesis23:9 bona angithengisele irholo leMakaphela, ekungelakhe ngemaphethelweni wesimakhe. Mbaweni angithengisele lona ngenani elizeleko phambi kwenu, khona lizakuba yindawami yokubulungela.”" 
Genesis23:10 U-Efroni naye begade ahlezi namaRhithi. Waphendula u-Abrahamu phambi kwebandla kanye nomphakathi woke ogade usesangweni ledorobho, wathi:" 
Genesis23:11 “Awa mhlonitjhwa, akhe ungilalele: Isimu leyo ngikuthengisela yona nerholo eliphakathi kwayo ngikuthengisela lona. Ngizakuthengisela phambi kwabantu bekhethwaba bona babe bofakazi. Zibulungele ohlongakeleko wakho khona.”" 
Genesis23:12 Godu u-Abrahamu wahloma ihloko phasi phambi kwabantu bendawo," 
Genesis23:13 wakhuluma ku-Efroni, boke abantu bendawo bamlalele, wathi: “Nangabe uzimisele mbala ukuyithengisa, ngiyakurabhela ngilalela: Ngizakukhokhela intengo yesimu le, yamukela inani layo ukuze ngibulunge ohlongakeleko wami.”" 
Genesis23:14 U-Efroni waphendula u-Abrahamu wathi: 
Genesis23:15 “Bengithi umhlonitjhwa akhe angilalele: Indawo ebiza amakhilogremu amane nesiquntu wesiliva, bekuyini nje lokho phakathi kwami nawe? Yewuzibulungele ohlongakeleko wakho.”" 
Genesis23:16 U-Abrahamu wavuma okutjhiwo ngu-Efroni, wabe wamlinganisela ubudisi benani alibizileko phambi kwamaRhithi. Kwaba lisiliva elimakhilogremu amane nesiquntu ukuya ngobunjalo besiliva elalamukelwa barhwebi." 
Genesis23:17 Ngokunjalo-ke isimu ka-Efroni ebegade iseMakaphela eduze neMamre, irholo kanye nemithi yoke esemikhawulweni yendawo leyo, kwadluliselwa" 
Genesis23:18 ku-Abrahamu njengepahlakhe. Lokhu kwenziwa phambi kwamaRhithi woke abegade eze esangweni ledorobho lekhabo ka-Efroni.
