Genesis23:19 Ngemva kwalokhu u-Abrahamu wabulunga umkakhe uSara erholweni lesimu yeMakaphela engepumalanga yeMamre endaweni yeRhebroni enarheni yeKanana. 
Genesis23:20 Nje-ke isimu kanye nerholo elabe likiyo kwadluliselwa maRhithi ku-Abrahamu njengepahlakhe bona kube yindawo yokubulungela. 
Genesis24:1 U-Abrahamu bese aluphele namalanga ayile. USomnini bekambusise ngeendlela zoke. 
Genesis24:2 Wathi encekwinakhe ekulu ebeyiphethe koke kwendlwakhe: “Beka isandla sakho ngaphasi kwenyongami," 
Genesis24:3 kobana ngikufungise ngoSomnini uZimu wezulu nephasi, bona angekhe wathathela indodanami umfazi emadodakazini webantwini beKanana engihlala phakathi kwabo," 
Genesis24:4 kodwana bona uzakuya enarheni yekhethu neenhlobeni zami ukuyokuthathela khona indodanami u-Isaka umfazi.” 
Genesis24:5 Inceku yambuza yathi: “Alo, ngenzeni lokha umntazana loyo nange angabhala ukuza nami enarheni le? Kungabe kuzakufuneka bona ngithathe indodanakho ngiyibuyisele enarheni owavela kiyo na?”" 
Genesis24:6 U-Abrahamu wathi kiyo: “Qinisekisa bona awubuyiseli indodanami lapho. 
Genesis24:7 USomnini uZimu wezulu owangikhupha emzini wakababa, enarheni yeenhlobo zami nowakhuluma nami wangithembisa ngesifungo wathi, ‘inarha le ngizayinikela eenzukulwaneni zakho’, nguye ozakuthumela ingilozi ikhambe phambi kwakho bona uphumelele ukuthathela indodanami umfazi lapho." 
Genesis24:8 Nangabe intombi leyo ayikazimiseli ukuza nawe, khona angekhe ube nomlandu esifungweni samesi. Kwaphela nje ungalingi ubuyisele indodanami lapho.”" 
Genesis24:9 Ngokunjalo-ke inceku yabeka isandla sayo ngaphasi kwenyonga yekosayo, u-Abrahamu, yafunga isifungo mayelana nendaba leyo." 
Genesis24:10 Inceku yathatha amakamela alitjhumi wekosayo yasuka yakhamba iphethe izipho ezihle ezibuya ekosinayo. Yanqomba e-Aramu-Naharayimu ekumumuzi wakaNarhori. 
Genesis24:11 Yafika yaguqisa amakamela hlanu komthombo ngaphandle komuzi lowo, belisele lithambeme ilanga, kusikhathi abafazi abaphuma ngaso ukuyokukha amanzi." 
Genesis24:12 Khonapho yathandaza yathi: “Somnini, Zimu wekosami u-Abrahamu, yiba nomusa ku-Abrahamu ikosami, ungenze ngihlangane nomuntu ofaneleko." 
Genesis24:13 Nakhu ngijame esiyalwini lapha amadodakazi womuzi lo akhelela khona amanzi. 
Genesis24:14 Akuthi nangithi kelinye lamatlawu, ‘Ngiyakurabhela, akhese wethule umjekakho ngisele’, lona-ke lithi, ‘Awa ungasela begodu ngizokuseza namakamelakho’ ngizakwazi-ke bonyana ngilo olikhethele incekwakho, u-Isaka. Lokho kuzakuba siboniso bona mbala uyenzele umusa ikosami.”" 
Genesis24:15 Kwathi ingakaqedi nokuthandaza, veliyani uRabega ngemzini abeke umjeka wamanzi emahlombe. Yena bekayindodakazi kaBhetuweli indodana kaMilika obegade amkaNarhori umnakwabo laka-Abrahamu." 
Genesis24:16 Bekamntazana omuhle osajame ibele, ongakhange akhe ayanywe lisokana. Yena-ke wehlela ngesiyalwini, wazalisa umjekakhe ngamanzi, wakhuphuka." 
Genesis24:17 Inceku ka-Abrahamu yagijima, yamhlangabeza yathi: “Ndodakazi, akhese ungiseze kancancani amanzi angemjekenakho lawo.”" 
Genesis24:18 URabega wathi: “Awa, ikosami ingasela.” Yeke wethula umjeka wayibambela, yasela." 
Genesis24:19 Kuthe bona aqede ukuyiseza, wathi: “Namakamela wekosami ngizowakhelela abe aqede ukusela woke nje.”" 
Genesis24:20 Warhaba wathululela amanzi ngapha kuselela ngakhona iimbandana, wagijimela ngemthonjeni, wanande akha amanzi bewawaseza woke amakamelayo." 
Genesis24:21 Indoda leyo yathula, yamqala, ifuna ukubona nakube uSomnini uphelelise ikhambo layo namkha awa." 
Genesis24:22 Kwathi bona amakamela aqede ukusela, indoda leyo yathatha incina legolide elifakwa epumulweni elinobudisi bamagremu angaba mahlanu nesiquntu kanye neenkhono zegolide ezinobudisi obumagremu alikhulu netjhumi." 
Genesis24:23 Yabese ithi: “Ngiyakurabhela akhese ungitjele, uyindodakazi kabani wena? Endlini kayihlo kungaba khona amalalo lapha singalala khona na?”" 
Genesis24:24 Umntazana waphendula wathi: “Mina ngiyindodakazi kaBhetuweli umsa kaNarhori noMilika.” 
Genesis24:25 Wangezelela wathi: “Sineenhlanga nelusereni eyaneleko kanye nelawu lapha ningalala khona ebusuku.” 
Genesis24:26 Yeke indoda leyo yaguqa yahloma ihloko phasi phambi kwakaSomnini 
Genesis24:27 yathi: “Akadunyiswe uSomnini ongakhange atjhiye isisa nokwethembeka kwakhe ku-Abrahamu ikosami. Nakungimi, uSomnini uZimu ungirholele endleleni eya endlini yeenhlobo zekosami.”" 
Genesis24:28 Umntazana wagijima wayokutjela unina nabodadwabo ngokwenzekileko. 
Genesis24:29 URabega begade anomfowabo uLabani. Yena-ke waphuma wagijimela endodeni leyo emthonjeni 
Genesis24:30 ngombana abone incina lepumulo neenkhono kudadwabo. Godu wezwa lokha uRebega nabatjela bona indoda leyo itheni. Yeke waphuma wagijimela kiyo, wayifunyana isajame emakamelenayo hlanu komthombo." 
Genesis24:31 Wathi kiyo: “Muntu obusiswe nguSomnini, namba siye ekhaya. Kubayini ujame ngaphandlapha ngombana nakhu sengikulungiselele ekhaya bekunendawo yamakamelakho?”" 
Genesis24:32 Yeke indoda leyo yakhamba naye kwabo. Sebafikile uLabani wakhumula amakamela, wawanikela iinhlanga nelusereni. Wabuye walethela indoda leyo nabakhambisani bayo amanzi bona baqophe iinyawo zabo." 
Genesis24:33 Nje-ke kwabekwa ukudla phambi kwendoda leyo, kodwana yona yathi: “Awa, angekhe ngadla ngingakatjho into engiyizele lapha.” ULabani wathi: “Awa yeke, khuluma-ke.”" 
Genesis24:34 Nje-ke yathi: “Mina ngiyinceku ka-Abrahamu. 
Genesis24:35 USomnini uZimu yabusisa ikosami khulu beyanjinga. Yayipha izimvu, iimbuzi, iinkomo, isiliva negolide, amakhoboka namakhobokakazi, amakamela nabodumbana." 
Genesis24:36 Umka kosami uSara, wabelethela ikosami indodana asele aluphele, yeke ikosami yanikela koke enakho endodaneni." 
Genesis24:37 Begodu ikosami yangifungisa ngesifungo yathi, ‘Ungakhe ungathathela indodanami umfazi emadodakazini weKanana okuyinarha engihlala kiyo." 
Genesis24:38 Kodwana khamba uye ebantwini bekhethu, ekorwenami, uyithathele umfazi khona indodanami.’" 
Genesis24:39 Ngayibuza ikosami ngathi, ‘Alo, ngenzeni lokha umntazana loyo nange angabhala ukukhamba nami?’" 
Genesis24:40 Yona yaphendula yathi, ‘USomnini engikhamba phambi kwakhe, uzokuthumelela ingilozi bona ikuphumelelise ekhambeni lakho ukuze ufunyanele indodanami umfazi ekorwenami nebantwini bekhethu." 
Genesis24:41 Uzakutjhaphuluka esifungweni samesi kwaphela, ikani nje nawuye ebantwini bekhethu bakwalela naye. Ngaleyondlela wena uzabe utjhaphulukile esifungweni samesi.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Nje-ke kuthe bona ngifike emthonjeni namhlanje, ngathandaza ngathi, ‘Somnini, Zimu wekosami u-Abrahamu, ngiyakurabhela hle, phumelelisa ikhambo lami engize ngalo lapha." 
Genesis24:43 Nakhu uSomnini lapha ngijame khona hlanu kwanaku umthombo; nakwenzeka kuvela umntazana bona azokukha amanzi lapha bese ngimbawa bona angiseze amanzi kancancani ngemjekenakhe," 
Genesis24:44 nangabe uyavuma bonyana ngisele abe akhelele namakamelami amanzi, akube nguye loyo umntazana omkhethileko, Somnini, bona abe mfazi wendodana yekosami.’" 
Genesis24:45 “Ngithe ngingakaqedi umthandazwami wesidu, veliyani uRabega nomjeka wamanzi awubeke emahlombakhe, bewehlela ngemthonjeni ukuyokhelela amanzi. Ngithe nangithi kuye, ‘Ndodakazi, akhese ungiseze amanzi.’" 
Genesis24:46 Wethula msinyana umjeka emahlombakhe wathi, ‘Awa, yewusele kosami, namakamelakho ngizowaseza.’ Nje-ke ngasela bewaseza namakamelami." 
Genesis24:47 “Ngabese ngiyambuza-ke ngathi, ‘Uyindodakazi kabani?’ Wangiphendula wathi, ‘Mina ngiyindodakazi kaBhetuweli umsa kaNarhori noMilika.’ Yeke ngamfaka incina epumulwenakhe neenkhono emikhonwenakhe." 
Genesis24:48 Ngaguqa ngahloma ihloko phasi phambi kwakaSomnini. Ngadumisa uSomnini uZimu wekosami u-Abrahamu, yona eyanginqophisa endleleni ekungiyo ukuze ngizokuthathela indodana yekosami indodakazi yomnakwabo lekosami." 
Genesis24:49 Nje-ke nakube nizokutjengisa ukwethembeka neqiniso ekosinami njengeenhlobo, ngitjelani, nakhona nakube akuzukuba njalo, nitjho ukuze nami ngizibone bonyana ngiphuma ngayiphi.”" 
Genesis24:50 ULabani noBhetuweli baphendula bathi: “Ndoda, indaba le ivela kuSomnini, yeke thina akukho esingakutjho kuwe." 
Genesis24:51 NakunguRabega nangu yena; mthathe ukhambe naye abe mfazi wendodana yekosakho kanjengombana uSomnini akubonisile.” 
Genesis24:52 Kuthe bona inceku yaka-Abrahamu izwe abakutjwileko, yahloma ihloko phasi phambi kwakaSomnini." 
Genesis24:53 Yakhupha amagugu welisiliva negolide nezinye izinto zokwembathwa yazipha uRabega. Yapha umnakwabo nonina izipho ezikhethekileko. 
Genesis24:54 Yeke inceku nabantu ebe banayo bagoma, basela, balala ubusukobo lapho. Kuthe nabavukako ekuseni yathi: “Ngibawa isiphande ngibuyele ekosinami.”" 
Genesis24:55 Kodwana umfowabo kaRabega banonina bathi: “Akhese uvumele umntazana ahlalahlale nathi amalangana alitjhumi nje kwaphela, ngemva kwalokho angakhamba-ke.”" 
Genesis24:56 Kodwana inceku yathi: “Awa hle, njengombana uSomnini uZimu asele aphumelelise ikhambo lami nje, masani ukungibambezela. Ngivumelani ngibone enganatjani ngibuyele ekosinami.”" 
Genesis24:57 Bona bathi: “Yeke, asibize umntazana sizwe bona yena uthini.”" 
Genesis24:58 Nje-ke bambiza uRabega bambuza bathi: “Uyathanda ukukhamba nomuntu lo na?” Yena waphendula wathi: “Iye, ngizakukhamba.”" 
Genesis24:59 Nje-ke aboLabani balayelisa udadwabo uRabega nembelesakhe bona bakhambe nenceku yaka-Abrahamu kanye nabantu bakhe. 
Genesis24:60 Babusisa uRabega bathi: “Dadwethu, sengathi ungaba ngunina weenkulungwana ngeenkulungwana; kwangasuthi iinzukulwana zakho zingathumba amadorobho wamanabazo!”" 
Genesis24:61 Yeke uRabega neencekukazi zakhe babhinca bakhwela amakamelabo balandela indoda leyo. Kwaba njalo-ke ukukhamba kwenceku nayithatha uRabega sele igoduka. 
Genesis24:62 Ngesikhatheso u-Isaka gade ahlala ngesewula yenarha emthonjeni we-Larhayi-Royi. 
Genesis24:63 Kwathi malanga ntambamba asaphumile bona abethwe mumoya emmangweni, wathi nakathi mehlo suka, qala, nako amakamela asiza." 
Genesis24:64 URabega naye wathi nakathi uyaqala, wabona u-Isaka. Yeke wahlika msinyana ekameleni" 
Genesis24:65 bewabuza inceku yaka-Abrahamu wathi: “Ngubani umuntu loya okhamba emmangwenapha asiza kithi na?” Inceku yamphendula yathi: “Yikosami-ke leya.” Nje-ke uRabega wathatha isiyaya wazigubuzesa. 
Genesis24:66 Inceku yafese yadembela u-Isaka koke okwenzekileko. 
Genesis24:67 Nje-ke u-Isaka wangenisa uRabega ngetendeni lapha gade kuhlala khona unina uSara. Wamthatha waba mkakhe begodu wamthanda. Yeke watjhiriyeka ekutjhiyweni ngunina. 
Genesis25:1 U-Abrahamu wathatha omunye umfazi, egade kuthiwa nguKhethura." 
Genesis25:2 Yena wambelethela uZimrani, uJokhitjhani, uMedani, uMidiyani, uYitjhibakhi noTjhuwarhi." 
Genesis25:3 UJokhitjhani wabeletha uTjheba noDedani. Iinzukulwana zakaDedani bekuma-Atjhuri, amaLethutjhi namaLewumi." 
Genesis25:4 Amadodana kaMidiyani bekungu-Efa, u-Eferi, uRhanoki, u-Abida no-Elida. Boke labo bekuziinzukulwana zakaKhethura." 
Genesis25:5 U-Abrahamu wanikela u-Isaka loke ilifa lakhe. 
Genesis25:6 Kodwana kwathi asaphila, wapha amadodana wamakhohlwakhe izipho wathi abaye ngenarheni engepumalanga yeKanana ukuze babe kude nendodanakhe u-Isaka." 
Genesis25:7 U-Abrahamu waphila iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi alikhomba namihlanu. 
Genesis25:8 Gade sele aluphele khulu lokha nakakhohlela kokugcina, wahlongakala anelisekile ngepilo, aliqhegu elithukgheleko. Amadodanakhe u-Isaka no-Itjhimayeli bambulunga kebekhabo erholweni leMakaphela. Ithunelo belingepumalanga yeMamre, esimini ka-Efroni umsa kaTsorhari umRhithi," 
Genesis25:9 ekuyisimu u-Abrahamu ayithenga kumaRhithi. U-Abrahamu wabulungwa lapho-ke yena nomkakhe uSara. 
Genesis25:10 Ngemva kokuhlongakala kwaka-Abrahamu, uZimu wabusisa indodanakhe u-Isaka ogade ahlala emthonjeni we-Larhayi-Royi." 
Genesis25:11 Naku umlando ka-Itjhimayeli indodana ka-Abrahamu ambelethelwa nguHagari umGibhide, ikhobokakazi lakaSara." 
Genesis25:12 Naka-ke amabizo wamadodana ka-Itjhimayeli ngokulamana kwawo: Izibulo nguNebayothi, alanywe nguKedari, u-Adibiyeli, uMibisami," 
Genesis25:13 uMitjhima, uDuma, uMasa," 
Genesis25:14 uRhadadi, uTema, uJethuri, uNafitjhi kanye noKhedema." 
Genesis25:15 Lawo-ke mabizo wamadodana ka-Itjhimayeli. Abarholi abalitjhumi nambili beenkorwaba gade banemizi eyakhiweko neenkampa zamatende. 
Genesis25:16 U-Itjhimayeli waphila iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amathathu namikhomba. Wakhohlela kokugcina, wahlongakala bewabulungwa." 
Genesis25:17 Iinzukulwana zakhe zahlala endaweni ukusuka eRhavila ukuya eTjhuri, ngepumalanga yeGibhide ncange-Asiriya. Zahlala ziphehla inturhu kibo boke abafowazo." 
Genesis25:18 Naku umlando ka-Isaka indodana ka-Abrahamu: U-Abrahamu wabeletha u-Isaka. 
Genesis25:19 U-Isaka gade aneminyaka ematjhumi amane lokha nakathatha uRabega indodakazi kaBhetuweli umAramu ovela ePadana-Aramu nongudadwabo kaLabani umAramu. 
Genesis25:20 U-Isaka wathandaza kuSomnini ngomkakhe ogade ayinyumba. USomnini waphendula umthandazwakhe, yeke umkakhe uRabega waba sidisi." 
Genesis25:21 Amasana gade anande akghudlhana ngesiswini sakhe wabe wazibuza wathi: “Kanti kwenzakalani kimapha?” Wakanye wayokubuza kuSomnini. 
Genesis25:22 USomnini wathi kuye: “Kunezizwe ezimbili esibelethweni sakho, abantu ababili ngesiswini sakho bazakuhlukaniswa; omunye uzakuba namandla ukudlula omunye, omkhulu alotjhe omncani.”" 
Genesis25:23 Kwathi nakufika isikhathi sakhe sokubeletha, kwavela amawele wabesanyana." 
Genesis25:24 Wokuthoma wavela abomvana, umzimbakhe woke inga wembeswe ngenaka loboya, yeke bamthiya bona ngu-Esewu." 
Genesis25:25 Ngemva kwakhe kwavela umfowabo akakarele isithende saka-Esewu ngesandlana sakhe; yeke bamthiya bona nguJakopo. U-Isaka gade aneminyaka ematjhumi asithandathu lokha uRabega nakababelethako. 
Genesis25:26 Abesanabo bakhula, u-Esewu waba mzumi onobukghoni, indoda ezwana nommango, kodwana uJakopo yena bekumumuntu ozothileko ohlala ematendeni." 
Genesis25:27 U-Isaka wathanda u-Esewu ngombana gade athanda inyama yeenyamazana, kodwana uRabega yena wazithandela uJakopo." 
Genesis25:28 Kwathi ngelinye ilanga uJakopo asapheke isitjhebo, kwafika u-Esewu avela emmangweni, adinwe afile." 
Genesis25:29 Wathi kuJakopo: “Akhe ungiphe isitjhebo sakho esinzothweso ngombana ngifile ngokudinwa!” Ngikho-nje godu kwathiwa ngu-Edomu. 
Genesis25:30 UJakopo waphendula wathi: “Uzwile! Ngithengisela ubuzibulo bakho ntange.” 
Genesis25:31 U-Esewu wathi: “Qala, ngiyafa ngendlala, buzangisiza ngani nje ubuzibulwanyana bakhonobo?”" 
Genesis25:32 UJakopo wathi: “Zibophe ngesifungo khonanje.” Wazibopha ngesifungo-ke, wathengisela uJakopo ubuzibulo bakhe njalo." 
Genesis25:33 Yeke uJakopo waphakela u-Esewu isikwa nesitjhebo seenhlumaya. Wagoma, wasela, wasikima, wakhamba. Ngalokho u-Esewu wanyaza ubuzibulo bakhe." 
Genesis26:1 Kwabakhona indlala enarheni ngaphandle kwaleyo eyakhe yabakhona ngaphambilini esikhathini saka-Abrahamu. U-Isaka wakhamba wayokukhonza kwa-Abimeleki, ikosi yamaFilista, eGerari." 
Genesis26:2 IKosi yabonakala ku-Isaka yathi: “Ungehleli eGibhide, hlala enarheni engizakutjela bonyana uhlale kiyo." 
Genesis26:3 Khonzakhonza enarheni le. Ngizakuba nawe bengikubusise. Iye, ngizakupha wena neenzukulwana zakho zoke iinarhezi, ngiqinise isifungo engasenza kuyihlo u-Abrahamu." 
Genesis26:4 Ngizakwenza iinzukulwana zakho zibe zinengi njengeenkwekwezi emkayini bese ngizinikela zoke iinarhezi. Zoke iinkoro zephasi zikhanukele ukubusiswa njengeenzukulwana zakho," 
Genesis26:5 ngombana u-Abrahamu wangilalela wagcina okufaneleko: imiyalwami, iimiso zami nemithethwami.”" 
Genesis26:6 Yeke u-Isaka wahlala eGerari. 
Genesis26:7 Kwathi lokha amadoda wendawo leyo nakathoma ukumbuza ngomkakhe wathi: “Awa, lo ngudadwethu.” Wesaba ukuthi “mkami” ngombana wadlumbana bonyana amadoda wendawo leyo azambulala ngenca kaRabega isiphalaphala sakhe." 
Genesis26:8 U-Isaka wakhonza lapho isikhathi eside. Ngelinye ilanga u-Abimeleki ikosi yamaFilista yathi nayihlola enzasi ngefesidere yabona u-Isaka akitakitana nomkakhe uRabega. 
Genesis26:9 Yeke u-Abimeleki wabiza u-Isaka wathi: “Ngambala mkakho lo! Alo, bekutheni nawuzakuthi ngudadwenu?” U-Isaka wamphendula wathi: “Kungombana ngidlumbene bona ngizakufa ngebanga lakhe.”" 
Genesis26:10 U-Abimeleki wathi: “Yintobani osenze yona le? Bekulula bona enye yamadoda ilale nomkakho, nje-ke bewuzosithwesa umlandu.”" 
Genesis26:11 Yeke u-Abimeleki wayala woke umuntu wathi: “Nanyana ngubani othinta indoda le nomkayo, ngiqinisile ngithi uzakubulawa.”" 
Genesis26:12 U-Isaka watjala isivuno enarheni leyo. Kwathi kiwo lowo mnyaka wavuna ngamakhulu kilokho akutjeleko. USomnini wambusisa," 
Genesis26:13 wasoloko andlondlobala bewaba yinjinga yomuntu: 
Genesis26:14 Waba nemihlambi yezimvu, yeembuzi neyeenkomo kanye neenceku ezinengi. AmaFilista amfela umona" 
Genesis26:15 abe aphetha ngokudibizesa yoke imithombo eyenjiwa ziinceku zakayise u-Abrahamu asaphila. 
Genesis26:16 Yeke u-Abimeleki wathi ku-Isaka: “Suka kithapha ngombana sele usibhedlha ngamandla.” 
Genesis26:17 U-Isaka wafuduka-ke wayokuhloma itende lakhe emrhobeni weGerari, wanzinza lapho." 
Genesis26:18 Warhubha imithombo ebeyenjiwe ngesikhathi sakayise u-Abrahamu negade idibizeswe maFilista ngemva kokuhlongakala kwakhe. Wayithiya amabizo uyise agade ayithiye wona. 
Genesis26:19 Iinceku zaka-Isaka zemba emrhobeni zafumana umthombo wamanzi ayalukako. 
Genesis26:20 Kodwana abelusi bakaGerari baphikisana nabelusi baka-Isaka bathi: “Amanzi la ngewethu!” Yeke u-Isaka wathiya umthombo lowo bona yi-Esekhe ngombana batjhijilana naye. 
Genesis26:21 Iinceku zaka-Isaka zemba omunye umthombo godu, nalapho kwaba nokuqabana, yeke wawuthiya ibizo bona yiSitina." 
Genesis26:22 Wafuduka lapho wemba omunye umthombo. Lapho-ke azange kubekhona ukuqabana, nje-ke wawuthiya bona yiRerhobhothi, asithi: “Iye, gadesi uSomnini usiphe iindawo ezivulekileko, nje-ke sizakuphumelela enarheni le.”" 
Genesis26:23 Ukusuka lapho u-Isaka wafudukela eBheritjheba. 
Genesis26:24 Ngobusukobo uSomnini waziveza kuye wathi: “NginguZimu kayihlo u-Abrahamu. Yeke ungasabi ngombana nginawe. Ngizokubusisa bengingezelele isibalo seenzukulwana zakho ngebanga lencekwami u-Abrahamu.” 
Genesis26:25 Khonapho u-Isaka wakhela uSomnini i-aldari bewayithandaza. Wahloma itende lakhe lapho, iinceku zakhe zemba omunye umthombo." 
Genesis26:26 U-Abimeleki ogade avela eGerari wafika kuye akhambisana no-Arhuzathi umlulekakhe noPhikoli induna yamabuthwakhe. 
Genesis26:27 Nje-ke u-Isaka wababuza wathi: “Kubayini nizongibona? Angithi nina nangiphatha njengesitha benangiqotjha phakathi kwenu?” 
Genesis26:28 Baphendula bathi: “Awa mntanthu, kwembukile emehlwenethu bonyana uSomnini unawe, yeke sadlumbana sathi, ‘Kghani angeze senza isivumelwano sesifungo phakathi kwethu, iye, phakathi kwamaGerari nawe?’ Nje-ke sibawa ukwenza isivumelwano nawe" 
Genesis26:29 bona ungasikhubazi njengombana nathi singazange khesikukhubaze, kodwana sakuphatha kuhle besakulisa wakhamba ngokuthula. Sifuna isivumelwanesi ngombana uSomnini ukubusisile.”" 
Genesis26:30 U-Isaka wabahlabisa, bagoma bebasela." 
Genesis26:31 Ngakusasa kwakhona ekuseni amadoda lawo enza isivumelwano sesifungo omunye komunye. Ngemva kwalapho u-Isaka wabatjhaphulula, bakhamba ngokuthula." 
Genesis26:32 Khona mhlokho iinceku zaka-Isaka zafika zambikela ngomthombo eziwembileko, zathi: “Siwafumene amanzi!”" 
Genesis26:33 Wathiya umthombo lowo bona yiTjhiba. Bekube kunamhlanje ibizo lomuzi lowo laziwa bonyana yiBheritjheba. 
Genesis26:34 Kuthe u-Esewu naneminyaka ematjhumi amane, watjhada uJehudithi indodakazi kaBheri umRhithi noBhasemathi indodakazi ka-Eloni umRhithi." 
Genesis26:35 Abafazabo baphilisa u-Isaka banoRabega ipilo ebuhlungu. 
Genesis27:1 U-Isaka besele aluphele namehlwakhe sele afifiyela angasaboni. Wabiza u-Esewu izibulo lakhe wathi kuye: “Ndodanami!” Wasabela wathi: “Baba!” 
Genesis27:2 U-Isaka wathi kuye: “Qala sengimdala, kanti nelanga lami angilazi." 
Genesis27:3 Yeke thatha iinhlabano zakho, okusilanda nemisubelakho, uphume ubuzimba uyongifunela inyamazana." 
Genesis27:4 Ungilungisele iinkhanakhana engizithandako, ungilethele zona ngigome bese ngiyakubusisa ngaphambi kobana ngihlongakale.”" 
Genesis27:5 URabega gade alalele lokha u-Isaka nakakhuluma no-Esewu indodanakhe. Kwathi lokha u-Esewu nakafulathelako bona ayokuzumela uyise inyamazana," 
Genesis27:6 uRabega wathi kuJakopo indodanakhe: “Qala, ngizwe ngandlebenye uyihlo asithi kumnakwenu u-Esewu," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Ngilethela inyamazana ungiphekele ngayo iinkhanakhana ngigome ukuze ngikubusise phambi kwakaSomnini ngaphambi kobana ngihlongakale.’ 
Genesis27:8 Nje-ke ndodanami, lalelisisa kuhle bese wenza engikutjela khona:" 
Genesis27:9 Khamba uye emhlambini ukhethe iimbuzana ezimbili ezinonileko ukuze ngiphekele uyihlo iinkhanakhana azithandako. 
Genesis27:10 Uzazithatha uzise kuye agome bese akubusise phambi kobana ahlongakale.” 
Genesis27:11 Kodwana uJakopo wathi kuRabega unina: “Uyazi bona u-Esewu unoboya, kodwana mina nginesikhumba esitjhelelako." 
Genesis27:12 Nange kungenzeka angithinte, kuzakuba inga ngiyamnyaza bese ngizibizela iinthuweleliso kuneembusiso.”" 
Genesis27:13 Unina wamphendula wathi: “Nakube kuneenthuweleliso azize phezu kwami, ndodanami. Wena yenza lokho engikutjela khona. Khamba uyongithathela iimbuzanezo.”" 
Genesis27:14 Yeke wakhamba, walethela unina iimbuzanezo. Unina wapheka iinkhanakhana ezithandwa nguyise." 
Genesis27:15 Khonapho uRabega wakhupha izambatho zakanokutjho zaka-Esewu indodanakhe ekulu ebegade azibekile, wathi indodanakhe encani uJakopo ayizembathe." 
Genesis27:16 Wembesa izandla zakhe kanye nengcenye yentamakhe enesikhumba esibutjhelelezi ngesikhumba sembuzi. 
Genesis27:17 Wamnikela iinkhanakhana kanye nesikwa asilungisileko. 
Genesis27:18 Nje-ke waya kuyise wafika wathi: “Baba!” U-Isaka wathi: “We! Ungongubani ndodanami?” 
Genesis27:19 UJakopo wathi kuyise: “Ngingu-Esewu izibulo lakho. Ngenze njengombana ungitjelile. Ngiyakurabhela hlala kuhle udle inyama engikulethele yona, khona uzangipha isibusiso sakho.”" 
Genesis27:20 U-Isaka wathi: “Hawu, uyifumene njani msinyana kangaka ndodanami?” UJakopo waphendula wathi: “USomnini uZimakho ungisizile ngayifumana.”" 
Genesis27:21 U-Isaka wathi kuJakopo: “Tjhidela eduze ngikuthinte ndodanami ukuze ngazi bonyana ngambala ungu-Esewu indodanami namkha njani.” 
Genesis27:22 Ngambala uJakopo watjhidela, uyise wamphumbutha, wadlumbana wathi: “Ilizwi ngelakaJakopo, kodwana izandla ngezaka-Esewu.”" 
Genesis27:23 Azange alemuke bona nguJakopo ngombana izandla zakhe bezinoboya njengezaka-Esewu ukwenzela bona abusiswe. 
Genesis27:24 Kwathi nanyana sele ambuzisisa asithi, “Uthi ungu-Esewu kwamambala nje?” uJakopo wathi, “Iye baba, nginguye.”" 
Genesis27:25 U-Isaka wathi: “Ngilethela inyama oyizumileko ndodanami, ngigome ukuze ngikubusise-ke.” UJakopo wamnikela yona newayini, wadla wasela." 
Genesis27:26 Yeke uyise wathi kuye: “Tjhidela lapha ndodanami, ungincwange emhlathini.”" 
Genesis27:27 Ngambala waya kuye wamncwanga. Kuthe lokha u-Isaka nakezwa umnuko wezambatho zakhe wambusisa wathi: “Awuzwa-ke, iphunga lendodanami linjengephunga lesimu ebusiswe nguSomnini." 
Genesis27:28 UZimu akakuphe umbethe wezulu, avundise ihlabathakho! Akuphe inala yekoroyi neyesitjhidela sewayini!" 
Genesis27:29 Izizwe zikusebenzele, abantu bakukhothamele. Ube yikosana yabafowenu namadodana kanyoko akukhothamele. Abakunikelelako banikelelwe, nabakubusisako babusiswe.”" 
Genesis27:30 Emva kobana u-Isaka aqede ukubusisa uJakopo, bewasuka phambi koyise, qala nango umnakwabo u-Esewu afika abuya ekuzumeni." 
Genesis27:31 Naye wafika wapheka iinkhanakhana wazisa kuyise wathi kuye: “Bengithi ubaba akavuke ahlale ukuze agome inyama indodanakhe emlethele yona, khona ubaba azangipha isibusiso sakhe.”" 
Genesis27:32 Uyise u-Isaka wabuza wathi: “Kanti ungubani wena na?” U-Esewu waphendula wathi: “Ngimi indodanakho, izibulo lakho, u-Esewu.”" 
Genesis27:33 U-Isaka wabethwa livalo bewaqhaqhazela wathi: “Kanti bekungubani okhambe wayokuzuma inyamazana wangilethela yona bona ngiyigome phambi kobana ufike? Ngiqeda ukumbusisa khona nje, ngiqinisile uyokubusiseka loyo!”" 
Genesis27:34 Kuthe bona u-Esewu ezwe amezwi kayise, wathwala imikhono ehloko warhahlawula wathi: “Nami ngibusisa baba!”" 
Genesis27:35 Kodwana u-Isaka wathi: “Umfowenu ufike ngobugirikijani, wathatha isibusiso sakho.”" 
Genesis27:36 U-Esewu wathi: “Akubabali kuthiwa nguJakopo nje! Sele kungokwesibili angidlelezela: Wahlangula amalungelwami wobuzibulo, nje udzwebule isibusiso sami! Ubaba azange angibekele isibusiso na?”" 
Genesis27:37 U-Isaka waphendula wathi: “Sengimenze ikosana phezu kwakho begodu ngenza zoke iinhlobo zakhe zaba ziinsebenzi zakhe. Ngimsekele ngekoroyi nangesitjhidela sewayini. Alo, ngizabe ngisakwenzelani nje ndodanami?”" 
Genesis27:38 U-Esewu wathi kuyise: “Kanti ubaba unesibusiso sinye kwaphela na? Ubaba akangibusise nami.” Wathoma wakhihla isililo. 
Genesis27:39 Yeke u-Isaka wathi kuye: “Umuzakho uzakuba kude nehlabathi evundileko, Ube kude nombethe wezulu" 
Genesis27:40 uphile ngesabulakho. Uzakusebenzela umfowenu, kodwana lokha nawururharurhako uzakuhluthula ijogi lakhe lisuke entanyenakho.”" 
Genesis27:41 U-Esewu wabambela uJakopo ivunda ngebanga lesibusiso asinikelwe nguyise. Wadlumbana wathi: “Akufike amalanga wokuzilela ubaba, khona ngizakubulala umfowethu uJakopo lo.”" 
Genesis27:42 URabega wezwa ngokusongela kwaka-Esewu indodanakhe ekulu. Yeke wathumela bona kubizwe uJakopo indodanakhe encani, wathi kuye: “Umfowenu u-Esewu uziduduza ngomkhumbulo wokukubulala." 
Genesis27:43 Nje-ke ndodanami, yenza engikutjela khona: Balekela kwamnakwethu uLabani eRharana." 
Genesis27:44 Hlala naye isikhatjhana umfowenu abe aqole. 
Genesis27:45 Ngizakuthumela ilizwi kobana ubuye ekhaya nasele umfowenu aqolile begodu akhohliwe ngalokho owamenza khona. Angifuni ukuniloba ngalanga linye.” 
Genesis27:46 URabega wathi ku-Isaka: “Sengidinwe kuphila ngebanga labomalukazanyana bamaRhithaba. Nange uJakopo angathatha umfazi ebantazaneni bamaRhithi abafana nebenarha le, khona ngiqinisile ngithi ipilwami izaba lilize lakolize.”" 
Genesis28:1 U-Isaka wabiza uJakopo wambusisa bewamyala wathi kuye: “Ungathathi umfazi emadodakazini weKanana. 
Genesis28:2 Khamba uye ePadana-Aramu kwaBhetuweli ubamkhulwakho wekhenomkhulu, uzithathele khona umfazi emadodakazini kamalumakho uLabani." 
Genesis28:3 Inga uZimu oSabekako angakubusisa, wande ngembeleko ukuze kuvele iinkoro ngeenkoro kuwe." 
Genesis28:4 Akuphe wena neenzukulwana zakho isibusiso esaphiwa u-Abrahamu bona uthumbe inarha okhonze kiyo, inarha uZimu ayinikela u-Abrahamu.”" 
Genesis28:5 Yeke u-Isaka watjhaphulula uJakopo wangena indlela, wanqomba ePadana-Aramu kwaLabani umsa kaBhetuweli umAramu omnakwabo kaRabega unina kaJakopo no-Esewu." 
Genesis28:6 U-Esewu walemuka bonyana u-Isaka ubusise uJakopo bewamthumela ePadana-Aramu bona azithathele khona umfazi ngombana nambusisako wamyala bona angathathi umfazi weKanana. 
Genesis28:7 Walemuka godu bonyana uJakopo ulalele uyise nonina, waya ePadana-Aramu." 
Genesis28:8 Lokho kwamenza wabona bonyana abantazana beKananaba bamkghabhudlha kangangani uyise u-Isaka. 
Genesis28:9 Nje-ke waya kwa-Itjhimayeli, indodana ka-Abrahamu. Phezu kwabafazi agade asele anabo, wazithathela uMarhalathi, indodakazi ka-Itjhimayeli, ongudadwabo kaNebayothi." 
Genesis28:10 UJakopo wasuka eBheritjheba wanqomba eRharana. 
Genesis28:11 Wafika kwandawo, wathatha elinye lamatje lapho walisamela ngombana besele litjhingile. Walala ubusukobo lapho." 
Genesis28:12 Wabhudanga abona umqaqado usuka phasi uya ezulwini neengilozi zakaZimu zazehla zenyuka emqaqadwenapho. 
Genesis28:13 Wabona uSomnini ijame ngehla kwalapho, ithi: “NginguSomnini, uZimu kayihlomkhulu u-Abrahamu noZimu kayihlo u-Isaka. Ngizokupha inarha olele kiyo leyo wena neenzukulwana zakho." 
Genesis28:14 Iinzukulwana zakho zizakuba zinengi njengethuli lehlabathi. Uzakwanda unabele ngetjingalanga, ngepumalanga, ngetlhagwini nangesewula. Zoke iinkoro zephasi zikhanukele ukubusiswa njengawe nanjengeenzukulwana zakho." 
Genesis28:15 Qala, nginawe begodu ngizakuvikela kuphi nakuphi lapha ukhamba khona bengikubuyisele enarheni le. Angeze ngakutjhiya ukufikela ngiphetha engikuthembise khona.”" 
Genesis28:16 Kwathi lokha uJakopo nakaphaphamako wadlumbana wathi: “Ngambala uSomnini ukhona endaweni le, awukhuzi bengingazi!”" 
Genesis28:17 Wethukwa wathi: “Indawo le iyasabeka! Akunalitho elinye, le yindlu kaZimu! Leli, lisango lezulu!”" 
Genesis28:18 Wavuka ngamasa wathatha ilitje abegade alisamele walijamisa laba sikhumbuzo. Walizesa ngamafutha. 
Genesis28:19 Wathiya indawo leyo bona yiBhethe-Eli, nanyana umuzi lowo bewuphele ubizwe bona yiLuzi." 
Genesis28:20 Nje-ke uJakopo wenza isifungo wathi: “Nange uZimu angaba nami abe angivikele ekhambeni lameli, angiphe ukudla ngigome nezambatho ngembathe" 
Genesis28:21 bengibuyele ekhaya kubaba ngiphephile, uSomnini ube nguZimami." 
Genesis28:22 Khona-ke ilitje engilibeke lapha njengesikhumbuzweli lizakuba yindlu kaZimu. Begodu ngiyathembisa bonyana kikho koke ongipha khona, ngizakunikela kwetjhumi.”" 
Genesis29:1 UJakopo waraga ngekhambo lakhe lokuya enarheni yabantu bangepumalanga. 
Genesis29:2 Khonapho wabona umthombo emmangweni, kwakulele imihlambi emithathu yezimvu eqadi kwawo ngombana bekusezwa izimvu lapho. Umlomo womthombo lowo wawugutjuzeswe ngelitje elikhulu." 
Genesis29:3 Bekuthi yoke imihlambi nasele iphelele lapho, abelusi bagede ilitjelo balisuse emlonyeni womthombo bese baseza izimvu. Nabaqedako basibekele umthombo lowo ngelitjelo." 
Genesis29:4 UJakopo wabuza abelusi wathi: “Bafowethu, nibuya tjhuba liphi?” Baphendula bathi: “Sibuya ngeRharana.”" 
Genesis29:5 Wabuza godu wathi: “Niyamazi uLabani, umsa kaNarhori na?” Baphendula bathi: “Iye, siyamazi.”" 
Genesis29:6 Wabuza wathi: “Usaphila na?” Bamphendula bathi: “Iye, usaphila. Qala nasiya indodakazakhe uRarheli isiza nomhlambakhe.”" 
Genesis29:7 UJakopo wathi kibo: “Alo, njengombana kusesemini ekulu kangaka nje begodu akukabi sikhathi sokubuthelela umhlambi. Kubayini ningawusezi ubuyele emadlelweni na?”" 
Genesis29:8 Baphendula bathi: “Asikwazi ukwenza njalo kungakafiki yoke imihlambi bese-ke kugedwa ilitjeli emlonyeni womthombo. Ngemva kwalapho-ke sele kungasezwa izimvu.” 
Genesis29:9 Kwathi uJakopo asakhuluma nabo, kwafika uRarheli nezimvu zakayise ngombana gade angumelusazo." 
Genesis29:10 Lokha uJakopo nakabona uRarheli nomhlambi kamalumakhe uLabani, wanqomba emthonjeni wageda ilitje, waseza izimvu zakamalumakhe." 
Genesis29:11 Yeke uJakopo wancwanga uRarheli bewathoma wakhihla isililo. 
Genesis29:12 UJakopo watjela uRarheli bonyana usihlobo sakayise nokobana uyindodana kaRabega. Yeke uRarheli wagijima wayokutjela uyise. 
Genesis29:13 Kwathi bona uLabani ezwe ngeendaba zakaJakopo umzukulwanakhe wagijima bona amhlangabeze. Wamgona wamncwanga emhlathini, wamngenisa ngekhaya. UJakopo wadembela uLabani koke kwekhabo." 
Genesis29:14 ULabani wathi kuye: “Ngambala usihlobo sami seengazi.” Ngemva kobana uJakopo sele ahlezi kwaLabani inyanga yoke," 
Genesis29:15 uLabani wathi kuye: “Ukuthi usihlobo sami akutjho bonyana sekumele ungisebenzele simahla. Ungathanda bonyana ngikukhokhele kangangani?” 
Genesis29:16 ULabani gade anamadodakazi amabili, izibulo kwakunguLeya, omncani kunguRarheli." 
Genesis29:17 Amehlo kaLeya gade angasibukhali, kodwana uRarheli gade anejamo begodu amuhle." 
Genesis29:18 UJakopo wathanda uRarheli, nje-ke wathi kuLabani: “Ngizakusebenzela iminyaka elikhomba mayelana nendodakazakho encani uRarheli.”" 
Genesis29:19 ULabani wathi: “Kuzaba ngcono ngimnikele wena kunobanyana ngimnikele enye nje indoda. Yeke hlala kimapha.” 
Genesis29:20 UJakopo wasebenza iminyaka elikhomba bona afunyane uRarheli. Kodwana kwaba kwangathi malanga ambalwa kuye ngebanga lethando agade athanda ngalo uRarheli. 
Genesis29:21 Yeke uJakopo wathi kuLabani: “Nginikela umkami. Isikhathi sami sengisiqedile, sengifuna ukumngena.”" 
Genesis29:22 Nje-ke uLabani wenza umnyanya, wamema boke abantu bendawo leyo." 
Genesis29:23 Kodwana kwathi sekurhwaqele wathatha indodakazakhe uLeya wayisa kuJakopo, uJakopo walala nayo." 
Genesis29:24 ULabani gade anikele uLeya incekukazakhe, uZilipha, njengesipho somtjhado." 
Genesis29:25 Kwathi nakusako, uJakopo wathi: “Madekhethu, nguLeya lo!” Waya kuLabani wathi: “Yintobani ongenze yona le? Angithi bengisebenzela uRarheli? Alo, ungigalajelani?”" 
Genesis29:26 ULabani waphendula wathi: “Kumphambo ekhethwapha bona omncani angenda qangi omkhulu angakendi. 
Genesis29:27 Lindalinda bekuphele iveke yobukhazi le, ngizabe sengikunikela uRarheli nayibe uzangisebenzela eminye iminyaka elikhomba.”" 
Genesis29:28 UJakopo wenza njalo. Kuthe bona iveke yobukhazi iphele, uLabani wanikela uJakopo indodakazakhe uRarheli bona abe mkakhe." 
Genesis29:29 ULabani wapha uRarheli incekukazakhe, uBhilirha, njengesipho somtjhado." 
Genesis29:30 UJakopo wangena uRarheli. Ngambala wathanda uRarheli khulu kunoLeya. Yeke wasebenzela uLabani eminye iminyaka elikhomba. 
Genesis29:31 Kuthe uSomnini nabona bonyana uLeya akathandwa, yavula isibeletho sakhe, yavala sakaRarheli." 
Genesis29:32 ULeya waba sidisi bewabeletha indodana. Wayithiya bona nguRubeni ngombana wathi: “Ngambala uSomnini ubone umtlhagwami. Ngiqinisile indodami izangithanda kwanjesi.” 
Genesis29:33 Waba sidisi godu, wabeletha enye indodana, wathi: “USomnini ungiphe enye indodana godu ngombana uzwile bona angithandwa.” Yeke wayithiya bona nguSimiyoni." 
Genesis29:34 ULeya godu waba sidisi, wabeletha indodana godu, wathi: “Kwanjesi indodami izakunamathela kimi ngombana ngiyibelethele amadodana amathathu.” Yeke wayithiya bona nguLevi." 
Genesis29:35 Godu waba sidisi, wabeletha enye indodana, wathi: “Gadesi ngizakudumisa uSomnini.” Yeke wayithiya bona nguJuda. Ngemva kwalapho imbelekwakhe yajama." 
Genesis30:1 Lokha uRarheli nakabona bonyana akabeletheli uJakopo abantwana, wafela udadwabo umona. Wathi kuJakopo: “Ngipha abantwana, nakungasinjalo ngizakufa!”" 
Genesis30:2 UJakopo wamthukuthelela wathi: “Kanti senginguZimu okuvale bona ungabelethi na?” 
Genesis30:3 URarheli wathi: “Nangu uBhilirha incekukazami. Lala naye khona azakubelethela emathangenami, yeke nami ngizakuba ngunobantwana ngaye.”" 
Genesis30:4 Yeke wamnikela uBhilirha incekukazakhe kobana abe mkakhe. UJakopo walala naye. 
Genesis30:5 UBhilirha waba sidisi. Wabelethela uJakopo indodana. 
Genesis30:6 URarheli wathi: “UZimu ungigwebele, walalela isibawo sami, wangipha indodana.” Ngebangelo wamthiya bona nguDani." 
Genesis30:7 UBhilirha incekukazi kaRarheli waba sidisi godu wabelethela uJakopo indodana yesibili. 
Genesis30:8 URarheli wathi: “Ngibindene nodadwethu ngamandla amakhulu, ngamhlula.” Alo-ke wayithiya bona nguNafitali." 
Genesis30:9 Kuthe lokha uLeya nakabona bonyana akasabelethi, wathatha uZilipha incekukazakhe, wamnikela uJakopo bona abe mkakhe." 
Genesis30:10 Yeke uZilipha incekukazi kaLeya wabelethela uJakopo indodana. 
Genesis30:11 ULeya wathi: “Ngehlelwe litjhudu!” Yeke wayithiya bona nguGadi. 
Genesis30:12 UZilipha incekukazi kaLeya wabelethela uJakopo indodana yesibili. 
Genesis30:13 ULeya wathi: “Maye nginamile! Ngambala amaqhakazana azongibiza ngonosinamile.” Yeke wayithiya ibizo bona ngu-Atjheri. 
Genesis30:14 Kwathi ngesikhathi sokuvunwa kwekoroyi uRubeni waphuma waya emasimini wafese wathola ikofe, wayilethela unina uLeya. URarheli wayibona wathi: “Akhe ungiphe ikofe leyo oyiphathelwe yindodanakho.”" 
Genesis30:15 ULeya waphendula wathi: “Akukaneli ukungithathela indodami na? Nanje usalinga ukuthathela indodanami ikofe yayo?” URarheli wathi: “Nangabe indodanakho ingangipha ikofe yayo, khona-ke ungalala noJakopo ubusukobu.”" 
Genesis30:16 Kuthe bona uJakopo abuye emasimini, uLeya waphuma wayomhlangabeza, wafese wathi: “Uzolala nami ubusuku banamhlanjesobu ngombana ngikuqatjhe ngekofe yendodanami.” Nje-ke walala naye ubusukobo." 
Genesis30:17 UZimu wezwa umthandazo kaLeya, waba sidisi bewabelethela uJakopo indodana yesihlanu." 
Genesis30:18 ULeya wathi: “UZimu ungikhokhele ngombana nganikela indodami incekukazami.” Nje-ke wayithiya ibizo bona ngu-Isakari. 
Genesis30:19 ULeya waba sidisi godu bewabelethela uJakopo indodana yesithandathu. 
Genesis30:20 Wathi: “UZimu ungiphe isipho esihle, kwanjesi indodami izakuba ngemkhawulwenami ngombana ngiyibelethele amadodana amathandathu.” Yeke wayithiya ibizo bona nguZebuloni." 
Genesis30:21 Ngemva kwalokho wabelethela uJakopo indodakazi, wayithiya bona nguDina." 
Genesis30:22 Yeke uZimu wakhumbula uRarheli, wezwa umthandazwakhe wavula isibeletho sakhe." 
Genesis30:23 Waba sidisi wabeletha indodana, wathi: “UZimu ungithule ihlazo lami.”" 
Genesis30:24 Wayithiya ibizo bona nguJosefa asithi: “Inga uSomnini angangingezelela ngomsana omunye godu.” 
Genesis30:25 Ngemva kokobana uRarheli abelethe uJosefa, uJakopo wathi kuLabani: “Ngivumela ngigoduke, ngibuyele enarhenekhethu." 
Genesis30:26 Nginikela abafazi bami engabafumana ngokubasebenzela kuwe kanye nabantwabami. Nawe uyazi bona ngakusebenzela kuhle kangangani.” 
Genesis30:27 ULabani wathi kuye: “Ungangivumela khengithi kuwe: Nginjingile. Ngokuba khona kwakho kimapha, uSomnini ungibusisile." 
Genesis30:28 Ngitjela bona ungibulalelaphi, ngizakukhokhela.”" 
Genesis30:29 UJakopo waphendula wathi: “Nawe uyazi bona ngakusebenzela kangangani nokobanyana imihlambakho yanda kangangani ngaphasi kwesandla sami. 
Genesis30:30 Iye, okuncani gade unakho ngaphambi kokobana ngifike, nokho ngemva kwalokho kwanda khulu. USomnini wakubusisa ngokuba khona kwami kuwapha. Alo, mina ngiyokuthoma nini-ke ngezomzami?”" 
Genesis30:31 ULabani wathi: “Ufuna ngikunikeleni?” UJakopo waphendula wathi: “Angifuni ikokhelo. Ngizokusoloko ngikwelusela umhlambakho nange singavumelana kilokhu: 
Genesis30:32 Ngizakhamba hlangana nemimhlambakho namhlanje ngikhuphe zoke iinlwana ezinemibala engakajayeleki. Ngizakuthatha zoke iimvana ezinzima nazo zoke iimbuzi ezimabalabala nezinemitleza. Lokho-ke kuzakuba yikokhelwami. 
Genesis30:33 Ukwethembeka kwami kuzakubonakala kuhle ngesikhathi esizako lokha nawuzokuhlola umhlambami: Nawufunyana iimbuzi ezingasimabalabala nezinganamitleza nezimvu ezingasinzima, uzakwazi bona zetjiwe ngimi.”" 
Genesis30:34 ULabani waphendula wathi: “Kulungile, akube njengombana usitjho.”" 
Genesis30:35 Kodwana khona mhlokho, uLabani wakhetha zoke iimpongo ezimabalabala nezimtleza, nazo zoke iimbuzi ezisikazi ezimabalabala nezimtleza, okutjho zoke ezinamabala amhlophe nezimvu zoke ezingasinzima, wazibeka ezandleni zamadodanakhe." 
Genesis30:36 ULabani wabeka ibanga lekhambo lamalanga amathathu phakathi kwakhe noJakopo. UJakopo yena welusa inengi lemihlambi yakaLabani. 
Genesis30:37 UJakopo wathatha amaswazi kapopuliri, i-alimondi newamapalatani wawahluba amaqolwawo ngokwenza imitleza ukuze kubonakale ubumhlope bamaswazi lawo." 
Genesis30:38 Wabeka amaswazi awahlubileko lawo ngaphambi komhlambi weembuzi ngeenkerebheni lapha uselela khona amanzi. Umhlambi lowo gade ulungele ukujarhwa lokha nawuzokusela amanzi," 
Genesis30:39 bekuthi lokha nawujarhana phambi kwamaswazi lawo, uzale iimbuzana ezinamabala amhlophe, ezimtleza nezimabalabala." 
Genesis30:40 UJakopo wahlukanisa izimvu eembuzini. Waqalisa izimvu eembuzini ezimitleza nezinzima lokha nazijarhanako. Ngokwenza njalo wazenzela imihlambi angazange ayihlanganise neyakaLabani. 
Genesis30:41 Kwathi umhlambi weembuzi oqinileko nawujarhanako, uJakopo wabeka amaswazi phambi kwawo ngeenkerebheni ukuze ujarhanele phambi kwamaswazapho." 
Genesis30:42 Kodwana azange abeke amaswazi phambi komhlambi obogabogako. Ngaleyondlela umhlambi obogabogako waba ngewakaLabani kwathi oqinileko waba ngewakaJakopo. 
Genesis30:43 Yeke koke uJakopo anakho kwanda. Azange abe nezimvu neembuzi kwaphela kodwana waba namakhobokakazi, amakhoboka, amakamela nabodumbana." 
Genesis31:1 UJakopo wezwa bonyana amadodana kaLabani gade asithi: “UJakopo lo, sese athethe koke okungokwakababa. Uzinonise khulu ngakho koke ubaba anakho.”" 
Genesis31:2 Wabona bonyana uLabani akasese mehlweni njengaphambilini. 
Genesis31:3 USomnini wathi kuJakopo: “Buyela emuva enarheni yaboyihlo neenhlobeni zakho. Ngizakuba nawe.” 
Genesis31:4 Yeke uJakopo wathumela ilizwi kuRarheli noLeya bonyana beze emmangweni emhlambinakhe. 
Genesis31:5 Wathi kibo: “Ngilemuke bonyana ubabenu akasese mehlweni kimapha njengombana gade angakho ngaphambilini, kodwana uZimu kababa ungisizile." 
Genesis31:6 Nani niyazi bonyana ngisebenzele ubabenu ngamandlami woke. 
Genesis31:7 Phezu kwalokho yena wangidlelezela ngokuphambanisa umrholwami kalitjhumi. Nokho uZimu akakamvumeli kobana angilimaze. 
Genesis31:8 Bekathi lokha nakathi uzangikhokhela ngomhlambi omabalabala, woke umhlambi uzale iimvana neembuzana ezimabalabala. Athi lokha nakathi uzangikhokhela ngomhlambi onemitleza, woke uzale iimvana neembuzana ezinemitleza." 
Genesis31:9 Nje-ke uZimu uthathele ubabenu ifuyo wayinikela mina. 
Genesis31:10 “Ngesikhathi sokujarhwa ngakhe ngabhudanga, ngathi nangiqalako ngabona bonyana iimpongo ezijarha umhlambi ngezimabalabala, ezinemitleza nezimapharaphara." 
Genesis31:11 Ingilozi kaZimu yathi kimi ebhudangweni, ‘Jakopo!’ ngathi, ‘Ngilapha!’" 
Genesis31:12 Yaraga yathi, ‘Qala, zoke iimpongo ezijarha umhlambi ngezimabalabala, ezinemitleza nezimapharaphara. Lokhu kwenzeka ngombana ngibone koke uLabani akwenze kuwe." 
Genesis31:13 NginguZimu weBhethe-Eli lapha wazesa khona ilitje nalapha wenze khona isifungo kimi. Nje-ke suka enarheni le bese ubuyela emuva enarheni yekhenu.’ ” 
Genesis31:14 URarheli noLeya baphendula bathi: “Sisese nesabelo elifeni lakababa na? 
Genesis31:15 Angithi usithatha njengamaphandle! Akakasithengisi kwaphela, kodwana ugomojele koke esikhokhelwe ngakho." 
Genesis31:16 Ngambala woke umnono uZimu awumuke ubabethu ungowethu nabantwabethu. Yeke yenza nanyana yini uZimu akutjele bona uyenze.” 
Genesis31:17 UJakopo walungisa, wakhweza abantwabakhe nabafazi bakhe phezu kwamakamela," 
Genesis31:18 waraga yoke imihlambakhe okutjho yoke ifuyo azifumanela yona ePadana-Aramu, wanqomba kuyise u-Isaka enarheni yeKanana." 
Genesis31:19 Lokha uLabani nayokurhuna izimvu, uRarheli weba imihlalandlini yakayise." 
Genesis31:20 Phezu kwalokho uJakopo wakhukhuthela uLabani umAramu ngokungamtjeli bonyana uyabaleka. 
Genesis31:21 Wabaleka nakho koke agade anakho, wayama umlambo iYufrathe wanqomba eentatjaneni zakwaGiliyadi." 
Genesis31:22 Kwathi elangeni lesithathu uLabani wabikelwa bonyana uJakopo ubalekile. 
Genesis31:23 ULabani wabutha iinhlobo zakhe, wagijimisa uJakopo amalanga alikhomba. Wambambela eentatjaneni zakwaGiliyadi." 
Genesis31:24 UZimu waziveza kuLabani umAramu ngebhudango ebusuku wathi kuye: “Utjheje ikulumakho noJakopo.” 
Genesis31:25 UJakopo gade ahlome itendakhe eentatjaneni zakwaGiliyadi lokha uLabani namfumanako. ULabani nomndenakhe nabo bahloma amatendabo lapho. 
Genesis31:26 ULabani wathi kuJakopo: “Yintobani oyenzileko le? Ungikhukhuthele ngokuraga amadodakazami njengeembotjhwa epini. 
Genesis31:27 Ungebeleleni bewabaleka sidu na? Nangathana fese wangibikela, bengizokwenzela umnyanya wokukulayelisa ngethabo nangokukuvumela ingoma sililise abosotjherere namaharibha." 
Genesis31:28 Azange usangipha nethuba lokuncwanga abantwana babantwabami namadodakazami ngibalayelise. Uyazi wenze ubudlhadlha bakodlhadlha. 
Genesis31:29 Nginamandla wokunilimaza, kodwana ubusuku bayizolo uZimu waboyihlo uthe kimi, ‘Utjheje ikulumakho noJakopo.’" 
Genesis31:30 Ngiyabona bonyana ngambala usendleleni ngombana uhlulukele khulu ukubuyela kwenu. Alo-ke webeleni abozinyana bami?” 
Genesis31:31 UJakopo waphendula wathi kuLabani: “Ngibalekile ngombana gade ngesaba. Ngadlumbana bonyana uzangemuka amadodakazakho. 
Genesis31:32 Kodwana nange ufunyana nanyana ngubani ogugudlhele abozinyana bakho, uzakuhlukana namabele. Ngikhombisa phambi kweenhlobo zethwezi bonyana yini yakho engiyithetheko. Nawuyifunyanako, ithathe.” UJakopo gade angazi bonyana uRarheli webe abosingazimabo." 
Genesis31:33 Yeke uLabani wangena ngetendeni lakaJakopo, lakaLeya neencekukazi ezimbili; kodwana azange afunyane litho. Naphuma etendeni lakaLeya waya kelakaRarheli." 
Genesis31:34 URarheli gade athethe imihlalandlini wayibeka ngaphakathi kwesala sekamela wahlala phezu kwayo. ULabani waphumbutha koke ngetendenapho kodwana azange afunyane litho. 
Genesis31:35 URarheli wathi kuyise: “Ubaba angathukutheli nangibona ngitshimalele phasi ngingasikimi ubaba nangenako, ngisesikhathini.” Yeke wabhenyegula kodwana azange ayifunyane imihlalandlini." 
Genesis31:36 UJakopo wathukuthela wasola uLabani wathi: “Ngikone ngani? Ngikwenze sono bani nawulokhu utjha kangaka ngami nje? 
Genesis31:37 Iye, uphumbuthe yoke ipahlami! Alo, ufunyaneni-ke okungekwakho? Kuveze ukubeke phambi komndenakho nowami ukuze kuphele intwele phakathi kwami nawe!" 
Genesis31:38 Sele kuminyaka ematjhumi amabili yoke ngihlala nawe. Izimvu neembuzi zakho azange zipholoze, nami azange khengigome amaqama womhlambakho." 
Genesis31:39 Azange khengikulethele iinlwana ezidatjulwe ziinyamazana zommango; kube kukonakalelwa kwami koke lokho. Ngaphezu kwalokho ubize ikokhelo kimi malungana nanyana yini eyetjiweko emini namkha ebusuku. 
Genesis31:40 Ngiphile makghwakghwa nawe: Emini bengikhanzingwa mtjhiso kuthi ebusuku ngigongobaliswe makhaza. Bengihlwa ngiqale ngamehlo wayizolo! 
Genesis31:41 Ngiphile njalo iminyaka ematjhumi amabili yoke endawenakho. Ngikusebenzele iminyaka elitjhumi nane kobana ngifumane amadodakazakho amabili neminyaka esithandathu ukufumana umhlambi. Khonapho waphambanisa umrholwami katjhumitjhumi. 
Genesis31:42 Nangathana uZimu wabobaba, uZimu ka-Abrahamu, uZimu ohloniphekako ku-Isaka gade angasi nami, ngiqinisile ngithi ngabe ungiqotjhe ngimkhonoze. Kodwana uZimu ubonile umtlhagwami nomjuluko wezandla zami bekwathi ebusukwini bayizolo wakusola.”" 
Genesis31:43 ULabani waphendula uJakopo wathi: “Abantazanaba madodakazami, abantwanaba bantwabami, nomhlambi lo ngewami. Koke okubonakokhu kuthi mina. Kodwana yini engabe ngisayenza namhlanje ngamadodakazami lawa, namkha ngabantwana ababelethwe ngiwo?" 
Genesis31:44 Yeke mina nawe asenze isivumelwano, kube bufakazi phakathi kwami nawe.”" 
Genesis31:45 UJakopo wathatha ilitje walijamisa laba lilitje lesikhumbuzo. 
Genesis31:46 ULabani wathi eenhlotjeni zakhe: “Buthelelani amatje.” Ngambala benza njalo bawakghubelela aba siqorho. Nabaqeda lapho bagomela esiqorhwenapho. 
Genesis31:47 ULabani wasibiza bonyana yiYegari-Sahaduta, kodwana uJakopo wasibiza bonyana yiGaledi." 
Genesis31:48 ULabani wathi: “Isiqorhwesi singufakazi phakathi kwami nawe namhlanjesi.” Kungebangelo kwathiwa yiGaledi. 
Genesis31:49 Godu kwathiwa yiMitsipha ngombana uLabani wathi: “Inga uSomnini angaba mlindi phakathi kwami nawe lokha nasisemakudana. 
Genesis31:50 Nakwenzeka uhlukumeze amadodakazami namkha uthathe abanye abafazi ngaphandle kwamadodakazami, ngitjho nanyana kungekho obonako, khumbula bonyana uZimu ungufakazi phakathi kwami nawe.”" 
Genesis31:51 Godu uLabani wathi: “Nasi isiqorho engisikghubelele phakathi kwami nawe begodu nanti nelitje lesikhumbuzo. 
Genesis31:52 Isiqorho esingakimi nelitje lesikhumbuzo elingakuwe bufakazi besivumelwano sokobana angeze ngasidlula ngize ngakuwe bona ngikulimaze, nawe angeze wasidlula uze ngakimi bona ungilimaze." 
Genesis31:53 UZimu kayihlo u-Abrahamu nabozinyana bakababa uNarhori bazakugweba phakathi kwethu.” UJakopo wafunga ngoZimu ohloniphekileko kuyise u-Isaka. 
Genesis31:54 Wenza umhlatjelo entabeni, wamema iinhlobo zakhe bona zizogoma. Ngemva kobana sele bagomile, bahlala ubusukobo entabenapho." 
Genesis31:55 Ekuseni ngakusasa uLabani wancwanga abantwana babantwabakhe namadodakazakhe wawabusisa. Wabuyela kwakhe. 
Genesis32:1 UJakopo wangena indlelakhe, khonapho iingelozi zakaZimu zahlangana naye." 
Genesis32:2 Kwathi lokha uJakopo nazibonako wathi: “Leli libutho lakaZimu!” Wathiya indawo leyo bonyana yiMarhanayimu. 
Genesis32:3 UJakopo wathuma iinthunywa phambi kwakhe kumfowabo u-Esewu enarheni yeSeyiri kwa-Edomu. 
Genesis32:4 Wathi kizo: “Tjelani ikosami u-Esewu bonyana incekwayo uJakopo ithi, ‘Bengiseze ngikhonze kwaLabani bekube gadesi." 
Genesis32:5 Ngineenkomo nabodumbana, izimvu neembuzi, amakhoboka namakhobokakazi. Nje-ke ngithi angithumele umlayezo lo ekosinami kobanyana ngifumane umusa emehlwenayo.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Iinthunywa zabuyela kuJakopo zathi: “Sifikile kwamfowenu u-Esewu, nje-ke usendleleni uzokuhlangabeza, ukhamba namakhulu amane wamadoda.”" 
Genesis32:7 UJakopo wethukwa khulu bewakhathazeka ngalokho. Wahlukanisa abantu akhamba nabo, imihlambi yezimvu neembuzi, yeenkomo neyamakamela ngeenqhema ezimbili." 
Genesis32:8 Wadlumbana wathi: “Kuzakuthi u-Esewu nakasahlela isiqhema esinye nokho kube nesinye esiphunyurhako.” 
Genesis32:9 Yeke uJakopo wathandaza wathi: “Maye Zimu kabamkhulu u-Abrahamu, Zimu kababa u-Isaka! Somnini wena owathi kimi angibuyele enarhenekhethu neenhlotjeni zami begodu wathi uzangiphumelelisa," 
Genesis32:10 ngimncani khulu bonyana ungabeze ube nomusa ongaka bewutjengise nokwethembeka okungaka kimi mina ncekwakho. Iye, benginedondolo kwaphela lokha nangiyama iJordani le, kodwana gadesi sele ngiziinqhema ezimbili." 
Genesis32:11 Ngibawa kobana ungisindise esandleni somfowethu u-Esewu ngombana ngiyamesaba. Nginevalo lokobana uzangisahlela abe abulale abonobantwana nabantwana ababavikeleko. 
Genesis32:12 Somnini wena ngokwakho uthe ngambala uzangiphumelelisa bewenze iinzukulwana zami zibe ngangehlabathi yelwandle engabalekiko.” 
Genesis32:13 Wahlwa ubusukobo lapho, wakhethela umfowabo u-Esewu isipho phakathi kwalokho agade anakho:" 
Genesis32:14 iimbuzi ezisikazi ezimakhulu amabili neempongo ezimatjhumi amabili, izimvu ezisikazi ezimakhulu amabili namaqama amatjhumi amabili," 
Genesis32:15 amakamela asikazi amatjhumi amathathu namakamedlana wakhona, iinkomazi ezimatjhumi amane neenkunzi ezilitjhumi, abodumbana abasikazi abamatjhumi amabili nabaduna abalitjhumi." 
Genesis32:16 Koke lokhu wakubeka ezandleni zeensebenzi zakhe, wakuhlukanisa ngemihlambi wathi kizo: “Khambani phambi kwami, nitjhiye isikhala hlangana nemihlambi.”" 
Genesis32:17 Wayala isisebenzi esimrholi wathi: “Lokha umfowethu u-Esewu nakahlangana nawe bese abuze bonyana ungewakabani, uthathelaphi nokobana umhlambi ongaka lo ngewakabani," 
Genesis32:18 uthi kuye, ‘Ngewencekwakho uJakopo. Usisipho esithunyelelwe ikosakhe u-Esewu. Ngikhuluma nje useenthendeni zethu.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Wayala nesisebenzi sesibili, sesithathu nazo zoke ezinye ezaziraga imihlambi wathi: “Nani nitjho njalo ku-Esewu nanihlangana naye." 
Genesis32:20 Niqiniseke bonyana nithi, ‘UJakopo incekwakho useenthendeni zethu.’ ” UJakopo wayala njalo ngombana wadlumbana wathi: “Ngizomthoba ummoya ngezipho engimthumelela zonezi. Ngemva kwalokho sengingaqalana naye. Mhlamunye uzangamukela.”" 
Genesis32:21 Yeke izipho zakaJakopo zakhamba phambi kwakhe, kodwana yena wahlwa ubusukobo ekampeni." 
Genesis32:22 Ngobusukobo uJakopo wavuka wathatha abafazi bakhe ababili, amakhohlwakhe amabili namadodanakhe alitjhumi nanye bayama izibuko leJabokhi." 
Genesis32:23 Ngemva kobana abayamise umlanjana, wayamisa nayo yoke ipahlakhe." 
Genesis32:24 Kuthe bona uJakopo asale yedwa, kwafika umuntu othize wabindana naye bekwasa." 
Genesis32:25 Umuntu loyo nakabona bonyana akahluli uJakopo wamkghodlha inyonga beyakhwamuka nakalokhu abindana naye njalo. 
Genesis32:26 Wathi kuJakopo: “Ngilisa ngikhambe, nakhu kuyasa.” Kodwana uJakopo wathi: “Angizukulisa ungakangibusisi.”" 
Genesis32:27 Umuntu loyo wambuza wathi: “Ungubani ibizo lakho?” Yena wathi: “NginguJakopo.” 
Genesis32:28 Umuntu wathi: “Ibizo lakho akusazokuba nguJakopo, kodwana uzakuba ngu-Israyeli ngombana uwunawunene nabozinyana nabantu bewahlula.”" 
Genesis32:29 UJakopo wabuza wathi: “Alo, wena, ibizo lakho ngubani?” Kodwana waphendula wathi: “Ungibuzelani ibizo lami?” Wabusisa uJakopo khonapho-ke." 
Genesis32:30 UJakopo wathiya indawo leyo bonyana yiPeniyeli asithi: “Ngambala ngibonene nozinyana ubuso nobuso, khonapho ipilwami yabulungeka.”" 
Genesis32:31 Kwathi uJakopo nakadlula ePenuweli wabona ilanga liphuma. Gade ahluza ngombana inyongakhe beyirhwahlaphele. 
Genesis32:32 Kungebangelo bekube namhlanjesi ama-Israyeli akawugomi umsipha wenyonga ngombana umuntu loyo wakghodlha umsipha wenyonga kaJakopo. 
Genesis33:1 Kwathi lokha uJakopo nakaphakamisa amehlo, nangu u-Esewu asiza namakhulu amane wamadoda. Wahlukanisa abantwana: abanye baba noLeya abanye baba noRarheli kanye namakhohlo amabili." 
Genesis33:2 Wabeka amakhohlo nabantwabawo ngaphambili, alandelwa nguLeya nabantwabakhe, uRarheli noJosefa baba semuva." 
Genesis33:3 Yena wakhamba phambi kwabo boke wafese waguqa ehlabathini wahloma ihloko phasi kalikhomba alokhu atjhidela kumfowabo. 
Genesis33:4 Kodwana u-Esewu wagijima wamhlangabeza wamgona, wabeka ihlokwakhe emahlombe, wamncwanga emhlathini. Bathoma balila bobabili." 
Genesis33:5 Kuthe bona u-Esewu avuse amehlo wabona amakhosikazi nabantwana, wabuza wathi: “Bobani abakhamba nawaba?” UJakopo wathi: “Bantwana okuthe uZimu ngesisa sakhe wabapha incekwakho.”" 
Genesis33:6 Amakhohlo nabantwabawo atjhidela ahloma iinhloko phasi. 
Genesis33:7 Kwalandela uLeya nabantwabakhe nabo bahloma iinhloko phasi. Kwaswaphelisa ngoJosefa noRarheli nabo bahloma iinhloko phasi. 
Genesis33:8 U-Esewu wabuza wathi: “Alo, uthini ngemihlambi engaka engihlangene nayo leya?” UJakopo waphendula wathi: “Bengithi angifunyane umusa emehlweni wekosami.”" 
Genesis33:9 Kodwana u-Esewu wathi: “Nginakho ngokwaneleko mfowethu. Zilondele lokho onakho.” 
Genesis33:10 UJakopo wathi: “Awa, ngiyakubawa! Nayibe ngifumene umusa kuwe, yamukela isipho samesi. Kazi ngithe nangikubonako kwaba ngathi ngibona uZimu, kodwana phezu kwalokho ungamukele kuhle." 
Genesis33:11 Ngibawa wamukele isipho esilethwe kuwe ngombana uZimu ube nomusa kimi nginokwaneleko.” UJakopo watomatomela u-Esewu wagcina asamukele. 
Genesis33:12 Khonapho u-Esewu wathi: “Asikhambeni, ngilandelani.”" 
Genesis33:13 Kodwana uJakopo wathi: “Ikosami iyazi bonyana abantwana basese buthakathaka nokobana ngisamele ngitlhogomele izimvu ezisikazi namathole amunyisako. Nange zikhanjiswa ngamandla ngelanga linye, zingafa zoke." 
Genesis33:14 Yeke bengithi ikosami ayikhambe phambi kwencekwayo, mina nginanye ngamaqa wokukhamba kwabantwana nangokuya ngomsebenzi odingeka emhlambini, bengifike ekosinami eSeyiri.”" 
Genesis33:15 U-Esewu wathi: “Nakunjalo-ke yithi ngitjhiye amanye wamadoda engikhamba nawo kuwapha.” Kodwana uJakopo waphendula wathi: “Uzitshwenyelani kangako? Bengithi kwanele ukufumana umusa ekosinami.” 
Genesis33:16 Khona mhlokho u-Esewu wathoma ikhambo lokubuyela eSeyiri. 
Genesis33:17 Kodwana uJakopo yena waya eSukothi lapha azakhela khona indawo bewenzela nefuywakhe imithunzi ngamatjhwaba. Kungebangelo indawo leyo kwathiwa yiSukothi. 
Genesis33:18 Ngemva kobana uJakopo abuye ePadana-Aramu, wafika aphephile edorobheni leTjhekemu enarheni yeKanana. Wahloma itende lakhe ngepumalanga yedorobho." 
Genesis33:19 Indawo lapha gade ahlome khona itende lakhe wayithenga eenhlotjeni zakaRhamori uyise kaTjhekemu ngeempaparwana ezilikhulu zesiliva. 
Genesis33:20 Wajamisa lapho i-aldari, walibiza bonyana yi-Eli-Elohe-Israyeli." 
Genesis34:1 UDina indodakazi kaJakopo ayibelethelwa nguLeya waphuma wayokubukela abantazana bendawo leyo. 
Genesis34:2 Kwathi lokha uTjhekemu umsa kaRhamori umRhivi omphathi wendawo nakambonako wamthatha wamgagadlhela, ngendlela leyo wamrhubutjha." 
Genesis34:3 Ihliziywakhe yanamathela kuDina indodakazi kaJakopo, wamthanda wabe wamsomasoma." 
Genesis34:4 UTjhekemu wathi kuyise uRhamori: “Ngibawa ungithathele umntazana lo abe mkami.” 
Genesis34:5 Lokha uJakopo nakezwa bonyana uDina indodakazakhe usilaphaziwe, amadodanakhe gade asekweluseni nomhlambakhe. Yeke wazithulela abe abuya ekweluseni." 
Genesis34:6 URhamori nabakhambisani bakhe baya kuJakopo bona bayokukhuluma naye. 
Genesis34:7 Kusesenjalo amadodana kaJakopo abuya emrhuleni ngombana gade sele ezwile okwenzekileko. Amadoda lawo bekaqumbelene agcwele ipotjwana ngobuhlola obenziwe nguTjhekemu ngokulala nendodakazi kaJakopo, into engakameli ukwenziwa kwa-Israyeli!" 
Genesis34:8 URhamori wenza isiphakamiso wathi kiwo: “Ihliziyo yendodanami uTjhekemu iyancithika ngomntwanenu. Yeke ngizoyibawela umkhamanzi. 
Genesis34:9 Thathelanani nathi, siphani amadodakazenu bese nithatha amadodakazethu." 
Genesis34:10 Hlalani nathi. Inarha ibanzi phambi kwenu, hlalani ninzinze kiyo. Dlisani umhlambenu nanyana kukuphi, nizizuzele ipahla enarhenapha.”" 
Genesis34:11 UTjhekemu wathi kuyise lakaDina nabafowabo: “Naningivumelako ngifumene umusa kini, ngizaninikela nanyana yini eniyibiza kimi." 
Genesis34:12 Ningangibiza nanyana lilobolo eliphezulu kangangani ngomakoti nesipho esikhulu, ngizanikhokhela lokho enikubizako kimi. Kwaphela nginikelani umntazana abe mkami.”" 
Genesis34:13 Ngebanga lokobana udadwabo uDina gade asilaphaziwe, amadodana kaJakopo aphendula ngobuqili nakakhuluma noTjhekemu noyise uRhamori." 
Genesis34:14 Bathi kibo: “Asikwazi ukwenza into enjalo, akwazeki ukunikela udadwethu indoda engakasoki. Lokho kungaba lihlazo kithi." 
Genesis34:15 Singavumelana nawe kwaphela nange nivuma ukufana nathi ngokusoka boke abaduna benu. 
Genesis34:16 Nanenze njalo, sizaninikela amadodakazethu bese sithatha amadodakazenu. Sizakuhlala nani sibe munye." 
Genesis34:17 Kodwana naningavumelani nathi nisoke, sizakuthatha umntazanethu, sifuduke.”" 
Genesis34:18 Isiphakamiso sabo sabonakala sisihle kuRhamori nendodanakhe uTjhekemu. 
Genesis34:19 Isokana ebegade kungelihlonitjhwako ngakwabo azange lone isikhathi, lenza njengombana batjhwile ngombana gade lithathekile ngendodakazi kaJakopo." 
Genesis34:20 Yeke uRhamori nendodanakhe uTjhekemu baya esangweni ledorobho labo ukuyokhuluma namadoda womuzi, bathi kiwo:" 
Genesis34:21 “Abantwaba banobuntu nathi. Yeke bavumeleni bahlale enarhenapha badlisele khona ifuywabo. Qalani inarha ibanzi mahlangothi woke. Nje-ke asendiselaneni nabo. 
Genesis34:22 Kodwana naku umbandela abavuma ngawo bona bahlale nathi sibe munye nabo: Akusokwe boke abaduna bethu njengombana nabo basokile. 
Genesis34:23 Ngithi sibulele ngombana imihlambabo, ipahlabo nayo yoke ifuywabo izakuba ngeyethu. Kwethu sekuvuma ukuze bahlale phakathi kwethwapha!”" 
Genesis34:24 Woke amadoda agade anekghono lokulwa avumelana noRhamori nendodanakhe uTjhekemu. Yeke woke omduna wasokwa, okutjho boke abanekghono lokulwa." 
Genesis34:25 Elangeni lesithathu lokha basese seenhlungwini, amadodana amabili wakaJakopo, uSimiyoni noLevi, abanakwabo kaDina, bobabili bathatha iinsabula zabo bazingenela edorobheni ngaphandle kwesiliyo, babulala boke abaduna." 
Genesis34:26 Babulala uRhamori nendodanakhe uTjhekemu ngesabula bathatha uDina ngekumbeni kaTjhekemu bakhamba naye. 
Genesis34:27 Amanye amadodana kaJakopo aya lapha kuneendumbu khona, aphanga idorobho ngombana udadwabo wasilaphazelwa lapho." 
Genesis34:28 Athatha imihlambabo yezimvu neembuzi, iinkomo zabo nabodumbana babo nakho koke kwabo okungedorobheni nokungaphandle emmangweni." 
Genesis34:29 Athumba woke amakhobokabo, abantwababo nababafazi babo. Aphanga koke okungeenkumbeni." 
Genesis34:30 UJakopo wathi kuSimiyoni noLevi: “Ningibangele ihlekelele ngokungenza isizondo ebantwini balapha okumaKanana namaPerizi. Nginedlanzana labantu, yeke nange bangazihlanganisa balwe nami, mina nomzami sizokurhayilwa.”" 
Genesis34:31 Kodwana baphendula uyise bathi: “Bekumele aphathe udadwethu njengengwadla na?” 
Genesis35:1 UZimu wathi kuJakopo: “Yenyuka uyokuhlala eBhethe-Eli. Nawufika lapho wakhe i-aldari lakaZimu owazibonakalisa kuwe lokha nawubalekela umfowenu u-Esewu.” 
Genesis35:2 UJakopo wathi emndeninakhe nakibo boke egade banaye: “Lahlani abosingazimu abaphakathi kwenu, nizihlambulule nembathe izambatho ezinye." 
Genesis35:3 Yizani sikhuphukele eBhethe-Eli lapha ngizafese ngakhele khona uZimu i-aldari, yena owangiphendula mhlana ngitshwenyekileko nobesoloko anami lapha bengikhamba khona.”" 
Genesis35:4 Yeke banikela uJakopo boke abosingazimu ebegade baphakathi kwabo, bamnikela namancinabo. UJakopo wakuthatha koke lokho wakufihla ngaphasi komuthi we-owuku eTjhekemu." 
Genesis35:5 Kwathi lokha nabafudukako ukwesaba okuvela kuZimu kwehlela imizi ebabhodileko kangangobana akunamuntu owalinga ukugijimisa amadodana kaJakopo. 
Genesis35:6 UJakopo nabantu boke egade bakhamba naye bafika eLuzi, okutjho iBhethe-Eli, esenarheni yeKanana." 
Genesis35:7 Wakha i-aldara lapho wathiya indawo leyo bona inguZimu eBhethe-Eli ngombana kukulapha uZimu azibonakalisa kuye khona lokha nakabalekela umnakwabo. 
Genesis35:8 Eduze neBhethe-Eli kunendawo okuthiwa yi-Owuku yesiLilo ngombana uDebhora imbelesi kaRabega wahlongakalela khona, wabulungwa lapho ngaphasi komuthi we-owuku." 
Genesis35:9 Godu uZimu wazibonakalisa kuJakopo lokha nakabuya ePadana-Aramu. Wambusisela eBhethe-Eli," 
Genesis35:10 wathi kuye: “Ibizo lakho unguJakopo, kodwana awusazokubizwa njalo, kuzakuthiwa ungu-Israyeli.” Nje-ke uZimu wamthiya ibizo bona ngu-Israyeli." 
Genesis35:11 UZimu wathi kuye: “NginguZimu oSabekako. Yanda ngembeleko ukuze kuvele iinkoro ngeenkoro kuwe, ubelethe namakhosi." 
Genesis35:12 Wena ngizakupha inarha engayipha u-Abrahamu no-Isaka, kuthi ngemva kwakho ngiyinikele iinzukulwana zakho.”" 
Genesis35:13 Yeke uZimu wenyuka wamtjhiya lapha agade akhuluma naye khona. 
Genesis35:14 UJakopo wajamisa ilitje lesikhumbuzo lapha uZimu akhulume naye khona, wathululela umnikelo wokuselwako kilo, godu walizesa ngamafutha." 
Genesis35:15 Wathiya indawo leyo bona yiBhethe-Eli ngombana uZimu wakhuluma naye lapho. 
Genesis35:16 UJakopo banomndenakhe bafuduka eBhethe-Eli. Kwathi kusese mumangwana ukuya e-Efrata, uRarheli wathoma ukubeletha kodwana waphatheka khulu." 
Genesis35:17 Kuthe asese seenhlungwini zokubeletha njalo, umbelethisi wathi kuye: “Ungesabi ngombana sele unomunye godu umsanyana.”" 
Genesis35:18 Wadosa umphefumulo kokugcina ngombana gade sele ahlongakala wathiya umsanakhe bona nguBhen-Oni. Kodwana uyise wamthiya bona nguBhenjamini. 
Genesis35:19 Yeke uRarheli wahlongakala bewabulungwa endleleni eya e-Efrata okutjho iBhethe-Lehema namhlanje. 
Genesis35:20 UJakopo wajamisa ilitje lesikhumbuzo ngehla kwethuna lakhe; ilitjelo lisikhumbuzo sethuna lakaRarheli bekube gadesi. 
Genesis35:21 U-Israyeli wahlabela phambili, wahloma itende ngaphetjheya kweMigidali-Ederi." 
Genesis35:22 Kwathi u-Israyeli asahlezi kilesosifunda, uRubeni wangenela uBilirha ikhohlo lakayise, walala naye. U-Israyeli wakuzwa lokho. UJakopo gade anamadodana alitjhumi nambili:" 
Genesis35:23 Amadodana kaLeya bekunguRubeni, izibulo lakaJakopo, uSimiyoni, uLevi, uJuda, u-Isakari noZebuloni." 
Genesis35:24 Amadodana wakaRarheli bekunguJosefa noBhenjamini. 
Genesis35:25 Amadodana wencekukazi kaRarheli, okutjho uBhilirha, bekunguDani noNafitali." 
Genesis35:26 Amadodana wencekukazi kaLeya, okutjho uZilipha, bekunguGadi no-Atjheri. Lawo-ke madodana kaJakopo abelethelwa wona ePadana-Aramu." 
Genesis35:27 UJakopo wabuyela kuyise u-Isaka eMamre eduze neKhiriyathi-Araba okutjho iRhebroni namhlanje, lapha bekukhonze khona u-Abrahamu no-Isaka." 
Genesis35:28 U-Isaka waphila iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi abunane. 
Genesis35:29 Gade sele aluphele khulu lokha nakakhohlela kokugcina, wahlongakala aliqhegu begodu anelisekile ngepilo. Amadodanakhe u-Esewu noJakopo ambulunga." 
Genesis36:1 Naku umlando ka-Esewu okutjho u-Edomu. 
Genesis36:2 U-Esewu wathatha abafazi emadodakazini weKanana: u-Ada indodakazi ka-Eloni umRhithi, u-Oholibhama indodakazi ka-Ana oyindodakazi kaTsibiyoni, umRhivi" 
Genesis36:3 noBhasemathi indodakazi ka-Itjhimayeli udadwabo kaNebayothi. 
Genesis36:4 U-Ada wabelethela u-Esewu u-Elifazi, uBhasemathi wabeletha uRewuyeli," 
Genesis36:5 u-Oholibhama wabeletha uJewutjhi, uJalamu noKhorarhi. Lawo bekumadodana ka-Esewu abelethelwa wona eKanana." 
Genesis36:6 U-Esewu gade athethe abafazi bakhe, amadodanakhe, amadodakazakhe nabo boke bomndenakhe, ifuywakhe, zoke iinlwana ezinye kanye nayo yoke ipahla ayizuza enarheni yeKanana, wafudukela enarheni engepumalanga komfowabo uJakopo." 
Genesis36:7 Ipahlabo besele iyinengi khulu kobana bebangaragela phambili nokuhlala ndawonye. Inarha ebegade bahlala kiyo besele ingasakghoni ukubondla bobabili ngebanga lefuywabo. 
Genesis36:8 U-Esewu okutjho u-Edomu, wanzinza eentatjaneni zeSeyiri." 
Genesis36:9 Lo mlando ka-Esewu uyise wama-Edomu wangeentatjaneni zeSeyiri. 
Genesis36:10 Lawa-ke mabizo wamadodana ka-Esewu: u-Elifazi indodana ka-Ada umka-Esewu, uRewuyeli indodana kaBhasemathi umka-Esewu." 
Genesis36:11 Amadodana ka-Elifazi bekunguTemana, u-Omari, uTsefo, uGatami noKhenazi." 
Genesis36:12 Indodana ka-Esewu, u-Elifazi, gade anekhohlo ibizo lalo kunguTimna owambelethela u-Amalekhi. Lezo bekuziinzukulwana zomka-Esewu u-Ada." 
Genesis36:13 Lawa bekumadodana kaRewuyeli: uNarhathi, uZerarhi, uTjhama noMiza. Lezo bekuziinzukulwana zomka-Esewu uBhasemathi." 
Genesis36:14 Amadodana womka-Esewu u-Oholibhama, indodakazi ka-Ana oyindodakazi kaTsibiyoni, awabelethela u-Esewu bekunguJewutjhi, uJalamu noKhorarhi." 
Genesis36:15 Lawa bekumakhosana weenzukulwana zaka-Esewu okumadodana ka-Elifazi izibulo laka-Esewu: ikosana uTemana, ikosana u-Omari, ikosana uTsefo, ikosana uKhenazi," 
Genesis36:16 ikosana uKhorarhi, ikosana uGatamu, ikosana u-Amalekhi. Lawo bekumakhosana abelethelwe ngu-Elifazi enarheni yakwa-Edomu. Wona gade aziinzukulwana zaka-Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Lawa bekumadodana kaRewuyeli umsa ka-Esewu: ikosana uNarhathi, ikosana uZerarhi, ikosana uTjhama, ikosana uMiza. Lawo-ke bekumakhosana abelethelwe nguRewuyeli enarheni yakwa-Edomu. Wona gade aziinzukulwana zomka-Esewu uBhasemathi." 
Genesis36:18 Lawa bekumadodana ka-Oholibhama umka-Esewu: ikosana uJewutjhi, ikosana uJalamu, ikosana uKhorarhi. Lawo-ke bekumakhosana abelethwe mka-Esewu u-Oholibhama oyindodakazi ka-Ana." 
Genesis36:19 Lezo bekuziinzukulwana zaka-Esewu okutjho u-Edomu ebegade zimakhosana weenkoro. 
Genesis36:20 Lawa bekumaRhori, azizakhamuzi zendabuko zeSeyiri: uLothani, uTjhobali, uTsibiyoni, u-Ana," 
Genesis36:21 uDitjhoni, u-Etseri noDitjhani. Lawo bekumakhosana wamaRhori azizakhamuzi zeSeyiri enarheni yakwa-Edomu." 
Genesis36:22 Amadodana kaLothani bekunguRhori noHemami, ukghariyabo kunguTimna." 
Genesis36:23 Lawa bekumadodana kaTjhobali: u-Alvani, uManarhathi, u-Ebali, uTjhefo no-Onami." 
Genesis36:24 Lawa bekumadodana kaTsibiyoni: u-Aya no-Ana. U-Ana lo ngowathi aseluse abodumbana bakayise uTsibiyoni erhalawumbeni wazithela phezu kwamagoqo. 
Genesis36:25 Laba bekubantwana baka-Ana: uDitjhoni indodana no-Oholibhama indodakazi. 
Genesis36:26 Amadodana kaDitjhoni bekungilawa: uRhemdani, u-Etjhibhani, uJitirani noKerana." 
Genesis36:27 Naka amadodana ka-Etseri: uBhilirhana, uZavana no-Akhana." 
Genesis36:28 Lawa bekumadodana kaDitjhani: u-Utsi no-Arana. 
Genesis36:29 Lawa bekumakhosana wamaRhori: ikosana uLothani, ikosana uTjhobali, ikosana uTsibiyoni, ikosana u-Ana," 
Genesis36:30 ikosana uDitjhoni, ikosana u-Etseri, ikosana uDitjhani. Bona gade bamakhosana weenkoro zamaRhori ukuya ngokobukhosi benarha yeSeyiri." 
Genesis36:31 Lawa kwaba makhosi abusa kwa-Edomu ngaphambi kokobana ikosi yakwa-Israyeli ibuse naphezu kwama-Edomu: 
Genesis36:32 UBhela umsa kaBhewori ovela edorobheni leDinihaba. 
Genesis36:33 Lokha uBhela nakahlongakalako, uJobabi umsa kaZerarhi weBhotsira waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
Genesis36:33 Lokha uBhela nakahlongakalako, uJobabi umsa kaZerarhi weBhotsira waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
Genesis36:34 Kwathi nakuhlongakala uJobabi, uRhutjhamu wenarheni yamaTemani waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
Genesis36:34 Kwathi nakuhlongakala uJobabi, uRhutjhamu wenarheni yamaTemani waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
Genesis36:35 Nakuhlongakala uRhutjhamu, uHadadi umsa kaBhedadi owasahlela bakwaMidiyani esifundeni sakwaMowabi, waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe. Idorobho avela kilo bekuyi-Avithi." 
Genesis36:36 Lokha uHadadi nakahlongakalako, uSamla weMasirekha waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
Genesis36:37 Kwathi lokha nakuhlongakala uSamla, uSawula weRerhobhothi magegana nomlambo waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
Genesis36:38 Nakuhlongakala uSawula, uBhali-Rhanani umsa ka-Akibhori waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
Genesis36:39 Lokha uBhali-Rhanani umsa ka-Akibhori nakahlongakalako, uHadadi waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe. Idorobho lakhe labizwa bona yiPawu; ibizo lomkakhe bekunguMehethabheli indodakazi kaMathiredi oyindodakazi kaMezahabu." 
Genesis36:40 Lokha uHadadi nakahlongakalako, amakhosana alandelako la, abusa kwa-Edomu: ikosana uTimna, ikosana u-Aliva, ikosana uJetethi," 
Genesis36:41 ikosana u-Oholibama, ikosana u-Ela, ikosana uPinoni," 
Genesis36:42 ikosana uKhenazi, ikosana uTemani, ikosana uMibitsari," 
Genesis36:43 ikosana uMagidiyeli, ikosana u-Iramu. Lawo bekumakhosana wakwa-Edomu enye nenye emzinayo esifundeni sayo. Ngiwo-ke lowo umlando ka-Esewu, ongukhokho wama-Edomu." 
Genesis37:1 UJakopo wahlala enarheni lapha gade kukhonze khona uyise, inarha yeKanana." 
Genesis37:2 Lo mlando womndeni kaJakopo. UJosefa, isokana elineminyaka elitjhumi nekhomba, gade elusa imihlambi nabafowabo okumadodana kaBhilirha newakaZilipa abafazi bakayise. Wabaceba kuyise ngakho koke okumbi ebebakwenza." 
Genesis37:3 U-Israyeli gade athanda uJosefa khulu ukudlula amanye amadodana ngombana wabelethelwa yena sele amdala. Wamenzela ijasana kanokutjho. 
Genesis37:4 Kuthe bona abafowabo babone bonyana uyise umthanda khulu kunabo boke, bamfela umona begodu nokukhuluma kwakhe kuhle bebangasakuthathi." 
Genesis37:5 UJosefa waba nebhudango, kwathi lokha nakatjela abafowabo, bamfela umona ukudlula." 
Genesis37:6 Wathi kibo: “Akhese nilalele nanti ibhudango engibe nalo: 
Genesis37:7 Uyazi gade sibopha iintjherefu zekoroyi esimini. Qalani khonapho isitjherefu sami savuka sajama rwe, nanziya zenu zizombeleza bezikhothamele sami.”" 
Genesis37:8 Abafowabo bathi kuye: “Eya, hi! Utjho bonyana wena uzoba yikosethu, usibuse na?” Bamhloya khulu ngebanga lebhudango lakhelo nalokho akutjhwileko." 
Genesis37:9 UJosefa waba nelinye ibhudango, watjela abafowabo godu wathi: “Lalelani, ngibe nelinye ibhudango. Ngibone ilanga nenyezi neenkwekwezi ezilitjhumi nanye zingikhothamela.”" 
Genesis37:10 Kuthe lokha nakatjela uyise nabafowabo ngebhudangwelo, uyise wamthethisa wathi: “Libhudango bani lakhweli wena msana? Udlumbana bonyana mbala mina nonyoko nabafowenu sizakuza kuwe sihlome iinhloko phasi phambi kwakho na?”" 
Genesis37:11 Abafowabo basilingeka ngaye, kodwana uyise wayidlela ngaphakathi indaba le." 
Genesis37:12 Abanakwabo kaJosefa gade bayokwelusa imihlambi kayise eduze neTjhekemu," 
Genesis37:13 u-Israyeli wathi kuJosefa: “Angithi uyazi bonyana abanakwenu belusele imihlambi eduze neTjhekemu? Yewize-ke ngikuthume kibo.” UJosefa waphendula wathi: “Kulungile baba.” 
Genesis37:14 Uyise wathi kuye: “Khamba uyokuqala bonyana koke kusakhamba kuhle ngabafowenu nemihlambi na bese ungilethela ilizwi.” Nje-ke uyise wamthuma; wasuka emrhobeni weRhebroni, akhamba ngendlela eya eTjhekemu." 
Genesis37:15 Umuntu othileko wafunyana uJosefa azulazula emmangweni alahlekile, wambuza wathi: “Uzulazula nje ufunani?”" 
Genesis37:16 UJosefa wamphendula wathi: “Ngifuna abanakwethu. Kghani ungangitlhadlhula bonyana beluselephi umhlambabo?” 
Genesis37:17 Umuntu loyo wathi: “Sebasuka lapha. Ngabezwa basithi, ‘Asiyeni eDotani.’ ” Yeke uJosefa wabalandela wabafumana eDotani." 
Genesis37:18 Bambona aseza kude. Kwathi angakafiki nokufika babesele bamenzele ubukhwebetjhana bokumbulala. 
Genesis37:19 Bathi omunye komunye: “Qalani, nasiya isibhudangikazesiya sisiza!" 
Genesis37:20 Nje-ke yizani sisibulale, sisiphosele ngakomunye wemigodi yomphathamanzi le bese sithi sekwavela isibandana sommango sasiqeda nya. Khesibone bonyana kuzakwenzakalani ngamabhudangwanaso lawo.”" 
Genesis37:21 URubeni wathi bona ezwe lokho, walinga ukuphephisa uJosefa ezandleni zabo ngombana wadlumbana wathi: “Singambulali.”" 
Genesis37:22 Yeke wathi kubafowabo: “Ningathululi iingazi. Mphoseleni ngemgodini womphathamanzi oserhalawumbeni lo, kodwana ningamusi isandla.” URubeni watjho lokhu ukuze amphephise ezandleni zabo kobana akghone ukumbuyisela kuyise." 
Genesis37:23 Kuthe lokha uJosefa nakafika kibomnakwabo, bamhlubulisa ijasanakhe agade ayembethe, okuyijasana kanokutjho." 
Genesis37:24 Bamthatha bamphosela ngemgodini womphathamanzi onganalitho. 
Genesis37:25 Kuthe nabahlala phasi bonyana bagome, bathi nabaphakamisa amehlo babona umlandelande wama-Itjhimayeli uvela eGiliyadi. Amakamelawo gade asiya eGibhide, athwele iinthako zokwenza amakha azithethe emihlobohlobeni yemithi." 
Genesis37:26 UJuda wathi kubafowabo: “Sizakuzuzani nasibulala umfowethu bese sidibizesa iingazi zakhe? 
Genesis37:27 Kubayini singamthengiseli ama-Itjhimayeli lawa? Ngalokho sizabe singakambeki isandla ngombana vele mfowethu, uziingazi nenyamethu.” Abanakwabo bavumelana naye." 
Genesis37:28 Yeke kuthe lokha abarhwebi bamaMidiyani nabadlulako, abanakwabo bakhupha uJosefa ngemgodini bamthengisela ama-Itjhimayeli ngeempaparwana ezimatjhumi amabili zesiliva. Wona akhamba naye eGibhide." 
Genesis37:29 Kuthe lokha uRubeni nabuyela emgodini womphathamanzi wafumana uJosefa angasekho lapho, warathula izambatho zakhe." 
Genesis37:30 Wabuyela kubafowabo wafese wathi kibo: “Umsana loya akasesekho lapha! Maye mina, ngizakuba yini?”" 
Genesis37:31 Yeke bahlaba imbuzi, bathatha ijasana kaJosefa bayenya eengazini zayo." 
Genesis37:32 Bathumela ijasana kanokutjho leyo kuyise bathi: “Sithole lokhu. Kuqale bonyana akusi ngokwendodanakho na?” 
Genesis37:33 UJakopo wayibona wayazi wathi: “Maye mina, yijasana yomsanami le! Kutjho bonyana esinye seembandana ezinelaka simbulele! Ngambala uJosefa urathulwe waba ziinquqwana!”" 
Genesis37:34 Yeke uJakopo wadabula izambatho zakhe, wembatha umgodla. Kwathi lokha nasoloko alilela indodanakhe isikhathi eside," 
Genesis37:35 boke abantwabakhe basikima beza kuye bamduduze, kodwana wala ukududuzwa wathi: “Ngizokulila bengehlele phasi ethuneni lapha kunendodanami khona.” Wamlilela njalo-ke uyise." 
Genesis37:36 AmaMidiyani wona athengisa uJosefa eGibhide kuPothifara oyinduna ekulu yakaFaro nomphathi wobuzimba. 
Genesis38:1 Ngesikhatheso uJuda watjhiya abafowabo wehla wayokuhlala nomuntu we-Adulamu okuthiwa nguRhira. 
Genesis38:2 Lapho uJuda wafese wabona indodakazi yendoda yomKanana okuthiwa nguTjhuwa, wayithatha. Wayiyama," 
Genesis38:3 yabeletha indodana, uJuda wayithiya ibizo bona ngu-Eri." 
Genesis38:4 Yaba sidisi godu, yabeletha indodana, yayithiya ibizo bona ngu-Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Yabeletha indodana godu yayithiya ibizo bona nguTjhela. Ngesikatheso uJuda gade aseKeziba. 
Genesis38:6 UJuda wathathela u-Eri izibulo lakhe umfazi, ibizo lakhe bekunguTamari." 
Genesis38:7 Kodwana u-Eri, izibulo lakaJuda gade akhohlakele phambi kwakaSomnini, ngalokho uSomnini wamliselela bona afe." 
Genesis38:8 Yeke uJuda wathi ku-Onani: “Ngena umkamnakwenu, ugcine isiko kuye njengomrharibakho ubelethele umnakwenu abantwana.”" 
Genesis38:9 Kodwana u-Onani gade asazi bonyana nakuba nendodana angeze kwaba ngeyakhe, nje-ke bekuthi njalo lokha nayama umrharibakhe aphalazele imbewu phasi ukuze angabeletheli umnakwabo abantwana." 
Genesis38:10 Isenzo sakheso saba simbi phambi kwakaSomnini, yeke wamliselela bona naye afe." 
Genesis38:11 UJuda wathi kumalukazanakhe uTamari: “Buyela ekhenu, uhlale umuhlolokazi bekukhule indodanami uTjhela.” Watjho njalo ngombana wadlumbana wathi: “Naye uzabe ahlongakale njengabafowabo.” Yeke uTamari wabuyela kwabo." 
Genesis38:12 Ngemva kwesikhathi eside umkaJuda, indodakazi kaTjhuwa wahlongakala. Kuthe bona uJuda aqede ukuzila, wakhuphukela eTimna emadodeni ebegade arhuna izimvu zakhe. Waphekelelwa mkhongakhe uRhira we-Adulamu." 
Genesis38:13 Kwathi bona uTamari atjelwe bonyana usosokanakhe uya eTimna ukuyorhuna izimvu zakhe," 
Genesis38:14 wahlubula izambatho zobuhlolokazi, waziphotjhonga bewazigubuzesa ngesiyaya. Wathithibala ejikeni le-Enayimu, endleleni eya eTimna. Lokhu wakwenza ngombana wabona bonyana nanyana uTjhela sele akhulile, akanikelwa yena bona abe mfazakhe." 
Genesis38:15 Kuthe uJuda nakambonako, wadlumbana bona uyingwadla ngombana gade agubuzese ubuso bakhe." 
Genesis38:16 Waphambukela kuye angamboni bonyana ngumalukazanakhe, wafese wathi kuye: “Kunjani ngamabhayi?” Yena wathi kuJuda: “Uzawahlawula ngani amabhayi lawo?”" 
Genesis38:17 UJuda wathi: “Mina ngizakuthumelela imbuzana emihlambinami.” Yena wathi: “Kulungile, kwaphela nange unganginikela isibambiso kufikela lapha uthumela khona imbuzana leyo.”" 
Genesis38:18 UJuda wathi: “Alo, sibambiso bani nje engingakunikela sona?” Yena wathi: “Umtiya onedzilamnwana yetshwayo lakho kanye nedondolo lakhwelo kwaphela.” Yeke uJuda wamnikela izintwezo, wamngena-ke, wamenza waba sidisi." 
Genesis38:19 Nakasuka lapho uTamari, wanqomba ekhaya, wahlubula isiyaya sakhe, wembatha izambatho zobuhlolokazi godu." 
Genesis38:20 UJuda wathumela imbuzi ngomkhongakhe umAdulamu ukuze afunyane isibambiso sakhe emfazini lowaya. Kodwana nakafika lapho wafunyana ngesikhundla. 
Genesis38:21 Wabuza abantu balapho wathi: “Siphi isitjhatjha ebegade siseqadi kwendlela e-Enayimu?” Bathi kuye: “Azange khekube nesitjhatjha lapha.” 
Genesis38:22 Yeke wabuyela kuJuda wafese wathi: “Akhange ngimfumane. Nabantu balapho bathi akhange khekube nesitjhatjha lapho.” 
Genesis38:23 UJuda wathi: “Silise sizigcinele lokho esikuphetheko. Nasisoloko sifunana naso sizaziphendula isihlekiso. Angithi ngisithumelele imbuzi kodwana wangasifumana.” 
Genesis38:24 Bekungaba ziinyanga ezintathu ngemva kwalapho lokha uJuda nakabikelwa bona umalukazanakhe uTamari ufebile, nje-ke usebantwini. UJuda wathi: “Mkhupheleni ngaphandle komuzi nimtjhise abe afe!”" 
Genesis38:25 Kuthe lokha nakakhutjhelwa ngaphandle wathumela umyalezo kusosokanakhe wathi: “Umuntu ongenze ngaba sidisi mnikazi wezintwezi. Bengithi akhe ufumane qangi bonyana idzilamnwana, umtiya nedondolweli ngezakabani.”" 
Genesis38:26 UJuda wazazi izintwezo bewathi: “Yena umsulwa kunami ngombana ngiriyadile ukumnikela indodanami uTjhela.” Ukusuka lapho azange alale naye godu. 
Genesis38:27 Kuthe lokha nakufika isikhathi sakhe sokubeletha, kwabonakala bona mawele wabantwana." 
Genesis38:28 Kwathi nakasabelethako omunye wamawele lawo waveza isandla sakhe, umbelethisi wasibopha ngentanjana ebomvu wathi: “Lo ngowamantange.”" 
Genesis38:29 Kodwana labuyisela isandla salo emva kwase kuvela umfowabo. Umbelethisi wathi: “Kungendlela ophundlukele ngayo-ke leyo!” Nje-ke wathiywa ibizo bona nguPeretsi. 
Genesis38:30 Yeke umfowabo ogade abotjhwe ngentanjana ebomvu esandleni wabelethwa, wathiywa ibizo bona nguTserarhi." 
Genesis39:1 UJosefa gade asiwe eGibhide. Kwathi ama-Itjhimayeli nakafika lapho, uJosefa wathengiselwa uPothifara umGibhide ogade ayinduna ekulu kaFaro begodu amphathi wobuzimba." 
Genesis39:2 USomnini gade anoJosefa, ngalokho waphumelela. Wahlala emzini womphathakhe omGibhide." 
Genesis39:3 Umphathakhe lokha nakabona bonyana uSomnini inoJosefa nokobana imnikele ukuphumelela kikho koke agade akwenza," 
Genesis39:4 waba nomusa kuye bewamenza waba sisandla sakhe. UPothifara lo, wabeka uJosefa bonyana abe mtjheji womzakhe, wabeka koke anakho emahlombakhe." 
Genesis39:5 Ukusuka ngesikhathi umphathi abeka ngaso uJosefa bonyana amqalele endlinakhe nakho koke anakho, uSomnini wabusisa woke umndeni womGibhide ngebanga lakaJosefa. Isibusiso sakaSomnini sehlela phezu kwakho koke uPothifara agade anakho, ngekumbeni nemasimini." 
Genesis39:6 Watjhiya koke agade anakho ezandleni zakaJosefa ngombana nakusaphethe yena uPothifara bekangazitshwenyi ngalitho ngaphandle kokudla agade akugoma. UJosefa bekanejamo begodu ahlamazana. 
Genesis39:7 Emva kwesikhathi esithize umfazi womphathakhe wathatheka ngoJosefa lo wathi kuye: “Yewize ulale nami!” 
Genesis39:8 Kodwana uJosefa wala, wathi kuye: “Njengombana ngiphethe lapha nje, umphathami akazitshwenyi ngalitho ngokungendlini. Koke anakho ukubeke ezandleni zami." 
Genesis39:9 Ungenze ngalingana naye emzinakhapha, yeke akukho nokuncani angidime khona ngaphandle kwakho ngombana wena umkakhe. Alo-ke ngingakwenza njani ukukhohlakala okungako ngone kuZimu na?”" 
Genesis39:10 Nanyana gade asomasoma uJosefa imihla namalanga, uJosefa wala ukulala naye namkha ukutjhidela hlanu kwakhe." 
Genesis39:11 Ngelinye ilanga wangena ngekumbeni kobana ayokwenza imisebenzakhe, gade kungekho namunye weensebenzi zangekumbenapho ngaphakathi."
