Genesis39:12 Yeke umkaPothifara wamtjhubelela ngesambatho sakhe wathi: “Ngiyakubawa hle, lala nami!” Kodwana uJosefa waphunyurha, watjhiya isambatho sakhe ezandleni zomfazi loyo, waphumela ngaphandle." 
Genesis39:13 Kuthe umkaPothifara nakabona bonyana uJosefa utjhiye isambatho sakhe bewaphumela ngaphandle," 
Genesis39:14 wabiza iinsebenzi zangekumbenakhe wathi: “Akhese nithi niyaqala, umHebheru lo ulethwe kithapha bonyana azosiphuphela! Khona nje ungene lapha bonyana azokulala nami kodwana ngarhuwelela." 
Genesis39:15 Uthe lokha nangizwa ngirhuwelela, weqa bewatjhiya nesambatho sakhe hlanu kwami, waphumela ngaphandle.”" 
Genesis39:16 Umfazi lo wabeka isambatho sakaJosefa hlanu kwakhe bekwafika umphathakhe. 
Genesis39:17 Wamtjela indaba leyo wathi: “Ikhoboka lomHebheru owasilethela loneli, lize kimi lazongiphuphela." 
Genesis39:18 Kodwana kuthe lokha nangirhuwelelako, leqa belatjhiya isambatho salo hlanu kwami labalekela ngaphandle.”" 
Genesis39:19 Kwathi lokha uPothifara nakezwa amagama womkakhe wokuthi, “Lingiwunawune njalo-ke ikhobokanyana lakhwelo,” wabhoka ngobukhali." 
Genesis39:20 Wathatha uJosefa wamphosela ngejele lapha kubotjhwe khona iimbotjhwa zesigodlo. UJosefa gade asejele," 
Genesis39:21 kodwana uSomnini gade anaye. Waba nesisa kuye bewamenzela umusa phambi komphathijele. 
Genesis39:22 Umphathijele wabeka uJosefa bona abe yinduna phezu kwazo zoke iimbotjhwa. Wabekwa bonyana atjheje koke okwenziwa ngapho. 
Genesis39:23 Umphathijele azange azitshwenye ngokutjhejisisa nanyana yini ebe ingaphasi kwelihlo lakaJosefa ngombana uSomnini gade anoJosefa begodu amphumelelisa kinanyana yini agade ayenza. 
Genesis40:1 Emva kwesikhathi esithize, umphathikapho nombhagi wekosi yeGibhide bonela umphathabo oyikosi yeGibhide." 
Genesis40:2 UFaro wathukuthelela iinduna ezikulu zakhe ezimbili okutjho ihloko yabaphathikapho nehloko yababhagi," 
Genesis40:3 beyazibeka ngesikhungweni emzini womphathi wobuzimba, hlanu kwejele lapha bekunoJosefa khona." 
Genesis40:4 Umphathi wobuzimba wanikela uJosefa eendunenezo bona azitjheje. Ngemva kobana zihlezi ngesikhungweni isikhatjhana," 
Genesis40:5 enye nenye yazo, umphathikapho nombhagi wekosi yeGibhide, zaba namabhudango busukubunye zingesikhungwenapho. Elinye nelinye ibhudango gade linehlathululwalo." 
Genesis40:6 Lokha uJosefa nakafika kizo ekuseni wazifumana zinyamile. 
Genesis40:7 Yeke wabuza iindunezo ebegade zinaye ngesikhungweni emzini womphathakhe wathi: “Kubayini ninyukubele nje namhlanjesi?” 
Genesis40:8 Zamphendula zathi: “Sibe namabhudango, kodwana akunamuntu ongasihlathululela wona.” UJosefa wathi: “Angithi nguZimu okwazi ukuhlathulula amabhudango? Ningangitjela amabhudangwenu lawo-ke.”" 
Genesis40:9 Yeke ihloko yabaphathikapho yatjela uJosefa ibhudango layo yathi: “Ebhudangweni lami bekunesidiribe ngaphambi kwami," 
Genesis40:10 sinamahlumela amathathu. Sekwathi sisahluma njalo, satjhatjhaza, khonokho sathela amatjatho wamadiribe avuthiweko." 
Genesis40:11 Ikapho kaFaro gade isesandleni sami, ngathatha amadiribe ngawaminyela ngekatjheni kaFaro leyo bengayibeka esandleni sakhe.”" 
Genesis40:12 UJosefa wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo libhudangwelo: Amahlumela amathathu atjho amalanga amathathu. 
Genesis40:13 Emalangeni amathathu la uFaro uzakugweba umlandwakho abe akubuyisele esikhundleni sakho. Wena uzakubeka ikapho kaFaro esandleni sakhe njengaphambilini lokha nawugade usesemphathikaphakhe. 
Genesis40:14 Kodwana ungikhumbule-ke nasele izinto zikukhambela kuhle. Ungizamele ngokungibika kuFaro, angikhuphe ngejelapha." 
Genesis40:15 Ungibona nginje, ngathathwa ngekani enarheni yamaHebheru. NeGibhidapha sengaphoselwa ngemgodinapha ngingakenzi litho elimbi.”" 
Genesis40:16 Kuthe bona ihloko yababhagi izwe bonyana uJosefa ukhulume ihlathululo ekarisako yebhudango yathi kuye: “Uyazi nami ngibhudangile. Ebhudangweni lami gade ngithwele iinqwebu ezintathu zesikwa esimhlophe. 
Genesis40:17 Esiqwebini esingaphezulu bekunemifunda yoke yezikwa ezikhethekileko ezibhagelwe uFaro, kodwana iinyoni bezikugoma seze kusehlokwami njalo.”" 
Genesis40:18 UJosefa wayiphendula wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo libhudango lakhwelo: Iinqwebu ezintathu malanga amathathu. 
Genesis40:19 Emalangeni amathathu la uFaro uzakugweba umlandwakho abe akuhlomele esigodweni, iinyoni zinqothule inyamakho.”" 
Genesis40:20 Kwathi elangeni lesithathu okwakulilanga uFaro abelethwa ngalo, wenzela zoke iinkhulu zakhe umnyanya. Wagweba umlandu wehloko yabaphathikapho nowehloko yababhagi phambi kweenkhulu zakhe:" 
Genesis40:21 Wabuyisela ihloko yabaphathikapho esikhundleni sayo kobana ibuye godu ibeke ikapho esandleni sakaFaro," 
Genesis40:22 kodwana wahlomela ihloko yababhagi esigodweni. Kwaba njengombana uJosefa gade azihlathululele. 
Genesis40:23 Ihloko yabaphathikapho azange ikhumbule uJosefa. Yamkhohlwa nya. 
Genesis41:1 Kuthe bona kudlule iminyaka emibili poro, uFaro wabhudanga ajame emlanjeni iNayili." 
Genesis41:2 Kwathi vumbu iinkomo ezilikhomba ngemlanjenapho. Zazinone ziphazima, zakarula utjani eqadi komlambo." 
Genesis41:3 Khonapho kwanyuka ezinye ezilikhomba egade zondile zimigorhu. Zafese zajama malungana negade zisedongeni lomlambo. 
Genesis41:4 Iinkomo ezonde zimigorhwezo zaginya ezilikhomba ezinone ziphazima. Khonapho uFaro waphaphama. 
Genesis41:5 Wabanjwa buthongo wabhudanga godu: Nanzi iinqwambi ezilikhomba zekoroyi, ezimabhombo nezinothileko zitlhurha emudzwini munye." 
Genesis41:6 Ngemva kwazo kwavela ezinye iinqwambi ezilikhomba, zona bezimatsikani begodu zitjhwabiswe mumoya wepumalanga." 
Genesis41:7 Iinqwambi ezimatsikani zarhiribidela ezimabhombo nezinothileko. Yeke uFaro waphaphama. Agu, bekulibhudango!" 
Genesis41:8 Ekuseni wavuka atshwenyekile. Wabiza boke abosomlingo nabosiyazi beGibhide. Wabatjela amabhudangwakhe, kodwana akakho owakghona ukumhlathululela wona." 
Genesis41:9 Yeke ihloko yabaphathikapho yathi kuFaro: “Maye mina! Namhlanje ngikhumbula imitjhaphami. 
Genesis41:10 UFaro wakhe wathukuthelela iinkhulu zakhe, ngalokho wangithatha ngikanye nehloko yababhagi wasifaka ngesikhungweni emzini womphathi wobuzimba." 
Genesis41:11 Omunye nomunye wethu waba nebhudango ngobusuku bunye. Ibhudango ngalinye belinehlathululwalo. 
Genesis41:12 Phakathi kwethu bekunesokana lomHebheru ebegade liyinceku yomphathi wobuzimba. Salitjela amabhudangwethu, lasihlathululela wona ngamunye ngamunye ngokwebhudango lakhe." 
Genesis41:13 Ngambala kwenzeka poro njengombana lalihlathululile: Mina ngabuyiselwa esikhundleni sami kodwana indodenye leya yona yahlonywa esigodweni.” 
Genesis41:14 Yeke uFaro wathumela bona kubizwe uJosefa. Msinyana wakhutjhwa ngesikhungweni, warhuna iindevu bewembatha ezinye izambatho, weza kuFaro." 
Genesis41:15 UFaro wathi kuJosefa: “Ngibe nebhudango, kodwana akunamuntu ongalihlathululako. Yeke besele ngilunywe indlebe ngawe bonyana ngokuzwa nje ibhudango kwaphela, uyakwazi ukulihlathulula.”" 
Genesis41:16 UJosefa waphendula uFaro wathi: “Awa, akusikho kwami ukuhlathulula amabhudango, kodwana nguZimu ozakunikela ipendulo elungele kuFaro.”" 
Genesis41:17 UFaro wathi kuJosefa: “Ebhudangweni lami gade ngijame edongeni lomlambo iNayili. 
Genesis41:18 Sekwathi vumbu iinkomo ezilikhomba ngemlanjenapho, zinone ziphazima. Zakarula utjani hlanu komlambo." 
Genesis41:19 Khonapho kwavela ezinye iinkomo ezilikhomba ezonde zimigorhu. Azange khengibone imigorhwana yeenkomo ezonde kangaka kiyo yoke inarha yeGibhide le. 
Genesis41:20 Iinkomo ezonde zimigorhwezo zaginya zokuthoma ezilikhomba ezinonileko. 
Genesis41:21 Kodwana ngitjho nangemva kokobana seziziginyile azange kubonakale bona zingenile eziswini zazo ngombana zase zaqaleka zizimbi zimigorhu njalo. Yeke ngaphaphama. 
Genesis41:22 “Kwelinye ibhudango ngabona iinqwambi zekoroyi ezilikhomba ezinothileko nezimabhombo, zitlhurha emudzwini munye." 
Genesis41:23 Kwavela nezinye iinqwambi zekoroyi ezilikhomba zinganalitho, zimatsikani begodu zitjhwabiswe mumoya wepumalanga." 
Genesis41:24 Nje-ke iinqwambi ezimatsikanezo zarhiribidela ezimabhombo. “Manje, amabhudango la ngiwazise abosomlingo, kodwana akukho noyedwa wabo owakhe wakghona ukungihlathululela wona.”" 
Genesis41:25 UJosefa wathi kuFaro: “Womabili amabhudango la atjho into eyodwa. UZimu ubonise uFaro into azoyenza. 
Genesis41:26 Iinkomo ezilikhomba ezinonileko minyaka elikhomba begodu neenqwambi ezimabhombo ezilikhomba zekoroyi minyaka elikhomba, koke njalo kutjho ibhudango linye." 
Genesis41:27 Iinkomo ezilikhomba ezonde zimigorhu ezivele muva kwezinye minyaka elikhomba, kanjalo neenqwambi ezilikhomba ezimatsikani, ezitjhwabiswe mumoya wepumalanga: Kuzokuba neminyaka elikhomba yendlala." 
Genesis41:28 “Sekunjengombana ngitjele uFaro, uZimu ubonise uFaro lokho azokwenza." 
Genesis41:29 Kuzokuba khona inala ekulu kiyo yoke inarha yeGibhide iminyaka elikhomba. 
Genesis41:30 Ngemva kwalokho kuzokuba khona indlala iminyaka elikhomba. Koke ukusutha kuzakulitjalwa eGibhide ngombana indlala izakukhothulula inarha. 
Genesis41:31 Iye, ukusutha angeze bekusakhunjulwa enarheni ngombana indlala leyo iza ngamandla." 
Genesis41:32 Isizathu sokobana uFaro anikelwe ibhudango ngeendlela ezimbili kukobana indaba le uZimu uyiqinisekisile begodu uzayenza msinyazana. 
Genesis41:33 “Nje-ke uFaro akakhethe indoda enelihlo nehlakaniphileko ayibeke bonyana yengamele inarha yeGibhide. 
Genesis41:34 UFaro akabone bonyana ubeka iinduna enarheni yoke kobana zithathe ingcenye eyodwa kezihlanu yesivuno seGibhide eminyakeni elikhomba yenala. 
Genesis41:35 Kumele zibuthelele koke ukudlokho eminyakeni yenala ezako le. Azibulunge isivuno ngaphasi kwelawulo lakaFaro emadorobheni beziseluse. 
Genesis41:36 Ukudla enizokubulungokho kufuze kugcinelwe abantu benarha kobana kusetjenziswe eminyakeni elikhomba yendlala ezakwehlela iGibhide ukuze inarha ingabhujiswa yindlala.” 
Genesis41:37 Iqhingeli laba lihle kuFaro nakizo zoke iinkhulu zakhe. 
Genesis41:38 UFaro wakhuluma neenkhulu zakhe wathi: “Singamthathaphi umuntu onjengendoda le, umuntu onommoya kaZimu?”" 
Genesis41:39 Nje-ke wathi kuJosefa: “Njengombana uZimu akwambulele koke lokhu nje, kuyakhanya bonyana akakho omunye onelihlo nohlakaniphe njengawe." 
Genesis41:40 Nguwe ozakuphatha isigodlo sami. Nje-ke boke abantu bami kumele balalele wena. Mina ngizakuba mkhulu kuwe ngesigodlo kwaphela.” 
Genesis41:41 Yeke uFaro wathi kuJosefa: “Ngalokho ngikubeka bona wengamele yoke inarha yeGibhide.” 
Genesis41:42 Wakhupha idzilamnwanakhe yokutlikitla emnweni wayifaka kewakaJosefa. Wamembathisa isambatho esimhlope selineni, wamfaka umncamo wegolide entanyeni." 
Genesis41:43 Wamkhweza ekaraneni esezingeni lesibili keyakhe, abantu barhuwelela phambi kwakhe bathi: “Khothamani!” Ngaleyondlela wamenza umengameli wenarha yoke yeGibhide." 
Genesis41:44 UFaro wathi kuJosefa: “NginguFaro, kodwana ngaphandle kwelizwi lakho akunamuntu ozakusikinyeka kilo loke leGibhide.”" 
Genesis41:45 Wathiya uJosefa ibizo lesiGibhide wathi nguTsafenati-Paneyarha, bewamupha u-Asenathi indodakazi kaPothi-Fera umphristi we-Oni bona abe mkakhe. Njalo-ke idumo lakaJosefa lasabalala nenarha yeGibhide." 
Genesis41:46 UJosefa gade aneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu lokha nakangena esikhundleni somsebenzi kaFaro ikosi yeGibhide. Kwathi lokha nakasuka phambi kwakaFaro wakhambela yoke inarha yeGibhide. 
Genesis41:47 Eminyakeni elikhomba yenala inarha yathela isivuno esinengi. 
Genesis41:48 UJosefa wabuthelela koke ukudla okukhiqizwe eminyakeni elikhomba leyo yenala eGibhide wakulondoloza emadorobheni. Kelinye nelinye idorobho walondoloza ukudla okuvunwe emasimini walapho. 
Genesis41:49 Walondoloza isivuno esinengi kwanga yihlabathi yelwandle. Sasisinengi kangangobana walisa ukubala ngombana sasingasabaleki. 
Genesis41:50 Ngaphambi kokufika kweminyaka yendlala, u-Asenathi indodakazi kaPothi-Fera umphristi we-Oni wabelethela uJosefa amadodana amabili." 
Genesis41:51 UJosefa wathiya izibulo bona nguManase wathi: “Kungebanga lokobana uZimu ungenze ngakhohlwa boke ubudisi bami kanye nawo woke umuzi kababa.” 
Genesis41:52 Indodana yesibili wayithiya bona ngu-Efrayimu wathi: “Kungebanga lokobana uZimu ungiphumelelisile enarheni yokurhubutjhwa kwami.” 
Genesis41:53 Iminyaka elikhomba yenala yaphela eGibhide. 
Genesis41:54 Kwathoma iminyaka elikhomba yendlala kwaba njengokutjho kwakaJosefa. Kizo zoke iinarha ezinye kwaba nendlala kodwana yoke inarha yeGibhide yona yaba nokudla. 
Genesis41:55 Kwathi lokha indlala nayithoma ukusahlela neGibhide, abantu balila ngokudla kuFaro. Yena wathi kiwo woke amaGibhide: “Khambani niye kuJosefa nifese nenze koke athi nikwenze.”" 
Genesis41:56 Indlala yabhoka eGibhide. Kwathi bona indlala leyo yembathe inarha yoke, uJosefa wavula zoke iinlulu lapha bekunesivuno khona wathengisela amaGibhide." 
Genesis41:57 Nephasi loke leza eGibhide ukuzokuthenga ukudla kuJosefa ngombana indlala besele ibhoke iphasi loke. 
Genesis42:1 Kuthe bona uJakopo ezwe bonyana kunekoroyi eGibhide, wathi emadodanenakhe: “Kubayini nihlalele ukuqalana ngemehlweni nje?" 
Genesis42:2 Qalani, ngizwe bonyana kunekoroyi eGibhide. Yehlani niyosithengela ukuze siphile singafi.”" 
Genesis42:3 Kwaba ngabalitjhumi kwaphela abanakwabo kaJosefa abehla ukuyokuthenga ikoroyi eGibhide 
Genesis42:4 ngombana uJakopo wathi uBhenjamini olama uJosefa asale, angakhambi nabanye. Gade esaba bonyana naye angahle ehlelwe yingozi." 
Genesis42:5 Ngaleyondlela amadodana ka-Israyeli gade akhambisana nalabo ebebayokuthenga ikoroyi ngombana nenarheni yeKanana indlala beyiphodlha. 
Genesis42:6 UJosefa gade ambusi wenarha yeGibhide, athengisela abantu ikoroyi. Nje-ke kuthe lokha abanakwabo nabafikako, baguqa bahloma iinhloko phasi phambi kwakhe." 
Genesis42:7 Kuthe bonyana uJosefa abone abafowabo, wabazi kodwana wenza ngathi akabazi. Wabakhulumisa ngokubakgharameja wathi: “Nibuyaphi nina?” Baphendula bathi: “Sibuya eKanana sizokuthenga ukudla.”" 
Genesis42:8 Nanyana uJosefa wabazi abanakwabo, kodwana bona akhange bamazi." 
Genesis42:9 Wakhumbula amabhudangwakhe ngabo. Wathi kibo: “Sukanapha, niziinhloli nina! Nizele ukuzokuhlola bonyana kukuphi lapha inarha yekhethu le ingakavikeleki khona.”" 
Genesis42:10 Bamphendula bathi: “Awa kosi, iinceku zakho zizele ukuzokuthenga ukudla." 
Genesis42:11 Nasinje siziinlamani zendoda yinye. Iinceku zakho zimadoda athembekileko, asisizo iinhloli.”" 
Genesis42:12 UJosefa wathi kibo: “Sukelani le! Nizele ukuzokuhlola bonyana kukuphi lapha inarha yekhethu le ingakavikeleki khona.” 
Genesis42:13 Kodwana baphendula bathi: “Emanyeni iinceku zakho gade zibabafo abalitjhumi nambili, amadodana wendoda yinye ehlala enarheni yeKanana. Ubuphetjhani gadesi nje busele nobaba, kanti omunye akasekho.”" 
Genesis42:14 UJosefa wathi kibo: “Ngisatjho bonyana niziinhloli nina! 
Genesis42:15 Nasi-ke indlela enizakuhlolwa ngayo: Ngifunga uFaro ngithi anizukukhamba enarhenapha kungakalethwa umfowenu omncani. 
Genesis42:16 Thumelani omunye phakathi kwenu ayomthatha, nina abanye nizakuhlala ngesikhungwenapha. Ngaleyondlela amezwi wenu azabe azizinywa ukubona bonyana nineqiniso kangangani. Nakungasinjalo, ngimfunge uFaro, ngithi niziinhloli nina!”" 
Genesis42:17 Ngambala wababeka boke ngesikhungweni amalanga amathathu. 
Genesis42:18 Elangeni lesithathu uJosefa wathi kibo: “Yenzani lokhu nizakuphila ngombana mina ngimumuntu owesaba uZimu: 
Genesis42:19 Nakube nimadoda athembekileko akuthi omunye wenu asale esikhungwenapha khibe abanye benu nithatha ikoroyi nibuyele emindeninenu elambileko. 
Genesis42:20 Kodwana kumele nilethe umfowenu omncani kimapha ukuze kuqinisekiswe amezwi wenu nokobana ningafi.” Mbala benza njalo. 
Genesis42:21 Bathi omunye komunye: “Iye, sihlunguphazwa ngebanga lalokho esakwenza kumfowethu. Sambona bonyana gade akhathazeke kangangani lokha nasirabhelako, kodwana azange simlalele. Ngikho-nje iinkathazwezi zehlele phezu kwethu.”" 
Genesis42:22 URubeni wathi kibo: “Angithi nganitjela bona ningenzi ubumbi emsaneni? Kodwana nanghanghabala! Gadesi-ke sekumele sithwale umlandu ngeengazi zakhe.” 
Genesis42:23 Azange batjheje bonyana uJosefa uyabezwa ngombana gade asebenzisa umrhumutjhi lokha nakhuluma nabo. 
Genesis42:24 UJosefa wabasukela, wathoma ukulila. Kwathi nakabuyela kibo, wakhuluma nabo bewathatha uSimiyoni wambopha phambi kwabo." 
Genesis42:25 UJosefa wayaleza bona imithwalo yabo izaliswe ikoroyi, enye nenye indoda ibuyiselwe isilivayo ifakwe ngesikhwameni sayo bebanikelwe umphako. Mbala benzelwa njalo." 
Genesis42:26 Yeke abanakwabo kaJosefa bakhweza ikoroyabo kibodumbana bangena indlela. 
Genesis42:27 Kuthe lokha omunye wabo nakavula isikhwama sakhe kobana adlise udumbanakhe lapha bahlwelwa khona, qala naso isilivakhe emlonyeni wesitjhuba sekoroyi!" 
Genesis42:28 Wabiza abafowabo wathi: “Ngibuyiselwe isilivami! Qalani, nasi ingesitjhubeni sami!” Bakhungatheka, bangenwa kukwesaba babuzana bathi: “Yini esiyenziwa nguZimu le?”" 
Genesis42:29 Kuthe nabafika kuyise uJakopo enarheni yeKanana, bambikela koke okwenzekileko kibo," 
Genesis42:30 bathi: “Umuntu ombusi weGibhide usitjhobolile, wasiphatha njengeenhloli enarhenakhe." 
Genesis42:31 Sabathe siyamtjela bonyana asisizo iinhloli kodwana simadoda athembekileko," 
Genesis42:32 nokobana besiziinlamani ezilitjhumi nambili, amadodana kababa. Samtjela nokobana omunye wethu sele asitjhiya, kanti obuphetjhani yena usele nobaba eKanana." 
Genesis42:33 Kodwna umuntu ombusi wenarha loyo wathi kithi, ‘Nayibe sithembekile ngizakubona ngalokhu: Munye wenu uzakusala nami bese abanye benu bathathela emindenenu elambileko ukudla, barhatjheke." 
Genesis42:34 Nilethe ubuphetjhani bekhenu kimi, ngalokho ngizakholwa bonyana anisizo iinhloli kodwana nimadoda athembekileko. Nanenza njalo ngizanibuyisela umfowenu bese nikhamba enarheni ngokutjhaphuluka.’ ”" 
Genesis42:35 Kuthe lokha nabathulula iinkhwama zabo ebebazikhweze kibodumbana, omunye nomunye wafumana imbadanakhe yesiliva ebe ingesikhwameni. Uyise kanye nabo bangenelwa kukwesaba lokha nababona iimbadana zesilivezo." 
Genesis42:36 UJakopo uyisabo wathi kibo: “Ningemuke abantwabami. UJosefa akasekho, uSimiyoni naye uthethwe. Gadesi sele nifuna ukungithathela uBhenjamini! Maye mina, iphasi lingijikele!”" 
Genesis42:37 URubeni wathi kuyise: “Nakube angimbuyiseli kuwe uBhenjamini, ungabulala amadodanami womabili. Mbeke ngaphasi kwesandla sami, ngizambuyisa.”" 
Genesis42:38 Kodwana uJakopo wathi: “Indodanami ayikazokwehla nani. Umnakwabo uhlongakele, sekusele yona yedwa tere. Nakwenzeka yehlelwe yingozi ekhambeni lenu, nizabe ningibangele bona ngife ngamatlhuwiso sengimdala kangaka.”" 
Genesis43:1 Indlala beyisabhokile enarheni yeKanana. 
Genesis43:2 Kwathi bona bagome yoke ikoroyi abayithatha eGibhide, uyise wathi kibo: “Buyelani niyosithengela ukudlana godu.”" 
Genesis43:3 Kodwana uJuda wathi kuyise: “Umuntu loya wasidosa ngendlebe wathi akafuni nokusibona nakube asizi nomfowethu. 
Genesis43:4 Nayibe sikhamba nomfowethu, khona kulungile sizakwehla siyokuthengela ubaba ukudla." 
Genesis43:5 Kodwana nakube akakhambi nathi, angeze sikghone ukwehla ngombana umuntu loya wasidosa ngendlebe wathi akafuni nokusibona nakube asizi nomfowethu.”" 
Genesis43:6 U-Israyeli wabuza wathi: “Kubayini ningilethele amatlhuwo anje ngokutjela indoda leyo bonyana ninomfowenu omncani.” 
Genesis43:7 Baphendula bathi: “Indoda leya isifake esifuthweni semibuzo ngathi nomndenethu. Yabuza bonyana ubaba usaphila na. Godu yasibuza bona sinomfowethu omunye na. Sesaphendula imibuzwayo kwaphela. Besizakwazi njani bonyana uzakuthi kithi size nomfowethu loyo kuye?” 
Genesis43:8 UJuda wathi kuyise u-Israyeli: “Ngithuma nomsana lo, sizakhamba khona nje ukuze mina nobaba nabantwana bekhayaba siphile singafi." 
Genesis43:9 Mina ngizamgada ngepilwami. Ubaba akambize esandleni sami. Nakube angimbuyisi ngimbeke phambi kwakababa aphila, khona-ke angibe mlandu kubaba ipilwami yoke." 
Genesis43:10 Nangathana azange siriyade ngasele sibuya eGibhide kabili.” 
Genesis43:11 Yeke uyisabo u-Israyeli wathi kibo: “Nakube kunjalo, khona-ke yenzani lokhu: Thathani imikhiqizo ephambili yenarha le niyifake emithwalwenenu nehle nayo nifese niyiphe indoda leyo. Ninghwathe kancani imihlobohlobo yeenthako zokwenza amakha, iliju, amapistatjhiyo kanye nama-alimondi." 
Genesis43:12 Thathani inani elibuyelelweko lesiliva ngombana kumele nibuyisele isiliva eyafakwa emilonyeni yeentjhuba zenu. Mhlambe kwaba yiphoso. 
Genesis43:13 Khambani nomfowenu-ke nibuyele emuntwini loyo khona nje. 
Genesis43:14 Kwanga uZimu oSabekako anganenzela umusa phambi komuntu loyo ukuze abuyise umfowenu loya noBhenjamini. Akusenani, nakumele ngilahlekelwe bantwana nakhona sekulungile.”" 
Genesis43:15 Yeke amadoda athatha izipho, abuyelela inani lesiliva abe akhamba noBhenjamini, arhaba ehlela eGibhide bona aziveze kuJosefa." 
Genesis43:16 Kwathi lokha uJosefa nakabona uBhenjamini akanye nawo, wathi kumphathimuzakhe: “Thatha amadoda la uwase kwami, uhlabe isilwana bese uyalungisa bona agome nami ukudla kwemini.”" 
Genesis43:17 Umphathimuzakhe wenza njengombana uJosefa amtjelile, wathatha amadoda wawasa kwaJosefa." 
Genesis43:18 Kwathi lokha amadoda lawo nakabona bonyana asiwa kwaJosefa, akhuluma wodwa athi: “Silethwe lapha ngebanga lesiliva leya eyafakwa emilonyeni yeentjhuba zethu nasithoma ukuza lapha. Yeke ufuna ukusibhudungela asihlule bese usenza amakhobokakhe asithathele abodumbana bethu.”" 
Genesis43:19 Nje-ke anqomba kumphathimuzi kaJosefa akhuluma naye esangweni lesirhodlo," 
Genesis43:20 athi: “Siyakukhombela nomzana akhe usilalele. Kuliqiniso bona seza lapha sazokuthenga ukudla phambilini. 
Genesis43:21 Kodwana kuthe lokha nasifika endaweni esahlwelwa kiyo, sathi nasithi sivula iintjhuba zethu, qala isiliva yomunye nomunye gade isemlonyeni wesitjhuba sakhe. Isiliva leyo beyilingana poro nesithenge ngayo. Yeke nasi siyiphethe, sithe asiyibuyise." 
Genesis43:22 Ngaphezu kwalokho size nesiliva enye kobana sizokuthenga ukudla. Asazi bonyana ngubani owafaka isiliva leya ngeentjhubeni zethu.” 
Genesis43:23 Umphathimuzi wathi kiwo: “Ngiyanizwa; ningesabi! UZimenu nonguZimu waboyihlomkhulu uninikele umnono ngeentjhubeni zenu. Ngayifumana isilivenu.” Ngemva kwalokho wawalethela uSimiyoni. 
Genesis43:24 Umphathimuzi wawangenisa kwaJosefa, wawanikela amanzi wokusula iinyawo zawo bewapha nabodumbana bawo ilusereni." 
Genesis43:25 Wona alungisa isibiko sawo bona azosipha uJosefa lokha nakafikako ngemva kwemini ngombana besele ezwile bonyana ayokugomela lapho. 
Genesis43:26 Kwathi lokha uJosefa nakafika ekhaya, amadoda lawo angenisa isibiko agade eze naso, aguqa ahloma iinhloko phasi amnikela sona." 
Genesis43:27 Wawabuza amavuko wabuye wathi: “Unjani uyihlo osele aluphele enangitjela ngaye? Usaphila na?” 
Genesis43:28 Aphendula athi: “Ubaba incekwakho usaphile kuhle.” Aguqa godu ahloma iinhloko phasi. 
Genesis43:29 Wathi nakaqalako wabona umfowabo uBhenjamini, indodana kanina, wabuza wathi: “Nguye umfowenu obuphetjhani ebeningitjela ngaye lo na?” Yeke wathi kuBhenjamini: “UZimu abe nomusa kuwe ndodanami.”" 
Genesis43:30 UJosefa wasikima msinyana wafuna indawana yokulila ngombana watlhuwa nakabona umfowabo. Yeke wangena ngelawini lakhe walilela khona. 
Genesis43:31 Kuthe bonyana asule ubuso bakhe, waphuma, waziqinisa wathi: “Phakululani ukudlokho.”" 
Genesis43:32 Bamphakela yedwa, baphakela abanakwabo bodwa namaGibhide wodwa. AmaGibhide gade angagomi namaHebheru ngombana bekazila ukwenza njalo." 
Genesis43:33 Amadoda lawa gade ahlaliswe ngaphambi kwakaJosefa ngokulamana kwawo ukusuka komkhulu ukuya komncani. Arhedlulana ararekile. 
Genesis43:34 Aphiwa ukudla etafuleni lakaJosefa, uBhenjamini yena waphiwa okubuyelelwe kahlanu kunabanakwabo. Basela, badakwa phambi kwakaJosefa." 
Genesis44:1 UJosefa wayala umphathimuzakhe wathi: “Zalisa iintjhuba zamadoda lawa ngokudla kube ngendlela angathwala ngayo. Ufake isiliva yenye nenye indoda emlonyeni wesitjhuba sayo. 
Genesis44:2 Faka ikaphami yesiliva emlonyeni wesitjhuba sobuphetjhani kanye nesiliva athenge ngayo.” Umphathimuzi wenza njengombana uJosefa atjhwile. 
Genesis44:3 Kuthe lokha nakusako amadoda lawa atjhatjhululwa kobana abuyele ekhabo nabodumbana bawo. 
Genesis44:4 Gade angakakhambi ukuyaphi ukusuka edorobheni lokha uJosefa nakathi kumphathimuzakhe: “Rhaba ulandele amadoda lawaya! Nawuwafumanako uwabuze uthi, ‘Kubayini nibuyisela okuhle ngokumbi? Niyebeleni ikaphami yesiliva?" 
Genesis44:5 Akusiyikapho esela ngomphathami naziphengula ngayo na? Bukhohlakali into eniyenzileko le.’ ” 
Genesis44:6 Ngambala kuthe lokha umphathimuzi nawawafumanako, watjho amezwi lawo." 
Genesis44:7 Wona amphendula athi: “Kubayini unomzana akhulume njalo? Iinceku zakho angeze bezayenza into efana naleyo! 
Genesis44:8 Kunalokho angithi uyazi bonyana nesiliva leya esayifumana ngeentjhubeni zethu nasiseKanana siyibuyisile? Alo, besizayebelani-ke isiliva namkha igolide ngekumbeni yomphathakho?" 
Genesis44:9 Nakube ingatholakala kinanyana ngiyiphi yeenceku zakhwezi, ayibulawe bese kuthi thina abanye sibe makhoboka wekosethu.”" 
Genesis44:10 Umphathimuzi wathi: “Kulungile, akube njengamagamenu: Nanyana ngubani ezakutholakala kuye uzakuba likhoboka lami bese kuthi nina abanye nibe msulwa, nitjhaphuluke.”" 
Genesis44:11 Omunye nomunye wawo wehlisa msinyana isitjhuba sakhe kobana asivule. 
Genesis44:12 Wathoma-ke umphathimuzi wabhenyegula, wathoma ngomkhulu wehlela komncani. Ikapho yafunyanwa ngesitjhubeni sakaBhenjamini." 
Genesis44:13 Amadoda lawo adabula izambatho zawo. Asuka lapho akhweza imithwalwawo kibodumbana abuyela ngedorobheni. 
Genesis44:14 UJosefa gade asese ngekumbeni lokha uJuda nabafowabo nabangenako. Bafika baziphosela phasi phambi kwakhe. 
Genesis44:15 UJosefa wathi kibo: “Yintobani eniyenzileko le? Anazi bonyana umuntu onjengami nje kufuze aziphengule na?” 
Genesis44:16 UJuda waphendula wathi: “Yini esingayitjho ekosinami na? Sizivikele sithini? Singazihlanza njani? UZimu wembule umlandu weenceku zekosami. Nje-ke sele simakhoboka wekosami, thina ngokwethu kanye naloyo okufunyenwe kuye ikapho.”" 
Genesis44:17 Kodwana uJosefa wathi: “Awa, nokho angeze bengiyenze into efana naleyo! Umuntu okufunyenwe kuye ikaphami nguye kwaphela ozakuba likhoboka lami. Nina abanye buyelani kuyihlo ngokuthula.”" 
Genesis44:18 Yeke uJuda watjhidela kuJosefa wathi: “Ngiyakhombela kosami! Nanyana ikosami ilingana noFaro incekwakho beyibawa ukuba nelizwi nekosayo. Nokho bengithi ikosami ingapheleli incekwayo ihliziyo. 
Genesis44:19 Ikosami yabuza iinceku zayo yathi, ‘Nisese nobaba namkha umfowenu na?’" 
Genesis44:20 Sayiphendula sathi, ‘Iye, ubaba sele amdala, godu sathi sinomfowethu obelethwe ubaba sele aluphele. Umnakwabo lomsana loyo wahlongakala, nje-ke sese kusele yena yedwa tere ngakwabo. Ngalokho uyise umthanda khulu.’" 
Genesis44:21 Yeke ikosami yathi eencekweni zayo, ‘Mletheni kimapha ngizombona ngamehlwami la.’" 
Genesis44:22 Thina sathi ekosinami, ‘Umsana lo akakwazi ukusukela uyise. Nange angenza njalo, uyise angaqaleka bekabulungwe.’" 
Genesis44:23 Yeke ikosami yathi, ‘Angifuni ukubona ubuso benu lapha nakube anizi naye.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Sithe lokha nasibuyela ekhaya kubaba oyinceku yekosami, samtjela koke ikosami ekutjhwileko." 
Genesis44:25 Kwathi lokha ubaba nakathi kithi, ‘Buyelani niyosithengela ukudlana godu,’" 
Genesis44:26 thina sathi kuye, ‘Angeze sakghona ukwehla nakube umfowethu obuphetjhani akakhambi nathi. Asikazukukghona ukubonana nonomzana loyo nakube asikezi naye.’" 
Genesis44:27 Ubaba oyinceku yekosami wathi kithi, ‘Niyazi nani bonyana umkami oyintandokazi wangibelethela abesana ababili kwaphela." 
Genesis44:28 Omunye wanyamalala, ngamhloboka ngathi wadatjulwadatjulwa iinquqwana. Mbala solo kwalokho azange bengisambona." 
Genesis44:29 Nje-ke naningithathela nalo, naye bese wehlelwa yingozi, nizabe ningibangele bona ngife ngesihluku sengimdala kangaka.’" 
Genesis44:30 Njengombana ipilo kababa inamathele emsaneni kangaka, nasibuyela kubaba ngaphandle kwakhe" 
Genesis44:31 bese uyabona bonyana umsana lo akakho, uzokuqaleka. Ngaleyondlela iinceku zekosami zizabe zibangele bona ubaba oyinceku yekosami ahlongakale ngamatlhuwiso sele amdala." 
Genesis44:32 Mina ncekwakho ngiqinisekise ubaba bonyana ngizakugada umsana lo ngepilwami ngathi, ‘Nakube angimbuyisi kubaba, angibe mlandu phambi kwakababa ipilwami yoke!’" 
Genesis44:33 “Nje-ke bengibawa bona ikosami ivumele incekwayo bonyana isale lapha ibe likhoboka lekosami esikhundleni somsana lo. Ikosami ivumele umsana lo aphenduke nabomnakwabo 
Genesis44:34 ngombana mina ngingaya njani kubaba khibe umsana lo akasinami? Angifuni ukubona amatlhuwiso azakwehlela ubaba!” 
Genesis45:1 UJosefa azange asakghona ukuzibamba phambi kweensebenzi zakhe, warhuwelela wathi: “Phumani noke nje ngekumbenapha!” Nje-ke gade kunganamuntu lokha uJosefa nakaziveza kubafowabo." 
Genesis45:2 Warhahlawula kangangobana amaGibhide amuzwa, kwezwakala ngitjho nesigodlweni sakaFaro." 
Genesis45:3 UJosefa wathi kubafowabo: “NginguJosefa! Ubaba usaphila na?” Kodwana abafowabo azange bakghone ukumphendula ngombana bakhungatheka phambi kwakhe. 
Genesis45:4 Yeke uJosefa wathi kibo: “Tjhidelani kimapha.” Kuthe bona benze njalo, wathi: “Ngimi umfowenu uJosefa, enamthengisa eGibhide!" 
Genesis45:5 Nje-ke ningatshwenyeki begodu ningazithukutheleli ngebanga lokungithengisa kwenu ngombana nguZimu owangithumela ngaphambi kwenu kobana ngisindise ipilwenu. 
Genesis45:6 Sele kuminyaka emibili kunendlala enarheni, kanti-ke kusazokuthatha iminyaka emihlanu ezako kungalinywa begodu kungavunwa." 
Genesis45:7 Kodwana uZimu ungithume ngaphambili kwenu kobana nginibulungele imisalela ephasini begodu ngisindise ipilwenu ngetjhaphuluko ekulu. 
Genesis45:8 Ngalokho-ke akusini enangithumela lapha, kodwana nguZimu. Ungenze ngaba mluleki kaFaro, umphathi womzakhe woke nombusi weGibhide yoke." 
Genesis45:9 Nje-ke rhabani niye kubaba nithi kuye, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguJosefa indodanakho: UZimu ungenze ngaba mphathi weGibhide yoke. Ubaba akehle eze kimi, angariyadi." 
Genesis45:10 Uzakuhlala esifundeni seGotjheni abe seduze nami: ubaba, abantwabakhe neenzukulwana zakhe, izimvu zakhe nemihlambakhe nakho koke anakho." 
Genesis45:11 Ubaba ngizamondla alapho ngombana kuseza iminyaka emihlanu yendlala. Nakungasinjalo ubaba nomndenakhe nabo boke abanaye bazakuswela.’ ” 
Genesis45:12 UJosefa waraga wathi: “Nani niyabona ngitjho noBhenjamini uyangibona bonyana ngimi okhuluma nani. 
Genesis45:13 Tjelani ubaba ngakho koke ukuhlonitjhwa kwami eGibhidapha nangakho koke enikubonileko. Nirhabe nize naye kimapha!” 
Genesis45:14 Wagona umntanabo uBhenjamini bewathoma watlhuwa walila, noBhenjamini naye wamgona, walila." 
Genesis45:15 Wasuka lapho wancwanga boke abafowabo emhlathini alokhu alila njalo. Ngemva kwalokho abafowabo bacoca naye. 
Genesis45:16 Kuthe iindabezi nazifika esigodlweni sakaFaro kobanyana uJosefa uthekelwe bafowabo, uFaro nazo zoke iinkhulu zakhe bajabula." 
Genesis45:17 UFaro wathi kuJosefa: “Tjela abafowenu bona bakhweze imithwalo kibodumbana babo babuyele eKanana," 
Genesis45:18 bafese bakhuphuke noyihlo nemindenabo beze kimapha. Ngizabasikela kelinonileko eGibhidapha bese bazinikelela ngamanoni wenarha le. 
Genesis45:19 Wena Josefa bona ukuqeda bonyana bathathela abantwana abancani nabafazi babo iinkoloyana eGibhidapha. Bakhweze noyihlo beze naye. 
Genesis45:20 Bangatshwenyeki ngepahla yomizabo ngombana koke okuhle kweGibhide kuzakuba ngokwabo.” 
Genesis45:21 Yeke amadodana ka-Israyeli enza njalo. UJosefa wawanikela iinkoloyana njengombana kutjho uFaro, godu wawapha nomphako." 
Genesis45:22 Wanikela omunye nomunye wawo izambatho ezitja, kodwana uBhenjamini yena wamupha amakhilogremu amathathu nesiquntu wesiliva kanye nezambatho ezihlanu." 
Genesis45:23 Khonokho wathumela uyise abodumbana abalitjhumi abalayitjhe izinto zeGibhide eziphambili, nabodumbana abalitjhumi abasikazi abalayitjhe ikoroyi nezikwa kanye nomphako." 
Genesis45:24 Walayelisa abafowabo nabakhambako wathi kibo: “Ningesabi litho endleleni!” 
Genesis45:25 Basuka eGibhide bakhamba babuyela kuyise uJakopo enarheni yeKanana. 
Genesis45:26 Bafese bamtjela bona uJosefa usaphila. Kodwana kuthe lokha nabathi uJosefa umbusi weGibhide yoke, wakhena, azange abakholwe." 
Genesis45:27 Kwathi nabamtjela koke uJosefa akukhulume kibo, nalokha nakabona iinkoloyana uJosefa azithumele bona zizomthatha, ummoyakhe wahlambuluka." 
Genesis45:28 Nje-ke u-Israyeli wathi: “Sengiyakholwa-ke! Indodanami uJosefa isaphila! Yeke bengikhamba khona nje ngiyombona ngaphambi kobana ngife.” 
Genesis46:1 Yeke u-Israyeli wasuka wakhamba nakho koke kwakhe. Kwathi lokha nakafika eBheritjheba wenza imihlabelo kuZimu kayise u-Isaka. 
Genesis46:2 UZimu wakhuluma no-Israyeli ebusuku ngombono wathi: “Jakopo! Jakopo!” Yena wathi: “Ungubani?” 
Genesis46:3 UZimu wathi: “NginguZimu, uZimu kayihlo. Ungasabi ukwehlela eGibhide ngombana ngizokwenza ube sisizwe esikhulu lapho." 
Genesis46:4 Mina ngokwami ngizakwehlela nawe eGibhide bese ngiyakubuyisa godu. NguJosefa ngesandla sakhe ozakuvala amehlo nawuhlongakalako.” 
Genesis46:5 Nje-ke uJakopo watjhiya iBheritjheba. Amadodanakhe amkhweza yena nabantwabawo nabafazi eenkoloyaneni uFaro azithumela bonyana athuthwe ngazo. 
Genesis46:6 Godu athatha imihlambawo nefuywawo egade ayibuthelele enarheni yeKanana, aya eGibhide. Ngaleyondlela uJakopo neenzukulwana zakhe" 
Genesis46:7 waya eGibhide: yena, amadodanakhe, amadodakazakhe, abantwana babantwabakhe okutjho zoke iinzukulwana zakhe." 
Genesis46:8 Naka amabizo wama-Israyeli akhamba noJakopo eGibhide kanye neezukulwana abelethelwa zona: URubeni izibulo lakaJakopo. 
Genesis46:9 Amadodana kaRubeni: ngu-Inogo, uPalu, uRhetsironi noKarimi." 
Genesis46:10 Amadodana kaSimiyoni: nguJemuweli, uJamini, u-Ohadi, uJakini, uTsorhari noSawula indodana yomfazi weKanana." 
Genesis46:11 Amadodana kaLevi: nguGeritjhoni, uKhehathi noMerari." 
Genesis46:12 Amadodana kaJuda: ngu-Eri, u-Onani, uTjhela, uPeretsi noZerarhi. (U-Eri no-Onani gade sebahlongakele lokha nakusukwa eKanana.) Amadodana kaPeretsi: nguRetsironi noRhamulu." 
Genesis46:13 Amadodana ka-Isakari: nguTola, uPuwa, uJobho noTjhimroni." 
Genesis46:13 Amadodana ka-Isakari: nguTola, uPuwa, uJobho noTjhimroni." 
Genesis46:14 Amadodana kaZebuloni: nguSeredi, u-Eloni noJarhiliyeli." 
Genesis46:15 (Lawo bekumadodana uLeya awabelethela uJakopo ePadana-Aramu, ngaphandle kwendodakazakhe uDina. Zoke iinzukulwana zakhe ezimadodana namadodakazi bezimatjhumi amathathu nazintathu.)" 
Genesis46:16 Amadodana kaGadi: nguTsifiyoni, uRhagi, uTjhuni, u-Etsiboni, u-Eri, u-Arodi no-Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Amadodana ka-Atjheri: nguJimina, uJitjhiva, uJitjhivi noBheriya. (Udadwabo gade kunguSerarhi.) Amadodana kaBheriya nguRhebere noMalikiyeli." 
Genesis46:18 (Lezo bekuziinzukulwana zakaZilipha ezabelethelwa uJakopo. UZilipha bekuyincekukazi uLabani ayipha indodakazakhe uLeya. Zoke iinzukulwana zakhe bezilitjhumi nathandathu.) 
Genesis46:19 Amadodana womkaJakopo uRarheli: nguJosefa noBhenjamini. 
Genesis46:20 (EGibhide kwabelethwa uManase no-Efrayimu. Bona bebabantwana bakaJosefa ababelethelwa ngu-Asenathi indodakazi kaPothi-Fera umphristi we-Oni.) 
Genesis46:21 Iinzukulwana zakaBhenjamini: nguBhela, uBhekere, u-Atjhibeli, uGera, uNamani, u-Erhi, uRotjha, amaMupi, amaRhupi no-Aradi." 
Genesis46:22 (Lezo bekuziinzukulwana zakaRarheli ezabelethelwa uJakopo. Zoke iinzukulwanezo bezilitjhumi nane.) 
Genesis46:23 Iinzukulwana zakaDani: maRhutjhi. 
Genesis46:24 Amadodana kaNafitali nguJarhitsiyeli, uGuni, uJetseri noTjhilemu." 
Genesis46:25 (Lezo bekuziinzukulwana zakaBhilirha ezabelethelwa uJakopo. UBhilirha bekuyincekukazi uLabani ayipha indodakazakhe uRarheli.) 
Genesis46:26 Boke abaya eGibhide noJakopo ebegade baziinzukulwana zakhe ngenyama, ngaphandle kwabomalukazana bakhe, bebamatjhumi asithandathu nabathandathu." 
Genesis46:27 Amadodana kaJosefa abelethelwa wona eGibhide gade amabili. Yeke woke umndeni kaJakopo owanzinza eGibhide gade umatjhumi alikhomba. 
Genesis46:28 UJakopo wathumela uJuda bona akhambe phambili ayokubuza indlela eya eGotjheni kuJosefa. Kuthe bona bafike esifundeni seGotjheneso," 
Genesis46:29 uJosefa wabophela ikaranakhe waya khona ukuyokuhlangabeza uyise u-Israyeli. UJosefa wathi nakabona uyise, waziphosa phezu kwakhe wamgona, walila isikhathi eside." 
Genesis46:30 U-Israyeli wathi kuJosefa: “Ngombana nakhu sele ngibone ubuso bakho, ngabona bonyana uyaphila, awa njekhona sengingafa-ke.”" 
Genesis46:31 UJosefa wathi kibomnakwabo nemndenini kayise: “Ngizakhuphuka ngiyonibika kuFaro ngithi kuye, ‘Abomnakwethu nomndeni woke wakababa ebegade bahlala enarheni yeKanana sebafikile kimi." 
Genesis46:32 Amadoda wakhona abelusi. Iye, madoda afuyileko. Nje-ke eze nemihlambi yezimvu, yeembuzi, neenkomo nayo yoke ifuyo anayo.’" 
Genesis46:33 Kuzakuthi lokha uFaro nanibizako anibuze bona nazi msebenzi bani," 
Genesis46:34 nithi kuye, ‘Iinceku zakho zimadoda afuyileko, ukusukela ebusaneni bekube namhlanje. Thina-ke sifuze abobaba.’ Ngaleyondlela nizakuvunyelwa bonyana nihlale esifundeni seGotjheni ngombana amaGibhide ayabanyenya abelusi.”" 
Genesis47:1 UJosefa wakhamba wabikela uFaro wathi: “Ubaba nabafowethu basukile eKanana sele baseGotjheni kanye nemihlambi yezimvu, yeembuzi, neenkomo nayo yoke ifuyo abanayo.”" 
Genesis47:2 Phakathi kwabafowabo boke wathatha abahlanu wabethula kuFaro. 
Genesis47:3 UFaro wabuza abafowabo wathi: “Nazi msebenzi bani?” Baphendula bathi: “Iinceku zakho zibelusi, zifuze aboyise.”" 
Genesis47:4 Godu bathi kuye: “Size bonyana sizokhonza enarhenapha ngombana indlala iyaphodlha eKanana le, kanti nemihlambi yeenceku zakho beyingasenamadlelo. Nje-ke sithe asibawe bonyana uvumele iinceku zakho zihlale eGotjhenapha.”" 
Genesis47:5 UFaro wathi kuJosefa: “Njengombana uyihlo nabafowenu beze kuwe nje," 
Genesis47:6 qeda wena bonyana ungababeka kuphi. Bahlalise endaweni eyazisako yeGibhidapha. Ungase ubahlalise eGotjheni. Nange kukhona phakathi kwabo abanekghono elikhethekileko, babeke babe baphathi babelusi befuywami.”" 
Genesis47:7 UJosefa waletha uyise uJakopo wamethula kuFaro. UJakopo walotjhisa uFaro bewambusisa. 
Genesis47:8 UFaro wambuza wathi: “Uneminyaka emingaki?” 
Genesis47:9 UJakopo wathi kuFaro: “Ngineminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amathathu woke ngisikhonzi ephasinapha. Iminyaka yokuphila kwami mincani begodu ibudisi, ayilingani neminyaka yabobaba.”" 
Genesis47:10 UJakopo wabusisa uFaro wamlayelisa, wakhamba." 
Genesis47:11 Yeke uJosefa wahlalisa uyise nabafowabo eGibhide, wabapha indawo okungeyabo. Bekuyindawo eyazisako, isesifundeni seRamasese njengokutjho kwakaFaro." 
Genesis47:12 UJosefa wondla uyise nabafowabo kanye nawo woke umndeni kayise ukuya ngokwesidingo sawo. 
Genesis47:13 Soke isifunda besinganakudla ngombana indlala beyibhokile. Abantu beGibhide nebeKanana bebaphodlhekile ngebanga lendlala. 
Genesis47:14 UJosefa wabuthelela loke isiliva elafumaneka eGibhide neKanana ngokuthengisa ikoroyi, waliletha esigodlweni sakaFaro." 
Genesis47:15 Kuthe bona abantu beGibhide nebeKanana baphelelwe lisiliva, yoke iGibhide yeza kuJosefa yathi: “Sipha ukudla. Kubayini usiliselele sibulawe yindlala usiqalile? Qala sesidududu asisenasiliva.”" 
Genesis47:16 UJosefa wathi: “Nakube anisenasiliva, lethani ifuywenu. Ngizanipha ukudla ngokuninanela ngayo.”" 
Genesis47:17 Yeke baletha ifuywabo kuJosefa, wabapha ukudla ngeenjomani, imihlambi yezimvu, yeembuzi, neyeenkomo kanye nabodumbana babo. Umnyaka lowo wabatjheja ngokudla, bona bathenga ngefuywabo yoke." 
Genesis47:18 Kuthe nakuphela umnyaka lowo babe bangasenalitho. Ngomnyaka olandelako beza kuJosefa bathi: “Amala akasizi, asisenalitho. Ifuywethu seyaba ngeyakho, sitlhoga nesiliva. Asinanto esingayinikela ikosethu ngaphandle kwemizimbethu namasimethu." 
Genesis47:19 Kubayini usiliselele sibulawe yindlala usiqalile, thina namasimethu? Thenga thina namasimethu ngokudla ukuze sibe ngebakaFaro. Godu usiphe imbewu ukuze siphile singafi, namasimu angabi mrhula.”" 
Genesis47:20 Yeke uJosefa wathengela uFaro woke amasimu weGibhide. AmaGibhide woke athengisa amasimawo ngombana indlala beyibhoke khulu. Inarha yaba ngeyakaFaro. 
Genesis47:21 Kiyo yoke imikhawulo yeGibhide uJosefa wafudusa abantu bonyana baye emadorbheni. 
Genesis47:22 Kwaba masimu wabaphristi kwaphela angazange awathenge ngombana bona bebafunyana isondlo kuFaro. Isondlweso besibanele, kungebangelo bangazange bathengise amasimabo." 
Genesis47:23 UJosefa wathi ebantwini: “Njengombana nginithenge bona nibe ngebakaFaro nina namasimenu nje, nasi-ke imbewu, tjalani amasimu la." 
Genesis47:24 Kodwana lokha nanivunako, yenzani isivuno senu sibe ziingcenye ezihlanu. Thathani ingcenye eyodwa niyinikele uFaro. Okuseleko nikugcine kube yimbewu enizayitjala, nokudla kwenu nemindenenu nabantwabenu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Bathi kuye: “Ikosethu isindise ipilwethu yeke nayifuna bonyana sisebenzele uFaro, sizakwenza njalo.”" 
Genesis47:26 UJosefa wakwenza kwaba mthetho wenarha yeGibhide osalandelwako nagadesi ukobana isivuno esiyingcenye eyodwa kezihlanu isisabelo sakaFaro. Masimu wabaphristi kwaphela angazange abe ngewakaFaro. 
Genesis47:27 Ama-Israyeli gade sele ahlala eGibhide esifundeni seGotjheni. Azuza ipahla lapho, abeletha, anda khulu ngesibalo." 
Genesis47:28 UJakopo wahlala eGibhide iminyaka elitjhumi namikhomba, yena waphila iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amane namikhomba." 
Genesis47:29 Kuthe nakufika isikhathi sokobana ahlongakale, wabiza indodanakhe uJosefa wathi kiyo: “Nange ngifumana umusa kuwe, faka isandla sakho ngaphasi kwenyongami bese uyangithembisa ngeqiniso nangokwethembeka bonyana awuzungibulungela eGibhidapha," 
Genesis47:30 kodwana nangihlongakalako, ngisusa lapha, ungithwale uyongibeka kibobamkhulu.” UJosefa wathi: “Ngizakwenza njengombana ubaba asitjho.”" 
Genesis47:31 UJakopo wathi: “Funga phambi kwami.” Yeke uJosefa wafunga-ke. U-Israyeli wakhothama wathandaza eenhloko zombhedakhe. 
Genesis48:1 Isikhatjhana ngemva kwalokho uJosefa wabikelwa bonyana uyise uyagula. Wakhamba namadodanakhe uManase no-Efrayimu bayokubona uyise. 
Genesis48:2 Lokha uJakopo nakatjelwa bonyana indodanakhe uJosefa ize ukuzombona, waziqinisa, wavuka wahlala embhedeni." 
Genesis48:3 UJakopo wathi kuJosefa: “UZimu oSabekako waziveza kimi eLuzi enarheni yeKanana, wangibusisa" 
Genesis48:4 wathi kimi, ‘Ngizokwenza ubelethe ngikwandise kuvele iinkoro ngeenkoro kuwe. Ngizokupha iinzukulwana zakho emva kwakho inarha le kube lilifa lazo lanini nanini.’" 
Genesis48:5 Nje-ke amadodanakho owabelethele eGibhidapha ngaphambi kobana ngize kuwe azakuthathwa bonyana ngewami. U-Efrayimu noManase bazakuba madodanami njengombana uRubeni noSimiyoni bangebami. 
Genesis48:6 Abanye-ke abantwana ababelethwe ngemva kwabo ngibo abazakuba ngebakho kodwana bazakudla ilifa kanye nabantwana baka-Efrayimu noManase. 
Genesis48:7 Bengithanda bonyana kube njalo ngombana unyoko uRarheli ngambulunga eKanana. Ngehlelwa lisizi lokha nakangitjhiya ngisendleleni kudanyana ne-Efrata. Ngambeka khonapho eqadi kwendlela eya e-Efrata.” (I-Efrata namhlanje kuthiwa yiBhethe-Lehema.) 
Genesis48:8 Yeke u-Israyeli wabuza uJosefa wathi: “Bobani-ke okhamba nababa?” Watjho lokho ngombana waphosa amehlwakhe emadodaneni kaJosefa. 
Genesis48:9 UJosefa wathi kuyise: “Madodanami uZimu angiphe wona enarheni le.” U-Israyeli wathi: “Balethapha ngibabusise.” 
Genesis48:10 U-Israyeli bekangasaboni ngombana amehlwakhe gade sele afiphele ngebanga lokuluphala. UJosefa wabandameza amadodanakhe kuyise, yena wawancwanga emhlathini wawagona." 
Genesis48:11 U-Israyeli wathi kuJosefa: “Besele ngahloboka bonyana ngingabuye ngikubone godu. Nokho uZimu ungivumele bonyana ngibone nabantwabakho.” 
Genesis48:12 UJosefa wasusa amadodanakhe egade ajame emadolweni kayise, wahloma ihloko phasi phambi kwakhe." 
Genesis48:13 Wawathatha womabili, u-Efrayimu waba ngesidleni sakhe bonyana abe ngesinceleni saka-Israyeli, kwathi uManase waba ngesinceleni sakhe bonyana abe ngesidleni saka-Israyeli. Wawatjhideza ku-Israyeli ngaleyondlela." 
Genesis48:14 Kodwana u-Israyeli welula isandla sakhe sokudla wasibeka ehloko ka-Efrayimu phezu kobana gade angomncani, waphambanisa izandla zakhe wabeka sekhohlo ehloko kaManase phezu kobana uManase bekalizibulo." 
Genesis48:15 Wabusisa uJosefa wathi: “Abobaba u-Abrahamu no-Isaka gade batjhidelene noZimu. UZimu waba ngumelusami ipilwami yoke bekube gadesi nengilozakhe yangisindisa kizo zoke iingozi. Inga uZimethu angabusisa abasanaba ukuze ngabo kungakhohlwakali ibizo lami namabizo wabobaba u-Abrahamu no-Isaka, godu bande khulu ephasinapha.”" 
Genesis48:16 Lokha uJosefa nakabona uyise abeka isandla sakhe sokudla ehloko ka-Efrayimu wadana. Wabamba isandla sakayise ukuze asisuse ehloko ka-Efrayimu asise kweyakaManase. 
Genesis48:17 Wathi kuyise: “Awa baba, olizibulo ngilo; ubaba akabeke isandla sakhe sokudla ehlokwakhe.”" 
Genesis48:18 Kodwana uyise wala wathi: “Ngiyazi ndodanami, ngikwazi kuhle lokho. Naye uzakuba sisizwe. Nokho umfowabo omncani uzakuba ngaphezu kwakhe, neenzukulwana zakhe zizakuba zizizwe ezinengi.”" 
Genesis48:19 Wababusisa mhlokho wathi: “Ngani u-Israyeli uzakutjho amezwi lawa nakabusisako athi, ‘Inga uZimu angakwenza ube njengo-Efrayimu noManase.’ ” Ngaleyondlela wabeka u-Efrayimu ngaphambi kwakaManase." 
Genesis48:20 U-Israyeli wathi kuJosefa: “Sengiyahlongakala, kodwana uZimu uzakuba nani anibuyisele enarheni yaboyihlomkhulu." 
Genesis48:21 Wena-ke Josefa, mina ngikunikela okukhethekileko nokungehla kokwabafowenu okulihlangothi elilodwa lentaba engayithatha kuma-Amori ngesabula nangomsebe wami.”" 
Genesis49:1 UJakopo wabiza amadodanakhe wathi: “Bizanani nihlangane ukuze nginitjele bonyana kuzokwenzakalani kini esikhathini esizako. 
Genesis49:2 “Buthanani nilalele madodana kaJakopo; lalelani uyihlo u-Israyeli. 
Genesis49:3 “Rubeni, ulizibulo lami, umamandlami, umphumela wokuthoma wobudoda bami. Ngawe ngasasa, ngaqina amandla." 
Genesis49:4 Kodwana njengamanzi anyamalalako, nawe angeze waba neenzukulwana, ngombana wangena emalalweni kayihlo, wasilaphaza umbhedami." 
Genesis49:5 “USimiyoni noLevi zizelamani iinsabula zabo ziinhlabano zenturhu. 
Genesis49:6 Angingangeni ebandleni labo, ngingabi mdibi munye nabo, ngombana ngetukuthelwabo babulala abantu, ngokuhlosa baqunta imisipha yemilenze yeenkomo." 
Genesis49:7 Akunikelelwe ukuthukuthela kwabo ngombana kubhamba, nobukhali babo ngombana buyavutha! Ngiyabaphadlhalaja kwaJakopo, ngibahlakaze kwa-Israyeli." 
Genesis49:8 “Wena Juda, abafowenu bayakubuka, isandla sakho siphezu kwentamo yezitha zakho, amadodana kayihlo ayakukhothamela." 
Genesis49:9 UJuda umntwana webhubezi, indodanami ifana nebhubezi elisuthiko: Liyakhothama lizigedagede phasi, akakho ongalinga ukulivusa!" 
Genesis49:10 Intonga yobukhosi angeze yasuka kuJuda, nentonga yombusi hlangana neenyawo zakhe, bekulethwe isibiko kuye, nezizwe zoke zitjengise ukumlalela." 
Genesis49:11 Ubophela udumbanakhe esidiribeni, udumbanyanakhe epandeni ekhethekileko, ahlanze isambatho sakhe ewayinini, iphuraphurakhe eengazini zamadiribe." 
Genesis49:12 Amehlwakhe amnyama kunewayini, amazinywakhe amhlophe kunebisi." 
Genesis49:13 “UZebuloni uzakuphila ngegwini lelwandle, abe njengesebe leenthayamanzi; imikhawulwakhe inabele ngeTsidoni." 
Genesis49:14 “U-Isakari uyikakha kadumbana, ubhesa hlangana nemithwalo." 
Genesis49:15 Lokha nakabona ubuhle bendawo yokuphumula, nobuhle benarha, wehlisa ihlombe lakhe bonyana athwale abe likhoboka lomsebenzi okatelelako." 
Genesis49:16 “UDani umela amalungelo wabantu bekhabo angomunye wesizwe sakwa-Israyeli. 
Genesis49:17 UDani uyinyoka esendleleni, ulirabi elisemzileni, eliluma iinthende zenjomani umkhweli wakhona abe aketuke." 
Genesis49:18 “Mina ngiqale isindiswakho Somnini. 
Genesis49:19 “UGadi usahlelwa siqhema semigulukudu, kodwana yena ugijimisa isiqhemeso." 
Genesis49:20 “Ku-Atjheri kunokudla okunothileko, uphakela iinkhanakhana ezilungele ikosi." 
Genesis49:21 “UNafitali umumuthi onabileko, oveza iimpande ezihle." 
Genesis49:22 “UJosefa usidiribe esithelako, isidiribe esithelako esiseduze nomthombo, esineempande ezirarela umthangala." 
Genesis49:23 Abadumuzi ngomsebe bayamtlhorholoja, bayamsahlela ngombana banevunda naye." 
Genesis49:24 Kodwana umsebakhe uhlala uqinile, umkhonwakhe nezandla zakhe zimsinya, ngombana usizwa ngongonamandla kaJakopo, usizwa ngumelusi olidwala laka-Israyeli," 
Genesis49:25 iye, usizwa nguSabekako onguZimu kayihlo. UZimu uyakwenyela abe akubusise ngeembusiso zamazulu aphezulu, iimbusiso zamanzi azikileko neembusiso zamabele nesibeletho." 
Genesis49:26 Iimbusiso zakaZimu uyihlo zikulu kuneembusiso zeentaba zekadeni, kunezinto ongazifisa emibundwini yekadeni. Inga zoke iimbusiswezi zingaba phezu kwehloko kaJosefa, phezu kwepandla yekosana yabafowabo." 
Genesis49:27 “UBhenjamini uyipisi evithizako, ekuseni urhiribidela ukudla kwakhe, entambama wahlukanisa ipango.”" 
Genesis49:28 Zoke lezi ziinkoro ezilitjhumi nambili zakwa-Israyeli begodu lokhu ngokwatjhiwo nguyisazo kizo lokha nazibusisako. Wanikela enye nenye isibusiso esiyifaneleko. 
Genesis49:29 UJakopo wanikela amadodanakhe umyalo wathi: “Sele ngizokuhlongakala. Ningibulunge kibobamkhulu erholweni elisesimini ka-Efroni umRhithi. 
Genesis49:30 Ngitjho irholo lesimu yeMakaphela engepumalanga yeMamre eKanana, u-Abrahamu alithenga nesimu ku-Efroni umRhithi kobana kube yindawo yamathuna wasafuthi." 
Genesis49:31 Lapho, yindawo lapha kwabulungwa u-Abrahamu nomkakhe uSara, u-Isaka nomkakhe uRabega nabo babulungwa lapho. Nami ngabulunga uLeya lapho." 
Genesis49:32 Isimu kanye nerholo elilapho kwathengwa kumaRhithi.” 
Genesis49:33 Kuthe bona uJakopo aqede ukuyala amadodanakhe, wanabisela iinyawo zakhe embhedeni, wadosa ummoya kokugcina, wahlongakala." 
Genesis50:1 UJosefa waziphosa phezu kwakayise, wamlilela, wamncwanga emhlathini." 
Genesis50:2 Walayela amagedla amsebenzelako bonyana omise isidumbu sakayise ngeenhlahla. Yeke amagedla asomisa ngeenhlahla. 
Genesis50:3 Kwawathatha amalanga amatjhumi amane ngombana leso bekusikhathi esibekelwe ukomisa isidumbu ngeenhlahla. AmaGibhide alilela uJakopo amalanga amatjhumi alikhomba. 
Genesis50:4 Kuthe nasele kudlule amalanga wokulila uJosefa wathi ebaphathini besigodlo sakaFaro: “Nange ngifumene umusa emehlwenenu ngikhulumelani noFaro nimtjele bonyana 
Genesis50:5 ubaba wangifungisa wathi, ‘Sele ngizokuhlongakala, ungibulunge ethuneni engazilungisela lona enarheni yeKanana.’ Nje-ke bengithi ngivumela ngikhambe ngiyokubulunga ubaba ngizakubuya.”" 
Genesis50:6 UFaro wathi: “Khuphuka uyokubulunga uyihlo njengombana akufungisa njalo.” 
Genesis50:7 Yeke uJosefa wakhuphuka wayokubulunga uyise. Zoke iinkhulu zakaFaro zamphekelela: kwakuziintatanyiswa zesigodlo sakhe nazo zoke iintatanyiswa zeGibhide," 
Genesis50:8 zazikhambisana nawo woke amalunga wekumba kaJosefa nabafowabo nebekumba kayise. Bantwababo nefuywabo kwaphela okwasala eGotjheni. 
Genesis50:9 Abakhweli beenkarana bakhuphuka naye, kwaba siqubuthu esikhulu." 
Genesis50:10 Lokha nabafika eGoreni-Hayathadi ngaphetjheya kweJordani bahlaba umkhosi omkhulu wesililo. Lapho uJosefa wadlulisa amalanga alikhomba wokuzilela uyise. 
Genesis50:11 Lokha amaKanana ahlala lapho nakabona isililo eGoreni-Hayathadi athi: “Lo, mkhosi omkhulu wesililo samaGibhide.” Kungebangelo indawo engaphetjheya kweJordani leyo yabizwa bonyana yi-Abela-Mitsirayimu." 
Genesis50:12 Ngaleyondlela amadodana kaJakopo aphetha ilizwi lakhe: 
Genesis50:13 Amthwala, amngenisa enarheni yeKanana. Ambulunga ngerholweni lesimu yeMakaphela engepumalanga yeMamre. Lelo bekulirholo elisesimini eyathengwa ngu-Abrahamu ku-Efroni umRhithi bonyana kube yindawo yamathuna wasafuthi." 
Genesis50:14 Ngemva kokubulungwa kwakayise, uJosefa wabuyela eGibhide kanye nabafowabo nabo boke ebegade bamphekelele." 
Genesis50:15 Kuthe bona abafowabo babone bonyana uyisabo uhlongakele bathi: “UJosefa usasibambele ivunda. Ngalokho uzozibuyiselela ngakho koke okumbi esamenza khona!” 
Genesis50:16 Yeke bazisa uJosefa bathi: “Uyihlo watjhiya umyalezo naku nazakuhlongakala," 
Genesis50:17 ‘Nakhu enizakutjho kuJosefa: Ngibawa bona ulibalele abafowenu imitjhapho nezono abakwenza zona ngokukuphatha makghwakghwa.’ Nje-ke sibawa uqolele imitjhapho yeenceku zakaZimu kayihlo.” UJosefa walila nakezwa amezwi lawo. 
Genesis50:18 Abafowabo beza ngokwabo bazilahlela phambi kwakhe bathi: “Simakhobokakho.” 
Genesis50:19 Kodwana uJosefa wathi: “Ningesabi. Angeze ngazibeka esikhundleni sakaZimu. 
Genesis50:20 Nina nanihlele ukungilimaza kodwana uZimu wakujika lokho kwaba ngokuhle ukuze asindise amaphilo wabanengi njengombana kunjalo namhlanje. 
Genesis50:21 Yeke musani ukwesaba. Ngizanondla kanye nabantwabenu.” Wabaduduza, wakhuluma kuhle nabo." 
Genesis50:22 UJosefa wahlala eGibhide kanye nomndeni kayise. Waphila iminyaka elikhulu netjhumi. 
Genesis50:23 Wabona abantwana bomntwana ka-Efrayimu. Wathatha abantwana bakaMakiri umsa kaManase njengebakhe. 
Genesis50:24 UJosefa wathi kubafowabo: “Sele ngizakuhlongakala. Kodwana yazini uZimu uzanikhumbula anikhuphe enarheni le niye enarheni ayithembisa ngesifungo ku-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo.”" 
Genesis50:25 UJosefa wafungisa amadodana ka-Israyeli wathi: “Khambani namathambami nanisuka lapha lokha uZimu nakanikhumbulako.” 
Genesis50:26 UJosefa wahlongakala aneminyaka elikhulu netjhumi. Isidumbu sakhe somiswa ngeenhlahla safakwa ngekasini eGibhide. 
Exodus1:1 U-Israyeli onguJakopo waya eGibhide. Amadodanakhe akhamba naye, enye nenye nomndenayo. Naka amabizwawo:" 
Exodus1:2 uRubeni, uSimiyoni, uLevi noJuda;" 
Exodus1:3 u-Isakari, uZebuloni noBhenjamini;" 
Exodus1:4 uDani noNafitali; uGadi no-Atjheri. 
Exodus1:5 Ngesikhatheso uJosefa bekasele aseGibhide. Yeke iinzukulwana zakaJakopo gade zimatjhumi alikhomba ngesibalo. 
Exodus1:6 UJosefa nabo boke abafowabo kanye nazo zoke iinzukulwanezo bahlongakala," 
Exodus1:7 kodwana ama-Israyeli abeletha, ahluma abe anda ngesibalo kangangobana azala inarha yeGibhide." 
Exodus1:8 Ngokukhamba kwesikhathi eGibhide kwaba nekosi etja egade ingamazi uJosefa. 
Exodus1:9 Yathi ebantwini bayo: “Qalani, ama-Israyeli kwanjesi sele andile kunathi." 
Exodus1:10 Yeke asibeni nelisu ngawo, sikhandele bona angandi. Nakungasinjalo nakube kuyenzeka bona siqalane nepi azakuba libutho nezitha zethu bese alwa nathi, athumbe inarha.”" 
Exodus1:11 Ngalokho bawabekela abatjhotjhozeli kobana bawagandelele emsebenzinawo okatelelako. Bekufuze akhe iPitomu neRamesese njengamadorobho wakaFaro wokubeka ipahla. 
Exodus1:12 Kodwana bathi nabarhagala ngokuwagandelela nawo arhagala ngokwanda, anaba. Ngalokho amaGibhide athoma ukukhathazeka khulu ngama-Israyeli." 
Exodus1:13 Nje-ke aqinisa isandla phezu kwawo," 
Exodus1:14 abe enza ipilo yama-Israyeli bona ibe munyu ngokuwasebenzisa umsebenzi obudisi weentina nedaka nangayo yoke imihlobo yemisebenzi yemasimini. Kiyo yoke imisebenzi ebudisi, amaGibhide asebenzisa ama-Israyeli ngesihluku." 
Exodus1:15 Ikosi yeGibhide yakhuluma kuTjhifira noPuwa okubabelethisi bamaHebheru 
Exodus1:16 yathi: “Lokha nanisiza abafazi bamaHebheru ukubeletha bese nanibona kumsana, mbulaleni, nakumntazana mliseni aphile.”" 
Exodus1:17 Kodwana ababelethisi besaba uZimu, azange benze lokho ikosi yeGibhide ethe bakwenze. Balisa abesana baphila." 
Exodus1:18 Nje-ke ikosi yeGibhide yabiza ababelethisi yababuza yathi: “Nikwenzeleni lokhu? Kubayini nilise abesana baphile na?” 
Exodus1:19 Ababelethisi baphendula uFaro bathi: “Abafazi bamaHebheru abafani nebamaGibhide, bona banamandla, kuthi umbelethisi angakafiki ibe sebabelethile.”" 
Exodus1:20 Ngalokho uZimu waba nomusa ebabelethisini, nabantu banda baba banengi khulu ukudlula." 
Exodus1:21 Ngebanga lokobana ababelethisi besaba uZimu, wabapha imbeleko." 
Exodus1:22 Yeke uFaro wakhupha umyalo othi: “Boke abesana ababelethwako baphoseleni emlanjeni iNayili, kodwana abentazana bona nibalise baphile.”" 
Exodus2:1 Indoda yendlu kaLevi gade ithethe umfazi omLevi. 
Exodus2:2 Umfazi loyo waba sidisi bewabeletha indodana. Kwathi angabona bonyana umntwana muhle, wamfihla iinyanga ezintathu." 
Exodus2:3 Kodwana kuthe nangasakghoni ukumfihla, wathatha umantji wephaphirasi wawutjhatjha ngemihlobohlobo yesikontiri. Wafaka umntwana ngaphakathi komantji wawubeka hlangana nomgaba emanzini magegana nomlambo iNayili." 
Exodus2:4 Udadwabo lomntwana wajamela kujanyana afuna ukubona bonyana kuzokwenzakalani ngaye. 
Exodus2:5 Kwehla indodakazi kaFaro yaya emlanjeni iNayili kobana iyokuhlamba. Lokha nayisahlambako iinsebenzi zayo bezikhambakhamba magegana nomlambo. Kuthe kusesenjalo yabona umantji hlangana nomgaba, yathumela ikhobokakazi layo bonyana liwuthathe." 
Exodus2:6 Yawuvula, yabona isana lilila. Yeke yalirhawukela yathi: “Leli ngelinye lamasana wamaHebheru.”" 
Exodus2:7 Udadwabo lesanelo wakhuluma nendodakazi kaFaro wathi: “Ngingayokufunela omunye wabafazi bamaHebheru kobana azokumunyisela isaneli na?” 
Exodus2:8 Yona yathi: “Iye, gijima!” Nje-ke umntazana wakhamba wayokubiza unina." 
Exodus2:9 Indodakazi kaFaro yathi kunina: “Thatha isaneli ungondlele lona, ngizakukhokhela.” Yeke umfazi wathatha isanelo walondla." 
Exodus2:10 Kuthe umntwana loyo nasele akhulile, wamthatha wamusa endodakazini kaFaro waba yindodanayo. Yamthiya bona nguMosi ngombana yathi: “Iye, ngamthatha emanzini.”" 
Exodus2:11 Ngelinye ilanga, uMosi sele akhule ngokwaneleko, waphuma waya ebantwini bekhabo, wababona basebenza kabudisi. Khonapho wabona umGibhide abetha umHebheru ongomunye wabantu bekhabo." 
Exodus2:12 Waqala ngapha nangapha wangabona muntu, wabulala umGibhide loyo bewamfihla ehlabathini." 
Exodus2:13 Ngelanga elilandelako nakhona waphuma, wabona amaHebheru amabili asilwa. Wabuza onomlandu wathi: “Kubayini ubethe umHebheru wekhenu?”" 
Exodus2:14 Indoda leyo yathi kuye: “Ubekwe ngubani bonyana ube mbusi nomgwebi phezu kwethu? Kghani ucabanga ukungibulala nami njengomGibhide ombuleleko loya?” UMosi waba nokwesaba wadlumbana wathi: “Kutjho bona sekuyaziwa ngendabami le.” 
Exodus2:15 Kwathi bona uFaro ezwe ngendaba le, walinga ukubulala uMosi, kodwana uMosi wabalekela eMidiyani wafika wahlala emthonjeni." 
Exodus2:16 Umphristi weMidiyani gade anamadodakazi alikhomba. Ehla azokukha amanzi bese azalisa neenkerebhe kobana aseze ifuyo kayisawo. 
Exodus2:17 Khonapho kwavela abelusi abanye bawaqotjha. Kodwana uMosi wasikima wawenyela bewaseza ifuywawo. 
Exodus2:18 Lokha amadodakazi nabuyela kuyise, uRewuyeli, wawabuza wathi: “Naba msinya kangaka namhlanje kwenze njani?”" 
Exodus2:19 Aphendula athi: “Senyelwe mGibhide othize ebelusinaba. Godu usikhelele namanzi bewaseza nefuywethu.” 
Exodus2:20 Nje-ke wabuza amadodakazakhe wathi: “Alo, uphi umuntu loyo? Nimtjhiyeleni ebaleni? Khambani niyomkhombela azogoma intwanyana.”" 
Exodus2:21 UMosi wazimisela ukuhlala noRewuyeli. Wamupha indodakazakhe uTsiphora bonyana abe mkakhe. 
Exodus2:22 UTsiphora wabeletha indodana, uMosi wayithiya bona nguGeritjhomu asithi: “Ngibe sikhonzi enarheni etjhili.”" 
Exodus2:23 Ngemva kwesikhathi eside ikosi yeGibhide yahlongakala. Kodwana ama-Israyeli bekasoloko anghunanghuna ngobukhoboka bawo. Abalabala njalo ngobukhoboka bawo isililo sawo sabe safika kuZimu. 
Exodus2:24 UZimu wezwa ukububula kwawo, wakhumbula isivumelwano sakhe no-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo." 
Exodus2:25 UZimu wayelela ama-Israyeli bewabazi ubujamo bawo. 
Exodus3:1 UMosi gade eluse umhlambi kaJetero, umkhwe wakhe, umphristi weMidiyani. Waragela umhlambi ngaphetjheya kwerhalawumba bewafika eRhorebe intaba kaZimu." 
Exodus3:2 Khonapho kwavela ingilozi kaZimu ngamalangabi womlilo iphakathi kwesithukghwana. UMosi wabona bonyana nanyana isithukghwaneso sisitjha kodwana besingapheli. 
Exodus3:3 Yeke uMosi wadlumbana wathi: “Akhe ngiphambuke ngiyokuhlola isimangaliswesi. Kubayini isithukghwanesi sisitjha kodwana singapheli?” 
Exodus3:4 Lokha uSomnini nabona bonyana uphambukele ukuyohlola bona kwenzakalani, uZimu wambiza asesithukghwanenapho wathi: “Mosi! Mosi!” UMosi wathi: “Ngilapha!”" 
Exodus3:5 USomnini wathi: “Ungatjhideli lapha, hlubula amapatlagwanakho ngombana lapha ujame khonapho yindawo ecwengileko." 
Exodus3:6 NginguZimu kayihlo, uZimu ka-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo.” UMosi wagubuzesa ubuso bakhe ngombana bekesaba ukuqala uZimu." 
Exodus3:7 Godu uSomnini wathi: “Ngambala ngibonile amatlhuwiso wabantu bami eGibhide. Ngisizwile isililo sabo ngebanga labatjhotjhozeli. Iye, ngiyalazi isizi labo." 
Exodus3:8 Ngalokho ngehlile kobana ngibenyele esandleni samaGibhide, ngibakhuphe enarheni leyo ngibase enarheni ehle nevulekileko. Iye, inarha egeleza ibisi neliju, ikhaya lamaKanana, amaRhithi, ama-Amori, amaPerizi, amaRhivi namaJebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Gadesi nje isililo sama-Israyeli sele sifike eendlebeni zami. Begodu ngibonile indlela amaGibhide awagandelele ngayo. 
Exodus3:10 Yeke yewize, ngikuthume kuFaro kobana uyokukhupha abantu bami ama-Israyeli eGibhide.”" 
Exodus3:11 Kodwana uMosi wathi kuZimu: “Bengingubani bonyana ngingaya kuFaro ngiyokukhupha ama-Israyeli eGibhide?” 
Exodus3:12 UZimu wathi: “Mbala ngizakuba nawe. Nasi isibonakaliso esizakuba litshwayo kuwe kobana ngimi engikuthumileko: Nasele ukhuphe abantu eGibhide, nizakudumisa uZimu entabeni le.”" 
Exodus3:13 UMosi wathi kuZimu: “Akhe sithi ngiya kuma-Israyeli bese ngithi, ‘UZimu waboyihlomkhulu ungithume kini’, angibuze-ke athi, ‘Ngubani ibizo lakhe uZimu loyo?’ alo, ngizakuthini kiwo?”" 
Exodus3:14 UZimu wathi kuMosi: “Nginguye enginguye. Nakhu ozakutjela ama-Israyeli, ‘UNginguye ungithume kini.’ ”" 
Exodus3:15 UZimu godu wathi kuMosi: “Yithi kuma-Israyeli, ‘USomnini uZimu waboyihlomkhulu, uZimu ka-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo ungithume kini.’ Lelo libizo lami lanini nanini, okulibizo engizakuduma ngalo iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana." 
Exodus3:16 “Khamba ufese uhlanganise abaphathi bakwa-Israyeli ndawonye bese uthi kibo, ‘USomnini uZimu waboyihlomkhulu, uZimu ka-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo uzibonakalise kimi wathi: Nginitjhejile bengabona lokho amaGibhide akwenze phezu kwenu." 
Exodus3:17 Nje-ke sengithembise ukunikhupha esizini leGibhide nginise enarheni yamaKanana, amaRhithi, ama-Amori, amaPerizi, amaRhivi namaJebusi, inarha egeleza ibisi neliju.’" 
Exodus3:18 Abaphathi bakwa-Israyeli bazakulalela. Wena-ke nabaphathi nizakuya ekosini yeGibhide nithi kiyo, ‘USomnini uZimu wamaHebheru ubonene nathi. Yeke sivumela sikhambe ikhambo lamalanga amathathu erhalawumbeni kobana senzele uSomnini uZimethu imihlabelo.’" 
Exodus3:19 Kodwana mina ngiyazi bonyana ikosi yeGibhide angeze yanivumela bona nikhambe ngaphandle kokukatelelwa sisandla esinamandla. 
Exodus3:20 Ngalokho-ke ngizakwelula isandla sami ngimadlhe amaGibhide ngazo zoke iimangaliso engizazenza phakathi kwawo. Ngemva kwalapho izanitjhaphulula. 
Exodus3:21 “Godu ngizakwenza bonyana amaGibhide abe nesisa ebantwinaba ukuze nithi naniphumako ningakhambi nimkhonoze. 
Exodus3:22 Woke umfazi akakhombele umakhelwanakhe nanyana omunye nomunye umfazi ahlala ekumbenakhe kobana amuphe iintwanyana zesiliva negolide kanye nezambatho enizazembathisa amadodana namadodakazenu. Ngaleyondlela nizakuphanga amaGibhide.” 
Exodus4:1 UMosi waphendula wathi: “Bahlumba ukungikholwa namkha ukungilalela bese bathi, ‘Sukapha wena! AkunaSomnini okhe waziveza kuwe.’ ”" 
Exodus4:2 USomnini wathi kuye: “Uphetheni kuwapho?” UMosi wathi: “Ngiphethe idondolo.” 
Exodus4:3 USomnini wathi: “Liphosele phasi.” UMosi waliphosela phasi laphenduka inyoka. Kuthe lokha uMosi nayibalekelako," 
Exodus4:4 uSomnini wathi kuye: “Lula isandla sakho uyibambe ngomsila!” Yeke uMosi welula isandla sakhe wayibamba, yabuya yaphenduka idondolo esandleni sakhe." 
Exodus4:5 USomnini wathi: “Naso-ke isibonakaliso ukuze bakholwe bonyana uSomnini uZimu waboyisemkhulu, uZimu ka-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo uziveze kuwe.”" 
Exodus4:6 Godu uSomnini wathi: “Faka isandla sakho esifubeni.” UMosi wenza njalo, kwathi lokha nasikhuphako sabe sikghamathele ikhwekhwe simhlophe inga sithwathwa." 
Exodus4:7 USomnini wathi: “Sibuyisele esifubeni.” UMosi wasibuyisela, kwathi lokha nasikhuphako sabe sele silaphekile sifana nesinye." 
Exodus4:8 USomnini waraga wathi: “Nayibe abakukholwa namkha abathatheki ngesibonakaliso sokuthoma, bazakukholwa sesibili." 
Exodus4:9 Kodwana nayibe abazikholwa zombili iimbonakaliswezo namkha abakulaleli, yikha amanzi eNayili uwathele equlwanini. Amanzi owakhe emlanjeni azakuphenduka iingazi equlwanini.”" 
Exodus4:10 UMosi wathi kuSomnini: “Maye Kosami! Mina angisisikhulumi, azange khengibe ngiso nesikhathini esidlulileko, ngitjho nanje njengombana uSomnini athome ukukhuluma nencekwakhe nje. Ngiyangunguza godu ngikhuluma sidondi.”" 
Exodus4:11 USomnini wathi kuye: “Ngubani owenze umuntu bona akhulume? Ngubani omenza bona abe simumu namkha angezwa? Ngubani omenza abone namkha abe siphofu? Akusimi mina Somnini na? 
Exodus4:12 Nje-ke ngena indlela, ngizakusiza ukukhuluma bengikufundise nalokho ozokukhuluma.”" 
Exodus4:13 Kodwana uMosi wathi: “Awu, Kosami! Ngiyakubawa, bengithi uSomnini akhe athume omunye.”" 
Exodus4:14 USomnini wathukuthelela uMosi wathi: “Angitjho unomfowenu u-Aroni umLevi? Ngiyazi bonyana yena ukghona ukukhuluma kuhle. Sele asendleleni uzokuhlangabeza, ihliziywakhe izokuthaba nakubonako." 
Exodus4:15 Uzakhuluma naye umfunze ngamagama; ngizanisiza nobabili ukukhuluma benginifundise nenifanele nikwenze. 
Exodus4:16 Nguye ozakukhuluma nabantu esikhundleni sakho. Yena uzakuba mlomakho, wena ube njengoZimu kuye." 
Exodus4:17 Thatha idondolwelo ukuze wenze ngalo iimbonakaliso.” 
Exodus4:18 UMosi wabuyela kumkhwe wakhe uJetero wathi kuye: “Bengithi ngitjhaphulula ngiye ebantwini bekhethu eGibhide ngiyobabona bonyana basaphile kuhle na.” UJetero wathi: “Goduka, inga izinto zingakukhambela kuhle.”" 
Exodus4:19 USomnini watjela uMosi asese seMidiyani wathi: “Buyela eGibhide ngombana boke abantu ebegade bafuna ukukubulala sebafile kwanjesi.” 
Exodus4:20 Yeke uMosi wathatha umkakhe namadodanakhe, wabakhweza kudumbana wanqomba eGibhide. Waphatha nedondolo lakaZimu." 
Exodus4:21 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Lokha nawubuyela eGibhide, qinisekisa bonyana wenza phambi kwakaFaro yoke imikarisomraro engikunikele amandla bonyana uyenze. Kodwana ngizakukhunyalalisa ihliziywakhe ukuze angavumi bonyana abantu batjhaphuluke bakhambe." 
Exodus4:22 Bese uthi kuFaro, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: U-Israyeli yindodanami elizibulo;" 
Exodus4:23 ngikutjele ngathi utjhaphulule indodanami leyo kobana ikwazi ukungilotjha. Kodwana nawunghanghabalako, yazi bonyana ngizokubulala indodanakho elizibulo.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Kwathi endleleni, endaweni yokulala, uSomnini weza kuye wafuna ukumbulala." 
Exodus4:25 Kodwana uTsiphora wathatha ilitje elibukhali watsepunya ijwabu lendodanakhe, wathinta uMosi ngejwabelo ebudodeni bakhe wathi: “Ngambala kimi ungovikeleke ngeengazi!”" 
Exodus4:26 Watjho lokho akhomba ukusoka. Yeke uSomnini wamlisa. 
Exodus4:27 USomnini wathi ku-Aroni: “Khamba uye erhalawumbeni uyokuhlangabeza uMosi.” Yeke wahlangana noMosi entabeni kaZimu wamncwanga emhlathini. 
Exodus4:28 UMosi watjela u-Aroni koke uSomnini amthume bona akutjho, nangazo zoke iimbonakaliso amlayele bonyana azenze." 
Exodus4:29 UMosi no-Aroni bakhamba, babizela ndawonye boke abaphathi bakwa-Israyeli." 
Exodus4:30 U-Aroni wafese wabatjela koke uSomnini akukhulume kuMosi. Godu wenza neembonakaliso phambi kwabantu," 
Exodus4:31 yeke bakholwa. Kuthe lokha nabezwa bonyana uSomnini utshwenyekile ngabo nokobana ubonile isizi labo, badumisa ngokuguqa bahlome iinhloko phasi." 
Exodus5:1 Ngemva kwalokho uMosi no-Aroni baya kuFaro bathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ‘Tjhaphulula abantu bami bakhambe ukuze bangenzele umnyanya erhalawumbeni.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 UFaro wathi: “Bekangubani uSomnini wakhona loyo bonyana ngingabeze ngimlalele ngitjhaphulule ama-Israyeli? Angimazi uSomnini loyo, ngalokho ngithi nakuma-Israyeli akayi ndawo!”" 
Exodus5:3 Yeke bathi: “UZimu wamaHebheru ubonene nathi. Nje-ke sibawa usivumele sikhambe ikhambo lamalanga amathathu erhalawumbeni siyokuhlabela uSomnini uZimethu. Nakungasinjalo uzasirhadla ngamatshwenyeko namkha ngepi.” 
Exodus5:4 Kodwana ikosi yeGibhide yathi kibo: “Wena Mosi nawe Aroni, kubayini nifune ukususa abantu emsebenzinabo? Buyelani emsebenzinenu!”" 
Exodus5:5 UFaro waraga wathi: “Qalani bona abantu benu banengi kangangani enarhenapha, kodwana khonapho nina nifuna ukujamisa abasebenzako.”" 
Exodus5:6 Khona mhlokho uFaro wayala abatjhotjhozeli babantu neenduna zabo wathi: 
Exodus5:7 “Ningasanikela abantu amawunguwungu wekoroyi ukwenza iintina. Abakhambe bayozifunela wona. 
Exodus5:8 Kodwana nibatjele benze inani leentina elilingana nelaphambilini, ningehlisi inani abafanele balenze ngelanga. Bayadonda abantwaba, ngikho bangenana ngendlebeni nje hlebasithi, ‘Sitjhaphulula siyokuhlabela uZimethu.’" 
Exodus5:9 Yenzani umsebenzi ube nzima phezu kwendoda kunekuthomeni ukuze basebenze, bangalokhu balalele amala.”" 
Exodus5:10 Yeke abatjhotjhozeli neenduna zaphuma zaya ebantwini zathi kibo: “UFaro uthi angeze abe asaninikela amawunguwungu wekoroyi. 
Exodus5:11 Nizakufanela bonyana niyozifunela nanyana kukuphi lapha niwafumana khona. Kodwana umsebenzenu angeze wancitjhiswa nakancani.” 
Exodus5:12 Nje-ke abantu basabalala nenarha yeGibhide yoke bona babuthelele amahlengelo wotjani esikhundleni samawunguwungu wekoroyi. 
Exodus5:13 Abatjhotjhozeli babahlala entanyeni balokhu basithi: “Qedani umsebenzenu wangamalanga ulingane nalokha nanisanikelwa amawunguwungu wekoroyi.” 
Exodus5:14 Iinduna zakwa-Israyeli ezakhethwa batjhotjhozeli bakaFaro zadulwa bekwathiwa kizo: “Kubayini ningakafikeleli esibalweni esibekiweko seentina namhlanjesi njengombana benenza phambilini?” 
Exodus5:15 Iinduna zakwa-Israyeli zakhamba zayokumangala kuFaro zathi: “Kubayini uFaro aphathe iinceku zakhe ngalendlela? 
Exodus5:16 Iinceku zakhe azisaphiwa amawunguwungu wekoroyi kodwana khonapho kuthiwa asenze iintina; qala bona zidulwa kangangani. Into esiyenziwe babantu bakaFaro le ayisiyihle.” 
Exodus5:17 UFaro wathi: “Arha sukanapha mavila ndina! Niphethwe buvila! Ngikho nilokhu ningifundekela nithi, ‘Sivumela siyokuhlabela uSomnini.’" 
Exodus5:18 Ayiye, buyelani emsebenzinenu! Anisazokunikelwa amawunguwungu wekoroyi kodwana kumele nenze inani elifunekako leentina.”" 
Exodus5:19 Amezwi kaFaro wokuthi, “Ninganciphisi isibalo seentina okumele nizenze ngelanga” enza iinduna zakwa-Israyeli zabona bonyana zisemrarweni." 
Exodus5:20 Kuthe lokha nazisuka kuFaro, zazithela kuMosi no-Aroni bazilindele," 
Exodus5:21 zathi: “USomnini ukubonile enikwenzileko. Uzonigweba! Nisenze saba nyamanambana kuFaro neenkhulu zakhe nabeka isabula esandleni sabo bona basibulale!” 
Exodus5:22 UMosi wabuyela kuSomnini wathi: “Maye! Kubayini uSomandla ehlisele amatshwenyeko phezu kwabantwaba? USomandla ungithumeleleni lapha? 
Exodus5:23 Soloko ngaya kuFaro bona ngikhulume ebizweni lakaSomnini, ngambala uFaro uwurubaja abantwaba. USomnini akazange alamulele abantu bakhe.”" 
Exodus6:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Uzakubukela kwanjesi bonyana ngizomenzani uFaro: Ngebanga lesandla sami esinamandla uzatjhaphulula ama-Israyeli; iye, ngesandla sami esinamandla awaqotjhe enarhenakhe le.”" 
Exodus6:2 UZimu godu wakhuluma noMosi wathi: “NginguSomnini. 
Exodus6:3 Ngaziveza ku-Abrahamu, u-Isaka nakuJakopo njengoZimu oSabekako, kodwana angizange ngibazise ibizo lami elithi Somnini." 
Exodus6:4 Godu ngenza isivumelwano sami nabo kobana ngibaphe inarha yeKanana lapha bakhonza khona njengamaphandle. 
Exodus6:5 Ngambala ngikuzwile ukububula kwama-Israyeli akhobongwe maGibhide, yeke ngisikhumbulile isivumelwano sami." 
Exodus6:6 “Ngalokho tjela ama-Israyeli uthi, ‘NginguSomnini begodu ngizonikhupha emsebenzini okatelelako wamaGibhide. Nginitjhaphulule ekubeni makhobokawo, nginihlenge ngomkhono olulekileko nangokugweba amaGibhide ngesigwebo esikhulu." 
Exodus6:7 Ngizanenza isizwe sami, mina ngibe nguZimenu. Ngalokho nizakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini uZimenu owanikhupha emsebenzini okatelelako wamaGibhide." 
Exodus6:8 Ngizanisa enarheni engayifungela ngokuphakamisa isandla sami kobana ngiyiphe u-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo. Ngizanipha yona kube lilifa lenu lasafuthi. NginguSomnini.’ ”" 
Exodus6:9 UMosi wabikela ama-Israyeli indaba le, kodwana azange amlalele ngombana gade anyamile ngebanga lokugandelelwa kwawo." 
Exodus6:10 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Exodus6:11 “Khambani niyokutjela uFaro ikosi yeGibhide bonyana atjhaphulule ama-Israyeli aphume enarheni le.” 
Exodus6:12 Kodwana uMosi wathi kuSomnini: “Kosami, ama-Israyeli akangilaleli, alo uFaro yena uzangilalela njani-ke? Mina angisiso isikhulumi.”" 
Exodus6:13 Nje-ke uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni babobabili, wabayala ngama-Israyeli noFaro ikosi yeGibhide bonyana kufuze bona ama-Israyeli aphume eGibhide." 
Exodus6:14 UMosi no-Aroni gade bangebemindeni elandelako: URubeni bekalizibulo laka-Israyeli. Amadodana kaRubeni kungu-Inogo noPalu, uRhetsironi noKarimi. Bona bebaziinhloko zemindeni kaRubeni." 
Exodus6:15 USimiyoni bekalama uRubeni. Amadodana kaSimiyoni kunguJemuweli, uJamini, u-Ohadi, uJakini, uTsorhari noSawula indodana yomfazi weKanana. Bona bebaziinhloko zemindeni kaSimiyoni." 
Exodus6:16 ULevi bekalama uSimiyoni. Lawa bekumabizo wamadodana kaLevi ukuya ngokutloliswa kwawo: uGeritjhoni, uKhehathi noMerari. ULevi waphila iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amathathu namikhomba." 
Exodus6:17 Iinzukulwana zakaGeritjhoni bekunguLibhina noTjhimeyi nemindenabo. 
Exodus6:18 Amadodana kaKhehathi bekungu-Amramu, uJitsihari, uRhebroni no-Uziyeli. UKhehathi waphila iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amathathu namithathu." 
Exodus6:19 Amadodana kaMerari bekunguMarhili noMutjhi. Bona bebamindeni edabuka kuLevi. 
Exodus6:20 U-Amramu wathatha ukghariyakhe uJokobedi bona abe mkakhe. Yena wambelethela u-Aroni noMosi. U-Amramu waphila iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amathathu namikhomba. 
Exodus6:21 Amadodana kaJitsihari bekunguKhorarhi, uNefegi noZikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Amadodana ka-Uziyeli bekunguMitjhayeli, u-Elitsafana noSitiri." 
Exodus6:23 U-Aroni wathatha u-Elitjheba indodakazi ka-Aminadaba nongudadwabo kaNarhitjhoni. Wambelethela uNadabi no-Abihu, u-Elazara no-Itamara." 
Exodus6:24 Amadodana kaKhorarhi bekungu-Asiri, u-Elikhana no-Abiyasafi. Bona bebaziinzukulwana zakaKhorarhi." 
Exodus6:25 U-Elazara indodana ka-Aroni wathatha enye yamadodakazi kaPuthiyeli. Indodakazi leyo yambelethela uFiniyasi. Bona bebaziinhloko zemindeni yamaLevi neenzukulwana zabo. 
Exodus6:26 U-Aroni noMosi okukhulunywe ngabo lapha, ngibo uSomnini athi kibo: “Khuphani ama-Israyeli eGibhide ngombana agandelelwe ngomsebenzi.”" 
Exodus6:27 Ngibo abo-Aroni noMosi abakhuluma noFaro ikosi yeGibhide bona akhuphe ama-Israyeli eGibhide. 
Exodus6:28 Lokha uSomnini nakhuluma noMosi eGibhide," 
Exodus6:29 wathi kuye: “NginguSomnini. Tjela uFaro ikosi yeGibhide koke engikutjele khona.” 
Exodus6:30 Kodwana uMosi wathi kuSomnini: “Kosami, mina angisiso isikhulumi. Alo, uFaro yena uzangilalela njani?”" 
Exodus7:1 Yeke uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Qala, ngikwenze waba njengoZimu kuFaro, umfowenu u-Aroni uzakuba mphorofidakho." 
Exodus7:2 Wena uzakufanela bonyana ukhulume yoke into engikuyale ngayo, umfowenu u-Aroni yena atjele uFaro bona atjhaphulule ama-Israyeli aphume enarhenakhe." 
Exodus7:3 Mina ngizaqinisa ihliziyo kaFaro, nanyana ngingabuyelela iimbonakaliso nemikarisomraro yami eGibhide," 
Exodus7:4 angeze anilalela. Kodwana ngizakubeka isandla sami phezu kweGibhide bese kuthi ngesigwebo sami esikhulu ngikhuphe abantu bami ama-Israyeli barhwante ngeengaba zabo. 
Exodus7:5 Ngalokho amaGibhide azakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini lokha nangelula isandla sami ngokujamelana neGibhide ngikhuphe ama-Israyeli kiyo.” 
Exodus7:6 UMosi no-Aroni benza poro njengombana uSomnini abayalile. 
Exodus7:7 UMosi gade aneminyaka ematjhumi abunane, u-Aroni anamatjhumi abunane namithathu lokha nabakhuluma noFaro." 
Exodus7:8 USomnini gade athe kuMosi no-Aroni: 
Exodus7:9 “Lokha uFaro nathi kuwe, ‘Zibonakaliseni ngokwenza umkarisomraro’, wena uthi ku-Aroni, ‘Thatha idondolo lakho uliphosele phasi ngaphambi kwakaFaro’, yeke lizakuba yinyoka.”" 
Exodus7:10 Kwathi lokha uMosi no-Aroni nabaya kuFaro bona benze njengombana uSomnini abayalile, u-Aroni waphosela idondolo lakhe phasi ngaphambi kwakaFaro neenkhulu zakhe. Idondolwelo laphenduka inyoka." 
Exodus7:11 UFaro wabiza abosiyazi nabaloyi. Abosomlingo beGibhidabo benza soneso ngemilingwabo. 
Exodus7:12 Omunye nomunye wabo waphosela idondolo lakhe phasi, amadondolo lawo aphenduka iinyoka. Kodwana idondolo laka-Aroni laginya wamaGibhide." 
Exodus7:13 Khonapho ihliziyo kaFaro yaqina, azange alalele uMosi no-Aroni. Kwaba njengokutjho kwakaSomnini." 
Exodus7:14 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Ihliziyo kaFaro ikhunyalele, walela abantu bonyana bakhambe." 
Exodus7:15 Khamba uye kuFaro ekuseni ngesikhathi sokuphuma kwakhe ukuya emlanjeni. Mlinde edongeni lomlambo iNayili umhlangabeze lapho. Uphathe idondolo elaphenduka inyoka," 
Exodus7:16 uthi kuye, ‘USomnini uZimu wamaHebheru wangithuma bona ngikutjele utjhaphulule abantu bakhe bakhambe ukuze bamlotjhe erhalawumbeni. Kodwana azange ulalele bekube gadesi." 
Exodus7:17 Godu uSomnini ungitjele bona uzakwazi bonyana unguSomnini ngalokhu okuzakwenzeka nje: Ngedondolo elisesandleni sami ngizobetha amanzi weNayili bese aphenduka iingazi. 
Exodus7:18 Iinhlambi eziseNayili zizakufa bese umlambo uba nesivunda, amaGibhide azakubhalelwa kusela amanzi weNayili.’ ”" 
Exodus7:19 USomnini wabuya wathi kuMosi: “Tjela u-Aroni athathe idondolo lakhe elulele isandla sakhe ngehla kwamanzi weGibhide, phezu kwemilambo yakhona, okutjho imilanjana yeNayili, iintete nazo zoke izinto eziphatha amanzi. Woke amanzi azakuba ziingazi. Kuzakuba neengazi yoke indawo eGibhide, ngitjho nangakizo zoke izitja zesigodo nezamatje.”" 
Exodus7:20 UMosi no-Aroni benza poro njengombana uSomnini abayalile. Waphakamisa idondolo lakhe phambi kwakaFaro neenkhulu zakhe wabetha amanzi weNayili, nje-ke woke amanzi ajika aba ziingazi." 
Exodus7:21 Iinhlambi ngeNayili zafa, umlambo waba nesivunda kangangobana amaGibhide azange akwazi ukusela amanzi wakhona. Kwazala iingazi iGibhide yoke." 
Exodus7:22 Kodwana abosomlingo beGibhide nabo benza soneso ngemilingwabo. Ngalokho ihliziyo kaFaro yakhunyalala, azange alalele uMosi no-Aroni. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini bekatjhwile." 
Exodus7:23 UFaro wafulathela waziyela esigodlweni sakhe, wakubetha mthalazeni okwenzakeleko." 
Exodus7:24 AmaGibhide woke emba eqadi kweNayili bona azifunyanele amanzi wokusela ngombana bekungakghoneki ukusela amanzi wemilambo. 
Exodus7:25 Amatshwenyeko wokuthoma athatha amalanga alikhomba kusukela mhlana uSomnini amadlha iNayili. 
Exodus8:1 Yeke uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Khamba uye kuFaro uthi kuye, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: Tjhaphulula abantu bami ukuze bangilotjhe." 
Exodus8:2 Nawala ukubatjhaphulula, ngizakwehlisela inarhakho yoke ngeenrhwarhwa." 
Exodus8:3 INayili izakuzala swi ngeenrhwarhwa. Zizakukhuphuka zipharumele ngesigodlweni sakho, zingene ngelawini lakho zimumele umbhedakho, zingene ngeenkumbeni zeenkhulu zakho nebantwini bakho, zizale nangema-ondweni nangezitjeni zakho zokudubela." 
Exodus8:4 Iinrhwarhwa zizakunamathela wena nabantu bakho kanye neenkhulu zakho zoke.’ ” 
Exodus8:5 Yeke uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Tjela u-Aroni elulele isandla sakhe ngedondolo lakhe ngehla kwemilambo yeGibhide okutjho imilanjana yeNayili nemisele bese kuvele iinrhwarhwa zembathe inarha yeGibhide.” 
Exodus8:6 Nje-ke u-Aroni welulela isandla sakhe ngehla kwamanzi weGibhide. Kwavela iinrhwarhwa zembatha inarha. 
Exodus8:7 Abosomlingo benza soneso ngemilingwabo. Nabo benza bonyana kube neenrhwarhwa enarheni yeGibhide. 
Exodus8:8 Yeke uFaro wabiza uMosi no-Aroni wathi kibo: “Ncengani uSomnini bonyana asuse iinrhwarhwakazezi kimapha nebantwini bami, ngizakutjhaphulula ama-Israyeli bonyana ayokuhlabela uSomnini.”" 
Exodus8:9 UMosi wathi kuFaro: “Kukuwe ukubeka isikhathi kobana ngikuncengele neenkhulu zakho kanye nabantu bakho bonyana iinrhwarhwa zinigadunge ngaphandle kwalezo eziphila eNayili.” 
Exodus8:10 UFaro wathi: “Kusasa okusakokhu!” UMosi wathi: “Kuzakuba njengokutjho kwakho ukuze wazi bonyana akakho ofana noSomnini uZimethu. 
Exodus8:11 Iinrhwarhwa zizakusuka kuwe, esigodlweni sakho, eenkhulwini nebantwini bakho. Zizakuba seNayili kwaphela.”" 
Exodus8:12 Ngemva kobana uMosi no-Aroni basukile kuFaro, uMosi wathandaza kuSomnini malungana neenrhwarhwa azehlisele kuFaro." 
Exodus8:13 USomnini wenza njengokwesibawo sakaMosi. Iinrhwarhwa ebegade zingeenkumbeni, ngeenrhodlweni nemasimini zafa." 
Exodus8:14 Zabuthelelwa zaba maqubi. Inarha yoke yazala isivunda.
