Exodus8:15 Kodwana uFaro nabona bonyana sele kubetha ummoya, wakhunyalalisa ihliziywakhe, azange alalele uMosi no-Aroni. Kwaba njengokutjho kwakaSomnini." 
Exodus8:16 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Tjela u-Aroni bonyana aphakamise idondolo lakhe bese ubetha ithuli lehlabathi. Enarheni yoke yeGibhide ithuli lizakuphenduka imiyani.” 
Exodus8:17 Bakwenza-ke lokho. Kwathi lokha u-Aroni nakelula isandla sakhe esiphethe idondolo wabetha ithuli lehlabathi, kwavela imiyani yadumela abantu neenlwana. Loke ithuli enarheni yoke yeGibhide laphenduka imiyani." 
Exodus8:18 Abosomlingo balinga ukuveza imiyani ngemilingwabo, kodwana babhalelwa. Ngokubona bonyana imiyani inamathele abantu neenlwana," 
Exodus8:19 abosomlingo bathi kuFaro: “Lesi sisandla sakaZimu!” Kodwana ihliziyo kaFaro gade iqinile begodu azange alalele. Kwaba njengokutjho kwakaSomnini. 
Exodus8:20 Yeke uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Vuka ekuseni ulindele uFaro lokha naya emlanjeni bese uthi kuye, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: Tjhaphulula abantu bami ukuze bangilotjhe." 
Exodus8:21 Nakungasinjalo, ngizokuthumela iwoma leembawu phezu kwakho neenkhulu zakho, phezu kwabantu bakho ngitjho nangesigodlweni sakho. Iinkumba zamaGibhide zizokuzala ngeembawu ngitjho nemasiminawo." 
Exodus8:22 “ ‘Kodwana mhlokho ngizokusebenza ngokwahlukileko enarheni yeGotjheni lapha kuhlala khona abantu bami. Angeze kwaba khona iimbawu lapho ukuze nazi bonyana mina Somnini ngisenarheni le. 
Exodus8:23 Ngizakwenza umahluko phakathi kwabantu bami nebakho. Isibonakaliswesi sizokwenzeka kusasa.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Ngambala uSomnini wakwenza lokho. Kwavela iwoma elimabhombo leembawu lamumela isigodlo sakaFaro langena ngeenkumbeni zeenkhulu zakhe. Iimbawezo zabanga umonakalo esifundeni samaGibhide. 
Exodus8:25 UFaro wabiza uMosi no-Aroni wathi kibo: “Khambani niyokuhlabela uZimenu khona enarhenapha.” 
Exodus8:26 Kodwana uMosi wathi: “Angeze kwalunga lokho. Imihlabelo esiyinikela uSomnini uZimethu izakuba sikghabhudlho emaGibhideni. Nje-ke nasenza imihlabelo ewakghabhudlhako azasikhanda ngamatje! 
Exodus8:27 Kumele sikhambe ikhambo lamalanga amathathu erhalawumbeni kobana sihlabele uSomnini uZimethu njengombana asiyala.” 
Exodus8:28 UFaro wathi: “Awa yeke, mina ngiyanitjhaphulula bonyana nihlabele uSomnini uZimenu erhalawumbeni, kodwana ningayi kude. Yeningithandazeleni-ke.”" 
Exodus8:29 UMosi wathi: “Ngizakuthi bona ngisuke lapha, ngithandaze kuSomnini, kuzakuthi kusasa iimbawu zisuke kuFaro neenkhulwini zakhe kanye nebantwini. Kodwana uFaro aqinisekise bonyana akenzi ubuqili godu ngokwalela abantu bonyana bayokuhlabela uSomnini.”" 
Exodus8:30 UMosi wasuka kuFaro, wafese wathandaza kuSomnini." 
Exodus8:31 USomnini wenza njengokwesibawo sakaMosi: Iimbawu zasuka kuFaro neenkhulwini nebantwini bakhe. Azange kusale ngitjho nasinye. 
Exodus8:32 Kodwana nagadesi uFaro wakhunyalalisa ihliziyo, azange atjhaphulule ama-Israyeli." 
Exodus9:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Khamba uye kuFaro uthi kuye, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu wamaHebheru: Tjhaphulula abantu bami ukuze bangilotjhe." 
Exodus9:2 Nawala bonyana bakhambe uragele phambili ngokubabambezela," 
Exodus9:3 isandla sakaSomnini sizokwehlisela ubhubhani phezu kwefuywakho esemrhuleni: iinjomani, abodumbana, amakamela, iinkomo, izimvu neembuzi." 
Exodus9:4 Kodwana uSomnini uzakwenza umahluko phakathi kwefuyo yama-Israyeli neyamaGibhide ngendlela yokobana akunasilwana sama-Israyeli esizakufa. 
Exodus9:5 USomnini ubeke isikhathi wathi: Kusasa uSomnini uzakwenza isigesi enarheni.’ ” 
Exodus9:6 Ngelanga elilandelako uSomnini wenza isigeso: Yoke ifuyo yamaGibhide yafa, kodwana kuma-Israyeli azange kufe ngitjho nayinye ifuyo." 
Exodus9:7 UFaro wabikelwa bonyana mbala akunafuyo nayinye yama-Israyeli efileko. Kodwana khonapho ihliziywakhe yayilokhu ikhunyalele. Azange atjhaphulule abantu bona bakhambe. 
Exodus9:8 USomnini wathi kuMosi no-Aroni: “Rhurhulani umule nge-ondweni ekulu nizalise izandla bese uMosi awurhatjhe emmoyeni phambi kwakaFaro. 
Exodus9:9 Uzakuphenduka ithuli phezu kweGibhide yoke bese kuqubuka amathumba abhibhidlhako ebantwini neenlwaneni enarheni yoke.” 
Exodus9:10 Yeke barhurhula umule, bajama ngaphambi kwakaFaro. UMosi wawurhatjha emmoyeni, kwaqubuka amathumba abhibhidlhako ebantwini neenlwaneni." 
Exodus9:11 Abosomlingo babhalelwa kujama phambi kwakaMosi ngebanga lamathumba ebegade aqubuke kibo nemaGibhideni woke. 
Exodus9:12 Kodwana uSomnini waqinisa ihliziyo kaFaro wangalalela uMosi no-Aroni. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini atjho kuMosi. 
Exodus9:13 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Vuka ekuseni, ujamelane noFaro uthi kuye, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu wamaHebheru: Tjhaphulula abantu bami, bakhambe ukuze bangilotjhe!" 
Exodus9:14 Gadesi khona ngizokumadlha neenkhulu zakho kanye nabantu bakho ngamatshwenyekwami anzima. Ngalokho uzakwazi kuhle bonyana akakho ofana nami ephasinapha. 
Exodus9:15 Iye, ngesikhathesi bekusemandlenami kobana ngiphakamise isandla sami ngikumadlhe wena nabantu bakho ngamatshwenyeko uphele nya ephasini." 
Exodus9:16 Kodwana ngikubabalele ngomnqopho wokukukhombisa amandlami nokobana ibizo lami libatjazwe iphasi loke. 
Exodus9:17 Nawusoloko uphatha abantu bami makghwakghwa ngokubalela bona bakhambe," 
Exodus9:18 ngiyakutjela hi, ngesikhathesi kusasa ngizokwehlisa isinanja esikhulu nesingazange khesibe khona eGibhidapha soloko yaba khona bekube gadesi." 
Exodus9:19 Nje-ke thumela bonyana kubuthwe yoke ifuywakho nakho koke kwakho okusemrhuleni kulethwe esidalasini ngombana isinanja sizakwehlela phezu kwawo woke umuntu nakizo zoke iinlwana ezingakakhoseliswa ezisasabalele emrhuleni, zizakufa ngiyakutjela.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Iinkhulu zakaFaro ezesaba ilizwi lakaSomnini zarhaba zaletha amakhobokazo nefuywazo ngesidalasini. 
Exodus9:21 Kodwana lezo ezabeba ilizwi lakaSomnini zalisa amakhobokazo nefuywazo emrhuleni. 
Exodus9:22 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Lulela isandla sakho emkayini ukuze isinanja sehlele phezu kweGibhide: phezu kwabantu neenlwana naphezu kwaso soke isivuno emasimini wamaGibhide.” 
Exodus9:23 Lokha uMosi naphakamisela idondolo lakhe emkayini, uSomnini wathumela umdumo nesinanja. Umbani wamekezela ehlabathini, isinanja sarhulukela enarheni yeGibhide." 
Exodus9:24 Kwaphambana imibani njalo phakathi kwesiwuruwuru sesinanja. Kwaba yinto engazange kheyibe khona emlandweni woke weGibhide. 
Exodus9:25 Kiyo yoke iGibhide isinanja sarhayila koke okusemrhuleni, abantu neenlwana. Sarhayila soke isivuno emasimini, sarwadlha nayo yoke imithi esemmangweni." 
Exodus9:26 Kodwana lapha bekuhlala khona ama-Israyeli, eGotjheni, azange kube nesinanja." 
Exodus9:27 UFaro wathumela ilizwi bona kubizwe uMosi no-Aroni, wathi kibo: “Awa kwanje khona ngonile. USomnini uqinisile, mina nabantu bami sinephoso." 
Exodus9:28 Akhese nithandaze nisirabhelele kuSomnini. Sekwanele kwanjesi ngomdumo osabekako nangesinanja esingaka. Ngizanitjhaphulula-ke, ningasahlala.”" 
Exodus9:29 UMosi wathi: “Ngizakuthi ngingaphuma ngedorobhenapha, ngilule izandla zami ngithandaze kuSomnini. Umdumo uzakuthula begodu kungasaba nesinanja ukuze wazi bonyana iphasi ngelakaSomnini." 
Exodus9:30 Kodwana ngiyazi bonyana wena neenkhulu zakho anikabukwesaba uSomnini uZimu.” 
Exodus9:31 (Isitjalo selineni nebhali kwarhayileka ngombana ibhali besele iphalazile nesitjalo selineni sithuthumbile. 
Exodus9:32 Ikoroyi nesakoroyi nokho azange zirhayileke ngombana zona zivuthwa muva.) 
Exodus9:33 UMosi wasuka kuFaro waphumela ngaphandle kwedorobho. Welulela izandla zakhe kuSomnini, umdumo nesinanja zathula nezulu azange lisawulukela enarheni." 
Exodus9:34 Kuthe lokha uFaro nabona bonyana izulu lisile, isinanja nomdumo zithulile, wona godu: Yena neenkhulu zakhe bakhunyalalisa iinhliziyo zabo." 
Exodus9:35 Ngaleyondlela ihliziyo kaFaro yaqina, azange atjhaphulule ama-Israyeli. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini atjho ngoMosi." 
Exodus10:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Khamba uye kuFaro ngombana ngimi engikhunyalalise ihliziywakhe neenhliziyo zeenkhulu zakhe ukuze ngenze iimbonakaliso zami phakathi kwabo. 
Exodus10:2 Wena-ke uzakwazisa abantwabakho neenzukulwana zakho ngeembonakaliso zami engazenza phakathi kwamaGibhide nokobana ngadlala kangangani ngawo. Ngalokho nizakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini.” 
Exodus10:3 Yeke uMosi no-Aroni baya kuFaro bathi kuye: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu wamaHebheru, ‘Kuzabe kube nini usoloko wala ukuzithoba phambi kwami? Tjhaphulula abantu bami bakhambe ukuze bangilotjhe." 
Exodus10:4 Nawulokhu ubalela bonyana bakhambe, ngizakwehlisela intethe esifundeni sakho kusasa." 
Exodus10:5 Izakwembatha ihlabathi yoke ingasabonakala. Izakuqothula nokuncani okukusaleleko nakuna isinanja, irhiribidele ngitjho nayo yoke imithi emila emasiminakho." 
Exodus10:6 Izakuzala ngesigodlweni sakho, ngeenkumbeni zeenkhulu zakho zoke nakiwo woke amaGibhide. Kuzakuba yinto engazange kheyenzeke kiboyihlo nakiboyihlomkhulu ukusuka mhlana bathoma ukuhlala lapha bekube kunamhlanjesi.’ ” Yeke uMosi wafulathela uFaro wakhamba." 
Exodus10:7 Iinkhulu zakaFaro zathi kuye: “Kuzabe bekube nini umrhali lo alokhu ayipehli kithapha? Tjhaphulula amadoda wakhona lawo akhambe ukuze alotjhe uSomnini uZimawo. Kghani awuboni bonyana iGibhide iyaphela na?” 
Exodus10:8 Yeke uMosi no-Aroni babuyiselwa kuFaro wathi kibo: “Khambani niyokulotjha uZimenu! Kuhlekuhle bobani okhamba nabo?” 
Exodus10:9 UMosi wathi: “Sizokukhamba nabo boke abadala nabancani, amadodana namadodakazethu, izimvu neembuzi kanye neenkomo zethu ngombana siyokugidinga imbedla yomnyanya kuSomnini.”" 
Exodus10:10 UFaro wathi kibo: “Nidlumbana bonyana uSomnini unani kangako kobana ngingabeze nginitjhaphulule nikhambe nababuthakathaka benu na? Ngambala ninamaqhinga nina! 
Exodus10:11 Angeze kwaba njalo! Khambani namadoda kwaphela niyokulotjha uSomnini ngombana vele beniseze nibawa lokho.” Baqotjhwa njalo-ke uMosi no-Aroni phambi kwakaFaro. 
Exodus10:12 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Phakamisela isandla sakho phezu kweGibhide; kuzakufika iwoma lentethe likhithikele phezu kweGibhide bese lirhiribidela koke okuhlaza enarheni, koke okutjhiywe sinanja.”" 
Exodus10:13 Yeke uMosi waphakamisa idondolo lakhe phezu kweGibhide, uSomnini wenza bonyana kuvunguze ummoya wepumalanga, wadabula inarha mhlokho nobusuku boke. Kwathi nakusako kwabe ummoya sele ulethe intethe." 
Exodus10:14 Yakhithikela phezu kweGibhide yoke beyahlala ngobunengi bayo esifundeneso. Azange khekube nesinyokotho esingakaya samatshwenyeko wentethe phambilini begodu angeze sisaba khona. 
Exodus10:15 Yembatha yoke ihlabathi yaba nzima. Yarhiribidela koke okuhlaza enarheni, kanye neenthelo zoke zemithi yenarha, koke okutjhiywe sinanja. Akunahlaza elasalako kiyo yoke inarha yeGibhide, emithini namkha eentjalweni." 
Exodus10:16 UFaro warhaba wabiza uMosi no-Aroni wathi kibo: “Ngonile phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu naphambi kwenu. 
Exodus10:17 Ngibawa ningilibalele godu bese niyathandaza kuSomnini uZimenu bonyana asuse ukufokhu kimapha!” 
Exodus10:18 UMosi wafulathela uFaro wakhamba wayokuthandaza kuSomnini. 
Exodus10:19 USomnini watjhugulula ummoya waba mumoya onamandla wetjingalanga. Wathatha intethe wayiphephulela ngelwandle lomGaba. Azange kusale ngitjho nayinye intethe eGibhide. 
Exodus10:20 Kodwana uSomnini wakhunyalalisa ihliziyo kaFaro. Azange atjhaphulule ama-Israyeli bonyana akhambe. 
Exodus10:21 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Phakamisela isandla sakho emkayini ukuze kube nobumnyama phezu kweGibhide. Kube bumnyama obunga buyathinteka.” 
Exodus10:22 Yeke uMosi waphakamisela isandla sakhe emkayini, kwavela ubumnyama obunzima tshu obembatha iGibhide yoke amalanga amathathu." 
Exodus10:23 Abantu bebangabonani begodu bangakghoni ukususa inyawo amalanga amathathu woke. Kodwana lapha bekuhlala khona ama-Israyeli umkhanyo gade ukhona. 
Exodus10:24 UFaro wabiza uMosi wathi kuye: “Kwanje khona khambani noke niyokulotjha uSomnini. Ababuthakathaka benu nabo abakhambe nani kodwana nitjhiye izimvu neembuzi kanye neenkomo zenu.” 
Exodus10:25 UMosi waphendula wathi: “Nanyana wena bewungasipha imihlabelo yetjhebiswano neyokutjhiswa bona sihlabele uSomnini uZimethu," 
Exodus10:26 ifuywethu yona kumele ikhambe nathi. Akuzukusala ngitjho neqatjhana lesilwana lapha. Kumele sisebenzise ezinye zazo ekulotjheni uSomnini uZimethu. Angeze sazi nasisese lapha nje bonyana ngiziphi esizazisebenzisa ekulotjheni uSomnini, kuzakubonakala sesifikile.”" 
Exodus10:27 Kodwana uSomnini wakhunyalalisa ihliziyo kaFaro. Azange azimisele ukubatjhaphulula. 
Exodus10:28 UFaro wathi kuMosi: “Suka phambi kwamapha! Utjheje bona ungasabonakala phambi kwamapha godu! Ngiqinisile ngithi mhlana ubeka umqonjwanakho lapha, ufile wena!”" 
Exodus10:29 UMosi wathi: “Vele, angeze bewusangibona!”" 
Exodus11:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Ngizakuletha okhunye godu ukutshwenyeka phezu kwakaFaro neGibhide. Ngemva kwalapho uzanitjhaphulula, aniqotjhe noke ngendlwana lapha." 
Exodus11:2 Tjela abantu bonyana woke amadoda nabafazi ngokufanako bakhombele amagugu wesiliva newegolide ebakhozini babo beGibhide.” 
Exodus11:3 USomnini wenza bonyana amaGibhide abe nomusa kuma-Israyeli begodu neenkhulu zakaFaro kanye nabantu beGibhide bamhlonipha khulu uMosi. 
Exodus11:4 UMosi waya kuFaro wafese wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Kuzakuthi phakathi kobusuku ngikhambele iGibhide." 
Exodus11:5 Woke umsana olizibulo eGibhide uzakufa, ukusuka kowakaFaro esihlalweni sobukhosi ukuya kowekhobokakazi elitjeni lokusila, nawo woke amazibulo wefuyo." 
Exodus11:6 Kuzakuba nesililo esikhulu eGibhide yoke. Sizakuba ngesingazange khesibe khona nesingasoze saba khona godu. 
Exodus11:7 Kodwana phakathi kwama-Israyeli nefuywawo kuzokuthi nghwayi, neemvungana zingakhonkothi.’ Ngalokho nizakwazi bonyana uSomnini wenza umahluko phakathi kwamaGibhide nama-Israyeli." 
Exodus11:8 Zoke iinkhulu zakhwezo zizakuza kimi zihlome iinhloko phasi zithi, ‘Khambani, wena nabo boke abantu abakulandelako!’ Ngemva kwalapho ngizakukhamba.” UMosi waphuma agcwele ipotjwana, wasukela uFaro." 
Exodus11:9 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “UFaro uzokwala ukukulalela ukuze imikariswami yande eGibhidapha.” 
Exodus11:10 UMosi no-Aroni benza yoke imikariso le phambi kwakaFaro, kodwana uSomnini wakhunyalalisa ihliziyo kaFaro. Azange atjhaphulule ama-Israyeli kobana aphume enarhenakhe." 
Exodus12:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi no-Aroni eGibhide: 
Exodus12:2 “Inyanga le izakuba yinyanga yokuthoma kini, kube ngeyokuthoma komnyaka." 
Exodus12:3 Tjela yoke ihlangano yakwa-Israyeli bonyana elangeni letjhumi lenyanga le akube ngileyo naleyo ndoda ithathele umndenayo imvana, kube yimvana yinye ekumbeni ngayinye." 
Exodus12:4 Nakube ikumba iba yincani khulu bona ingagoma imvana, khona abayihlukaniselane nabomakhelwana babo abaseduze, baqale isibalo sabantu abalapho. Kumele bayabe ngendlela yokobana omunye nomunye anele ngokwesilinganiso sokugoma kwakhe." 
Exodus12:5 Khethani iimvana eziduna ezinomnyaka, zibe msulwa. Kungaba yimvana namkha imbuzana." 
Exodus12:6 Zaluseni bekufike ilanga letjhumi nane lenyanga le, lokha yoke ihlangano yakwa-Israyeli nasele kumele izihlabe ngamarhwaqela." 
Exodus12:7 Yeke bazakuthatha ezinye zeengazi bazitjhatjhe ngemaqadi naphezu kweengoseni zeenkumba zabo lapha bagomela khona. 
Exodus12:8 Khona ntambamokho kumele bagome inyama ebaswe emlilweni, bayitjhebe ngeenrhabelo ezibabako nesikwa esinganangumelo." 
Exodus12:9 Ningagomi inyama ehlaza namkha ephekwe ngamanzi, kodwana niyibase emlilweni isitutu njalo, isese nehloko, iinqatha neenredlo." 
Exodus12:10 Ningatjhiyi ngitjho nesiqutjana senyamayo bekuse. Nakube nibanjwe kukusa ningakayiqedi, eseleko niyitjhise." 
Exodus12:11 “Nasi-ke indlela enizayigoma ngayo: Izambatho zenu azibotjhwe edinini, nihlale nifake amapatlagwana namadondolo abe sezandleni zenu, niyigome nirhabile. KuliPhasika lakaSomnini." 
Exodus12:12 Khona ngobusukobo ngizakudlula eGibhide ngimadlhe phasi woke amazibulo aduna wabantu neweenlwana. Ngizogweba boke abosingazimu beGibhide ngombana nginguSomnini. 
Exodus12:13 Iingazi eziseenkumbeni lapha nikhona zizakuba litshwayo lokunivikela. Kuzakuthi nangibona iingazi, ngineqe. Angeze nathintwa matshwenyeko arhayilako lokha nangimadlha iGibhide." 
Exodus12:14 Leli lilanga okumele nilikhumbule, niligidinge njengomnyanya kaSomnini, libe simiso sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni zenu." 
Exodus12:15 Amalanga alikhomba nizakugoma isikwa esinganangumelo. Elangeni lokuthoma nisuse ihlama enengumelo eenkumbeni zenu ngombana nanyana ngubani ogoma nanyana yini enengumelo ukusuka elangeni lokuthoma bekube ngelekhomba, uzakujutjwa kwa-Israyeli." 
Exodus12:16 Bambani umhlangano okhethekileko elangeni lokuthoma nelekhomba. Ningathinti umsebenzi nakancani kilamalanga abaliweko, ngaphandle kokulungiselela okudliwako kwaphela." 
Exodus12:17 Gidingani umnyanya wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo ngombana kungelangeli lapha ngakhupha khona ihlanganwenu ngeengaba zayo eGibhide. Ugidingeni ube simiso sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni zenu. 
Exodus12:18 Ngenyanga yokuthoma kumele nigome isikwa esinganangumelo ukusuka ekuhlweni kwelanga letjhumi nane bekube kusekuhlweni kwelanga lamatjhumi amabili nalinye. 
Exodus12:19 Kuzabe kube malanga alikhomba kuzilwa ukuba nehlama enengumelo ngeenkumbeni zenu. Nanyana ngubani ogoma nanyana yini enesibiliso uzakujutjwa ehlanganweni yakwa-Israyeli, kungaba sikhonzi namkha umuntu wendabuko." 
Exodus12:20 Ningagomi litho eliwunyelweko. Kuphi nakuphi lapha nakhe khona, gomani isikwa esinganangumelo.”" 
Exodus12:21 Yeke uMosi wabiza boke abaphathi bakwa-Israyeli wathi kibo: “Bambelani imindenenu imvana namkha imbuzana bese nihlaba iPhasika. 
Exodus12:22 Thathani ihlukuzu lehisophi nilitjhebe eengazini ngesitjeni bese nitjhatjha iingazezo phezu kwegoseni nangemaqadi wayo. Kungabi nomuntu namunye wenu ozakuphumela ngaphandle komnyango wekumbakhe bekube sekuseni. 
Exodus12:23 Lokha uSomnini nadabula enarheni bona ehlisele amaGibhide amatshwenyeko, uzakubona iingazi phezu kwegoseni nangemaqadi wayo bese weqa umnyango lowo. Angeze avumela umrhayili bonyana angene ngeenkumbeni zenu anehlisele amatshwenyeko." 
Exodus12:24 Gcinani imiyalo le kube simiso senu sanini nanini neenzukulwana zenu. 
Exodus12:25 “Godu lokha naningena enarheni uSomnini aninikela yona njengokwesithembiso sakhe, ragelani phambili ngokugcina umkhuba wokulotjha lo." 
Exodus12:26 Kuzakuthi abantwabenu nabanibuza bonyana umkhuba wokulotjha lo utjho ukuthini," 
Exodus12:27 nibatjele nithi mhlabelo wePhasika owenzelwa uSomnini oweqa iinkumba zama-Israyeli eGibhide wababalela imizi yethu lokha nakehlisela amaGibhide amatshwenyeko.” Nje-ke abantu baguqa bahloma iinhloko phasi. 
Exodus12:28 Ama-Israyeli akhamba enza poro njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi no-Aroni. 
Exodus12:29 Phakathi kobusuku uSomnini wamadlha woke amazibulo eGibhide, ukusuka ezibulweni lakaFaro esihlalweni sobukhosi ukuya ezibulweni lesibotjhwa ngejele kanye namazibulo wayo yoke ifuyo." 
Exodus12:30 UFaro nazo zoke iinkhulu zakhe namaGibhide woke bavuka phakathi kobusuku. Kwaqubuka ukurhahlawula okukhulu eGibhide ngombana kwakunganandlu nayinye eyayinganasidumbu. 
Exodus12:31 UFaro wabiza uMosi no-Aroni ngobusukobo wathi kibo: “Ayigubhe! Hlukanani nabantu bami nina nama-Israyelenu la! Khambani niyokulotjha uSomnini njengombana nikhombele. 
Exodus12:32 Thathani izimvu neembuzi zenu kanye neenkomo zenu njengombana nitjhwile bese ningena indlela. Nami ningibeke.” 
Exodus12:33 AmaGibhide akatelela abantu bonyana barhabe baphume enarheni ngombana athi: “Soke sizokufa nya!” 
Exodus12:34 Ama-Israyeli athatha ihlamawo enganangumelo ayithwala emahlombe ngezitjeni zokudubela aziphuthela ngamatjhila. 
Exodus12:35 Godu enza njengombana uMosi awayala abe akhombela amaGibhide kobana awaphe amagugu wesiliva newegolide kanye nezambatho. 
Exodus12:36 USomnini gade enze amaGibhide bonyana abe nomusa khulu kuma-Israyeli. Nje-ke awapha lokho akukhombeleko, ngaleyondlela aphanga amaGibhide." 
Exodus12:37 Ama-Israyeli akhamba asuka eRamesese anqomba eSukothi. Kwakungaba ziinkulungwana ezimakhulu asithandathu zamadoda akhamba ngeenyawo ngaphandle kwabafazi, abantwana nababuthakathaka." 
Exodus12:38 Akhamba nezimvu neembuzi kanye neenkomo, kwaba mihlambi eminengi khulu. Godu kwaba nesiqubuthu sabantu bezinye izizwe esakhamba nawo." 
Exodus12:39 Abhaga iimphaphatha ezinganangumelo ngehlama aphume nayo eGibhide. Ngebanga lokobana bekaqotjhiwe eGibhide, azange abe nesikhathi sokuzilungiselela imiphako nokuwumela ihlama." 
Exodus12:40 Ama-Israyeli ahlala eGibhide isikhathi esiminyaka emakhulu amane namatjhumi amathathu. 
Exodus12:41 Kwathi ngelanga lokugcina lokuhlangana kweminyaka emakhulu amane namatjhumi amathathu, yoke ihlangano kaSomnini yaphuma enarheni yeGibhide ngeengaba zayo." 
Exodus12:42 Ngobusukobo uSomnini wabeka ilihlo phezu kwama-Israyeli kobana awakhuphe eGibhide. Ngebangelo woke ama-Israyeli, iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana, ayalindela ngobusukobo ukuze ahloniphe uSomnini." 
Exodus12:43 USomnini wathi kuMosi no-Aroni: “Nanzi iimiso zePhasika: Kungabi nomqhamuka oligomako. 
Exodus12:44 Nakunekhoboka olithengileko lona lingaligoma ngemva kobana ulisokile. 
Exodus12:45 Umhlali oqubileko nesisebenzi esiqatjhiweko bona bangaligomi. 
Exodus12:46 Kumele ligonyelwe ngekumbeni yinye, kungabi nenyama ekhutjhelwa ngaphandle kwekumba. Ningephuli nalinye lamathambo." 
Exodus12:47 Yoke ihlangano yakwa-Israyeli kumele iligidinge. 
Exodus12:48 Lokha nakunesikhonzi phakathi kwenu esifuna ukugidinga iPhasika lakaSomnini, kumele sisoke boke abaduna esinabo, ngemva kwalokho-ke singaba nesabelo njengomuntu woke wendabuko kwa-Israyeli. Omduna ongakasoki angaligomi." 
Exodus12:49 Umthetho lo wembatha nomuntu wendabuko kwa-Israyeli ngitjho nesikhonzi phakathi kwenu.” 
Exodus12:50 Woke ama-Israyeli enza poro njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi no-Aroni. 
Exodus12:51 Khona mhlokho uSomnini wakhupha ama-Israyeli eGibhide ngeengaba zawo. 
Exodus13:1 USomnini wayala uMosi wathi: 
Exodus13:2 “Ngihlukanisela woke amazibulo. Koke okuvele qangi esibelethweni kwa-Israyeli, kungaba mumuntu namkha ifuyo kungekwami.”" 
Exodus13:3 UMosi wathi ebantwini: “Khumbulani ilangeli eniphuma ngalo eGibhide, ekumbeni yobukhoboka ngombana uSomnini unikhupha endaweni le ngamandla wesandla sakhe. Ngalokho ningagomi isikwa esinengumelo ngelangeli." 
Exodus13:4 Namhlanje, ngenyanga ka-Abibi, niphuma eGibhide." 
Exodus13:5 Lokha uSomnini nanifikisa enarheni yamaKanana, amaRhithi, ama-Amori, amaRhivi namaJebusi owafunga kiboyihlomkhulu bonyana uzanipha yona, inarha egeleza ibisi neliju, nihlale nigidinga ngenyanga le umkhuba wokulotjha olandelako:" 
Exodus13:6 “Nizagoma isikwa esinganangumelo amalanga alikhomba. Kuthi elangeni lobukhomba nigidingele uSomnini umnyanya. 
Exodus13:7 Isikwa esinganangumelo sizagonywa amalanga alikhomba. Akukameli bonyana kufunyanwe isikwa esinengumelo phakathi kwenu, ngitjho nehlama enengumelo ingeze yafaniswa enarhenenu yoke." 
Exodus13:8 Nizakutjela amadodanenu mhlokho nithi, ‘Kungebanga lalokho uSomnini asenzela khona nasiphuma eGibhide.’" 
Exodus13:9 “Umkhuba lo uzakuba sikhumbuzo kini. Njengenyongo esandleni nanjengomkhala ehloko uzanikhumbuza bonyana uSomnini wanikhupha eGibhide ngesandla sakhe esinamandla. Umthetho kaSomnini lo awube semlonyenenu njalo. 
Exodus13:10 Ngalokho nizakuphetha isimiswesi ngesikhathi sakhona esifaneleko qobe mnyaka. 
Exodus13:11 “Lokha uSomnini naniletha enarheni yamaKanana njengombana afunga kini nakiboyihlomkhulu bona uzaninikela yona," 
Exodus13:12 nihlukanisele uSomnini woke amazibulo wefuywenu aduna. Koke okuduna okuphume qangi esibelethweni kuzakuba ngokwakaSomnini. 
Exodus13:13 Elinye nelinye izibulo lakadumbana nilihlenge ngemvana namkha ngembuzana, nakungasinjalo nilephule intamo. Woke amazibulo wabantu hlangana namadodanenu niwahlenge." 
Exodus13:14 “Nakube ngokuzako indodanakho iyakubuza ithi, ‘Baba, kutjho ukuthini lokhu?’ uzakuthi kiyo, ‘USomnini wasikhupha eGibhide ekumbeni yobukhoboka ngesandla sakhe esinamandla." 
Exodus13:15 Lokha uFaro nakhunyalala angafuni ukusitjhaphulula, uSomnini wamadlha woke amazibulo enarheni yeGibhide. Kwaba mazibulo woke wabantu newefuyo. Ngalokho nginikela uSomnini woke amazibulo aduna wefuyo aphume qangi esibelethweni, kodwana indodanami elizibulo ngiyayihlenga.’" 
Exodus13:16 Umkhuba lo nawo uzakuba sikhumbuzo kini. Njengenyongo esandleni nanjengomkhala ehloko uzanikhumbuza bonyana uSomnini wanikhupha eGibhide ngesandla sakhe esinamandla.” 
Exodus13:17 Lokha uFaro natjhaphulula abantu bona bakhambe, uZimu azange abarhole ngendlela yangenarheni yamaFilista nanyana bekuyindlela efitjhani leyo ngombana uZimu wathi: “Abantu bazakuthi nabamele balwe epini, bazisole bona basukeleni eGibhide hle babuyela khona.”" 
Exodus13:18 Ngalokho uZimu wenza bona abantu babhode ngendlela yerhalawumbeni banqombe ngelwandle lomGaba. Abantu bakwa-Israyeli baphuma enarheni yeGibhide ngeengaba. 
Exodus13:19 UMosi wathatha amathambo kaJosefa ngombana uJosefa wafungisa abantu bakwa-Israyeli wathi: “UZimu uzanikhambela, nina-ke nithwale amathambami niwasuse lapha.”" 
Exodus13:20 Basuka eSukothi bahloma amatende e-Ethamu magegana nerhalawumba. 
Exodus13:21 USomnini wakhamba phambi kwabo ngesika yelifu emini bona ibarhole, ebusuku yaba yisika yomlilo bona ibakhanyisele. Ngaleyondlela baphumelela ukukhamba ubusuku nemini." 
Exodus13:22 Isika yelifu emini nesika yomlilo ebusuku azange isuke phambi kwabantu. 
Exodus14:1 Yeke uSomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Exodus14:2 “Tjela ama-Israyeli bonyana abuyele emuva ayokuhloma amatendawo ngaphambi kwePi-Harhirothi hlangana neMigidoli nelwandle, malungana neBhali-Tsefoni esebeni lelwandle." 
Exodus14:3 UFaro uzadlumbana bona ama-Israyeli ararejeke enarheni nokobana avaleleke erhalawumbeni. 
Exodus14:4 Yeke ngizakhunyalalisa ihliziyo kaFaro ukuze agijimise ama-Israyeli. Ngalokho ngizakubonakalisa idumo lami ngoFaro nalo loke ibutho lakhe. Nje-ke amaGibhide azakwazi bona nginguSomnini.” Ngambala kwenzeka njalo. 
Exodus14:5 Lokha ikosi yeGibhide nayitjelwa bonyana ama-Israyeli athuthile, uFaro neenkhulu zakhe watjhugulula umkhumbulo ngawo wathi: “Yintobani esiyenzileko le? Madekhethu, sathukulula ama-Israyeli bona angasasisebenzeli!”" 
Exodus14:6 Yeke wabophela ikaranakhe wathatha ibutho lakhe," 
Exodus14:7 okutjho iinkarana ezikhethekileko ezimakhulu asithandathu nazo zoke ezinye iinkarana zeGibhide, enye nenye inomlawuli." 
Exodus14:8 USomnini wakhunyalalisa ihliziyo kaFaro ikosi yeGibhide, walandela ama-Israyeli njengombana gade ahlabela phambili ajekezela." 
Exodus14:9 AmaGibhide alandela ama-Israyeli ngazo zoke iinjomani zeenkarana zakaFaro nabakhweli bazo okutjho amabutho wakhona. Awafunyana ahlome amatende elwandle ngePi-Harhirothi malungana neBhali-Tsefoni. 
Exodus14:10 UFaro nebutho lakhe watjhidela. Kwathi lokha ama-Israyeli naphakamisa amehlo, qala nako amaGibhide eza ngemva kwawo! Angenelwa kukwesaba okukhulu abe arhuwelela akhombela isizo kuSomnini." 
Exodus14:11 Godu athi kuMosi: “Kungebanga lokobana kunganamathuna eGibhide bonyana usisuse khona sizokufela erhalawumbenapha na? Yintobani osenze yona ngokusikhupha eGibhide le? 
Exodus14:12 Angithi sakutjela nasiseGibhide sathi kuwe, ‘Sisusela thina! Sifuna ukusebenzela amaGibhide ngombana kungcono ukusebenzela amaGibhide kunokufela erhalawumbeni!’ ”" 
Exodus14:13 UMosi wathi ebantwini: “Ningesabi benidlhamazele. Lindani nibone isindiso kaSomnini azanenzela yona namhlanjesi. Ngiyanitjela ngithi amaGibhide eniwabona namhlanjesi la, angeze benisawabona godu." 
Exodus14:14 USomnini uzanilwela, nina kwenu sekuthula nibukele.”" 
Exodus14:15 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Ungangilileli; tjela ama-Israyeli bonyana aragele phambili. 
Exodus14:16 Phakamisa idondolo lakho, ululele isandla sakho ngehla kwelwandle, ulihlukanise phakathi kobana ama-Israyeli akghone ukukhamba phezu kwehlabathi eyomileko ayame ilwandle." 
Exodus14:17 Ngizakhunyalalisa iinhliziyo zamaGibhide bese awalandele abe angene ngelwandle. Ngalokho ngizakubonakalisa idumo lami ngoFaro nalo loke ibutho lakhe, okutjho iinkarana nabakhweli bazo." 
Exodus14:18 AmaGibhide azakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini nasele ngibonakalise idumo lami ngoFaro, iinkarana zakhe nabakhweli bazo.”" 
Exodus14:19 Nje-ke ingilozi kaZimu ebegade ingaphambi komkhambathi wakwa-Israyeli yatjhida yaya ngemva kwawo, kwathi isika yelifu yatjhida ngaphambi kwawo yaya ngemva kwawo" 
Exodus14:20 kobana ibe phakathi kwebutho leGibhide nomkhambathi wakwa-Israyeli. Ngobusukobo ilifelo laletha ubumnyama ngehlangothini lamaGibhide kodwana ngehlangothini lama-Israyeli lakhanyisa. Kwaba njalo ukuze iinqhema ezimbilezi zingakwazi ukuhlangana ubusuku boke. 
Exodus14:21 UMosi welulela isandla sakhe ngehla kwelwandle. USomnini wahlehlisa ilwandle ngokulivuthela ngommoya wepumalanga nonamandla ubusuku boke. Amanzi ahlukana phakathi kwaba nehlabathi eyomileko. 
Exodus14:22 Ama-Israyeli akhamba phakathi kwelwandle ehlabathini eyomileko, khibe amanzi aliboda ngapha nangapha kwawo." 
Exodus14:23 AmaGibhide athoma ukulandela ama-Israyeli ngelwandlapho. Zoke iinjomani neenkarana zakaFaro kanye nabakhweli bazo zangena ngelwandle. 
Exodus14:24 Kwathi ekuseni ngovivi uSomnini asesikeni yomlilo neyelifu waqalela ibutho lamaGibhide phasi. USomnini wafakela ibutho lamaGibhide ivalo 
Exodus14:25 ngokwenza bona amavili weenkarana zalo abhajwe ukuze atjhitjhirize. AmaGibhide athi: “Asibalekeni ema-Israyelenapha ngombana uSomnini uwalwela ngokujamelana nathi.” 
Exodus14:26 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Lulela isandla sakho ngehla kwelwandle bonyana amanzi agubuzese amaGibhide, okutjho iinkarana zawo nabakhweli bazo.”" 
Exodus14:27 Yeke uMosi welulela isandla sakhe phezu kwelwandle. Ekuseni ilwandle labuyela esigeni. AmaGibhide athi ayabaleka, ahlangana namanzi. USomnini wawadlhunya ngaphakathi kwelwandle." 
Exodus14:28 Amanzi agubuzesa bunjalo-ke iinkarana nabakhweli bazo, okutjho loke ibutho lakaFaro elalilandele ama-Israyeli ngelwandle. Azange kusinde namunye." 
Exodus14:29 Kodwana ama-Israyeli akhamba ehlabathini eyomileko phakathi kwelwandle, khibe amanzi aliboda ngapha nangapha kwawo." 
Exodus14:30 Ngaleyondlela uSomnini wasindisa ama-Israyeli mhlokho esandleni samaGibhide. Ama-Israyeli abona iindumbu zamaGibhide zitutumele magegana nelwandle. 
Exodus14:31 Kwathi lokha ama-Israyeli nabona umsebenzi omkhulu owenziwe nguSomnini ngokujamelana namaGibhide, amesaba abe akholwa kuye nencekwinakhe uMosi." 
Exodus15:1 UMosi nabantu bakwa-Israyeli babhinela uSomnini ingoma nasi: Ngizakubhinela uSomnini ngombana uphakeme khulu, wajikijela iinjomani neenkarana ngelwandle." 
Exodus15:2 USomnini umamandlami neenkhwepha zami begodu uyisindiswami. UnguZimami yeke ngizamdumisa, unguZimu kababa ngizamphakamisa." 
Exodus15:3 USomnini uyingorho, ubongelelwa ngebizo lakaSomnini." 
Exodus15:4 Ujikijele iinkarana zakaFaro nebutho lakhe ngelwandle, abalawuli beenkarana abakhethekileko bacwila ngelwandle lomGaba." 
Exodus15:5 Amanzi azikileko azisibekela, zatjhinga phasi ekuzikeni njengelitje." 
Exodus15:6 Isandla sakho Somnini, siyesabeka ngamandlaso; iye, isandla sakho Somnini, sibhubhisa isitha." 
Exodus15:7 Ngobukhulu bobukhosi bakho uketula abajamelani bakho, uthumela itukuthelwakho, ibaqothule inga mawunguwungu." 
Exodus15:8 Ngokufutha kweempumulo zakho amanzi ayabuthelelana, iinkhukhula zijame inga lidonga, amanzi azikileko akhaphuzele phakathi kwelwandle." 
Exodus15:9 Isitha sathi: “Ngizabagijimisa, ngibabambe, ngihlukanise ipango. Ngizakwanelisa ivunda lami kibo nangirhwatjha isabulami, ngibarhayile ngesandla sami.”" 
Exodus15:10 Wena Somnini wavuthela ummoyakho, ilwandle lawagubuzesa, acwila njengomthofi emanzini anamandla." 
Exodus15:11 Ngubani onjengawe Somnini phakathi kwabosingazimu? Ngubani onjengawe onobukhosi obucwengileko nemisebenzi ebabazekako ngokwenza imikarisomraro? 
Exodus15:12 Kwathi nawelula isandla sakho, iphasi lawaginya." 
Exodus15:13 Ngokwethembeka kwakho warhola abantu obahlengileko, ngamandlakho wabakhokhela endawenakho ecwengileko." 
Exodus15:14 Izizwe zoke zezwa, zathuthumela; abahlali beFilistiya baba nevalo." 
Exodus15:15 Nje-ke amakhosana wakwa-Edomu akakamala, abaphathi bakwaMowabi bathuthumela; zoke izakhamuzi zeKanana zahlengezela." 
Exodus15:16 Zehlelwa kukwesaba okukhulu kanye nevalo ngebanga lobukhulu bakho obenzileko; zathula zathi du njengelitje, lokha nakudlula abantu bakho, Somnini, iye, kudlule abantu bakho obazuzileko." 
Exodus15:17 Wena Somnini uzabangenisa, ubatjale entabeni yelifa lakho, endaweni Somnini owayilungisako kobana bahlale kiyo, iye, indawo ecwengileko wena Mninimandlawoke owayisungula ngezandla zakho." 
Exodus15:18 USomnini uzakubusa nini nanini. 
Exodus15:19 Lokha iinjomani neenkarana zakaFaro kanye nabakhweli bazo nazingena ngelwandle, uSomnini wabuyisa amanzi welwandle azigubuzesa kodwana ama-Israyeli akhamba phezu kwehlabathi eyomileko phakathi kwelwandle." 
Exodus15:20 Nje-ke uMiriyamu umphorofidikazi, ongudadwabo ka-Aroni waphuma aphethe abosotjherere, boke abafazi bamlandela nabo baphethe babo bagida." 
Exodus15:21 UMiriyamu wakhalela wathi: “Bhinelani uSomnini ngombana uphakeme khulu, wajikijela iinjomani neenkarana ngelwandle.”" 
Exodus15:22 Yeke uMosi warhola u-Israyeli ukusuka elwandle lomGaba bangena erhalawumbeni leTjhuri. Bakhamba amalanga amathathu erhalawumbeni, azange bafunyane amanzi." 
Exodus15:23 Kuthe lokha nabafika eMara, azange bakghone ukusela amanzi wakhona ngombana gade amunyu. Ngalokho athiywa bona yiMara." 
Exodus15:24 Abantu banghonghoyila kuMosi bathi: “Uthi sisele ini nasome kangaka?” 
Exodus15:25 UMosi walila kuSomnini, uSomnini wamkhombisa umuthi. Wawuthatha wawuphosela ngemanzini, amanzi aba mnandi. Khonapho uSomnini wabenzela isimiso nomthetho godu wabazizinya." 
Exodus15:26 USomnini wathi: “Nakube nizakulalela ngokuzimisela ilizwi lami, mina Somnini uZimenu, nenze okuhle phambi kwami, niphethe imiyalwami bese nigcina zoke iimiso zami, angeze nganehlisela nasinye isifo kilezo engazehlisela amaGibhide ngombana mina Somnini ngimlaphi wenu.”" 
Exodus15:27 Yeke bafika e-Elimi lapha gade kunemithombo elitjhumi nambili yamanzi kanye nemithi yesundu ematjhumi alikhomba. Bahloma amatendabo lapho eqadi kwamanzi. 
Exodus16:1 Umkhambathi woke wama-Israyeli wasuka e-Elimi wafika erhalawumbeni leSini eliphakathi kwe-Elimi neSinayi elangeni letjhumi nahlanu lenyanga yesibili ngemuva kobana uphumile enarheni yeGibhide. 
Exodus16:2 Umkhambathi lowo wanghonghoyila kuMosi no-Aroni erhalawumbeni," 
Exodus16:3 wathi kibo: “Ngathana uSomnini wase wasibulalela enarheni yeGibhide lapha gade sizihlalela khona kamnandi ngeempotweni zenyama, sidla isikwa, sibetha esimonyongwana. Kodwana qalani nje, nina nisilethe erhalawumbenapha bona nibulale yoke ihlangano le ngendlala.”" 
Exodus16:4 Yeke uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Qala, ngizanehlisela isikwa esivela ezulwini. Abantu bazakuphuma ilanga nelanga babuthelele okwanele ilanga. Ngalokho ngizabe ngibazizinya kobana ngibone nakube bazakukhamba ngomyalwami namkha njani." 
Exodus16:5 Kuzakuthi ngelanga lesithandathu, lokha nabalungiselela abakubuthileko, kube ngokubuyelelwe kabili.”" 
Exodus16:6 Yeke uMosi no-Aroni bathi kuma-Israyeli: “Besiyini thina bona ninganghonghoyila kithi? Kuhlekuhle ninghonghoyila kuSomnini! USomnini ukuzwile ukunghonghoyila kwenu ngaye. Ngalokho ntambama nizakwazi bonyana nguSomnini owanikhupha enarheni yeGibhide, godu nakusasa ekuseni nizakubona ubukhulu bephazimulwakhe.”" 
Exodus16:7 Godu uMosi wathi: “Lokha uSomnini nanipha inyama namhlanje ntambama kobana nigome nesikwa esaneleko kusasa ekuseni, khona nizakwazi bonyana ukuzwile ukunghonghoyila kwenu. Thina asisilitho; emanyeni naninghonghoyilako aninghonghoyileli thina kodwana ninghonghoyilela uSomnini.”" 
Exodus16:8 UMosi wathi ku-Aroni: “Yithi kiwo woke umkhambathi wama-Israyeli, ‘Tjhidelani eduze noSomnini ngombana ukuzwile ukunghonghoyila kwenu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:9 Kuthe u-Aroni asakhuluma nabantu bakwa-Israyeli, baqala ngerhalawumbeni, babona iphazimulo kaSomnini ivela elifini." 
Exodus16:10 USomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Exodus16:11 “Ngikuzwile ukunghonghoyila kwama-Israyeli. Nje-ke yithi kiwo, ‘Ngamarhwaqela nizagoma inyama bese ekuseni nisuthiswa ngesikwa. Ngalokho nizakwazi bonyana mina Somnini nginguZimenu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:12 Kwathi nakuthambamako kwehla iinkwali zembatha ikampa, ekuseni kwaba nombethe magegana nayo." 
Exodus16:13 Kuthe bona umbethe uthintitheke, kwasala into esamakariya, yayisileke inga sithwathwa phasi." 
Exodus16:14 Lokha ama-Israyeli nabona lokho athi omunye komunye: “Madekhethu, yintobani-ke le?” Gade angazi bonyana kuyini. UMosi wathi kiwo: “Sisikwa uSomnini anipha sona kobana nigome." 
Exodus16:15 Ngikhokhu uSomnini akutjhwileko nasithi, ‘Omunye nomunye wenu akazibuthele okumanelisako, kube lithungana umuntu ngamunye. Nibuthelele ukuya ngesibalo sabantu omunye nomunye wenu anabo ngetendeni lakhe.’ ”" 
Exodus16:16 Yeke ama-Israyeli enza njalo, amanye abuthelela khulu amanye kancani." 
Exodus16:17 Kwathi lokha nasele kulinganiswa ngesilinganiso sethungana, kwafunyanwa bona obuthelele khulu azange abe namasalela nobuthelele kancani azange atlhayelelwe. Enye nenye ihloko yomndeni beyibuthe okwanela umndenayo." 
Exodus16:18 UMosi wathi kibo: “Kungabi nomuntu otjhiyela kwakusasa.” 
Exodus16:19 Kodwana abanye azange balalele uMosi, batjhiya ingcenye yokudlokho bekwaba sekuseni. Kwaba neempethu kwanuka. Nje-ke uMosi wabathukuthelela." 
Exodus16:20 Njalo ekuseni bebabutha kube ngiloyo naloyo ngendlela anganeliseka ngakho. Kodwana bekuthi ilanga nalithoma ukutjhisa bese kuyancibilika. 
Exodus16:21 Elangeni lesithandathu babuthelela ukudlokho ngokubuyelelwe kabili kwaba mathungana amabili umuntu ngamunye. Boke abarholi bomkhambathi beza kuMosi bambikela. 
Exodus16:22 Yena wathi kibo: “Nakhu uSomnini akutjhwileko, ‘Kusasa lilanga elikhethekileko lokuphumula, liSabatha elicwengileko lakaSomnini. Bhagani enifuna ukukubhaga, nipheke enifuna ukukupheka, kuthi koke okuseleko nikubeke bekube kusasa ekuseni.’ ”" 
Exodus16:23 Yeke bakubeka bekwaba sekuseni njengombana uMosi abayalile. Azange kunitjhe bekuphethuke iimbungu. 
Exodus16:24 UMosi wathi: “Kugomeni namhlanjesi lokho ngombana kuliSabatha phambi kwakaSomnini. Angeze nakufunyana namhlanjesi emmangweni. 
Exodus16:25 Kubutheleleni amalanga asithandathu ngombana elangeni lekhomba okuliSabatha angeze kwaba khona emmangweni.” 
Exodus16:26 Kwathi elangeni lekhomba abanye baphuma bona bayokubutha kodwana bafumana kunganalitho. 
Exodus16:27 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Kuzabe kube nini nilokhu ningafuni ukugcina imiyalo nemithethwami? 
Exodus16:28 Qalani, mina Somnini nginiphe iSabatha, nje-ke elangeni lesithandathu nginipha ukudla kwamalanga amabili. Omunye nomunye wenu kumele abe ngakwakhe, kungabikho ophumako elangeni lekhomba.”" 
Exodus16:29 Yeke abantu baphumula ngelanga lekhomba. 
Exodus16:30 Isizwe sakwa-Israyeli sathiya isikweso bona yimana. Sasinjengembewu yekhoriyanda, simhlophe begodu sinandipha njengamabhagwana enziwe ngeliju." 
Exodus16:31 UMosi wathi: “Nakhu uSomnini akutjhwileko, ‘Akubulungelwe iinzukulwana zenu ithungana elizeleko lokudlokhu ukuze zibone ukudla enganondla ngakho erhalawumbeni lokha nanginikhupha enarheni yeGibhide.’ ”" 
Exodus16:32 UMosi wathi ku-Aroni: “Thatha umjeka uthele ithungana elizeleko lemana ngaphakathi bese uwubeka endaweni yokulotjhela uSomnini bona ulondele iinzukulwana zenu.” 
Exodus16:33 U-Aroni wenza njengombana uMosi bekayalwe nguSomnini. Emva kwesikhathi wawubeka ngaphambi kwemiqebethu yobufakazi bonyana ulondeke. 
Exodus16:34 Ama-Israyeli agoma imana iminyaka ematjhumi amane abe afika enarheni ehlalekako. Agoma imana leyo abe afika emkhawulweni wenarha yeKanana. 
Exodus16:35 Ithungana lilingana nengcenye yinye yokwetjhumi kapumpana. 
Exodus17:1 Umkhambathi woke wama-Israyeli wasuka erhalawumbeni leSini wakhamba uhloma amatendawo ukuya ngomyalo kaSomnini. Kwathi lokha nawuhloma amatende eRefidimu wafumana kunganamanzi wokusela. 
Exodus17:2 Ngalokho abantu basola uMosi bathi: “Siphani amanzi sisele nina!” UMosi wathi kibo: “Kubayini nisola mina? Kuhlekuhle nizizinya uSomnini ngesenzo senwesi!” 
Exodus17:3 Kodwana abantu bomela amanzi banghonghoyila kuMosi bathi: “Umuntu bekasikhuphelani eGibhide nazosibulalisa ngomrhawu thina nabantwabethu kanye nefuywethu na?” 
Exodus17:4 Yeke uMosi walila kuSomnini wathi: “Ngizokwenzani ngabantwaba? Sekusele kancani bona bangikghadlhe ngamatje.” 
Exodus17:5 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Dlula phambi kwabantu, uthathe abanye babaphathi bakwa-Israyeli bese uphatha idondolo owabetha ngalo iNayili, ukhambe." 
Exodus17:6 Qala, ngizakujama lapho phambi kwakho edwaleni elisentabeni yeRhorebe. Ubethe idwalelo bese kuphuma amanzi ukuze abantu basele.” Yeke uMosi wenza njalo phambi kwabaphathi bakwa-Israyeli." 
Exodus17:7 Wathiya indawo leyo bona yiMasa neMeriba ngombana ama-Israyeli bekamsola begodu azizinya uSomnini ngokuthi: “SineKosi nasinje na?” 
Exodus17:8 Kwavela ama-Amalekhi alwa nama-Israyeli eRefidimu. 
Exodus17:9 UMosi wathi kuJotjhuwa: “Sikhethela amadoda bese uphuma nawo niyosahlela ama-Amalekhi kusasa. Mina ngizakujama esiqongolweni sentatjana ngiphethe idondolo lakaZimu.” 
Exodus17:10 UJotjhuwa wenza njengombana uMosi amyalile, walwa nama-Amalekhi. UMosi, u-Aroni noRhuri bakhuphukela esiqongolweni sentatjana." 
Exodus17:11 Bekuthi njalo lokha uMosi naphakamisa isandla sakhe nedondolo ama-Israyeli adlondlobale, kuthi nasehlisako kudlondlobale ama-Amalekhi." 
Exodus17:12 Kodwana imikhono kaMosi yadinwa. Nje-ke u-Aroni noRhuri bathatha ilitje balisunduzela ngaphasi kwakhe. Wahlala phezu kwalo. U-Aroni noRhuri bamphahla baphakamisa izandla zakhe ngokuzidlheganisa. Ngaleyondlela isandla sakhe sahlala siphakeme njalo bekwatjhinga ilanga. 
Exodus17:13 UJotjhuwa wahlula ama-Amalekhi ngobukhali besabula. 
Exodus17:14 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Tlola lokhu encwadini kube sikhumbuzo nikutjho eendlebeni zakaJotjhuwa bonyana ngizokutjhabalalisa nya ukukhunjulwa kwama-Amalekhi ngaphasi komthunzi welanga.” 
Exodus17:15 UMosi wakha i-aldari walithiya wathi: “USomnini ulitshwayo lami.” 
Exodus17:16 Godu wathi: “Ngambala isandla sami siphethe itshwayo lakaSomnini! Iye, uSomnini uzakulwa nama-Amalekhi iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana.”" 
Exodus18:1 UJetero umphristi weMidiyani ongumkhwe kaMosi wezwa ngakho koke uSomnini uZimu akwenzela uMosi kanye nabantu bakhe u-Israyeli nokobana wawakhupha njani ama-Israyeli eGibhide. 
Exodus18:2 Kwathi lokha uMosi naseseGibhide wathumela umkakhe kuJetero umkhwe wakhe bona amtjheje, yena" 
Exodus18:3 namadodanakhe amabili. Ibizo lenye bekunguGeritjhomu ngombana uMosi wathi: “Ngibe sikhonzi enarheni etjhili.” 
Exodus18:4 Enye bekungu-Eliyezeri ngombana wathi: “UZimu kababa ube msizami bewangisindisa esabuleni kaFaro.” 
Exodus18:5 Yeke uJetero, umkhwe kaMosi, weza nomkaMosi namadodanakhe kuye erhalawumbeni lapha agade ahlome khona itende entabeni kaZimu." 
Exodus18:6 UJetero gade athumele ilizwi kuMosi wathi: “UJetero umkhwe wakho uza nomkakho namadodanakho amabili.” 
Exodus18:7 Nje-ke uMosi waphuma wayomhlangabeza. Wafese wahloma ihloko phambi kwakhe, wamncwanga emhlathini bebabuzana amavuko. Bangena ngetendeni." 
Exodus18:8 UMosi watjela umkhwe wakhe ngakho koke okwenziwa nguSomnini kuFaro namaGibhide ngebanga lama-Israyeli. Wamtjela nangobudisi boke obabehlelako endleleni nokobana uSomnini wabasindisa njani. 
Exodus18:9 UJetero wathabela boke ubuhle uSomnini abenzela ama-Israyeli ngombana uSomnini wawasindisa esandleni samaGibhide. 
Exodus18:10 Nje-ke wathi: “Akadunyiswe uSomnini onisindise esandleni seGibhide nesakaFaro. Iye, kudunyiswe uSomnini owasindisa abantu bakhe emandleni wamaGibhide" 
Exodus18:11 agade abaphatha ngokubanyaza. Gadesi sengiyazi bonyana uSomnini mkhulu kunabo boke abosingazimu.” 
Exodus18:12 Khonapho uJetero, umkhwe kaMosi, waphuma wayokwenzela uZimu umhlabelo wokutjhiswa newetjhebiswano. U-Aroni nabo boke abaphathi bakwa-Israyeli bahlanganyela nomkhwe kaMosi ekugomeni umhlabelo wetjhebiswano phambi kwakaZimu." 
Exodus18:13 Ngakusasa uMosi wahlala bona agwebe abantu. Abantu bajama ubuhlomohlomo kuMosi ukusuka ekuseni bekwahlwa. 
Exodus18:14 Umkhwe wakhe wathi nabona koke lokho uMosi agade akwenzela abantu, wathi: “Yintobani oyenza ebantwini le? Kubayini uhlale wedwa bese abantu bajama ubuhlomohlomo kuwe ukusuka ekuseni bekuhlwe?”" 
Exodus18:15 UMosi wathi kuye: “Abantu beza kimi babuze ngoZimu. 
Exodus18:16 Lokha nabarareneko nakhona beza kimi bese ngigweba phakathi komuntu nomakhelwanakhe. Vane ngibafundisa iimiso nemithetho kaZimu.” 
Exodus18:17 Umkhwe wakhe wathi kuye: “Into oyenzako ayikalungi. 
Exodus18:18 Wena nabantu abakuwaba niyazibulalisa ngombana umtjhikatjhika lo mkhulu khulu, angeze wawenza uwedwa." 
Exodus18:19 Ngilalela, ngizakweluleka kuhle; uZimu akusize! Wena kumele ujamele abantu phambi kwakaZimu, ulethe imilandwabo phambi kwakhe." 
Exodus18:20 Ubayelelise ngeemiso nemithetho, ubafundise indlela okumele bakhambe ngayo nalokho okumele bakwenze." 
Exodus18:21 Ngaphezu kwalokho beka ilihlo emadodeni, ukhethe anekghono, esaba uZimu, athembekileko nazonda ukufunjathiswa bese uwabeka bonyana abe ziinduna zeenkulungwana, zekhulu, zamatjhumi amahlanu nezamatjhumi phezu kwabantu." 
Exodus18:22 Akube ngiwo agweba abantu ngeenkhathi zoke. Akagwebe iindaba ezilula, kodwana ezimaphorodlha azilethe kuwe. Ngaleyondlela kuzakuba lula kuwe ngombana azakuphumuza." 
Exodus18:23 Nawenza lokhu noZimu akuyala bonyana ukwenze, uzakubambelela, nabantwaba boke nje bazakuya emizinabo bathokozile.”" 
Exodus18:24 Ngalokho uMosi walalela iseluleko somkhwe wakhe, wenza koke agade athe akwenze." 
Exodus18:25 UMosi wakhetha amadoda anekghono kwa-Israyeli wawenza abarholi babantu, aba ziinduna zeenkulungwana, zamakhulu, zamatjhumi amahlanu nezamatjhumi." 
Exodus18:26 Agweba abantu ngeenkhathi zoke, iindaba ezimaphorodlha aziletha kuMosi kodwana lezo ezilula azigwebela zona." 
Exodus18:27 UMosi waphekelela umkhwe wakhe bonyana akhambe. Njalo-ke waya enarheni yekhabo. 
Exodus19:1 Enyangeni yesithathu, ngelanga lenyanga ama-Israyeli asuka ngalo enarheni yeGibhide, ngemva kokusuka kwawo eRefidimu, afika erhalawumbeni leSinayi. Ahloma amatendawo eduze nentaba." 
Exodus19:2 UMosi wakhuphukela kuZimu. USomnini wambiza asentabeni wathi kuye: “Nakhu ozakutjho ekumbeni kaJakopo, ozakutjela abantu bakwa-Israyeli," 
Exodus19:3 ‘Nibonile bonyana ngawenzani amaGibhide nokobana nganithwala njani ngamaphiko wekhozi nganitjhideza kimi. 
Exodus19:4 Iphasi loke ngelami kodwana nanilalela ilizwi lami, nilonde isivumelwano sami, nina nizakuba ngabakhethekileko bami phakathi kwezizwe zoke." 
Exodus19:5 Kimi nizaba mbuso wabaphristi, isizwe esicwengileko.’ Lawa mamezwi ozawatjela ama-Israyeli.”" 
Exodus19:6 Yeke uMosi wafika, wabiza abaphathi babantu wababikela woke amezwi lawo uSomnini amyale ngawo." 
Exodus19:7 Boke abantu baphendula ngazwi linye bathi: “Koke uSomnini akukhulumileko sizakwenza.” UMosi wabika amezwi wabantu kuSomnini. 
Exodus19:8 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Qala, ngiza kini ngelifu elinzima ukuze abantu bezwe lokha nangikhuluma nawe nokobana bakholwe kuya kuyile.” Lokha uMosi nabika amezwi wabantu kuSomnini," 
Exodus19:9 uSomnini godu wathi kuye: “Khamba uye ebantwini uqinisekise bona bayazihlambulula namhlanje nakusasa, bahlanze nezambatho zabo." 
Exodus19:10 Abalunge ngelanga lesithathu ngombana mina Somnini ngizakwehlela entabeni yeSinayi phambi kwabantu boke mhlokho. 
Exodus19:11 Wenzele abantu umkhawulo uthi kibo, ‘Nitjheje bonyana ningakhuphukeli entabeni namkha nithinte umkhawulwayo ngombana nanyana ngubani othinta intaba, akabulawe." 
Exodus19:12 Angathintwa ngesandla kodwana akhandwe ngamatje namkha ahlatjwe ngemisubi. Lokhu kwenzeni namkha kumumuntu namkha kusilwana. Lokha nakulila ipalapala abakhuphukele entabeni.’ ” 
Exodus19:13 Yeke uMosi wehla entabeni waya ebantwini, waqinisekisa kobana bayazihlambulula begodu bahlanza nezambatho zabo." 
Exodus19:14 Wathi ebantwini: “Lungani ngelanga lesithathu, kungabi nomuntu okitakitana nomfazi.”" 
Exodus19:15 Ngokusa kwelanga lesithathu kwaba nemidumo nemibani, kwaqubuka ilifu elinzima entabeni. Kwaba netjhada elikhulu elizwakala njengelepalapala. Boke abantu egade basekampeni bathuthumela." 
Exodus19:16 UMosi wakhupha abantu ekampeni kobana bayokuhlangana noZimu; bajama ekuthomeni kwentaba. 
Exodus19:17 Intaba yeSinayi gade ithe kupe ngentuthu ngombana uSomnini wehlela phezu kwayo ngomlilo. Intuthu yakhona yakhuphukela phezulu kwanga yintuthu ye-ondo ekulu. Intaba yoke yahlengezela ngamandla. 
Exodus19:18 Itjhada lokusapalapala nalilokhu liya phezulu, uMosi wakhuluma, uZimu wamphendula ngelizwi elikhulu." 
Exodus19:19 Kwathi bona uSomnini ehlele esiqongolweni sentaba yeSinayi, wabizela uMosi kuye. Yeke uMosi wakhuphuka." 
Exodus19:20 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Yewuka ufese uyelelise abantu bonyana bangafahli beze kuSomnini bona bazokubukela ngombana bazakubhubha ngobunengi. 
Exodus19:21 Nabaphristi abavane batjhidele kuSomnini abajamele kude, nakungasinjalo uSomnini uzabavuthela.”" 
Exodus19:22 UMosi wathi kuSomnini: “Njengombana uSomnini ngokwakhe bekasiyalile wathi, ‘Yenza umkhawulo magegana nentaba ukuze ibe ngehlukaniselwe uSomnini’ abantu angeze benyukela entabeni iSinayi.”" 
Exodus19:23 USomnini wathi kuye: “Yehla ukhuphuke no-Aroni, kodwana ungavumeli abaphristi nabantu bona bafahle umkhawulo beze kuSomnini, nakungasinjalo uSomnini uzabavuthela.”" 
Exodus19:24 Yeke uMosi wehlela ebantwini wakhuluma nabo. 
Exodus20:1 UZimu wakhuluma woke amezwi la wathi: 
Exodus20:2 “Mina Somnini nginguZimakho owakukhupha enarheni yeGibhide ekumbeni yobukhoboka. 
Exodus20:3 Ungalotjhi abosingazimu, lotjha mina kwaphela." 
Exodus20:4 Ungazenzeli isithombesibazwa namkha umfanekiso wananyana yini esezulwini phezulu namkha ephasini phasi nanyana ngemanzini ngaphasi kwephasi. 
Exodus20:5 Ungazikhothameli izintwezo, ungazilotjhi ngombana mina Somnini nginguZimakho. NginguZimu onesikhwele owehlisela isibetho sezono zaboyise phezu kwabantwababo besizukulwana sesithathu nesesine salabo abangenzi intandwami." 
Exodus20:6 Kodwana ukwethembeka kwami kuzakuhlala eenkulungwaneni zeenzukulwana zalabo abangikhathalelako nabalonda imiyalwami. 
Exodus20:7 Ungakhulumeli butjhilweni ngebizo lakaSomnini uZimakho ngombana uSomnini uzambeka umlandu loyo ophatha ibizo lakhe butjhilweni. 
Exodus20:8 Hlonipha ilanga leSabatha ngombana licwengile. 
Exodus20:9 Sebenza amalanga asithandathu, wenze woke umsebenzakho," 
Exodus20:10 kodwana ilanga lekhomba liliSabatha, lahlukaniselwe uSomnini uZimakho. Mhlokho ungasebenzi ngitjho nakancani, wena, indodanakho, indodakazakho, ikhoboka nekhobokakazi lakho, ifuywakho namkha isikhonzi esihlala nawe," 
Exodus20:11 ngombana emalangeni asithandathu uSomnini wenza izulu nephasi, ilwandle nakho koke okudaliweko, waphumula ngelanga lekhomba. Ngalokho uSomnini wabusisa ilanga leSabatha, wathi licwengile." 
Exodus20:12 Yazisa uyihlo nonyoko khona kuzakwanda amalangakho wokuphila endaweni oyiphiwa nguSomnini uZimakho. 
Exodus20:13 Ungabulali umuntu. 
Exodus20:14 Ungahlobongi. 
Exodus20:15 Ungebi. 
Exodus20:16 Ungafakazi amala ngomunye umuntu. 
Exodus20:17 Ungafisi ikumba yomunye umuntu; ungakhanukeli umfazi womunye umuntu, ungafisi ikhoboka namkha ikhobokakazi lakhe, ikomakhe, udumbanakhe nanyana yini engeyomunye umuntu.”" 
Exodus20:18 Boke abantu bezwa imidumo netjhada lepalapala begodu babona imibani nentuthu ethunya entabeni. Kwathi nababona lokho besaba, bathuthumela. Nje-ke bajamela kujana," 
Exodus20:19 bathi kuMosi: “Akungabi nguZimu okhuluma nathi ngombana sizakufa! Akukhulume wena, sizakulalela.”" 
Exodus20:20 UMosi wathi ebantwini: “Ningesabi ngombana uZimu uze bona anizizinye nokobana nimesabe ukuze ningoni.” 
Exodus20:21 Abantu bajamela kujana, uMosi yena watjhidela eduze elifini elimabhombo nelimnyama lapha bekunoZimu khona." 
Exodus20:22 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Nakhu ozakutjho kuma-Israyeli, ‘Nizibonele ngokwenu bonyana ngikhulume nani ngisezulwini." 
Exodus20:23 “ ‘Nje-ke ningazenzeli abozinyana besiliva nebegolide bonyana nibalotjhe kanye nami.’ ” 
Exodus20:24 Godu uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Ngenzela i-aldari lequlwani bese wenzela kilo umhlabelwakho wokutjhiswa, umnikelwakho wetjhebiswano okutjho imihlabelo yezimvu neembuzi kanye neenkomo zakho. Kuzakuthi kiyo yoke indawo lapha ngenza khona bona ibizo lami lidunyiswe, ngehlele kiyo, ngikubusise." 
Exodus20:25 “Nawungenzela i-aldari lamatje, ungalakhi ngamatje acoziweko ngombana nawuwaqoqoda ngeentlabagelo zakho, uyawangcolisa." 
Exodus20:26 Ungenzeli i-aldari lami iintepisi ngombana nawukhwela ngazo ububhunubhunu bakho buzakwembulekela kilo.” 
Exodus21:1 UZimu wathi kuMosi: “Nasi imithetho ozayibeka phambi kwama-Israyeli: 
Exodus21:2 “Lokha nawuthenga ikhoboka lomHebheru, kumele likusebenzele iminyaka esithandathu. Kodwana emnyakeni wekhomba, lizakutjhaphuluka ngaphandle kokukhokha litho." 
Exodus21:3 Nakube lize lilodwa lizakutjhaphuluka lilodwa njalo; kodwana nalize nomfazi kumele umfazi loyo akhambe nalo. 
Exodus21:4 Nakube umphathalo ulipha umfazi bese umfazi loyo ulibelethela amadodana namkha amadodakazi, umfazi loyo nabantwabakhe bazakuba ngebomphathakhe. Lona-ke lizakhamba lilodwa." 
Exodus21:5 Kodwana nakube ikhobokelo ngokwalo lithi, ‘Ngithanda umphathami, umkami nabantwabami; nje-ke angiyi ndawo,’" 
Exodus21:6 yeke-ke umphathalo uzaliletha kuZimu endaweni ecwengileko. Umphathi loyo uzalibekelela ebadini namkha egosenini bese athumbuse indlebalo ngesungulo. Lona-ke lizamsebenzela ipilwalo yoke. 
Exodus21:7 “Lokha indoda nayithengisa indodakazayo bona ibe likhobokakazi, indodakazi leyo ayizokutjhatjhululwa njengombana kusenziwa nakulikhoboka eliduna." 
Exodus21:8 Nakube umphathayo owazithengela yona akasakareki ngayo, khona-ke umphathi loyo uzayinikela bonyana ihlengwe mndenayo. Akanalungelo lokuyithengisela abantu abatjhili ngombana wephule isivumelwano sokuyithenga." 
Exodus21:9 Nakube umphathi loyo uthengele indodanakhe indodakazi leyo, kufanele bonyana ayithathe njengomalukazana." 
Exodus21:10 Indodana yomphathi loyo nayithatha omunye umfazi, inganciphisi isabelo sendodakazi leyo, kungaba kugoma, izambatho namkha ukulala nayo." 
Exodus21:11 Nakube indodakazi leyo ayenzelwa izinto ezintathwezi, inelungelo lokukhamba simahla, ingakhokhi ilitho.”" 
Exodus21:12 “Umuntu omadlha omunye ambulale naye akabulawe. 
Exodus21:13 Nayibe ubangakahlosi ukumbulala, kodwana uZimu wavuma bonyana ahlongakale ngesandla sakhe, obuleleko loyo akabalekele endaweni engizakukhombisa yona." 
Exodus21:14 Nakube umuntu ubulala omunye ngehloso nangokumkhukhuthela, nanyana angabalekela e-aldarini lami, msuse lapho abulawe." 
Exodus21:15 “Obetha uyise namkha unina akabulawe. 
Exodus21:16 “Oweba umuntu amthengise namkha afunyanwe amvalele akabulawe. 
Exodus21:17 “Owethuka uyise namkha unina akabulawe. 
Exodus21:18 “Kungenzeka abantu baphikisane, khonapho omunye amadlhe omunye ngelitje namkha ngeguduva bese omadlhiweko loyo angafi kodwana alimale abe alale phasi." 
Exodus21:19 Umuntu loyo nasele azizwa angcono, avuke bese adondoloze aye ngaphandle, omlimazileko uzakuba msulwa, kodwana kumele akhokhele isikhathi alele ngaso phasi nokwelatjhwa kwakhe." 
Exodus21:20 “Lokha umuntu naphobola ikhoboka namkha ikhobokakazi lakhe ngentonga bese lihlongakalela esandleni sakhe, uzakuhlunguphazwa." 
Exodus21:21 Kodwana nakube ikhobokelo liphile ilanga namkha amalanga amabili, umuntu loyo akazukuhlunguphazwa ngombana uzilobise yena." 
Exodus21:22 “Lokha amadoda nalwako, akhahlameze umfazi osidisi bese uyonakalelwa, nokho angabi namanceba, omlimazileko loyo uzakuhlawuliswa phambi kwabagwebi ukuya ngendlela indoda yomfazi loyo izakubiza ngakhona." 
Exodus21:23 Nakube umfazi loyo naye ulimele, uzagweba ipilo ngepilo," 
Exodus21:24 ilihlo ngelihlo, izinyo ngezinyo, isandla ngesandla, inyawo ngenyawo," 
Exodus21:25 ukutjha ngokutjha, umvuvu ngomvuvu nenceba ngenceba." 
Exodus21:26 “Lokha umuntu namanya ilihlo lekhoboka namkha lekhobokakazi lakhe bese liyapatlaka, kumele atjhaphulule ikhobokelo likhambe ngebanga lelihlo lalo alipatlazileko." 
Exodus21:27 Lokha naporola izinyo lekhoboka namkha lekhobokakazi lakhe, kumele atjhaphulule ikhobokelo likhambe ngebanga lezinywelo.”" 
Exodus21:28 “Nakube ikomo ihlaba indoda namkha umfazi imbulale, izakubulawa ngamatje nenyamayo ningayigomi. Umniniyo uzakuba msulwa." 
Exodus21:29 Kodwana nakube ikomo leyo beyivele inomkhuba wokuhlaba abantu bese umniniyo alokhu akhalinywa ngayo kodwana wangayivalela, yabulala indoda namkha umfazi, izakubulawa ngamatje nomniniyo abulawe." 
Exodus21:30 Nakube umniniyo loyo uyahlawuliswa, uzakuhlawula ngananyana yini ebizwa phezu kwakhe malungana nepilwakhe." 
Exodus21:31 Umthetho lo uzakusetjenziswa nalokha ikomo leyo ihlabe umsana namkha umntazana. 
Exodus21:32 Nakube ikomo ihlaba ikhoboka namkha ikhobokakazi, umniniyo uzakunikela umphathi wekhobokelo iimpaparwana ezimatjhumi amathathu zesiliva bese ikomo leyo ibulawa ngamatje." 
Exodus21:33 “Lokha umuntu nalisa ipetsi ingakavalwa, namkha lokha umuntu nemba ipetsi ayitjhiye ikhamisile bese ikomo namkha udumbana arhohlomele ngapho," 
Exodus21:34 umninipetsi leyo uzakuhlawula: Uzakunikela umninisilwana loyo imali. Kodwana isilwana esifilekweso sibe ngesakhe. 
Exodus21:35 “Nakube ikomo yomunye ihlaba yomunye bese iyafa, bazakuthengisa ikomo ephilako bese bahlukaniselana imali. Kumele godu bahlukaniselane nekomo efileko leyo." 
Exodus21:36 Nangabe kuyaziwa bonyana ikomo leyo inomkhuba wokuhlaba ezinye bese umniniyo akayivaleli, uzakukhokha ikomo ngekomo bese kuthi ikomo efileko kube ngeyakhe.”" 
Exodus22:1 “Lokha umuntu neba ikomo, imvu namkha imbuzi bese uyayihlaba namkha ayithengise, uzakuhlawuliswa iinkomo ezihlanu ngekomo yinye, ahlawuliswe izimvu namkha iimbuzi ezine ngemvu yinye namkha ngembuzi yinye." 
Exodus22:2 “Nakube isela libanjwe liseba bese liyabethwa belife, angeze kwaba nomlandu wokuthulula iingazi zalo." 
Exodus22:3 Kodwana nakube lokho kwenzeke ilanga sele liphumile, olibuleleko uzakuba nomlandu weengazi. “Isela kumele lihlawule ngokuzeleko. Nakube alinanto, kufuze lithengiswe ukuze kukhokhelwe umonakalo eliwenzileko." 
Exodus22:4 Nakube okwetjiweko kufunyanwa esandleni salo kusaphila, lizakuhlawuliswa ngokubuyelelweko, kungaba yikomo, udumbana, imvu namkha imbuzi." 
Exodus22:5 “Nakube umuntu ukghaphela ifuywakhe esimini namkha esidiribeni bese ifuyo leyo ikarula esimini yomunye umuntu, uzakukhokhela umninisimu ngesivuno esikhethekileko sesimakhe nesesidiribe sakhe." 
Exodus22:6 “Nakuqubuka umlilo ulumathise ameva bese kutjhe isithala sekoroyi namkha ikoroyi engakavunwa namkha isimu, umuntu othungelele umlilo lowo uzakuhlawula woke umonakalo ngokuzeleko." 
Exodus22:7 “Nakube umuntu usisa isiliva namkha ipahla komunye umuntu bese yetjiwa ngekumbeni yomuntu loyo, isela eliyebileko lifunyanwe, lizakhokha ngokubuyelelwe kabili." 
Exodus22:8 Nakube isela alifunyanwa, umninimuzi uzakusondela kuZimu endaweni ecwengileko, afunge bonyana akanasandla ekwetjiweni kwepahla yomuntu loyo." 
Exodus22:9 “Nakwenzeka umuntu afanise ipahlakhe komunye bese athi ngeyakhe, kungaba yikomo, udumbana, imvu, imbuzi, izambatho okutjho nanyana yini emlahlekeleko, abantwabo bazakuletha umbangwabo bobabili phambi kwakaZimu endaweni ecwengileko. Kuzakuthi loyo uZimu ambona umlandu, akhokhele umbangisanakhe ngokubuyelelwe kabili." 
Exodus22:10 “Nakube umuntu usisa udumbana, ikomo, imvu, imbuzi namkha esinye nesinye isilwana komunye umuntu bese siyafa namkha sikhubale nanyana sinyamalale kungabi nomuntu obonako," 
Exodus22:11 umsolwa uzakwenza isifungo komsolako phambi kwakaSomnini bonyana azange abe nesandla epahleni yomuntu omsolako loyo. Umnikazi kumele amukele isifungweso begodu angabizi imbuyiselo. 
Exodus22:12 Kodwana nakube ipahla leyo ngambala yetjiwe ezandleni zakhe, kumele akhokhele umniniyo." 
Exodus22:13 Nakube isilwaneso sidatjulwe ziimbandana, akasilethe sibe bufakazi; akazukhokhela isilwana esidatjuliweko." 
Exodus22:14 “Lokha umuntu naboleka into ethize namkha ifuyo komunye umuntu bese iyalimala namkha ife, umniniyo angekho, umuntu loyo uzakukhokha imbuyiselo ngokuzeleko." 
Exodus22:15 Nakube umniniyo gade akhona nakwenzeka lokho, umuntu loyo akazukukhokha imbuyiselo. Nakube beyiqatjhiwe izakukhokhelwa ngemali yokuqatjhwa kwayo." 
Exodus22:16 “Nakube indoda ikhwatjha itlawu elingakabonwa bese ilala nalo, kumele ililobole libe mkayo." 
Exodus22:17 Nakube uyise wetlawelo ubetha phasi ngenyawo uthi akalendiseli endodeni leyo, indoda leyo izakukhokha inani elilingana nelobolo lamatlawu." 
Exodus22:18 “Ungavumeli bonyana umloyi aphile. 
Exodus22:19 “Nanyana ngubani olalana nesilwana akabulawe. 
Exodus22:20 “Owenzela nanyana ngimuphi usingazimu imihlabelo angenzeli uSomnini kwaphela akarhayilwe. 
Exodus22:21 “Ungahlukumezi isikhonzi namkha usigandelele ngombana nani beniziinkhonzi enarheni yeGibhide. 
Exodus22:22 Ungarhubutjhi umhlolokazi namkha intandani. 
Exodus22:23 Nanibarhubutjhako bese bayangililela, ngambala ngizasizwa isililo sabo," 
Exodus22:24 ubukhali bami buzakuvutha phezu kwenu nginibulale ngesabula bese abafazi benu baba bahlolokazi, abantwabenu babe ziintandani." 
Exodus22:25 “Nawubolekisa imali komunye wabantu bami abadududu abahlala nawe, ungabi njengomatjhonisa kuye; ungambizi inzalo." 
Exodus22:26 Nakube uthathela umuntu isambatho sakhe njengesibambiso, kumele umbuyisele sona ngaphambi kobana kutjhinge ilanga," 
Exodus22:27 ngombana isambathweso ngiso sodwa esisisembeso sakhe, siyingubo yomzimbakhe. Angalala ngani ngaphandle kwaso? Godu lokha nalila kimi, mina ngizakwizwa ngombana nginesisa." 
Exodus22:28 “Ungakhulumi uZimu kumbi, namkha uthuwelelise umphathi wabantu bakho." 
Exodus22:29 “Ungariyadi ukunikela isivuno sakhe sekoroyi, sewayini nesamafutha we-oliva. “Ngihlukaniselani amadodanenu wamazibulo." 
Exodus22:30 Nenze soneso nangamazibulo weenkomo, wezimvu neweembuzi zenu. Izibulo eliduna alihlale nonina amalanga alikhomba bese kuthi ngelanga lobunane ninginikele lona." 
Exodus22:31 “Nibabantu bami, nje-ke ningagomi inyama yesilwana esibulewe ziimbandana emmangweni. Inikeleni izinja.”" 
Exodus23:1 “Ungarhatjhi iindaba ezimamala. Ungazibandakanyi nesikhohlakali ngokuba ngufakazi wobukhohlakali. 
Exodus23:2 Ungalandeli inengi bona nenze ubumbi. Nawufakaza emlandwini ungahlanakeli ubulungiswa ngokulandela inengi. 
Exodus23:3 Ungagwebi ochakileko ngokumzamela. 
Exodus23:4 “Lokha nawuhlangana nekomo namkha udumbana olahlekileko wesitha sakho, mrage umbuyisele kiso." 
Exodus23:5 Lokha nawubona udumbana waloyo okuhloyileko arabhalaliswe mthwalwakhe, ungamdluli anjalo, kodwana msize." 
Exodus23:6 “Ungahlanakeli ubulungiswa nawugweba umlandu womuntu ochakileko. 
Exodus23:7 Ungayengwa bufakazi bamala nawugwebako ngombana ungahle ukhuphe isigwebo sokubulawa konganamlandu nolungileko. Angeze ngamlisa umgwebi okhohlakeleko. 
Exodus23:8 Ungalingi wamukele ukufunjathiswa ngombana ukufunjathiswa kuphophaza ohlolisisako, kwenze abaneqiniso babe bakhohlisi." 
Exodus23:9 “Ningagandeleli isikhonzi; niyayazi ihliziyo yesikhonzi ngombana nani gade niziinkhonzi enarheni yeGibhide. 
Exodus23:10 “Uzakutjala bewuvune amasimakho iminyaka esithandathu," 
Exodus23:11 kodwana emnyakeni wekhomba uzawaphumuza, uwalise abe mraga ukuze abadududu bekhenu bakghone ukugoma amakhikhizela. Abawatjhiyileko azakudliwa ziinlwana zommango. Wenze soneso nangesidiribe sakho nesivande sakho se-oliva." 
Exodus23:12 “Yenza umsebenzakho amalanga asithandathu. Elangeni lekhomba uphumule ukuze kuphumule nekomakho nodumbanakho bese indodana yekhobokakazi lakho nesikhonzi esikusebenzelako nabo bakhokhe ummoya. 
Exodus23:13 “Yelelani koke engikutjho kini; ningabizi amabizo wabosingazimu; niwakhafule nemilonyenenu. 
Exodus23:14 “Ningenzele umnyanya kathathu ngomnyaka. 
Exodus23:15 Yenzani umnyanya wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo njengombana nginiyalile. Nizagoma isikwa esinganangumelo amalanga alikhomba ngesikhathi esibekiweko ngenyanga ka-Abibi ngombana leyo yinyanga enaphuma ngayo eGibhide. Kungabi nomuntu ozakuvela phambi kwami amkhonoze. 
Exodus23:16 Gidingani umnyanya wesiVuno okumnyanya womkhiqizo womsebenzenu walokho enikutjele emasimini. Nigidinge umnyanya wokuButhelela ekupheleni komnyaka lokha nanibuthelela iinthelo zomsebenzenu emasimini. 
Exodus23:17 Boke abaduna benu bazakuvela phambi kwakaSomnini uSomandla kathathu ngomnyaka. 
Exodus23:18 “Ingumelo ingeze yabandakanywa neengazi zomhlabelo. Godu ungalisi amafutha wemihlabelo yeminyanyami ahlale bekuse ungakawatjhisi. 
Exodus23:19 “Letha njalo imikhiqizo yokuthoma yehlabathakho endaweni ecwengileko kaSomnini uZimakho. “Ungapheki imbuzana ngebisini lakanina.” 
Exodus23:20 “Qalani, ngithumela ingilozi phambi kwenu bona ineluse endleleni beyinise endaweni enginilungiselele yona." 
Exodus23:21 Ziqapheleni ngombana iphakathi kwenu; nilalele ilizwi layo, ningalwi nayo. Naningayilaleliko angeze yaqolela imitjhapho yenu ngombana ngimi okhuluma kiyo." 
Exodus23:22 “Kodwana lokha naniyilalelisisa kuhle bese nenza koke engithi nikwenze, khona-ke ngizakuba sisitha sezitha zenu ngibe mjamelani ebajamelanini benu." 
Exodus23:23 “Lokha ingilozami nayikhamba phambi kwenu bese iningenisa kuma-Amori, amaRhithi, amaPerizi, amaKanana, amaRhivi namaJebusi bese ngiyawabhubhisa," 
Exodus23:24 ningakhothameli abosingazimu bawo begodu ningabalotjhi. Ningenzi izinto ngendlelabo kodwana nibaphelise nya beniphadlhe namatjabo akhethekileko. 
Exodus23:25 Lotjhani uSomnini uZimenu. Mina ngizakubusisa isikwa namanzenu bengisuse izifo phakathi kwenu. 
Exodus23:26 Akunamfazi ozakubuya endleleni namkha abe yinyumba enarhenenu; ngizanandisela ipilo. 
Exodus23:27 Ngizathumela ukwesaba kwami phambi kwenu bese ngihlangahlanganisa boke abantu eniqabene nabo ngenze zoke izitha zenu zinibaleke. 
Exodus23:28 Godu ngizakuthumela abonondovu phambi kwenu, baqotjhe amaRhivi, amaKanana namaRhithi phambi kwenu." 
Exodus23:29 Izizwezi angeze ngaziqotjha phambi kwenu ngamnyaka munye ngombana inarha izasala inganamuntu bese iinlwana zommango ziyanda zinivukele. 
Exodus23:30 Kodwana ngizaziqotjha kancani kancani phambi kwenu, kufikela lapha nanda khona benithathe inarha." 
Exodus23:31 Ngizabeka imikhawulwenu ukusuka elwandle lomGaba ukuya elwandle lamaFilista nokusuka erhalawumbeni ukuya eYufrathe. Iye, ngizanikela abahlali benarha ezandleni zenu bese nina niyabagijimisa." 
Exodus23:32 Ningenzi isivumelwano nabo namkha nabosingazimu babo. 
Exodus23:33 Bangahlali enarhenenu ngombana bazanenza none phambi kwami lokha nanilotjha abosingazimu babo. Lokho kuzakuba sisifu kini.” 
Exodus24:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Yenyukela kimi, wena no-Aroni, uNadabi no-Abihu kanye namatjhumi alikhomba wabanye babaphathi bakwa-Israyeli, kodwana niguqe kudanyana nihlome iinhloko phasi." 
Exodus24:2 Nguwe kwaphela Mosi ozakubandamela kimi, kodwana abaphathi bangabandameli. Kungabi nabanye abantu abenyuka nawe.”" 
Exodus24:3 UMosi wehla wabikela abantu woke amezwi nemithetho kaSomnini. Abantu baphendula boke ngalizwi linye bathi: “Woke amezwi akhulunywe nguSomnini sizawaphetha.” 
Exodus24:4 UMosi watlola woke amezwi kaSomnini. Wavuka ngovivi wakha i-aldari enzasi kwentaba, wajamisa namatje wesikhumbuzo alitjhumi nambili agade ajamele iinkoro ezilitjhumi nambili zakwa-Israyeli." 
Exodus24:5 Wayala amasokana wama-Israyeli kobana enzele uSomnini imihlabelo yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano ngeenkunzi. 
Exodus24:6 UMosi wathatha ingcenye yeengazi wayifaka ezitjeni, kwathi ingcenye enye wayifafaza e-aldarini." 
Exodus24:7 Wathatha incwadi yesivumelwano, wayifundela abantu. Bona bathi: “Koke okukhulunywe nguSomnini sizokwenza begodu sizokulalela.”" 
Exodus24:8 Nje-ke uMosi wathatha iingazi wafafaza abantu ngazo wathi: “Qalani, lezi ziingazi zesivumelwano uSomnini asenze nani ngokuya ngawo woke amezwi la.”" 
Exodus24:9 Emva kwalokho uMosi no-Aroni, uNadabi no-Abihu kanye namatjhumi alikhomba wabanye babaphathi bakwa-Israyeli benyukela entabeni," 
Exodus24:10 bafika babona lapha kujame khona uZimu wakwa-Israyeli: Ngaphasi kweenyawo zakhe gade kunokungathi yindlela egangadwe ngelitje lesafaya, isuleke inga mkayi ngokwawo." 
Exodus24:11 Nanyana iinkhulu zama-Israyelezi zabona uZimu, azange azenze litho. Bagoma bebasela." 
Exodus24:12 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Khuphukela kimi entabeni, ulinde khonapho; ngizokunikela imiqebethu enomthetho nemiyalo engiyitlolele bona ngifundise ama-Israyeli ngayo.”" 
Exodus24:13 Yeke uMosi wazilungiselela ukukhuphuka nencekwakhe uJotjhuwa bona baye entabeni kaZimu. 
Exodus24:14 Wathi ebaphathini: “Silindelani lapha besibuye. Qalani nango u-Aroni noRhuri phakathi kwenu, nanyana ngubani onomraro akaye kibo.”" 
Exodus24:15 Yeke uMosi wakhuphukela entabeni, ilifu lagubuzesa intaba." 
Exodus24:16 Iphazimulo kaSomnini yembatha intaba yeSinayi yasibekelwa lilifu amalanga asithandathu, kwathi elangeni lekhomba uZimu wabiza uMosi phakathi kwelifu." 
Exodus24:17 Kuthe lokha ama-Israyeli nabona iphazimulo kaSomnini egade injengomlilo oqothulako phezu kwesiqongolo sentaba 
Exodus24:18 uMosi wangena elifini, wakhuphukela entabeni. UMosi waba sentabeni amalanga amatjhumi amane nobusuku bakhona." 
Exodus25:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Exodus25:2 “Tjela ama-Israyeli bonyana angilethele umnikelo. Abaphathi abawuthathe komunye nomunye umuntu onehliziyo evumako. 
Exodus25:3 Nanti ihlobo lomnikelo enizalithatha kiwo: igolide, isiliva nekoporo," 
Exodus25:4 iwulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede, ilineni emhlophe kanye noboya beembuzi," 
Exodus25:5 iinkhumba zamaqama ezifakwe umbala obovu, iinkhumba ezitjhukiweko bezazeswa ngamafutha, iingodo zomtholo," 
Exodus25:6 amafutha weembani, iinungo zamafutha wokuzesa kanye namakha wetjhwalo," 
Exodus25:7 amatje we-oniksi namatje wokukghabisa i-efodi neporiyana yomphristi. 
Exodus25:8 “Ngenzelani indawo ecwengileko ukuze ngihlale phakathi kwama-Israyeli. 
Exodus25:9 Nenze ithaberinakeli nakho koke okukilo ngendlela yomfanekiso engizakukhombisa wona.” 
Exodus25:10 Godu uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Ngenzelani umfaji ngeengodo zomtholo ube limitha nesiqunjwana ubude, ube siquntu nesiqunjwana semitha ububanzi nokuphakama." 
Exodus25:11 Uwunameke ngegolidembala ngaphakathi nangaphandle bese uwuphetha ngegolide. 
Exodus25:12 Uwubumbele amasongo wegolide amane bese uwabethelela emajikeni wawo amane ngaphasi, amasongo amabili ngehlangothini lawo namanye amabili ngakelinye ihlangothi." 
Exodus25:13 Ulungise iingodo zomuthi womtholo, uzinameke ngegolide." 
Exodus25:14 Ufake iingodwezo ngaphakathi kwamasongo ngemahlangothini womfaji ukuze uwuthwale ngazo. 
Exodus25:15 Iingodo azibe ngemasongweni womfaji; zingasuswa kiwo. 
Exodus25:16 Ufake ubufakazi besivumelwano engizakunikela bona ngemfajini. 
Exodus25:17 Wenze isisibekelo somfaji ngegolidembala sibe limitha nesiqunjwana ubude, sibe siquntu nesiqunjwana semitha ububanzi." 
Exodus25:18 “Wenze amakerubhi amabili wegolide ngokuwakhanda ekugcineni kwemiphetho emibili yesisibekelo somfaji. 
Exodus25:19 Ukhande ikerubhi linye ngehlangothini elinye nekerubhi elinye ngakelinye ihlangothi. Amakerubhi amabili angemaqadi wesisibekelweso akabe yinto yinye nesisibekelweso. 
Exodus25:20 Amakerubhi akathabululele amaphikwawo ngaphezulu engamele isisibekelo somfaji aqalane ngobuso, womabili aqale isisibekelo." 
Exodus25:21 Ufake ubufakazi besivumelwano engizakunikela bona ngaphakathi komfaji bese uvala umfaji ngesisibekelo. 
Exodus25:22 Ngizakuhlangana nawe lapho, ngikhulume nawe ngingehla kwesisibekelo hlangana namakerubhi amabili aphezu komfaji wobufakazi. Ngizakuyala ngalokho okumalungana nama-Israyeli.”" 
Exodus25:23 USomnini wabuya wathi: “Yenza itafula ngomuthi womtholo libe ngaphasana kwemitha ubude, ngaphasana kwesiquntu semitha ububanzi, libe siquntu nesiqunjwana semitha ukuphakama." 
Exodus25:24 Linameke ngegolidembala bese uliphetha ngesakhelelo segolide magegana nalo. 
Exodus25:25 Ukusuka emphethweni ukuya ngaphakathi kube bubanzi besandla bese wakha umqoqo wesakhelelo segolide. 
Exodus25:26 Lenzele amasongo amane wegolide, uwabophelele emajikenalo amane emilenzeni." 
Exodus25:27 Amasongo wokufaka iingodo zokuthwala itafula akabe ngaphasana kwesakhelelo. 
Exodus25:28 Lungisa iingodo zomuthi womtholo, uzinameke ngegolide, uthwale ngazo itafula." 
Exodus25:29 “Lenzele izitja ezahlukahlukeneko, iinkapho nemijeka yokuvubela umnikelo wewayini. Koke lokhu kwenze ngegolidembala." 
Exodus25:30 Beka izikwa ezibekwa phambi kwakaZimu etafulenapho zibe phambi kwami ngeenkhathi zoke.” 
Exodus25:31 Godu uSomnini wathi: “Yenza ilithi leembani ngegolidembala. Isikhondo, isiqu, iimpundu okutjho amaqumbe namathuthumbo walo kube msebenzi okhandwe wahlanganiswa nalo." 
Exodus25:32 Akube namagatja asithandathu aphuma ngemaqadi wesiqu selithi leembani, kube magatja amathathu ngehlangothini linye lesiqu bese amagatja amathathu abe ngehlangothini elinye." 
Exodus25:33 Emagatjeni akube neempundu ezinjengama-alimondi okutjho amaqumbe namathuthumbo. Egatjeni ngalinye kilawo asithandathu kube neempundu ezintathu. 
Exodus25:34 Kuthi esiqwini selithi leembani kube neempundu ezine ezinjengama-alimondi, zibe namaqumbe namathuthumbo." 
Exodus25:35 Akube nequmbe linye esiqwini ngaphasi komsuka wamagatja akhamba ngamabili. Kube njalo kiwo woke amagatja asithandathu asuka esiqwini. 
Exodus25:36 Amaqumbe namagatja wakhona akhandwe ndawonye nesiqu ngegolidembala. 
Exodus25:37 “Lenzele iimbani ezilikhomba. Ubeke isibani phezu kwesiqu nangaphezu kwegatja negatja ukuze zikhanyise esibangeni esingaphambi kwelithi leembani. 
Exodus25:38 Iincimasibani nezitjana zalo zibe ngezegolidembala. 
Exodus25:39 “Ilithi leembani sele lihlangene nezitja zalo zoke libe makhilogremu amatjhumi amathathu nane wegolidembala. 
Exodus25:40 “Qinisekisa bonyana wenza koke lokhu ngomfanekiso owakhonjiswa wona entabeni.” 
Exodus26:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Yenza ithaberinakeli ngamatjhila alitjhumi welineni emhlophe. Uthunge nemifanekiso yamakerubhi ngobukghoni ematjhilenapho ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus26:2 Ubude betjhila ngalinye bube mamitha alitjhumi nambili nesiquntu, libe ngaphasana kwamamitha amabili ububanzi. Woke amatjhila lawa kumele alingane." 
Exodus26:3 Amatjhila akahlanganiswe ndawonye ngamahlanu. 
Exodus26:4 Wenze iinrhobelo ezihlaza komkayi emphethweni welinye letjhila elihlanganisiweko elingeqadi. Wenze njalo nakelinye itjhila elihlanganisiweko. 
Exodus26:5 Akube ziinrhobelo ezimatjhumi amahlanu etjhileni lokuthoma elihlanganisiweko, ezinye iinrhobelo ezimatjhumi amahlanu emphethweni wetjhila lesibili elihlanganisiweko. Iinrhobelwezo aziqalane." 
Exodus26:6 Wenze iinqobotjhelo ezimatjhumi amahlanu zegolide bese uqobotjhela amatjhila elinye kelinye ngeenqobotjhelwezo ukuze ithaberinakeli lihlangane libe linye. 
Exodus26:7 “Godu wenze amatjhila woboya beembuzi wokwenza itende phezu kwethaberinakeli; uwenze abe litjhumi nanye. 
Exodus26:8 Ubude betjhila ngalinye bube mamitha alitjhumi nantathu nesiquntu bese ububanzi buba ngaphasana kwamamitha amabili. Wolitjhumi nanye amatjhila lawo kumele alingane. 
Exodus26:9 Uhlanganise amatjhila amahlanu ndawonye nasithandathu ndawonye. Itjhila lesithandathu uzalibhinca ngehla komnyango wetende. 
Exodus26:10 Wenze iinrhobelo emphethweni welinye letjhila elihlanganisiweko elingeqadi. Wenze njalo nakelinye itjhila elihlanganisiweko. 
Exodus26:11 Wenze iinqobotjhelo ezimatjhumi amahlanu zekoporo bese uqobotjhela iinrhobelo. Qobotjhela ngazo itende ukuze lihlangane libe linye. 
Exodus26:12 Ingcenye yamatjhila wetende edluleleko okuyingcenye yamatjhila ahlanganisiweko, ayilembeleliswe ngeswazini langemuva lethaberinakeli." 
Exodus26:13 Ingcenye esiquntu semitha ngehlangothini elinye nelinye lalokho okudluleleko ebudeni bamatjhila wetende izakulembelela ngemaqadi wethaberinakeli, ngapha nangapha ligubuzeseke." 
Exodus26:14 “Yenza isigubuzeso setende ngeenkhumba zamaqama ezifakwe umbala obomvu begodu wenze isigubuzeso esinye ngeenkhumba ezitjhukiweko bezazeswa ngamafutha ngaphezu kwaso. 
Exodus26:15 “Wenze amahlaka wethaberinakeli ajamileko ngeengodo zomtholo. 
Exodus26:16 Ihlaka ngalinye libe nobude obumamitha amane nesiquntu, libe siquntu nesiqunjwana semitha ububanzi." 
Exodus26:17 Iingodo ezimbili ezihlanganiswe bona zenze ihlaka kufuze zibe neentlobo ezimbili ngaphasi. Woke amahlaka wethaberinakeli uwenze ngaleyondlela. 
Exodus26:18 “Wenze amahlaka wethaberinakeli amatjhumi amabili ngeswazini langesewula. 
Exodus26:19 Ngaphasi kwamahlaka amatjhumi amabili lawo wenze amanzinziso wesiliva amatjhumi amane. Akube manzinziso amabili ngaphasi kwehlaka ngalinye lapha iintlobo zalo ezimbili zizakungena khona. Yenza njalo ehlakeni elinye nelinye. 
Exodus26:20 “Godu nangeswazini elinye langetlhagwini lethaberinakeli kube mahlaka amatjhumi amabili 
Exodus26:21 namanzinziso wesiliva amatjhumi amane. Akube manzinziso amabili ngaphasi kwehlaka ngalinye. 
Exodus26:22 “Ngeswazini lethaberinakeli elingetjingalanga wenze amahlaka asithandathu. 
Exodus26:23 Yenza amahlaka amabili ukuze enze amajika wethaberinakeli ngemuva. 
Exodus26:24 Ijika linye alenziwe ziingcenye ezimbili ezifanako. Iingcenye ezimbilezi kumele zihlanganiswe ukusuka phasi ukuya phezulu lapha isongo lokuthoma lizafakwa khona. Akube njalo emajikeni womabili. 
Exodus26:25 Nje-ke kuzakuba namahlaka abunane ngemuva kwethaberinakeli namanzinziso wesiliva alitjhumi nasithandathu. Ihlaka ngalinye libe namanzinziso amabili. 
Exodus26:26 “Wenze iinqabo ngeengodo zomtholo zibe ngezamahlaka wethaberinakeli. Yenza zibe zihlanu ngeswazini elinye 
Exodus26:27 zibe zihlanu ngakelinye; godu zibe zihlanu ngemuva lethaberinakeli ngeswazini langetjingalanga. 
Exodus26:28 Iinqabo ezingeziphakathi emahlakeni wamaswazi wethaberinakeli kumele zithome ekuthomeni kweswazi ukuyokutjhayisa ekugcineni. 
Exodus26:29 Unameke amahlaka neenqabo ngegolide. Amasongo wokubamba iinqabo enziwe ngegolide. 
Exodus26:30 “Jamisa ithaberinakeli ukuya ngendlela owaboniswa ngayo usentabeni. 
Exodus26:31 “Wenze isiyaya ngelineni emhlophe. Uthungelele phezu kwesiyayapho ngobukghoni imifanekiso yamakerubhi ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus26:32 Yenza iinsika ezine zomtholo ezinamekwe ngegolide zijame phezu kwamanzinziso wesiliva. Lembelelisa isiyayeso ngeenkhonkhwani zegolide phezu kweensika," 
Exodus26:33 silembelele ngaphasi kweenqobotjhelo zamatjhila. “Ngenisa umfaji wobufakazi uwubeke ngemuva kwesiyaya. Isiyaya sizakuhlukanisa indawo ecwengileko kecwenge khulu. 
Exodus26:34 Beka isisibekelo somfaji phezu komfaji wobufakazi ngendaweni ecwenge khulu. 
Exodus26:35 Beka itafula ngaphandle kwesiyaya, ubeke ilithi leembani ngeswazini langesewula yethaberinakeli malungana netafula elingeswazini langetlhagwini." 
Exodus26:36 “Yenza itjhila lomnyango wetende ngelineni emhlophe ulithungelele newulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus26:37 Wenzele itjhila lomnyango iinsika ezine zomtholo bese uzinameka ngegolide; iinkhonkhwani zakhona kube ngezegolide. Uzibumbele amanzinziso amahlanu wekoporo.” 
Exodus27:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Wenze i-aldari ngeengodo zomtholo libe sikwere ngaphezulu. Ubude nobubanzi libe mamitha amabili nesiqunjwana. Libe limitha nesiqunjwana ukuphakama. 
Exodus27:2 Ulenzele iimpundu emajikenalo amane; zinamathele kilo bese ulinameka ngekoporo. 
Exodus27:3 “Ulenzele izitja zokufaka umlotha, iintjhefula, izitja zokunyenyeza, iimforogo nezitja zokutjhisela itjhwalo. Zoke izitja zalo uzenze ngekoporo." 
Exodus27:4 “Godu ulenzele umsefo wekoporo njengenede ngemaqadi walo. Wenze amasongo amane wekoporo emajikenalo amane. 
Exodus27:5 Ubeke umsefo ngaphasi komqoqo we-aldari ukuze ulembelele uphelele phakathi e-aldarini. 
Exodus27:6 Wenzele i-aldari iingodo, kube ziingodo zomtholo bese uzinameka ngekoporo." 
Exodus27:7 Iingodwezo zifakwe emasongweni ukuze zibe ngemaqadi we-aldari lokha naligugwako. 
Exodus27:8 Ulenze ngamaplanka libe nomkghotho ngaphakathi njengombana wakhonjiswa lona entabeni.” 
Exodus27:9 Godu uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Wenze isirhodlo sethaberinakeli ngalendlela: Ngeswazini langesewula lethaberinakeli ulembelelise umlembelembe wamatjhila welineni emhlophe anomthungo abe mamitha amatjhumi amane nahlanu. 
Exodus27:10 Ihlangothi lesirhodlwelo alibe neensika ezimatjhumi amabili namanzinziso wakhona amatjhumi amabili kwenziwe ngekoporo, kodwana iinkhonkhwani zeensika kanye nemipherho yakhona kwenziwe ngesiliva." 
Exodus27:11 “Ngokunjalo ngeswazini langetlhagwini lethaberinakeli kube nomlembelembe wamatjhila omamitha amatjhumi amane nahlanu ubude.
