Akube neensika ezimatjhumi amabili namanzinziso wakhona amatjhumi amabili kwenziwe ngekoporo, kodwana iinkhonkhwani zeensika kanye nemipherho yakhona kwenziwe ngesiliva." 
Exodus27:12 “Ububanzi besirhodlo, ngeswazini langetjingalanga lethaberinakeli, bube nomlembelembe wamatjhila omamitha amatjhumi amabili nambili nesiquntu. Godu bube neensika ezilitjhumi kanye namanzinziso wakhona alitjhumi." 
Exodus27:13 “Ububanzi besirhodlo ngeswazini langaphambili lethaberinakeli ngepumalanga bube mamitha amatjhumi amabili nambili nesiquntu. 
Exodus27:14 Ihlangothi lesirhodlo langaphambili libe nemilembelembe emibili yamatjhila ephahle isango. Ubude bomlembelembe ngamunye bube mamitha asithandathu nesiquntu nesiqunjwana. Yomibili imilembelembe leyo ibe neensika ezintathu namanzinziso amathathu. 
Exodus27:15 Esangweni lesirhodlo akube nesivalo esimamitha alithoba ububanzi, senziwe ngelineni emhlophe ethungwe ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede. Asibe neensika ezine ezinamanzinziso amane." 
Exodus27:16 “Zoke iinsika magegana nesirhodlo zibe nemipherho yesiliva, iinkhonkhwani zesiliva namanzinziso wekoporo." 
Exodus27:17 Ubude besirhodlo bube mamitha amatjhumi amane nahlanu, ububanzi bube mamitha amatjhumi amabili nambili nesiquntu. Ukuphakama komlembelembe kube mamitha amabili nesiqunjwana. Umlembelembe lowo ube ngewelineni emhlophe enomthungo; amanzinziso wakhona enziwe ngekoporo." 
Exodus27:18 Zoke izitja zethaberinakeli zananyana ngimuphi umsebenzi, nazo zoke iinkhonkhwani ezibamba itende nesirhodlo zizakuba ngezekoporo.”" 
Exodus27:19 USomnini wathi: “Wena-ke Mosi utjele ama-Israyeli bonyana alethe kuwe amafutha we-oliva atsengileko nacwebileko wokukhanyisa ilithi leembani. Iimbani azihlale zivutha 
Exodus27:20 ngetendeni lokuhlanganela ngaphandle kwesiyaya esingaphambi kobufakazi. U-Aroni namadodanakhe kumele bahlale babona bonyana iimbani ziyakhanya phambi kwakaSomnini ukusukela ntambama bekuse. Lokhu kuzakuba simiso esijame nini nanini sama-Israyeli iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana.” 
Exodus28:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Umnakwenu u-Aroni namadodanakhe akaphume phakathi kwama-Israyeli. Qala ngimkhethile yena namadodanakhe uNadabi no-Abihu, u-Elazara no-Itamara kobana babe baphristi bangilotjhe." 
Exodus28:2 “Wenzele umnakwenu u-Aroni izambatho ezicwengileko kobana abe nesithunzi ahlonipheke. 
Exodus28:3 Tjela boke abanekghono, engibaphe ukuhlakanipha, kobana benzele u-Aroni izambatho ukuze ahlukaniselwe ubuphristi bami." 
Exodus28:4 “Nanzi izambatho okumele bazenze: iporiyana yomphristi, i-efodi, ijasi, iphuraphura enomphetho, ingwani yomphristi kanye nomkhungo. Abenzele namadodana womfowenu u-Aroni izambatho ezikhethekileko kobana abe baphristi bami." 
Exodus28:5 “Bazakusebenzisa imicwana yegolide, iwulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede kanye nelineni emhlophe." 
Exodus28:6 Abasebenze ngobukghoni ukwenza i-efodi ngelineni emhlophe, ethungwe ngemicwana yegolide nangewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus28:7 I-efodi leyo ayibe nemitletle emibili yamahlombe ukuze ihlanganise ingcenye yangemuva neyangaphambili emphethwenayo. 
Exodus28:8 Ibhande lokuyibopha elithungelelwe kiyo nalo alenziwe ngelineni emhlophe ethungwe ngemicwana yegolide nangewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus28:9 “Uthathe amatje amabili abomvu naligugu utlole kiwo ngokugobhodlha amabizo wamadodana ka-Israyeli," 
Exodus28:10 asithandathu elitjeni elinye, nasithandathu kelinye ilitje ngendlela alamana ngayo." 
Exodus28:11 Ugobhodlhe amabizo wamadodana ka-Israyeli ematjeni amabili njengombazi natlola elitjeni lokugiba. Amatje lawo uwaphethe ngemicwana yegolide 
Exodus28:12 bewuwathungelele phezu kwemitletle yamahlombe we-efodi, abe sikhumbuzo samadodana ka-Israyeli. U-Aroni akembathe amabizwawo emahlombakhe phambi kwakaSomnini kube sikhumbuzo." 
Exodus28:13 Lokha nawuphetha amatje lawo ngemicwana yegolide 
Exodus28:14 uthungelele iinketanyana ezimbili zegolidembala khonapho. Iinketanyanezo azilukwe njengalokha nakulukwa imicwana. 
Exodus28:15 “Wenze ngobukghoni imbada yeporiyana yomphristi lapha kufakwa khona amatje wefumbe. Uyenze ifane nangendlela ekwenziwe ngayo i-efodi: ngelineni emhlophe, ethungwe ngemicwana yegolide nangewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus28:16 Ayilingane mahlangothi woke nayibhinciweko, ibe masentimitha amatjhumi amabili nambili ubude nobubanzi." 
Exodus28:17 Uyifake amarhemo amane wamatje aligugu: “Irhemo lokuthoma libe nerubi, ithophazi ne-emeraldi;" 
Exodus28:18 irhemo lesibili libe nesimaragidu, isafaya nedayimani;" 
Exodus28:19 irhemo lesithathu libe nehiyasinthi, i-agatha ne-ametisthi;" 
Exodus28:20 irhemo lesine libe nebherili, i-oniksi nejasipere. “Woke amatje lawo uwarubele ngemicwana yegolide." 
Exodus28:21 Akube mamatje alitjhumi nambili, anamabizo ukuya ngamadodana ka-Israyeli. Azakuba njengamatje wokugiba, enye nenye ikoro kezilitjhumi nambili itlolwe ngokugobhodlhwa elitjeni layo." 
Exodus28:22 “Iinketanyana ezimbili zegolidembala ezilukwe njengemicwana uzazibophelela eporiyaneni nganasi indlela: 
Exodus28:23 Yenza amasongo amabili wegolide bese uwathungelela emajikenayo angehla. 
Exodus28:24 Ufake iinketanyana ezimbili zegolide ngemasongweni amabili emajikeni weporiyana. 
Exodus28:25 Bopha amaphelelo weenketanyana ezimbili emphethweni orutjelweko wamatje asemtletleni we-efodi emahlombe ukuze iporiyana ibe sesifubeni. 
Exodus28:26 Wenze amasongo amanye amabili wegolide, uwathungelele emajikeni amanye angaphasi womphetho weporiyana." 
Exodus28:27 Godu wenze amanye amasongo amabili wegolide bese uwathungelela ngaphambili phasi emitletleni yamahlombe hlanu kwalapha ihlangana khona ne-efodi ngehla kwebhande. 
Exodus28:28 Bophelela amasongo weporiyana emasongweni we-efodi ngomtiya ohlaza komkayi ukuze ibe ngehla kwebhande le-efodi. Lokho kuzakwenza bonyana iporiyana ingatjhaphuluki isuke e-efodini. 
Exodus28:29 “Ngaleyondlela u-Aroni uzakuthwala amabizo wamadodana ka-Israyeli eporiyaneni enembada yamatje wefumbe. Amabizo lawo uzawathwala ehliziywenakhe lokha naya endaweni ecwengileko kube sikhumbuzo sanini nanini phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Exodus28:30 Ngembadeni yeporiyana ubeke amatje wefumbe okuyi-urimi nethumimi, abe sehliziyweni ka-Aroni lokha nayokuvela phambi kwakaSomnini. Ngaleyondlela u-Aroni uzakuhlala athwele amatje wefumbe yokuhlahla ama-Israyeli ehliziywenakhe njalo." 
Exodus28:31 “Wenze ijasi ekhambisana ne-efodi ibe hlaza komkayi koke. 
Exodus28:32 Phakathi nendawo ibe nentamo lapha kungena khona ihloko, uyithungelele umphetho olukiweko entanyeni ufane nomphetho wesambatho sepi ukuze ingadabuki." 
Exodus28:33 Emphethwenayo ngenzasi wenze amarharinada ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede azombeleze umphetho abe neenkhencezo zegolide hlangana," 
Exodus28:34 kube sikhencezo segolide nerharinada, godu isikhencezo segolide nerharinada njalo njalo magegana nomphetho wejasi." 
Exodus28:35 U-Aroni akembathe ijasi leyo njalo lokha nangenako nalokha naphumako endaweni ecwengileko yokulotjha phambi kwakaSomnini ukuze kuzwakale ukukhenceza. Nangembathi njalo, uzakufa." 
Exodus28:36 “Godu wenze ithuthumbo legolidembala, uligwale ngokuligobhodlha amagama athi, ‘Ohlukaniselwe uSomnini’ njengomgobhodlho wesigibo." 
Exodus28:37 Ulibophelele engwanini ngomtiya ohlaza komkayi; libe ngaphambili engwanini 
Exodus28:38 phezu kwepandla ka-Aroni. Ithuthumbelo lizakuhlala lisepandla ka-Aroni njalo ukuze ama-Israyeli amukeleke phambi kwakaSomnini lokha naletha izipho ezikhethileko. Ngaleyondlela u-Aroni uzakwenza bonyana izono zama-Israyeli zithethelelwe lokha naphambukako ekunikeleni nanyana ngiziphi izipho.” 
Exodus28:39 Godu uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Lokha nawuthungela u-Aroni iphuraphura ngelineni emhlophe nalokha nawumenzela ingwani ngelineni emhlophe kanye nomkhungo ngobukghoni," 
Exodus28:40 wenzele namadodanakhe iimphuraphura, imikhungo yokuthekeleza nemibhode. Lokhu ukwenze kobana abe nesithunzi abe ahlonipheke." 
Exodus28:41 Wembathise umnakwenu u-Aroni namadodanakhe akanye naye, ubahlukanisele ubuphristi bami ngokubazesa nangokubajamisa." 
Exodus28:42 Ubenzele iindzeredzere ngelineni kobana bafihle ububhunubhunu babo ukusuka edinini ukufika emadolweni. 
Exodus28:43 U-Aroni namadodanakhe bayembathe lokha nabangena ngetendeni lokuhlanganela ngitjho nalokha nabatjhidela e-aldarini kobana balotjhe endaweni ecwengileko. Nakungasinjalo bazazithwesa umlandu bese bayafa. Lokhu kuzakuba simiso sanini nanini ku-Aroni neenzukulwaneni zakhe ngemva kwakhe.” 
Exodus29:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Nakhu ozakwenza kibo nawubahlukaniselako kobana babe baphristi bami: Thatha ikunzana eyodwa namaqama amabili amsulwa," 
Exodus29:2 izikwa ezindulungu, izikwa ezimasongo ezidutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva neemphaphatha ezitjhatjhwe ngamafutha we-oliva. Izikwezo zingabi nengumelo begodu zenziwe ngeflowuru esefiweko." 
Exodus29:3 Zifake ngesiqwebini sinye uzilethe bese utjhideza ikunzana namaqama amabili. 
Exodus29:4 “Utjhideze u-Aroni namadodanakhe emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela bese ubahlambulula ngamanzi. 
Exodus29:5 Thatha izambatho, wembese u-Aroni iphuraphura kanye nejasi ekhambisana ne-efodi, i-efodi neporiyana yomphristi bese umbopha ngebhande le-efodi." 
Exodus29:6 Umthwese ingwani bese ubeka isihlohlo esahlukaniselweko phezu kwengwani. 
Exodus29:7 Thatha amafutha wokuzesa umthele ehloko bese uyamzesa. 
Exodus29:8 “Utjhideze amadodanakhe, uwembathise iimphuraphura," 
Exodus29:9 bese uwabopha ngemikhungo yokuthekeleza emadinini njengombana wenze ku-Aroni, uwathwese imibhode. Ubuphristi buzakuba ngebabo ngokwesimiso sanini nanini. “Uzajamisa u-Aroni namadodanakhe ngalendlela:" 
Exodus29:10 Letha ikunzana ngaphambi kwetende lokuhlanganela. U-Aroni namadodanakhe bazakubeka izandla zabo phezu kwehloko yekunzana. 
Exodus29:11 Uhlabe ikunzana leyo phambi kwakaSomnini emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela 
Exodus29:12 bese uthatha ingcenye yeengazi zekunzana uzininde phezu kweempundu ezisemajikeni we-aldari ngomunwakho. Iingazi eziseleko uzithululele emanzinzweni we-aldari. 
Exodus29:13 Uthathe woke umhlwehlwe weenredlo, ipundu yesibindi, iziso zombili nomhlwehlwe wakhona ukutjhisele e-aldarini." 
Exodus29:14 Kodwana inyama yekunzana, isikhumba kanye nomswani wakhona ukutjhise ngaphandle kwekampa. Lokho kumhlabelo wehlambululo." 
Exodus29:15 “Uthathe elinye lamaqama bese u-Aroni namadodanakhe babeka izandla zabo phezu kwehlokwalo," 
Exodus29:16 ulihlabe. Uthathe iingazi zalo uzifafaze magegana ne-aldari. 
Exodus29:17 Uhlahlele iqamelo, uhlanze iinredlo neenqatha zalo bese ubeka izitho nehloko yakhona ndawonye." 
Exodus29:18 Utjhise loke iqamelo e-aldarini, libe mhlabelo wokutjhiswa kuSomnini. Lokho kumnikelo owamukelekako kuSomnini." 
Exodus29:19 “Uthathe iqama elinye; u-Aroni namadodanakhe babeke izandla zabo phezu kwehlokwalo. 
Exodus29:20 Ulihlabe bese uthatha ingcenye yeengazi zalo uzininde endlebeni yangesidleni ka-Aroni neendlebeni zangesidleni zamadodanakhe, phezu kwabothubha babo bangesidleni naphezu kwabothubhakghuru babo bangesidleni. Ufafaze iingazi eziseleko e-aldarini magegana nalo." 
Exodus29:21 Uthathe ingcenye yeengazi ezise-aldarini nengcenye yamafutha wokuzesa bese ukufafaze phezu kwaka-Aroni nezambatho zakhe naphezu kwamadodanakhe nezambatho zawo. Yena nezambatho zakhe uzakuba ngocwengileko kanye namadodanakhe nezambatho zawo. 
Exodus29:22 “Leli liqama abazakujanyiswa ngalo, yeke thatha amafuthalo okutjho amanoni womsila nomhlwehlwe weenredlo, ipundu yesibindi, iziso zombili nomhlwehlwe wakhona kanye nomlenze wangesidleni." 
Exodus29:23 Godu uthathe sinye isikwa esindulungu, esimasongo esidutjwe ngamafutha nesiphaphatha ngesiqwebini sesikwa esinganangumelo esiphambi kwakaSomnini." 
Exodus29:24 Koke lokhu ukubeke ezandleni zaka-Aroni nezamadodanakhe ukuze kuphakanyiswe njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini. 
Exodus29:25 Uthathe lokho ezandleni zabo, ukutjhise e-aldarini ngaphezu komhlabelo wokutjhiswa kube mnikelo owamukelekako kuSomnini." 
Exodus29:26 “Uthathe isifuba seqama okujanyiswe ngalo u-Aroni, usiphakamise njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini. Lokho kusisabelo sakho." 
Exodus29:27 “Ngebanga lokobana isifuba nomlenze weqama kwaphakanyiswa njengomnikelo osibiko nakujanyiswa u-Aroni namadodanakhe, lokho kufuze kutjhejwe ngokukhethekileko ngomuso:" 
Exodus29:28 Kusisabelo saka-Aroni namadodanakhe. Iye, izithwezi zazimnikelo okhethekileko lokha nakujanyiswa abaphristi, nangokuzako kumele zibe ngezikhethekileko. Lokha ama-Israyeli nenza imihlabelo yetjhebiswano kumele aphakamisele izithwezo kuSomnini bese zinikelwa abaphristi. Lokhu kusimiso sanini nanini ama-Israyeli okumele asigcine." 
Exodus29:29 “Izambatho ezikhethekileko zaka-Aroni zizakwambulelwa lowo ozakuba mphristi omkhulu eenzukulwaneni zakhe. Uzazembatha lokha nazeswako nalokha najanyiswako. 
Exodus29:30 Indodana ezakuba mphristi esikhundleni sakhe izazembatha emalangeni alikhomba wokujanyiswa kwayo etendeni lokuhlanganela. Godu izembathe njalo nayingena endaweni ecwengileko bonyana izokulotjha. 
Exodus29:31 “Uthathe inyama yeqama okujanyiswe ngalo abaphristi uyiphekele endaweni ecwengileko. 
Exodus29:32 U-Aroni namadodanakhe bazagoma inyama yeqama leyo nesikwa esingesiqwebini emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. 
Exodus29:33 Abazagoma ukudlokho ngilabo kwaphela abazibandakanye ekambisweni yetethelelo ukuze bajanyiswe ngokuhlukaniselwa uSomnini. Ongaphandle akukameli agome ngombana kukhethekile. 
Exodus29:34 Nakube kunamasalela wenyama yokujanyiswa namkha wesikwa asele bekwaba sekuseni, uwatjhise. Angeze agonywa ngombana akhethekile." 
Exodus29:35 “Koke engikuyale ngakho ngo-Aroni namadodanakhe kumele kubuyelelwe amalanga abe likhomba: Bajamise 
Exodus29:36 bewulungise ngamalanga ikunzana yomhlabelo wehlambululo kube yitethelelwabo. Lokha nawenzela i-aldari ihlambululo, lihlambulule begodu ulizese ukuze lihlukaniselwe uSomnini." 
Exodus29:37 Buyelela ikambiso yehlambululo ye-aldari amalanga alikhomba bese uyalihlukanisela. I-aldari lizakuba ngelicwenge khulu; nanyana yini ethinta i-aldarelo izakucwenga.” 
Exodus29:38 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Nakhu okuzakwenziwa phezu kwe-aldari: Kuzakuhlatjwa iimvana ezimbili ezinomnyaka munye, imihla yoke ngokungapheliko." 
Exodus29:39 Imvana eyodwa unikele ngayo ekuseni bese kuthi enye unikele ngayo ngamarhwaqela. 
Exodus29:40 Imvana yokuthoma ayikhambisane nethungana leflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngelitha nesiquntu samafutha we-oliva, nelitha nesiquntu sewayini yomnikelo wokuselwako." 
Exodus29:41 Enye imvana unikele ngayo ngamarhwaqela ikhambisane nomnikelo weenthoro newokuselwako njengombana wenza ekuseni ukuze kube mnikelo okhethekileko owamukelekako kuSomnini. 
Exodus29:42 Kuzakuba mhlabelo wokutjhiswa owenziwa njalo eenzukulwaneni zenu emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela phambi kwakaSomnini. “Ngizakuhlangana nabaphristi lapho bengikhulume nawe. 
Exodus29:43 Godu ngizakuhlangana nama-Israyeli lapho. Indawo leyo izakucwengiswa yiphazimulwami. 
Exodus29:44 Ngizakwahlukanisela itende lokuhlanganela kanye ne-aldari; u-Aroni namadodanakhe nabo ngizabahlukanisela kobana babe baphristi bami. 
Exodus29:45 Ngizakuhlala hlangana nama-Israyeli, ngibe nguZimawo." 
Exodus29:46 Azakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini uZimawo. Ngawakhupha enarheni yeGibhide kobana ngihlale phakathi kwawo. Iye, nginguSomnini uZimawo.”" 
Exodus30:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Yenza i-aldari lokutjhisela itjhwalo ngomuthi womtholo. 
Exodus30:2 Alibe sikwere ngaphezulu okutjho isiquntu semitha ubude nesiquntu semitha ububanzi. Libe ngaphasi kwemitha ukuphakama, iimpundu zalo zilingane nalo." 
Exodus30:3 Ulinameke ngegolidembala ngaphezulu nemahlangothini walo kanye neempundu zalo. Umphethwalo uwenze ngegolide. 
Exodus30:4 Ulenzele amasongo wegolide abe ngaphasi komphetho walo. Kube masongo amabili ngehlangothini linye namabili ngehlangothini elifulatheleko. Azakuba ziimphatho zalo lapha kufakwa khona iingodo zokulithwala. 
Exodus30:5 Ulungise iingodo zomuthi womtholo bese uzinameka ngegolide. 
Exodus30:6 Beka i-aldarelo ngaphambi kwesiyaya sendawo ecwenge khulu, lapha kunomfaji wobufakazi khona. Ulibeke lapha ngizakuhlangana nawe khona okutjho ngaphambi kwesisibekelo somfaji esisibekela ubufakazi." 
Exodus30:7 U-Aroni uzakutjhisela kilo amakha wetjhwalo njalo ekuseni ngesikhathi sokucima iimbani abe azilungise. 
Exodus30:8 Godu awatjhise ngamarhwaqela lokha nakhanyisa iimbani. Umphristi omkhulu akatjhise amakha wetjhwalo imihla ngemihla phambi kwakaSomnini iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana. 
Exodus30:9 Ungenzeli kilo itjhwalo elingakacwengi, umhlabelo wokutjhiswa nomnikelo weenthoro. Ungalingi wenzele kilo umnikelo wokuselwako." 
Exodus30:10 U-Aroni uzakuninda iimpundu zalo ngeengazi zomhlabelo wehlambululo kanye ngomnyaka. Qobe mnyaka uzakwenza ngaleyondlela itethelelo kilo. I-aldarelo licwenge khulu kuSomnini.” 
Exodus30:11 USomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Exodus30:12 “Lokha nawubala ama-Israyeli bona utlolise amadoda wepi, omunye nomunye wawo uzakuhlawulela ipilwakhe kuSomnini. Enze njalo ukuze kungabi namatshwenyeko phakathi kwawo lokha natloliswako." 
Exodus30:13 Omunye nomunye otlolisweko uzakunikela ngalokhu: amagremu asithandathu wesiliva ukuya ngokwesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko kube mnikelo kaSomnini. 
Exodus30:14 Woke umuntu otlolisweko, ukusuka koneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu uzakunikela umnikelo kaSomnini." 
Exodus30:15 Lokha naninikela umnikelo kaSomnini ukuze nizenzele itethelelo, abanesabo banganikeli ngaphezu kwamagremu asithandathu nabadududu banganikeli ngaphasi kwamagremu asithandathu." 
Exodus30:16 Uthathe isiliva yomnikelo wetethelelo kuma-Israyeli ibe ngeyomsebenzi wetende lokuhlanganela. Isiliva leyo izakuba sikhumbuzo sama-Israyeli phambi kwakaSomnini kobana nizenzele itethelelo.” 
Exodus30:17 USomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Exodus30:18 “Godu yenza isitja sekoporo sibe nesinzinziso sekoporo kube ngesokuhlambela. Usibeke hlangana netende lokuhlanganela ne-aldari lomhlabelo. Uthele amanzi ngaphakathi kwaso 
Exodus30:19 ukuze u-Aroni namadodanakhe bahlambele khona izandla neenyawo zabo lapho. 
Exodus30:20 Abahlambe lokha nabaya ngetendeni lokuhlanganela, namkha nabatjhidela e-aldarini kobana balotjhe nalokha nabatjhisela uSomnini umnikelo. Nakungasinjalo bazakufa." 
Exodus30:21 Abahlambe izandla neenyawo zabo, nakungasinjalo bazakufa. Lokhu kuzakuba simiso sanini nanini kibo ngitjho nakuye kube ziinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana.”" 
Exodus30:22 USomnini godu wathi kuMosi: 
Exodus30:23 “Zithathele iinthako eziphambili zalokhu: amakhilogremu asithandathu wemire emagiqana, isinamoni nomgaba okuzizinto ezinuka kamnandi, zibe makhilogremu amathathu ngayinye," 
Exodus30:24 amakhilogremu asithandathu wegcolo lomuthi wekhasiya ukuya ngokwesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko kanye namalitha asithandathu nesiquntu wamafutha we-oliva. 
Exodus30:25 Uthathe koke lokhu wenze ngakho amafutha wokuzesa ahlukaniselweko kube mvango okhethekileko. Ulungise umvango lowo ube njengowomvangi weenhlahla. Uthathe amafutha wokuzesa ahlukaniselweko lawo," 
Exodus30:26 uzese ngawo itende lokuhlanganela, umfaji wobufakazi," 
Exodus30:27 itafula nezitja zakhona zoke, ilithi leembani nezitja zakhona, i-aldari letjhwalo," 
Exodus30:28 i-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa nazo zoke izitja zakhona kanye nesitja sokuhlambela nesinzinziso sakhona 
Exodus30:29 ukuze kube ngokucwengileko. Iye, kuzakuba ngokucwenge khulu kangangobana nanyana yini ekuthintako izakucwenga." 
Exodus30:30 “Uzese u-Aroni namadodanakhe, ubahlukanisele ukuze babe baphristi bami." 
Exodus30:31 Bese uthi kuma-Israyeli, ‘Lokhu kuzakuba mafutha akhethekileko wokuzesa kibo boke abaphristi bangomuso." 
Exodus30:32 Ningazesi nanyana ngubani, godu ningenzi amanye afana nawo ngeenthako. Amafutha la akhethekile, nakini akabe ngakhethekileko." 
Exodus30:33 Nanyana ngubani ozenzela wakhe afana nawo namkha azese ngawo nanyana ngubani ongakahlukaniselwa, uzakujutjwa ebantwini bekhabo.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 USomnini godu wathi kuMosi: “Zithathele iinthako ezilinganako zamakha alandelako: uburegu bomuthi webhalisamu, inovu enuka kamnandi ye-onikha neyegalibhanumu kanye noburegu obutsengileko bomuthi welebhona." 
Exodus30:35 Ngeenthakwezo wenze itjhwalo libe inga lenziwe muvangi weenhlahla. Ulinunge ngetswayi elihlanzekileko nelikhethekileko. 
Exodus30:36 Ukghadlhe ingcenye yazo zibe ziinquqwana bese uzibeka ngaphambi kobufakazi ngetendeni lokuhlanganela lapha ngizakuhlangana nawe khona. Itjhwalweli lizakuba ngelikhetheke khulu kini. 
Exodus30:37 Itjhwalo enizolenza ukuya ngeenthako zalo ningazenzeli nina. Ngakini lizakuba ngelikhethekileko kuSomnini. 
Exodus30:38 Nanyana ngubani owenza elifana nalo kobana alisebenzise njengamakha wakhe uzakujutjwa ebantwini bekhabo.” 
Exodus31:1 uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Exodus31:2 “Qala, ngikhethe uBhetsaleli umsa ka-Uri omsa kaRhuri wekoro yakwaJuda." 
Exodus31:3 Ngimzalise ngesiphiwo esikhethekileko bona abe nekghono nokuhlakanipha, ilwazi nobuno," 
Exodus31:4 kobana enze imitlamo yobukghwari, asebenze ngegolide, isiliva nekoporo," 
Exodus31:5 abaze amatje aligugu wokurubela, abaze iingodo okutjho namkha ngiliphi isino." 
Exodus31:6 Qala-ke, ngimbeke kanye no-Oholiyaba umsa ka-Arhisamaki, wekoro yakwaDani. Godu nginikele woke amadoda anekghono ukuhlakanipha kobana enze koke engikuyale ngakho:" 
Exodus31:7 itende lokuhlanganela, umfaji wokufaka ubufakazi, isisibekelo somfaji esiphezu kwawo nakho koke okukhambisana netende," 
Exodus31:8 itafula nezitja zalo, ilithi leembani legolidembala nazo zoke izitja zakhona, i-aldari letjhwalo," 
Exodus31:9 i-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa nazo zoke izitja zakhona, isitja sokuhlambela nesinzinziso saso," 
Exodus31:10 izambatho ezithungiweko nezikhethekileko zaka-Aroni umphristi omkhulu kanye nezambatho zamadodanakhe kobana babe baphristi," 
Exodus31:11 amafutha wokuzesa namakha wetjhwalo malungana nendawo ecwengileko. Lokho bakwenze ngendlela engikuyale ngayo.” 
Exodus31:12 USomnini godu wathi kuMosi: 
Exodus31:13 “Yithi kuma-Israyeli, ‘Gcinani amaSabatha wami ngombana lokhu kulitshwayo phakathi kwami nani ukudlulela eenzukulwaneni zenu ukuze nazi bonyana mina Somnini ngiyanihlukanisela." 
Exodus31:14 Nigcine iSabatha ngombana licwengile kini; nanyana ngubani olisilaphazako akabulawe. Iye, nanyana ngubani owenza umsebenzi mhlokho, akajutjwe ebantwini bekhabo." 
Exodus31:15 Umsebenzi awenziwe emalangeni asithandathu, kodwana ilanga lekhomba liliSabatha elihlukaniselweko nelicwengileko kuSomnini. Nanyana ngubani owenza umsebenzi ngeSabatha akabulawe." 
Exodus31:16 Ngalokho ama-Israyeli azakugidinga iSabatha, aligcine eenzukulwaneni zawo zoke kube sivumelwano sanini nanini." 
Exodus31:17 Kulitshwayo lanini nanini phakathi kwami nama-Israyeli kobana emalangeni asithandathu uSomnini wenza izulu nephasi kodwana waphumula ngelanga lekhomba, ngalokho waqabuleka.’ ”" 
Exodus31:18 Kwathi naqeda ukukhuluma noMosi entabeni yeSinayi wamnikela imiqebethu emibili yobufakazi, imiqebethu etlolwe ngomuno kaZimu." 
Exodus32:1 Kwathi lokha abantu nababona bonyana uMosi uyariyada ukubuya entabeni, babungelela u-Aroni bathi kuye: “Sikima usenzele isithombe sakaZimu ozasikhokhela ngombana nakhu uMosi okunguye owasikhupha enarheni yeGibhide asazi bonyana kwenzakeleni ngaye.”" 
Exodus32:2 U-Aroni wathi kibo: “Ncomulani amancina wegolide aseendlebeni zabomkenu, zamadodanenu nezamadodakazenu niwalethapha.”" 
Exodus32:3 Nje-ke boke abantu bancomula amancina wegolide eendlebeni zabo bawaletha ku-Aroni. 
Exodus32:4 Wathatha amancina wegolide lawo kibo wenza isithombe esibunjiweko wasibaza ngebhedlhela saba yikunzana. Abantu bathi: “Israyeli, nangu-ke uZimenu owanikhupha enarheni yeGibhide!”" 
Exodus32:5 Kwathi lokha u-Aroni nabona lokhu, wakha i-aldari phambi kwekunzana leyo bewenza isimemezelo wathi: “Kusasa kuzakuba mnyanya kaSomnini.”" 
Exodus32:6 Bavuka ekuseni, benza imihlabelo yokutjhiswa bebaletha nemihlabelo yetjhebiswano. Abantu bahlala phasi bagoma, basela iwayini, basikima, bathoma ukukhwatjhana." 
Exodus32:7 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: “Yehla ngombana nakhu abantu owabakhupha enarheni yeGibhide barhubutjhe isivumelwano! 
Exodus32:8 Baphambuke msinyana endleleni engabayala ngayo. Bazenzele ikunzana ebunjiweko bebayikhothamela, bazenzela imihlabelo kiyo bathi, ‘Israyeli, nangu-ke uZimenu owanikhupha enarheni yeGibhide!’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 USomnini godu wathi kuMosi: “Ngiyababona abantwaba bonyana baneentanyana! 
Exodus32:10 Nje-ke ngilisa ukuze ilaka lami livuthe bhe phezu kwabo belibaqothule. Wena ngizakwenza ube sisizwe esikhulu.” 
Exodus32:11 Kodwana uMosi wancancabeza kuSomnini uZimakhe wathi: “Maye Somnini, kuzakuba njani nasele ilaka lakaSomnini livutha phezu kwabantu bakhe abakhupha enarheni yeGibhide ngamandla amakhulu nangesandla sakhe esiqinileko na?" 
Exodus32:12 AmaGibhide azakuthi, ‘Iye, uZimabo wabakhuphela zonezi eGibhide bonyana abehlisele ihlekelele abe abarhayilele eentabeni abaqede nya ebusweni bomhlaba.’ Bengithi uSomnini akaphenduke elakeni lakhe elivuthako, azisole ngokuhlosa ubumbi ebantwini bakhe." 
Exodus32:13 USomnini akakhumbule u-Abrahamu, u-Isaka no-Israyeli iinceku zakhe afunga kizo ngebizo lakhe wathi, ‘Ngizakwandisa iinzukulwana zenu zibe njengeenkwekwezi zomkayi, nginikele iinzukulwana zenu yoke inarha enginithembise yona le kobana ibe lilifa lazo isiphelani.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Ngambala uSomnini wazisola ngobumbi egade ithi izobehlisela phezu kwabantu bakhe. 
Exodus32:15 UMosi waphenduka, wehla entabeni aphethe imiqebethu emibili yobufakazi. Imiqebethu leyo beyitlolwe ngapha nangapha." 
Exodus32:16 Imiqebethu leyo beyenziwe nguZimu begodu itlolwe nguye ngesandla sakhe. Gade itlolwe ngokugobhodlhwa. 
Exodus32:17 Kwathi lokha uJotjhuwa nezwa itjhada labantu nabalokhu barhuwelela, wathi kuMosi: “Baba-ke! Kunetjhada lepi ekampeni!”" 
Exodus32:18 Kodwana uMosi wathi: “Awa, engilizwakweli akusilo itjhada lokuthabela ukuhlula namkha lokulilela ukuhlulwa. Litjhada lokudumisa leli.”" 
Exodus32:19 Kwathi bona atjhidele eduze nekampa wabona ikunzana nabantu babetha isikhalanga, uMosi wavutha ngelaka. Waphosa imiqebethu phasi wayephula emsukeni wentaba." 
Exodus32:20 Wathatha ikunzana leyo wayiphosa emlilweni. Wayitshidlha yaba yiputjhana, wayirhatjha emanzini bewaseza ama-Israyeli amanzi lawo ngekani." 
Exodus32:21 UMosi wathi ku-Aroni: “Bakwenzeni abantwaba kobana ungabeze ubehlisele isonokazi esingaka na?” 
Exodus32:22 U-Aroni wathi: “Umphathami akangavuthi ngelaka. Angitjho umphathami uyabazi abantu bonyana bonakele kangangani. 
Exodus32:23 Ngibo abathe kimi, ‘Senzela uZimu ozasikhokhela ngombana nakhu uMosi loyo owasikhupha eGibhide unyamalele; asazi bonyana kwenzakeleni ngaye.’" 
Exodus32:24 Mina ngathi kibo, ‘Woke onegolide akalikhuphe.’ Mbala banginikela-ke. Ngaliphosela emlilweni kwase kuphuma ikunzana leyo.”" 
Exodus32:25 UMosi wabona bonyana abantu abasalawuleki ngombana u-Aroni wahluleka ukubalawula. Ngokwenza lokho abantu bazirhubutjha phambi kwabajamelani babo. 
Exodus32:26 Nje-ke uMosi wajama esangweni lekampa wathi: “Boke abangehlangothini lakaSomnini abeze kimapha.” Woke amadodana kaLevi abuthanela kuye. 
Exodus32:27 Wathi kiwo: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ‘Omunye nomunye wenu akahlome ngesabulakhe, athome emasangweni wekampa abulale nanyana ngubani, kungaba ngumfowabo, umnganakhe nanyana umakhelwanakhe.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Amadodana kaLevi aphetha ilizwi lakaMosi; mhlokho kwafa abantu abangaba ziinkulungwana ezintathu. 
Exodus32:29 UMosi wathi: “Namhlanje nizahlukanisele ngokwenu kobana nibe baphristi bakaSomnini ngombana omunye nomunye wenu ujike wajamelana ngitjho nomndenakhe. Ngalokho nizifumanele isibusiso.” 
Exodus32:30 Ngakusasa ekuseni uMosi wathi ebantwini: “Nenze isono esikhulu. Nje-ke ngizakhuphukela kuSomnini, mhlambe nginganenzela itethelelo ngesonokazi senwesi.”" 
Exodus32:31 Nje-ke uMosi wabuyela kuSomnini wathi: “Awu Kosami! Abantwaba benze isono esikhulu ngokwenza usingazimu wegolide. 
Exodus32:32 Nokho bengithi uSomnini akalibalele isono sabesi. Nakube kuyabhala, ngiyarabhela, uSomnini akangisule encwadinakhe ayitlolileko.”" 
Exodus32:33 Kodwana uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Awa, ngizakusula kwaphela loyo owonileko kimi encwadinami." 
Exodus32:34 Gadesi-ke khamba uyokhokhela abantu ubase endaweni engikutjele ngayo. Qala, ingilozami izakhamba phambi kwakho. Kuzakuba nesikhathi lapha ngizabahlunguphaza khona ngezono zabo.”" 
Exodus32:35 USomnini wehlisela abantu amatshwenyeko ngebanga lokobana benza ikunzana leyo eyabazwa ngu-Aroni. 
Exodus33:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Thutha lapha wena nabantu owabakhupha enarheni yeGibhide uye enarheni engayifungela ku-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo ngathi ngizayinikela iinzukulwana zabo." 
Exodus33:2 Ngizathumela ingilozi phambi kwakho, ngiqotjhe amaKanana, ama-Amori, amaRhithi, amaPerizi, amaRhivi namaJebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Khuphuka uye enarheni egeleza ibisi neliju, kodwana angizukhamba nani ngombana ngizabe nginiqothule endleleni ngebanga lokobana nineentanyana.”" 
Exodus33:4 Kuthe lokha abantu nabezwa iindaba ezibuhlungwezi, balila. Akakho owaziphotjhongako mhlokho." 
Exodus33:5 Abantu benza njalo ngombana uSomnini bekathe kuMosi: “Tjela ama-Israyeli bona ababantu abaneentanyana. Nange kungenzeka ngikhambe phakathi kwawo, ngingabona sele ngiwaqothule wokanyana nje. Nje-ke akakhuphe imikghabiswawo leyo ngibone kuhle bona ngizokwenzani ngawo.”" 
Exodus33:6 Yeke ama-Israyeli ahlubula imikghabiswawo ukusukela mhla asuka entabeni yeHorebe. 
Exodus33:7 UMosi wathatha itende walihloma ngaphandle kwekampa kudanyana nayo, walibiza bonyana litende lokuhlanganela. Bekuthi nanyana ngubani ofuna uSomnini eze ngetendeni lokuhlanganelelo elingaphandle kwekampa." 
Exodus33:8 Bekuthi njalo lokha uMosi naya etendeni, boke abantu basikime. Woke umuntu ajame emnyango wetende lakhe bese uqala uMosi abe ayongena ngetendenelo." 
Exodus33:9 Lokha uMosi nangena ngetendenelo, bekwehla isika yelifu ijame emnyango wetende bese uSomnini ukhuluma noMosi." 
Exodus33:10 Abantu nababona isika yelifelo ijame emnyango wetende, omunye nomunye wabo gade azilungiselela asemnyango wetende lakhe kobana ahlome ihloko phasi." 
Exodus33:11 USomnini bekakhuluma noMosi ngokwakhe njengomuntu nacoca nomnganakhe. Lokha uMosi nabuyela ekampeni, incekwakhe uJotjhuwa isokana elimsa kaNuni azange iphume ngetendeni." 
Exodus33:12 UMosi wathi kuSomnini: “Iye, uSomnini bekanande athi kimi, ‘Khupha abantwaba’, kodwana uSomnini azange asangitjela bonyana ngubani azomthuma nami. Angithi nguSomnini ngokwakhe owathi kimi, ‘Ngikukhethile begodu ufumene umusa emehlwenami.’" 
Exodus33:13 Nje-ke ngiyabawa, nakube ngifumene umusa emehlweni kaSomnini, uSomnini akangikhombise iindlela zakhe, ngalokho ngizamazi bengiqiniseke bonyana uSomnini unami. USomnini akhumbule godu bonyana isizwesi ngesakhe.”" 
Exodus33:14 USomnini wathi kuye: “Ufuna ubukhona bami bukhambe nawe ukuze unethezeke na?” 
Exodus33:15 UMosi waphendula wathi: “Iye, nakube uSomnini akakhambi nathi, khona angeze sakwazi ukutjhida lapha." 
Exodus33:16 Kuzakwazeka njani bonyana ngifumene umusa emehlweni kaSomnini, mina nesizwe sakhesi? Angithi kuzakubonakala lokha uSomnini nakhamba nathi bonyana mina nabantu bakhe sikhethekile kibo boke abantu ephasini.”" 
Exodus33:17 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Ngizakwenza lokho okukhulumileko ngombana ufumene umusa emehlwenami begodu ngikukhethile.” 
Exodus33:18 UMosi wathi kuSomnini: “Ngiyabawa, Somnini akhese ungikhombise iphazimulwakho.”" 
Exodus33:19 USomnini wathi: “Ngizakwenza bona boke ubuhle bami budlule phambi kwakho bese ngibize ibizo elithi ‘Somnini’. Iye, ngizakuba nomusa kengifuna ukuba nomusa kuye, ngikhombise isirhawu kengithanda ukumkhombisa." 
Exodus33:20 Kodwana awukwazi ukubona ubuso bami ngombana akunamuntu ongangibona aphile.” 
Exodus33:21 Godu uSomnini wathi: “Qala, kunendawo eduze nami phezu kwedwala lapha ungajama khona." 
Exodus33:22 Kuzakuthi lokha iphazimulwami nayidlulako ngikufake hlangana nompharu wedwala ngikusithe ngesandla sami bengidlule. 
Exodus33:23 Ngizabese ngisusa isandla sami, ubone umhlana wami; kodwana nakububuso bami bona abubonwa.”" 
Exodus34:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Baza imiqebethu emibili njengeyokuthoma. Ngizotlola kiyo amagama agade akeyokuthoma owayephulako. 
Exodus34:2 Qinisekisa bonyana kusasa ekuseni ulungela ukwenyukela kimi entabeni yeSinayi, ungilinde esiqongolweni sentaba." 
Exodus34:3 Kungabi nomuntu oza nawe godu kungabonakali muntu kiyo yoke intaba. Ungavumeli bonyana kutjhidele izimvu, iimbuzi neenkomo entabenapha.”" 
Exodus34:4 Yeke uMosi wabaza imiqebethu emibili njengeyekuthomeni. Wavuka ekuseni wakhuphukela entabeni yeSinayi aphethe imiqebethu emibili njengombana uSomnini bekamyalile. 
Exodus34:5 USomnini wehla ngelifu lapha uMosi agade alinde khona. Kwathi asathandaza," 
Exodus34:6 uSomnini wadlula ngaphambi kwakhe wamemezela wathi: “USomnini, uSomnini unguZimu onomusa nesirhawu, ubuthaka ekusilingekeni, uzele ukwethembeka neqiniso!" 
Exodus34:7 Uhlala athembekile eenkulungwaneni ngeenkulungwana zeenzukulwana, ulibalela imilandu, imitjhapho nezono, kodwana akazumlisa onomlandu. Wehlisela isibetho sezono zaboyise phezu kwabantwababo besizukulwana sesithathu nesesine.”" 
Exodus34:8 Msinyana uMosi waguqa, wahloma ihloko phasi," 
Exodus34:9 wathi kuSomnini: “Nakube gadesi ngifumene umusa emehlweni kaSomandla, bengithi angibawe bona uSomandla akhambe phakathi kwethu nanyana sineentanyana nje. USomnini akalibalele imilandu nezono zethu, asithathe njengelifa lakhe.”" 
Exodus34:10 USomnini wathi kuye: “Qala, ngizimisele ukuvuselela isivumelwano. Phambi kwabo boke abantu bakho ngizakwenza iimangaliso ezingazange khezibonwe kilo loke iphasi namkha ezizweni zoke. Boke abantu ophakathi kwabo bazakubona umsebenzi kaSomnini. Iye, ngizakwenza okwesabekako ngawe." 
Exodus34:11 “Gcinani imiyalo enginiyala ngayo namhlanjesi. Qala, ngizaqotjha ama-Amori, amaKanana, amaRhithi, amaPerizi, amaRhivi namaJebusi phambi kwenu." 
Exodus34:12 Tjhejani ningenzi isivumelwano nabahlali benarha eniya kiyo ngombana lokho kuzakuba sisifu phakathi kwenu. 
Exodus34:13 Nibhuruze ama-aldarabo, niphadlhe amatjabo wesikhumbuzo benigawule imifanekiswabo yabo-Atjhera." 
Exodus34:14 Ningakhothameli usingazimu ngombana nginguZimu ongahlanganiswako, ngikho ngaziwa bonyana nginguSomnini onesikhwele nje." 
Exodus34:15 Ningenzi isivumelwano nabahlali benarha le ngombana bazakuthi lokha nabadlhemadlhema ngemva kwabosingazimu babo babahlabele bese bayanimema bona nigome imihlabelwabo. 
Exodus34:16 Ningathathelani nabo ngombana abantwababo nabadlhemadlhema ngemva kwabosingazimu babo bazakuyenga abantwabenu bona nabo bagijime nabosingazimu. 
Exodus34:17 “Ningazenzeli abosingazimu ababaziweko. 
Exodus34:18 “Yenzani umnyanya wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo njengombana nginiyalile. Nizagoma isikwa esinganangumelo amalanga alikhomba ngesikhathi esibekiweko ngenyanga ka-Abibi ngombana leyo yinyanga enaphuma ngayo eGibhide. 
Exodus34:19 Koke okuduna okuphume qangi esibelethweni kungokwami, kungaba ngokweenkomo namkha kwezimvu neembuzi." 
Exodus34:20 Elinye nelinye izibulo lakadumbana nilihlenge ngemvana namkha ngembuzana, nakungasinjalo nilephule intamo. Woke amazibulo wabantu hlangana namadodanenu niwahlenge. Kungabi nomuntu ozakuvela phambi kwami amkhonoze." 
Exodus34:21 “Nisebenze amalanga asithandathu bese kelekhomba niphumule. Nanyana kungaba sikhathi sokulima namkha sokuvuna niphumule. 
Exodus34:22 Nenze umnyanya weemVeke lokha nanivuna ikoroyi yokuthoma. Godu nenze umnyanya wokuButhelela ekupheleni komnyaka. 
Exodus34:23 Boke abaduna benu bazakuvela kathathu ngomnyaka phambi kwakaSomandla uSomnini onguZimu ka-Israyeli. 
Exodus34:24 Njengombana ngizokuqotjha izizwe phambi kwenu bese ngikhulise imikhawulwenu nje, akunamuntu ozarhalela inarhenu lokha naniyokuvela kathathu ngomnyaka phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu." 
Exodus34:25 “Kungabi nesibiliso lapha nenzela khona umhlabelo. “Umhlabelo womnyanya wePhasika ungahlali bekuse. 
Exodus34:26 “Lethani njalo imikhiqizo yokuthoma yehlabathenu endaweni ecwengileko kaSomnini uZimenu. “Ningapheki imbuzana ngebisi lakanina.” 
Exodus34:27 Godu uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Tlola naka amezwi ngombana ukuya ngamezwi la, ngenze isivumelwano nawe no-Israyeli.”" 
Exodus34:28 UMosi wahlala lapho noSomnini amalanga amatjhumi amane nobusuku bakhona. Azange agome isikwa namkha asele amanzi. USomnini watlola amezwi wesivumelwano phezu kwemiqebethu. Lokho bekumiyalo elitjhumi. 
Exodus34:29 UMosi nehla entabeni yeSinayi nemiqebethu emibili yobufakazi, gade angakatjheji bonyana ubuso bakhe buyaphazimula ngebanga lokukhuluma kwakhe noZimu." 
Exodus34:30 Kwathi lokha u-Aroni nabantu boke bakwa-Israyeli nababona bonyana ubuso bakaMosi buyaphazimula, besaba ukutjhidela kuye." 
Exodus34:31 Kodwana uMosi wababiza. U-Aroni nabo boke abaphathi bomkhambathi beza kuye, wakhuluma nabo." 
Exodus34:32 Ngemva kwalapho woke ama-Israyeli atjhidela, wawanikela yoke imiyalo uSomnini amnikele yona entabeni yeSinayi." 
Exodus34:33 Kuthe bona uMosi aqede ukukhuluma nabo wazigubuzesa ngesiyaya. 
Exodus34:34 Bekuthi njalo lokha uMosi nayokhuluma noSomnini agubulule isiyaya kufikela lapha aphuma khona ngetendeni. Naphuma lapho gade atjela ama-Israyeli lokho uSomnini amyale ngakho," 
Exodus34:35 ama-Israyeli aphele abona bonyana ubuso bakaMosi buyaphazimula. Yeke uMosi gade azigubuzesa ngesiyaya godu kufikela lapha ayokhuluma khona noSomnini. 
Exodus35:1 UMosi wabizela ndawonye woke umkhambathi wama-Israyeli wathi kiwo: “Nanzi izinto uSomnini aniyale bonyana nizenze: 
Exodus35:2 Umsebenzi awenziwe emalangeni asithandathu, kodwana ilanga lekhomba liliSabatha elihlukaniselweko nelicwengileko kuSomnini. Nanyana ngubani owenza umsebenzi mhlokho akabulawe." 
Exodus35:3 Ningaphembi umlilo kiyo yoke imizenu ngelanga leSabatha.” 
Exodus35:4 UMosi wathi kiwo woke umkhambathi wama-Israyeli: “Naku umyalo uSomnini awukhuphileko," 
Exodus35:5 ‘Thathani phakathi kwenu umnikelo niwuse kuSomnini, nanyana ngubani onehliziyo evumako, akalethe umnikelo kaSomnini kube ligolide, isiliva nekoporo," 
Exodus35:6 iwulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede, ilineni emhlophe kanye noboya beembuzi," 
Exodus35:7 iinkhumba zamaqama ezifakwe umbala obovu, iinkhumba ezitjhukiweko bezazeswa ngamafutha, iingodo zomtholo," 
Exodus35:8 amafutha weembani, iinungo zamafutha wokuzesa kanye namakha wetjhwalo," 
Exodus35:9 amatje we-oniksi namatje wokukghabisa i-efodi neporiyana yomphristi.’ 
Exodus35:10 “Woke umuntu onekghono phakathi kwenu akeze azokwenza koke uSomnini ayale ngakho: 
Exodus35:11 ithaberinakeli, itende lalo nesigubuzeso salo, iinqobotjhelo namahlaka walo, iinqabo zalo, iinsika zalo namanzinziswalo," 
Exodus35:12 umfaji wesivumelwano neengodo zakhona, isisibekelo somfaji, kanye nesiyaya esilitjhila lomnyango," 
Exodus35:13 itafula neengodo zakhona kanye nazo zoke izitja zakhona nezikwa ezibekwa phambi kwakaZimu," 
Exodus35:14 ilithi leembani lokukhanyisa kanye nezitja neembani zakhona, amafutha weembani," 
Exodus35:15 i-aldari letjhwalo neengodo zakhona, amafutha wokuzesa namakha wetjhwalo, itjhila lomnyango okumnyango wethaberinakeli," 
Exodus35:16 i-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa, nomsefo walo wekoporo, iingodo zakhona, izitja zakhona, isitja sokuhlambela nesinzinziso sakhona," 
Exodus35:17 imilembelembe yesirhodlo, iinsika zakhona kanye namanzinziso wakhona, itjhila lokuvala isango lesirhodlo," 
Exodus35:18 iinkhonkhwani zethaberinakeli nezesirhodlo neentambo zakhona," 
Exodus35:19 izambatho ezithungiweko zokulotjha endaweni ecwengileko, izambatho ezikhethekileko zaka-Aroni umphristi omkhulu nezambatho zamadodanakhe kobana babe baphristi.”" 
Exodus35:20 Yeke umkhambathi wama-Israyeli wasuka phambi kwakaMosi. 
Exodus35:21 Ngambala beza, omunye nomunye agugwa yihliziyo begodu nommoyakhe uvuma waletha umnikelo kaSomnini kobana usetjenziswe etendeni lokuhlanganela nemisebenzinalo yoke kanye nezambathweni ezikhethekileko." 
Exodus35:22 Ngaleyondlela beza-ke kwaba madoda nabafazi. Boke ebegade banehliziyo evumako baletha iinqobotjhelo, amancina wepumulo, iindzilamnwana zokutlikitla, abonongoro nayo yoke imihlobo yezinto zegolide; kwaba ngiloyo naloyo wanikela umnikelo wegolide kuSomnini." 
Exodus35:23 Woke umuntu waletha lokho anakho kwaba yiwulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede, ilineni emhlophe, uboya beembuzi, iinkhumba zamaqama ezifakwe umbala obomvu neenkhumba ezitjhukiweko bezazeswa ngamafutha." 
Exodus35:24 Nogade akghona ukunikela ngesiliva nangekoporo wenza njalo. Abaneengodo zomtholo ebezingasetjenziselwa umsebenzi lo nabo baziletha emnikelweni kaSomnini. 
Exodus35:25 Boke abafazi ebegade banekghono lokuphotha, baletha emnikelweni abakuphothileko okutjho iwulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede kanye nemicu yelineni emhlophe." 
Exodus35:26 Labo-ke bekubafazi abanekghono nebebagugwa ziinhliziyo kobana baphothe uboya beembuzi. 
Exodus35:27 Abarholi baletha amatje we-oniksi namatje wokukghabisa i-efodi neporiyana yomphristi," 
Exodus35:28 iinungo, amafutha weembani newokuzesa kanye namakha wetjhwalo." 
Exodus35:29 Woke amadoda nabafazi okutjho abantu bakwa-Israyeli abagugwa ziinhliziyo kobana balethe nanyana yini emsebenzini kaSomnini ayala ngoMosi bonyana wenziwe, bakuletha lokho njengomnikelo wesihle kuSomnini." 
Exodus35:30 UMosi wathi ebantwini bakwa-Israyeli: “USomnini ukhethe uBhetsaleli umsa ka-Uri omsa kaRhuri wekoro yakwaJuda," 
Exodus35:31 yamzalisa ngesiphiwo esikhethekileko bona abe nekghono nokuhlakanipha, ilwazi nobuno" 
Exodus35:32 kobana enze imitlamo yobukghwari, asebenze ngegolide, isiliva kanye nekoporo," 
Exodus35:33 abaze amatje aligugu wokurubela, abaze neengodo okutjho nanyana ngiliphi isino." 
Exodus35:34 USomnini wamhlohlozela bona afundise abanye abantu, yena no-Oholiyaba umsa ka-Arhisamaki wekoro yakwaDani." 
Exodus35:35 Yabazalisa ngekghono lokwenza woke umsebenzi owenziwa bososino, nabatlami, umsebenzi wokuthunga ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende etlerebede nemicu yelineni emhlophe newokuluka. Bebakwazi ukwenza nanyana ngiliphi isino nemitlamo yobukghwari.”" 
Exodus36:1 UMosi waraga wathi: “UBhetsaleli no-Oholiyaba nabo boke abantu abanekghono uSomnini abaphe ubukghoni nobuhlakani bokwazi ukwenza nanyana ngimuphi umsebenzi ekwakhiweni kwendawo ecwengileko, bazasebenza ukuya ngakho koke uSomnini akuyalileko.”" 
Exodus36:2 Yeke uMosi wabiza uBhetsaleli no-Oholiyaba nabo boke abantu abanekghono, loyo naloyo uSomnini amuphe ubuhlakani okutjho boke abagugwa ziinhliziyo bonyana beze bazokusebenza." 
Exodus36:3 Bathatha kuMosi woke umnikelo wesihle owalethwa ma-Israyeli malungana nomsebenzi wendawo ecwengileko. Abantu baragela phambili ngokuletha iminikelo yesihle kuMosi qobe kusekuseni 
Exodus36:4 bekwathi labo abanekghono ebegade basebenza umsebenzi wendawo ecwengileko omunye nomunye wabo walisa ukusebenza weza kuMosi 
Exodus36:5 wathi kuye: “Abantu baletha okunengi ngokudluleleko kilokho okudingeka ekwenzeni umsebenzi uSomnini asiyale bona siwenze.” 
Exodus36:6 UMosi wayala bonyana kumemezelwe kiyo yoke ikampa bona kungasalethwa umnikelo wesihle malungana nendawo ecwengileko. Yeke abantu bakhawula ukuletha iminikelo. 
Exodus36:7 Ipahla ebeyikhona besele yanele beyeqa kokudingeka ekwenzeni woke umsebenzi. 
Exodus36:8 Boke abantu abanobukghoni ebebasebenza ekwakheni ithaberinakeli benza amatjhila alitjhumi welineni emhlophe. Bathungelela nemifanekiso yamakerubhi ngobukghoni ematjhilenapho ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus36:9 Ubude betjhila ngalinye gade bumamitha alitjhumi nambili nesiquntu, lingaphasana kwamamitha amabili ububanzi. Woke amatjhila lawo gade alingana." 
Exodus36:10 Amatjhila ahlanganiswa ndawonye ngamahlanu. 
Exodus36:11 Benza iinrhobelo ezihlaza komkayi emphethweni welinye letjhila elihlanganisiweko elingeqadi. Benza soneso nakelinye itjhila elihlanganisiweko. 
Exodus36:12 Kwaba neenrhobelo ezimatjhumi amahlanu etjhileni lokuthoma elihlanganisiweko nezinye ezimatjhumi amahlanu emphethweni wetjhila lesibili elihlanganisiweko. Iinrhobelwezo gade ziqalene. 
Exodus36:13 Benza iinqobotjhelo ezimatjhumi amahlanu zegolide bese baqobotjhela amatjhila elinye kelinye ngazo ukuze ithaberinakeli lihlangane libe linye. 
Exodus36:14 Godu benza amatjhila ngoboya beembuzi kobana kwenziwe itende phezu kwethaberinakeli; kwaba matjhila alitjhumi nanye. 
Exodus36:15 Ubude betjhila ngalinye gade bumamitha alitjhumi nantathu nesiquntu bese ububanzi bungaphasana kwamamitha amabili. Wolitjhumi nanye amatjhila lawo gade alingana. 
Exodus36:16 Bahlanganisa amatjhila amahlanu ndawonye nasithandathu ndawonye. 
Exodus36:17 Benza iinrhobelo emphethweni welinye letjhila elihlanganisiweko elingeqadi. Kwaba njalo nakelinye itjhila elihlanganisiweko. 
Exodus36:18 Benza iinqobotjhelo ezimatjhumi amahlanu zekoporo kobana kuqobotjhelwe ngazo itende ukuze lihlangane libe linye. 
Exodus36:19 Benzela itende isigubuzeso ngeenkhumba zamaqama ezifakwe umbala obovu begodu benza isigubuzeso esinye ngaphezu kwaso ngeenkhumba ezitjhukiweko bezazeswa ngamafutha. 
Exodus36:20 Godu benzela ithaberinakeli amahlaka ajamileko ngeengodo zomtholo. 
Exodus36:21 Ihlaka ngalinye gade linobude obumamitha amane nesiquntu, lisiquntu nesiqunjwana semitha ububanzi." 
Exodus36:22 Iingodo ezimbili ezihlanganiswe bona zenze ihlaka bekufuze zibe neentlobo ezimbili ngaphasi. Woke amahlaka wethaberinakeli bawenza ngaleyondlela. 
Exodus36:23 Benzela ithaberinakeli amahlaka amatjhumi amabili ngeswazini langesewula. 
Exodus36:24 Ngaphasi kwamahlaka amatjhumi amabili lawo benza amanzinziso wesiliva amatjhumi amane. Kwaba manzinziso amabili ngaphasi kwehlaka ngalinye lapha iintlobo zalo ezimbili zazingena khona. Benza njalo ehlakeni elinye nelinye. 
Exodus36:25 Godu nangeswazini elinye langetlhagwini lethaberinakeli kwaba mahlaka amatjhumi amabili 
Exodus36:26 namanzinziso wesiliva amatjhumi amane. Kwaba manzinziso amabili ngaphasi kwehlaka ngalinye. 
Exodus36:27 Ngeswazini elingetjingalanga lethaberinakeli benza amahlaka asithandathu. 
Exodus36:28 Benza amahlaka amabili ukuze enze amajika wethaberinakeli ngemuva. 
Exodus36:29 Ijika linye belenziwe ziingcenye ezimbili ezifanako. Iingcenye ezimbilezi bezihlanganiswe ukusuka phasi ukuya phezulu lapha isongo lokuthoma belizokufakwa khona. Bekunjalo emajikeni womabili. 
Exodus36:30 Gade kunamahlaka abunane ngemuva kwethaberinakeli namanzinziso wesiliva alitjhumi nasithandathu. Ihlaka ngalinye belinamanzinziso amabili. 
Exodus36:31 Benza iinqabo ngeengodo zomtholo zaba ngezamahlaka wethaberinakeli. Benza zaba zihlanu ngeswazini elinye," 
Exodus36:32 zaba zihlanu ngakelinye; godu zaba zihlanu ngeswazini langetjingalanga elingemuva kwethaberinakeli. 
Exodus36:33 Iinqabo ezingeziphakathi emahlakeni wamaswazi wethaberinakeli begade zithoma ekuthomeni kweswazi ukuyokutjhayisa ekugcineni. 
Exodus36:34 Banameka amahlaka neenqabo ngegolide, benza amasongo wokubamba iinqabo ngegolide." 
Exodus36:35 Benza isiyaya ngelineni emhlophe. Bathungelela phezu kwesiyayapho ngobukghoni imifanekiso yamakerubhi ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus36:36 Godu benza iinsika ezine zomtholo zokuphanyeka isiyaya, bazinameka ngegolide. Iinkhonkhwani zakhona zona kwaba ngezegolide. Babumbela iinsikezo amanzinziso amane wesiliva." 
Exodus36:37 Benza itjhila lomnyango wetende ngelineni emhlophe, balithungelela ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus36:38 Godu benzela itjhilelo iinsika ezihlanu neenkhonkhwani zakhona. Banameka iimpundu zalo nemipherho yakhona ngegolide, kodwana amanzinziso wakhona amahlanu gade angewekoporo." 
Exodus37:1 UBhetsaleli wenza umfaji ngomuthi womtholo, waba limitha nesiqunjwana ubude, waba siquntu nesiqunjwana semitha ububanzi nokuphakama." 
Exodus37:2 Wawunameka ngegolidembala ngaphakathi nangaphandle, wawuphetha ngegolide." 
Exodus37:3 Wawubumbela amasongo amane wegolide, wawabethelela emajikenawo amane ngaphasi. Kwaba masongo amabili ngehlangothini lawo namanye amabili ngakelinye ihlangothi." 
Exodus37:4 Wenza neengodo ngomtholo nazo wazinameka ngegolide," 
Exodus37:5 wafaka iingodwezo ngaphakathi kwamasongo ngemahlangothini womfaji bonyana kuthwalwe ngazo umfaji. 
Exodus37:6 Wenza isisibekelo somfaji ngegolidembala saba limitha nesiqunjwana ubude, saba siquntu nesiqunjwana semitha ububanzi." 
Exodus37:7 Godu wenza amakerubhi amabili wegolide ngokuwakhanda ekugcineni kwemiphetho emibili yesisibekelo somfaji," 
Exodus37:8 kwaba likerubhi linye ngehlangothini elinye nekerubhi linye ngehlangothini elinye. Amakerubhi amabili bekangemaqadi wesisibekelweso ayinto yinye naso. 
Exodus37:9 Amakerubhi bekathabululele amaphikwawo ngaphezulu engamele isisibekelo somfaji aqalene ngobuso; womabili aqala isisibekelweso. 
Exodus37:10 Godu wenza netafula ngomuthi womtholo laba ngaphasana kwemitha ubude, ngaphasana kwesiquntu semitha ububanzi, laba siquntu nesiqunjwana semitha ukuphakama." 
Exodus37:11 Walinameka ngegolidembala, waliphetha ngomphetho wegolide magegana nalo." 
Exodus37:12 Ukusuka emphethweni ukuya ngaphakathi kwaba bubanzi besandla, wakha umqoqo wesakhelelo segolide." 
Exodus37:13 Wabumba amasongo amane wegolide, wawabophelela emajikeni wemilenzenalo emine." 
Exodus37:14 Amasongo wokufaka iingodo zokuthwala itafula aba ngaphasana komphetho. 
Exodus37:15 Walungisa iingodo zomtholo kobana kuthwalwe ngazo itafula, wazinameka ngegolide." 
Exodus37:16 Godu wenza nezitja ngegolidembala ebekumele zibe phezu kwetafula, izitja ezihlukahlukeneko zakhona, iinkapho nemijeka yokuvubela umnikelo wewayini." 
Exodus37:17 Wenza ilithi leembani ngegolidembala. Isikhondo, isiqu, iimpundu okutjho amaqumbe namathuthumbalo kwaba msebenzi okhandwe wahlanganiswa nalo." 
Exodus37:18 Gade kunamagatja asithandathu aphuma ngemaqadi wesiqu selithi leembani, kwaba magatja amathathu ngehlangothini linye lesiqu namathathu ngehlangothini elinye." 
Exodus37:19 Emagatjeni gade kuneempundu ezinjengama-alimondi okutjho amaqumbe namathuthumbo. Egatjeni ngalinye kilawo asithandathu kwaba neempundu ezintathu. 
Exodus37:20 Esiqwini selithi leembani bekuneempundu ezine ezinjengama-alimondi, zaba namaqumbe namathuthumbo." 
Exodus37:21 Bekunequmbe linye esiqwini ngaphasi komsuka wamagatja akhamba ngamabili. Kwaba njalo kiwo woke amagatja asithandathu asuka esiqwini. 
Exodus37:22 Amaqumbe namagatja wakhona bekakhandwe ndawonye nesiqu ngegolidembala. 
Exodus37:23 Wenza iimbani zakhona ezilikhomba, iincimasibani nezitjana zakhona ngegolidembala." 
Exodus37:24 Ilithi leembani sele lihlangene nezitja zalo zoke, belimakhilogremu amatjhumi amathathu nane wegolidembala." 
Exodus37:25 Wenza i-aldari letjhwalo ngomuthi womtholo. Gade lisikwere ngaphezulu okutjho isiquntu semitha ubude nesiquntu semitha ububanzi, lingaphasi kwemitha ukuphakama. Iimpundu zalo gade zinamathele kilo." 
Exodus37:26 Walinameka ngegolidembala ngaphezulu nangemahlangothinalo kanye neempundu zalo, waliphetha ngegolide." 
Exodus37:27 Walenzela amasongo wegolide aba ngaphasi komphethwalo. Kwaba masongo amabili ngehlangothini linye namabili ngehlangothini elifulatheleko kobana kube ziimphatho zalo lapha kufakwa khona iingodo zokulithwala. 
Exodus37:28 Walungisa iingodo zomuthi womtholo, wazinameka ngegolide." 
Exodus37:29 Godu wenza amafutha wokuzesa ahlukaniselweko namakha wetjhwalo elihlanzekileko. Kwaba njengomsebenzi womvangi weenhlahla. 
Exodus38:1 UBhetsaleli wenza i-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa ngomuthi womtholo, laba sikwere ngaphezulu. Ubude nobubanzi belimamitha amabili nesiqunjwana, liphakeme ngemitha nesiqunjwana." 
Exodus38:2 Walenzela iimpundu emajikenalo amane. Iimpundwezo gade zinamathelene nalo, walinameka ngekoporo." 
Exodus38:3 Wenza zoke izitja ze-aldari ngekoporo. Zona gade kungilezi: iimbiza, iintjhefula, izitja zokunyenyeza, iimforogo nezitja zokutjhisela itjhwalo." 
Exodus38:4 Walenzela umsefo wekoporo njengenede ngemaqadi walo. Wabeka umsefo ngaphasi komqoqo we-aldari ukuze ulembelele uphelele phakathi e-aldarini. 
Exodus38:5 Walibumbela amasongo amane, wawabophelela emajikeni amane womsefo wekoporo bona abe ziimphatho zeengodo." 
Exodus38:6 Wenzela i-aldari iingodo zomtholo, wazinameka ngekoporo." 
Exodus38:7 Wafaka iingodwezo emasongweni ngemaqadi we-aldari kobana lithwalwe ngazo. I-aldari gade lenziwe ngamaplanka laba nomkghotho ngaphakathi. 
Exodus38:8 Godu wenza isitja sekoporo saba nesinzinziso sekoporo ngeemboniboni zabafazi okwathi muva basebenza emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. 
Exodus38:9 UBhetsaleli wenza isirhodlo sethaberinakeli ngalendlela: Ngeswazini langesewula lethaberinakeli walembelelisa umlembelembe wamatjhila welineni emhlophe anomthungo, waba mamitha amatjhumi amane nahlanu." 
Exodus38:10 Ihlangothi lesirhodlwelo laba neensika ezimatjhumi amabili namanzinziso wakhona amatjhumi amabili enziwe ngekoporo. Kodwana iinkhonkhwani zeensika kanye nemipherho yakhona gade kwenziwe ngesiliva. 
Exodus38:11 Ngeswazini langetlhagwini lethaberinakeli nakhona kwaba nomlembelembe omamitha amatjhumi amane nahlanu ubude. Iinsika zakhona zaba matjhumi amabili namanzinziso wakhona enziwe ngekoporo aba matjhumi amabili. Kodwana iinkhonkhwani zeensika kanye nemipherho yakhona gade kwenziwe ngesiliva. 
Exodus38:12 Ngeswazini langetjingalanga lethaberinakeli khona gade kunomlembelembe wamatjhila omamitha amatjhumi amabili nambili nesiquntu, iinsika zakhona zilitjhumi namanzinziso wakhona alitjhumi. Iinkhonkhwani zeensika kanye nemipherho yakhona gade kwenziwe ngesiliva." 
Exodus38:13 Ngeswazini langaphambili lethaberinakeli ngepumalanga gade limamitha amatjhumi amabili nambili nesiquntu. 
Exodus38:14 Ihlangothi lesirhodlo langaphambili laba nemilembelembe emibili yamatjhila ephahle isango. Ubude bomlembelembe ngamunye bebumamitha asithandathu nesiquntu nesiqunjwana. Yomibili imilembelembe leyo yaba neensika ezintathu namanzinziso amathathu. 
Exodus38:15 Woke umlembelembe wamatjhila magegana nesirhodlo gade wenziwe ngelineni emhlophe enomthungo. 
Exodus38:16 Amanzinziso weensika gade ayikoporo, kodwana iinkhonkhwani zakhona kanye nemipherho yakhona gade kwenziwe ngesiliva. Iimpundu zeensika gade zinamekwe ngesiliva. Zoke iinsika zesirhodlo bezinemipherho yesiliva." 
Exodus38:17 Isivalo sesango lesirhodlo gade senziwe ngelineni emhlophe ethungwe ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede. Gade simamitha alithoba ububanzi, simamitha amabili nesiqunjwana ukuphakama. Besilingana nokuphakama komlembelembe wesirhodlo." 
Exodus38:18 Isango belineensika ezine namanzinziso amane wekoporo. Iinkhonkhwani zeensika kanye nemipherho yakhona gade kuyisiliva. Iimpundu zakhona bezinamekwe ngesiliva. 
Exodus38:19 Zoke iinkhonkhwani zethaberinakeli nezesirhodlo magegana, gade ziyikoporo." 
Exodus38:20 Ngomyalo kaMosi amaLevi atlola isibalo seentlabagelo ezasetjenziswa mayelana nethaberinakeli okutjho itende lapha bekufakwe khona ubufakazi. AmaLevi lawo gade arholwa ngu-Itamara umsa ka-Aroni umphristi omkhulu. 
Exodus38:21 Lokho kwenziwa ngemva kobana uBhetsaleli umsa ka-Uri omsa kaRhuri ongowekoro yakwaJuda enze koke uSomnini ayala uMosi ngakho. 
Exodus38:22 Yena gade asekelwe ngu-Oholiyaba umsa ka-Arhisamaki wekoro yakwaDani ongusosino, umtlami nomthungi ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede phezu kwelineni emhlophe." 
Exodus38:23 Inani legolide elasetjenziswa kiwo woke umsebenzi wethaberinakeli nakho koke okukilo gade limakhilogremu ayikulungwana ukuya ngesilinganiso esisetjenziswa endaweni ecwengileko. Igolideli lalethwa babantu njengesibiko. 
Exodus38:24 Isiliva eyalethwa ma-Israyeli atlolisweko gade imakhilogremu aziinkulungwana ezintathu namakhulu amane namatjhumi amathathu ukuya ngesilinganiso esisetjenziswa endaweni ecwengileko. 
Exodus38:25 Kwaba magremu amahlanu anesiquntu nesiqunjwana emuntwini ngamunye otlolisweko. Lokho bekusilinganiso esisiquntu sesipaparwana ukuya ngesilinganiso esisetjenziswa endaweni ecwengileko. (Bekubalwe ukusuka koneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu, kwaba madoda aziinkulungwana ezimakhulu asithandathu nantathu namakhulu amahlanu anamatjhumi amahlanu.)" 
Exodus38:26 Amakhilogremu aziinkulungwana ezintathu namakhulu amane netjhumi wesiliva gade asetjenziselwe ukubumba amanzinziso wendawo ecwengileko newesiyaya. Inaneli lasetjenziselwa ukubumba amanzinziso alikhulu okutjho bona amakhilogremu angaphezudlwana kwamatjhumi amathathu nane enza inzinziso linye. 
Exodus38:27 Ngamakhilogremu amatjhumi amabili wesiliva aseleko uBhetsaleli wenzela iinsika iinkhonkhwani, wanameka iimpundu zeensika bewazenzela nemipherho." 
Exodus38:28 Ikoporo eyalethwa njengesibiko gade imakhilogremu aziinkulungwana ezimbili namakhulu amane namatjhumi amabili nahlanu. 
Exodus38:29 UBhetsaleli wenza ngayo amanzinziso womnyango wetende lokuhlanganela, i-aldari lekoporo nomsefo wekoporo ngemaqadi kanye nazo zoke izitja ze-aldari," 
Exodus38:30 amanzinziso weensika zesirhodlo newesango laso kanye nazo zoke iinkhonkhwani zethaberinakeli nezesirhodlo. 
Exodus39:1 Abantu abanobukghoni benzela abaphristi izambatho zokulotjha endaweni ecwengileko. Izambathwezo bezithungwe ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede. Godu benzela u-Aroni izambatho ezikhethekileko njengombana uSomnini bekayale uMosi." 
Exodus39:2 Benza i-efodi ngelineni emhlophe ethungwe ngemicwana yegolide nangewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus39:3 Bebakhande igolide laba sipara balisika imicwana kobana balithungelele ngobukghoni ewulwini ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede kanye nelinenini emhlophe." 
Exodus39:4 Benza imitletle yamahlombe kobana ihlanganise ingcenye ye-efodi yangemuva neyangaphambili emphethweni. 
Exodus39:5 Ibhande lokuyibopha elithungelelwe kiyo nalo gade lenziwe ngelineni emhlophe ethungwe ngemicwana yegolide nangewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede njengombana uSomnini ayala uMosi." 
Exodus39:6 Balungisa amatje amabili we-oniksi: Batlola ngokugobhodlha amabizo wamadodana ka-Israyeli ematjeni lawo njengombazi natlola elitjeni lokugiba, bawaphetha ngemicwana yegolide." 
Exodus39:7 Bawabeka phezu kwemitletle yamahlombe we-efodi kobana abe mamatje wesikhumbuzo wamadodana ka-Isayeli njengombana uSomnini bekayale uMosi. 
Exodus39:8 Benza ngobukghoni iporiyana yomphristi omkhulu yafana nangendlela ekwenziwe ngayo i-efodi: ngelineni emhlophe ethungwe ngemicwana yegolide nangewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus39:9 Gade ilingana mahlangothi woke nayibhinciweko, imasentimitha amatjhumi amabili nambili ubude nobubanzi." 
Exodus39:10 Bafaka amarhemo amane wamatje aligugu: Irhemo lokuthoma belinerubi, ithophazi ne-emeraldi;" 
Exodus39:11 irhemo lesibili belinesimaragidu, isafaya nedayimani;" 
Exodus39:12 irhemo lesithathu belinehiyasinthi, i-agatha ne-ametisthi;" 
Exodus39:13 irhemo lesine belinebherili, i-oniksi nejasipere. Woke amatje lawo gade arutjelwe ngemicwana yegolide" 
Exodus39:14 anamabizo wamadodana ka-Israyeli. Bekanjengamatje wokugiba, enye nenye ikoro kezilitjhumi nambili beyitlolwe ngokugobhodlhwa elitjeni layo." 
Exodus39:15 Benza iinketanyana ezimbili zegolidembala ezilukwe njengemicwana, bazibophelela eporiyaneni nganasi indlela:" 
Exodus39:16 Benza amasongo amabili wegolide, bawarubela ngemicwana yegolide. Bathungelela amasongo lawo emajikeni angehla weporiyana." 
Exodus39:17 Bafaka iinketanyana ezimbili zegolide ngemasongweni amabili emajikeni weporiyana. 
Exodus39:18 Babopha amaphelelo weenketanyana ezimbili emphethweni orutjelweko wamatje asemtletleni we-efodi emahlombeni ukuze iporiyana ibe sesifubeni. 
Exodus39:19 Benza amasongo amanye amabili wegolide, bawathungelela emajikeni amanye angaphasi womphetho weporiyana." 
Exodus39:20 Godu benza amanye amasongo amabili wegolide, bawathungelela ngaphambili phasi emitletleni yamahlombe hlanu kwalapha ihlangana khona ne-efodi ngehla kwebhande." 
Exodus39:21 Babophelela amasongo weporiyana emasongweni we-efodi ngomtiya ohlaza komkayi kobana ube ngehla kwebhande le-efodi. Benza njalo bonyana iporiyana ingatjhaphuluki isuke e-efodini. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayala uMosi. 
Exodus39:22 Godu benza ijasi elukwe ngokuhlaza komkayi koke, yakhambisana ne-efodi." 
Exodus39:23 Phakathi nendawo beyinentamo ithungelelwe umphetho olukiweko ofana nowesambatho sepi ukuze ingadabuki. 
Exodus39:24 Emphethweni wejasi ngenzasi benza amarharinada ngokutatela iwulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede." 
Exodus39:25 Godu benza iinkhencezo ngegolidembala bazibeka hlangana namarharinada phezu komphetho wejasi magegana nawo phakathi kwamarharinada. 
Exodus39:26 Kwaba sikhencezo nerharinada, godu isikhencezo nerharinada njalo njalo magegana nomphetho wejasi yokulotjha, njengombana uSomnini ayala uMosi." 
Exodus39:27 Benzela u-Aroni namadodanakhe iimphuraphura ezilukwe ngelineni emhlophe," 
Exodus39:28 ingwani yomphristi omkhulu yelineni emhlophe nemibhode yabaphristi, iindzeredzere zelineni kanokutjho" 
Exodus39:29 kanye nomkhungo wokuthekeleza welineni ekhethekileko ethungwe ngewulu ehlaza komkayi, ebubende netlerebede njengombana uSomnini ayala uMosi." 
Exodus39:30 Godu benza nethuthumbo legolidembala okutjho isihlohlo esahlukaniselweko, batlola phezu kwaso amagama anjengawomgobhodlho wesigibo athi, “Ohlukaniselwe uSomnini”." 
Exodus39:31 Babophelela kiso umtiya ohlaza komkayi kobana basibophelele engwanini ngaphambili njengombana uSomnini ayala uMosi. 
Exodus39:32 Ngaleyondlela woke umsebenzi mayelana nethaberinakeli okutjho itende lokuhlanganela, waphethwa. Ama-Israyeli enza ngakho koke uSomnini agade ayale uMosi ngakho." 
Exodus39:33 Abantu baletha kuMosi ithaberinakeli okutjho itende nazo zoke izitja zakhona, iinqobotjhelo zalo, amahlaka, iinqabo, iinsika, amanzinziso," 
Exodus39:34 isembeso esenziwe ngeenkhumba zamaqama ezifakwe umbala obovu nesinye isembeso esenziwe ngeenkhumba ezitjhukiweko bezazeswa ngamafutha, isiyaya esilitjhila lomnyango," 
Exodus39:35 umfaji wobufakazi neengodo zawo nesisibekelo," 
Exodus39:36 itafula nazo zoke izitja zakhona, izikwa ezibekwa phambi kwakaZimu," 
Exodus39:37 ilithi leembani legolidembala neembani zakhona, zoke izitja zakhona namafutha weembani," 
Exodus39:38 i-aldari legolide, amafutha wokuzesa, amakha wetjhwalo, itjhila lomnyango wetende," 
Exodus39:39 i-aldari lekoporo nomsefo walo wekoporo, iingodo zakhona, nazo zoke izitja zakhona, isitja sokuhlambela nesinzinziso sakhona," 
Exodus39:40 imilembelembe yamatjhila yesirhodlo, iinsika zakhona namanzinziso wakhona, itjhila lokuvala isango lesirhodlo, iintambo neenkhonkhwani ezibamba imilembelembe yesirhodlo, nazo zoke izitja zokulotjha ethaberinakelini okutjho itende lokuhlanganela," 
Exodus39:41 izambatho ezithungiweko zokulotjha endaweni ecwengileko okutjho izambatho ezikhethekileko zaka-Aroni umphristi omkhulu kanye nezambatho zamadodanakhe kobana babe baphristi. 
Exodus39:42 Ama-Israyeli enza woke umsebenzi kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayala uMosi. 
Exodus39:43 Kwathi lokha uMosi nabona bonyana mbala ama-Israyeli enze woke umsebenzi njengombana uSomnini amyalile, wawabusisa." 
Exodus40:1 USomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Exodus40:2 “Jamisa ithaberinakeli okutjho itende lokuhlanganela ngelanga lokuthoma lenyanga yokuthoma. 
Exodus40:3 Faka ngaphakathi kwalo umfaji wobufakazi bese uwusitha ngesiyaya. 
Exodus40:4 Ungenise itafula bewuhlele koke kuhle phezu kwalo. Ngenisa nelithi leembani bese uhlela iimbani zalo. 
Exodus40:5 Ubeke i-aldari legolide lokutjhisela itjhwalo phambi komfaji wobufakazi bese ulembelelisa itjhila lomnyango wethaberinakeli. 
Exodus40:6 Ujamise i-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa ngaphandle komnyango wethaberinakeli okutjho itende lokuhlanganela. 
Exodus40:7 Ubeke isitja sokuhlambela hlangana netende lokuhlanganela ne-aldari bese uthela amanzi ngaphakathi kwaso. 
Exodus40:8 Wakhe isirhodlo magegana nethaberinakeli bese ulembelelisa itjhila esangweni lesirhodlweso. 
Exodus40:9 Thatha amafutha uzese ithaberinakeli nakho koke okungaphakathi kwalo, ulihlukanisele kanye nepahlalo yoke engaphakathi; lizakuba ngelicwengileko." 
Exodus40:10 Uzese ne-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa kanye neensetjenziswa zalo zoke, ulihlukanisele, nje-ke lizakuba ngelicwenge khulu." 
Exodus40:11 Godu uzese nesitja sokuhlambela kanye nesinzinziso sakhona, usihlukanisele." 
Exodus40:12 Ngemva kwalokho kuze u-Aroni namadodanakhe emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela bese ubahlambulula ngamanzi. 
Exodus40:13 Wembathise u-Aroni izambatho ezikhethekileko bese uyamzesa umhlukanisele ukuze abe mphristami. 
Exodus40:14 Utjhideze namadodanakhe, uwembathise iimphuraphura" 
Exodus40:15 bese uwazesa njengombana uzese uyisawo ukuze abe baphristi bami. Ukuzeswa kwawo kuzawenza abe baphristi nini nanini eenzukulwaneni zawo.” 
Exodus40:16 UMosi wenza koke njengombana uSomnini bekamyalile. 
Exodus40:17 Nje-ke kwathi ngelanga lokuthoma enyangeni yokuthoma emnyakeni wesibili, ithaberinakeli lajanyiswa." 
Exodus40:18 UMosi wajamisa ithaberinakeli ngokuthoma ukubeka amanzinziswalo, amahlakalo, iinqabo neensika zalo." 
Exodus40:19 Yeke wendlala itende phezu kwamahlaka wethaberinakeli waleka itendelo ngezembeso zakhona njengombana uSomnini bekamyalile. 
Exodus40:20 Wathatha imiqebethu yobufakazi wayifaka ngemfajini, wawufakela iingodo zokuwuthwala, wabeka isisibekelo somfaji ngaphezu kwawo." 
Exodus40:21 Khonapho wangenisa umfaji lowo ngethaberinakelini wabese ulembelelisa isiyaya setjhila lokusitha umfaji wobufakazi njengombana uSomnini bekamyalile. 
Exodus40:22 Wabeka itafula ngetendeni lokuhlanganela ngetlhagwini yethaberinakeli ngaphandle kwendawo esithwe ngesiyaya. 
Exodus40:23 Wahlela kuhle phezu kwalo izikwa ezibekwa phambi kwakaSomnini njengombana uSomnini bekamyalile. 
Exodus40:24 Wabeka nelithi leembani ngetendeni lokuhlanganela, laba malungana netafula ngesewula," 
Exodus40:25 wahlela neembani zalo phambi kwakaSomnini njengombana bekamyalile. 
Exodus40:26 Godu uMosi wabeka i-aldari legolide ngetendeni lokuhlanganela, laba ngaphambi kwesiyaya sendawo ecwenge khulu," 
Exodus40:27 watjhisela phezu kwalo amakha wetjhwalo njengombana uSomnini bekamyalile. 
Exodus40:28 Nje-ke walembelelisa itjhila lomnyango wethaberinakeli. 
Exodus40:29 Wajamisa i-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa ngaphandle komnyango wethaberinakeli okutjho itende lokuhlanganela, watjhisa phezu kwalo umhlabelo wokutjhiswa nomnikelo weenthoro njengombana uSomnini bekamyalile." 
Exodus40:30 Wabeka isitja sokuhlambela hlangana netende lokuhlanganela ne-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa, wabese uthela amanzi wokuhlambulula ngaphakathi kwaso." 
Exodus40:31 Nje-ke uMosi, u-Aroni namadodanakhe bahlambulula izandla neenyawo zabo ngesitjenapho." 
Exodus40:32 (Bekuthi njalo ngaphambi kobana bangene ngetendeni lokuhlanganela nalokha nabatjhidela e-aldarini, bazihlambulule njengombana uSomnini bekayale uMosi.)" 
Exodus40:33 UMosi wabuye wakha isirhodlo magegana nethaberinakeli ne-aldari bewalembelelisa itjhila esangweni lesirhodlweso. Wawuqeda njalo-ke uMosi umsebenzi. 
Exodus40:34 Ilifu lembatha itende lokuhlanganela, iphazimulo kaSomnini yazala ithaberinakeli." 
Exodus40:35 Ngebanga lokobana ilifu belembethe itende lokuhlanganela nephazimulo kaSomnini izele ithaberinakeli, uMosi akhange akghone ukungena ngetendenapho." 
Exodus40:36 Kilo loke ikhambo lama-Israyeli erhalawumbeni, begade afuduka aragela phambili kwaphela lokha ilifu nalikhuphuka lisuka ethaberinakelini." 
Exodus40:37 Ngalokho gade ahlala bekube kumhlana ilifu likhuphukako. Ilifu lingakakhuphuki bekangakhambi. 
Exodus40:38 Iye, ilifu lakaSomnini gade liba sethaberinakelini emini, kuthi ebusuku libe mlilo ngaphakathi kwalo. Woke ama-Israyeli akubona lokho kilo loke ikhambo lawo erhalawumbeni." 
Leviticus1:1 USomnini angetendeni lokuhlanganela, wabiza uMosi wakhuluma naye wathi" 
Leviticus1:2 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Lokha nanyana ngubani phakathi kwenu naletha umnikelo wefuyo kuSomnini kufuze kube yikomo, imvu nanyana imbuzi." 
Leviticus1:3 “Nangabe umnikelwakhe umhlabelo wokutjhiswa, kumele kube yikunzi emsulwa. Ayilethe emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela kube ngendlela eyamukelekako kuSomnini:" 
Leviticus1:4 Umuntu loyo uzakubeka isandla sakhe phezu kwehloko yekunzi emhlabelo leyo. Umhlabelwakhe uzakwamukeleka njengetethelelo. 
Leviticus1:5 Kuzakufanela bona ahlabe ikunzana leyo phambi kwakaSomnini bese kuthi amadodana ka-Aroni okubaphristi bathathe iingazi zayo bazifafaze mahlangothi woke we-aldari ngaphambi komnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus1:6 Umuntu loyo akahlinze umhlabelwakhe abe awuhlahlele. 
Leviticus1:7 Amadodana ka-Aroni umphristi akalungise iinkuni bese aphemba umlilo phezu kwe-aldari. 
Leviticus1:8 Amadodana ka-Aroni abaphristi lawo, akabeke izitho, ihloko kanye nomhlwehlwe phezu kweenkuni ezivuthako e-aldarini." 
Leviticus1:9 Umuntu loyo akahlanze iinredlo neenqatha ngamanzi ukuze umphristi akwazi ukutjhisa woke umhlabelo e-aldarini. Lokho kuzakuba mhlabelo wokutjhiswa okumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukeleka kuSomnini." 
Leviticus1:10 “Nakube umnikelwakhe uwuthethe emhlambini wezimvu namkha weembuzi bona kube mhlabelo, khona kumele alethe iduna elimsulwa." 
Leviticus1:11 Kufuze ahlabele idunelo ngehlangothini elingetlhagwini ye-aldari phambi kwakaSomnini bese abaphristi okumadodana ka-Aroni bathathe iingazi zedunelo bazifafaze mahlangothi woke we-aldari. 
Leviticus1:12 Umuntu loyo akalihlahlele idunelo ngezitho zalo. Umphristi ahlele izithwezo, ihloko nomhlwehlwe phezu kweenkuni ezivuthako e-aldarini." 
Leviticus1:13 Umuntu loyo akahlanze iinredlo neenqatha ngamanzi ukuze umphristi akwazi ukutjhisa woke umhlabelo e-aldarini. Lokho kuzakuba mhlabelo wokutjhiswa okumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukeleka kuSomnini." 
Leviticus1:14 “Nakube umnikelwakhe kuSomnini kumhlabelo wokutjhiswa weenyoni, khona-ke umuntu loyo kufuze enze umhlabelo wezuba lommango namkha izutjana lekhaya." 
Leviticus1:15 Umphristi akalethe umhlabelo wenyoni leyo e-aldarini, aquntule ihlokwayo, ayitjhise e-aldarini. Iingazi zayo aziphophisele ngeqadi kwe-aldari." 
Leviticus1:16 Asuse ingingila neensiba azilahlele ezaleni ngepumalanga ye-aldari. 
Leviticus1:17 Umuntu loyo kufuze ayivule ukufikela emaphikweni, kodwana angayiphadlhuli bona ihlukaniseke yoke. Umphristi ayitjhise phezu kweenkuni ezivuthako e-aldarini. Lokho kuzakuba mhlabelo wokutjhiswa okumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukeleka kuSomnini.”" 
Leviticus2:1 “Nakube kunomuntu oletha umnikelo weenthoro kuSomnini umnikelwakhe awube yiflowuru esefiweko. Kufuze athele amafutha we-oliva phezu kwayo, afake namakha" 
Leviticus2:2 bese alethe umnikelo lowo emadodaneni ka-Aroni okubaphristi. Umphristi uzakunghwatha isandla seflowuru enamafutha kanye namakha woke. Koke lokho uzakutjhisa e-aldarini kube sisabelo sesikhumbuzo. Lokho bekumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukeleka kuSomnini." 
Leviticus2:3 Omunye umnikelo weenthoro oseleko ungewaka-Aroni namadodanakhe. Umnikelo lowo ungocwenge khulu ngombana bewulethwa njengomnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini. 
Leviticus2:4 “Nawuletha umnikelo weenthoro obhagwe nge-ondweni, awube zizikwa ezimasongo ezidutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva namkha izikwa ezisipara ezitjhatjhwe ngamafutha we-oliva. Izikwezo zingabi nengumelo begodu zenziwe ngeflowuru esefiweko." 
Leviticus2:5 Nakube umnikelwakho weenthoro ungokhanzingwe ngedengela, akube ngoweflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva; kube siphaphatha esinganangumelo." 
Leviticus2:6 Usihlephule iinquqwana uzithele ngamafutha we-oliva. Lokho kumnikelo weenthoro. 
Leviticus2:7 Nakube umnikelwakho weenthoro uphekwe ngesithetjhelelo, akube ngodutjwe ngeflowuru esefiweko namafutha we-oliva." 
Leviticus2:8 “Nawuletha umnikelo weenthoro owenziwe ngezintwezo kuSomnini uwunikele umphristi ozawuthatha awulethe e-aldarini. 
Leviticus2:9 Umphristi loyo uzakuthatha isabelo sesikhumbuzo emnikelweni weenthoro asitjhise e-aldarini. Lokho bekumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukeleka kuSomnini." 
Leviticus2:10 Omunye umnikelo weenthoro oseleko ungewaka-Aroni namadodanakhe. Lowo bekumnikelo ocwenge khulu ngombana bewulethwa njengomnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini. 
Leviticus2:11 “Akungalethwa umnikelo weenthoro onengumelo kuSomnini. Iye, akungatjhiswa isikwa esinengumelo namkha iliju njengomnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini." 
Leviticus2:12 Nokho nakube mnikelo wesilumo, ningawuletha kuSomnini kodwana nakuse-aldarini khona, ungakhe unganikelwa kobana wamukeleke kuSomnini." 
Leviticus2:13 Nungani yoke iminikelwenu yeenthoro ngetswayi. Ningalikhohlwa itswayi lesivumelwano sakaZimenu eminikelweni yeenthoro. Fakani itswayi njalo kiyo yoke iminikelwenu. 
Leviticus2:14 “Lokha nawuletha umnikelo weenthoro okungewesilumo kuSomnini rhabula iinqwambi zekoroyi etja leyo emlilweni, uzitlhutlhure bese ugaya ikoroyi yakhona. Ulethe ikoroyi leyo njengomnikelwakho wesilumo." 
Leviticus2:15 Thela amafutha we-oliva phezu kwayo bese ufaka amakha ngaphezulu. Lowo kumnikelo weenthoro. 
Leviticus2:16 Umphristi uzakutjhisa isabelo sesikhumbuzo seenthoro ezigayiweko namafutha we-oliva kanye namakha woke. Lokho kumnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini.” 
Leviticus3:1 “Nakube umnikelo womuntu kumnikelo wetjhebiswano awuthethe emhlambini weenkomo, akube ngeduna namkha esikazi emsulwa, ilethwe phambi kwakaSomnini." 
Leviticus3:2 Umuntu loyo uzakubeka isandla sakhe phezu kwehloko yomhlabelwakhe. Kuzakufanele bonyana awuhlabe phambi komnyango wetende lokuhlanganela bese kuthi amadodana ka-Aroni okubaphristi bafafaze iingazi zawo mahlangothi woke we-aldari. 
Leviticus3:3 Emhlabelweni wetjhebiswano umuntu loyo kufuze alethe umnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini. Lokho kutjho umhlwehlwe owembese iinredlo nakho koke okuphathelene nawo," 
Leviticus3:4 iziso zombili nomhlwehlwe wakhona, amanoni wesifunzi kanye nepundu yesibindi ekufuze ikhutjhwe neziso." 
Leviticus3:5 Amadodana ka-Aroni akatjhise koke lokho e-aldarini phezu kweenkuni ezivuthako ngemva kobana enze umhlabelo wokutjhiswa. Lokho kumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukeleka kuSomnini." 
Leviticus3:6 “Nakube umnikelwakhe uwuthethe emhlambini wezimvu namkha weembuzi bona kube mhlabelo wetjhebiswano, khona akube ngeduna namkha esikazi emsulwa, ilethwe kuSomnini." 
Leviticus3:7 Nakube unikela ngeqamanyana, akalilethe phambi kwakaSomnini," 
Leviticus3:8 abeke isandla sakhe phezu kwehloko yomhlabelwakhe lowo, awuhlabe phambi komnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. Amadodana ka-Aroni afafaze iingazi zawo mahlangothi woke we-aldari." 
Leviticus3:9 Emhlabelweni wetjhebiswano umuntu loyo kufuze alethe amanoni njengomnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini. Lokho kutjho woke umsila ononileko oquntwe emngolweni, umhlwehlwe owembese iinredlo nakho koke okuphathelene nawo," 
Leviticus3:10 iziso zombili nomhlwehlwe wakhona, amanoni wesifunzi kanye nepundu yesibindi ekufuze ikhutjhwe neziso." 
Leviticus3:11 Umphristi uzakutjhisa koke lokhu phezu kwe-aldari. Lokho kukudla okumnikelo okhethekileko wakaSomnini. 
Leviticus3:12 “Nakube unikela ngembuzi, akayilethe phambi kwakaSomnini," 
Leviticus3:13 abeke isandla sakhe phezu kwehloko yomhlabelwakhe lowo, awuhlabe phambi komnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. Amadodana ka-Aroni afafaze iingazi zawo mahlangothi woke we-aldari." 
Leviticus3:14 Emnikelwenakhe umuntu loyo kufuze alethe umnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini. Lokho kutjho umhlwehlwe owembese iinredlo nakho koke okuphathelene nawo," 
Leviticus3:15 iziso zombili nomhlwehlwe wakhona, amanoni wesifunzi kanye nepundu yesibindi ekufuze ikhutjhwe neziso." 
Leviticus3:16 Umphristi uzakutjhisa koke lokhu phezu kwe-aldari. Lokho kukudla okumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukeleka kuSomnini. “Woke umhlwehlwe ngowakaSomnini." 
Leviticus3:17 Lokhu kusimiso sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni ngeenzukulwana lapha nizakuhlala khona: Ningalingi nidle umhlwehlwe, amanoni namkha ububende.”" 
Leviticus4:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi kuye 
Leviticus4:2 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi kiwo: “Nanyana ngubani owona ngokungakahlosi ngokwenza okuphambene neminye yemiyalo kaSomnini, akaphathwe nganasi indlela:" 
Leviticus4:3 “Nangabe kona umphristi ozesiweko, abangele abantu umlandu, akalethe ikunzana emsulwa kuSomnini kube mhlabelwakhe wehlambululo mayelana nesono asenzileko." 
Leviticus4:4 Akalethe ikunzana leyo phambi kwakaSomnini emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. Abeke isandla sakhe phezu kwehloko yekunzana bese uyihlabela phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Leviticus4:5 Yeke umphristi ozesiweko uzakuthatha ezinye zeengazi zekunzana leyo angene nazo ngetendeni lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus4:6 Kufuze atlubhuze umunwakhe ngeengazinapho bese ufafaza ezinye zazo kalikhomba phambi kwakaSomnini ngaphambi kwesiyaya sendawo ecwengileko. 
Leviticus4:7 Godu umphristi uzabese uninda ezinye iingazi phezu kweempundu ze-aldari letjhwalo phambi kwakaSomnini ngetendeni lokuhlanganela. Inengi leengazi zekunzana leyo azithululele emanzinzweni we-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa phambi komnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus4:8 Kufuze asuse woke umhlwehlwe wekunzana yomhlabelo wehlambululo okutjho umhlwehlwe weenredlo nakho koke okuhlangene nazo," 
Leviticus4:9 iziso zombili nomhlwehlwe wakhona namanoni wesifunzi kanye nepundu yesibindi ekufuze ikhutjhwe neziso. 
Leviticus4:10 Koke lokho akube njengalokha nakukhutjhwa umhlwehlwe ekomeni eyenzelwa umhlabelo wetjhebiswano. Yeke umphristi uzakutjhisa lokho e-aldarini lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa. 
Leviticus4:11 Kodwana isikhumba sekunzana nenyama yayo yoke, ihloko nemilenze, iinredlo nemiswanayo" 
Leviticus4:12 okutjho koke okuseleko kwekunzana kufuze akuthathe aphumele nakho ngaphandle kwekampa endaweni ekhethekileko, lapha kuthululwa khona umlotha we-aldari. Abase umlilo ezalenapho atjhise koke lokho." 
Leviticus4:13 “Nangabe woke umkhambathi wama-Israyeli owona ngokungakahlosi ngokweqa imiyalo kaSomnini kodwana ihlangano ingakuboni lokho bese umkhambathi lowo uzizwe unomlandu," 
Leviticus4:14 ihlangano ayilethe ikunzana njengomhlabelo wehlambululo, masinyana nasele isono somkhambathi sazekile. Kufuze ilethwe phambi kwetende lokuhlanganela," 
Leviticus4:15 bese abaphathi bomkhambathi babeka izandla zabo phezu kwehloko yekunzana, bayihlabe phambi kwakaSomnini." 
Leviticus4:16 Umphristi ozesiweko uzakuthatha ezinye zeengazi zekunzana angene nazo ngetendeni lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus4:17 Uzakutlubhuza umunwakhe ngeengazinapho bese uzifafaza phambi kwakaSomnini kalikhomba ngaphambi kwesiyaya sendawo ecwengileko. 
Leviticus4:18 Godu umphristi uzabese uninda ezinye iingazi phezu kweempundu ze-aldari letjhwalo phambi kwakaSomnini ngetendeni lokuhlanganela. Inengi leengazi zekunzana leyo azithululele emanzinzweni we-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa phambi komnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus4:19 Kuzakufanela bona asuse woke umhlwehlwe bese uwutjhisa e-aldarini. 
Leviticus4:20 Lokho akwenze ngekunzana leyo yaphambilini, akakwenze nangekunzana yomhlabelo wehlambululo lo. Ngendlela leyo umphristi uzabe wenzela umkhambathi itethelelo. Ngalokho umkhambathi uzakuhlambuluka esonweni sawo." 
Leviticus4:21 Nje-ke uzakukhuphela ikunzana leyo ngaphandle kwekampa, ayitjhise njengombana atjhise yokuthoma. Lokho kumhlabelo wehlambululo wehlangano." 
Leviticus4:22 “Nangabe kona umrholi ngokungakahlosi ngokwenza okuphambene neminye yemiyalo kaSomnini uZimakhe bese uzizwa anomlandu," 
Leviticus4:23 akalethe ipongo emsulwa njengomhlabelwakhe wehlambululo, masinyana nasele alemukile ngesono asenzileko." 
Leviticus4:24 Uzakubeka isandla sakhe phezu kwehloko yepongo bese uyihlabela phambi kwakaSomnini lapha kuhlatjelwa khona umhlabelo wokutjhiswa. Lokho kumhlabelo wehlambululo. 
Leviticus4:25 Nje-ke umphristi uzakuthatha ezinye zeengazi zomhlabelo wehlambululo ngomunwakhe azininde eempundwini ze-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa bese uthulula inengi leengazezo emanzinzweni we-aldari. 
Leviticus4:26 Uzakutjhisa woke umhlwehlwe phezu kwe-aldari kube njengombana atjhisa umhlwehlwe womhlabelo wetjhebiswano. Ngendlela leyo umphristi uzabe enzela umuntu loyo itethelelo ngebanga lezono zakhe. Ngalokho uzakuhlambuluka esonweni sakheso. 
Leviticus4:27 “Nangabe kona umuntukazana ngokungakahlosi ngokwenza okuphambene neminye yemiyalo kaSomnini bese uzizwa anomlandu," 
Leviticus4:28 akalethe imbuzi esikazi emsulwa njengomhlabelwakhe wehlambululo, masinyana nasele alemukile ngesono asenzileko." 
Leviticus4:29 Uzakubeka isandla sakhe phezu kwehloko yembuzi, ayihlabe njengomhlabelo wehlambululo lapha kuhlatjelwa khona umhlabelo wokutjhiswa." 
Leviticus4:30 Nje-ke umphristi uzakuthatha ezinye zeengazi zomhlabelo wehlambululo ngomunwakhe, azininde eempundwini ze-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa bese uthulula inengi leengazezo emanzinzweni we-aldari."
