Leviticus4:31 Umuntukazana loyo uzakususa woke umhlwehlwe kube njengalokha nakasusa umhlwehlwe womhlabelo wetjhebiswano. Umphristi uzawutjhisa phezu kwe-aldari ube mhlabelo owamukeleka kuSomnini. Ngendlela leyo umphristi uzabe umenzela itethelelo. Ngalokho uzakuhlambuluka esonweni sakheso. 
Leviticus4:32 “Umuntukazana loyo uvunyelwe ukuletha imvana njengomhlabelwakhe wehlambululo. Yona kufuze ibe ngesikazi emsulwa. 
Leviticus4:33 Uzakubeka isandla sakhe phezu kwehloko yemvana, ayihlabe njengomhlabelo wehlambululo lapha kuhlatjelwa khona umhlabelo wokutjhiswa." 
Leviticus4:34 Nje-ke umphristi uzakuthatha ezinye zeengazi zomhlabelo wehlambululo ngomunwakhe, azininde eempundwini ze-aldari lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa bese uthulula inengi leengazezo emanzinzweni we-aldari." 
Leviticus4:35 Umuntukazana loyo uzakususa woke umhlwehlwe kube njengalokha nakawususa emvaneni yomhlabelo wetjhebiswano. Umphristi uzawutjhisa phezu kwe-aldari neminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini. Ngendlela leyo umphristi uzabe umenzela itethelelo ngesono asenzileko. Ngalokho uzakuhlambuluka esonweni sakheso.” 
Leviticus5:1 “Kungenzeka umuntu abone namkha ezwe ngobulelesi kodwana athule ngobufakazi, phezu kokobana asazi bonyana umuntu onjalo unikelelwe, ngalokho uzabe wonile bese uyakhathazeka ngebanga lesonweso;" 
Leviticus5:2 godu kungenzeka umuntu athinte into esilapheleko ngokungazi, kungaba sidumbu sesilwana esisilapheleko sommango, sefuyo esilapheleko namkha seemphili ezikhakhaba ehlabathini uzakusilaphala bese uzizwa anomlandu;" 
Leviticus5:3 kungenzeka godu umuntu athinte ukusilaphala komunye umuntu ngokungazi, kungaba nanyana yini engasilaphaza umuntu, alemuke ngalokho bese uzizwa anomlandu;" 
Leviticus5:4 namkha enze isifungo ngamawala, kungaba ngokuhle namkha okumbi kwananyana yini angahle afunge ngayo ngobutjhapho, alemuke ubutjhapho bakhe bese uzizwa anomlandu;" 
Leviticus5:5 kufuze avume lokho one ngakho kikho koke okubaliweko. 
Leviticus5:6 Akalethe ihlawulo kuSomnini okuyimvana namkha imbuzana esikazi ayithethe emhlambinakhe, ibe mhlabelo wehlambululo mayelana nesono sakhe. Ngendlela leyo umphristi uzabe enzela umuntu loyo itethelelo ngebanga lesono sakheso." 
Leviticus5:7 Nakube akanamandla wokuletha imvana, akalethe ihlawulo kuSomnini okumazuba amabili wommango namkha amazutjana amabili wekhaya kube mhlabelwakhe wehlambululo mayelana nesono sakhe. Elinye libe ngelomhlabelo wehlambululo bese elinye liba ngelomhlabelo wokutjhiswa." 
Leviticus5:8 Kufuze awalethe kumphristi bese umphristi uthoma ngokunikela linye lawo libe mhlabelo wehlambululo. Aliquntule intanyana le eduze nehloko, nokho angavuli isitutu salo." 
Leviticus5:9 Akaphophisele ezinye zeengazi zalo zomhlabelo wehlambululo ngeqadi kwe-aldari, ezinye aziphophisele emanzinzwenalo. Lokho kumhlabelo wehlambululo." 
Leviticus5:10 Elinye umphristi uzakwenza ngalo umhlabelo wokutjhiswa, enze njengombana kuvame ukwenziwa. Ngendlela leyo umphristi uzabe enzela umuntu loyo itethelelo ngebanga lesono sakhe. Ngalokho uzakuhlambuluka esonweni sakheso." 
Leviticus5:11 “Nakube akanamandla wokuletha amazuba amabili wommango namkha amazutjana amabili wekhaya, akalethe umnikelwakhe ositjhutjana seflowuru esefiweko kube mnikelo wehlambululo. Akukafuzi afake amafutha we-oliva namkha amakha phezu kwayo ngombana lowo mnikelo wehlambululo." 
Leviticus5:12 Akayilethe kumphristi ozakunghwatha isandla seflowuru leyo kube sisabelo sesikhumbuzo bese uyitjhisa e-aldarini kanye neminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini. Lokho kumnikelo wehlambululo. 
Leviticus5:13 “Ngendlela leyo umphristi uzabe enzela umuntu loyo itethelelo ngebanga lesinye sezono ezibaliweko. Ngalokho uzakuhlambuluka esonweni sakheso. “Woke omunye umnikelo ungowomphristi, njenganyana kwenziwa ngomnikelo weenthoro.”" 
Leviticus5:14 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Leviticus5:15 “Nangabe umuntu wenza isiphambeko ngokona angakahlosi ngokusilaphaza izinto ezicwengileko zakaSomnini, kufuze alethe ihlawulo kuSomnini okuliqama elimsulwa alithethe emhlambinakhe. Iqama aliletha njengomhlabelwakhe wehlawulo alibe nobungako besiliva obubekwa mphristi ngokwesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko." 
Leviticus5:16 Kufuze abuyisele koke lokho one ngakho mayelana nezinto ezicwengileko begodu angezelele ngobungako besihlanu. Akanikele umphristi iqamelo bese amenzele itethelelo ngalo. Ngalokho uzakuhlambuluka esonweni sakheso. 
Leviticus5:17 “Nangabe umuntu wona ngokwenza okuphambene neminye yemiyalo kaSomnini kodwana angazi bonyana wone muphi, khonapho azizwe anomlandu begodu akhathazeke," 
Leviticus5:18 kufuze alethe kumphristi umhlabelo wehlawulo okuliqama elimsulwa alithethe emhlambinakhe. Iqama alilethako alibe nobungako besiliva obubekwa mphristi. Umphristi uzamenzela itethelo mayelana nesono asenze angakahlosi. Nanyana angazi bonyana wenze sonobani, uzakuhlambuluka emmoyenakhe." 
Leviticus5:19 Lowo-ke mhlabelo wehlawulo. Iye, umuntu loyo abuyisene noSomnini ngawo.”" 
Leviticus6:1 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Leviticus6:2 “Nangabe umuntu wona ngokwenza isiphambeko kuSomnini ngokuba nobuqili emuntwini womphakathi ngento esiswe kuye netjhiywe kuye bona ayitjheje, ngokumgalaja, ngokumdlelezela" 
Leviticus6:3 namkha ngokufunyana into yomuntu womphakathi ilahlekile bese ufunga ngekohliso ngananyana yini yezintwezi umuntu angona ngazo phambi kwakaSomnini," 
Leviticus6:4 nakubanyana wona ngendlela enjalo kodwana azizwe anomlandu, akabuyisele akwebileko, akuthethe ngokudlelezela, lokho egade kusiswe kuye namkha ipahla ayifunyene ilahlekile" 
Leviticus6:5 okutjho nanyana yini afunge ngakho ngekohliso. Kufuze abuyise lokho kuphelele, abe angezelele ngokwesihlanu sobungako bepahla leyo. Akakubuyisele kumninipahla ngelanga aletha ngalo umhlabelwakhe wehlawulo." 
Leviticus6:6 Kufuze alethe ihlawulo kuSomnini okuliqama elimsulwa alithethe emhlambinakhe. Iqama aliletha njengomhlabelo wehlawulo alibe nobungako besiliva obubekwa mphristi. 
Leviticus6:7 Ngendlela leyo umphristi uzabe enzela umuntu loyo itethelelo kuSomnini. Ngalokho uzakuhlambuluka kinanyana ngiyiphi yezinto okuthi umuntu nakayenzileko abe nomlandu.” 
Leviticus6:8 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus6:9 akayale u-Aroni namadodanakhe athi: “Naku umyalo womhlabelo wokutjhiswa: Umhlabelo wokutjhiswa kufuze uhlale ezikweni le-aldari ubusuku boke, godu nomlilo uhlale uvutha phezu kwe-aldari. Ekuseni" 
Leviticus6:10 umphristi embathe iphuraphurakhe yelineni, athekeleze nedzeredzere ngaphasi kwayo, akhuphe umlotha womhlabelo wokutjhiswa otjhiswe mlilo phezu kwe-aldari awuthululele eqadi kwalo." 
Leviticus6:11 Uzabese uhlubula izambatho zakhe afake ezinye. Nje-ke uzakuwola umlotha ayowulahlela ngaphandle kwekampa endaweni ekhethekileko. 
Leviticus6:12 Awuhlale uvutha umlilo phezu kwe-aldari, ungacimi. Njalo ekuseni umphristi kufuze abaselele umlilo abese ulungisa umhlabelo wokutjhiswa phezu kwawo, godu atjhise nemihlwehlwe yemihlabelo yetjhebiswano emlilweni lowo." 
Leviticus6:13 Iye, umlilo kufuze uhlale uvutha njalo phezu kwe-aldari, ungacimi.”" 
Leviticus6:14 “Naku umyalo womnikelo weenthoro: Amadodana ka-Aroni kufuze alethe umnikelo lowo kuSomnini ngaphambi kwe-aldari. 
Leviticus6:15 Umphristi uzakunghwatha isandla seflowuru esefiweko enamafutha we-oliva kanye namakha woke aphezu komnikelo weenthoro. Koke uzakutjhisa e-aldarini kube sisabelo sesikhumbuzo. Lokho kumnikelo owamukeleka kuSomnini. 
Leviticus6:16 U-Aroni namadodanakhe bazakudla koke okuseleko. Kufuze kudliwe kunganangumelo endaweni ecwengileko ngesirhodlweni setende lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus6:17 Kungaphekwa ngengumelo. Ngikunikele abaphristi bona kube sisabelo sabo. Njengomhlabelo wehlambululo newehlawulo umnikelo lowo ungocwenge khulu ngombana bewulethwa njengomnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini. 
Leviticus6:18 Boke abaduna baka-Aroni bangakudla. Eminikelweni ekhethekileko kuSomnini lokhu kuzakuba sisabelo sabo sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni ezizako. Nanyana yini ethinta umnikelo lowo izakuba ngecwengileko.” 
Leviticus6:19 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Leviticus6:20 “Naku umnikelo ekufuze ulethwe ngu-Aroni namadodanakhe kuSomnini ngelanga azeswa ngalo: isitjhutjana seflowuru esefiweko kube mnikelo weenthoro wangemihla, ingcenye ekuseni nengcenye ngamarhwaqela." 
Leviticus6:21 Awuhlanganiswe kuhle namafutha we-oliva, ubhagwe phezu kwedengela. Awuhletjhulwe ube ziinquqwana kube mnikelo owamukeleka kuSomnini." 
Leviticus6:22 Awulungiswe yindodana ezakulandela u-Aroni esikhundleni sokuba mphristi ozesiweko. Umnikelo lowo utjhiswe woke ngombana ungokaSomnini isiphelani. 
Leviticus6:23 Woke uminikelo weenthoro olethwa mphristi uzakutjhiswa ngokupheleleko, awungadliwa.”" 
Leviticus6:24 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi godu wathi 
Leviticus6:25 akakhulume no-Aroni namadodanakhe athi: “Naku umyalo womhlabelo wehlambululo: Umhlabelo wehlambululo kufuze uhlatjelwe phambi kwakaSomnini endaweni lapha kuhlatjelwa khona umhlabelo wokutjhiswa. Lowo kumhlabelo ocwenge khulu. 
Leviticus6:26 Umphristi owunikelako akawudle. Kufuze udlelwe endaweni ecwengileko ngesirhodlweni setende lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus6:27 Nanyana yini ethinta inyama leyo izakuba ngecwengileko. Begodu nanyana ngiziphi iingazi zomhlabelo lowo ezithontela esambathweni kufuze sihlanzelwe endaweni ecwengileko. 
Leviticus6:28 Ipoto yomdaka ebekuphekwe ngayo ayiphadlhwe. Kodwana nakube bekuphekwe ngeyekoporo, ayiphalwe kuhle iyakazwe ngamanzi." 
Leviticus6:29 Boke abaduna emndenini wobuphristi bangayidla. Lokho kumnikelo ocwenge khulu. 
Leviticus6:30 Kodwana nanyana ngimuphi umhlabelo wehlambululo okulethwa iingazi zawo etendeni lokuhlanganela bona kwenzelwe itethelelo ngawo endaweni ecwengileko akukafuzi udliwe, kodwana utjhiswe.”" 
Leviticus7:1 “Naku umyalo womhlabelo wehlawulo: Lowo kumhlabelo ocwenge khulu. 
Leviticus7:2 Umhlabelo wehlawulo kufuze uhlatjelwe lapha kuhlatjelwa khona umhlabelo wokutjhiswa. Iingazi zawo zifafazwe mahlangothi woke we-aldari. 
Leviticus7:3 Woke umhlwehlwe wawo kufuze kunikelwe ngawo. Lokho kutjho umsila ononileko, umhlwehlwe owembese iinredlo," 
Leviticus7:4 iziso zombili nomhlwehlwe wakhona, amanoni wesifunzi kanye nepundu yesibindi ekufuze ikhutjhwe neziso." 
Leviticus7:5 Umphristi akutjhise koke lokho phezu kwe-aldari kube mnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini. Lokho kumhlabelo wehlawulo. 
Leviticus7:6 Boke abaduna phakathi kwabaphristi bangawudla. Abawudlele endaweni ecwengileko ngombana kumhlabelo ocwenge khulu. 
Leviticus7:7 “Umyalo womhlabelo wehlawulo usebenza ngokufana nowehlambululo: Uzakuba ngowomphristi owenzela umuntu itethelelo ngawo. 
Leviticus7:8 Umphristi owenzela umuntu umhlabelo wokutjhiswa angazithathela isikhumba somhlabelo lowo. 
Leviticus7:9 Woke umnikelo weenthoro obhagwe nge-ondweni, ophekwe ngesithetjhelelo namkha edendelekweni, ungowomphristi osebenza e-aldarini." 
Leviticus7:10 Kodwana woke umnikelo weenthoro ongakaphekwa, kungaba ngodutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva namkha owomileko ungowamadodana ka-Aroni begodu kufuze bawabelane.”" 
Leviticus7:11 “Naku umyalo womhlabelo wetjhebiswano ongahle ulethwe kuSomnini: 
Leviticus7:12 Nakube umuntu uwunikela ngokutjengisa ukuthokoza anakho, kufuze anikele ngezikwa ezimasongo ezidutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva, izikwa ezisipara ezitjhatjhwe ngamafutha we-oliva nezikwa ezimasongo zeflowuru esefiweko ehlanganiswe kuhle ngamafutha we-oliva. Izikwezo zingabi nengumelo." 
Leviticus7:13 Emnikelweni wezikwa awuletha nomhlabelo wetjhebiswano athokoza ngawo, kufuze angezelele izikwa ezimasongo eziwunyelweko." 
Leviticus7:14 Komunye nomunye umhlobo wesikweso, sinye saso kufuze sibe mnikelo kaSomnini. Lokho kungokomphristi ofafaza iingazi zomhlabelo wetjhebiswano." 
Leviticus7:15 Inyama yomhlabelo wetjhebiswano umuntu awunikela ngokuthokoza kufuze idliwe ngelanga enikelwa ngalo, angayitjhiyeli ikusasa." 
Leviticus7:16 “Kodwana nakube umhlabelo olethwa mumuntu ungebanga lesifungo namkha ungowesihle kufuze udliwe ngelanga awunikela ngalo, okuseleko kudliwe ngelanga elilandelako." 
Leviticus7:17 Yoke inyama yomhlabelo esalako bekube lilanga lesithathu, kufuze itjhiswe." 
Leviticus7:18 Nakube inyama yomhlabelo wetjhebiswano idliwa ngelanga lesithathu, umuntu olethe umhlabelo lowo angeze amukeleka begodu angeze wambhadekela. Inyama leyo isinyenyiso begodu nanyana ngubani oyidlako uzazizwa." 
Leviticus7:19 “Inyama yomhlabelo wetjhebiswano ethinta nanyana yini into engakahlambuluki ingeze yadliwa, kufuze itjhiswe. Inyama yomhlabelo wetjhebiswano idliwa ngohlambulukileko kwaphela." 
Leviticus7:20 Umuntu ongakahlambuluki odla inyama yomhlabelo wetjhebiswano owenzelwe uSomnini, akajutjwe ebantwini bekhabo." 
Leviticus7:21 Iye, nanyana ngubani othinta into engakahlambuluki, kungaba mumuntu, isilwana namkha ngikuphi okunyenyisako bese udla inyama yomhlabelo wetjhebiswano owenzelwe uSomnini, akajutjwe ebantwini bekhabo.”" 
Leviticus7:22 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus7:23 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Nakumhlwehlwe namanoni akungadliwa, kungaba ngewekomo, wemvu namkha wembuzi." 
Leviticus7:24 Amanoni wesilwana esifunyenwe sidindilizile namkha sidatjulwe ziimbandana, angasetjenziselwa nanyana ngiliphi ibanga, kodwana angadliwa nakancani." 
Leviticus7:25 Nanyana ngubani odla umhlwehlwe womnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini akajutjwe ebantwini bekhabo. 
Leviticus7:26 Ningalingi nidle inyama isese neengazi, kungaba ngezenyoni namkha zesilwana kuphi nakuphi lapha nizakuhlala khona." 
Leviticus7:27 Umuntu odla nanyana ngiziphi iingazi akajutjwe ebantwini bekhabo.” 
Leviticus7:28 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus7:29 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi kiwo: “Umuntu onikela umhlabelo wetjhebiswano, akanikele ingcenye yawo kuSomnini." 
Leviticus7:30 Akube zizandla zakhe eziletha umnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini. Alethe umhlwehlwe, amanoni nesifuba ukuze isifubeso siphakanyiswe njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini." 
Leviticus7:31 Umphristi uzabese utjhisa umhlwehlwe namanoni e-aldarini, kodwana isifuba singesika-Aroni namadodanakhe." 
Leviticus7:32 Umlenze wangesidleni womhlabelo wetjhebiswano awunikelwe umphristi ube sibiko sakhe," 
Leviticus7:33 okutjho indodana ka-Aroni enikela ngeengazi, umhlwehlwe namanoni womhlabelo e-aldarini. Umlenze wangesidleni uzakuba sisabelo sayo." 
Leviticus7:34 Iye, isifuba nomlenze okuphakanyiswa njengomnikelo osibiko ngikuthethe emihlabelweni yetjhebiswano yama-Israyeli, ngakunikela u-Aroni umphristi omkhulu namadodanakhe bona kube simiso sanini nanini kuma-Israyeli." 
Leviticus7:35 “Lokhu kusisabelo saka-Aroni namadodanakhe esithethwe eminikelweni ekhethekileko kaSomnini ukusuka ngelanga abahlukaniselwa ngalo bona babe baphristi bakaSomnini. 
Leviticus7:36 USomnini wayala bonyana banikelwe isifuba nomlenze ngelanga abazeswa ngalo. Lokhu kuzakuba simiso esijame nini nanini sama-Israyeli iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana.” 
Leviticus7:37 Leyo-ke miyalo emayelana nomhlabelo wokutjhiswa, umnikelo weenthoro, umhlabelo wehlambululo, umhlabelo wehlawulo, umhlabelo wokuhlukaniselwa kanye nomhlabelo wetjhebiswano," 
Leviticus7:38 uSomnini awunikela uMosi phezu kwentaba yeSinayi erhalawumbeni mhlana ayala ama-Israyeli bona alethe umnikelo kuye. 
Leviticus8:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Leviticus8:2 “Yewize no-Aroni namadodanakhe, izambatho zabo, amafutha wokuzesa, ikunzana yomhlabelo wehlambululo, amaqama amabili kanye nomqebethu onezikwa ezinganangumelo," 
Leviticus8:3 bese uhlanganisa umkhambathi woke emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela.” 
Leviticus8:4 Mbala uMosi wenza njengombana uSomnini amyalile, umkhambathi nawo wabuthana emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela." 
Leviticus8:5 UMosi wathi kumkhambathi: “Okuzakwenziwa nje, yinto uSomnini ayale bona yenziwe.”" 
Leviticus8:6 Nje-ke watjhideza u-Aroni namadodanakhe bewabahlambulula ngamanzi. 
Leviticus8:7 Wembesa u-Aroni iphuraphura, wambopha edinini ngomkhungo wokuthekeleza, wamembathisa ijasi ekhambisana ne-efodi bewameleka nge-efodi wayibopha ngebhande endawenayo." 
Leviticus8:8 Wamfaka iporiyana yomphristi bewabeka ngembadeni yeporiyana amatje wefumbe okuyi-urimi nethumimi. 
Leviticus8:9 Ehloko wamthwesa ingwani yomphristi wabophelela ithuthumbo legolidembala okutjho isihlohlo esahlukaniselweko. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi. 
Leviticus8:10 Nje-ke uMosi wathatha amafutha wokuzesa, wazesa ngawo ithaberinakeli nakho koke okungaphakathi, walihlukanisela." 
Leviticus8:11 Enye ingcenye yamafutha wayifafaza e-aldarini kalikhomba, wazesa i-aldari nakho koke okusetjenziswa kilo kanye nesitja sokuhlambela nesinzinziso saso ukuze kwahlukaniselwe." 
Leviticus8:12 Amanye amafutha wawathela ehloko ka-Aroni, wamzesa bona amhlukanisele." 
Leviticus8:13 Watjhideza amadodana ka-Aroni, wawembesa iimphuraphura zabaphristi, wawabopha emadinini ngemikhungo yokuthekeleza bewawathwesa iingwani. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi." 
Leviticus8:14 Waletha ikunzana yomhlabelo wehlambululo. U-Aroni namadodanakhe babeka izandla zabo phezu kwehlokwayo. 
Leviticus8:15 Nje-ke uMosi wahlaba ikunzana leyo, wathatha ingcenye yeengazi zekunzana wazininda phezu kweempundu ezisemajikeni we-aldari ngomunwakhe bona alihlambulule. Iingazi eziseleko wazithululela emanzinzweni we-aldari. Ngendlela leyo-ke, walihlukanisela ngokulenzela itethelelo." 
Leviticus8:16 UMosi wathatha woke umhlwehlwe owembese iinredlo, ipundu yesibindi, iziso zombili nomhlwehlwe wakhona, wakutjhisa e-aldarini." 
Leviticus8:17 Kodwana yoke ikunzana, okutjho isikhumba sayo, inyama nomswani wakhona, wakutjhisela ngaphandle kwekampa. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi." 
Leviticus8:18 Wabese utjhideza iqama lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa. U-Aroni namadodanakhe babeka izandla zabo phezu kwehlokwalo. 
Leviticus8:19 Nje-ke uMosi walihlaba, wafafaza iingazi zalo magegana ne-aldari." 
Leviticus8:20 Walihlahlela bewatjhisa ihloko, izitho nomhlwehlwe." 
Leviticus8:21 Wahlanza iinredlo neenqatha ngamanzi wabese utjhisa iqamelo loke e-aldarini. Lokhu bekumhlabelo wokutjhiswa okumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukeleka kuSomnini. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi." 
Leviticus8:22 Watjhideza godu elinye iqama okuliqama abajanyiswa ngalo. U-Aroni namadodanakhe babeka izandla zabo phezu kwehlokwalo. 
Leviticus8:23 UMosi wahlaba iqamelo, wathatha ingcenye yeengazi zalo, wazininda endlebeni yangesidleni ka-Aroni, kuthubha wangesidleni nakuthubhakghuru wangesidleni." 
Leviticus8:24 Watjhideza amadodana ka-Aroni wafese waninda eendlebeni zawo zangesidleni, kibothubha bawo bangesidleni nakibothubhakghuru bawo bangesidleni. Iingazi eziseleko wazifafaza magegana ne-aldari." 
Leviticus8:25 Wathatha amafuthalo okutjho amanoni womsila nomhlwehlwe weenredlo woke, ipundu yesibindi, iziso zombili nomhlwehlwe wakhona kanye nomlenze wangesidleni," 
Leviticus8:26 ngesiqwebini sesikwa esinganangumelo ebesibekwa phambi kwakaSomnini wathatha sinye isikwa esilisongo, nasinye esihlanganiswe ngamafutha we-oliva kanye nasinye esisipara, wakubeka phezu kwamafutha weqama naphezu komlenze wangesidleni;" 
Leviticus8:27 koke lokhu wakubeka ezandleni zaka-Aroni nezamadodanakhe. Bakuphakamisa njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini. 
Leviticus8:28 Yeke uMosi wakuthatha ezandleni zabo wakutjhisa e-aldarini phezu komhlabelo wokutjhiswa. Lokhu bekumhlabelo wokujanyiswa, okumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukeleka kuSomnini." 
Leviticus8:29 Wathatha godu isifuba seqama wasiphakamisa njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini. Isifuba seqama lokujanyisweso bekusisabelo sakhe. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi. 
Leviticus8:30 UMosi wathatha ingcenye yamafutha wokuzesa nengcenye yeengazi ezise-aldarini wafafaza phezu kwaka-Aroni nezambatho zakhe, naphezu kwamadodanakhe nezambatho zawo. Njalo-ke wahlukanisela u-Aroni nezambatho zakhe, amadodanakhe kanye nezambatho zawo." 
Leviticus8:31 UMosi wathi ku-Aroni namadodanakhe: “Phekelani inyama emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela bese niyigomela khonapho nesikwa esingesiqwebini sokujanyiswa ngombana ngayalwa kwathiwa, ‘Asidliwe ngu-Aroni namadodanakhe.’" 
Leviticus8:32 Kodwana woke amasalela wenyama newesikwa niwatjhise. 
Leviticus8:33 Ningasuki ebungenweni betende lokuhlanganela bekube malanga alikhomba, ukufikela lapha kuphela khona amalanga wokujanyiswa kwenu. Iye, ukujanyiswa kufuze kuthathe amalanga alikhomba." 
Leviticus8:34 USomnini wayala bona okwenziwe namhlanjesi kwenziwe amalanga alikhomba kobana nenzelwe itethelelo. 
Leviticus8:35 Kufuze nihlale ebungenweni betende lokuhlanganela imini nobusuku amalanga alikhomba. Gcinani imiyalo kaSomnini ukuze ningafi ngombana ngilokho nami engayalwa ngakho.” 
Leviticus8:36 Nje-ke u-Aroni namadodanakhe benza koke uSomnini akuyala ngoMosi. 
Leviticus9:1 Kwathi ngelanga lokugcina lokujanyiswa kwabaphristi uMosi wabiza u-Aroni namadodanakhe kanye nabaphathi bakwa-Israyeli," 
Leviticus9:2 wathi ku-Aroni: “Thatha ikunzana ibe mhlabelwakho wehlambululo neqama libe mhlabelwakho wokutjhiswa, kokubili kube msulwa, ukulethe kuSomnini." 
Leviticus9:3 Nje-ke khuluma nama-Israyeli uthi, ‘Lethani ipongo ibe mhlabelo wehlambululo, ikunzana neqama okunomnyaka owodwa nokumsulwa, kube mhlabelo wokutjhiswa," 
Leviticus9:4 ikunzana neqama kube mihlabelo yetjhebiswano ehlatjelwa phambi kwakaSomnini kanye nomnikelo weenthoro ohlanganiswe ngamafutha we-oliva. Iye, khona namhlanje uSomnini uzozibonakalisa kini.’ ”" 
Leviticus9:5 Baletha koke lokho uMosi ayala ngakho phambi kwetende lokuhlanganela, umkhambathi nawo wabandamela, wajama phambi kwakaSomnini." 
Leviticus9:6 Nje-ke uMosi wathi: “Okuzakwenziwa nje, yinto uSomnini ayale bona yenziwe ukuze iphazimulwakhe ibonakale kini.”" 
Leviticus9:7 UMosi wathi ku-Aroni: “Tjhidela e-aldarini unikele umhlabelwakho wehlambululo kanye newokutjhiswa, uzenzele itethelelo, wena nomndenakho. Nikela umhlabelo ongowabantu ubenzele itethelelo njengombana uSomnini ayalile.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Nje-ke, u-Aroni watjhidela e-aldarini wafese wahlaba ikunzana yomhlabelwakhe wehlambululo." 
Leviticus9:9 Amadodanakhe amnikela iingazi, watlubhuza umunwakhe kizo, wazininda eempundwini ze-aldari. Iingazi eziseleko wazithululela emanzinzweni we-aldari." 
Leviticus9:10 Watjhisa umhlwehlwe, iziso nepundu yesibindi somhlabelo wehlambululo e-aldarini. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi." 
Leviticus9:11 Inyama nesikhumba wazitjhisela ngaphandle kwekampa. 
Leviticus9:12 Godu wahlaba umhlabelo wokutjhiswa. Amadodanakhe amnikela iingazi, wazifafaza mahlangothi woke we-aldari." 
Leviticus9:13 Amlethela nomhlabelo wokutjhiswa ngezitho zawo kanye nehloko yakhona; wawutjhisa e-aldarini. 
Leviticus9:14 Wahlanza iinredlo neenqatha, nazo wazitjhisela phezu komhlabelo wokutjhiswa e-aldarini." 
Leviticus9:15 Nje-ke u-Aroni watjhideza imihlabelo yabantu. Wathatha ipongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo, wayihlaba wabenzela ihlambululo njengombana enze ekuthomeni ngomhlabelwakhe wehlambululo." 
Leviticus9:16 Wenza umhlabelo wokutjhiswa njengokomyalo. 
Leviticus9:17 Godu waletha nomnikelo weenthoro: Wanghwatha kiwo isandla, wawutjhisa phezu kwe-aldari. (Lokhu bekungafani nomhlabelo wokutjhiswa ebewulethwa ekuseni.)" 
Leviticus9:18 U-Aroni wahlaba ikunzana neqama kwaba mihlabelo yabantu yetjhebiswano. Amadodanakhe amnikela iingazi wazifafaza mahlangothi woke we-aldari. 
Leviticus9:19 Amafutha wekunzi neweqama, okumsila ononileko, umhlwehlwe owembese iinredlo, iziso nepundu yesibindi," 
Leviticus9:20 amadodanakhe awabeka phezu kweemfuba zemihlabelo yetjhebiswano. U-Aroni watjhisa woke amafutha lawo e-aldarini 
Leviticus9:21 kodwana iimfuba nomlenze wangesidleni wakuphakamisa njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini. Kwaba njengombana uMosi ayalile. 
Leviticus9:22 Nje-ke u-Aroni waphakamisela izandla zakhe ngebantwini wababusisa. Njengombana gade sele aqede ukunikela umhlabelo wehlambululo, wokutjhiswa kanye nowetjhebiswano, wasuka e-aldarini." 
Leviticus9:23 UMosi no-Aroni bangena ngetendeni lokuhlanganela. Kwathi lokha nabaphumako, babusisa abantu. Iphazimulo kaSomnini yabonakala ebantwini boke:" 
Leviticus9:24 Khonapho kwehla umlilo uvela kuZimu waqothula umhlabelo wokutjhiswa namafutha e-aldarini. Boke abantu nababona lokho, bahlokoma ngelizwi elikhulu, bawa ngobuso phasi." 
Leviticus10:1 Amanye amadodana ka-Aroni okunguNadabi no-Abihu, enye nenye yathatha idengela layo, yakha amalahle, yathela netjhwalo kilo beyaliletha phambi kwakaSomnini. Kodwana lawo bekumalahle atjhili uSomnini angazange ayale bona asetjenziswe." 
Leviticus10:2 Nje-ke kwavela umlilo endaweni ecwengileko phambi kwakaSomnini wawaqothula afela phambi kwakhe. 
Leviticus10:3 UMosi wathi ku-Aroni: “USomnini bekatjho khona lokho nasithi, ‘Kilabo abeza kimi ngizazibonakalisa ngicwengile; emehlweni wabantu boke ngizaziphazimulisa.’ ” U-Aroni wathula." 
Leviticus10:4 UMosi wabiza uMitjhayeli no-Elitsafana amadodana ka-Uziyeli, ongusonghwanakhe laka-Aroni, wathi kiwo: “Tjhidelani, nisuse abafowenwaba phambi kwendawo ecwengileko nibase ngaphandle kwekampa.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Mbala batjhidela, babathwala basambethe iimphuraphura njalo, babakhuphela ngaphandle kwekampa njengombana uMosi ayalile." 
Leviticus10:6 UMosi wakhuluma no-Aroni namadodanakhe u-Elazara no-Itamara wathi kibo: “Ningaliseleli iinhluthu zenu zimatlharatlhara begodu ningatlebhuli izambatho zenu. Nanenza lokho nizakufa noSomnini uzakusilingeka ngomkhambathi woke. Kodwana abafowenu okuyindlu yoke yakwa-Israyeli, bangabalileli labo ababhujiswe nguSomnini ngomlilo." 
Leviticus10:7 Ningasuki emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela ukuze ningafi ngombana amafutha wokuzesa kaSomnini aphezu kwenu.” Nje-ke benza njengombana uMosi atjhwile. 
Leviticus10:8 USomnini wathi ku-Aroni: 
Leviticus10:9 “Wena namadodanakho ningaseli iwayini namkha utjwala lokha naningena ngetendeni lokuhlanganela, nakungasinjalo nizakufa. Lokhu kusimiso sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni ngeenzukulwana." 
Leviticus10:10 Kufuze nihlukanise phakathi kokucwengileko nokujayelekileko, okuhlambulukileko nokusilapheleko." 
Leviticus10:11 Godu kufuze nifundise ama-Israyeli zoke iimiso uSomnini ayala ngazo ngoMosi.” 
Leviticus10:12 UMosi wakhuluma no-Aroni namadodanakhe aseleko okungu-Elazara no-Itamara wathi: “Thathani umnikelo weenthoro osele eminikelweni ekhethekileko kuSomnini niwudlele ngeqadi kwe-aldari unganangumelo ngombana ucwenge khulu. 
Leviticus10:13 Udleleni endaweni ecwengileko ngombana usisabelo sakho nesamadodanakho eminikelweni ekhethekileko kuSomnini; kungendlela engayalwa njalo ngayo. 
Leviticus10:14 Kodwana wena, amadodana kanye namadodakazakho ningadla isifuba nomlenze wokuphakanyiswa. Kudleleni endaweni ehlambulukileko ngombana kunikelwe wena, amadodanakho kanye namadodakazakho bona kube sisabelo sakho nabantwabakho emihlabelweni yetjhebiswano yama-Israyeli." 
Leviticus10:15 Lokha nakulethwa amafutha weminikelo ekhethekileko e-aldarini, umlenze nesifuba sokuphakanyiswa kufuze nakho kulethwe njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini. Umlenze nesifubesi kuzakuba sisabelo senu nabantwabenu imihla ngemihla, kube njengombana uSomnini ayalile.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Kuthe lokha uMosi nabuzisisa ngepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo, wafunyana bona selebe itjhisiwe. Nje-ke wasilingekelela u-Elazara no-Itamara okumadodana ka-Aroni aseleko, wathi kiwo:" 
Leviticus10:17 “Kubayini ningadleli umhlabelo wehlambululo endaweni ecwengileko na? Umhlabelo lo ucwenge khulu, wanikelwa nina bona ususe imilandu yomkhambathi ngokuwenzela itethelelo kuSomnini." 
Leviticus10:18 Akhese nithi niyaqala, iingazi zepongo azange bezisasiwa ngendaweni ecwengileko. Bekufuze niyidlele endaweni ecwengileko njengombana ngayala.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Yeke u-Aroni waphendula uMosi wathi: “Qala, namhlanjesi abantu banikele umhlabelwabo wehlambululo nomhlabelwabo wokutjhiswa phambi kwakaSomnini, nokho into enjalo nami ingehlele! Nakube bengidle umhlabelo wehlambululo namhlanje, bekuzakuba kuhle lokho phambi kwakaSomnini na?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Kuthe bona uMosi ezwe lokhu, waneliseka." 
Leviticus11:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni bonyana 
Leviticus11:2 batjele ama-Israyeli bathi: “Kizo zoke iimphili ezikhona enarheni, nanzi eningazidla:" 
Leviticus11:3 Zoke iinlwana ezihlukanisa kabili iinqatha bezetjise zidleni. 
Leviticus11:4 “Kodwana lezo ezetjisa kwaphela namkha ezahlukanisa iinqatha kwaphela, ningazidli. Ikamela liyetjisa kodwana iinqatha zalo azikahlukani; yeke lisilaphele kini." 
Leviticus11:5 Nembila iyetjisa kodwana iindlawu zayo azikahlukani; isilaphele kini. 
Leviticus11:6 Umqasa nawo uyetjisa kodwana iindlawu zawo azikahlukani; usilaphele kini. 
Leviticus11:7 Godu iwotji ineenqatha ezihlukene kabili kodwana ayetjisi; isilaphele kini. 
Leviticus11:8 Ningadli inyamazo begodu ningathinti iindumbu zazo; zisilaphele kini. 
Leviticus11:9 “Kizo zoke eziphila ngemanzini elwandle nemlanjeni, ningadla nanyana yini eneengwedlo neempepha." 
Leviticus11:10 Kodwana nanyana ngisiphi isiphili esihlala ngelwandle namkha ngemilanjeni esinganangwedlo neempepha okutjho eziphithizelako nezikulu, zisinyenyiso kini." 
Leviticus11:11 Nizinyenye ezinjalo, inyamazo ningayidli neendumbu zazo zizakuhlala zingezinyenyisako kini." 
Leviticus11:12 Nanyana yini engemanzini enganangwedlo neempepha isinyenyiso kini. 
Leviticus11:13 “Iinyoni ezisinyenyiso kini neningakafaneli ukuzidla ngilezi: yoke imihlobo yamadlanga," 
Leviticus11:14 imihlobo yabokholo," 
Leviticus11:15 yoke imihlobo yamagubulu," 
Leviticus11:16 iinciliba, yoke imihlobo yeenrhululurhulu, yoke imihlobo yamakhozi, abotlhame, amalanda," 
Leviticus11:17 abonogolantethe, abodoyi, amagqofu nabonomaphelaphelana." 
Leviticus11:18 “Zoke iinunwana ezineempiko nemilenzana zisinyenyiso kini. 
Leviticus11:19 Kodwana phakathi kweenunwana ezineempiko nemilenzana, ningadla lezo ezinamaqondo wokweqayeqa ehlabathini." 
Leviticus11:20 Kizo ningadla: isikhonyani ngokwemihlobaso, amaboni ngemihlobawo, amadiye ngokwemihlobawo kanye nezinye iintethe." 
Leviticus11:21 Zoke ezinye iinunwana ezineempiko nemilenzana zisinyenyiso kini. 
Leviticus11:22 “Nasi indlela enizakusilaphala ngayo: Nanyana ngubani othinta isidumbu sesiphili esisilapheleko uzokuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe. 
Leviticus11:23 Nanyana ngubani othwala isidumbu sesiphileso kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe, kodwana uzokuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:24 Zoke iinlwana ezineenqatha ezingakahlukani kabili begodu zingetjisi, zisilaphele kini; nanyana ngubani othinta iindumbu zazo uzakuba ngosilapheleko." 
Leviticus11:25 Zoke iinlwana ezikhamba ngeendlawu zisilaphele kini. Nanyana ngubani othinta iindumbu zazo uzakusilaphala bekuhlwe. 
Leviticus11:26 Nanyana ngubani othwala isidumbu sazo kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe, kodwana uzokuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe ngombana zisilaphele kini." 
Leviticus11:27 “Phakathi kweenkhakhabi eziphithizela ehlabathini, nanzi ezisilapheleko kini: iimfukwana namakhondlo, yoke imihlobo yeembhadwa nabononkghadanyana kanye namanwabu." 
Leviticus11:28 Lezo zisilaphele kini phakathi kwazo zoke iimbandana ezikhakhaba ehlabathini. Othinta iindumbu zazo uzakuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe. 
Leviticus11:29 Nanyana yini ewelwa ziindumbezo izakuba ngesilapheleko, kungaba ngeyenziwe ngesigodo, ngetjhila, ngesikhumba, ngomgodla namkha ngisiphi isitja esisetjenziselwa nanyana yini. Yeke kufuze sitlubhuzwe ngemanzini kodwana sizakuba ngesisilapheleko bekuhlwe. Emva kwalokho sizakuhlambuluka." 
Leviticus11:30 Okungaphakathi kwesitja somdaka esiwelwa nanyana ngisiphi seendumbezo, kusilaphele. Ngalokho kufuze nisephule." 
Leviticus11:31 Koke ukudla okuqaphakelwe mamanzi wesitjeso, kuzakuba ngokusilapheleko. Zoke iinselo ezingahle ziselelwe ngaphakathi kwaso zisilaphele." 
Leviticus11:32 Nanyana yini ewelwa ziindumbezo, isilaphele. Kungaba siwulu somdaka namkha iziko, akwephulwe ngombana kusilaphele begodu kuzakuhlala kusilaphele kini." 
Leviticus11:33 Nakumthombo namkha umphathamanzi kuzakuba ngokuhlambulukileko, kodwana othinta isidumbu esiwele ngaphakathi, usilaphele." 
Leviticus11:34 Nanyana ngiyiphi imbewu ekufuze itjalwe, nayiwelwa sidumbu sazo izakuba ngehlambulukileko," 
Leviticus11:35 kodwana nakube imbewu ithambile bese kuthi isidumbu sazo siwele imbewu leyo, khona-ke isilaphele kini." 
Leviticus11:36 “Nakube kuyenzeka bona kufe isilwana enisidlako, othinta isidumbu sesilwaneso uzakuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:37 Loyo odla inyama yesilwana esizifeleko kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe begodu uzakuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe. Kanti-ke nothwala isidumbu sesilwaneso kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe abe ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe. 
Leviticus11:38 “Zoke iimbandana ezikhakhaba ehlabathini ziyanyenyisa kini, azingadliwa," 
Leviticus11:39 kungaba ngokurhurhubako, okukhakhaba ngemilenze emine namkha okuneenyawo ezinengi. Koke okuphithizela ehlabathini ningakudli ngombana kuyanyenyisa kini." 
Leviticus11:40 Ningazenzi bona nibe ngabanyenyekako ngebanga lananyana ngisiphi isikhakhabi esiphithizelako. Ningazisilaphazi ngazo ukuze ningasilaphali. 
Leviticus11:41 NginguSomnini uZimenu, ngalokho zahlukaniseleni mina. Yibani ngabacwengileko ngombana mina ngicwengile. Ningazisilaphazi nanganyana yini ekhakhaba ehlabathini." 
Leviticus11:42 Iye, nginguSomnini owanikhupha enarheni yeGibhide bona ngibe nguZimu kini. Ngebangelo yibani ngabacwengileko ngombana mina ngicwengile." 
Leviticus11:43 “Lowo-ke mthetho ophathelene neenlwana, iinyoni, iimphili zoke eziphithizela ngemanzini nezikhakhaba ehlabathini." 
Leviticus11:44 Ngawo nizakwazi ukuhlukanisa phakathi kokuhlambulukileko nokusilapheleko, naphakathi kweemphili ezidliwako nezingadliwako.”" 
Leviticus12:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus12:2 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi kiwo: “Lokha umfazi osidisi nabeletha umntwana omsana, uzakuba ngosilapheleko amalanga alikhomba. Njengemalangenakhe wokubona inyanga, uzakuba ngosilapheleko." 
Leviticus12:3 Akuthi ngelanga lobunane kusokwe isana. 
Leviticus12:4 Umfazi lo kufuze ahlalele ubudlezana amanye amalanga amatjhumi amathathu nantathu ngaphambi kobana ahlambuluke eengazini zokubeletha kwakhe. Akukafaneli athinte litho elicwengileko begodu angangeni endaweni ecwengileko bekuphelele amalangakhe wokuhlanjululwa. 
Leviticus12:5 “Nakube ubeletha umntwana omntazana, uzakuba ngosilapheleko njengemalangenakhe wokubona inyanga, kodwana kube ziimveke ezimbili. Uzakuhlalela ubudlezana amanye amalanga amatjhumi asithandathu nasithandathu ngaphambi kobana ahlambuluke eengazini zokubeletha kwakhe." 
Leviticus12:6 “Lokha amalangakhe wokuhlanjululwa sele aphelele, kungaba ngewomntwana omsana namkha omntazana, kufuze alethe imvana enomnyaka munye kumphristi emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela kube mhlabelo wokutjhiswa. Alethe godu izuba lommango namkha izutjana lekhaya kube mhlabelwakhe wehlambululo." 
Leviticus12:7 Uzakwenza umhlabelo lowo phambi kwakaSomnini, azenzele itethelelo. Ngokunjalo uzakuba ngohlambulukileko ekusilaphaleni kwakhe kweengazi. “Lowo-ke, mthetho womfazi obeletha umntwana omsana namkha omntazana." 
Leviticus12:8 Nakube akanamandla wokuletha imvana, akalethe amazuba amabili wommango namkha amazutjana amabili wekhaya, elinye libe ngelomhlabelo wokutjhiswa bese elinye liba ngelomhlabelo wehlambululo. Yeke umphristi uzamenzela itethelelo, abe ngohlambulukileko.”" 
Leviticus13:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni wathi: 
Leviticus13:2 “Lokha umuntu nanendawo evuvukileko emzimbeni nanyana anokukaruka namkha ibala elikhanyelako okungahle kubonakale inga likhwekhwe, akalethwe ku-Aroni umphristi namkha kwenye yamadodanakhe." 
Leviticus13:3 Umphristi loyo uzabese uhlola indawo enesifo esikhumbeni. Nakube uboya besikhumba buphenduke baba mhlophe nokobana isifo singenelele esikhumbeni, kulikhwekhwe lokho. Kuzakuthi umphristi nabona lokho amemezele bona umuntu loyo usilaphele." 
Leviticus13:4 Kodwana nakube isilonda siyakhanyela kwaphela nokobana asikangeneleli esikhumbeni, noboya abukaphenduki baba mhlophe, umphristi akakhuphe umuntu loyo hlangana nabantu amalanga alikhomba." 
Leviticus13:5 Ngelanga lekhomba umphristi akamhlole godu. Nangabe kubonakala emehlweni womphristi bona isilonda asikasabalali esikhumbeni, kufuze amkhuphe godu amanye amalanga alikhomba." 
Leviticus13:6 Kuzakuthi ngelanga lekhomba amhlole godu. Nangabe isilonda asisakhanyeli kuhle begodu asikasabalali esikhumbeni, umphristi uzakumemezela bona uhlambulukile. Lokho sesibabu nje kwaphela. Umuntu loyo akahlanze izambatho zakhe, ahlambuluke." 
Leviticus13:7 Kodwana nangabe isibabu leso sisabalala nesikhumba emva kobana sele azibonakalise kumphristi ngokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, kufuze azibonakalise phambi komphristi godu." 
Leviticus13:8 Umphristi uzabese uyamhlola. Nangabe isibabu sisabalele nesikhumba, umphristi uzakumemezela bona usilaphele. Likhwekhwe lelo." 
Leviticus13:9 “Nangabe umuntu unekhwekhwe, kufuze alethwe kumphristi." 
Leviticus13:10 Umphristi akamhlole, nakube mbala kunendawo ekhanyela ngokuvuvuka esikhumbeni okuphendule uboya baba mhlophe nokobana sekunesilonda," 
Leviticus13:11 lelo likhwekhwe elingeneleleko esikhumbeni. Nje-ke umphristi uzakumemezela bona usilaphele. Loyo-ke akahlukaniswe nabantu kwesikhatjhana ngombana usilaphele. 
Leviticus13:12 Kodwana nangabe isifo sisabalele nesikhumba ukufika lapha sele sembese umzimba woke womuntu, ihloko neenyawo okutjho zoke izitho ezibonakala kumphristi," 
Leviticus13:13 umphristi uzabese uyamhlola. Nangabe isikhumba sakhe simhlope, uzakumemezela bona uhlambulukile. Nanyana isifo besele sembese woke umzimba, ungohlambulukileko." 
Leviticus13:14 Kodwana nakube masinyana uba nesilonda, khona-ke usilaphele." 
Leviticus13:15 Umphristi akahlole isilondeso bese amemezele bona umuntu loyo usilaphele. Isilonda sisilaphele, silikhwekhwe." 
Leviticus13:16 Kodwana nakube isilonda siyabutha bese siba mhlophe, akeze kumphristi," 
Leviticus13:17 umphristi amhlole. Nangabe isilonda siphenduke saba mhlophe, umphristi uzakumemezela bona uhlambulukile; yeke mbala uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:18 “Nangabe umuntu unethumba elipholako esikhumbeni sakhe 
Leviticus13:19 bese kuthi esikhundleni salo kube nokuvuvuka okubuthako namkha ibala elibovu elingakhanyeliko, naloyo kufuze azibonakalise phambi komphristi." 
Leviticus13:20 Umphristi akamhlole. Nangabe indawo ethintekileko ibonakala bona sele ingenelele esikhumbeni noboya buphenduke baba mhlophe, umphristi uzakumemezela bona usilaphele. Kulikhwekhwe eliqubuke esilondeni." 
Leviticus13:21 Kodwana nangabe umphristi uhlola indawo ethintekileko afunyanise bona ayikangeneleli esikhumbeni nokobana ayikakhanyeli kuhle begodu uboya abukaphenduki baba mhlophe, khona-ke umphristi akamkhuphe hlangana nabantu amalanga alikhomba." 
Leviticus13:22 Nangabe ibala lisabalala nesikhumba, umphristi uzakumemezela bona usilaphele. Likhwekhwe-ke lelo." 
Leviticus13:23 Kodwana nakube ibala lihlala linjalo alisabalali, kusibazi sethumba kwaphela. Umphristi uzakumemezela bona umuntu loyo uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:24 “Nakube umuntu unenceba lokutjha esikhumbeni bese isilonda sakhona siba nebala elimthuthu namkha elimhlophe 
Leviticus13:25 umphristi akalihlole ibalelo. Nakube uboya bebala buphenduke baba mhlophe begodu ibala libonakala lingenelele esikhumbeni, lelo likhwekhwe elivele encebeni lokutjha. Yeke umphristi uzakumemezela bona usilaphele. Lokho sisifo sekhwekhwe." 
Leviticus13:26 Kodwana nakube umphristi uyalihlola bese afunyanise bona uboya bebala abusi mhlophe nokobana alikangeneleli esikhumbeni begodu alikhanyeli kuhle, akamkhuphe hlangana nabantu amalanga alikhomba." 
Leviticus13:27 Kuzakuthi ngelanga lekhomba umphristi amhlole godu. Nakube lisabalala nesikhumba akamemezele bona umuntu loyo usilaphele. Lokho sisifo sekhwekhwe. 
Leviticus13:28 Kodwana nakube ibala lihlala lisendaweni eyodwa alisabalali nesikhumba begodu alikhanyeli kuhle, lokho sekuvuvuka kwenceba lokutjha nje. Umphristi uzakumemezela bona uhlambulukile ngombana lokho sibazi sokutjha." 
Leviticus13:29 “Nakube indoda namkha umfazi unesifo ehloko nanyana esilevini," 
Leviticus13:30 umphristi akahlole isifeso. Nakube sibonakala singenelele esikhumbeni nokobana uboya obukiso bumthubi ngombala begodu buthambile, umphristi uzakumemezela bona umuntu loyo usilaphele. Lobo kubuthana bembuzana okulikhwekhwe lehloko namkha lesilevu." 
Leviticus13:31 Nakube umphristi uhlola ubuthana bembuzanobo, bekubonakale bona akukangeneleli esikhumbeni nokobana akunaboya obunzima tshu phezu kwabo, khona umphristi uzakhupha umuntu onesifo hlangana nabantu amalanga alikhomba." 
Leviticus13:32 Ngelanga lekhomba umphristi uzakuhlola isifo godu. Nakube ubuthana bembuzana abukasabalali begodu abukangeneleli esikhumbeni nokobana akunaboya obumthubi," 
Leviticus13:33 umuntu loyo uzakurhunwa, kodwana lapha kunobuthana bembuzana khona angakurhuni. Umphristi uzamkhupha hlangana nabantu amanye amalanga alikhomba." 
Leviticus13:34 Ngelanga lekhomba umphristi akahlole ubuthana bembuzana godu. Nakube ubuthana bembuzana abukasabalali begodu abukangeneleli esikhumbeni, khona-ke umphristi uzakumemezela bona uhlambulukile. Yeke umuntu loyo uzakuhlanza izambatho zakhe abe ngohlambulukileko." 
Leviticus13:35 Kodwana nakube ubuthana bembuzana busabalala nesikhumba emva kokuhlanjululwa kwakhe," 
Leviticus13:36 umphristi uzamhlola godu. Nakube ubuthana bembuzana busabalele nesikhumba, akudingeki bona umphristi ahlole uboya obumthubi. Nanjalo ungosilapheleko." 
Leviticus13:37 Kodwana nangabe ekuboneni komphristi ubuthana bembuzana bujame ndawonye noboya obunzima bumilile, khona-ke ubuthana bembuzana bupholile nomuntu uhlambulukile. Yeke umphristi uzakumemezela bona uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:38 “Nakube indoda nanyana umfazi unamabala amhlophe esikhumbeni," 
Leviticus13:39 umphristi akamhlole. Nangabe amabala asesikhumbeni amthuthu, lobo bumhlophe besikhumba obujayelekileko, umuntu loyo uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:40 “Nakube indoda ineenhluthu eziqothukileko ehlokwayo yaba liphandla, ihlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:41 Godu nakube indoda iqothuke iinhluthu ukusuka epandlayo, ihlambulukile ngombana seliphandla nje." 
Leviticus13:42 Kodwana nakube kunebala elibovu nokumhlophe phezu kwephandla nepandla, lokho kungatjho bona likhwekhwe elisabalalako." 
Leviticus13:43 Yeke umphristi kufuze amhlole. Nangabe ukuvuvuka kwebala phezu kwephandla lakhe namkha epandla kunebala elibovu nokumhlophe elifana nekhwekhwe lomzimba," 
Leviticus13:44 khona-ke sekumumuntu onekhwekhwe nosilapheleko. Umphristi kufuze amemezele bona usilaphele. Isifo sakhe siphezu kwehloko. 
Leviticus13:45 “Umuntu onesifo sekhwekhwe kufuze embathe amanikiniki abe aliselele neenhluthu zakhe zimatlharatlhara bese avale isibhena sakhe somlomo esingehla arhuwelele athi, ‘Ngisilaphele! Ngisilaphele!’" 
Leviticus13:46 Uzakuhlala angosilapheleko njalo mlunga anesifeso. Usilaphele yena begodu kufuze ahlale yedwa endaweni engaphandle kwekampa.” 
Leviticus13:47 “Kungaba nokukghora esambathweni esenziwe ngewulu namkha ngelineni," 
Leviticus13:48 namkha phezu kwentambo ephothiweko netjhila elenziwe ngelineni nanyana ngewulu namkha phezu kwesikhumba esitjhukiweko nanyana yini yesikhumba. 
Leviticus13:49 Nakube kubonakala ubuhlazana namkha ububovana phezu kwesambatho, isikhumba esitjhukiweko, intambo ephothiweko netjhila, namkha naphezu kwananyana yini yesikhumba, kukghora-ke lokho. Okunjalo akutjengiswe umphristi." 
Leviticus13:50 Umphristi uzakuhlola indawo ethintekileko bese ubekela into leyo eqadi amalanga alikhomba. 
Leviticus13:51 Kuzakuthi ngelanga lekhomba ayihlole godu. Nakube ukukghora kusabalele nesambatho, intambo ephothiweko, itjhila nesikhumba esitjhukiweko namkha kungaba nanyana yini eyenziwe ngesikhumba, lokho kukukghora okukhambeleleko. Ipahla leyo isilaphele." 
Leviticus13:52 Umphristi akatjhise nanyana yini enokukghora okukhambeleleko eyenziwe ngewulu namkha ngelineni, kungaba sisambatho, intambo ephothiweko namkha itjhila nananyana yini eyenziwe ngesikhumba. Iye, nayinokukghora okukhambeleleko kufuze itjhiswe." 
Leviticus13:53 “Nangabe umphristi uthi nahlolako afunyane bona ukukghora akukasabalali nesambatho, intambo ephothiweko, itjhila namkha nanyana yini eyenziwe ngesikhumba," 
Leviticus13:54 khona-ke uzakuyala bona kuhlanzwe into enokukghora leyo abe ayibekele eqadi amanye amalanga alikhomba. 
Leviticus13:55 Emva kwalokho umphristi kufuze ahlole into leyo. Nakube indawo ethintekileko ayikatjhugululi umbala namkha ayikasabalali, nanyana injalo isilaphele. Into leyo ayitjhiswe nanyana ukukghora kungemuva namkha ngaphambili kwayo." 
Leviticus13:56 “Kodwana nakube umphristi uhlola into leyo afunyane ukukghora kufiphele ngemva kokobana ihlanziwe beyabekelwa eqadi, kuzakufanela bona adabule indawo ethintekileko esambathweni, entweni yesikhumba namkha entanjeni ephothiweko netjhileni." 
Leviticus13:57 Nakube kuyenzeka ukukghora kuvele godu esambathweni, entanjeni ephothiweko, etjhileni nakunanyana yini yesikhumba, kutjho bona kuyasabalala. Into enokukghora leyo ayitjhiswe." 
Leviticus13:58 Kodwana isambatho, intambo ephothiweko, itjhila nanyana yini yesikhumba ukukghora okususiweko kikho emva kokobana kuhlanziwe, kufuze ihlanzwe ngokwesibili. Nje-ke kuzakuba ngokuhlambulukileko." 
Leviticus13:59 “Lowo mthetho wokukghora okuhlolwa ngawo bona isambatho sewulu namkha selineni, intambo ephothiweko, itjhila nanyana yini yesikhumba kuhlambulukile namkha kusilaphele.”" 
Leviticus14:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Leviticus14:2 “Naku umthetho womuntu ogade anekhwekhwe lokha nahlanjululwako: Akalethwe kumphristi 
Leviticus14:3 ozakuphumela ngaphandle kwekampa bona ayomhlola. Nakube ikhwekhwe lipholile," 
Leviticus14:4 umphristi uzakuyala bona ozokuhlanjululwa alethelwe iinyoni ezimbili ezihlambulukileko, isigojwana somsedari, nomtiya otlerebede nehlukuzu lehisophi." 
Leviticus14:5 Umphristi uzakuyala bona kukhiwe amanzi agelezako ngomjeka bese kuhlatjelwa enye yeenyoni ngehla kwawo. 
Leviticus14:6 Bese uthatha enye inyoni ephilako, isigojwana somsedari, umtiya otlerebede nehlukuzu lehisophi akutlubhuze eengazini zenyoni ehlatjelwe ngehla komjeka onamanzi akhiweko." 
Leviticus14:7 Akafafaze umuntu ozokuhlanjululwa loyo kalikhomba, amemezele bona uhlambulukile. Nje-ke akalise inyoni ephilako iphaphele emmangweni." 
Leviticus14:8 “Ohlanjululwako kuzakufanela ahlanze izambatho zakhe, arhune iinhluthu noboya boke emzimbeni bese uyaduda. Yeke uzakuba ngohlambulukileko. Emva kwalokho uzakubuyela ngekampeni nokho ahlale ngaphandle kwetende lakhe amalanga alikhomba." 
Leviticus14:9 Ngelanga lekhomba akagude zoke iinhluthu ehloko, esilevini namatjhiya. Iye, akasuse boke uboya emzimbeni. Nje-ke uzakuhlanza izambatho zakhe bese uyaduda. Yeke uzakuba ngohlambulukileko." 
Leviticus14:10 “Ngelanga lobunane ohlanjululwako loyo kufuze alethe amaqamanyana amabili nemvana esikazi enomnyaka, zoke zibe msulwa. Akalethe namathungana amathathu weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva kanye nekwana yamafutha we-oliva." 
Leviticus14:11 Umphristi omhlambululako uzamletha kanye nezintwezo phambi kwakaSomnini emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus14:12 Yeke umphristi uzakuthatha linye lamaqamanyana lawo alihlabe libe mhlabelo wehlawulo kanye nekwana yamafutha bese uziphakamisa njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini. 
Leviticus14:13 Iqamanyanelo alihlatjelwe endaweni ecwengileko lapha kuhlatjelwa khona umhlabelo wehlambululo nomhlabelo wokutjhiswa. Umhlabelo wehlawulo njengomhlabelo wehlambululo ungowomphristi, ungocwenge khulu." 
Leviticus14:14 Umphristi uzakuthatha ingcenye yeengazi zomhlabelo wehlawulo azininde endlebeni yangesidleni, kuthubha wangesidleni naphezu kothubhakghuru wangesidleni emuntwini ohlanjululwako." 
Leviticus14:15 Yeke uzakuthatha ikwana yamafutha we-oliva awathele ngentendeni yesandla sakhe sesincele. 
Leviticus14:16 Nje-ke atlubhuze ngokhombabantu wangesidleni emafutheni angentendenakhe yangesinceleni, afafaze amafutha lawo kalikhomba phambi kwakaSomnini." 
Leviticus14:17 Amanye amafutha asentendeni yomphristi uzawaninda phezu kweengazi zomhlabelo wehlawulo endlebeni yangesidleni, kuthubha wangesidleni naphezu kothubhakghuru wangesidleni emuntwini ohlanjululwako." 
Leviticus14:18 Amafutha aseleko entendeni yomphristi uzawatjhatjha ehloko yomuntu loyo. Yeke umphristi uzakwenzela umuntu loyo itethelelo phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Leviticus14:19 Uzakunikela umhlabelo wehlambululo ukwenzela itethelelo yaloyo okufuze ahlanjululwe ekusilaphaleni kwakhe. Emva kwalokho ahlabe umhlabelo wokutjhiswa. 
Leviticus14:20 Umphristi uzakutjhisa umhlabelo wokutjhiswa noweenthoro phezu kwe-aldari. Ngendlela leyo umphristi uzamenzela itethelelo; yeke umuntu loyo uzakuba ngohlambulukileko. 
Leviticus14:21 “Kodwana nakube umuntu uchakile begodu akanamandla wokwenza koke lokhu, uzakuthatha iqamanyana elilodwa libe mhlabelo wehlawulo osibiko kuSomnini ukumenzela itethelelo. Akalethe umnikelo weenthoro okulithungana leflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva, ikwana yamafutha we-oliva," 
Leviticus14:22 amazuba amabili wommango namkha amazutjana amabili wekhaya kube ngilokho angakukghona. Elinye libe ngelomhlabelo wehlambululo bese elinye liba ngelomhlabelo wokutjhiswa. 
Leviticus14:23 Kufuze alethe lokho kumphristi ngelanga lobunane emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela phambi kwakaSomnini bona kube ngekokuhlanjululwa kwakhe. 
Leviticus14:24 Umphristi uzakuthatha imvana yomhlabelo wehlawulo nekwana yamafutha we-oliva bese ukuphakamisa njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini. 
Leviticus14:25 Uzakuhlaba imvana yomhlabelo wehlawulo, athathe ingcenye yeengazi zayo azininde endlebeni yangesidleni, kuthubha wangesidleni naphezu kothubhakghuru wangesidleni emuntwini ohlanjululwako." 
Leviticus14:26 Godu umphristi uzakuthela amanye wamafutha ngentendeni yesandla sakhe sesincele 
Leviticus14:27 bese ufafaza amafutha angentendenakhe yangesinceleni ngokhombabantu wangesidleni kalikhomba phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Leviticus14:28 Amanye amafutha asentendeni yomphristi uzawaninda phezu kweengazi zomhlabelo wehlawulo endlebeni yangesidleni, kuthubha wangesidleni naphezu kothubhakghuru wangesidleni emuntwini ohlanjululwako." 
Leviticus14:29 Amafutha aseleko entendeni yomphristi uzawatjhatjha ehloko yomuntu loyo. Yeke umphristi uzakwenzela umuntu loyo itethelelo phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Leviticus14:30 Umphristi uzakwenza imihlabelo ngamazutjana, kube ngendlela umuntu loyo aphumelela ngayo ukunikela." 
Leviticus14:31 Elinye libe ngelomhlabelo wehlambululo bese kuthi elinye libe ngelomhlabelo wokutjhiswa linikelwe kanye nomnikelo weenthoro. Ngendlela leyo umphristi uzakwenza itethelelo yomuntu ohlanjululwako loyo phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Leviticus14:32 “Lowo mthetho womuntu onekhwekhwe, ozihlulekelako ukuletha imihlabelo yehlambululo ejayelekileko.”" 
Leviticus14:33 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni wathi: 
Leviticus14:34 “Lokha nanifika enarheni yeKanana enganinikela yona bona ibe lilifa lenu bese ngibangela ukukghora endlini enye nenye enarhenenu," 
Leviticus14:35 umninindlu kuzakufanela bona eze kumphristi azokubika athi, ‘Ngibona kwangasuthi kwamapha kungene umkhokha.’" 
Leviticus14:36 Yeke umphristi uzakuyala bona kukhutjhwe koke okungendlini ngaphambi kokobana angene bona azoyihlola. Nakungasinjalo koke okungendlini kungahle kumenyezelwe bona kusilaphele. Nasele kukhutjhwe koke, umphristi uzakungena bona ahlole indlu." 
Leviticus14:37 Nje-ke umphristi uzakuhlola umkhokha lowo. Nangabe ufunyana bona iboda linokukghora okuhlazana namkha okubovana okubonakala kungenelele ebodeni," 
Leviticus14:38 umphristi uzakuphuma ngendlini ajame emnyango ngaphandle bese uvala indlu leyo amalanga alikhomba. 
Leviticus14:39 Ngelanga lekhomba umphristi uzakubuya azokuhlola indlu. Nangabe ufunyana ukukghora kusabalele neboda lendlu," 
Leviticus14:40 uzakuyala bonyana kukhutjhwe amatje anokukghora, aphoselwe ngaphandle komuzi ezaleni." 
Leviticus14:41 Uzakwenza bona kurhwayiwe umpharo wendlu ngaphakathi, kuthi koke okuqeqebuliweko, kuthululelwe ngaphandle komuzi ezaleni." 
Leviticus14:42 Kuzakuthathwa amanye amatje ajamiselele alahliweko bese usinda indlu leyo butjha ngehlabathi. 
Leviticus14:43 “Nakube ukukghora kuyabuya ngendlinapho bekusabalale ngemva kokobana sele kususwe amatje, kwarhwaywa bekwasindwa," 
Leviticus14:44 umphristi kufuze abuyele ayokuhlola godu. Nakubonakala bona isifo sisabalele nendlu godu, yeke lokho kukukghora okukhambeleleko. Indlu leyo isilaphele." 
Leviticus14:45 Yeke ayibhuruzwe indlu leyo, kuthi yoke iququ okutjho amatje, iingodo nehlabathi ebekusindwe ngayo, kukhutjhelwe ngaphandle komuzi ezaleni." 
Leviticus14:46 Loyo ozakungena ngendlini ngesikhathi sokuvalwa kwayo uzakuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe; 
Leviticus14:47 naloyo olala namkha adlele ngendlini leyo uzakuhlanza izambatho zakhe. 
Leviticus14:48 “Kodwana nangabe umphristi uthi nangena ngendlini azoyihlola, afunyane bona ukukghora akukasabalali ngemva kokobana indlu besele isindiwe, uzakumemezela bona indlu leyo ihlambulukile okutjho bona ukukghora kusukile." 
Leviticus14:49 Mayelana nokuhlanjululwa kwendlu leyo umniniyo uzaletha iinyoni ezimbili, isigojwana somsedari, umtiya otlerebede nehlukuzu lehisophi." 
Leviticus14:50 Umphristi uzakuyala bona kukhiwe amanzi agelezako ngomjeka bese kuhlatjelwa enye yeenyoni ngehla kwawo. 
Leviticus14:51 Godu akathathe isigojwana somsedari, ihlukuzu lehisophi nomtiya otlerebede kanye nenyoni ephilako bese utlubhuza izintwezo ngemanzini aneengazi zenyoni ehlatjiweko, afafaze indlu leyo kalikhomba." 
Leviticus14:52 Ngendlela leyo uzabe uhlambulula indlu ngeengazi zenyoni leyo, amanzi asemjekeni, inyoni ephilako, isigojwana somsedari, ihisophi nangomtiya otlerebede." 
Leviticus14:53 Uzakulisa inyoni ephilako iphaphele ngaphandle komuzi emmangweni. Ngalokho uzabe enzele indlu leyo ihlambululo, ibe ngehlambulukileko." 
Leviticus14:54 “Lowo-ke mthetho wanyana ngisiphi isifo sekhwekhwe, ubuthana bembuzana," 
Leviticus14:55 ukukghora engutjeni nangendlini," 
Leviticus14:56 ukuvuvuka, ukukaruka nebala." 
Leviticus14:57 Nako-ke umthetho wezifezo umuntu angakghona ukuhlukanisa ngawo bona into isilaphele nini namkha ihlambuluke nini.” 
Leviticus15:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni wathi 
Leviticus15:2 abakhulume nama-Israyeli bathi: “Nangabe indoda inokuvuza ebudodeni bayo, ukuvuza kwayokho kusilaphele." 
Leviticus15:3 Isilaphele nanyana ukuvuza kwayo kuthonta namkha kungasathonti. Iye, ukuvuza kukusilaphala kiyo." 
Leviticus15:4 Yoke imibhede ovuzako alala kiyo izakuba ngesilapheleko nezinto zoke ahlala phezu kwazo zisilaphele. 
Leviticus15:5 Woke umuntu othinta umbhede womuntu onjalo kuzakufanela bona ahlanze izambatho zakhe, adude bese uhlala angosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:6 Woke umuntu ohlala phezu kwananyana yini ehlezwi ngovuzako kuzakufanela bona ahlanze izambatho zakhe, adude bese uhlala angosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:7 Othinta umzimba womuntu ovuzako kuzakufanela bona ahlanze izambatho zakhe, adude bese uhlala angosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:8 Nakube ovuzako ukhafulela ohlambulukileko, khona-ke ohlambulukileko kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe, adude bese uhlala angosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:9 Esinye nesinye isihlalo senjomani ekhwelwa ngovuzako sizakuba ngesisilapheleko. 
Leviticus15:10 Iye, nanyana ngubani othinta into egade ihlezwi namkha ilelwe ngovuzako uzakuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe. Begodu othwala into enjalo kuzakufanela bona ahlanze izambatho zakhe, adude bese uhlala angosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:11 Othintwa ngovuzako angakahlambi izandla zakhe, uzakuhlanza izambatho zakhe, adude bese uhlala angosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:12 Isitja somdaka esithintwa ngovuzako kufuze sephulwe; kuthi zoke izitja zesigodo zihlanzwe ngamanzi. 
Leviticus15:13 “Nasele ovuzako ahlanjululiwe, uzazibalela amalanga alikhomba wehlambululo bese uhlanza izambatho zakhe, adude ngemanzini agelezako, yeke uzakuba ngohlambulukileko." 
Leviticus15:14 Ngelanga lobunane alethe amazuba amabili wommango namkha amazutjana amabili wekhaya kumphristi phambi kwakaSomnini emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus15:15 Umphristi uzakwenza imihlabelo ngawo. Elinye libe mhlabelo wehlambululo bese kuthi elinye libe mhlabelo wokutjhiswa. Nje-ke umphristi uzamenzela itethelelo kuSomnini ngokuvuza kwakhe.” 
Leviticus15:16 “Nangabe indoda itsanyazile, kufuze idude umzimba woke bese ihlala isilaphele bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:17 Nanyana ngiyiphi into yetjhila namkha yesikhumba etsanyazelweko, kufuze ihlanzwe bese ihlala ingesilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:18 Nangabe indoda ilala nomfazi bese itsanyaze, bobabili kufuze badude, babe ngabasilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:19 “Nangabe umfazi usesikhathini, uzakuba ngosilapheleko amalanga alikhomba, nomthintako uzakuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:20 Yoke into alala phezu kwayo nasesikhathini, izakuba ngesilapheleko. Nakho koke ahlala kikho, kuzakuba ngokusilapheleko." 
Leviticus15:21 Naloyo othinta umbhedakhe kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe, adude bese uhlala angosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:22 Nothinta nanyana yini ehlezwi nguye, kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe, adude bese uhlala angosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:23 Iye, uzakuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe nakube uthinta umbhede nanyana yini egade ihlezwi mfazi loyo." 
Leviticus15:24 “Nangabe indoda ilala naye anjalo, ukusilaphala kwakhe kuba phezu kwayo. Indoda leyo izakuba ngesilapheleko amalanga alikhomba nombhede elala kiwo, uzakuba ngosilapheleko.”" 
Leviticus15:25 “Nangabe umfazi wopha iingazi amalanga amanengi kungasi sikhathi sakhe namkha ukudlula esikhathini, uzakuba ngosilapheleko njengalokha nasesikhathini mlunga nje asopha." 
Leviticus15:26 Omunye nomunye umbhede alala kiwo nasophako, uzakuba ngosilapheleko njengalowo alala kiwo nasesikhathini. Nento yoke ahlala kiyo izakuba ngesilapheleko, ibe njenganyana asesikhathini." 
Leviticus15:27 Woke umuntu othinta izintwezo uzakuba ngosilapheleko. Kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe, adude bese uhlala angosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:28 “Nangabe ukopha kuphelile emfazini loyo, akazibalele yena amalanga alikhomba, emva kwalokho uzakuba ngohlambulukileko." 
Leviticus15:29 Ngelanga lobunane akalethe amazuba amabili wommango namkha amazutjana amabili wekhaya kumphristi phambi kwakaSomnini emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus15:30 Nje-ke umphristi uzakwenza elinye libe mhlabelo wehlambululo, elinye libe mhlabelo wokutjhiswa. Ngendlela leyo umphristi uzamenzela itethelelo kuSomnini ngokusilaphala kokopha kwakhe." 
Leviticus15:31 “Ngokunjalo nizabe niyelelisa ama-Israyeli ekusilaphaleni kwawo ukuze angafi ngebanga lokusilaphala kwawo ngokurhubutjha ithaberinakeli lami eliphakathi kwenu. 
Leviticus15:32 “Lowo kumthetho omayelana nomuntu ovuzako okutjho indoda etsanyazako bese iyasilaphala," 
Leviticus15:33 umfazi osesikhathini, umuntu ovuzako nowophako kanye nendoda elala nomfazi osilapheleko.”" 
Leviticus16:1 Ngemva kokufa kwamadodana amabili ka-Aroni lokha nabandamela uSomnini, uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi" 
Leviticus16:2 wathi kuye: “Tjela u-Aroni umnakwenu bona angezi ngeenkhathi zoke endaweni ecwenge khulu engemuva kwesiyaya setjhila esiphambi kwesisibekelo somfaji wobufakazi ukuze angafi ngombana mina ngizokubonakala ngelifu phezu kwesisibekelweso. 
Leviticus16:3 Nanzi izinto u-Aroni ekufuze angene nazo ngendaweni ecwenge khulu: ikunzana yomhlabelo wehlambululo neqama lomhlabelo wokutjhiswa. 
Leviticus16:4 Akembathe iphuraphura ekhethekileko yelineni, afake idzeredzere yelineni ngaphasi kwayo, azibophe ngomkhungo welineni womphristi, athwale ingwani yelineni. Lokho kuzizambatho ezikhethekileko, yeke uzakududa umzimba ngaphambi kokwembatha." 
Leviticus16:5 Uzabese uthatha iimpongo ezimbili emkhambathini wama-Israyeli, zibe mihlabelo yehlambululo kanye neqama linye, libe mhlabelo wokutjhiswa." 
Leviticus16:6 “Nje-ke u-Aroni kufuze ahlabe ikunzana bona ibe mhlabelwakhe wehlambululo, azenzele yena nomndenakhe itethelelo kuSomnini." 
Leviticus16:7 Akathathe iimpongo ezimbili azijamise phambi kwakaSomnini emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus16:8 Enze ifumbe yeempongo ezimbilezo, enye ifumbe ibe ngekaSomnini kuthi enye ibe ngeka-Azazeli." 
Leviticus16:9 Uzakunikela ngepongo ewelwe yifumbe engekaSomnini, ayenze ibe mhlabelo wehlambululo." 
Leviticus16:10 Kodwana ipongo ewelwe yifumbe engeyaka-Azazeli uzayijamisa phambi kwakaSomnini iphila bona enze itethelelo ngayo bese uyithumela ku-Azazeli erhalawumbeni. 
Leviticus16:11 “U-Aroni uzakunikela ikunzana bona ibe mhlabelo wehlambululwakhe, azenzele yena nomndenakhe itethelelo kuSomnini. Ngemva kobana ahlabe ikunzana leyo njengomhlabelo wehlambululo" 
Leviticus16:12 uzakuthatha isitja sokutjhisela itjhwalo esigcwele amalahle avuthako e-aldarini eliphambi kwakaSomnini, akhelele izandla ezimbili zamakha wetjhwalo eligayiweko angene nawo ngaphakathi kwesiyaya setjhila." 
Leviticus16:13 Uzakuthela itjhwalwelo emalahleni avuthako phambi kwakaSomnini ukuze ukuthunya kwentuthu yetjhwalo kuvale isisibekelo somfaji wobufakazi; ukwenzela bona angafi. 
Leviticus16:14 Godu uzakuthatha ingcenye yeengazi zekunzana leyo afafaze ilingaphambili lesisibekelo somfaji ngomuno, abuye afafaze kalikhomba phasi phambi kwaso." 
Leviticus16:15 “Uzakuhlaba ipongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo ekungeyabantu, alethe iingazi zayo ngaphakathi kwesiyaya setjhila bese wenza ngeengazi zayo njengombana enze ngezekunzana: Afafaze ilingaphambili lesisibekelo somfaji begodu afafaze phasi phambi kwaso." 
Leviticus16:16 Ngendlela leyo uzabe enzela indawo ecwenge khulu ihlambululo ngebanga lokusilaphala kwama-Israyeli nangeemphambeko zabo okutjho zoke izono zabo. Uzalihlambulula njalo-ke itende lokuhlanganela eliphakathi kwabo, hlangana nokusilaphala kwabo." 
Leviticus16:17 Akunamuntu ofanele abe ngetendeni lokuhlanganela lokha u-Aroni nangena endaweni ecwenge khulu bona enze itethelelo kuSomnini bekube sikhathi lapha aphuma khona. Nasele aqedile ukuzenzela yena nomndenakhe kanye nehlangano yoke yama-Israyeli itethelelo," 
Leviticus16:18 uzakuphuma aye e-aldarini elisesirhodlweni alenzele ihlambululo. Akathathe ezinye zeengazi zekunzana nezepongo azininde phezu kweempundu ezisemajikeni we-aldari. 
Leviticus16:19 Uzakufafaza ezinye ngomuno phezu kwalo kalikhomba. Ngendlela leyo uzakwenzela i-aldari ihlambululo ngebanga lokusilaphala kwama-Israyeli bese ulihlukanisela uSomnini godu. 
Leviticus16:20 “Kuzakuthi lokha u-Aroni nasele enze ihlambululo yendawo ecwenge khulu, yetende lokuhlanganela neye-aldari, atjhideze ipongo ephilako." 
Leviticus16:21 Akabeke izandla zakhe zombili phezu kwehloko yepongo ephilako leyo, avume kiyo boke ubukhohlakali bama-Israyeli, zoke iimphambeko zawo, okutjho zoke izono zawo, azibeke phezu kwehloko yepongo. Athumele ipongo leyo erhalawumbeni ngesandla saloyo okhethelwe ukwenza lokho." 
Leviticus16:22 Ipongo leyo izakuthwala zoke izono zabantu iye nazo erhalawumbeni, endaweni engahlali muntu. “Lokha umuntu loyo nasele alise ipongo erhalawumbeni," 
Leviticus16:23 u-Aroni akangene ngetendeni lokuhlanganela, ahlubule izambatho zelineni agade azembethe lokha nangena endaweni ecwenge khulu, azitjhiye lapho." 
Leviticus16:24 Adudele umzimbakhe ngaphakathi kwendawo ecwengileko, embathe izambatho zobuphristi bese uphuma lapho unikela umhlabelwakhe wokutjhiswa nomhlabelo wokutjhiswa wabantu, azenzele yena nabantu itethelelo kuSomnini." 
Leviticus16:25 Umhlwehlwe womhlabelo wokutjhiswa uzawutjhisela phezu kwe-aldari. 
Leviticus16:26 Umuntu othethe ipongo wayisa ku-Azazeli uzakuhlanza izambatho zakhe, adude nomzimba. Emva kwalokho angangena ngekampeni." 
Leviticus16:27 Ikunzana nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo ekulethwe iingazi zazo endaweni ecwenge khulu ukwenza itethelelo, zizakukhutjhelwa ngaphandle kwekampa. Iinkhumba zazo, inyamazo nomswanazo kuzakutjhiswa." 
Leviticus16:28 Naloyo otjhisa lokho kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe, adude nomzimba. Emva kwalokho angabuyela ngekampeni." 
Leviticus16:29 “Lokhu kuzakuba simiso sanini nanini kini: Ngenyanga yekhomba lokha nayinamalanga alitjhumi nizakuba nesizilo, mhlokho ningawuthinti umsebenzi. Lokho kungekomuntu wendabuko nesikhonzi phakathi kwenu." 
Leviticus16:30 Lokho nizakwenza ngombana ilangelo lizakuba ngeletethelelo nelehlambululo ezonweni zenu zoke phambi kwakaSomnini ukuze nibe msulwa. 
Leviticus16:31 Lelo kuliSabatha elicwengileko kini, yeke nizakuzila ukudla. Lokho kuzakuba simiso sanini nanini." 
Leviticus16:32 Umphristi ozesiweko bewahlukaniselwa isikhundla sakayise omphristi omkhulu, nguye kwaphela ozakwenza itethelelo. Kufuze embathe izambatho ezikhethekileko zelineni" 
Leviticus16:33 lokha nenza ihlambululo yendawo ecwenge khulu, yetende lokuhlanganela neye-aldari nalokha enzela abaphristi nehlangano yoke itethelelo kuSomnini." 
Leviticus16:34 Lokho kuzakuba simiso sanini nanini kini: Kanye ngomnyaka akwenzelwe ama-Israyeli itethelelo kuSomnini ngebanga lezono zawo.” U-Aroni wenza njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi. 
Leviticus17:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus17:2 akakhulume no-Aroni namadodanakhe kanye nawo woke ama-Israyeli athi: “Nakhu uSomnini ayale ngakho: 
Leviticus17:3 Nangabe umuntu wendlu yakwa-Israyeli uhlaba ikomo, imvu nanyana imbuzi ekampeni namkha ngaphandle kwekampa," 
Leviticus17:4 angayihlabeli emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela, okutjho ngaphambi kwethaberinakeli lakaSomnini, njengomnikelo kaSomnini, uzakubekwa umlandu wokuthulula iingazi. Iye, uthulule iingazi ngalokho uzakujutjwa ebantwini bekhabo." 
Leviticus17:5 Lokho kutjho bona imihlabelo yama-Israyeli avane ayihlabele emmangweni, kufuze ayilethe kumphristi emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela njengemihlabelo kaSomnini. Ahlabele uSomnini imihlabelo yetjhebiswano leyo lapho." 
Leviticus17:6 Nje-ke umphristi uzakufafaza iingazi e-aldarini lakaSomnini emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela bese utjhisa umhlwehlwe bona ube ngowamukeleka kuSomnini. 
Leviticus17:7 Angeze asahlabela uzinyana onesimo seembuzi adlhemadlheme ngemva kwakhe. Lokho kuzakuba simiso sanini nanini kibo eenzukulwaneni ngeenzukulwana.” 
Leviticus17:8 USomnini wathi godu akawatjele athi: “Nangabe umuntu wendlu yakwa-Israyeli nanyana osikhonzi phakathi kwenu uletha umhlabelo wokutjhiswa namkha omunye umhlabelo nje," 
Leviticus17:9 bese angawulethi emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela bona ube mhlabelo kuSomnini, umuntu loyo uzakujutjwa ebantwini bekhabo.”" 
Leviticus17:10 Godu uSomnini wathi kuMosi akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Nangabe umuntu wendlu yakwa-Israyeli nanyana osikhonzi phakathi kwenu udla iingazi, ngizakujamelana nomuntu loyo. Ngizamjuba ebantwini bekhabo" 
Leviticus17:11 ngombana ukuphila kwenyama kuseengazini. Ngimi oninikele iingazi bona nenze ngazo itethelelo yemiphefumulwenu e-aldarini. Ngebanga lokobana iingazi ziletha itethelelo ngepilo ekizo 
Leviticus17:12 ngalokho nginiyale nina ma-Israyeli ngathi, ‘Kungabi nomuntu phakathi kwenu namkha isikhonzi esihlala nani esidla iingazi’." 
Leviticus17:13 “Nangabe umuntu wakwa-Israyeli nanyana isikhonzi esiphakathi kwenu sikhamba siyokuzuma inyamazana namkha inyoni edliwako, kufuze siyikhuphe iingazi bese sizivala ngehlabathi." 
Leviticus17:14 Ngebanga lokobana ukuphila kwenyama yoke kuseengazini, ngiyale nina ma-Israyeli ngathi, ‘Nakuziingazi, akungabi nomuntu ozidlako ngombana ukuphila kwenyama yoke kuseengazini. Ozidlako uzakujutjwa ebantwini bekhabo.’" 
Leviticus17:15 “Woke umuntu odla okuzifeleko namkha okudatjulwe ziimbandana, kungaba ngowendabuko namkha sikhonzi, kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe bese adude umzimbakhe. Uzakuhlala angosilapheleko bekuhlwe, emva kwalokho uzakuba ngohlambulukileko." 
Leviticus17:16 Kodwana nangabe akahlanzi izambatho zakhe abe adude umzimbakhe, uzazizwa ngesono sakheso.”" 
Leviticus18:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus18:2 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Mina nginguSomnini uZimenu. 
Leviticus18:3 Ningenzi njengombana kwenza amaGibhide lapha benihlala khona begodu ningenzi njengombana kwenza abantu benarha yeKanana enginisa kiyo. Ningakhambi ngemikhubabo 
Leviticus18:4 kodwana yenzani imithethwami, nilonde neemiso zami, niphile ngazo. NginguSomnini uZimenu." 
Leviticus18:5 Iye, londani iimiso zami nemithethwami ngombana umuntu owenza njalo uzakuphila ngayo. NginguSomnini." 
Leviticus18:6 “Akungabi khona owambula ubuze bomuntu wekhabo ngokwamabhayi. NginguSomnini. 
Leviticus18:7 Ungambuli ubuze bakanyoko ngombana bungebakayihlo; ngunyoko, ungambuli ubuze bakhe." 
Leviticus18:8 Ungambuli ubuze bomkayihlo ngombana bungebakayihlo. 
Leviticus18:9 “Ungambuli ubuze bakadadwenu, kungaba mntwana kayihlo namkha kanyoko okhulele ekhaya namkha ngaphandle." 
Leviticus18:10 Ungambuli ubuze bomntwana womntwanakho ngombana ubuze bakhe bububuze bakho. 
Leviticus18:11 Ungambuli ubuze bendodakazi kayihlo ebelethwe ngomunye umfazi ngombana ingudadwenu. 
Leviticus18:12 Ungambuli ubuze bakakghariyakho ngombana uziingazi zakayihlo. 
Leviticus18:13 Ungambuli ubuze bakadadwabo lakanyoko ngombana uziingazi zakanyoko. 
Leviticus18:14 Ungambuli ubuze bomfazi wakamfowabo lakayihlo ngombana bungebakayihlo begodu ngunyoko. 
Leviticus18:15 Ungambuli ubuze bomalukazanakho ngombana mfazi wendodanakho, ungabumbuli ubuze bakhe." 
Leviticus18:16 Ungambuli ubuze bomfazi womfowenu ngombana bungebomfowenu. 
Leviticus18:17 “Ungambuli ubuze bomfazi kanye nomntwanakhe omntazana begodu ungalali nanomntwana womntwana womfazi loyo ngombana batjhidelene khulu nawe; lokho kubuhlola. 
Leviticus18:18 Ungathathi umlamu wakho njengehlanzi wambule ubuze bakhe umkakho asaphila. 
Leviticus18:19 “Ungatjhideli emfazini bona wambule ubuze bakhe lokha nasasilapheleko ngebanga lokobana asesikhathini. 
Leviticus18:20 Ungalali nomfazi womuntu womphakathi uzisilaphaze ngalokho. 
Leviticus18:21 “Unganikeli ngananyana ngimuphi wabantwana bakho bona bahlukaniselwe uMoleki njengeengwadla, ngombana akukafaneli ulirhubutjhe ibizo lakaZimakho. NginguSomnini." 
Leviticus18:22 Ungalalani nenye indoda njenganyana ulala wesifazana. Lokho kuyanyenyisa. 
Leviticus18:23 Ungalingi ulale isilwana uzisilaphaze ngalokho. Godu akungabi khona umfazi ozinikela esilwaneni bona simlale. Lokho kubuhlola. 
Leviticus18:24 “Ungazisilaphazi nangasinye sezintwezo ngombana izizwe engiziqotjha phambi kwenu zazisilaphaza ngazo 
Leviticus18:25 nenarha yasilaphala. Yeke ngakhambela ukonakala kwayo. Ngebangelo inarha yabaphalaza abahlali bayo. 
Leviticus18:26 Kodwana nina londani iimiso zami nemithethwami. Iye, tjhejani nina bantu bendabuko neenkhonzi eziphakathi kwenu bona ningenzi neyodwa yezinto ezinyenyisakwezo" 
Leviticus18:27 ngombana abantu bendawo le ebebahlala lapho phambilini benza zoke iinyenyiswezo, yeke inarha yasilaphala." 
Leviticus18:28 Nanisilaphaza inarha, nayo izoniphalaza njengombana kwenzeka ezizweni ebezihlala enarheni ngaphambi kwenu." 
Leviticus18:29 Iye, boke abenza nanyana ngiziphi iinyenyiswezo, bazakujutjwa ebantwini bekhabo." 
Leviticus18:30 “Yeke londani imiyalwami, ningalingi nenze nayinye yemikhuba enyenyisako leyo eyayenziwa phambilini. Ningazisilaphazi ngayo. NginguSomnini uZimenu.”" 
Leviticus19:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus19:2 akakhulume nomkhambathi woke wama-Israyeli athi: “Yibani ngabacwengileko ngombana mina Somnini uZimenu ngicwengile. 
Leviticus19:3 Omunye nomunye wenu ahloniphe unina noyise. Gcinani amaSabatha wami. NginguSomnini uZimenu. 
Leviticus19:4 Ningalandeli abosingazimu begodu ningazenzeli abozinyana ababaziweko. NginguSomnini uZimenu. 
Leviticus19:5 “Lokha nanihlabela uSomnini umhlabelo wetjhebiswano, uhlabeni ukuze namukeleke kuye." 
Leviticus19:6 Umhlabelo lowo uzakudliwa ngelanga ohlatjwa ngalo namkha ngakusasa. Okuseleko bekwaba lilanga lesithathu, akutjhiswe." 
Leviticus19:7 Nakube inyama leyo idliwa ngelanga lesithathu izakuba sinyenyiso. Umhlabelo lowo angeze wamukeleka. 
Leviticus19:8 Nanyana ngubani oyidlako uzazizwa ngombana usilaphaze okucwengileko kwakaSomnini. Umuntu onjalo akajutjwe ebantwini bekhabo. 
Leviticus19:9 “Lokha nanivuna isivuno senarhenu, ningakhothululi koke namkha niburukuje emva kwesivuno." 
Leviticus19:10 Ningakhi isidiribe senu sidududu begodu ningadobhi amadiribe awele phasi. Lokho kuliseleleni odududu nosikhonzi. NginguSomnini uZimenu. 
Leviticus19:11 “Ningebi, ningakhohlisani begodu ningephuli isithembiso omunye komunye." 
Leviticus19:12 Ningafungi ibizo lami ngamanga ukuze ningarhubutjhi ibizo lakaZimenu. NginguSomnini. 
Leviticus19:13 “Ungagandeleli umakhelwanakho begodu ungamdlelezeli. “Ungabambeli isisebenzi esitorhako ikokhelo bekube ngakusasa. 
Leviticus19:14 Ngokwesaba uZimakho ungathuki ongezwako begodu ungabeki isikhubekiso phambi kwesiphofu. NginguSomnini. 
Leviticus19:15 “Ningahlanakezeli isigwebo; ungakhethi ubuso besichaka namkha nijamele onothileko. Gwebani abantu bekhenu ngokulunga. 
Leviticus19:16 Ungafaki abantu bekhenu engozini ngokukhamba ubahleba. NginguSomnini. 
Leviticus19:17 “Ungabi nevunda nomfowenu kodwana mkhalimele epanyameni ungamgegi ukuze ungakhambi uqumbelene. 
Leviticus19:18 Ungazibuyiseleli namkha ube nevunda ebantwini ophila nabo, kodwana thanda umakhelwanakho njengombana uzithanda wena. NginguSomnini." 
Leviticus19:19 “Londani iimiso zami. Ungavumeli ifuywakho izekwe ngelinye ihlobo lefuyo. Nesiminakho ungatjali imihlobo emibili yembewu begodu ungembathi isambatho esilukwe ngemihlobo emibili yemicu eyahlukeneko. 
Leviticus19:20 “Nangabe umnini khobokakazi ulala nalo sele lithengwe ngenye indoda, nokho khibe alikabi ukukhokhelwa imali begodu alikabi ukutjhatjhululwa uzakuhlawula umthengi. Bangeze babulawa ngombana ikhobokakazelo belingakabi ukutjhatjhululwa." 
Leviticus19:21 Kodwana umuntu olele nalo kufuze alethe iqama njengomhlabelo wehlawulo kuSomnini emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. 
Leviticus19:22 Nje-ke umphristi uzamenzela itethelelo kuSomnini ngeramelo ngesono asenzileko. Ngalokho uzakuhlambuluka esonweni sakheso. 
Leviticus19:23 “Lokha nasele ningenile enarheni benatjala yoke imihlobo yemithi edliwako, kuzakuba minyaka emithathu yoke iinthelo zemithi leyo ningakavunyelwa ukuzidla." 
Leviticus19:24 Ngomnyaka wesine zoke iinthelo zemithi zizakuba ngezikhethekileko kudunyiswa ngazo uSomnini uZimu. 
Leviticus19:25 Ngomnyaka wesihlanu ningadla iinthelo. Ngendlela leyo imithi izakuhloma khulu. NginguSomnini uZimenu. 
Leviticus19:26 “Ningahlanganyeli emihlatjelweni yabarhedeni. Ningafuniseli begodu ningaphenguli. 
Leviticus19:27 Lokha nanihlobokako ningarhuni iinhloko zenu ngokuzigega namkha niphungule iindevu zenu. Ningazirhayi begodu ningazidali amabala emizimbenenu. NginguSomnini. 
Leviticus19:28 “Ungarhubutjhi indodakazakho ngokuyivumela bona ingwadle. Nawenza njalo inarha izakudlhemadlhema ngemva kwabosingazimu beyigcwale ubuhlola. 
Leviticus19:29 Gcinani amaSabatha wami, nihloniphe indawami ecwengileko. NginguSomnini." 
Leviticus19:30 “Ningaphendukeli ebezimini namkha kwabanemimoya. Ningaziphenguli kibo ngombana nanenza njalo bazanisilaphaza. NginguSomnini uZimenu. 
Leviticus19:31 “Ngokwesaba uZimu, thulelani othukgheleko ingwani, nihloniphe omdala. NginguSomnini." 
Leviticus19:32 “Naninesikhonzi enarhenenu, ningasigandeleli." 
Leviticus19:33 Niphathe kuhle isikhonzi enihlala naso njenganyana nenza ebantwini bekhenu. Thandani isikhonzi njengombana nizithanda nina ngombana nani naniziinkhonzi enarheni yeGibhide. NginguSomnini uZimenu. 
Leviticus19:34 “Ningakhwabanisi lokha nanenza iinlinganiso zobudisi, ubude nomthamo." 
Leviticus19:35 Linganisani ngokulunga, nisebenzise iinkala neenlinganiso ezifaneleko kube mthamo kapumpana weqiniso nekwana yeqiniso. NginguSomnini uZimenu owanikhupha enarheni yeGibhide." 
Leviticus19:36 Londani iimiso zami zoke, nenze imiyalwami yoke. NginguSomnini.”" 
Leviticus20:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus20:2 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Nanyana ngubani wama-Israyeli namkha isikhonzi esikhonze kwa-Israyeli onikela ngomntwanakhe kuMoleki, akabulawe. Izakhamuzi zimkhande ngamatje." 
Leviticus20:3 Nakungasinjalo ngizakujamelana naye ngokwami ngokumjuba ebantwini bekhabo ngombana unikele umntwanakhe kuMoleki. Usilaphaze indawami ecwengileko bewarhubutjha nebizo lami elicwengileko. 
Leviticus20:4 Iye, nakube izakhamuzi zisitheza ubuso bazo emuntwini loyo ngokungambulali lokha nanikela umntwanakhe kuMoleki," 
Leviticus20:5 ngizakujamelana naye kanye nomndenakhe ngokwami. Ngizamjuba ebantwini bekhabo ngokudlhemadlhema kwakhe ngemva kwakaMoleki, yena nejima loke elimlandelako." 
Leviticus20:6 “Nangabe umuntu uphendukela ebezimini namkha kwabanemimoya, adlhemadlheme emva kwabo, ngizakujamelana naye umuntu loyo, ngimjube ebantwini bekhabo." 
Leviticus20:7 Ngalokho zahlukaniseleni, nibe ngabacwengileko ngombana mina nginguSomnini uZimenu." 
Leviticus20:8 Londani iimiso zami nizenze. NginguSomnini onihlukaniselako. 
Leviticus20:9 Nanyana ngubani othuka uyise namkha unina akabulawe. Iye, umuntu othuka uyise nonina iingazi zakhe zizakuba phezu kwakhe." 
Leviticus20:10 “Nangabe indoda ihlobonga nomfazi wenye indoda ababulawe bobabili njalo, isihlobongi nesihlobongikazi." 
Leviticus20:11 Umuntu olala nomkayise wambule ubuze bakayise. Bobabili indodana nomfazi lowo ababulawe; iingazi zabo zizakuba phezu kwabo. 
Leviticus20:12 Nangabe indoda ilala nomalukazanayo, bobabili ababulawe, iingazi zabo zizakuba phezu kwabo ngombana benze ubuhlola." 
Leviticus20:13 Indoda elalana nenye indoda kanjenganyana ilala nomfazi, womabili akabulawe. Iingazi zawo zizakuba phezu kwawo ngombana enze isinyenyiso." 
Leviticus20:14 Nangabe indoda ithatha umfazi kanye nomkhwekazayo, buhlola lokho. Abatjhiswe bobathathu njalo ukuze kungabi nobuhlola phakathi kwenu." 
Leviticus20:15 Umuntu olala nesilwana akabulawe kanye nesilwaneso. 
Leviticus20:16 Nangabe umfazi uzinikela esilwaneni bona simlale, bulala umfazi kanye nesilwaneso. Akubulawe kokubili njalo; iingazi zakho zizakuba phezu kwakho kokubili." 
Leviticus20:17 “Nangabe umuntu uthatha udadwabo namkha umntamamakhe bahlubulelane, kulihlazo lokho. Bobabili abajutjwe ebantwini bekhabo emtarini ngombana umuntu loyo wambule ubuze bakadadwabo, nje-ke uzazizwa ngesono sakheso." 
Leviticus20:18 Nangabe umuntu ulala nomfazi amyame asesikhathini, angene efindweni lomfazi, nomfazi loyo amngenise-ke efindweni lakhelo, bobabili abajutjwe ebantwini bekhabo." 
Leviticus20:19 Ungabambuli ubuze bakadadwabo kanyoko namkha bakakghariyakho ngombana lokho kukukwambula ubuze besihlobo sakho, abenza njalo bazazizwa ngesono sabeso." 
Leviticus20:20 Nangabe umuntu ulala nomfazi womfowabo kayise, wambule ubuze bakayise; umuntu nomfazi loyo bazazizwa ngesono sabo: Bazakufa banganabizo." 
Leviticus20:21 Nangabe umuntu uthatha umkamfowabo, kumphambo lokho. Wambule ubuze bakamfowabo, nje-ke bobabili bazakuswela ibizo." 
Leviticus20:22 “Londani iimiso zami zoke, nenze imiyalwami yoke ukuze inarha enginiletha bona nihlale kiyo inganiphalazi." 
Leviticus20:23 Ningakhambi ngemikhuba yabantu engizobaqotjha phambi kwenu ngombana bona bebazenza zoke izinto ezimbezi, ngebangelo ngibasuthi." 
Leviticus20:24 Kodwana nina nganithembisa ngathi, ‘Nizakuzuza inarhabo. Ngimi oninikela yona bona ibe lilifa lenu. Kuyinarha egeleza ibisi neliju.’ NginguSomnini uZimenu owanihlukanisa nezinye izizwe." 
Leviticus20:25 Ngalokho yahlukanisani phakathi kwesilwana esihlambulukileko nesisilapheleko, naphakathi kwenyoni esilapheleko nehlambulukileko. Ningazenzi ninyenyeke ngesilwana, inyoni namkha yini ekhakhaba ehlabathini leyo engazahlukanisa nani ngathi zisilaphele." 
Leviticus20:26 Yibani ngabacwengileko kimi ngombana mina Somnini ngicwengile begodu nginahlukanisile nezinye izizwe bona nibe ngabami.” 
Leviticus20:27 “Indoda namkha umfazi onabezimu nanyana onommoya, akabulawe. Abakhandwe ngamatje; iingazi zabo zizakuba phezu kwabo.”" 
Leviticus21:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi akakhulume nabaphristi okumadodana ka-Aroni athi: “Akungabi namunye ozisilaphaza ngokuphatha isidumbu sabantu bekhabo," 
Leviticus21:2 ngaphandle kwesesihlobo seengazi okutjho unina, uyise, indodana, indodakazi, umnakwabo" 
Leviticus21:3 namkha udadwabo osese litlawana ohlala naye ngombana angakendi. Ngaye angazisilaphaza ngokuthinta isidumbu sakhe. 
Leviticus21:4 Angazisilaphazi ngabantu ahlobene nabo ngobukhazi abe ngongakahlambuluki. 
Leviticus21:5 Abaphristi akukafuzi bona bazigude ibande ehloko namkha bazigege emaphethelweni weenlevu zabo nanyana bazirhaye imizimbabo ngebanga lohlongakeleko. 
Leviticus21:6 Kufuze babe ngabacwengileko kuZimabo bangarhubutjhi ibizo lakaZimabo ngombana ngibo abaletha e-aldarini iminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini okukukudla kwakaZimabo. Nje-ke kufuze babe ngabacwengileko. 
Leviticus21:7 Abaphristi bangathathi ingwadla namkha ithari begodu bangathathi ibuya ngombana abaphristi bangabakhethekileko kuZimabo.
