Leviticus21:8 Hloniphani isikhundla somphristi ngombana unikela ukudla kuZimenu. Mthatheni njengocwengileko ngombana mina Somnini enginicwengisako, ngicwengile." 
Leviticus21:9 Nangabe indodakazi yomphristi izirhubutjha ngobungwadla, irhubutjha uyise, yeke kufuze itjhiswe ngomlilo." 
Leviticus21:10 “Umphristi ongomkhulu kubafowabo, nongowazeswa ngamafutha ehlokwakhe, wahlukaniselwa ukwembatha izambatho ezikhethekileko, akukafaneli aliselele iinhluthu zakhe zimatlharatlhara namkha atlebhule izambatho zakhe ngebanga lohlongakeleko." 
Leviticus21:11 Angatjhideli esidunjini; iye, angazisilaphazi ngitjho nanyana kusidumbu sakayise namkha sakanina," 
Leviticus21:12 begodu angaphumi endaweni ecwengileko kaZimakhe ngombana angayirhubutjha. Yena wahlukaniselwe uZimakhe ngokuzeswa kwakhe ngamafutha. NginguSomnini. 
Leviticus21:13 “Umphristi omkhulu kufuze athathe umfazi osese litlawu. 
Leviticus21:14 Angathathi umhlolokazi, ibuya, ithari namkha ingwadla. Kodwana akathathe kwaphela itlawu ebantwini bekhabo;" 
Leviticus21:15 nakungasinjalo uzakurhubutjha isizukulwana sakhe. Ngimi mina Somnini omenza abe ngocwengileko.” 
Leviticus21:16 Godu uSomnini wathi kuMosi 
Leviticus21:17 akakhulume no-Aroni athi kuye: “Akungabi noyedwa esizukulwaneni sakho onomphambo ozakuletha ukudla kwakaZimakhe e-aldarini. 
Leviticus21:18 Iye, kungabi namunye onomphambo ozakutjhidela ekunikeleni: ophopheleko, ohluzako, okhubazeke ebusweni namkha emzimbeni," 
Leviticus21:19 orhwahlaphele inyawo namkha isandla," 
Leviticus21:20 onesifumba, osirhonodwana, onelihlo elithunyileko, obhibhidlhako namkha onesibabu nopatlazwe amahlwayi." 
Leviticus21:21 Akungabi nomphristi onomphambo esizukulwaneni saka-Aroni ozakutjhidela e-aldarini alethe iminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini. Njengombana anomphambo nje, angatjhideli bona anikele ukudla kwakaZimakhe." 
Leviticus21:22 Yena nokho angakudla ukudla kwakaZimakhe, okutjho ukudla okubuya eminikelweni ecwenge khulu nakecwengileko." 
Leviticus21:23 Kodwana ngebanga lokobana anomphambo akakafaneli angene lapha kunesiyaya setjhila lokusitha umfaji wobufakazi namkha atjhidele e-aldarini ukuze angarhubutjhi indawami ecwengileko. Ngimi mina Somnini engenze izintwezo zaba ngezicwengileko.” 
Leviticus21:24 Ngokunjalo uMosi watjela u-Aroni namadodanakhe kanye nama-Israyeli woke iindabezo. 
Leviticus22:1 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Leviticus22:2 “Tjela u-Aroni namadodanakhe bona bahloniphe iminikelo ecwengileko yama-Israyeli ayihlukanisele mina ukuze bangarhubutjhi ibizo lami elicwengileko. NginguSomnini. 
Leviticus22:3 Yithi kibo, ‘Nanyana ngubani wesizukulwana senu othi asilaphele atjhidele eminikelweni ecwengileko, ama-Israyeli ayinikele ngokuyihlukanisela mina Somnini, akakhawulwe ekungilotjheni. NginguSomnini.’" 
Leviticus22:4 “Nangabe kunomuntu wesizukulwana saka-Aroni onekhwekhwe namkha onokuvuza ebudodeni akakavunyelwa ukugoma ukudla okubuya eminikelweni ecwengileko angakahlambuluki. Othinta okusilapheleko, kungaba sidumbu, indoda etsanyazileko," 
Leviticus22:5 isikhakhabi esingamsilaphaza namkha ngubani ongahle amsilaphaze nanyana kukusilaphala kwaliphi ihlobo," 
Leviticus22:6 uzakuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe. Kufuze angadli ukudla okubuya eminikelweni ecwengileko angakadudi umzimba mantange. 
Leviticus22:7 Nakutjhinga ilanga uzabe sele ahlambulukile, emva kwalokho angadla ukudlokho ngombana lokho kusisabelo sakhe." 
Leviticus22:8 Kodwana akakavunyelwa nakancani ukudla okuzifeleko nokudatjulwe ziimbandana zommango ukuze angazisilaphazi ngalokho. NginguSomnini. 
Leviticus22:9 “Abaphristi abalonde imiyalwami ukuze bangabi nomlandu bebafele endawenami ecwengileko ngebanga lokuyirhubutjha kwabo. NginguSomnini okucwengisako lokho. 
Leviticus22:10 “Woke umuntu ongaphandle kwendlu yobuphristi akakafaneli ukugoma ukudla okubuya eminikelweni ecwengileko, ngitjho nanyana kusithekeli somphristi namkha isisebenzi sakhe." 
Leviticus22:11 Kodwana ikhoboka elithengwe mphristi ngemali bona libe njengepahlakhe nalawo abelethelwe endlinakhe, angakudla ukudlokho." 
Leviticus22:12 Nangabe indodakazi yomphristi ithethwe ngongasuye wendlu yobuphristi, akukafaneli idle iminikelo esibiko kuSomnini." 
Leviticus22:13 Kodwana nakube imhlolokazi namkha ilibuya begodu ayinamntwana bese ibuyela kwabo ibe njengalokha isese mntazana, ingadla koke okudliwa nguyise. Nakuliphandle lona, lingeze ladla ukudla okubuya eminikelweni ecwengileko." 
Leviticus22:14 “Nakwenzeka bona umuntu agome ukudla kweminikelo ecwengileko ngephoso, akakubuyisele kumphristi kungezelelwe ngokwesihlanu sobungako bokudla." 
Leviticus22:15 Abaphristi bangavumeli bona kurhubutjhwe ukudla kweminikelo ecwengileko okusibiko ama-Israyeli asiletha kuSomnini 
Leviticus22:16 begodu bafanele bathwese ama-Israyeli umlandu wokuwahlawulisa lokha nadle ukudla okucwengileko kwabaphristi. NginguSomnini ocwengisa ukudlokho.” 
Leviticus22:17 USomnini wabuya wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus22:18 akakhulume no-Aroni namadodanakhe kanye nawo woke ama-Israyeli athi: “Nanyana ngubani wendlu yakwa-Israyeli namkha osikhonzi oletha umnikelo njengomhlabelo wokutjhiswa kuSomnini, ekungaba ngewesifungo namkha wesihle," 
Leviticus22:19 kufuze kube liduna elimsulwa: ikunzi, iqama namkha ipongo ukuze amukeleke." 
Leviticus22:20 Ninganikeli ngesilwana esinomphambo ngombana lokho angeze kwanibhadekela. 
Leviticus22:21 Nakube umuntu unikela ngekomo, imvu namkha imbuzi njengomhlabelo wetjhebiswano kuSomnini ukwenzela ukuzalisa isifungo namkha umnikelo wesihle, kufuze kube ngemsulwa; ingabi nomphambo." 
Leviticus22:22 Ninganikeli ngesilwana esiphopheleko, esirholopheleko, esilimeleko, esineensupa, esibhibhidlhako namkha esinesibabu. Ningalethi nasinye sazo e-aldarini njengomnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini." 
Leviticus22:23 Unganikela ngekunzi namkha ngeqama elinesitho eside namkha esifitjhani kunezinye kube mhlabelo wesihle, kodwana emhlabelweni wokuzalisa isifungo, azamukeleki." 
Leviticus22:24 Ninganikeli kuSomnini ngesilwana esiphakulwe ngokuncinzwa, ngokupatlazwa, ngokudatjulwa namkha ngokuquntwa. Ningathomi niphakule iinlwana enarheni yekhenu," 
Leviticus22:25 godu ningamukeli iinlwana ezinjalo kewakosozizwe bona nenze ngazo umhlabelo njengokudla kwakaZimenu. Iye, ngebanga lokobana ziqanduliwe, angeze zanibhadekela.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Leviticus22:27 “Lokha nakuzalwa ikonyana, imvana namkha imbuzana, akuhlale nonina amalanga alikhomba, kodwana ukusukela elangeni lobunane ukuya phambili kuzakwamukeleka njengomnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini." 
Leviticus22:28 Ningahlabi ikomo nekonyana layo namkha imvana nonina ngalanga linye. 
Leviticus22:29 “Lokha naninikela umhlabelo wokuthokoza kuSomnini, qinisekani bona uyamukeleka:" 
Leviticus22:30 Awudliwe khona mhlokho uphele. Ningatjhiyi ngitjho neqatjhana lenyama bekuse. NginguSomnini. 
Leviticus22:31 “Londani imiyalwami niyenze. NginguSomnini. 
Leviticus22:32 Begodu ningarhubutjhi ibizo lami elicwengileko, kodwana liphatheni ngokukhethekileko phakathi kwama-Israyeli. Mina NginguSomnini onicwengisako" 
Leviticus22:33 nowanikhupha enarheni yeGibhide bona ngibe nguZimu kini. NginguSomnini.” 
Leviticus23:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus23:2 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi kiwo: “Nasi iminyanya kaSomnini ekumele nibize ngayo imihlangano ekhethekileko. Leyo-ke minyanyami ejanyisiweko.” 
Leviticus23:3 “Umsebenzi awenziwe emalangeni asithandathu, kodwana ilanga lekhomba liliSabatha elihlukaniselwe umhlangano okhethekileko. KuliSabatha kuSomnini, ningenzi umsebenzi ngalo kuphi nakuphi lapha nizakuhlala khona.”" 
Leviticus23:4 “Nasi iminyanya ejanyisiweko kaSomnini ekumele nibize ngayo imihlangano ekhethekileko ngeenkhathi zayo ezibekiweko: 
Leviticus23:5 IPhasika lakaSomnini lizakuba ntambama elangeni letjhumi nane ngenyanga yokuthoma emnyakeni. 
Leviticus23:6 Kuthi mhlana zilitjhumi nahlanu khona enyangeni leyo kuthome umnyanya kaSomnini wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo. Nizakudla isikwa esinganangumelo amalanga alikhomba. 
Leviticus23:7 Elangeni lokuthoma lomnyanya lowo nibe nomhlangano okhethekileko, nje-ke ningawuphathi umsebenzenu wangemihla." 
Leviticus23:8 Amalanga alikhomba lawo, nizakunikela iminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini. Kuthi ngelanga lekhombelo, nibe nomhlangano okhethekileko, yeke ningawuphathi umsebenzenu wangemihla.”" 
Leviticus23:9 USomnini wabuya wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus23:10 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Lokha naningena enarheni engininikela yona bese nivuna isivuno sakhona, lethani iinqwambi zebhali zokuthoma kumphristi." 
Leviticus23:11 Umphristi uzabese uphakamisa iinqwambezo njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini ukuze namukeleke. Kufuze aziphakamise ngakusasa ngemva kwelanga leSabatha. 
Leviticus23:12 Ngelanga mhlana niphakamisa iinqwambi kuSomnini, mhlokho nizakunikela iqamanyana elimsulwa nelinomnyaka munye bona libe mhlabelo wokutjhiswa kuSomnini." 
Leviticus23:13 Nikelani iqamanelo kanye nomnikelo weenthoro omathungana amabili weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva libe mnikelo owamukelekako kuSomnini. Godu kube nomnikelo wewayini elingaba lilitha nesiquntu. 
Leviticus23:14 Ningadli isikwa, iinthoro ezikhanzingiweko namkha ibhali etja bekufike ilangelo lapha niletha khona umnikelo kuZimenu. Lokhu kusimiso sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni zenu kuphi nakuphi lapha nizakuhlala khona." 
Leviticus23:15 “Nizakuthoma ukubala ilanga emva kweSabatha, okutjho ilanga eniletha ngalo iinqwambi zomnikelo wokuphakanyiswa, kube ziimveke ezilikhomba ezigcweleko." 
Leviticus23:16 Balani bekube lilanga lamatjhumi amahlanu, okulilanga emva kweSabatha lekhomba bese kuthi mhlokho nilethe umnikelo wekoroyi etja kuSomnini." 
Leviticus23:17 Kuphi nakuphi lapha nizakuhlala khona lethani amapani amabili wesikwa sokuphakanyiswa esiwunyelweko esibhagwe ngamathungana amabili weflowuru esefiweko, sibe njengesilumo kuSomnini uZimenu." 
Leviticus23:18 Lethani izikwezo kanye namaqamanyana amsulwa alikhomba abe nomnyaka munye, ikunzana kanye namaqama amabili kube mhlabelo wokutjhiswa kuSomnini kanye nomnikelo weenthoro newokuselwako kube mnikelo owamukelekako kuSomnini." 
Leviticus23:19 Godu kufuze ninikele ipongo ibe mhlabelo wehlambululo namaqamanyana amabili anomnyaka abe mhlabelo wetjhebiswano. 
Leviticus23:20 Umphristi kufuze aphakamise izikwa zesilumo njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini kanye namaqamanyana amabili. Amaqamanyana lawo akhethekile kuSomnini, asisabelo somphristi." 
Leviticus23:21 Mhlokho nimemezele umhlangano okhethekileko begodu ningawuphathi umsebenzenu wangemihla. Lokhu kusimiso sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni zenu kuphi nakuphi lapha nizakuhlala khona. 
Leviticus23:22 “Lokha nanivuna isivuno senarhenu, ningakhothululi koke namkha niburukuje emva kwesivuno. Tjhiyelani odududu nosikhonzi. NginguSomnini uZimenu.”" 
Leviticus23:23 USomnini wabuya wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus23:24 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Elangeni lokuthoma enyangeni yekhomba akube liSabatha elikhethekileko, isikhumbuzo sokubetha iimporompita zomhlangano okhethekileko." 
Leviticus23:25 Ningawuphathi umsebenzenu wangemihla. Nikelani iminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini.” 
Leviticus23:26 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Leviticus23:27 “Elangeni letjhumi lenyanga yekhomba kulilanga letethelelo kuSomnini. Kini kuzakuba mhlangano okhethekileko, nizakuzila ukudla, nilethe iminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini." 
Leviticus23:28 Ningawuphathi nakancani umsebenzi ngelangelo ngombana kulilanga letethelelo enizenzela yona phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu. 
Leviticus23:29 Ongazithobi ngokuzila ukudla mhlokho akajutjwe ebantwini bekhabo. 
Leviticus23:30 Owenza umsebenzi mhlokho, ngizamthanyela ebantwini bekhabo." 
Leviticus23:31 Iye, ningawuphathi nakancani umsebenzi. Lokhu kusimiso sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni zenu kuphi nakuphi lapha nizakuhlala khona." 
Leviticus23:32 Lelo kuliSabatha elihlukaniselweko kini, yeke nizakuzila ukudla. Elangeni lethoba lenyanga leyo ukuthoma ntambama bekube ngakusasa ntambama niphumule ngokupheleleko.”" 
Leviticus23:33 USomnini wabuyelela wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus23:34 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi kiwo: “Mhlana zilitjhumi nahlanu enyangeni yekhomba, amalanga alikhomba kumnyanya wemiTlhatlhana kuSomnini." 
Leviticus23:35 Ngelanga lokuthoma kumhlangano okhethekileko, ningawuphathi umsebenzenu wangemihla." 
Leviticus23:36 Amalanga alikhomba woke nizakuletha iminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini. Kuzakuthi ngelanga lobunane nibe nomhlangano okhethekileko nalapha niletha khona iminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini. Lowo mgidi omkhulu, yeke ningawuphathi umsebenzenu wangemihla." 
Leviticus23:37 “Leyo-ke minyanya kaSomnini ekumele bona niyimemezele njengemihlangano ekhethekileko, ibe ngeyokuletha iminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini, ekumihlabelo yokutjhiswa, iminikelo yeenthoro, imihlabelo yetjhebiswano kanye neminikelo yokuselwako njengombana kubekelwe ilanga nelanga." 
Leviticus23:38 Iminikelo leyo ayifaki phakathi izipho zenu zamaSabatha, iminikelwenu yesithembiso neminikelwenu yesihle eniyinikela kuSomnini." 
Leviticus23:39 “Yelelani ukugidinga umnyanya kaSomnini amalanga alikhomba ngelanga letjhumi nahlanu enyangeni yekhomba, lokha nasele nibuthelele isivuno senarha. Ilanga lokuthoma kuzakuba liSabatha elikhethekileko godu kube njalo nangelanga lobunane." 
Leviticus23:40 Ngelanga lokuthoma kufuze nikhe iinthelo zemithi ekhethekileko, iingala zamasundu, zemithi enamakari amahle nezemiyezani yemilanjaneni bese nijekezela phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu amalanga alikhomba." 
Leviticus23:41 Gidingani umnyanya kaSomnini amalanga alikhomba emnyakeni. Lokho kusimiso sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni zenu. Ugidingeni ngenyanga yekhomba. 
Leviticus23:42 Nizakuhlala emitlhatlhaneni amalanga alikhomba. Boke abantu bendabuko kwa-Israyeli bazakuhlala emitlhatlhaneni 
Leviticus23:43 ukuze iinzukulwana zenu zazi bona ngathi lokha nangenyula ama-Israyeli enarheni yeGibhide, ngawenza bonyana ahlale emitlhatlhaneni. NginguSomnini uZimenu.”" 
Leviticus23:44 UMosi wawethulela njalo-ke ama-Israyeli iminyanya kaSomnini. 
Leviticus24:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Leviticus24:2 “Yala ama-Israyeli bona alethe kuwe amafutha we-oliva atsengileko nacwebileko wokukhanyisa ilithi leembani. Iimbani azihlale zivutha njalo 
Leviticus24:3 ngetendeni lokuhlanganela ngaphandle kwesiyaya esingaphambi kobufakazi. U-Aroni kufuze abone bonyana iimbani zihlala zikhanya phambi kwakaSomnini ukusukela ntambama bekuse. Lokhu kuzakuba simiso sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni zenu. 
Leviticus24:4 Akathi ngantambama ahlele iimbani phezu kwelithi legolidembala phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Leviticus24:5 “Thatha iflowuru esefiweko bese ubhage izikwa ezimasongo ezilitjhumi nambili ngayo. Isikwa ngasinye sidutjwe ngamathungana amabili weflowuru. 
Leviticus24:6 Kufuze uzibeke ngamahla amabili, zibe zithandathu elihleni ngalinye, zibekwe phezu kwetafula legolidembala." 
Leviticus24:7 Elihleni ngalinye utjhise uburegu obutsengileko bomuthi welebhona, esikhundleni sezikwa kube mnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini." 
Leviticus24:8 ISabatha elinye nelinye u-Aroni kufuze ahlele izikwezo phambi kwakaSomnini. Lokho akwenziwe njalo esikhundleni sama-Israyeli, kube sibopho sanini nanini." 
Leviticus24:9 Izikwezo zingezaka-Aroni namadodanakhe, bazazidlela endaweni ecwengileko ngombana zimnikelo ocwenge khulu, zisisabelo sakhe eminikelweni ekhethekileko kuSomnini. Lokhu kusimiso sanini nanini.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Gade kunomfazi wakwa-Israyeli ibizo lakhe kunguTjhelomithi oyindodakazi kaDibhiri wekoro yakwaDani. Bekanendodana uyisayo egade kumGibhide, ihlala nama-Israyeli. Ngelinye ilanga kwaba khona ukulwa ngekampeni phakathi kwendodana leyo nomIsrayeli othileko. Ekulwenapho indodana leyo yahlambalaza ibizo lakaZimu lokha nayithukanako. Nje-ke abantu bayiletha kuMosi." 
Leviticus24:11 Yavalelwa ngesikhungweni, kwalindelwa ukwizwa bona intando kaSomnini uZimu izakuthini kibo ngayo." 
Leviticus24:12 Nje-ke uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Leviticus24:13 “Khupha umhlambalazi loyo ngekampeni, kuthi boke abamizwe athukana babeke izandla phezu kwehlokwakhe bese umkhambathi woke umkhanda ngamatje." 
Leviticus24:14 Godu tjela woke ama-Israyeli uthi, ‘Nanyana ngubani othuka uZimu uzakuthwala umlandu wesono sakheso." 
Leviticus24:15 Akabulawe ohlambalaza ibizo lakaSomnini. Umkhambathi woke umkhande ngamatje. Woke umuntu ohlambalaza ibizo lakaSomnini, kungaba sikhonzi namkha umuntu wendabuko, akabulawe.’ ”" 
Leviticus24:16 Godu uSomnini wathi: “Obulala umuntu, naye akabulawe." 
Leviticus24:17 Obulala ifuyo yomunye kufuze ayijamiselele, kube yipilo ngepilo." 
Leviticus24:18 Olimaza omunye umuntu, naye akalinyazwe:" 
Leviticus24:19 ithambo ngethambo, ilihlo ngelihlo, izinyo ngezinyo, abuyiselelwe njengombana enze komunye." 
Leviticus24:20 Iye, obulala ifuyo yomunye kufuze ayijamiselele, kodwana obulala omunye umuntu akabulawe." 
Leviticus24:21 Nibe nomthetho munye owembethe isikhonzi naloyo ongowendabuko. Mina nginguSomnini uZimenu.” 
Leviticus24:22 UMosi wakhuluma njalo-ke nama-Israyeli. Ngalokho bamkhupha ngekampeni loyo ogade athukene, bamkhanda ngamatje. Ngokunjalo ama-Israyeli enza njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi." 
Leviticus25:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi phezu kwentaba yeSinayi wathi 
Leviticus25:2 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi kiwo: “Lokha naningena enarheni engizoninikela yona, inarha leyo kufuze iphumule ukuphumula kweSabatha elahlukaniselwe uSomnini." 
Leviticus25:3 Iminyaka emithandathu nizakutjala amasimenu, nihlunge isidiribe senu benikhe iinthelo zaso." 
Leviticus25:4 Kodwana umnyaka wekhomba uzakuba ngoweSabatha, okuliSabatha elihlukaniselweko kuSomnini. Ngomnyaka loyo anizukutjala amasimenu namkha nihlunge isidiribe senu." 
Leviticus25:5 Ningavuni amakhakhazela wokulinyiweko namadiribe esidiribeni senu esingakahlungwa. Kuzakuba mnyaka wokuphumula okukhethekileko kwenarha. 
Leviticus25:6 Okuzimilela ngomnyaka weSabatha kudleleni khonapho, nina, amakhoboka namakhobokakazenu, iinsebenzi kanye neenthekeli ezigogobele phakathi kwenu." 
Leviticus25:7 Godu kuzakuba kukudla kwefuywenu kanye neenlwana zommango ezisenarhenenu.” 
Leviticus25:8 “Zibaleleni iminyaka elikhomba yamaSabatha okutjho iminyaka elikhomba ebuyelelwe kalikhomba, kube minyaka ematjhumi amane nethoba." 
Leviticus25:9 Nje-ke kuzakuthi lokha inyanga yekhomba nayinamalanga alitjhumi nivuthele ipalapala izwakale eendaweni zoke. Zwakalisani ipalapala enarhenenu yoke ngelanga letethelelo. 
Leviticus25:10 Nihloniphe umnyaka wamatjhumi amahlanu welimo, niwucwengise ngokumemezela ukusulwa kwesikolodo enarheni yoke kizo zoke izakhamuzi. Kuzakuba mnyaka wokubuyisela kini, lapha omunye nomunye wenu azakutjhaphuluka khona abuyele elifeni lakhe nemndeninakhe." 
Leviticus25:11 Umnyaka wamatjhumi amahlanu uzakuba mnyaka wokubuyisela kini, okumnyaka lapha ningeze natjala, navuna amakhakhazela namkha isidiribe esidiribeni senu esingakahlungwa." 
Leviticus25:12 Njengombana kumnyaka wokubuyisela nje, kufuze ube ngocwengileko kini. Nizakudla kwaphela okuzimilela emasimini." 
Leviticus25:13 “Emnyakeni wokubuyisela lowo, omunye nomunye wenu akabuyele endaweni yelifa lakhe." 
Leviticus25:14 Lokha nanisiselana nabantu bekhenu ngendawo yelifa, ningadlelezelani." 
Leviticus25:15 Inani lokusisa lihloswa sibalo seminyaka ngemva komnyaka wokubuyisela, okutjho bona inani lesivuno seminyaka eseleko ngaphambi komnyaka wokubuyisela ngilo elihlosa inani lokusisa." 
Leviticus25:16 Ubunengi beminyaka eseleko buzakutjho ukuphakama kwenani lokusisa, kuthi ubuncani beminyaka eseleko kube kukwehla kwenani ngombana kuhlekuhle kusiselwana isivuno kwaphela." 
Leviticus25:17 Ngokwesaba uZimakho ungadlelezeli umuntu wekhenu ngombana mina nginguSomnini uZimenu. 
Leviticus25:18 “Nanenza iimiso zami, nilonde imithethwami beniyenze, nizakuphila niphephile enarheni." 
Leviticus25:19 Inarha izakuthela iinthelo zayo, nidle nisuthe begodu nizakuhlala kiyo niphephile." 
Leviticus25:20 Mhlambe ningazibuza nithi, ‘Alo, ngomnyaka wekhomba sizokudlani ngombana singeze satjala namkha sivune?’" 
Leviticus25:21 Lalelani-ke, ngomnyaka wesithandathu ngizonehlisela isibusiso sami ukuze isivuno somnyaka lowo sibambelele iminyaka emithathu." 
Leviticus25:22 Nanitjalako ngomnyaka wobunane, nizabe nisalokhu nidla isivuno esidala bekube mnyaka wethoba. Iye, nizakudla isivuno esidala bekube sikhathi sesivuno somnyaka wethoba." 
Leviticus25:23 Inarha ayingathengiswa, ayisiswe kwaphela ngombana ingeyami, nina niziinkhonzi neenthekeli kimi." 
Leviticus25:24 Ilungelo lokuhlenga inarha engininikele yona bona ibe lilifa lenu alihlonitjhwe.” 
Leviticus25:25 “Nangabe umfowenu uyakhwahla bese usisa ingcenye yamasimakhe, kuzakufanela bona umhlengi oseduze naye aye kiloyo okusiswe kuye afese ahlenge isimu yomfowabo leyo." 
Leviticus25:26 Nakube umfo loyo akanaye ongamhlengela yona, kodwana yena athome ukuhluma bese uba nalokho angayihlenga ngakho isimu leyo," 
Leviticus25:27 akabale inani leminyaka yamasiso bese ukhokha iminyaka eseleko ngaphambi komnyaka wokubuyisela kiloyo amsisiseleko. Nje-ke uzabese ubuyisa ubunikazi belifa lakhe. 
Leviticus25:28 Kodwana nangabe akahlumi ukuze akghone ukuzihlengela isimu leyo, izakuhlala ezandleni zaloyo okusiswe kuye bekube mnyaka wokubuyisela. Ubunikazi besimu leyo abubuyiswe bese umuntu loyo ubuyela elifeni lakhe ngomnyaka wokubuyisela." 
Leviticus25:29 “Nangabe umuntu usisa indlwakhe engedorobheni elizombelezwe ngomthangala, unesikhathi somnyaka woke sokobana ayihlenge ngemva kokuyithengisa kwakhe. Ilungelo lokuyihlenga lizakuba mnyaka munye." 
Leviticus25:30 Nangayihlengiko bekuphele umnyaka woke swana, khona-ke indlu leyo izakuba lilifa lomthengi isiphelani, iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana. Akukameli ibuyiselwe kumthengisi ngomnyaka wokubuyisela." 
Leviticus25:31 Kodwana izindlu ezisemizini engakazombelezwa ngomthangala zingathathwa njengegcenye yamasimu wendawo leyo. Zona kunelungelo lokuzihlenga begodu zingatjhatjhululwa ngomnyaka wokubuyisela. 
Leviticus25:32 “AmaLevi wona anelungelo lokuhlenga izindlu ezisemadorobhenawo ngesikhathi soke. 
Leviticus25:33 Nangabe kunomLevi ongahlengi indlu esiswe edorobheni lelifa lawo, kufuze ibuyiswe ngomnyaka wokubuyisela. Lokhu kungebanga lokobana izindlu ezisemadorobheni wamaLevi zililifa lawo kwa-Israyeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Amadlelo asemadorobhenawo akukafuzi asisiswe ngombana alilifa lawo isiphelani. 
Leviticus25:35 “Nangabe umfowenu uyakhwahla bese uhluleka ukuzondla, msize njengombana bewungasiza isikhonzi nesithekeli ukuze akwazi ukuphila nawe." 
Leviticus25:36 Kungabi khona inzalo ombiza yona nawumboleka imali namkha nayibuyisako. Ngokwesaba uZimakho msize ukuze akwazi ukuphila nawe. 
Leviticus25:37 Ungambizi inzalo lokha nawumboleka imali begodu ungafuni ukuzuza nawumthengisela ukudla. 
Leviticus25:38 NginguSomnini uZimenu owanikhupha enarheni yeGibhide bona ngininikele inarha yeKanana ukuze ngibe nguZimu kini. 
Leviticus25:39 “Nangabe umfowenu uyakhwahla bese uzithengisa kuwe, ungamphathi njengekhoboka." 
Leviticus25:40 Kufuze umphathe njengomunye weensebenzi namkha weenthekeli ezihlala nawe. Akusebenzele bekube mnyaka wokubuyisela," 
Leviticus25:41 nje-ke angakhamba, yena nabantwabakhe, abuyele kebekhabo enarheni yaboyisemkhulu." 
Leviticus25:42 Ama-Israyeli aziinceku zami engazenyula enarheni yeGibhide, ngalokho akukafuzi athengiswe njengamakhoboka." 
Leviticus25:43 Ngokwesaba uZimakho ungaphathi umIsrayeli ngokumkhahlameza. 
Leviticus25:44 Nanifuna amakhoboka namakhobokakazi athengeni ezizweni ezinye," 
Leviticus25:45 godu ningawathenga phakathi kwabaphalali abakhonze kini kanye nemindeninabo ebelethelwa enarhenenu nehlala nani. Wona-ke alilifa lenu 
Leviticus25:46 begodu ningawatjhiyela abantwabenu bona abe lilifa labo. Akanisebenzele nini nanini. Kodwana ama-Israyeli wona okubafowenu angakhahlamezani. 
Leviticus25:47 “Nangabe umfowenu uyakhwahla bese azithengise esikhonzini namkha kumphalali onjingileko nanyana eenzukulwaneni zabo 
Leviticus25:48 usese nelungelo lokobana ahlengwe emva kokuzithengisa kwakhe. Kufuze ahlengwe ngomunye wabafowabo: 
Leviticus25:49 Umfowabo kayise, indodana yomfowabo kayise namkha omunye womndeni wekhabo angamhlenga. Kanti-ke nangabe kuyenzeka ahlume angazihlenga yena ngekwakhe." 
Leviticus25:50 Uzakubonisana naloyo omthengileko, kubalwe ukusukela ngomnyaka azithengisa ngawo bekube mnyaka wokubuyisela: Inani lokuhlengwa kwakhe lizakuya ngesibalo seminyaka eseleko ekusebenzeni kwakhe lapho. Inanelo libe njengelesisebenzi." 
Leviticus25:51 Nangabe kusasele iminyaka eminengi, kufuze kuthi emalini athengwe ngayo abuyise ingcenye yayo ngokweminyaka eseleko leyo njengesihlengo sakhe." 
Leviticus25:52 Kodwana nakusele iminyaka embalwa ngaphambi komnyaka wokubuyisela kufuze kutjhejwe lokho: Isihlengo asibe njengokweminyaka eseleko. 
Leviticus25:53 Emnikazinakhe akabe njengomqatjhwa womnyaka ngomnyaka; niqalisise bona umthengi lo akamkhahlamezi na. 
Leviticus25:54 Nangabe akukghoneki bona ahlengeke ngeendlelezo, ngomnyaka wokubuyisela kufuze atjhaphuluke nabantwabakhe" 
Leviticus25:55 ngombana kimi ama-Israyeli aziinceku. Iye, aziinceku zami engazenyula enarheni yeGibhide. NginguSomnini uZimenu.”" 
Leviticus26:1 “Ningazenzeli abosingazimu: Ningazijamiseli iinthombembazwa namkha amatje akhethekileko begodu kungabi khona imifanekiso yamatje abaziweko ekhothanyelwako enarhenenu. Mina Somnini nginguZimenu. 
Leviticus26:2 Londani amaSabatha wami nihloniphe nendawami ecwengileko. NginguSomnini. 
Leviticus26:3 “Nanikhamba ngeemiso zami, nilonde benenze imiyalwami," 
Leviticus26:4 khona-ke ngizanipha izulu ngeenkhathi zalo, inarha ibe nesivuno esihle nemithi yommango ithele iinthelo zayo." 
Leviticus26:5 Nizakubhula iinthoro bekube sikhathi sokuvuna amadiribe, nivune amadiribe bekube sikhathi sokutjala iinthoro. Nizakudla ukudla kwenu nisuthe nihlale enarhenenu niphephile." 
Leviticus26:6 Inarhenu ngizayipha ukuthula, nilale nitjhaphulukile kungabi nalitho eliniphazamisako. Ngizakususa neembandana eziyingozi enarheni, ngenze kungabi nezipi enarhenenu." 
Leviticus26:7 Nizakugijimisa izitha zenu, nizirhayile ngesabula." 
Leviticus26:8 Abahlanu benu bazakugijimisa abalikhulu, kuthi abalikhulu benu bagijimise iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi. Iye, nizakurhayila izitha zenu ngesabula." 
Leviticus26:9 Ngizanitjheja, ngibusise imbelekwenu benginenze nande. Ngizakuhlala esivumelwaneni sami engasenza nani." 
Leviticus26:10 Nizakudla isivuno esidala bekube sikhathi sokuvuna esitjha, nitjhidise amasalela ukuze nilonde esitjha." 
Leviticus26:11 Ngizakuzenzela indawo yokuhlala phakathi kwenu, ngingakghabhudlheki ngani." 
Leviticus26:12 Ngizakutjhidelana nani; ngibe nguZimu kini, nina nibe babantu bami." 
Leviticus26:13 NginguSomnini uZimenu owanikhupha enarheni yeGibhide bona ningasabi makhobokawo. Ngiwephulile amajogi agade aseentanyeni zenu nganenza nakhamba amahlombenu aphakamile.” 
Leviticus26:14 “Nje-ke naningangilaleliko ngokungenzi yoke imiyalwami leyo," 
Leviticus26:15 nidela iimiso zami nehliziywenu ikghabhudlhwa mithethwami kobana niphambane nemiyalwami yoke bese nephule isivumelwano sami," 
Leviticus26:16 nakhu engizokwenza kini: Ngizonehlisela isizi, isifo esiqeda amandla, umkhuhlani orhwahlisa amehlo nodambisa ipilo. Nizakutjalela ilize ngombana ukudla kwenu kuzakudliwa zizitha zenu." 
Leviticus26:17 Ngizanifulathela ukuze izitha zenu zinimadlhe. Nizakubuswa ngabanizondako, nibaleke nanyana kungekho onigijimisako." 
Leviticus26:18 “Nangabe naphezu kwakho koke lokho anizungilalela, ngizokungezelela isibetho sezono zenu sibuyelelwe kalikhomba:" 
Leviticus26:19 Ngizoniqeda amandla wokuzazi kwenu, ngenze umkayi ngaphezu kwenu ufane nesimbi nehlabathenu ifane nekoporo." 
Leviticus26:20 Ukusebenza kwenu kuzakuba lilize ngombana amasimenu angeze aba nesivuno nemithi yenarhenenu ayisoze yathela iinthelo zayo. 
Leviticus26:21 “Nangabe nisaragalala, nala ukungilalela, ngizonehlisela amanye amatlhuwo abe manengi nangaphezu kokubuyelelwe kalikhomba njengokwezono zenu." 
Leviticus26:22 Ngizokuliselela neembandana zommango zibe hlangana nani bona zitle abantwabenu nefuywenu, zinenze niphunguke ngesibalo ukuze nemizilenu ingasabi nabantu." 
Leviticus26:23 “Nangabe nangaphezu kwakho koke lokho anifuni ukuzwa, kodwana nisoloko niphambene nami," 
Leviticus26:24 nami ngizakuphambana nani: Ngimi ozonibetha ngokubuyelelwe kalikhomba ngebanga lezono zenu. 
Leviticus26:25 Ngizakwehlisela isabula phezu kwenu, yona izakuba sibuyiselelo sokwephula kwenu isivumelwano. Lokha nanibalekela emadorobhenenu, ngizokuthumela izifo phakathi kwenu, niwele ezandleni zesitha." 
Leviticus26:26 Ngizokwephula umphekgho wesikwa senu bese abafazi abalitjhumi bahlanganyele ekubhageleni imindenabo ipani eyodwa nge-ondweni yinye. Isikwa sakhona sihlukaniselwane ngokulinganisiweko. Nizakudla kodwana ningasuthi. 
Leviticus26:27 “Nangabe nangaphezu kwezintwezi soloko anifuni ukungilalela kodwana niphambana nami," 
Leviticus26:28 nami ngizokuphambana nani ngivutha ngobukhali. Ngizonibetha ngokubuyelelwe kalikhomba ngebanga lezono zenu: 
Leviticus26:29 Nizokudla ngitjho nenyama yamadodanenu, iye neyamadodakazenu niyirhiribidele." 
Leviticus26:30 Ngizokutjhabalalisa iindunduma zenu, ngiphohloze ama-aldarenu wetjhwalo, ngilahlele iindumbu zenu phezu kweenthombembazwa zenu ezingaphiliko. Ngizokukghabhudlheka ngani." 
Leviticus26:31 Amadorobhenu ngizowenza amarubhi, iindawo ezicwengileko zenu zibe maqubi. Iminikelwenu angizukuyamukela." 
Leviticus26:32 Ngizokwenza inarhenu ibe libhudu kangangombana nezitha zenu ezingena kiyo bona zihlale, zikhuze ngayo." 
Leviticus26:33 “Nina-ke ngizonihlakazela hlangana nezinye izizwe nesabula ihlale irhwatjhiwe ngemuva kwenu. Iye, inarhenu izakuba libhudu namadorobhenu abe marubhi." 
Leviticus26:34 Ngesikhatheso inarha izakuba nethuba lokuba namaSabatha ebegade inganawo. Iye, lokha naniseenarheni zezitha zenu inarha izabe iphumule, ivuselela iminyaka yamasabhathayo." 
Leviticus26:35 Ngesikhathi soke inarha isese libhudu, izakuba nokuphumula engazange kheyibe nakho eminyakeni yamaSabatha lokha nanisahlala kiyo." 
Leviticus26:36 Nakungabanye benu eniseleko, ngizonenza nibe nommoya odanileko eenarheni zezitha zenu. Ngitjho netjhada lokuphephuka kwekari lomuthi lizonenza nibaleke inga mumuntu ubalekela ipi, niwe kungekho onigijimisako!" 
Leviticus26:37 Nizokukhubeka niwelane phezulu kube inga niphepha ibutho, nanyana kungekho onigijimisako. Angeze naba nesibindi sokujamelana nezitha zenu." 
Leviticus26:38 Niyokufela hlangana nebakosozizwe, niginywe yinarha yezitha zenu." 
Leviticus26:39 Abanye benu abasaseleko bazokuphela eenarheni zezitha zabo ngebanga lezono zabo nangenca yeemphambeko zaboyisemkhulu. 
Leviticus26:40 “Nje-ke bazokuvuma izono zabo nezaboyisemkhulu bona akhange bathembeke kimi nokobana baphambene nami 
Leviticus26:41 kangangobana nami ngaphambana nabo bengabanikela eenarheni zezitha zabo. Nangabe bathoba iinhliziyo zabo ezikhunyaleleko begodu bamukele isibetho sezono zabo," 
Leviticus26:42 ngizokukhumbula isivumelwano sami engasenza noJakopo, no-Isaka kanye no-Abrahamu, ngikhumbule nenarhabo." 
Leviticus26:43 Inarha kufuze khebayitjhiye ukuze iphumule, ithabele iminyaka yamaSabathayo ngokungabikho kwabo kiyo, nje-ke bona kufuze bamukele isibetho sezono zabo ngombana bahlubuka imithethwami bebakghabhudlhwa ziimiso zami." 
Leviticus26:44 “Nanyana baseenarheni zezitha zabo angeze ngabahlubuka namkha bangikghabhudlhe kangangobana ngingabeze ngibabhubhise nya bengephule nesivumelwano sami nabo ngombana nginguSomnini uZimabo. 
Leviticus26:45 Ngenca yabo ngizakukhumbula isivumelwano sami engasenza naboyisemkhulu lokha nangibenyula tjhatjhalazi phambi kwezizwe enarheni yeGibhide ukuze ngibe nguZimu kibo. NginguSomnini!” 
Leviticus26:46 Lezo kwaba ziimiso, imithetho kanye nemiyalo uSomnini ayinikela ngoMosi entabeni yeSinayi ukuze yakhe ubudlelwano phakathi kwayo nama-Israyeli." 
Leviticus27:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Leviticus27:2 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi kiwo: “Lokha umuntu enza isithembiso sokuhlukanisela umuntu kuSomnini bese kudingeke bona kubekwe inani lokumhlenga 
Leviticus27:3 kuzakusetjenziswa imithetho elandelako: Inani lomuntu omduna ukusungula eminyakeni ematjhumi amabili ukuya kwematjhumi asithandathu simagremu amakhulu amahlanu namatjhumi alikhomba wesiliva ngokwesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko. 
Leviticus27:4 Nangabe kumumuntu omsikazi kuzakuba magremu amakhulu amathathu namatjhumi amane wesiliva. 
Leviticus27:5 Nangabe kumumuntu oneminyaka emihlanu ukuya ematjhumini amabili, inani lizakuba magremu amakhulu amabili namatjhumi amathathu wesiliva nakumsana, kube magremu alikhulu netjhumi nahlanu wesiliva nakumntazana." 
Leviticus27:6 Nangabe kumntwana onenyanga eyodwa ukuya eminyakeni emihlanu, inani lizakuba magremu amatjhumi amahlanu nekhomba wesiliva nakumsanyana, kube magremu amatjhumi amathathu nane wesiliva nakumntazanyana." 
Leviticus27:7 Nangabe umuntu uneminyaka ematjhumi asithandathu ukudlula, inani lizakuba magremu alikhulu namatjhumi alikhomba wesiliva nakuliqhegu, esilukazini kube magremu alikhulu netjhumi nahlanu." 
Leviticus27:8 Nangabe owenza isifungo uchake kangangobana uhluleka ukuhlenga umuntu ofungelweko ngokwenani elibekiweko, khona-ke akamlethe phambi komphristi bona kube mphristi ohlosa inani. Umphristi uzakuhlosa inani elingakghonwa ngowenze isifungo." 
Leviticus27:9 “Nangabe umuntu uthembisa ifuyo kuSomnini ekungaba ngeyomhlabelo, ingekaSomnini. Ifuyo leyo icwengile" 
Leviticus27:10 nomuntu oyinikelako akakavunyelwa ukuyijamiselela. Angayenani ngehle namkha ngembi. Nangabe mbala ujamiselela ifuyo ngenye ifuyo, zombili njalo zingezicwengileko, ngezakaSomnini." 
Leviticus27:11 “Nangabe umuntu uthembisa uSomnini ifuyo esilapheleko nekungakghonakali bona kwenziwe umhlabelo ngayo, ifuyo leyo ayilethwe phambi komphristi." 
Leviticus27:12 Umphristi uzabese uhlosa ubungako bayo ngokuqala bona yihle namkha yimbi na. Okuquntwe mphristi ngayo kujamile. 
Leviticus27:13 Nangabe umniniyo uthanda ukuyihlenga, uzakungezelela ngokwesihlanu sobungako benani lefuyo leyo." 
Leviticus27:14 “Lokha umuntu ahlukanisela indlwakhe uSomnini, icwengile kuSomnini. Umphristi kufuze ahlose ubungako benani layo ngokuqala bona yihle namkha yimbi na. Okuquntwe mphristi ngayo kujamile." 
Leviticus27:15 Nangabe umniniyo uthanda ukuyihlenga, uzakungezelela ngokwesihlanu sobungako benani lendlu leyo. Nje-ke izakuba ngeyakhe godu." 
Leviticus27:16 “Nangabe umuntu wahlukanisela uSomnini ingcenye yesimu elilifa lakhe, ubungako benani lesimu leyo kufuze buhloswe ngokulinganiswa kwembewu etjalwa kiyo: Intundu eyodwa kadumbana yebhali ibiza amagremu amakhulu amahlanu namatjhumi alikhomba wesiliva." 
Leviticus27:17 Nakubana uhlukanisela isimakhe ukusukela ngomnyaka wokubuyisela, inani layo lizakuhlala lijamile." 
Leviticus27:18 Kodwana nakube uhlukanisela isimakhe emva komnyaka wokubuyisela, umphristi kufuze abale iminyaka eseleko bese wehlisa inani." 
Leviticus27:19 Nangabe ohlukanisela ngesimakhe usafuna ukuyihlenga, uzakungezelela ngokwesihlanu sobungako benani lesimu leyo. Nje-ke izakuba ngeyakhe godu." 
Leviticus27:20 Kodwana nangayihlengiko bese uthengisela omunye umuntu ilungelo lokuyisebenzisa, angekhe asayihlenga godu." 
Leviticus27:21 Kuzakuthi lokha nayitjhatjhululwako ngomnyaka wokubuyisela, ibe ngecwengileko kuSomnini. Njengesimu ezilwako iba ngeyabaphristi, kube lilifa labo." 
Leviticus27:22 Nangabe umuntu uhlukanisela uSomnini isimu anelungelo lokuyisebenzisa nekungasiyo ingcenye yelifa lakhe," 
Leviticus27:23 umphristi kufuze abale inani lokuhlengwa kwayo bekube mnyaka wokubuyisela. Umuntu loyo uzakukhokha khona mhlokho inani lokuhlengwa njengesipho esikhethekileko kuSomnini. 
Leviticus27:24 Ngomnyaka wokubuyisela isimu izakubuyela keyathengwa kuye, ekunguye umniniyo ngokwelifa." 
Leviticus27:25 Koke ukuhlosa kufuze kwenziwe ngokwesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko. 
Leviticus27:26 “Khumbulani bona amazibulo wefuyo angawakaSomnini, nje-ke akungabi khona owahlukanisela uSomnini. Kungaba ngelekomo namkha lemvu lingelikaSomnini." 
Leviticus27:27 Kodwana nangabe ngelefuyo esilapheleko, umninilo kufuze alihlenge ngenani elibekwe phezu kwalo bese angezelele ngokwesihlanu. Nakube alikahlengwa lizakuthengiswa ngenani lalo esele libekiwe." 
Leviticus27:28 “Khumbulani bona nanyana yini umuntu azilela ngayo uSomnini epahlenakhe angeze yathengiswa namkha ihlengwe, kungaba mumuntu, isilwana namkha ingcenye yesimu yelifa lakhe. Koke okuzilelwa ngakho uSomnini kucwenge khulu kuSomnini." 
Leviticus27:29 Umuntu osele azilelwe kuSomnini, akabulawe; angeze asahlengwa." 
Leviticus27:30 “Koke kwetjhumi kwenarha, kungaba ngokweenthoro namkha kweenthelo, kungokwakaSomnini. Yeke kucwengile kuSomnini." 
Leviticus27:31 Nangabe umuntu ufuna ukuhlenga nanyana yini yokwetjhumi kwakhe, kufuze angezelele ngokwesihlanu enanini lentweleyo." 
Leviticus27:32 Koke kwetjhumi kwemihlambi yeenkomo namkha kwezimvu neembuzi, okutjho lokho okudlula ngaphasi kwentonga yomelusi, kucwengile kuSomnini." 
Leviticus27:33 Umuntu akukafuzi aqale bona kuhle namkha kumbi nanyana akwenane ngokhunye. Nangabe mbala ujamiselela ifuyo ngenye ifuyo, zombili njalo zingezicwengileko, ngezikaSomnini. Akukafaneli bona zihlengwe.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Leyo miyalo uSomnini ayala ngayo uMosi entabeni yeSinayi mayelana nama-Israyeli. 
Numbers1:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi asetendeni lokuhlanganela erhalawumbeni leSinayi ngelanga lokuthoma enyangeni yesibili ngomnyaka wesibili, emva kokuphuma kwama-Israyeli enarheni yeGibhide wathi:" 
Numbers1:2 “Balani umkhambathi woke wama-Israyeli ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise, ngezindlu zabo, iye, boke abaduna, umuntu nomuntu" 
Numbers1:3 ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu. Boke kwa-Israyeli abasele balungele ukuya epini, batloliseni wena no-Aroni ngokwamabuthwabo." 
Numbers1:4 Kufuze kube nendoda yinye eyihloko yomndeni kileyo naleyo koro ekumele inisize ukubala. 
Numbers1:5 Naka-ke amabizo wamadoda ekufuze anisize: “KebakwaRubeni ngu-Elitsuri umsa kaTjhedewuri," 
Numbers1:6 kwaSimiyoni nguTjhelumiyeli umsa kaTsuritjhadayi," 
Numbers1:7 kwaJuda nguNarhitjhoni umsa ka-Aminadaba," 
Numbers1:8 kwa-Isakari nguNataneli umsa kaTsuwari," 
Numbers1:9 kwaZebuloni ngu-Eliyabu umsa kaRheloni," 
Numbers1:10 emadodaneni kaJosefa: ku-Efrayimu ngu-Elitjhama umsa ka-Amihudi, kuManase kube nguGamaliyeli umsa kaPedatsuri," 
Numbers1:11 kwaBhenjamini ngu-Abidani umsa kaGidiyoni," 
Numbers1:12 kwaDani ngu-Arhiyezeri umsa ka-Amitjhadayi," 
Numbers1:13 kwa-Atjheri nguPagiyiyeli umsa ka-Okirani," 
Numbers1:14 kwaGadi ngu-Eliyasafa umsa kaDewuyeli," 
Numbers1:15 kwaNafitali ngu-Arhira umsa ka-Enani.” 
Numbers1:16 Labo-ke ngibo abakhethwa emkhambathini bona babe barholi beenkoro zaboyise, babekwa baba ziinhloko zamabutho wakwa-Israyeli." 
Numbers1:17 UMosi no-Aroni babiza amadoda akhethiweko lawo," 
Numbers1:18 kwabizwa nomkhambathi woke ngelanga lokuthoma lenyanga yesibili. Boke abaduna, umuntu nomuntu, ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu batloliswa ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo." 
Numbers1:19 Kwaba njengombana uSomnini bekayale uMosi. Lokha natlolisa abantu erhalawumbeni leSinayi," 
Numbers1:20 iinzukulwana zakwaRubeni olizibulo laka-Israyeli beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane nesithandathu namakhulu amahlanu. Kwabalwa umuntu nomuntu ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:21 Iinzukulwana zakwaSimiyoni beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu nethoba namakhulu amathathu. Kwabalwa umuntu nomuntu ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:22 Iinzukulwana zakwaGadi beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane nahlanu namakhulu asithandathu namatjhumi amahlanu. Kwabalwa ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:23 Iinzukulwana zakwaJuda beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi alikhomba nane namakhulu asithandathu. Kwabalwa ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:24 Iinzukulwana zakwa-Isakari beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu nane namakhulu amane. Kwabalwa ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:25 Iinzukulwana zakwaZebuloni beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu nalikhomba namakhulu amane. Kwabalwa ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:26 Iinzukulwana zakwaJosefa beziziinkoro ezimbili, okutjho u-Efrayimu noManase: Iinzukulwana zakwa-Efrayimu beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane namakhulu amahlanu. Kwabalwa ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:27 Neenzukulwana zakwaManase beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nambili namakhulu amabili. Kwabalwa ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:28 Iinzukulwana zakwaBhenjamini beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nahlanu namakhulu amane. Kwabalwa ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:29 Iinzukulwana zakwaDani beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi asithandathu nambili namakhulu alikhomba. Kwabalwa ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:30 Iinzukulwana zakwa-Atjheri beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane nanye namakhulu amahlanu. Kwabalwa ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:31 Iinzukulwana zakwaNafitali beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu nantathu namakhulu amane. Kwabalwa ngokweenkoro, ngemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zabo, boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers1:32 Ngilawo-ke amadoda uMosi no-Aroni abawatlolisa ngokusizwa ziinhloko zemindeni ezilitjhumi nambili ezazijamele ikoro nekoro kwa-Israyeli. 
Numbers1:33 Nje-ke boke abatloliswako kwa-Israyeli ngemindeni yaboyise, okutjho abaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu abasele balungele ukuya epini," 
Numbers1:34 bebaziinkulungwana ezimakhulu asithandathu nantathu namakhulu amahlanu namatjhumi amahlanu. 
Numbers1:35 Ikoro yakwaLevi yona akhange itloliswe neenkoro ezinye 
Numbers1:36 ngombana uSomnini gade athe kuMosi: 
Numbers1:37 “Ungatlolisi ikoro yakwaLevi begodu ungayifaki esibalweni seenkoro zakwa-Israyeli. 
Numbers1:38 Kodwana beka amaLevi bona aphathe ithaberinakeli lobufakazi, ipahlalo kanye nakho koke kwalo. Wona kufuze athwale ithaberinakeli nepahlalo yoke begodu aleluse. Akakhe amatendawo magegana nalo." 
Numbers1:39 Lokha ithaberinakeli nalithuthwako, lizakuwiswa maLevi. Godu nalihlonywako, maLevi azalijamisa. Nanyana ngubani omunye ozakutjhidela kilo akabulawe." 
Numbers1:40 Ngesikhathi ama-Israyeli ahlome amatendawo ekampeni ebaleni lawo ngokwamabuthwawo, enye nenye ikoro ngaphasi kwesibekiso sayo," 
Numbers1:41 amaLevi wona akahlome amatendawo magegana nethaberinakeli lobufakazi ukuze ilaka lami lingavutheli emkhambathini wama-Israyeli. MaLevi azakulawula ethaberinakelini lobufakazi.” 
Numbers1:42 Ama-Israyeli enza koke uSomnini ayala ngakho uMosi bona kwenziwe. 
Numbers2:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni wathi: 
Numbers2:2 “Lokha ama-Israyeli nakahloma amatendawo kufuze ahlome magegana netende lokuhlanganela kudanyana nalo. Omunye nomunye ahlome itende lakhe esibekisweni sekoro yekhabo ngokwetshwayo lomndeni waboyise. 
Numbers2:3 “BakwaJuda kufuze bahlome amatendabo esibekisweni sabo ukuyela ngepumalanga. Umrholi wekoro yakwaJuda kube nguNarhitjhoni umsa ka-Aminadaba. 
Numbers2:4 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi alikhomba nane namakhulu asithandathu. 
Numbers2:5 Bakwa-Isakari kufuze bahlome amatendabo ngehlangothini lakwaJuda. Umrholi wekoro leyo kube nguNataneli umsa kaTsuwari. 
Numbers2:6 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu nane namakhulu amane. 
Numbers2:7 BakwaZebuloni nabo bahlome khonapho. Umrholi wekoro leyo kube ngu-Eliyabu umsa kaRheloni. 
Numbers2:8 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu nalikhomba namakhulu amane. 
Numbers2:9 Isibalo soke samabutho ahlome noJuda sizakuba ziinkulungwana ezilikhulu namatjhumi abunane nasithandathu namakhulu amane wabatlolisweko. Ngibo abazakuphuma qangi. 
Numbers2:10 “Isibekiso sakwaRubeni sizakuba ngesewula lapha bazakuhloma khona amatendabo. Umrholi wekoro leyo kube ngu-Elitsuri umsa kaTjhedewuri. 
Numbers2:11 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane nasithandathu namakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers2:12 BakwaSimiyoni kufuze bahlome amatendabo ngehlangothini lakwaRubeni. Umrholi wekoro leyo kube nguTjhelumiyeli umsa kaTsuritjhadayi. 
Numbers2:13 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu nalithoba namakhulu amathathu. 
Numbers2:14 BakwaGadi nabo bahlome khonapho. Umrholi wekoro leyo kube ngu-Eliyasafa umsa kaDewuyeli. 
Numbers2:15 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane nahlanu namakhulu asithandathu namatjhumi amahlanu. 
Numbers2:16 Isibalo soke samabutho ahlome noRubeni sizakuba ziinkulungwana ezilikhulu namatjhumi amahlanu nanye namakhulu amane namatjhumi amahlanu. Ngibo abazakuphuma kwesibili. 
Numbers2:17 “Ngemva kwalokho itende lokuhlanganela lizakuwiswa kanye nekampa yamaLevi ephakathi kweenkampa ezinye. Ama-Israyeli azakuwisa amatendawo ngendlela awahlome ngayo, ikoro ngekoro endawenayo njengokwesibekiso." 
Numbers2:18 “Isibekiso sakwa-Efrayimu sizakuba ngetjingalanga lapha bazakuhloma khona amatendabo. Umrholi wekoro leyo kube ngu-Elitjhama umsa ka-Amihudi. 
Numbers2:19 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane namakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers2:20 BakwaManase kufuze bahlome amatendabo ngehlangothini lakwa-Efrayimu. Umrholi wekoro leyo kube nguGamaliyeli umsa kaPedatsuri. 
Numbers2:21 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nambili namakhulu amabili. 
Numbers2:22 BakwaBhenjamini nabo bahlome khonapho. Umrholi wekoro leyo kube ngu-Abidani umsa kaGidiyoni. 
Numbers2:23 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nahlanu namakhulu amane. 
Numbers2:24 Isibalo soke samabutho ahlome no-Efrayimu sizakuba ziinkulungwana ezilikhulu nabunane nekhulu. Ngibo abazakuphuma kwesithathu. 
Numbers2:25 “Isibekiso sakwaDani sizakuba ngetlhagwini lapha bazakuhloma khona amatendabo. Umrholi wekoro leyo kube ngu-Arhiyezeri umsa ka-Amitjhadayi. 
Numbers2:26 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi asithandathu nambili namakhulu alikhomba. 
Numbers2:27 Bakwa-Atjheri kufuze bahlome amatendabo ngehlangothini lakwaDani. Umrholi wekoro leyo kube nguPagiyiyeli umsa ka-Okirani. 
Numbers2:28 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane nanye namakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers2:29 BakwaNafitali nabo bahlome khonapho. Umrholi wekoro leyo kube ngu-Arhira umsa ka-Enani. 
Numbers2:30 Abatlolisweko bebutho lakhe bazakuba ziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu nantathu namakhulu amane. 
Numbers2:31 Isibalo soke samabutho ahlome noDani sizakuba ziinkulungwana ezilikhulu namatjhumi amahlanu nalikhomba namakhulu asithandathu. Ngibo abazakuphuma kokugcina ngaphasi kwesibekiso sabo.” 
Numbers2:32 Lawo-ke ma-Israyeli atloliswa ngokuya ngokwezindlu zaboyise. Isibalo sawo woke atloliswako ngokwamabuthwawo saba ziinkulungwana ezimakhulu asithandathu nantathu namakhulu amahlanu namatjhumi amahlanu. 
Numbers2:33 Ikoro yakwaLevi yona akhange itloliswe neenkoro ezinye. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini bakayale uMosi. 
Numbers2:34 Ama-Israyeli enza koke uSomnini ebe ayale uMosi ngakho. Nje-ke ahloma amatendawo ngokweembekiso zawo begodu aphuma ngokwemindeni yaboyise nangokwezindlu zawo. 
Numbers3:1 Naku-ke umlando weenzukulwana zaka-Aroni noMosi ngesikhathi uSomnini akhuluma noMosi entabeni yeSinayi: 
Numbers3:2 Amabizo wamadodana ka-Aroni bekunguNadaba izibulo, alanywe ngu-Abihu, u-Elazara no-Itamara." 
Numbers3:3 Lawo-ke mabizo wamadodana ka-Aroni abaphristi abazesiweko ebegade ajanyiswe kobana abe baphristi. 
Numbers3:4 Kodwana uNadaba no-Abihu bafela phambi kwakaSomnini erhalawumbeni leSinayi lokha nabatjhidela e-aldarini namalahle atjhili. Bebanganabantwana. Ngu-Elazara no-Itamara kwaphela abasala bona balotjhe njengabaphristi ngesikhathi saka-Aroni uyise. 
Numbers3:5 Yeke uSomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Numbers3:6 “Tjhideza ikoro yakwaLevi bese uyibeka ngaphasi kwelawulo laka-Aroni umphristi. Kufuze imsekele 
Numbers3:7 ngokwenza imisebenzakhe phambi kwetende lokuhlanganela kanye neyomkhambathi woke, okutjho imisebenzi okufanele iyenze ethaberinakelini." 
Numbers3:8 AmaLevi kufuze atjheje yoke ipahla yetende lokuhlanganela begodu enze imisebenzi yethaberinakeli esikhundleni sama-Israyeli. 
Numbers3:9 Beka amaLevi aphelele emsebenzini ka-Aroni namadodanakhe. Kufuze abasize ngehlangothini lama-Israyeli. 
Numbers3:10 Kodwana u-Aroni namadodanakhe ababekwe bona benze umsebenzi wobuphristi. Nange kungaba khona omunye othatha umsebenzabo, akabulawe.”" 
Numbers3:11 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi godu wathi: 
Numbers3:12 “Qala, ngimi okhethe amaLevi hlangana nama-Israyeli kobana ajamele woke amazibulo, okutjho koke okuphume qangi esibelethweni. Iye, amaLevi azakuba ngewami" 
Numbers3:13 ngombana woke amazibulo ngewami. Kwathi lokha nangimadlha phasi woke amazibulo wenarheni yeGibhide, ngazihlukanisela woke amazibulo aduna, wabantu neweenlwana kwa-Israyeli; nje-ke angewami. NginguSomnini.”" 
Numbers3:14 USomnini wabuye wakhuluma noMosi erhalawumbeni leSinayi wathi: 
Numbers3:15 “Tlolisa amaLevi ngokwezindlu zaboyise nangemindenawo. Boke abaduna ukusukela esaneni lenyanga ukuya phezulu kufuze batloliswe.” 
Numbers3:16 Nje-ke uMosi wawatlolisa ukuya ngelizwi lakaSomnini. Wenza njengombana bekayaliwe. 
Numbers3:17 Naka-ke amadodana kaLevi ngokwamabizwawo: NguGeritjhoni, uKhehathi noMerari." 
Numbers3:18 Amabizo wamadodana kaGeritjhoni ngokwemindenawo kunguLibini noTjhimeyi. 
Numbers3:19 WakaKhehathi ngokwemindenawo kungu-Amramu, uYitsihari, uRhebroni no-Uziyeli." 
Numbers3:20 WakaMerari ngokwemindenawo, kunguMarhili noMutjhi. Leyo-ke bekumindeni yamaLevi ngokwezindlu zaboyise." 
Numbers3:21 KuGeritjhoni kudabuka imindeni yamaLibini neyamaTjhimeyi. Leyo-ke bekumindeni kaGeritjhoni. 
Numbers3:22 Isibalo sabo boke abaduna abatlolisweko bemindeni le, ukusukela esaneni lenyanga ukuya phezulu, besiziinkulungwana ezilikhomba namakhulu amahlanu." 
Numbers3:23 Umndeni kaGeritjhoni lo, bekufuze uhlome amatendawo ngemuva kwethaberinakeli nca ngetjingalanga." 
Numbers3:24 Umrholi womndeni kaGeritjhoni bekungu-Eliyasafa umsa kaLayela. 
Numbers3:25 AmaGeritjhoni bekufuze atjheje itende lokuhlanganela: ithaberinakeli netende, okutjho isigubuzeso sethaberinakeli, itjhila lomnyango wetende lokuhlanganela," 
Numbers3:26 imilembelembe yesirhodlo, isivalo sesango lesirhodlo esizombeleze ithaberinakeli ne-aldari kanye neentambo zakhona. Koke okuphathelene nalokho bekumsebenzawo." 
Numbers3:27 KuKhehathi kudabuka imindeni yama-Amramu, yamaYitsihari, yamaRhebroni neyama-Uziyeli. Leyo-ke bekumindeni kaKhehathi." 
Numbers3:28 Isibalo sabo boke abaduna abatlolisweko bemindeni le, ukusukela esaneni lenyanga ukuya phezulu, besiziinkulungwana ezibunane namakhulu asithandathu. Umndeni lo bekufuze utjheje ipahla yendawo ecwengileko." 
Numbers3:29 AmaKhehathi la bekufuze ahlome amatendawo ngehlangothini langesewula yethaberinakeli. 
Numbers3:30 Umrholi womndeni kaKhehathi bekungu-Elitsafani umsa ka-Uziyeli. 
Numbers3:31 Imisebenzi yamaKhehathi beyiphathelene nokutjheja umfaji wesivumelwano, itafula, ilithi leembani, ama-aldari, izitja zendawo ecwengileko ezisetjenziswa baphristi kanye nesiyaya sendawo ecwenge khulu. Koke okuphathelene nalokho bekumsebenzawo." 
Numbers3:32 U-Elazara umsa ka-Aroni umphristi, bekayinduna ekulu yamaLevi begodu bekufuze abe nelihlo phezu kwabatjheji bendawo ecwengileko." 
Numbers3:33 KuMerari kudabuka imindeni yamaMarhili neyamaMutjhi. Leyo-ke bekumindeni kaMerari. 
Numbers3:34 Isibalo sabo boke abaduna abatlolisweko bemindeni le, ukusukela esaneni lenyanga ukuya phezulu, besiziinkulungwana ezisithandathu namakhulu amabili." 
Numbers3:35 Umrholi womndeni kaMerari bekunguTsuriyeli umsa ka-Abirhayili. AmaMerari bekufuze ahlome amatendawo ngehlangothini langetlhagwini yethaberinakeli. 
Numbers3:36 Imisebenzi yamaMerari beyiphathelene nokutjheja amahlaka wethaberinakeli, iinqabo, iinsika namanzinziswalo kanye nazo zoke iinsetjenziswa zakhona. Koke okuphathelene nalokho bekumsebenzawo." 
Numbers3:37 Godu bekufuze atjheje iinsika ezizombeleze isirhodlo namanzinziswazo, iinkhonkhwani kanye neentambo zakhona." 
Numbers3:38 Labo ebekufuze bahlome amatendabo ngaphambi kwethaberinakeli, ngehlangothini langepumalanga yetende lokuhlanganela, nguMosi no-Aroni kanye namadodanakhe. Ngibo ebe baqalene nokulotjha endaweni ecwengileko esikhundleni sama-Israyeli. Nanyana ngubani omunye ozakutjhidela eendaweni ezikhethiselako, akabulawe." 
Numbers3:39 Isibalo samaLevi esatloliswa nguMosi no-Aroni ngokomyalo kaSomnini, besiziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nambili. Bekutloliswe boke abaduna ngokwemindeni ukusukela esaneni lenyanga ukuya phezulu." 
Numbers3:40 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: “Yewutlolise woke amazibulo aduna kwa-Israyeli ukusukela esaneni lenyanga ukuya phezulu, uwabale ngokwamabizwawo." 
Numbers3:41 Esikhundleni samazibulo woke aduna wama-Israyeli, ngihlukanisela amaLevi, nesikhundleni samazibulo wefuyo yama-Israyeli ungihlukanisele amazibulo wefuyo yamaLevi. NginguSomnini.”" 
Numbers3:42 Nje-ke uMosi watlolisa woke amazibulo hlangana nama-Israyeli njengombana uSomnini bekamyalile. 
Numbers3:43 Isibalo sabatlolisweko, okutjho boke abaduna abamazibulo ukusukela esaneni lenyanga ukuya phezulu, besiziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nambili namakhulu amabili namatjhumi alikhomba nantathu." 
Numbers3:44 USomnini wabuya wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers3:45 “Ngihlukanisela amaLevi esikhundleni samazibulo woke wama-Israyeli nefuyo yamaLevi esikhundleni sefuyo yama-Israyeli. Iye, amaLevi ngewami. NginguSomnini." 
Numbers3:46 Amazibulo amakhulu amabili namatjhumi alikhomba nantathu wama-Israyeli angaphezulu kwesibalo samaLevi kufuze ahlengwe. 
Numbers3:47 Umuntu ngamunye akahlengwe ngeempaparwana ezihlanu zesiliva okumagremu amatjhumi amahlanu nahlanu ngokwesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko. 
Numbers3:48 Thatha koke lokho ukunikele u-Aroni namadodanakhe kube sihlengo samazibulo wama-Israyeli angaphezulu kwesibalo samaLevi.” 
Numbers3:49 Nje-ke uMosi wabuthelela isiliva yesihlengo ebantwini abangaphezulu kwesibalo sabahlengwe maLevi. 
Numbers3:50 Isiliva ayibuthelele emazibulweni wama-Israyeli leyo, yaba makhilogremu alitjhumi nahlanu nesiquntu ngokwesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko." 
Numbers3:51 Ngokunjalo-ke uMosi wanikela u-Aroni namadodanakhe isiliva yesihlengo ngokuya ngelizwi lakaSomnini. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini bekamyalile. 
Numbers4:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni wathi: 
Numbers4:2 “Emadodaneni kaLevi, bala amaKhehathi ngokwemindeni nangezindlu zaboyise." 
Numbers4:3 Utlolise ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu ukuya ematjhumini amahlanu, okutjho boke ekufuze balotjhe bebasebenze etendeni lokuhlanganela.”" 
Numbers4:4 “Naku umsebenzi wamadodana kaKhehathi etendeni lokuhlanganela endaweni ecwenge khulu: 
Numbers4:5 Lokha ikampa yama-Israyeli nayifuduswako, u-Aroni namadodanakhe kufuze bangene ngetendeni behlise isiyaya sendawo ecwenge khulu bese bembesa umfaji wobufakazi ngaso." 
Numbers4:6 Bazagubuzesa umfaji lowo ngesikhumba esitjhukiweko, godu baleke nangetjhila elihlaza komkayi koke bese bahlomela iingodo zakhona." 
Numbers4:7 “Endaweni ecwengileko, phezu kwetafula elinezikwa ezibekwa phambi kwakaZimu, abaleke itjhila elihlaza komkayi. Izikwa azihlale zisetafulenapho ngeenkhathi zoke. Ababeke phezu kwetjhilelo izitja ezihlukahlukeneko kanye neenkapho nemijeka yokuvubela umnikelo wewayini." 
Numbers4:8 Abagubuzese koke lokho ngetjhila elitlerebede bese baleka ngesikhumba esitjhukiweko ngaphezulu, bahlomele neengodo zakhona." 
Numbers4:9 Bazakuthatha itjhila elihlaza komkayi bembese ngalo ilithi leembani lokukhanyisa neembani zakhona, iincimasibani nezitjana zalo kanye nezitja zamafutha weembani abazisebenzisa kilo." 
Numbers4:10 Nje-ke ababeke ilithi leembanelo nazo zoke izitja zalo phezu kwesikhumba esitjhukiweko. Koke lokho kukhwezwe phezu kwehlaka. 
Numbers4:11 Godu bazakwendlala itjhila elihlaza komkayi phezu kwe-aldari legolide, baleke itjhilelo ngesikhumba esitjhukiweko bese balihlomela iingodo zalo." 
Numbers4:12 Abathathe zoke izitja ezisetjenziswa endaweni ecwengileko bazibeke etjhileni elihlaza komkayi, baleke ngesikhumba esitjhukiweko ngaphezulu bese bazikhweza ehlakeni." 
Numbers4:13 Abakhuphe umlotha e-aldarini bese balembesa ngetjhila elibubende. 
Numbers4:14 Babeke phezu kwe-aldarelo zoke iinsetjenziswa zalo okulotjhwa ngazo kilo. Lokhu kufaka hlangana izitja zokutjhisela itjhwalo, iimforogo, iintjhefula, izitja zokunyenyeza, iye, zoke izitja ze-aldari. Abalileke ngesikhumba esitjhukiweko bese balihlomela iingodo zalo." 
Numbers4:15 U-Aroni namadodanakhe nasele baqedile ukwembesa ipahla yendawo ecwengileko nazo zoke iinsetjenziswa zayo, nakufuzwa ikampa, amadodana kaKhehathi kufuze eze athwale ipahla. Kodwana angathinti izinto ezicwengileko zingakembeswa ukuze angafi. Lezo-ke bekuzizinto zetende lokuhlanganela amadodana kaKhehathi ebekufuze azithwale." 
Numbers4:16 “U-Elazara umsa ka-Aroni umphristi, nguye ekufuze aqaphele amafutha weembani, amakha wetjhwalo, umnikelo weenthoro wemihla ngemihla kanye namafutha wokuzesa. Godu kufuze abe nelihlo phezu kwethaberinakeli nezintweni zoke ezingaphakathi kwalo, ngitjho nakiyo yoke indawo ecwengileko kanye nezitja zayo.”" 
Numbers4:17 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni wathi: 
Numbers4:18 “Qinisekisani bonyana indlu kaKhehathi iyagcineka hlangana namaLevi. 
Numbers4:19 AmaKhehathi gade angakafuzi ukungena ngendaweni ecwengileko bona alunguze izinto ezicwengileko ngitjho nanyana beyingakafuzwa ngombana bekazakufa. Ukuze ahlale agcinekile nakhu okuzakwenziwa: U-Aroni namadodanakhe abawathathe bawatjengise omunye nomunye umsebenzakhe wokuthwala izintwezo ngombana azakuhlongakala lokha natjhidela ezintweni ezicwenge khulu.” 
Numbers4:20 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers4:21 “Godu bala amaGeritjhoni ngezindlu zaboyise nangokwemindeni. 
Numbers4:22 Utlolise ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu ukuya ematjhumini amahlanu, okutjho boke ekufuze balotjhe bebasebenze etendeni lokuhlanganela." 
Numbers4:23 Naku umsebenzi wemindeni yamaGeritjhoni ekulotjheni nekuthwaleni imithwalo: 
Numbers4:24 Kuzakufanela bona ithwale amatjhila wethaberinakeli, itende lokulembesa, iinkhumba ezitjhukiweko ezelekwa phezu kwetendelo, itjhila lomnyango wetende lokuhlanganela," 
Numbers4:25 imilembelembe yesirhodlo, itjhila lokuvala isango lesirhodlo esizombeleze ithaberinakeli ne-aldari, iintambo zesirhodlo kanye nazo zoke iinsetjenziswa zakhona. Koke okuphathelene nokutjhwiweko kumsebenzi yemindeni yamaGeritjhoni." 
Numbers4:26 Woke umsebenzi wokuthwala uzakwenziwa maGeritjhoni ngomyalo ka-Aroni namadodanakhe. Wena-ke Mosi no-Aroni kufuze nibatjengise koke okumele bakuthwale. 
Numbers4:27 Lowo-ke kuzakuba msebenzi wemindeni yamaGeritjhoni etendeni lokuhlanganela. Imisebenzayo izakuba ngaphasi kwesandla saka-Itamara, umsa ka-Aroni umphristi.”" 
Numbers4:28 Godu uSomnini wathi: “AmaMerari nawo uwabale ngokwemindenawo nangezindlu zaboyise. 
Numbers4:29 Utlolise ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu ukuya ematjhumini amahlanu, okutjho boke ekufuze balotjhe bebasebenze etendeni lokuhlanganela." 
Numbers4:30 Naku umsebenzi wamaMerari wokuthwala etendeni lokuhlanganela: Akathwale amahlaka wethaberinakeli neenqabo zawo, iinsika, amanzinziso," 
Numbers4:31 iinsika magegana nesirhodlo namanzinziso wazo, iinkhonkhwani ezibamba isirhodlo, iintambo kanye nazo zoke iinsetjenziswa zakhona. Wena Mosi no-Aroni niyitjho ngamabizo ipahla ekufuze ithwalwe madoda lawo." 
Numbers4:32 Lowo-ke kuzakuba msebenzi wemindeni yamaMerari etendeni lokuhlanganela. Imisebenzayo izakuba ngaphasi kwesandla saka-Itamara, umsa ka-Aroni umphristi.”" 
Numbers4:33 UMosi no-Aroni kanye nabarholi bomkhambathi babala amaKhehathi ngokwemindeni nangezindlu zaboyise. 
Numbers4:34 Batlolisa ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu ukuya ematjhumini amahlanu, okutjho boke ekufuze balotjhe bebasebenze etendeni lokuhlanganela." 
Numbers4:35 Abatlolisweko ngokwemindenabo baba ziinkulungwana ezimbili namakhulu alikhomba namatjhumi amahlanu. 
Numbers4:36 Leso-ke bekusibalo semindeni yamaKhehathi agade asebenza etendeni lokuhlanganela nagade atloliswe nguMosi no-Aroni. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini bekayale uMosi. 
Numbers4:37 Abatlolisweko bamaGeritjhoni ngokwemindeni nangezindlu zaboyise 
Numbers4:38 ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu ukuya ematjhumini amahlanu, okutjho boke ekufuze balotjhe bebasebenze etendeni lokuhlanganela," 
Numbers4:39 bebaziinkulungwana ezimbili namakhulu asithandathu namatjhumi amathathu. 
Numbers4:40 Leso-ke bekusibalo semindeni yamaGeritjhoni agade asebenza etendeni lokuhlanganela nagade atloliswe nguMosi no-Aroni. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini bekayalile. 
Numbers4:41 Abatlolisweko bamaMerari ngokwemindeni nezindlu zaboyise," 
Numbers4:42 ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu ukuya ematjhumini amahlanu, okutjho boke ekufuze balotjhe bebasebenze etendeni lokuhlanganela," 
Numbers4:43 bebaziinkulungwana ezintathu namakhulu amabili. 
Numbers4:44 Leso-ke bekusibalo semindeni yamaMerari agade asebenza etendeni lokuhlanganela nagade atloliswe nguMosi no-Aroni. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini bekayale uMosi. 
Numbers4:45 Boke ababalwako bamaLevi abatloliswa nguMosi, u-Aroni nabarholi bama-Israyeli ngokwemindeni nangezindlu zaboyise," 
Numbers4:46 ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu ukuya ematjhumini amahlanu, okutjho boke ekufuze benze umsebenzi wokuthwala etendeni lokuhlanganela," 
Numbers4:47 bebaziinkulungwana ezibunane namakhulu amahlanu namatjhumi abunane. 
Numbers4:48 Ngokuya ngomyalo kaSomnini kuMosi, ngiloyo naloyo wanikelwa umsebenzi nalokho ekumele akuthwale etendeni lokuhlanganela njengokutloliswa kwabo. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi." 
Numbers5:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers5:2 “Yala ama-Israyeli bona akhuphele ngaphandle kwekampa boke abanekhwekhwe, woke onokuvuza namkha loyo osilaphele ngokuthintana nesidumbu." 
Numbers5:3 Nikhuphe omduna nomsikazi ngokufanako. Bakhupheleni ngaphandle kwekampa ukuze bangasilaphazi ikampabo ngombana ngihlala phakathi kwabo.” 
Numbers5:4 Ngambala ama-Israyeli enza njalo, abakhuphela ngaphandle kwekampa. Iye, enza njengombana uSomnini bekayale uMosi." 
Numbers5:5 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Numbers5:6 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Nangabe indoda namkha umfazi wenza nanyana ngisiphi isono kowekhabo ngendlela leyo one kuSomnini, uzakuba nomlandu." 
Numbers5:7 Kufuze avume isono asenzilekweso, ahlawule nokona kwakhe ngokupheleleko begodu angezelele kwesihlanu ehlawulwenakhe. Uzakunikela lokho kiloyo amonileko." 
Numbers5:8 Nangabe umoniwa akasekho begodu akanamjameli ongamukela ihlawulo yomoni, khona ihlawulo yomlandu leyo ayisiwe kuSomnini kobana ibe ngeyomphristi. Ihlawulo leyo ayinikelwe neqama lokuthethelela ukuze umphristi enzele umoni itethelelo kuSomnini." 
Numbers5:9 Godu eemphiweni ezikhethekileko ama-Israyeli aziletha kumphristi, umnikelo osibiko kuSomnini uzakuba ngowomphristi." 
Numbers5:10 Umuntu angahlosa bona ufuna ukwenzani ngezipho zakhe ezikhethekileko, kodwana nangabe sele anikele isipho kumphristi angeze asasibuyisela kuye godu.”" 
Numbers5:11 USomnini wabuya wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Numbers5:12 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Nangabe umfazi akathembeki endodenakhe ngokuhlobonga," 
Numbers5:13 azebe nenye indoda, kodwana kufihlakale endodenakhe begodu kungeze kwazeka bonyana uzisilaphazile ngombana angakhange abanjwe nobufakazi bungekho," 
Numbers5:14 kwenzeke indodakhe ingenwe mumoya wesikhwele imsolele bona usilaphele, indoda leyo kuzakufanela ilethe umkayo loyo kumphristi. Lokhu kufuze kwenziwe nalokha iba nesikhwele nokumsolela, khibe akakazisilaphazi. Ayilethe nomnikelo ofunekako ngomfazi loyo okutjho ithungana leflowuru yebhali. Ingatheli amafutha we-oliva phezu kwayo begodu ingafaki amakha kiyo ngombana imunikelo weenthoro ngebanga lesikhwele, umnikelo weenthoro wokuveza bona umfazi unomlandu namkha akanamlandu." 
Numbers5:15 “Umphristi uzakutjhideza umfazi loyo, amjamise phambi kwakaSomnini." 
Numbers5:16 Uzakukha amanzi acwengileko ngesitjeni somdaka bese ukha ihlabathi phasi ngethaberinakelini ayithele ngemanzinapho. 
Numbers5:17 Ngemva kobana umphristi ajamise umfazi loyo phambi kwakaSomnini, uzamtlharulula iinhluthu ehloko bese ubeka ezandleni zakhe umnikelo weenthoro osikhumbuzo, okumnikelo wesikhwele. Esandleni somphristi kuzabe kunamanzi amunyu, okumamanzi aletha amanikelela." 
Numbers5:18 Nje-ke umphristi uzakumemezela amanikelela emfazini loyo athi, ‘Nangabe akhange kube nenye indoda elala nawe, wangazisilaphaza ngokuhlobonga ngesikhathi usesandleni somyenakho, khona-ke yiba ngotjhaphulukileko emanikeleleni wamanzi amunyu la." 
Numbers5:19 Kodwana nangabe khewazisilaphaza, wahlobonga ngokulala nenye indoda ngaphandle komyenakho, lokha usese sesandleni sakhe," 
Numbers5:20 kwanga uSomnini angakwenza isithuko nesiga phakathi kwabantu bekhenu. USomnini akutjhwabanise igwayana lakho bese avuvukise isibeletho sakho.’ Leyo kuyindlela umphristi ekufuze amemezele ngayo amanikelela emfazini loyo begodu athi," 
Numbers5:21 ‘Kwanga amanzi aletha amanikelela la, angangena esiswini sakho avuvukise isibeletho begodu atjhwabanise negwayana lakhwelo.’ Yeke umfazi uzakuthi, ‘Amen, Amen.’" 
Numbers5:22 “Umphristi uzabese utlola amanikelela lawo encwadini, abuye godu ahlanze umtlolo ngemanzini amunyu." 
Numbers5:23 Uzakuseza umfazi loyo amanzi amunyu nabanga amanikelela ukuze angene emzimbenakhe athome ukumbangela ikathazo. 
Numbers5:24 Umphristi uzakwenza lokho ngemva kobana athethe umnikelo weenthoro ongowesikhwele ezandleni zomfazi, awuphakamise njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini bese awulethe e-aldarini." 
Numbers5:25 Uzakunghwatha isandla esigcweleko somnikelo weenthoro kube sisabelo sesikhumbuzo, awutjhise phezu kwe-aldari. Emva kwalokho aseze umfazi loyo amanzi wakhona." 
Numbers5:26 Nangabe mbala umfazi loyo uzisilaphaze ngokungathembeki endodenakhe, khona kuzakuthi bona umphristi amseze amanzi amunyu wokubanga amanikelela, amanzi lawo azamngena, isibeletho sakhe sivuvuke bese igwayana lakhe litjhwabane. Umfazi loyo uzakuba sithuko hlangana nabantu bekhabo." 
Numbers5:27 Kodwana nangabe umfazi loyo azange azisilaphaze begodu umsulwa, khona-ke uzakuba ngotjhaphulukileko emanikeleleni nabantwana uzababeletha." 
Numbers5:28 “Lowo-ke kumthetho mayelana nesikhwele. Usebenza nangabe umfazi uzisilaphaza ngokuhlobonga asese sesandleni sendodakhe," 
Numbers5:29 nalokha indoda engenwa mumoya wesikhwele bese isolela umfazayo. Kufuze kulethwe umfazi phambi kwakaSomnini bese umphristi usebenzisa woke umthetho lo emfazini loyo. 
Numbers5:30 Indoda leyo izakuhlambuluka esonweni sokusolela kodwana umfazi yena uzakuthwala umlandu nakube wonile.” 
Numbers6:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Numbers6:2 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Lokha omduna namkha omsikazi nakenza isifungo esikhethekileko sokuzahlukanisela bona abe mnaziri kuSomnini," 
Numbers6:3 kufuze azahlukanise newayini namkha utjwala. Akukameli asele okumunyu okuvela ewayinini namkha etjwaleni begodu akukameli asele nanyana ngimuphi umhluzi wamadiribe namkha adle amadiribe, kungaba ngamatjha namkha omisiweko." 
Numbers6:4 Ngesikhathi soke sokuzahlukanisela kwakhe bona abe mnaziri, angadli okuphuma esidiribeni ngitjho nanyana yintanga namkha ikhasi lediribe." 
Numbers6:5 “Yoke imihla yokuzahlukanisela kwakhe akungathinti utjhefana ehlokwakhe. Akabe ngocwengileko kuSomnini soke isikhathi sokuzahlukanisela kwakhe, aliselele iinhluthu zakhe zibe zide." 
Numbers6:6 “Yoke imihla azahlukanisele ngayo uSomnini akukafuzi azitjhideze eduze kwesidumbu. 
Numbers6:7 Ngitjho nanyana kungahlongakala uyise, unina, umfowabo namkha udadwabo, angazisilaphazi ngeendumbu zabo ngombana itshwayo lokuzahlukanisela kwakhe uZimu liphezu kwehlokwakhe." 
Numbers6:8 Yoke imihla yokuzahlukanisela kwakhe uzakuba ngocwengileko kuSomnini. 
Numbers6:9 “Nakwenzeka kube khona umuntu ohlongakala masinyana hlanu kwakhe, ngalokho asilaphazwe itshwayo lokuzahlukanisela kwakhe ehloko, akazihlambulule elangeni lekhomba ngokuziguda ihloko." 
Numbers6:10 Kuzakuthi ngelanga lobunane alethe kumphristi phambi komnyango wetende lokuhlanganela amazuba amabili wommango namkha amazutjana amabili wekhaya. 
Numbers6:11 Nje-ke umphristi uzakunikela linye lawo bona libe ngelomhlabelo wehlambululo, elinye libe ngelomhlabelo wokutjhiswa, enzele umuntu loyo itethelelo ngombana wone ngokuba seduze kwesidumbu. Kuzakuthi khona mhlokho ahlukanisele ihlokwakhe" 
Numbers6:12 bese azahlukanisele uSomnini, godu isikhathi soke azifungele ngaso bona abe mnaziri. Akalethe iqamanyana elinomnyaka libe ngelomhlabelo wehlawulo. Ngebanga lokusilaphazeka kobunaziri bakhe, isikhathi athome ngaso asisayelwa." 
Numbers6:13 “Lokha isikhathi sobunaziri nasiphelako, nakhu okufanele kwenzeke: Umnaziri kufuze alethwe phambi komnyango wetende lokuhlanganela." 
Numbers6:14 Kufuze alethe umhlabelwakhe kuSomnini: iqamanyana linye elimsulwa elinomnyaka munye libe ngelomhlabelo wokutjhiswa, imvana yinye emsulwa esikazi enomnyaka munye ibe ngeyomhlabelo wehlambululo neqama linye elimsulwa libe ngelomhlabelo wetjhebiswano." 
Numbers6:15 Godu akalethe nesiqwebu esinezikwa ezinganangumelo: izikwa ezimasongo zeflowuru esefiweko ezidutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva nezikwa ezisipara ezitjhatjhwe ngamafutha we-oliva. Zilethwe kanye neminikelo yakhona yeenthoro neyokuselwako. 
Numbers6:16 “Yeke umphristi uzakutjhideza iminikelo leyo e-aldarini, enzele umnaziri umhlabelo wehlambululo newokutjhiswa." 
Numbers6:17 Iqama alinikele njengomhlabelo wetjhebiswano kuSomnini kanye nesiqwebu esinezikwa ezinganangumelo. Godu umphristi uzakunikela iminikelo yakhona yeenthoro neyokuselwako. 
Numbers6:18 “Emva kwalokho umnaziri uzakuguda iinhluthu zakhe ezilitshwayo lokuzahlukanisela. Azigudele emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela bese uziphosela emlilweni lapha kuphekwe khona umhlabelo wetjhebiswano. 
Numbers6:19 “Kuzakuthi umnaziri nasele aqede ukuguda iinhluthu zakhe zokuzahlukanisela, umphristi athathe umkhono weqama ophekiweko, isikwa sinye esimasongo esinganangumelo nasinye esisipara esinganangumelo ngesiqwebini. Koke lokho akubeke ezandleni zomnaziri," 
Numbers6:20 godu akuthathe ukuze akuphakamise njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini. Isibikweso sikhethekile, kusisabelo somphristi kanye nesifuba nomlenze weqama okuphakanyiswe njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini. Emva kwalokho umnaziri loyo angasela iwayini." 
Numbers6:21 “Lowo-ke mthetho womnaziri. Lokha umuntu nakafunga bona abe mnaziri, kufuze alethe iminikelo leyo kuSomnini. Godu kufuze alethe iminikelo athembise ukuyinikela lokha nakazahlukaniselako ukuba mnaziri. Kufuze anikele lokho kanye neminikelo ehlathululwa mthetho wobunaziri.”" 
Numbers6:22 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Numbers6:23 akakhulume no-Aroni namadodanakhe athi: “Busisani ama-Israyeli ngamezwi la," 
Numbers6:24 ‘USomnini uzanibusisa, anigcine;" 
Numbers6:25 uSomnini uzanikhanyisela, abe nomusa kini;" 
Numbers6:26 uSomnini uzanitjheja, aniphe ipumelelo.’" 
Numbers6:27 “Ngendlela leyo-ke bazabe bamemezela ibizo lami phezu kwama-Israyeli, nje-ke mina ngizawabusisa.”" 
Numbers7:1 Kwathi mhlana uMosi aqeda ukujamisa ithaberinakeli walahlukanisela kanye nepahlalo yoke ngokulizesa. Godu wahlukanisela i-aldari neensetjenziswa zakhona zoke ngokulizesa. 
Numbers7:2 Emva kwalokho abarholi bakwa-Israyeli abaziinhloko zemindeni yaboyise, okutjho iinduna zeenkoro ebegade ziqale abatlolisweko," 
Numbers7:3 baletha iminikelwabo phambi kwakaSomnini: iinkoloyana ezivalekileko ezisithandathu neenkomo ezilitjhumi nambili. Abarholi ababili baletha ikoloyana yinye, umrholi ngamunye waletha ikomo. Kwathi bona balethe koke lokho phambi kwethaberinakeli," 
Numbers7:4 uSomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Numbers7:5 “Kwamukele lokho kibo ukuze kusetjenziselwe imisebenzi yetende lokuhlanganela. Kunikele amaLevi mayelana nomsebenzi ekufuze wenziwe mumuntu ngamunye.” 
Numbers7:6 Ngokunjalo uMosi wathatha iinkoloyana neenkomo wazinikela amaLevi. 
Numbers7:7 Iinkoloyana ezimbili neenkomo ezine wazinikela amaGeritjhoni, ngokuya ngokomsebenzawo;" 
Numbers7:8 kwathi iinkoloyana ezine neenkomo ezibunane wazinikela amaMerari ngokomsebenzawo. Boke bebangaphasi kwesandla saka-Itamara umsa ka-Aroni umphristi. 
Numbers7:9 Kodwana amaKhehathi akhange awanikele ilitho ngombana wona gade anomsebenzi wepahla yendawo ecwengileko ebe kufuze ayithwale ngamahlombe. 
Numbers7:10 Ngelanga i-aldari elahlukaniselwa ngalo, abarholi baletha iminikelwabo yokuhloma umnyanya walo. Kwathi lokha nabaletha iminikelwabo phambi kwe-aldari," 
Numbers7:11 uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: “Abalethe iminikelwabo yokuhloma umnyanya we-aldari kube mrholi munye ilanga nelanga.” 
Numbers7:12 Umrholi owaletha umnikelwakhe ngelanga lokuthoma kwaba nguNarhitjhoni umsa ka-Aminadaba wekoro yakwaJuda. 
Numbers7:13 Umnikelwakhe kwaba sisitja esikhulu sesiliva, sinobudisi obulikhilogremu elilodwa nesiquntu. Waletha nesitja sokunyenyeza sinobudisi obumagremu amakhulu abunane ukuya ngesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko. Zombili izitjezo bezinomhlumba weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva bona kube mnikelo weenthoro." 
Numbers7:14 Godu waletha nesitja segolide esinobudisi bamagremu alikhulu netjhumi, sigcwele amakha," 
Numbers7:15 ikunzana eyodwa, iqama elilodwa neqamanyana elilodwa elinomnyaka kwaba ngokomhlabelo wokutjhiswa." 
Numbers7:16 Wabuya godu wanikela nangepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo," 
Numbers7:17 iinkomo ezimbili, amaqama amahlanu, iimpongo ezihlanu kanye namaqamanyana amahlanu anomnyaka munye bona kube ngokomhlabelo wetjhebiswano. Ngilowo-ke umnikelo kaNarhitjhoni umsa ka-Aminadaba." 
Numbers7:18 Ngelanga lesibili uNataneli umsa kaTsuwari umrholi wama-Isakari, waletha wakhe umnikelo." 
Numbers7:19 Umnikelwakhe kwaba sisitja esikhulu sesiliva, sinobudisi obulikhilogremu elilodwa nesiquntu. Waletha nesitja sokunyenyeza sinobudisi obumagremu amakhulu abunane ukuya ngesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko. Zombili izitjezo bezinomhlumba weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva bona kube mnikelo weenthoro."

Numbers7:21 ikunzana eyodwa, iqama elilodwa neqamanyana elilodwa elinomnyaka kwaba ngokomhlabelo wokutjhiswa." 
Numbers7:22 Wabuya godu wanikela nangepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo," 
Numbers7:23 iinkomo ezimbili, amaqama amahlanu, iimpongo ezihlanu kanye namaqamanyana amahlanu anomnyaka munye bona kube ngokomhlabelo wetjhebiswano. Ngilowo-ke umnikelo kaNataneli umsa kaTsuwari." 
Numbers7:24 Ngelanga lesithathu u-Eliyabu umsa kaRheloni umrholi wamaZebuloni, naye waletha umnikelo."

Numbers7:30 Ngelanga lesine u-Elitsuri umsa kaTjhedewuri umrholi wamaRubeni, naye waletha umnikelo."

Numbers7:36 Elangeni lesihlanu uTjhelumiyeli umsa kaTsuritjhadayi umrholi wamaSimiyoni, naye waletha umnikelo."

Numbers7:42 Elangeni lesithandathu u-Eliyasafa umsa kaDewuyeli umrholi wamaGadi, naye waletha umnikelo."

Numbers7:48 Ngelanga lekhomba u-Elitjhama umsa ka-Amihudi umrholi wama-Efrayimu, naye waletha umnikelo."

Numbers7:54 Ngelanga lobunane uGamaliyeli umsa kaPedatsuri umrholi wakwaManase, naye waletha umnikelo." 
Numbers7:55 Umnikelwakhe kwaba sisitja esikhulu sesiliva, sinobudisi obulikhilogremu elilodwa nesiquntu. Waletha nesitja sokunyenyeza sinobudisi obumagremu amakhulu abunane ukuya ngesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko. Zombili izitjezo bezinomhlumba weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva bona kube mnikelo weenthoro."

Numbers7:60 Ngelanga lethoba u-Abidani umsa kaGidiyoni umrholi wamaBhenjamini, naye waletha umnikelo."

Zombili izitjezo bezinomhlumba weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva bona kube mnikelo weenthoro."

Numbers7:66 Ngelanga letjhumi u-Arhiyezeri umsa ka-Amitjhadayi umrholi wamaDani, naye waletha umnikelo." 
Numbers7:67 Umnikelwakhe kwaba sisitja esikhulu sesiliva, sinobudisi obulikhilogremu elilodwa nesiquntu. Waletha nesitja sokunyenyeza sinobudisi obumagremu amakhulu abunane ukuya ngesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko. Zombili izitjezo bezinomhlumba weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva bona kube mnikelo weenthoro." 
Numbers7:68 Godu waletha nesitja segolide esinobudisi bamagremu alikhulu netjhumi, sigcwele amakha," 
Numbers7:69 ikunzana eyodwa, iqama elilodwa neqamanyana elilodwa elinomnyaka kwaba ngokomhlabelo wokutjhiswa." 
Numbers7:70 Wabuya godu wanikela nangepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo," 
Numbers7:71 iinkomo ezimbili, amaqama amahlanu, iimpongo ezihlanu kanye namaqamanyana amahlanu anomnyaka munye bona kube ngokomhlabelo wetjhebiswano. Ngilowo-ke umnikelo ka-Arhiyezeri umsa ka-Amitjhadayi." 
Numbers7:72 Ngelanga letjhumi nanye uPagiyiyeli umsa ka-Okirani umrholi wama-Atjheri, naye waletha umnikelo." 
Numbers7:73 Umnikelwakhe kwaba sisitja esikhulu sesiliva, sinobudisi obulikhilogremu elilodwa nesiquntu. Waletha nesitja sokunyenyeza sinobudisi obumagremu amakhulu abunane ukuya ngesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko. Zombili izitjezo bezinomhlumba weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva bona kube mnikelo weenthoro." 
Numbers7:74 Godu waletha nesitja segolide esinobudisi bamagremu alikhulu netjhumi, sigcwele amakha," 
Numbers7:75 ikunzana eyodwa, iqama elilodwa neqamanyana elilodwa elinomnyaka kwaba ngokomhlabelo wokutjhiswa." 
Numbers7:76 Wabuya godu wanikela nangepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo," 
Numbers7:77 iinkomo ezimbili, amaqama amahlanu, iimpongo ezihlanu kanye namaqamanyana amahlanu anomnyaka munye bona kube ngokomhlabelo wetjhebiswano. Ngilowo-ke umnikelo kaPagiyiyeli umsa ka-Okirani." 
Numbers7:78 Ngelanga letjhumi nambili u-Arhira umsa ka-Enani umrholi wamaNafitali, naye waletha umnikelo." 
Numbers7:79 Umnikelwakhe kwaba sisitja esikhulu sesiliva, sinobudisi obulikhilogremu elilodwa nesiquntu. Waletha nesitja sokunyenyeza sinobudisi obumagremu amakhulu abunane ukuya ngesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko. Zombili izitjezo bezinomhlumba weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva bona kube mnikelo weenthoro." 
Numbers7:80 Godu waletha nesitja segolide esinobudisi bamagremu alikhulu netjhumi, sigcwele amakha," 
Numbers7:81 ikunzana eyodwa, iqama elilodwa neqamanyana elilodwa elinomnyaka kwaba ngokomhlabelo wokutjhiswa." 
Numbers7:82 Wabuya godu wanikela nangepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo," 
Numbers7:83 iinkomo ezimbili, amaqama amahlanu, iimpongo ezihlanu kanye namaqamanyana amahlanu anomnyaka munye bona kube ngokomhlabelo wetjhebiswano. Ngilowo-ke umnikelo ka-Arhira umsa ka-Enani." 
Numbers7:84 Leyo gade kuminikelo yokuhloma umnyanya we-aldari eyalethwa barholi bakwa-Israyeli ngesikhathi elahlukaniselwa ngalo. Bekuzizitja ezikulu zesiliva ezilitjhumi nambili, izitja zokunyenyeza zesiliva ezilitjhumi nambili kanye nezinye izitjana zegolide ezilitjhumi nambili." 
Numbers7:85 Esinye nesinye isitja esikhulu sesiliva besinobudisi obulikhilogremu elilodwa nesiquntu bese kuthi isitja sokunyenyeza sibe nobudisi obumagremu amakhulu abunane. Ubudisi bezitja zesiliva sezizoke ukuya ngesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko bebumakhilogremu amatjhumi amabili nabunane.
