Numbers7:86 Izitja zegolide ezilitjhumi nambili ezigcwele amakha bezinobudisi obumagremu alikhulu netjhumi ngokuya ngesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko. Ubudisi begolide lezitjezo zoke bebungaba likhilogremu nesiquntu. 
Numbers7:87 Zoke iinkomo zomhlabelo wokutjhiswa bewuziinkunzi ezilitjhumi nambili, amaqama alitjhumi nambili, amaqamanyana anomnyaka munye alitjhumi nambili kanye nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro. Godu bekuneempongo ezilitjhumi nambili zomhlabelo wehlambululo." 
Numbers7:88 Kuthi zoke iinkomo zomhlabelo wetjhebiswano kube ziinkunzi ezimatjhumi amabili nane, amaqama amatjhumi asithandathu, iimpongo ezimatjhumi asithandathu kanye namaqamanyana anomnyaka munye amatjhumi asithandathu. Lokho bekuminikelo yokuhloma umnyanya we-aldari emva kokobana selihlukaniselwe." 
Numbers7:89 Kwathi lokha uMosi nakangena ngetendeni lokuhlanganela bona ayokukhuluma noSomnini, wezwa ilizwi likhuluma naye livela esisibekelweni somfaji wobufakazi hlangana namakerubhi amabili. Ngendlela leyo uSomnini bekakhuluma naye." 
Numbers8:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Numbers8:2 akakhulume no-Aroni athi: “Lokha nawukhanyisa iimbani ezilikhomba kufuze zikhanyise indawo ephambi kwelithi lazo.” 
Numbers8:3 Nje-ke u-Aroni wenza njalo. Wajamisa iimbani bona zikhanyise endaweni ephambi kwelithi lazo njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi. 
Numbers8:4 Ilithi leembani, ukusukela esikhondweni bekube semathuthumbenalo, belikhandwe ngegolide. Bekumsebenzi okhandwe ukuya ngomfanekiso uSomnini awukhombisa uMosi." 
Numbers8:5 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers8:6 “Khupha amaLevi kuma-Israyeli, uwahlambulule." 
Numbers8:7 Nasi indlela ozawahlambulula ngayo: Afafaze ngamanzi wehlambululo, uwenze bona asuse boke uboya emzimbenawo bese ahlanze nezambatho zawo nawo ahlambe." 
Numbers8:8 Nje-ke akathathe ikunzana nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro ongoweflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva bese wena uthatha enye ikunzana kube ngeyomhlabelo wehlambululo. 
Numbers8:9 Tjhideza amaLevi ngaphambi kwetende lokuhlanganela bese uhlanganisa umkhambathi wakwa-Israyeli woke. 
Numbers8:10 Lokha nawutjhideza amaLevi phambi kwakaSomnini, ama-Israyeli kufuze abeke izandla zawo phezu kwawo." 
Numbers8:11 U-Aroni yena kufuze anikele amaLevi lawo phambi kwakaSomnini njengomnikelo wesibiko ophuma kuma-Israyeli ukuze akwazi ukusebenzela uSomnini. 
Numbers8:12 Ngalokho amaLevi azakubeka izandla zawo phezu kweenhloko zeenkunzanezo. Wena-ke unikele enye yazo ibe ngeyomhlabelo wehlambululo kuthi enye ibe ngeyomhlabelo wokutjhiswa kuSomnini, ukwenzela amaLevi itethelelo kuSomnini." 
Numbers8:13 Nje-ke jamisa amaLevi phambi kwaka-Aroni namadodanakhe bese wena uwanikela abe njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini. 
Numbers8:14 Ngendlela leyo-ke uzakukhupha amaLevi phakathi kwama-Israyeli ukuze abe ngewami. 
Numbers8:15 “Emva kobana uhlambulule bewanikela amaLevi njengomnikelo osibiko, azakungena ngetendeni lokuhlanganela bona alotjhe." 
Numbers8:16 Iye, amaLevi anikelwe mina ngokupheleleko hlangana nama-Israyeli. Ngizithathele wona bona abe ngewami esikhundleni sawo woke amazibulo wama-Israyeli, koke okuvele qangi esibelethweni." 
Numbers8:17 Mbala, woke amazibulo wama-Israyeli, kungaba ngewabantu namkha wefuyo, angewami. Kwathi mhlana ngimadlha woke amazibulo enarheni yeGibhide, ngazahlukanisela wona kwa-Israyeli bona abe ngewami." 
Numbers8:18 Nje-ke esikhundleni sawo woke amazibulo wama-Israyeli, ngizithathele amaLevi bona abe ngewami." 
Numbers8:19 Nginikele amaLevi ngokupheleleko ku-Aroni namadodanakhe bona enze umsebenzi wama-Israyeli ngetendeni lokuhlanganela. Azakwenzela ama-Israyeli itethelelo kuSomnini, ngaleyondlela avikele amatshwenyeko nakwenzeka bona ama-Israyeli atjhidele khulu endaweni ecwengileko.”" 
Numbers8:20 UMosi no-Aroni kanye nomkhambathi woke wama-Israyeli benza kumaLevi koke uSomnini agade ayale uMosi ngakho. 
Numbers8:21 AmaLevi ahlanza izambatho zawo bese u-Aroni wawanikela njengomnikelo osibiko kuSomnini, wawenzela netethelelo kobana awahlambulule. Ngaleyondlela amaLevi ahlanjululwa ezonweni zawo." 
Numbers8:22 Emva kwalokho amaLevi eza bona athome umsebenzawo etendeni lokuhlanganela ngaphasi kwelihlo laka-Aroni namadodanakhe. Lokho uSomnini agade ayale uMosi bona kwenziwe kumaLevi, bakwenza kiwo." 
Numbers8:23 USomnini wabuya wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers8:24 “Nakhu okumayelana nabaduna bamaLevi: Ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili nahlanu ukuya phezulu, bazakungena bona benze umsebenzi wetende lokuhlanganela," 
Numbers8:25 kodwana abaneminyaka ematjhumi amahlanu bazakuthatha umhlalaphasi, bangasasebenzi." 
Numbers8:26 Nokho bangasiza ngokuba lilihlo labafowabo etendeni lokuhlanganela, kodwana bangasebenzi. Ngilokho ozakwenza ngamaLevi lokha nawuwahlelela umsebenzi.”" 
Numbers9:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi erhalawumbeni leSinayi ngenyanga yokuthoma yomnyaka wesibili emva kokuphuma kwama-Israyeli enarheni yeGibhide wathi: 
Numbers9:2 “Yenza ama-Israyeli bona agidinge umnyanya wePhasika ngesikhathi esibekiweko salo. 
Numbers9:3 Kufuze libe ngelanga letjhumi nane enyangeni le, kube ngamarhwaqela ngesikhathi esibekiweko. Ligidingeni ngokuya ngazo zoke iimiso zalo nemithethwalo yoke.”" 
Numbers9:4 UMosi wawatjela njalo-ke ama-Israyeli ngokugidingwa kwePhasika. 
Numbers9:5 Mbala kwathi ngenyanga yokuthoma mhlana zilitjhumi nane, ama-Israyeli agidinga iPhasika ngamarhwaqela erhalawumbeni leSinayi. Ama-Israyeli enza koke kwaba njengendlela uSomnini ayala ngayo uMosi." 
Numbers9:6 Kodwana bekukhona amadoda asilapheleko ngebanga lokobana gade athinte isidumbu somuntu. Ngalokho wona akhange aphumelele ukugidinga iPhasika, yeke mhlokho aziveza phambi kwakaMosi no-Aroni," 
Numbers9:7 athi kibo: “Nasinje, sibe ngabasilapheleko ngebanga lokuthinta isidumbu somuntu. Alo, singakhandelwa yini bona sinikele umnikelo kaSomnini ngesikhathi sawo esijanyisiweko phakathi kwama-Israyeli na?”" 
Numbers9:8 UMosi wathi kiwo: “Lindani khengiyokwizwa bona uSomnini uzokuyala athini ngani.” 
Numbers9:9 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Numbers9:10 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Nangabe omunye wenu namkha weenzukulwana zenu usekhambeni kude namkha usilaphele ngebanga lokuthinta isidumbu, kodwana ufuna ukugidinga iPhasika lakaSomnini," 
Numbers9:11 kufuze aligidinge ngamarhwaqela mhlana inyanga yesibili inamalanga alitjhumi nane. Alidle ngesikwa esinganangumelo neenrhabelo ezibabako. 
Numbers9:12 Angatjhiyi litho lalo begodu angephuli ithambo lakhona. Agidinge iPhasika kulandelwe zoke iimiso zalo. 
Numbers9:13 Kodwana nangabe umuntu ohlambulukileko begodu ongekho ekhambeni wala ukugidinga iPhasika, uzakujutjwa ebantwini bekhabo ngombana akakanikeli umnikelwakhe ngesikhathi sawo kuSomnini. Kwamambala umuntu loyo uzazizwa ngesono sakheso." 
Numbers9:14 “Nangabe kunesikhonzi phakathi kwenu esithanda ukugidinga iPhasika, asiligidinge ngokweemiso nemithethwalo. Nibe nesimiso sinye esikhonzini namkha emuntwini wendabuko kwa-Israyeli.”" 
Numbers9:15 Kwathi mhlana kujanyiswa ithaberinakeli, ilifu lembesa ithaberinakelelo, okulitende lobufakazi. Nakuhlwako bekuyokusa ilifelo belibonakala linjengekehla yomlilo ngehla kwethaberinakeli." 
Numbers9:16 Bekunjalo-ke ngaso soke isikhathi: Emini belembeswa lilifu, kuthi ebusuku ilifelo libonakale linjengekehla yomlilo." 
Numbers9:17 Bekuthi lokha ilifu naliphakamako, ama-Israyeli afuduke, kuthi lokha ilifu nalijamako, ama-Israyeli ahlome amatendawo lapho." 
Numbers9:18 Ama-Israyeli bekafuduka ngomyalo kaSomnini begodu ahlome amatendawo ngomyalwakhe. Ngesikhathi soke ilifu nalisajame ngehla kwetende, ama-Israyeli gade angasuki." 
Numbers9:19 Ngitjho nanyana ilifu belingajama amalanga amanengi ngehla kwethaberinakeli, ama-Israyeli gade agcina umyalo kaSomnini, angasuki." 
Numbers9:20 Kwesinye isikhathi ilifu belijama amalangana ngehla kwethaberinakeli, nanyana kunjalo ama-Israyeli bekahlala ekampeni. Bekakhamba kwaphela ngomyalo kaSomnini." 
Numbers9:21 Kwesinye isikhathi ilifu belijama ukusuka ntambama bekube sekuseni. Bese kuthi lokha ilifu nalikhuphukako ekuseni, nawo afuduke. Ngitjho nanyana ilifelo belingahlala ubusuku nemini, naliphakamako nawo bekakhamba." 
Numbers9:22 Nangabe malanga amabili, inyanga namkha isikhathi eside ilifu lijamile, ama-Israyeli nawo gade angasuki ekampenapho. Kodwana bekasuka kwaphela ilifu naliphakamako." 
Numbers9:23 Bekahloma amatendawo namkha asuke kwaphela ngomyalo kaSomnini. Alalela iimiso zakaSomnini ayala uMosi ngazo. 
Numbers10:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers10:2 “Yenza iimporompita ezimbili ezikhandwe ngesiliva. Zona zizakuba libika lokubiza umkhambathi nokufudusa ikampa. 
Numbers10:3 Kuzakuthi lokha nazililiswa zombili, umkhambathi woke ubuthane phambi kwakho emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela." 
Numbers10:4 Kodwana lokha nakuliliswa yinye, kuzakubuthana phambi kwakho abarholi abaziinhloko zeenkoro zakwa-Israyeli kwaphela." 
Numbers10:5 Lokha iporompita nayipopozako, akufuduswe iinkampa ezingepumalanga." 
Numbers10:6 Kuthi lokha nayipopoza ihlandla lesibili, kufuduswe iinkampa ezingesewula. Ukupopoza kuzakuba liphawu lokufuduka." 
Numbers10:7 Kodwana nakufuze ihlangano ibuthane, kuzakuliliswa iporompita, nokho ingaliliswa ngokupopoziswa." 
Numbers10:8 “Ekufuze bavuthele iimporompita baphristi okumadodana ka-Aroni. Lowo kuzakuba myalo wanini nanini kini ngitjho neenzukulwaneni zenu. 
Numbers10:9 Lokha naniphuma ipi bona nilwe nabajamelani benu enarhenenu, popozisani iimporompita. Nanenza njalo nizakukhumbuleka phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu, nje-ke nizakusindiswa ezitheni zenu." 
Numbers10:10 Kanti-ke godu ngeenkhathi zokujabula kwenu, iminyanyenu ejanyisiweko nekuthwaseni kwenyanga, vuthelani iimporompita lokha naninikela imihlabelwenu yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano. Lokho kuzanenza nikhumbuleke phambi kwakaZimenu. NginguSomnini uZimenu.”" 
Numbers10:11 Ngomnyaka wesibili, lokha inyanga yesibili nayinamalanga amatjhumi amabili, ilifu lakhutjhulwa ethaberinakelini lobufakazi." 
Numbers10:12 Ama-Israyeli afuduka erhalawumbeni leSinayi ngeengaba zawo. Ilifu lakhamba belayokujama erhalawumbeni leParana. 
Numbers10:13 Kwaba ngekokuthoma ama-Israyeli afuduka ngomyalo kaSomnini ngoMosi. 
Numbers10:14 Isibekiso seenkampa zabakwaJuda saba ngesokuthoma ukufuduka ngokwamabuthwaso. Induna yebutho lakwaJuda bekunguNarhitjhoni umsa ka-Aminadaba," 
Numbers10:15 yakwa-Isakari kunguNataneli umsa kaTsuwari," 
Numbers10:16 yakwaZebuloni kungu-Eliyabu umsa kaRheloni. 
Numbers10:17 Bekuthi lokha ithaberinakeli nalehliswako, amaGeritjhoni namaMerari okungiwo alithwalako, afuduke." 
Numbers10:18 Isibekiso seenkampa zabakwaRubeni saba ngesesibili ukufuduka ngokwamabuthwaso. Induna yebutho lakwaRubeni bekungu-Elitsuri umsa kaTjhedewuri," 
Numbers10:19 yakwaSimiyoni kunguTjhelumiyeli umsa kaTsuritjhadayi," 
Numbers10:20 yakwaGadi kungu-Eliyasafa umsa kaDewuyeli. 
Numbers10:21 Emva kwalokho kwalandela amaKhehathi athwele ipahla ecwengileko yethaberinakeli. Itende lokuhlanganela lalifanele lijanyiswe endaweni lapha kwakuzokuhlonywa khona amatende ngaphambi kokobana amaKhehathi afike nepahla leyo. 
Numbers10:22 Nje-ke isibekiso seenkampa zabakwa-Efrayimu safuduka ngokwamabuthwaso. Induna yebutho lakwa-Efrayimu bekungu-Elitjhama umsa ka-Amihudi," 
Numbers10:23 yakwaManase kunguGamaliyeli umsa kaPedatsuri," 
Numbers10:24 yakwaBhenjamini kungu-Abidani umsa kaGidiyoni. 
Numbers10:25 Isibekiso seenkampa zabakwaDani saba ngesokugcina ukufuduka ngokwamabuthwaso. Induna yebutho lakwaDani bekungu-Arhiyezeri umsa ka-Amitjhadayi," 
Numbers10:26 yakwa-Atjheri kunguPagiyiyeli umsa ka-Okirani," 
Numbers10:27 yakwaNafitali kungu-Arhira umsa ka-Enani. 
Numbers10:28 Lokho bekulihlelo lokufuduka kwamabutho wama-Israyeli; kuyindlela egade afuduka ngayo-ke leyo. 
Numbers10:29 Nje-ke uMosi wakhuluma noRhobabi umsa kaRewuyeli umkhwe wakhe, omuMidiyani, wathi: “Sifudukela endaweni uSomnini athi uzasinikela yona. Yeke, namba nathi, sizokunanageja ngombana uSomnini ukhulume kuhle ngo-Israyeli.”" 
Numbers10:30 Kodwana uRhobabi wathi: “Awa, angizukukhamba, sekunalokho ngizokubuyela enarheni yekhethu nebantwini bekhethu.”" 
Numbers10:31 Godu uMosi wathi: “Ungasitjhiyi Rhobabi, ngiyakuncenga. Angitjho nguwe owaziko bona kufuze sihlome njani amatendethu erhalawumbeni. Wena-ke uzokuba lilihlo lethu." 
Numbers10:32 Yeke nawunamba nathi, sizokuhlomulisa kiyo yoke into ehle uSomnini azasenzela yona.”" 
Numbers10:33 Nje-ke ama-Israyeli asuka entabeni kaSomnini, akhamba amalanga amathathu. Umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini bewuphambi kwawo ekhambenelo; lapha bewujama khona, nama-Israyeli bekaphumula lapho." 
Numbers10:34 Bekuthi emini, ilifu lakaSomnini libe ngehla kwawo lokha nakafudukako endaweni ahlome kiyo." 
Numbers10:35 Lokha umfaji nawufudukako, uMosi gade aphele athi: “Sikima Somnini ukuze izitha zakho zihlakazeke nabakuzondako babaleke phambi kwakho!”" 
Numbers10:36 Kuthi lokha nawubekwa phasi athi: “Somnini, buyela ku-Israyeli, iye, kumatjhumitjhumi weenkulungwana!”" 
Numbers11:1 Abantu bakwa-Israyeli bakhola uSomnini ngokumbalabalela ngobudisi abanabo. Kwathi lokha uSomnini nabezwako wavutha khulu ngelaka lakhe. Nje-ke kwaqubuka umlilo kaSomnini hlangana nabantwabo watjhisa amahlangothi wekampa. 
Numbers11:2 Abantu balila kuMosi, yena wabathandazela kuSomnini, umlilo wacima." 
Numbers11:3 Bathiya indawo leyo ibizo bona yiTabhera ngombana kwavutha umlilo kaSomnini phakathi kwabo. 
Numbers11:4 Phakathi kwama-Israyeli bekunecubevange yabantu egade imarhamaru ifuna ukutla. Kanti-ke nama-Israyeli athoma abubula godu athi: “Uyazi bona sikhanuka inyama kangangani! 
Numbers11:5 Sese sikhumbula neenhlambi ebegade sizidlela zona eGibhide singazithengi, iinkomukomu, amakhabe, imihlobohlobo yama-eyi namakonofula." 
Numbers11:6 Kodwana kwanjesi khona imiphimbo le sese yome kere, akunanja ngaphandle kwemana esikholileko le.”" 
Numbers11:7 (Imana beyinjengembewu yekhoriyanda, ifana noburegu obunuka kamnandi." 
Numbers11:8 Abantu bebakhambakhamba bayibuthe bese bayayisila ngelitje lokugaya namkha ngesigigo. Gade bayipheka ngembiza namkha bayenze iimphaphatha. Yona beyizwakala inga litjhatjhatjha elenziwe ngamafutha we-oliva. 
Numbers11:9 Imana beyikhithika ekampeni lokha nakukhithika umbethe ebusuku.) 
Numbers11:10 UMosi wezwa ukulila kwabantu kiyo yoke imindenabo kungiloyo naloyo ngaphambi komnyango wetende lakhe. USomnini naye wabhoka khulu ngelaka lakhe. Lokho kwamkhathaza khulu uMosi. 
Numbers11:11 Nje-ke wabuza uSomnini wathi: “Kubayini uSomnini aphathe incekwakhe ngesihluku esingaka? Somnini awusangithandi na, kobana ungabeze uthwese umthwalo wabantwaba phezu kwami?" 
Numbers11:12 Akhange ngizithwale ngabantwaba begodu ababelethwa ngimi. USomnini utjho njani nakathi ngigone boke abantwaba esifubeni sami njengomdlezana omunyisa umntwana? Alo, kufuze ngibabhebhule ngibase enarheni uSomnini ayithembisa aboyise na?" 
Numbers11:13 Ngizoyifunyanaphi inyama yabantwaba boke nje? Angithi balilela mina bathi, ‘Sipha inyama sidle.’" 
Numbers11:14 Awa mina, angizukukghona ukuthwala boke abantwaba ngingedwa. Umthwalo lowo ubudisi khulu kimi!" 
Numbers11:15 Nakube mbala Somnini uzongiphatha bunje, dumbana ungibulale nya. Nangabe uSomnini uyangithanda, akenze ngingasabona amatlhuwami la.”" 
Numbers11:16 Nje-ke uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: “Yewungihlanganisele amadoda amatjhumi alikhomba ebaphathini bakwa-Israyeli owaziko bona babaphathi abakwazi ukwengamela abantu. Atjhideze etendeni lokuhlanganela bese ajame nawe lapho. 
Numbers11:17 Mina-ke ngizakwehla ngikhulume nawe lapho. Begodu ngizakuthatha ingcenye yommoya ophezu kwakho ngiyithele kiwo. Wona-ke, azakuthwalisa umthwalo wabantwaba ukuze ungasawuthwali uwedwa." 
Numbers11:18 Bese utjela abantu uthi, ‘Zihlambululeni ngombana kusasa nizokudla inyama. Angithi nililile nakhola uSomnini ngokuthi ngubani ozanipha inyama, godu nathi eGibhide bekungcono, angitjho? Nje-ke uSomnini uzonipha inyamenu leyo bona nidle." 
Numbers11:19 Anikazuyidla ilanga elilodwa, amabili, amahlanu, alitjhumi namkha amatjhumi amabili," 
Numbers11:20 kodwana inyanga yoke, ize ininukele beyinigonyulukise ngombana nidele uSomnini ophakathi kwenu ngokubuza bona kubayini naphuma enarheni yeGibhide.’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 UMosi waphendula uSomnini wathi: “Qala, abantu engikhamba phakathi kwabo baziinkulungwana ezimakhulu asithandathu, kodwana khonapho uSomnini uthi uzabapha inyama abazayidla inyanga yoke!" 
Numbers11:22 Imihlambi yezimvu neembuzi kanye neenkomo ezizakuhlatjwa zingabanela na? Namkha kuzakubuthelelwa zoke iinhlambi zelwandle bona zibanele?” 
Numbers11:23 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Kanti uSomnini unesandla esifitjhani na? Manje uzokubona-ke bona ilizwi lami liyafezeka namkha awa.” 
Numbers11:24 Ngalokho uMosi waphuma wafese watjela abantu amezwi kaSomnini. Begodu wahlanganisa amadoda amatjhumi alikhomba ekubaphathi babantu wawajamisa etendeni mazombe. 
Numbers11:25 Nje-ke uSomnini wehla ngelifu wakhuluma naye, wathatha nengcenye yommoyakhe wawuthela ebaphathini abamatjhumi alikhomba. Kuthe lokha ummoya wehlela phezu kwabo baphorofida. Ngemva kwalokho akhange asaphorofida." 
Numbers11:26 Ngekampeni bekusele amanye amadoda amabili u-Elidada noMedada egade asesibalweni sabamatjhumi alikhomba. Wona akhange aphumelele ukuya etendeni. Amadoda lawo ehlelwa mumoya, nawo abe aphorofida khona ngekampenapho." 
Numbers11:27 Isokana elithileko lagijima lafese labikela uMosi lathi: “Kazi ngekampenaphaya, u-Elidada noMedada bayaphorofida!”" 
Numbers11:28 UJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni noyinceku kaMosi ukusukela ebutjheni bakhe, gade angomunye wamadoda akhethiweko, wathi kuMosi: “Kosami, Mosi, bathulise!”" 
Numbers11:29 Kodwana uMosi wathi kuye: “Kanti awufuni ngami na? Mina bengingafisa ngathana boke abantu bakaSomnini bekungaba baphorofidi, nokobana sengasuthi uSomnini bakangathela ummoya ovela kuye phezu kwabo.”" 
Numbers11:30 Nje-ke uMosi nabaphathi bakwa-Israyeli babuyela ngekampeni. 
Numbers11:31 USomnini wavusa ummoya ovela elwandle waphaphisela iinkwali ekampeni, zaphuphuruza pheze ngemitha ukuphakama. Zazigcwele ikampa yoke begodu kulikhambo lelanga mahlangothi woke ukuzibamba." 
Numbers11:32 Mhlokho abantu baphuma imini yoke nobusuku bakhona kanye nelanga elilandelako bona bayokubutha iinkwalezo. Owabutha kancani ngogade abuthe amaqubi alitjhumi. Nje-ke baneka iinkwalezo magegana nekampa. 
Numbers11:33 Kuthe inyama yeenkwalezo isese semazinyweni, ingakahlafunywa, ubukhali bakaSomnini bavutha phezu kwabantu. Khonapho uSomnini wamadlha abantu ngehlupheko ekulu." 
Numbers11:34 Ngebangelo indawo leyo yathiywa bona yiKhibrothi-Hatava, ngombana lapho kwangcwatjwa abantu ebe bamarhamaru." 
Numbers11:35 Ukusuka eKhibrothi-Hatava ama-Israyeli afudukela eRhatserothi, afese ahlala khona." 
Numbers12:1 UMiriyamu no-Aroni bahleba uMosi ngebanga lokuthatha kwakhe umfazi omuKutjhe, bathi: “Kazi uthethe umKutjhe!”" 
Numbers12:2 Godu bathi: “Ingabe mbala uSomnini ukhulume kwaphela ngoMosi? Kanti akakakhulumi nangathi godu na?” USomnini wakwizwa lokho. 
Numbers12:3 NakunguMosi yena bekazithobe ukudlula boke abantu abaphila ngaphasi komthunzi welanga. 
Numbers12:4 Khonapho uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni kanye noMiriyamu wathi: “Yeyi nina, ngobuthathu benu njalo, yizani etendeni lokuhlanganela!” Mbala baphuma beza bobathathu." 
Numbers12:5 Nje-ke uSomnini wehla ngesika yelifu wajama emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela, wafese wabiza u-Aroni noMiriyamu. Batjhidela-ke bobabili." 
Numbers12:6 USomnini wathi kibo: “Akhese nilalele la: Nakube kukhona umphorofidi hlangana nani, mina-ke Somnini ngizazazisa kuye ngombono, ngikhulume naye ngebhudango." 
Numbers12:7 Nokho akusinjalo ngencekwami uMosi, yena ungothembekileko emsebenzinami woke." 
Numbers12:8 Yena ngikhuluma naye bunqopha, ubuso nobuso ingasi ngekulumo yokugwagwanisa. Iye, yena uyakwazi ukuzibonakalisa kwami. Kubayini-ke nina ningakhange nesabe ukuhleba incekwami uMosi na?”" 
Numbers12:9 Ubukhali bakaSomnini bavutha phezu kwabo, wase uyabatjhiya." 
Numbers12:10 Lithe lisuka nje ilifu phezu kwetende, qala, uMiriyamu gade sele akghamathele ikhwekhwe amhlophe njengesithwathwa. Uthe u-Aroni nakathi uphendukela kuye, madekhethu unekhwekhwe!" 
Numbers12:11 Nje-ke wabikela uMosi wathi: “Maye, babethu! Bengithi akhe ngikhulume. Ngiyakubawa hle, ungasihlunguphazi ngobudlhayela esone ngabo." 
Numbers12:12 UMiriyamu akangabi njengobelethwa ahlongakele, ophuma esibelethweni sakanina sele onakele.”" 
Numbers12:13 Nje-ke uMosi walila kuSomnini wathi: “Zimu ngiyakuncenga, mphilise hle.”" 
Numbers12:14 USomnini waphendula uMosi wathi: “Nangabe gade akhafulelwe nguyise ebusweni, bekangazukuhlala amalanga alikhomba arhubutjhekile na? Yeke akavalelwe amalanga alikhomba ngaphandle kwekampa, kuthi emva kwalokho abuyiswe.”" 
Numbers12:15 Nje-ke uMiriyamu wavalelwa ngaphandle kwekampa amalanga alikhomba. Ngesikhatheso abantu akhange bathathe ikhambo, bekwabuyiswa uMiriyamu." 
Numbers12:16 Emva kwalokho abantu bafuduka eRhatserothi bafese bahloma amatendabo erhalawumbeni leParana. 
Numbers13:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers13:2 “Thumela amadoda bona ayokuhlola inarha yeKanana engiyinikele ama-Israyeli. Ekorweni ngayinye yaboyise nithumele umrholi oyedwa.” 
Numbers13:3 Nje-ke uMosi wathuma amadoda lawo asuka erhalawumbeni leParana njengokomyalo kaSomnini. Boke bekumadoda aziinhloko zeenkoro zakwa-Israyeli. 
Numbers13:4 Naka-ke amabizwawo: Ekorweni yakwaRubeni bekunguTjhamuwa umsa kaZakuru," 
Numbers13:5 keyakwaSimiyoni kunguTjhafathi umsa kaRhori," 
Numbers13:6 keyakwaJuda kunguKalebi umsa kaJefune," 
Numbers13:7 keyakwa-Isakari kunguYigali umsa kaJosefa," 
Numbers13:8 keyakwa-Efrayimu kunguHosiya umsa kaNuni," 
Numbers13:9 keyakwaBhenjamini kunguPalithi umsa kaRafu," 
Numbers13:10 keyakwaZebuloni kunguGadiyeli umsa kaSodi," 
Numbers13:11 keyakwaJosefa (okutjho ikoro yakwaManase) kunguGadi umsa kaSusi," 
Numbers13:12 keyakwaDani kungu-Amiyeli umsa kaGemali," 
Numbers13:13 keyakwa-Atjheri kunguSeturi umsa kaMikayeli," 
Numbers13:14 keyakwaNafitali kunguNarhibi umsa kaVofsi," 
Numbers13:15 keyakwaGadi kunguGewuyeli umsa kaMaki. 
Numbers13:16 Lawo-ke bekumabizo wamadoda uMosi awathuma bona ayokuhlola inarha. UMosi wathiya uHosiya umsa kaNuni bona nguJotjhuwa. 
Numbers13:17 Lokha uMosi nakawathumako bona ayokuhlola inarha yeKanana, wathi kiwo: “Nqombani ngesewula yenarha, nenyukele entatjaneni yakhona," 
Numbers13:18 niqale bona inarha injani, abantu abakhe kiyo baqinile namkha mitheretherana, banengi namkha lidlanzana," 
Numbers13:19 nokobana inarha leyo yihle namkha yimbi, iindawo abahlala kizo zikhamukhamu namkha zimadorobho abiyelwe ngomthangala na." 
Numbers13:20 Niqale bona ihlabathi ivundile namkha ilibhudu nokobana inemithi namkha awa na. Qinani isibindi nibuye neenthelo zayo.” (Ngesikhatheso bekusikhathi sokuvuthwa kwamadiribe wokuthoma.) 
Numbers13:21 Akhamba-ke ayokuhlola inarha leyo ukusukela erhalawumbeni leTsini ukufikela eRerhobho eduze neLebo-Rhamathi. 
Numbers13:22 Akhuphukela ngesewula yenarha, afika eRhebroni lapha bekuneenzukulwana zaka-Anakhi, okungu-Arhimani, uTjhetjhayi noTalimayi. (IRhebroni beyakhiwe iminyaka elikhomba ngaphambi kokwakhiwa kweTsowani eGibhide.)" 
Numbers13:23 Afika emrhobeni we-Etjhikolo afese aquntula lapho ipande enesitjhutha samadiribe. Amadoda amabili atjatha isitjhutheso ngesigodo saba phakathi kwawo. Godu bekathwele amarharinada namakhiwani. 
Numbers13:24 Indawo leyo yabizwa bona mrhoba we-Etjhikolo ngebanga lesitjhutha samadiribe esakhiwa madoda wama-Israyeli lapho. 
Numbers13:25 Abuya ekuhloleni inarha ekupheleni kwamalanga amatjhumi amane. 
Numbers13:26 Afika kuMosi no-Aroni kanye nemkhambathini woke wama-Israyeli eKhadetjhi eserhalawumbeni leParana. Abikela aboMosi nomkhambathi woke umbiko abuye nawo, abe abakhombisa neenthelo zenarha leyo." 
Numbers13:27 Atjela uMosi athi: “Kazi besafika-ke enarheni owasithuma kiyo. Kuyinarha egeleza ibisi neliju, neenthelo zakhona nanzi." 
Numbers13:28 Nokho abantu bakhona ziinkakaramba namadorobho wakhona anemithangala begodu aziinthabathaba. Phezu kwalokho sabona neenzukulwana zaka-Anakhi lapho. 
Numbers13:29 Ama-Amalekhi ahlale ngesewula yenarha. AmaRhithi, amaJebusi nama-Amori wona ahlala ngeentatjaneni zenarha leyo. Kuthi amaKanana ahlale eduze nelwandle namagegana neJordani.”" 
Numbers13:30 UKalebi wathulisa amadoda lawo phambi kwakaMosi wathi: “Asikhuphukeni khona nje sithumbeni inarha ngombana vele singaphumelela ukukwenza lokho.” 
Numbers13:31 Kodwana amadoda agade akhambe naye athi: “Awa, akukghonakali bona singajamelana nabantu labaya ngombana baziinkakaramba kunathi.”" 
Numbers13:32 Nje-ke aletha kuma-Israyeli umbiko omumbi ngenarha akhamba bona ayoyihlola athi: “Thina inarha esaya kiyo bona siyoyihlola, kuyinarha eginya abantu abahlala kiyo. Begodu boke abantu esibabone khona, kubabantu abaziinkakaramba." 
Numbers13:33 Godu sabona lapho neentsitsirimba, okutjho ama-Anakhi iinzukulwana zeentsitsirimba. Thina-ke sazibona sifana neentethe kizo; khisibe nazo vele zasibona sinjalo.”" 
Numbers14:1 Umkhambathi woke wapongoloza, iye, abantu barhahlawula ngobusukobo." 
Numbers14:2 Woke ama-Israyeli anghonghoyila kuMosi no-Aroni. Umkhambathi woke wathi kibo: “Ibe thana sase safela enarheni yeGibhide leya namkha ngathana sesafela erhalawumbenapha. 
Numbers14:3 Kubayini uSomnini asilethe enarheni le bona sibulawe ngesabula na? Abomkethu nabantwabethu bazakuba yipango. Akusingcono sizibuyelele eGibhide na?” 
Numbers14:4 Wakhulumisana wodwa wathi: “Asizikhetheleni induna, sibuyele eGibhide.”" 
Numbers14:5 Nje-ke uMosi no-Aroni bawa ngobuso ngaphambi kwayo yoke ihlangano yakwa-Israyeli. 
Numbers14:6 UJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni noKalebi umsa kaJefune, ebegade kungabanye ebe baphakathi kweenhloli zenarha, badabula izambatho zabo," 
Numbers14:7 bakhuluma nomkhambathi woke wama-Israyeli bathi: “Niyazi, inarha esakhamba sayoyihlola, kuyinarha ehle kwamambala." 
Numbers14:8 Nakukuhle emehlweni kaSomnini ngathi, uzosifikisa enarheni leyo abe asiphe yona. Iye, kuyinarha egeleza ibisi neliju." 
Numbers14:9 Into nje masani ukuhlubuka uSomnini begodu ningabesabi abantu benarha leyo ngombana bakukudla kwethu. Ukuvikeleka kwabo kususiwe kibo begodu uSomnini ujame nathi; nje-ke ningabesabi.” 
Numbers14:10 Kodwana umkhambathi wakhulumisana bona ubakhande ngamatje. Nje-ke iphazimulo kaSomnini yabonakala etendeni lokuhlanganela kiwo woke ama-Israyeli. 
Numbers14:11 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: “Kuzabe kube nini abantwaba bangidelela na? Begodu kuzabe kube nini bangakholwa kimi ngaphezu kwazo zoke iimbonakaliso engiziveze phakathi kwabo na? 
Numbers14:12 Ngiyakutjela yi, ngizobamadlha ngamahlungu bengibamuke ilifa labo. Kodwana nakunguwe ngizokwenza ube sisizwe esikhulu nesinamandla, undlondlobale kunabo.”" 
Numbers14:13 UMosi wathi kuSomnini: “AmaGibhide owenyula kiwo abantwaba ngamandlakho azokwizwa lokho 
Numbers14:14 bese atjela abantu benarha le iindabezo. Bona sebezwile bonyana wena Somnini uphakathi kwabantu bakho, nokobana ubonakele kibo ubuso nobuso, nelifu lakho lihlala lijame ngehla kwabo begodu ukhamba phambi kwabo ngesika yelifelo emini kuthi ebusuku ube yisika yomlilo." 
Numbers14:15 Nje-ke nawubulala abantwaba kube kanye, izizwe ezizwe ngedumo lakho zizokuthi," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Ngebanga lokobana uSomnini uhlulekile ukufikisa abantwaba enarheni abafungela yona, yeke ubabulalele erhalawumbeni.’" 
Numbers14:17 Nje-ke ngiyancenga, kwanga uSomandla angabonakalisa amandlakhe njengokutjho kwakhe nasithi," 
Numbers14:18 ‘USomnini ubuthaka ekusilingekeni, uzele ukwethembeka, ulibalela imilandu nemitjhapho, kodwana akazumlisa onomlandu. Wehlisela isibetho sezono zaboyise phezu kwabantwababo besizukulwana sesithathu nesesine.’" 
Numbers14:19 Ngiyabawa Somnini, ngebanga lokwethembeka kwakho okukhulu, colela ubukhohlakali babantwaba, kube njengombana wabacolela kusukela eGibhide bekube lapha.”" 
Numbers14:20 USomnini waphendula uMosi wathi: “Awa, ngamezwakho lawo, ngibacolele." 
Numbers14:21 Kodwana wazi-ke, ngifunga ngepilwami nephazimulwami ezele iphasi loke ngithi:" 
Numbers14:22 Woke amadoda abone iphazimulwami neembonakaliso zami engazenza eGibhide nerhalawumbeni, kwathi kunjalo angilinga kalitjhumi ngokungalaleli ilizwi lami," 
Numbers14:23 angekhe ayibona inarha engayifungela aboyise. Iye, akakho namunye wabangidelelako ozayibona inarha leyo." 
Numbers14:24 Kodwana ngebanga lokobana incekwami uKalebi inommoya owehlukileko nokobana ingilandele ngokupheleleko, ngizayingenisa enarheni eye kiyo yayoyihlola begodu izakuba lilifa leenzukulwana zayo." 
Numbers14:25 Nje-ke, njengombana ama-Amalekhi namaKanana ahlala ngemirhobeni yeentaba, jikani kusasa nitjhinge nca ngerhalawumbeni ngendlela elunge elwandle lomGaba.”" 
Numbers14:26 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni wathi: 
Numbers14:27 “Kuzabe kube nini umkhambathi okhohlakeleko lo usoloko unginghonghoyilela? Yazini bona ngikuzwile ukungibalabalela kwama-Israyeli anghonghoyilako lawo. 
Numbers14:28 Atjeleni bona uSomnini uthi, ‘Ngifunga ngepilwami, lokho engikwizwe nikukhuluma, ngizokwenza kini:" 
Numbers14:29 Iindumbu zenu zizokurabhalaliswa erhalawumbenapha. Noke enitlolisweko ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu eninghonghoyile ngami," 
Numbers14:30 angeze nangena enarheni engafunga bona nizakuhlala kiyo, ngaphandle kwakaKalebi umsa kaJefune noJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni." 
Numbers14:31 Kodwana iinzukulwana zenu enikhulume ngazo nathi zizokuba yipango, ngizozingenisa begodu zizayifunda inarha enayinyefulako nina." 
Numbers14:32 Kodwana nakungini, iindumbu zenu zizokurabhalala erhalawumbenapha." 
Numbers14:33 Abantwabenu bazakuba belusi erhalawumbeni iminyaka ematjhumi amane, bahlupheke ngebanga lokungathembeki kwenu bekube kulapha iindumbu zenu zibolela khona erhalawumbeni." 
Numbers14:34 Isibalo samalanga amatjhumi amane enahlola ngawo inarha, sizakuba minyaka ematjhumi amane nisoloko nihlunguphazelwa izono zenu. Ilanga linye libe mnyaka. Nje-ke nizakwazi bona kunjani nanginifulathelako." 
Numbers14:35 Ngikhulumile mina Somnini, ngiyafunga ngithi kwamambala ngizokwenza koke lokho emkhambathini okhohlakeleko nobuthene bona ujamelane nami lo. Kilo lona leli irhalawumba, kulapha uzakuphelela khona, iye, uzokufa nya.’ ”" 
Numbers14:36 (Amadoda agade athunywe nguMosi bona ayokuhlola inarha, abuya enza bona woke umkhambathi unghonghoyile ngokujamelana naye ngokuletha umbiko omumbi ngenarha." 
Numbers14:37 Ngemva kwesikhathi amadoda lawo abhubha phambi kwakaSomnini ngesifo. Lokho kwenzeka njalo ngombana aletha umbiko omumbi ngenarha. 
Numbers14:38 Kodwana uJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni noKalebi umsa kaJefune baba ngabasindileko kilabo abayokuhlola inarha.) 
Numbers14:39 Kuthe lokha uMosi nakabikela ama-Israyeli umbiko lowo, abantu balila khulu." 
Numbers14:40 Bavuka ekuseni kobana banyukele esiqongolweni seentaba bathi: “Sonile, kodwana qalani sesilungele ukuya enarheni uSomnini akhuluma ngayo.”" 
Numbers14:41 UMosi wathi: “Niweqelani umyalo wakaSomnini na? Anizukuphumelela. 
Numbers14:42 Ningenyuki ngombana uSomnini akakho phakathi kwenu. Nakungasinjalo, nizakumadlhwa zizitha zenu" 
Numbers14:43 ngombana nako ama-Amalekhi namaKanana phambi kwenu. Nizokubulawa yisabula ngokufulathela kwenu uSomnini. USomnini angeze abe ajame nani.” 
Numbers14:44 Kodwana banghakalala bakhuphukela esiqongolweni seentaba nanyana umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini noMosi bebasese ngekampeni. 
Numbers14:45 Nje-ke ama-Amalekhi namaKanana ahlala ngeentabeni zenarha leyo ehla abamadlha abe abagijimisa bekwaba seRhorema. 
Numbers15:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Numbers15:2 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi kiwo: “Lokha naningena enarheni enizokuhlala kiyo, ekuyinarha enginipha yona," 
Numbers15:3 begodu naninikela umhlabelo wokutjhiswa namkha umhlabelo wetjhebiswano njengomnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini emhlambini weenkomo, wezimvu noweembuzi kobana nizalise isifungo namkha ukunikelela isihle nanyana lokha nanineminyanya, kufuze niwulethe bonyana ube ngowamukelekako kuSomnini." 
Numbers15:4 Umuntu oletha umnikelwakhe kuSomnini kufuze angezelele ngomnikelo weenthoro ekulithungana leflowuru esefiweko, edutjwe ngelitha nesiquntu samafutha we-oliva" 
Numbers15:5 kanye nelitha nesiquntu sewayini njengomnikelo wokuselwako. Lokho akunikelako akukhambisane nenye nenye imvana ehlatjwa njengomhlabelo wokutjhiswa namkha wetjhebiswano. 
Numbers15:6 Lokha nawunikela iqama ungezelele ngomnikelo weenthoro, ekumathungana amabili weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe namalitha amabili wamafutha we-oliva" 
Numbers15:7 kanye namalitha amabili wewayini njengomnikelo wokuselwako, kube mnikelo owamukelekako kuSomnini." 
Numbers15:8 Lokha nawunikela ikunzana njengomhlabelo wokutjhiswa namkha wetjhebiswano kobana uzalise isifungo kuSomnini 
Numbers15:9 kufuze ungezelele emhlabelweni lowo ngomnikelo weenthoro ekumathungana amane weflowuru esefiweko, edutjwe ngamalitha amane wamafutha we-oliva" 
Numbers15:10 kanye namalitha amane wewayini njengomnikelo wokuselwako kube mnikelo okhethekileko, owamukelekako kuSomnini." 
Numbers15:11 Kuzakwenziwa njalo-ke ngenye nenye ikunzana, iqama, iqamanyana nepongwana." 
Numbers15:12 Ngokuya ngobungako bomhlabelo onikelwako, ungezeleleni ngeminikelo ekhambisana nawo." 
Numbers15:13 “Boke abantu bendabuko bazakwenza lokho ngendlela leyo lokha nabanikela umnikelo okhethekileko, owamukelekako kuSomnini." 
Numbers15:14 Isikhonzi esikhonze phakathi kwenu namkha esihlala nani kufuze naso sinikele njengani lokha nasifuna ukunikela umnikelwaso okhethekileko, owamukelekako kuSomnini." 
Numbers15:15 Lokha nanihlanganako phambi kwakaSomnini, kuzakuba nesimiso sinye ekungesenu nesesikhonzi esiphakathi kwenu. Lokho kufuze kube simiso sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni zenu: Njengombana kunjalo kini, kuzakuba njalo nesikhonzini." 
Numbers15:16 Kuzakuba mthetho munye nomyalo munye kini nesikhonzini esiphakathi kwenu.” 
Numbers15:17 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Numbers15:18 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi kiwo: “Lokha naningena enarheni enginisa kiyo," 
Numbers15:19 nalokha nanidla isikwa sakhona, akube nesibiko kuSomnini." 
Numbers15:20 Ehlamenenu yokuthoma nikelani isikwa esimasongo, kube sibiko kuSomnini njengombana ninikela isibiko esiphuma eselelweni." 
Numbers15:21 Iye, iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana nizakunikela umnikelo onjalo kuSomnini, uphume ehlamenenu yokuthoma.”" 
Numbers15:22 Godu uSomnini wathi: “Kungenzeka bonyana none ngokungakahlosi ngokungenzi nanyana ngimiphi yemiyalo mina Somnini engiyikhulume ngawe wena Mosi," 
Numbers15:23 okutjho koke engayala ngakho kusukela mhlana nginikela imiyalo eenzukulwaneni ngeenzukulwana ukuya phambili. 
Numbers15:24 Nakube kwenzeke ngokungakahloswa nomkhambathi ungazi, nje-ke woke umkhambathi lowo uzakunikela ngekunzana yinye ibe mhlabelo wokutjhiswa kube mnikelo okhethekileko, owamukelekako kuSomnini, okhambisana nomnikelo weenthoro zawo newokuselwako ukuya ngomyalo. Godu kunikelwe nepongo yinye ibe ngeyomhlabelo wehlambululo." 
Numbers15:25 Nje-ke umphristi uzakwenzela umkhambathi woke wama-Israyeli itethelelo. Ngalokho-ke umkhambathi uzakuhlambuluka esonweni sawo ngombana wone ngokungakahlosi nokobana ulethe nomnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini kanye nomhlabelo wehlambululo ngokona kwawo ungakahlosi. 
Numbers15:26 Woke umkhambathi wama-Israyeli uzakuhlambuluka kanye nesikhonzi esiphakathi kwawo ngombana woke umuntu gade athinteke ngokona angakahlosi. 
Numbers15:27 “Nangabe kona umuntu munye ngokungakahlosi, uzakunikela imbuzi esikazi enomnyaka munye kube mhlabelo wehlambululo." 
Numbers15:28 Umphristi uzakwenzela umuntu loyo itethelelo phambi kwakaSomnini mayelana nesono asenze angakahlosi. Iye, ngokumenzela itethelelo, uzakucolelwa." 
Numbers15:29 Kuzakuba nomthetho munye kiloyo owona angakahlosi, kungaba mumuntu wendabuko kwa-Israyeli namkha osikhonzi." 
Numbers15:30 Kodwana umuntu owona ngamabomu, kungaba ngowendabuko namkha osikhonzi, udelela uSomnini. Umuntu onjalo akajutjwe ebantwini bekhabo" 
Numbers15:31 ngombana anyaze ilizwi lakaSomnini begodu wephula nomyalwakhe. Iye, umuntu loyo uzakujutjwa nya ebantwini bekhabo, athwale isono sakhe.”" 
Numbers15:32 Kwathi lokha ama-Israyeli nakaserhalawumbeni, kwafunyaneka indoda itheza iinkuni ngeSabatha." 
Numbers15:33 Labo abayifunyanako, bayiletha kuMosi no-Aroni nakiwo woke umkhambathi." 
Numbers15:34 Bavalela indoda leyo ngesikhungweni ngombana bekungakazeki bona kufuze kwenziweni ngayo. 
Numbers15:35 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Indoda leyo ayibulawe nokubulawa. Umkhambathi woke uyikhande ngamatje ngaphandle kwekampa.” 
Numbers15:36 Mbala umkhambathi woke wathatha indoda leyo wayikhuphela ngaphandle kwekampa, wafese wayikhanda ngamatje bonyana ifele lapho. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayala uMosi." 
Numbers15:37 Emva kwalokho uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers15:38 “Tjela ama-Israyeli bona wona neenzukulwana zawo azenzele amatjharhatjharha emiphethweni yezambatho zawo lapha kuzakuthungelelwa khona imicwana elihlaza komkayi. 
Numbers15:39 Kuzakuthi nanibona amatjharhatjharha lawo, nikhumbule ukwenza imiyalo kaSomnini ukuze ningabi ngabangakathembeki ngokulandela iinkanuko zeenhliziyo zenu nezamehlwenu." 
Numbers15:40 Nizakukhumbula benenze yoke imiyalwami ukuze nibe ngabacwengileko kuZimenu. 
Numbers15:41 NginguSomnini uZimenu owanenyula enarheni yeGibhide bona ngibe nguZimu kini. NginguSomnini uZimenu.” 
Numbers16:1 UKhorarhi umsa kaJitsihari omsa kaKhehathi umsa kaLevi kanye namaRubeni okunguDatani no-Abiramu amadodana ka-Eliyabu no-Oni umsa kaPelethi 
Numbers16:2 bavukela uMosi. Basekelwa madoda amakhulu amabili namatjhumi amahlanu wakwa-Israyeli. Lawo-ke bekubarholi bomkhambathi, abakhethwa ehlanganweni ekubabantu abanedumo." 
Numbers16:3 Babuthana ndawonye bajamelana noMosi no-Aroni bathi kibo: “Kwanje khona, sekwanele! Boke abantu bomkhambathi, omunye nomunye wabo ungocwengileko begodu noZimu uphakathi kwabo. Alo, nina kubayini niziphakamisa ngaphezu kwehlangano kaSomnini na?”" 
Numbers16:4 Kuthe lokha uMosi nakezwa lokho, wahloma ihloko phasi," 
Numbers16:5 wakhuluma noKhorarhi nejima lakhe wathi: “Kusasa ekuseni uSomnini uzozitjengisa bona ngubani ongowakhe nokobana ngubani ongocwengileko begodu uSomnini uzakwenza onjalo atjhidele kuye. Iye, loyo azamkhetha uzamenza atjhidele kuye." 
Numbers16:6 Nje-ke wena Khorarhi nejima lakho yenzani lokhu: Thathani izitja zokutjhisela itjhwalo," 
Numbers16:7 bese kuthi kusasa nokhele amalahle nithele itjhwalo phezu kwawo phambi kwakaSomnini. Nje-ke loyo uSomnini amkhethileko kuzakuba nguye ongocwengileko. Kwanje khona, nami senganele ngani madodana kaLevi!”" 
Numbers16:8 Godu uMosi wathi kuKhorarhi: “Lalelani la nina madodana kaLevi: 
Numbers16:9 Kuyinto encani kini kobana uZimu wakwa-Israyeli anihlukanisele emkhambathini wakwa-Israyeli ukuze anitjhideze kuye bonyana nilotjhe ethaberinakelini lakaSomnini nokobana nijame esikhundleni somkhambathi beniwulotjhe na? 
Numbers16:10 Njengombana anitjhideze hlanu kwakhe nje, nina nabafowenu boke bamaLevi, alo, nisafunana nobuphristi godu?" 
Numbers16:11 Aninghonghoyili ku-Aroni! Eqinisweni wena nalo loke ijinyana lakhwelo niphambene noSomnini ngokukghuthana kwenu lapha!” 
Numbers16:12 Nje-ke uMosi wathumela bona kubizwe uDatani no-Abiramu amadodana ka-Eliyabu. Bona bathi: “Thina asizi lapho! 
Numbers16:13 Akukaneli kuwe bona usenyule enarheni egeleza ibisi neliju bonyana uzosibulalela erhalawumbenapha, ubuye uzenze ikosana ngaphezu kwethu?" 
Numbers16:14 Ngaphezu kwalokho, akhange usilethe enarheni egeleza ibisi neliju begodu akhange bewusiphe ngitjho kungaba masimu namkha isidiribe bona kube lilifa lethu. Abantu abanjengathi nje ungababeka isandla ebusweni na? Thina asizi lapho!”" 
Numbers16:15 UMosi gade anyenye khulu; nje-ke wathi kuSomnini: “Somnini, ungawunaki umnikelwabo! Angikathathi ngitjho nodumbana kibo begodu akhange khe ngikhube noyedwa wabo.”" 
Numbers16:16 Waphendukela kuKhorarhi wathi: “Kusasa, ubekhona wena nejima lakhwelo loke phambi kwakaSomnini; iye, wena nalo kanye no-Aroni." 
Numbers16:17 Omunye nomunye wenu akeze nesitja sakhe sokutjhisela itjhwalo, athele itjhwalo phezu kwaso asilethe phambi kwakaSomnini, okutjho izitja ezimakhulu amabili namatjhumi amahlanu. Nawe wena Khorarhi no-Aroni niphathe zenu izitja.”" 
Numbers16:18 Nje-ke omunye nomunye wazithathela isitja sakhe, wokhela amalahle wathela netjhwalo phezu kwawo, bajama emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela banoMosi no-Aroni." 
Numbers16:19 Kuthe bona uKhorarhi abuthelele loke ijima lakhe elijamelene noMosi phambi komnyango wetende lokuhlanganela, kwabonakala iphazimulo kaSomnini emkhambathini woke." 
Numbers16:20 Nje-ke uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni wathi: 
Numbers16:21 “Zahlukaniseni nejimelo ukuze ngiliqede kube kanye.” 
Numbers16:22 Bona bahloma iinhloko phasi, bathi: “Maye Zimu! Wena Zimu wemiphefumulo yenyama yoke, kanti kuzakona umuntu munye bese ukhaliphela umkhambathi woke na?”" 
Numbers16:23 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers16:24 “Khuluma nomkhambathi bonyana usuke magegana nalapha kuhlala khona uKhorarhi, uDatani no-Abiramu.”" 
Numbers16:25 Nje-ke uMosi wasikima waya kuDatani no-Abiramu. Abaphathi bakwa-Israyeli bamlandela. 
Numbers16:26 Wakhuluma nomkhambathi wathi: “Ngiyanibawa, sukani ematendeni wamadoda akhohlakeleko lawo, ningathinti litho lawo ukuze ningathanyelwa ngebanga lazo zoke izono zawo.”" 
Numbers16:27 Mbala umkhambathi wasuka magegana nalapha bekuhlala khona uKhorarhi, uDatani no-Abiramu. UDatani no-Abiramu baphuma bajama eminyangweni yamatendabo nabafazi babo, abantwana kanye namasanabo." 
Numbers16:28 UMosi wathi: “Ngalokhu nizakwazi bona uSomnini ungithumile bona ngenze woke umsebenzi lo, nokobana akuveli kimi." 
Numbers16:29 Nangabe abarhalaba bafa ukufa kwabantu boke, behlelwe ngokwehlela abantu boke, khona-ke uSomnini uzabe angakangithumi." 
Numbers16:30 Kodwana nangabe uSomnini wenza isiga esitjha, ihlabathi ivule umlomayo ibaginye kanye nakho koke okungekwabo, baye endaweni yabafileko basezwa. Nje-ke nizakwazi bona abarhalaba badelele uSomnini!”" 
Numbers16:31 Kuthe angakaginyi namezwi agade awakhuluma, ihlabathi abarhalabo ebegade bajame kiyo yahlukana phakathi," 
Numbers16:32 iphasi lavula umlomalo labaginya nemizabo kanye nabo boke abantu bakaKhorarhi nepahlabo yoke. 
Numbers16:33 Ngendlela leyo behlela endaweni yabafileko nakho koke kwabo basezwa. Ihlabathi yabadibizesa, babhubha baphela ehlanganweni." 
Numbers16:34 Ama-Israyeli woke agade amagegana nabo abaleka nakezwa barhuwelela, adlumbana athi: “Baba-ke! Nathi iphaseli lizosiginya!”" 
Numbers16:35 Kwehla umlilo uvela kuSomnini, waqothula amakhulu amabili namatjhumi amahlanu wabantu abagade banikela itjhwalo." 
Numbers16:36 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers16:37 “Tjela u-Elazara umsa ka-Aroni umphristi bona asuse izitja zokutjhisela itjhwalo emthuthwini bese ukghuthulela amalahle wakhona kude le ngombana amalahle lawo acwengile. 
Numbers16:38 Izoni lezo zife ngebanga lokobana bezinikela itjhwalo ngezitjezo. Nje-ke izitjezo zibe ngezicwengileko ngokulethwa kwazo phambi kwakaSomnini. Yeke zikhandeni zibe sipara nizinamathisele e-aldarini. Ngendlela leyo zizakuba siyeleliso kuma-Israyeli.” 
Numbers16:39 Nje-ke u-Elazara umphristi wathatha izitja zokutjhisela itjhwalo zekoporo egade zisetjenziswa ngabatjhisiweko, zakhandwa zaba sipara bona zinamathiselwe e-aldarini." 
Numbers16:40 Zaba siyeleliso kuma-Israyeli bonyana kungabi khona noyedwa ongasuye umphristi nongasiso isizukulwana saka-Aroni ozakutjhidela phambi kwakaSomnini batjho utjhisa itjhwalo. Nakungasinjalo uzakufana noKhorarhi nejima lakhe. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayala u-Elazara ngoMosi. 
Numbers16:41 Ngakusasa kwamhlokho umkhambathi woke wama-Israyeli wanghonghoyila ngoMosi no-Aroni wathi kibo: “Nina, nibulele abantu bakaSomnini!”" 
Numbers16:42 Kwathi lokha umkhambathi lowo nawukghuthanako bona ujamelane noMosi no-Aroni, wajika etendeni lokuhlanganela; qala nanto ilifu lembatha itende, kwabonakala iphazimulo kaSomnini." 
Numbers16:43 Nje-ke uMosi no-Aroni batjhidela phambi kwetende lokuhlanganela; 
Numbers16:44 uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers16:45 “Tjhidani hlangana nomkhambathi lowo ukuze ngiwuqede kube kanye.” Bobabili bahloma iinhloko phasi. 
Numbers16:46 UMosi wathi ku-Aroni: “Thatha isitja sakho sokutjhisela itjhwalo bese wokhela amalahle e-aldarini ngakiso, uthele itjhwalo phezu kwawo, usithathe masinyana uye naso emkhambathini uwenzele itethelelo ngombana ilaka lakaSomnini liyavutha begodu sekusunguleke nesifo.”" 
Numbers16:47 Nje-ke u-Aroni wathatha isitja sakhe njengombana uMosi atjhwile, wagijimela phakathi kwehlangano lapha isifo besele sisunguleke khona. Wathela itjhwalo phezu kwamalahle bona enzele abantu itethelelo." 
Numbers16:48 Wajama phakathi kwabasaphilako nesele bafile, isifo saphela." 
Numbers16:49 Labo ebe basele babulewe sisifo bebaziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nane namakhulu alikhomba, ngaphandle kwalabo abafa ngesigemegeme sakaKhorarhi." 
Numbers16:50 U-Aroni wabuyela kuMosi emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela emva kokuphela kwesifo. 
Numbers17:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers17:2 “Khuluma nama-Israyeli akunikele iintonga ezilitjhumi nambili, kube yintonga yinye ephuma kumrholi wekoro enye nenye. Utlole ibizo lomrholi phezu kwentongakhe." 
Numbers17:3 Ibizo laka-Aroni litlolwe phezu kwentonga yekoro kaLevi. Kufuze kube nentonga yinye yehloko yekoro. 
Numbers17:4 Beka iintongezo ngetendeni lokuhlanganela phambi komfaji wobufakazi, lapha vane ngihlangane nawe khona." 
Numbers17:5 Intonga yomuntu engizakumkhetha izakuhluma. Ngalokho ngizakuqeda ukubelesela kokunghonghoyila kwama-Israyeli kini.” 
Numbers17:6 UMosi wakhuluma nama-Israyeli, nje-ke omunye nomunye umrholi wamnikela intonga, zaba litjhumi nambili. Kwaba mrholi nomrholi intonga ngokuya ngokweenkoro zawo. Intonga ka-Aroni beyihlangana nazo." 
Numbers17:7 Nje-ke uMosi wabeka iintonga phambi kwakaSomnini ngetendeni elinobufakazi. 
Numbers17:8 Kwathi ngakusasa uMosi nakaya ngetendeni elinobufakazi, qala, intonga ka-Aroni ongowendlu kaLevi beyihlumile! Beyinamaqumbe, amakhwa nama-alimodi avuthiweko!" 
Numbers17:9 Nje-ke uMosi wakhupha zoke iintonga phambi kwakaSomnini waziletha kuma-Israyeli woke. Emva kokobana sele azibonile iintongezo, umrholi omunye nomunye wathatha yakhe." 
Numbers17:10 Godu uSomnini wathi kuMosi: “Buyisela intonga ka-Aroni phambi komfaji wobufakazi bona ibe siyeleliso samahlubuka. Akuphele ukunghonghoyila kwabo kimi, nakungasinjalo bazakufa bokanyana nje.”" 
Numbers17:11 Mbala uMosi wenza njengombana uSomnini amyalile. 
Numbers17:12 Ama-Israyeli athi kuMosi: “Qala siyafa, siphelile nasinje, iye siphele sokanyana nje." 
Numbers17:13 Ngambala, omunye nomunye otjhidela ethaberinakelini lakaSomnini uzokufa! Alo, sifanele sife sokanyana nje?”" 
Numbers18:1 USomnini wakhuluma no-Aroni wathi: “Wena namadodanakho kanye nekoro yekhenu enawe nizakuthwala isiphambeko esenziwe endaweni ecwengileko. Kodwana wena namadodanakho kwaphela nizakuthwala isiphambeko sobuphristi. 
Numbers18:2 Utjhideze abafowenu okutjho ikoro yamaLevi okuyindlu kayihlo ukuze bahlanganyele nawe, bakusize lokha wena namadodanakho nanilotjha phambi kwetende elinobufakazi." 
Numbers18:3 Bazakwenza imisebenzi obanikela yona etendeni loke, kodwana bangatjhideli ezitjeni ezicwengileko namkha e-aldarini. Nange bangatjhidela bazakufa bese nani niyafa." 
Numbers18:4 Bazakuhlanganyela nawe, baqale itende lokuhlanganela bebenze yoke imisebenzalo kodwana ongasi mphristi angatjhideli kini" 
Numbers18:5 lokha nanisebenza ngezitja ezicwengileko namkha e-aldarini. Ngendlela leyo nizabe nikhandela ilaka lakaSomnini bona lingehleli phezu kwama-Israyeli godu. 
Numbers18:6 Yelela-ke, mina Somnini ngikhethe abafowenu amaLevi phakathi kwama-Israyeli njengesipho senu. Bona bahlukaniselwe uSomnini bonyana benze umsebenzi wetende lokuhlanganela." 
Numbers18:7 Kodwana wena namadodanakho akanye nawe nizakwenza umsebenzenu wobuphristi omayelana nakho koke okuphathelene ne-aldari nendawo engemuva kwesiyaya setjhila. Lokho kumsebenzenu. Ubuphristi ngibunikele nina njengesipho, nje-ke nanyana ngubani otjhidela eduze angasi mphristi, uzakubulawa.”" 
Numbers18:8 Godu uSomnini wathi ku-Aroni: “Mina Somnini, ngimi engikunikele umsebenzi ophathelene neminikelo esibiko, okutjho izipho ezikhethekileko zama-Israyeli. Ngikunikele zona bona kube sisabelo sakho namadodanakho nini nanini." 
Numbers18:9 Eminikelweni yoke ecwenge khulu uzakufunyana okungakatjhiswa e-aldarini. Iye, yoke iminikelo ecwenge khulu ephuma eminikelweni yeenthoro, emihlabelweni yehlambululo neyehlawulo ingeyakho namadodanakho." 
Numbers18:10 Nizayidla njengomnikelo ocwenge khulu. Boke abaduna phakathi kwabaphristi banelungelo lokuwudla. Kumnikelo ocwengileko kini. 
Numbers18:11 Nakhu okhunye godu okungokwakho: Isabelo esibekiweko eminikelweni yoke esibiko ama-Israyeli ayiletha kuSomnini, ngesakho. Ngisinikele wena namadodanakho kanye namadodakazakho njengesabelo senu nini nanini. Woke ohlambulukileko endlinakho angadla kiso." 
Numbers18:12 Koke okuhle kwesivuno sokuthoma samafutha we-oliva, kwewayini nokweenthoro okulethwa ma-Israyeli kuSomnini, ngikunikela wena." 
Numbers18:13 Isilumo sakho koke okusemasiminabo asiletha kuSomnini, sizakuba ngesakho. Woke ohlambulukileko endlinakho angadla kiso." 
Numbers18:14 Godu okuzilelwa ngakho uSomnini kwa-Israyeli kungokwakho. 
Numbers18:15 Koke okuduna okuphume qangi esibelethweni, kwabantu nekweenlwana okulethwe kuSomnini, kuzakuba ngokwakho. Nokho-ke amazibulo wabantu neweenlwana ezingakahlambuluki, niwahlenge." 
Numbers18:16 Lokha izibulo nalinenyanga yinye kumele ubeke inani lokuhlengwa elimagremu amatjhumi amahlanu nalikhomba wesiliva ukuya ngesilinganiso sendawo ecwengileko. 
Numbers18:17 Kodwana amazibulo weenkomo, izimvu neembuzi angahlengwa ngombana acwengile. Fafaza iingazi zawo phezu kwe-aldari, utjhise imihlwehlwe yawo kube mnikelo okhethekileko, owamukeleka kuSomnini." 
Numbers18:18 Inyama yawo izakuba ngeyakho njengombana isifuba esiphakanyiswa nomlenze wangesidleni kungokwakho. 
Numbers18:19 Yoke iminikelo esibiko elethwa ma-Israyeli kuSomnini, ngiyinikela wena, amadodanakho namadodakazakho kube sisabelo sakho nini nanini. Lokho kusivumelwano esijanyiswe ngetswayi ngehlangothini lakaSomnini mayelana nawe neenzukulwana zakho.”" 
Numbers18:20 Godu uSomnini wathi ku-Aroni: “Angeze waba nelifa hlangana nama-Israyeli begodu nesabelo sesimu angeze ube naso phakathi kwawo. Mina Somnini ngisisabelo sakho nelifa lakho phakathi kwama-Israyeli. 
Numbers18:21 “Koke kwetjhumi kwa-Israyeli, ngikunikele amaLevi bona kube lilifa lawo lokuwavuza emsebenzinawo wokulotjha etendeni lokuhlanganela." 
Numbers18:22 Kusukela nje, ama-Israyeli akukafaneli atjhidele etendeni lokuhlanganela ngombana nakenza njalo azakuthwala isono bese ayafa." 
Numbers18:23 Kodwana maLevi azakwenza umsebenzi wetende lokuhlanganela begodu azakuthwala isiphambeko esenziwa kilo. Lokhu kuzakuba simiso sanini nanini eenzukulwaneni zawo. AmaLevi angeze aba nelifa hlangana nama-Israyeli 
Numbers18:24 ngombana ngiwanikele kwetjhumi okulethwa ma-Israyeli kuSomnini bona kube lilifa lawo. Kungalokho ngithe kiwo angeze aba nelifa hlangana nama-Israyeli.” 
Numbers18:25 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Numbers18:26 akakhulume namaLevi athi kiwo: “Lokha nanamukela kwetjhumi kuma-Israyeli engininikele khona bona kube ngokwenu, khuphani kwetjhumi emnikelweni lowo kube ngokwakaSomnini. Lokho kuzakuba ngokwetjhumi kokwetjhumi." 
Numbers18:27 Umnikelwenu wokwetjhumi lowo uzakubalwa ngasuthi mnikelo weenthoro ophuma eselelweni senu newayini kanye namafutha we-oliva aphuma ebutlhodlhelweni benu. 
Numbers18:28 Ngendlela leyo nani nizakhupha kuSomnini umnikelo wokwetjhumi kwakho koke kwenu enikwamukela kuma-Israyeli. Nje-ke nizakuthatha umnikelo kaSomnini lowo niwunikele u-Aroni umphristi. 
Numbers18:29 Eminikelweni yoke eninikelwa yona, nikelani uSomnini umnikelo ongowakhe. Lokho kuzakuba mnikelo ocwengileko kuSomnini kikho koke okuhle kweminikelo.”" 
Numbers18:30 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi akakhulume namaLevi athi: “Lokha nina maLevi naninikela okukhethekileko kweminikelo leyo bese ithathwa ingasuthi sivuno esivela eselelweni nebutlhodlhelweni," 
Numbers18:31 okuseleko ningakudlela nanyana kukuphi, nina nezindlu zenu. Lokho kumvuzo wenu mayelana nomsebenzi wokulotjha etendeni lokuhlanganela." 
Numbers18:32 Angeze naba nomlandu ngawo naniwudlako ikani nje nanithome ngokunikela okukhethekileko kwawo kuSomnini. Ngalokho ningasilaphazi izipho ezikhethekileko zama-Israyeli ukuze ningafi.” 
Numbers19:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni wathi: 
Numbers19:2 “Nasi isimiso somthetho uSomnini ayale ngaso: Tjelani ama-Israyeli bona anilethele ithokazi elibovu libe msulwa, lingabi nomphambo begodu libe ngelingazange khe libotjhelwe." 
Numbers19:3 Alinikele u-Elazara umphristi bese likhutjhelwa ngaphandle kwekampa lihlatjelwe lapho phambi kwakhe. 
Numbers19:4 Nje-ke u-Elazara umphristi uzakuthatha ezinye zeengazi zalo ngomuno, afafaze kalikhomba aqalise ngaphambi kwetende lokuhlanganela." 
Numbers19:5 Ithokazelo lizakutjhiswa umphristi aliqalile. Kutjhiswe isikhumba, inyama, iingazi kanye nomswanalo." 
Numbers19:6 Godu umphristi uzakuthatha isigojwana somsedari, ihlukuzo lehisophi nomtiya otlerebede, akuphosele emlilweni lapha kutjhiswa khona ithokazelo." 
Numbers19:7 Umphristi loyo uzakuhlanza izambatho zakhe, adude nomzimba, emva kwalokho angabuyela ngekampeni, kodwana uzakuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Numbers19:8 Naloyo otjhise ithokazi kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe adude nomzimba, naye uzakuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe." 
Numbers19:9 Indoda ehlambulukileko izakuwola umlotha wethokazi bese iwubeka ngaphandle kwekampa endaweni ekhethekileko. Uzakulondwa lapho bona usetjenziswe emanzini wehlambululo yomkhambathi wama-Israyeli ukuze uhlanjululwe ezonweni. 
Numbers19:10 Naloyo owola umlotha wethokazi kufuze ahlanze izambatho zakhe, abe ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe. Lokhu kuzakuba simiso sanini nanini kuma-Israyeli nesikhonzini esiphakathi kwawo." 
Numbers19:11 “Nanyana ngubani othinta isidumbu somunye nomunye umuntu, uzakuba ngosilapheleko amalanga alikhomba." 
Numbers19:12 Kufuze azihlambulule ngamanzi wehlambululo elangeni lesithathu nelekhomba, nje-ke uzakuba ngohlambulukileko. Kodwana nangabe akazihlambululi ngelanga lesithathu nelekhomba, angeze aba ngohlambulukileko." 
Numbers19:13 Nanyana ngubani othinta isidumbu somuntu ohlongakeleko bese angazihlambululi, usilaphaza ithaberinakeli lakaSomnini. Onjalo akajutjwe ebantwini bakwa-Israyeli ngombana akakafafazwa ngamanzi wehlambululo. Yeke uzakuhlala angosilapheleko. Iye, usananyathelwe kusilaphala." 
Numbers19:14 “Naku umthetho lokha umuntu nakahlongakalela ngetendeni lokuhlala: Woke umuntu ongena ngetendenelo namkha ongaphakathi kwalo uzakuba ngosilapheleko amalanga alikhomba. 
Numbers19:15 Kanti-ke nesitja esingetendeni esingakavalwa sabotjhwa ngesisibekelo, sisilaphele." 
Numbers19:16 “Nanyana ngubani osemmangweni othinta obulewe ngesabula, isidumbu somuntu ohlongakele ngemvelo, ithambo lomuntu namkha ithuna, uzakuba ngosilapheleko amalanga alikhomba." 
Numbers19:17 “Mayelana nomuntu osilapheleko, kufuze kuthathwe emlotheni wethokazi egade litjhiselwe ihlambululo, uthelwe ngesitjeni esinamanzi agelezako." 
Numbers19:18 Kuthi umuntu ohlambulukileko athathe ihlukuzo lehisophi alenye ngemanzinapho bese afafaze itendelo, ipahla yoke yetende nomuntu woke ogade alapho. Godu afafaze nomuntu okhe wathinta ithambo, isidumbu sobulewe ngesabula, isidumbu sozihlongakaleleko namkha ithuna." 
Numbers19:19 Umuntu ohlambulukileko loyo uzakufafaza godu phezu kokusilapheleko elangeni lesithathu nelekhomba. Ngendlela leyo uzakuhlambulula umuntu loyo ngelanga lekhomba. Ohlanjululweko uzakuhlanza izambatho zakhe, adude nomzimba, kuthi nakuhlwako abe ngohlambulukileko." 
Numbers19:20 “Kodwana nangabe osilapheleko akazihlambululi, uzakujutjwa ehlanganweni ngombana usilaphaze indawo ecwengileko kaSomnini. Ngebanga lokobana akakafafazwa ngamanzi wehlambululo, ungosilapheleko." 
Numbers19:21 Lokho kuzakuba simiso sanini nanini kuma-Israyeli. Umuntu ofafaza amanzi wokuhlambulula uzakuhlanza izambatho zakhe bese kuthi othinta amanzi wokuhlambulula abe ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe. 
Numbers19:22 Nanyana yini ethintwa mumuntu ongakahlambuluki izakuba ngesilapheleko. Nothinta okusilapheleko uzakuba ngosilapheleko bekuhlwe.” 
Numbers20:1 Kwathi ngenyanga yokuthoma woke umkhambathi wama-Israyeli wafika erhalawumbeni leTsini wahlala eKhadetjhi. UMiriyamu wahlongakalela lapho bewabekwa. 
Numbers20:2 Nje-ke lapho umkhambathi bewunganamanzi wokusela. Abantu bakghuthana ndawonye bajamelana noMosi no-Aroni. 
Numbers20:3 Basola uMosi bathi: “Bekungcono ukube ngathana sesafa nabafowethu lokha nabafa ngelaka lakaSomnini! 
Numbers20:4 Niyiletheleni ihlangano kaSomnini erhalawumbenapha? Benenzelela bonyana sizokufela lapha, thina nefuywethu, yi!" 
Numbers20:5 Njekhona nisenyuleleni enarheni yeGibhide bona nisilethe endaweni embikazi le? Indawo enganamabele, imithi yamakhiwani, isidiribe nemithi yamarharinada; namanzi tle wokusela, awekho!”" 
Numbers20:6 Nje-ke uMosi no-Aroni basuka ehlanganweni banqomba emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela, bafese bahloma iinhloko phasi. Khonapho kwabonakala kibo iphazimulo kaSomnini." 
Numbers20:7 USomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Numbers20:8 “Thatha idondolo lakho bese wena no-Aroni umfowenu nihlanganise umkhambathi. Khulumani edwaleni phambi kwawo bona likhuphe amanzi akilo. Ngendlela leyo nizawuvezela amanzi edwaleni ukuze usele wona nefuywawo.” 
Numbers20:9 Khonapho uMosi wathatha idondolo lakhe endaweni ecwengileko njengombana uSomnini amyalile. 
Numbers20:10 Mbala uMosi no-Aroni babuthelela ihlangano ndawonye phambi kwedwala, wathi kiyo: “Nje-ke lalelani nina mahlubuka ndina! Siniphundlusele amanzi edwaleneli na?”" 
Numbers20:11 Yeke uMosi waphakamisa isandla sakhe wabetha idwala ngedondolo kabili; kwagobhoza amanzi amanengi kwasela umkhambathi kanye nefuywawo. 
Numbers20:12 Kodwana uSomnini wathi kuMosi no-Aroni: “Njengombana ningakhange ningethembe, nikhombise ukungihlonipha emehlweni wama-Israyeli, angeze nayingenisa ihlangano leyo enarheni engiyinikela yona.”" 
Numbers20:13 Lawo bekumamanzi weMeriba lapha abantu bakwa-Israyeli basola khona uSomnini; nalapha uSomnini waziveza khona kibo ngobumsulwa bakhe. 
Numbers20:14 UMosi wathuma iinthunywa zisuka eKhadetjhi, zaya ekosini yakwa-Edomu zafese zathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo ngumfowenu u-Israyeli, ‘Wena uyabazi boke ubunzima obasehlelako." 
Numbers20:15 Abobamkhulu behlela eGibhide, sahlala khona isikhathi eside. AmaGibhide asiphatha kumbi njengombana aphatha abobamkhulu." 
Numbers20:16 Kwathi lokha nasilila kuSomnini, uSomnini wasizwa bewathumela ingilozi bonyana isenyule eGibhide. Kwanjesi, singapha ngeKhadetjhi ekumumuzi ongemkhawulwenakho." 
Numbers20:17 Yeke sibawa usivumele bonyana sidlule enarhenakho. Angeze satlaya emasimini namkha esidiribeni begodu asizukusela amanzi wemithombakho. Sizokukhamba endleleni ekhanjwa makhosi, singaphambukeli ngesidleni namkha ngesinceleni size sidlule emkhawulwenakho.’ ”" 
Numbers20:18 Kodwana u-Edomu waphendula wathi: “Awa, ningadluli lapha, nakungasinjalo, ngizanihlangabeza ngesabula.”" 
Numbers20:19 Nje-ke ama-Israyeli amphendula athi: “Awa hle, sizokukhamba kwaphela endleleni ekulu. Nakungenzeka bona thina namkha ifuywethu isele amanzakho, sizakukukhokhela. Esikubawako sekudlula ngeenyawo kwaphela, akukho okhunye.”" 
Numbers20:20 Godu waphendula wathi: “Ngithi, ningakhe ningadlula lapha!” Nje-ke u-Edomu waphuma wawakhandela ngamadoda amanengi ekulibutho elinamandla." 
Numbers20:21 Ngendlela leyo u-Edomu walela u-Israyeli bona adlule emkhawulwenakhe. Nje-ke u-Israyeli wajika, wamgadunga." 
Numbers20:22 Woke umkhambathi wama-Israyeli wasuka eKhadetjhi, wakhamba wabe wafika entabeni yeHori." 
Numbers20:23 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Aroni entabeni yeHori ngemkhawulweni wenarha yakwa-Edomu wathi: 
Numbers20:24 “Nakungu-Aroni uzakulandela aboyisemkhulu. Angeze angena enarheni engiyinikela ama-Israyeli ngombana nafulathela umyalwami emanzini weMeriba. 
Numbers20:25 Thatha u-Aroni no-Elazara indodanakhe wenyukele nabo entabeni yeHori," 
Numbers20:26 uhlubulise u-Aroni izambatho zakhe zobuphristi bese uzembesa indodanakhe u-Elazara. U-Aroni uzakuhlongakalela lapho, abekwe.”" 
Numbers20:27 UMosi wenza njengombana uSomnini amyalile. Bakhuphuka intaba yeHori umkhambathi woke ubaqalile. 
Numbers20:28 Mbala uMosi wahlubulisa u-Aroni izambatho zobuphristi wazembesa indodanakhe u-Elazara. U-Aroni wahlongakalela lapho esiqongolweni sentaba. Nje-ke uMosi no-Elazara bewuka intaba. 
Numbers20:29 Kuthe lokha umkhambathi woke nawubona bonyana u-Aroni uhlongakele, indlu yoke yakwa-Israyeli yamlilela amalanga amatjhumi amathathu." 
Numbers21:1 Ikosi ye-Aradi egade imKanana ihlala ngesewula yenarha, yezwa bona u-Israyeli uza ngendlela yange-Atarimu. Yasahlela ama-Israyeli beyathumba amanye wawo." 
Numbers21:2 Ama-Israyeli enza isifungo kuSomnini athi: “Nange mbala uSomnini anganikela abantwaba esandleni sethu, amadorobhabo sizowabhubhisa nya.”" 
Numbers21:3 USomnini wezwa isibawo sama-Israyeli, wanikela amaKanana esandleni sawo. Ama-Israyeli abhubhisa amaKanana lawo nya kanye namadorobhawo. Nje-ke ibizo lendawo leyo labizwa bona yiRhorima." 
Numbers21:4 Ama-Israyeli asuka entabeni yeHori alunga ngendlela eya elwandle lomGaba ukuze abhode inarha yakwa-Edomu. Khonapho endleleni banyefa ummongo. 
Numbers21:5 Abantu banyefula uZimu noMosi bathi: “Nisikhupheleni eGibhide bona sizokufela erhalawumbenapha? Akunakudla! Namanzi awekho lapha! Begodu sese sidinwe nakukudlanyana okungazisikokhu!” 
Numbers21:6 Nje-ke uSomnini wathumela iinyoka ezinesihlungu ebantwini, zabaluma; kwafa ama-Israyeli amanengi." 
Numbers21:7 Abantu beza kuMosi bafese bathi: “Sonile ngombana sinyefule uSomnini kanye nawe. Yeke sithandazela kuSomnini bona asuse iinyokezi kithapha.” Nje-ke uMosi wabathandazela-ke. 
Numbers21:8 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Yenza umfanekiso wenyoka enesihlungu uyiphakamise ibe liphawu okuzakuthi omunye nomunye olunyiweko nakayiqalako, aphiliswe.”" 
Numbers21:9 UMosi wenza inyoka yekoporo, wayiphakamisa kobana ibe liphawu. Bekuthi nanyana ngubani olunywa yinyoka nakaqala inyoka yekoporo, aphile." 
Numbers21:10 Ama-Israyeli afuduka ayokuhloma amatendawo nge-Obhothi. 
Numbers21:11 Afuduka godu e-Obhothi ayokuhloma e-Iye-Habharimu, eserhalawumbeni elingepumalanga yakwaMowabi." 
Numbers21:12 Ukusuka lapho afuduka ayokuhloma emlanjaneni iZeredi. 
Numbers21:13 Ukusuka lapho afuduka godu ayokuhloma ngale kwe-Arinoni, ngerhalawumbeni elinabela ngemkhawulweni wama-Amori. Kwakhona i-Arinoni le, isemkhawulweni hlangana neMowabi nendawo yama-Amori." 
Numbers21:14 Kungalokho encwadini yezipi zakaSomnini kuthiwa: “... eWahebe eseSufa emilanjaneni ye-Arinoni 
Numbers21:15 namadonga wemirhoba enabela ngebuhlalweni be-Ari, izeyame ngemikhawulo yakwaMowabi.”" 
Numbers21:16 Ukusuka lapho ama-Israyeli aragela phambili aya eBheri, ekumthombo lapha uSomnini akhuluma khona noMosi wathi: “Buthelela abantu ndawonye ukuze ngibaphe amanzi.”" 
Numbers21:17 Nje-ke ama-Israyeli avuma nasi ingoma: “Gobhoza mthombo! Vumani njalo 
Numbers21:18 ngomthombo owenjiwe barholi, warhujwa ngitjho nangani makhosi wabantu ngentonga yombusi nangamadondolwawo.” Asuka erhalawumbenapho aya eMatana," 
Numbers21:19 ukusuka eMatana aya eNarhaliyeli, eNarhaliyeli aya eBhamothi." 
Numbers21:20 Ukusuka eBhamothi kwayiwa emrhobeni ongesifundeni sakwaMowabi lapha esiqongweni sePisiga umuntu angabona khona iJetjhimoni. 
Numbers21:21 Ama-Israyeli athumela iinthunywa kuSirhoni ikosi yama-Amori athi: 
Numbers21:22 “Sivumela bonyana sidlule enarhenakho. Angeze satlaya emasimini namkha esidiribeni begodu asizukusela amanzi wemithombakho. Sizokukhamba endleleni ekhanjwa makhosi, size sidlule emkhawulwenakho.”" 
Numbers21:23 Kodwana uSirhoni akhange avumele u-Israyeli bona adlule emkhawulwenakhe. Wahlanganisa loke ibutho lakhe waphuma bonyana asahlele u-Israyeli erhalawumbeni. Wafika eJahatsi walwa no-Israyeli. 
Numbers21:24 Ama-Israyeli alwa naye ngesabula amhlula abe athumba inarhakhe ukusukela emlanjeni i-Arinoni bekwaba semlanjeni iJabokhi. IJabokhi bekumkhawulo oqinisiweko wama-Amoni. 
Numbers21:25 Ama-Israyeli athatha woke amadorobho wakhona, ahlala ngemadorobheni wama-Amori, ngeRhetjhibhoni nemizanayo yoke." 
Numbers21:26 IRhetjhibhoni bekulidorobho lakaSirhoni ikosi yama-Amori. USirhoni lo, gade alwe nekosi yaphambilini yakwaMowabi bewayemuka inarhayo yoke bekube semlanjeni i-Arinoni." 
Numbers21:27 Ngikho nje iimbongi zithi: “Yizani eRhetjhibhoni ukuze lakhiwe, idorobho lakaSirhoni aliqiniswe." 
Numbers21:28 Phambilini kwaphuma umlilo eRhetjhibhoni, iye, amalangabi edorobheni lakaSirhoni. Aginya i-Ari kwaMowabi, nabanini beendunduma hlangana ne-Arinoni." 
Numbers21:29 Maye kuwe Mowabi! Niphelile nina balotjhi bakaKemotjhi! Wenze amadodanakhe aba bakhoseli, namadokazakhe aba bathunjwa bekosi yama-Amori, uSirhoni." 
Numbers21:30 Amasimabo atjhabalele ukusukela eRhetjhibhoni ukuya eDibhoni, begodu ukusukela eNatjhimu ukuya eNofarhi.” (INofarhi le iseduze neMedeba.)" 
Numbers21:31 Ngendlela leyo-ke ama-Israyeli ahlala enarheni yama-Amori. 
Numbers21:32 UMosi wathumela bona kuyokuhlolwa iJazeri. Ama-Israyeli athumba imizanayo, aqotjha nama-Amori agade alapho." 
Numbers21:33 Nje-ke ama-Israyeli ajika akhuphuka ngendlela eya eBhatjhani. U-Ogi ikosi yakhona yaphuma nebutho layo loke bonyana ibasahlele ngepi e-Edreyi. 
Numbers21:34 Kodwana uSomnini uZimu wathi kuMosi: “Ungamesabi ngombana ngimnikele esandleni sakho, iye, yena nebutho lakhe kanye nenarhakhe. Uzakwenza kuye njengombana wenze kuSirhoni ikosi yama-Amori ebe yakhe eRhetjhibhoni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Mbala ama-Israyeli abulala u-Ogi namadodanakhe kanye nabantu bakhe boke, kwangabi khona noyedwa wakhe osindako. Ngendlela leyo athumba inarhakhe." 
Numbers22:1 Ama-Israyeli afuduka afese ahloma amatendawo ngemrhobeni weJordani kwaMowabi malungana neJerikho. 
Numbers22:2 UBhalakhi umsa kaTsipori wakubona koke ama-Israyeli agade akwenze kuma-Amori. 
Numbers22:3 AmaMowabi aba nevalo elikhulu ngama-Israyeli ngombana gade amanengi. Iye, akhathazeka khulu ngawo." 
Numbers22:4 UMowabi wakhuluma nabaphathi bamaMidiyani wathi: “Nje-ke isiqubuthwesi sizokutjhwamadela koke okusizombileko njengekomo nayitjhwamadela utjani emrhuleni.” UBhalakhi umsa kaTsipori, ogade ayikosi yakwaMowabi ngesikhatheso," 
Numbers22:5 wathumela iinthunywa kuBhiliyamu umsa kaBhewori ngePetora emagegana nomlambo iYufrathe enarheni lapha adabuka khona, bona ziyombiza zithi kuye: “Yelela, kunabantu abaphuma eGibhide, abasibekele ubuso bephasi begodu bakhe eduze kwami." 
Numbers22:6 Nje-ke yewize, uzonginikelelela abantwaba ngamanikelela ngombana banamandla khulu kunami. Mhlamunye kungahle kwenzeke bona ngibahlule bengibaqotjhe enarheni. Iye, ngiyazi bona obusiswa nguwe, ubusisiwe nonikelelwa nguwe unikelelwe.”" 
Numbers22:7 Nje-ke abaphathi bakwaMowabi nebakwaMidiyani basuka baphethe isiliva yokuthukula ezandleni zabo. Bafika kuBhiliyamu, bambikela umlayezo kaBhalakhi." 
Numbers22:8 Yena wathi kibo: “Lalani lapha namhlanje, kuzakuthi kusasa nginibuyele nelizwi engilifumene kuSomnini.” Mbala iinkhulu zakwaMowabezo zalala kwaBhiliyamu." 
Numbers22:9 UZimu wabonakala kuBhiliyamu wambuza wathi: “Bobani amadoda anawe la?” 
Numbers22:10 UBhiliyamu waphendula uZimu wathi: “UBhalakhi ikosi yakwaMowabi omsa kaTsipori ungithumelele umbiko ngawo wathi," 
Numbers22:11 ‘Yelela, kunabantu abaphuma eGibhide, abasibekele ubuso bephasi begodu bakhe eduze kwami. Nje-ke yewize, uzongithiyela abantwaba ngemilingo. Mhlamunye kungahle kwenzeke bona ngibahlule bengibaqotjhe.’ ”" 
Numbers22:12 UZimu wathi kuBhiliyamu: “Ungakhambi nawo. Begodu unganikeleli abantwabo ngombana bangababusisiweko.” 
Numbers22:13 UBhiliyamu wavuka ekuseni wathi eenkhulwini zakaBhalakhi: “Buyelani enarheni yekhenu ngombana uSomnini walile bona ngikhambe nani.” 
Numbers22:14 Nje-ke iinkhulu zakwaMowabi zasuka zabuyela kuBhalakhi zafese zathi: “UBhiliyamu walile ukuza nathi.” 
Numbers22:15 Godu uBhalakhi wathumela iinkhulu ezinengi nezinesithunzi kunezokuthoma. 
Numbers22:16 Zeza kuBhiliyamu zafese zathi kuye: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguBhalakhi umsa kaTsipori uthi, ‘Hle, akungabi khona into ekuthiyako ukuza kimi" 
Numbers22:17 ngombana ngizakupha umvuzo omkhulu. Nanyana yini oyitjhoko kimi ngizayenza. Yewize wena, uzongithiyela abantwaba ngemilingo.’ ”" 
Numbers22:18 Kodwana uBhiliyamu waphendula iinceku zakaBhalakhi wathi: “Ngitjho nanyana uBhalakhi gade angangipha isigodlo sakhe sigcwele isiliva negolide bengingeze ngeqa umyalo kaSomnini uZimami ngenze nanyana yini. 
Numbers22:19 Nje-ke akhese nilale lapha nani ubusukobu, khengizwe bona yini enye into uSomnini azayitjho kimi.”" 
Numbers22:20 UZimu wabonakala kuBhiliyamu ngobusukobo wathi kuye: “Nangabe amadoda lawo eze bona azokubiza, zilungiselele ukhambe nawo. Kodwana uzakwenza kwaphela lokho mina engikutjela khona.”" 
Numbers22:21 Nje-ke uBhiliyamu wavuka ekuseni wabophela udumbanakhe wemuka neenkhulu zakwaMowabi. 
Numbers22:22 Kodwana gade asese sendleleni, akhwele udumbanakhe akhamba neenceku zakhe ezimbili, lokha ilaka lakaZimu nalithoma ukuvutha ngokukhamba kwakhe neenkhulwezo. Nje-ke ingilozi kaSomnini yajama endleleni phambi kwakhe kobana imkhandele." 
Numbers22:23 Udumbana wabona ingilozi kaSomnini ijame endleleni irhwatjhe isabulayo. Nje-ke udumbana waphuma endleleni wavundla ummango. UBhiliyamu wadula udumbana loyo bona abuyele endleleni. 
Numbers22:24 Ingilozi kaSomnini yajama emzilaneni phakathi kwesidiribe hlanu komthangala ngapha nangapha. 
Numbers22:25 Kuthe lokha udumbana nakabona ingilozi kaSomnini, waziyama ngomthangala, warhuhlisa inyawo lakaBhiliyamu ngomthangala lowo. Nje-ke uBhiliyamu wamdula godu." 
Numbers22:26 Ingilozi kaSomnini yaragela phambili yafese yajama emkghothaneni womthangala lapha kunganandawo yokujikela ngesidleni namkha ngesinceleni. 
Numbers22:27 Kwathi lokha udumbana nakabona ingilozi kaSomnini walala phasi uBhiliyamu asakhwele njalo. UBhiliyamu wabila khulu, watutlula udumbana loyo ngomtjhizakhe." 
Numbers22:28 Nje-ke uSomnini wavula umlomo kadumbana, wakhuluma noBhiliyamu wathi: “Ngikwenzeni mntabantu njengombana sekulihlandla lesithathu usoloko ungidula nje?”" 
Numbers22:29 UBhiliyamu waphendula udumbana wathi: “Kungebanga lokobana ungitshime isidlhayela. Sengathi ngathana bengiphethe isabula esandleni samapha; bengizokubulala nya wena, khona nje!”" 
Numbers22:30 Udumbana wathi kuBhiliyamu: “Kanti angisuye udumbanakho omkhwelileko esikhathini eside esidlulileko bekube namhlanje na? Bengiphele ngenze lokhu kuwe na?” UBhiliyamu wathi: “Awa.” 
Numbers22:31 Nje-ke uSomnini wavula amehlo kaBhiliyamu, wabona ingilozi kaSomnini ijame endleleni irhwatjhe isabulayo. Khonapho waguqa wahloma ihloko phasi." 
Numbers22:32 Ingilozi kaSomnini yathi kuye: “Kubayini ututlule udumbanakho bekube kathathu na? Yelela-ke, mina ngize bona ngizokukhandela ngombana indlela leyo inameva ngokubona kwami." 
Numbers22:33 Udumbana ungibonile bewaphambuka kathathu phambi kwami. Nangathana udumbana akhange aphambuke phambi kwami, ngiqinisile yi, wena ngasele ngikubulele nya, yena ngamlisa waphila.”" 
Numbers22:34 Nje-ke uBhiliyamu wathi engilozini kaSomnini: “Ngonile ngombana akhange ngazi bona ujame endleleni kobana ungihlangabeze. Yeke nangabe akuthandeki emehlweni wekosami, ngizokubuyela emuva.”" 
Numbers22:35 Ingilozi kaSomnini yathi kuBhiliyamu: “Khamba namadoda lawo, kodwana ukhulume kwaphela amezwi engizakutjela wona.” Nje-ke uBhiliyamu wakhamba neenkhulu zakaBhalakhi lezo." 
Numbers22:36 Kwathi lokha uBhalakhi nakezwa bona uBhiliyamu usendleleni, waphuma wayomhlangabeza edorobheni lakwaMowabi elisemlanjeni i-Arinoni, ngemaphelelweni womkhawulo." 
Numbers22:37 UBhalakhi wathi kuBhiliyamu: “Akhange ngithumele bona ubizwe na? Alo, kubayini ungakhange uze kimi ngesikhatheso? Kghani ngiyahluleka ukukuvuza na?”" 
Numbers22:38 UBhiliyamu waphendula uBhalakhi wathi: “Lalela-ke, kwanje sengifikile kuwe. Kodwana ungacabangi bonyana ngizakukhuluma ilizwi uSomnini angakalitjho kimi. Kwaphela lokho uSomnini athe ngikutjho.”" 
Numbers22:39 Nje-ke uBhiliyamu wakhamba noBhalakhi bebafika eKiriyathi-Rhutsothi. 
Numbers22:40 UBhalakhi wenza umhlabelo weenkomo nezimvu wabese uthumela isabelo kuBhiliyamu neenkhulu egade zinaye. 
Numbers22:41 Kwathi ngakusasa kwakhona uBhalakhi wathatha uBhiliyamu wenyukela naye eBhamothi-Bhali. Lapho uBhiliyamu wabona ingcenye yabantu bakwa-Israyeli. 
Numbers23:1 UBhiliyamu wathi kuBhalakhi: “Ngakhelani ama-aldari alikhomba bese ningilethela iinkunzi ezilikhomba namaqama alikhomba.” 
Numbers23:2 UBhalakhi wenza njengombana uBhiliyamu atjhwile. Nje-ke uBhalakhi noBhiliyamu banikela ngekunzi neqama phezu kwelinye nelinye i-aldari. 
Numbers23:3 UBhiliyamu wathi kuBhalakhi: “Jama hlanu kwemihlabelwakho yokutjhiswa le, mina ngisathi ukubethwa mumoya; mhlamunye uSomnini uzazibonakalisa kimi. Nje-ke nanyana yini azakwambula kimi, ngizakutjela khona.” Mbala wakhamba waya embunjwaneni onganalitho." 
Numbers23:4 UZimu wazibonakalisa kuBhiliyamu. UBhiliyamu wathi kuye: “Ngilungise ama-aldari alikhomba, kwathi phezu kwelinye nelinye nganikela ikunzi neqama.”" 
Numbers23:5 USomnini wafaka uBhiliyamu ilizwi ngemlonyeni. Begodu wathi: “Buyela kuBhalakhi ufese umtjele engikutjele khona.” 
Numbers23:6 Nje-ke wabuyela kuBhalakhi, qala, yena neenkhulu zoke zakwaMowabi bebajame hlanu kwemihlabelwakhe yokutjhiswa." 
Numbers23:7 UBhiliyamu waphimisa umlayezwakhe wathi: “UBhalakhi wangilanda ukusukela e-Aramu, iye, ikosi yakwaMowabi yangisusa ngeentabeni zepumalanga ngokuthi, ‘Yewize uzonginikelelela uJakopo ngamanikelela; yewize uzokuthuwelelisa u-Israyeli!’" 
Numbers23:8 Ngingamnikelela njani ongakanikelelwa nguZimu? Ngimthuwelelise njani ongakathuweleliswa nguSomnini na? 
Numbers23:9 Iye, ukusukela phezu kwamadwala ngiyababona, naphezu kwemibundu basavelile: Qala, kubabantu abahlala bodwa, begodu abazibali nezinye izizwe!" 
Numbers23:10 Ngubani ongabala uJakopo onjengethuli, u-Israyeli onjengesibalo sethuli lesivunguvungu? Angife ukufa kolungileko, nokuphela kwami kube njengokwakhe!”" 
Numbers23:11 UBhalakhi wathi kuBhiliyamu: “Kanti ndoda ungisebenze njani? Angitjho ngikuthethe bona uzongithiyela izitha zami ngemilingo! Qala, sewazibusisa kwaphela!”" 
Numbers23:12 Yena waphendula wathi: “Kanti akukafaneli bona ngiyelele lokho uSomnini akufake emlonyenami na?” 
Numbers23:13 UBhalakhi wathi kuye: “Akhese unambe nami siye kenye indawo lapha uzababona khona abantwabo. Lapho-ke uzakubona ingcenye yabo ingasi boke. Nje-ke ungithiyele bona ngemilingo usendaweni leyo.” 
Numbers23:14 Mbala uBhalakhi wamthatha wakhamba emmangweni weTsofimu esiqongweni sePisiga, wafese wakha ama-aldari alikhomba lapho bewanikela ngekunzi nangeqama phezu kwelinye nelinye lawo." 
Numbers23:15 UBhiliyamu wathi kuBhalakhi: “Akhusuje ujame hlanu kwemihlabelo yokutjhiswa, mina ngisafuna ukuzihlanganisa noSomnini ngaphetjheyaphaya.”" 
Numbers23:16 USomnini wahlangana noBhiliyamu wafese wafaka ilizwi ngemlonyenakhe. Begodu wathi: “Buyela kuBhalakhi ufese umtjele engikutjele khona.” 
Numbers23:17 Mbala uBhiliyamu wabuyela kuye wamfunyana ajame hlanu kwemihlabelwakhe yokutjhiswa neenkhulu zakwaMowabi ezikanye naye. UBhalakhi wambuza wathi: “Alo, uSomnini utheni?”" 
Numbers23:18 UBhiliyamu waphimisa umlayezo okuye wathi: “Sikima wena Bhalakhi, ulalele, iye, lalela kuhle wena msa kaTsipori:" 
Numbers23:19 UZimu akasuye umuntu bona angabeze aleye amala, namkha indodana yomuntu bona angabeze aphenduke. Uyakhuluma yena angenzi na? Uyathembisa angaphethi na?" 
Numbers23:20 Yelela-ke mina ngamukele umyalo wokubusisa, yena ubusisile, yeke mina angeze ngakuphendula lokho." 
Numbers23:21 KwaJakopo akufunyanwa iinthuweleliso, akubonwa umonakalo kwa-Israyeli. USomnini uZimabo unabo, ukusasela kwabo uSomnini kuphakathi kwabo." 
Numbers23:22 UZimu wabakhupha eGibhide, kibo unjengeempondo zekukhama." 
Numbers23:23 Kwamambala awukho umlingo ongaphumelela kuJakopo, akukho ukufunisela okungajamelana no-Israyeli. UZimu ukhuluma ngoJakopo ngesikhathi esifaneleko, iye, uZimu ngokwakhe uhlosa okuzokwenzeka ngo-Israyeli." 
Numbers23:24 Isizwesi sifana nengwenyamakazi esikimako, iye, sifana nengwenyama ezisikimisako; ayilali phasi ingakadli inyamazana, ikhothe iingazi zesibandana esidabulileko.”" 
Numbers23:25 Nje-ke uBhalakhi wathi kuBhiliyamu: “Khona-ke nakube awubathiyi ngemilingo, ungababusisi!”" 
Numbers23:26 Kodwana uBhiliyamu waphendula uBhalakhi wathi: “Angitjho ngikutjelile bona kufuze ngenze kwaphela lokho uSomnini akutjhwileko.” 
Numbers23:27 UBhalakhi wathi kuBhiliyamu: “Namba khengikuthathe ngikuse kenye indawo. Mhlambe nawulapho kungahle kuthokozise uZimu bona ungithiyele abantwaba ngemilingo.” 
Numbers23:28 Nje-ke uBhalakhi wathatha uBhiliyamu wamusa esiqongweni sePewori lapha umuntu angabona khona iJetjhimoni. 
Numbers23:29 UBhiliyamu wathi kuBhalakhi: “Yewungakhele ama-aldari alikhomba bese ungilethela iinkunzi ezilikhomba namaqama alikhomba.” 
Numbers23:30 Mbala uBhalakhi wenza njengombana uBhiliyamu atjhwile bewanikela ngekunzi nangeqama e-aldarini elinye nelinye. 
Numbers24:1 Kwathi lokha uBhiliyamu nakabona bona okuhle kuSomnini kukobana abusise ama-Israyeli, azange aphendukele emilingweni njengesiqhelo, kodwana waqala erhalawumbeni." 
Numbers24:2 Kwathi lokha nakaphakamisa amehlwakhe, wabona u-Israyeli ahlome amatendakhe ikoro ngekoro. UMoya kaZimu wehlela phezu kwakhe," 
Numbers24:3 waphimisa umlayezwakhe wathi: “Isitjho sakaBhiliyamu umsa kaBhewori, isitjho somuntu onelihlo elibukhali," 
Numbers24:4 isitjho somuntu olalela amezwi kaZimu, nobona isambulo soSabekako, obona kuhle nakasemmoyeni:" 
Numbers24:5 Maye mahle kangangani amatendakho Jakopo, imitlhatlhanakho wena Israyeli!" 
Numbers24:6 Anjengemithi emide yamasundu, nanjengeemvande ezimagegana nomlambo, nanjengesilele esitjalwa nguSomnini, nanjengemithi yomsedari emile hlanu kwamanzi." 
Numbers24:7 Amanzi azakukhelelwa ngeenkhwama zabo zesikhumba, nembewabo izakuba namanzi aneleko. Ikosabo izakuphakamela ngehla kwaka-Agagi, nombuswayo uzakuphakanyiswa." 
Numbers24:8 UZimu wabakhupha eGibhide, kibo unjengeempondo zekukhama. Bazakuginya izizwe ezizizitha zabo bephule amathambazo abe ziinquqwana, baphihlize ababagandelelako." 
Numbers24:9 Bayakhothama bazigedagede phasi njengebhubezi nanjengebhubezikazi; akakho ongalinga ukubavusa! Abanibusisako bazakubusiswa, nabaninikelelako bazakunikelelwa.”" 
Numbers24:10 Ilaka lakaBhalakhi lavutha kuBhiliyamu, wathintitha izandla wathi: “Ngikubizele bona uzongithiyela izitha zami ngemilingo! Qala-ke wena uzibusise bekwaba kathathu!" 
Numbers24:11 Yeke goduka khona nje, utjhinge ekhenu. Bengithi ngizokuvuza kuhle, kodwana uSomnini ukwenze bona ungavuzeki.”" 
Numbers24:12 UBhiliyamu wathi kuBhalakhi: “Angitjho ngizitjelile iinthunywa ogade uzithume kimi ngathi," 
Numbers24:13 ‘Nanyana uBhalakhi gade angangipha isigodlo sakhe sigcwele isiliva negolide bengingeze ngeqa umyalo kaSomnini ngenze okuhle namkha okumbi. Kwaphela lokho uSomnini athi ngikutjho.’ 
Numbers24:14 Iye, ngiyagoduka-ke nje, ngiya ekhethu. Yizapha ngikulemukise bona abantwaba bazokwenzani ebantwini bakho ngomuso.”" 
Numbers24:15 Nje-ke godu uBhiliyamu waphimisa umlayezwakhe wathi: “Isitjho sakaBhiliyamu umsa kaBhewori, isitjho somuntu onelihlo elibukhali," 
Numbers24:16 isitjho somuntu olalela amezwi kaZimu, owazi ilwazi lakaZimu ongoPhezulu, obona isambulo soSabekako nobona kuhle nakasemmoyeni:" 
Numbers24:17 Ngiyambona yena kodwana ingasi manjesi, ngiyambona kodwana ingasi eduze. Iye, ikwekwezi izakuvumbuka kuJakopo, intonga yobukhosi izakuvela ku-Israyeli; izakuphihliza iindlani zombili zakwaMowabi, neenhloko zamaTjhethi woke." 
Numbers24:18 U-Edomu uzakuba sisabelo sayo, iye, uSeyiri, isitha sayo, uzakuba sisabelo. Iye, u-Israyeli uzakubonisa amandlakhe" 
Numbers24:19 lokha loyo ovela kuJakopo nakabusako. Uzakubhubhisa abasindileko emadorobheni.” 
Numbers24:20 Nje-ke uBhiliyamu waqala ngaku-Amalekhi waphimisa umlayezwakhe wathi: “U-Amalekhi uyindlondlo hlangana nezizwe kodwana ekugcineni uzakuwa ngephondo.” 
Numbers24:21 UBhiliyamu waqala amaKheni waphimisa umlayezwakhe wathi: “Indawakho yokuhlala ingeyasafuthi, isihlakana sakho sakhiwe edwaleni." 
Numbers24:22 Kodwana uKhayini uzokutjhiswa. Akuzukuba kade bona u-Asiriya akuthumbe.”
