Numbers24:23 UBhiliyamu waphimisa nomlayezo lo: “Maye! Kazi ngubani ozakuphila lokha uZimu nakenza lokho? 
Numbers24:24 Iye, kuzakuvela iinthayamanzi endaweni yamaKithi, zihlunguphaze u-Asiriya no-Ebhere; kanti-ke no-Asiriya uzakuhloma ngephondo phasi.”" 
Numbers24:25 Nje-ke uBhiliyamu wasikima wagoduka waya ekhabo. UBhalakhi naye wabona eze ngayo. 
Numbers25:1 Kwathi lokha ama-Israyeli asahlezi eTjhithimu, amadoda athoma ukungwadla namadodakazi wakwaMowabi." 
Numbers25:2 Amadodakazi lawo awamema emihlatjelweni yabozinyana bawo. Amadoda lawo adla abe alotjha abozinyana bamadodakazi lawo. 
Numbers25:3 Ngalokho ama-Israyeli azibophelela kuBhali wePewori. Nje-ke ilaka lakaSomnini lavutha ngama-Israyeli 
Numbers25:4 bewathi kuMosi: “Thatha boke abarholi babantwaba bese ubaphanyeka babe selangeni phambi kwakaSomnini ukuze ilaka lakaSomnini lizokwazi ukusuka kuma-Israyeli.” 
Numbers25:5 Yeke uMosi wathi ebagwebini bakwa-Israyeli: “Omunye nomunye wenu akabulale abantu abengameleko abazibophelele kuBhali wePewori.” 
Numbers25:6 Khonapho, nango omunye wama-Israyeli aletha umfazi wakwaMidiyani emndeninakhe, uMosi nomkhambathi woke wakwa-Israyeli baqalile. Ngesikhatheso bebasalila phambi kwetende lokuhlanganela." 
Numbers25:7 Kwathi lokha uFiniyasi umsa ka-Elazara omsa ka-Aroni umphristi nakabona lokho, wasikima watjhiya umkhambathi, wathatha umkhontwakhe," 
Numbers25:8 walandela umuntu wakwa-Israyeli loyo ngencabafazi ngetendeni. Kwathi basalele wabahlaba bobabili, indoda nomfazi loyo, umkhonto waphundlukela esiswini somfazi. Emva kwalokho isifo sasuka kuma-Israyeli." 
Numbers25:9 Labo ebegade sele bafe ngesifo bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nane. 
Numbers25:10 USomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Numbers25:11 “UFiniyasi umsa ka-Elazara omsa ka-Aroni umphristi, urhobhise ilaka lami kuma-Israyeli ngombana yena ube netjisakalo ngami. Ngalokho akhange ngiwabhubhise ama-Israyeli ngesikhwele enginaso." 
Numbers25:12 Yeke mtjele bona ngenza naye isivumelwano sokuthula: 
Numbers25:13 Yena neenzukulwana zakhe bazakwamukeliswa isivumelwano sobuphristi nini nanini ngombana ube nesikhwele ngoZimakhe, wabuye wenzela ama-Israyeli itethelelo.”" 
Numbers25:14 Ibizo lendoda yakwa-Israyeli eyabulawa nomfazi wakwaMidiyani bekunguZimri umsa kaSalu oyihloko yomndeni wakwaSimiyoni. 
Numbers25:15 Ibizo lomfazi wakwaMidiyani owabulawako bekunguKozibi indodakazi kaTsuri oyihloko yemindeni yekoro yakwaMidiyani. 
Numbers25:16 USomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Numbers25:17 “Phathani amaMidiyani njengezitha zenu bese niyawabulala," 
Numbers25:18 ngombana nawo aniphatha njengezitha ngobuqili bawo lokha nakaniyenga ngendaba yePewori. Kwaba njalo nangendaba kadadwawo uKozibi indodakazi yomrholi wakwaMidiyani, owabulawa ngelanga lesifo esabangwa yiPewori.”" 
Numbers26:1 Ngemva kwalokho uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi no-Elazara umsa ka-Aroni umphristi wathi: 
Numbers26:2 “Balani woke umkhambathi wama-Israyeli ngemindeni yaboyise, okutjho boke abaduna abasele balungele ukuya epini ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu.”" 
Numbers26:3 Nje-ke uMosi no-Elazara umphristi bakhuluma nama-Israyeli kwaMowabi ngemrhobeni weJordani malungana neJerikho bonyana 
Numbers26:4 kutloliswe abaduna ukusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukuya phezulu. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi. Ama-Israyeli aphuma enarheni yeGibhide nakabalwa nguMosi bekungilawa: 
Numbers26:5 Lezi bekuziinzukulwana zakaRubeni izibulo laka-Israyeli: uRhanoko owabeletha umndeni wamaRhanoko, uPalu owabeletha umndeni wamaPalu," 
Numbers26:6 uRhetsironi owabeletha umndeni wamaRhetsironi, uKarimi owabeletha umndeni wamaKarimi." 
Numbers26:7 Leyo-ke bekumindeni yakaRubeni. Labo abatlolisweko bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane nantathu namakhulu alikhomba namatjhumi amathathu. 
Numbers26:8 Indodana kaPalu bekungu-Eliyabu. 
Numbers26:9 Amadodana ka-Eliyabu kunguNemuweli, uDatani no-Abiramu. (Laba bekunguDatani no-Abiramu abakhethwa emkhambathini. Ngibo abaphikisana noMosi no-Aroni ejimeni lakaKhorarhi. Ngalokho bebaphikisana noSomnini." 
Numbers26:10 Iphasi lavula umlomalo labaginya kanye noKhorarhi. Ijima lamadoda amakhulu amabili namatjhumi amahlanu lafa ngokuqothulwa mlilo. Ngendlela leyo abantwaba baba sitjengiso sesiyeleliso. 
Numbers26:11 Nokho amadodana kaKhorarhi akhange ahlongakale.) 
Numbers26:12 Lezi bekuziinzukulwana zakaSimiyoni ngokwemindenazo: uNemuweli owabeletha umndeni wamaNemuweli, uJamini owabeletha umndeni wamaJamini, uJakini owabeletha umndeni wamaJakini," 
Numbers26:13 uZerarhi owabeletha umndeni wamaZerarhi, uSawula owabeletha umndeni wamaSawula." 
Numbers26:14 Leyo-ke bekumindeni yakaSimiyoni. Labo abatlolisweko bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nambili namakhulu amabili. 
Numbers26:15 Lezi bekuziinzukulwana zakaGadi ngokwemindenazo: uTsefoni owabeletha umndeni wamaTsefoni, uRhagi owabeletha umndeni wamaRhagi, uTjhuni owabeletha umndeni wamaTjhuni," 
Numbers26:16 u-Ozini owabeletha umndeni wama-Ozini, u-Eri owabeletha umndeni wama-Eri," 
Numbers26:17 u-Arodi owabeletha umndeni wama-Arodi, u-Areli owabeletha umndeni wama-Areli." 
Numbers26:18 Leyo-ke bekumindeni yakaGadi. Labo abatlolisweko bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane namakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers26:19 U-Eri no-Onani bekumadodana kaJuda, kodwana bahlongakalela enarheni yeKanana." 
Numbers26:20 Lezi bekuziinzukulwana zakaJuda ngokwemindenazo: uTjhela owabeletha umndeni wamaTjhela, uPeretsi owabeletha umndeni wamaPeretsi, uZerarhi owabeletha umndeni wamaZerarhi." 
Numbers26:21 Amadodana kaPeretsi bekunguRhetsironi owabeletha umndeni wamaRhetsironi noRhamulu owabeletha umndeni wamaRhamulu. 
Numbers26:22 Leyo-ke bekumindeni yakaJuda. Labo abatlolisweko bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi alikhomba nathandathu namakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers26:23 Lezi bekuziinzukulwana zaka-Isakari ngokwemindenazo: uTola owabeletha umndeni wamaTola, uPuva owabeletha umndeni wamaPuni," 
Numbers26:24 uJatjhubi owabeletha umndeni wamaJatjhubi, uTjhimroni owabeletha umndeni wamaTjhimroni." 
Numbers26:25 Leyo-ke bekumindeni yaka-Isakari. Labo abatlolisweko bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi asithandathu nane namakhulu amathathu. 
Numbers26:26 Lezi bekuziinzukulwana zakaZebuloni ngokwemindenazo: uSeredi owabeletha umndeni wamaSeredi, u-Eloni owabeletha umndeni wama-Eloni, uJarhiliyeli owabeletha umndeni wamaJarhiliyeli." 
Numbers26:27 Leyo-ke bekumindeni yakaZebuloni. Labo abatlolisweko bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi asithandathu namakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers26:28 Amadodana kaJosefa bekunguManase no-Efrayimu. 
Numbers26:29 Lezi bekuziinzukulwana zakaManase ngokwemindenazo: uMakiri owabeletha umndeni wamaMakiri, uGiliyadi umsa kaMakiri owabeletha umndeni wamaGiliyadi." 
Numbers26:30 Nanzi-ke iinzukulwana zakaGiliyadi: u-Iyezeri owabeletha umndeni wama-Iyezeri, uRhelekhi owabeletha umndeni wamaRhelekhi," 
Numbers26:31 u-Asriyeli owabeletha umndeni wama-Asriyeli, uTjhekemu owabeletha umndeni wamaTjhekemu," 
Numbers26:32 uTjhemida owabeletha umndeni wamaTjhemida, uRheferi owabeletha umndeni wamaRheferi." 
Numbers26:33 (UTselofirhadi umsa kaRheferi gade anganawo amadodana kodwana amadodakazi kwaphela, amabizwawo bekunguMarhila, uNoya, uRhogila, uMilika noTiritsa.)" 
Numbers26:34 Leyo-ke bekumindeni kaManase. Labo abatlolisweko bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu nambili namakhulu alikhomba. 
Numbers26:35 Nanzi-ke iinzukulwana zaka-Efrayimu ngokwemindenazo: uTjhutelarhi owabeletha umndeni wamaTjhutelarhi, uBhekeri owabeletha umndeni wamaBhekeri, uTarhani owabeletha umndeni wamaTarhani." 
Numbers26:36 Iinzukulwana zakaTjhutelarhi bekuma-Erani abelethwa ngu-Erani. 
Numbers26:37 Leyo-ke bekumindeni yaka-Efrayimu. Labo abatlolisweko bebaziinkuluwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nambili namakhulu amahlanu. Zoke lezo bekuziinzukulwana zakaJosefa ngokwemindenazo. 
Numbers26:38 Lezi bekuziinzukulwana zakaBhenjamini ngokwemindenazo: uBhela owabeletha umndeni wamaBhela, u-Atjhibhela owabeletha umndeni wama-Atjhibhela, u-Arhiramu owabeletha umndeni wama-Arhiramu," 
Numbers26:39 uTjhefufamu owabeletha umndeni wamaTjhefufamu, uRhufamu owabeletha umndeni wamaRhufamu." 
Numbers26:40 Amadodana kaBhela bekungu-Aridi noNamani; u-Aridi wabeletha umndeni wama-Aridi, uNamani wabeletha umndeni wamaNamani." 
Numbers26:41 Lezo-ke bekuziinzukulwana zakaBhenjamini ngokwemindenazo. Labo abatlolisweko bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane nahlanu namakhulu asithandathu. 
Numbers26:42 Nanzi iinzukulwana zakaDani ngokwemindenazo: uTjhurhamu owabeletha umndeni wamaTjhurhamu. Lezo-ke bekuziinzukulwana zakaDani. 
Numbers26:43 Woke umndeni wakaTjhurhamu owatloliswako bewuziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi asithandathu nane namakhulu amane. 
Numbers26:44 Lezi bekuziinzukulwana zaka-Atjheri ngokwemindenazo: uJimna owabeletha umndeni wamaJimna, uJitjhivi owabeletha umndeni wamaJitjhivi, uBheriya owabeletha umndeni wamaBheriya." 
Numbers26:45 Amadodana kaBheriya bekunguRhebhere owabeletha umndeni wamaRhebhere uMalikiyeli owabeletha umndeni wamaMalikiyeli. 
Numbers26:46 (U-Atjheri gade anendodakazi ekuthiwa nguSerarhi.) 
Numbers26:47 Leyo-ke bekumindeni yaka-Atjheri. Labo abatlolisweko bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu nantathu namakhulu amane. 
Numbers26:48 Lezi bekuziinzukulwana zakaNafitali ngokwemindenazo: uJarhitsiyeli owabeletha umndeni wamaJarhitsiyeli, uGuni owabeletha umndeni wamaGuni," 
Numbers26:49 uJetseri owabeletha umndeni wamaJetseri, uTjhilemu owabeletha umndeni wamaTjhilemu." 
Numbers26:50 Leyo-ke bekumindeni yakaNafitali. Labo abatlolisweko bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane nahlanu namakhulu amane. 
Numbers26:51 Boke abatlolisweko bama-Israyeli bebaziinkulungwana ezimakhulu asithandathu nanye namakhulu alikhomba namatjhumi amathathu. 
Numbers26:52 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers26:53 “Inarha izakwabelwa abantwabo ibe lilifa labo ngokuya ngesibalo samabizo. 
Numbers26:54 Ikoro enesibalo esikhulu izakwabelwa inarha ekulu, kuthi enesibalo esincani yabelwe inarha encani. Ikoro nekoro izakwabelwa ilifa layo ngokuya ngesibalo sabatlolisweko bayo." 
Numbers26:55 Inarha kufuze yabiwe ngefumbe. Izakuba lilifa ngokuya ngamabizo weenkoro zaboyisemkhulu. 
Numbers26:56 Woke amafa wekoro ekulu nencani azakwabiwa ngefumbe.” 
Numbers26:57 Napa-ke abatlolisweko bamaLevi ngokwemindenabo: uGeritjhoni owabeletha umndeni wamaGeritjhoni, uKhehathi owabeletha umndeni wamaKhehathi, uMerari owabeletha umndeni wamaMerari." 
Numbers26:58 Godu eminye imindeni yamaLevi bekunginasi: umndeni wamaLibini, umndeni wamaRhebroni, umndeni wamaMarhili, umndeni wamaMutjhi, umndeni wamaKhorarhi. (UKhehathi wabeletha u-Amramu." 
Numbers26:59 Ibizo lomka-Amramu bekunguJokobedi indodakazi kaLevi eyabelethelwa eGibhide. Yena wabeletha u-Aroni, uMosi nodadwabo uMiriyamu." 
Numbers26:60 U-Aroni bekanguyise kaNadaba, u-Abihu, u-Elazara no-Itamara." 
Numbers26:61 Kodwana uNadaba no-Abihu bahlongakala lokha nabathi banikela ngamalahle atjhili phambi kwakaSomnini.) 
Numbers26:62 Boke abaduna abatlolisweko bamaLevi ukusukela esaneni lenyanga ukuya phezulu bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nantathu. Bona azange batloliswe kanye nama-Israyeli ngombana akhange bamukele ilifa lenarha hlangana nama-Israyeli. 
Numbers26:63 Labo-ke babantu abatloliswa nguMosi no-Elazara umphristi lokha nabatlolisa ama-Israyeli kwaMowabi ngemrhobeni weJordani malungana neJerikho. 
Numbers26:64 Isibalo sabantu abatloliswekwaba, asifaki noyedwa walabo abatloliswa nguMosi no-Aroni umphristi erhalawumbeni leSinayi," 
Numbers26:65 ngombana uSomnini bekathe ngabo: “Ngambala bazakufela erhalawumbeni.” Yeke akhange kusale namunye wabo ngaphandle kwakaKalebi umsa kaJefune noJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni. 
Numbers27:1 UTselofirhadi gade alilunga lekoro kaManase. Gade ayindodana kaRheferi umsa kaGiliyadi omsa kaMakiri umsa kaManase omsa kaJosefa. Amabizo wamadodakazakhe bekunguMarhila, uNoya, uRhogila, uMilika noTiritsa. Amadodakazi lawo atjhidela" 
Numbers27:2 afese ajama phambi kwakaMosi, u-Elazara umphristi, abaphathi kanye nomkhambathi woke emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela athi:" 
Numbers27:3 “Ubaba wahlongakalela erhalawumbeni. Nokho-ke yena gade angekho hlangana nejima lakaKhorarhi elajamelana noSomnini. Wase wazihlongakalela ngesono sakhe, anganandodana." 
Numbers27:4 Alo, ukungabi kwakhe namadodana ngilo ibanga elenza bona ibizo lakhe lingasabalwa emndeninakhe na? Nje-ke siphani isabelo senarha hlangana nabafowabo kababa.”" 
Numbers27:5 UMosi waletha indaba yamadodakazi lawo phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Numbers27:6 USomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Numbers27:7 “Amadodakazi kaTselofirhadi akhuluma iqiniso. Kufuze uwanikele isabelo selifa hlangana nabafowabo kayisawo bese wenza bona ilifa lakayisawo lidlulele kiwo. 
Numbers27:8 Begodu khuluma nama-Israyeli uthi, ‘Lokha indoda nayihlongakala inganandodana, nizakudlulisela ilifa layo endodakazinayo." 
Numbers27:9 Nangabe ayinandodakazi, nikelani ilifa layo kubafowayo." 
Numbers27:10 Nayinganabafowayo, nikelani ilifa layo kubafowaboyise." 
Numbers27:11 Nangabe ayinabo abafowaboyise, nikelani ilifelo kosihlobo sayo seengazi esitjhidelene khulu nayo kube sisabelo sakhe. Lokho kuzakuba simiso somthetho kuma-Israyeli njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: “Khuphuka intaba ye-Abhiramu le bese ubona inarha engiyinikele ama-Israyeli. 
Numbers27:13 Kuzakuthi nasele uyibonile, nawe uzakulandela aboyihlomkhulu njengomfowenu u-Aroni." 
Numbers27:14 Lokhu kungenca yokobana nafulathela umyalwami erhalawumbeni leTsini ngesikhathi umkhambathi ungisola begodu akhange nikhombise ukungihlonipha emehlweni wama-Israyeli.” (Lokho kwenzeka emanzini weMeriba yeKhadetjhi ngerhalawumbeni leTsini.) 
Numbers27:15 UMosi waphendula uSomnini wathi: 
Numbers27:16 “USomnini uZimu wemiphefumulo yenyama yoke, akakhombe umuntu ozakuba ngaphezu komkhambathi lo," 
Numbers27:17 kube mumuntu ozawurhola epini, akhambe phambi kwawo njengomelusi ukuze umkhambathi kaSomnini ungabi njengezimvu ezingenamelusi.”" 
Numbers27:18 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Thatha uJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni okuyindoda enommoya, umbeke izandla" 
Numbers27:19 bese umtjhideza phambi kwaka-Elazara umphristi naphambi komkhambathi woke, umgunyaze phambi kwabo boke." 
Numbers27:20 Mnikele amanye wamagunya onawo ukuze ama-Israyeli amlalele. 
Numbers27:21 Yena uzakujama e-aldarini phambi kwaka-Elazara umphristi ozakumbuzela isiphetho se-urimi kuSomnini. Isiphethweso ngiso esizakuqunta bona baphume ipi namkha bangaphumi. Iye, isiphethweso simayelana noJotjhuwa nama-Israyeli woke anaye, okutjho umkhambathi woke.”" 
Numbers27:22 Mbala uMosi wenza njengombana uSomnini amyalile: Wathatha uJotjhuwa wamjamisa phambi kwaka-Elazara umphristi nomkhambathi woke," 
Numbers27:23 wabeka izandla phezu kwakhe wamgunyaza njengombana uSomnini bekamyalile. 
Numbers28:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers28:2 “Yala ama-Israyeli uthi kiwo, ‘Yelelani bona kulethwa kimi ngesikhathi esifaneleko iminikelwami okutjho ukudla okumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukelekako kimi.’" 
Numbers28:3 “Godu yithi kiwo, ‘Naku umnikelo okhethekileko enizawunikela kuSomnini: Amaqamanyana amabili anomnyaka munye abe msulwa, kube mhlabelo wokutjhiswa onikelwa imihla ngemihla." 
Numbers28:4 Kunikelwe linye ekuseni, linye ngamarhwaqela." 
Numbers28:5 Umhlabelo lowo awukhambisane nokwetjhumi kwakapumpana womnikelo weenthoro okuyiflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngelitha nesiquntu samafutha we-oliva. 
Numbers28:6 Lowo kumhlabelo wokutjhiswa wesikhathi soke owasungulwa entabeni yeSinayi bona ube mnikelo okhethekileko, owamukelekako kuSomnini." 
Numbers28:7 Iqamanyana linye alikhambisane nelitha nesiquntu somnikelo wokuselwako. Umnikelo wokuselwako obutjwala lowo awuthululelwe endaweni ecwengileko phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Numbers28:8 Iqamanyana elinye olinikela ngamarhwaqela, linikele nomnikelo weenthoro newokuselwako kube njenganyana wenze kelekuseni. Linikele libe njengomnikelo okhethekileko owamukelekako kuSomnini.’ ”" 
Numbers28:9 “ ‘Ngelanga leSabatha umhlabelo akube maqamanyana amabili anomnyaka munye abe msulwa, namathungana amathathu weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva kube mnikelo weenthoro kanye nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako." 
Numbers28:10 Lokho kuzakuba mhlabelo wokutjhiswa wangamaSabatha, ngaphandle komhlabelo wokutjhiswa wangemihla nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako.’ ”" 
Numbers28:11 “Ekuthomeni kwenyanga enye nenye, nikelani umhlabelo wokutjhiswa kuSomnini: iinkunzana ezimbili, iqama linye namaqamanyana alikhomba anomnyaka munye abe msulwa." 
Numbers28:12 Ikunzana enye nenye niyinikele kanye namathungana amathathu weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva kube mnikelo weenthoro. Iqamelo alikhambisane namathungana amabili weflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva kube mnikelo weenthoro. 
Numbers28:13 Iqamanyana ngalinye alikhambisane nethungana leflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva kube mnikelo weenthoro. Linikele libe mhlabelo wokutjhiswa, njengomnikelo okhethekileko owamukelekako kuSomnini." 
Numbers28:14 Umnikelo wokuselwako okhambisana nekunzana enye nenye uzakuba malitha amane wewayini. Umnikelo wokuselwako okhambisana neqama uzakuba malitha amabili nesiquntu bese okhambisana neqamanyana kube lilitha nesiquntu. Lokho kuzakuba mhlabelo wokutjhiswa waqobe yinyanga umnyaka woke. 
Numbers28:15 Ninikele nepongo yinye kube mhlabelo wehlambululo kuSomnini, ngaphandle komhlabelo wokutjhiswa ojayelekileko nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako.”" 
Numbers28:16 “IPhasika lakaSomnini lizakuba elangeni letjhumi nane, ngenyanga yokuthoma emnyakeni." 
Numbers28:17 Ngelanga letjhumi nahlanu lenyanga leyo kufuze kube nomnyanya, kudliwe isikwa esinganangumelo amalanga alikhomba." 
Numbers28:18 Elangeni lokuthoma lomnyanya nizakuba nomhlangano okhethekileko, nje-ke mhlokho ningawuthinti umsebenzi." 
Numbers28:19 Nikelani umhlabelo wokutjhiswa okumnikelo okhethekileko kuSomnini: iinkunzana ezimbili, iqama elilodwa namaqamanyana alikhomba anomnyaka munye. Qinisekisani bona zoke iinlwanezo zimsulwa." 
Numbers28:20 Kufuze ninikele imihlabelo leyo neminikelo yeenthoro yeflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva. Ikunzana enye nenye ikhambisane namathungana amathathu weflowuru bese iqama nalo likhambisane namathungana amabili weflowuru leyo. 
Numbers28:21 Elinye nelinye iqamanyana kilawo alikhomba, nilinikele nethungana leflowuru leyo." 
Numbers28:22 Godu kube nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo bonyana nizenzele itethelelo kuSomnini. 
Numbers28:23 Nizakunikela ngalokho ngaphandle kweminikelo yokutjhiswa ejayelekileko eyenziwa njalo ekuseni. 
Numbers28:24 Ngendlela efanako imihla ngemihla nizakunikela ukudla okumnikelo okhethekileko owamukelekako kuSomnini nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako. Iminikelo leyo izakunikelwa amalanga alikhomba ngaphandle kwemihlabelo yokutjhiswa ejayelekileko. 
Numbers28:25 Elangeni lekhomba lomnyanya nizakuba nomhlangano okhethekileko, nje-ke mhlokho ningawuthinti umsebenzi.”" 
Numbers28:26 “Ngelanga eniletha ngalo umnikelo weenthoro ezitja wesilumo kuSomnini, okutjho emnyanyeni weemVeke, yibani nomhlangano okhethekileko, nje-ke mhlokho ningawuthinti umsebenzi." 
Numbers28:27 Nikelani umhlabelo wokutjhiswa owamukelekako kuSomnini: iinkunzana ezimbili, iqama elilodwa namaqamanyana alikhomba anomnyaka munye." 
Numbers28:28 Kufuze ninikele imihlabelo leyo neminikelo yeenthoro yeflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva. Ikunzana enye nenye ikhambisane namathungana amathathu weflowuru bese iqama nalo likhambisane namathungana amabili weflowuru leyo. 
Numbers28:29 Elinye nelinye iqamanyana kilawo alikhomba, nilinikele nethungana leflowuru leyo." 
Numbers28:30 Godu kube nepongo bonyana nizenzele itethelelo kuSomnini. 
Numbers28:31 Nizakunikela ngalokho kanye neminikelo yakhona yokuselwako, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutjhiswa ojayelekileko nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro. Qinisekisani bona zoke iinlwanezo zimsulwa.”" 
Numbers29:1 “ ‘Ngelanga lokuthoma enyangeni yekhomba nizakuba nehlangano ekhethekileko, nje-ke mhlokho ningawuthinti umsebenzi. Lelo kulilanga lokuvuthela iimporompita." 
Numbers29:2 Nikelani umhlabelo wokutjhiswa owamukelekako kuSomnini: ikunzana eyodwa, iqama elilodwa namaqamanyana alikhomba anomnyaka munye. Qinisekisani bona zoke iinlwanezo zimsulwa." 
Numbers29:3 Kufuze ninikele imihlabelo leyo neminikelo yeenthoro yeflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva. Ikunzana ikhambisane namathungana amathathu weflowuru bese iqama nalo likhambisane namathungana amabili weflowuru leyo. 
Numbers29:4 Elinye nelinye iqamanyana kilawo alikhomba, nilinikele nethungana linye leflowuru leyo." 
Numbers29:5 Godu kube nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo bonyana nizenzele itethelelo kuSomnini. 
Numbers29:6 Nizakunikela ngalokho kube mnikelo okhethekileko, owamukelekako kuSomnini ngaphandle kwemihlabelo yokutjhiswa yokuthwasa kwenyanga neminikelo yakhona yeenthoro. Godu ngaphandle kwemihlabelo yokutjhiswa ejayelekileko neminikelo yakhona yeenthoro kanye neminikelo yakhona yokuselwako. Lokho kube ngokwemikhuba yakhona.’ ”" 
Numbers29:7 “ ‘Ngenyanga yekhomba lokha nayinamalanga alitjhumi nizakuba nomhlangano okhethekileko nizile ukudla. Nje-ke mhlokho ningawuthinti umsebenzi. 
Numbers29:8 Nikelani umhlabelo wokutjhiswa owamukelekako kuSomnini: ikunzana eyodwa, iqama elilodwa namaqamanyana alikhomba anomnyaka munye, koke kube msulwa." 
Numbers29:9 Kufuze ninikele imihlabelo leyo neminikelo yeenthoro yeflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva. Ikunzana ikhambisane namathungana amathathu weflowuru bese iqama nalo likhambisane namathungana amabili weflowuru leyo. 
Numbers29:10 Elinye nelinye iqamanyana kilawo alikhomba, nilinikele nethungana linye leflowuru leyo." 
Numbers29:11 Godu kube nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo, ngaphandle komhlabelo wehlambululo okwenziwa ngawo itethelelo nangaphandle komhlabelo wokutjhiswa ojayelekileko nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro kanye nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako.’ ”" 
Numbers29:12 “ ‘Ngelanga letjhumi nahlanu enyangeni yekhomba nizakuba nomhlangano okhethekileko. Mhlokho ningawuthinti umsebenzi, kodwana nigidinge umnyanya kaSomnini amalanga alikhomba." 
Numbers29:13 Ninikele umhlabelo wokutjhiswa okumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukelekako kuSomnini: iinkunzana ezilitjhumi nanthathu, amaqama amabili namaqamanyana alitjhumi nane anomnyaka munye; koke kube msulwa." 
Numbers29:14 Kufuze ninikele imihlabelo leyo neminikelo yeenthoro yeflowuru esefiweko edutjwe ngamafutha we-oliva. Enye nenye yeenkunzana ezilitjhumi nanthathu kumele ikhambisane namathungana amathathu weflowuru bese elinye nelinye iqama nalo likhambisane namathungana amabili weflowuru leyo. 
Numbers29:15 Elinye nelinye iqamanyana kilawo alitjhumi nane, nilinikele nethungana linye leflowuru leyo." 
Numbers29:16 Godu kube nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo, ngaphandle komhlabelo wokutjhiswa ojayelekileko nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro kanye nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako." 
Numbers29:17 “ ‘Ngelanga lesibili nikelani iinkunzana ezilitjhumi nambili, amaqama amabili namaqamanyana alitjhumi nane anomnyaka munye, koke kube msulwa." 
Numbers29:18 Kesinye nesinye isibalo seenkunzana, amaqama namaqamanyana lawo, kunikelwe iminikelo yeenthoro kanye neyokuselwako njengokwesimiso sakhona." 
Numbers29:19 Godu kube nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo, ngaphandle komhlabelo wokutjhiswa ojayelekileko nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro kanye nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako." 
Numbers29:20 “ ‘Ngelanga lesithathu ninikele ngeenkunzana ezilitjhumi nanye, amaqama amabili namaqamanyana alitjhumi nane anomnyaka munye, koke kube msulwa." 
Numbers29:21 Kesinye nesinye isibalo seenkunzana, amaqama namaqamanyana lawo, kunikelwe iminikelo yeenthoro kanye neyokuselwako njengokwesimiso sakhona." 
Numbers29:22 Godu kube nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo, ngaphandle komhlabelo wokutjhiswa ojayelekileko nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro kanye nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako." 
Numbers29:23 “ ‘Ngelanga lesine ninikele ngeenkunzana ezilitjhumi, amaqama amabili namaqamanyana alitjhumi nane anomnyaka munye, koke kube msulwa." 
Numbers29:24 Kesinye nesinye isibalo seenkunzana, amaqama namaqamanyana lawo, kunikelwe iminikelo yeenthoro kanye neyokuselwako njengokwesimiso sakhona." 
Numbers29:25 Godu kube nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo, ngaphandle komhlabelo wokutjhiswa ojayelekileko nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro kanye nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako." 
Numbers29:26 “ ‘Ngelanga lesihlanu ninikele ngeenkunzana ezilithoba, amaqama amabili namaqamanyana alitjhumi nane anomnyaka munye, koke kube msulwa." 
Numbers29:27 Kesinye nesinye isibalo seenkunzana, amaqama namaqamanyana lawo, kunikelwe iminikelo yeenthoro kanye neyokuselwako njengokwesimiso sakhona." 
Numbers29:28 Godu kube nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo, ngaphandle komhlabelo wokutjhiswa ojayelekileko nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro kanye nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako." 
Numbers29:29 “ ‘Ngelanga lesithandathu ninikele ngeenkunzana ezibunane, amaqama amabili namaqamanyana alitjhumi nane anomnyaka munye, koke kube msulwa." 
Numbers29:30 Kesinye nesinye isibalo seenkunzana, amaqama namaqamanyana lawo, kunikelwe iminikelo yeenthoro kanye neyokuselwako njengokwesimiso sakhona." 
Numbers29:31 Godu kube nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo, ngaphandle komhlabelo wokutjhiswa ojayelekileko nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro kanye nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako." 
Numbers29:32 “ ‘Ngelanga lekhomba ninikele ngeenkunzana ezilikhomba, amaqama amabili namaqamanyana alitjhumi nane anomnyaka munye, koke kube msulwa." 
Numbers29:33 Kesinye nesinye isibalo seenkunzana, amaqama namaqamanyana lawo, kunikelwe iminikelo yeenthoro kanye neyokuselwako njengokwesimiso sakhona." 
Numbers29:34 Godu kube nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo, ngaphandle komhlabelo wokutjhiswa ojayelekileko nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro kanye nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako." 
Numbers29:35 “ ‘Ngelanga lobunane nizakuba nomgidi omkhulu, nje-ke mhlokho ningawuthinti umsebenzi." 
Numbers29:36 Ninikele umhlabelo wokutjhiswa okumnikelo okhethekileko, owamukelekako kuSomnini: ikunzana eyodwa, iqama elilodwa namaqamanyana alikhomba anomnyaka munye, koke kube msulwa." 
Numbers29:37 Kesinye nesinye isibalo seenkunzana, amaqama namaqamanyana lawo, kunikelwe iminikelo yeenthoro kanye neyokuselwako njengokwesimiso sakhona." 
Numbers29:38 Godu kube nepongo yomhlabelo wehlambululo, ngaphandle komhlabelo wokutjhiswa ojayelekileko nomnikelo wakhona weenthoro kanye nomnikelo wakhona wokuselwako." 
Numbers29:39 “ ‘Nikelani koke lokho kuSomnini ngesikhathi sakhona seminyanyenu, kube singezelelo eminikelwenenu yesithembiso, yesihle, yeenthoro, yokuselwako neyetjhebiswano kanye nemihlabelwenenu yokutjhiswa.’ ”" 
Numbers29:40 UMosi watjela ama-Israyeli koke njengombana uSomnini amyalile. 
Numbers30:1 UMosi wakhuluma nazo zoke iinhloko zeenkoro zakwa-Israyeli wathi: “Nakhu uSomnini ayale ngakho: 
Numbers30:2 Lokha indoda yenza isithembiso kuSomnini namkha yenza isifungo sokuzibophelela ngepilwayo, kufuze ingawephuli amezwayo. Ayenze koke ekukhulumileko." 
Numbers30:3 Lokha wesifazana enza isithembiso kuSomnini namkha azibophe ngesibopho ebutjheni bakhe khisibe usese ngakwabo," 
Numbers30:4 noyise ezwe isithembiso namkha isibopho azibophe ngaso kodwana angatjho litho kuye, khona-ke zoke iinthembiso zakhe zizakujama begodu esinye nesinye isibopho azibophe ngaso naso sizakuba ngesijamileko." 
Numbers30:5 Kodwana nangabe uyise uthi ngokuzwa ngaso bese umsola khona mhlokho, khona-ke akunasithembiso namkha isibopho umntazana azibophe ngaso esizakujama. USomnini uzamcolela ngombana uyise umsolile." 
Numbers30:6 “Nangabe wende endodeni asese sesithembisweni sakhe namkha ekulumeni engayi ndawo ayikhulumileko wazibopha ngayo," 
Numbers30:7 bese umyenakhe ezwe ngalokho, angatjho litho nokho ngelanga ezwa ngalo; khona-ke iinthembiso zakhe neembopho azibophe ngazo zizakujama." 
Numbers30:8 Kodwana nangabe kuthi ngelanga indodakhe ezwa ngalo bese imsole, izakwenza bona isithembiso nekulumo engayi ndawo ayikhulumileko wazibopha ngayo, ibe lilize. USomnini uzamcolela." 
Numbers30:9 (Mayelana nomhlolokazi namkha ibuya: Koke azibopha ngakho kuzakujama.) 
Numbers30:10 Nangabe umfazi uthembisa angakwakhe namkha azibophe ngesibopho sokufunga," 
Numbers30:11 indodakhe izwe ngalokho, nokho ingatjho litho kuye begodu ingamsoli, khona-ke esinye nesinye isithembiso sakhe nesibopho esinye nesinye azibophe ngaso sizakujama." 
Numbers30:12 Kodwana nangabe indodakhe yenza izintwezo ilize mhlana izwa ngazo, nje-ke koke okuphume emlonyenakhe mayelana neenthembiso namkha iimbopho zakhe angeze kwajama. Indodakhe izabe yenze koke lokho ilize, yeke uSomnini uzamcolela." 
Numbers30:13 Esinye nesinye isithembiso nanyana isifungo sokuzibopha ngokuzila, indodakhe ingenza bona sijame namkha isenze ilize." 
Numbers30:14 Kodwana nangabe woke amalanga indodakhe ithe du ngendaba leyo, khona-ke yenza zoke iinthembiso neembopho zomfazi loyo zijame. Iye, izenze zajama ngombana akhange itjho litho kuye mhlana izwa ngazo." 
Numbers30:15 Nangabe indodakhe izenza ilize ngemva kwesikhathi esithileko sele izwile ngazo yeke ngiyo ezakuthwala isiphambeko somfazi.” 
Numbers30:16 Lezo-ke ziimiso uSomnini ayala ngazo uMosi mayelana nendoda nomkayo, uyise nendodakazi ebutjheni bayo nayisese sendlini kayise." 
Numbers31:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers31:2 “Buyiselela ukubuyiselela kwama-Israyeli kumaMidiyani. Ngemva kwalokho nawe uzakulandela aboyihlomkhulu.” 
Numbers31:3 Nje-ke uMosi wathi ebantwini: “Hlomisani amadoda aphakathi kwenu bona ayokulwa namaMidiyani, abuyiselele ukubuyiselela kwakaSomnini kumaMidiyani." 
Numbers31:4 Ekorweni enye nenye yakwa-Israyeli nithumele epini ikulungwana yamadoda.” 
Numbers31:5 Mbala ikoro nekoro yakwa-Israyeli yakhupha ikulungwana yamadoda, kwaba libutho lepi eliziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili." 
Numbers31:6 UMosi wathumela ibuthwelo epini, kwaba yikulungwana ekorweni ngayinye. Gade likhamba noFiniyasi umsa ka-Elazara umphristi aphethe izitja ezicwengileko neemporompita." 
Numbers31:7 Ibuthwelo lalwa namaMidiyani njengombana uSomnini bekayale uMosi, labulala omunye nomunye omduna epini." 
Numbers31:8 Labulala namakhosi amahlanu wakwaMidiyani okungu-Evi, uRekhemu, uTsuri, uRhuri noReba. Godu abulala noBhiliyamu umsa kaBhewori ngesabula." 
Numbers31:9 Ama-Israyeli azithumbela abafazi bamaMidiyani kanye nabantwana. Abuya athatha zoke iinkomo kanye nefuyo enye yamaMidiyani; iye, ipahlawo yoke yaba yipango." 
Numbers31:10 Atjhisa woke amadorobho ahlala kiwo kanye namatendawo angeenrhodlweni. 
Numbers31:11 Athatha yoke ipango yabantu neyefuyo leyo," 
Numbers31:12 ayiletha kuMosi, ku-Elazara umphristi kanye nemkhambathini wama-Israyeli. Iye, abathunjiweko nepango balethwa ekampeni ngemrhobeni weJordani kwaMowabi malungana neJerikho." 
Numbers31:13 UMosi, u-Elazara umphristi kanye nabarholi bomkhambathi baphuma bahlangabeza ibutho ngaphandle kwekampa." 
Numbers31:14 UMosi bekasilingekile ngeenkhulu zebutho, iinduna zeenkulungwana nezamakhulu egade zibuya epini." 
Numbers31:15 Nje-ke wathi kizo: “Nilise boke abafazi baphila na? 
Numbers31:16 Yelelani la, laba ngibo abahlohlozelwa nguBhiliyamu bona babe sisifu kuma-Israyeli ukuze one ngokungathembeki kuSomnini endabeni yePewori. Ngalokho isifo sehlela emkhambathini kaSomnini." 
Numbers31:17 Yeke phakathi kwabancanaba, bulalani omunye nomunye omduna bese nibulala omunye nomunye wesifazana okhe wangenwa yindoda," 
Numbers31:18 kodwana zigcineleni woke amatlawana angazange akhe angenwe yindoda. 
Numbers31:19 Boke benu abakhe babulala umuntu namkha bathinta obuleweko, hlalani ngaphandle kwekampa amalanga alikhomba, nizihlambulule kanye nabathunjwa benu elangeni lesithathu nelekhomba." 
Numbers31:20 Hlambululani esinye nesinye isambatho, yoke into eyenziwe ngesikhumba, koke okwenziwe ngoboya bembuzi nento yoke ebazwe ngesigodo.”" 
Numbers31:21 U-Elazara umphristi wakhuluma namadoda agade aye epini wathi: “Nasi isimiso somthetho uSomnini ayale ngaso uMosi: 
Numbers31:22 Igolide, isiliva, ikoporo, isimbi, isinjana, umthofi" 
Numbers31:23 nakho koke okungatjhiko, kudluliseni emlilweni, nje-ke kuzakuhlambuluka. Nanyana kunjalo kufuze kuhlanjululwe ngamanzi wehlambululo godu. Lokho okungakghoni ukujamelana nomlilo kudluliseni ngemanzini wehlambululo." 
Numbers31:24 Ngelanga lekhomba nihlanze izambatho zenu, nizakuhlambuluka. Emva kwalokho ningangena ekampeni.”" 
Numbers31:25 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers31:26 “Wena no-Elazara umphristi kanye neenhloko zemindeni yomkhambathi, balani okuthunjwe epini okubabantu nefuyo." 
Numbers31:27 Okuthunjiweko kwepango kwabiwe kabili phakathi komkhambathi namadoda agade aye epini. 
Numbers31:28 Epangweni yamadoda agade aye epini lawo khuphani umthelo kaSomnini: Emakhulwini amahlanu nilethe kunye kwepango yabantu, yeenkomo, yabodumbana, yezimvu neembuzi." 
Numbers31:29 Lokho kuthatheni esiquntwini sesabelo samadoda lawo ninikele u-Elazara umphristi kube njengomnikelo kaSomnini. 
Numbers31:30 Esiquntwini sepango yama-Israyeli thathani kunye ngefumbe ematjhumini amahlanu kwepango yabantu, yeenkomo, yabodumbana, yezimvu neembuzi, okutjho eenlwaneni zoke nikunikele amaLevi abatjheji bepahla yethaberinakeli lakaSomnini.”" 
Numbers31:31 UMosi no-Elazara umphristi benza njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi. 
Numbers31:32 Ipango eyathunjwa madoda wepi egade imele yabiwe ngile: bekuzizimvu neembuzi eziziinkulungwana ezimakhulu asithandathu namatjhumi alikhomba nahlanu," 
Numbers31:33 iinkomo eziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi alikhomba nambili," 
Numbers31:34 abodumbana abaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi asithandathu nanye," 
Numbers31:35 abantu, okutjho iintombi eziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nambili ezingazange khe zingenwe madoda." 
Numbers31:36 Isiquntu sesabelo salabo abagade baye epini bekuzizimvu neembuzi eziziinkulungwana ezimakhulu amathathu namatjhumi amathathu nalikhomba namakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers31:37 Umthelo kaSomnini waba zizimvu neembuzi ezimakhulu asithandathu namatjhumi alikhomba nahlanu. 
Numbers31:38 Iinkomo beziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nantandathu. Umthelo kaSomnini kizo waba matjhumi alikhomba nambili. 
Numbers31:39 Abodumbana bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu namakhulu amahlanu. Umthelo kaSomnini kibo waba matjhumi asithandathu nanye. 
Numbers31:40 Abantu baba ziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nantandathu. Umthelo kaSomnini ngabo waba matjhumi amathathu nambili. 
Numbers31:41 UMosi wanikela umthelo weminikelo kaSomnini ku-Elazara umphristi. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini bekayale uMosi. 
Numbers31:42 Isabelo sama-Israyeli, okusiquntu sepango eyalethwa madoda agade aye epini, ebe sabiwe nguMosi, besingalendlela:" 
Numbers31:43 Umkhambathi wafunyana okulandelako: izimvu neembuzi eziziinkulungwana ezimakhulu amathathu namatjhumi amathathu nalikhomba namakhulu amahlanu," 
Numbers31:44 iinkomo eziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nesithandathu," 
Numbers31:45 abodumbana abaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu namakhulu amahlanu," 
Numbers31:46 abantu abaziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nesithandathu. 
Numbers31:47 Esiquntwini sepango yama-Israyeli uMosi wathatha ngefumbe munye ebantwini abamatjhumi amahlanu nefuyo yinye kematjhumi amahlanu, wanikela amaLevi abatjheji bepahla yethaberinakeli lakaSomnini. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini bekayale uMosi." 
Numbers31:48 Iinkhulu egade zengamele ibutho leenkulungwana neenduna zeenkulungwana nezamakhulu zatjhidela kuMosi," 
Numbers31:49 zafese zathi kuye: “Iinceku zakho seziwabalile amadoda wepi angaphasi kwelawulo lazo, nje-ke akukho neyodwa indoda elahlekileko." 
Numbers31:50 Begodu silethe nomnikelo kaSomnini, okungilokho omunye nomunye wethu akufunyeneko kwezinto zegolide: imihlobohlobo yeenkhono, iindzilamnwana, amancina nabonongoro kobana sizozenzela itethelelo kuSomnini.”" 
Numbers31:51 Yeke uMosi no-Elazara umphristi bamukela izinto zegolidezo kizo, ebe kubuphaziphazi obenziweko." 
Numbers31:52 Loke igolide ebegade liphuma eenduneni zeenkulungwana neenduneni zamakhulu, uMosi no-Elazara abanikela ngalo kuSomnini, belingaba makhilogremu alikhulu namatjhumi alithoba." 
Numbers31:53 Amadoda wepi gade azithathele ipango ebuphaziphazi epini. 
Numbers31:54 UMosi no-Elazara umphristi bamukela igolide eenduneni zeenkulungwana nezamakhulu baliletha etendeni lokuhlanganela bona libe sikhumbuzo sama-Israyeli phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Numbers32:1 AmaRubeni namaGadi gade anemihlambi emikhulu yefuyo. Wona-ke abona indawo kaJazeri neyakaGiliyadi kungeyamadlelo. 
Numbers32:2 Nje-ke amaGadi namaRubeni eza kuMosi, ku-Elazara umphristi nakubarholi bomkhambathi afese athi:" 
Numbers32:3 “Indawo ye-Atarothi, iDibhoni, iJazeri, iNimra, iRhetjhibhoni, i-Elale, iSebhama, iNebo neBhewoni," 
Numbers32:4 uSomnini ayirhayila phambi komkhambathi wama-Israyeli, yona kuyinarha yokufuya. Iinceku zenu zinefuyo," 
Numbers32:5 yeke nange sifunyene umusa emehlwenenu sibawa bona iinceku zenu ziphiwe yona inarha leyo ibe lilifa lazo. Nje-ke ningasiyamisi iJordani.” 
Numbers32:6 Kodwana uMosi wakhuluma namaGadi namaRubeni wathi: “Abafowenu bazakuya epini khisibe nina nizihlalele lapha na? 
Numbers32:7 Kubayini nidanisa ihliziyo yama-Israyeli kobana angayameli ngaphetjheya enarheni uSomnini awaphe yona? 
Numbers32:8 Lokhu ngekwenziwa boyihlo lokha nangibathuma basuka eKhadetjhi-Bharineya bonyana bayokuhlola inarha. 
Numbers32:9 Bathi bonyana bafike emrhobeni we-Etjhikolo babone inarha, bakhuluma okudanisa ihliziyo yama-Israyeli mayelana nokuya enarheni uSomnini agade abaphe yona." 
Numbers32:10 Nje-ke ubukhali bakaSomnini bavutha mhlokho, wabe wafunga wathi," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Ngiqinisile yi, akunamuntu owaphuma eGibhide kilabo abaneminyaka ukusukela ematjhumini amabili ukuya phezulu ozakubona inarha engayifungela u-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo ngombana akhange bangilandele ngokupheleleko," 
Numbers32:12 ngaphandle kwakaKalebi umsa kaJefune umKhenizi noJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni. Bona balandela uSomnini ngokupheleleko.’ 
Numbers32:13 Nje-ke ubukhali bakaSomnini bavutha ngama-Israyeli, yawenza azulazula erhalawumbeni iminyaka ematjhumi amane bekwaphela soke isizukulwaneso esenza okumbi phambi kwakaSomnini." 
Numbers32:14 Qalani lapha-ke nina nzalo yezoni ndina, nivukile najama esikhundleni saboyihlo, yeke nibange bona uSomnini abhokele u-Israyeli ngelaka!" 
Numbers32:15 Nakubanyana nani niyahlubuka ukumlandela, naso isizukulwanesi uzositjhiya erhalawumbenapha. Ngini enizobe nibhubhise boke abantwaba.”" 
Numbers32:16 Nje-ke amaRubeni namaGadi atjhidela kuye afese athi: “Yeke sizozakhela iimbaya zezimvu khonapha zibe ngezomhlambethu, sakhele abafazi nabantwabethu amadorobho." 
Numbers32:17 Abantwabethu bazokuhlala emadorobheni anemithangala ukuze baphephe ebantwini abakhe enarheni le. Thina-ke sizokuhloma bese sikhamba ngaphambi kwama-Israyeli besiyowafikisa endawenawo. 
Numbers32:18 Angeze sabuyela lapha omunye nomunye wama-Israyeli angakazizuzeli ilifa lakhe. 
Numbers32:19 Thina angeze sahlala nabo elifeni lenarha elingaphetjheya kweJordani ngombana lethu ilifa lisitjharhathelele ngepumalanga enganeno kweJordani le.” 
Numbers32:20 UMosi wathi kibo: “Nakube nizakwenza lokho, nihlome nikhambe phambi kwakaSomnini niye epini," 
Numbers32:21 omunye nomunye wenu ohlomileko ayame iJordani phambi kwakaSomnini bekube sikhathi lapha uSomnini aqotjha izitha zakhe phambi kwakhe," 
Numbers32:22 ukuze inarha ibe seenyaweni zakaSomnini. Nje-ke emva kwalokho seningabuyela emuva bese niba ngabatjhaphulukileko esibopheni senu kuSomnini nakuma-Israyeli. Ngalokho inarha le izakuba lilifa lenu phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Numbers32:23 Kodwana nangabe angeze nenza njalo, nizabe nonile phambi kwakaSomnini. Nje-ke yazini bonyana isono senu sizanibamba." 
Numbers32:24 Yakhelani abantwabenu amadorobho nemihlambenu iimbaya bese nenza njengombana nithembisile.” 
Numbers32:25 AmaGadi namaRubeni athi kuMosi: “Thina nceku zakho sizakwenza njengombana ubabethu asiyalile. 
Numbers32:26 Abantwabethu, abafazi bethu nemihlambethu, iye yoke ifuywethu, kuzakusala khona emadorobheni wakwaGiliyadi la." 
Numbers32:27 Kodwana iinceku zakho zona zizakuyama, indoda enye nenye ihlomele ipi phambi kwakaSomnini; kube njengombana ubabethu asiyala.”" 
Numbers32:28 Nje-ke uMosi wanikela imiyalo ngawo ku-Elazara umphristi, kuJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni kanye neenhlokweni zemindeni yeenkoro zakwa-Israyeli" 
Numbers32:29 wathi: “Nangabe amaGadi namaRubeni aniyamisa umlambo iJordani, indoda enye nenye ihlomele ipi phambi kwakaSomnini bese inarha iba sezandleni zenu, khona-ke anikeleni inarha yakwaGiliyadi ibe lilifa lawo." 
Numbers32:30 Kodwana nangabe angeze aniyamise ahlomile, khona-ke nabo ilifa labo lizakuba senarheni yeKanana kanye nani.”" 
Numbers32:31 AmaGadi namaRubeni avuma athi: “Njengombana uSomnini uZimu akhulume eencekwini zenu, sizokwenza njalo." 
Numbers32:32 Thina sizokuyama sihlomile phambi kwakaSomnini singene enarheni yeKanana, kodwana ilifa lethu esele silithumbile lizakuba nganeno kweJordani le.”" 
Numbers32:33 UMosi wanikela amaGadi namaRubeni kanye nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase umsa kaJosefa umbuso kaSirhoni ikosi yama-Amori nombuso ka-Ogi ikosi yeBhatjhani, okumadorobho wenarha namadlelwawo magegana nawo." 
Numbers32:34 AmaGadi avuselela iDibhoni, i-Atharothi, i-Aroweri," 
Numbers32:35 i-Athirothi-Tjhofani, iJazeri, iJogibhoha," 
Numbers32:36 iBhethe-Nimra neBhethe-Harana okumadorobho anemithangala neembaya zakhona zemihlambi. 
Numbers32:37 AmaRubeni avuselela iRhetjhibhoni, i-Elale, iKhiriyatayimu," 
Numbers32:38 iNebo, iBhali-Mewoni (okumabizo ebe kufuze atjhugululwe) kanye neSibima. Bathiya namanye amadorobho abawavuselelako amabizo." 
Numbers32:39 Iinzukulwana zakaMakiri umsa kaManase, zaya eGiliyadi zalithumba, kwathi ama-Amori alapho zawaqotjha." 
Numbers32:40 Nje-ke uMosi wanikela uMakiri umsa kaManase iGiliyadi. Iinzukulwana zakhe zahlala kiyo. 
Numbers32:41 Iinzukulwana zakaJayire umsa kaManase zaya zathumba imizi yamatende yama-Amori bezayithiya bona yiRhavothi-Jayire. 
Numbers32:42 UNobarhi wathumba iKhenathi kanye nemizayo wayithiya ngebizo lakhe wathi yiNobarhi. 
Numbers33:1 Nanzi-ke iindawo lapha ama-Israyeli agade akhamba ahlala kizo ekuphumeni kwawo enarheni yeGibhide ngaphasi koburholi bakaMosi no-Aroni. 
Numbers33:2 Ngomyalo kaSomnini uMosi watlola iindawo asungula kizo nalapha ahloma khona amatendawo. Lezi-ke kuziindawo lapha akhamba ahloma khona amatendawo: 
Numbers33:3 Afuduka eRamesese mhlana inyanga yokuthoma inamalanga alitjhumi nahlanu, ngakusasa emva kwePhasika. Aphuma afuduka ngokutjakadula amaGibhide woke aqalile." 
Numbers33:4 (Ngesikhatheso amaGibhide gade asangcwabana nabantwabawo abamazibulo ebegade uSomnini abamadlhe phakathi kwawo. Begodu uSomnini gade alethe isigwebo phezu kwabosingazinyana bawo.) 
Numbers33:5 Ama-Israyeli afuduka eRamesese ayokuhloma amatendawo eSukothi. 
Numbers33:6 Afuduka eSukothi ahloma e-Etamu elingemaphethelweni werhalawumba. 
Numbers33:7 Afuduka e-Etamu abuyela emuva ePhi-Harhirothi engepumalanga yeBhali-Tsefoni ayokuhloma hlanu kweMigidoli. 
Numbers33:8 Afuduka ePhi-Harhirothi adabula phakathi kwelwandle atjhinga erhalawumbeni. Emva kwekhambo lamalanga amathathu erhalawumbeni le-Etamu afese ahloma amatendawo eMara. 
Numbers33:9 Afuduka eMara afika ahloma amatendawo e-Elimu lapha bekunemithombo yamanzi elitjhumi nambili nemithi yamasundu ematjhumi alikhomba. 
Numbers33:10 Afuduka e-Elimu ahloma elwandle lomGaba. 
Numbers33:11 Afuduka elwandle lomGaba ahloma erhalawumbeni leSini. 
Numbers33:12 Afuduka erhalawumbeni leSini ahloma eDofikha. 
Numbers33:13 Afuduka eDofikha ahloma e-Alutjha. 
Numbers33:14 Afuduka e-Alutjha ahloma eRefidimu lapha bekunganamanzi khona bona abantu basele. 
Numbers33:15 Afuduka eRefidimu ahloma erhalawumbeni leSinayi. 
Numbers33:16 Afuduka erhalawumbeni leSinayi ahloma eKhibrothi-Hatava. 
Numbers33:17 Afuduka eKhibrothi-Hatava ahloma eRhatserothi. 
Numbers33:18 Afuduka eRhatserothi ahloma eRitima. 
Numbers33:19 Afuduka eRitima ahloma eRimoni-Peretsi. 
Numbers33:20 Afuduka eRemoni-Peretsi ahloma eLibina. 
Numbers33:21 Afuduka eLibina ahloma eRisa. 
Numbers33:22 Afuduka eRisa ahloma eKhehelata. 
Numbers33:23 Afuduka eKhehelata ahloma entabeni iTjheferi. 
Numbers33:24 Afuduka entabeni iTjheferi ahloma eRharada. 
Numbers33:25 Afuduka eRharada ahloma eMakhehelothi. 
Numbers33:26 Afuduka eMakhehelothi ahloma eTarhathi. 
Numbers33:27 Afuduka eTarhathi ahloma eTerarhi. 
Numbers33:28 Afuduka eTerarhi ahloma eMitikha. 
Numbers33:29 Afuduka eMitikha ahloma eRhatjhimona. 
Numbers33:30 Afuduka eRhatjhimona ahloma eMoserothi. 
Numbers33:31 Afuduka eMoserothi ahloma eBhene-Jakhani. 
Numbers33:32 Afuduka eBhene-Jakhani ahloma eRhori-Hagidigadi. 
Numbers33:33 Afuduka eRhori-Hagidigadi ahloma eJothibata. 
Numbers33:34 Afuduka eJothibata ahloma e-Abrona. 
Numbers33:35 Afuduka e-Abrona ahloma e-Etsiyoni-Gebere. 
Numbers33:36 Afuduka e-Etsiyoni-Gebere ahloma ngerhalawumbeni leTsini eKhadetjhi. 
Numbers33:37 Afuduka eKhadetjhi ahloma entabeni iHori emkhawulweni wenarha yakwa-Edomu. 
Numbers33:38 (Ngomyalo kaSomnini uZimu, u-Aroni umphristi wakhuphuka intaba iHori, wafese wahlongakalela lapho ngelanga lokuthoma enyangeni yesihlanu, ngemva kweminyaka ematjhumi amane ama-Israyeli aphume enarheni yeGibhide." 
Numbers33:39 Gade aneminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amabili namithathu lokha nakahlongakalela entabeni iHori leyo. 
Numbers33:40 Ngesikhatheso ikosi ye-Aradi emKanana egade ihlala ngesewula yeKanana besele izwile bona ama-Israyeli ayeza.) 
Numbers33:41 Ama-Israyeli afuduka entabeni yeHori ahloma amatendawo eTsalimona. 
Numbers33:42 Afuduka eTsalimona ahloma ePunoni. 
Numbers33:43 Afuduka ePunoni ahloma e-Obhothi. 
Numbers33:44 Afuduka e-Obhothi ahloma e-Iye-Habharimu. 
Numbers33:45 Afuduka e-Iye-Habharimu ahloma eDibhoni-Gadi. 
Numbers33:46 Afuduka eDibhoni-Gadi ahloma e-Alimoni-Dibilatayimu. 
Numbers33:47 Afuduka e-Alimoni-Dibilatayimu ahloma eentabeni ze-Abarimu buqamamana neNebo. 
Numbers33:48 Afuduka eentabeni ze-Abarimu ahloma ngemrhobeni weJordani kwaMowabi malungana neJerikho. 
Numbers33:49 Ahloma kwaMowabi ngemrhobeni weJordanapho ukusukela eBhethe-Hajetjhimothi ukululekela e-Abela-Hatjhithimu. 
Numbers33:50 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi ngemrhobeni weJordani kwaMowabi malungana neJerikho wathi 
Numbers33:51 akatjele ama-Israyeli athi: “Lokha naniyama iJordani ningena enarheni yeKanana," 
Numbers33:52 qotjhani boke abahlali benarha leyo phambi kwenu. Phahlazani yoke imifanekiso yamatje abaziweko nephule zoke iinthombembazwa zabosingazimu begodu nibhuruze zoke iindunduma zabo. 
Numbers33:53 Thumbani inarha leyo nihlale kiyo ngombana ngininikele yona bona ibe ngeyenu. 
Numbers33:54 Nizayaba ngefumbe ngokuya ngemindenenu. Umndeni omkhulu niwabele ilifa elikhulu kuthi omncani niwabele elincani. Omunye nomunye uzakuzuza ilifa ngokuya ngendlela ifumbe emwele ngayo. Ngendlela leyo nizakwabelana inarha ngokweenkoro zaboyihlo. 
Numbers33:55 Kodwana nangabe nizakuhluleka ukuqotjha abahlali benarha leyo, labo enibavumele bona bahlale nani, bazokuba liliva enyamenenu banikhole njengentuthu emehlweni. Bazokuba lihlupho kini enarheni enizobe nihlezi kiyo leyo." 
Numbers33:56 Mina-ke ngizakwenza kini lokho ebe ngizimisele ukukwenza kibo.” 
Numbers34:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Numbers34:2 akayale ama-Israyeli athi: “Lokha naningena enarheni yeKanana, ekuyinarha enizakwabelwa yona bona ibe lilifa lenu, imikhawulo yayo izakuba bunje:" 
Numbers34:3 Isewula yenu izakuba serhalawumbeni leTsini magegana nenarha yakwa-Edomu. Umkhawulo wakhona usuke ngesewula-pumalanga yelwandle leTswayi 
Numbers34:4 uyokujika ngesewula yomkghotha we-Akhirabhimu udabule irhalawumba leTsini ukuyokutjhayisa ngesewula yeKhadetjhi-Bharineya, ululekele eRhatsari-Adari bese utjhayise i-Atsimona." 
Numbers34:5 Umkhawulo lowo uzakujika e-Atsimona ukuyokutjhayisa emlanjaneni weGibhide bese uphelela elwandle. 
Numbers34:6 “Umkhawulo wangetjingalanga uzakuba lilwandle elikhulu neligu lakhona. Lowo kuzakuba mkhawulwenu ngetjingalanga. 
Numbers34:7 “Naku-ke umkhawulwenu wangetlhagwini: Ukusuka elwandle elikhulu bekisani umuda bekube sentabeni yeHori. 
Numbers34:8 Ukusuka entabeni yeHori niwubekise bekube seLebo-Rhamathi. Amaphethelo womkhawulo abe seTsedadi," 
Numbers34:9 bese ululekela eZifroni uphelele eRhatsari-Enani. Lowo-ke kuzakuba mkhawulwenu wangetlhagwini. 
Numbers34:10 “Umkhawulwenu wangepumalanga nizawubekisa ukusukela eRhatsari-Enani bekube seTjhefamu. 
Numbers34:11 Ukusukela eTjhefamu uzakwehlela enzasi, tjhuba langeRibla ngepumalanga ye-Ayini. Uzakudosa bewuyokufika enzasi magegana nehlangothi lentaba ngepumalanga yelwandle iKinerethi." 
Numbers34:12 Godu uzakunabela enzasi ngeJordani bese uphelela elwandle leTswayi. “Leyo kuzakuba yinarhenu nemikhawulwenu yoke mazombe.” 
Numbers34:13 UMosi wayala ama-Israyeli wathi: “Le yinarha ezakuba lilifa lenu ngefumbe. USomnini uyale bona inikelwe iinkoro ezilithoba nesiquntu sazo," 
Numbers34:14 ngombana ikoro yakwaRubeni ngokwemindeni yaboyise neyakwaGadi ngokwemindeni yaboyise kanye nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase sele zamukele ilifa lazo. 
Numbers34:15 Iinkoro ezimbilezi nesiquntu zamukela ilifa lazo nganeno kweJordani ukuyela ngepumalanga yeJerikho.” 
Numbers34:16 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi: 
Numbers34:17 “Naka amabizo wamadoda azakwaba inarha yelifa lenu: Ngu-Elazara umphristi kanye noJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni. 
Numbers34:18 Ekorweni ngayinye thathani umrholi abe munye ukuze asize ekwabiweni kwelifa lenarha. 
Numbers34:19 “Naka-ke amabizo wamadoda abarholi lawo: “Ekorweni yakwaJuda: uKalebi umsa kaJefune; 
Numbers34:20 ekorweni yeenzukulwana zakaSimiyoni: uSamyela umsa ka-Amirhudi; 
Numbers34:21 ekorweni yakwaBhenjamini: u-Elidadi umsa kaKisiloni; 
Numbers34:22 ekorweni yeenzukulwana zakaDani: umrholi uBhukhi umsa kaJogili; 
Numbers34:23 eenzukulwaneni zakaJosefa ekorweni yakwaManase: umrholi uRhaniyeli umsa ka-Efodi; 
Numbers34:24 ekorweni yeenzukulwana zaka-Efrayimu: umrholi uKhemuweli umsa kaTjhifithani; 
Numbers34:25 ekorweni yeenzukulwana zakaZebuloni: umrholi u-Elitsafani umsa kaParinakhi; 
Numbers34:26 ekorweni yeenzukulwana zaka-Isakari: umrholi uPalithiyeli umsa ka-Azani; 
Numbers34:27 ekorweni yeenzukulwana zaka-Atjheri: umrholi u-Arhihudi umsa kaTjhelomi; 
Numbers34:28 ekorweni yeenzukulwana zakaNafitali: umrholi uPedayeli umsa ka-Amihudi.” 
Numbers34:29 Lawo bekumadoda uSomnini ayale ngawo bona abele ama-Israyeli inarha iKanana. 
Numbers35:1 USomnini wakhuluma noMosi kwaMowabi ngemrhobeni weJordani malungana neJerikho wathi: 
Numbers35:2 “Yala ama-Israyeli bona epahleni ekulilifa lawo, anikele amaLevi amadorobho azakwakha kiwo neendawo zamadlelo magegana namadorobho lawo." 
Numbers35:3 Amadorobho lawo azakuba ngewawo bona ahlale kiwo bese amadlelo wakhona kube ziindawo zemihlambi, okutjho yoke ifuywawo." 
Numbers35:4 Ububanzi beendawo zamadlelo enizazinikela amaLevi magegana namadorobho kufuze okungasenani zibe mamitha amakhulu amane namatjhumi amahlanu ukusuka emthangaleni wedorobho. 
Numbers35:5 Ngaphandle kwedorobho nizakulinganisa amamitha angaba makhulu alithoba ngehlangothini langepumalanga, amamitha angaba makhulu alithoba ngehlangothini langesewula, amamitha angaba makhulu alithoba ngehlangothini langetjingalanga namamitha angaba makhulu alithoba ngehlangothini langetlhagwini, khisibe idorobho liphakathi. Leyo kuzakuba yindawawo yamadlelo emadorobhenawo." 
Numbers35:6 Amadorobho eniwanikela amaLevi kuzakuba madorobho asithandathu wobuphephelo, lapha nizakuvumela umbulali abalekele khona. Ngaphezu kwalokho nizawanikela amanye amadorobho amatjhumi amane namabili." 
Numbers35:7 Sele awoke amadorobho enizawanikela amaLevi azakuba matjhumi amane nabunane kanye neendawo zawo zamadlelo. 
Numbers35:8 Mayelana namadorobho eniwathethe esabelweni sama-Israyeli ekufuze niwanikele amaLevi: Enye nenye ikoro kumele inikele ngokuya ngelifa elizuzileko. Eenkorweni ezikulu nithathe amadorobho amanengi bese kuthi kezincani nithathe ambalwa.” 
Numbers35:9 Godu uSomnini wakhuluma noMosi wathi 
Numbers35:10 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Lokha naniyama iJordani ningena eKanana," 
Numbers35:11 khethani amadorobho bona abe ngewobuphephelo kini, lapha kuzakuthi lokha umuntu nakabulele omunye ngephoso, abalekele khona." 
Numbers35:12 Amadorobho lawo azakuba buphephelo kini lokha nanibalekela umbuyiseleli ukuze obuleleko angafi angakajami ebandla bona agwetjwe. 
Numbers35:13 Amadorobho asithandathu lawo nizawajamisa bona abe ngewobuphephelo. 
Numbers35:14 Amathathu wawo akabe nganeno kweJordani kuthi amanye amathathu abe ngenarheni yeKanana, kube ngawobuphephelo." 
Numbers35:15 Amadorobho asithandathu lawo, azakuba ziindawo zobuphephelo kuma-Israyeli, isikhonzi nomphalali ophakathi kwawo ukuze kuthi nanyana ngubani obulala umuntu ngokungakahlosi abalekele khona." 
Numbers35:16 “Kodwana nangabe kunomuntu obetha omunye ngesimbi ambulale, loyo umbulali. Nje-ke umbulali kufuze abulawe." 
Numbers35:17 Nangabe umuntu uphethe ilitje esandleni sakhe elingabulala bese umadlha omunye ngalo ambulale, naye umbulali. Nje-ke umbulali akabulawe." 
Numbers35:18 Nangabe umuntu uphethe umphini osibulawo bese uphobola omunye ngawo ambulale, umbulali naye. Nje-ke umbulali kufuze abulawe." 
Numbers35:19 Umbuyiseleli weengazi kufuze kube nguye obulala umbulali loyo lokha nakahlangana naye. Iye, ambulale nya." 
Numbers35:20 Nangabe umuntu uthi ngokuzonda omunye bese umsunduzela endaweni eyingozi ambulale, namkha amphose ngento ngehloso yokumlimaza ambulale," 
Numbers35:21 namkha ngenca yevunda amdule phasi ngeguduva ambulale, umbethi loyo kufuze abulawe ngombana umbulali. Umbuyiseleli weengazi kufuze ambulale lokha nakahlangana naye." 
Numbers35:22 “Kodwana nangabe umuntu uqhula omunye ngephoso kunganavunda namkha aphose ngananyana yini angakahlosi ukulimaza umuntu," 
Numbers35:23 namkha aliselele ilitje elingabulala umuntu bese likhande omunye khisibe gade angamboni, umuntu loyo ahlongakale; nanyana gade bangasi zizitha begodu angakahlosi ukulimaza," 
Numbers35:24 ibandla lizakugweba phakathi kobuleleko nombuyiseleli weengazi ngokulandela iimiswezo. 
Numbers35:25 Ibandla kufuze livikele umuntu obuleleko ezandleni zombuyiseleli weengazi, limbuyisele edorobheni lobuphephelo lapha gade abalekele khona. Uzakuhlala lapho bekuhlongakale umphristi omkhulu nogade azeswe ngamafutha acwengileko." 
Numbers35:26 Kodwana nangabe obuleleko angalinga eqe imikhawulo yedorobho lobuphephelo abalekele kilo," 
Numbers35:27 bese umbuyiseleli weengazi amfunyane ngaphandle kwemikhawulo yedorobho lobuphephelo ambulale, angeze abekwa umlandu weengazi." 
Numbers35:28 Lokho kungebanga lokobana obuleleko bekufuze ahlale ngedorobheni lobuphephelo bekube kulapha kuhlongakala khona umphristi omkhulu. Kodwana ngemuva kokuhlongakala komphristi omkhulu, obuleleko angabuyela enarheni yelifa lakhe." 
Numbers35:29 Lokho kuzakuba ziimiso nemithetho yenu kanye neenzukulwana ngeenzukulwana zenu lapha nizakuhlala khona.” 
Numbers35:30 “Umuntu obulala omunye naye uzakubulawa ngesiqiniseko sabofakazi. Kodwana umuntu angakhe angabulawa ngobufakazi bomuntu oyedwa. 
Numbers35:31 Ningayamukeli ihlawulo yokuhlenga ipilo yombulali onomlandu wokubulala. Onjalo, akabulawe nokubulawa." 
Numbers35:32 Godu ningayamukeli ihlawulo yokuhlenga umuntu obalekele edorobheni lobuphephelo kobana abuyele enarheni yekhabo kungakahlongakali umphristi omkhulu. 
Numbers35:33 Ningasilaphazi inarha eniphila kiyo ngombana iingazi ziyayisilaphaza inarha. Akunatethelelo engenzelwa inarha ethulukelwe ziingazi ngaphandle kokuthululwa kweengazi zaloyo ozithululileko. 
Numbers35:34 Ningayirhubutjhi inarha eniphila kiyo ngombana mina Somnini ngihlala kiyo. Iye, ngihlala phakathi kwabantu bakwa-Israyeli.”" 
Numbers36:1 Iinhloko zemindeni kaGiliyadi umsa kaMakiri omsa kaManase okuziinzukulwana zekoro kaJosefa, zeza zakhuluma phambi kwakaMosi nabarholi okuziinhloko zemindeni yama-Israyeli," 
Numbers36:2 zafese zathi: “Ngesikhathi uSomnini uZimu ayala ikosethu bona inarha le yabelwe ama-Israyeli ngefumbe, ikosethu yayalwa nguSomnini uZimu bonyana ilifa lomfowethu uTselofirhadi linikelwe amadodakazakhe." 
Numbers36:3 Kodwana nangabe ende kenye yamadodana weenkoro zama-Israyeli, khona ilifa lawo lizakuthathwa esabelweni sabobaba lingezelelwe ekorweni ebendele kiyo. Nje-ke ingcenye yelifa lethu esabelwe lona ngefumbe izokuthathwa kithi." 
Numbers36:4 Lokha umnyaka wokubuyisela nawufikako kuma-Israyeli, ilifa lawo lizokungezelelwa elifeni lekoro endele kiyo. Ngalokho ilifa labo lizokuhletjhulwa elifeni lekoro yabobaba.”" 
Numbers36:5 Ngokomyalo kaSomnini uMosi wayala ama-Israyeli wathi: “Ikoro yesizukulwana sakaJosefa ikhuluma iqiniso. 
Numbers36:6 Nje-ke nakhu uSomnini ayale ngakho mayelana namadodakazi kaTselofirhadi uthi, ‘Wona angathathwa nanyana ngubani abona awalungele, ikani kumumuntu womndeni wekoro kayisawo." 
Numbers36:7 Ilifa lama-Israyeli akukafaneli lidluliselwe ekorweni ngekoro ngombana omunye nomunye wama-Israyeli kufuze anamathele elifeni lekoro yaboyise. 
Numbers36:8 Nje-ke nanyana ngimuphi umntazana weenkoro zama-Israyeli onelifa, kufuze ende komunye womndeni wekoro kayise ukuze omunye nomunye wama-Israyeli abe nelifa lendlu yaboyise." 
Numbers36:9 Ngalokho akunalifa elizakudluliselwa ekorweni ukuya kwenye ngombana enye nenye ikoro izakunamathela elifeni layo.’ ” 
Numbers36:10 Amadodakazi kaTselofirhadi enza njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi: 
Numbers36:11 UMarhila, uTiritsa, uRhogila, uMilika noNoya bebathethwe madodana wendlu yabafowabo kayisabo." 
Numbers36:12 Iye, bebathethwe ngemndenini wakaManase umsa kaJosefa. Ngalokho ilifa labo lahlala lisekorweni yomndeni kayise wamadodakazi lawo." 
Numbers36:13 Leyo-ke mithetho nemiyalo uSomnini ayala ngayo ama-Israyeli ngoMosi kwaMowabi ngemrhobeni weJordani malungana neJerikho. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Le, yikulumo kaMosi ayethula kuma-Israyeli woke ngepumalanga yeJordani erhalawumbeni, okutjho umrhoba we-Araba emalungana neSufi hlangana neParana ngehlangothini elinye neTofeli, iLabana, iRhatserothi kanye neDizahaba ngakelinye." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Bekuthatha amalanga alitjhumi nanye kwaphela ukusuka eRhorebe ukuya eKhadetjhi-Bharineya ngendlela yentabeni iSeyiri," 
Deuteronomy1:3 kodwana uMosi wethula ikulumo le kuma-Israyeli ngemva kweminyaka ematjhumi amane. Gade kulilanga lokuthoma lenyanga yetjhumi nanye lokha uMosi nakhuluma nama-Israyeli ikulumo uSomnini amyale bona ayitjho kiwo. 
Deuteronomy1:4 Lokho kwaba ngemva kobana ahlule uSirhoni ikosi yama-Amori egade ihlala eRhetjhibhoni; godu wahlula no-Ogi etatawini lokulwa e-Edreyi. U-Ogi lo, bekayikosi yeBhatjhani egade ihlala e-Atjhitarothi." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Kwathi nabangepumalanga yeJordani, ngenarheni yakwaMowabi, uMosi wakubeka emahlombakhe bonyana aveze umthetho lo emtarini, wathi:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 USomnini uZimethu wathi kithi nasiseRhorebe: “Sele nihlezi isikhathi eside ngokwaneleko entabenapha. 
Deuteronomy1:7 Nje-ke jikani nifudukele eentabeni zama-Amori nakibo boke abomakhelwana bawo, okutjho umrhoba we-Araba, iintaba nemibundu yeTjhefela, isewula yenarha yamaKanana, isifunda seligu neLibhanoni bekuyokufika emlanjeni omkhulu iYufrathe." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Qalani, ngibeke inarha phambi kwenu. Ngenani nithumbe inarha mina Somnini engafunga kiboyihlomkhulu u-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo kobana ngizayinikela bona neenzukulwana zabo ngemva kwabo.”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Ngesikhatheso mina Mosi ngathi kini: “Afeke, angeze ngakghona ukunithwala ngingedwa." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Qala bona uSomnini uZimu unandise kangangani: Namhlanje sese nifana neenkwekwezi zomkayi ngobunengi. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Bengifisa inga uSomnini uZimu waboyihlomkhulu bekanganandisa kayikulungwana ngobunengi abe anibusise njengombana anithembisile," 
Deuteronomy1:12 kodwana ngizowathwala njani amacalenu, imirarwenu nemibangwenu ngingedwa na?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Khethani amadoda ahlakaniphileko, anombono nelemuko ukuya ngokweenkoro zenu ukuze ngiwabeke bona abe ziinhloko zenu.”" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Nangiphendula nathi: “Into ositjela yona le, kuhle bonyana siyenze.”" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Yeke ngathatha iinhloko zeenkoro zenu, okumadoda ahlakaniphileko nanelemuko ngawabeka bonyana abe ziinhloko phezu kwenu, abe ziinduna zeenkulungwana, zamakhulu, zamatjhumi amahlanu, zamatjhumi okutjho bona abe ziinkhulu kizo zoke iinkoro zenu." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Ngesikhatheso ngathi kubagwebi benu: “Lalelani imilandu ngokufanako hlangana komuntu nomuntu; nigwebe ngokulunga phakathi komuntu nomfowabo namkha isikhonzi esihlala naye. 
Deuteronomy1:17 Ningakhethi ubuso nanigwebako; nilalele obuthakathaka nonamandla ngokufanako. Ningethuswa bubuso bomuntu ngombana ukugweba ngekwakaZimu. Umlandu obudisi kini uletheni kimi, mina ngizawulalela.”" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Nganiyala ngesikhatheso ngakho koke okwakumele nikwenze. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Nje-ke safuduka eRhorebe sadabula erhalawumbeni elikhulu nelesabekako enalibonako endleleni eya eentabeni zama-Amori njengombana sayalwa nguSomnini uZimethu besafika eKhadetjhi-Bharineya. 
Deuteronomy1:20 Godu ngathi kini: “Angithi niyabona bonyana sele nifike eentabeni zama-Amori esizinikelwe nguSomnini uZimethu? 
Deuteronomy1:21 Arha-ke, uSomnini uZimenu ubeke inarha phambi kwenu; khuphukani niyithumbe njengombana uSomnini uZimu waboyihlomkhulu anitjelile. Ningesabi namkha niphele amandla.”" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Noke natjhidela hlanu kwami nathi: “Asithumele amadoda phambi kwethu kobana ayosiqalela inarha bese asilethele ilizwi lokobana sithathe yiphi indlela yamadorobho esizakudlula kiwo.” 
Deuteronomy1:23 Kwabonakala kukuhle kimi lokho, nje-ke ngathatha amadoda alitjhumi nambili phakathi kwenu kwaba yindoda yinye ikoro nekoro." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Akhamba-ke anyukela eentabeni abe afika emrhobeni we-Etjhikolo awuhlola. 
Deuteronomy1:25 Athi nabuyako eza asiphathele ezinye zeenthelo zenarha leyo abe asipha nombiko othi: “Yinarha ehle esiyiphiwe nguSomnini uZimethu.” 
Deuteronomy1:26 Khonapho nakhunyalala azange nenyuke, nalwa nomyalo kaZimenu," 
Deuteronomy1:27 naba neensolo ngematendenenu nathi: “Kungebanga lokobana uSomnini asizondile bona asikhuphe enarheni yeGibhide ukuze asinikelele ngama-Amori kobana asirhayile. 
Deuteronomy1:28 Alo, sizakuyaphi nje? Nabafowethu napa nabo basethusile bathi abantwaba banengi begodu bandlondlobele kunathi. Amadorobho wakhona makhulu begodu anemithangala etjhayisa emkayini. Phezu kwalokho sibone neenzukulwana zaka-Anakhi lapho.”" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Nje-ke ngathi kini: “Ningabi nevalo begodu ningesabi ngabantwabo. 
Deuteronomy1:30 NguSomnini uZimenu okhamba ngaphambi kwenu, yena uzanilwela. Uzanilwela njengombana enza eGibhide niqalile," 
Deuteronomy1:31 nanjengombana enza erhalawumbeni lapha nabona khona bonyana uSomnini uZimenu wanithwala njengobaba nathwala umntwanakhe. Wanithwala endlelenenu yoke benafika endaweni le.” 
Deuteronomy1:32 Nangaphezu kwelizwi enginitjele lona, azange nethembe uSomnini uZimenu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 owakhamba phambi kwenu ekhambeni lenu ngomlilo ebusuku nangelifu emini kobana anifunele iindawo zokuhloma amatendenu nokunibonisa indlela okufanele nikhambe ngayo. 
Deuteronomy1:34 Lokha uSomnini nezwa enikutjhwileko, wathukuthela bewafunga wathi:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 “Akunamuntu namunye wesizukulwana esikhohlakelekwesi ozakubona inarha ehle engafunga bonyana ngizayinikela aboyihlomkhulu," 
Deuteronomy1:36 ngaphandle kwakaKalebi umsa kaJefune. Yena uzayibona begodu ngizamnikela inarha agadanga kiyo, yena neenzukulwana zakhe ngombana ulandele uSomnini ngokupheleleko.”" 
Deuteronomy1:37 USomnini nami wangithukuthelela ngebanga lenu bewathi kimi: “Nawe abe awuzukungena enarheni leyo, ngiyakutjela!" 
Deuteronomy1:38 UJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni omsizakho, nguye ozakungena. Yena-ke mkhuthaze ngombana nguye ozokuthumbisa ama-Israyeli inarha leyo." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Ababuthakathaka benu egade nibathukwele bonyana bazakuba yipango okutjho abantwabenu abangakwazi ukuhlukanisa phakathi kokuhle nokumbi, ngibo abazakungena. Ngizabanikela yona begodu ngibo abazayithumba." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Kodwana nina-ke, jikani nifuduke niye erhalawumbeni ngendlela yelwandle lomGaba.”" 
Deuteronomy1:41 Nje-ke nangiphendula nathi: “Maye thina, sonile phambi kwakaSomnini! Sizakukhuphuka ngokwethu silwe njengombana uSomnini uZimethu asiyalile.” Nabhinca, enye nenye indoda phakathi kwenu yahloma ngeenhlabano zayo zepi ngombana kwabonakala kulula kini ukukhuphukela eentatjaneni." 
Deuteronomy1:42 USomnini wathi nginitjele bonyana ningakhuphuki namkha nilwe ngombana akakho phakathi kwenu. Nakungasinjalo nizokuhlulwa zizitha zenu. 
Deuteronomy1:43 Yeke ngakhuluma nani kodwana azange beningilalele. Esikhundleni salokho nalwa nomyalo kaSomnini, nanghanghabala nakhuphukela eentatjaneni." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Kwasuka ama-Amori ahlala eentabenezo anikhandela anikhweza ummango njengeenyosi nazithutha abesana abe anidulela ngeSeyiri ukuyokufika eRhorema. 
Deuteronomy1:45 Nabuya lapho nalila phambi kwakaSomnini. USomnini azange abe anilalele ekububuleni kwenu begodu azange anitjheje. 
Deuteronomy1:46 Sahlala isikhathi eside eKhadetjhi. Ngemva kwesikhathi 
Deuteronomy2:1 safuduka saya erhalawumbeni ngendlela yelwandle lomGaba njengombana uSomnini gade angitjelile. Sathatha isikhathi eside silokhu sibhoduluka intaba iSeyiri. 
Deuteronomy2:2 USomnini wathi kimi: 
Deuteronomy2:3 “Sekwanele bonyana nilokhu nibhoduluka ummango weentaba lo, jikelani ngetlhagwini." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Utjele abantu bonyana sele nizokudlula emkhawulweni wenarha yabafowenu okuziinzukulwana zaka-Esewu ezihlala eSeyiri. Zizonesaba, nje-ke yelelani kuhle:" 
Deuteronomy2:5 Ningalwi nazo ngombana angeze nganinikela ngitjho nesiqetjhana senarhazo. Intaba iSeyiri ngayinikela u-Esewu kobana kube lilifa lakhe. 
Deuteronomy2:6 Nizakuthenga kibo ukugoma ngesiliva kobana nigome. Nithenge namanzi kibo ngesiliva kobana nisuse umrhawu. 
Deuteronomy2:7 USomnini uZimenu unibusisile kiyo yoke imisebenzi yezandla zenu. Uyakwazi ukukhamba kwenu phakathi kwerhalawumbakazeli. USomnini uZimu ube nani eminyakeni ematjhumi amane le, akhange niswele litho.”" 
Deuteronomy2:8 Njalo-ke saragela phambili sagegeda inarha yabafowethu okuziinzukulwana zaka-Esewu ezihlala eSeyiri, kude nendlela ye-Elathi ne-Etsiyoni-Gebhere phakathi komrhoba we-Araba. Sajika sakhamba ngendlela yerhalawumbeni lakwaMowabi." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Ngesikhatheso uSomnini wathi kimi: “Ningethuseli amaMowabi namkha nilwe nawo ngepi ngombana angizuninikela inarhawo bona ibe lilifa lenu ngebanga lokobana nginikele iinzukulwana zakaLothi i-Ari bonyana ibe lilifa lazo. 
Deuteronomy2:10 Nje-ke zilungiseleleni nikhuphukele emrhobeni iZeredi.” (Ngaphambilini ama-Emi gade ahlala kwaMowabi. Wona bekasisizwe esikhulu nesinengi kanti godu mindondotjhiya yabantu abeluleke inga ma-Anakhi. Njengama-Anakhi, ama-Emi nawo bekathathwa bonyana maRafa, kodwana amaMowabi awabiza bona ma-Emi. Ekuthomeni amaRhori nawo gade ahlala eSeyiri kodwana amadodana ka-Esewu awaqotjha, awabhubhisa abe azithathela indawawo njengombana no-Israyeli enza ngenarha yelifa lawo ayiphiwa nguSomnini.) Sayama-ke umrhoba iZeredi." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Isikhathi esasithatha ukuthoma mhla sisuka eKhadetjhi-Bharineya ukufikela lapha sayama khona umrhoba iZeredi sasiminyaka ematjhumi amathathu nabunane, bekwabhubha soke isizukulwana esasimadoda wepi ekampeni njengombana uSomnini bekafungile kiso." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Ngambala isandla sakaSomnini gade sijamelene naso kobana siphume hlangana nabantu ekampeni kufikela lapha siphela khona nya. 
Deuteronomy2:13 Kwathi bona woke amadoda wepi abhubhe nya hlangana nabantu," 
Deuteronomy2:14 USomnini wathi kimi: 
Deuteronomy2:15 “Namhlanje nina nizakudabula i-Ari okuyinarha yakwaMowabi. 
Deuteronomy2:16 Lokha nanifika emikhawulweni yama-Amoni, ningawethuseli namkha nilwe nawo ngepi. Angeze nganinikela inarhawo kobana ibe lilifa lenu ngombana sele ngiyinikele iinzukulwana zakaLothi kobana ibe lilifa lazo.”" 
Deuteronomy2:17 (Inarha leyo godu beyithathwa bonyana yinarha yamaRafa. AmaRafa ngiwo agade ahlala lapho ekuthomeni, kodwana ama-Amoni gade awabiza bona maZamzumi." 
Deuteronomy2:18 Gade kubabantu abakhulu begodu babanengi. Bekumindondotjhiya kwanga ma-Anakhi. Kodwana uSomnini wabarhayila nya phambi kwama-Amoni. Ama-Amoni awaqotjha amaZamzumi lawo abe ahlala enarhenawo. 
Deuteronomy2:19 USomnini wazenzela njalo neenzukulwana zaka-Esewu ezihlala eSeyiri lokha narhayila amaRhori phambi kwazo. Zawaqotjha zabe zathumba indawawo bekube kunamhlanje. 
Deuteronomy2:20 Nakuma-Avi agade ahlala emizaneni yeGaza, arhayilwa maKafitori avela ngeKafitori abe ahlala eendaweni zawo.)" 
Deuteronomy2:21 USomnini wathi: “Fudukani niyame umrhoba we-Arinoni. Qala, nginikele uSirhoni umAmori ikosi yeRhetjhibhoni ezandleni zenu kanye nenarhakhe. Thomani-ke nithumbe ilifa bese nilwa naye ngepi." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Namhlanje ngizokuthoma ukufaka ivalo ebantwini abangaphasi kwawo woke umthunzi welanga kobana banesabe. Lokha nabezwa ngeendaba zakho bazakuthuthumela bavevezele phambi kwakho.” 
Deuteronomy2:23 Nje-ke ngathumela iinthunywa zasuka erhalawumbeni leKhedemothi zaya kuSirhoni ikosi yeRhetjhibhoni ziphethe amazwi wokuthula athi: 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Ngivumela ngidlule enarhenakho, ngizakhamba ngendlela kwaphela, angeze ngaphambukela ngesigomeni namkha ngesinceleni." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Uzangithengisela ukugoma ngesiliva kobana ngigome, namanzi kobana ngisele. Ngivumela kwaphela bonyana ngidlule ngeenyawo," 
Deuteronomy2:26 njengombana neenzukulwana zaka-Esewu ezihlala eSeyiri namaMowabi ahlala e-Ari enza kimi. Ngipha indlela bengeyame iJordani ngiye enarheni uSomnini uZimethu asinikela yona.” 
Deuteronomy2:27 Kodwana uSirhoni ikosi yeRhetjhibhoni azange asivumele bonyana sidlule ngakuye ngombana uSomnini uZimenu waqinisa ummoyakhe, wakhunyalalisa nehliziywakhe kobana amnikele esandleni senu njengombana kwenzekile namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy2:28 USomnini wathi kimi: “Qala sele ngithome ukunikela uSirhoni nenarhakhe kuwe. Thoma-ke uzihlele kobana uthumbe inarhakhe.” 
Deuteronomy2:29 Nje-ke uSirhoni waphuma kobana asikhandele, yena nabo boke abantu bakhe kobana silwe eJahatsi." 
Deuteronomy2:30 USomnini uZimethu wamnikela kithi, samumadlha yena namadodanakhe nabo boke abantu bakhe." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Sathumba woke amadorobhakhe ngesikhatheso, sawarhayila nya. Kelinye nelinye idorobho sarhayila amadoda, abafazi nababuthakathaka. Azange sitjhiye namunye aphila," 
Deuteronomy2:32 ngaphandle kwefuyo esazithathela yona njengepango kanye nepahla yamadorobho esawathumbako. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Ukusuka emlanjaneni we-Arinoni okutjho idorobho le-Aroweri elingemrhobeni ukuyela ngeGiliyadi, azange kube nedorobho eliphakeme khulu kithi. USomnini uZimethu wawanikela woke njalo ezandleni zethu." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Kusenarheni yama-Amoni kwaphela lapha ungazange utjhidele khona, okutjho kiyo yoke indawo eseempambosini zomlanjana iJabokhi kanye namadorobho weentatjaneni nakho koke lapha uSomnini uZimethu wasalela khona bona singene." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Sajika-ke sakhuphuka ngendlela yeBhatjhani. U-Ogi ikosi yakhona yaphuma nebutho layo loke bonyana isisahlele ngepi e-Edreyi. 
Deuteronomy3:2 Kodwana uSomnini wathi kimi: “Ungamesabi ngombana ngimnikele esandleni sakho, yena nabo boke abantu bakhe kanye nenarhakhe. Umenze isenzo owasenza uSirhoni ikosi yama-Amori ogade ahlala eRhetjhibhoni.”" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Yeke uSomnini uZimethu wanikela u-Ogi ikosi yeBhatjhani esandleni sethu kanye nabo boke abantu bakhe. Samumadlha bekwatlhoga namunye wabantu bakhe ophunyurhako. 
Deuteronomy3:4 Sathatha woke amadorobhakhe ngesikhatheso. Akunadorojana esingazange simemuke lona. Kwakumadorobho amatjhumi asithandathu, sahlanganisa soke isifunda i-Arigobho, okumbuso ka-Ogi eBhatjhani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Woke lawo bekumadorobho aqiniswe ngemithangala ephakamileko, amasango neenqabo. Sathatha godu nemizi eminengi enganamithangala." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Sawarhayila nya njengombana senza kuSirhoni ikosi yeRhetjhibhoni nasirhayila elinye nelinye idorobho, okutjho amadoda, abafazi nababuthakathaka." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Kodwana yoke ifuyo nepango yedorobho sazithathela yona. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Nje-ke ngesikhatheso samuka amakhosi amabili wama-Amori ebegade angepumalanga yeJordani inarha, ukusuka emrhobeni we-Arinoni ukuya entabeni iRherimoni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (AmaTsidoni abiza iRherimoni bona yiSiriyoni khibe ama-Amori wona athi yiSeniri.) 
Deuteronomy3:10 Iye, sathatha woke amadorobho wenarha yemibundu eligagadu, okutjho iGiliyadi yoke neBhatjhani yoke ukuyokufika eSaleka ne-Edreyi okumadorobho wombuso ka-Ogi weBhatjhani." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Ngu-Ogi yedwa ikosi yeBhatjhani owasalako kumisalela yamaRafa. Qala, umbhedakhe gade wenziwe ngesimbi, useRabha okuyihlokodorobho yama-Amoni. Gade umamitha amane ubude, ulimitha nesiquntu nesiqunjwana ububanzi ngesilinganiso esijayelekileko.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Lokha nasithumba inarha le ngesikhatheso, nganikela amaRubeni namaGadi isifunda ukusuka e-Aroweri okulidorobho elingemrhobeni we-Arinoni ukuyela ngetlhagwini kanye nesiquntu senarha yemibundu yakwaGiliyadi namadorobho wakhona." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Inarha eseleko yakwaGiliyadi nayo yoke iBhatjhani, okumbuso waka-Ogi, ngakunikela isiquntu sekoro kaManase. (Soke isifunda se-Arigobho, okutjho yoke iBhatjhani, godu sibizwa bonyana yinarha yeRafa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 UJayire osizukulwana sakaManase wathatha soke isifunda se-Arigobho okutjho iBhatjhani, ukuyokufika emkhawulweni wamaGetjhuri newamaMakathi. Wathiyelela isifundeso ngebizo lakhe wathi yiRhavothi-Jayire njengombana saziwa njalo nanamhlanje.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 UMakiri ngamnikela isifunda esingetlhagwini yeGiliyadi 
Deuteronomy3:16 bese amaRubeni namaGadi ngawanikela isifunda esingesewula yeGiliyadi ukuyokufika emrhobeni we-Arinoni. Imikhawulo yawo bekumlanjana we-Arinoni ngesewula, umlanjana weJabokhi ngetlhagwini, isifunda sama-Amoni ngetlhagwini-pumalanga," 
Deuteronomy3:17 umrhoba i-Araba ngetjingalanga (okutjho umlambo iJordani ukusuka eKinerethi ukuyokufika elwandle le-Araba, okulilwandle leTswayi). Umkhawulo ngesewula-pumalanga bekumathomo wentaba iPisiga." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Nganiyala ngesikhatheso ngathi: “USomnini uZimenu uninikele inarha le bona ibe lilifa lenu. Woke amadoda anesibindi azakuyama ahlomile ngaphambi kwabafowenu ama-Israyeli. 
Deuteronomy3:19 Kodwana abafazi benu, ababuthakathaka benu kanye nefuywenu njengombana ninefuyo enengi nje, bazakusala ngemadorobheni engininikele wona;" 
Deuteronomy3:20 bekube kulapha uSomnini anikela khona abafowenu ukuphumula njengombana wenza kini, nabo bathumba inarha ebayiphiwa nguSomnini uZimenu ngaphetjheya kweJordani. Ngemva kwalapho-ke nizakubuyela omunye nomunye endawenakhe enganinikela yona.”" 
Deuteronomy3:21 Ngesikhatheso ngayala uJotjhuwa ngathi: “Amehlwakho abone koke uSomnini uZimenu akwenze emakhosini amabili la. USomnini uzakwenza soneso nemibusweni enizokudabula kiyo. 
Deuteronomy3:22 Anizuyesaba ngombana nguSomnini uZimenu onilwelako.” 
Deuteronomy3:23 Yeke ngabawa uSomnini ngesikhatheso ngathi: 
Deuteronomy3:24 “Awu, Somnini Somandla, sewuthome ukutjengisa incekwakho ubukhulu bakho nesandla sakho esinamandla. Ngimuphi uzinyana emkayini namkha ephasini ongenza imisebenzi engaka kanye nezenzo ezikulu ezinjengezakho na?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Bengithi uSomnini akangivumele ngiyame, ngiyokubona inarha ehle ngaphetjheya kweJordani, inarha ehle yeentatjana kanye neLibhanoni.”" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Kodwana uSomnini wangithukuthelela ngebanga lenu, azange angilalele, wathi kimi: “Sekwanele, ungabe usakhuluma litho kimi ngendaba le." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Yenyukela esiqongolweni sePisiga, uphakamisele amehlwakho ngetjingalanga, ngetlhagwini, ngesewula nangepumalanga, uzibonele wena ngokwakho ngombana awuzokuyama iJordani le." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Kodwana yala uJotjhuwa, umkhuthaze bewumqinise ngombana nguye ozakuyama nabantwaba. Yena uzabathumbisa inarha ozayibona.”" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Nje-ke sahlala emrhobeni ngaphetjheya kweBhethe-Pewori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Nje-ke nina ma-Israyeli, yelelani iimiso nemithetho enginifundisa yona, niyiphethe kobana niphile nikwazi ukungena nithumbe inarha uSomnini uZimu waboyihlomkhulu aninikele yona." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Ningangezeleli begodu ningaphunguli elizwini enginiyala ngalo, kodwana phethani imithetho enginiyala ngayo kaSomnini uZimenu." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Amehlwenu akubonile okwenziwa nguSomnini kuBhali-Pewori. USomnini uZimenu warhayila phakathi kwenu woke amadoda agade alandela uBhali wePewori," 
Deuteronomy4:4 kodwana nina enakakarela kuSomnini uZimenu, noke nisaphila nanamhlanje." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Qala, nginifundise iimiso nemithetho njengombana ngayalwa nguSomnini uZimami ukuze niphile ngayo naningena enarheni enizoyithumba." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Ibulungeni beniyiphethe ngombana lokho kuzakuba kuhlakanipha nelwazi lenu emehlweni wabantu abazakuthi nabezwa zoke iimiswezi bathi: “Ngambala isizwe esikhulwesi sibabantu abahlakaniphileko nabanelihlo.” 
Deuteronomy4:7 Alo, ngisiphi isizwe esikhulu esinozinyana ohlala hlangana naso njengombana kwenza uSomnini uZimethu kithi kikho koke esimbizela khona?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Godu ngisiphi isizwe esikhulu esineemiso nemithetho elunge njengawo woke umyalo engininikela wona namhlanje lo? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Yelelani, nizitjheje ngesikhathi soke bonyana ningakhohlwa izinto enizibone ngamehlwenu. Azihlale zisemikhumbulwenenu ipilwenu yoke, nizifundise abantwabenu neenzukulwana zenu" 
Deuteronomy4:10 bona kwenzakalani mhlana nijame phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu eRhorebe lokha uSomnini nakazakuthi kimi: “Ngibuthelelela abantu kobana ngibazwise amezwami ukuze bafunde ukungesaba imihla yoke yokuphila kwabo lapha bahlala khona nokobana bafundise nabantwababo ukuwagcina.” 
Deuteronomy4:11 Natjhidela najama ekuthomeni kwentaba, intaba yavutha umlilo ukufikela emkayini elifini elimabhombo nelimnyama." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Yeke uSomnini wakhuluma nani aphakathi komlilo, nezwa umdumo wamezwi kodwana nangabona isimo, kwezwakala ilizwi kwaphela." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Wamemezela kini isivumelwano sakhe aniyala bonyana nisenze, okutjho imiyalo elitjhumi, ayitlola phezu kwemiqebethu emibili." 
Deuteronomy4:14 USomnini wangiyala ngesikhatheso bonyana nginifundise iimiso nemithetho kobana niyenze enarheni eniya kiyo nenizoyithumba. 
Deuteronomy4:15 Ngalokho zitjhejeni khulu. Njengombana ningazange nibone nanyana ngisiphi isimo mhlana uSomnini akhuluma nani eRhorebe aphakathi komlilo," 
Deuteronomy4:16 zitjhejeni ningenzi ukurhubutjheka ngokuzibumbela iinthombembazwa nganamkha ngisiphi isimo, kungaba ngesomduna namkha somsikazi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 iye, isimo sanamkha ngisiphi isilwana ephasini, isimo sanamkha ngiyiphi inyoni enamaphiko ephapha emkayini," 
Deuteronomy4:18 isimo sanamkha yini erharhaba equlwanini, isimo sanamkha ngiyiphi ihlambi engemanzini ngaphasi kwephasi." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Godu nitjheje ningathi naniphakamisela amehlwenu emkayini, nanibona umkhambathi womkayi, okutjho ilanga, inyanga neenkwekwezi bese niyadurha nithome nizikhothamele nizilotjhe. Izintwezi uSomnini uZimenu uzabele boke abantu ngaphasi komthunzi welanga," 
Deuteronomy4:20 kodwana nina uSomnini unithethe wanikhupha ekehleni yomlilo wesimbi eGibhide bonyana nibe lilifa lakhe njengombana kunjalo nanamhlanje. 
Deuteronomy4:21 USomnini wangithukuthelela ngebanga lenu bewafunga bona ngingayami iJordani nokobana ngingalibhadi enarheni ehle uSomnini uZimenu aninikela yona bona ibe lilifa lenu. 
Deuteronomy4:22 Nje-ke ngizakufela enarheni le, angizukuyamela ngaphetjheya kweJordani, kodwana nina nizakuyama nithumbe inarha ehle leyo ibe lilifa lenu." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Zitjhejeni ningakhohlwa isivumelwano sakaSomnini uZimenu asenza nani bese niyadurha nenze iinthombembazwa zomfanekiso wanamkha yini uSomnini uZimenu analela ngayo. 
Deuteronomy4:24 Mbala, uSomnini uZimenu umlilo oqothulako, uZimu onesikhwele." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Nanibeletha abantwana kanye neenzukulwana, sele nihlezi ninethezekile enarheni bese niyazirhubutjha ngokwenza iinthombembazwa zomfanekiso wanamkha yini, nithukuthelise uSomnini uZimenu ngokwenza okumbi lokho," 
Deuteronomy4:26 yazini bona ngenza izulu nephasi kobana zibe bofakazi bami namhlanje ngokujamelana nani: Ngambala nizakubhubha masinyana enarheni eniya kiyo bona ibe lilifa lenu naniyama iJordani. Angeze naphila ukuyaphi nanifika khona, kodwana nizakurhayilwa nya." 
Deuteronomy4:27 USomnini uzanihlakaza hlangana nabantu nibe lidlanzana ezizweni uSomnini azanisa kizo. 
Deuteronomy4:28 Lapho nizakulotjha abosingazimu besigodo nebelitje okumisebenzi yezandla zabantu, izinto ezingaboniko, ezingezwako, ezingagomiko nezinganukeleliko."
