Deuteronomy4:29 Kodwana ukusuka lapho nizakufuna uSomnini uZimenu begodu nizamfumana nakube nimfuna ngeenhliziyo zenu ezipheleleko nangemiphefumulwenu yoke. 
Deuteronomy4:30 Lokha nanisematshwenyekweni bese zoke izintwezi zehlela phezu kwenu emalangeni wokugcina, nizakubuyela kuSomnini uZimenu nilalele ilizwi lakhe," 
Deuteronomy4:31 ngombana uSomnini uZimenu unguZimu onomusa. Angeze anitjhiya namkha anirhayile namkha akhohlwe isivumelwano saboyihlomkhulu asifunga kibo. 
Deuteronomy4:32 Nje-ke buzani ngesikhathi esibe ngaphambi kwenu soloko kwamhla uZimu adala umuntu ephasinapha, nibuze emagumbini womane kobana kunento ekulu efana nale eyakhe yenzeka namkha kwezwakala ngayo na?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Kunabantu abakhe bezwa ilizwi lakazinyana likhuluma phakathi komlilo njengombana nina nizwe ilizwi lakaZimu khonapho khibe nisaphila na? 
Deuteronomy4:34 Kwakhe kwaba nozinyana owalinga ukukhamba ayozenyulela isizwe hlangana nezinye ngokuzibonakalisa ngamatshwenyeko, iimbonakaliso, imikarisomraro nezipi, ngamandla amakhulu nangesiphanga sakhe nangokwesabeka okukhulu njengombana kwenza uSomnini uZimenu eGibhide niqalile na?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Nina nakhonjiswa bonyana nazi ukuthi uSomnini unguZimu, akakho omunye ngaphandle kwakhe." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Wanizwisa ilizwi lakhe asezulwini kobana anikhalime, ephasini wanibonisa umlilwakhe omkhulu, nezwa amezwakhe aphakathi komlilo." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Ngebanga lokobana wathanda aboyihlomkhulu, wakhetha iinzukulwana zabo ngemva kwabo, wanikhupha eGibhide ngokwakhe nangamandlakhe amakhulu," 
Deuteronomy4:38 waqotjha phambi kwenu izizwe ezikulu nezinamandla kunani kobana aningenise, aniphe inarha yezizwezo ibe lilifa lenu njengombana kunjalo nanamhlanje." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Yazini-ke namhlanje, nikufake eenhliziyweni zenu kobana uSomnini unguZimu ezulwini phezulu nephasini phasi, akakho omunye!" 
Deuteronomy4:40 Ngalokho gcinani iimiso nemiyalwakhe enginiyala ngayo namhlanje ukuze izinto zinikhambele kuhle kanye neenzukulwana zenu ezilandelako nokobana amalangenu wokuphila ande endaweni enihlala kiyo, okuyindawo uSomnini uZimenu anipha yona isiphelani." 
Deuteronomy4:41 (Ngesikhatheso uMosi wahlukanisa amadorobho amathathu angepumalanga yeJordani 
Deuteronomy4:42 kobana nakukhona obuleleko abalekele kiwo. Obulala omunye umuntu angakahlosi nongazange akhe amzonde phambilini nabalekela emadorobheni lawa uzakuphephisa ipilwakhe: 
Deuteronomy4:43 IBhetseri eserhalawumbeni elisenarheni yemibundu eligagadu izakuba ngeyakwaRubeni, iRamothi ibe ngeyamaGadi bese iGolani eseBhatjhani ibe ngeyakwaManase.)" 
Deuteronomy4:44 UMosi wajamisa umthetho phambi kwama-Israyeli," 
Deuteronomy4:45 okutjho ubufakazi, iimiso nemithetho kaSomnini. Wakhuluma kuma-Israyeli emva kokuphuma eGibhide" 
Deuteronomy4:46 ngepumalanga yeJordani emrhobeni ngaphetjheya kweBhethe-Pewori. Bekusenarheni kaSirhoni ikosi yama-Amori ogade ahlala eRhetjhibhoni owahlulwa nguMosi nama-Israyeli sele baphumile eGibhide. 
Deuteronomy4:47 Bathumba inarhakhe kanye neyaka-Ogi ikosi yeBhatjhani okumakhosi amabili wama-Amori agade ahlala ngepumalanga ngaphetjheya kweJordani. 
Deuteronomy4:48 Godu bathumba nenarha ukusuka e-Aroweri emagegana nomlanjana i-Arinoni ukuyela entabeni iSiwoni okutjho iRherimoni 
Deuteronomy4:49 kanye nomrhoba woke ongepumalanga yeJordani ukusukela ngetlhagwini ukuyela ngelwandle elisemrhobeni weJordani emathomeni wentaba iPisiga. 
Deuteronomy5:1 UMosi wabiza woke ama-Israyeli wabeka kiwo ikulumo le: Yizwani nina ma-Israyeli, iimiso nemithetho engiyikhulume kini namhlanje ukuze niyifunde beniyelele ukuyenza." 
Deuteronomy5:2 USomnini uZimethu wenza isivumelwano nathi eRhorebe. 
Deuteronomy5:3 USomnini azange enze isivumelwanesi nabobaba kodwana usenze nathi soke esilapha esisaphilako namhlanje. 
Deuteronomy5:4 USomnini wakhuluma nani ubuso nobuso entabeni aphakathi komlilo," 
Deuteronomy5:5 mina ngangijame hlangana noSomnini nani ngesikhatheso kobana ngimemezele kini ilizwi lakaSomnini ngombana gade nesaba ngebanga lomlilo; ngalokho azange nenyukele entabeni. USomnini wathi: 
Deuteronomy5:6 “Mina Somnini nginguZimakho owakukhupha enarheni yeGibhide ekumbeni yobukhoboka. 
Deuteronomy5:7 Ungalotjhi abosingazimu, lotjha mina kwaphela." 
Deuteronomy5:8 Ungazenzeli isithombesibazwa, namkha umfanekiso wananyana yini esezulwini phezulu namkha ephasini phasi nanyana ngemanzini ngaphasi kwephasi." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Ungazikhothameli izintwezo, ungazilotjhi ngombana mina Somnini nginguZimakho. NginguZimu onesikhwele owehlisela isibetho sezono zaboyise phezu kwabantwababo besizukulwana sesithathu nesesine salabo abangenzi intandwami." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Kodwana ukwethembeka kwami kuzakuhlala eenkulungwaneni zeenzukulwana zalabo abangikhathalelako nabalonda imiyalwami. 
Deuteronomy5:11 Ungakhulumeli butjhilweni ngebizo lakaSomnini uZimakho ngombana uSomnini uzambeka umlandu loyo ophatha ibizo lakhe butjhilweni. 
Deuteronomy5:12 Hlonipha ilanga leSabatha, ulilonde ngokucwenga njengombana uSomnini uZimakho akuyala." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Sebenza amalanga asithandathu, wenze woke umsebenzakho;" 
Deuteronomy5:14 kodwana ilanga lekhomba liliSabatha, lahlukaniselwe uSomnini uZimakho. Mhlokho ungasebenzi ngitjho nakancani, wena, indodanakho nendodakazakho, ikhoboka nekhobokakazi lakho, ikomakho nodumbanakho, okutjho yoke ifuywakho namkha isikhonzi esihlala nawe; ukuze ikhoboka nekhobokakazi lakho liphumule njengawe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Ukhumbule bonyana gade ulikhoboka enarheni yeGibhide, uSomnini uZimakho wakukhupha lapho ngesandla esinamandla nangesiphanga sakhe. Ngalokho uZimakho wakuyala bonyana ugidinge ilanga leSabatha." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Yazisa uyihlo nonyoko njengombana uyalwe nguSomnini uZimakho ukuze kwande amalangakho wokuphila nokobana izinto zikukhambele kuhle endaweni oyiphiwa nguSomnini uZimakho. 
Deuteronomy5:17 Ungabulali umuntu. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Ungahlobongi. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Ungebi. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Ungafakazi amala ngomunye umuntu. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Ungakhanukeli umfazi womunye umuntu, ungafisi ikumbakhe, isimakhe, ikhoboka namkha ikhobokakazi lakhe, ikomakhe, udumbanakhe nanyana yini engeyomunye umuntu.”" 
Deuteronomy5:22 Amezwi lawo akhulunywa nguSomnini kiwo woke umkhambathi wenu entabeni aphakathi komlilo, elifini elimabhombo nelimnyama ngelizwi elikhulu begodu azange angezelele. Wawatlola emiqebethwini emibili wanginikela wona." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Kwathi lokha nanizwa ilizwi phakathi kobumnyama, lokha intaba nayitjhako, natjhidela eduze kwami nazo zoke iinhloko zeenkoro zenu kanye nabaphathi benu" 
Deuteronomy5:24 nathi: “Qala uSomnini uZimethu usikhombise iphazimulo nobukhulu bakhe, nje-ke silizwile ilizwi lakhe lihlangana nomlilo, namhlanje sibone uZimu akhuluma nomuntu kodwana umuntu usaphila." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Alo, thina sizakufelani? Umlilo omkhulu lo uzosiqothula; nange singabuya godu sizwe ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimethu, ngiqinisile ngithi sizokufa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Ngubani phakathi kwayo yoke inyama owakhe wezwa ilizwi lakaZimu ophilako likhuluma phakathi komlilo njengombana kwenzeka kithi, kodwana waphila?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Tjhidela wena uzwe koke uSomnini uZimethu azokutjho, usitjele koke uSomnini uZimethu azokukhuluma nawe, thina-ke sizakulalela besenze.”" 
Deuteronomy5:28 Ngambala uSomnini wawezwa amezwi wenu lokha nanikhuluma nami, wathi kimi: “Ngiwezwile amezwi abantwaba abawakhulume kuwe; koke abakutjhwileko kuwe kulungile." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Inga bangahlala banomkhumbulo onjalo wokobana bangesabe bebagcine yoke imiyalwami ngeenkhathi zoke ukuze izinto zibakhambele kuhle nabantwababo isiphelani! 
Deuteronomy5:30 Khamba ufese ubatjele bonyana babuyele ematendenabo. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Kodwana wena jama eduze namapha, ngizakutjela yoke imiyalo, iimiso nemithetho ozabafundisa yona kobana bayenze enarheni engibanikela yona njengelifa labo.”" 
Deuteronomy5:32 Ngalokho yelelani nenze koke uSomnini uZimenu aniyale ngakho; ningaphambukeli ngesigomeni namkha ngesinceleni. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Nikhambe endleleni yoke uSomnini uZimenu aniyale ngayo ukuze niphile nokobana koke kunikhambele kuhle, niphile isikhathi eside enarheni enizayithumba." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Le-ke miyalo, okutjho iimiso nemithetho uSomnini uZimenu angiyale bonyana nginifundise ukuze niyenze enarheni enizokungena kiyo niyithumbe." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Umnqopho womyalo lo kukobana nesabe uSomnini uZimenu ngokulonda iimiso nemithethwakhe enginiyala ngayo. Yenzeni nina, abantwabenu neenzukulwana zenu imihla yoke yokuphila kwenu ukuze niphile isikhathi eside." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Yelelani nina ma-Israyeli niphethe imiyalo ngokupheleleko ukuze koke kunikhambele kuhle enarheni egeleza ibisi neliju, nokobana nande khulu njengombana uSomnini uZimu waboyihlomkhulu anithembisile." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Yizwa wena Israyeli! USomnini nguZimethu, nguye yedwa uSomnini." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Ngalokho uzakukhathalela uSomnini uZimakho ngayo yoke ihliziywakho, nangomphefumulwakho woke nangawo woke amandlakho." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Amezwi la engikuyala ngawo namhlanje azakuba sehliziywenakho. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Uwabuyekeze njalo ebantwaneni bakho ngokuzimisela, ukhulume ngawo nawuhlezi emzinakho, nalokha nawukhamba endleleni, nawulalako nalokha nawuvukako." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Uzawabopha njengenyongo esandleni nanjengomkhala ehloko abe sikhumbuzo. 
Deuteronomy6:9 Uzawatlola egosenini yekumbakho nemasangwenakho. 
Deuteronomy6:10 USomnini uZimenu uzaningenisa enarheni ayifungela kiboyihlomkhulu, ku-Abrahama, u-Isaka noJakopo. Lokha nayininikela amadorobho amakhulu namahle eningazange niwakhe," 
Deuteronomy6:11 neenkumba ezizele ipahla ehle eningazange niyisebenzele, imiphathamanzi eningazange niyembe, iindiribe nemithi ye-oliva eningazange niyitjale, nalokha nigoma, nisutha," 
Deuteronomy6:12 yelelani bona ningakhohlwa uSomnini owanikhupha enarheni yeGibhide, ekumbeni yobukhoboka." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Yesabani uSomnini uZimenu kwaphela; nimlotjhe benifunge ngebizo lakhe. 
Deuteronomy6:14 Ningadlhemadlhemi ngemva kwabosingazimu babantu abanibhodileko," 
Deuteronomy6:15 ngombana uSomnini ophakathi kwenu unguZimu onesikhwele; ubukhali bakhe buzakuvutha phezu kwenu, anirhayile ebusweni bephasi." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Ningazizinyi uSomnini uZimenu njengombana nenza eMasa. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Gcinani ngokuzimisela imiyalo kaSomnini uZimenu nobufakazi bakhe neemiso zakhe aniyale ngazo. 
Deuteronomy6:18 Nenze okulungileko nokuhle phambi kwakaSomnini ukuze izinto zinikhambele kuhle, nokobana nikwazi ukungena nithumbe inarha ehle uSomnini ayifungela kiboyihlomkhulu" 
Deuteronomy6:19 ngokuqotjha zoke izitha zenu phambi kwenu njengombana uSomnini wathembisa. 
Deuteronomy6:20 Amadodanenu azanibuza ngamunye esikhathini esizako athi: “Butjho ukuthini ubufakazi, iimiso nemithetho uSomnini uZimethu aniyale ngakho?”" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Yeke nizawaphendula nithi: “Sasimakhoboka kaFaro eGibhide, kodwana uSomnini wasikhupha lapho ngesandla esinamandla;" 
Deuteronomy6:22 wasikhombisa iimbonakaliso nemikarisomraro emikhulu nesabekako ngokujamelana noFaro kanye naso soke isigodlo sakhe, siqalile." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Wasikhupha-ke thina lapho kobana asilethe abe asiphe inarha ayifungela kibobamkhulu. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Nje-ke uSomnini usiyale bonyana senze yoke imithetho le, ukwesaba uSomnini uZimethu kobana izinto zisikhambele kuhle isikhathi soke, asigcine siphilile njengombana kunjalo namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Lokho kuzakuba buqotho kithi nakube siyelela bonyana senze yoke imiyalo le phambi kwakaSomnini uZimethu njengombana asiyalile.” 
Deuteronomy7:1 Lokha uSomnini uZimenu aniletha enarheni eningena kiyo bona niyithumbe bese aqotjhe izizwe ezinengi phambi kwenu, okumaRhithi, amaGirigatjhi, ama-Amori, amaKanana, amaPerizi, amaRhivi namaJebusi, izizwe ezilikhomba ezikulu nezinamandla kunani," 
Deuteronomy7:2 nalokha uSomnini uZimenu anikela izizwezo kini bese nizihlule; nizakufanela bonyana nizirhayile nya. Ningenzi isivumelwano nazo begodu ningabi nomusa phezu kwazo. 
Deuteronomy7:3 Ningakhi isikhozi nazo ngokwendisela amadodakazenu emadodanenazo namkha nithathele amadodanenu amadodakazazo. 
Deuteronomy7:4 Nakungasinjalo, zizakudurhisa amadodanenu angasalandeli uSomnini bese alotjha abosingazimu. Itukuthelo kaSomnini izakuvutha phezu kwenu, anirhayile masinyana." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Kodwana nakhu enizakwenza kizo: Bhuruzani ama-aldarazo, niphahlaze amatje akhethekileko, nigawule nemifanekiso yabo-Atjhera bese nitjhisa iinthombembazwa zazo." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Nina nibabantu abacwengileko kuSomnini uZimenu. USomnini uZimenu unikhethe kobana nibe sisizwe esingesakhe hlangana nabo boke abantu abasephasinapha. 
Deuteronomy7:7 USomnini akakabeki ihliziywakhe kini bewanikhetha ngebanga lokobana nibanengi ngesibalo kunabanye (emanyeni benilidlanzana khulu kibo boke abantu)," 
Deuteronomy7:8 kodwana kungebanga lokobana uSomnini uyanithanda nokobana ufeza isithembiso asifunga kiboyihlomkhulu. Ngebangelo uSomnini unikhuphe ngesandla esinamandla, wanihlenga ekumbeni yobukhoboka, esandleni sakaFaro ikosi yeGibhide." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Ngalokho yazini-ke bonyana uZimenu nguye yedwa uZimu, uZimu othembekileko ngokugcina isivumelwano. Uthembekile kilabo abamkhathalelako balonde imiyalwakhe, eenkulungwaneni zeenzukulwana," 
Deuteronomy7:10 kodwana uhlunguphaza labo abangakathembeki kuye, abarhayile. Akazokuhlehlisa isibetho songakathembeki kuye kodwana uzomhlunguphaza." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Ngalokho niyelele ukwenza imiyalo, iimiso nemithetho enginiyala ngayo namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Ngebanga lokobana nilalele imithetho leyo, nayilonda benayenza, uSomnini uZimenu uzakulonda isivumelwano nokwethembeka akufungela kiboyihlomkhulu bona uzakwenza." 
Deuteronomy7:13 USomnini uzanithanda, anibusise abe anandise enarheni ayifunga kiboyihlomkhulu bona uzaninikela yona. Uzakubusisa imbelekwenu, inzalo yeenkomo nezimvu zenu, neentjalo zenu okutjho ikoroyi, iwayini namafuthenu we-oliva." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Nizakubusiseka ngaphezu kwezizwe zoke: Akuzukuba nenyumba phakathi kwenu, komduna namkha komsikazi. Ngitjho nefuywenu ayikho ezakuhlala ingazali." 
Deuteronomy7:15 USomnini uzakususa zoke izifo phezu kwenu. Angeze anehlisela amagulo amambi weGibhide enakhe nawabona, kodwana uzawehlisela phezu kwabo boke abanizondako." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Nizakuqeda boke abantu uSomnini uZimenu azabanikela ezandleni zenu, amehlwenu angabarhawukeli. Ningalotjhi abosingazimu babo ngombana lokho kuzakuba sisifu kini." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Mhlamunye ningadlumbana nithi: “Izizwezi zikulu kunathi, alo singazirhayila njani?”" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Ningazesabi, kodwana khumbulani kuhle lokho uSomnini uZimenu akwenza ngoFaro nabo boke eGibhide:" 
Deuteronomy7:19 USomnini uZimenu wanenyula eGibhide ngamatshwenyeko amakhulu niqalile, iimbonakaliso nemikarisomraro, ngesandla esinamandla nangesiphanga sakhe. Ngaleyondlela uSomnini uZimenu uzakwenza soneso kibo boke abantu enibesabakwaba." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ngaphezu kwalokho uSomnini uZimenu uzabathumelela abonondovu kufikela lapha labo abaseleko nabazifihlele nina barhayilwa khona. 
Deuteronomy7:21 Ningabi nevalo ngabo ngombana uSomnini uZimenu uphakathi kwenu, uZimu omkhulu nosabekako." 
Deuteronomy7:22 USomnini uZimenu uzakutjhabalalisa izizwezi phambi kwenu kancani kancani, anizoziqeda zoke kanye kanye. Nakungasinjalo kuzakwanda iimbandana zommango ezingaba yingozi kini." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Kodwana uSomnini uZimenu uzakunikela izizwezi ezandleni zenu bese uzihlanganisa iinhloko kufikela lapha zirhayileka khona. 
Deuteronomy7:24 USomnini uzakunikela amakhosi wazo ezandleni zenu, nitjhabalalise amabizwawo ngaphasi komthunzi welanga. Akunamuntu ozakghona ukujamelana nani kufikela lapha nibarhayila khona." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Nitjhise iinthombembazwa zabosingazimu bazo, ningarhaleli namkha nizithathele isiliva namkha igolide elikibosingazimu labo ngombana lizanibamba njengesifu. Izintwezo zisinyenyiso kuSomnini uZimenu." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Ngalokho ningalethi izinto ezinyenyisakwezo ngeenkumbeni zenu bese niba ngabathuwelelisiweko njengazo. Ninyenye benigonyuluke ngalokho ngombana kuzizinto ezithuwelelisiweko. 
Deuteronomy8:1 Nitjheje ukwenza yoke imiyalo enginiyala ngayo namhlanje ukuze niphile, nande, beningene nithumbe inarha uSomnini afunga bonyana uzayinikela aboyihlomkhulu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Nikhumbule yoke indlela uSomnini uZimenu anirhole ngayo eminyakeni ematjhumi amane erhalawumbeni. Wanithoba lokha nakanihlolako bonyana azi okuseenhliziywenu zenu nokobana nizakulalela imiyalwakhe namkha njani. 
Deuteronomy8:3 Ngambala wanithoba ngokunibulalisa ngendlala. Wanondla ngemana ebeningayazi, ngitjho naboyihlomkhulu bebangayazi ukuze anifundise bonyana umuntu akaphili ngesikwa kwaphela kodwana uphila nangelinye nelinye ilizwi eliphuma emlonyeni kaSomnini." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Kiyo yoke leminyaka ematjhumi amane, izambatho zenu azange zirhaluke neenyawo zenu azange zivuvuke." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Yazini-ke eenhliziyweni zenu bonyana njengobaba nakhalima umntwanakhe, ngokunjalo noZimu uyanikhalima." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Ngalokho gcinani imiyalo kaSomnini uZimenu ngokukhamba eendleleni zakhe nangokumesaba. 
Deuteronomy8:7 USomnini uZimenu uniletha enarheni ehle, inarha enemilanjana neeyalu, okutjho amanzi avinyilika emirhobeni neentabeni," 
Deuteronomy8:8 inarha yekoroyi nebhali, iindiribe, amakhiwani namarharinada, inarha yeliju namafutha we-oliva," 
Deuteronomy8:9 inarha lapha nizagoma khona isikwa singapheli, lapha ningekhe naswela khona, inarha lapha amatje wakhona kungewesimbi, lapha ningemba khona ikoporo emibundwini yakhona." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Nizagoma nibethe esimonyongwana, nikhakhazise uSomnini uZimenu ngobuhle benarha aniphe yona." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Yelelani bona ningakhohlwa uSomnini uZimenu ngokungalaleli imiyalwakhe, imithethwakhe kanye neemiso zakhe enginiyala ngazo namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Nasele nigome nasutha, nakha iinkumba zamabono benahlala kizo," 
Deuteronomy8:13 nalokha iinkomo, izimvu neembuzi zenu nasele zandile, isiliva negolide lenu nalo landile nakho koke eninakho sele kwandile," 
Deuteronomy8:14 ningazikhukhumezi, nikhohlwe uSomnini uZimenu owanikhupha eGibhide ekumbeni yobukhoboka." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Iye, uSomnini owanirhola erhalawumbeni elikhulu nelesabekako elineenyoka ezinesihlungu nabofezela kanye nequlwani eyomileko lapha bekunganamanzi khona, wanipha amanzi ngitjho edwaleni." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Wanondla niserhalawumbeni ngemana naboyihlomkhulu abangayaziko ukuze anithobe abe anizizinye, kuthi ekugcineni nizuze." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Ningathi eenhliziyweni zenu: “Umnono ongaka lo, kazi mjuluko wamandla nezandla zethu.”" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Kodwana khumbulani uSomnini uZimenu ngombana nguye onipha amandla wokufumana umnono ukuze aqinisekise isivumelwano sakhe asifunga kiboyihlomkhulu njengombana kunjalo namhlanje. 
Deuteronomy8:19 Yazini bonyana nange ningakhohlwa uSomnini uZimenu, nidlhemadlheme ngemva kwabosingazimu, nibalotjhe benibakhothamele, ngiyafunga namhlanje bona nizakubhubha nya." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Iye, nizakubhubha njengezizwe uSomnini azibhubhise phambi kwenu ngombana anilaleli ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimenu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Lalelani nina ma-Israyeli! Nizakuyama iJordani namhlanje ningene bese nithumba izizwe ezikulu nezinamandla kunani, amadorobho amakhulu anemithangala etjhayisa emkayini," 
Deuteronomy9:2 okubabantu abanengi nabandlondlobeleko kunathi, iinzukulwana zaka-Anakhi enimaziko benezwa ngaye nakuthiwa: “Akunamuntu ongajama phambi kweenzukulwana zaka-Anakhi!”" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Yazini-ke namhlanje bonyana loyo okhamba phambi kwenu anjengomlilo oqothulako, nguSomnini uZimenu. Uzaziqeda izizwezo ngokuziguqisa phambi kwenu, nina-ke niziqotjhe benizibhubhise msinyana njengombana uSomnini anithembisile." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Ningathi ngemva kobana uSomnini uZimenu sele aqotjhe izizwezo phambi kwenu bese nidlumbana nithi: “Kungebanga lokulunga kwethu okwenze uSomnini bonyana asiphe inarha le.” Awa, kungebanga lobukhohlakali bezizwezi okwenze bonyana uSomnini aziqotjhe phambi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Anizokuthumba inarha yezizwezo ngebanga lokulunga kwenu namkha ubumsulwa beenhliziyo zenu, kodwana kungebanga lobukhohlakali bazo kobana uSomnini uZimenu aziqotjhe phambi kwenu nokobana aqinisekise ilizwi alifungela kiboyihlomkhulu u-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Yazini-ke bonyana uSomnini uZimenu akakaninikeli inarha ehle le kobana niyithumbe ngebanga lokulunga kwenu. Kuhlekuhle nina nibabantu abaneentanyana! 
Deuteronomy9:7 Khumbulani begodu ningakhohlwa bona nimthukuthelise njani uSomnini uZimenu naniserhalawumbeni ukusuka mhlana niphuma enarheni yeGibhide bekube kumhlana nifika endaweni le, nilokhu nilwa noSomnini." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Khulukhulu eRhorebe kulapha nathukuthelisa khona uSomnini. USomnini wasilingeka kangangobana kwakuthi akanirhayile. 
Deuteronomy9:9 Lokha nangikhuphukela entabeni ukuyokwamukela imiqebethu yesivumelwano uSomnini asenza nani, ngahlala lapho amalanga amatjhumi amane nobusuku bakhona. Azange ngigome isikwa namkha ngisele amanzi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 USomnini wanginikela imiqebethu emibili etlolwe ngomuno kaZimu. Emiqebethwinapho gade kutlolwe woke amezwi uSomnini awakhuluma nani aphakathi komlilo entabeni ngelanga lomhlangano. 
Deuteronomy9:11 Kwathi ekupheleni kwamalanga amatjhumi amane nobusuku bakhona uSomnini wanginikela imiqebethu emibili, okungeyesivumelwano," 
Deuteronomy9:12 wathi kimi: “Sikima, wehle msinyana ngombana abantu bakho owabakhupha eGibhide barhubutjhe isivumelwano, baphambuka msinyana endleleni engabayala ngayo, bazenzela isithombesibunjwa.”" 
Deuteronomy9:13 USomnini waraga wathi kimi: “Ngibabonile abantwaba, maye uthi baneentanyana na!" 
Deuteronomy9:14 Yewungilise ngibarhayile, ngisule amabizwabo ngaphasi komthunzi welanga, wena ngikwenze isizwe esinamandla nesikhulu kunabo.”" 
Deuteronomy9:15 Nje-ke ngafulathela ngehla entabeni, intaba gade ivutha umlilo; imiqebethu emibili yesivumelwano beyisezandleni zami." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ngaqala ngabona bonyana nonile phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu; nizenzele ikunzana ebunjiweko. Nirhabile ukuphambuka endleleni uSomnini aniyala ngayo. 
Deuteronomy9:17 Yeke ngagugudlhela imiqebethu emibili leyo ngayimadlha phasi, yephuka niyiqalile." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Ngawa ngobuso phambi kwakaSomnini. Njengaphambilini kwaba malanga amatjhumi amane nobusuku bakhona ngingagomi isikwa namkha ngirhamule amanzi ngebanga lesonokazi enisenzileko ngokwenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini namthukuthelisa. 
Deuteronomy9:19 Gade nginesabela itukuthelo nobukhali bakaSomnini phezu kwenu ngombana bekanidinekele kangangobana besele alungele ukunirhayila. Kodwana nangesikhatheso uSomnini wangilalela. 
Deuteronomy9:20 USomnini godu wathukuthelela u-Aroni kangangobana besele alungele ukumrhayila, khonapho naye ngamthandazela." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Nje-ke ngathatha isinyenyiso senweso, okuyikunzana eniyenzileko, ngasitjhisa ngasiqova iinquqwana, ngasitshidlha saba njengethuli ngarhatjha ithulelo ngemlanjaneni ovela entabeni." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Godu eThabhera, eMasa neKhibrothi-Hatava nakhona nahlalela ukuthukuthelisa uSomnini." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Kwathi lokha uSomnini nanisusa eKhadetjhi-Bharineya wathi nikhuphuke nithumbe inarha aniphe yona, nalwa nomyalo kaSomnini uZimenu. Azange nimkholwe namkha nilalele ilizwi lakhe." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Benilokhu nilwa noSomnini ukusuka mhlana ngithoma ukunazi. 
Deuteronomy9:25 Yeke ngawa ngobuso phambi kwakaSomnini amalanga amatjhumi amane nobusuku bakhona ngombana uSomnini bekathe uzonirhayila. 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ngathandaza kuSomnini ngathi: “Maye Somnini Somandla! Ungarhayili abantu bakho abalilifa lakho, owabahlenga ngobukhulu bakho, wabakhupha eGibhide ngesandla esinamandla." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Khumbula incekwakho u-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo, ungayeleli ukunghanghabala kwabantwaba, namkha ubukhohlakali babo nanyana isono sabo," 
Deuteronomy9:28 ngombana inarha owasikhupha kiyo izakuthi, ‘USomnini uhlulekile ukubafikisa enarheni abathembise yona, nokubazonda bekabazonda, ubakhuphele zonezi enarheni kobana abarhayilele erhalawumbeni.’" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Bababantu bakho nelifa lakho, owalikhupha ngamandlakho amakhulu nangesiphanga sakho.”" 
Deuteronomy10:1 Ngesikhatheso uSomnini wathi kimi: “Baza imiqebethu emibili ifane neyokuthoma ukhuphukele kimi entabeni bese wenze umfaji weengodo. 
Deuteronomy10:2 Ngizotlola kiyo amezwi agade akeyokuthoma owayephulako bese uyifaka ngemfajini.” 
Deuteronomy10:3 Yeke ngenza umfaji ngeengodo zomtholo, ngabaza imiqebethu emibili njengeyokuthoma, ngakhuphukela entabeni ngiphethe imiqebethu emibili leyo." 
Deuteronomy10:4 USomnini watlola emiqebethwinapho njengekuthomeni: imithetho elitjhumi akhuluma ngayo kini entabeni aphakathi komlilo ngelanga lomhlangano, wanginikela yona." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Ngasuka entabeni ngehlela phasi, ngabeka imiqebethu ngemfajini engangiwenzile, naso-ke imiqebethu leyo njengombana uSomnini angiyala." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Ama-Israyeli gade afuduke emithonjeni yeBheni-Jakhani aya eMosera. U-Aroni wahlongakala bewabulungelwa lapho. Indodanakhe u-Elazara yalotjha njengomphristi esikhundleni sakhe. 
Deuteronomy10:7 Ekufudukeni kwama-Israyeli lapho, anqomba eGudigoda, asuka eGudigoda aya eJothibata inarha enemilanjana." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Ngesikhatheso uSomnini wahlukanisela ikoro yakwaLevi kobana ithwale umfaji wesivumelwano sakhe nokobana ibe ziinceku zakhe ukuze ilotjhe uSomnini beyibusise ebizweni lakhe njengombana kunjalo nanamhlanje. 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ngalokho amaLevi akanasabelo namkha ilifa kubafowawo, ilifa lawo nguSomnini njengombana uSomnini atjho njalo kiwo.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 Ngahlala entabeni njengekuthomeni, kwaba malanga amatjhumi amane nobusuku bakhona. Nalapha uSomnini wangilalela, wangathanda ukunirhayila." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Nje-ke uSomnini wathi kimi: “Sikima uthathe ikhambo lakho urhole abantu ukuze bangene bathumbe inarha engayifungela kiboyihlomkhulu kobana ngizabanikela yona.” 
Deuteronomy10:12 Alo-ke wena Israyeli, yini efunwa nguSomnini uZimakho ngaphandle kobana wesabe uSomnini uZimakho, ukhambe eendleleni zakhe zoke, uthembeke kuye, umlotjhe ngehliziywakho yoke nangomphefumulwakho woke," 
Deuteronomy10:13 ugcine imiyalo neemiso zakaSomnini engikuyala ngazo namhlanje kobana izinto zikukhambele kuhle. 
Deuteronomy10:14 Nanyana izulu, iye izulu lamazulu lingelakaSomnini uZimenu nephasi nakho koke okukilo" 
Deuteronomy10:15 khonapho uSomnini bekasoloko abeke ihliziywakhe kiboyihlomkhulu bewakhetha iinzukulwana zabo, okutjho nina, phakathi kwezizwe zoke njengombana kunjalo namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Ngalokho sokani amajwabu weenhliziyo zenu, ningasabi nekani." 
Deuteronomy10:17 USomnini uZimenu unguZimu ongaphezu kwabozinyana, yiKosi yamakhosi, uZimu omkhulu, onamandla nosabekako, ongenzi izinto ngokukhetha ibala nongafunjathiswako." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Iye, uSomnini ujamela intandani nomhlolokazi, uthanda isikhonzi, ubapha ukugoma nokokwembatha." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Ngalokho thandani isikhonzi ngombana nani gade niziinkhonzi enarheni yeGibhide. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Nesabe uSomnini uZimenu, nimlotjhe beninamathele kuye, nifunge ngebizo lakhe." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Uyindumiswenu, unguZimenu onenzele izinto ezikulu nezethusakwezo enizibone ngamehlwenu." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Aboyihlomkhulu behlela eGibhide bamatjhumi alikhomba wabantu. Nje-ke gadesi uSomnini uZimenu unenze naba banengi njengeenkwekwezi zomkayi. 
Deuteronomy11:1 Ngalokho khathalelani uSomnini uZimenu, nigcine iimfanelo zakhe, okutjho iimiso zakhe, imithethwakhe, kanye nemiyalwakhe ngaso soke isikhathi." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Yazini-ke namhlanje bona abantwabenu abazi begodu azange babone ukukhalima kwakaSomnini uZimenu, kodwana nina niyabazi ubukhulu bakhe, isandla sakhe esinamandla kanye nesiphanga sakhe." 
Deuteronomy11:3 Iye, niyawazi amatshwayo kanye nezenzo zakhe azenza ekabeni yeGibhide kuFaro ikosi yakhona nenarhenakhe yoke;" 
Deuteronomy11:4 nalokho akwenza ebuthweni leGibhide, eenjomaneni neenkaraneni zalo lokha nagubuzesa ibuthwelo ngamanzi welwandle lomGaba nalinigijimisako nangendlela uSomnini alibhubhisa nya ngayo njengombana nazi namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Niyakwazi okwenziwa nguSomnini kini naniserhalawumbeni kufikela lapha nifika khona endaweni le," 
Deuteronomy11:6 nokobana yenzani kuDatani no-Abiramu amadodana ka-Eliyabu umsa kaRubeni lokha iphasi livula umlomalo bonyana libaginye nemindenabo, amatendabo nakho koke okuphilako okwabalandelako, phakathi kwawo woke ama-Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Njengombana amehlwenu abone yoke imisebenzi emikhulu uSomnini ayenzileko," 
Deuteronomy11:8 gcinani yoke imiyalo enginiyala ngayo namhlanje. Qinani idolo, ningene nithumbe inarha eniyamela kiyo ukuyithatha bona ibe ngeyenu" 
Deuteronomy11:9 ukuze niphile isikhathi eside endaweni uSomnini ayifungela kiboyihlomkhulu bona uzabanikela yona kanye neenzukulwana zabo. Leyo-ke yinarha egeleza ibisi neliju. 
Deuteronomy11:10 Ngambala, inarha eningena kiyo kobana niyithumbe ayifani neGibhide eniphuma kiyo, lapha benitjala khona imbewenu kwanga sivande semirorho, niyisezela ngokumodza edakeni;" 
Deuteronomy11:11 kodwana inarha eningena kiyo kobana niyithumbe yinarha yeentaba nemirhoba esezelwa lizulu emkayini. 
Deuteronomy11:12 Kuyinarha etjhejwa nguSomnini uZimenu, amehlwakhe ahlala akiyo ukusuka ekuthomeni komnyaka bekube sekupheleni kwawo." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Nakube ngambala nizakulalela imiyalo kaSomnini enginiyala ngayo namhlanje, ukobana nikhathalele uSomnini uZimenu, nimlotjhe ngeenhliziyo zenu zoke nangemiphefumulwenu yoke," 
Deuteronomy11:14 yena wathembisa bonyana uzakunisa izulu enarhenenu ngesikhathi esifaneleko: izulu lokuthoma nelamuva. Nizakubulunga ikoroyi, iwayini namafuthenu we-oliva;" 
Deuteronomy11:15 godu uSomnini uzakumilisa utjani emirhulenenu kobana ifuywenu ikarule, nina nigome nisuthe." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Ziyeleleni ningayengwa bese niyaphambuka nilotjhe abosingazimu benibakhothamele 
Deuteronomy11:17 ngombana itukuthelo kaSomnini izakuvutha phezu kwenu, ivale amazulu ukuze izulu lingasana, inarha ingasakhiqiza ukudla bese nibhubha masinyana enarheni ehle uSomnini aninikele yona." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Ngalokho bekani amezwami la eenhliziyweni zenu nemiphefumulwenenu; niwabophelele abe njengenyongo ezandleni zenu nanjengomkhala eenhloko zenu abe sikhumbuzo. 
Deuteronomy11:19 Niwafundise abantwabenu, nikhulume ngawo naniditjhileko emizinenu, nanikhambako endleleni, nanilalako nalokha nanivukako." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Niwatlole eengosenini zeenkumba zenu nemasangwenenu 
Deuteronomy11:21 ukuze amalangenu newabantwabenu ande endaweni uSomnini ayifungela kiboyihlomkhulu ukubanikela yona ikani kusaphilwa. 
Deuteronomy11:22 Naniwulonda ngokupheleleko woke umyalo enginiyala bona niwenze, nikhathalele uSomnini uZimenu, nikhambe eendleleni zakhe zoke benikakarele kuye," 
Deuteronomy11:23 khona-ke uSomnini uzokuqotjha zoke izizwezi phambi kwenu, nina niphange izizwe ezikulwezo nezinamandla kunani." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Yoke indawo lapha inyawo lenu ligadanga khona izakuba ngeyenu; umkhawulwenu uzakuthoma erhalawumbeni ngesewula uphelele eLibhanoni ngetlhagwini begodu usuke emlanjeni iYufrathe ngepumalanga ukuya elwandle elingetjingalanga. 
Deuteronomy11:25 Akunamuntu ozakghona ukujamelana nani; uSomnini uZimenu uzakubeka ukwesabeka nevalo lenu phezu kwayo yoke inarha enibeka kiyo inyawo lenu njengombana anithembisa. 
Deuteronomy11:26 Qalani, ngibeka namhlanje phambi kwenu isibusiso namanikelela:" 
Deuteronomy11:27 isibusiso, nakube nilalela imiyalo kaSomnini uZimenu enginiyala ngayo namhlanje;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 amanikelela, naningalaleli imiyalo kaSomnini uZimenu, niphambuke endleleni enginiyale ngayo namhlanje, kobana nidlhemadlheme ngemva kwabosingazimu beendawezi." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Lokha uSomnini uZimenu aniletha enarheni eningena kiyo kobana niyithumbe, nizakubeka isibusiso entabeni iGerizimu nibeke amanikelela entabeni i-Ebali." 
Deuteronomy11:30 (Iintabezi zingaphetjheya kweJordani ngetjingalanga, zifulathele indlela eya ngetjingalanga, enarheni yamaKanana ahlala emrhobeni weJordani. Iintabezi zingaphetjheya kweGiligali eduze nemithi emikhulu yeMore.)" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Lokha naniyama iJordani kobana ningene nithumbe inarha uSomnini uZimenu aninikela yona nalokha naniyithathako benihlale kiyo," 
Deuteronomy11:32 tjhejani bona nenza zoke iimiso nemithetho engininikela yona namhlanje. 
Deuteronomy12:1 Nanzi iimiso nemithetho enizayenza ngokutjheja enarheni uSomnini uZimu waboyihlomkhulu aninikele yona kobana niyithumbe, imihla yoke yokuphila kwenu endaweni leyo." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Nitjhabalalise ngokupheleleko zoke iindawo lapha izizwe enizoziqotjha zilotjhela khona abosingazimu bazo eentabeni eziphakemeko, phezu kwemibundu nangaphasi komunye nomunye umuthi ohlaza." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Nizakubhuruza ama-aldarazo, niphadlhe namatjazo akhethekileko. Godu tjhisani imifanekiswazo yabo-Atjhera, nikghunule iinthombembazwa zabosingazimu bazo. Iye, nitjhabalalise ibizo labosingazimabo endaweni leyo." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Ningalotjhi uSomnini uZimenu ngendlela izizwezo zilotjha abosingazimu bazo ngayo," 
Deuteronomy12:5 kodwana akube sendaweni ezakukhethwa nguSomnini uZimenu hlangana kwazo zoke iinkoro zenu, kobana ijamise ibizo layo lapho belidunyiswe khonapho. Lapho kulapha nizakuza khona bona nibuze intando kaZimu," 
Deuteronomy12:6 nilethe lapho imihlabelwenu yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano, kwetjhumi neminikelwenu ekhethekileko, iminikelwenu yeenthembiso neyesihle, namazibulo weenkomo, wezimvu neweembuzi zenu." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Nigome khonapho phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu, nijekezele, nina nemindenenu, ngayo yoke imisebenzi yezandla zenu uSomnini uZimenu anibusisa ngayo." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Ningenzi njengombana senza lapha namhlanje, lapha omunye nomunye azenzela khona umathanda." 
Deuteronomy12:9 Njenganje, anikabi ukungena enarheni yelifa lapha uSomnini uZimenu azaninikela khona ukuphumula." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Kodwana lokha naniyama iJordani, nihlale enarheni uSomnini uZimenu aninikela yona bona niyithumbe, nalokha aninikela ukuphumula ezitheni zenu zoke zombelele ukuze nihlale niphephile," 
Deuteronomy12:11 nasele nazi indawo uSomnini uZimenu ayikhethileko kobana ibizo lakhe lijanyiswe lapho, khona-ke nizakuletha koke enginiyale ngakho: imihlabelwenu yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano, kwetjhumi kwenu neminikelo ekhethekileko, nayo yoke imihlabelo yeenthembiso enayithembisa kuSomnini." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Nijekezele phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu, nina, amadodana namadodakazenu, iinceku neencekukazi zenu kanye namaLevi asemadorobhenenu ngombana wona akanasabelo namkha ilifa phakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Yelelani bonyana ninganikeli imihlabelwenu yokutjhiswa phezu kwanamkha ngiyiphi indawo eniyibonako," 
Deuteronomy12:14 kodwana akube sendaweni ekhethwe nguSomnini kenye yeenkoro zenu kwaphela. Lapho-ke nizanikela khona imihlabelwenu yokutjhiswa benenze khonapho koke enginiyala ngakho. 
Deuteronomy12:15 Nokho ningahlaba benigome inyama kinamkha ngiyiphi yamadorobhenu, kube ngendlela enithanda ngayo, kuye ngeembusiso eniziphiwe nguSomnini uZimenu, ongakahlambuluki nohlambulukileko angagoma inyama leyo njengombana benizakwenza nakugonywa itsephe nehlangumataka." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Kodwana ningagomi iingazi, nizithululele equlwanini njengamanzi." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Ningalingi nigomele ngemadorobhenenu kwetjhumi kwesivuno senu sekoroyi, sewayini kanye nesamafutha we-oliva, namkha amazibulo weenkomo zenu namkha wezimvu neembuzi namkha omunye nomunye umnikelo wenu weenthembiso enawuthembisako namkha iminikelo yesihle namkha iminikelo ekhethekileko." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Gomelani koke lokho phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu endaweni ezakukhethwa nguSomnini uZimenu, nina namadodana namadodakazenu, iinceku neencekukazi zenu kanye namaLevi ahlala emadorobhenenu. Nijekezele phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu ngayo yoke imisebenzi yezandla zenu." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Tjhejani bona ningahlanuki amaLevi qobe nisahlala eendaweni zenu. 
Deuteronomy12:20 Lokha uSomnini uZimenu andisa imikhawulwenu njengombana anithembisile, indawo ayikhethileko kobana ajamise ibizo lakhe lapho, ingahle ibe kude nani. Nakube kunjalo bese nikhanukela inyama khulu, khona-ke ningayigoma ngesikhathi soke eniyikhanuka ngaso. Ningahlaba nanyana ngiyiphi yeenkomo, yezimvu namkha yeembuzi zenu eniziphiwe nguSomnini. Nigomele inyama leyo ngemadorobhenenu njengombana nginiyalile kube ngendlela nifuna ngayo." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Ningayigoma njengombana kugonywa itsephe nehlangumataka. Woke umuntu, ohlambulukileko nongakahlambuluki angagoma." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Kwaphela qinisekisani bona ningagomi iingazi ngombana zikuphila, yeke ningagomi ipilo nenyama." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Ningagomi iingazi kodwana zithululeleni equlwanini njengamanzi. 
Deuteronomy12:24 Naningagomi iingazi nenza kuhle phambi kwakaSomnini, yeke koke kuzanikhambela kuhle nina neenzukulwana zenu." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Kodwana iminikelo ekhethekileko eninayo, neminikelwenu yesithembiso nizayithatha niye nayo endaweni ekhethwe nguSomnini." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Nikelani inyama neengazi zemihlabelwenu yokutjhiswa e-aldarini lakaSomnini uZimenu. Iingazi zeminikelwenu yetjhebiswano nizithululele e-aldarini lakaSomnini, kodwana inyama yona ningayigoma." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Tjhejani ukwenza woke amezwi enginiyala ngawo ukuze koke kunikhambele kuhle, nina neenzukulwana zenu nini nanini ngombana nizabe nenza okuhle nokulungileko phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Lokha uSomnini uZimenu nakabhubhisa izizwe eziphambi kwenu eniyokungena nithumbe inarhazo benihlale kiyo," 
Deuteronomy12:29 tjhejani kobana ningathi ngemva kobana sezibhujisiwe, nilandele imikhubazo. Nizakubambeka esifwini lokha nanikhamba nibuza ngabosingazimu bazo nithi: “Izizwezi bezilotjha njani abosingazimu bazo? Nathi sifuna ukwenza njengazo nasilotjha uSomnini.”" 
Deuteronomy12:30 Ningenzi njalo kuSomnini uZimenu ngombana izizwezo zenze kibosingazimu bazo isinyenyiso uSomnini asizondako! Zathuwelela kangangobana zabe zatjhisa amadodana namadodakazazo ngomlilo njengomnikelo kibosingazimu bazo. 
Deuteronomy12:31 Tjhejani ukuphetha elinye nelinye ilizwi enginiyale ngalo; ningangezeleli namkha niphungule kilo. 
Deuteronomy13:1 Kungenzeka bonyana kuvuke umphorofidi phakathi kwenu, namkha umbhudangi wamabhudango anibonise itshwayo namkha isimangaliso" 
Deuteronomy13:2 bese itshwayelo namkha isimangalisweso siyenzeka begodu ngemva kwalokho athi: “Asilandeleni abozinyana sibalotjhe.” Nakube labo bozinyana, akusinguZimu enimaziko," 
Deuteronomy13:3 ningalaleli amezwi womphorofidi namkha wombhudangi loyo ngombana uSomnini uZimenu uyanizizinya ukubona bonyana nimkhathalela ngeenhliziyo zenu zoke nangomphefumulwenu woke na. 
Deuteronomy13:4 Nizakulandela uSomnini uZimenu kwaphela benimesabe, nilonde imiyalwakhe, nilalele ilizwi lakhe, nimlotjhe benikakarele kuye kwaphela." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Kodwana umphorofidi namkha umbhudangi wamabhudango loyo akabulawe ngombana unihlohlozele bona nihlubuke uSomnini uZimenu owanikhupha enarheni yeGibhide wanihlenga ekumbeni yobukhoboka. Uniyenge bona nisuke endleleni uSomnini uZimenu aniyala bona nikhambe ngayo. Ngalokho thanyelani ubumbi phakathi kwenu. 
Deuteronomy13:6 Nakube umfowenu, indodana kanyoko namkha indodanakho nanyana indodakazakho namkha umfazakho oyintandokazi namkha umnganakho enimamathe nelimu, ukuyenga ngasese athi: “Namba siyokulotjha abozinyana.” Nakube labo bozinyana, akusinguZimu omaziko wena ngitjho naboyihlomkhulu" 
Deuteronomy13:7 kodwana khibe ngomunye wabosingazimu babantu abanibhodileko nanyana bangaba seduze namkha kude nani, ukusuka egumbini lomhlaba ukuya kelinye," 
Deuteronomy13:8 ungaphiki naye, ungamlaleli begodu ungamtlhuweli, ungamzweli namkha umfihle." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Umbulale nya! Isandla sakho asibe ngesokuthoma bese kulandele zabo boke abanye abantu. 
Deuteronomy13:10 Mkhandeni ngamatje abe afe ngombana ufune ukukuyenga kobana usuke kuSomnini uZimakho owakukhupha enarheni yeGibhide, ekumbeni yobukhoboka." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Woke u-Israyeli uzakuzwa, esabe, angasenza ubuhlola obunjengalobo obenzeke phakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Kungenzeka bonyana kelinye lamadorobhenu uSomnini uZimenu aninikela wona bona nihlale kiwo," 
Deuteronomy13:13 kunabaphehli benturhu abaphuma bayokuyenga abahlali bedorobhabo bathi: “Nambani siyokulotjha abozinyana.” Nakube labo bozinyana, akusinguZimu enimaziko" 
Deuteronomy13:14 khona-ke nizakubuzisisa bese niyafunisisa nikhambe nibuza ngokuzimisela. Nakube ngambala nifunyana bona isinyenyisweso senzekile phakathi kwenu," 
Deuteronomy13:15 bulalani nya abahlali bedorobhelo ngesabula, nirhayile ngokupheleleko loke idorobhelo nakho koke okukilo, ngitjho nefuyo yakhona yoke, niyibhubhise ngesabula." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Buthelelani ipango yakhona niyibeke ekabeni yetatawu ledorobho, nitjhise idorobho nayo yoke ipangwalo njengomnikelo otjhiswa woke kuSomnini uZimenu. Idorobhelo lihlale liliqubi njalo lingabe lisakhiwa godu." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Ningababaleli izinto ekufanele zirhayilwe ukuze uSomnini atjhuguluke ekuthukutheleni kwakhe. Uzakuba nomusa kini, anandise njengombana afunga kiboyihlomkhulu" 
Deuteronomy13:18 nakube nilalela ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimenu, nigcine yoke imiyalwakhe enginiyale ngayo namhlanje, nenze okuhle phambi kwakhe." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Nina nibantwana bakaSomnini uZimenu, ngalokho ningazirhayi namkha nizigude ehloko ngebanga labahlongakeleko." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Nina nisisizwe esicwengileko kuSomnini uZimenu begodu uSomnini unikhethe phakathi kwabo boke abantu abasebusweni bephasi kobana nibe ngebakhe. 
Deuteronomy14:3 Ningagomi litho elinyenyisako. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Nanzi iinlwana enizazigoma: ikomo, imvu, imbuzi," 
Deuteronomy14:5 imihlobo yehlangumataka, yeentsephe neyeenkukhama kanye nembuzi yommango," 
Deuteronomy14:6 okutjho zoke iinlwana ezihlukanisa iinqatha kabili bezetjise. 
Deuteronomy14:7 Kodwana ezihlukanisa iinqatha kabili kwaphela namkha ezetjisa kwaphela ningazigomi. Ikamela, umqasa nembila ziyetjisa kodwana azihlukanisi iinqatha kabili, ngalokho zisilaphele kini." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Iwotji nayo ningayigomi ngombana ihlukanisa iinqatha kabili kodwana ayetjisi; isilaphele kini. Ningasithinti isidumbu sayo. 
Deuteronomy14:9 Kizo zoke eziphila ngemanzini gomani lezi: zoke ezineengwedlo neempepha; 
Deuteronomy14:10 koke okunganangwedlo neempepha ningakugomi. Lokho kusilaphele kini. 
Deuteronomy14:11 Ningagoma zoke iinyoni ezihlambulukileko. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Kodwana lezi, ngilezo eningakafaneli ukuzigoma: yoke imihlobo yamadlanga;" 
Deuteronomy14:13 imihlobo yabokholo, yoke imihlobo yamagubulu, iinciliba, yoke imihlobo yeenrhulurhulu, yoke imihlobo yamakhozi, abotlhame, amalanda, abonogolantethe, imihlobo yabodoyi, amagqovu nabonomaphelaphelana." 
Deuteronomy14:14 Zoke iinunwana ezineempiko zisilaphele kini, ningazigomi." 
Deuteronomy14:15 Zoke iinunwana ezihlambulukileko zona ningazigoma. 
Deuteronomy14:16 Ningagomi ingcuba; inikeleni abatjhili abasemadorobhenenu kobana bazigomele yona. Nakungasinjalo niyithengisele imiqhamuka. Khumbulani bona nina nisisizwe esicwengileko kuSomnini uZimenu. Ningapheki imbuzana ngebisi lakanina. 
Deuteronomy14:17 Nikhuphe kwetjhumi kwakho koke enikutjeleko enikuvuna minyaka yoke. 
Deuteronomy14:18 Thathani kwetjhumi kwenu kwekoroyi, iwayini namafutha we-oliva kanye namazibulo weenkomo, wezimvu neweembuzi zenu nikugomele phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu endaweni azayikhetha kobana ajamise ibizo lakhe lapho. Ngaleyondlela nizakufunda ukwesaba uSomnini uZimenu soke isikhathi." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Nakube ibanga lide khulu kini kobana ningafika endaweni uSomnini uZimenu ayikhethileko bona ajamise ibizo lakhe lapho bese nibhalelwa kuletha kwetjhumi lokha uSomnini uZimenu nanibusisako," 
Deuteronomy14:20 khona nizayenana ngesiliva. Niyitjhubelele, nikhuphukele endaweni uSomnini uZimenu ayikhethileko leyo," 
Deuteronomy14:21 bese niyigomele lapho ngokuthenga namkha yini eniyithandako, iinkomo, izimvu, iwayini namkha utjwala, nanyana yini eniyikhanukelako. Nibethe esimonyongwana lapho phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu, nijekezele nina nemindenenu." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Ningahlanuki amaLevi ahlala emadorobhenenu ngombana akanasabelo namkha ilifa phakathi kwenu. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Njalo ekupheleni kweminyaka emithathu nilethe koke kwetjhumi kwemikhiqizo yenu ngawo lowo mnyaka, nikukghubelele emadorobhenenu." 
Deuteronomy14:24 AmaLevi anganasabelo nelifa phakathi kwenu, iinkhonzi kanye neentandani nabahlolokazi abasemadorobhenenu beze bazogoma babethe esimonyongwana. Ngaleyondlela uSomnini uZimenu uzanibusisa kiwo woke umsebenzi wezandla zenu eniwenzako." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Njalo ekupheleni komnyaka wekhomba nisule iinkolodo. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Nasi indlela enizakusula ngayo iinkolodo: Omunye nomunye okolodwako uzakusula lokho akukolodwa ngomunye umuntu. Angalandeleli umuntu loyo namkha umfowabo kobana amkhokhele ngombana ukusulwa kweenkolodo sele kumenyezelwe ebizweni lakaSomnini. 
Deuteronomy15:3 Umqhamuka wona kumele ukukhokhele, kodwana usule nanyana ngisiphi isikolodo umfowenu akukoloda sona." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Nanyana kunjalo akuzukuba nesichaka phakathi kwenu ngombana uSomnini uzonibusisa enarheni aniphe yona kobana ibe lilifa lenu," 
Deuteronomy15:5 kwaphela nakube nilalela ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimenu, niyelele ukwenza yoke imiyalo enginiyala ngayo namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Ngambala uSomnini uZimenu uzanibusisa njengombana anithembisa. Izizwe ezinengi zizokugogela kini kodwana nina ningagogeli litho kizo, nilawule izizwe ezinengi kodwana zona zinganilawuli." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Nakube kunesichaka phakathi kwenu, esingomunye wabafowenu, kinamkha ngiliphi lamadorobhenu enarhenenu eniyiphiwe nguSomnini uZimenu, ningaqinisi iinhliziyo zenu nirhunyeze izandla zenu kumfowenu ochakileko," 
Deuteronomy15:8 kodwana mvuleleni izandla, nimboleke ngokwanele iindingo zakhe, nanyana kungaba yini." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Yelelani kungabi nobumenemene eenhliziywenu zenu bese nithi: “Afe-ke, umnyaka wekhomba wokusulwa kweenkolodo sele useduze!” Bese ninyokoloza umfowenu ochakileko ngelihlo elimbi, ningamnikeli litho. Uzakulila ngani kuSomnini, lokho kube sisono kini." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Mupheni nitjhaphulukile, ningamnikeli ngeenhliziyo ezigugunekako ngombana uSomnini uZimenu uzanibusisa kiwo woke umsebenzenu nakikho koke enitlama ukukwenza." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Abadududu angeze baphela enarheni, ngalokho ngiyaniyala bona nivule izandla zenu ngokupheleleko namukele umfowenu, okutjho otlhagako kanye nodududu enarheni." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Nakube umfowenu, okuyindoda namkha umfazi omHebheru, azithengisa kuwe bona akukhonze, uzakusebenzela iminyaka esithandathu bese kuthi emnyakeni wekhomba umtjhaphulule kuwe." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Nawumtjhaphululako kuwe, ungamkhambisi amkhonoze;" 
Deuteronomy15:14 kodwana mtshayele ngokutjhaphulukileko ezimvini neembuzini, umabele eselelweni nebutlhodlhelweni bakho ukuya ngendlela uSomnini uZimenu akubusise ngayo." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Khumbula bonyana benimakhoboka enarheni yeGibhide, nje-ke uSomnini uZimenu wanihlenga, ngalokho ngiyakuyala-ke ngamezwi la namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Kodwana nakube umuntu loyo athi akazukusuka kuwe ngombana akuthanda wena nomndenakho begodu ahlezi kamnandi nawe," 
Deuteronomy15:17 yeke uzakuthatha isungulo umthumbuselele indlebe ngalo emnyango bese uba sisebenzi sakho sanini nanini. Nesisebenzini esimfazi uzakwenza soneso. 
Deuteronomy15:18 Kungabi nzima kuwe ukumtjhaphulula simahla bonyana akhambe ngombana ukusebenzele iminyaka esithandathu ngesiquntu senani lokuqatjhwa kwesisebenzi. Ngalokho uSomnini uZimakho uzakubusisa kikho koke okwenzako. 
Deuteronomy15:19 Hlukaniselani uSomnini uZimenu woke amazibulo aduna weenkomo, izimvu neembuzi zenu. Kungabi nomsebenzi eniwenza ngamazibulo aziinkunzana namkha nirhune amazibulo wezimvu neembuzi zenu." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Agomeni qobe mnyaka nina nemindenenu phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu endaweni ekhethwe nguSomnini. 
Deuteronomy15:21 Kodwana nakube amazibulo lawo anomphambo, kungaba kuhluza namkha ukuphophala namkha kungaba sizila sananyana yini, ningawanikeli kuSomnini uZimenu." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Agomeleni ngemadorobhenenu; abahlambulukileko nabangakahlambuluki ngokufanako abagome njengombana kwenziwa nakuyitsephe namkha ihlangumataka. 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kwaphela ningagomi iingazi zakhona, kodwana zithululeleni equlwanini njengamanzi." 
Deuteronomy16:1 Gcinani inyanga ka-Abibi, nenzele uSomnini uZimenu iPhasika ngombana ngenyanga ka-Abibi uSomnini uZimenu wanikhupha eGibhide ebusuku." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Nizakuhlabela uSomnini uZimenu iPhasika eenkomeni, ezimvini neembuzini zenu endaweni ezakukhethwa nguSomnini kobana ajamise ibizo lakhe lapho." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Ningaligomi ngesikwa esinengumelo. Ligomeni amalanga alikhomba ngesikwa esinganangumelo, isikwa esinikhumbuza igandelelo ukuze kiwo woke amalanga wokuphila kwenu nikhumbule ilanga enaphuma ngalo eGibhide nirhabile." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Kungabi nehlama enengumelo phakathi kwenu kiyo yoke imikhawulwenu amalanga alikhomba. Inyama eniyihlabe ntambama elangeni lokuthoma, ingahlali bekuse." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Anikavunyelwa ukuhlaba iPhasika kinamkha ngiliphi lamadorobhenu eniwaphiwe nguSomnini uZimenu 
Deuteronomy16:6 ngaphandle kwendawo ezakukhethwa nguSomnini uZimenu, bona ajamise ibizo lakhe lapho. Nizakuhlaba iPhasika lapho ntambama nakutjhinga ilanga ngesikhathi enaphuma ngaso eGibhide." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Nipheke inyama yakhona niyigomele endaweni ezakukhethwa nguSomnini uZimenu bese ekuseni nibuyele lapha nihlala khona. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Nizakugoma isikwa esinganangumelo amalanga alikhomba bese elangeni lekhomba nenzele uSomnini uZimenu umgidi omkhulu. Nje-ke mhlokho ningawuthinti umsebenzi. 
Deuteronomy16:9 Nizakubala iimveke ezilikhomba ukusuka ngesikhathi nithoma ukugweba ibhali. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Nigidinge umnyanya weemVeke kuSomnini uZimenu ngokunikela ngomnikelo wesihle ukuya ngendlela uSomnini uZimenu anibusise ngayo. 
Deuteronomy16:11 Nijekezele phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu, nina namadodana namadodakazenu, amakhoboka namakhobokakazenu, amaLevi asemadorobhenenu, iinkhonzi, iintandani kanye nabahlolokazi abaphakathi kwenu, endaweni ezakukhethwa nguSomnini uZimenu bona ajamise ibizo lakhe lapho." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Nizakhumbula bonyana nakhe naba makhoboka eGibhide, ngalokho nitjheje ukugcina iimiswezo." 
Deuteronomy16:13 Gidingani umnyanya wemiTlhatlhana amalanga alikhomba lokha nanibutha eselelweni nebutlhodlhelweni benu. 
Deuteronomy16:14 Yenamani ngomnyanyenu lowo, nina namadodana namadodakazenu, amakhoboka namakhobokakazenu, amaLevi, iinkhonzi, iintandani nabahlolokazi abaphakathi kwamadorobhenu." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Gidingani umnyanya kaSomnini uZimenu amalanga alikhomba endaweni ezakukhethwa nguSomnini ngombana uzanibusisa kiyo yoke imikhiqizwenu nakiyo yoke imisebenzi yezandla zenu ukuze nename noke. 
Deuteronomy16:16 Kuzakuthi kathathu ngomnyaka boke abaduna benu bavele phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu endaweni azayikhetha: ngomnyanya wesiKwa esinganaNgumelo, emnyanyeni weemVeke nemnyanyeni wemiTlhatlhana. Ningaveli phambi kwakaSomnini nimkhonoze," 
Deuteronomy16:17 kodwana woke umuntu akanikele ngendlela akghona ngayo ukuya ngesibusiso sakaSomnini uZimenu ambusise ngaso. 
Deuteronomy16:18 Khethani abagwebi neenkhulu kiwo woke amadorobhenu uSomnini uZimenu anipha wona ukuya ngeenkoro zenu bese bagweba abantu ngeengwebo ezinokulunga. 
Deuteronomy16:19 Ningahlanakeli ubulungiswa, ningakhethi ubuso, ningamukeli ukufunjathiswa ngombana ukufunjathiswa kuphophaza amehlo wohlakaniphileko bese kwenza abaneqiniso babe bakhohlisi." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Yenzani ubulungiswa kwaphela ukuze niphile benizuze inarha eniyiphiwa nguSomnini uZimenu. 
Deuteronomy16:21 Ningathi nanakha i-aldari lakaSomnini uZimenu bese nitjala umuthi ojamele u-Atjhera eqadi kwalo. 
Deuteronomy16:22 Ningazijamiseli amatje akhethekileko ngombana uSomnini uZimenu uyazizonda izintwezo. 
Deuteronomy17:1 Ningahlabeli uSomnini uZimenu ikomo, imvu nembuzi enomphambo, nanyana kungaba sisici bani ngombana lokho kusinyenyiso kuSomnini uZimenu." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Nakube phakathi kwenu, emadorobhenenu eniwaphiwe nguSomnini uZimenu, kufunyaneka indoda namkha umfazi owenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu ngokwephula isivumelwano sayo," 
Deuteronomy17:3 abe adlhemadlheme ngemva kwabosingazimu abalotjhe namkha akhothamele ilanga namkha inyanga nanyana ngiyiphi yeenkwekwezi emkayini, engayala bona ningakwenzi," 
Deuteronomy17:4 bese niyabikelwa namkha niyezwa ngalokho, khona-ke nizakubuzisisa kuhle. Nakube kuliqiniso bona mbala isinyenyisweso senzakele kwa-Israyeli," 
Deuteronomy17:5 nizakuletha indoda namkha umfazi owenze ubuhlolobo esangweni bese nimkhanda ngamatje abe afe. 
Deuteronomy17:6 Uzakubulawa ngesiqiniseko sabofakazi ababili namkha abathathu. Umuntu angeze abulawa nakube kunofakazi oyedwa. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Nabambulalako isandla sabofakazi sizakuba ngesokuthoma bese ngemva kwalapho kulandele isandla sabo boke abantu. Ngalokho nizabe nithanyela ubumbi phakathi kwenu. 
Deuteronomy17:8 Nakube kuvela umlandu okumele uwugwebe omalungana nokubulalana, wamalungelo womthetho, newokulimazana, okutjho nanyana kungaba mlandu onjani emadorobhenenu, ufumane bonyana ubudisi kuwe, kuzakufanela bona wenyuke uye endaweni ezakukhethwa nguSomnini uZimakho," 
Deuteronomy17:9 uye kubaphristi bamaLevi nakumgwebi osesikhundleni emihleni leyo. Uzakubonisana nabo, bazakuhlahla ekwenzeni isiqunto." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Wenze njengokweseluleko sabo endaweni leyo ezakukhethwa nguSomnini. Yelela ukwenza koke abakuyale ngakho. 
Deuteronomy17:11 Iye, uhlale emyalweni abakululeke ngawo nequntweni abakunikele lona. Ungaphambukeli ngesigomeni namkha ngesinceleni emezwini wesigwebo sabo abakunikela sona." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Umuntu ozitjhayako angalaleli umphristi olotjha phambi kwakaSomnini uZimakho endaweni leyo, namkha ongalaleli umgwebi, akabulawe. Ngalokho uzabe uthanyela ubumbi kwa-Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Boke abantu bazakuzwa, besabe, balahle ukuzitjhaya." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Lokha nanifika enarheni eniyinikelwa nguSomnini uZimenu bese niyayithumba benihlale kiyo, nje-ke nizakuthi: “Kwanjesi khona asizikhetheleni ikosi ezakubusa phezu kwethu njengezizwe zoke ezisibhodileko.”" 
Deuteronomy17:15 Nakunjalo kufanele niqiniseke bonyana ikosi enizayibeka leyo iba ngekhethwe nguSomnini uZimenu. Akube ngomunye hlangana nabafowenu. Anikavunyelwa ukubeka iphandle phezu kwenu nokwenza elingasimfowenu. 
Deuteronomy17:16 Kwaphela yena-ke akukameli azandisele iinjomani namkha abangele bona ibutho lakhe libuyele eGibhide kobana kwandiswe iinjomani njengombana uSomnini bekathe kini: “Ningasalibeka eGibhide.” 
Deuteronomy17:17 Angabi nabafazi abanengi ngombana ihliziywakhe izakuhlubuka begodu angazandiseli isiliva negolide elinengi. 
Deuteronomy17:18 Nasele ahlezi esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi, uzazitlolela isithunzi somthetho lo encwadini, athathele kileyo ekubaphristi bamaLevi," 
Deuteronomy17:19 ayiphathe kuye, ayifunde imihla yoke yokuphila kwakhe ukuze afunde ukwesaba uSomnini uZimakhe ngokugcina woke amezwi womthetho lo begodu enze neemiswezi." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Nakube wenza njalo angeze aziphakamisa kubafowabo begodu angeze aphambukele ngesigomeni namkha ngesinceleni emiyalweni. Uzakuphatha isikhathi eside embuswenakhe, yena nabantwabakhe kwa-Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Abaphristi bamaLevi, okutjho yoke ikoro yamaLevi, ayizukuba nesabelo namkha ilifa kwa-Israyeli. Ilifa labo liminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini, ngilokho abamele bakugome." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Abazukuba nelifa kubafowabo, kodwana ilifa labo nguSomnini njengombana athembisa." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Iminikelo ekhethekileko izakuba lilungelo labaphristi elibuya ebantwini abaletha imihlabelo, okungaba ziinkomo, izimvu namkha iimbuzi. Umphristi osebenza e-aldarini uzakunikelwa umkhono, imihlathi emibili nomrhoru." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Iinthelo zokuthoma zekoroyi yenu, zewayini lenu nezamafuthenu we-oliva kanye noboya bokuthoma bezimvu zenu nikunikele umphristi." 
Deuteronomy18:5 USomnini uZimakho ukhethe uLevi hlangana neenkoro zenu kobana abe yincekwakhe elotjha ebizweni lakhe, yena namadodanakhe nini nanini." 
Deuteronomy18:6 UmLevi obuya lapha aqube khona kinamkha ngiliphi lamadorobhenu kilo loke lakwa-Israyeli, angeza endaweni ekhethwe nguSomnini nanyana kunini nafunako." 
Deuteronomy18:7 Lapho-ke angalotjha ebizweni lakaSomnini uZimakhe njengawo woke amaLevi wekhabo alotjha phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Uzakufumana isabelo sokugoma esilingana nesabafowabo, ngaphandle kwaleso asifumene ekuthengiseni kwakhe ipahlakhe." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Lokha nanifika enarheni eniyiphiwa ngusomnini uZimenu, ningafundi ukwenza imikhuba enyenyisako yezizwezo." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Phakathi kwenu kungafunyanwa umuntu otjhisa indodanakhe namkha indodakazakhe emlilweni njengomnikelo namkha umuntu osisangoma, osisanusi, omloyi, oyinyanga," 
Deuteronomy18:11 ongusomlingo, othukulako, obhulako nophahla abezimu." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Nanyana ngubani owenza lokhu, usinyenyiso kuSomnini begodu ngebanga lemikhuba enyenyisako leyo uSomnini uZimenu uqotjha izizwezo phambi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Yibani msulwa phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Izizwe enizoziphangezi, zilalela izanusi nezangoma, kodwana nina uSomnini uZimenu azange anivumele kobana nenze njalo." 
Deuteronomy18:15 USomnini uZimenu uzanivusela umphorofidi onjengami phakathi kwenu, kubafowenu. Nguye okufanele nimlalele." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Kuzakuba njengombana nanifuna uSomnini uZimenu eRhorebe ngelanga lomhlangano lokha nanithi: “Asisakwazi ukulalela umdumo welizwi lakaSomnini uZimethu nokubona umlilokazi lo ngombana sizokufa!” 
Deuteronomy18:17 USomnini wathi kimi: “Koke abakutjhwileko kuwe kulungile. 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ngizabavusela umphorofidi onjengawe phakathi kwabafowabo, ngibeke amezwami emlonyenakhe, abatjele koke engimyale ngakho." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Nanyana ngubani ongeze alalela amezwami umphorofidi azabe awakhuluma ebizweni lami, mina ngokwami ngizakubona ukuqeda ngaye." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Kodwana umphorofidi okhuluma ebizweni lami ngokuzitjhaya khibe angikamthumi, namkha okhuluma ebizweni labozinyana, akabulawe.”" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Ningazibuza nithi: “Sizahlukanisa njani bona leli akusilo ilizwi elikhulunywe nguSomnini?” 
Deuteronomy18:22 Ipendulo kukobana nakube umphorofidi ukhuluma ebizweni lakaSomnini bese lokho akutjhoko akwenzeki namkha akubi liqiniso, kuzabe kungasilo ilizwi elikhulunywe nguSomnini. Umphorofidi loyo uzabe akhuluma ngokuzitjhaya, yeke ningamesabi onjalo." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Lokha uSomnini uZimakho narhayila izizwe aninikele inarhazo, niziqotjhe bese nihlala emadorobhenazo neenkumbeni zazo," 
Deuteronomy19:2 nizakwahlukanisela amadorobhenu amathathu enarheni uSomnini uZimenu aninikela yona bona niyithumbe. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Nizakulinganisa iindlela bese nihlukanisa kathathu umkhawulo wenarha uSomnini uZimenu aninikela yona bona ibe lilifa lenu ukuze nanyana ngubani obulala angakahlosi abalekele lapho. 
Deuteronomy19:4 Umbulali angabalekela emadorobheni lawo asindise ipilwakhe kwaphela nakube ubulele omunye umuntu ngaphandle kwehloso begodu angakhange amzonde ngaphambilini. 
Deuteronomy19:5 Isibonelo salokho kukulokha mhlambe umuntu naya ngehlathini nomunye umuntu ukuyokutheza iinkuni bese athi nagawula isigodo, ihloko yezembe itsomuke emphinini imadlhe umuntu loyo abe ahlongakale. Nakunjalo, obuleleko loyo angabalekela emadorobheni lawo kobana asindise ipilwakhe." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Nakube idorobho lobuphephelo likude umbuyiseleli weengazi othukutheleko, lokha nagijimisa umbulali, uzambamba bese uyambulala, khibe akanamlandu wokubulawa ngombana umbulali bekangakamzondi ambuleleko loyo ngaphambilini." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ngalokho ngiyaniyala bona nihlukanisele amadorobho amathathu. 
Deuteronomy19:8 Yengezani amadorobho amathathu lawo ngamanye amathathu lokha uSomnini uZimenu nakhulisa umkhawulwenu njengombana afunga kiboyihlomkhulu. Iye, uzaninikela inarha yoke ayithembisa ukuyinikela aboyihlomkhulu, kwaphela nakube niyatjheja ukugcina yoke imiyalo enginiyala ngayo le namhlanje, kobana nikhathalele uSomnini uZimenu nokobana nikhambe eendleleni zakhe." 
Deuteronomy19:9 Ngaleyondlela iingazi ezinganamlandu angeze zathululwa enarheni uSomnini uZimenu aninikela yona kobana ibe lilifa lenu. Nakungasinjalo umlandu wokuthuluka kweengazi uzakuba phezu kwenu. 
Deuteronomy19:10 Nakube kunomuntu ozonda omunye, amlalele endleleni bese uyameqela, amumadlhe phasi abe ahlongakale, nje-ke umbulali loyo abalekele kelinye lamadorobho lawo," 
Deuteronomy19:11 abaphathi bedorobho lapho abuya khona bazakuthumela bona azokuthathwa asiwe esandleni sombuyiseleli weengazi, abulawe." 
Deuteronomy19:12 Ningamtlhuweli kodwana phelisani umlandu wokuthululwa kweengazi ezimsulwa kwa-Israyeli ukuze izinto zinikhambele kuhle. 
Deuteronomy19:13 Ningatjhidisi isikhonkhwani sakamakhelwana esabekwa ngabadala elifeni eliyinarha enayabelwa nguSomnini uZimenu kobana ibe ngeyenu. 
Deuteronomy19:14 Ningathathi ubufakazi bomuntu oyedwa emlandwini wokusolwa komuntu owenze ubulelesi namkha owone nganamkha ngimuphi umlandu. Akube nabofakazi ababili namkha abathathu ngaphambi kobana ningalalela umlandu lowo. 
Deuteronomy19:15 Nakube kuvela ufakazi onobuqili avukele omunye umuntu amfungele ngamanga," 
Deuteronomy19:16 bobabili njalo bazakuvela phambi kwakaSomnini, phambi kwabaphristi naphambi kwabagwebi abasesikhundleni ngesikhatheso." 
Deuteronomy19:17 Abagwebi bazabaphenyisisa bese nakube ufakazi loyo ngowamanga begodu ufungele umfowabo ngamanga," 
Deuteronomy19:18 yenzani kuye lokho ebegade akuhlose ngomfowabo. Ngaleyondlela nizabe nithanyela ubumbi phakathi kwenu. 
Deuteronomy19:19 Inengi lizakuzwa, lesabe bese lingasalingi ukwenza ubumbi obunjalo phakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy19:20 Ilihlo lenu lingatlhuweli, akube yipilo ngepilo, ilihlo ngelihlo, izinyo ngezinyo, isandla ngesandla, inyawo ngenyawo." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Lokha naniya epini niyokulwa nezitha zenu bese nibona iinjomani neenkarana nebutho elikhulu kunelenu, ningesabi ngombana uSomnini uZimenu owanikhupha enarheni yeGibhide unani." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Nasele nitjhidele epini, umphristi uzakuza ngaphambili akhulume nebutho" 
Deuteronomy20:3 athi kilo: “Lalela Israyeli, namhlanje uze epini ukuzokulwa nezitha zakho. Ihliziywakho ayingadani, ungesabi ubaleke ngebanga levalo ngazo" 
Deuteronomy20:4 ngombana uSomnini uZimakho nguye okhamba nawe bona akulwele ezitheni zakho, akunikele ukuhlula.”" 
Deuteronomy20:5 Iinkhulu zizakukhuluma nebutho zithi: “Nakube omunye wenu wakhe ikumba etja kodwana wangayivula, akabuyele ekumbenakhe. Nakungasinjalo uzakufela epini bese ivulwa ngomunye umuntu." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Nakube omunye wenu utjele isidiribe kodwana wangagoma iinthelo zakhona, akabuyele ekhaya. Nakungasinjalo uzakufela epini bese omunye umuntu ugoma iinthelo zakhona." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Nakube omunye wenu sele aveze indaba kodwana wangasathatha intombakhe leyo, akabuyele ekhaya. Nakungasinjalo uzakufela epini bese enye indoda izithathela intombakhe leyo.”" 
Deuteronomy20:8 Iinkhulu zizakuragela phambili nokukhuluma nebutho zithi: “Nakube omunye wenu unevalo entanyeni njengesirhwarhwa akabuyele ekhaya. Nakungasinjalo iinhliziyo zabafowabo zizakuphelelwa mamandla njengeyakhe.” 
Deuteronomy20:9 Nasele iinkhulu ziqedile ukukhuluma nebutho, kuzakubekwa iinduna ezizakurhola ibuthwelo." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Nanitjhidela eduze kwedorobho kobana nilwe nalo, thomani ngokubekelana nalo imibandela." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Nakube ipendulwalo ingeyokuthula bese linivulela amasango, boke abangaphakathi kwalo bazanenzela umsebenzi okatelelako bese bayanisebenzela." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Kodwana nakube idorobhelo alibi nokuthula nani bese lilwa nani, khona-ke nizalivimbezela," 
Deuteronomy20:13 kuzakuthi lokha uSomnini uZimenu nakalinikela ezandleni zenu, nibulale boke abaduna balo ngesabula." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Nizithathele abafazi nabantwana, ifuyo nakho koke okunye okungedorobheni, okutjho yoke ipango yalo. Nizibusise ngepango yezitha zenu leyo eniyiphiwe nguSomnini uZimenu." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Nenze soneso kiwo woke amadorobho akude nani okungasi madorobho wezizwe eziseduze. 
Deuteronomy20:16 Kodwana emadorobheni wabantu uSomnini aninikela wona njengelifa lenu, ningatjhiyi litho eliphefumulako." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Bhubhisani nya izizwe zamaRhithi nama-Amori, amaKanana namaPerizi, amaRhivi namaJebusi njengombana uSomnini uZimenu ayalile" 
Deuteronomy20:18 ukuze zinganifundisi imikhuba yazo enyenyisako eziyenza nazilotjha abosingazimu bazo bese niyona phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu. 
Deuteronomy20:19 Nanivimbezela idorobho isikhathi eside benilwe nalo ukuze nilithumbe, ningarhayili imithi yalo ngokuyikghedlha ngezembe, kodwana gomani iinthelo zayo, yeke ningayigawuli. Kanti imithi le sese ifana nabantu bonyana ningabeze niyivimbezele nayo na?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Mimithi enaziko bona akusi ngegonywako kwaphela ekumele niyirhayile beniyigawule ukuze nivimbezele ngayo idorobho elilwa nani kufikela beliwe. 
Deuteronomy21:1 Nakube enarheni eniyiphiwa nguSomnini uZimenu kobana ibe lilifa lenu, kufunyanwa umuntu abulewe, adindilize emmangweni, kungaziwa bonyana ubulewe ngubani," 
Deuteronomy21:2 abaphathi benu nabagwebi benu bazakuza bafese balinganise ibanga eliphakathi komuntu obuleweko namadorobho aseduze. 
Deuteronomy21:3 Abaphathi bedorobho eliseduze khulu nomuntu obuleweko bazakuthatha ithokazi elingazange khelibotjhelwe. 
Deuteronomy21:4 Abaphathi bedorobho bazakwehlela nethokazelo emlanjaneni lapha kungalimeki namkha kutjaleke khona. Bazafese balephule intamo emlanjanenapho. 
Deuteronomy21:5 Abaphristi abamadodana kaLevi bazakuza ngombana uSomnini uZimenu ubakhethile bona bamlotjhe bebabusise ebizweni lakhe. Ngibo ekumele babenelizwi lokha nakunokurarana namkha inturhu. 
Deuteronomy21:6 Boke abaphathi bedorobho eliseduze khulu nomuntu obuleweko bazakuhlambela izandla ngehla kwethokazi elephulwe intamo emrhobeni," 
Deuteronomy21:7 bafakaze bathi: “Izandla zethu azange zithulule iingazezi, ngitjho namehlwethu azange abone ukuthuluka kweengazokho." 
Deuteronomy21:8 USomnini akathethelele abantu bakhe u-Israyeli, abahlengako; angabeki umlandu weengazi ezimsulwa phakathi kwabantu bakhe u-Israyeli.” Nje-ke bazakuthethelelwa emlandwini weengazi lowo." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Ngalokho nizakutjhaphuluka emlandwini weengazi ezimsulwa. Ngaleyondlela nizakwenza okulungileko phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Deuteronomy21:10 Lokha u-Israyeli naya epini ayokulwa nezitha zakhe, uSomnini uZimakhe azinikele ezandleni zakhe, azithumbe" 
Deuteronomy21:11 bese kuthi phakathi kwabathunjwa ubone isimomondiya somfazi osithandako nofuna ukusithatha bona sibe mkakho," 
Deuteronomy21:12 ungakhamba naso ekhenu. Lapho-ke umfazi loyo uzazirhuna ihloko aqunte namaziphakhe," 
Deuteronomy21:13 ahlubule izambatho zakhe zobukhoboka, ahlale endlinakho alilele uyise nonina inyanga yoke. Ngemva kwalokho ungamngena-ke, ube yindodakhe, yena abe mkakho." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Nakube ngemva kwesikhathi awusathokozi ngomfazi loyo, mtjhaphulule azikhambele aye lapha athanda ukuya khona. Awukavunyelwa ukumthengisa namkha wenane ngaye ngombana umrhubutjhile." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Nakube indoda inabafazi ababili, omunye ayintandokazi omunye asisaliwakazi bese bobabili bambelethele abantwana, izibulo libe ngelesaliwakazi," 
Deuteronomy21:16 mhlana yabela amadodanayo ilifa ingathathi indodana yentandokazi iyenze izibulo phezu kwendodana elizibulo yesaliwakazi. 
Deuteronomy21:17 Ayamukele izibulo eliyindodana yesaliwakazi ngokuyinikela isabelo esibuyelelwe kabili kesomunye kwakho koke enakho ngombana imamandlayo wokuthoma. Ilungelo lobuzibulo ngelayo. 
Deuteronomy21:18 Nakube indoda inendodana enekani netjhingako engalaleli ilizwi lakayise namkha lakanina, kuthi nanyana bayikhalima ingabalaleli," 
Deuteronomy21:19 khona-ke uyise nonina bazayibamba bayilethe kubaphathi bedorobho lekhabo abasesangweni lendawo leyo. 
Deuteronomy21:20 Bazakuthi kubaphathi: “Indodanethu le kazi inekani begodu iyatjhinga, ayilaleli ilizwi lethu. Isirhiribideli nesidakwa.”" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Nje-ke woke amadoda wedorobho azayikhanda ngamatje ibe ife. Ngalokho nizakuthanyela ubumbi phakathi kwenu. Woke u-Israyeli uzakuzwa bese uyesaba. 
Deuteronomy21:22 Nakube umuntu wenze ubulelesi besibetho sokufa bese ngambala uyabulawa, nimhlomele esigodweni," 
Deuteronomy21:23 isidumbu sakhe singahlali ubusuku boke sisesigodwenapho. Kodwana mbulungeni khona mhlokho ngombana umuntu ohlonywe esigodweni uthuweleliswe nguZimu. Ningasilaphazi inarhenu eniyiphiwa nguSomnini uZimenu kobana ibe lilifa lenu. 
Deuteronomy22:1 Ungathi nawubona ikomo namkha imvu kamfowenu ilahleka bese uyayilisa. Irage uyibuyisele kumfowenu. 
Deuteronomy22:2 Nakube akasiseduze nawe, namkha nakube awumazi, iragele kwakho, ihlale kwakho kufikela lapha umfowenu afuna ukutholatholiswa yona bese uyamtholatholisa-ke." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Wenze soneso nangodumbanakhe, ngesambatho ngitjho nangananyana yini yomfowenu emlahlekeleko nawuyitholileko, ungagodli isizo lakho kuye." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Ungathi nawubona udumbana namkha ikomo kamfowenu iphareme endleleni uyilise. Msize kobana niyivuse ijame godu. 
Deuteronomy22:5 Umfazi angavunuli litho eliphathelene namadoda, nendoda ingembathi iimvunulo zabafazi ngombana nanyana ngubani owenza njalo usinyenyiso kuSomnini uZimenu." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Nakwenzeka uzithele phezu kwesihlakana senyoni, kinamkha ngimuphi umuthi namkha equlwanini, sinamadzinyani namkha sinamaqanda khibe unina wakhona uhlezi phezu kwawo, ungathatha amaqanda namkha amadzinyani kodwana ulise unina." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Tjhaphulula unina akhambe, kodwana abantwana ungazithathela bona ukuze kukukhambele kuhle nokobana uphile isikhathi eside." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Nawakha ikumba etja, yakha nesirhodlwana seengodo phezu kwephahla layo ukuze ungaziletheli umlandu weengazi nakwenzeka bona kube nomuntu othi asephahlenapho amadlheke phasi." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Ungatjali umhlobo omunye wembewu esidiribeni sakho. Nakungasinjalo zoke iinthelo zakhona zizakuba ngezendawo ecwengileko: isivuno ositjalileko kanye neenthelo zesidiribe. 
Deuteronomy22:10 Ungalimi ngokubophela ikomo nodumbana ndawonye. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Ungembathi izambatho ezivangeneko, okuyiwulu nelineni ndawonye." 
Deuteronomy22:12 Zenzeleni amatjharha emiphethweni yengubo enizembesa ngayo. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Kungenzeka umuntu athathe umfazi, amngene bese angasathokozi ngaye" 
Deuteronomy22:14 amsolele ngamanga, amlethele ibizo elimbi ngokuthi: “Ngithethe umfazi lo, ngathi nangimtjhidelako, ngafunyana bonyana akasese litlawu.”" 
Deuteronomy22:15 Nakwenzeka njalo yeke usomntazana nonomntazana bazakuthatha ubufakazi bobutlawu bakhe babuse kubaphathi bedorobho esangweni. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Usomntazana uzafese athi kubaphathi: “Nginikele umrhali lo indodakazami bona ibe mkayo, nje-ke nangu akasathokozi ngayo." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Usolele indodakazami ngamanga batjho uyifumene ingasese litlawu. Kodwana nginobufakazi napu obukhomba ubutlawu bendodakazami.” Bazakwendlala ingubo leyo phambi kwabaphathi bedorobho. 
Deuteronomy22:18 Abaphathi bedorobho bazakuthatha indoda leyo bayirithe 
Deuteronomy22:19 bese bayihlawulise isiliva elikhilogremu nesiqunjwana bayinikele usomntazana ngombana ilethe ibizo elimbi phezu kwetlawu lakwa-Israyeli. Umntazana loyo uzakuba mkayo begodu angeze isabe isamtlhala ipilwayo yoke. 
Deuteronomy22:20 Kodwana nakube indaba leyo iliqiniso, kobana azange kufunyanwe ubufakazi bobutlawu emntazanenapho," 
Deuteronomy22:21 khona-ke bazakuletha umntazana loyo esangweni lomuzi kayise bese amadoda wedorobho amkhande ngamatje abe afe ngombana wenze ubuhlola kwa-Israyeli ngokufeba emzini kayise. Ngalokho nizakuthanyela ubumbi phakathi kwenu. 
Deuteronomy22:22 Nakube indoda ibanjwa ilele nomfazi wenye indoda, ababulawe bobabili njalo. Ngalokho nizakuthanyela ubumbi phakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Nakube kunetlawu eliboniweko bese lihlangane nendoda ngedorobheni, indoda leyo ilale nalo," 
Deuteronomy22:24 baletheni bobabili njalo esangweni ledorobho, nibakhande ngamatje bebafe ngombana itlawelo azange lirhuwelele libawe isizo phezu kobana belingedorobheni. Indoda leyo yona irhubutjhe umfazi womunye umuntu. Ngalokho nizakuthanyela ubumbi phakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Kodwana nakube kusemmangweni, indoda ihlangane nomntazana oboniweko bese iyamgagadlhela, yindoda leyo kwaphela ezakubulawa." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Nakulitlawelo lona ningalenzi litho. Itlawu alinamlandu wesibetho sokufa. Umlandu onje ufana nowalokha umuntu nasahlele bewabulala omunye umuntu 
Deuteronomy22:27 ngombana uliragelele emmangweni; nanyana itlawu eliboniwekwelo lirhuwelele libawa isizo azange kube nomuntu olisizako. 
Deuteronomy22:28 Nakube indoda ihlangana netlawu elingakabonwa, ilibambe ilale nalo bese kuyaziwa," 
Deuteronomy22:29 indoda leyo izakunikela usomntazana loyo isiliva engaphezu kwesiquntu sekhilogremu bese umntazana loyo uba mkayo ngombana imrhubutjhile. Ingabe isamtlhala epilwenayo yoke. 
Deuteronomy22:30 Indoda ingathathi umfazi kayise namkha yambule ubuze bomfazi kayise. 
Deuteronomy23:1 Opatlazwe amahlwayi namkha oquntwe ubudoda akazukungena ehlanganweni kaSomnini. 
Deuteronomy23:2 Umntwana wephandle akazukungena ehlanganweni kaSomnini, ngitjho nesizukulwaneni sakhe setjhumi akakho ozakungena ehlanganweni kaSomnini." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Akunamu-Amoni namkha umuMowabi ozakungena ehlanganweni kaSomnini, ngitjho nesizukulwaneni setjhumi. Iye, akunamuntu womndenabo ozakungena ehlanganweni kaSomnini nini nanini," 
Deuteronomy23:4 ngombana azange banihlangabeze ngesikwa namanzi nanisendleleni lokha nanibuya eGibhide. Godu baqatjha uBhiliyamu umsa kaBhewori ngePetora eMesopotamiya kobana anithuke. 
Deuteronomy23:5 USomnini uZimenu azange alalele uBhiliyamu, kodwana waphendula isithukweso saba sibusiso kini ngombana uSomnini uZimenu uyanithanda." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Epilwenenu yoke ningasekeli ukuthula kwabo nepumelelwabo. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Ninganyenyi umEdomu ngombana ngumfowenu, ninganyenyi umGibhide ngombana nakhe naba ziinkhonzi enarheni yekhabo." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Abantwana besizukulwana sabo sesithathu bangangena ehlanganweni kaSomnini. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Naniyokulwa nezitha zenu bese nihlala ekampeni, zilondeni kikho koke okumbi." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Nakube kunomuntu phakathi kwenu ongakahlambuluki ngebanga lokuzitsanyazela ebusuku, akaphumele ngaphandle kwekampa, angatjhideli eduze kwayo." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Kodwana kuzakuthi ntambama, adude bese nakutjhinga ilanga angene-ke ngekampeni." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Yibani nendawana ngaphandle kwekampa lapha nizazithumela khona. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Niphathe ingembo eenkhalini zenu enizakwemba ngayo umgodi nanizithumako bese naniqedako nidibizese uthuvi benu lobo," 
Deuteronomy23:14 ngombana uSomnini uZimenu ukhamba phakathi kwenu ekampeni kobana anisindise abe anikele izitha zenu phambi kwenu. Ngalokho ikampenu kumele ihlanzeke ukuze uSomnini angakhambi abona ameswe wenu bese uyanifulathela. 
Deuteronomy23:15 Lokha ikhoboka nalibalekele kini ningalibuyiseli kumninilo," 
Deuteronomy23:16 alihlale nani, libe phakathi kwenu, endaweni elizayikhetha hlangana namadorobhenu, lapha lithanda khona, ningaligandeleli." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Kungabi nesitjhatjha sendawo ecwengileko emadodakazini nemadodaneni wakwa-Israyeli. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Ningalethi ikokhelo yengwadla namkha umrholo wenja ngekumbeni kaSomnini uZimenu kobana kukhokhelwe nanyana ngisiphi isifungo ngombana kokubili lokho kusinyenyiso kuSomnini uZimenu. 
Deuteronomy23:19 Ungathi nawuboleka umfowenu imali, okugonywako namkha nanyana yini ebolekwako, umbize inzalo." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Nakumqhamuka wona ungawubiza inzalo nawuwubolekako, kodwana umfowenu ungambizi inzalo nawumbolekako ukuze uSomnini uZimakho akubusise kikho koke okwenzako enarheni eningena kiyo bona niyithumbe." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Lokha nawenza isithembiso kuSomnini uZimakho, ungadosi iinyawo nakumele usiphethe ngombana ngambala uSomnini uZimakho uzasifuna kuwe begodu kuzakuba sisono nawungasiphethiko." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Kodwana nawungathembisiko, akuzukuba sisono kuwe." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Okuthembise ngomlomakho, kulonde bewukwenze ngombana isithembisweso usenze kuSomnini uZimakho ngokuthanda kwakho." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Lokha nawuya esidiribeni somunye umuntu, ungagoma usuthe amadiribe, kube ngendlela ofuna ngayo, kodwana ungaphathi umphako." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Lokha nawungena esimini yekoroyi yomunye umuntu, ungakha iinqwambi ngesandla, kodwana ungayigwebi ngesegere." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Nakube indoda ithatha umfazi ibe myenakhe, kuthi ngemva kwesikhathi izifumane ingasenakareko ngaye ngebanga lokobana ibone ubutjhophori kuye, kumele itlole incwadi yesahlukaniso imnikele yona esandleni, imkhuphe emzinayo." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Nakube umfazi loyo uyaphuma akhambe emzini wendoda leyo, athathwe ngenye indoda," 
Deuteronomy24:3 nayo izizwe inesicasucasu ngaye itlole incwadi yesahlukaniso imnikele yona esandleni beyimkhuphe emzinayo, namkha nakube iyahlongakala," 
Deuteronomy24:4 indodakhe yokuthoma eyamtlhalako ayisenalungelo lokumthatha godu njengomkayo ngemva kobana arhubutjhiwe. Lokho kusinyenyiso phambi kwakaSomnini. Ningalethi umlandu enarheni uSomnini uZimenu aninikela yona bona ibe lilifa lenu. 
Deuteronomy24:5 Nakube indoda iqeda ukuthatha, ingaphumi nepi namkha inikelwe nanyana ngimuphi umsebenzi okatelelako. Kumele itjhaphuluke ibe sekhaya umnyaka munye kobana ithokozise umkayo emthetheko." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Kungabi nomuntu othatha ilitje lokugayela njengesibambiso ngitjho nanyana kungaba yimbokotho ngombana uzabe abambisa ngepilo. 
Deuteronomy24:7 Nakube indoda ifunyanwa yeba omunye wabafowabo, okumumuntu wakwa-Israyeli bese yenane ngaye njengekhoboka namkha imthengise, yeke alibulawe iselelo. Ngalokho nizakuthanyela ubumbi phakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Yelelani bona nanisahlelwe likhwekhwe, nitjheje ukwenza ukuya ngakho koke abaphristi bamaLevi abanifundise ngakho. Tjhejani ukwenza ngendlela engayala ngayo abaphristabo." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Khumbulani okwenziwa nguSomnini uZimenu kuMiriyamu endleleni lokha nanibuya eGibhide. 
Deuteronomy24:10 Nawuboleka omunye umuntu nanyana yini, ungayi ekumbenakhe ukuyokuthatha isibambiso sakhe." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Jama ngaphandle bese umuntu ombolekileko alethe isibambiso kuwe. 
Deuteronomy24:12 Nakube mumuntu odobha phasi, ungalali usaphethe isibambiso sakhe." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Nakutjhinga ilanga, uzambuyisela isibambiso sakhe ukuze akghone ukulala ngengubakhe leyo akuthokoze. Lokho kuzakuba kulunga kuwe phambi kwakaSomnini uZimakho." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Ungagandeleli isisebenzi esiqatjhiweko esidobha phasi nesiswelako, nanyana kungaba ngomunye wabafowenu nanyana osikhonzi esisenarhenenu ngemadorobhenenu." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Sikhokhele umrholwaso ilanga elinye nelinye ngaphambi kokutjhinga kwelanga ngombana sidududu, sithembele emrholweni lowo. Nakungasinjalo sizakulila ngawe phambi kwakaSomnini bese kuba sisono kuwe." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Aboyise bangabulawa ngebanga labantwana, nabantwana abangabulawa ngebanga laboyise. Omunye nomunye uzakufela isono sakhe." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Ningahlanakezeli ilungelo lesikhonzi namkha intandani. Godu ningathathi ingubo yomhlolokazi njengesibambiso. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Khumbulani kobana benimakhoboka eGibhide, uSomnini uZimenu wanihlenga. Ngalokho ngiyaniyala bona nikwenze lokho." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Nanivuna isivuno senu emasiminenu bese nikhohlwa isitjherefu emasiminapho, ningabuyeli niyosithatha; sizakuba ngesesikhonzi, intandani nomhlolokazi ukuze uSomnini uZimenu anibusise kiyo yoke imisebenzi yezandla zenu." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Lokha nanitlhwara imithenu ye-oliva ningayitlhwarisisi; okusele lapho kuzakuba ngokwesikhonzi, intandani nomhlolokazi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Lokha nanivuna amadiribe wesidiribe senu, ningawaburuji ngemva kwalokho; azakuba ngewesikhonzi, intandani nomhlolokazi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Khumbulani bona benimakhoboka enarheni yeGibhide, ngalokho ngiyaniyala bona nikwenze lokho." 
Deuteronomy25:1 Nakube amadoda ayararana bese aya ebandla, umgwebi abange umlandwawo, akhuphe omsulwa, asole onomlandu" 
Deuteronomy25:2 bese indoda enomlandu leyo kumele irithwe, umgwebi uzayibhambalalisa phasi irithwe phambi kwakhe kube mivuvu ekhambisana nomlandwayo." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Ingarithwa imivuvu ematjhumi amane, kodwana kungadluli lapho. Namritha ukudlula lapho umfowenu lo, uzakuhlaziseka emehlwenenu." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Ungafaki ikomo isifonyo lokha nayibhula ibhali nekoroyi.
