Deuteronomy25:5 Nakube abafo bahlala ndawonye bese omunye wabo uhlongakala anganandodana, umfazi wohlongakeleko angaphakeli umuntu ongasingowomndeni, okutjho iphandle. Kumele aphakele umfowabo lendodakhe, amthathe abe mkakhe, agcine isiko kuye njengomrharibakhe." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Indodana elizibulo ezakubelethwa, izakuba ngeyomfowabo ohlongakeleko ukuze ibizo lakhe lingasuswa kwa-Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Nakube indoda leyo ayithandi ukungena umkamfowabo, umkamfowabo uzakukhuphukela kubaphathi esangweni afike athi: “Umrharibami kazi uyala ukuvusa ibizo lomfowabo kwa-Israyeli. Akafuni ukugcina isiko kimapha.”" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Abaphathi bedorobho bazambiza-ke bakhulume naye. Nakube uyaragalala athi: “Ngithi angimfuni!” 
Deuteronomy25:9 Khona-ke umkamfowabo loyo uzakuya kuye phambi kwabaphathi afese amhlubulise ipatlagwana, amkhafulele ebusweni athi kuye: “Kuzakuba njalo endodeni engafuni ukuvusa umuzi womfowabo.”" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Umndenakhe uzakwaziwa kwa-Israyeli bona ngowaHlutjuliswa iPatlagwana. 
Deuteronomy25:11 Nakube amadoda ayalwa bese umfazi wendodenye atjhidele bona alamulele indodakwakhe ebhudungelweko, atjhubelele indoda leyo ngepahlayo yangaphasi," 
Deuteronomy25:12 nizakuqunta isandla somfazi loyo, ilihlo lenu lingamtlhuweli." 
Deuteronomy25:13 Ningabi nemihlobo emibili yamatje wokulinganisa, amakhulu namancani, ngeembadeni zenu." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Ningabi namathungana amabili wokulinganisa, amakhulu namancani, ngeenkumbeni zenu." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Yibani nesilinganiso sinye seqiniso, okulilitje nethungana ukuze amalangenu ande enarheni uSomnini uZimenu aninikela yona." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Iye, uSomnini uZimenu uyabanyenya boke abenza izinto ezinjalo, okutjho abarhweba ngekohliso." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Khumbulani enakwenziwa ngu-Amalekhi naniphuma eGibhide: 
Deuteronomy25:18 Kwathi lokha nanidiniweko begodu niphelelwe mamandla wanisahlela endleleni. Warhayila boke ebebasemuva, wangesaba uZimu." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Ngalokho emva kobana uSomnini uZimenu aninikele ukuphumula ezitheni zenu zoke, enarheni uSomnini uZimenu aninikela yona bona ibe lilifa lenu, susani zoke iinkhumbuzo zaka-Amalekhi ngaphasi komthunzi welanga. Ningakhohlwa." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Nawufika enarheni uSomnini uZimakho akunikela yona kobana ibe lilifa lakho bese uyayithumba, uhlale kiyo," 
Deuteronomy26:2 uzakuthatha ezinye zazo zoke iinthelo zokuthoma zequlwanakho, ozivuna enarhenakho oyiphiwe nguSomnini uZimakho, uzifake ngesiqwebini, uye endaweni ezakukhethwa nguSomnini uZimakho kobana ajamise ibizo lakhe lapho." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Uye kumphristi osesikhundleni ngesikhatheso, uthi kuye: “Ngimemezela ilangeli kuSomnini uZimakho kobana ngifikile enarheni uSomnini ayifungela kibobamkhulu kobana uzanginikela yona.”" 
Deuteronomy26:4 Yeke umphristi uzakuthatha isiqwebu esandleni sakho asibeke phambi kwe-aldari lakaSomnini uZimakho. 
Deuteronomy26:5 Uzakuvuma phambi kwakaSomnini uZimakho uthi: “Ubaba gade amAramiya onguzulani, wehlela eGibhide waba sikhonzi lapho, umndenakhe ulidlanzana. Lapho wanda waba sisizwe esikhulu, okutjho esinamandla nesinengi ngesibalo." 
Deuteronomy26:6 AmaGibhide thina asiphatha kumbi, asigandelela, asithwesa umthwalo obudisi." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Salila kuSomnini uZimu wabobamkhulu. USomnini wasizwa isililo sethu, wabona isizi lethu, ubudisi nokuhlunguphazwa kwethu." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Wasikhupha eGibhide ngesandla esinamandla nangesiphanga sakhe, ngokwesabeka okukhulu, ngeembonakaliso nemikarisomraro." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Wasiletha lapha, wasinikela inarha le, inarha egeleza ibisi neliju." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Qala-ke, gadesi ngiletha iinthelo zokuthoma zequlwani uSomnini anginikele yona.” Uzakubeka isiqwebu phambi kwakaSomnini uZimakho, ukhothame phambi kwakhe." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Uzakujekezela kibo boke ubuhle obenzelwe nguSomnini uZimakho wena nomndenakho, umLevi kanye nesikhonzi esikhonze phakathi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Nasele uqede ukukhokha koke kwetjhumi kwesivuno sakho emnyakeni wesithathu, okumnyaka wokwetjhumi ukunikele umLevi, isikhonzi, intandani nomhlolokazi ukuze bagome basuthe edorobheni lakho." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Nje-ke uzakuthi phambi kwakaSomnini uZimakho: “Ngisisusile isipho esikhethekileko endlinami, khulukhulu ngisinikele umLevi, isikhonzi, intandani kanye nomhlolokazi ukuya ngayo yoke imiyalo uSomnini angiyale ngayo, azange ngeqe namunye godu azange ngiyikhohlwe." 
Deuteronomy26:14 “Azange ngigome kokwetjhumi nangizilileko; azange ngisuse ingcenye yakhona nangisasilapheleko; azange ngiphahle ngengcenye yakhona kwabafileko. “Ngilalele ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimami. Ngenze koke engikuyalwe nguSomnini. 
Deuteronomy26:15 USomnini akaqale asendawenakhe ecwengileko, ezulwini bese abusise abantu bakhe u-Israyeli kanye nequlwani uSomnini asinikele yona njengombana uSomnini afunga kibobamkhulu, inarha egeleza ibisi neliju.”" 
Deuteronomy26:16 Namhlanje uSomnini uZimenu uyaniyala kobana nenze iimiso nemithetho le. Ngalokho tjhejani niyenze ngeenhliziyo zenu nangemiphefumulwenu epheleleko. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Nivumile namhlanje kobana uSomnini unguZimenu, nathi nizokukhamba eendleleni zakhe, nilonde iimiso zakhe nemiyalwakhe kanye nemithethwakhe, nilalele ilizwi lakhe." 
Deuteronomy26:18 USomnini naye umemezele namhlanje bona nisisizwe esingesakhe njengombana anithembisile. Ngalokho londani yoke imiyalwakhe. 
Deuteronomy26:19 USomnini uzaniphakamisa ngaphezu kwazo zoke izizwe azidalileko, ngokudunyiswa, ngokwaziwa nangokuhlonitjhwa. Nizakuba babantu abacwengileko kuSomnini uZimenu njengombana akhulumile." 
Deuteronomy27:1 UMosi ngokusekelwa baphathi bakwa-Israyeli wayala abantu ngamezwi alandelako: Gcinani yoke imiyalo enginiyala ngayo namhlanje. 
Deuteronomy27:2 Mhlana niyama iJordani niya enarheni uSomnini uZimenu aninikela yona, zilungiseleleni ukubeka amatje amakhulu nokuwatjhatjha ngepembe," 
Deuteronomy27:3 ukuze nitlole phezu kwawo woke amezwi womthetho lo. Lokho nikwenze naniyamako kobana ningene enarheni uSomnini uZimenu aninikela yona, inarha egeleza ibisi neliju, njengombana uSomnini uZimu waboyihlomkhulu anithembisa." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Nasele niyame iJordani, nizakubeka amatje enginiyale ngawo namhlanje la, entabeni i-Ebali, niwatjhatjhe ngepembe." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Nakhele lapho uSomnini uZimenu i-aldari lamatje, ningawaqoqodi ngesisetjenziswa sesimbi." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Nizakwakhela uSomnini uZimenu i-aldari lamatje angakabazwa, nenzele uSomnini uZimenu iminikelo yokutjhiswa kilo." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Yenzelani lapho iminikelo yetjhebiswano, nigomele khonapho benijekezele phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Qinisekisani bonyana nitlole woke amezwi womthetho lo phezu kwamatjapho abonakale kuhle. 
Deuteronomy27:9 UMosi ngokusekelwa baphristi bamaLevi wathi kiwo woke ama-Israyeli ngamezwi alandelako: Thulani nithi du, nilalele nina ma-Israyeli: Namhlanje sele nibabantu bakaSomnini uZimenu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Ngalokho lalelani uSomnini uZimenu, nilonde imiyalwakhe neemiso zakhe, enginiyala ngazo namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Godu uMosi wayala abantu khona mhlokho ngamezwi la: 
Deuteronomy27:12 Nasele niyame iJordani, iinkoro ezilandelako zizakujama e-aldarini ngehlangothini lentaba iGerizimu lokha nakumenyezelwa iimbusiso: bakwaSimiyoni, bakwaLevi, bakwaJuda, bakwa-Isakari, bakwaJosefa nebakwaBhenjamini." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Iinkoro ezilandelako zizakujama e-aldarini ngehlangothini lentaba i-Ebali lokha nakumenyezelwa amanikelela: bakwaRubeni, bakwaGadi, bakwa-Atjhere, bakwaZebuloni, bakwaDani nebakwaNafitali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 AmaLevi azakumemezela kibo boke abantu bakwa-Israyeli ngelizwi elikhulu athi: 
Deuteronomy27:15 “Akanikelelwe umuntu obaza namkha obumba isithombe bese asijamise ngemsitheleni, okuyinto eyenziwe ngezandla zakasosino. Lokho kusinyenyiso kuSomnini.” Boke abantu bazakuphendula bathi: “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “Akanikelelwe umuntu odelela uyise nonina.” Boke abantu bazakuthi: “Amen!” 
Deuteronomy27:17 “Akanikelelwe otjhidisa isikhonkhwani sakamakhelwana.” Boke abantu bazakuthi: “Amen!” 
Deuteronomy27:18 “Akanikelelwe umuntu odurhisa isiphofu endleleni.” Boke abantu bazakuthi: “Amen!” 
Deuteronomy27:19 “Akanikelelwe umuntu ohlanakezela ilungelo lesikhonzi, lentandani nelomhlolokazi.” Boke abantu bazakuthi: “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “Akanikelelwe umuntu olalana nomkayise ngombana wembule ubuze bomkayise.” Boke abantu bazakuthi: “Amen!” 
Deuteronomy27:21 “Akanikelelwe umuntu olalana nanamkha mhlobo bani wesilwana.” Boke abantu bazakuthi: “Amen!” 
Deuteronomy27:22 “Akanikelelwe umuntu olalana nodadwabo, kungaba yindodakazi kayise namkha indodakazi kanina.” Boke abantu bazakuthi: “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “Akanikelelwe umuntu olalana nomkhwekazakhe.” Boke abantu bazakuthi: “Amen!” 
Deuteronomy27:24 “Akanikelelwe umuntu obulala omunye umuntu ngemsitheleni.” Boke abantu bazakuthi: “Amen!” 
Deuteronomy27:25 “Akanikelelwe umuntu owamukela ukufunjathiswa kobana abulale umuntu, ngokwenza njalo athulule iingazi ezimsulwa.” Boke abantu bazakuthi: “Amen!”" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “Akanikelelwe umuntu ongadzimeleli emazwini womthetho lo.” Boke abantu bazakuthi: “Amen!” 
Deuteronomy28:1 Nanilalela ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimenu, niyelela ukwenza yoke imiyalwakhe enginiyala ngayo namhlanje, uSomnini uZimenu uzoniphakamisa ngaphezu kwazo zoke izizwe zephasi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Iye, nanilalela ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimenu, zoke iimbusiswezi zizakwehlela phezu kwenu, zinembathe." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Nizakubusiswa ngedorobheni, nibusiswe nemasimini." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Kuzakubusiswa iimbeletho zenu, iinthelo zequlwanenu, inzalo yeenlwana zenu: Iinkomo, izimvu neembuzi zenu zizakwanda." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Kuzakubusiswa iinqwebu zenu nezitja zenu zokudubela. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Nizakubusiswa naningenako nalokha naniphumako. 
Deuteronomy28:7 USomnini uzakwenza bonyana izitha zenu ezinivukelako zihlulwe phambi kwenu, zizanisahlela ngandlelanye, zibaleke phambi kwenu ngeendlela ezilikhomba." 
Deuteronomy28:8 USomnini uzakuvulela iimbusiso phezu kweenlulu zenu nakikho koke enikwenzako. Iye, uzanibusisa enarheni aninikela yona." 
Deuteronomy28:9 USomnini uzanijamisa njengesizwe esicwengileko kuye njengombana afunga kini, iye, nanigcina imiyalo kaSomnini uZimenu benikhambe eendleleni zakhe." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Boke abantu bephasi bazakubona bonyana nibizwa ngebizo lakaSomnini, yeke bazanesaba." 
Deuteronomy28:11 USomnini uzanandisela ipumelelo: Nizakuba nabantwana abanengi, ifuyo enengi neenthelo ezinengi zequlwani enarheni ayifungele ukuyinikela aboyihlomkhulu." 
Deuteronomy28:12 USomnini uzanivulela umnonwakhe omuhle, okumazulu, kobana aniphe izulu enarhenenu ngesikhathi sakhona abe abusise woke umsebenzi wezandla zenu. Nizakuboleka izizwe ezinengi kodwana nina ningaboleki litho kizo." 
Deuteronomy28:13 USomnini uzanenza ihloko, ningabi msila. Nizakukhuphuka njalo ningehli. Lokho kuzakwenzeka kwaphela nanilalela imiyalo kaSomnini uZimenu enginiyala ngayo namhlanje kobana niyilonde beniyenze," 
Deuteronomy28:14 nalokha naningaphambukiko emazwini enginiyala ngawo namhlanje ngokudlhemadlhema ngemva kwabosingazimu nibalotjhe. 
Deuteronomy28:15 Naningalaleli ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimenu namkha ningatjheji ukwenza yoke imiyalwakhe neemiso zakhe enginiyale ngazo namhlanje, yeke woke amanikelela la azakwehlela phezu kwenu anembathe." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Nizakunikelelwa edorobheni, ninikelelwe nemasimini." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Kuzakunikelelwa iinqwebu zenu, kunikelelwe nezitja zenu zokudubela." 
Deuteronomy28:18 Kuzakunikelelwa iimbeletho zenu, iinthelo zequlwanenu, iinkomo, izimvu neembuzi zenu." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Nizakunikelelwa naningenako, ninikelelwe nalokha naniphumako." 
Deuteronomy28:20 USomnini uzanithumelela iinthuweleliso, ihlangahlangano nokungezwani kikho koke enikwenzako kufikela lapha nirhayileka khona. Nizakuphela msinyana ngebanga lezenzo zenu ezimbi nanimhlubukako." 
Deuteronomy28:21 USomnini uzakubangela bonyana amatshwenyeko aninamathele abe aniqotjhe enarheni eningena kiyo bonyana niyithumbe: 
Deuteronomy28:22 Izanibetha ngesifo esiqeda amandla nangomgomani, nokutjhisa komzimba nokuhlangahlangana kwengqondo; inibethe ngesomiso, ububori nokukghora. Koke lokhu kuzaninamathela bekunibhubhise nya." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Umkayi ngehla kwenu uzakuba yikoporo nomhlaba ngaphasi kwenu ube yisimbi. 
Deuteronomy28:24 USomnini uzakwenza izulu enarhenenu libe lithuli neputjhana, uzakwehlela phezu kwenu avela emkayini abe anirhayile nya." 
Deuteronomy28:25 USomnini uzanenza nihlulwe zizitha zenu, nizisahlele ngandlelanye kodwana nizakubaleka phambi kwazo ngeendlela ezilikhomba. Nizakuba sibonelo esesabekako emibusweni yoke yephasi:" 
Deuteronomy28:26 Iindumbu zenu zizakuba kugoma kwazo zoke iinyoni zomkayi neembandana zephasi. Kuzakutlhogeka umuntu wokuzethusa. 
Deuteronomy28:27 USomnini uzanibetha ngamathumba weGibhide, iinlonda, ukubhibhidlha nangobuzikazikani besikhumba okungapholiko." 
Deuteronomy28:28 USomnini uzanibetha ngokurhapha nangobuphofu, nihlangane iinhloko," 
Deuteronomy28:29 nizakuphumbutha emini ka bha inga kusemnyameni njengesiphofu. Anizukuphumelela eendleleni zenu, nizakuhlala nigandelelwe benidlelezelwe njalo, nizakutlhoga umuntu ozanisiza." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Omunye wenu nabona intombi, omunye umuntu uzayigagadlhela. Nizakwakha iinkumba kodwana ningazihlali, nitjale isidiribe kodwana ninganandiphi neenthelo zakhona." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Kuzakuhlatjwa iinkomo zenu niqalile, ningagomi neqatjhana lakhona. Kuthathwe abodumbana benu ngekani niqalile, bangasabuyiselwa kini. Izimvu zenu zizakunikelwa izitha zenu, kungabi nomuntu onisizako." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Amadodana namadodakazenu azakunikelwa abanye abantu ningabi namandla wokukukhandela lokho. Kwenu kuzakuba kuhlala nigolozele ukubuya kwawo. 
Deuteronomy28:33 Isizwe eningasaziko sizakurhiribidela iinthelo zequlwanenu nomsebenzi woke wezandla zenu. Nizakuhlala nigandelelwe njalo beniphathwe kumbi 
Deuteronomy28:34 kufikela lapha nihlanyiswa khona ngilokho enikubonako. 
Deuteronomy28:35 USomnini uzonibetha ngamathumba amambi nangalaphekiko emadolweni neenyonga, ehlele eenyaweni abe akhuphukele neenhloko." 
Deuteronomy28:36 USomnini uZimu uzanithatha nekosi enizibekele yona inise esizweni eningasaziko nina naboyihlomkhulu. Lapho-ke nizakulotjha abosingazimu besigodo nebelitje. 
Deuteronomy28:37 Nizakuba sithuko, isiga nesiphoqo phakathi kwabo boke abantu lapha uSomnini azanisa khona." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Nizakutjala imbewu enengi emasimini, kodwana nivune idlanzana ngombana isivuno senu sizakurhiribidelwa yintethe." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Nizakutjala isidiribe benisihlunge, kodwana anizukusela iwayini lakhona namkha nikhe amadiribe wakhona ngombana azakudliwa ziimbungu zobubori." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Nizakuba nemithi ye-oliva esifundeni senu soke, kodwana anizozizesa ngamafutha wakhona ngombana ama-olivenu azakuthintitheka." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Nizakubeletha amadodana namadodakazi, kodwana akazukuba ngewenu ngombana azakuthunjwa." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Intethe izakumumela yoke imithenu neenthelo zequlwanenu. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Isikhonzi esiphakathi kwenu sizakuphumelela sindlondlobale sibe ngehla kwenu, nina nichake nehlele phasi phasi." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Nizakuboleka kiso, kungasaba ngiso esiboleka kini, sizakuba yihloko nina nibe msila." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Woke amanikelela la azanehlela, anilale nje, abe anembathe kufikela lapha nirhayileka khona nya ngombana azange nilalele ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimenu, ukulonda imiyalwakhe nemithethwakhe aniyale ngayo." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Azakuba njengesibonakaliso nesimangaliso phezu kwenu naphezu kweenzukulwana zenu nini nanini. 
Deuteronomy28:47 Ngombana nakhu anizange nilotjhe uSomnini uZimenu ngethabo nangokuthokoza kwehliziyo ngebanga lokobana benisutha," 
Deuteronomy28:48 ngalokho nizakusebenzela izitha zenu uSomnini azazithumela bona zijamelane nani. Zizanibulalisa ngendlala, zinibangele umrhawu, zinihlubulise nibe bhunubhunu niswele koke. USomnini uzakubeka ijogi lesimbi eentanyeni zenu abe anibhubhise nya." 
Deuteronomy28:49 USomnini uzakuletha isizwe esizakujamelana nani esivela kude epelazwe, esizakufika inga likhozi, isizwe eningazi ilimi laso," 
Deuteronomy28:50 isizwe esinelunya nesingekhe sarhawukela umuntu omdala namkha sibe nomusa ebantwaneni. 
Deuteronomy28:51 Sizakufika siqothule inzalo yefuywenu neenthelo zequlwanenu kufikela lapha nirhayileka khona: Angeze sanitjhiyela ikoroyi, iwayini namkha amafutha we-oliva. Singanitjhiyeli inzalo yeenkomo, yezimvu neembuzi zenu kufikela lapha sinibhubhisa khona." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Sizanivimbezela kiwo woke amadorobhenu enarhenenu yoke, kufikela lapha kugirika khona imithangalenu ephakamileko neqinileko enithembele kiyo. Iye, sizanivimbezela kiwo woke amadorobhenu enarhenenu yoke eniyinikelwe nguSomnini uZimenu" 
Deuteronomy28:53 benitle abantwabenu, inyama yamadodanenu namadodakazenu eniwaphiwe nguSomnini uZimenu. Lokho kuzakwenzeka esizini nebudisini enizakuhlunguphazwa ngabo zizitha zenu." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Ngitjho nendoda ephakathi kwenu ethambileko ngombana ikhuliswe ngokutotoswa khulu, mhlokho ayizukutlhuwela umfowayo, umkayo emthanda khulu kanye nomntwanayo esele kusele yena yedwa zwi." 
Deuteronomy28:55 Ayizukupha namunye wabo inyama yabantwabayo eyigomako ngombana kuzabe kungasenalitho layo eliseleko. Lokho kuzakwenzeka esizini nebudisini enizakuhlunguphazwa ngabo zizitha zenu kiwo woke amadorobhenu. 
Deuteronomy28:56 Ngitjho nomfazi ophakathi kwenu othambileko nodedesa khulu, ongekhe agadanga ubunyonyo ngendlela adedesa ngayo, mhlokho angeze atlhuwela indodakhe ayithanda khulu, indodanakhe nendodakazakhe." 
Deuteronomy28:57 Akazukubapha ingubo yomntwana ephuma hlangana nemilenzakhe nenyama yomtwanakhe ambelethako. Koke lokho uzakutlela ngemsitheleni ngebanga lokuswela kwakhe. Lokho kuzakwenzeka esizini nebudisini enizakuhlunguphazwa ngabo zizitha zenu emadorobhenenu. 
Deuteronomy28:58 Naningaqapheli ukwenza woke amezwi womthetho lo atlolwe encwadinapha ukuze nesabe ibizo elidumileko nelesabekako lakaSomnini uZimenu," 
Deuteronomy28:59 khona-ke uSomnini uzanehlisela nina neenzukulwana zenu amatshwenyeko eningazange kheniwabone, amatshwenyeko amakhulu nangapheliko kanye namagulo amambi angalaphekiko." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Uzanehlisela zoke izifo zeGibhide ebenizesaba, ngithi zizaninamatha." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Godu uzanehlisela woke amagulo namatshwenyeko angakatlolwa ngencwadini yomthetho le benirhayileke nya. 
Deuteronomy28:62 Nizakusala niyikereketjhana phezu kobana beniliwoma njengeenkwekwezi zomkayi ngombana azange nilalele ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimenu. 
Deuteronomy28:63 Njengombana uSomnini athabela ukunenzela okuhle abe anandise, ngokunjalo uzakuthabela ukuniqeda abe anirhayile. Nizakuqotjhwa enarheni eningena kiyo bona niyithumbe." 
Deuteronomy28:64 USomnini uzanihlakaza hlangana nabantu boke, ukusuka egumbini elinye lephasi ukuya kelinye. Lapho nizakulotjha abosingazimu besigodo nebelitje eningabaziko nina ngitjho naboyihlomkhulu." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Anizukufumana ukuthula hlangana nezizwezi; iye, iinyawo zenu angeze zaphumula. USomnini uzokwenza iinhliziyo zenu zithuthumele, amehlwenu afifiyele nemiphefumulwenu iphelelwe mamandla;" 
Deuteronomy28:66 ipilwenu izakulengela erharheni. Ubusuku nemini nizakuphila ngevalo ningabi nesiqiniseko ngepilwenu. 
Deuteronomy28:67 Ngebanga lokugcwala kwevalo eenhliziyweni zenu nalokhu okuzakubonwa mamehlwenu, nizakuthi ekuseni, “Hayi, thana sele kusebusuku!” bese kuthi entambama nithi, “Hayi, thana sekusile!”" 
Deuteronomy28:68 USomnini uzanibuyisela eGibhide ngemikhumbi, ikhambo enganithembisa bona angeze nisalibona. Lapho nizazinikela ezitheni zenu njengamakhoboka namakhobokakazi, kodwana akunamuntu ozanithenga." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Naka amezwi wesivumelwano uSomnini ayala ngawo uMosi bona asenze nama-Israyeli enarheni yakwaMowabi, ngaphandle kwaleso asenza nawo eHorebe." 
Deuteronomy29:2 UMosi wabiza woke ama-Israyeli wathi kiwo: “Nikubonile koke uSomnini akwenze phambi kwenu enarheni yeGibhide kuFaro neencekwini zakhe zoke kanye nenarhenakhe yoke. 
Deuteronomy29:3 Lokhu kutjho amatshwenyeko amakhulu enzeka phambi kwenu, iimbonakaliso nemikarisomraro emikhulu." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Kodwana kunamhlanje kwaphela lapha uSomnini aniphe umkhumbulo wokuzwisisa, amehlo wokubona neendlebe zokuzwa." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Nginirhole iminyaka ematjhumi amane erhalawumbeni, izambatho zenu azange zirhalukele emizimbenenu, namapatlagwanenu azange adabuke eenyaweni zenu." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Azange nigome isikwa, azange nisele iwayini namkha utjwala ukuze nazi bonyana uSomnini unguZimenu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 “Bona nifike endaweni le, uSirhoni ikosi yeRhetjhibhoni no-Ogi ikosi yeBhatjhani bajamelana nathi epini kodwana sabahlula." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Sathatha inarhabo sayinikela bakwaRubeni, bakwaGadi kanye nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase njengelifa labo." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Ngalokho tjhejani ukwenza amezwi wesivumelwaneso ukuze niphumelele kikho koke enikwenzako. 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Noke nijame namhlanje phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu, iinhloko zeenkoro zenu, abaphathi benu kanye neenkhulu zenu, woke amadoda wakwa-Israyeli," 
Deuteronomy29:11 abantwabenu, abafazi benu, neenkhonzi ezisekampenenu, ngitjho nabanithezela iinkuni nabanikhela amanzi" 
Deuteronomy29:12 ukuze ningene esivumelwaneni sakaSomnini uZimenu asenza nani namhlanje kanye nokuzithathela amanikelela akhambisana naso. 
Deuteronomy29:13 Ngaleyondlela uSomnini unenze abantu bakhe namhlanje, naye uzakuba nguZimenu njengombana anithembisile nanjengombana afunga kiboyihlomkhulu u-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Isivumelwanesi namanikelela akhambisana naso angisenzi nani kwaphela; 
Deuteronomy29:15 ngisenza nanamkha ngubani ojame nathi phambi kwakaSomnini uZimethu namhlanje kanye nalabo abangekho lapha. 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Niyazi bonyana besihlala njani enarheni yeGibhide, nokobana saphuma njani hlangana nezizwe esadlula kizo." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Godu nibonile iinyenyiso zazo, okutjho abozinyana beengodo nebamatje, besiliva nebegolide ezibalotjhako." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Mhlamunye kungaba khona phakathi kwenu indoda, umfazi, umndeni namkha ikoro enehliziyo esele ihlanuke uSomnini uZimethu bona idlhemadlheme ngemva kwabosingazimu bezizwezo. Nakube kunjalo kuzakumila umrabhu onobuthi neenthelo ezimunyu:" 
Deuteronomy29:19 Umuntu onjalo uzakuthi nezwa amezwi wamanikelela akhambisana nesivumelwano lawo azibusise ehliziywenakhe athi, ‘Nokho ngizakubulungeka, ije ngikhamba ngikhunyalele kangaka ehliziywenami ngombana uSomnini akazukuvuthisa isikhuni esomileko hlangana nezimanzi.’" 
Deuteronomy29:20 USomnini angeze amcolela kodwana itukuthelo kaSomnini nesikhwele sakhe kuzakuvutha phezu komuntu loyo, namanikelela atlolwe encwadinapha azakwehlela phezu kwakhe bese uSomnini usula ibizo lakhe ngaphasi komthunzi welanga." 
Deuteronomy29:21 USomnini uzamkhupha hlangana nazo zoke iinkoro zakwa-Israyeli ehlelwe yihlekelele ukuya ngawo woke amanikelela akhambisana nesivumelwano atlolwe ngencwadini yomthetho le. 
Deuteronomy29:22 Isizukulwana esizako, okutjho abantwabenu abazakuvela ngemva kwenu, nomqhamuka ovela ezizweni uzakubona woke amahlungu wenarha nezifo uSomnini aziphose phezu kwayo." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Inarha yoke izakwembathwa litswayi nesibabula ibe mlotha lapha kungeze kwatjalwa bekwamila litho khona. Ngitjho neemila angeze zamila lapho. Kuzakuba njengeSodoma neGomora, i-Adima neTseboyimu uSomnini aziketula ngetukuthelo evuthako." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Zoke izizwe zizakubuza zithi, ‘Kubayini uSomnini enze into enje enarheni le? Kutheni ngetukuthelo evutha kangaka?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 “Kuzaphendulwa kuthiwe, ‘Kungombana bahlanuke isivumelwano sakaSomnini uZimu waboyisemkhulu, asenza nabo nabakhupha enarheni yeGibhide." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Badlhemadlhema bayokulotjha abosingazimu bebabakhothamela. Abosingazimu abangabaziko begodu uSomnini angazange abanikele kibo. 
Deuteronomy29:27 Ngalokho-ke itukuthelo kaSomnini yavutha phezu kwenarha le, wayehlisela woke amanikelela atlolwe encwadinapha." 
Deuteronomy29:28 USomnini wabaruthula enarhenabo ngetukuthelo, ngobukhali nangelaka elikhulu, wabalahlela enarheni enye njengombana kunjalo namhlanje.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Izinto ezifihlakeleko ngezikaSomnini uZimethu, kodwana lokho okwambuliweko kungekwethu nabantwabethu isiphelani ukuze senze woke amezwi womthetho lo.”" 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Nasele koke lokho kunehlele, okutjho iimbusiso namanikelela engiwabeke phambi kwenu, khibe niphakathi kwezizwe zoke uSomnini uZimenu anihlakazele kizo bese nikufaka ehloko," 
Deuteronomy30:2 nibuyele kuSomnini uZimenu, nina nabantwabenu, nilalele ilizwi lakhe ngeenhliziyo zenu nangemiphefumulwenu yoke, kikho koke enginiyala ngakho namhlanje," 
Deuteronomy30:3 khona-ke uSomnini uZimenu uzakutjhugulula ubujamo benu, abe nezwelo phezu kwenu. Uzabuye anibuthelele hlangana nabo boke abantu lapha bekanihlakazele khona." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Nanyana abaqotjhiweko benu basepelazwe, uSomnini uZimenu uzanibuthelela khonapho, anithathe lapho," 
Deuteronomy30:5 anise enarheni yaboyihlomkhulu kobana ibe ngeyenu. Uzaniphumelelisa khulu anandise ukudlula aboyihlomkhulu. 
Deuteronomy30:6 USomnini uZimenu uzakusoka iinhliziyo zenu nezeenzukulwana zenu ukuze nimthande ngeenhliziyo zenu ezipheleleko nangemiphefumulwenu yoke. Nanenza njalo nizakuphila. 
Deuteronomy30:7 USomnini uZimenu uzakubeka woke amanikelela la phezu kwezitha zenu naphezu kwabanizondako banigijimise. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Godu nizakulalela ilizwi lakaSomnini, nigcine yoke imiyalwakhe enginiyala ngayo namhlanje." 
Deuteronomy30:9 USomnini uZimenu uzanenza niphumelele khulu kiyo yoke imisebenzi yezandla zenu, ngabantwabenu, ngenzalo yefuywenu nangeenthelo zequlwanenu ngombana uSomnini uzakubuye athabele ukuniphumelelisa njengombana kwabanjalo ngaboyihlomkhulu." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Lokho kuzakwenzeka nanilalela ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimenu, nigcine imiyalwakhe neemiso zakhe ezitlolwe encwadini yomthetho le, niphendukele kuSomnini uZimenu ngeenhliziyo nangemiphefumulwenu ngokupheleleko." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Umyalo enginiyala ngawo lo namhlanje, awusilikhuni kangako kini begodu awusi kude." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Awusisezulwini bonyana ningathi, ‘Sizakufikelwa ngubani ezulwini ayosithathela wona ukuze siwuzwe besiwenze?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Godu awusingaphetjheya kwelwandle bonyana ningathi, ‘Sizakufikelwa ngubani ngaphetjheya kwelwandle kobana asilethele wona ukuze siwuzwe besiwenze?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Iye, ilizwi liseduze khulu nani, lisemilonyeni neenhliziyweni zenu kobana nilenze." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Qalani, ngibeke phambi kwenu namhlanje ukuphila nobuhle, ukufa nobumbi." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Nanilalela imiyalo kaSomnini uZimenu enginiyala ngayo namhlanje ngokukhathalela uSomnini uZimenu, nikhambe eendleleni zakhe, nigcine imiyalo, iimiso kanye nemithethwakhe, nizakuphila benande. USomnini uZimenu uzanibusisa enarheni eningena kiyo bona niyithumbe." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Kodwana nakube iinhliziyo zenu ziyahlanuka, ningasalalela bese nidlhemadlhema niyokulotjha abosingazimu nibakhothamele," 
Deuteronomy30:18 ngiyanitjela namhlanje ngithi nizakubhubha nya, ipilwenu izakuba yifitjhani enarheni eniyama iJordani kobana niyithumbe." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Ngenza izulu nephasi kobana zibe bofakazi bami namhlanje ngokujamelana nani: Ngibeka phambi kwenu ipilo nokufa, iimbusiso namanikelela. Ngalokho khethani ukuphila ukuze niphile nina neenzukulwana zenu," 
Deuteronomy30:20 nikhathalele uSomnini uZimenu, nilalele ilizwi lakhe, nikakarele kuye ngombana lokho kukuphila kini nokwanda kwamalanga ukuze nihlale enarheni uSomnini ayifungela kiboyihlomkhulu u-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo kobana uzabanikela yona.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Yeke uMosi waragela phambili nokukhuluma amezwi la kiwo woke ama-Israyeli," 
Deuteronomy31:2 wathi kiwo: “Namhlanje sele ngineminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amabili; angisakghoni ukunirhola epini begodu uSomnini uthe kimi angeze ngayama iJordani. 
Deuteronomy31:3 USomnini uZimenu ngokwakhe uzakukhamba phambi kwenu, nguye ozakurhayila izizwezi phambi kwenu ukuze nizithumbe. UJotjhuwa uzanirhola ekuyameni iJordani njengombana uSomnini akhulumile." 
Deuteronomy31:4 USomnini uzakwenza izizwezo lokho akwenza kuSirhoni no-Ogi, amakhosi wama-Amori nenarhenawo lokha nabarhayilako." 
Deuteronomy31:5 NguSomnini ozakunikela izizwezo ezandleni zenu bese nenza kizo ukuya ngokomyalo enginiyale ngawo. 
Deuteronomy31:6 Qinani nibe nesibindi, ningesabi nibe nevalo ngazo ngombana nguSomnini uZimenu okhamba nani, angeze anitjhiya namkha anilahle.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 UMosi wabiza uJotjhuwa wakhuluma naye phambi kwama-Israyeli woke wathi: “Qina, ube nesibindi ngombana nguwe ozakukhamba nabantwaba enarheni uSomnini ayifungela kiboyisemkhulu bona uzoyinikela bona. Nguwe-ke ozakwenza bonyana bathumbe inarha leyo." 
Deuteronomy31:8 NguSomnini okhamba phambi kwakho, nguye ozakuba nawe, angeze akutjhiya namkha akulahle. Ungesabi bewuphele amandla.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 UMosi watlola umthetho lo, wawunikela abaphristi abamadodana kaLevi ebegade bathwala umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini kanye nabo boke abaphathi bakwa-Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy31:10 UMosi wabayala wathi: “Njalo ekupheleni kweminyaka elikhomba, ngesikhathi esibekiweko somnyaka wokusulwa kweenkolodo, ngomnyanya wemiTlhatlhana," 
Deuteronomy31:11 lokha woke ama-Israyeli nazokuvela phambi kwakaSomnini uZimenu endaweni azayikhetha, nizakufunda umthetho lo phambi kwawo ukuze azizwele wona." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Nizakubuthelela abantu okutjho amadoda, abafazi, ababuthakathaka kanye neenkhonzi emadorobhenenu ukuze bezwe bebafunde ukwesaba uSomnini uZimenu begodu batjheje ukwenza woke amezwi womthetho lo." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Nabantwababo abangakabi ukuwazi umthetho lo, kumele bawizwe bebafunde ukwesaba uSomnini uZimenu, qobe nisahlala enarheni eniyoyithumba naniyama iJordani.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Qala, amalanga wokuhlongakala kwakho sele afikile. Biza uJotjhuwa nize nijame ngetendeni lokuhlanganela ukuze ngimthume.” UMosi noJotjhuwa bakhamba-ke bajama ngetendeni lokuhlanganela." 
Deuteronomy31:15 USomnini wavela ngetendenapho ngesika yelifu. Isika leyo yajama emnyango. 
Deuteronomy31:16 USomnini wathi kuMosi: “Qala, sele uzokuhlongakala. Abantwaba bazakusuka badlhemadlheme ngemva kwabosingazimu benarha abayokuhlala kiyo, bazangitjhiya bebephule isivumelwano sami engasenza nabo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Yeke itukuthelwami izakuvutha phezu kwabo mhlokho, ngifihle ubuso bami kibo. Bazakuba yinyamana kakatsu, behlelwe bubumbi obunengi namatshwenyeko. Mhlokho bazakuthi, ‘Uthi akusingebanga lokobana uZimethu angasinathi ukuze sehlelwe bubumbobu na?’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Kodwana mina ngiqinisile ngithi mhlokho ngizakufihla ubuso bami ngebanga labo boke ubumbi ababenzileko ngokuphendukela kibosingazimu. 
Deuteronomy31:19 Yeke tlola ingoma nasi bese uyifundisa ama-Israyeli, uyihlohle ngemilonyenawo ukuze ibe bufakazi bami ngokujamelana nawo." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Nasele ngiwalethe enarheni egeleza ibisi neliju, engayifungela ukuyinikela aboyisemkhulu, sele agomile asuthi aziimputjuputjwana, azakuphendukela kibosingazimu abalotjhe, mina angeqise amehlo, ephule isivumelwano sami." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Nasele ehlelwe bubumbi obunengi namatshwenyeko, ingoma le izawakhumbuza ibe bufakazi obujamelene nawo ngombana izakuhlala isemilonyeni yeenzukulwana zawo zingasayikhohlwa. Koke esele asophe ukukwenza, ngikwazile ngaphambi kobana ngiwalethe enarheni engafunga bona ngizawanikela yona.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Yeke uMosi watlola ingoma leyo khona mhlokho bewayifundisa ama-Israyeli. 
Deuteronomy31:23 USomnini wayala uJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni wathi: “Qina, ube nesibindi ngombana uzakungenisa ama-Israyeli enarheni engafunga bona ngizawanikela yona. Mina ngizakuba nawe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 UMosi nasele aqedile ukutlola amezwi womthetho la ngencwadini bekube sekugcineni," 
Deuteronomy31:25 wayala amaLevi agade athwala umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini wathi: 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Thathani incwadi yomthetho le, niyibeke ngeqadi komfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini uZimenu ukuze ibe bufakazi ngokujamelana nani." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Ngiyanazi bona nimahlubuka angangani nokobana iintamo zenu ziqinile. Nanihlubuka uSomnini ngisaphila nginani nje, alo, kuzokuba kangangani-ke nasele ngihlongakele!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Bizelani ndawonye kimapha boke abaphathi beenkoro zenu, neenkhulu zenu ukuze ngikhulume amezwi la eendlebeni zabo ngibize izulu nephasi kobana zibe bofakazi abajamelene nabo." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Iye, ngiyazi bonyana ngemva kokuhlongakala kwami, ngiqinisile ngithi nizokwenza amanyala, niphambuke endleleni enganiyala ngayo. Emalangeni ezako nizokwehlelwa bubumbi ngombana nizokwenza ubukhohlakali phambi kwakaSomnini, nimthukuthelise ngemisebenzi yezandla zenu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 UMosi wakhuluma amezwi wengoma le eendlebeni zomkhambathi woke wama-Israyeli, bekwafika ekugcineni." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Lalelani, nina mazulu ngikhulume, nomhlaba uzwe amezwi womlomami." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Ifundiswami ayehle njengezulu, ikulumami iwe njengombethe, iwuluke njengemvula phezu kwehlungu nanjengomfefezwana phezu kweemila." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Ngambala ngizakumemezela ibizo lakaSomnini; nje-ke, dumisani ubukhulu bakaZimethu!" 
Deuteronomy32:4 Ulidwala, umsebenzakhe uphelele, iye, zoke iindlela zakhe zilungile. UnguZimu wokwethembeka, uZimu onganasiphambeko, umsulwa begodu uneqiniso." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Kodwana abantwabakhe baziphethe ngameswe, kusukela kwakade basizukulwana esiphambeneko nesikhohlakeleko." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Leyo yindlela enithokoza ngayo uSomnini na? Nibabantu abaziindlhadlha nabanganangqondo! USomnini akasiyihlo owanidalako na? Iye, nguye owanenza bewaninzinzisa!" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Khumbulani isikhathi esadlulako, niyelele okwenzeka ngesizukulwana ngesizukulwana; nibuze aboyihlo banikhombise, abaphathi benu, banidembele." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Lokha uZimu ongoPhezulu anikela izizwe ilifa lazo, nalokha nahlukanisa amadodana wabantu, wajamisa imikhawulo yabantu ukuya ngesibalo samadodana kaZimu." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Kodwana uSomnini wathatha abantu bakhe njengesabelo sakhe, iye, uJakopo waba lilifa lakhe." 
Deuteronomy32:10 Wamfumana enarheni elirhalawumba, endaweni engahlalwa muntu, emajukujukwini anabaphaphi; wamgona, wamtjheja, wambabalela njengehlavu yelihlo lakhe." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Njengekhozi elikhanukeza idzinyani lalo ukuphapha, liphuphuruze ngehla kwalo, livule amaphikwalo, lilibambe, lilithwale ngawo," 
Deuteronomy32:12 ngokunjalo noSomnini nguye kwaphela owamrholako; kungekho singazimu hlanu kwakhe. 
Deuteronomy32:13 Wamkhweza eendaweni eziphakemeko zenarha, wagoma iinthelo zommango; wamenza wazitika ngeliju edwaleni namafutha we-oliva elitjeni legwari." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Wazitika ngamakghamatha weenkomo nebisi leembuzi kanye namafutha weemvana; wazitika ngamaqama weBhatjhani neembuzi kanye namafutha wehliziyo yekoroyi; wazitika ngomhluzi wamadiribe, iye, wasela iwayini elisabilako." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Kodwana uJetjhuruni wanona bewatjakadula, iye, wanona, waba sibhumbudu bewaragalala. Watjhiya uZimu owamdalako, wanyefula iDwala lesindiswakhe." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Abantu bakaZimu bamvusela isikhwele ngabosingazimu abatjhili, bamthukuthelisa ngemifanekiso enyenyisako." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Bahlabela imimoya emimbi, izinto ezibosingazimu, okubozinyana abangazange babazi, izinto ezifike izolo, naboyihlo abangazange bazazi." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Ngitjho neDwala elakubelethako walikhohlwa, walibala uZimu owezwa ubuhlungu ngawe." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Lokha uSomnini nabona lokho, wathukuthela khulu ngebanga lokudabukiswa madodana namadodakazakhe" 
Deuteronomy32:20 bewathi: “Ngizokufihla ubuso bami kiwo, khengibone bonyana azokuphelelaphi ngombana asizukulwana esikhohlakeleko, abantwana abangathembekiko:" 
Deuteronomy32:21 Bangivusela isikhwele ngento engasinguzimu, bangithukuthelisa ngezinto ezingatjho litho. Nje-ke, mina ngizabavusela isikhwele ngesingasizwe, ngibathukuthelise ngeendlhayela zabantu." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Lokha itukuthelwami nayivutha umlilo ubabule bekube sekuzikeni kwendawo yabafileko; uzakuqothula iphasi nesivuno salo, ukhothe isisekelo seentaba." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ngizabadindela ngamatshwenyeko, ngibarhululele ngemisubelami." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Indlala izabaqoba, badliwe matshwenyeko nobhubhani wesifo. Ngizabanikelela ngamazinyo weembandana nangesihlungu seenrhurhubi." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Endleleni isabula izabathathela abantwana, emizinabo kubuse ukwesaba. Kuzakubhubha amasokana kanye namatlawu, amasana kanye nabathukgheleko." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Bengithe ngizabathanyela, ngisuse ukukhunjulwa kwabo ebantwini," 
Deuteronomy32:27 kodwana azange ngifune ukuzwa isiphoqo sesitha sabo: Abajamelani babo bebazazitjhaya ngamanga, bathi, ‘Izandla zethu ngizo ezihlulileko; akusinguSomnini owenze koke lokhu.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 Basisizwe esinganatlha, abanawo umbono phakathi kwabo." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Nangathana bebahlakaniphile, bebazakghona ukuzwisisa lokhu, bahlole bona siyini isiphetho sabo." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Umuntu munye angeze agijimisa abaziinkulungwana nababili angeze balwise itjhumi leenkulungwana, ngaphandle kwanange iDwala labo libathengisile; iye, iKosabo ibalahlile!" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Idwala abalithembako alifani neDwala lethu nezitha zethu kumele zikubone lokho. 
Deuteronomy32:32 Godu uSomnini wathi: “Amadiribabo abuya eSodoma esidiribeni seGomora. Amadiribabo anesihlungu nesitjhutha sakhona simunyu. 
Deuteronomy32:33 Iwayini abazolisela lisihlungu seenyoka, isihlungu esibulalako samabululu." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Lokhu kubulungwe kimi, kuvalelwe ngekumbenami yamagugu." 
Deuteronomy32:35 Ukubuyiselela nokuhlomulisa kungokwami, ngesikhathi sakhona iinyawo zabo zizakutjhelela. Ngambala ilanga labo lehlekelele selitjhidele, iye, ilangelo libarhabile.”" 
Deuteronomy32:36 Iye, uSomnini uzokumela abantu bakhe abe nesirhawu eencekwini zakhe. Lokha nabona bonyana amandlazo aphelile sekusele bona zinyamalale zoke," 
Deuteronomy32:37 uzakuthi: “Alo, baphi-ke abozinyana babo abalidwala ababalekela kilo," 
Deuteronomy32:38 abozinyana abagoma amafutha wemihlabelwabo basele iwayini lomphahlwabo na? Abavele phela banisize! Baninikele umthunzi! 
Deuteronomy32:39 Qalani-ke gadesi, mina ngingimi kwaphela; akunaZimu ngaphandle kwami! Mina ngiyabulala, ngibuye ngiphilise, nangilimazileko, ngibuye ngipholise; akakho ongasindisa esandleni sami." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Ngambala ngiphakamisela isandla sami ezulwini ngifunge ngithi, ‘Ngokuphila kwami kwanini nanini:" 
Deuteronomy32:41 Nangilola isabulami emanyazelako, isandla sami siyibambe bona ngigwebe, ngizazibuyiselela ezitheni zami, ngibuyiselele kilabo abangizondako." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Ngizakucwilisa imisubelami eengazini zababuleweko nabathunjiweko; khibe isabulami irhiribidela inyama yabosaziwako bezitha.’ ” 
Deuteronomy32:43 Nina zizwe, thokozisani abantu bakaSomnini ngombana uzokubuyiselela iingazi zeenceku zakhe. Lokha nazibuyiselela ezitheni zakhe uzabe enzela abantu bakhe nenarhakhe itethelelo." 
Deuteronomy32:44 UMosi wakhuluma woke amezwi wengoma leyo eendlebeni zabantu ngokusekelwa nguJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni. 
Deuteronomy32:45 Kwathi lokha uMosi naqeda yoke ikulumakhe kuma-Israyeli woke," 
Deuteronomy32:46 wathi: “Yelelani woke amezwi womthetho engiwamemezele njengobufakazi kini namhlanje ukuze niyale abantwabenu kobana bawalalele ngokutjheja. 
Deuteronomy32:47 Akusimamezwi nje angatjho litho kini, kodwana abuphilo benu. Ngawo nizakuphila isikhathi eside enarheni eniyama iJordani kobana niyoyithumba.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Khona mhlokho uSomnini wathi kuMosi: 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Khuphukela entabeni i-Abarimu kwaMowabi, okuyintaba iNebo ngepumalanga yeJerikho bese ubukela iKanana, inarha engizoyinikela ama-Israyeli njengelifa lawo." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Uzakuhlongakalela entabeni oya kiyo leyo, ulandele bekhenu njengombana no-Aroni umfowenu wahlongakala entabeni iRhori walandela bekhabo." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Lokhu kungebanga lokobana nobabili nalahlekelwa kungethemba phambi kwama-Israyeli emanzini weMeriba eKhadetjhi naniserhalawumbeni leTsini. Lapho azange nikhombise ukungihlonipha emehlweni wama-Israyeli. 
Deuteronomy32:52 Yeke uzakubona inarha leyo buqamama kwaphela, kodwana awuzungena enarheni engiyinikela ama-Israyeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Lesi sibusiso uMosi umuntu kaZimu abusisa ngaso ama-Israyeli ngaphambi kobana ahlongakale. 
Deuteronomy33:2 Wathi: “USomnini wavela eSinayi, wakhanyisela abantu bakhe eSeyiri, waphazimula eentabeni zeParana; wavela neenkulungwana ezilitjhumi zabacwengileko ngesidleni sakhe bekunomkhambathi wezulwini." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Iye, Somnini, wena othanda izizwe, boke abacwengileko basesandleni sakho; bazithoba eenyaweni zakho, benza imiyalwakho." 
Deuteronomy33:4 UMosi wasiyala ngomthetho, njengelifa lehlangano kaJakopo." 
Deuteronomy33:5 UZimu waba yikosi kaJetjhuruni, lokha iinhloko nazibutheneko, iye, nakuhlangene iinkoro zakwa-Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy33:6 “URubeni akaphile, angafi nebutho lakhe linganciphi." 
Deuteronomy33:7 “NgoJuda uMosi wathi: “Somnini, yewulalele ilizwi lakaJuda, umlethe ebantwini bekhabo. Yiba zizandla zakhe ezimlwelako, isizo ezitheni zakhe." 
Deuteronomy33:8 “NgoLevi wathi: “Ithumimi ne-urimakho Somnini, ngezabathembekileko kuwe; labo owabazizinya eMasa, wabasola emanzini weMeriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Abantwabo bathi kiboyise nabonina: Siyabahlubuka! Baphika abafowabo, babeba abantwababo; Kodwana bayelela ilizwi lakho, Somnini, balonda isivumelwano sakho." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Bafundisa uJakopo imiyalwakho, u-Israyeli umthethwakho; batjhisa itjhwalo phambi kwakho nomhlabelo otjhiswa woke e-aldarini lakho." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Somnini, busisa amandla wamaLevi, wamukele nemisebenzi yezandla zawo; uphorhoze amadini wezitha zawo, lezo eziwazondako, ukuze zingasavuki." 
Deuteronomy33:12 “NgoBhenjamini wathi: “Othandiweko kaSomnini, uzakuhlala aphephile kuye; amsibekele ngesikhathi soke, uzakuhlala hlangana neentaba zakaSomnini.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 “NgoJosefa wathi: “Inarhakhe ibusiswe nguSomnini, ngombethe, isipho somkayi, ngamanzi wangaphasi," 
Deuteronomy33:14 ngesipho seenthelo zomnyaka, iye, imikhiqizo yeenkhathi zomnyaka," 
Deuteronomy33:15 ngemikhiqizo ephambili yeentaba zekadeni, iye, isipho semibundu yanini nanini," 
Deuteronomy33:16 ngezipho ezikhethekileko iphasi elingaba nazo. Umusa waloyo ohlala esithukghwaneni inga ungaba phezu kwehloko kaJosefa, iye, phezu kwepandla yekosana yabafowabo." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Unedumo njengekunzi elizibulo, iimpondo zakhe ngezekukhama; usunduza ngazo izizwe, bekube semikhawulweni yephasi; abanjalo ziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi zaka-Efrayimu, abanjalo ziinkulungwana zakaManase." 
Deuteronomy33:18 “NgoZebuloni wathi: “Jabula wena Zebuloni ekuphumeni kwakho ipi, nawe Isakari ngematendenakho." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Babizela izizwe entabeni, bahlabele khona imihlabelo yokulunga ngombana bamunya umnono welwandle namagugu afihlakeleko wetjhwabatjhwaba." 
Deuteronomy33:20 “NgoGadi wathi: “Akabusiswe onabisa uGadi! UGadi uphila njengebhubezi, udabula umkhono nepandla." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Uzikhethela indawo ekhethekileko ebegade ingakhethwa mrholi. Lokha iinhloko zeenkoro zihlangana lapho, yena ufeza okulungileko kwakaSomnini nemithethwakhe ku-Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy33:22 “NgoDani wathi: “UDani libhubezana eleqa lisuka eBhatjhani. 
Deuteronomy33:23 “NgoNafitali wathi: “UNafitali waneliswe mumusa, uzele iimbusiso zakaSomnini, inga angathumba itjingalanga nesewula." 
Deuteronomy33:24 “Ngo-Atjheri wathi: “U-Atjheri akabusiswe ngaphezu kwamadodana, akathandwe bafowabo, acwilise inyawo lakhe emafutheni." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Iinqabo zakho zizakuba ngezesimbi nezekoporo, amandlakho abe njengamalangakho." 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Akakho onjengoZimu kaJetjhuruni, oza ngephazimulwakhe, adabule umkayi namafu bona azokusiza." 
Deuteronomy33:27 UZimu wanini nanini usiphephelo, imikhonwakhe ikuthwala isiphelani. Uqotjha izitha zakho lokha nathi, ‘Bhubhisa!’" 
Deuteronomy33:28 U-Israyeli uhlezi ngokuphepha, uJakopo unzinzile enarheni yekoroyi newayini, iye, umkayi wakhona wehlisa umbethe." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Ubusisekile wena Israyeli! Ngubani nje ofana nawe, isizwe esisindiswa nguSomnini! Nguye osihlangu esikuvikelako nesabula yokuhlula kwakho! Izitha zakho zizakuza zikhasa kuwe, wena ubeke iinyawo zakho emahlombazo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 UMosi wakhuphukela emrhobeni weJordani kwaMowabi entabeni iNebo, esiqongolweni sePisiga, emalungana neJerikho. USomnini wamkhombisa yoke inarha: ukusuka eGiliyadi ukuyokufika kwaDani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 yoke iNafitali, inarha yakwa-Efrayimu neyakwaManase, yoke inarha yakwaJuda ukuyokufika elwandle elingetjingalanga," 
Deuteronomy34:3 isewula yenarha nomrhoba weJordani, okutjho umrhula weJerikho idorobho lamasundu, ukuyokufika eTsowari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 USomnini wathi kuye: “Nasi inarha engayifungela ku-Abrahamu, u-Isaka noJakopo ngathi ngizayinikela iinzukulwana zabo. Ngikuvumele bonyana uyibone ngamehlwakho, kodwana awuzukungena kiyo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Yeke uMosi inceku kaSomnini wahlongakalela lapho enarheni yakwaMowabi ukuya ngelizwi lakaSomnini. 
Deuteronomy34:6 USomnini wambulungela ngakeminye yemirhoba enarheni yakwaMowabi malungana neBhethe-Pewori. Akunamuntu owazi ithuna lakhe bekube namhlanje. 
Deuteronomy34:7 UMosi gade aneminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amabili lokha nahlongakalako. Amehlwakhe gade asabona kuhle begodu asese namandla emzimbeni. 
Deuteronomy34:8 Ama-Israyeli alilela uMosi kwaMowabi ngemrhobeni weJordani amalanga amatjhumi amathathu. Ngemva kwalapho amalanga wokulila nokuzila aphela. 
Deuteronomy34:9 UJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni wayezele ngommoya wokuhlakanipha ngombana uMosi wayembeke izandla. Yeke ama-Israyeli amlalela, enza njengombana uSomnini ayale uMosi." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Nje-ke solo kwalokho azange bekusaba nomphorofidi onjengoMosi kwa-Israyeli uSomnini atjhidelene khulu naye. 
Deuteronomy34:11 Azange kube nonjengaye uSomnini amnikela zoke iimbonakaliso nemikarisomraro kobana azenze enarheni yeGibhide kuFaro nakizo zoke iinceku zakhe nenarhenakhe yoke. 
Deuteronomy34:12 Woke ama-Israyeli awabona amandla amakhulu nezenzo ezesabekako ezikulu uMosi azenzako. 
Joshua1:1 Ngemva kokuhlongakala kwakaMosi inceku kaSomnini, uSomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni omsizi kaMosi:" 
Joshua1:2 “UMosi incekwami uhlongakele. Yeke zilungiselele ukuyama iJordani le, wena nabo boke abantwaba, niye enarheni engiyipha ama-Israyeli." 
Joshua1:3 Yoke indawo lapha kugadanga khona iinyawo zenu ngininikele yona njengombana ngathembisa uMosi. 
Joshua1:4 Ukusuka erhalawumbeneli ukuya eLibhanoni begodu nokusuka emlanjeni omkhulu iYufrathe ukuyokufika elwandle elikhulu ngetjingalanga, okutjho yoke inarha yamaRhithi, kuzakuba yinarhenu." 
Joshua1:5 Imihla yoke yokuphila kwakho akunamuntu ozakujama phambi kwakho. Ngizakuba nawe njengombana nganginoMosi. Angeze ngakulahla namkha ngikutjhiye. 
Joshua1:6 Qina ube nesibindi ngombana nguwe ozokwenza bonyana abantwaba bazuze inarha engayifungela kiboyisemkhulu bona ngizabanikela yona. 
Joshua1:7 Kwaphela nje wena, qina amandla ube nesibindi khulu, uyelele ukwenza ukuya ngawo woke umthetho incekwami uMosi eyakuyala ngawo. Ungaphambukeli ngesigomeni namkha ngesinceleni ukuze ube nepumelelo koke lapha ukhamba khona." 
Joshua1:8 Incwadi yomthetho le ingasuki emlonyenakho, kodwana zindla ububule ngayo ubusuku nemini ukuze uyelele ukwenza ukuya ngakho koke okutlolwe kiyo. Ngalokho uzakwenza iindlela zakho zibe mhlophe bese uba nepumelelo." 
Joshua1:9 Angithi ngikuyalile: Qina-ke ube nesibindi. Ungabi nevalo namkha uphele amandla ngombana uSomnini uZimakho unawe koke lapha ukhamba khona.” 
Joshua1:10 Yeke uJotjhuwa wayala iinduna zabantu bona 
Joshua1:11 zikhambe ziye ebantwini ngekampeni zifese zithi: “Lungisani imiphako ngombana emalangeni amathathu nizokuyama iJordani niyokuthumba inarha uSomnini uZimenu aninikele yona bona ibe lilifa lenu.” 
Joshua1:12 UJotjhuwa wathi kebakwaRubeni, bakwaGathi nesiquntwini sekoro yakwaManase:" 
Joshua1:13 “Khumbulani igama inceku kaSomnini uMosi eyaniyala ngalo nayithi, ‘USomnini uZimenu unibonelele ngendawo yokuphumula lokha nakanipha inarha le.’" 
Joshua1:14 Abafazi nababuthakathaka benu bazakusala kanye neenkomo zenu enarheni uMosi aninikele yona nganeno kweJordani. Kodwana zoke iingorho phakathi kwenu zizakuyama zihlomile ngaphambi kwabafowenu kobana zibasize," 
Joshua1:15 kufikela lapha uSomnini anikela khona abafowenu ukuphumula njengani lokha nabo nabathumba inarha abayinikelwe nguSomnini uZimenu. Nje-ke ngemva kwalokho ningabuyela enarheni elilifa lenu, nihlale kiyo, okutjho inarha uMosi inceku kaSomnini aninikele yona ngepumalanga yeJordani.”" 
Joshua1:16 Baphendula uJotjhuwa bathi: “Koke osiyala ngakho sizakwenza nalapha usithuma khona sizakuya. 
Joshua1:17 Njengombana salalela uMosi kikho koke, nawe sizakulalela. Inga uSomnini uZimakho angaba nawe njengombana gade anoMosi!" 
Joshua1:18 Nanyana ngubani ojamelana nemiyalwakho ngokungalaleli amezwakho kinamkha yini omyala ngayo, akabulawe. Wena qina ube nesibindi.”" 
Joshua2:1 UJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni wathumela amadoda amabili ngasese aseTjhithimu kobana abe ziinhloli wathi: “Khambani niyokuhlola inarha, khulukhulu iJerikho.” Akhamba-ke, afika ekumbeni yengwadla ekuthiwa nguRarhabu kobana alale lapho." 
Joshua2:2 Ikosi yeJerikho yabikelwa kwathiwa: “Tjheja, kunamadoda athileko wakwa-Israyeli afike entambama nje kobana azokuhlola inarha.”" 
Joshua2:3 Yeke ikosi yeJerikho yathumela iinthunywa kuRarhabu yathi: “Khupha amadoda eze kuwe nangene ekumbenakho lawo ngombana into ayizeleko kuzokuhlola inarha kwaphela.” 
Joshua2:4 Kodwana uRarhabu gade afihle amadoda amabili lawo, yeke wathi: “Iye, awa, khona kuliqiniso bona kufike amadoda amabili lapha. Kodwana angiwazi bona adabukaphi." 
Joshua2:5 Nje-ke kuthe lokha nakurhwalalako sele kuvalwa amasango, nawo aphuma. Ukuthi atjhingephi-ke, awa nami abe angazi. Nokho nange ningarhaba niwagijimise, ningawafumana.”" 
Joshua2:6 URarhabu gade enyusele amadoda lawo ephahleni lekumba, wawafihla hlangana neenhlanga zeflaksi ebegade azineke ephahlenapho." 
Joshua2:7 Yeke iinthunywa zeJerikho zagijimisa amadoda lawo ngendlela yeJordani ukuyela emazibukweni. Kuthe bona iinthunywa ezigijimisa amadoda ziphume, kwavalwa isango ledorobho." 
Joshua2:8 Kwathi ngaphambi kobana kulalwe, uRarhabu wenyukela phezu kwephahla emadodeni lawo," 
Joshua2:9 wathi kiwo: “Ngiyazi bonyana uSomnini uninikele inarha, nokobana sehlelwe kukunesaba begodu boke abahlali benarha bayathuthumela phambi kwenu." 
Joshua2:10 Kambe sizwile bona uSomnini womisa amanzi welwandle lomGaba phambi kwenu naniphuma eGibhide, godu sezwa nalokho enakwenza emakhosini amabili wama-Amori ebegade angaphetjheya kweJordani, aboSirhoni no-Ogi enabarhayilako." 
Joshua2:11 Kuthe bona sizwe lokho, sangenwa mamanzi emadolweni, azange kube nomuntu oba nomdlandla ngebanga lenu ngombana uSomnini uZimenu unguZimu ezulwini phezulu nephasini phasi." 
Joshua2:12 Nje-ke ngibawa nifunge kimi ngoSomnini kobana njengombana ngibe nomusa kini, nani nizakuba nomusa ngomuzi kababa. Ninginikele itshwayo lesiqinisekiso" 
Joshua2:13 kobana niphunyurhise ubaba nomma, abomnakwethu nabodadwethu nabo boke abanabo, iye, nisindise ipilwethu ekufeni.”" 
Joshua2:14 Amadoda athi kuye: “Sifunga ngepilwethu! Nange ungavala phetjheya ngendabethu le, khona-ke sizakuba nomusa besithembeke kuwe lokha uSomnini nasinikela inarha le.”" 
Joshua2:15 Ngebanga lokobana uRarhabu gade ahlala ekumbeni eyakhiwe phezu komthangala wedorobho, wawehlisa ngentambo ngefesidere," 
Joshua2:16 wathi kiwo: “Khambani niye eentatjaneni, nakungasinjalo abanigijimisako bazanifumana. Zifihleni lapho amalanga amathathu abanigijimisako bebabuye. Ngemva kwalokho-ke seningakhamba.”" 
Joshua2:17 Amadoda athi kuye: “Thina angeze saba nomlandu ngesifungo osifungise sona," 
Joshua2:18 nakube kuzakuthi nasingena enarheni le, wena ubophelele intambo etlerebede le efesidereni osikhuphe ngalo. Ubizele ekumbenakho uyihlo nonyoko, abafowenu, iye, boke bakwenu." 
Joshua2:19 Nakube nanyana ngubani onawe ngekumbeni uyathintwa, iingazi zakhe zizakuba phezu kweenhloko zethu. Kodwana nange kungaba nomuntu ophumela ngaphandle kweminyango yekumbakho, iingazi zakhe zizakuba phezu kwehlokwakhe, thina-ke asizukuba nomlandu." 
Joshua2:20 Godu asizukuba nomlandu malungana nesifungo sakho osenze kithi nange wakhuluma ngendabethu le.” 
Joshua2:21 Yena wathi: “Akube njengokwamezwenu.” Yeke wawalayelisa, akhamba. Ngambala wabophelela intambo etlerebede efesidereni." 
Joshua2:22 Amadoda lawo akhamba-ke anqomba eentatjaneni, ahlala lapho amalanga amathathu abantu abawagijimisako bebabuya ngombana babhenyegula yoke indlela kodwana bangawafumana." 
Joshua2:23 Amadoda amabili godu ehla abuya eentatjaneni ayama iJordani aya kuJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni, ambikela koke okuwehleleko." 
Joshua2:24 Godu athi kuJotjhuwa: “Ngambala uSomnini unikele yoke inarha ezandleni zethu, nabahlali bakhona basesabela ukufa.”" 
Joshua3:1 UJotjhuwa wavuka ngamasa; yena nawo woke ama-Israyeli basuka eTjhithimu baya eJordani bafese bahlala lapho ngaphambi kobana bayame. 
Joshua3:2 Ekupheleni kwamalanga amathathu iinkhulu zakhamba zigega nekampa," 
Joshua3:3 zayala abantu zathi: “Lokha nanibona umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini uZimenu uthwelwe baphristi bamaLevi, fudukani eendaweni zenu niwulandele," 
Joshua3:4 ukuze nazi indlela ekumele nikhambe ngayo ngombana azange khenikhambe ngendlela le ngaphambilini. Nokho kumele kube nesikhala phakathi kwenu nawo, kube sibanga esingaba mamitha amakhulu athobako. Ningatjhideli hlanu kwawo.”" 
Joshua3:5 UJotjhuwa wathi ebantwini: “Zihlambululeni ngombana kusasa uSomnini uzokwenza iimangaliso phakathi kwenu.” 
Joshua3:6 Godu uJotjhuwa wathi kubaphristi: “Thwalani umfaji wesivumelwano, nikhambe phambi kwabantu niyame.” Yeke bawuqubula, bakhamba phambi kwabantu." 
Joshua3:7 USomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa: “Namhlanje ngizokuthoma ukukukhulisa emehlwenawo woke ama-Israyeli ukuze azi bonyana njengombana nganginoMosi, nawe ngizakuba nawe." 
Joshua3:8 Wena yala abaphristi abathwele umfaji wesivumelwano bona nabafika eligwini lomlambo iJordani, bajame.”" 
Joshua3:9 UJotjhuwa wathi kuma-Israyeli: “Tjhidelani nizokwizwa amezwi sakaSomnini uZimenu.” 
Joshua3:10 Waraga wathi: “Ngalokhu nizakwazi bonyana uZimu ophilako uphakathi kwenu: Ngambala uzakuqotjha phambi kwenu amaKanana, amaRhithi, amaRhivi, amaPerizi, amaGirigatjhi, ama-Amori namaJebusi." 
Joshua3:11 Qalani, umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini wephasi loke wayama iJordani phambi kwenu." 
Joshua3:12 Ngalokho-ke thathani amadoda alitjhumi nambili eenkorweni zakwa-Israyeli. Akube yindoda ngayinye ekorweni ngayinye. 
Joshua3:13 Kuzakuthi lokha iinyawo zabaphristi abathwele umfaji kaZimu onguSomnini wephasi loke nazikghwatha amanzi weJordani, amanzi avela ngehla azakujama angasadluli bese akghubelelane akhuphuke abe yintaba.”" 
Joshua3:14 Yeke kwathi lokha abantu nabafudusa amatendabo bona bayokuyama iJordani, abaphristi abathwele umfaji wesivumelwano bakhamba phambi kwabo." 
Joshua3:15 Nanyana iJordani beyithwala iingodo ngeenkhathi zokuvuna, kwathi bona iinyawo zabaphristi abathwele umfaji zikghwathe amanzi wakhona," 
Joshua3:16 lawo avela ngehla ajama athoma ukukhuphuka aba yintaba. Lokhu kwenzeka kude e-Adamu okulidorobho elihlanu kweTsaretani ukuze amanzi ageleza ukuyela ngelwandle lomrhoba, okulilwandle leTswayi, aqunteke. Abantu bayama manqophana neJerikho." 
Joshua3:17 Lokha ama-Israyeli nasayama njalo akhamba ehlabathini eyomileko, abaphristi ebebathwele umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini bajama ehlabathini eyomileko phakathi kweJordani soke isizwe besaqeda ukuyama." 
Joshua4:1 Kuthe bona soke isizwe siqede ukuyama iJordani, uSomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa:" 
Joshua4:2 “Thatha amadoda alitjhumi nambili hlangana nabantu, kube yindoda ngayinye ekorweni ngayinye," 
Joshua4:3 uwayale bona aye phakathi kweJordani afese athi lapha kunzinze khona iinyawo zabaphristi, athathe lapho amatje alitjhumi nambili, eze nawo akhambisane nani ukuyowabeka lapha nizakulala khona ebusuku banamhlanjesi.”" 
Joshua4:4 Yeke uJotjhuwa wabiza amadoda alitjhumi nambili ebegade awakhethe ebantwini bakwa-Israyeli, kwaba yindoda ngayinye ekorweni ngayinye," 
Joshua4:5 wathi kiwo: “Buyelani lapha kunomfaji kaSomnini uZimenu phakathi kweJordani, omunye nomunye wenu athathe ilitje alithwale emahlombe ukuya ngesibalo seenkoro zakwa-Israyeli," 
Joshua4:6 ukuze abe litshwayo phakathi kwenu. Kuzakuthi lokha abantwabenu nabanibuzako esikhathini esizako bathi, ‘Atjho ukuthini kini amatje la?’" 
Joshua4:7 Nizabatjela-ke bonyana amanzi weJordani ajama lokha umfaji kaSomnini nawuyama iJordani. Yeke amatje la azakuba sikhumbuzo sanini nanini ebantwini bakwa-Israyeli.” 
Joshua4:8 Ama-Israyeli enza njengombana uJotjhuwa awayalile: Amadoda alitjhumi nambili lawo athatha amatje alitjhumi nambili phakathi kweJordani ukuya ngesibalo seenkoro zakwa-Israyeli njengombana uSomnini atjela uJotjhuwa. Akhamba namatje lawo ayowabeka endaweni lapha afese alala khona. 
Joshua4:9 UJotjhuwa wajamisa amanye amatje alitjhumi nambili phakathi kweJordani lapha bekujame khona iinyawo zabaphristi ebegade bathwele umfaji. Asese lapho nanamhlanje. 
Joshua4:10 Abaphristi ebegade bathwele umfaji bajama phakathi kweJordani bekwaphela koke uSomnini ebegade ayale uJotjhuwa bona akutjele abantu, ukuya ngakho koke uMosi agade amyale ngakho. Abantu bayama barhabile," 
Joshua4:11 kwathi bona boke baqede ukuyama, abaphristi abathwele umfaji kaSomnini badlulela ngaphambi kwabantu." 
Joshua4:12 BakwaRubeni nebakwaGadi kanye nesiquntu sekoro kaManase badlula bahlomile phambi kwama-Israyeli njengombana uMosi bekabayalile. 
Joshua4:13 Bebangaba madoda aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane ahlome aphelele alungele ipi akhamba nomfaji kaSomnini kobana ayokulwa emrhuleni weJerikho. 
Joshua4:14 Mhlokho uSomnini waphakamisa uJotjhuwa phambi kwama-Israyeli woke. Ama-Israyeli esaba uJotjhuwa imihla yoke yokuphila kwakhe njengombana bekesaba uMosi. 
Joshua4:15 Kwathi lokha nabayamako uSomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa: 
Joshua4:16 “Yala abaphristi abathwele umfaji wobufakazi kobana bakhuphuke baphume ngemlanjeni iJordani.” 
Joshua4:17 Yeke uJotjhuwa wayala abaphristi wathi: “Yeniphume ngeJordanapho.” 
Joshua4:18 Kuthe lokha abaphristi abathwele umfaji wobufakazi nabaphuma ngeJordani, bona iinyawo zabo zigadange ehlabathini eyomileko, amanzi weJordani abuyela endawenawo, umlambo wathwala iingodo njengaphambilini." 
Joshua4:19 Abantu baphuma ngeJordani ngelanga letjhumi lenyanga yokuthoma, bahloma amatendabo eGiligali emkhawulweni wangepumalanga yeJerikho." 
Joshua4:20 Amatje alitjhumi nambili lawo abawathatha ngeJordani, uJotjhuwa wawajamisa eGiligali," 
Joshua4:21 wathi kuma-Israyeli: “Lokha iinzukulwana zenu nazinibuzako nina boyise esikhathini esizako bona amatje la atjho ukuthini," 
Joshua4:22 nizazitjela nithi, ‘Lobu bufakazi bokobana u-Israyeli wayama iJordani equlwanini eyomileko.’" 
Joshua4:23 USomnini uZimenu womisa amanzi weJordani bonyana nikwazi ukuyama njengombana enza elwandle lomGaba nakomisa amanzi kobana siyame. 
Joshua4:24 Lokhu kwenzeka ukuze boke abantu bephasi bazi bonyana isandla sakaSomnini sinamandla, nokobana nesabe uSomnini uZimenu nini nanini.”" 
Joshua5:1 Kwathi lokha woke amakhosi wama-Amori ebegade angaphetjheya kweJordani ngetjingalanga, newamaKanana ebegade amagegana nelwandle bona ezwe ukuthi uSomnini womise amanzi weJordani phambi kwama-Israyeli kobana akghone ukuyama, angenwa mamanzi emadolweni, azange kube nomuntu oba nomdlandla ngebanga lama-Israyeli." 
Joshua5:2 Ngesikhatheso uSomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa: “Zenzele imikhwa yamatje, uvuselele umkhuba wokusoka ama-Israyeli godu.”" 
Joshua5:3 Yeke uJotjhuwa wenza imikhwa, wasoka woke ama-Israyeli eGibeyathi-Haralothi." 
Joshua5:4 UJotjhuwa wasoka ama-Israyeli ngebanga lokobana boke abaduna abaphuma eGibhide, okutjho boke ebebamadoda wepi, bahlongakalela endleleni erhalawumbeni ngemva kokuphuma kwabo." 
Joshua5:5 Iye, boke abaduna abaphuma eGibhide bebasokiwe, kodwana boke labo ababelethelwa endleleni erhalawumbeni ngemva kokuphuma kwabo, bebangakasokwa." 
Joshua5:6 Ama-Israyeli akhamba amatjhumi amane woke weminyaka erhalawumbeni kufikela lapha soke isizwe, okutjho amadoda wepi aphuma eGibhide, ahlongakala khona ngombana angazange alalele ilizwi lakaSomnini. USomnini wafunga kiwo bona akazowabonisa inarha ayifungela kiboyisemkhulu bona uzabanikela yona, inarha egeleza ibisi neliju." 
Joshua5:7 Nje-ke uJotjhuwa wasoka abantwana bamadoda lawo ngombana bebangakasokwa erhalawumbeni. USomnini wazivusela bona esikhundleni saboyise. 
Joshua5:8 Kuthe bona boke abaduna basokwe, isizwe sahlala ematendenaso ngekampeni bebaphola." 
Joshua5:9 USomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa: “Namhlanjesi ngisuse loke ihlazo leGibhide phezu kwenu.” Nje-ke indawo leyo kwathiwa yiGiligali bekube namhlanje. 
Joshua5:10 Kwathi ama-Israyeli asahlezi eGiligali, agidinga iPhasika entambama ngelanga letjhumi nane lenyanga emrhuleni weJerikho." 
Joshua5:11 Ngakusasa kwePhasika, ama-Israyeli agoma iinthelo zenarha mhlokho, okutjho izikwa ezinganangumelo kanye nesibere." 
Joshua5:12 Yeke imana yagcina mhlokho ukwehla, lokha nathoma ukugoma iinthelo zenarha. Iye, ukusukela mhlokho ngomnyaka lowo, ama-Israyeli azange asagoma imana, kodwana athoma ukugoma imikhiqizo yenarha yeKanana." 
Joshua5:13 UJotjhuwa waphakamisa amehlwakhe aseJerikho wabona umuntu ajame phambi kwakhe aphethe isabula erhwatjhiweko. UJotjhuwa wanqomba kuye wathi: “Ujame nathi namkha ujame nezitha zethu na?” 
Joshua5:14 Umuntu loyo wathi: “Awa, mina ngiyinduna yebutho lakaSomnini, kungalokho ngilapha.” UJotjhuwa waguqa, wahloma ihloko phasi wathi kuye: “Isikhulu sami sinomlayezo wencekwaso na?”" 
Joshua5:15 Induna yebutho lakaSomnini yathi kuJotjhuwa: “Hlubula amapatlagwanakho ngombana lapha ujame khonapho kucwengile.” UJotjhuwa wenza njalo. 
Joshua6:1 IJerikho gade ivalwe ntsi ngebanga lama-Israyeli. Bekungaphumi begodu kungangeni muntu. 
Joshua6:2 USomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa: “Qala, nginikele esandleni sakho iJerikho, ikosi yakhona kanye neengorho zakhona." 
Joshua6:3 Thatha woke amadoda wepi nizombeleze iJerikho kanye. Lokho ukwenze amalanga asithandathu. 
Joshua6:4 Abaphristi abalikhomba abaphethe iimpalapala zamaqama ezilikhomba bakhambe phambi komfaji. Ngelanga lekhomba nizombeleze idorobho kalikhomba bese abaphristi bavuthele iimpalapalezo. 
Joshua6:5 Bazakuvuthela iimpalapala ihlandla elide. Kuzakuthi nanizwa ukuvuthelokho bese abantu bahlaba umkhosi wepi. Umthangala wedorobho uzakubhusuka phasi bese abantu bazingenele, omunye nomunye lapha akhona.”" 
Joshua6:6 Yeke uJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni wabiza abaphristi wathi kibo: “Thwalani umfaji wesivumelwano bese abaphristi abalikhomba baphathe iimpalapala zamaqama ezilikhomba bakhambe phambi komfaji kaSomnini.” 
Joshua6:7 Wathi ebantwini: “Ragelani phambili, abantu bazombeleze idorobho. Amadoda ahlomileko akhambe phambi komfaji kaSomnini.”" 
Joshua6:8 Kwenzeka njengombana uJotjhuwa ayale abantu: Abaphristi abalikhomba abaphethe iimpalapala ezilikhomba phambi komfaji kaSomnini batjhinga phambili, bavuthela iimpalapalezo. Umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini wabalandela" 
Joshua6:9 khisibe amadoda ahlomileko akhamba phambi kwabaphristi ebebavuthela iimpalapala, abantu abangemuva balandela umfaji. Iimpalapala zaragela phambili nokuvuthelwa," 
Joshua6:10 kodwana uJotjhuwa gade ayale abantu wathi: “Ningahlabi umkhosi wepi namkha nibange itjhada, ningavuli ngitjho nemilomenu bekube kumhla nginiyala bonyana nirhuwelele. Nasele ngitjhwile, seningahlaba-ke umkhosi wepi.”" 
Joshua6:11 Ngaleyondlela wazombisa umfaji kaSomnini edorobheni. Abantu balizombeleza kanye babuyela ngekampeni, balala ubusukobo lapho." 
Joshua6:12 Ngakusasa uJotjhuwa wavuka ekuseni. Abaphristi bathwala umfaji kaSomnini. 
Joshua6:13 Abaphristi abalikhomba abaphethe iimpalapala ezilikhomba bakhamba phambi komfaji, baragela phambili ngokuvuthela iimpalapala. Phambi kwabo kwakhamba amadoda ahlomileko kwathi ngemuva komfaji kwalandela abantu khibe iimpalapala zirhagele." 
Joshua6:14 Nelangeni lesibili bazombeleza idorobho kanye, babuyela ekampeni. Benza njalo amalanga asithandathu." 
Joshua6:15 Elangeni lekhomba bavuka ngesamarimarima, bazombeleza idorobho njengombana bebenza emihleni. Kodwana mhlokho kwaba kalikhomba." 
Joshua6:16 Kuthe nasele bazombeleza kwekhomba, bona abaphristi babethe iimpalapala, uJotjhuwa wathi ebantwini: “Rhuwelelani! USomnini uniphe idorobheli!" 
Joshua6:17 Idorobho nakho koke okukilo kuzakunikelwa uSomnini kobana kubhujiswe. Kuzakusinda uRarhabu ingwadla nabo boke abanaye ngekumbenakhe ngombana wafihla iinthunywa esasizithumile. 
Joshua6:18 Zilondeni ezintweni ezikhethelwe ukubhujiswa ngombana nanizithathako nizakubangela bonyana ikampa yama-Israyeli ibhujiswe, ngalokho niyibangele ihlekelele." 
Joshua6:19 Kodwana loke isiliva negolide kanye nezitja zekoporo nezesimbi zikhethekile kuSomnini, zizakubulungelwa ikumba yamagugu kaSomnini.”" 
Joshua6:20 Yeke abantu barhuwelela, kwavuthelwa neempalapala. Kuthe bona abantu bezwe ukulila kweempalapala, bahlaba umkhosi, umthangala weJerikho wabhusuka phasi. Abantu bazingenela, omunye nomunye lapha akhona. Bathumba idorobho," 
Joshua6:21 babhubhisa koke okukilo, amadoda nabafazi, abatjha nabadala, iinkomo, izimvu kanye nabodumbana ngesabula." 
Joshua6:22 UJotjhuwa wathi emadodeni amabili ebegade ayokuhlola inarha: “Khambani niye ekumbeni yengwadla niyoyithatha kanye nabo boke abanayo njengombana nafunga kiyo.” 
Joshua6:23 Yeke amadoda lawo akhamba ayokukhupha uRarhabu, uyise, unina, abafowabo kanye nabo boke abanaye. Iye, akhupha woke umndenakhe awuhlalisa ngaphandle kwekampa yama-Israyeli." 
Joshua6:24 Ama-Israyeli atjhisa idorobho nakho koke ebekukilo. Kwaba lisiliva negolide kanye nezitja zekoporo nezesimbi kwaphela abakubulungela ikumba yamagugu kaSomnini. 
Joshua6:25 UJotjhuwa azange abulale uRarhabu ingwadla, uyise kanye nabo boke ebebanaye. Umfazi loyo neenzukulwana zakhe zahlala kwa-Israyeli bekube namhlanje ngombana wafihla iinthunywa uJotjhuwa ayezithume bona zihlole iJerikho." 
Joshua6:26 UJotjhuwa wabafungisa ngesikhatheso wathi: “Akanikelelwe phambi kwakaSomnini umuntu ozakuncama avuselele idorobho leJerikhweli. Ngomphefumulo wendodanakhe elizibulo uzakuleya isisekelo sedorobho, ngomphefumulo wendodanakhe ebuphetjhani ajamise amasangwalo.”" 
Joshua6:27 Yeke uSomnini waba noJotjhuwa, idumo lakhe lasabalala nenarha yoke." 
Joshua7:1 Ama-Israyeli eqa umthetho malungana nezinto ezikhethelwe ukubhujiswa ngombana u-Akani umsa kaKarimi omsa kaZabadi umsa kaZerarhi wekoro kaJuda wathatha ezinye zezinto ezibekelwe ukubhujiswa. Itukuthelo kaSomnini yavutha phezu kwama-Israyeli. 
Joshua7:2 UJotjhuwa wathumela amadoda ukusuka eJerikho aya e-Ayi ngepumalanga yeBhethe-Eli wathi kiwo: “Khuphukani niyokuhlola inarha.” Yeke amadoda lawo akhuphuka ayokuhlola i-Ayi. 
Joshua7:3 Abuyela kuJotjhuwa athi kuye: “Akungakhuphuki woke umuntu. Iinkulungwana ezimbili namkha ezintathu zamadoda zinganela ukubhudabhuda i-Ayi. Akunasidingo sokukhathaza abantu kobana baye boke ngombana akunalitho laphaya.” 
Joshua7:4 Yeke kwakhuphuka iinkulungwana ezintathu zamadoda, kodwana zabuya zingasaqali nemuva zigijinyiswa madoda we-Ayi." 
Joshua7:5 Amadoda we-Ayi lawo amadlha ama-Israyeli, awagijimisa ukusuka esangweni ledorobho ukuya eTjhebarimu. Abulala pheze amatjhumi amathathu nesithandathu emehlelweni. Abantu baphela amandla bangenwa mamanzi emadolweni." 
Joshua7:6 UJotjhuwa wadabula izambatho zakhe, wahloma ihloko phasi phambi komfaji kaSomnini bekwahlwa akanye nabaphathi bakwa-Israyeli. Bazithela iinhloko ngequlwani." 
Joshua7:7 UJotjhuwa wathi: “Maye, Somnini Somandla! Bewusasiyamiselani iJordani isizwesi? Kungabe bewusinikela ezandleni zama-Amori kobana asirhayile na? Bekungasi ngcono thana sase sazihlalela ngaphetjheya kweJordani!" 
Joshua7:8 Awu, Somandla! Alo, yinto engizoyithini-ke le nasele ama-Israyeli agijinyiswa zizitha zawo kangaka!" 
Joshua7:9 AmaKanana nabahlali benarha le bazokwizwa ngalokhu, basizombe basuse ibizo lethu ngaphasi komthunzi welanga. USomnini uzokuthini ngebizo lakhe elikhulu kangaka na?”" 
Joshua7:10 USomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa: “Sikima, kubayini uhlome ihloko phasi nje?" 
Joshua7:11 Ama-Israyeli onile, eqe isivumelwano sami engiwayale ngaso. Athethe ezinye zezinto ekumele zibhujiswe. Ngalokho ebile, abe akhuluma amala, afihla ezinye zezintwezo epahlenawo." 
Joshua7:12 Yeke ama-Israyeli angeze akwazi ukujama phambi kwezitha zawo. Azakufulathela izitha zawo abaleke ngombana aphenduke isiga sokubhujiswa. Angeze ngisaba nani ngaphandle kwanange nirhayila izinto ekufanele zibhujiswe eziphakathi kwenu. 
Joshua7:13 Sikima uhlambulule abantu uthi, ‘Zihlambululeni nilungiselele ikusasa ngombana uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli uthi kunezinto ekumele zibhujiswe eziphakathi kwenu. Wena Israyeli angeze wakghona ukujama phambi kwezitha zakho kufikela lapha ususa khona izinto ekumele zibhujiswe phakathi kwakho." 
Joshua7:14 Kuzakuthi ekuseni-ke nitjhidezwe ngeenkoro zenu. Ikoro ezakukhonjwa yifumbe kaSomnini izakutjhidela ngemindenayo, umndeni ozakukhonjwa yifumbe kaSomnini utjhidele ngokweenkumba zawo, nekumbeni ezakukhonjwa yifumbe kaSomnini kutjhidele indoda nendoda." 
Joshua7:15 Loyo okhonjwe nezinto ezibhujiswako uzakutjhiswa, yena nakho koke anakho ngombana weqe isivumelwano sakaSomnini nokobana wenze ubudlhayela kwa-Israyeli.’ ”" 
Joshua7:16 UJotjhuwa wavuka ekuseni, watjhideza ama-Israyeli ngeenkoro zawo. Kwakhonjwa ikoro yakwaJuda." 
Joshua7:17 Watjhideza imindeni yakwaJuda, kwakhonjwa umndeni kaZerarhi. Watjhideza ihloko nehloko yomndeni kaZerarhi kwakhonjwa uZabadi." 
Joshua7:18 Watjhideza ihloko nehloko yemizi kaZabadi kwakhonjwa u-Akani umsa kaKarimi omsa kaZabadi umsa kaZerarhi wekoro yakwaJuda. 
Joshua7:19 UJotjhuwa wathi ku-Akani: “Ndodanami, nikela idumo kuSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, uvume kuSomnini, ungitjele koke okwenzileko ungangifihleli litho.”" 
Joshua7:20 U-Akani waphendula uJotjhuwa wathi: “Eqinisweni ngimi owonileko kuSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, nakhu engikwenzileko:" 
Joshua7:21 Ngithe nangiqala ipango ngabona inaka lakanokutjho leTjhinari, isiliva engaphezu kwamakhilogremu amabili nesitina segolide esinobudisi obungaba siquntu sekhilogremu. Yeke ngazirhalela izintwezi, ngazithatha. Ngizifihle ehlabathini ngetendeni lami, isiliva lingaphasi kwenaka.”" 
Joshua7:22 UJotjhuwa wathumela iinthunywa, zagijimela ngetendeni laka-Akani. Ngambala zafumana koke lokho kufihlwe ngetendeni lakhe, isiliva lingaphasi kwenaka." 
Joshua7:23 Bazikhupha ngetendenapho baziletha phambi kwakaJotjhuwa nama-Israyeli woke. Bazendlala phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Joshua7:24 UJotjhuwa nawo woke ama-Israyeli bathatha u-Akani umsa kaZerarhi, isiliva nenaka lakanokutjho nesitina segolide, amadodanakhe namadodakazakhe, iinkomo nabodumbana bakhe, izimvu neembuzi zakhe, itende lakhe nakho koke anakho bakwenyusela emrhobeni we-Akori." 
Joshua7:25 UJotjhuwa wathi: “Kubayini ubange ihlekelele engaka phezu kwethu? Nawe-ke uSomnini ukwehlisela ihlekelele namhlanje.” Woke ama-Israyeli abakhanda ngamatje, abatjhisa yena nakho koke kwakhe, abavala ngamatje." 
Joshua7:26 Akghubelela phezu kwabo isiqorho samatje esisese khona nanamhlanje. USomnini waphenduka etukuthelwenakhe evuthako. Yeke bekube namhlanje indawo leyo kuthiwa mrhoba we-Akori. 
Joshua8:1 USomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa: “Ungesabi namkha uphelelwe mamandla. Thatha woke amadoda wepi uphanagele wenyukele e-Ayi. Qala, nginikele ikosi yakhona esandleni sakho, abantu bayo, idorobho layo kanye nenarhayo." 
Joshua8:2 Wenze nge-Ayi nekosayo owasenza ngeJerikho nekosi yakhona. Kwanjesi ningazithathela ipango nefuyo yakhona kube ngekwenu. Nanabelani idorobheli nilivelele ngemuva.” 
Joshua8:3 UJotjhuwa waphuma nawo woke amadoda wepi wenyukela e-Ayi. Wakhetha iinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu zeengorho wazithumela ebusuku. 
Joshua8:4 Waziyala wathi: “Qalani la, nanabelani idorobheli nilivelele ngemuva. Ningayi kude khulu nalo kodwana hlalani nizilungiselele." 
Joshua8:5 Mina-ke nabo boke abantu abakhamba nami, sizalivelela ngaphambili. Kuzakuthi nabaphumako basihlangabeza, sibaleke njengombana senza phambilini." 
Joshua8:6 Bazasigijimisa kufikela lapha sibadosela khona kude nedorobho ngombana bazabe bazitjela bathi, ‘Qalani, babaleka njengaphambilini.’ Thina-ke nasibalekako," 
Joshua8:7 nina nizakuvumbuka bese nithumba idorobho ngombana uSomnini uZimu uzalinikela ezandleni zenu. 
Joshua8:8 Nasele niragelele idorobho, nilithungelele ngomlilo njengombana uSomnini ayalile. Qinisekani bona nenza njengokuniyala kwami.”" 
Joshua8:9 Yeke uJotjhuwa wathumela amadoda wepi, aya lapha gade azokulalela khona idorobho. Afike aqupha ngetjingalanga ye-Ayi, hlangana neBhethe-Eli ne-Ayi, kodwana uJotjhuwa wahlala ubusuku bamhlokho aphakathi kwabantu." 
Joshua8:10 UJotjhuwa wavuka ekuseni, wahlela amadoda, wakhuphuka nabaphathi bakwa-Israyeli bakhamba phambi kwabantu banqombe e-Ayi." 
Joshua8:11 Woke amadoda wepi ebegade anaye akhuphuka, abandamela edorobheni. Ahloma amatende ngetlhagwini ye-Ayi ahlukaniswe mrhoba phakathi kwawo ne-Ayi leyo." 
Joshua8:12 Godu wathatha amadoda angaba ziinkulungwana ezihlanu, wawabadalalisa phakathi kweBhethe-Eli ne-Ayi ngetjingalanga yedorobho." 
Joshua8:13 Ngendlela leyo bajamisa amabutho: Ibutho elikhamba phambili belingetlhagwini yedorobho kwathi elikhamba ngemuva laba ngetjingalanga. Ngobusukobo uJotjhuwa wangena ngemrhobeni nebutho. 
Joshua8:14 Kwathi lokha ikosi ye-Ayi nayibona lokhu, yona nabo boke abantu bayo, okumadoda wedorobho, barhaba baphuma ekuseni banqomba etatawini ukuyela emrhobeni weJordani kobana bahlangane no-Israyeli epini. Kodwana ikosi leyo azange ilemuke bonyana kunabantu abayilaleleko ngemva kwedorobho." 
Joshua8:15 UJotjhuwa nawo woke ama-Israyeli bafulathela, babalekela nca ngebhudwini." 
Joshua8:16 Boke abantu ebebangedorobheni babizwa kwathiwa abagijimise ama-Israyeli. Nabalokhu bagijimisana noJotjhuwa njalo bagadunga idorobho. 
Joshua8:17 Azange kusale muntu e-Ayi namkha eBhethe-Eli ongazange agijimise ama-Israyeli. Batjhiya amasango wedorobho avuleke khamukhamu bagijimisana nama-Israyeli. 
Joshua8:18 USomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa: “Yelulela izenjana oliphethekwelo nca nge-Ayi ngombana ngizoyinikela esandleni sakho.” UJotjhuwa welulela izenjana ebegade aliphethe nca ngedorobheni. 
Joshua8:19 Ababalaleleko bavumbuka msinyana lapha bebabadalele khona, kuthe bona uJotjhuwa elule isandla sakhe, bangena ngedorobheni baliragelela bebalithungela ngomlilo khonokho." 
Joshua8:20 Kuthe lokha amadoda we-Ayi naqala emuva, madekhethu, intuthu evela ngedorobheni besele ithe kupe itjhinga emkayini. Akakamala ahluleka ukubalekela ngapha nangapha ngombana ibutho ebelibalekele ebhudwini lajikela abagijimisi balo." 
Joshua8:21 Iye, kwathi lokha uJotjhuwa nawo woke ama-Israyeli nababona bonyana labo ebebalalele idorobho sebalithumbile nokobana intuthu yedorobho besele isemkayini, bajika bona balwe namadoda we-Ayi lawo." 
Joshua8:22 Kanti-ke namanye ama-Israyeli avela ngedorobheni alwa namadoda lawo. Ngaleyondlela azifumana aphahlwe ma-Israyeli ngapha nangapha. Ama-Israyeli awamadlha kangangobana azange kube nophunyurhako namkha osindako," 
Joshua8:23 ngaphandle kwekosi ye-Ayi ayibamba iphila ayiletha kuJotjhuwa. 
Joshua8:24 Kuthe bona ama-Israyeli aqede ukubulala boke abahlali be-Ayi emmangweni lapha gade agijinyiselwe khona, ngemva kobana boke bafe ngesabula kufikela kewokugcina, woke ama-Israyeli abuyela e-Ayi afese ayibhubhisa ngesabula." 
Joshua8:25 Boke abantu be-Ayi, okutjho boke abafa mhlokho okumadoda nabafazi, bebaziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili," 
Joshua8:26 ngombana uJotjhuwa azange abuyisele isandla sakhe ebegade aphethe ngaso izenjana emuva kufikela lapha kubhujiswa khona boke abahlali be-Ayi. 
Joshua8:27 Ama-Israyeli azithathela ifuyo nepango kwaphela edorobheni, ukuya ngokwelizwi lakaSomnini ayala ngalo uJotjhuwa." 
Joshua8:28 UJotjhuwa watjhisa i-Ayi yaba liqubi leququ lasafuthi njengombana kunjalo nanamhlanje. 
Joshua8:29 Wahlomela ikosi ye-Ayi esigodweni bekwahlwa. Kwathi nakutjhinga ilanga uJotjhuwa wayala bona kuphanyulwe isidumbu sayo esigodwenapho siphoselwe ebungenweni besango ledorobho. Sadindelwa ngesiqorho samatje esisajame lapho nanamhlanje. 
Joshua8:30 Nje-ke uJotjhuwa wakhela uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli i-aldari entabeni i-Ebali," 
Joshua8:31 njengombana uMosi inceku kaSomnini yayala ama-Israyeli encwadini yomthetho kaMosi. I-aldarelo belakhiwe ngamatje angakabazwa namkha angakabandulwa ngesisetjenziswa sesimbi. Batjhisela kilo imihlabelo yokutjhiswa kuSomnini, bahlabela nemihlabelo yetjhebiswano." 
Joshua8:32 Khonapho, phambi kwama-Israyeli, watlola ematjeni isifaniso somthetho kaMosi ebegade awutlolile." 
Joshua8:33 Woke ama-Israyeli, abaphathi, iinkhulu nabagwebi bawo, okutjho boke bendabuko kanye neenkhonzi, bajama ngapha nangapha komfaji ngaphambi kwabaphristi bamaLevi abathwala umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini. Ingcenye yabo yaba ngaphambi kwentaba yeGerizimu enye yaba ngaphambi kwentaba ye-Ebali kobana kube kubusiswa kwama-Israyeli njengombana uMosi inceku kaSomnini ayala phambilini." 
Joshua8:34 Ngemva kwalapho uJotjhuwa wafunda woke amezwi womthetho, iimbusiso namanikelela ukuya ngakho koke okutlolwe encwadini yomthetho." 
Joshua8:35 Wafunda woke amezwi phambi kwehlangano yama-Israyeli kanye nabafazi, abantwana neenkhonzi ebezihlala phakathi kwawo. Kiwo woke amezwi uMosi ayala ngawo, azange atjhiye nalinye." 
Joshua9:1 Woke amakhosi angaphetjheya kweJordani ezwa ngokwenzakeleko. Lawo bekumakhosi wamaRhiti, ama-Amori, amaKanana, amaPerizi, amaRhivi namaJebusi ahlala ngenarheni yeentaba nemibundu yeTjhefela, namagegana nelwandle eliKhulu ukuyela eLibhanoni." 
Joshua9:2 Nje-ke abuthana ndawonye avumelana ngalizwi linye bona alwe noJotjhuwa nama-Israyeli. 
Joshua9:3 Kodwana kuthe bona abahlali beGibiyoni bezwe ngokwenziwe nguJotjhuwa eJerikho ne-Ayi," 
Joshua9:4 benza iqhinga lobuqili. Bakhamba baya kuJotjhuwa bazenza inga ziinthunywa. Bebathethe iinquthulo ezidala zemigodla bazikhweza phezu kwabodumbana, bathatha neenkhumba zewayini ezidala ezidabukileko nezineentjheza," 
Joshua9:5 bafaka amapatlagwana adabukileko nakhibelelweko, bembatha izambatho ezirhalukileko. Yoke imiphakwabo beyome kere begodu ikokorene." 
Joshua9:6 Banqomba kuJotjhuwa ekampeni eGiligali bathi kuye nama-Israyeli: “Sibuya kude kwamambala nasinje; yeke besithi yewenze isivumelwano nathi.” 
Joshua9:7 Kodwana ama-Israyeli athi kumaRhivi: “Afe-ke, singenza njani isivumelwano nani singanazi nokunazi? Mhlamunye nihlala khona hlanu kwethwapha nje!”" 
Joshua9:8 Bona bathi kuJotjhuwa: “Siziinceku zakho.” UJotjhuwa wabuza wathi: “Nibobani-ke nina? Khonanje nibuya tjhuba liphi?” 
Joshua9:9 Bamphendula bathi: “Iinceku zakho zibuya kude tle, sithe asize kuwapha ngebanga lebizo lakaSomnini uZimakho. Sizwe umbiko ngoSomnini uZimakho ngalokho akwenze amaGibhide," 
Joshua9:10 namakhosi amabili wama-Amori ebegade angaphetjheya kweJordani, uSirhoni ikosi yeRhetjhibhoni no-Ogi ikosi yeBatjhana ehlala e-Atjhitarothi." 
Joshua9:11 Abaphathi nabo boke abahlali benarhekhethu bathe kithi, ‘Thathani umphako nikhambe niyokuhlanganisa amehlo nabo nifese nithi siziinceku zabo. Yeke sibawa benze isivumelwano nathi.’" 
Joshua9:12 Nasi isikwana sethu ebesisiphethe njengomphako, nokho besisatjhisa sona nasisuka ekhaya. Gadesi sele somelele begodu sikokorene," 
Joshua9:13 iinkhumba zewayinezi nazo kokwakho bezizitja nasizivubelako. Gadesi sele zidabukile, nezambatho namapatlagwanethu sese kuphelile kuqedwe yindlelakazi ede le.”" 
Joshua9:14 Kwathi ama-Israyeli angakabuzi nokubuza kuSomnini, adumela umphako lowo ahlanganyela nabo!" 
Joshua9:15 UJotjhuwa waba nokuthula nabo, wenza isivumelwano sokobana baphephile bese abarholi bomkhambathi bafunga kibo." 
Joshua9:16 Ekupheleni kwamalanga amathathu ngemva kobana benze isivumelwano nabo, bezwa bonyana babomakhelwana babo nokobana bahlala phakathi kwabo." 
Joshua9:17 Ama-Israyeli aphuma anqomba emadorobheni wabantwabo afika elangeni lesithathu. Amadorobhabo gade kuyiGibiyoni, iKefira, iBherothi neKhiriyathi-Jeyarimu." 
Joshua9:18 Kodwana azange abulale abantwabo ngombana abarholi bomkhambathi bafunga ebantwinabo ngoSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli. Kwathi lokha umkhambathi woke nawunghonghoyila kubarholabo," 
Joshua9:19 boke abaphathi bathi kiwo woke umkhambathi: “Ngithi esifunge kibo ngoSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, nje-ke angeze sisababeka isandla."
