Joshua9:20 Nasi indlela esizabaphatha ngayo: Sizabalisa baphile ukuze ubukhali bakaSomnini bungabi phezu kwethu ngebanga lesifungo esisifunge kibo.” 
Joshua9:21 Abaphathi godu bathi: “Nje-ke nani baliseni baphile.” Ngalokho abaphathi baqunta bonyana abantwabo babe ziinsebenzi zawo woke umkhambathi, bawugawulele iinkuni bawukhelele namanzi." 
Joshua9:22 Yeke uJotjhuwa wabiza abantwabo wathi kibo: “Nisikhohliseleni ngokusitjela bonyana nivela kude khibe nihlala enyonga yesilukazapha? 
Joshua9:23 Ngalokho-ke ninikelelwe, nizakuhlala nimakhoboka, abathezi beenkuni nabakheleli bamanzi ekumbeni kaZimami.”" 
Joshua9:24 Baphendula uJotjhuwa bathi: “Iinceku zakho zaqinisekiswa bonyana uSomnini uZimakho ayale incekwakhe uMosi bonyana aniphe yoke inarha le nokobana nina kumele nibhubhise nya phambi kwenu boke abahlali bakhona. Sesabela khulu amaphilwethu ngebanga lenu, kungalokho senze lokhu." 
Joshua9:25 Qala, njenganje sisesandleni sakho, yeke yewenze ngokubona kwakho ngathi.”" 
Joshua9:26 Nje-ke nasi indlela uJotjhuwa enza ngayo kibo: Wabasindisa esandleni sama-Israyeli. Azange ababulale. 
Joshua9:27 Kodwana ukusuka mhlokho wabenza bona basebenzele umkhambathi ne-aldari lakaSomnini ngokutheza iinkuni nokukhelela amanzi. Lokho bakwenza bekwaba kunamhlanje endaweni eyakhethwa nguSomnini. 
Joshua10:1 U-Adonitsedekhi ikosi yeJerusalema wezwa bona uJotjhuwa uthumbe i-Ayi bewayibhubhisa nya. Wezwa godu bonyana i-Ayi nekosi yakhona uyenze njengalokho akwenza ngeJerikho nekosi yakhona, nokobana abahlali beGibiyoni babe nokuthula naye begodu sele bangaphasi kwama-Israyeli." 
Joshua10:2 Yena nabantu bakhe bahlalela evalweni ngalokho ngombana iGibiyoni gade kulidorobho elikhulu, elalifana nelinye lamadorobho webukhosini. IGibiyoni beyidlula i-Ayi begodu namadoda wakhona aziingorho." 
Joshua10:3 Yeke u-Adonitsedekhi ikosi yeJerusalema wathumela ilizwi kuHohami ikosi yeRhebroni, uPiramu ikosi yeJarimuthi, uJafiya ikosi yeLakitjhi nakuDebiri ikosi ye-Egiloni wathi:" 
Joshua10:4 “Khuphukani nizapha nizongisiza sisahlele iGibiyoni ngombana yenze ukuthula noJotjhuwa nama-Israyeli.” 
Joshua10:5 Amakhosi amahlanu wama-Amori lawo, okuyikosi yeJerusalema, ikosi yeRhebroni, ikosi yeJarimuthi, ikosi yeLakitjhi nekosi ye-Egiloni, ahlanganisa woke amabuthwawo ndawonye, akhuphuka, avimbezela iGibiyoni bona alwe nayo." 
Joshua10:6 Amadoda weGibiyoni athumela ilizwi kuJotjhuwa ekampeni eGiligali athi: “Ungaliseleli iinceku zakho, yewukhuphuke msinya uzosisindisa ngokusisiza ngombana woke amakhosi wama-Amori ahlala ngeentabeni abuthene kobana ajamelane nathi.”" 
Joshua10:7 UJotjhuwa wakhuphukela eGiligali akhamba nawo woke amadoda wepi neengorho zoke. 
Joshua10:8 USomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa: “Ungabesabi ngombana sele ngibanikele esandleni sakho. Akunandoda nayinye phakathi kwabo ezakujama phambi kwakho.” 
Joshua10:9 UJotjhuwa wasuka eGiligali, warhwanta ubusuku boke wavelela amakhosi lawo angakatjheji." 
Joshua10:10 USomnini wenza amakhosi lawo nabantu bawo bona bahlangahlangane phambi kwama-Israyeli, abadulela eGibiyoni abagijimisa ngendlela eyehlelako yeBhethe-Rhoroni, abamadlha kufikela e-Azekha neMakheda." 
Joshua10:11 Nabalokhu babaleka phambi kwama-Israyeli, nabehlela emehlelweni weBethe-Rhoroni, uSomnini wawululela iingiditjha zesinanja phezu kwabo bekwaba se-Azekha, bafela khonapho. Abafa ngebanga leengiditjha zesinanja baba banengi ukudlula ababulawa ma-Israyeli ngesabula." 
Joshua10:12 UJotjhuwa wakhuluma noSomnini mhlana anikela ama-Amori kuma-Israyeli, wathi phambi kwawo: “Langa, jama tsi ngehla kweGibiyoni, nawe nyezi ngehla komrhoba we-Ayaloni.”" 
Joshua10:13 Ngambala ilanga lajama nenyezi yangakhambi, kufikela lapha isizwe sizibuyiselela khona ezitheni zaso. Lokhu kwatlolwa encwadini kaJatjhari. Ilanga lajama phakathi kwesibhakabhaka, azange lirhabe ukutjhinga isikhathi esingaba lilanga." 
Joshua10:14 Azange kube nelanga elifana nalo ngaphambilini namkha ngemva kwalo, kobana uSomnini ulalele ilizwi lomuntu ngombana mhlokho walwela ama-Israyeli." 
Joshua10:15 UJotjhuwa wabuyela ekampeni eGiligali nawo woke ama-Israyeli. 
Joshua10:16 Amakhosi amahlanu lawo abaleka, azifihla ngerholweni leMakheda." 
Joshua10:17 Bekubikwe kuJotjhuwa kwathiwa: “Amakhosi amahlanu afunyenwe azifihle ngerholweni leMakheda.” 
Joshua10:18 UJotjhuwa wathi: “Sunduzelani ilitje elikhulu emlonyeni werholo, nibeke amadoda awagade," 
Joshua10:19 kodwana ningahlali lapho nina ngokwenu. Gijimisani izitha zenu, nibe seenthendeni zazo, ningazivumeli zingene ngemadorobhenazo ngombana uSomnini uZimenu uzinikele esandleni senu.”" 
Joshua10:20 Kwathi ngemva kobana uJotjhuwa nama-Israyeli bamadlhe khulu izithezo kufikela lapha ziphela khona nya, nalokha abasindileko sele bangene ngemadorobheni anemithangala," 
Joshua10:21 boke abantu babuyela baphephile kuJotjhuwa ekampeni yeMakheda. Akunamuntu owavula umlomakhe ngama-Israyeli. 
Joshua10:22 UJotjhuwa wathi: “Vulani umlomo werholo bese nilethe amakhosi amahlanu lawo kimapha.” 
Joshua10:23 Yeke benza njalo, bakhupha amakhosi amahlanu lawo ngerholweni bawaletha kuye. Gade kuyikosi yeJerusalema, ikosi yeRhebroni, ikosi yeJarimuthi, ikosi yeLakitjhi nekosi ye-Egiloni." 
Joshua10:24 Lokha nabaletha amakhosi lawo kuJotjhuwa, uJotjhuwa wabiza woke amadoda wakwa-Israyeli wathi eenduneni zamadoda wepi ebegade zikhambe nawo: “Tjhidelani, nibeke iinyawo zenu phezu kweentamo zamakhosi la.” Yeke zatjhidela, zabeka iinyawo zazo eentanyeni zawo." 
Joshua10:25 UJotjhuwa wathi kizo: “Ningesabi namkha niphelelwe mamandla. Qinani nibe nesibindi ngombana ngilokho uSomnini azakwenza kizo zoke izitha zenu enilwa nazo.” 
Joshua10:26 Ngemva kwalokho uJotjhuwa wawamadlha, wawabulala bewawahlomela enye nenye esigodweni sayo. Alembelela eengodwenapho bekwahlwa." 
Joshua10:27 Kodwana kwathi nakutjhinga ilanga, uJotjhuwa wayala bonyana aphanyulwe eengodweni, wawaphosela ngerholweni lapha begade azifihle khona. Kwabekwa amatje amakhulu emlonyeni werholwelo, asese lapho nanamhlanje." 
Joshua10:28 UJotjhuwa wathatha iMakheda mhlokho wayimadlha kanye nekosi yakhona ngesabula. Wabhubhisa nya koke okuphilako okungedorobhenapho. Azange atjhiye nakunye kuphunyurhile. Ikosi yeMakheda wayenza asenze ikosi yeJerikho. 
Joshua10:29 UJotjhuwa wasuka eMakheda nama-Israyeli woke wanqomba eLibhina bona alwe nayo. 
Joshua10:30 USomnini wanikela iLibhina nekosi yakhona esandleni sama-Israyeli. UJotjhuwa wayimadlha ngesabula nakho koke okuphilako okukiyo. Azange atjhiye nakunye kuphunyurhile. Ikosi yakhona wayenza asenze ikosi yeJerikho. 
Joshua10:31 UJotjhuwa wasuka eLibhina nama-Israyeli woke wanqomba eLakitjhi. Wayivimbezela wayisahlela. 
Joshua10:32 USomnini wanikela iLakitjhi esandleni sama-Israyeli. Ngelanga lesibili uJotjhuwa wayithumba, wayimadlha ngesabula nakho koke okuphilako okukiyo njengombana enza ngeLibhina." 
Joshua10:33 Kwathi lokha uHoramu ikosi yeGezeri nenyuka ukusiza iLakitjhi, uJotjhuwa wamumadlha kanye nabantu bakhe, wangatjhiya namunye wakhe ophunyurhako." 
Joshua10:34 UJotjhuwa wasuka eLakitjhi nama-Israyeli woke banqomba e-Egiloni. Bafese bayivimbezela bayisahlela," 
Joshua10:35 bayithumba khona mhlokho, bayigongoda ngesabula. UJotjhuwa wabhubhisa nya koke okuphilako okukiyo njengombana enza ngeLakitjhi." 
Joshua10:36 UJotjhuwa wasuka e-Egiloni akhamba nama-Israyeli woke, banqomba eRhebroni. Bafese bayisahlela," 
Joshua10:37 bayithumba, bayigongoda ngesabula. UJotjhuwa wabhubhisa ikosi nemizana yakhona yoke, nakho koke okuphilako okukiyo. Azange atjhiye nakunye kuphunyurhile; kwaba njengombana enza nge-Egiloni. Iye, wayibhubhisa nya nakho koke okuphilako okukiyo." 
Joshua10:38 UJotjhuwa nawo woke ama-Israyeli babuyela eDebhiri, nayo bayisahlela." 
Joshua10:39 Bayithumba nekosi yakhona kanye nemizana yakhona yoke. Bayigongoda ngesabula, babhubhisa nya koke okuphilako okukiyo. UJotjhuwa azange atjhiye nakunye kuphunyurhile. Lokho akwenza ngeRhebroni neLibhina namakhosi wakhona, wakwenza ngeDebhiri nekosi yakhona." 
Joshua10:40 Ngaleyondlela uJotjhuwa wathumba soke isifunda sesewula: iintaba, isewula yenarha, iTjhefela kanye namathomo wakhona. Wabhubhisa woke amakhosi wesifundeso. Azange atjhiye nakunye kuphunyurhile, iye, wabhubhisa nya koke okuphilako njengombana uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli ayalile." 
Joshua10:41 UJotjhuwa wabamadlha boke ukusuka eKhadetjhi-Bharineya ukuya eGaza, nayo yoke inarha yeGotjheni ukuyokufika eGibiyoni." 
Joshua10:42 Wathumba woke amakhosi lawo nenarhawo ngasikhathi sinye ngombana uSomnini uZimu waka-Israyeli walwela u-Israyeli. 
Joshua10:43 Yena nama-Israyeli woke babuyela ekampeni eGiligali. 
Joshua11:1 Kwathi bona uJabhini ikosi yeRhatsori ezwe ngeendabezi, wathumela igama kuJobabi ikosi yeMadoni, ekosini yeTjhimroni nekosini ye-Akitjhafi." 
Joshua11:1 Kwathi bona uJabhini ikosi yeRhatsori ezwe ngeendabezi, wathumela igama kuJobabi ikosi yeMadoni, ekosini yeTjhimroni nekosini ye-Akitjhafi." 
Joshua11:2 Igamelo lafika nemakhosini ebegade angeentabeni zangetlhagwini, angemrhobeni weJordani ngesewula yelwandle iKinerethi, nangenarheni ethulamelwe ziintaba neligwini leDori ngetjingalanga." 
Joshua11:3 Godu lafika kumaKanana ngepumalanga netjingalanga, ama-Amori, amaRhithi, amaPerizi namaJebusi ngeentabeni namaRhivi angaphasi kwakaRherimoni enarheni yeMitsipha." 
Joshua11:4 Amakhosi lawo aphuma nawo woke amabuthwawo, kwaba liwoma, kwanga yitjhwabatjhwaba yelwandle. Godu bekuneenjomani neenkarana zepi ezinengi khulu." 
Joshua11:5 Woke amakhosi lawo abuthana, ahloma amatendawo ndawonye emanzini weMeromi kobana alwe no-Israyeli." 
Joshua11:6 USomnini wathi kuJotjhuwa: “Ungawesabi ngombana kusasa ngesikhathesi ngizowanikela woke esandleni sama-Israyeli afile. Wena uquntule imisipha yeenjomani zawo bese utjhise iinkarana zawo.” 
Joshua11:7 Yeke uJotjhuwa nawo woke amadoda wepi bawavelela, bawathelekela emanzini weMeromi." 
Joshua11:8 USomnini wanikela amakhosi lawo nabantu bawo esandleni sama-Israyeli, abamadlha, abagijimisa bekwaba seTsidoni eKulu neMisrefothi-Mayimu ukufikela ngemrhuleni weMitsiphe ngepumalanga. Ama-Israyeli abamadlha, angatjhiya namunye wabo owaphunyurhako." 
Joshua11:9 UJotjhuwa wenza kibo njengombana uSomnini amyalile, waqunta imisipha yeenjomani zabo bewatjhisa neenkarana zabo zepi." 
Joshua11:10 UJotjhuwa wabuyela emuva ngesikhatheso, wathumba iRhatsori ngombana phambilini gade iyihloko yayo yoke imibuso leyo, bewamadlha ikosi yakhona ngesabula." 
Joshua11:11 Yena nama-Israyeli bamadlha ngesabula koke okuphilako okukiyo. Babhubhisa koke nya kwangaba khona okusala kuphila. Godu batjhisa iRhatsori. 
Joshua11:12 Iye, uJotjhuwa bekenze njengombana uMosi inceku kaSomnini amyalile: Bekamadlhe ngesabula woke amakhosi lawo bewabhubhisa nabo boke abahlali bamadorobhawo." 
Joshua11:13 Nokho ama-Israyeli azange atjhise nalinye lamadorobho ngaphandle kweRhatsori eyatjhiswa nguJotjhuwa. Amadorobho lawo nanje asajame embundwini. 
Joshua11:14 Ama-Israyeli azithathela yoke ipango yamadorobho lawo kanye nefuyo; kwaba sisabelo sawo. Kodwana bekamadlhe boke abantu ngesabula kufikela lapha abaqeda khona nya; azange batjhiye namunye aphila. 
Joshua11:15 Njengombana uSomnini ayala incekwakhe uMosi, uMosi wayala uJotjhuwa, uJotjhuwa waphetha njengokomyalo lowo, azange atjhiye litho lingakenziwa kikho koke uSomnini akuyala uMosi." 
Joshua11:16 Ngaleyondlela uJotjhuwa wathatha yoke inarha, okutjho iintaba zakwaJuda, yoke inarha yangesewula neyeGotjheni, iTjhefela, umrhoba weJordani, iintaba zakwa-Israyeli neendawo ezithulamelwe ziintaba." 
Joshua11:17 Imikhawulo le ithoma entabeni iRhalakha enabele ngeSeyiri ukuyokufika eBhali-Gadi ngemrhobeni weLibhanoni ngenzasi kwentaba iRherimoni. Wabamba woke amakhosi wakhona, wawamadlha, wawabulala." 
Joshua11:18 Kwaba sikhathi eside uJotjhuwa asilwa nawo woke amakhosi lawo. 
Joshua11:19 Azange kube nedorobho elaba nokuthula nama-Israyeli ngaphandle kwamaRhivi, okubahlali beGibiyoni. Ama-Israyeli athumba koke ngepi." 
Joshua11:20 Kwaba sisenzo sakaSomnini sokuqinisa iinhliziyo zamakhosi lawo kobana ajamelane nama-Israyeli epini ukuze amakhosi lawo abhujiswe nya, nokobana angafumani umusa kodwana apheliswe njengombana uSomnini ayala uMosi." 
Joshua11:21 UJotjhuwa weza ngesikatheso, wathanyela ama-Anakhi eentabeni zakwa Juda nakizo zoke iintaba zakwa-Israyeli. Wawabhubhisa nya namadorobhawo iRhebroni, iDebhiri ne-Anaba." 
Joshua11:22 Azange kusale namunye wama-Anakhi enarheni yama-Israyeli. Kwaba seGaza, eGathi ne-Atjhidodi kwaphela lapha kwaba khona abasindako." 
Joshua11:23 UJotjhuwa wathatha yoke inarha ukuya ngendlela uSomnini akhuluma ngakho kuMosi. UJotjhuwa wayinikela bona ibe lilifa lama-Israyeli ukuya ngokwesabelo seenkoro zawo. Ngesikhatheso inarha yaphumula izipi. 
Joshua12:1 Lawa-ke makhosi weendawo ezahlulwa ma-Israyeli. Athumba iindawo zawezo ezingaphetjheya ngepumalanga yeJordani, ukusuka emlanjaneni i-Arinoni ukuya entabeni iRherimoni, ukufaka phakathi umrhoba woke ongepumalanga yeJordani:" 
Joshua12:2 USirhoni ikosi yama-Amori ogade ahlala eRhetjhibhoni wabusa phezu kwesiquntu seGiliyadi. Umkhawulwakhe usuka edorobheni i-Aroweri eliseligwini lomlanjana i-Arinoni ngekabeni yomrhoba wakhona, ukuyokufika emlanjaneni iJabokhi okumkhawulo wama-Amoni," 
Joshua12:3 ukufaka phakathi ipumalanga yomrhoba weJordani ukuyela elwandle leKinerethi nokuyela elwandle le-Araba, okulilwandle leTswayi, nangetjhubeni langeBhethe-Hajetjhimothi. Ngesewula umkhawulwakhe unabela emathomeni wentaba iPisiga." 
Joshua12:4 Amathomo lawo bekumkhawulo. U-Ogi ikosi yeBhatjhani, ongomunye wemisalela yakwaRafa, gade ahlala e-Atjhitarothi ne-Edreyi." 
Joshua12:5 Wabusa entabeni yeRherimoni neSaleka nakiyo yoke inarha yeBhatjhani ukuya emkhawulweni wamaGetjhuri newamaMakathi nangaphezu kwesiquntu seGiliyadi ukuya emkhawulweni kaSirhoni ikosi yeRhetjhibhoni. 
Joshua12:6 UMosi inceku kaSomnini nama-Israyeli bawahlula. UMosi inceku kaSomnini wathatha iinarha zawo wazinikela bakwaRubeni nebakwaGathi nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase. 
Joshua12:7 Lawa-ke makhosi weendawo uJotjhuwa nama-Israyeli abazihlula ngetjingalanga yeJordani ukusuka eBhali-Gadi emrhobeni weLibhanoni ukuya entabeni iRhalakha enabela ukuyela ngeSeyiri. (Iindawo zawo uJotjhuwa wazinikela ama-Israyeli ukuya ngokwesabelo seenkoro zawo kobana kube lilifa lazo. 
Joshua12:8 Iindawezo bekuziintaba, iTjhefela, umrhoba weJordani, iindawo ezithulamelwe ziintaba, irhalawumba nesewula yenarha, okutjho inarha yamaRhithi, ama-Amori, amaKanana, amaPerizi, amaRhivi namaJebusi.) UJotjhuwa wahlula enye nenye yamakhosi alandelako:" 
Joshua12:9 ikosi yeJerikho, ikosi ye-Ayi (ebeyihlanu kweBhethe-Eli)," 
Joshua12:10 ikosi yeJerusalema, ikosi yeRhebroni," 
Joshua12:11 ikosi yeJarimuthi, ikosi yeLakitjhi," 
Joshua12:12 ikosi ye-Egiloni, ikosi yeGezeri," 
Joshua12:13 ikosi yeDebhiri, ikosi yeGederi," 
Joshua12:14 ikosi yeRhorima, ikosi ye-Aradi," 
Joshua12:15 ikosi yeLibhina, ikosi ye-Adulamu," 
Joshua12:16 ikosi yeMakheda, ikosi yeBhethe-Eli," 
Joshua12:17 ikosi yeTapuwarhi, ikosi yeRheferi," 
Joshua12:18 ikosi ye-Afekhi, ikosi yeLatjharoni," 
Joshua12:19 ikosi yeMadoni, ikosi yeRhatsori," 
Joshua12:20 ikosi yeTjhimironi-Meroni, ikosi ye-Akitjhafi," 
Joshua12:21 ikosi yeTanaka, ikosi yeMegido," 
Joshua12:22 ikosi yeKhedetjhi, ikosi yeJokhineyamu eKarameli," 
Joshua12:23 ikosi yeDori eligwini leDori, ikosi yeGoyimu eGalile," 
Joshua12:24 ikosi yeTiritsa. Kwaba makhosi amatjhumi amathathu nanye sele awoke. 
Joshua13:1 UJotjhuwa bekasele aluphele namalanga ayile. USomnini wathi kuye: “Sele uluphele begodu namalanga sele ayile, kanti kusese nenarha ekulu ekusafanele ithunjwe." 
Joshua13:2 Nasi inarha esaseleko: Zoke iimfunda zamaFilista nezamaGetjhuri 
Joshua13:3 ukusuka emlanjaneni omkhawulo wangepumalanga yeGibhide ukuyokufika emkhawulweni we-Ekhironi ngetlhwagwini. (Iindawezo bezithathwa bona ngezamaKanana kodwana bezibuswa babusi abahlanu bamaFilista eemfundeni ezilandelako: iGaza, i-Atjhidodi, i-Atjhikeloni, iGathi, ne-Ekhironi. Ama-Awi nawo gade ahlala" 
Joshua13:4 ngesewula yenarha.) Yoke inarha yamaKanana, okutjho ukusuka e-Ara yamaTsidoni ukuya e-Afekhi ukufika emkhawulweni wama-Amori." 
Joshua13:5 Godu nenarha yamaGibili neLibhanoni yoke ngepumalanga, ukusuka eBhali-Gadi ngenzasi kwentaba iRherimoni ukuya eLebo-Rhamathi." 
Joshua13:6 Lokhu kutjho boke abahlali bangeentabeni ukusuka eLibhanoni ukuya eMisirefothi-Mayimu ngitjho woke amaTsidoni. Ngizabaqotjha mina ngokwami phambi kwama-Israyeli, wena yabela nje kwaphela ama-Israyeli inarha leyo ibe lilifa lawo njengombana ngakuyala." 
Joshua13:7 Yeke hlukanisa inarha le kobana ibe lilifa leenkoro ezilithoba kanye nesiquntu sakwaManase.” 
Joshua13:8 UMosi inceku kaSomnini wabela isiquntu sekoro yakwaManase, ikoro yakwaRubeni neyakwaGadi isabelo sazo ngaphetjheya kweJordani ngepumalanga. Iinkorwezo zathatha ilifa lazwelo, kwaba njengombana zabelwa nguMosi." 
Joshua13:9 Imikhawulo yenarhazo beyisuka edorobheni i-Aroweri eliseligwini lomlanjana i-Arinoni ngekabeni yomrhoba wakhona ukuyokufika emkhawulweni wama-Amoni. Beyifaka phakathi inarha eyikangala ukusuka eMedeba ukuya eDibhoni kanye nawo woke amadorobho wakaSirhoni ikosi yama-Amori ogade abusa eRhetjhibhoni. 
Joshua13:10 Imikhawulo yenarhazo leyo godu beyinabela eGiliyadi, emkhawulweni wamaGetjhuri namaMakathi, kiyo yoke intaba iRherimoni neBhatjhani ukuya eSaleka," 
Joshua13:11 okutjho yoke imibuso ka-Ogi weBhatjhani obusa e-Atjhitarothi ne-Edreyi. (U-Ogi lo besele kunguye kwaphela oseleko hlangana nemisalela yamaRafa.) UMosi wahlula ama-Amori lawo bewawaqotjha," 
Joshua13:12 kodwana ama-Israyeli azange aqotjhe amaGetjhuri namkha amaMakathi; yeke izizwezo zazihlalela hlangana nama-Israyeli bekube kunamhlanje. 
Joshua13:13 Kwaba yikoro yamaLevi kwaphela uMosi angazange ayabele ilifa ngombana ilifa lawo bekuminikelo ekhethekileko kuSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli njengombana atjho kuye. 
Joshua13:14 UMosi wanikela ikoro yakwaRubeni ilifa ukuya ngemindenayo. 
Joshua13:15 Imikhawulwayo beyisuka edorobheni i-Aroweri eliseligwini lomlanjana i-Arinoni ngekabeni yomrhoba wakhona ukufaka phakathi yoke ikangala ukuyokufika eMedeba 
Joshua13:16 neRhetjhibhoni kanye nemizanayo yoke esekangala. Imikhawulo yenarha leyo beyifaka phakathi iDibhoni, iBhamothi-Bhali, iBhethe-Bhali-Mewoni," 
Joshua13:17 iJahatsi, iKhedemothi, iMefathi," 
Joshua13:18 iKhiriyathayimu, iSibima, iTserethi-Hatjharhari entabeni ethulamele umrhoba," 
Joshua13:19 iBhethe-Pewori, amathomo wentaba iPisiga kanye neBhethe-Jetjhimoni." 
Joshua13:20 Ngilawo-ke amadorobho wekangala okutjho yoke imibuso kaSirhoni ikosi yama-Amori owabusa eRhetjhibhoni. UMosi wabulala uSirhoni loyo kanye nabarholi beMidiyani, u-Evi, uRekhemu, uZuri, uRhuri noReba okumakhosana kaSirhoni agade ahlala enarhenapho." 
Joshua13:21 Hlangana nabo boke ababulawa ma-Israyeli ngesabula kwakunoBhiliyamu umsa kaBhewori, umbhuli." 
Joshua13:22 Umlambo iJordani gade umkhawulo wamaRubeni. Amadorobho lawo nemizanawo gade kulilifa lamaRubeni ukuya ngemindenawo. 
Joshua13:23 UMosi godu wabela ikoro yakwaGadi ilifa ukuya ngokwemindenayo. 
Joshua13:24 Imikhawulo yenarhayo kwakuyiJazeri nawo woke amadorobho weGiliyadi nesiquntu senarha yakwa-Amoni ukuya e-Aroweri engepumalanga yeRabha. 
Joshua13:25 Imikhawulo leyo beyithoma eRhetjhibhoni ukuya eRamathi-Mitsiphe neBhethonimu nokusuka eMarhanayimu ukuya emkhawulweni weLo-Debhara. 
Joshua13:26 Godu beyifaka phakathi amanye amadorobho angemrhobeni weJordani, okutjho iBhethe-Haramu, iBhethe-Nimra, iSukothi neTsafoni. Lokhu kutjho ubunengi bombuso kaSirhoni ikosi yeRhetjhibhoni ngepumalanga yomlambo iJordani. IJordani leyo kwaba mkhawulo wakhona ukuyela ngesewula yelwandle leKinerethi." 
Joshua13:27 Amadorobho lawo nemizanawo gade kulilifa lamaGadi ukuya ngokwemindenawo. 
Joshua13:28 UMosi godu wabela isiquntu sekoro yakwaManase ilifa ngokwemindenaso. 
Joshua13:29 Imikhawulo yaso isuka eMarhanayimu ifake phakathi iBhatjhani yoke, okutjho woke umbuso ka-Ogi ikosi yakhona nemizi yoke yeRhavothi-Jayire eseBhatjhani, ebeyingaba madorobho amatjhumi asithandathu." 
Joshua13:30 Imikhawulo leyo godu beyifaka phakathi isiquntu sakwaGiliyadi, i-Atjhitarothi ne-Edreyi, okumadorobho wobukhosi baka-Ogi eBhatjhani. Lezo bekuziindawo ezanikelwa isiquntu sekoro yakwaManase okuziinzukulwana zakaMakiri ngokwemindenazo." 
Joshua13:31 Lelo-ke kwaba lilifa uMosi alaba lokha nagade angemrhobeni weJordani kwaMowabi malungana neJerikho. 
Joshua13:32 UMosi azange ayabele litho ikoro yamaLevi ngombana isabelo sayo nguSomnini uZimu njengombana kwatjhiwo njalo kiyo. 
Joshua14:1 La mamafa ama-Israyeli awafumana enarheni yeKanana abawabelwa ngu-Elazara umphristi, uJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni kanye neenhloko zemindeni yaboyise beenkoro zama-Israyeli." 
Joshua14:2 Ilifa labo labiwa ngefumbe njengombana uSomnini ayala uMosi mayelana neenkoro ezilithoba nesiquntu. 
Joshua14:3 UMosi gade abele iinkoro ezimbili nesiquntu ilifa ngepumalanga yeJordani. AmaLevi azange awabele ilifa hlangana neenkorwezo. 
Joshua14:4 Abantu bakwaJosefa gade baziinkoro ezimbili, uManase no-Efrayimu. Iye, amaLevi azange awabele ilifa njengenarhawo; kwaphela amadorobho wokuhlala kanye namadlelo wakhona kobana ifuywawo idle." 
Joshua14:5 Nje-ke ama-Israyeli aba inarha njengombana uSomnini ayala uMosi. 
Joshua14:6 Abajameli babantu bakwaJuda beza kuJotjhuwa eGiligali. UKalebi umsa kaJefune umKhenizi wathi kuye: “Nguwe owaziko bona uSomnini wathini kuMosi inceku kaZimu eKhadetjhi-Bharineya mayelana nami nawe. 
Joshua14:7 Gade ngineminyaka ematjhumi amane lokha uMosi inceku kaSomnini nangithuma ngiseKhadetjhi-Bharineya kobana ngiyokuhlola inarha, ngambuyela nependulo njengombana kwakusehliziywenami." 
Joshua14:8 Abafowethu abenyuka nami bafakela abantu amanzi emadolweni, kodwana mina ngalandela uSomnini uZimami ngokupheleleko." 
Joshua14:9 UMosi wafunga mhlokho wathi, ‘Ngambala inarha obeke kiyo inyawo lakho izakuba lilifa lakho nabantwabakho isiphelani ngombana ulandele uSomnini uZimami ngokupheleleko’." 
Joshua14:10 Yeke, qala, uSomnini ungibulungile njengombana watjho eminyakeni ematjhumi amane namihlanu le, ukusuka ngesikhathi akhuluma amazwi lawa kuMosi lokha u-Israyeli nasakhamba erhalawumbeni. Nakhu namhlanje sengineminyaka ematjhumi abunane nahlanu," 
Joshua14:11 kodwana ngisesenamandla nanamhlanjesi njengombana nganginjalo mhlana uMosi nangithumako. Amandlami nagadesi asese njengaleso sikhathi, ngisengaphuma ipi, ngirhole nabantu." 
Joshua14:12 Yeke nginikela inarha yeentabezi uSomnini akhuluma ngayo mhlokho. Iye, mbala nawe wezwa mhlokho bona ama-Anakhi ahlala lapho anamadorobho amakhulu anemithangala. Nakube uSomnini uzakuba nami, ngiwaqotjhe lapho njengombana athembisa.”" 
Joshua14:13 Yeke uJotjhuwa wambusisa, wanikela uKalebi umsa kaJefune iRhebroni kwaba lilifa lakhe." 
Joshua14:14 Ngaleyondlela iRhebroni yaba lilifa lakaKalebi umsa kaJefune umKhenizi bekube namhlanje ngombana walandela uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli ngokupheleleko. 
Joshua14:15 Ibizo leRhebroni ekuthomeni bekuyiKhiriyathi-Ariba. U-Ariba loyo gade ayitsitsirimbakazi hlangana nama-Anakhi. Ngesikhatheso inarha yaphumula izipi. 
Joshua15:1 Ifumbe yesabelo sekoro yakwaJuda ukuya ngokwemindenayo yafikelela ngesewula yomkhawulo wakwa-Edomu ukuyela erhalawumbeni leTsini ekugcineni kwamaphethelo wenarha ngesewula. 
Joshua15:2 Umkhawulwayo wangesewula wawuthoma ekugcineni kwelwandle leTswayi ukusuka eligwini eliqalene nesewula," 
Joshua15:3 urhubalale njalo uye ngesewula yomkghotha we-Akhirabhimu udlulele eTsini bese ukhuphukela ngesewula yeKhadetjhi-Bharineya, udlule eRhetsironi ukhuphukele e-Adari bese ujikela eKharakha," 
Joshua15:4 udlulele e-Atsimoni urhubalale ngomlanjana weGibhide bese ugcine elwandle. Lowo-ke mkhawulo wangesewula. 
Joshua15:5 Umkhawulo wangepumalanga lilwandle leTswayi ukuya ekugcineni kweJordani. Umkhawulo ongetlhagwini uthoma eligwini lelwandle, lapha iJordani igcina khona," 
Joshua15:6 ukhuphukele eBhethe-Rhogila, udlulele ngetlhagwini yeBhethe-Araba bese ukhuphukele elitjeni lakaBhohani. (UBhohani lo bekusizukulwana sakaRubeni.)" 
Joshua15:7 Umkhawulo lowo wenyukela eDebhiri udabule emrhobeni we-Akori unqombe ngetjingalanga nca ngeGiligali emalungana nomkghotha we-Adumimi ongehlangothini langesewula yomlanjana. Ukusuka lapho udlulele emanzini womthombo iTjhemetjhi bese uyokutjhayisa emthonjeni iRogeli. 
Joshua15:8 Ukusuka lapho wenyuke ngomrhoba weBheni-Hinomu ugege nehlangothi langesewula yentaba yamaJebusi (okutjho iJerusalema), uye esiqongolweni sentaba elinganisene nomrhoba weHinomu ngetjingalanga okumaphethelo womrhoba weRafa," 
Joshua15:9 bese ujike ukusuka esiqongolweni sentaba leyo uye emthonjeni weNefitowarhi, ukusuka lapho unqombe emizaneni engentabeni i-Efroni, ujikele nca ngemzini weBhala (okutjho iKhiriyathi-Jeyarimu)." 
Joshua15:10 Ukusuka lapho ujikela ngetjingalanga uye entabeni iSeyiri, unqombe ngehlangothini elingetlhagwini yentaba iJeyarimu (okutjho iKesaloni) bese wehlele eBhethe-Tjhemetjhi, udabule eTimna." 
Joshua15:11 Ukusuka lapho umkhawulo udlula ehlangothini elingetlhagwini yentaba i-Ekhironi, ujikele nca ngeTjhikeroni udlulele entabeni iBhala bese utjhinga nca ngeJabiniyeli ubhoduluke uzokuphelela ekupheleleni kwelwandle." 
Joshua15:12 Umkhawulo wangetjingalanga kwakulilwandle elikhulu kanye neligu lalo. Leyo-ke mikhawulo ebegade izombeleze abantu bakwaJuda ukuya ngokwemindenabo. 
Joshua15:13 Ukuya ngokomyalo kaSomnini kuJotjhuwa, uKalebi umsa kaJefune wanikelwa isabelo hlangana nabantu bakwaJuda. Isabelweso bekuyiKhiriyathi-Ariba, okutjho iRhebroni (u-Ariba gade kunguyise ka-Anakhi)." 
Joshua15:14 UKalebi waqotjha lapho amadodana amathathu ka-Anakhi okunguTjhetjhayi, u-Arhimani noTalimayi." 
Joshua15:15 Wasuka lapho wenyuka wayokusahlela abahlali beDebhiri. Ekuthomeni iDebhiri bekuthiwa yiKhiriyathi-Seferi. 
Joshua15:16 UKalebi wathi: “Nanyana ngubani omadlha iKhiriyathi-Seferi, ayithumbe, ngizamnikela u-Akisa indodakazami abe mkakhe.”" 
Joshua15:17 U-Otiniyeli umsa kaKhenazi, ongumfowabo omncani kaKalebi, wayithumba. UKalebi wamnikela indodakazakhe u-Akisa bona abe mkakhe." 
Joshua15:18 Ekufikeni kwaka-Akisa ku-Otiniyeli gade amyenge bonyana akhombele uyise isimu. Kodwana kuthe nabafika kuyise, u-Akisa asehla kudumbanakhe, uKalebi wathi kuye: “Ufuna ngikwenzeleni?”" 
Joshua15:19 Yena waphendula wathi: “Ngibawa isipho. Ubaba ungibeke ngesewula yenarha eyomileko, yeke akangiphe indawo enamanzi.” Nje-ke uKalebi wamnikela indawo enamanzi emibundwini nangemirhobeni." 
Joshua15:20 Nanti ilifa lekoro yabantu bakwaJuda ukuya ngokwemindenayo: 
Joshua15:21 Amadorobho wabantu bakwaJuda ngemaphethelweni wangesewula ukuyela emkhawulweni waka-Edomu bekuyiKhabitsiyeli, i-Ederi, iJaguri," 
Joshua15:22 iKhina, iDimona, i-Adadi," 
Joshua15:23 iKhedetjhi, iRhatsori, iJitinani," 
Joshua15:24 iZifi, iThelemu, iBheyalothi," 
Joshua15:25 iRhatsori-Rhadata, iKheriyothi-Rhetsironi (godu okuthiwa yiRhatsori)," 
Joshua15:26 i-Amamu, iTjhema, iMolada," 
Joshua15:27 iRhatsari-Gada, iRhetjhimoni, iBhethe-Pelethi," 
Joshua15:28 iRhatsari-Tjhuwali, iBheritjheba, iBhiziyothiya," 
Joshua15:29 iBhala, i-Iyimu, i-Etsemu," 
Joshua15:30 i-Elitoladi, iKesili, iRhorima," 
Joshua15:31 iTsikhilagi, iMadimana, iSansana," 
Joshua15:32 iLebawothi, iTjhilirhimu, i-Ayini neRimoni. Sele awoke kwaba madorobho amatjhumi amabili nethoba nemizanawo." 
Joshua15:33 Eendaweni ezithulamelwe ziintaba bekuyi-Etjhitawoli, iTsora, i-Atjhina," 
Joshua15:34 iZanowarhi, i-Eni-Ganimu, iTapuwarhi, i-Enamu," 
Joshua15:35 iJarimuthi, i-Adulamu, iSoko, i-Azekha," 
Joshua15:36 iTjhayarayimu, i-Aditayimu, iGedera neGederotayimu. Kwaba madorobho alitjhumi nane nemizanawo." 
Joshua15:37 Hlanu kwamadorobho lawo bekunalawa: iTsenani, iRhadatjha, iMigidali-Gadi," 
Joshua15:38 iDilani, iMitsiphe, iJokitiyeli," 
Joshua15:39 iLakitjhi, iBhotsikhathi, i-Egiloni," 
Joshua15:40 iKaboni, iLarhimasi, iKitilitjhi," 
Joshua15:41 iGederothi, iBhethe-Dagoni, iNama neMakheda. Kwaba madorobho alitjhumi nathandathu nemizanawo." 
Joshua15:42 Amanye godu bekuyiLibhina, i-Eteri, i-Atjhani," 
Joshua15:43 iJifitarhi, i-Atjhina, iNetsibi," 
Joshua15:44 iKheyila, i-Akziba neMaretjha. Kwaba madorobho alithoba nemizanawo." 
Joshua15:45 Godu i-Ekhironi nemizayo kanye nemizanayo; 
Joshua15:46 ukusuka e-Ekhironi ukuya elwandle, woke amadorobho ebegade amagegana ne-Atjhidodi nemizanawo." 
Joshua15:47 Godu ukusuka e-Atjhidodi nemizayo kanye nemizanayo neGaza nemizayo kanye nemizanayo ukuya emlanjaneni weGibhide nelwandle eliKhulu kanye neligu lalo. 
Joshua15:48 Ngenarheni yangeentabeni, kwaba yiTjhamiri, iJatiri, iSoko," 
Joshua15:49 iDana, iKhiriyathi-Sana (okutjho iDebhiri)," 
Joshua15:50 i-Anabi, i-Etjhitemo, i-Animu," 
Joshua15:51 iGotjheni, iRholoni neGilo. Kwaba madorobho alitjhumi nanye nemizanawo." 
Joshua15:52 Amanye godu bekuyi-Arabu, iRuma, i-Etjhani," 
Joshua15:53 iJanimu, iBhethe-Tapuwarhi, i-Afekha," 
Joshua15:54 iRhumeta, iKhiriyathi-Ariba (okutjho iRhebroni) neTsiwori. Kwaba madorobho alithoba nemizanawo." 
Joshua15:55 Godu kwaba yi-Mawoni, iKarameli, iZifi, iJutha," 
Joshua15:56 iJizriyela, iJokideyamu, iZanowarhi," 
Joshua15:57 iKhayini, iGibeya neTimina. Kwaba madorobho alitjhumi nemizanawo." 
Joshua15:58 Godu iRhalirhuli, iBhethe-Tsuri, iGedori," 
Joshua15:59 iMarathi, iBhethe-Anothi ne-Elitekhoni. Kwaba madorobho asithandathu nemizanawo." 
Joshua15:60 Godu iKhiriyathi-Bhali (okutjho iKhiriyathi-Jeyarimu) neRaba. Kwaba madorobho amabili nemizanawo. 
Joshua15:61 Erhalawumbeni kwaba yiBhethe-Araba, iMidini, iSekaka," 
Joshua15:62 iNibitjhani, i-Iri-Hamelarhi ne-Eni-Gedi. Kwaba madorobho asithandathu nemizanawo." 
Joshua15:63 Kodwana abantu bakwaJuda azange baphumelele ukuqotjha amaJebusi, okubahlali beJerusalema; yeke amaJebusi ahlala nabantu bakwaJudabo eJerusalema bekube kunamhlanje." 
Joshua16:1 Ifumbe yabeka umkhawulo weenzukulwana zakaJosefa ngesewula ngalendlela: Wathoma emlanjeni iJordani eJerikho; ukusuka lapho wadlula imithombo yeJerikho ngepumalanga, wadabula erhalawumbeni wenyukela eentabeni zeBhethe-Eli." 
Joshua16:2 Ukusuka lapho wanqomba eLuzi ukuyela e-Atharothi nca ngemkhawulweni wama-Ariki 
Joshua16:3 bese wehlela ngetjingalanga emkhawulweni wamaJafilethi ukudlula eBhethe-Rhoroni esenzasi, wanqomba eGezeri ukuyokutjhayisa elwandle." 
Joshua16:4 Lokha iinzukulwana zakaJosefa, uManase no-Efrayimu, nazithatha ilifa lazo" 
Joshua16:5 imikhawulo yabakwa-Efrayimu ngokwemindenabo yayingalendlela: Umkhawulo welifa labo ngesewula usuka ngepumalanga ye-Atharothi-Adara uye eBhethe-Rhoroni engehla," 
Joshua16:6 uyokufika elwandle. Umkhawulo wangepumalanga uthoma eMikimetathi ngetlhagwini bese ujikela ngesewula-pumalanga ukuya eTanathi-Tjhilo, udabule kiyo ngepumalanga uye eJanowarhi." 
Joshua16:7 Ukusuka lapho wehlele e-Atharothi neNara, udlule eJerikho bese uphelele eJordani." 
Joshua16:8 Umkhawulo wangetlhagwini usuka eTapuwarhi unqomba ngetjingalanga emlanjaneni iKhana bese uphelela elwandle. Lelo-ke bekulilifa lekoro yama-Efrayimu ngokwemindenayo. 
Joshua16:9 Ama-Efrayimu godu gade abelwe amanye amadorobho nemizanawo ngaphakathi kwelifa lakwaManase. 
Joshua16:10 Kodwana azange baqotjhe amaKanana ebegade ahlala eGezeri. Yeke amaKanana lawo ahlala hlangana nama-Efrayimu bekube kunamhlanje nanyana gade enza umsebenzi okatelelako. 
Joshua17:1 Godu ifumbe yabeka umkhawulo wekoro yakwaManase. UManase gade alizibulo lakaJosefa, uMakiri alizibulo lakaManase nonguyise kaGiliyadi. Ngebanga lokobana uMakiri gade ayingorho bekabelwe iGiliyadi neBhatjhani." 
Joshua17:2 Inengi lekoro yakwaManase lafumana ilifa ngokwemindeni. Imindeni leyo bekungu-Abiyezeri neenzukulwana zakaRhelekhi, zaka-Asiriyeli, zakaTjhekemu, zakaRheferi nezakaTjhemida. Lezo-ke bekuziinzukulwana eziduna zakaManase umsa kaJosefa ngokwemindenazo." 
Joshua17:3 UTselofirhadi umsa kaRheferi omsa kaGiliyadi umsa kaMakiri omsa kaManase azange abe namadodana. Waba namadodakazi kwaphela, amabizwawo ngilawa: uMarhila, uNoya, uRhogila, uMilika noTiritsa." 
Joshua17:4 Wona eza phambi kwaka-Elazara umphristi noJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni nabarholi athi: “USomnini wayala uMosi kobana asiphe ilifa phakathi kwabafowethu.” Yeke ukuya ngokomyalo kaSomnini, wawanikela ilifa phakathi kwabafowabo." 
Joshua17:5 UManase wabelwa iingcenye ezilitjhumi ngaphandle kwenarha yeGiliyadi neBhatjhani engaphetjheya kweJordani," 
Joshua17:6 ngombana amadodakazi wekoro yakwaManase afumana ilifa hlangana namadodanakhe. Inarha yeGiliyadi gade yabelwe elinye inengi lekoro yakwaManase. 
Joshua17:7 Umkhawulo wakwaManase wawusuka e-Atjhera ufike eMikimetathi eseTjhekemu. Umkhawulo lowo bewukhamba ugegele ngesewula ukuyela eJatjhibi nomthombo weTapuwarhi. 
Joshua17:8 Inarha yeTapuwarhi bekungeyakaManase, kodwana idorobho leTapuwarhi emkhawulweni wakwaManase belingelama-Efrayimu." 
Joshua17:9 Umkhawulo bewehlela ngesewula yomlanjana iKhana. Amanye wamadorobho asenarheni yakwaManase ngetlhagwini yomlanjana lowo gade kungewaka-Efrayimu. Umkhawulo lowo bewuphelela elwandle. 
Joshua17:10 Nje-ke inarha engesewula yomlanjana bekungeyaka-Efrayimu bese engetlhagwini kungeyakaManase. Ilwandle belimkhawulo ngetjingalanga yenarha yakwaManase. Ngetlhagwini-tjingalanga beyifika kwa-Atjheri bese ngetlhagwini-pumalanga ifike kwa-Isakari. 
Joshua17:11 Enarheni yakwa-Isakari neyakwa-Atjheri uManase gade abelwe amadorobho alandelako nemizanawo: iBhethe-Tjhani, iJibiliyamu, iDoro nabahlali bakhona (lokhu kutjho iDoro eentatjaneni zeligu), i-Eni-Doro nabahlali bakhona, iTanaki nabahlali bakhona kanye neMegido nabahlali bakhona." 
Joshua17:12 Amadodana kaManase azange aphumelele ukuthumba amadorobho lawo, nje-ke amaKanana aragela phambili nokuzihlalela enarhenapho." 
Joshua17:13 Kodwana kuthe lokha ama-Israyeli naqina amandla, akatelela amaKanana lawo ngomsebenzi. Ngalokho azange awaqotjhe woke emadorobheni lawo." 
Joshua17:14 Isizukulwana sakaJosefa sakhuluma noJotjhuwa sathi: “Kubayini uthi usibona sibanengi kangaka ngesibalo, nokobana sibusiswe nguSomnini wena usiphosele ifumbe kanye kobana usabele isabelo sinye kwaphela na?”" 
Joshua17:15 UJotjhuwa wathi kiso: “Nakube nibanengi kangako, kubayini ningakhuphukeli ehlathini bese nizirhulele lapho indawo enarheni yamaPerizi namaRafa nangabe mbala inarha yeentaba zakwa-Efrayimu yincani khulu kini?”" 
Joshua17:16 Isizukulwana sakaJosefa sathi: “Inarha yeentaba nayo ayikasaneli, kanti namaKanana ahlala emirhuleni aneenkarana zepi zesimbi, okutjho lawo ahlala eBhethe-Tjhani nemizanayo nalawo asemrhobeni weJizriyela.”" 
Joshua17:17 UJotjhuwa wathi ekumbeni kaJosefa, okungu-Efrayimu noManase: “Vele nibabantu abanengi begodu ninamandla amakhulu. Ngalokho anikafaneli ukuba nesabelo sinye kwaphela," 
Joshua17:18 iye, inarha yeentaba ingeyenu begodu nanyana imahlathi, nizayirhula ibe ngeyenu ukuyokufika emathomeni weentaba. Nizakuqotjha amaKanana nanyana anamandla begodu neenkarana zawo zepi zingezesimbi njalo.”" 
Joshua18:1 Umkhambathi woke wama-Israyeli wahlangana eTjhilo wahloma itende lokuhlanganela lapho. Inarha leyo besele ihluliwe. 
Joshua18:2 Gade kusese neenkoro ezilikhomba hlangana nama-Israyeli ebegade zingakabi ukwabelwa ilifa lazo. 
Joshua18:3 UJotjhuwa wathi kuma-Israyeli: “Nizolokhu nitatazela kufika nini ningangeni nithathe inarha uSomnini uZimu waboyihlo aninikele yona le? 
Joshua18:4 Khuphani amadoda amathathu ekorweni ngayinye, mina ngizawathuma kobana aphume adabule inarha athale ubujamo bayo ukuze yabiwe njengelifa. Lokha nabuyela kimi" 
Joshua18:5 izakuhlukaniswa iingcenye ezilikhomba. Ilifa lakwaJuda lizakuhlala linjalo ngesewula nelifa lekumba kaJosefa ngetlhagwini. 
Joshua18:6 Lokha nasele nithale inarha iingcenye ezilikhomba, lethani ihlathululo leyo kimi ukuze ngenze ifumbe yokwaba inarha khonapha phambi kwakaSomnini uZimethu." 
Joshua18:7 AmaLevi akanasabelo phakathi kwenu ngombana ubuphristi bakaSomnini bulilifa lawo. BakwaGadi, bakwaRubeni kanye nesiquntu sakwaManase sebafumene ilifa labo ngaphetjheya kweJordani ngepumalanga okuyinarha ebayabelwa nguMosi inceku kaSomnini.”" 
Joshua18:8 Kuthe lokha amadoda ebekakhethelwe ukuyokuthala inarha nasele alungele ukuphuma uJotjhuwa wabuyelela umyalwakhe kiwo wathi: “Khambani nidabule inarha niyithale bese nibuyela kimi. Mina ngizanenzela ifumbe khona eTjhilwapha phambi kwakaSomnini.” 
Joshua18:9 Amadoda aphuma-ke adabula inarha, atlola emsongweni ihlathululwayo ngokwamadorobhayo iingcenye ezilikhomba. Abuyela kuJotjhuwa ekampeni eTjhilo." 
Joshua18:10 UJotjhuwa wawenzela ifumbe eTjhilo phambi kwakaSomnini, wahlukanisela ama-Israyeli inarha khonapho. Ikoro ngayinye yafumana isabelo sayo." 
Joshua18:11 Ifumbe yawela ekorweni yakwaBhenjamini ngokwemindenayo. Inarha eyabelwa yona yaba hlangana kwekoro yakwaJuda neyakwaJosefa. 
Joshua18:12 Umkhawulo ongetlhagwini wathoma eJordani, wakhuphukela ngehlangothini langetlhagwini yentaba yeJerikho, wakhuphuka njalo uqamula intaba waya ngetjingalanga, wayokubetha erhalawumbeni leBhethe-Aveni." 
Joshua18:13 Ukusuka lapho umkhawulo waqamula ngehlangothini langesewula yentatjana yeLuzi (okutjho iBhethe-Eli) ukuya enzasi e-Atharothi-Adari ukudabula phezu kwentaba engesewula yeBhethe-Rhoroni esenzasi. 
Joshua18:14 Khonapho wajika waba mkhawulo wangetjingalanga. Ukusuka entabeni engesewula hlanu kweBhethe-Rhoroni umkhawulo wanqomba ngesewula wayokutjhayisa eKhiriyathi-Bhali (okutjho iKhiriyathi-Jeyarimu), okulidorobho lekoro yakwaJuda. Lowo-ke bekumkhawulo wangetjingalanga." 
Joshua18:15 Umkhawulo wangesewula bewuthoma hlanu kweKhiriyathi-Jeyarimu; ukusuka ngetjingalanga uye emthonjeni weNefitowarhi," 
Joshua18:16 wehlele emathomeni wentaba ehlanu komrhoba weBheni-Hinomu nangetlhagwini yomrhoba weRafa, urhubalale njalo ukwehlela enzasi emrhobeni kaHinomu bese uqamule ihlangothi langesewula yentaba yamaJebusi, wehlele emthonjeni weRogeli." 
Joshua18:17 Ukusuka lapho ujikele ngetlhagwini-pumalanga uye emthonjeni weTjhemetjhi bese lapho-ke unqombe eGelilothi emalungana nomkghotha we-Adumimi, wehle njalo unqombe elitjeni lakaBhohani osizukulwana sakaRubeni." 
Joshua18:18 Umkhawulo lowo udlulele ngehlangothini langetlhagwini yentaba magegana neBhethe-Araba, wehlele emrhobeni weJordani." 
Joshua18:19 Godu udlulele ngehlangothini langetlhagwini yentaba yeBhethe-Rhogila bese uyokuphelela ngetlhagwini yeligu lelwandle leTswayi ekugcineni kweJordani. Lowo-ke bekumkhawulo wangesewula. 
Joshua18:20 IJordani beyimkhawulo wangepumalanga. Leyo-ke bekumikhawulo mazombe yelifa lekoro yakwaBhenjamini ukuya ngokwemindenayo. 
Joshua18:21 Amadorobho wekoro yakwaBhenjamini ukuya ngokwemindenayo gade kuyiJerikho, iBhethe-Rhogila, i-Emekhi-Ketsitsi," 
Joshua18:22 iBhethe-Araba, iTsemarayimu, iBhethe-Eli," 
Joshua18:23 i-Avimu, iPara, i-Ofira," 
Joshua18:24 iKefara-Hamoni, i-Ofini neGeba. Kwaba madorobho alitjhumi nambili nemizanawo." 
Joshua18:25 Amanye bekuyiGibiyoni, iRama, iBherothi," 
Joshua18:26 iMitsiphe, iKefira, iMotsa," 
Joshua18:27 iRekhemu, iJiripiyeli, iTarala," 
Joshua18:28 iTsela, i-Elefi, iJebusi (okutjho iJerusalema), iGibeya neKhiriyathi-Jeyarimu. Kwaba madorobho alitjhumi nane nemizanawo. Lelo-ke bekulilifa lekoro yakwaBhenjamini ukuya ngokwemindenayo." 
Joshua19:1 Ifumbe yesibili yawela ekorweni yakwaSimiyoni ukuya ngokwemindenayo. Ilifa layo laba hlangana nelifa lekoro yakwaJuda. 
Joshua19:2 Isabelo sayo saba yiBheritjheba, iTjheba, iMolada," 
Joshua19:3 iRhatsari-Tjhuwali, iBhala, i-Etsemu," 
Joshua19:4 i-Elitoladi, iBhetuli, iRhorima," 
Joshua19:5 iTsikhilagi, iBhethe-Hamarikabothi, iRhatsari-Susa," 
Joshua19:6 iBhethe-Lebawothi neTjharurheni. Kwaba madorobho alitjhumi nantathu nemizanawo. 
Joshua19:7 Amanye bekuyi-Ayini, iRimoni, i-Eteri ne-Atjhani. Kwaba madorobho amane nemizanawo," 
Joshua19:8 iye, yoke imizana emagegana namadorobho lawo ukufaka phakathi iBhalathi-Bheri neRamathi-Negevu. Lelo bekulilifa lekoro yakwaSimiyoni ukuya ngokwemindenayo." 
Joshua19:9 Ilifa lekoro yakwaSimiyoni beliyingcenye yenarha yakwaJuda ngombana isabelo sekoro yakwaJuda besisikhulu khulu kiso. Ngalokho ikoro yakwaSimiyoni yafumana isabelo hlangana nelifa lekoro yakwaJuda. 
Joshua19:10 Ifumbe yesithathu yawela ekorweni yakwaZebuloni ukuya ngokwemindenayo. Imikhawulo yelifa layo beyithoma eSaridi. 
Joshua19:11 Umkhawulo omunye ukhuphukela nca ngelwandle neMarala, udlule eduze neDabetjhethi, uthinte umlanjana oseJokhineyamu." 
Joshua19:12 Omunye bewusuka eSaridi utjhinge tjhuba langepumalanga ukudabula inarha yeKisilothi-Tabori unqombe eDaberathi bese ukhuphukela eJafiya. 
Joshua19:13 Ukusuka lapho utjhinge tjhuba langepumalanga yeGathi-Rheferi ne-Eti-Khatsini, unqombe eRimoni bese ujikela ngeNeya." 
Joshua19:14 Ngetlhagwini yeRhanatoni ujike bese uphelela emrhobeni weJifitarheli. 
Joshua19:15 Ilifelo belifaka phakathi iKhathathi, iNahalali, iTjhimroni, iJidala neBhethe-Lehema. Kwaba madorobho alitjhumi nambili nemizanawo." 
Joshua19:16 Lelo bekulilifa lekoro yakwaZebuloni ukuya ngokwemindenayo, okumadorobho nemizanawo." 
Joshua19:17 Ifumbe yesine yawela ekorweni yakwa-Isakari ukuya ngokwemindenayo. 
Joshua19:18 Isabelo sayo safaka phakathi iJizriyela, iKesulothi, iTjhunemu," 
Joshua19:19 iRhafarayimu, iTjhiyoni, i-Anarharathi," 
Joshua19:20 iRabithi, iKhitjhiyoni, i-Ebetsi," 
Joshua19:21 iRemethi, i-Eni-Ganimu, i-Eni-Rhada neBhethe-Patsetsi." 
Joshua19:22 Umkhawulo wesabelo sayo wathinta iTabori wadlulela eTjharhatsima neBhethe-Tjhemetjhi waphelela eJordani. Kwaba madorobho alitjhumi nesithandathu nemizanawo. 
Joshua19:23 Lelo bekulilifa lekoro yakwa-Isakari ukuya ngokwemindenayo, okumadorobho nemizanawo." 
Joshua19:24 Ifumbe yesihlanu yawela ekorweni yakwa-Atjheri ukuya ngokwemindenayo. 
Joshua19:25 Isabelo sayo safaka hlangana iRhelikhathi, iRhali, iBhetheni, i-Akitjhafi," 
Joshua19:26 i-Alameleki, i-Amadi neMitjhali. Umkhawulo wakhona bewudlula entabeni iKarameli bese urhubalale uye ngetjingalanga ukuyokufika ekugcineni komlanjana iLibinathi." 
Joshua19:27 Ukuyela ngepumalanga, umkhawulo bewujikela eBhethe-Dagoni, ugege namaphethelo weZebuloni ngetlhagwini yomrhoba iJifitharhi-Eli, unqombe eBhethe-Emekhi neNehiyeli bese uragele phambili utjhinge eKabhulu ngetlhagwini." 
Joshua19:28 Umkhawulo bewufaka phakathi i-Eburoni, iRerhobho, iRhamoni neKhana, ukuyokufika eTsidoni eKulu." 
Joshua19:29 Usuke lapho ujike uye eRama uyokutjhayisa eTirosi okulidorobho elinemithangala; godu ujike udlule iRhosa uphelele elwandle. Amanye amadorobho bekuyiMarhalebu, i-Akziba," 
Joshua19:30 i-Uma, i-Afekhi neRerhobho. Kwaba madorobho amatjhumi amabili nambili nemizanawo." 
Joshua19:31 Lelo bekulilifa lekoro yakwa-Atjheri ukuya ngokwemindenayo, okumadorobho nemizanawo." 
Joshua19:32 Ifumbe yesithandathu yawela ekorweni yakwaNafitali ngokuya ngemindenayo. 
Joshua19:33 Umkhawulwayo ngesewula bewuthoma eRhelefi, emthini omkhulu we-owuku eTsananimu, udabule e-Adami-Nekhebi neJabhiniyeli ukuyokufika eLakhumu bese uphelela eJordani." 
Joshua19:34 Ukusuka eRhelefi ujikele ngetjingalanga uye e-Azinothi-Tabori, urhubalale njalo uye eRhukhokhi ufese ugege emaphethelweni wakwaZebuloni ngesewula newakwa-Atjheri ngetjingalanga, wayokuphelela ngepumalanga eJehuda ngemlanjeni iJordani." 
Joshua19:35 Amadorobhayo anemithangala kwaba yiTsidimu, iTseri, iRhamathi, iRakhathi, iKinerethi," 
Joshua19:36 i-Adama, iRama, iRhatsori," 
Joshua19:37 iKhedetjhi, i-Edreyi, i-Eni-Rhatsori," 
Joshua19:38 iJironi, iMigidali-Eli, iRhoremu, iBhethe-Anathi neBhethe-Tjhemetjhi. Kwaba madorobho alitjhumi nethoba nemizanawo." 
Joshua19:39 Lelo bekulilifa lekoro yakwaNafitali ukuya ngokwemindenayo, okumadorobho nemizanawo." 
Joshua19:40 Ifumbe yekhomba yawela ekorweni yakwaDani ukuya ngokwemindenayo. 
Joshua19:41 Umkhawulo welifa layo bewufaka phakathi iTsora, i-Etjhitawolo, i-Iri-Tjhemetjhi," 
Joshua19:42 iTjhalabhini, i-Ayaloni, iJitila," 
Joshua19:43 i-Eloni, iTimna, i-Ekhironi," 
Joshua19:44 i-Elitekhe, iGibetoni, iBhalathi," 
Joshua19:45 iJehudi, iBhene-Bherakhi, iGathi-Rimoni," 
Joshua19:46 iMe-Jarikhoni neRakhoni kanye nemikhawulo emalungana neJafo. 
Joshua19:47 Kodwana bakwaDani baloba umkhawulwabo. Nje-ke bakhuphuka bayokulwa neLetjhemu, bayisahlela, bayimadlha ngesabula, bayithumba bebahlala kiyo. Bayibiza bona yiDani, bayithiyelela ngoyisemkhulu uDani." 
Joshua19:48 Lelo bekulilifa lekoro yakwaDani ukuya ngokwemindenayo, okumadorobho nemizanawo." 
Joshua19:49 Kuthe bona baqede ukwaba inarha njengelifa ngokwemikhawulwayo, ama-Israyeli anikela uJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni isabelo phakathi kwawo." 
Joshua19:50 Ngokomyalo kaSomnini ama-Israyeli amnikela idorobho alikhombelako, okuyiTimnathi-Serarhi ngeentatjaneni zakwa-Efrayimu. Wavuselela idorobhelo, wahlala kilo." 
Joshua19:51 Lawo-ke mamafa u-Elazara umphristi noJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni kanye neenhloko zemindeni yaboyise beenkoro zama-Israyeli abawaba ngefumbe eTjhilo phambi kwakaSomnini emnyango wetende lokuhlanganela. Baqeda njalo-ke ukwaba inarha. 
Joshua20:1 USomnini wakhuluma noJotjhuwa wathi 
Joshua20:2 akakhulume nama-Israyeli athi: “Khethani amadorobho wobuphephelo engakhuluma ngawo nani ngoMosi," 
Joshua20:3 bonyana umuntu obulele omunye ngephoso angakahlosi, abalekele kiwo. Azakuba yindawo yokuphephela kini nanibalekela umuntu ofuna ukubuyiselela ngeengazi." 
Joshua20:4 Umuntu loyo uzakubalekela kelinye lamadorobho lawo afese ajame ebungenweni besango lakhona, ahlathululele abaphathi bedorobhelo indabakhe. Bona-ke bazamngenisa ngedorobheni, bamnikele indawo, ahlale nabo lapho." 
Joshua20:5 Nakube umbuyiseleli weengazi uyamlandelela, abaphathi abakameli ukunikela umbulali loyo ezandleni zombuyiseleli ngombana ubulele umuntu womphakathi ngaphandle kwehloso angazange amzonde phambilini." 
Joshua20:6 Uzakuhlala ngedorobhenelo bekufike isikhathi sokobana ayokuvela ngaphambi kwebandla. Nakube akakabonwa umlandu uzakuhlala ngedorobhenapho kufikela lapha kuhlongakala khona umphristi omkhulu wangaleso sikhathi. Ngemva kwalokho-ke umbulali loyo angabuyela edorobheni lekhabo aye emzinakhe, okulidorobho abaleka kilo.”" 
Joshua20:7 Yeke ama-Israyeli ahlukanisela iKhedetjhi eGalile ngeentatjaneni zakwaNafitali, iTjhekemu ngeentatjaneni zakwa-Efrayimu neKhiriyathi-Ariba (okutjho iRhebroni) ngeentatjaneni zakwaJuda." 
Joshua20:8 Ngaphetjheya kweJordani ngepumalanga yeJerikho bahlukanisela iBhetseri eserhalawumbeni elisekangala ukusuka ekorweni yakwaRubeni, iRamothi eseGiliyadi ekorweni yakwaGadi neGolana eseBhatjhani ekorweni yakwaManase." 
Joshua20:9 Lawo bekumadorobho wobuphephelo abelwe woke ama-Israyeli neenkhonzi eziphakathi kwawo ukuze kuthi nanyana ngubani obulala umuntu ngaphandle kwehloso abalekele kiwo. Umbuyiseleli weengazi akukameli ambulale angakaveli phambi kwebandla. 
Joshua21:1 Iinhloko zemindeni yamaLevi zeza ku-Elazara umphristi nakuJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni neenhlokweni zemindeni yaboyise beenkoro zama-Israyeli 
Joshua21:2 baseTjhilo enarheni yeKanana zathi kibo: “USomnini wayala ngoMosi bonyana sinikelwe amadorobho wokuhlala kanye namadlelo wefuywethu.” 
Joshua21:3 Yeke ngomyalo kaSomnini ama-Israyeli athatha elifeni lawo amadorobho namadlelo wakhona awanikela amaLevi. 
Joshua21:4 Ifumbe yawela emindenini yamaKhehathi. Yeke hlangana namaLevi aziinzukulwana zaka-Aroni umphristi amanye amaKhehathi afumana amadorobho alitjhumi nantathu ngefumbe ekorweni yakwaJuda, yakwaSimiyoni neyakwaBhenjamini." 
Joshua21:5 Godu amanye amaKhehathi afumana amadorobho alitjhumi ngefumbe emindenini yekoro yakwa-Efrayimu, yakwaDani kanye nesiquntwini sakwaManase." 
Joshua21:6 AmaGeritjhoni afumana amadorobho alitjhumi nantathu ngefumbe emindenini yekoro yakwa-Isakari, yakwa-Atjheri, yakwaNafitali kanye nesiquntwini sakwaManase eBhatjhani." 
Joshua21:7 AmaMerari ngokwemindenawo afumana amadorobho alitjhumi nambili ekorweni yakwaRubeni, yakwaGadi kanye neyakwaZebuloni." 
Joshua21:8 Ngaleyondlela ama-Israyeli anikela amaLevi amadorobho lawo kanye namadlelo wakhona ngefumbe njengombana uSomnini ayala ngoMosi. 
Joshua21:9 Njengombana ifumbe nayiwako yathoma emindenini yamaKhehathi okuziinzukulwana zaka-Aroni ekorweni yamaLevi, amadorobho abalwe ngenzasi athathwa ekorweni yakwaJuda neyakwaSimiyoni anikelwa iinzukulwanezo." 
Joshua21:10 Amadorobho lawo bekuyiKhiriyathi-Ariba, okutjho iRhebroni, ngeentatjaneni zakwaJuda kanye namadlelwayo magegana nayo. (U-Ariba lo gade kunguyise ka-Anakhi.)" 
Joshua21:11 Kodwana amasimu wedorobho nemizanalo kwanikelwa uKalebi umsa kaJefune njengelifa lakhe. 
Joshua21:12 Ngaphandle kweRhebroni, okulidorobho lobuphephelo, kanye namadlelwayo, iinzukulwana zaka-Aroni umphristi zanikelwa iLibhina namadlelwayo," 
Joshua21:13 iJatiri namadlelwayo, i-Etjhitemowa namadlelwayo," 
Joshua21:14 iRholoni namadlelwayo, iDebhiri namadlelwayo," 
Joshua21:15 i-Ayini namadlelwayo, iJutha namadlelwayo neBhethe-Tjhemetjhi namadlelwayo. Wolithoba amadorobho lawo aphuma eenkorweni ezimbili, okutjho yakwaJuda neyakwaSimiyoni." 
Joshua21:16 Ekorweni yakwaBhenjamini kwathathwa iGibiyoni namadlelwayo, iGeba namadlelwayo," 
Joshua21:17 i-Anatothi namadlelwayo ne-Alimoni namadlelwayo. Kwaba madorobho amane. 
Joshua21:18 Amadorobho wabaphristi abaziinzukulwana zaka-Aroni, gade alitjhumi nantathu sele awoke kanye namadlelwawo." 
Joshua21:19 Amanye amaKhehathi angewomndeni wamaLevi, abelwa amadorobho ekorweni yakwa-Efrayimu." 
Joshua21:20 Anikelwa iTjhekemu, okulidorobho lobuphephelo namadlelwayo ngeentatjaneni zakwa-Efrayimu, iGezeri namadlelwayo," 
Joshua21:21 iKhibitsayimu namadlelwayo neBhethe-Rhoroni namadlelwayo. Kwaba madorobho amane. 
Joshua21:22 Ekorweni yakwaDani kwathathwa i-Elitekhe namadlelwayo, iGibetoni namadlelwayo," 
Joshua21:23 i-Ayaloni namadlelwayo neGathi-Rimoni namadlelwayo. Kwaba madorobho amane. 
Joshua21:24 Esiquntwini sekoro yakwaManase kwathathwa iTanaki namadlelwayo neJibiliyamu namadlelwayo. Kwaba madorobho amabili. 
Joshua21:25 Amadorobho wemindeni yamaKhehathi amanye gade alitjhumi nawo woke amadlelwawo. 
Joshua21:26 AmaGeritjhoni, okungeminye yemindeni yamaLevi, anikelwa amadorobho esiquntwini sekoro yakwaManase. Wona gade kuyiGolana eseBhatjhani namadlelwayo (okulidorobho lobuphephelo), iBhetjhitera namadlelwayo. Kwaba madorobho amabili." 
Joshua21:27 Ekorweni yakwa-Isakari anikelwa iKhitjhiyoni namadlelwayo, iDaberathi namadlelwayo," 
Joshua21:28 iJarimuthi namadlelwayo ne-Eni-Ganimu namadlelwayo. Kwaba madorobho amane. 
Joshua21:29 Ekorweni yakwa-Atjheri anikelwa iMitjhali namadlelwayo, i-Abidoni namadlelwayo" 
Joshua21:30 iRhelikhathi namadlelwayo neRerhobho namadlelwayo. Kwaba madorobho amane. 
Joshua21:31 Ekorweni yakwaNafitali anikelwa iKhedetjhi eseGalile namadlelwayo (okulidorobho lobuphephelo), iRhamothi-Dori namadlelwayo neKharitani namadlelwayo. Kwaba madorobho amathathu." 
Joshua21:32 Amadorobho wemindeni yamaGeritjhoni gade alitjhumi nantathu sele awoke namadlelwawo. 
Joshua21:33 KumaLevi aseleko, imindeni yamaMerari yanikelwa amadorobho alandelako: Ekorweni yakwaZebuloni anikelwa iJokhineyamu namadlelwayo, iKharita namadlelwayo," 
Joshua21:34 iDimina namadlelwayo neNahalali namadlelwayo. Kwaba madorobho amane. 
Joshua21:35 Ekorweni yakwaRubeni anikelwa iBhetseri namadlelwayo, iJatsa namadlelwayo," 
Joshua21:36 iKhedemothi namadlelwayo neMefathi namadlelwayo. Kwaba madorobho amane. 
Joshua21:37 Ekorweni yakwaGadi anikelwa iRamothi eseGiliyadi namadlelwayo (okulidorbho lobuphephelo), iMarhanayimu namadlelwayo," 
Joshua21:38 iRhetjhibhoni namadlelwayo neJazeri namadlelwayo. Kwaba madorobho amane sele awoke. 
Joshua21:39 Sele awoke amadorobho abelwa imindeni yamaMerari okumaLevi aseleko, gade alitjhumi nambili." 
Joshua21:40 Woke amadorobho wamaLevi agade aphakathi kwama-Israyeli bekamatjhumi amane nobunane kanye namadlelwawo. 
Joshua21:41 Elinye nelinye lamadorobho lawo gade linamadlelo magegana nalo. Iye, bekunjalo-ke kiwo woke amadorobho lawo." 
Joshua21:42 Ngaleyondlela uSomnini wanikela ama-Israyeli inarha yoke afunga bona uzoyinikela aboyisemkhulu. Kwathi bona ayithumbe, ahlala kiyo." 
Joshua21:43 USomnini wanikela ama-Israyeli ukuphumula mahlangothi woke njengombana afunga kiboyisemkhulu. Akunasitha nasinye esajamelana nawo ngombana uSomnini wanikela zoke izitha ezandleni zawo. 
Joshua21:44 Akunasithembiso nasinye esihle uSomnini asenza ekumbeni yama-Israyeli esingazange siphumelele. Koke kwenzeka. 
Joshua22:1 UJotjhuwa wabiza bakwaRubeni nebakwaGadi kanye nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase," 
Joshua22:2 wathi kibo: “Nigcine koke uMosi inceku kaSomnini eniyale ngakho, nalalela nelizwi lami kikho koke enginiyale ngakho." 
Joshua22:3 Emalangeni amanengi la, azange nilahle abafowenu bekube kunamhlanjesi. Niqaphelile ukwenza umyalo kaSomnini uZimenu." 
Joshua22:4 Nje-ke uSomnini uZimenu unikele abafowenu ukuphumula njengombana wabathembisa. Ngalokho buyelani emizini yenu enarheni lapha kunelifa lenu khona, endaweni enayabelwa nguMosi inceku kaSomnini ngaphetjheya kweJordani." 
Joshua22:5 Tjhejani bonyana nigcina kuhle umyalo nomthetho uMosi inceku kaSomnini aniyale ngawo kobana nikhathalele uSomnini uZimenu. Nikhambe kizo zoke iindlela zakhe nigcine imiyalwakhe bese nikakarela kuye nimlotjhe ngeenhliziyo ezipheleleko nangemiphefumulwenu yoke.” 
Joshua22:6 Yeke uJotjhuwa wababusisa, wathi kibo: “Buyelani emizinenu ninomnotho omnengi, nefuyo enengi, isiliva, igolide, ikoporo, isimbi kanye nezambatho ezinengi khulu. Hlukaniselanani nabafowenu ipango eniyifumene ezitheni zenu.” Nje-ke wabalayelisa, baya emizinabo. Isiquntu esinye sekoro yakwaManase sanikelwa nguMosi isabelo eBhatjhani, kodwana esinye sabelwa nguJotjhuwa hlangana nabafowabo enarheni engetjingalanga yeJordani." 
Joshua22:7 Ngalokho bakwaRubeni nebakwaGadi kanye nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase babuyela ekhaya, basuka ebantwini bakwa-Israyeli eTjhilo esenarheni yeKanana kobana baye enarheni yakwaGiliyadi, okuyinarhabo abayithumbe ngokwabo ngokomyalo kaSomnini ngoMosi." 
Joshua22:8 Lokha nabafika esifundeni esinothileko ngemrhobeni weJordani enarheni yeKanana, bakha i-aldari elikhulu nelibabazekako eduze neJordani." 
Joshua22:9 Ama-Israyeli, okubafowabo, ezwa bona bakwaRubeni, bakwaGadi nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase bakhe i-aldari emkhawulweni wenarha yamaKanana esifundeni esinothileko ngemrhobeni weJordani ehlangothini lakwa-Israyeli." 
Joshua22:10 Kwathi bona woke ama-Israyeli akuzwe lokho, kwahlangana woke umkhambathi eTjhilo kobana ulwe nabo." 
Joshua22:11 Ama-Israyeli athumela uFiniyasi umsa ka-Elazara umphristi kebakwaRubeni, bakwaGadi nesiquntwini sekoro yakwaManase enarheni yeGiliyadi," 
Joshua22:12 akhambisana namakhosana alitjhumi. Enye nenye beyijamele ikoro ngayinye yakwa-Israyeli, omunye nomunye wabo njengehloko yomndeni eenkorweni zakwa-Israyeli." 
Joshua22:13 Beza kebakwaRubeni, kebakwaGadi nesiquntwini sekoro yakwaManase enarheni yeGiliyadi bathi kibo:" 
Joshua22:14 “Nakhu okutjhiwo ngiwo woke umkhambathi kaSomnini, ‘Kubayini nenze isiphambeko esingaka phambi kwakaZimu wakwa-Israyeli ngokulisa namhlanjesi ukulandela uSomnini bese nizakhela i-aldari nijamelane noSomnini na?" 
Joshua22:15 Bekungakaneli ngesono sePewori na? Bekube namhlanje besingakazihlambululi kiso begodu kuvele kiso amatshwenyeko ehlela umkhambathi wakaSomnini. 
Joshua22:16 Nina-ke senifulathela uSomnini kwanjesi! Nanijamelana noSomnini namhlanje, uzokuthukuthelela woke umkhambathi wakwa-Israyeli kusasa." 
Joshua22:17 Yeke nakube inarhenu ayikahlambuluki, yizani enarheni kaSomnini lapha kunethaberinakeli lakaSomnini khona bese nihlukaniselane nathi inarha phakathi. Kwaphela ningajamelani noSomnini namkha nijamelane nathi ngokuzakhela kwenu i-aldari elinye ngaphandle kwelakaSomnini uZimethu." 
Joshua22:18 U-Akani umsa kaZerarhi wenze isiphambeko ezintweni ezikhethelwe ukubhujiswa, ngalokho umkhambathi wakwa-Israyeli wawelwa bukhali! Angithi azange abhubhe yedwa ngesono sakheso?’ ”" 
Joshua22:19 BakwaRubeni, bakwaGadi nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase baphendula amakhosana weenkoro zakwa-Israyeli bathi:" 
Joshua22:20 “UZimu uSomnini oyiKosi yamakhosi, iye, uZimu uSomnini oyiKosi yamakhosi nguye owaziko; ngitjho no-Israyeli ngokwakhe kumele azi bonyana esikwenzileko akusikho ukujamelana namkha ukufulathela uSomnini. Khona-ke ningasibabaleli namhlanje" 
Joshua22:21 nakube i-aldari silakhele ukufulathela uSomnini namkha ukunikela iminikelo yokutjhiswa namkha iminikelo yeenthoro neyetjhebiswano. USomnini ngokwakhe akasibone umlandu nakube kunjalo. 
Joshua22:22 Kodwana koke lokho sikwenze ngokwesaba ngombana esikhathini esizako abantwabenu bangahle babuze bathi, ‘Ninasabelo sini kuSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli?" 
Joshua22:23 USomnini wenze iJordani yaba mkhawulo phakathi kwethu nani.’ Yeke abantwabenu bangahle bangasavumi nakancani kobana bethu beze balotjhe uSomnini. 
Joshua22:24 Ngalokho sazitjela sathi, ‘Asizakheleni i-aldari.’ Kodwana azange silakhele imihlabelo yokutjhiswa namkha yetjhebiswano." 
Joshua22:25 Awa, sengelobufakazi kwaphela phakathi kwethu nani naphakathi kweenzukulwana ezizako ngemva kwethu bonyana nathi silotjhe phambi kwakaSomnini ngemihlabelwethu yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano kanye neminye ukuze abantwabenu bangathi kebethu esikhathini esizako, ‘Aninasabelo kuSomnini.’" 
Joshua22:26 Yeke sacabanga bonyana nange lokho bekungatjhiwo kithi namkha eenzukulwaneni zethu ngesikhathi esizako, besizakuthi, ‘Qalani, umfuziselo we-aldari lakaSomnini elenziwa bobaba, akusilo lemihlabelo yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano, kodwana libufakazi phakathi kwethu nani.’" 
Joshua22:27 Angeze sajamelana noSomnini simfulathele namhlanjesi ekumlandeleni ngokwakha i-aldari! Asizukuletha imihlabelo yokutjhiswa, iminikelo yeenthoro namkha imihlabelo yetjhebiswano ngaphandle kwe-aldarini lakaSomnini uZimethu eliphambi kwethaberinakeli!”" 
Joshua22:28 Lokha uFiniyasi umphristi namakhosana womkhambathi, iinhloko zemindeni yakwa-Israyeli ebegade banaye nabezwa amezwi akhulunywe ngebakwaRubeni, bakwaGadi kanye nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase, baneliseka." 
Joshua22:29 UFiniyasi umsa ka-Elazara umphristi wathi kebakwaRubeni, bakwaGadai nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase: “Namhlanje siyazi bonyana uSomnini uphakathi kwethu ngombana anikenzi isiphambeko ngokujamelana naye. Ngalokho nisindise ama-Israyeli esandleni sakaSomnini.”" 
Joshua22:30 UFiniyasi umsa ka-Elazara umphristi namakhosana basuka kebakwaRubeni nebakwaGadi enarheni yakwaGiliyadi baya enarheni yeKanana kuma-Israyeli, bawabikela ngekhambo labo." 
Joshua22:31 Umbiko lowo wanelisa ama-Israyeli, abe adumisa uZimu. Azange asakhuluma godu ngokulwa nangokurhayila inarha yebakwaRubeni nebakwaGadi." 
Joshua22:32 BakwaRubeni nebakwaGadi bathiya i-aldarelo bathi: “Bufakazi.” Benza lokho ngombana bathi: “Libufakazi phakathi kwethu kobana uSomnini unguZimu.” 
Joshua23:1 Kwathi ngemva kwesikhathi eside uSomnini aphumuze ama-Israyeli ezitheni zawo zoke eziwabhodileko, noJotjhuwa bekaluphele namalanga sele ayile," 
Joshua23:2 wabiza woke ama-Israyeli, abaphathi bakhona, iinhloko zemindeni, abagwebi kanye neenkhulu, wathi kibo: “Niyangibona bonyana sele ngiluphele namalanga ayile," 
Joshua23:3 begodu nibone koke uSomnini uZimenu akwenze kizo zoke izizwezi ngenca yenu ngombana nguye onilweleko. 
Joshua23:4 Qalani-ke, iinkoro zenu ngizabele ilifa ngefumbe, okuyinarha yezizwe ezisaseleko kanye nalezo engazirhayilako ukusuka eJordani ukuyokufika elwandle eliKhulu ngetjingalanga." 
Joshua23:5 USomnini uZimenu uzaziqotjha izizwezo phambi kwenu, zisuke endlelenenu, nizakuthumba inarhazo njengombana uSomnini uZimenu anithembisa." 
Joshua23:6 Ngalokho qinani khulu nigcine benenze koke okutlolwe ngencwadini yomthetho kaMosi, ningaphambukeli ngesigomeni namkha ngesinceleni," 
Joshua23:7 ukuze ningahlangahlangani nezizwezi eziseleko phakathi kwenu. Ningaphathi amabizo wabozinyana bazo emilonyenenu, ningafungi ngabo, ningabalotjhi namkha nibakhothamele," 
Joshua23:8 kodwana kakarelani kuSomnini uZimenu njengombana nenzile bekube kunamhlanje. 
Joshua23:9 Iye, nguSomnini oqotjhe phambi kwenu izizwe ezikulu nezinamandla, nje-ke bekube kunamhlanje akunamuntu owakhe wajama phambi kwenu." 
Joshua23:10 Umuntu munye kini ukghona ukugijimisa amadoda ayikulungwana ngombana nguSomnini uZimenu nguye onilwelako njengombana anithembisa. 
Joshua23:11 Yeke nakelelani khulu ukukhathalela uSomnini uZimenu 
Joshua23:12 ngombana nanifulathela uSomnini, nihlanganyele nemisalela yezizwe eziphakathi kwenwezi, nikhozisane nazo ngokuthatha abafazi kizo nazo zithathe abafazi kini," 
Joshua23:13 yazini kuhle bonyana uSomnini uZimenu akazukuragela phambili ngokuqotjha izizwezo phambi kwenu. Zizakuba sisifu nesithiyo kini, zibe sibebhu emihlanenu nameva emehlwenenu, kufikela benibhubhe enarheni ehle kangaka uSomnini uZimenu aniphe yona le." 
Joshua23:14 “Nje-ke mina sele ngizakuhlongakala. Kumele nazi ngeenhliziyo zenu zoke nangemiphefumulwenu yoke bonyana akunalitho elakhe langaba yipumelelo kikho koke okuhle uSomnini uZimenu anithembisa khona. Koke kwenzeka njengokwesithembiso, akunalitho elingazange libe yipumelelo." 
Joshua23:15 Kodwana njengombana koke okuhle uSomnini uZimenu anithembisa khona kwanehlela, ngokunjalo uSomnini uzanehlisela koke okumbi, kufikela lapha anithanyela khona endaweni ehle kangaka aniphe yona le." 
Joshua23:16 Iye, naniphambukako esivumelwaneni sakaSomnini uZimenu aniyala ngaso bese nidlhemadlhema ngemva kwabozinyana nibalotjhe benibakhothamele, itukuthelo yakaSomnini izakuvutha phezu kwenu, nibhubhe msinyana enarheni ehle kangaka uSomnini aniphe yona le.”" 
Joshua24:1 UJotjhuwa wabuthelela zoke iinkoro zakwa-Israyeli eTjhekemu, wabiza abaphathi, iinhloko zemindeni, abagwebi kanye neenkhulu zakwa-Israyeli, baziveza phambi kwakaZimu." 
Joshua24:2 UJotjhuwa wathi kibo boke abantu: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ‘Ekadeni aboyihlo bebahlala ngaphetjheya komlambo iYufrathe, uTerarhi uyise ka-Abrahamu noNarhori. Bona balotjha abozinyana khonapho." 
Joshua24:3 Yeke ngathatha uyihlomkhulu u-Abrahamu ngaphetjheya komlambo ngamdabulisa loke iKanana, ngamenza wanda ngeenzukulwana: Ngamupha u-Isaka," 
Joshua24:4 ku-Isaka ngamupha uJakopo no-Esewu. Ngapha u-Esewu inarha yangeentabeni zeSeyiri kobana kube lilifa lakhe, kodwana uJakopo nabantwabakhe behlela enzasi eGibhide." 
Joshua24:5 Ngathumela uMosi no-Aroni, ngehlisela iGibhide amatshwenyeko njengombana ngenza phakathi kwayo, ngemva kwalapho nganikhupha eGibhidapho." 
Joshua24:6 Iye, ngakhupha aboyihlomkhulu eGibhide. Kwathi nanifika elwandle, amaGibhide anihlala eenthendeni ngeenkarana zepi nangeenjomani ukuyokufika elwandle lomGaba." 
Joshua24:7 Kuthe lokha nanililela uSomnini, mina Somnini ngabeka ubumnyama phakathi kwenu namaGibhide, ngenza bona ilwandle liwabhibhe, nje-ke amehlwenu abona engakwenza ngeGibhide, nahlala erhalawumbeni isikhathi eside." 
Joshua24:8 Nganiletha enarheni yama-Amori ebegade ahlala ngaphetjheya kweJordani. Alwa nani kodwana ngawanikela ezandleni zenu, nathumba inarhawo nawarhayila phambi kwenu." 
Joshua24:9 Yeke uBhalaki umsa kaTsiphori ikosi yakwaMowabi wavuka walwa no-Israyeli. Wathumela ilizwi wamema uBhiliyamu umsa kaBhewori kobana aninikelele. 
Joshua24:10 Kodwana azange ngilalele uBhiliyamu, yeke wanibusisa. Ngalokho nganitjhaphulula esandleni sakhe." 
Joshua24:11 Nayama iJordani nafika eJerikho. Amadoda weJerikho alwa nani, nama-Amori, amaPerizi, amaKanana, amaRhithi, amaGirigatjhi, amaRhivi namaJebusi. Boke njalo ngabanikela ezandleni zenu." 
Joshua24:12 Ngathumela abonondovu phambi kwenu, baqotjha amakhosi amabili wama-Amori phambi kwenu. Bekungasi msebe namkha isabulenu okwaqotjha amakhosi lawo." 
Joshua24:13 Nganinikela inarha eningazange niyijulukele, namadorobho eningazange niwakhe. Nahlala lapho, nagoma iinthelo zamadiribe neemvande zemithi ye-oliva eningazange niyitjale.’ ”" 
Joshua24:14 UJotjhuwa waraga wathi: “Ngalokho-ke yesabani uSomnini nimlotjhe ngokuzimisela nangokwethembeka. Lahlani abosingazimu ebebalotjhwa boyihlomkhulu ngaphetjheya komlambo iYufrathe neGibhide bese nilotjha uSomnini. 
Joshua24:15 Nakube anifuni ukulotjha uSomnini, khona-ke khethani namhlanjesi kobana nifuna ukulotjha bani, kungaba bosingazimu ebebalotjhwa boyihlomkhulu ngaphetjheya komlambo iYufrathe, namkha abozinyana bama-Amori enarheni enihlala kiyo le. Kodwana mina nomzami sizakulotjha uSomnini.”" 
Joshua24:16 Abantu baphendula bathi: “Afe-ke! Angeze sathoma safulathela uSomnini bese sidlhemadlhema ngemva kwabosingazimu sibalotjhe," 
Joshua24:17 ngombana nguSomnini uZimethu owasikhupha thina nabobaba enarheni yeGibhide, ekumbeni yobukhoboka. USomnini wenza iimbonakaliso ezikulu phambi kwethu, wasibulunga kiyo yoke indlela esayikhambako, naphakathi kwabo boke abantu esadlula hlangana nabo." 
Joshua24:18 USomnini godu waqotjha phambi kwethu zoke izizwe, ama-Amori ebegade ahlala enarheni, ngalokho nathi sizayilotjha uSomnini ngombana unguZimethu.”" 
Joshua24:19 Kodwana uJotjhuwa wathi ebantwini: “Anikwazi ukulotjha uSomnini ngombana unguZimu ocwengileko nonesikhwele. Angeze acolela iimphambeko namkha izono zenu. 
Joshua24:20 Nakube nifulathela uSomnini nilotjhe abozinyana, uSomnini uzakujika anilimaze, aniqede nya, nanyana akhe wanenzela okuhle nje.”" 
Joshua24:21 Abantu bathi kuJotjhuwa: “Awa! Thina sizokulotjha uSomnini.” 
Joshua24:22 Yeke uJotjhuwa wathi ebantwini: “Nibofakazi ngokwenu bonyana nikhethe uSomnini kobana nimlotjhe.” Abantu bathi: “Kunjalo, sibofakazi.”" 
Joshua24:23 Waraga wathi: “Khona-ke lahlani abosingazinyana abaphakathi kwenu bese nibeka umqondwenu kuSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli.” 
Joshua24:24 Abantu bathi kuJotjuwa: “NakunguSomnini uZimethu yena, sizamlotjha! Sizakulalela ilizwi lakhe.”" 
Joshua24:25 Ngaleyondlela uJotjhuwa wenza isibopho nabantu mhlokho eTjhekemu, wabanikela imithetho nemiyalo" 
Joshua24:26 ayitlola ngencwadini yomthetho kaZimu. Wathatha ilitje elikhulu walijamisa lapho ngaphasi komuthi omkhulu endaweni ecwengileko kaSomnini. 
Joshua24:27 UJotjhuwa wathi ebantwini: “Qalani, ilitjeli lizakuba ngufakazi ngathi ngombana lizwe woke amezwi kaSomnini awakhulume kithi. Iye, lizakuba ngufakazi ngani nakube aninaqiniso phambi kwakaZimenu.”" 
Joshua24:28 Nje-ke uJotjhuwa wathi abantu abakhambe, omunye nomunye abuyele elifeni lakhe." 
Joshua24:29 Ngemva kwalokho uJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni inceku kaSomnini wahlongakala. Gade aneminyaka elikhulu netjhumi. 
Joshua24:30 Bambulungela elifeni lakhe eTimnathi-Serarhi, okuyinarha yeentatjana zakwa-Efrayimu, ngetlhagwini yeGatjhi." 
Joshua24:31 Ama-Israyeli alotjha uSomnini emihleni yoke yokuphila kwakaJotjhuwa nemihleni yoke yabaphathi abasala ngemva kwakaJotjhuwa nebegade bazi koke uSomnini akwenzela ama-Israyeli. 
Joshua24:32 Amathambo kaJosefa abantu abawathatha eGibhide abekwa eTjhekemu, endaweni eyathengwa nguJakopo emadodaneni kaRhamori uyise kaTjhekemu ngeempaparwana ezilikhulu zesiliva. Indawo leyo yaba lilifa leenzukulwana zakaJosefa." 
Joshua24:33 U-Elazara umsa ka-Aroni wahlongakala. Bambulungela embundwini wakaFiniyasi indodanakhe, egade anikelwe wona eentatjaneni zakwa-Efrayimu." 
Judges1:1 Incwadi le iphathelene nokwenzeka ngemva kokuhlongakala kwakaJotjhuwa. Ngaphambi kobana ahlongakale ama-Israyeli abuza kuSomnini athi: “Ngubani ozakukhuphuka qangi ayosilwela namaKanana?” 
Judges1:2 USomnini wathi: “Kuzakwenyuka bakwaJuda. Qalani, nginikele inarha ezandleni zabo.”" 
Judges1:3 BakwaJuda bathi kebakwaSimiyoni abafowabo: “Yenyukelani nathi enarheni esabelwe yona ukuze silwe namaKanana. Nathi sizakwenyukela nani enarheni enabelwe yona.” Yeke bakwaSimiyoni bakhamba nabo. 
Judges1:4 BakwaJuda benyuka-ke, uSomnini wanikela amaKanana namaPerizi ezandleni zabo. Bamadlha iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi eBhezekhi." 
Judges1:5 Bathi basamadlhana nawo eBhezekhapho, bafumana u-Adoni-Bhezekhi, bamsahlela." 
Judges1:6 U-Adoni-Bhezekhi loyo wabaleka kodwana bamgijimisa, bambamba, bamqunta abothubha nabothubhakghuru bakhe." 
Judges1:7 Nje-ke u-Adoni-Bhezekhi wathi: “Amakhosi amatjhumi alikhomba aquntwe abothubha nabothubhakghuru gade aphele adobhelele iintshutshurwana ngaphasi kwetafulami, ngalokho uZimu ungibetha ngezami.” Walethwa eJerusalema, wahlongakalela lapho." 
Judges1:8 BakwaJuda nabo balwa neJerusalema, bayithumba, bayimadlha ngesabula, bayithungelela ngomlilo." 
Judges1:9 Ngemva kwalokho abantu bakwaJuda balwa namaKanana ebegade ahlala eentabeni, ngesewula yenarha nangeTjhefela." 
Judges1:10 BakwaJuda basahlela amaKanana ebegade ahlala eRhebroni. (Ekuthomeni iRhebroni bekuthiwa yiKhiriyathi-Ariba.) Bahlula uTjhetjhayi, u-Arhimani noTalimayi khonapho." 
Judges1:11 Ukusuka lapho basahlela abahlali beDebhiri. (Ekuthomeni iDebhiri bekuthiwa yiKhiriyathi-Seferi.) 
Judges1:12 Ngesikhatheso uKalebi wathi: “Nanyana ngubani omadlha iKhiriyathi-Seferi, ayithumbe, ngizamnikela u-Akisa indodakazami abe mkakhe.”" 
Judges1:13 U-Otiniyeli umsa kaKhenazi, ongumfowabo omncani kaKalebi, wayithumba. UKalebi wamnikela indodakazakhe u-Akisa bona abe mkakhe." 
Judges1:14 Ekufikeni kwaka-Akisa ku-Otiniyeli gade amyenge bonyana akhombele uyise isimu. Kodwana kuthe nabafika kuyise, u-Akisa asehla kudumbanakhe, uKalebi wathi kuye: “Ufuna ngikwenzeleni?”" 
Judges1:15 Yena waphendula wathi: “Ngibawa isipho. Ubaba ungibeke ngesewula yenarha eyomileko, yeke akangiphe indawo enamanzi.” Nje-ke uKalebi wamnikela indawo enamanzi emibundwini nangemirhobeni." 
Judges1:16 Iinzukulwana zomukhwe kaMosi, okutjho amaKheni, zakhuphuka nabantu bakwaJuda zisuka edorobheni lamasundu zaya ngerhalawumbeni lakwaJuda elingesewula yenarha eduze ne-Aradi. Zahlala lapho nabantu bakhona." 
Judges1:17 BakwaJuda bakhamba nebakwaSimiyoni abafowabo, basahlela amaKanana ebegade ahlezi eTsefathi bawahlula, babhubhisa nya indawo leyo. Yeke ibizo ledorobhelo kwathiwa yiRhorima." 
Judges1:18 Godu bakwaJuda bathatha iGaza nemikhawulwayo, i-Atjhikheloni nemikhawulwayo kanye ne-Ekhironi nemikhawulwayo." 
Judges1:19 USomnini waba nebakwaJuda bebathumba inarha yangeentabeni, kodwana azange bakghone ukuqotjha abahlali bekangala ngombana gade baneenkarana zepi zesimbi." 
Judges1:20 IRhebroni yanikelwa uKalebi njengombana kwatjho uMosi. Kuhlekuhle nguye owaqotjha amadodana amathathu ka-Anakhi ebegade ahlala lapho. 
Judges1:21 BakwaBhenjamini azange baqotjhe amaJebusi ebegade ahlala eJerusalema. Yeke amaJebusi lawo ahlala nabantu bakwaBhenjamini eJerusalema bekube kunamhlanje. 
Judges1:22 Ikumba kaJosefa nayo yenyuka, yasahlela iBhethe-Eli. USomnini waba nayo." 
Judges1:23 BakwaJosefa bathumela iinhloli zayokuhlola iBhethe-Eli. Ngesikhatheso ibizo ledorobheli bekuthiwa yiLuzi. 
Judges1:24 Iinhloli zabona umuntu aphuma ngedorobheni zathi kuye: “Nange ungasikhombisa intunja yokungena ngedorobhenapha, sizakuba nomusa kuwe.”" 
Judges1:25 Yeke wazikhombisa indawo yokungena. Zafese zamadlha idorobho ngesabula. Zasindisa umuntu loyo nomzakhe woke. 
Judges1:26 Umuntu loyo waya enarheni yamaRhithi wafese wakha idorobho walithiya bona yiLuzi, okulibizo lalo bekube kunamhlanje." 
Judges1:27 BakwaManase azange baqotjhe abahlali beBhethe-Tjhani nemizanayo, iTanaki nemizanayo, abahlali beDori nemizanayo, abahlali beJibiliyamu nemizanayo nabahlali beMegido nemizanayo. Ngaleyondlela amaKanana aragela phambili ngokuhlala enarheni leyo." 
Judges1:28 Lokha ama-Israyeli naba namandla, akatelela amaKanana ngomsebenzi, kodwana azange awaqotjhe." 
Judges1:29 Bakwa-Efrayimu azange baqotjhe amaKanana ebegade ahlala eGezeri. Ngaleyondlela aragela phambili ngokuhlala phakathi kwabo. 
Judges1:30 BakwaZebuloni nabo azange baqotjhe abahlali beKhithironi namkha abahlali beNahaloli. Ngaleyondlela amaKanana aragela phambili ngokuhlala phakathi kwabo. Bawakatelela ngomsebenzi. 
Judges1:31 Bakwa-Atjheri nabo azange baqotjhe abahlali be-Ako, abahlali beTsidoni, be-Arhilaba, be-Akziba, beRhelibha, be-Afekhi namkha beRerhobho." 
Judges1:32 Ngaleyondlela bakwa-Atjheri bahlala hlangana namaKanana, okubahlali benarha ngombana azange bawaqotjhe." 
Judges1:33 NebakwaNafitali nabo azange baqotjhe abahlali beBhethe-Tjhemetjhi nabahlali beBhethe-Anathi, kodwana bahlala hlangana namaKanana, okubahlali benarha. Abahlali beBhethe-Tjhemetjhi nebeBhethe-Anathi bakatelelwa ngomsebenzi." 
Judges1:34 Ama-Amori asunduzela bakwaDani emuva ngenarheni yangeentabeni ngombana azange abavumele ukwehlela ekangala. 
Judges1:35 Ama-Amori aphumelela ukuhlala eHari-Rheresi, e-Ayaloni neTjhalibimu, kodwana isandla sekumba kaJosefa sanzinza phezu kwawo akatelelwa ngomsebenzi." 
Judges1:36 Umkhawulo wama-Amori wawuthoma emkghotheni we-Akhirabhimu ukuya eSela ukhuphukele phezulu. 
Judges2:1 Ingilozi kaSomnini yakhuphuka isuka eGiligali yaya eBhokimu, yathi kuma-Israyeli: “Nganikhupha eGibhide nganisa enarheni engafunga bonyana ngizayipha aboyihlo. Ngathembisa bonyana angeze ngephula isivumelwano sami nani." 
Judges2:2 Nina-ke ningenzi isikhozi nabahlali benarha le, ngalokho bhuruzani ama-aldarabo. Kodwana azange nilalele umyalwami. Nikwenzeleni lokho na?" 
Judges2:3 Yeke, gadesi ngithi angeze ngaziqotjha izizwezi phambi kwenu kodwana zizakuba sithiyo kini, nabozinyana bazo babe sisifu.”" 
Judges2:4 Lokha ingilozi kaSomnini nayikhuluma amezwi la kiwo woke ama-Israyeli, ama-Israyeli arhahlawula." 
Judges2:5 Athiya indawo leyo bona yiBhokimu. Enzela uSomnini umhlabelo khonapho. 
Judges2:6 Lokha uJotjhuwa natjhaphulula abantu bonyana bakhambe, omunye nomunye waya esabelweni sakhe kobana athumbe inarha ibe lilifa lakhe." 
Judges2:7 Abantu balotjha uSomnini emihleni yoke yokuphila kwakaJotjhuwa, nemihleni yoke yabaphathi abasala ngemva kwakaJotjhuwa, ababone yoke imisebenzi emikhulu uSomnini ayenzela ama-Israyeli." 
Judges2:8 UJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni, inceku kaSomnini, wahlongakala aneminyaka elikhulu netjhumi." 
Judges2:9 Bambulungela emkhawulweni welifa lakhe eTimnathi-Rheresi ngeentatjaneni zakwa-Efrayimu ngetlhagwini yentaba yeGatjhi. 
Judges2:10 Soke isizukulwaneso naso sahlongakala, kwavuka esinye ngemva kwaso ebesingamazi uSomnini namkha imisebenzi uSomnini ayenzela ama-Israyeli." 
Judges2:11 Ama-Israyeli enza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini ngokulotjha aboBhali. 
Judges2:12 Afulathela uSomnini uZimu waboyisemkhulu owabakhupha enarheni yeGibhide, adlhemadlhema ngemva kwabosingazimu babantu ebebahlala hlangana nabo, abakhothamela. Ngokwenza njalo athukuthelisa uSomnini." 
Judges2:13 Iye, afulathela uSomnini, alotjha aboBhali nabo-Atjhitarothi." 
Judges2:14 Yeke itukuthelo kaSomnini yavutha phezu kwama-Israyeli, wawanikela esandleni sabaphangi, bawaphanga. Godu wawathengisela izitha zawo ebeziwazombelezile kangangobana azange akghone ukujamelana nazo." 
Judges2:15 Njalo lokha naya epini, isandla sakaSomnini besijamelana nawo siwehlisele ubumbi njengombana uSomnini bekawayelelisile bewafunga kiwo. Aba sembandezelekweni ekulu." 
Judges2:16 USomnini wavusa abakhokheli abasindisa ama-Israyeli ezandleni zalabo ebegade bawaphanga. 
Judges2:17 Khonapho ama-Israyeli azange alalele abakhokheli bawo ngombana adlhemadlhema ngemva kwabosingazimu abakhothamela. Aphambuka msinyana eendleleni ezakhanjwa boyisemkhulu ebegade balalela imiyalo kaSomnini, wona azange enze njalo." 
Judges2:18 Njalo lokha uSomnini navusela ama-Israyeli abakhokheli, bekasekela umkhokheli wesikhatheso. Umkhokheli loyo bekasindisa ama-Israyeli ezandleni zezitha zawo emihlenakhe yoke ngombana uSomnini bekarhawuka ngokububula kwawo ngebanga labagandeleli nabahlunguphazi bawo." 
Judges2:19 Kodwana njalo lokha nakuhlongakala umkhokheli, ama-Israyeli gade abuyela emuva aziphathe kumbi ukudlula aboyise, adlhemadlheme ngemva kwabosingazimu, abalotjhe abe abakhothamele. Azange alahle imikhuba namkha iindlela zawo zokudaza ikani." 
Judges2:20 Yeke itukuthelo kaSomnini yavutha phezu kwaka-Israyeli, bewathi: “Ngebanga lokobana abantwaba baphambukile esivumelwaneni sami engayala ngaso aboyise, bangalalela ilizwi lami," 
Judges2:21 angeze bengisaqotjha phambi kwabo ngitjho nasinye sezizwe ezatjhiywa nguJotjhuwa nahlongakalako.” 
Judges2:22 Ngebangelo uSomnini waliselela izizwezo wangaziqotjha khonokho, azange azinikele esandleni sakaJotjhuwa ukuze azizinye ama-Israyeli ukubona bonyana azakutjheja abe akhambe endlelenakhe njengombana kwenza aboyise, namkha njani." 
Judges3:1 Izizwe uSomnini azilisa kobana azizinye ngazo ama-Israyeli, okutjho lawo ebegade anganalwazi lepi eKanana" 
Judges3:2 nokuwafundisa ukwazi ipi njengombana bekangazange akhe ayibone ngaphambilini, ngilezi:" 
Judges3:3 ababusi abahlanu beemfunda zamaFilista, woke amaKanana, amaTsidoni namaRhivi ebekahlala entabeni iLibhanoni, ukusuka entabeni eBhali-Rherimoni ukuyokufika eLebo-Rhamathi." 
Judges3:4 Izizwezo uSomnini bekazizinya ngazo ama-Israyeli ukubona bonyana azakulalela imiyalwakhe ayala ngayo aboyise ngoMosi na. 
Judges3:5 Yeke ama-Israyeli ahlala phakathi kwamaKanana, amaRhithi, ama-Amori, amaPerizi, amaRhivi namaJebusi." 
Judges3:6 Kodwana athatha amadodakazi wezizwezo njengabafazi bawo begodu anikela amadodana wezizwezo amadodakazawo bona abe bafazi bawo. Alotjha abosingazimu bezizwezo. 
Judges3:7 Ama-Israyeli enza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini, akhohlwa uSomnini uZimawo, alotjha aboBhali nabo-Atjhera." 
Judges3:8 Ngalokho itukuthelo kaSomnini yavutha phezu kwama-Israyeli, wawathengisa ezandleni zakaKutjhana-Ritjhatayimu ikosi ye-Aramu-Naharayimu, asebenzela uKutjhana-Ritjhatayimu iminyaka ebunane." 
Judges3:9 Kodwana kwathi lokha ama-Israyeli nalilela uSomnini, uSomnini wawavusela umsindisi owawasindisako, ongu-Otiniyeli umsa kaKhenazi, umfowabo omncani kaKalebi." 
Judges3:10 UMoya kaSomnini wehlela phezu kwakhe, wakhokhela u-Israyeli. Waphuma ipi, uSomnini wanikela uKutjhana-Ritjhatayimu ikosi ye-Aramu esandleni sakhe. Wahlula uKutjhana-Ritjhatayimu ngokumeyisa." 
Judges3:11 Inarha yaba nokuthula iminyaka ematjhumi amane. U-Otiniyeli umsa kaKhenazi wahlongakala. 
Judges3:12 Godu ama-Israyeli enza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini. USomnini waqinisa u-Egiloni ikosi yakwaMowabi bona alwe nama-Israyeli ngombana enza ubumbi phambi kwakhe. 
Judges3:13 U-Egiloni wabuthelela kuye ama-Amoni nama-Amalekhi, waphuma wayokulwa nama-Israyeli, wawahlula. Bathumba idorobho lamasundu." 
Judges3:14 Ama-Israyeli asebenzela u-Egiloni ikosi yakwaMowabi iminyaka elitjhumi nabunane. 
Judges3:15 Kodwana kwathi lokha ama-Israyeli nalilela uSomnini, uSomnini wawavusela umsindisi, u-Ehudi umsa kaGera wakwaBhenjamini. U-Ehudi loyo gade asincele. Ama-Israyeli athumela isibiko ku-Egiloni ikosi yakwaMowabi ngo-Ehudi." 
Judges3:16 U-Ehudi wazenzela isabulana ebukhali mahlangothi woke nengaba masentimitha amatjhumi amathathu ubude, wayibophelela enyongenakhe yangesigomeni ngaphakathi kwezambatho zakhe." 
Judges3:17 Waletha isibiko ku-Egiloni ikosi yakwaMowabi. U-Egiloni lo kwakuyindoda ezimuke khulu. 
Judges3:18 Kwathi bona u-Ehudi aqede ukwethula isibiko, wajika nabantu ebebathwele isibikweso." 
Judges3:19 Kodwana yena wathi nafika ematjeni aseGiligali wabuyela emuva wafese wathi ku-Egiloni: “Nginomlayezwakho oyifihlo, kosi.” U-Egiloni wathi ku-Ehudi: “Akhe uyibambe kancani!” Nje-ke wayala iinsebenzi zakhe bona zimrhaduke." 
Judges3:20 Njengombana u-Egiloni gade azipholele ngelawini lakhe elipholileko elingaphezulu, u-Ehudi watjhidela kuye wathi: “Nginomlayezwakho obuya kuZimu.” Wasikima lapha gade ahlezi khona." 
Judges3:21 U-Ehudi welula isandla sakhe sesincele wakhupha isabulana enyongakhe yangesigomeni wahlaba ngayo u-Egiloni esiswini. 
Judges3:22 Kwangena ngitjho nesibambo sesabulana esiswini, yacwila emafutheni. U-Ehudi azange akhuphe isabulana esiswini saka-Egiloni kodwana waphuma ngentunja," 
Judges3:23 ngemva kobana avale iminyango yakhona wayilodlhela. Waphuma hlangana neensika zesigodlo. 
Judges3:24 Ngemva kobana akhambe, iinsebenzi zaka-Egiloni zafika. Kuthe nazibona iminyango yelawu elingaphezulu ilodlhelwe zadlumbana zathi: “Awa, usazibangula ngelawini lakhe elipholileko.”" 
Judges3:25 Zalinda bezaphela amandla. Kwathi nakubonakala angavuli iminyango yelawu elingaphezulu zathatha isilodlhelo zayivula. Zafumana ikosazo idindilizile. 
Judges3:26 U-Ehudi waphunyurha lokha iinsebenzezo nazisadidizelako, wadlula hlangana namatje aseGiligali wabalekela eSeyira." 
Judges3:27 Kwathi nafikako wavuthela ipalapala ngeentatjaneni zakwa-Efrayimu. Ama-Israyeli asuka ngeentatjanenapho ehla naye, yena wakhamba phambi kwawo." 
Judges3:28 Wathi kiwo: “Ngilandelani ngombana uSomnini unikele izitha zenu, amaMowabi, ezandleni zenu.” Ngambala amlandela, avimbezela amazibuko weJoridani ukuyela ngakwaMowabi. Azange avumela abantu ukudlula lapho." 
Judges3:29 Ngesikhatheso abulala amaMowabi angaba ziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi. Woke njalo bekumadoda wepi ondlekileko kodwana azange kusinde nayinye.
