1Samuel15:23 Yeke ukuhlubuka uSomnini umuntu alalele ihlokwakhe le, sekufana nokulalela abosomthwadlana nanyana umphristi wabosingazimu. Njengombana ulahle ilizwi lakaSomnini nje, naye-ke ukulahlile ekubeni yikosi.”" 
1Samuel15:24 USawula wathi kuSamyela: “Maye mina ngonile. Nginyaze umyalo kaSomnini namezwakho. Ngesabe abantu, ngenza intandwabo." 
1Samuel15:25 Nje-ke ngiyakurabhela, libalela isono sami ujike nami siyokuguqa phambi kwakaSomnini.”" 
1Samuel15:26 USamyela wamphendula wathi: “Angeze bengakhamba nawe. Unyaze ilizwi lakaSomnini, yeke noSomnini naye ukulahlile ekubeni yikosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli!”" 
1Samuel15:27 Kuthe lokha uSamyela nathi uyakhamba, uSawula wagugudlhela umphetho wephuraphurakhe beyadabuka." 
1Samuel15:28 USamyela wathi kuye: “USomnini urharhule ubukhosi bakwa-Israyeli ezandleni zakho namhlanjesi, wabunikela umakhelwanakho ongcono kunawe." 
1Samuel15:29 OngaTjhugulukiko ka-Israyeli akaleyi amala namkha atjhugulule umkhumbulwakhe ngombana akasinjengomuntu kobana angaloko atjhugulula umkhumbulwakhe.” 
1Samuel15:30 USawula waphendula wathi: “Iye, kazi ngonile. Kodwana ngiyakubawa bonyana khese ungihloniphe eemphathimandleni zabantu bami naphambi ko-Israyeli, jika nami ukuze ngiyoguqa phambi kwakaSomnini uZimakho.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Ngambala uSamyela wabuyela emva noSawula; uSawula waguqa phambi kwakaSomnini. 
1Samuel15:32 USamyela wathi: “Yenilethapha u-Agagi ikosi yama-Amalekhi leyo.” U-Agagi weza athwele ihloko adlumbana bonyana: “Nakumahlungu wokufa aphele kade.” 
1Samuel15:33 USamyela wathi kuye: “Njengombana isabulakho yenza bonyana abafazi balobe abantwababo, nonyoko-ke kuzakuba nguye hlangana nabafazi oloba umntwanakhe namhlanjesi.” USamyela wambulala u-Agagi phambi kwakaSomnini eGiligali." 
1Samuel15:34 USamyela waya eRama, kodwana uSawula yena wakhuphukela kwakhe eGibeya." 
1Samuel15:35 USamyela wabe wahlongakala angazange akhe abonane noSawula godu. USamyela wakhathazeka ngoSawula, noSomnini wazisola ngokubeka kwakhe uSawula bona abe yikosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli." 
1Samuel16:1 USomnini wathi kuSamyela: “Uyokukhathazeka bekube nini ngoSawula? Ngimlahlile ekubeni yikosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli. Zalisa iphondo lakho ngamafutha we-oliva bese ungena indlela; ngikuthuma kuJese weBhethe-Lehema. Ngikhethe omunye wamadodanakhe kobana abe yikosi.” 
1Samuel16:2 Kodwana uSamyela wathi: “Ngingaya njani lapho? Indaba le izakufika eendlebeni zakaSawula bese uyangibulala.” USomnini wathi kuye: “Thatha ithole bese nawufika khona uthi, ‘Ngize ukuzokwenzela uSomnini umhlabelo.’" 
1Samuel16:3 Umemele uJese emhlabelweni, yeke ngizakukhombisa ofanele ukwenze. Ngifuna bonyana uzese loyo engizakukhombisa yena.”" 
1Samuel16:4 USamyela wenza njengombana ikosi imtjelile. Nakafika eBhethe-Lehema, iinkhulu zedorobho zatatazela nazihlangana naye. Zambuza zathi: “Uze ngobuhle na?”" 
1Samuel16:5 USamyela waphendula wathi: “Iye, ngize ngobuhle; ngize ukuzokwenzela uSomnini umhlabelo. Zicwengiseni bese nikhuphuka nami siyokwenza umhlabelo.” Nje-ke wacwengisa uJese namadodanakhe wabe wabamemela emhlabelweni." 
1Samuel16:6 Kuthe lokha nabafikako, uSamyela wabona u-Eliyabu wathi: “Ngambala nangu ozesiweko kaSomnini ajame phambi kwakaSomnini.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Kodwana uSomnini wathi kuSamyela: “Ungaqali ubunjalo bakhe namkha ijamo lakhe ngombana ngimalile loyo. USomnini akaqali izinto eziqalwa babantu. Abantu batjheja ijamo lomuntu kodwana uSomnini utjheja ihliziyo.” 
1Samuel16:8 Yeke uJese wabiza u-Abinadaba kobana azokubingelela uSamyela. Kodwana uSamyela wathi: “Awa, naye lo akusuye okhethwe nguSomnini.”" 
1Samuel16:9 UJese wabiza uTjhama bona naye azokubingelela uSamyela. Kodwana uSamyela wathi: “Awa, nalo godu akusuye uSomnini amkhethileko.”" 
1Samuel16:10 UJese wabiza amadodanakhe alikhomba bonyana nawo azokubingelela uSamyela. Kodwana uSamyela wathi kuye: “Akakho namunye uSomnini amkhethileko kilaba.” 
1Samuel16:11 Wase ubuza uJese wathi: “Amadodanakho aphelele na?” UJese wathi: “Awa, kusesekhona omunye ongumaswaphela, nokho uselusa izimvu.” USamyela wathi: “Akabizwe ngombana angeze sagoma angakafiki.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Bambiza-ke bafika naye. Bekakhanya begodu aqaleka, anamehlo amahle. USomnini wathi: “Nangu-ke engimkhethileko. Sikima umzese.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Yeke uSamyela wathatha iphondo lamafutha we-oliva wamzesa phambi kwabafowabo. Kusukela mhlokho uMoya kaSomnini wehlela phezu kwakaDavida. USamyela wanqomba eRama. 
1Samuel16:14 UMoya kaSomnini wemuka kuSawula, kwathi ummoya omumbi owathunywa nguSomnini wamhlunguphaza." 
1Samuel16:15 Abatlhogomeli bakaSawula bathi kuye: “Qala, ummoya omumbi othunywe nguZimu uyakuhlunguphaza." 
1Samuel16:16 Ikosi ayitjho, iinceku zayo zizakufuna umuntu ongakghona ukubetha iharibha. Umuntu loyo uzakubetha iharibha lokha ummoya omumbi othunyelwe nguZimu nawehlela phezu kwakho, yeke uzakuqaquluka.”" 
1Samuel16:17 USawula wathi kubatlhogomeli bakhe: “Iye, funani umuntu onekghono lokubetha iharibha, nimlethe kimapha.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Omunye wabatlhogomeli wathi: “Ngibone umsa kaJese weBhethe-Lehema okwazi ukubetha iharibha. Usihlabani begodu unesibindi. Uhlamazana kanti nekulumo uyayilonda. USomnini unaye.” 
1Samuel16:19 USawula wathumela iingijimi kuJese wathi: “Yewungithumelele indodanakho uDavida osekweluseni.” 
1Samuel16:20 UJese wathatha izikwa nekwana yewayini, wazikhweza phezu kwakadumbana wazithumela kanye nembuzana kuSawula ngendodanakhe uDavida." 
1Samuel16:21 UDavida wafika kuSawula wathoma wasebenza. USawula wamthanda tle uDavida bewamenza usonkhande wakhe. 
1Samuel16:22 Yeke uSawula wathumela ilizwi kuJese wathi: “Akhese uvumele uDavida kobana ahlale kimapha ngombana nganelisekile ngaye.” 
1Samuel16:23 Njalo lokha ummoya omumbi owathunywa nguZimu wehlela phezu kwakaSawula, uDavida gade athatha iharibha ayibethe. Yeke uSawula aqaquluke, azizwe angcono bese ummoya omumbi uyamgadunga." 
1Samuel17:1 AmaFilista abutha amabutho wawo azilungiselela ipi ahlanganela eSoko kwaJuda. Ahloma itende e-Efesi-Damimi, phakathi kweSoko ne-Azeka." 
1Samuel17:2 USawula nama-Israyeli bahlangana bahloma itende labo emrhobeni we-Ela bazilungiselela ukuhlangabezana namaFilista. 
1Samuel17:3 AmaFilista ahlala ngaphetjheya kombundu, ama-Israyeli ahlala nganeno kombundu, bahlukaniswa mrhoba phakathi." 
1Samuel17:4 Kwaphuma itsitsirimba yekulwazo ekampeni yamaFilista, ibizo layo kunguGoliyadi weGathi. Ubude bakhe babungaba mamitha amathathu." 
1Samuel17:5 Wayethwele isikupuru sekoporo, embethe nembaji yepi enamarhururhuru wekoporo enobudisi obubalelwa kumakhilogremu amatjhumi amahlanu nalikhomba." 
1Samuel17:6 Eenyaweni afake amapatanisi wekoporo; abhebhule izenjana lekoporo. 
1Samuel17:7 Umphini womkhontwakhe wawufana nompherho womluki, kanti itlobo yakhona yayinesimbi enobudisi obumakhilogremu asithandathu. Usonkhandakhe aphethe isihlangu esikhulu akhamba phambi kwakhe." 
1Samuel17:8 UGoliyadi wehlela emrhobeni wajokolela iinqhema zama-Israyeli wathi: “Kutheni niphume imijeje kobana nilwe ipi? NgimFilista mina. Nina nimakhobokana kaSawula! Khethani indoda ezizwako sihlangane. 
1Samuel17:9 Nangabe iyakghona ukulwa nami ingirhayile, yeke sizakuba makhobokenu. Kodwana nange mina ngiyirhirizile, nina nizakuba makhobokethu nisikhonze.”" 
1Samuel17:10 UmFilista waragela phambili wathi: “Namhlanje ngiyazeyisa zoke iinqhenyana zakwa-Israyeli! Khuphani indoda ezizwako ibe yinye sihlangane.” 
1Samuel17:11 Kwathi lokha nabezwa amagama womFilista la, uSawula nama-Israyeli woke besaba khulu bathuthumela." 
1Samuel17:12 Kwaba malanga amanengi umFilista alokhu ajokola lapho ekuseni nantambama. Yeke uDavida gade ayindodana yomEfratha ekuthiwa nguJese, ogade avela eBhethe-Lehema lakwaJuda. UJese gade anamadodana abunane, kanti ngesikhathi sakaSawula wayesele aluphele khulu kobana angaphuma ipi. Amadodana amathathu amadala kaJese alandela uSawula epini: Izibulo kwakungu-Eliyabu; alanywa ngu-Abinadaba; yena alandelwa nguTjhama. UDavida bekabuphetjhani. Amadodana amathathu amakhulu ahlala noSawula, kodwana uDavida bekalokhu eza kuSawula begodu abuyele emuva ayokwelusa umhlambi kayise eBhethe-Lehema." 
1Samuel17:13 UJese wathi endodanenakhe uDavida: “Thatha upumpana wekoroyi ekhanzingiweko lo, neempani ezilitjhumi zesikwezi uzise kubafowenu ekampeni msinyazana." 
1Samuel17:14 Iintina ezilitjhumi zetjhizezi, ziphathele umphathisiqhema. Uhlole bonyana abafowenu baphethe njani bewubuye nobufakazi bona gade unabo." 
1Samuel17:15 Abafowenu banoSawula kanye nawo woke amadoda wakwa-Israyeli emrhobeni we-Ela, ukuyokulwa namaFilista.”" 
1Samuel17:16 Kwathi ekuseni uDavida watjhiya izimvu nomelusi, wathatha umthwalo wakhamba njengokutjho kwakaJese. Wafika ekampeni lokha amabutho nakathoma ukuzilungiselela ukuya evadleni, avuma ingoma yepi," 
1Samuel17:17 ngombana ama-Israyeli namaFilista begade azihlela ngeengaba zawo bona alwe. 
1Samuel17:18 UDavida watjhiya umthwalo wakhe kugadi wemithwalo wagijimela evadleni walotjhisa abafowabo. 
1Samuel17:19 Kuthe nasakhuluma nabafowabo, kwavela uGoliyadi weGathi, ikulwazo yetsitsirimba yamaFilista, waphuma esiqhemeni sakhe ajokola, akhuluma amagama anamadinyana njengemihleni. UDavida wakuzwa lokho." 
1Samuel17:20 Lokha ama-Israyeli nakabona indoda le, ethuka khulu ahlehla woke." 
1Samuel17:21 Ama-Israyeli atjelwa kwathiwa: “Niyayibona indoda ejokolako le, iphumele ukurhubutjha u-Israyeli. Umuntu ozokubulala umrhali lo ikosi izomnjingisa khulu. Begodu izamendisela indodakazayo kanti nomndeni kayise lomuntu loyo awuzukuhlawuliswa umthelo kwa-Israyeli.”" 
1Samuel17:22 UDavida wabuza amadoda agade ajame hlanu kwawo wathi: “Uzakwenzelwani umuntu ozakubulala umFilista lo bese ususa ihlazweli ku-Israyeli na? Ungubani yena umFilista ongakasoki lo bonyana angazokurhubutjha amabutho kaZimu ophilako?” 
1Samuel17:23 Amphendula uDavida amadoda la abuyekeza lokho agade akukhuluma athi: “Umuntu ozakubulala umFilista uzakwenzelwa lokhu nalokhuya.” 
1Samuel17:24 U-Eliyabu, umfowabo omdala kaDavida wezwa lokha uDavida nakhuluma namadoda lawo, wamcasukela wathi: “Ufunani lapha? Izimvu zinobani emrhuleni nawulapha nje? Ngiyakwazi bonyana ungumaqobolwana begodu unobuqili; uzele ukuzokubukela ipi nje kwaphela.”" 
1Samuel17:25 UDavida wabuza wathi: “Sengenzeni-ke gadesi? Kanti lokhu akukaqakatheki na?” 
1Samuel17:26 UDavida waya komunye umuntu, wambuza njengombana abuze ekuthomeni, yeke umuntu loyo naye wamphendula njengombana aphendulwe ekuthomeni." 
1Samuel17:27 Ikulumo kaDavida yafika eendlebeni zakaSawula. USawula wathi akabizwe. 
1Samuel17:28 UDavida wathi kuSawula: “Akungabi nomuntu onyamako ngebanga lomFilista lo; incekwakho izakwehla iyokulwa naye.” 
1Samuel17:29 USawula wathi: “Angeze wakghona ukwehla uyokulwa nomFilista loya; usesemsana, kanti yena uyitsitsirimba eyathoma ukulwa kusukela ebutjheni bayo.”" 
1Samuel17:30 Kodwana uDavida wathi kuSawula: “Incekwakho beyelusa izimvu zakayise. Bekuthi nakufika ibhubezi nanyana ibhere ithathe imvu hlangana nomhlambi," 
1Samuel17:31 ngiyilandele, ngifike ngiyisawule bese ngihlangula imvu emlonyenayo. Nayibe iyangijikela, ngiyibambe ngomphinjanayo, ngiyimadlhe phasi ngiyibulale." 
1Samuel17:32 Incekwakho ibulele iibhubezi nebhere, yeke nomFilista ongakasoki lo, uzakufana nenye yazo ngombana uhlazise amabutho kaZimu ophilako." 
1Samuel17:33 USomnini owangisindisa eqatheni lebhubezi neqatheni lebhere, uzangisindisa esandleni somFilista lo.” USawula wathi kuDavida: “Khamba, yeke uSomnini abe nawe.”" 
1Samuel17:34 USawula wembathisa uDavida izambatho zakhe zepi. Wamembathisa imbaji yepi wamthwesa nesikupuru sekoporo. 
1Samuel17:35 UDavida wabophelela isabula yakaSawula ezambathweni zepi, walinga ukukhambakhamba ngazo ngombana ubangakazijayeli. Wathi kuSawula: “Angikghoni ukukhamba ngembethe izintwezi ngombana angikazijayeli.” Yeke wazihlubula." 
1Samuel17:36 Wathatha isibhuku sakhe wasiphatha ngesandla sakhe, wakhetha amatje amahlanu nabutjhelelezi emlanjaneni, wawafaka ngesikhwameni sembadakhe yekweluseni, waphatha isarwayi sakhe ngesandla, wanqomba kumFilista." 
1Samuel17:37 UmFilista watjhidela kuDavida apeleselwa ngusonkhandakhe aphethe isihlangu esikhulu. 
1Samuel17:38 Waqala uDavida wambona amsanyana, akhanya begodu aqaleka, yeke wamnyaza." 
1Samuel17:39 Wathi kuDavida: “Ngiyinja na, uza kimi uphethe iingojwana nje?” UmFilista wathuka uDavida ngabosingazimu bakhe." 
1Samuel17:40 Wathi: “Yizapha ukuze ngiphe amadlanga nabophagana inyamakho!” 
1Samuel17:41 UDavida wathi kumFilista: “Uza kimi ngesabula nomkhonto nangezenjana, kodwana mina ngiza kuwe ngebizo lakaSomnini uMninimandlawoke, uZimu wamabutho ka-Israyeli, oweyisileko." 
1Samuel17:42 Namhlanje uSomnini uzokunikela ezandleni zami, ngizokumadlha phasi bese ngiqunta ihlokwakho. Namhlanje ngizokuthatha iindumbu zamabutho wamaFilista ngiziphe amadlanga nabophagana. Iphasi loke lizakwazi bonyana kunoZimu kwa-Israyeli." 
1Samuel17:43 Woke umuntu olapha namhlanjesi uzakwazi bonyana uSomnini akasindisi ngesabula nomkhonto kwaphela ngombana ipi ngeyakaSomnini. Nje-ke uzoninikela ezandleni zethu nokanyana nje.” 
1Samuel17:44 Kuthe lokha umFilista natjhidelako afuna ukulwa, uDavida wagijima ngebelo wanqomba evadleni wamhlangabeza." 
1Samuel17:45 Wafaka isandla ngesikhwameni sembadakhe wakhupha ilitje, walijuguja ngesarwayi walidedela, lafike lavirimeja umFilista epandla. Ilitje lamodza epandla yakhe bewarabhalala ngobuso phasi." 
1Samuel17:46 Yeke uDavida wahlula umFilista ngelitje nesarwayi; angakaphathi isabula esandleni, kodwana wamadlha phasi umFilista bewambulala." 
1Samuel17:47 UDavida wagijima wafika wajama ngehla kwakhe. Warhwatjha isabula yomFilista loyo emgodlanenayo, wamqedelela bewaqunta ihlokwakhe ngayo. Lokha amaFilista nakabona bonyana ikutana yawo ifile, ajika abeletha iinthende." 
1Samuel17:48 Amadoda wakwa-Israyeli newakwaJuda aragela phambili arhuwelela, agijimisa amaFilista awaragela ebungenweni beGathi nemasangweni we-Ekroni. Iindumbu zawo zazirhatjheke magegana nendlela yeTjharayimi ukuya eGathi ne-Ekroni." 
1Samuel17:49 Ama-Israyeli nabuya ekugijimiseni amaFilista, aphanga ikampawo." 
1Samuel17:50 (Ngemva kwesikhathi uDavida wathatha ihloko yomFilista wayiletha eJerusalema, wathatha neenhlabani zomFilista wazifaka endlinakhe.)" 
1Samuel17:51 Kwathi lokha uSawula nabona uDavida ahlangabeza umFilista, wathi ku-Abineri umphathibutho: “Abineri-ke, msakabani isokaneliya?” U-Abineri waphendula wathi: “Ngiqinisile kosi, abe angazi.”" 
1Samuel17:52 USawula wathi: “Akhe ubuze bonyana msakabani isokaneli.” 
1Samuel17:53 Kuthe lokha uDavida nabuya ukubulala umFilista, u-Abineri wamthatha wamusa kuSawula; asaphethe ihloko yomFilista." 
1Samuel17:54 USawula wambuza wathi: “Umsa kabani, sokana?” UDavida wathi: “Ngimntwana wencekwakho, uJese weBhethe-Lehema.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Kusukela mhlokho uSawula akhange asavuma bona uDavida abuyele endlini kayise kodwana wamenza bona ahlale naye. Emva kobana uDavida aqede ukukhuluma noSawula, ihliziyo kaJonathani yanamathela kuDavida ngombana wamkhathalela njengombana azikhathalela yena." 
1Samuel18:2 UJonathani wenza isivumelwano noDavida ngombana wamkhathalela njengombana azikhathelela yena. 
1Samuel18:3 UJonathani wahlubula iphuraphura ebegade ayembethe wayinikela uDavida. Wamnikela izambatho zakhe zepi, ngitjho nesabulakhe, nomsebe kanye nebhande lakhe." 
1Samuel18:4 Noma yini uSawula agade amthuma yona, uDavida wayenza ngokuphumelela okukhulu. USawula wamupha isikhundla esiphakamileko ebuthweni. Lokhu kwathabisa abantu boke ngitjho neenkhulu zakaSawula." 
1Samuel18:5 Ekubuyeni kwabantu emva kobana uDavida abulele umFilista, abafazi baphuma kiyo yoke imizi yakwa-Israyeli bona bahlangabeze ikosi uSawula ngokuvuma nokugida, ngeengoma zethabo, ngabosotjherere nangegatara yeenara ezintathu." 
1Samuel18:6 Basagida njalo gade bavuma bathi: “USawula ubulele iinkulungwana, uDavida ubulele iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi.”" 
1Samuel18:7 USawula wasilingeka khulu, ingoma egade ivunywa le yamhlabekisa. Waba nomkhumbulo othi: “Bakhakhazisa uDavida ngamatjhumi weenkulungwana kodwana mina ngeenkulungwana nje. Sekusele nje bonyana bambeke abe yikosi!”" 
1Samuel18:8 Kusukela lokho uSawula wathoma ukuqala uDavida ngokumrhonona. 
1Samuel18:9 Kwathi ngakusasa uSawula wangenwa ziinlwana, wadlharuma njengehlanya esigodlweni sakhe. UDavida wabetha iharibha njengombana gade asenza emihleni. USawula gade aphethe umkhontwakhe ngesandla," 
1Samuel18:10 wawuphosa ngamandla azitjela athi: “Ngifuna ukuhlaba uDavida ngimhlanganise neboda.” Kodwana uDavida waphepha bekwaba kabili. 
1Samuel18:11 USawula gade esaba uDavida ngombana uSomnini gade anoDavida kodwana amtjhiyile uSawula. 
1Samuel18:12 Ngebangelo wasusa uDavida eduze kwakhe, wambeka induna yekulungwana yabantu. UDavida warhola amajoni ejimeni lawo." 
1Samuel18:13 Ezintweni zoke agade azenza uDavida waphumelela khulu ngombana uSomnini gade anaye. 
1Samuel18:14 Lokha uSawula nabona indlela uDavida aphumelela ngayo, wamesaba ukudlula." 
1Samuel18:15 Kodwana u-Israyeli woke noJuda bamthanda uDavida ngombana wabarhola emajimenabo. 
1Samuel18:16 Yeke uSawula wathi kuDavida: “Nangu uMerabi indodakazami elizibulo, ngizakwendisela yena abemkakho; kwaphela ngisebenzela ngesibindi ulwe izipi zakaSomnini uZimakho.” USawula wazitjela wathi: “Angingasibeki isandla sami phezu kwakhe, akube maFilista ambulalako.”" 
1Samuel18:17 Kodwana uDavida wathi kuSawula: “Ngingubani mina begodu uyini umndeni wekhethu namkha ikoro kababa kwa-Israyeli, bonyana ngibe mkhwenyana wekosi na?”" 
1Samuel18:18 Kwathi nakufika isikhathi sokobana uMerabi indodakazi kaSawula anikelwe uDavida, wendiselwa u-Adriyeli wakwaMerhola." 
1Samuel18:19 Kwathi kusesenjalo uMikali indodakazi kaSawula wakarwa nguDavida. USawula wathaba lokha nabamtjela ngalokho," 
1Samuel18:20 wacabanga wathi: “Ngizomendisela yena, ngaleyondlela uzakugadanga isifu ukuze isandla samaFilista sibe phezu kwakhe.” Nje-ke uSawula wathi kuDavida: “Unethuba lesibili lokobana ube mkhwenyanami.”" 
1Samuel18:21 Alo-ke uSawula wabiza iinceku zakhe wathi: “Khulumani noDavida ngemsitheleni nithi, ‘Qala ndoda, ikosi izwana nawe, neenceku zayo zoke ziyakuthanda. Yeke yiba mkhwenyanayo.’ ”" 
1Samuel18:22 Iinceku zazinande zikhobelela uDavida. Kodwana uDavida wathi: “Enjephana ukuba mkhwenyana wekosi yintwana encancani ngokucabanga kwenu na? Mina ngisichakana begodu angaziwa kangako.” 
1Samuel18:23 Lokha iinceku zakaSawula zimtjela bonyana uDavida utheni," 
1Samuel18:24 uSawula waphendula wathi: “Yenithi kuDavida, ‘Ikosi ifuna ukuzibuyiselela ezitheni zayo, nje-ke abe ayifuni ilitho elingako elililobolo ngomlobokazi ngaphandle kwamajwabu alikhulu wamaFilista.’ ” USawula gade anethemba lokobana uDavida uzakuwela ezandleni zamaFilista." 
1Samuel18:25 Kuthe lokha iinceku zibikela uDavida iindabezi, zamthabisa kwaba kuhle kuye bonyana abe mkhwenyana wekosi. Yeke uDavida akhange asalinda bona iphole," 
1Samuel18:26 waphuma nabantu bakhe wabulala amakhulu amabili wamaFilista. Waletha amajwabawo wawabeka aphelele phambi kwakaSawula ukuze abe mkhwenyanakhe. USawula wamendisela uMikali indodakazakhe bona abe mkakhe. 
1Samuel18:27 Lokha uSawula alemuka bona uSomnini unoDavida nokuthi uMikali indodakazakhe uthanda uDavida," 
1Samuel18:28 kwaba khona amesaba khulu gadesi begodu waba sisitha sakhe ipilwakhe yoke. 
1Samuel18:29 Iinduna zamaFilista zaragela phambili nokulwa no-Israyeli; kodwana ngesikhathi soke uDavida gade aphumelela ukuzihlula ukudlula iinkhulu zakaSawula. Ngebangelo ibizo lakhe laduma khulu. 
1Samuel19:1 USawula watjela indodanakhe uJonathani kanye nazo zoke iinceku bona kubulawe uDavida. Ngebanga lokobana uJonathani gade akhathalela khulu uDavida 
1Samuel19:2 wamlemukisa wathi: “Ubaba, uSawula, ufuna ithuba lokobona akubulale. Uzeluse-ke kusasa ekuseni; ufunyane indawo esithekileko ubhace lapho." 
1Samuel19:3 Mina ngizakuphuma nobaba siye emmangweni hlanu kwalapha ukhona. Ngizakukhuluma naye ngawe, ngimuzwe bona uthini bese ngiyakubikela-ke.”" 
1Samuel19:4 UJonathani wancengela uDavida kuyise uSawula wathi: “Ubaba yikosi, yeke akangenzi okumbi encekwinakhe uDavida; akhange one ubaba, akwenzileko kwenze nobaba wazuza khulu." 
1Samuel19:5 Ipilwakhe beyisengozini lokha nabulala umFilista. USomnini wasindisa woke u-Israyeli ngokuhlula okukhulu begodu ubaba wakubona lokho bewathaba. UDavida umsulwa. Alo, kubayini-ke ubaba afune ukuphalaza iingazi ezinganamlandu ngokumbulala na?”" 
1Samuel19:6 USawula walalela uJonathani bewafunga wathi: “Mncwi, uSomnini uyangizwa, uDavida angeze asabulawa.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Nje-ke, uJonathani wabiza uDavida wamdembela koke. UJonathani wabe waletha uDavida kuSawula; uDavida waba noSawula njengemihleni yangaphambili." 
1Samuel19:8 Kwabuya kwaqubuka ipi godu, waphuma uDavida walwa namaFilista. Wabarhadla okurara khulu bebambalekela." 
1Samuel19:9 Kodwana uSawula wavukwa ziinlwana, asazihlalele esigodlweni sakhe aphethe umkhonto ngesandla. UDavida yena gade abetha iharibhakhe." 
1Samuel19:10 USawula walinga ukumphundluselela ebodeni ngomkhonto, kodwana uDavida waphepha, umkhonto waphundlusa iboda. Ngobusukobo uDavida wabaleka esigodlweni waphunyurha." 
1Samuel19:11 USawula wathumela amadoda endlini kaDavida bona ayoyigada kuthi ekuseni ambulale. Kodwana uMikali umkaDavida wamyelelisa wathi: “Nawungabalekiko ebusukwini banamhlanjesi, kusasa uzokubulawa.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Nje-ke uMikali wakhupha uDavida wamehlisa ngefesidere, wabaleka wasinda." 
1Samuel19:13 UMikali wathatha isithombesibunjwa esinguzinyana wekhaya wasilalisa embhedeni, wasembesa ngengubo bewabeka uboya bembuzi ngeenhloko." 
1Samuel19:14 Kuthe lokha uSawula nakathumela amadoda bona ayokubamba uDavida, uMikali wathi: “Uyagula.”" 
1Samuel19:15 USawula wabuye wathumela amadoda kuDavida bona ayombona wawayala wathi: “Nize naye kimapha ngombhedakhe lowo ukuze ngimbulale.” 
1Samuel19:16 Kodwana kwathi lokha amadoda nangenako, qala naso isithombe silele embhedeni, ngeenhloko zaso kunoboya bembuzi!" 
1Samuel19:17 USawula wathi kuMikali: “Kubayini ungikhohlise kangaka bewusindise isitha sami ngokusibalekisa na?” UMikali wathi kuye: “Uthe kimi, ‘Yewungilise ngibaleke, nakungasinjalo ngiyakubulala.’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 UDavida sele abalekile bewasinda, waya kuSamyela eRama wafese wamtjela koke uSawula akwenze kuye. Yena noSamyela bakhamba bayokuhlala endlini yabaphorofidi." 
1Samuel19:19 Kweza ilizwi kuSawula lathi: “UDavida usendlini yabaphorofidi eRama.” 
1Samuel19:20 Nje-ke uSawula wathuma amadoda bona ayombamba. Kodwana kwathi nababona isiqubuthu sabaphorofidi sisemmoyeni, noSamyela alapho njengomkhokhelaso, uMoya kaZimu wehlela phezu kwamadoda abuya kuSawula, nawo aba semmoyeni." 
1Samuel19:21 Kuthe bona uSawula atjelwe ngalokho, wathumela amanye amadoda, nawo aba semmoyeni. USawula wathumela amanye ihlandla lesithathu, nawo kwaba ngisweso." 
1Samuel19:22 Ekugcineni, waziyela yena ngenyama eRama. Lokha nakafika emthonjeni omkhulu weSekhu, wabuza wathi: “Baphi aboSamyela noDavida na?” Bamphendula bathi: “Basendlini yabaphorofidi eRama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 USawula waya endlini yabaphorofidi eRama. UMoya kaZimu wehlela naphezu kwakhe, wakhamba asemmoyeni bewayokufika endlini yabaphorofidi." 
1Samuel19:24 Naye wahlubula izambatho zakhe waba semmoyeni phambi kwakaSamyela. Walala ahlubule imini leyo yoke nobusuku bakhona. Kungebangelo isiga sithi: “Kanti uSawula naye uhlangana nabaphorofidi na?” 
1Samuel20:1 UDavida wabaleka endlini yabaphorofidi eRama waya kuJonathani, wafese wabuza wathi: “Kanti ngenzeni? Umlandwami uyini? Ngimone ngani ubabakho ukuze afune ukungibulala na?”" 
1Samuel20:2 UJonathani waphendula wathi: “Nakanye! Awukazukufa! Ngiyathembisa akunalitho ubaba alenzako, nanyana likhulu nanyana lincani angakangitjeli. Alo, ubaba uzabe ayifihlelani indaba le kimi na? Akunanto enjalo.”" 
1Samuel20:3 UDavida wathi: “NgoZimu uqinisile, ubabakho uyazi bona ngiyathandeka kuwe, nje-ke uzitjele wathi, ‘UJonathani akakafaneli akwazi lokhu ngombana angaphatheka kumbi.’ Nokho ngiqinisile ngithi uSomnini uyangizwa, phila ngiphile, ngisemlonyeni wokufa.”" 
1Samuel20:4 UJonathani wathi kuDavida: “Alo-ke ungathanda bona ngikwenzeleni?” 
1Samuel20:5 UDavida wathi: “Qala, kusasa lilanga lomgidi wokuthwasa kwenyezi, kufanele ngihlale esidlweni kanye nekosi. Yeke ngivumela bona ngiyokubhaca emmangweni bekube lilanga laphambi kwakusasa ntambama." 
1Samuel20:6 Nange ubabakho angabona bona angikho, umtjele uthi, ‘UDavida ungirabhele khulu bona ngimvumele arhabele eBhethe-Lehema emzinekhabo ngombana ikoro yekhabo yoke inomhlatjelo womnyaka.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Nangabe uthi, ‘Awa kulungile,’ khona umkhozakho uzabe aphephile. Kodwana nange angasilingeka, yazi-ke nawe bona unqophe ukungilimaza." 
1Samuel20:8 Ngebanga lesithembiso owasenza phambi kwakaSomnini, umkhozakho ubopheleke kuwe. Yeke nange kunento embi engiyenzileko, yewungisize ungibulale wena. Ngiyakubawa, unganginikeli ezandleni zakababakho.”" 
1Samuel20:9 UJonathani wathi: “Awa, angeze ngakwenza lokho kuwe! Nangabe bekukhona okumbi engikwaziko ubaba akunqophe ngawe, bengizokwazisa nakanjani.”" 
1Samuel20:10 UDavida wabuza wathi: “Ngubani ozongazisa nakube ubabakho uphendula ngokuhluthuka na?” 
1Samuel20:11 UJonathani wathi: “Iza, namba siphume siye emmangweni.” Bakhamba-ke bobabili baya emmangweni." 
1Samuel20:12 UJonathani wathi kuDavida: “Ngiyakuthembisa phambi kwakaSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ngesikhathesi phambi kwakusasa, ngizakubuzisisa kubaba ngawe. Nangabe uyakwamukela ngizakuthumelela ilizwi ngikwazise." 
1Samuel20:13 Kodwana nangabe ubaba unqophe ukukulimaza, ngizakwazisa bengiqinisekise bonyana ukhamba uphephile. Nange ngingenzi njalo uSomnini akangibulale. “USomnini uzakuba nawe njengombana abe nobaba." 
1Samuel20:14 Nangisaphilako, yiba nomusa kimi njengombana noSomnini anomusa kuwe ukuze ngingabulawa." 
1Samuel20:15 Lokha uSomnini asusa zoke izitha zakho ephasini, yiba nesisa endlinami nawusaphilako.”" 
1Samuel20:16 UJonathani wenza isivumelwano nendlu kaDavida wathi: “USomnini uzamhlunguphaza ongagcini isibopho lesi.” 
1Samuel20:17 UJonathani wenza uDavida bona abuye afunge bonyana uzakwethembeka, amkhathelele njengombana azikhathelela yena." 
1Samuel20:18 Yeke wathi uJonathani kuDavida: “Kusasa lilanga lomgidi wokuthwasa kwenyezi. Uzokukhunjulwa ngombana isihlalo sakho sizobe singanamuntu. 
1Samuel20:19 Phambi kwakusasa ntambama, iya endaweni owazifihla kiyo phambilini, ulinde elitjeni i-Ezeli." 
1Samuel20:20 Ngizakudumuza imisubi emithathu ngehlangothini lalo, kubesengathi nginqophise entweni." 
1Samuel20:21 Ngizakuthumela umsana bese ngithi kuye, ‘Khamba uyokufuna imisubi leya.’ Lokha nangithi kuye, ‘Naso imisubi inganeno kwakho, yiza nayo la,’ ungaphuma-ke ngombana kuphephile. NgoZimu ngiqinisile akunangozi." 
1Samuel20:22 Kodwana nangithi emsaneni, ‘Imisubi ingale kwakho!’ Yewukhambe ngombana uZimu ukutjhaphululile." 
1Samuel20:23 Mayelana nesithembiso esisenzilekwesiya, khumbula bonyana uSomnini ungufakazi phakathi kwami nawe isiphelani.”" 
1Samuel20:24 UDavida wazifihla emmangweni. Ngelanga lomgidi wokuthwasa kwenyezi, ikosi uSawula yahlala phasi bona igome." 
1Samuel20:25 Yahlala endaweni engebodeni njengesiko layo, yalungana noJonathani, u-Abineri ahlezi hlanu kwayo; kodwana indawo kaDavida beyinganamuntu." 
1Samuel20:26 USawula akhange atjho ilitho mhlokho ngombana waba nomkhumbulo othi: “Ikhona into esilapheleko eyenze uDavida angezi emgidini. Iye, kutjho bona usilaphele.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Kwathi ngelanga elilandelako, ilanga lesibili enyangeni, indawo kaDavida yatlhoga umuntu godu. USawula wabuza indodanakhe uJonathani wathi: “Kubayini umsa kaJese angakhange eze ekudleni izolo nanamhlanjesi na?”" 
1Samuel20:28 UJonathani waphendula wathi: “UDavida ungibawile warabhela bona ngimvumele aye eBhethe-Lehema. 
1Samuel20:29 Wathi, ‘Yithi ngikhambe ngombana ikoro yekhethu inomhlatjelo emzinekhethu, nje-ke umnakwethu ungibawe bona ngibe khona. Nakulungileko kuwe, ithi ngikhambe ngiyokubona abafowethu.’ Kungebangelo angakezi etafuleni lekosi.”" 
1Samuel20:30 USawula wasilingekela uJonathani bewathi kuye: “Wena sidlhadlha somsana ndina! Udlumbana angazi bona sewukhethe ukukhambisana nomsa kaJese! Lokho kuzakuba lihlazo lakho neenhloni zakanyoko owakubelethako! 
1Samuel20:31 Nakusaphila umsa kaJese ephasinapha, uzasoloko ayingozi kuwe nembuswenakho. Akalethwe njenganje kimapha, kumele afe!”" 
1Samuel20:32 UJonathani wabuza uyise uSawula wathi: “Kanti ubulawelani? Wenzeni?” 
1Samuel20:33 Kodwana uSawula wamjikijela ngomkhonto bona ambulale. UJonathani walemuka bona uyise gade anqophe ukubulala uDavida. 
1Samuel20:34 UJonathani wasikima etafuleni asilingeke khulu, akhange agome mhlokho ngombana gade akhubekile ngepatho eziinhloni uyise aphatha ngayo uDavida." 
1Samuel20:35 Ekuseni ngakusasa uJonathani wakhamba nomsana emmangweni bona ahlangane noDavida. 
1Samuel20:36 Wathi emsaneni: “Gijima uyokuqala imisubi engiyidumuzako.” Umsana asagijima wadumuza umsubela ngaphambi kwakhe. 
1Samuel20:37 Kuthe lokha umsana nafika lapha umsubela kaJonathani uwele khona, uJonathani wamrhuwelela wathi: “Umsubela awusingaphambi kwakho na?”" 
1Samuel20:38 Warhuwelela godu wathi: “Rhaba! Ungariyadi!” Umsana wadobha umsubela wabuyela ekosinakhe. 
1Samuel20:39 Umsana gade angazi litho ngalokhu; nguJonathani noDavida kwaphela egade bazi. 
1Samuel20:40 UJonathani wanikela umsana iinhlabano zakhe wathi: “Zithathe ukhambe ubuyele nazo emzini.” 
1Samuel20:41 Emva kobana umsana akhambile, uDavida wasikima ngemva kwelitje waguqa wakhothama kathathu phambi kwakaJonathani. Base bayangana balila bobabili, kufikela lapha uDavida acola khona." 
1Samuel20:42 UJonathani wathi kuDavida: “Khamba uphephile kwanjesi ngombana sifunge ubuhlobo phakathi kwethu sobabili ebizweni lakaSomnini sathi, ‘USomnini ungufakazi phakathi kwami nawe, naphakathi kwesizukulwani sami nesakho isiphelani.’ ” Wakhamba-ke uDavida, noJonathani wabuyela emzinekhabo." 
1Samuel21:1 UDavida watjhinga eNobi ku-Arhimeleki umphristi. U-Arhimeleki wabethwa livalo nahlangana naye, wabe wabuza wathi: “Alo, kubayini ube wedwa, unganamkhambisani na?”" 
1Samuel21:2 UDavida waphendula u-Arhimeleki umphristi wathi: “Ikosi, uSawula ingiphe umyalo beyathi kimi, ‘Kungabi nomuntu owaziko bona ngikuthumeni nokuthi ngikuyale ngathini.’ Amadoda engikhamba nawo ngiwatjele bona angihlangabeze endaweni ethileko." 
1Samuel21:3 Alo, ungiphatheleni egonywako? Yewungiphe iimpani ezihlanu zesikwa, nanyana yini ongayifunyana.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Kodwana umphristi waphendula uDavida wathi: “Anginaso isikwa esijayelekileko, nokho kukhona izikwa zethempeli kwaphela. Ungazifumana kwaphela nakube amadoda lawo azahlukanisile ebafazini ngokwamabhayi.”" 
1Samuel21:5 UDavida wathi kumphristi: “Iye, vane sizahlukanise nabafazi ngokujayelekileko lokha nasiya epini. Imizimba yamadoda ayinasici nanyana singayi epini. Kangangani-ke nakube ikhambo liqakatheke njengelanamhlanje!”" 
1Samuel21:6 Umphristi wamnikela izikwa zethempeli ngombana bezingekho ezinye ngaphandle kwalezo ezisuswe etafuleni lakaSomnini nakubekwa ezitjha. 
1Samuel21:7 Mhlokho enye yeenceku zakaSawula gade isethempelini ngamabanga athileko. Ibizo layo bekunguDowegi umEdomu. Yona beyiyinduna yabelusi bakaSawula. 
1Samuel21:8 UDavida wabuza u-Arhimeleki wathi: “Awunamkhonto namkha isabula kuwapho na? Akhange ngize nesabula nanyana ngisiphi seenhlabano zami ngombana iindaba zekosi bezirhabekile.” 
1Samuel21:9 Umphristi waphendula wathi: “Isabula kaGoliyadi umFilista, owambulala emrhobeni we-Ela, ikhona. Isongwe ngetjhila ngemva kwe-efodi. Nawuyifunako ithathe ngombana ayikho enye ngaphandle kwaleyo.” UDavida wathi: “Ayikho enjengayo; nginikela yona.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Mhlokho uDavida wabalekela uSawula waya ku-Akhitjhi ikosi yeGathi. 
1Samuel21:11 Iinsebenzi zaka-Akhitjhi zathi kuye: “AkusinguDavida ikosi yenarha lo na? Akusuye, abafazi abakhalele ngaye nabagidako bathi, “ ‘USawula ubulele iinkulungwana, uDavida ubulele iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi.’ ”" 
1Samuel21:12 Kuthe uDavida nacabanga amezwi la, wesaba khulu u-Akhitjhi ikosi yeGathi." 
1Samuel21:13 Yeke wazenza kwanga uphambene phambi kwabo. Warhuhla amabadi wesango ngamazipho, wawuluka neendenda esilevini, waba sengathi lihlanya." 
1Samuel21:14 U-Akhitjhi wathi eensebenzini zakhe: “Qalani umuntu lo! Uphambene! Nimlethelani kimapha na? 
1Samuel21:15 Nicabanga bonyana ngifuna amahlanya bona ningangilethela umuntu ozanande agila imikhuba phambi kwamapha na? Nimfunisani umuntu onje esigodlweni samesi?” 
1Samuel22:1 UDavida wasuka eGathi wayokubhaca erholweni le-Adulamu. Kwathi bona abomnakwabo nebekhabo bezwe ngalokho, behlela kuye khonapho." 
1Samuel22:2 Boke ebegade basemtlhagweni, eenkolodweni neenghonghoyilweni bakghubelelana kuye, waba mrholabo. Bekungaba babantu abamakhulu amane." 
1Samuel22:3 Kusukela lapho uDavida waya eMitsiphe kwaMowabi, wafese wathi ekosini yakhona: “Bewungeze wavumela ubaba nomma bona bagugubale nawe lapha, bengizwisise bona uZimu ufuna ukungenzelani na?”" 
1Samuel22:4 Nje-ke wabatjhiya nekosi yakwaMowabi, bahlala nayo isikhathi soke yena agade asabhace ngaso eentabeni." 
1Samuel22:5 Kodwana umphorofidi uGadi wathi kuDavida: “Ungahlali eentabenapha. Khamba uye enarheni yakwaJuda.” Wasuka-ke uDavida waya ehlathini leRhereti. 
1Samuel22:6 USawula wezwa bona kuyaziwa bonyana uDavida nabantu bakhe bakuphi. USawula wahlala ngaphasi komuthi womtamariski aphethe umkhontwakhe entatjaneni yeGibeya, zoke iinkhulu zakhe zazijamile zimzombile." 
1Samuel22:7 USawula wathi kizo: “Lalelani, madoda wakwaBhenjamini! Nicabanga bona umsa kaJese uzaninikela noke nje amasimu neemvande zediribe? Uzanenza noke nje bona nibe ziinduna zeenkulungwana neenduna zamakhulu na?" 
1Samuel22:8 Kungebangelo noke nenze isibopho sokujamelana nami na? Akakho noyedwa ongitjelako lokha indodanami yenza isivumelwano nomsa kaJese. Akakho noyedwa kinapha otjhejako ngami nanyana angitjele bona indodanami itjitjizele incekwami bona ingilalele endleleni njengombana yenza namhlanje.” 
1Samuel22:9 Nje-ke uDowegi umEdomu ogade ajame neenkhulu zakaSawula wathi: “Ngiyibonile indodana kaJese ifika ku-Arhimeleki umsa ka-Arhithubi eNobi. 
1Samuel22:10 U-Arhimeleki wayibuzela kuSomnini bona ifanele yenze njani. Wayipha nomphako nesabula kaGoliyadi umFilista.” 
1Samuel22:11 Ikosi uSawula yathumela bona kubizwe umphristi u-Arhimeleki umsa ka-Arhithubi nendlu kayise yoke, ebekubaphristi beNobi. Boke beza ekosini uSawula." 
1Samuel22:12 USawula wathi: “Nje-ke lalela wena msa ka-Arhithubi.” Yena wathi: “Iye kosami, ngilalele.”" 
1Samuel22:13 USawula wathi kuye: “Kubayini wenze isibopho ngami ninomsa kaJese? Umuphe izikwa nesabula, bewambuzela kuZimu ukuze angihlubuke, abe ngongilalela endleleni njengombana enzile namhlanjesi?”" 
1Samuel22:14 U-Arhimeleki waphendula wathi: “Awu kosami, ngubani eencekwini zoke zekosi othembeke njengoDavida umkhwenyana wekosi, induna yamabutho agada ikosi, nohlonipheke kangaka esigodlweni soke sekosi?" 
1Samuel22:15 Nokho bebekungathomi mhlokha bona ngimbuzele kuZimu. Iye awa, bengingathomi! Ikosi ayingabeki incekwayo nanyana indlu kayise umlandu ngombana inceku yekosi ayazi litho ngendaba le.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Kodwana uSawula wathi: “Ngiqinisile uzokufa Arhimeleki, wena nendlu kayihlo yoke!”" 
1Samuel22:17 USawula walayela abogadi ebebajame hlanu kwakhe wathi: “Bulalani abaphristi bakaSomninaba ngombana nabo bahlangene noDavida! Bebazi bonyana uyabaleka, kodwana akhange bangitjele.” Kodwana iinkhulu ezinye zakaSawula akhange zithande ukuphakamisa isandla phezu kwabaphristi bakaSomnini." 
1Samuel22:18 Yeke uSawula walayela uDowegi wathi: “Rhayila abaphristaba!” UDowegi umEdomu waphendukela kibo wabarhayila. Mhlokho wabulala amadoda amatjhumi abunane nahlanu embatha iphuraphura yobuphristi. 
1Samuel22:19 Waragela phambili wasahlela neNobi umuzi wabaphristi. Amadoda nabafazi, abantwana namasana, iinkomo, abodumbana nezimvu kwabulawa ngesabula." 
1Samuel22:20 Kodwana u-Abiyatari, umsa ka-Arhimeleki omsa ka-Arhithubi, wasinda bewabaleka bona ayokuhlangana noDavida." 
1Samuel22:21 Wafese watjela uDavida bona uSawula ubulele abaphristi bakaSomnini. 
1Samuel22:22 Nje-ke uDavida wathi ku-Abiyatari: Mhlokha, mhlana uDowegi umEdomu asethempelini, ngazile bona uzokwenza ngakho koke bona atjele uSawula. Ngimi onomlandu wokufa kwayo yoke indlu kayihlo." 
1Samuel22:23 Hlala nami, ungesabi. Umuntu ofuna ubuphilo bakho ufuna mina. Uphephile nawunami." 
1Samuel23:1 Kwafika umbiko kuDavida wathi: “Qala, amaFilista asahlela iKeyila aphanga nezelelo.”" 
1Samuel23:2 UDavida wabuza kuSomnini wathi: “Ngiwasahlele amaFilista lawo na?” USomnini wamphendula wathi: “Khamba, usahlele amaFilista usindise iKeyila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Kodwana abantu bakaDavida bathi kuye: “Qala sisengozini kwaJudapha, kangangani-ke nakube sizakuya eKeyila siyokusahlela ibutho lamaFilista?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Godu uDavida wabuza kuSomnini, uSomnini wamphendula wathi: “Yehlela eKeyila ngombana ngizowanikela esandleni sakho amaFilista.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Yeke uDavida nabantu bakhe baya eKeyila, basahlela amaFilista bawabhubhisa ngokurhayila okukhulu, bebathumba nefuywabo, wasindisa abantu beKeyila." 
1Samuel23:6 USawula wabikelwa bona uDavida wehlele eKeyila, yeke wacabanga wathi: “UZimu umkhaphele esandleni sami ngombana uziphekelele yena ngokungena emzini ngamasango anesiqabo.” USawula wazisa woke amabuthwakhe bona ehlele eKeyila kusahlelwe uDavida nabantu bakhe. Kwathi bona uDavida ezwe ukuthi uSawula useqhingeni lokumsahlela, wathi ku-Abiyatari umphristi: “Letha i-efodi lapha.” U-Abiyatari umsa ka-Arhimeleki gade ehle ne-efodi lokha nabalekela kuDavida eKeyila." 
1Samuel23:7 UDavida wathandaza wathi: “Maye Somnini, Zimu ka-Israyeli! Incekwakho izwile kwamambala bona uSawula uluka iqhinga lokuza eKeyila bona arhayile umuzi ngebanga lami." 
1Samuel23:8 Izakhamuzi zeKeyila zizangikhaphela kuye na? USawula uzokwehla njengombana incekwakho izwile na? Awu Somnini, Zimu ka-Israyeli, phendula incekwakho!” USomnini wathi: “Uzokuza uSawula.”" 
1Samuel23:9 Godu uDavida wabuza wathi: “Ingabe izakhamuzi zeKeyila zizongikhaphela nabantu bami kuSawula na?” USomnini wathi: “Bazokukhaphela.” 
1Samuel23:10 Yeke uDavida nabantu abangaba makhulu asithandathu ngesibalo, basuka eKeyila bakhamba indawo ngeendawo. Lokha uSawula nakezwa bona uDavida usukile eKeyila, akhange asaya khona." 
1Samuel23:11 UDavida wahlala eendaweni eziphephileko zommango neentatjaneni zerhalawumba leZifu. USawula ubemzuma ilanga nelanga, kodwana uZimu akhange amnikele ezandleni zakhe." 
1Samuel23:12 UDavida walemuka bona uSawula uphumele ukumbulala. Lokha uDavida aseRhoretjha erhalawumbeni leZifu," 
1Samuel23:13 uJonathani umsa kaSawula weza kuye bona amsekele aqine amandla kuZimu. 
1Samuel23:14 Wathi: “Ungesabi Davida, ubaba, uSawula, angeze asibeka isandla phezu kwakho. Uzokuba yikosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli; mina ngibe ngaphasi kwakho. Ngitjho nobaba uSawula uyakwazi lokho.”" 
1Samuel23:15 Benza isivumelwano bobabili phambi kwakaSomnini. UJonathani wagoduka, kodwana uDavida wasala eRhoretjha." 
1Samuel23:16 AmaZifu akhuphukela kuSawula eGibeya afese athi: “Angithi nguDavida obhace hlangana nathi ngeendaweni eziphephileko zeRhoretjha? Uphezu kweentatjana zeRhakila, ngesewula yerhalawumba leJetjhimoni?" 
1Samuel23:17 Nje-ke kosi, yehla nanyana nini nakukuhle kuwe, kuzakuba ngithi esimnikela ekosini.”" 
1Samuel23:18 USawula waphendula wathi: “USomnini anibusise ngokutshwenyeka kwenu ngami. 
1Samuel23:19 Buyelani emuva, niqinisekise bonyana nifunyana bona uDavida ukhambelaphi begodu ngubani ovane ambone lapho. Ngitjelwe bona unamaqhinga khulu." 
1Samuel23:20 Qinisekisani bona nazi zoke iindawo abhaca kizo bese niyabuya nizongitjela indaba enetlha. Ngizabe ngikhamba nani nakube usendaweni leyo, ngimthungathe hlangana nemindeni yoke yakwaJuda.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Baphuma-ke babuyela eZifu. USawula wabalandela muva. UDavida nabantu bakhe bebaserhalawumbeni leMawoni, emrhobeni we-Araba engesewula yerhalawumba leJetjhimoni." 
1Samuel23:22 USawula nabantu bakhe bathoma ukuphenya, kwathi lokha uDavida atjelwako ngalokho wehla, wahlala emadwaleni erhalawumbeni leMawoni. Lokha uSawula ezwa lokho, wehlela ngerhalawumbeni leMawoni alandelela uDavida." 
1Samuel23:23 USawula gade agega ngehlangothini elinye lamadwala, uDavida nabantu bakhe angakelinye ihlangothi, arhabile bona agadunge uSawula. Kwathi lokha uSawula nebutho lakhe sele babandamele bona babambe uDavida nabantu bakhe," 
1Samuel23:24 kwafika isithunywa kuSawula sathi: “Yewize masinyana! AmaFilista athelekela inarha.” 
1Samuel23:25 Yeke uSawula walisa ukulandelela uDavida, wajika bona ayokuqalana namaFilista. Kungebangelo babiza indawo leyo ngokuthi, Lidwala Lokwahlukanisa." 
1Samuel23:26 UDavida wasuka lapho wayokubhaca eentabeni ze-Eni-Gedi. 
1Samuel24:1 USawula selabuyile ekuqotheni amaFilista, kwathiwa kuye: “UDavida useentabeni ze-Eni-Gedi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Yeke uSawula wathatha iinkulungwana ezintathu zamadoda akhethwe kibo boke bakwa-Israyeli, waphuma bona ayokuqala uDavida nabantu bakhe eduze kwamaDwalepunzi." 
1Samuel24:3 USawula wafika esibayeni sezimvu eqadi kwendlela, bekunerholo lapho, wangena khona wazithuma. UDavida nabantu bakhe bebangaphakathi kwerholwelo!" 
1Samuel24:4 Abantu bakaDavida bathi kuye: “Namhlanje kunamhlanje! Angithi uSomnini utjhwile kuwe wathi, ‘Ngizakunikela isitha sakho esandleni bona wenze njengokuthanda kwakho.’ ” Yeke uDavida wasikima, wakhukhutha, wafese watsepunya umphetho wephuraphura kaSawula." 
1Samuel24:5 Emva kwalokho uDavida wabethwa sisazela sokutsepunya umphetho wephuraphura kaSawula. 
1Samuel24:6 Wathi ebantwini bakhe: “USomnini akavumi bona ngenze into enje ekosinami, umzeswa kaSomnini, nanyana ngiphakamise isandla sami kiyo ngombana imzeswa kaSomnini.”" 
1Samuel24:7 UDavida wakhalimela abantu bakhe ngokuncama. Akhange abavumele bona bathinte uSawula. USawula nasikimako aphuma ngerholweni 
1Samuel24:8 uDavida waphumisana naye khonokho wamlandela. Wamrhuwelela wathi: “Bayede, kosi!” USawula naqala emuva, uDavida waguqa wahloma ihloko phasi." 
1Samuel24:9 Wathi kuSawula: “Kosami, kubayini ulalele abantu lokha nabathi, ‘UDavida ufuna ukukulimaza?’" 
1Samuel24:10 Namhlanjesi uzibonele ngawakho bona uZimu ukusindise njani ezandleni zami ngerholweni. Abantu bami bangihlohlozele bona ngikubulale, kodwana mina ngakubabalela. Ngathi kibo, ‘Angizusiphakamisa isandla sami ekosinami ngombana imzeswa kaSomnini.’" 
1Samuel24:11 Ubaba akaqale, naku umphetho wephuraphurakhe esandleni sami! Ngitsepunye umphetho wephuraphura kababa nokho ubaba ngangambulala. Ubaba uyabona-ke bona anginantwembi namkha ikani kuye. Akhange ngikone baba, kodwana ubaba uzumana nepilwami." 
1Samuel24:12 UZimu akabe mgwebi phakathi kwethu. Mhlamunye yena angangibuyiselela kubaba ngalokho akwenze kimi, kodwana mina angeze ngambeka isandla ubaba." 
1Samuel24:13 Angithi ikulumo yabadala ithi, ‘Ziinkhohlakali zodwa ezenza ubukhohlakali’? Yeke mina angeze ngambeka isandla ubaba." 
1Samuel24:14 Kuhlekuhle ikosi yakwa-Israyeli izumana nobani? Ilandelelene nenja efileko, itsetse nje!" 
1Samuel24:15 UZimu uzakuba mgwebi phakathi kwethu abe akhombe onomlandu. Ngebanga lokobana ubona koke, uzakujamela indabami angitjhaphulule kubaba.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Kwathi bona uDavida aqede ukutjho lokho, uSawula wabuza wathi: “Davida ndodanami, lilizwi lakho lelo na?” Wakhihla isililokazi," 
1Samuel24:17 wathi: “Ulunge khulu kunami ngombana wangiphatha kuhle, kodwana mina ngakuphatha kumbi." 
1Samuel24:18 Ukhombisile khona nje bona awunantwembi ngami: USomnini bekanginikele esandleni sakho kodwana akhange ungibulale. 
1Samuel24:19 Abasibangaki abantu abangathi sele babambe isitha sabo ngezandla basilise sikhambe siphephile. Kwanga uSomnini angakuhlomulisa khulu ngendlela ongiphethe ngayo namhlanje. 
1Samuel24:20 Sengiyazi bona ngambala uzokuba yikosi begodu umbuso wakwa-Israyeli uzokunzinza ezandleni zakho. 
1Samuel24:21 Nje-ke funga bona ngoSomnini awuzukubhubhisa iinzukulwani zami namkha uphelise ibizo lami endlini kababa.” 
1Samuel24:22 UDavida wafunga-ke kuSawula. USawula wabuyela ekhaya kodwana uDavida nabantu bakhe bakhuphukela eentabeni. 
1Samuel25:1 USamyela wahlongakala, u-Israyeli woke wabuthana wazomlilela. Bambulunga ekhabo eRama. UDavida wehlela erhalawumbeni leParani." 
1Samuel25:2 EMawoni kwakunendoda enjinge khulu, inepahla godu eKarameli. Beyinekulungwana yeembuzi, neenkulungwana ezintathu zezimvu. Gade irhuna izimvu eKarameli." 
1Samuel25:3 Ibizo layo bekunguNabhali, amKhalebi; ibizo lomkakhe lingu-Abigeyili. Umkakhe gade ahlakaniphile begodu amuhle, kodwana uNabhali gade anekani nehliziyo embi." 
1Samuel25:4 Lokha uDavida aseserhalawumbeni, wezwa bona uNabhali urhuna izimvu." 
1Samuel25:5 Wathuma amasokana alitjhumi wathi kiwo: “Khuphukelani eKarameli kuNabhali nifike nimtjele bona ngiyambingelela. 
1Samuel25:6 Ngithi pilohle, pilode kuye nomndenakhe. Sengathi umsebenzakhe ungakhula udlondlobale." 
1Samuel25:7 Nimtjele bonyana ngizwile bona urhuna izimvu. Nange angabuza iinsebenzi zakhe zizamtjela bona lokha abelusi bakhe nabahlanu kwethu eKarameli, akhange sibaphathe makghwakghwa. Soke isikhathi abasihlala nathi akunamvu neyodwa yabo eyalahlekako. Yeke, ngilindele bona abe nomusa kini njengombana kusikhathi seminyanya nje. Nithi: ‘Ngibawa bona ubaba aphe indodanakhe uDavida neensebenzi zayo nanyana yini ubaba angaba nayo.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:8 Lokha amasokana wakaDavida nafika kuNabhali, amnikela umlayezo wakaDavida njengombana unjalo. Alindela ipendulo-ke." 
1Samuel25:9 UNabhali waphendula amasokana lawo wathi: “Ngubani yena uDavida wakhona loyo? Umsa kaJese loyo uyini nje khona? Uyazi amalanga la, sekukhamba kugcwele amakhoboka abaleka ebanikazini bawo!" 
1Samuel25:10 Nje nidlumbana bona ngizakuthatha isikwa sami namanzami nezimvu engizihlabele abarhuni bami ngiphe imiqhamuka nabosikhotheni?” 
1Samuel25:11 Amasokana ajika khonapho abuyela emuva. Nafika kuDavida ambikela woke amezwi kaNabhali. 
1Samuel25:12 UDavida wathi ebantwini bakhe: “Hlomani ngeensabula zenu!” Bahloma-ke ngeensabula zabo, noDavida naye ngeyakhe. Kwakhuphuka amadoda angaba makhulu amane noDavida, amakhulu amabili asala agade iimpahla." 
1Samuel25:13 Esinye seensebenzi zakaNabhali satjela u-Abigeyili sathi: “UDavida uthumele iinthunywa erhalawumbeni bona zilotjhise unomzana, kodwana yena wazithela ngehlamba." 
1Samuel25:14 Nokho abantwaba bebasilungele khulu thina. Akhange basiphathe kumbi begodu ngesikhathi soke ebegade sikanye nabo emmangweni hlanu kwabo, ayikho into ekhe yasilahlekela." 
1Samuel25:15 Ngesikhathi soke siselusele izimvu zethu hlanu kwabo, gade baliboda elisizombileko ubusuku nemini." 
1Samuel25:16 Nje-ke cabanga ubone bona ungenzani ngombana ihlekelele ilengele phezu konomzana nendlwakho yoke. Unomzana uhlaza kangangobana akakho umuntu ongakhuluma naye.” 
1Samuel25:17 U-Abigeyili akhange asalinda ibhadi. Wathatha khonokho amakhulu amabili weempani zesikwa, imijeka emibili yewayini, izimvu ezihlanu eziphekiweko, isiqwebu sekoroyi ekhanzingiweko, ikhulu lamakhekhe wamakwapa wediribe namakhulu amabili wamakwapa wamakhiwani, walayitjha phezu kwabodumbana." 
1Samuel25:18 U-Abigeyili wathi eencekwini zakhe: “Khambani phambi kwami, ngizanilandela.” Kodwana akhange atjele umyenakhe uNabhali." 
1Samuel25:19 Wakhwela udumbana wehlela ngemrhobeni wentaba. UDavida nabantu bakhe bebeza nganeno. U-Abigeyili wavumbukela phezu kwabo. 
1Samuel25:20 UDavida gade asacabanga asithi: “Akhange kusize ilitho ukugada kwami ifuyo yomrhali lo bona kungalahleki nayinye imvakhe emmangweni. Nje-ke ungithokoza ngothuvi. 
1Samuel25:21 NgoZimu ngiqinisile ngithi akunandoda namkha umsana emzinakhe ozalibona lakusasa!” 
1Samuel25:22 Kwathi lokha u-Abigeyili nabona uDavida, wehla masinyana kudumbanakhe waguqa wahloma ihloko phasi phambi kwakaDavida." 
1Samuel25:23 Wawela eenyaweni zakhe wathi: “Kosami, ngimi onomlandu. Ngiyabawa bona uvumele incekukazakho ikhulume ekosinayo; ikosi ilalele lokho incekukazayo ekutjhoko." 
1Samuel25:24 Sengathi ikosi ingeze yatjheja uNabhali isirithirithi sendodesiya. Unjengebizo lakhe, elithi Sidlhayela; naye udlhayele. Mina ncekukazakho, akhange ngibabone abantu ikosami ebegade ibathumile." 
1Samuel25:25 NgoZimu nangokuphila kwakho ngiqinisile ngithi: NguZimu okuvimbe bona ungazenzeli ngokwakho ukuthulula iingazi. Sengathi izitha zekosami nabo boke abancamele ukuyilimaza bangaba njengoNabhali. 
1Samuel25:26 Sengathi isiphesi incekukazakho esilethele ikosayo, singanikelwa abantu abalandela ikosami." 
1Samuel25:27 Ngiyarabhela, ikosi ayithethelele iphoso yencekukazayo. Ngambala uZimu uzokwakhela ikosami indlu eqinileko ngebanga lokobana ikosami ilwe izipi zakaZimu. Ihlekelele asoze yakwehlela nawusaphilako," 
1Samuel25:28 begodu nange kungabakhona okulandelela ngemuva afuna ukukubulala, uSomnini uZimakho uzakuvikela, njengomelusi nabulunga ilitje esikhwameni sembada. Kodwana ukuphila kwezitha zakho uzakukuvirimejela kude njengelitje lesarayi." 
1Samuel25:29 Lokha uZimu nasele enzele ikosami koke okuhle akuthembisileko nokuyibeka ibe mbusi phezu kwaka-Israyeli," 
1Samuel25:30 ikosami ayikazukuzizwela ehliziywenayo inomlandu wokubulala ngaphandle kwebanga nanyana ukuzibuyiselela. Kuzakuthi lokha uZimu naphumelelisa ikosami bese iyakhumbula incekukazayo.” 
1Samuel25:31 UDavida wathi ku-Abigeyili: “Akadunyiswe uSomnini uZimu ka-Israyeli, okuthume bona namhlanjesi uzongihlangabeza." 
1Samuel25:32 Sengathi ungabusiswa ngokuhlakanipha obenakho nokungenza bona namhlanje ngingazibuyiseleli ngokuthulula iingazi ngezandla zami. 
1Samuel25:33 Ngathana akhange uze masinyana uzongihlangabeza, ngoZimu uSomnini wakwa-Israyeli ngiqinisile mncwi ngithi, akunandoda namkha umsana emzini kaNabhali obezalibona lakusasa.”" 
1Samuel25:34 UDavida wamukela esandleni sakhe agade amlethele khona wabe wathi kuye: “Iya ekhaya, ungasakhathazeki. Ngiwezwile amezwakho nesibawo sakho ngisamukele.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Lokha u-Abigeyili nafika kuNabhali, wamfunyana asendlini enze imbedla yomgidi. Gade athakase khulu begodu adakwe afile. Nokho u-Abigeyili akhange amtjele litho bekwasa ngomuso." 
1Samuel25:36 Kwathi ngomuso ekuseni uNabhali sele aqaqulukile, umkakhe wamtjela zoke izintwezo. Wawa watsirimezeka." 
1Samuel25:37 Emva kwamalanga angaba litjhumi uSomnini godu wabetha uNabhali bewafa. 
1Samuel25:38 Kwathi bona uDavida ezwe ukuthi uNabhali uhlongakele wathi: “USomnini akadunyiswe, ngokungibuyiselela kuNabhali owangithukako. USomnini ungibulungile ekoneni, kodwana wabetha uNabhali ngeentonga zakhe.” Emva kwalokho uDavida wathumela iinceku bona ziyomkhulumela ku-Abigeyili bonyana amngene." 
1Samuel25:39 Iinceku zakaDavida zaya eKharameli, zafese zathi ku-Abigeyili: “UDavida usithume bona sizokuthatha uzokuba mkakhe.”" 
1Samuel25:40 U-Abigeyili waguqa wahloma ihloko phasi wathi: “Incekukazenu nasi njengekhoboka, ilungele ukuhlanza iinyawo zeenceku zekosayo.”" 
1Samuel25:41 U-Abigeyili wasikima masinyana wakhwela udumbana aphekelelwa lidwendwe labafazi abahlanu. Wakhamba neenceku zakaDavida, waba mkakhe." 
1Samuel25:42 UDavida wathatha no-Arhinowami weJizriyela, bobabili baba bomkakhe." 
1Samuel25:43 Kodwana uSawula gade sele athethe indodakazakhe uMikali umkaDavida, wamendisela kuPhalithi umsa kaLayitjhi, ogade abuya eGalima." 
1Samuel26:1 AmaZifu aya kuSawula eGibeya afese athi kuye: “Angithi nguDavida obhace entatjaneni yeRhakila, eqalene nerhalawumba leJetjhimoni?”" 
1Samuel26:2 Yeke uSawula wehlela erhalawumbeni leZifu, wayokuzuma uDavida lapho, wakhamba neenkulungwana ezintathu zamadoda akhethiweko wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Samuel26:3 USawula wenza ikampakhe hlanukwendlela entatjaneni yeRhakila eqalene nerhalawumba leJetjhimoni. UDavida gade aseserhalawumbeni lokha nabona bonyana uSawula umlandelele khonapho. 
1Samuel26:4 Yeke wathumela iinhloli bona ziyokuhlola bonyana uSawula ukuphi. 
1Samuel26:5 UDavida waphuma waya lapha uSawula enze ikampakhe khona. Wafese wabona lapha uSawula no-Abineri umsa kaNeri induna yebutho balele khona. USawula gade alele phakathi kwekampa azonjwe libutho. 
1Samuel26:6 Nje-ke uDavida wabuza u-Arhimeleki umHite no-Abitjhayi umsa kaTseruya umnakwabo lakaJowabi, wathi: “Ngubani ozokukhamba nami ekampeni siye kuSawula?” U-Abitjhayi wathi: “Ngimi ozakukhamba nawe.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Nje-ke uDavida no-Abitjhayi bakhamba baya ebantwinabo ebusuku. Nabafikako, qala nango uSawula alele phakathi kwabo, umkhontwakhe uhlatjwe phasi ngeenhloko zakhe. U-Abineri namabutho bebalele bamzombile." 
1Samuel26:8 U-Abitjhayi wahlebela uDavida wathi: “Namhlanje, uZimu unikele isitha sakho ezandleni zakho. Yeke yithi ngimthungelele phasi ngomkhonto kube kanye; angeze ngamkhutha bona ngibuyelele kabili.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Kodwana uDavida wathi ku-Abitjhayi: “Awa, ungathomi umbulale! Ngubani ongabeka isandla phezu kozesiweko kaSomnini angabi nomlandu?”" 
1Samuel26:10 UDavida wabuye wathi: “NgoZimu ngiqinisile ngithi, nguSomnini kwaphela ozambulala, nakungasinjalo isikhathi sakhe sizakufika azifele, namkha uzakuya epini abhubhele khona." 
1Samuel26:11 Kodwana uSomnini uyangalela bona ngingabeka isandla phezu kozesiweko wakhe. Yeke, thatha umkhonto hlanu kwehlokwakhapho nomjekana wamanzi lowo sikhambe.”" 
1Samuel26:12 UDavida wathatha njalo-ke umkhonto nomjekana wamanzi hlanu kwehloko kaSawula, bakhamba. Akakho owabonako nowakhe wazi ngalokho begodu akakho owaphaphamako. Boke bebalele ngombana uSomnini bekabehlisele ubuthongo obukhulu." 
1Samuel26:13 UDavida wayamela ngaphetjheya komrhotjana, wajama phezu kwesiqongo sentatjana ebangeni eliphephileko phakathi kwabo." 
1Samuel26:14 Warhuwelela ibutho no-Abineri umsa kaNeri, wathi: “Abineri-ke! Uyangizwa na?” U-Abineri waphendula wathi: “Ungubani wena orhuwelela ikosi?”" 
1Samuel26:15 UDavida waphendula wathi: “Abineri, bewufanele ube yindoda yamambala kwa-Israyeli! Kubayini ungakhange ugade ikosakho? Bekunomuntu ogade eze ukuzokubulala ikosakho leyo." 
1Samuel26:16 Okwenzileko akusikuhle. NgoSomnini ngiqinisile ngithi, wena nebutho lakho nifanele ukufa ngombana akhange nigade ikosenu, umzeswa kaSomnini. Akhe niqale hlanu kwenu: Uphi umkhonto wekosenu nomjekana wamanzi obekugade kuhlanu kwehlokwayo na?”" 
1Samuel26:17 USawula walemuka ilizwi lakaDavida bewathi: “Davida ndodanami, lilizwi lakho lelo na?” UDavida waphendula wathi: “Iye kosami, ngilo.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Godu wathi: “Kubayini ikosami ilandelelana nencekwayo na? Ngenzeni? Uyini umlandwami ekosini na? 
1Samuel26:19 Ngibawa ikosami kheyilalele amezwi wencekwayo. Nangabe ubaba udlumbana bona nguSomnini ofuna bonyana angibulale, kubayini angayenzeli umnikelo? Kodwana nakube babantu abahlohloloja ubaba, abanikelelwe phambi kwakaSomnini! Bangikhuphile enarheni kaSomnini lapha nginesabelo khona. Kwaba sengasuthi bathi, ‘Khamba uyokukhothamela abosingazimu abanye.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Ngiyakubawa, angingafeli enarheni yabatjhili kude noSomnini. Ubaba, ikosi yakwa-Israyeli, uphume nebutho bona azokufunana netsetse lakotsetse, uzumana nekwali eentabeni na?”" 
1Samuel26:21 Yeke uSawula wathi: “Davida ndodanami, ngonile; yewubuye. Angeze ngisazama ukukulimaza ngombana ubone ubuphilo bami buqakathekile namhlanjesi. Ngenze ubudlhayela, ngatjhapha khulu.”" 
1Samuel26:22 UDavida waphendula wathi: “Naku-ke umkhonto wekosi, akweqe elinye lamasokana lize nganeno lizowuthatha." 
1Samuel26:23 UZimu uhlomelisa loyo naloyo ngokulunga nokwethembeka kwakhe. Unikele ubaba ezandleni zami namhlanjesi, nokho bengingeze ngabeka isandla sami phezu komzeswa kaSomnini." 
1Samuel26:24 Njengombana ngibabalele ukuphila kwakababa nanamhlanjesi, kwanga uSomnini angababalela ipilwami, angisindise kiwo woke amatshwenyeko.”" 
1Samuel26:25 USawula wathi kuDavida: “Kwanga ungabusiseka Davida ndodanami; uzakwenza izinto ezikulu uphumelele.” UDavida wathatha indlelakhe, noSawula wabuyela ekhaya." 
1Samuel27:1 UDavida wadlumbana wathi: “Ngelinye ilanga, uSawula uzongibamba. Okungcono angibalekele enarheni yamaFilista, ngisinde. Nangenze njalo, uSawula uzakudinwa ukufunana nami nanyana kukuphi kwa-Israyeli. Ngizabe ngiphunyurhile-ke esandleni sakhe.”" 
1Samuel27:2 UDavida nabantu abamakhulu asithandathu abagade banaye, bakhamba bayamela ku-Akhitjhi umsa kaMawoko ikosi yeGathi." 
1Samuel27:3 UDavida nabantu bakhe banzinza eGathi no-Akhitjhi. Omunye nomunye gade anomndenakhe, noDavida anabafazi bakhe ababili: U-Arhinowami weJizriyela no-Abigeyili weKarameli, umfelokazi kaNabhali." 
1Samuel27:4 Lokha uSawula natjelwa bona uDavida ubalekele eGathi, akhange asamfuna." 
1Samuel27:5 Yeke uDavida wathi ku-Akhitjhi: “Kungaba njani nange ikosi ingangipha indawo komunye wemizi esemaphandleni ukuze ngihlale khona? Incekwakho ingahlala njani nekosayo edorobheni na?” 
1Samuel27:6 Nje-ke mhlanokho u-Akhitjhi wamabela iTsikhilagi. Yona yaba ngeyamakhosi wakwaJuda kusukela mhlokho. 
1Samuel27:7 UDavida wahlala emkhawulweni wamaFilista umnyaka neenyanga ezine. 
1Samuel27:8 Ngesikhatheso uDavida nabantu bakhe benyuka basahlela amaGetjhuri, amaGirizi nama-Amalekhi. Abantwaba bebahlala endaweni le ukusuka eThelamu ukuya eTjhuri emaphethelweni weGibhide." 
1Samuel27:9 Ngesikhathi soke lokha uDavida nasahlela inarha gade abulala boke abantu. Kodwana izimvu, iinkomo, abodumbana namakamela kanye nezambatho azithathele zona. Kuthi emva kwalokho abuyele ku-Akhitjhi." 
1Samuel27:10 U-Akhitjhi ubephele ambuze athi: “Bewusahlelephi namhlanje, wena Davida?” Ubephendula athi: “Esewula yakwaJuda”, nanyana “Isewula yeJerarhamiyeli”, nanyana “Isewula yamaKheni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Gade angalethi umuntu aphila eGathi ngombana wacabanga wathi: “Bangasikhaphela bathi, ‘UDavida wenze lokhu nalokhu.’ ” Lokhu bekumumukghwakhe ngesikhathi soke asahlala enarheni yamaFilista." 
1Samuel27:12 U-Akhitjhi wathemba uDavida bewazitjela wathi: “Uzondeke khulu ebantwini bekhabo kwa-Israyeli, yeke sewuzaba yincekwami isiphelani.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Emalangeni lawo, amaFilista ahlanganisa ibutho lawo bona alwe no-Israyeli. Yeke u-Akhitjhi wathi kuDavida: “Yazi bona wena nabantu bakho nizakukhamba nami siyokulwa ipi.”" 
1Samuel28:2 UDavida wathi: “Khona-ke uzazibonela ngokwakho bona incekwakho yenzani.” U-Akhitjhi waphendula wathi: “Kulunge khulu nakunjalo, ngizakwenza ube mtjhejami nakusaliwako.”" 
1Samuel28:3 USamyela gade sele ahlongakele, no-Israyeli woke sele ambeka emzinakhe eRama bewamlilela. Ngesikhatheso uSawula naye gade aqothe zoke izangoma neenyanga enarheni yakwa-Israyeli." 
1Samuel28:4 AmaFilista ahlangana enza ikampawo eTjhunemi; uSawula naye wahlanganisa woke ama-Israyeli wenza ikampa eGilibowa. 
1Samuel28:5 Kwathi lokha uSawula nabona ipi yamaFilista, wesaba khulu bewathuthumela." 
1Samuel28:6 Wabuza kuSomnini, kodwana uSomnini akhange amphendule ngitjho ngamabhudango nanyana nge-urimi nangabaphorofidi." 
1Samuel28:7 Yeke wathi uSawula eencekwini zakhe: “Ngifunelani isangoma somfazi ukuze ngiye ngiyokuphengula kiso.” Iinceku zathi kuye: “Sikhona esinye e-Eni-Dori.” 
1Samuel28:8 Nje-ke uSawula wazitjhatjhanisa, wembatha izambatho ezijayelekileko, wakhukhutha ebusuku akhamba namadoda amabili baya emfazini loyo. Wafese wathi kuye: “Ngibawela ebezimini bona ngikhulume naloyo engizakumutjho ngebizo.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Kodwana isangoma sathi: “Afeke! Angithi uyazi bona uSawula wenzeni: Uqothe zoke iinyanga nezangoma enarheni. Alo, ungibekelelani isifu bona ngibulawe na?”" 
1Samuel28:10 USawula wafunga ngoSomnini wathi: “NgoZimu ngiqinisile ngithi, awukazukubethwa ngesibanga sentwele.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Nje-ke isangoma sathi: “Ngikubawele bani?” USawula wathi: “Ngibawela uSamyela.” 
1Samuel28:12 Kuthe bona isangoma sibone kuvela uSamyela, sarhuwelela khulu sathi kuSawula: “Alo, ungirhwaleleni? Angithi wena unguSawula!”" 
1Samuel28:13 USawula wathi kuye: “Ungesabi! Ubonani?” Isangoma sathi: “Ngibona isithunzi sikhuphuka sivela kabaphasi.” 
1Samuel28:14 Wasibuza wathi: “Sinjani?” Sona sathi: “Liqhegu elilupheleko, lembethe iphuraphura liyakhuphuka.” Yeke uSawula wazi bona nguSamyela, waguqa bewahloma ihloko phasi." 
1Samuel28:15 USamyela wathi kuSawula: “Ungiphazamiseleni ngokungenyusa na?” USawula wathi: “Ngitshwenyeke khulu. AmaFilista alwa nami noZimu ungihlanukele. Akasangiphenduli ngitjho ngabaphorofidi namkha ngamabhudango. Nje-ke ngibize wena bona ungitjele bonyana ngifanele ngenzeni?” 
1Samuel28:16 USamyela wathi: “Alo, uzelani kimi nakube uSomnini ukuhlanukele waba sisitha sakho?" 
1Samuel28:17 USomnini wenze akukhuluma kimi ngawe ngaphambili: USomnini uwususile umbuso esandleni sakho, wawunikela uDavida, umakhelwanakho, ongcono kunawe." 
1Samuel28:18 USomnini wenze lokhu kuwe namhlanjesi ngebanga lokobana ungakhange umlalele. Bekasilingekele ama-Amalekhi, nje-ke bewufanele uwarhayile nya." 
1Samuel28:19 USomnini uzokunikela kanye no-Israyeli esandleni samaFilista. Kusasa wena nabesabakho nizobe nikimapha. Begodu ibutho laka-Israyeli uSomnini uzolinikela emaFilisteni.” 
1Samuel28:20 Khonokho uSawula wadusuka phasi azele ukwesaba ngebanga lamezwi kaSamyela. Gade aphelelwe mamandla ngombana loke ilangelo nobusukobo, ubengakhange agome ilitho." 
1Samuel28:21 Kuthe lokha isangomeso nasifika kuSawula simbona bonyana uyarutharutha, sathi: “Kosami, nginikele ukuphila kwami ngakulalela, ngenza koke othe ngikwenze." 
1Samuel28:22 Nje-ke ngiyakubawa, lalela incekukazakho. Yithi ngikunikele ukudla ugome ukuze ube namandla wokukhamba indlela.”" 
1Samuel28:23 USawula wala wathi: “Angifuni ukudla.” Kodwana amadoda agade akhamba naye asiza isangoma, amncenga wawalalela. Wavuka, wahlala emkghadini." 
1Samuel28:24 Isangoma besinethole elinonisiweko ekhaya, salihlaba masinyana. Sathatha iflowuru sayibhica, sabhaga isikwa esinganangumelo." 
1Samuel28:25 Sase sibeka phambi kwakaSawula neenceku zakhe, bagoma. Khona ngobusukobo basikima bagoduka." 
1Samuel29:1 AmaFilista abutha woke amabuthwawo e-Afeki, u-Israyeli wabuthana ngemthonjeni eJizriyela." 
1Samuel29:2 Ababusi beemfunda zamaFilista barhwanta ngeenqhema zamakhulu neenkulungwana, uDavida namadoda agade akhamba nawo bebarhwanta ngemuva no-Akhitjhi." 
1Samuel29:3 Iinduna zamaFilista zabuza zathi: “Afunani-ke amaHebheru la?” U-Akhitjhi waphendula wathi: “NguDavida lo obekagade ayinduna ekulu kaSawula ikosi yakwa-Israyeli. Sekuphele umnyaka ahlezi nami, kusukela mhlana abalekela uSawula bekube kunamhlanjesi, angikafunyani iphoso kuye.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Kodwana iinduna zamaFilista zasilingeka ngaye bezathi: “Buyisela umrhali loyo emuva ukuze abuyele endaweni omabele yona. Angakhambi nathi epini ngombana nakungasinjalo, angajikela thina sisalwa. Yini nje umuntu lo into angazincengela ngayo ekosinakhe, nakungasi ziinhloko zamadoda la?" 
1Samuel29:5 Akusuye nje uDavida lo, abakhalela ngaye nabagidako bathi, “ ‘USawula ubulele iinkulungwana, kodwana uDavida ubulele amatjhumi weenkulungwana?’ ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Yeke u-Akhitjhi wabiza uDavida wathi kuye: “NgoZimu ngiqinisile ngithi bewusathembakele kimi begodu bengingathaba nange bewungasebenza nami epini. Kusukela mhlana ufika kimi bekubenje, akhange ngifumane iphoso kuwe. Nokho-ke ababusi abakwamukeli." 
1Samuel29:7 Jika ukhambe ngokuthula; ungenzi ilitho elizakusilinga ababusi beemfunda zamaFilista.” 
1Samuel29:8 UDavida wabuza wathi: “Alo, ngenzeni? Yini ephambeneko oyifunyene encekwinakho kusukela mhlana ngifika kuwe bekube njesi? Kubayini-ke ngingeze ngakhamba ngayokulwa nezitha zekosami?”" 
1Samuel29:9 U-Akhitjhi waphendula wathi: “Iye, ngiyazi bona emehlwenami, ube ngothokozisa njengesithunywa esibuya kuZimu. Nokho-ke, iinduna zamaFilista zithe, ‘Angakhambi nathi epini.’" 
1Samuel29:10 Nje-ke, yewuvuke ekuseni kanye neenceku zekosakho ezize nawe, ukhambe ekuseni nakuqeda ukusa.”" 
1Samuel29:11 UDavida namadoda agade akhamba nawo bavuka ekuseni ngakusasa bona babuyele enarheni yamaFilista. AmaFilista wona aya epini eJizriyela. 
1Samuel30:1 UDavida namadoda agade akhamba nawo bafika eTsikhilagi ngemva kwamalanga amabili. Ngesikhatheso ama-Amalekhi gade ahlangule isewula yakwaJuda neTsikhilagi. Bebasahlele iTsikhilagi bebalitjhisa. 
1Samuel30:2 Bathumba abafazi bomuzi nabo boke abakiwo. Akhange babulale noyedwa wabo, kodwana babaraga bakhamba nabo." 
1Samuel30:3 Lokha uDavida nabantu bakhe bafika eTsikhilagi, bayifunyana ibhujiswe ngomlilo. Abomkabo, amadodanabo namadodakazabo bathunjiwe." 
1Samuel30:4 Nje-ke uDavida namadoda agade akhamba nawo bakhihla isililo esikhulu bebabibitheka. 
1Samuel30:5 Bobabili abafazi bakaDavida, u-Arhinowami weJizriyela no-Abigeyili umfelokazi kaNabhali weKharameli bebathunjiwe." 
1Samuel30:6 UDavida gade asengozini ngombana abantu bebakhuluma ngokumkhanda ngamatje. Woke umuntu gade abilile emmoyeni ngebanga lamadodanabo namadodakazabo. Kodwana uDavida wafunyana amandla kuSomnini uZimakhe. 
1Samuel30:7 Yeke uDavida wathi kumphristi u-Abiyatari, indodana ka-Arhimeleki: “Akhungilethele i-efodi hle.” U-Abiyatari wamlethela yona." 
1Samuel30:8 UDavida wabuza kuSomnini wathi: “Ngibagijimise abasahlelaba na? Ngizabafunyana na?” USomnini waphendula wathi: “Bagijimise, uzabafunyana begodu uzakuphumelela ukusindisa abakuthumbileko.”" 
1Samuel30:9 UDavida namakhulu amathandathu wamadoda bafika emlanjeni iBhesori, lapha amanye amadoda asala khona." 
1Samuel30:10 Amakhulu amabili gade seladiniwe angasakwazi ukuyama esikhisini iBhesori. Kodwana uDavida waragela phambili namakhulu amane wamadoda. 
1Samuel30:11 Amadoda agade akhamba noDavida afunyana umGibhide emmangweni, amusa kuDavida. Amupha ukudla wagoma, wasela namanzi." 
1Samuel30:12 Amupha igagwana lamakwapa wamakhiwani namakhekhe amabili wamakwapa wediribe. Wagoma wase ubuyelwa mamandla ngombana ubangakhange agome ukudla namkha asele amanzi amalanga amathathu nobusuku obuthathu. 
1Samuel30:13 UDavida wambuza wathi: “Akhusungitjele, ungowakosobani? Udabukaphi?” Yena wathi: “NgimGibhide, ikhoboka lomunye wama-Amalekhi. Ikosami ingisukele lokha nangithoma ukugula emalangeni amathathu adlulileko la." 
1Samuel30:14 Besisahlele isewula yakwaJuda lapha kuhlala khona amaFilista nekoro yamaKhalebi. Sase sitjhisa iTsikhilagi.” 
1Samuel30:15 UDavida wambuza godu wathi: “Ungehla nami uyongikhombisa abathumbabo na?” Yena wathi: “Iye, nawungafunga kimi phambi kwakaZimu bona angeze ungibulale begodu angeze unginikele ekosinami, khona ngingakwehlisela kibo.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Yeke wehla noDavida. Madekhethu! Qalani, bazigedlile benze umnyanya ngezinto abazithumbe enarheni yamaFilista neyamaJuda. Bayagoma, bayasela bebayagida." 
1Samuel30:17 Ngelanga elilandelako uDavida wabasahlela kusukela ngamasa bekwaba kuntambama. Akhange kube khona noyedwa phakathi kwabo ophunyurhako, ngaphandle kwamasokana amakhulu amane akhwela amakamela abaleka." 
1Samuel30:18 UDavida wakusindisa koke obekuthunjwe ma-Amalekhi, ngitjho nabafazi bakhe ababili." 
1Samuel30:19 Bekungakalahleki litho: boke abantwana nabantu abakhulu, nepahla yoke egade ithunjwe ma-Amalekhi. UDavida wabuya nakho koke." 
1Samuel30:20 Amadoda agade akhamba noDavida araga imihlambi yefuyo abayithathela ama-Amalekhi ngaphambi kweyabo abayibuyise ekuthunjweni, basithi: “Yipahla kaDavida le.”" 
1Samuel30:21 UDavida weza ebantwini abamakhulu amabili abagade batjhiywe esikhisini iBhesori ngebanga lokudinwa. Baphuma bonyana bahlangabeze uDavida nabantu agade anabo. UDavida watjhidela ebantwinabo, wabalotjhisa." 
1Samuel30:22 Hlangana namadoda akhamba noDavida bekukhona iimbhidlamnyanya, iinkhohlakali zabantu. Zathi kilabo abangakhange baphume nazo: “Ngebanga lokobana ningazange niphume nathi, angeze sabelane nani ipahla esiyiphangileko. Nokho-ke, ngileyo naleyo indoda ingathatha umkayo nabantwabayo igoduke.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Kodwana uDavida wathi kizo: “Awa bafowethu, niyayilahla. Ningenzi njalo ngezinto uSomnini asiphe zona. USomnini usibulungile bewanikela kithi ibutho egade lijamelene nathi." 
1Samuel30:24 Akunamuntu onganisekela entweni eniyitjhoko leyo. Isabelo somuntu osele nepahla sifanele silingane nesomuntu owehle nepi. Asabelaneni ngokulinganako.” 
1Samuel30:25 UDavida wenza lokho kwaba mthetho kwa-Israyeli bekube namhlanjesi. 
1Samuel30:26 Kuthe lokha uDavida nafika eTsikhilagi, wathumela enye yepahla ebaphathini bakwaJuda ebegade kubasekeli bakhe, wathi: “Naso isipho senu esiyipahla ethunjwe ezitheni zakaSomnini.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Wasithumela kilabo abagade baseBhethe-Eli neRamothi-Negebi kanye neJatiri; 
1Samuel30:28 nakilabo abase-Aroweri, eSifmoti, ne-Etjhitemowa;" 
1Samuel30:29 nabaseRakala, emizini yamaJerarhamiyeli namaKheni;" 
1Samuel30:30 nabaseRhoroma, eBhori-Atjhana, e-Ataka" 
1Samuel30:31 neRhebroni; nakilabo egade bakezinye iindawo lapha uDavida nabantu bakhe bebaphele bajikajike khona. 
1Samuel31:1 AmaFilista gade alwa nama-Israyeli. Ama-Israyeli abaleka phambi kwamaFilista. Inengi lama-Israyeli lafa ngokurabhalaliswa entabeni iGilibowa. 
1Samuel31:2 AmaFilista amlala nje uSawula, abe abulala amadodanakhe uJonathani, u-Abinadaba noMaliki-Tjhuwa." 
1Samuel31:3 Ipi yarhagalela uSawula. Abadumuza ngemisubi abamfikelako bamkhubaza okwesabekako. 
1Samuel31:4 USawula wathi kusonkhandakhe: “Rhwatjha isabulakho ungihlabe ngife, kungaze kufike abarhali ababarhedenaba bangitlhofoze bese bayangirhubutjha.” Kodwana usonkhande loyo wesaba khulu ukwenza lokho. Yeke uSawula wathatha isabulakhe wazidlhunya phezu kwayo." 
1Samuel31:5 Kuthe lokha usonkhande nabona bona uSawula ufile, naye wazidlhunya phezu kwesabulakhe, wafa noSawula." 
1Samuel31:6 Nje-ke uSawula namadodanakhe amathathu, nosonkhandakhe, nabantu bakhe, bafa boke khona mhlokho." 
1Samuel31:7 Kuthe lokha ama-Israyeli agade angemrhobeni weJizriyela nangaphetjheya kweJordani nabona bonyana ipi yama-Israyeli ibalekile, nokobana uSawula namadodanakhe bahlongakele, atjhiya imizawo abaleka nawo. Ngemva kwalokho amaFilista afika ahlala emizini leyo." 
1Samuel31:8 Ilanga emva kwepi amaFilista ahlubulisa iindumbu. Afunyana uSawula namadodanakhe amathathu bahlongakalele phezu kwentaba iGilibowa. 
1Samuel31:9 Baqunta ihlokwakhe bebathatha iinkhande zakhe. Bathumela umlayezo enarheni yoke yamaFilista babika iindabezi emathempelini wabosingazimu babo nebantwini babo. 
1Samuel31:10 Bafaka iinkhande zakhe ngethempelini labo-Atjhitarothi bebabophelela isidumbu sakhe ebodeni leBhethe-Tjhana. 
1Samuel31:11 Kuthe lokha abantu beJabetjhi-Giliyadi nabezwa lokho amaFilista akwenze ngoSawula," 
1Samuel31:12 kwaphuma woke amadoda anesibindi akhamba ubusuku boke aya eBhethe-Tjhana. Afese ehlisa isidumbu sakaSawula neendumbu zamadodanakhe ebodeni leBhethe-Tjhana. Akhamba nazo eJabetjhi, lapha azitjhisa khona." 
1Samuel31:13 Athatha amathambazo awangcwaba ngaphasi komuthi womtamariske eJabetjhi, azila amalanga alikhomba." 
2Samuel1:1 Emva kokufa kwakaSawula, uDavida wabuya ekubulaleni ama-Amalekhi, wahlala amalanga amabili eTsikhilagi." 
2Samuel1:2 Ngelanga lesithathu kwafika umuntu etatawini lokulwa lakaSawula, izambatho zakhe bezidabukile, azele ithuli ehloko. Lokha nafika kuDavida, wawa ngamadolo wahloma ihloko phasi." 
2Samuel1:3 UDavida wambuza wathi: “Ubuyaphi?” Yena waphendula wathi: “Ngibaleke etatawini lokulwa lama-Israyeli.” 
2Samuel1:4 UDavida wambuza wathi: “Akhe ungitjele, kwenzekeni?” Yena wathi: “Abantu babalekile epini. Inengi labo lirabhalalisiwe belafa. USawula nendodanakhe uJonathani nabo bahlongakele.”" 
2Samuel1:5 UDavida wabuza isokana elimlethele umbikwelo wathi: “Alo, wena wazinjani bona uSawula nendodanakhe uJonathani bahlongakele?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Isokana laphendula lathi: “Kwenzekile bona ngifike entabeni iGilibowa, ngabona uSawula aziyame ngomkhontwakhe, ikarana yeenjomani kanye nabakhweli sekutjhidele bona zimgadange." 
2Samuel1:7 Uthe nathi rhedlu wangibona, wangibiza. Mina ngathi, ‘Ngingakwenzelani?’" 
2Samuel1:8 Wangibuza wathi, ‘Ungubani wena na?’ Ngamphendula ngathi, ‘NgingumAmalekhi.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Nje-ke wathi kimi, ‘Nanyana ngisaphefumula nje, sekusele isikhohlela. Yeke bandamela kimapha ungiqedelele.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Ngambandamela-ke ngamqedelela ngombana ngazile bona ubangekhe asasinda ngemva kokuhlulwa kwakhe. Ngathatha umbhode wekosi obusehlokwakhe nebhengela emkhonwenakhe, ngakulethela ikosi.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Ngalokho uDavida watjhuba izambatho zakhe wazidabula, nabo boke ebegade banaye benza njalo." 
2Samuel1:12 Batlhuwa barhahlawula bazilela uSawula nendodanakhe uJonathani nebutho lakaSomnini uZimu kanye nekumba ka-Israyeli bekwaba kuntambama ngombana bebabulewe ngesabula. 
2Samuel1:13 UDavida wathi esokaneni ebelimlethele umbiko: “Udabukaphi?” Laphendula lathi: “Ngiyindodana yesikhonzi, umAmalekhi.”" 
2Samuel1:14 UDavida wambuza godu wathi: “Waba nesibindi-ke sokuphakamisela umzeswa kaSomnini isandla!” 
2Samuel1:15 UDavida wabiza enye yeenceku zakhe wathi kiyo: “Mbandamele, umsuse!” Yeke inceku yadula isokanelo phasi, lafa." 
2Samuel1:16 UDavida wathi esokaneni: “Iingazi zakho azibe phezu kwehlokwakho ngombana namezwi womlomakho ayakufakazela nawuthi, ‘Ngibulele umzeswa kaSomnini.’ ”" 
2Samuel1:17 UDavida wavuma ingoma yesililo elandelako ngoSawula nendodonakhe uJonathani. 
2Samuel1:18 Wakhupha umyalo bona abantu bakwaJuda bafunde ingoma le. Isihloko sengoma leyo Msebe. Itlolwe encwadini kaJatjhara. 
2Samuel1:19 Iintsitsirimba zakho Israyeli, zibulewe emibundwini. Maye ukuwa kweenkutani zakho!" 
2Samuel1:20 Lokhu ningakubiki eGathi, kungakhulunywa eentaradeni ze-Atjhikeloni; ukuze abafazi bamaFilista bangathatjiswa, abafazi balabo abangasokiko bangathakasi." 
2Samuel1:21 Nina ntaba zeGilibowa, kwanga ningatlhoga umbethe namkha izulu, iye, eendaweni zenu eziphakamileko; ngombana iinhlangu zeentsitsirimba zirhubutjhiwe; isihlangu sakaSawula asisatjhatjhwa ngamafutha." 
2Samuel1:22 Umsebe kaJonathani bewuhlala ulungile, bewuhlaba uhlukanisa umhlwehlwe esiswini seengorho, kuphalake iingazi. Isabula kaSawula nayo beyinemba." 
2Samuel1:23 USawula noJonathani bebathandeka begodu bebaligugu nabasaphilako, nekufeni akhange bahlukane. Bebanebelo ukudlula amadlanga, banamandla ukudlula amabhubezi." 
2Samuel1:24 Nina bafazi bakwa-Israyeli, lilelani uSawula, indoda enembathise ezibubende, yanikghabisa ngezambatho ezirutjelwe ngegolide." 
2Samuel1:25 Maye ukuwa kweenkutani epini! UJonathani ubulewe eentabeni zakho. 
2Samuel1:26 Ngibuhlungu ngawe mfowethu Jonathani, bewuligugu kimi! Ukungikhathalela kwakho bekukarisa ukudlula kwabantu bengubo." 
2Samuel1:27 Maye iinkutani ziwile! Iinhlabano zepi zitjhabalele! 
2Samuel2:1 Emva kwalokho uDavida wabuza uSomnini wathi: “Ngingenyukela keminye yemizi yakwaJuda na?” USomnini wathi: “Yewenyuke.” UDavida wabuza godu wathi: “Ngenyukelephi?” USomnini wamphendula wathi: “ERhebroni.” 
2Samuel2:2 Yeke uDavida wenyukela lapho nabafazi bakhe ababili, u-Arhinowami weJizriyeli no-Abigeyili umfelokazi kaNabhali weKharameli." 
2Samuel2:3 Wathatha nabantu ebegade banaye ngemindenabo, bafese bakha eRhebroni nemizaneni yakhona." 
2Samuel2:4 Abantu bakwaJuda beza eRhebroni, bazesa uDavida bona abe yikosi phezu kwendlu yakwaJuda. Kuthe lokha uDavida aziswa bona babantu beJabetjhi-Giliyadi ababulunga uSawula," 
2Samuel2:5 wathumela iinthunywa ebantwini beJabetjhi-Giliyadi bona zithi kibo: “USomnini anibusise ngokubonisa kwenu isisa esingaka ngokubulunga uSawula ikosenu. 
2Samuel2:6 Kwanga uSomnini angaba nomusa kini abe anikhumbule. Nami-ke ngiyanibuka ngenikwenzileko. 
2Samuel2:7 Yeke, qinani nibe nesibindi madoda ngombana uSawula ikosenu uhlongakele. Ngifuna nazi bonyana indlu yakwaJuda izese mina bona ngibe yikosi phezu kwayo.”" 
2Samuel2:8 U-Abineri umsa kaNeri oyinduna yebutho lakaSawula gade sele athethe u-Itjhi-Bhotjhethi umsa kaSawula wamyamisa iJordani waya eMarhanayimu. 
2Samuel2:9 Wambeka bona abe yikosi phezu kweGiliyadi, i-Atjhuri neJizriyela begodu naphezu kwaka-Efrayimu, uBhenjamini no-Israyeli woke." 
2Samuel2:10 U-Itjhi-Bhotjhethi umsa kaSawula gade aneminyaka ematjhumi amane ekuthomeni kwakhe ukubusa phezu kwaka-Israyeli; wabusa iminyaka emibili. Nokho-ke, indlu yakwaJuda yalandela uDavida." 
2Samuel2:11 Isikhathi uDavida abusa ngaso eRhebroni phezu kwendlu yakwaJuda saba minyaka elikhomba neenyanga ezithandathu. 
2Samuel2:12 U-Abineri umsa kaNeri neviyo laka-Itjhi-Bhotjhethi umsa kaSawula, basuka eMarhanayimu baya eGibiyoni." 
2Samuel2:13 UJowabi umsa kaTseruya neviyo lakaDavida baphuma bahlangana nabo emthonjeni weGibiyoni. Isiqhema esinye sahlala phasi nganeno komthombo kwathi esinye saba ngaphetjheya kwawo. 
2Samuel2:14 U-Abineri wathi kuJowabi: “Asifumane amasokana asikime ahlangane ngeemfuba phambi kwethwapha.” UJowabi wathi: “Kulungile, abahlangane.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Asikima-ke amadoda, kwakhethwa amasokana alitjhumi nambili kebakwaBhenjamini bonyana alwele u-Itjhi-Bhotjhethi umsa kaSawula; nakebakwaDavida kwakhethwa abalitjhumi nambili bonyana balwele uDavida." 
2Samuel2:16 Kwaba ngilelo nalelosokana labamba isokana elinqombene nalo ehloko, ahlabana ehlangothini ngomukhwa omkhulu, awela phasi womabili. Yeke indawo leyo eGibiyoni yabizwa bona yiRhelikhathi Hatsidimi." 
2Samuel2:17 Ipi yamhlokho yayesabeka khulu. U-Abineri nabantu bakwa-Israyeli bahlulwa babantu bakaDavida. 
2Samuel2:18 Amadodana amathathu kaTseruya nawo gade asepini; kunguJowabi, u-Abitjhayi no-Asayeli. U-Asayeli gade asigijimi esinjengeqina emmangweni." 
2Samuel2:19 Wagijimisa u-Abineri, wamlala nje eenthendeni." 
2Samuel2:20 U-Abineri waqala ngemva kwakhe, warhuwelela wathi: “Asayeli, nguwe loyo na?” Yena waphendula wathi: “Iye ngimi!”" 
2Samuel2:21 U-Abineri wathi kuye: “Yewulise ukungigijimisa, bamba elinye lamasokana ulimuke iinhlabano zalo!” Kodwana u-Asayeli wathi ulale ulahlile." 
2Samuel2:22 U-Abineri warhuwelela godu wathi ku-Asayeli: “Ndoda, lisa ukugijimisana nami! Ufunelani bona ngikudule phasi? Njekhona, ngingamqalelwa ngubani uJowabi umnakwenu na?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Kodwana u-Asayeli akhange amlalele. Yeke u-Abineri wamhlaba ngetlobo yesidunu somkhonto emathunjini, umkhonto bewaphundlukela ngemva kwakhe. Wawa bewafa khonapho. Woke umuntu gade ajama lokha nafika lapha kwafela khona u-Asayeli." 
2Samuel2:24 Kodwana uJowabi no-Abitjhayi baqothelana no-Abineri. Ilanga labatjhingela lokha nabafika embundwini we-Ama, hlanu kweGiyarhi endleleni yebhudu leGibiyoni." 
2Samuel2:25 BakwaBhenjamini bazibutha bazibumba isiqhema, bajama esiqongweni sombundu emuva kwaka-Abineri." 
2Samuel2:26 U-Abineri warhuwelela uJowabi wathi kuye: “Sifanele sihlale ngokulwa isiphelani na? Wazi kuhle bona isiphetho sento le simbi kangangani. Uzabatjela nini abantu bakhwabo bona balise ukugijimisana nabafowabo?” 
2Samuel2:27 UJowabi waphendula wathi: “NgoZimu ngiqinisile ngithi, ibe thana khewakhuluma ekuseni, abantu bebangazukubhudabhudana nabafowabo kangaka.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Nje-ke, uJowabi wabetha ipalapala; boke abantu bajama. Akhange basaragela phambili nokugijimisana nama-Israyeli begodu akhange basalwa." 
2Samuel2:29 Boke ubusukobo u-Abineri nabantu bakhe badabula esikepetlwini seJordani, bayama umlambo. Baragela phambili, bafika eMarhanayimu emini ekulu." 
2Samuel2:30 Ekubuyeni kwakaJowabi ekugijimiseni u-Abineri, wahlanganisa boke abantu bakhe. Ngaphandle kwaka-Asayeli, kwafumaniseka bona kunamadoda alitjhumi nethoba acimeleko." 
2Samuel2:31 Kodwana abantu bakaDavida babulala amakhulu amathathu namatjhumi asithandathu wabantu bakwaBhenjamini ebegade bakhamba no-Abineri. 
2Samuel2:32 Bathatha u-Asayeli bambulunga ethuneni lakayise eBhethe-Lehema. UJowabi nabantu bakhe bakhamba ubusuku boke bebafika eRhebroni nakuthathela ukusa. 
2Samuel3:1 Ipi hlangana nendlu kaSawula nendlu kaDavida yathatha isikhathi eside. UDavida waya ngokuya akhula emandleni, indlu kaSawula yaya ngokuya iphelelwa mamandla." 
2Samuel3:2 UDavida wabelethelwa amadodana eRhebroni: Izibulo lakhe ku-Arhinowami weJizriyela bekungu-Amnoni; 
2Samuel3:3 yesibili nguKiliyabu ku-Abigeyili umfelokazi kaNabhali weKarameli; yesithathu kungu-Absalomu kuMakha, indodakazi kaTalimayi ikosi yeGetjhuri;" 
2Samuel3:4 yesine ngu-Adoniya kuRhagithi; yesihlanu kunguTjhefathiya ku-Abitala; 
2Samuel3:5 yesithandathu kunguYitriyamu, emfazini kaDavida u-Egila." 
2Samuel3:6 Ngesikhathi kusekhona ipi phakathi kwendlu kaSawula nendlu kaDavida, u-Abineri waqinisa isikhundla sakhe endlini kaSawula." 
2Samuel3:7 USawula gade anomngena, ibizo lawo bekunguRitsipha indodakazi ka-Aya. U-Itjhi-Bhotjhethi wabuza u-Abineri wathi: “Ungeneleni emabhayini nekhohlo lakababa na?”" 
2Samuel3:8 U-Abineri wasilingeka khulu ngombuzo ka-Itjhi-Bhotjhethi, bewaphendula wathi: “Udlumbana bona mina ngikhotha uJuda na? Kusukela ekuthomeni ngithembekile endlini kayihlo uSawula, nakubafowabo nebakhozini bakhe, nawe akhange ngikunikele kuDavida. Alo, wena namhlanje ungibeka umlandu ngomfazi tle!"
