2Samuel20:12 U-Amasa wabhudabhudeka eengazini zakhe phakathi kwendlela. Indoda leyo yabona bonyana amabutho akakhambi yarhurhubisela u-Amasa eqadi kwendlela. Kwathi nayilemuka bonyana woke umuntu nafika ku-Amasa uyajama, yambhibha ngengubo." 
2Samuel20:13 Ngemva kobana u-Amasa asusiwe endleleni, boke abantu baragela phambili noJowabi ekugijimiseni uTjheba umsa kaBhikiri." 
2Samuel20:14 UJowabi wadlula hlangana nazo zoke iinkoro zakwa-Israyeli bewafika e-Abela okutjho iBhethe-Mahakha. Woke amaBheri abuthana alandela uJowabi. 
2Samuel20:15 Abalandeli bakaJowabi bafika baragelela uTjheba e-Abela-Bhethe-Mahakha. Bakhamba basakha iinqabo magegana nomthangala ongaphambili wedorobho. Kwathi lokha nabasalwa nokuwisa umthangala," 
2Samuel20:16 kwavela isihlakaniphi somfazi ngedorobheni sathi: “Yenilalele! Yenilalele! Tjelani uJowabi loyo bonyana akhe avele lapha, ngisafuna ukukhuluma naye.”" 
2Samuel20:17 UJowabi wamhlangabeza. Umfazi loyo wathi kuye: “Nguwe uJowabi na?” Yena wathi: “Iye, uJowabi ngimi lo.” Umfazi loyo wathi: “Akhe ulalele lokho incekukazakho ekuphathele khona.” UJowabi wathi: “Khuluma, ngilalele.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Waragela phambili umfazi wathi: “Ekadeni kwakuphele kuthiwe, ‘Nawunomraro khamba uye e-Abela uzakurarululwa’." 
2Samuel20:19 Thina sibabantu abangananturhu begodu sithembekile ku-Israyeli. Gadesi wena ulinga ukubhuruza idorobho elingunina wama-Israyeli. Kubayini ufuna ukurhiribidela ilifa lakaZimu na?” 
2Samuel20:20 UJowabi wathi: “Kanti-ke awa! Angeze bengithome, angeze bengithome nakancani ngibhuruze nanyana ngirhiribidele idorobho!" 
2Samuel20:21 Awa, abe akusinjalo mma. Into nje phakathi kwenwapha kunesiphehlanturhu esitlhorholoje ikosami uDavida. Sidabuka ngale kombundu enarheni yakwa-Efrayimu, ibizo laso nguTjheba umsa kaBhikiri. Nawunganginikela umrhali loyo, bengiphuma khona nje ngedorobhenapha.” Umfazi wathi kuJowabi: “Awa yeke, nakunjalo, khona-ke ihlokwanakhe nizayigama ngehla komthangala.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Umfazi lo wathumba boke abantu ngeseluleko sakhe. Khonokho bajuqula ihloko kaTjheba umsa kaBhikiri bayijikijela kuJowabi. UJowabi wavuthela ipalapala, amabuthwakhe alitjhiya idorobhelo, aphadlhalala omunye nomunye walunga kwakhe. UJowabi wabuyela ekosini eJerusalema." 
2Samuel20:23 UJowabi gade engamele loke ibutho lakwa-Israyeli; uBhenaya umsa kaJehojada engamele amaKereti namaPeleti; 
2Samuel20:24 u-Adoniramu yena gade alawula zemisebenzi; uJehotjhafathi umsa ka-Arhiludi angusosiba; 
2Samuel20:25 uTjheva angumabhalana; uTsadokhi no-Abiyatari kubaphristi; 
2Samuel20:26 kanti u-Ira weJayiri naye gade amphristi kaDavida. 
2Samuel21:1 Ngesikhathi sokubusa kwakaDavida kwaba nendlala iminyaka emithathu ngokulandelana. UDavida walila kuSomninini. USomnini wathi: “Kungebanga lakaSawula kanye nekumbakhe ezele iingazi; ngokubulala kwakhe amaGibiyoni.” 
2Samuel21:2 (AmaGibiyoni la gade angasiyo ingcenye yama-Israyeli, kodwana bekusiqubutjhwana sabakwa-Amori abasindako. Bakwa-Israyeli bafunga bonyana bazabababalela, kodwana uSawula wasuka wancama khulu ngo-Israyeli noJuda bewazama nokuwabhubhisa). Ikosi uDavida yabiza amaGibiyoni bona ikhulume nawo," 
2Samuel21:3 yawabuza yathi: “Nginenzeleni? Ngingalungisa njani ukuze koke kubuyele esigeni enarheni kaZimu?” 
2Samuel21:4 AmaGibiyoni amphendula athi: “Asifuni isiliva namkha igolide kuSawula nesizukulwana sakhe. Godu asinalungelo lokubulala umuntu kwa-Israyeli.” UDavida wathi: “Alo, nifuna nginenzeleni?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Amphendula athi: “USawula walinga ukusibhubhisa bewasibekela isifu kobana asirhayile ukuze singabi nesabelo kwa-Israyeli. 
2Samuel21:6 Nje-ke sifuna iinzukulwana zakhe eziduna ezilikhomba zibulawe bezirhubutjhwe phambi kwakaSomnini uZimu. Siziphanyeke eGibeya lakaSawula, ikosi yokuthoma eyakhethwa nguZimu.” Yeke uDavida wathi: “Ngizaninikela zona.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Ikosi yambabalela uMefi-Bhotjheti umsa kaJonathani umsa kaSawula ngebanga lesifungo esenziwa phambi kwakaSomnini phakathi kwakaDavida noJonathani. 
2Samuel21:8 Kodwana ikosi yathatha amadodana amabili wakaRitsipa ongomunye wemingena kaSawula. URitsipa gade kuyindodakazi ka-Aya. Amabizo wamadodana lawo gade kungu-Aramoni noMefi-Bhotjheti. Godu ikosi yathatha amadodana amahlanu wendodakazi kaSawula uMikali. UMikali gade kumfazi ka-Adriyeli umsa kaBharzilayi weMerhola. 
2Samuel21:9 Yawanikela ezandleni zamaGibiyoni, awabulala awaneka embundwini e-aldarini lakaSomnini. Afa ndawonye wolikhomba njalo, abulawa emalangeni wokuthoma wokuvuna njengombana bekuthonywa ukuvunwa kwebhali." 
2Samuel21:10 URitsipa indodakazi ka-Aya wazendlalela ingubo yesizilo phezu kwedwala. Wagada iindumbezo kusukela ekuthomeni kokuvunwa bekwaba sikhathi sokuna kwezulu. Azange avumele bona zithintwe madlanga emini nanyana abophagana ebusuku. 
2Samuel21:11 Kuthe lokha uDavida nezwa ngalokho okwenziwa nguRitsipa umngena kaSawula," 
2Samuel21:12 wakhamba wayokuthatha amathambo kaSawula newendodanakhe uJonathani emphakathini weJabetjhi-Giliyadi. (Abantu beJabetjhi bebawathethe ngemsitheleni esirhodlweni seBhethe-Tjhani lapha bebaphanyekwe khona maFilista ngemva kobana amadlhe uSawula eGilibowa.) 
2Samuel21:13 UDavida waletha amathambo kaSawula newakaJonathani kanye newabanye ababulawa bebaphanyekwa eGibiyoni. 
2Samuel21:14 Bafihla woke amathambo lawo ethuneni lakaKitjhi uyise kaSawula, eTsela kwaBhenjamini. Ngemva kobana sele benze koke ikosi eyabayala ngakho, uZimu waphendula umthandazo wenarha." 
2Samuel21:15 Kwabuya godu kwaba nepi phakathi kwamaFilista nama-Israyeli. UDavida waphuma namabuthwakhe wehla wayokulwa namaFilista eGobo. Lokha uDavida nathoma ukudinwa, umFilista wadlumbana bona angambulala. UmFilista lo gade ayitsitsirimba, anomkhonto onetlobo enobudisi obungaphezu kwamakhilogremu amathathu begodu ahlome nangesabula etja." 
2Samuel21:16 Kodwana u-Abitjhayi umsa kaTseruya walamulela uDavida, wamadlha umFilista loyo wambulala. Ngemva kwalokho amabutho kaDavida afunga kuye athi: “Angeze bewusakhamba nathi epini, asifuni bonyana ilanga lakwa-Israyeli licime.”" 
2Samuel21:17 Kwaba nenye godu ipi namaFilista eGobo. Ngesikhatheso uSibekayi weRhutjha wabulala uSafi enye yeentsitsirimba. 
2Samuel21:18 Kenye ipi namaFilista eGobo, u-Elirhanana umsa kaJare-Oregimi weBhethe-Lehema wabulala uGoliyadi weGathi. Umphini womkhontwakhe wawulingana nomphekgho." 
2Samuel21:19 Nakenye godu ipi eyaba seGathi, kwakunendoda ede enemino esithandathu esandleni ngasinye namazwani asithandathu enyaweni ngalinye, okuba matjhumi amabili nane sele kukoke. Nayo gade ingenye yeentsitsirimba." 
2Samuel21:20 Yathi lokha nayitlhorholoja ama-Israyeli, uJonathani umsa kaTjhimeyi, umfowabo kaDavida wayibulala." 
2Samuel21:21 Laba abane gade baziinzukulwana zakaRafa eGathi, bafa babulawa nguDavida namabuthwakhe." 
2Samuel22:1 UDavida wadumisa uSomnini ngokuvuma ingoma le lokha uSomnini namsindisa esandleni sazo zoke izitha zakhe ngitjho nakuSawula. 
2Samuel22:2 Wabhina wathi: USomnini ulidwala lami, isiphephelo sami nomsindisami." 
2Samuel22:3 UZimami ulirholo lami engiphephela kilo; usihlangu sami namandla wesindiswami; uyisikami, isiviko sami nomenyelami. Nakibondwendweni uyangisindisa." 
2Samuel22:4 USomnini ufanele ukudunyiswa: Nangilila kuye ungisindisa ezitheni zami. 
2Samuel22:5 Ngenganyelwa magagasi wokufa, iinrhurhula ezibhubhisako zafuna ukungigubuzesa." 
2Samuel22:6 Iinkawule zezindla bezingirarele; ngabandamelwa zizifu zokufa. 
2Samuel22:7 Ematlhuwenami ngalilela uSomnini, ngarhuwelela uZimami. Wezwa ilizwi lami asethempelini lakhe, isililo sami safika eendlebeni zakhe." 
2Samuel22:8 Iphasi ladengezela begodu lahlengezela, iinsekelo zamazulu zasikinyeka, zathuthumela ngombana gade asilingekile." 
2Samuel22:9 USomnini nasilingekileko ufana nentabamlilo ethunya intuthu nekhafula amalangabi nekehla. 
2Samuel22:10 Wavula amazulu wehlela phasi; ngaphasi kweenyawo zakhe kuthe kupe amafu anzima tshu. 
2Samuel22:11 Kwaba ngathi uphapha ngekerubhi emafini, isiwuruwuru saba ngasuthi maphiko aphapha ngawo." 
2Samuel22:12 Wagubuzeswa lilifu elinzima njengesisitho, namafu wezulu amnyama wemkayini." 
2Samuel22:13 Ebuphaziphazini bobukhona bakhe kwamekeza, kwaphambana imibani." 
2Samuel22:14 USomnini waduma asemafini, kwezwakala ilizwi longoPhezulu." 
2Samuel22:15 Wadubula imisubi kwaphadlhalala izitha zami, zadiyazeliswa kumekezela kobuphaziphazi bombani." 
2Samuel22:16 Lokha uSomnini navuthela ummoya ngeempumulo, akhalima, ukuzika kwelwandle kwambuleka, iinsekelo zephasi zanekeka ebaleni." 
2Samuel22:17 Welula isandla sakhe aphezulu wangidzwebula; wangenyula emanzini azikileko. 
2Samuel22:18 Wangisindisa esitheni sami esinamandla nebajamelanini bami egade banamandla kunami. 
2Samuel22:19 Bangithelekela ngelanga lehlekelele, kodwana uSomnini waba msizami." 
2Samuel22:20 Wangikhupha emkghothweni wangibeka etjhatjhalazini, wangisindisa ngombana angithanda." 
2Samuel22:21 USomnini wangivuza ngombana nginganamlandu; wangisiza ngombana ngimsulwa. 
2Samuel22:22 Iye ngilondile iindlela zakaSomnini; azange ngenze okumbi ngokuhlanuka uZimu. 
2Samuel22:23 Ngihlala ngilonda imithethwakhe; azange ngiphambuke emiyalwenakhe. 
2Samuel22:24 Bengisolo ngiphetha ilizwi lakhe, ngizilondile ngaba kude necala." 
2Samuel22:25 USomnini wangivuza ngombana nginganamlandu, ngimsulwa phambi kwakhe." 
2Samuel22:26 Somnini, uziveza uthembekile kabathembekileko, uziveza umsulwa kabamsulwa," 
2Samuel22:27 nakohlanzekileko uziveza uhlanzekile, kodwana oneengwegwe akaphunyurhi kuwe." 
2Samuel22:28 Usindisa abazithobileko, uqaphela abazigqajako ubehlise." 
2Samuel22:29 Ukukhanya kwami wena Somninami, utjhugulula ubumnyama engikibo ubenze ukukhanya." 
2Samuel22:30 Ngesizo lakho angeze ngakhisimela; ngoZimami ngingagiriza umthangala wedorobho. 
2Samuel22:31 UZimu akaphosisi, ilizwi lakaSomnini alisoleki. USomnini usiphephelo sabo boke ababalekela kuye." 
2Samuel22:32 Ngubani uZimu ngaphandle kwakaSomnini? Ngubani idwala ngaphandle kwakaZimu? 
2Samuel22:33 NguZimu ongihlomisa ngamandla nowenza indlelami ilunge. 
2Samuel22:34 Ungenza ngiqhanase njengehlangu, angivumele ngijame eenqongolweni." 
2Samuel22:35 Ubandulela izandla zami ukulwa, imikhonwami ikghona ukucupha umsebe wekoporo." 
2Samuel22:36 Ukungivikela kwakho kungenza ngihlule; nawuphendula imithandazwami ngiqina idolo. 
2Samuel22:37 Ugangadela indlelami, bonyana ngingatshinyeki iingogoriyana." 
2Samuel22:38 Ngagijimisa izitha zami ngazifihliza; azange ngijike zingakafi zoke nya. 
2Samuel22:39 Ngaziqoba nya, zaparalala zangasavuka; zarabhalala ngaphasi kweenyawo zami." 
2Samuel22:40 Wangihlomisa ngamandla wokulwa, wathobisa izitha zami phambi kwami." 
2Samuel22:41 Wenza izitha zami bona zifulathele ipi, ngarhayila amanabami." 
2Samuel22:42 Zarhuwelela zifuna isizo, kodwana azange kube khona ongazisindisa; zalilela uSomnini, kodwana azange aziphendule." 
2Samuel22:43 Ngazitshidlha zasileka kwanga lithuli lehlabathi; ngazigadanga njengeensila zeendledlana. 
2Samuel22:44 Somnini, ungisindisile nangisahlelwa sisizwe sekhethu, wangenza ngaba yihloko yezizwe ezitjhili. Abantu bakosobantu bayangikhothamela," 
2Samuel22:45 nemiqhamuka iyathuthumela phambi kwami, yenze engikutjhoko." 
2Samuel22:46 Imiqhamuka iyangesaba, iza itatazela kusukela esiphephelweni sayo." 
2Samuel22:47 USomnini uyaphila! Alidunyiswe idwala lami! Akaphakanyiswe uZimu, olidwala nomsindisami!" 
2Samuel22:48 UnguZimu ongibuyiselelako, obeka izizwe ngaphasi kwami," 
2Samuel22:49 ongithukulula ezitheni zami. Ungiphakamisela ngaphezu kwezitha zami, angisindise kibondwendweni." 
2Samuel22:50 Nje-ke ngizakudumisa, Somninami, hlangana nezizwe; ngibhine iingoma zokudumisa ebizweni lakho." 
2Samuel22:51 Unikela ikosi ayibekileko ukuhlula okukhulu; akhombise umusa ongapheliko kabazesiweko bakhe, kuDavida neenzukulwana zakhe isiphelani." 
2Samuel23:1 Le yingoma yokugcina eyathonywa nguDavida: Ikulumo kaDavida umsa kaJese, ikulumo yendoda eyaphakanyiswa khulu; indoda ezeswe nguZimu kaJakopo, umtloli weengoma ezihle khulu kwa-Israyeli." 
2Samuel23:2 UMoya kaSomnini wakhuluma ngami; amezwakhe gade aselimini lami. 
2Samuel23:3 UZimu ka-Israyeli wakhuluma, iDwala laka-Israyeli lathi kimi: Obusa abantu ngokulunga, obusa ngokwesaba uZimu," 
2Samuel23:4 ufana nomkhanyo wokuphuma kwelanga ekuseni elinganalifu, unjengomkhanyo wokwembula kwezulu elivuselela utjani ehlabathini." 
2Samuel23:5 Ukubusa kwami kukhambisana nentando kaZimu; wenze isivumelwano esingapheliko nami, esiqinileko nesingasoze sephulwa." 
2Samuel23:6 Kodwana abambi bafana nesithukghu sameva esisitjhulweko: Asithintwa ngezandla. 
2Samuel23:7 Ofuna ukusiwola usebenzisa isikghopholo nanyana umphini womkhonto, sitjhiswa besilahlelwe khonapho." 
2Samuel23:8 Lawa mabizo weengorho zakaDavida: UJotjheba-Bhasitjhebethi umTarhikemoni gade amrholi wesiqhema sabathathu esaziwako. Wabulala abantu abamakhulu abunane ngesilembe ngehlandla linye. 
2Samuel23:9 Ingorho yesibili kwakungu-Eliyazari umsa kaDodo umArhorhi. Wabengomunye wesiqhema sabathathu ebegade sinoDavida mhla batjhijila amaFilista nahlangene ukuyokulwa. Abantu bakwa-Israyeli babaleka," 
2Samuel23:10 kodwana yena wajama wamadlha amaFilista isandla sakhe besakokorana phezu kwesabula. USomnini wehlisa ukuhlula okukhulu mhlokho. Amabutho abuyela ku-Eliyazari arhabele ukuyokukhuthuza iindumbu kwaphela. 
2Samuel23:11 Ingorho yesithathu kwakunguTjhama umsa ka-Agiye umHarari. AmaFilista ahlangana eLerhi lapha gade kunesimu yeenhlumaya khona. Kwathi lokha amabutho wakwa-Israyeli nabaleka amaFilista," 
2Samuel23:12 uTjhama yena waba nesibindi, wajama phakathi kwesimu. Wayivikela, wamadlha phasi amaFilista ngapha nangapha. USomnini wakwehlisa njalo-ke ukuhlula okukhulu." 
2Samuel23:13 Godu kwakunesiqhema samatjhumi amathathu. Ngesikhathi sokuvuna, kwaphuma iingorho ezintathu kezimatjhumi amathathu zeza kuDavida erharheni le-Adulamu, khonapho ipi yamaFilista yayihlome emRhobeni wabeZimu." 
2Samuel23:14 Ngesikhatheso uDavida gade aserholweni, umkhambathi wamaFilista useBhethe-Lehema." 
2Samuel23:15 UDavida womela amanzi wathi: “Uthi ngomile na, inga kungaba nomuntu ongayongikhelela amanzi wokusela emthonjeni ohlanu kwesango leBhethe-Lehema!”" 
2Samuel23:16 Nje-ke iingorho ezintathu kezimatjhumi amathathu zaratha phakathi kwamaFilista zayokukha amanzi emthonjeni ohlanu kwesango leBhethe-Lehema zawaletha kuDavida. Kodwana uDavida wala ukuwasela, esikhundleni salokho, wawathulula phambi kwakaSomnini wathi:" 
2Samuel23:17 “Kosami, angeze bengithome! Kuzakuba ngathi ngisela iingazi zabantu abadele ukuphila kwabo.” Yeke uDavida azange asawasela. Zazinjalo-ke iindaba zeengorho ezintathwezi." 
2Samuel23:18 U-Abitjhayi umnakwabo kaJowabi umsa kaTseruya bekayikulu yesiqhema samatjhumi amathathu. Wabulala abantu abamakhulu amathathu ngomkhonto. Ngalokho waduma njengeengorho ezintathu ezakhelela uDavida amanzi. 
2Samuel23:19 Waduma khulu bewadlula iingorho ezimatjhumi amathathu. Waba yindunazo, kodwana idumo lakhe azange lidlule lezintathu zokuthoma." 
2Samuel23:20 UBhenaya weKhabitsiyeli umsa kaJehojada isihlabani sengorho, gade adume ngezinto ezinengi. Wamadlha amadoda amabili okuthiwa “mabhubezi wakwaMowabi.” Nguye godu owangena ngemgodini wabulala ibhubezi mhlana kukhithika igabhogo." 
2Samuel23:21 Godu wamadlha itsitsirimba yomGibhide. UmGibhide wabephethe umkhonto, kodwana uBhenaya wamdumela kunjalo ngentonga. Wahluthula umkhonto esandleni somGibhide wambulala ngawo." 
2Samuel23:22 Zazinjalo-ke iindaba zakaBhenaya umsa kaJehojada, naye waduma njengeengorho ezintathu zesibili." 
2Samuel23:23 Wahlonitjhwa khulu phakathi kwabamatjhumi amathathu, kodwana azange abalwe kilabo abathathu bokuthoma. UDavida wambeka bonyana alawule amancusakhe." 
2Samuel23:24 Hlangana nabamatjhumi amathathu gade kunalaba: U-Asayeli umnakwabo kaJowabi, u-Elirhanana umsa kaDodo weBhethe-Lehema," 
2Samuel23:25 uTjhama weRharodi no-Elikha weRharodi," 
2Samuel23:26 uRheletsi wePalethi, u-Ira umsa ka-Ikhetjhi weTekhowa," 
2Samuel23:27 u-Abiyezeri we-Anatothi, uMebunayi weRhutjha," 
2Samuel23:28 uTsalmoni we-Arhorhi, uMaharayi weNethofa," 
2Samuel23:29 uRhelebi umsa kaBhahana weNethofa, u-Ithayi umsa kaRibayi weGibeya kwaBhenjamini," 
2Samuel23:30 uBhenaya wePirathoni, uHidayi wangemirhobeni yeGahatjha," 
2Samuel23:31 u-Abi-Alboni we-Araba, u-Azimavethe weBharirhumi," 
2Samuel23:32 u-Eliyarhiba weTjhalibhoni, uJatjheni weRhuni, uJonathani" 
2Samuel23:33 umsa kaTjhama weHarari, u-Arhiyamu umsa kaTjharari we-Arari," 
2Samuel23:34 u-Elifelethi umsa ka-Arhasibayi weMahaka, u-Eliyamu umsa ka-Arhitofeli weGiloni," 
2Samuel23:35 uRhetsiro weKarameli, uPaharayi we-Arabi," 
2Samuel23:36 u-Yigala umsa kaNathani weTsoba, uBhani weGadi," 
2Samuel23:37 uTselekhe umAmoni, uNarharayi weBhiyerothi, usonkhande kaJowabi umsa kaTseruya," 
2Samuel23:38 u-Ira weJetere noGarebe weJetere 
2Samuel23:39 kanye no-Uriya umHite. Bebamatjhumi amathathu nalikhomba nasele baboke. 
2Samuel24:1 Godu ubukhali bakaSomnini behlela phezu kwaka-Israyeli. USomnini watjitjizela uDavida bona ajamelane no-Israyeli wathi: “Khamba ufese ubale u-Israyeli noJuda.” 
2Samuel24:2 Yeke uDavida wathi kuJowabi neenduna zamabutho: “Khamba uqale kizo zoke iinkoro zakwa-Israyeli ukusuka kwaDani ngetlhagwini ukuya eBheritjheba ngesewula, utlolise amadoda wepi ukuze ngazi bonyana mangaki.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Kodwana uJowabi waphendula uDavida wathi: “Inga uSomnini uZimakho angandisa amabutho kalikhulukhulu, godu inga amehlo wekosami angawabona. Alo, kubayini ikosami ifuna kwenziwe njalo?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Kodwana uDavida wahlula uJowabi neenduna zepi ngamezwi; basuka phambi kwakhe bakhamba bayokutlolisa amadoda wepi wakwa-Israyeli. 
2Samuel24:5 Bayama iJordani bathoma ukubala e-Aroyeri, ngemlanjeni ongesewula yedorobho. Ukusuka lapho badlulela eGadi neJayezere." 
2Samuel24:6 Banqomba ngetlhagwini badabula eGiliyadi bebayokufika eKadetjhi hlanu kwenarha yamaHite. Ukusuka lapho baya eDani-Jayani bajikela ngetjingalanga baya eTsidoni. 
2Samuel24:7 Badlulela eTirosi idorobho elinemithangala nakiwo woke amadorobho wamaHivi newamaKanana. Bagcina ngokuya eBheritjheba ngesewula yakwaJuda. 
2Samuel24:8 Ngemva kobana sele bayibhadule yoke inarha, babuyela eJerusalema ngemva kweenyanga ezilithoba namalanga amatjhumi amabili." 
2Samuel24:9 UJowabi wazisa uDavida ngesibalo samadoda wepi: Kwa-Israyeli kwaphuma iinkakaramba zamadoda aziinkulungwana ezimakhulu abunane akwazi ukulwa ngesabula, kwaJuda khona kwaphuma iinkulungwana ezimakhulu amahlanu." 
2Samuel24:10 Ngemva kwalokho uDavida wathoma ukuzisola ehliziyweni ngokubala kwakhe amadoda wepi, wathi kuSomnini: “Maye mina, ngonile ngesenzo samesi. Ngiyabawa Somnini, libalela umlandu wencekwakho. Ubudlhadlha abelatjhwa.”" 
2Samuel24:11 UDavida navuka ekuseni ngakusasa, uGadi umphorofidi ombonakhe gade sele afunyene ilizwi lakaSomnini elithi:" 
2Samuel24:12 “Khamba ufese uthi kuDavida uZimu uthi, ‘Ngikunikela izinto ezintathu. Khetha kube kunye kwazo ofuna bona ngikuhlunguphaze ngayo.’ ”" 
2Samuel24:13 UGadi waya-ke kuDavida wathi kuye: “Khetha phakathi kokwehlelwa sisomiso enarhenakho iminyaka emithathu yoke, nanyana iinyanga ezintathu unganasikhundla njengomqasa ugijinyiswa zizitha zakho, nanyana amalanga amathathu wamatshwenyeko enarhenakho. Cabangisisa kuhle, nawuqedileko ungitjele ukuze ngibe negama engilibuyisela kongithumileko.”" 
2Samuel24:14 UDavida wathi kuGadi: “Ngisenyakanyakeni nanginje. Kungcono siwele ezandleni zakaSomnini ngombana yena umusakhe mkhulu; ngingaba yini ezandleni zabantu.” 
2Samuel24:15 Ngebangelo-ke uSomnini warhadla inarha yakwa-Israyeli ngamanikelela ukusuka mhlokho ekuseni bekwaba sikhathi esibekiweko. Kwafa abantu abaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi alikhomba ukusuka kwaDani ngetlhagwini ukuya eBheritjheba ngesewula. 
2Samuel24:16 Kuthe lokha ingilozi nayelula isandla bona irhayile iJerusalema, uSomnini warhawuka ngebanga lamatlhuwo wathi engilozini leyo: “Kahle! Kwanele! Khawula kwanjesi.” Ingilozi kaSomnini gade iseselelweni saka-Arawuna umJebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 UDavida nabona ingilozi egade irhadla abantu wathi kuSomnini: “Ngimi owonileko ngokwenza okumbi. Abantwaba sezizimvu nje. Boneni kangaka? Isandla sakaSomnini asiwele phezu kwami nomzami.” 
2Samuel24:18 Mhlokho uGadi waya kuDavida wathi kuye: “Khuphuka bese wakhela uSomnini i-aldari eselelweni saka-Arawuna umJebusi.” 
2Samuel24:19 UDavida wakhuphuka njengombana uSomnini bekalayezele ngoGadi. 
2Samuel24:20 Lokha u-Arawuna nambona eza neensebenzi zakhe, waphuma waguqa phambi kwakhe wahloma ihloko phasi," 
2Samuel24:21 wathi: “Ndabezitha, kubayini ikosami ikhambele incekwayo?” UDavida wathi: “Ngize ukuzokuthenga iselelo sakho bonyana ngakhe i-aldari lakaSomnini khona kuzakukhawuka amatshwenyeko ehlele abantu.”" 
2Samuel24:22 U-Arawuna wathi kuDavida: “Ikosami ayithathe nanyana yini eyibona iyihle inikele ngayo. Nanzi neenkabi zomnikelo wokutjhiswa, nanzi neenleyi zesibhulo kanye namajogi weenkabi kobana kubaswe." 
2Samuel24:23 Maye kosami, mina Arawuna ngithi ikosi ayizenzele.” Godu wathi u-Arawuna: “Inga uSomnini uZimakho angamukela umhlabelwakho.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Kodwana uDavida wathi ku-Arawuna: “Awa, angikukhokhele. Angeze bengithome ngenzele uSomnini umhlabelo wokutjhiswa wasimahla.” Nje-ke uDavida wathenga iselelweso kanye neenkabi ngamatjhumi amahlanu wamatjhekeli wesiliva." 
2Samuel24:25 UDavida wakhela uSomnini i-aldari lapho bewenza imihlabelo yokutjhiswa neminikelo yetjhebiswano. USomnini waphendula umthandazo wenarha, kwathi amatshwenyeko ehlele u-Israyeli akhawuka." 
1Kings1:1 Ikosi uDavida gade sele amdala, seyiphaphela phasi; iingazi zakhe bezingasatjhisi ngitjho nanyana bambhibha ngemikghadi." 
1Kings1:2 Iinceku zakhe zathi kuye: “Asifune intombi engakakhonjwa kobana izokutjheja ikosi, ibe mhlengikazayo, iyisingathe ukuze ikosethu ifuthumale.”" 
1Kings1:3 Bafuna isiphalaphala sentombi kiyo yoke imikhawulo yakwa-Israyeli, bathola u-Abitjhagi umTjhunemi, bamletha ekosini." 
1Kings1:4 Kwakusiphalaphala sakanomhlekhabo, ngambala waba mhlengikazi wekosi, wayonga kodwana ikosi ayizange imeyame." 
1Kings1:5 Kwasuka u-Adoniya indodana kaRhagithi wazibetha isifuba wathi: “Mina ngizakuba yikosi.” Wazilungisela iinjomani neenkarana wazifumanela namatjhumi amahlanu wamavulandlela. 
1Kings1:6 U-Adoniya gade amhlamazana, alama u-Absalomu. Uyise gade amtotosa, azange akhe amkhalime nanyana ambuze athi: “Wenzelani into enje?”" 
1Kings1:7 U-Adoniya wazwana noJowabi umsa kaTseruya no-Abiyatari umphristi, bamsekela." 
1Kings1:8 Kodwana umphristi uTsadokhi, uBhenaya umsa kaJehojada, uNathani umphorofidi, uTjhimeyi noReyi kanye neengorho zakaDavida azange bazibandakanye no-Adoniya." 
1Kings1:9 U-Adoniya wenza umhlabelo ngezimvu, iinkomo kanye namathole anonisiweko elitjeni leZorhelethi eduze nomthombo weRogeli. Wamema boke abanakwabo, amadodana wekosi nabo boke abantu bakwaJuda ebegade baziinkhulu zekosini," 
1Kings1:10 kodwana azange ameme umphorofidi uNathani, uBhenaya, iingorho ngitjho nomfowabo uSolomoni." 
1Kings1:11 UNathani wabuza uBhathi-Tjheba, unina kaSolomoni wathi: “Besele uzwile bonyana u-Adoniya indodana kaRhagithi sele azibeke ikosi ngaphandle kokwazisa ikosethu uDavida na?" 
1Kings1:12 Nje-ke ngithi angikulume indlebe bonyana ungayisindisa njani ipilwakho kanye neyendodanakho uSolomoni. 
1Kings1:13 Khamba uye ekosini uDavida ufese uthi, ‘Ikosami, azange ifunge kimi, mina ncekukazayo, bonyana nakanjani uSolomoni indodanami izakuba yikosi emva kwayo begodu ihlale esihlalweni sayo sobukhosi na? Alo, u-Adoniya sele ayikosi nakutheni?’" 
1Kings1:14 Uzakuthi nawusakhuluma nekosi njalo, mina ngivele; ngifakazele amezwakho.”" 
1Kings1:15 Yeke uBhathi-Tjheba wakhamba wayokubona ikosi. Ikosi beyingekumbenayo, iluphele khulu ihlengwa ngu-Abitjhagi umTjhunemi." 
1Kings1:16 Wafika wakhothama uBhathi-Tjheba waguqa phambi kwayo. Ikosi yambuza yathi: “Ubekwa yini lapha?” 
1Kings1:17 Waphendula wathi: “Ikosami yafunga yaqinisa kimi, incekukazayo, phambi kwakaSomnini uZimu yathi, ‘Ngithi uSolomoni indodanakho uzakuthatha iintambo zobukhosi emva kwami, abe ahlale esihlalweni sami sobukhosi.’" 
1Kings1:18 Kodwana u-Adoniya sele ayikosi ngaphandle kokwazisa ikosami," 
1Kings1:19 bewenze nomhlabelo ongangobaba ngomhlambi weenkomo namathole anonisiweko kanye nezimvu. Umeme u-Abiyatari umphristi noJowabi induna yepi kanye nawo woke amadodanekosi, kodwana watjhiya uSolomoni incekwakho." 
1Kings1:20 Nje-ke ngithi, kazi amehlwabo boke kwa-Israyeli lapha aphezu kwekosami, balindele ukuzwa kiyo bonyana ngubani ozokuhlala esihlalweni sekosami emva kwayo." 
1Kings1:21 Nakungasinjalo, ikosami ingakhothama la, mina nendodanami uSolomoni sizakukhonjwa ngomuno kuthiwe simavukelambuso.”" 
1Kings1:22 Kuthe asakhuluma nekosi njalo, kwangena uNathani umphorofidi." 
1Kings1:23 Babikela ikosi bathi: “Umphorofidi uNathani uyathokoza.” Bamngenisa, wafika phambi kwekosi waguqa wahloma ihloko phasi," 
1Kings1:24 wathi ekosini: “Ikosami ibeke u-Adoniya kobanyana abe yikosi emva kwayo nokobana ahlale esihlalweni sekosami na? 
1Kings1:25 Igidigidi ligidigidi ngaphandlapha namhlanjesi, bewenze nomhlabelo ngomhlambi weenkomo, namathole anonisiweko kanye nezimvu. Umeme woke amadodanekosi, wamema neenduna zepi kanye no-Abiyatari umphristi. Ngikhuluma nje bazinikelele ngokudla nangamarhamulo esithebeni sakhe baseze bathi, ‘Bayede ngwenyama Adoniya!’" 
1Kings1:26 Kodwana mina ncekwakho, umphristi uTsadokhi, uBhenaya umsa kaJehojada kanye nencekwakho uSolomoni azange asimeme." 
1Kings1:27 Kghani kungaba sisenzo sekosami esenze ngaphandle kokwazisa iinceku zayo kobana ngubani ofanele ahlale esihlalweni sekosami emva kwayo?” 
1Kings1:28 Ikosi uDavida yathi: “Ngibizelani uBhathi-Tjheba loya.” Yeke wangena wajama phambi kwekosi. 
1Kings1:29 Ikosi yenza isifungo yathi: “Ngifunga uSomnini owangisindisa kiyo yoke inyakanyaka," 
1Kings1:30 ngithi namhlanje ngizakuphumelelisa engakuthembisa khona ngakufungela ngoSomnini uZimu ka-Israyeli: USolomoni indodanakho uzakuba yikosi emva kwami begodu uzakuhlala esihlalweni sami sobukhosi.” 
1Kings1:31 UBhathi-Tjheba waguqa phambi kwekosi wahloma ihloko phasi wathi: “Inga ikosami ingwenyama uDavida ingaphila isiphelani!” 
1Kings1:32 Ikosi uDavida yathi: “Ngenisani umphristi uTsadokhi, umphorofidi uNathani kanye noBhenaya umsa kaJehojada.” Kuthe lokha nabafika phambi kwekosi," 
1Kings1:33 yathi kibo: “Thathani iinsebenzi zami bese nithatha indodanami uSolomoni niyikhweze phezu kwemeyila niyehlisele eGihoni. 
1Kings1:34 Nanifika lapho, wena mphristi Tsadokhi nawe mphorofidi Nathani zesani uSolomoni bona abe yikosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli. Nivuthele ipalapala nirhuwelele nithi, ‘Bayede ngwenyama Solomoni!’" 
1Kings1:35 Nanisuka lapho, nikhuphuke naye ukuze azokuhlala esihlalweni sami sobukhosi. Nguye okufanele abuse esikhundleni sami. Ngibeke yena bonyana abe mbusi phezu kwaka-Israyeli noJuda.”" 
1Kings1:36 UBhenaya umsa kaJehojada wathi ekosini: “Akube njengokutjho kwekosi! Inga uSomnini uZimu wekosami angakuzalisekisa lokho. 
1Kings1:37 Njengombana uZimu waba nekosami, inga angenza njalo nakuSolomoni enze umbuswakhe bonyana udlondlobale udlule wekosami ingwenyama uDavida!”" 
1Kings1:38 Yeke umphristi uTsadokhi, umphorofidi uNathani, uBhenaya umsa kaJehojada, amaKereti namaPeleti behla bakhweza uSolomoni phezu kwemeyila yekosi uDavida banqomba naye eGihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Umphristi uTsadokhi wathatha iphondo lamafutha etendeni elicwengileko wazesa uSolomoni. Bavuthela ipalapala abantu boke barhuwelela bathi: “Bayede ngwenyama Solomoni!” 
1Kings1:40 Boke abantu benyuka bamlandela, babetha amafludu bajekezela bahlaba iinsondo bekwadengezela iphasi ngebanga lomdumo." 
1Kings1:41 U-Adoniya nabo boke abamenywa egade banaye balizwa itjhadelo lokha nabaqedelela umnyanyabo. Kuthe lokha uJowabi nezwa kulila ipalapala, wabuza wathi: “Litjhada lani elisedorobheneli?”" 
1Kings1:42 Kuthe asakhuluma njalo, kwafika uJonathani umsa ka-Abiyatari umphristi. U-Adoniya wathi: “Ngena! Indoda eyazisa njengawe nje ifuze bona iza nezimnandi.”" 
1Kings1:43 UJonathani wathi: “Ubethe phasi! Ikosethu ingwenyama uDavida ibeke uSolomoni bona abe yikosi. 
1Kings1:44 Ikosi ithumele umphristi uTsadokhi, umphorofidi uNathani, uBhenaya umsa kaJehojada, amaKereti namaPeleti bona bamkhweze imeyila yekosi." 
1Kings1:45 Nje-ke umphristi uTsadokhi nomphorofidi uNathani bamzese eGihoni bona abe yikosi. Nabasuka lapho benyuka beza edorobhenapha bakhamba bajekezela, idorobho loke lahlokoma. Litjhada lakhona-ke enilizwakweli." 
1Kings1:46 Ngaphezu kwalokho, uSolomoni selahlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi." 
1Kings1:47 Godu neenduna zebukhosini sezifikile ukuzokuthokozisa ikosethu ingwenyama uDavida zithi, ‘Inga uZimakho angenza bona ibizo lakaSolomoni lazeke khulu kunelakho nobukhosi bakhe bunabe kunebakho!’ Ikosi yakhothama yadumisa isembhedenayo" 
1Kings1:48 yathi, ‘Akudunyiswe uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ovumele bonyana amehlwami abone loyo ongilandelako ebukhosini bami namhlanje.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Nabezwa lokhu, boke abamenywa baka-Adoniya baba nevalo baphuma ngesibuya." 
1Kings1:50 Kodwana u-Adoniya, ngokwesaba uSolomoni, wakhamba wayokukakarela iimpondo ze-aldari." 
1Kings1:51 USolomoni watjelwa bona u-Adoniya ukakarelene neempondo ze-aldari ngombana wesaba ikosi uSolomoni. Uthi ikosi uSolomoni ayifunge kuye namhlanje kobana angeze abulala incekwayo ngesabula. 
1Kings1:52 USolomoni wathi: “Nange angazibonakalisa bonyana umumuntu othembekileko, angeze adliwa mkhonto; kodwana nange kungatholakala ubukhohlakali kuye, ngiqinisile ngithi uzakufa.”" 
1Kings1:53 Ikosi uSolomoni yathumela amadoda afese amnamathulula e-aldarini ehla naye. U-Adoniya wafika waguqa wahloma ihloko phasi phambi kwekosi uSolomoni. USolomoni wathi kuye: “Khamba uye kwakho.” 
1Kings2:1 Kwathi nasele kusondele isikhathi sokobana uDavida ahlongakale, wayala indodanakhe uSolomoni" 
1Kings2:2 wathi: “Sengizokukhamba ngiziyele kwamhlaba. Nje-ke, qina amandla msanami, uzibonakalise bonyana uyindoda emadodeni." 
1Kings2:3 Ulonde okufunwa nguSomnini uZimakho: Khamba eendleleni zakhe, ulonde iimiso nemiyalwakhe, imithetho neemfuneko zakhe njengombana kutlolwe emthethweni kaMosi, ukuze uphumelele kikho koke okwenzako nalokho onqophe ukukwenza." 
1Kings2:4 Phetha koke lokhu ukuze uSomnini aphumelelise isithembiso sakhe kimi nathi, ‘Nange iinzukulwana zakho zingatjheja indlela eziphila ngayo, zikhambe ngokwethembeka phambi kwami, ziphelele ngeenhliziyo nangemiphefumulwazo, angeze wabhalelwa kubeka umuntu esihlalweni sobukhosi kwa-Israyeli.’" 
1Kings2:5 “Uyazazela-ke nawe bonyana uJowabi umsa kaTseruya wenzani kimi lokha nabulala iinduna ezimbili zebutho lakwa-Israyeli, u-Abineri umsa kaNeri no-Amasa umsa kaJeteri. Kwathi kusikhathi sokuthula waphalaza iingazi zabo kwanga kusepini, watjhatjha ibhande edinini lakhe namapatlagwana eenyaweni zakhe ngeengazi zabo." 
1Kings2:6 Bona ukuqeda ngaye ngendlela ongakghona ngayo, kodwana ungamlisi azifele ngokuthula." 
1Kings2:7 “Yiba nesisa emadodaneni kaBharzilayi weGiliyadi, uwavumele abe hlangana nalabo abagoma etafuleni lakho ngombana angisekela lokha nangibaleka umfowenu u-Absalomu." 
1Kings2:8 “Ukhumbule-ke bonyana kunoTjhimeyi umsa kaGera umBhenjamini weBharhurimu, owangijikijela ngazo zoke iinhlamba mhlana ngiya eMarhanayimu. Wewuka wangihlangabeza eJordani, ngafunga kuye ngathi, ‘NgoZimu ngiqinisile ngithi angeze ngakuqunta ihloko ngesabula.’" 
1Kings2:9 Nokho angitjho bonyana umthathe njengomuntu omsulwa. Wena uyindoda ehlakaniphileko, uzazibonisela ngaye. Akafe ngengongoma.”" 
1Kings2:10 UDavida wahlongakala, wafihlwa eMzini kaDavida." 
1Kings2:11 Wabusa iminyaka ematjhumi amane kwa-Israyeli. Wabusa iminyaka elikhomba eRhebroni; ematjhumi amathathu nantathu eJerusalema. 
1Kings2:12 Nje-ke uSolomoni wahlala esihlalweni sobukhosi sakayise uDavida, umbuswakhe wahlonywa ngokunzinzileko." 
1Kings2:13 Kwasuka u-Adoniya indodana kaRhagithi waya kuBhathi-Tjheba unina kaSolomoni. UBhathi-Tjheba wambuza wathi: “Uze ngokuthula na?” Waphendula wathi: “Iye, ngize ngokuthula.”" 
1Kings2:14 Godu wathi: “Kunento engifuna ukuyikhuluma nawe.” UBhathi-Tjheba wathi: “Yiza nazo.” 
1Kings2:15 Waraga-ke u-Adoniya wathi: “Njengombana wazi, umbuso bewungewami. Woke u-Israyeli gade aqale mina bonyana ngizakuba yikosi. Kodwana kube nomphambo, iintambo zaphathwa ngumfowethu. Nokho-ke lokho ukwabelwe nguZimu." 
1Kings2:16 Yeke nginento yinye tere engifuna ukuyikhombela kuwapha. Ngibawa bonyana ungali.” UBhathi-Tjheba wathi: “Ungakhuluma.” 
1Kings2:17 U-Adoniya wathi: “Ngikhombela bonyana ungikhulumele nekosi uSolomoni ingiphe u-Abitjhagi umTjhunemi bona abe mkami. Ngiyazi angeze aba likhuni nakatjelwa nguwe.” 
1Kings2:18 UBhathi-Tjheba wathi: “Iye, awa kulungile. Ngizakukhulumela nekosi.”" 
1Kings2:19 UBhathi-Tjheba waya ekosini uSolomoni bonyana ayokukhulumela u-Adoniya. USolomoni wasikima wamhlangabeza, wafese wamkhothamela. Wahlala esihlalweni sakhe wathi akulethwe isihlalo sendlovukazi izokuhlala. UBhathi-Tjheba wahlala phasi ngesidleni sakhe." 
1Kings2:20 UBhathi-Tjheba wathi: “Nginesibawo esincani esisodwa tere engisilethe kuwapha. Ungangaleli.” Ikosi yathi: “Yewukhulume mma, angeze ngakwalela.”" 
1Kings2:21 Wakhuluma-ke uBhathi-Tjheba wathi: “Vumela u-Abitjhagi umTjhunemi kobana ende kumfowenu u-Adoniya.” 
1Kings2:22 Ikosi uSolomoni yathi endlovukazini: “Kubayini ubawa bona u-Abitjhagi umTjhunemi ende ku-Adoniya? Akusingcono usale sele umbawela nobukhosobu? Angithi vele nguye omkhulu! Iye, ubawele nomphristi u-Abiyatari noJowabi umsa kaTseruya!”" 
1Kings2:23 Ikosi uSolomoni yafunga ngoZimu yathi: “Ngithi nange u-Adoniya angafi ngesibanga sesibawo sakhesi, uZimami akangihlunguphaze, ngiphele nya!" 
1Kings2:24 NgoZimu owangibeka esihlalweni sobukhosi sakababa uDavida bewanginikela nobukhosi njengombana athembisa, ngiqinisile ngithi u-Adoniya loyo, uzakubulawa khona namhlanjesi!”" 
1Kings2:25 Ikosi uSolomoni yayala uBhenaya umsa kaJehojada bonyana abulale u-Adoniya. Ngambala wafika wamrharhabula wafa. 
1Kings2:26 Ikosi yathi kumphristi u-Abiyatari: “Buyela ekhenu e-Anatothi. Umumuntu wokufa wena. Emanyeni ngabe ngikubulele ibe thana bewungasimthwali womfaji kaSomnini uSomandla phambi kwakababa uDavida, wahlanganyela nobaba kiyo yoke imitlhagwakhe.”" 
1Kings2:27 USolomoni waqotjha u-Abiyatari esikhundleni sobuphristi bakaSomnini, kwazaliseka ilizwi lakaSomnini alikhuluma eTjhilo ngekumba ka-Eli." 
1Kings2:28 Kwathi bona uJowabi ezwe ngokwenzekileko, wabalekela etendeni lakaSomnini, wakakarela iimpondo ze-aldari. UJowabi lo gade ahlala isicathana no-Adoniya kodwana azange enze isigungu no-Absalomu." 
1Kings2:29 Ikosi uSolomoni yabikelwa bonyana uJowabi ubalekele etendeni lakaSomnini begodu use-aldarini. USolomoni wayala uBhenaya umsa kaJehojada wathi: “Khamba, ufese umrharhabule!”" 
1Kings2:30 Yeke uBhenaya wangena ngetendeni lakaSomnini wathi kuJowabi: “Ingwenyama ithi uphume lapho.” Kodwana wathi: “Ulale ulahlile, abe angiphumi lapha, dumbana ngifele khonapha.” UBhenaya wabikela ikosi wathi: “Ulikhomba libaba.”" 
1Kings2:31 Ikosi yayala uBhenaya yathi: “Nafuna ukufela lapho, akube njengamagamakhe: Mrharhabule! Umngcwabe ukuze kuhlanzeke ibizo lami kanye nekumba yakababa emlandwini wokuthululwa kweengazi ezinganamlandu okwenziwa nguJowabi." 
1Kings2:32 UZimu umthwese umlandu weengazi azithululako ngokumadlha abulale amadoda amabili, u-Abineri umsa kaNeri ogade ayinduna yebutho lakwa-Israyeli, no-Amasa umsa kaJeteri ogade ayinduna yebutho lakwaJuda. Womabili amadoda lawo gade kumadoda alungileko nangcono khulu kunaye. Koke lokhu wakwenza ngaphandle kokwazisa ubaba uDavida." 
1Kings2:33 Iingazi zabo zizakuba phezu kwakaJowabi kanye neenzukulwana zakhe isiphelani. Kodwana ukuthula kwakaZimu kuzakwanda isiphelani kuDavida neenzukulwana zakhe, esigodlweni sakhe nakilabo abazakubusa emva kwakhe.”" 
1Kings2:34 Yeke uBhenaya umsa kaJehojada wenyuka wayokurharhabula uJowabi wambulala. Wangcwatjwa endawenakhe emrhuleni. 
1Kings2:35 Ikosi uSolomoni yabeka uBhenaya umsa kaJehojada bona abe mphathibutho esikhundleni sakaJowabi begodu isikhundla saka-Abiyatari yasinikela umphristi uTsadokhi. 
1Kings2:36 Ikosi uSolomoni yathumela bona kubizwe uTjhimeyi yathi kuye: “Zakhele ikumba eJerusalema bese uzihlalela lapho, kodwana ungalingi uye kwenye indawo." 
1Kings2:37 Mhlana weqa umlanjana weKhidroni, wazi bonyana uziphekelele! Iingazi zakho zizakuba phezu kwehlokwakho.”" 
1Kings2:38 UTjhimeyi wathi ekosini: “Amagamakho lawo ahlaba ikomo. Yeke incekwakho izakwenza njengombana kusitjho ikosami.” Ngambala uTjhimeyi wahlala eJerusalema isikhathi eside. 
1Kings2:39 Kodwana ngemva kweminyaka emithathu, amakhoboka amabili wakaTjhimeyi abalekela ku-Akhitjhi umsa kaMakha, ikosi yeGathi. UTjhimeyi wabikelwa kwathiwa: “Amakhobokakho aseGathi.”" 
1Kings2:40 Khonokho uTjhimeyi wabophela udumbanakhe wanqomba ku-Akhitjhi eGathi ukuyokufuna amakhobokakhe. Kwaba kuwabuyisa kwakhe-ke amakhobokakhe eGathi. 
1Kings2:41 USolomoni wabikelwa bonyana uTjhimeyi khewaphuma eJerusalema waya eGathi bewabuya. 
1Kings2:42 Yeke ikosi uSolomoni yathi akubizwe uTjhimeyi. Yathi kuye: “Kanti azange ngikufungise phambi kwakaSomnini bengakukhalima ngathi, ‘Nange watjhida kelalapha, wazi bonyana uziphekelele?’ Mhlokho wathi kimi, ‘Amagamakho lawo ahlaba ikomo; ngizakwenza njalo.’" 
1Kings2:43 Alo-ke kutheni ungazange ulonde isithembiso sakho owasenza phambi kwakaSomnini bese ulalela umyalo engakuyala ngawo na?” 
1Kings2:44 Ikosi yathi godu kuTjhimeyi: “Ehliziywenakho wazi yoke imitjhapho owatjhaphela ngayo ubaba uDavida. Nje-ke uZimu uzokuhlawulisa ngokona kwakho. 
1Kings2:45 Kodwana mina Solomoni, uZimu uzangibusisa begodu aqinise ubukhosi bakaDavida isiphelani.”" 
1Kings2:46 Ikosi uSolomoni yalayela uBhenaya umsa kaJehojada bonyana aphume afese arharhabule uTjhimeyi ambulale. Baqina njalo-ke ubukhosi ezandleni zakaSolomoni. 
1Kings3:1 USolomoni waba mkhwenyana kaFaro ikosi yeGibhide. Ngemva kokobana athethe indodakazakhe, waje ayibeke eMzini kaDavida. Yahlala lapho uSolomoni bewaqeda ukwakha isigodlo sakhe nethempeli lakaSomnini kanye nemithangala ezombeleze iJerusalema." 
1Kings3:2 Ngesikhatheso abantu bebasaragela phambili ngokwenza imihlabelo eendundumeni ngombana uSomnini bekangakabi ukwakhelwa ithempeli. 
1Kings3:3 Nanyana uSolomoni akhombisa ukuthanda uSomnini ngokukhamba ngemiyalo kayise uDavida, ubangakalisi ukwenza imihlabelo nokutjhisa itjhwalo eendundumeni." 
1Kings3:4 Nje-ke ikosi uSolomoni yaya eGibiyoni yayokwenza imihlatjelo ngombana indawo leyo bekuyindunduma eqakatheke khulu. Yanikela iminikelo yokutjhiswa eyikulungwana e-aldarinapho. 
1Kings3:5 UZimu waziveza kuSolomoni ebusuku ngebhudango eGibiyoni wathi: “Bawa okufunako ngikuphe.” 
1Kings3:6 USolomoni waphendula wathi: “Uyenzele umusa omkhulu incekwakho ubaba uDavida ngombana gade athembakele kuwe, aqotho begodu anehliziyo ehle. Uragele phambili ngokuba nomusa omkhulu kuye wamupha indodana kobana ihlale esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi namhlanjesi." 
1Kings3:7 Nje-ke Somnini Zimami, ubeke incekwakho bonyana ibe yikosi esikhundleni sakababa uDavida. Kodwana ngisesemsanyana, abe angazi nokuthi ngizakubambaphi ngilisephi nakunje." 
1Kings3:8 Incekwakho nasi hlangana nabantu abanengi obakhethileko, banengi babulala inyoka." 
1Kings3:9 Yeke Somnini yenza incekwakho ibe mgwebi ohlakaniphileko ukuze ikwazi ukubusa abantu bakho nokwazi ukuhlukanisa phakathi kokuhle nokumbi. Ngombana ngubani ongakghona ukubusa isizwe sakho nasisikhulu kangaka?” 
1Kings3:10 UZimu wakareka ngesibawo sakaSolomoni," 
1Kings3:11 wathi kuye: “Njengombana ubawe lokhu, wangazibawela ipilo ede nanyana ubunjinga, nanyana ubawe ukubulawa kwezitha zakho, kodwana wabawa kwaphela ukuhlakanipha ukuze ubuse ngokulunga," 
1Kings3:12 ngizakupha okubawileko: Ngizakunikela ihliziyo ehlakaniphileko nenombono ukuze kungabikhona owakhe wafana nawe begodu nongeze abakhona. 
1Kings3:13 Ngaphezu kwalokho, ngizakunikela nalokho ongazange ukubawe: Ngizakunikela ubunjinga nokuhlonitjhwa ukuze epilwenakho yoke kungabinakosi elingana nawe." 
1Kings3:14 Begodu nawukhamba eendleleni zami bewulalele imithetho nemiyalwami njengombana kwenza uyihlo uDavida, ngizakupha ipilo ede.”" 
1Kings3:15 USolomoni waphaphama, walemuka bonyana gade abhudanga. Wabuyela eJerusalema, wajama ngaphambi komfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini wenza iminikelo yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano. Wenzela boke abantu abasesigodlweni sakhe umnyanya." 
1Kings3:16 Ngemva kwalokho kweza iingwadla ezimbili zafika zajama phambi kwekosi uSolomoni. 
1Kings3:17 Enye yazo yathi: “Babethu, bengithi akhe ngikhulume: Mina nomfazi lo sihlala kumba yinye. Ngabeletha nginaye ngekumbenapho." 
1Kings3:18 Kuthe elangeni lesithathu sele ngibelethile, naye wabeletha. Besisodwa tere ngekumbenapho; bekungekho omunye ngaphandle kwethu; besisobabili kwaphela." 
1Kings3:19 Kuthe ebusuku, indodana yomfazi lo yahlongakala ngombana ulele phezu kwayo wayiminyazela." 
1Kings3:20 Nanguya avuka phakathi kobusuku ananabela umsanami, mina ncekukazakho ngisalele. Wathatha umsanakhe osele ahlongakele wamlalisa esifubeni sami. Wathatha wami wamlalisa esifubeni sakhe." 
1Kings3:21 Ekuseni ngavuka ngathi ngimunyisa umsanami. Baba-ke! Ngafumana bonyana uhlongakele! Kodwana ngithe nangimqalisisa kuhle emkhanyweni, ngabona bonyana akusuye obelethwe ngimi.”" 
1Kings3:22 Umfazi omunye loyo naye wathi: “Afeke! Ophilako lo ngewami; wakho ngohlongakeleko loyo.” Kodwana wokuthoma waphikelela wathi: “Ngithi ofileko ngewakho, wami ngophilako!” Baphikisana njalo-ke phambi kwekosi." 
1Kings3:23 Ikosi yathi: “Lo uthi, ‘Wami umsana uyaphila; wakho uhlongakele,’ loya uthi, ‘Umsanakho ngohlongakeleko; ophilako ngowami.’" 
1Kings3:24 Yeke ngilethelani isabula.” Ngambala kwalethwa isabula ekosini. 
1Kings3:25 Ikosi yathi: “Sikani umntwana ophilako lo phakathi, ninikele omunye nomunye ihlangothi.”" 
1Kings3:26 Umfazi ongunina lomntwana ophilako warhawuka waba lisizi ngomsanakhe wathi ekosini: “Babethu, ngiyakubawa, kungcono umnikele umntwana ophilako loyo! Ungambulali!” Kodwana umfazi omunye wathi: “Sukela le! Dumbana simlobe sobabili. Mrharhabuleni phakathi!”" 
1Kings3:27 Yeke ikosi yakhupha isigwebo sayo yathi: “Nikelani umfazi wokuthoma loya umntwana ophilako. Ningambulali; kuyakhanya bonyana nguye unina.” 
1Kings3:28 Woke u-Israyeli wezwa ngesigwebo ikosi eyasikuphako. Abantu bahlonipha khulu ikosi ngombana balemuka bonyana uZimu uyiphe ukuhlakanipha ekugwebeni ngokulunga. 
1Kings4:1 Ikosi uSolomoni yabusa phezu kwaka-Israyeli woke. 
1Kings4:2 Iinkhulu zakhe eziphezulu bekungilezi: u-Azariya umsa kaTsadokhi umphristi; 
1Kings4:3 u-Elirhorefi no-Arhiya, amadodana kaTjhitjha bekubomabhalana; uJehotjhafathi umsa ka-Arhiludi angunobhala;" 
1Kings4:4 uBhenaya umsa kaJehojada ayinduna yamabutho; uTsadokhi no-Abiyatari babaphristi; 
1Kings4:5 u-Azariya umsa kaNathani angumphathi weenkhulu zeemfunda; uZabudi umsa kaNathani amphristi nomeluleki wekosi; 
1Kings4:6 u-Arhitjhari amphathi wesigodlo; u-Adoniramu umsa ka-Abida amphathi wezemisebenzi. 
1Kings4:7 USolomoni gade anababusi beemfunda ezilitjhumi nambili kilo loke lakwa-Israyeli, egade baphakela ikosi nesigodlo. Omunye nomunye gade afanele alethe isondlo senyanga yoke ngomnyaka." 
1Kings4:8 Amabizwabo bekungu Bhen-Rhuru wangeentatjaneni zakwa-Efrayimu; 
1Kings4:9 uBhen-Dekere aphethe eMakatsa, eTjhayalbimi, eBhethe-Tjhemetjhi ne-Eloni-Bhethe-Rhanani;" 
1Kings4:10 uBhen-Rhesedi aphethe e-Arubhotho (iSoko nayo yoke inarha yeRhefere bekungezakhe); 
1Kings4:11 uBhen-Abinadaba aphethe yoke iNaphathi-Dori (gade atjhade noThafati indodakazi kaSolomoni); 
1Kings4:12 uBhana umsa ka-Arhiludi aphethe eTanakha neMegido, nayo yoke iBhethe-Tjhani eseduze neTsarithani ngenzasi kweJizriyela, ukusuka eBhethe-Tjhani ukuya e-Abela-Merhola ngaphetjheya kweJokomoyamu;" 
1Kings4:13 uBhen-Gebere aphethe eRamothi eGiliyadi (wathatha amatende kaJayire umsa kaManasa oseGiliyadi bona abe ngewakhe kanye nesifunda se-Arigobho eseBhatjhani esinamadorobho amathandathu amakhulu, anemithangala namasango aneenqabo zekoporo);" 
1Kings4:14 U-Arhinadaba umsa ka-Ido aphethe eMarhanayimu; 
1Kings4:15 U-Arhimahatsi aphethe eNafitali (gade atjhade uBhasemathi indodakazi kaSolomoni); 
1Kings4:16 UBhana umsa kaRhutjhayi aphethe e-Atjhere ne-Alothi; 
1Kings4:17 UJehotjhafathi umsa kaParuwarha aphethe e-Isakari; 
1Kings4:18 UTjhimeyi umsa ka-Ela aphethe eBhenjamini; 
1Kings4:19 UGebere umsa ka-Uri aphethe eGiliyadi (inarha yeSirhoni, ikosi yama-Amori nenarha ye-Ogi, ikosi yeBhatjhani). Gade kunguye kwaphela umbusi wesifunda." 
1Kings4:20 Abantu bakwaJuda nebakwa-Israyeli gade babanengi inga yihlabathi yelwandle; bangatlhogi okudliwako nokuselwako, bajekezela." 
1Kings4:21 USolomoni wabusa yoke imibuso ukusukela emlanjeni iYufrathe ukuya enarheni yamaFilista, ukuyokufika emkhawulweni weGibhide. Yoke imibuso le yaletha umthelwayo kuSolomoni begodu wayibusa ipilwakhe yoke." 
1Kings4:22 Ukudla kwakaSolomoni kwangamalanga gade kulikhulu namatjhumi amathathu nahlanu wemigodla yeflowuru esefiweko namakhulu amabili anamatjhumi alikhomba wemigodla yeflowuru emakariya; 
1Kings4:23 iinkomo ezilitjhumi ezinonisweko, iinkomo ezimatjhumi amabili ezidla emrhuleni nezimvu ezilikhulu, imihlobo yeempalapala, iinhlangumataka neentsephe kanye namadada anonisiweko." 
1Kings4:24 Wabusa imibuso yoke engetjingalanga yomLambo, ukusuka eTifsarha ukuya eGaza, godu anokuthula mahlangothi woke." 
1Kings4:25 Ngesikhathi sokuphila kwakaSolomoni, uJuda no-Israyeli baphila ngokuphepha ukusuka eDani etlhagwini ukuya eBheritjheba esewula, enye nenye indoda beyizigedla ngaphasi komthunzi wakwayo wesidiribe nomuthi wamakhiwani." 
1Kings4:26 USolomoni gade aneenkulungwana ezine zeenjomani zeenkarana, neenkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili zabakhweli." 
1Kings4:27 Isikhulu esinye nesinye sesifunda bekuthi nakuyinyanga yedlhego laso sithumele isibiko ekosini uSolomoni kanye nazo zoke iinthekeli zakhe. Gade ziqinisekisa bonyana akunanto etlhayelako esigodlweni. 
1Kings4:28 Godu gade ziletha nebhali neforiji endaweni efaneleko ukuze kuzokuphiwa iinjomani zeenkarana nezinye nje iinjomani. 
1Kings4:29 UZimu wapha uSolomoni ukuhlakanipha okukhulu nokubona kuhle izinto ngelihlo elibukhali, nommoya wokuzwisisa ngendlela ebanzi." 
1Kings4:30 Ukuhlakanipha kwakaSolomoni gade kudlula kwawo woke amadoda wepumalanga, godu kudlula ukuhlakanipha koke kweGibhide." 
1Kings4:31 Gade ahlakaniphe ukudlula woke umuntu, adlula ngitjho no-Ethani umEzrarhi, uHemani, uKalkolo noDarida, amadodana kaMarholo. Iye, idumo lakhe lasabalala kizo zoke izizwe ezizombelezileko." 
1Kings4:31 Gade ahlakaniphe ukudlula woke umuntu, adlula ngitjho no-Ethani umEzrarhi, uHemani, uKalkolo noDarida, amadodana kaMarholo. Iye, idumo lakhe lasabalala kizo zoke izizwe ezizombelezileko." 
1Kings4:32 Wakhuluma izaga eziziinkulungwana ezintathu neengoma zakhe zaziyikulungwana nahlanu. 
1Kings4:33 Wahlathulula zoke iintjalo ukusuka keziqakathekileko njengomsedari weLibhanoni ukuya kezijayelekileko njengehisophi emila emithangaleni. Begodu bekafundisa ngeenlwana neenyoni, iinrhurhubi neenhlambi." 
1Kings4:34 Kweza amadoda avela ezizweni zoke ukuzokulalela ubuhlakani bakaSolomoni, athunyelwe makhosi woke wephasi egade sele ezwile ngobuhlakani bakhe." 
1Kings5:1 Lokha uRhiramu ikosi yeTirosi nezwa bonyana uSolomoni uzeswe bona abe yikosi athathe iintambo zakayise uDavida, wathumela abazenda bakhe kuSolomoni ngombana gade azwana noDavida." 
1Kings5:2 USolomoni wathumela umlayezo kuRhiramu wathi: 
1Kings5:3 “Uyazi bonyana ubaba uDavida gade asahlelwa zizipi ngapha nangapha, nje-ke ngebangelo akhange akghone ukwakhela uSomnini uZimakhe ithempeli, uZimu angakabeki izitha zakhe ngaphasi kweenyawo zakhe." 
1Kings5:4 Nje-ke uSomnini uZimami unginikele ukuphumula mahlangothi woke begodu anginasitha nanyana ingozi. 
1Kings5:5 Yeke, ngiyabhinca ngifuna ukwakhela uSomnini uZimami ithempeli njengombana uSomnini watjela ubaba uDavida wathi, ‘Indodanakho engizayibeka esihlalweni sobukhosi endawenakho izangakhela ithempeli.’" 
1Kings5:6 Ngebangelo-ke thumela umlayezo bonyana ngilungiselwe iingodo zomsedari weLibhanoni. Abantu bami bazakusebenza nebakho begodu ngizakukhokhela nanyana yimalini oyibizako ngabantu bakho. Uyazi bonyana asinaye umuntu onekghono lokukghedlha imithi njengamaTsidoni.” 
1Kings5:7 Lokha uRhiramu nezwa umlayezo kaSolomoni wathaba khulu wathi: “Akuthokozwe uSomnini uZimu namhlanjesi ngombana uphe uDavida indodana ehlakaniphileko kobana ibuse isizwe esikhulu kangakesi.” 
1Kings5:8 Yeke uRhiramu wathumela ilizwi kuSolomoni wathi: “Ngiwufumene umlayezwakho begodu ngizakwenza koke okubawileko, umsedari neengodo zomsayipurusi." 
1Kings5:9 Abantu bami bazazidudula ukusuka eLibhanoni bekube selwandle bese ngizithayisa ngeenyanda elwandle kufikela lapha uzifuna khona. Nazifika lapho ngizabese ngiyazitlharhulula-ke, uzithathe ukhambe nazo. Wena-ke uzakufanela bonyana uphe isigodlo sami ukudla engikubawileko.”" 
1Kings5:10 Ngambala uRhiramu wahlinzeka uSolomoni ngomsedari nangeengodo ayegade azidinga," 
1Kings5:11 noSolomoni wapha uRhiramu amatjhumi athobako weenkulungwana zemigodla yekoroyi njengokudla kwesigodlo sakhe. Godu wamupha neenkulungwana ezilithoba zamalitha wamafutha we-oliva etlhodlhiweko. USolomoni waragela phambili nokupha uRhiramu ngalendlela iminyaka ngeminyaka. 
1Kings5:12 USomnini wapha uSolomoni ukuhlakanipha njengombana bekamthembisile. Kwaba khona itjhebiswano ehle phakathi kwakaSolomoni noRhiramu ngombana benza isivumelwano sokuthula. 
1Kings5:13 Ikosi uSolomoni yakatelela amadoda aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu kilo loke lakwa-Israyeli bona asebenze. 
1Kings5:14 Wawathumela eLibhanoni ngamajima wabaziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi ngenyanga ukuze aqede inyanga aseLibhanoni bese aqeda zimbili asemakhaya. U-Adoniramu gade ayinduna yamajima. 
1Kings5:15 USolomoni gade aneenkulungwana ezimatjhumi alikhomba zamadoda athwala amatje neenkulungwana ezimatjhumi abunane akghedlha ngeentabeni," 
1Kings5:16 kanye neenduna eziziinkulungwana ezintathu namakhulu amathathu ebegade zibeke ilihlo emsebenzini begodu zilawula abasebenzi. 
1Kings5:17 Ikosi uSolomoni yayala bonyana kukghadlhwe amatje amakhulu nakhethekileko ukuze kuyokwakhiwa isisekelo sethempeli ngamatje abaziweko. 
1Kings5:18 Abososino bakaSolomoni noRhiramu namadoda weGebali bagawula bebalungisa iingodo kanye namatje wokwakha ithempeli. 
1Kings6:1 Ngomnyaka wamakhulu amane namatjhumi abunane ngemva kokuphuma kwama-Israyeli eGibhide, emnyakeni wesine wokubusa kwakaSolomoni phezu kwaka-Israyeli, ngenyanga kaZifu, okuyinyanga yesibili, uSolomoni wathoma ukwakha ithempeli lakaSomnini." 
1Kings6:2 Ithempeli ikosi uSolomoni eyalakhela uSomnini lalimamitha amatjhumi amathathu ubude, amamitha alitjhumi ububanzi begodu namamitha alitjhumi nahlanu ukuphakama." 
1Kings6:3 Isirhodlwana sobungeno esingaphambi kwesirhodlo esikhulu sethempeli gade silingana nethempeli ngobubanzi, simamitha alitjhumi. Isirhodlwaneso gade siphume ngamamitha amahlanu ngaphambi kwethepeli." 
1Kings6:4 Wenza amafesidere anomluko ethempelini. 
1Kings6:5 Ngaphandle emabodeni wethempeli wahlomelela amalawana. Wawakha magegana neboda lomakhiwo wethempeli okusirhodlo esikhulu nelawu elingaphakathi. Amalawana angaphandle lawo wawakha ngamaplanka. 
1Kings6:6 Umgangadelo ophasi wamalawana angaphandle gade umamitha amabili nesiquntu ububanzi, kuthi ophakathi ube mamitha amathathu bese kuthi umgangadelo ongehla ube mamitha amathathu nesiquntu. Iboda langaphandle lethempeli gade linemiphetho emibili etjhiyanako magegana nalo ukuze kungalinyazwa iboda lethempeli." 
1Kings6:7 Nakwakhiwa ithempeli bekusetjenziswa amatje abazelwe ekwarini kwaphela, kwakungazwakali nondo, tjhizela namkha sitlabagelo bani sesimbi nakwakhiwako." 
1Kings6:8 Ubungeno bomgangadelo ophakathi bebungesewula yethempeli. Umuntu bekakghona ukungena ngeminyangwana ukusuka emgangadelweni ophakathi ukuya emgangadelweni wesithathu. 
1Kings6:9 Kwathi lokha naqeda ukwakha amaboda wethempeli wenza isilinghi ngamabhaluga namaplanka womsedari. 
1Kings6:10 Amalawana angaphandle awakha magegana nethempeli gade amamitha amabili nesiquntu ukuphakama emgangadelweni ngamunye. Gade ahlomelelwe ethempelini ngamabhaluga womsedari. 
1Kings6:11 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kuSolomoni lathi: 
1Kings6:12 “Mayelana nethempeli olakhako leli, kuzakuthi nawulandela iimiso zami, wenze imiyalwami, ulonde imithethwami bewuyilalele, ngizalise iinthembiso engazenza kuDavida uyihlo ngawe:" 
1Kings6:13 Ngizakuhlala hlangana nama-Israyeli, ngingabasukeli abantu bami bakwa-Israyeli.”" 
1Kings6:14 Lokha uSolomoni naqeda ukwakha ithempeli 
1Kings6:15 wanameka ilingaphakathi lamaboda wakhona ngamaplanka womsedari, wawavala ukusuka phasi emgangadelweni ukufika phezulu esilinghini. Wanameka umgangadelo wethempeli ngamaplanka womsayipurusi." 
1Kings6:16 Waqunta amamitha alitjhumi ukusuka emsamo wethempeli ngamaplanka womsedari, wawajamisa kusukela phasi emgangadelweni ukuya esilinghini. Ngokwenza njalo gade alungiselela ukwakha ilawu elingaphakathi okutjho indawo ecwenge khulu." 
1Kings6:17 Isirhodlo esikhulu, esingaphambi kwendawo ecwenge khulu besimamitha amatjhumi amabili ubude." 
1Kings6:18 Amaplanka womsedari emabodeni angaphakathi kwethempeli gade abazwe aba mfanekiso weenkurwana namakhwa aqhakazileko. Woke amaboda ngaphakathi bekanamekwe ngomsedari, kungabonakali litje." 
1Kings6:19 Ngaleyondlela walungisa indawo ecwenge khulu ngethempelini ukuze abeke umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini lapho. 
1Kings6:20 Indawo ecwenge khulu le beyimamitha alitjhumi ubude, amamitha alitjhumi ububanzi namamitha alitjhumi ukuphakama. Wayinameka yona ne-aldari lomsedari ngecwecwe legolide." 
1Kings6:21 USolomoni wanameka ilingaphakathi lethempeli ngecwecwe legolide. Walembelelisa iinketani zegolide ziqaba ingaphambili lendawo ecwenge khulu, ebeyembeswe ngegolide." 
1Kings6:22 Ngaleyondlela wanameka ngegolide woke umakhiwo ngaphakathi kanye ne-aldari elingaphambi kwendawo ecwenge khulu. 
1Kings6:23 Ngaphakathi kwendawo ecwenge khulu wenza amakerubhi amabili ngeengodo ze-oliva; ikerubhi ngalinye laba mamitha amahlanu ukuphakama. 
1Kings6:24 Iphiko ngalinye lekerubhi lalimamitha amabili nesiquntu ubude, kumamitha amahlanu ukusuka etlobeni yephiko ukuya kwenye itlobo yephiko." 
1Kings6:25 Ikerubhi lesibili nalo gade linesilinganiso samamitha amahlanu ngombana amakerubhi amabili lawa gade afana poro ngobukhulu nangesibumbeko. 
1Kings6:26 Ukuphakama kwekerubhi ngalinye gade kumamitha amahlanu. 
1Kings6:27 Wabeka amakerubhi ngaphakathi kwendawo ecwenge khulu, amaphiko wakhona avulekile. Iphiko lekerubhi elilodwa belithinte iboda bese kuthi iphiko lelinye ikerubhi nalo lithinte iboda elinye. Wona gade athintene ngamaphiko phakathi nendawo ecwenge khulu." 
1Kings6:28 Wanameka amakerubhi ngegolide. 
1Kings6:29 Wabazela amakerubhi, imithi yamasundu namakhwa aqhakazileko emabodeni angaphakathi wethempeli, endaweni ecwenge khulu nesirhodlweni esikhulu." 
1Kings6:30 Wanameka nomgangadelo wendawo ecwenge khulu nesirhodlo esikhulu ngegolide. 
1Kings6:31 Ebungenweni bendawo ecwenge khulu wenza iminyango yeengodo zemithi ye-oliva, igoseni yakhona beyinamahlangothi amahlanu." 
1Kings6:32 Wabazela amakerubhi, imithi yamasundu namakhwa aqhakazileko eminyangweni emibili leyo yeengodo ze-oliva. Wanameka iminyango ngegolide, ngokufanako wanameka amakerubhi kanye nemithi yamasundu." 
1Kings6:33 Wenza soneso nebungenweni besirhodlo esikhulu: Igoseni yeengodo zemithi ye-oliva beyinamahlangothi alinganako. 
1Kings6:34 Iminyango emibili yegoseni leyo gade yenziwe ngeengodo zomsayipurusi. Umnyango omunye nomunye gade uphayeka begodu wenziwe ngamaplanka amabili. 
1Kings6:35 Wabazela amakerubhi, imithi yamasundu namakhwa aqhakazileko phezu kweminyango leyo, watlinkelela igolide emlabulabana phezu kobaziweko." 
1Kings6:36 Wakha nesirhodlo esingaphakathi esinamahla amathathu wamatje abaziweko nelihla elilodwa lamabhaluga womsedari. 
1Kings6:37 Isisekelo sethempeli lakaSomnini sakhiwa emnyakeni wesine, ngenyanga kaZifu." 
1Kings6:38 Emnyakeni wetjhumi nanye wokubusa kwakaSolomoni, ngenyanga kaBhulu, okuyinyanga yobumnane ithempeli laqedwa ukwakhiwa ngokwemininingwana yoke yakhona nangendlela yoke ebeyijanyiswe ngayo. Kwamthatha iminyaka elikhomba uSolomoni ukwakha ithempeli." 
1Kings7:1 USolomoni kwamthatha iminyaka elitjhumi nantathu ukwakha nokuqedelela yoke imakhiwo yesigodlo sakhe. 
1Kings7:2 Wakha umakho okwakuthiwa liHlathi leLibhanoni, waba mamitha amatjhumi amahlanu ubude, amatjhumi amabili nahlanu ububanzi netjhumi nahlanu ukuphakama. Bewunemilandelande emine yeensika zomsedari ezisekele amabhaluga womsedari." 
1Kings7:3 Bewuvalwe ngamaplanka womsedari ngehla kwamabhaluga abekwe avundla phezu kweensika. Begade kumabhaluga amatjhumi amane nahlanu, okutjho itjhumi nahlanu emlandelandeni ngamunye phakathi kweensika." 
1Kings7:4 Iintunja zakhona bezibekwe emahleni amathathu aqaleneko, zikhamba ngantathu." 
1Kings7:5 Zoke iimvalo zeentunja namagosenazo gade zinamahlangothi alinganako; zikhamba ngantathu ziqalene. 
1Kings7:6 Esigodlweni wenza isirhodlwana sobungeno esineensika, saba mamitha amatjhumi amabili nahlanu ubude netjhumi nahlanu ububanzi. Ngaphambi kwaso gade kunamathuri enziwe ngeensika kanye nephahla." 
1Kings7:7 USolomoni wenza ibandla elinesihlalo sobukhosi, okwakuthiwa siRhodlo sokuGweba, lapha gade agwebela khona. Walivala ngeengodo zomsedari ukusuka phasi ukuya phezulu emgangadelweni ongehla." 
1Kings7:8 Amalawu ebekahlala kiwo bekaseduze nendawo evulekileko esigodlweni, akhiwe ngendlela efanako nebandla. Namalawana ebegade awenzele umkakhe uNaFaro gade akhiwe ngendlela efanako." 
1Kings7:9 Yoke imakhiwo le, ukusuka ngaphandle ukuya ngebaleni elakhelelweko nokusuka esisekelweni ukuya phezulu, gade yakhiwe ngamatje acoziweko wezinga eliphezulu abawalungise ngokulinganako ngesarha ngaphakathi nangaphandle." 
1Kings7:10 Iinsekelo zakhona bezendlalwe ngamatje amakhulu wezinga eliphezulu, amanye wawo gade amamitha amahlanu amanye amamitha amane." 
1Kings7:11 Phezu kwazo bekunamatje wezinga eliphezulu, nawo alungiswe ngokulinganako kanye neengodo zomsedari." 
1Kings7:12 Ibala elikhulu belizombelezwe mthangala onamahla amathathu wamatje acoziweko alungiswe ngokulinganako kanye nelihla elilodwa leengodo zomsedari ezibazwe kuhle. Nendawo evulekileko ethempelini lakaSomnini beyinjalo kanye nesirhodlwana sobungeno sesigodlo. 
1Kings7:13 Ikosi uSolomoni yathumela bona kulandwe uRhiramu eTirosi. 
1Kings7:14 Unina kaRhiramu gade amhlolokazi wesizwe sakwaNafitali, uyise amTirosi. URhiramu gade angusosino wekoporo, anekghono elikhulu begodu anelwazi kiyo yoke imisebenzi eyahlukahlukeneko yekoporo. Weza ekosini uSolomoni wenza woke umsebenzi anikelwa wona." 
1Kings7:15 Wabumba iinsika ezimbili zekoporo. Isika ngayinye beyimamitha alithoba ukuphakama namamitha asithandathu ubundulungu. 
1Kings7:16 Wenza neempundu ezimbili zekoporo encibilikisiweko ukuze azibeke phezu kweensika. Ipundu ngayinye beyimamitha amabili nesiquntu ukuphakama. 
1Kings7:17 Gade inemiluko eyenziwe umphambo phezu kweempundu ezaziphezu kweensika. Gade kurarelwe imiluko elikhomba phezu kwepundu ngayinye. 
1Kings7:18 Wakghabisa iimpundu egade ziphezulu kweensika ngamahla amabili wamarharinada azombeleza imiluko. Wenza njalo epundwini enye nenye. 
1Kings7:19 Iimpundu egade ziphezu kweensika esirhodlweni sobungeno zazibunjwe zafana namathuthumbo wommango, zimamitha amabili ukuphakama." 
1Kings7:20 Ngehla kwengcenye esamjeka eduze nomluko, phezu kweempundu zeensika zombili, gade kuzombeleze amakhulu amabili wamarharinada ahlelwe ngamahla." 
1Kings7:21 Wajamisa iinsikezo esirhodlweni sobungeno besirhodlo esikhulu. Isika engesewula wayibiza bona yiJakini kwathi engetlhagwini wathi yiBhowazi. 
1Kings7:22 Umsebenzi ophezu kweensika waphela lokha nakuqedwa ukwenziwa kwamathuthumbo wommango eempundwini. 
1Kings7:23 Wenza ilwandle ngekoporo encibilikisiweko, laba siyingilizi ngesibumbeko, linobukhulu obumamitha amahlanu ukusuka emqoqweni ukuya komunye namamitha amabili nesiquntu ukuphakama. Kwakungathatha intambo emamitha alitjhumi nahlanu ukulizombeleza." 
1Kings7:24 Ngaphasi komqoqo gade kuneenkurwana, zibekwe zaba matjhumi amabili emitheni ngayinye. Gade zimamahla amabili zakhelelwe safuthi emqoqweni ozombeleze ilwandle." 
1Kings7:25 Ilwandle lalibekwe phezu kweenkunzi ezilitjhumi nambili, ezintathu ziqale ngetlhagwini, ezintathu ziqale ngetjingalanga, ezintathu ziqale ngesewula neentathu ziqale ngepumalanga. Ilwandle lalinzinze phezu kwazo, ilingemuva lazo linqophe phakathi nendawo." 
1Kings7:26 Lalibanzi ngangepama yesandla begodu linomqoqo ofana newekapho, kwanga lithuthumbo lommango. Lalimumethe iinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane nane zamalitha." 
1Kings7:27 Godu wenza iinjamiso zezitja zokuhlambela ezilitjhumi zekoporo; isijamiso ngasinye saba mamitha amabili ubude, amamitha amabili ububanzi nemitha elinesiquntu ukuphakama." 
1Kings7:28 Nasi indlela iinjamisezo ezazakhiwe ngayo: Zazineenqabo ezinamathelene nalezo ezisemajikeni. 
1Kings7:29 Phezu kwazo zoke iinqabo lezo gade kunomkghabiso wamabhubezi, iinkunzi namakerubhi. Ngehla nangenzasi kwamabhubezi neenkunzi bekunamathuthumbo alembeleleko." 
1Kings7:30 Isijamiso ngasinye gade sinamavili amane wekoporo nama-asa wekoporo. Emanzinzweni wamajika amane gade kuneensekelo zokunzinzisa ama-asa. Ngaphasi kwesitja sokuhlambela bekuneensekelo ezinamathezwe ngamathuthumbo alembelele hlangana nazo. 
1Kings7:31 Ngaphakathi kwesijamiso bekunesongo elizike ngesiquntu semitha, livuleke ngesiquntu nesiqunjwana semitha. Begade ligobhodlhwe mahlangothi woke. Amahlangothi wesijamiso gade asikwere, angasiyindulungu." 
1Kings7:32 Amavili amane gade angaphasi kweenqabo bese ama-asa wamavili gade anamathele esijamisweni. Ubukhulu bevili ngalinye gade busiquntu nesiqunjwana semitha. 
1Kings7:33 Amavili lawa gade enziwe njengewekarana yepi; ama-asa, amarimu, iimpiki namahabhu gade kwenziwe ngekoporo enamatheziweko." 
1Kings7:34 Isijamiso ngasinye besineemphatho ezine, isiphatho sinye sisejikeni ngalinye, zinamathele esijamisweni." 
1Kings7:35 Isongo elingaphakathi kwesijamiso beliphakeme ngesiqunjwana semitha kunaso, lisekeleke ngeenqabo ezingaphezu kwesijamiso." 
1Kings7:36 URhiramu wakghabisa iinsekelwezo neenqabo ngamakerubhi, amabhubezi nemithi yesundu. Kesinye nesinye isikhadlana wafaka amathuthumbo alembeleleko mahlangothi woke." 
1Kings7:37 Le, ngiyo-ke indlela enza ngayo iinjamiso ezilitjhumi. Zazinamathezwe ngendlela efanako zoke begodu gade zilingana ngobukhulu nangesibumbeko." 
1Kings7:38 Wenza izitja zokuhlambela zekoporo ezilitjhumi, isitja ngasinye simumethe amakhulu abunane namatjhumi abunane wamalitha, sivuleke ngamamitha amabili. Isitja sokuhlambela ngasinye sabekwa phezu kwesinye nesinye isijamiso." 
1Kings7:39 Wathatha iinjamiso ezihlanu kezilitjhumi wazibeka ngesewula yethempeli nezihlanu ngetlhagwini yalo. Wabeka ilwandle lekoporo ngesewula ejikeni elingesewula-pumalanga yethempeli. 
1Kings7:40 Godu wenza nezinye izitja zokuhlambela, iintjhefula nezitja zokufafaza. URhiramu wawuqeda woke umsebenzi agade awenzela ikosi uSolomoni ethempelini lakaSomnini:" 
1Kings7:41 iinsika ezimbili; iimpundu ezimbili ezisamjeka phezu kweensika; imiluko emibili ezombeleze iimpundu eziphezu kweensika; 
1Kings7:42 amakhulu amane wamarharinada emilukweni emibili (amahla amabili wamarharinada epundwini ngayinye, ukwembesa iimpundu ezimbili ebeziphezu kweensika);" 
1Kings7:43 iinjamiso ezilitjhumi ezinezitja zokuhlambela ezilitjhumi phezu kwazo; 
1Kings7:44 ilwandle lekoporo neenkunzi ezilitjhumi nambili ezilisekeleko; 
1Kings7:45 izitja ezinye zokuhlambela, iintjhefula nezitja zokufafaza. Zoke izintwezi uRhiramu azenzela ikosi uSolomoni malungana nethempeli lakaSomnini zazenziwe ngekoporo emanyazelako." 
1Kings7:46 Izintwezo bezibunjelwe emdakeni ngemrhobeni weJordani phakathi kweSukothi neTsaretani ngelizwi lekosi uSolomoni. 
1Kings7:47 USolomoni watjhiya zoke izintwezi angakazilinganisi ngombana gade zizinengi; ubudisi bekoporo azange bufuniselwe. 
1Kings7:48 USolomoni wenza yoke ipahla egade isethempelini lakaSomnini: i-aldari legolide, itafula legolide ebegade kubekwe kilo izikwa zobukhona," 
1Kings7:49 izinti zeembani ezenziwe ngegolidembala (zizihlanu ngesigomeni nahlanu ngesinceleni ngaphambi kwendawo ecwenge khulu); amathuthumbo aseembanini kanye neencimasibani ebe kwenziwe ngegolide; 
1Kings7:50 izitja zegolidembala, iinquntapete, izitja zokufafaza, izitjana; igolide elinamekwe eminyango yethempeli, okutjho iminyango yesirhodlo esikhulu neyelawu elingaphakathi kwethempeli ebekuthiwa yindawo ecwenge khulu." 
1Kings7:51 Lokha ikosi uSolomoni sele iqedile ukwenza woke umsebenzi wethempeli lakaSomnini, yaletha izipho ezikhethekileko uyise uDavida anikela ngazo: isiliva negolide kanye nepahla enye. Yazibeka endlini yamagugu ngethempelini lakaSomnini." 
1Kings8:1 Ikosi uSolomoni yabizela kiyo eJerusalema abaphathi bakwa-Israyeli, okumakhosi woke weenkoro nazo zoke iinhloko zemindeni yakwa-Israyeli kobana banyuse umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini eMzini kaDavida, okuyiZiyoni." 
1Kings8:2 Woke amadoda wakwa-Israyeli ahlangana ekosini uSolomoni ngesikhathi somnyanya ngenyanga ka-Ethanimi okuyinyanga yekhomba. 
1Kings8:3 Kwathi bona kufike boke abaphathi bakwa-Israyeli, abaphristi bathatha umfaji," 
1Kings8:4 bawuthwala netende lokuhlanganela nakho koke okucwengileko okwakungaphakathi kwalo. AmaLevi asiza abaphristi ukuletha itendelo ethempelini. 
1Kings8:5 Ikosi uSolomoni nabo boke abantu bakwa-Israyeli bahlangana phambi komfaji benza umhlabelo ngezimvu nangeenkomo ezingangobaba. 
1Kings8:6 Nje-ke abaphristi baletha umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini endawenawo okuyindawo engaphakathi ethempelini, indawo ecwenge khulu. Bawubeka ngaphasi kwamaphiko wamakerubhi." 
1Kings8:7 Amaphiko wamakerubhi gade avulekile, angehla kwendawo yomfaji. Amaphiko lawo gade engamele umfaji kanye neengodo zawo othwalwa ngazo." 
1Kings8:8 Iingodwezo gade zizide kangangobana zazibonakala nawungaphakathi kwendawo ecwengileko ngaphambi kwendawo ecwenge khulu; kodwana nawungaphandle kwendawo ecwengileko wawungekhe uzibone. Ngitjho nanamhlanje zisese lapho. 
1Kings8:9 Bekunganalitho ngemfajini ngaphandle kwemiqebethu emibili eyabekwa nguMosi eRhorebe, lapha uSomnini enza khona isivumelwano nama-Israyeli ngemva kokuphuma kwawo eGibhide." 
1Kings8:10 Kwathi lokha abaphristi nabasuka endaweni ecwengileko, ilifu lazala ithempeli lakaSomnini." 
1Kings8:11 Abaphristi babhalelwa kukwenza imisebenzabo ngebanga lelifelo, iye iphazimulo kaSomnini yayizele ithempeli lakhe." 
1Kings8:12 Yeke uSolomoni wathi: “USomnini uthe batjho uzokuhlala elifini elinzima; 
1Kings8:13 nje-ke Somnini sele ngikwakhele ithempeli elibonakalako lapha uzakuhlala khona isiphelani.” 
1Kings8:14 Khonapho ikosi uSolomoni yaphenduka yabusisa woke umbuthano wakwa-Israyeli. Kwathi umbuthano wakwa-Israyeli usajame lapho woke," 
1Kings8:15 uSolomoni wathi: “Akudunyiswe uSomnini, uZimu ka-Israyeli, othe ngesandla sakhe wazalisa akuthembisileko ngomlomakhe kubaba uDavida. USomnini wathi kuye," 
1Kings8:16 ‘Solo kwamhla ngikhupha isizwe sami u-Israyeli eGibhide, azange ngikhethe idorobho kinanyana ngiyiphi ikoro bona kwakhiwe ithempeli lapho ukuze kudunyiswe ibizo lami. Kodwana ngakhetha uDavida bonyana abuse isizwe sami u-Israyeli.’" 
1Kings8:17 “Bekusehliziyweni kababa uDavida kobana akhe ithempeli ebizweni lakaSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli. 
1Kings8:18 Kodwana uSomnini wathi kubaba uDavida, ‘Kuyinto ehle khulu kobana wakhe ithempeli ebizweni lami." 
1Kings8:19 Nokho akusuwe ozokwakha ithempelelo, lizakwakhiwa yindodanakho, eligazi lakho. Ngiyo-ke ezokwakha ithempeli ebizweni lami.’" 
1Kings8:20 “USomnini usiphethile isithembiso asenzako: Nakhu nje ngithethe iintambo zakababa uDavida, ngihlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi bakwa-Israyeli njengombana uSomnini athembisa. Ngakhe ithempeli bonyana kudunyiswe ibizo lakaSomnini, uZimu wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Kings8:21 Ngilungise nendawo yomfaji lapha kuhlala khona imiqebethu yesivumelwano sakaSomnini asenza nabobaba lokha nabakhupha eGibhide.” 
1Kings8:22 USolomoni wathatha indawakhe ngaphambi kwe-aldari lakaSomnini phambi kombuthano woke wakwa-Israyeli, welulela izandla zakhe ezulwini zikhongozele" 
1Kings8:23 wathi: “Maye! Somnini, Zimu wakwa-Israyeli, akunazimu onjengawe phezulu ezulwini namkha phasi ephasini. Wena ugcina isivumelwano nokwethembeka eencekwini zakho ezikhamba phambi kwakho ngokwethembeka." 
1Kings8:24 Ugcine isithembiso sakho encekwinakho ubaba uDavida, wathembisa ngomlomakho bewaphetha ngesandla sakho njengombana kunjalo namhlanje." 
1Kings8:25 Yeke-ke Somnini, Zimu wakwa-Israyeli, ngibawa uphethe godu isithembiso owasenza kubaba uDavida lokha nawuthi kuye, ‘Angeze wabhalelwa kukuba nendoda engahlala phambi kwami esihlalweni sobukhosi bakwa-Israyeli, nakube amadodanakho ayelela iindlela zawo kikho koke akwenzako phambi kwami njengombana wena wenzile.’" 
1Kings8:26 Ngiyabawa, Zimu wakwa-Israyeli, akuphetheke ilizwi lakho owalithembisa incekwakho ubaba uDavida." 
1Kings8:27 “Kodwana nithi uZimu angahlala ephasinapha na? Ngitjho namazulu, ukufika nezulwini eliphezulu khulu, angeze akghona ukumumumatha. Alo, ithempeli engilakhilekweli beliyini-ke lona!" 
1Kings8:28 Nanyana kunjalo Somnini, Zimami, nokho bengithi uSomnini akatjheje umthandazo wencekwakhe kanye nesibawo sayo sesirhawu. Lalela isililo kanye nomthandazo othandazwa yincekwakho phambi kwakho namhlanjesi." 
1Kings8:29 Inga amehlwakho angatjheja ithempeleli ubusuku nemini, okuyindawo othe kiyo, ‘Ibizo lami lizakuba lapho’ ukuze uzwe umthandazo othandazwa yincekwakho iqale ngendaweni le." 
1Kings8:30 Yewizwe ukurabhela kwencekwakho kanye nekwabantu bakho u-Israyeli lokha nabathandaza baqale ngendaweni le. Yizwa usezulwini, okuyindawo lapha uhlala khona bese kuthi nawuzwako, ucolele." 
1Kings8:31 “Lokha umuntu naphosisela umakhelwanakhe bese kudingeka bonyana enze isifungo sobumsulwa ngaphambi kwe-aldari lakho ethempeleneli," 
1Kings8:32 yizwa usezulwini bese uyenza: Gweba phakathi kweenceku zakho, ukhalime onomlandu bese wehlisela phezu kwakhe lokho afunge ngakho. Omsulwa ungambeki umlandu, mbeke etjhatjhalazini bonyana umsulwa." 
1Kings8:33 “Lokha isizwe sakwa-Israyeli nasihlulwa sisitha ngebanga lokona kwaso kuwe bese siyaphenduka sivuma ibizo lakho, sithandaze sizirabhelele kuwe ethempelinapha," 
1Kings8:34 yewizwe usezulwini bese ucolela isono sabantu bakho u-Israyeli bewubabuyisele enarheni owayinikela aboyisemkhulu. 
1Kings8:35 “Lokha amazulu navalekileko, kutlhogeka nezulu ngebanga lokobana abantu bakho bakonele, nabathandaza baqale endaweni le, bavume ibizo lakho bese baphenduka ekoneni kwabo, ngebanga lokobana ubahlunguphazile," 
1Kings8:36 yeke yewizwe usezulwini bese ucolela isono seenceku zakho, abantu bakho u-Israyeli. Bafundise indlela elungileko yokuphila bese unisa izulu enarheni oyinikele abantu bakho bonyana kube lilifa labo." 
1Kings8:37 Yewizwe lokha nakunendlala enarheni, kunezifo, ubori, ukukghora, isikhonyani namkha iwoma lentethe, lokha isitha nasiwurubaja abantu bakho emkhawulweni wenarha kuvele namatshwenyeko namkha ubhubhani wesifo." 
1Kings8:38 Yizwa usezulwini, lapha uhlala khona, lokha nanyana ngubani wabantu bakho u-Israyeli athandaza nanyana arabhela, akhongozele aqale ngethempelinapha, avuma imilandu yehliziywakhe. Colela bese uyenza: Nikela loyo naloyo ukuya ngeendlela zakhe ngombana wazi ihliziywakhe. Iye, nguwe wedwa owazi iinhliziyo zabantu." 
1Kings8:39 Nje-ke bazakwesaba ngazo zoke iinkhathi zokuhlala kwabo enarheni owayinikela abobaba. 
1Kings8:40 “Yewulalele nomqhamuka ongabalelwa ebantwini bakho u-Israyeli nawuza ubuya khatjhana ngebanga lokobana uzwe indumela yebizo lakho. 
1Kings8:41 Iye, abantu bazokuzwa ngobukhulu bebizo lakho nangesandla sakho esinamandla kanye nomkhonwakho olulekileko. Lokha umqhamuka nawufika uthandaze ethempelinapha," 
1Kings8:42 yewizwe usezulwini, lapho uhlala khona bese wenza nanyana yini ekhonjelwa mqhamuka. Nje-ke boke abantu bephasinapha bazokwazi ibizo lakho bakwesabe njengombana kwenza abantu bakho u-Israyeli begodu bazi bonyana ithempeli engilakhilekweli lahlukaniselwe ibizo lakho." 
1Kings8:43 “Lokha abantu bakho nabaphuma ipi bayokulwa nezitha zabo, nanyana bangaba kuphi lapha ubathumela khona, nabathandaza kuwe Somnini baqale ngedorobheni olikhethileko nangethempelini engilakhele ibizo lakho," 
1Kings8:44 yewizwe usezulwini umthandazwabo nokurabhela kwabo bese ujama ngakibo. 
1Kings8:45 “Akunamuntu ongakoneliko. Nje-ke lokha nabakonelako bese uyabathukuthelela bewubanikelele ngesitha, sona sibathumbele enarhenaso ekude namkha eseduze," 
1Kings8:46 nabafika lapho bese batjhugulula iinhliziyo zabo, baphenduke bakurabhele basendaweni yesitheso bathi, ‘Sonile nasinje, senze okumbi, sikhohlakele,’" 
1Kings8:47 nabaphendukela kuwe ngeenhliziyo zabo zoke nangemiphefumulwabo yoke basendaweni yesitheso, bakuthandaze baqale ngenarheni owayinikela aboyisemkhulu, ncaya ngedorobheni olikhethileko nethempelini engilakhileko elahlukaniselwe ibizo lakho," 
1Kings8:48 yewizwe usezulwini, lapho uhlala khona, yizwa umthandazo nokurabhela kwabo bese ujama ngakibo." 
1Kings8:49 Colela nabantu bakho abakoneleko; colela yoke imitjhapho abakutjhaphele ngayo bese wenza bonyana abathumbi babo babe nomusa kibo; 
1Kings8:50 ngombana bababantu bakho begodu balilifa lakho, owalikhupha eGibhide, nekehleni yomlilo wokuncibilikisa isimbi." 
1Kings8:51 Inga amehlwakho angabona ukurabhela kwencekwakho kanye nokurabhela kwabantu bakho u-Israyeli, inga ungabalalela lokha nabalila kuwe." 
1Kings8:52 Ngombana wabakhetha phakathi kwazo zoke izizwe zephasi kobana babe lilifa lakho njengombana watjho ngencekwakho uMosi lokha, wena Somnini Somandla ukhupha abobaba eGibhide.”" 
1Kings8:53 Kuthe bona uSolomoni aqede ukuthandaza nokurabhela kuSomnini, wasikima phambi kwe-aldari lakaSomnini lapha agade aguqe khona elulele izandla zakhe ezulwini zikhongozele." 
1Kings8:54 Wajama wabusisa woke umbuthano wakwa-Israyeli ngelizwi elikhulu wathi: 
1Kings8:55 “Akathokozwe uSomnini onikele abantu bakhe u-Israyeli ukuphumula njengombana athembisa. Akunalizwi nalinye elahlulekileko kizo zoke iinthembiso azenza ngencekwakhe uMosi. 
1Kings8:56 Inga uSomnini uZimethu angaba nathi njengombana aba nabobaba; akangasitjhiyi begodu angasilahli. 
1Kings8:57 Akaphendulele iinhliziyo zethu kuye kobana sikhambe kizo zoke iindlela zakhe nokugcina imiyalo, imithetho kanye neemiso azinikela abobaba." 
1Kings8:58 Inga amezwami lawa engirabhele ngawo phambi kwakaSomnini angaba seduze noSomnini uZimethu ubusuku nemini, ajame ngakimi mina ncekwakhe nangebantwini bakhe u-Israyeli ukuya ngesidingo selanga nelanga." 
1Kings8:59 Kwanga boke abantu bephaseli bangakghona ukwazi bonyana uSomnini unguZimu nokuthi akakho omunye. 
1Kings8:60 Inga iinhliziyo zenu zingazimisela ngokupheleleko kuSomnini uZimethu ukuphila ngemithethwakhe nokulalela iimiso zakhe njengombana kunjalo namhlanjesi.” 
1Kings8:61 Nje-ke ikosi uSolomoni nesizwe soke sakwa-Israyeli benza umhlabelo phambi kwakaSomnini. 
1Kings8:62 USolomoni wenza umhlabelo wetjhebiswano phambi kwakaSomnini: iinkomo eziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nambili nezimvu eziziinkulungwana ezilikhulu namatjhumi amabili. Ikosi uSolomoni naye woke u-Israyeli banikela ithempeli kuZimu. 
1Kings8:63 Khona mhlokho ikosi uSolomoni yahlukanisa indawo ephakathi yesirhodlo ngaphambi kwethempeli lakaSomnini, yenzela khona imihlabelo yokutjhiswa, iminikelo yeenthoro kanye namafutha wemihlabelo yetjhebiswano ngombana i-aldari lekoporo elaliphambi kwakaSomnini lalilincani khulu kobana lingathwala imihlabelo yokutjhiswa, iminikelo yeenthoro kanye namafutha wemihlabelo yetjhebiswano." 
1Kings8:64 Ngaleyondlela uSolomoni wenzela uSomnini umnyanya ngesikhatheso. Woke u-Israyeli wahlanganyela naye phambi kwakaSomnini uZimethu. Kwaba yimbedla yomnyanya, bavela eLebo Rhamati ngetlhagwini ukuyokutjhayisa emlanjaneni weGibhide ngesewula. Bagidinga phambi kwakaSomnini uZimethu amalanga alikhomba woke poro, babuyelela godu amanye amalanga alikhomba kwaba ziimveke ezimbili." 
1Kings8:65 Ngelanga elilandelako wathi ebantwini ngamakoro ngamakoro. Abantu balayelisa ikosi bagoduka bathokozile neenhliziyo zabo zincibilikile ngakho koke okuhle uSomnini uZimu akwenzele incekwakhe uDavida kanye nabantu bakhe u-Israyeli. 
1Kings9:1 Kwathi bona uSolomoni aqede ukwakha ithempeli lakaSomnini kanye nesigodlo, bewenza koke agade ahlose ukukwenza," 
1Kings9:2 uSomnini waziveza kuye kwesibili njengombana aziveza kuye eGibiyoni. 
1Kings9:3 USomnini wathi kuye: “Ngiwuzwile umthandazo nokurabhela kwakho okwenze phambi kwami; ngilicwengisile ithempeli olakhilekweli ngokubeka ibizo lami lapho isiphelani. Ihliziywami namehlwami kuzakuhlala kulapho. 
1Kings9:4 “Wena-ke nawukhamba phambi kwami ngehliziyo epheleleko nangokuhlonipheka njengombana uyihlo uDavida enza bese wenza koke engikuyala ngakho bewulonde imithetho neemiso zami," 
1Kings9:5 ngizakunzinzisa isihlalo sakho sobukhosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli njengombana ngathembisa uyihlo uDavida lokha nangithi, ‘Angeze wabhalelwa kukuba nendoda engahlala esihlalweni sobukhosi bakwa-Israyeli.’" 
1Kings9:6 “Kodwana nange wena namkha amadodanakho ningihlanukela bese aniphethi imiyalo nemithetho engininikele yona, nigijime niyokulotjha abosingazimu benibakhothamele," 
1Kings9:7 ngizokususa u-Israyeli enarheni engimnikele yona bengifulathele nethempeli engilicwengisele ibizo lami. U-Israyeli uzakuba sisaga nesiphoqo hlangana nabo boke abantu. 
1Kings9:8 Ithempeleli lizakuba liqubi leququ. Woke umuntu odlula ngendlela uzalikhuza ababaze athi, ‘Alo, kubayini uSomnini enze into enje enarhenapha nethempelinapha?’" 
1Kings9:9 Abantu bazakuphendula bathi, ‘Awa musi, angithi bahlanuke uSomnini uZimabo owakhupha aboyise eGibhide, badlhemadlhema ngemva kwabosingazimu, babakhothamela bebabalotjha. Ngikho uSomnini abehlisele ihlekelele engaka nje.’ ”" 
1Kings9:10 USolomoni kwamthatha iminyaka ematjhumi amabili ukwakha imakhiwo emibili, okulithempeli lakaSomnini nesigodlo sakhe. Ngesikhatheso uRhiramu ikosi yeTirosi wahlinzeka uSolomoni ngazo zoke iingodo zomsedari nezomsayipurusi nangegolide ukuya ngendlela agade atlhoga ngakhona. Kwathi nakuqedwa ukwakhiwa, ikosi uSolomoni yathatha amatjhumi amabili wamadorobho aseGalile yawanikela uRhiramu ikosi yeTirosi." 
1Kings9:11 Kodwana kwathi lokha uRhiramu nasuka eTirosi athi uyokubona amadorobho awaphiwe nguSolomoni lawo, wafika wadana." 
1Kings9:12 Wabuza wathi: “Anjani nje amadorojanyana ongiphe wona la, mntanthu?” Wawabiza bona yinarha yeKhabhulu, okulibizo elawanamathela bekwaba kunamhlanjesi." 
1Kings9:13 URhiramu gade athumele igolide ebelingaba makhilogremu angaphezu kweenkulungwana ezine ekosini uSolomoni nakwakhiwako. 
1Kings9:14 Naku umlando wokukatelela ngomsebenzi owahlonywa yikosi uSolomoni bona kwakhiwe ithempeli lakaSomnini, isigodlo sakhe, indunduma nomthangala ozombeleze iJerusalema, neRhatsori, iMegido kanye neGezeri:" 
1Kings9:15 UFaro ikosi yeGibhide gade asahlela bewathumba iGezeri. Wayithungelela ngomlilo. Wabulala abahlali bayo abamaKhanana wayinikela indodakazakhe, umfazi kaSolomoni, yaba sisipho sayo somtjhado." 
1Kings9:16 Yeke uSolomoni wavuselela iGezeri. Godu wakha neBhethe-Rhoroni engenzasi," 
1Kings9:17 iBhalathi neTadimori eserhalawumbeni enarhenakhe," 
1Kings9:18 nawo woke amadorobhakhe agade abeka kiwo ipahla nemizi lapha bekuhlala khona iinkarana neenjomani. Wakha nanyana yini ayethanda ukuyakha eJerusalema, eLibhanoni nakiyo yoke inarha agade ayibusa." 
1Kings9:19 USolomoni wakatelela ngomsebenzi boke abantu egade basele kuma-Amori, amaHite, amaPherizi, amaRhivi namaJebusi. Abantwaba bekungasiwo ama-Israyeli, kodwana gade baziinzukulwana zabo ezasala eenarheni ezingazange zibhujiswe ma-Israyeli. Lokho kusese njalo nanamhlanjesi." 
1Kings9:20 USolomoni azange akatelele namunye wama-Israyeli ngomsebenzi, kodwana gade awenze amabuthwakhe wepi, iinkhulu zakhe zombuso, iimphathiswa zakhe, abalawuli neenduna zeenkarana zakhe zepi nabakhweli bazo." 
1Kings9:21 Godu ama-Israyeli gade aziinkhulu eziphezulu ezaziqalene nomsebenzi kaSolomoni. Bekunamadoda amakhulu amahlanu namatjhumi amahlanu agade eluse abantu abenza umsebenzi. 
1Kings9:22 USolomoni wakha indunduma yeJerusalema ngemva kobana uNaFaro asukile eMzini kaDavida waya esigodlweni asakhelwe nguSolomoni.
