1Kings9:23 Wenza imihlabelo yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano kathathu ngomnyaka e-aldarini alakhele uSomnini. Godu watjhisa nepepho phambi kwakaSomnini. Ngaleyondlela waphelelisa ihloso yokwakhiwa kwethempeli. 
1Kings9:24 Ikosi uSolomoni yakha neenthayamanzi e-Etsiyoni-Gebere eseduze ne-Elathi eliseligwini lelwandle eliBomvu enarheni yakwa-Edomu. 
1Kings9:25 URhiramu wathumela iinsebenzi zakhe eenthayamanzini zakaSolomoni, kobana zisebenzisane neensebenzi zakaSolomoni. Gade kumadoda azizazi zelwandle." 
1Kings9:26 Zathayela e-Ofira zeza namakhilogremu wegolide angaphezu kweenkulungwana ezilitjhumi nane. Zafese zalethula ekosini uSolomoni. 
1Kings10:1 Kwathi bona indlovukazi yeTjheba izwe ngendumela kaSolomoni ayiphiwa nguZimu, yeza yazomrareja ngeenrarejo ezibudisi." 
1Kings10:2 Yafika eJerusalema nedwendwe elikhulu, ikhamba namakamela athwele iinungo, umhlumba wegolide namatje aligugu. Yakhuluma noSolomoni ngakho koke eyayikucabanga." 
1Kings10:3 USolomoni waphendula yoke imibuzwayo, akunalitho elalibukhuni ekosini bona yayingabhalelwa kuliphendula endlovukazini." 
1Kings10:4 Kuthe lokha indlovukazi yeTjheba nayibona ubuhlakani bakaSolomoni kanye nesigodlo asakhileko," 
1Kings10:5 ukudla okwakusetafuleni lakhe, ihlelo lokuhlala kweenkhulu zakhe, ukukhuthala kweensebenzi zakhe zesigodlweni nevunulwazo, abaphathikapho bakhe kanye nemihlabelo yokutjhiswa ayenza ethempelini lakaSomnini, yaphelelwa mamandla." 
1Kings10:6 Yathi ekosini: “Umbiko engiwuzwe ngisenarhenami ngawe kanye nobuhlakani bakho kutjho bona uliqiniso. 
1Kings10:7 Uyazi azange ngikholwe, kufikela bengifike ngizozibonela mina ngamehlwami. Awa, ngambala lokho engitjelwe khona akwenzi ngitjho nengcenye yalokhu engikubonako. Ukuhlakanipha nomnotho onawo kudlula umbiko engiwuzwileko kude." 
1Kings10:8 Agu! Abantu bakho bayajekezela uyazi! Maye zinetjhudu kangangani iinsebenzi zakho ezihlala ziza kuwe zizokuzwa ukuhlakanipha kwakho! 
1Kings10:9 Akudunyiswe uSomnini uZimakho, okarekileko ngawe bewakubeka esihlalweni sobukhosi bakwa-Israyeli. Ngebanga lethando elingapheliko uSomnini athanda ngalo u-Israyeli, ukwenze waba yikosi bona ulethe ukulunga nobulungiswa.”" 
1Kings10:10 Yanikela ikosi igolide elimakhilogremu angaphezu kweenkulungwana ezine, umhlumba weenungo namatje aligugu. Godu azange khekube neenungo ezinengi kangako njengalezo indlovukazi yeTjheba eyazipha ikosi uSolomoni." 
1Kings10:11 Ikosi uSolomoni yanikela indlovukazi yeTjheba izipho zebukhosini. Ngaphezu kwalokho yayinikela nalokho ebegade ikufisa nekubawileko. Yasuka yagoduka-ke ikhamba nedwendwe layo yabuyela enarhenayo. Iinthayamanzi zakaRhiramu zaletha igolide zisuka nayo e-Ofira, ukusuka lapho zaletha imithwalo emikhulu yeengodo ze-almugi kanye namatje aligugu. Ikosi yasebenzisa iingodo ze-almugi ukwenza ilihla elingaphezulu ebodeni lethempeli lakaSomnini kanye nesigodlo, nokwenzela ababhini imihlobohlobo yamaharibha. Azange khekuthathwe ngaphandle namkha kubonwe iingodo ezingakaya ze-almugi bekube kunamhlanje." 
1Kings10:12 Ubudisi begolide elalifunyanwa nguSolomoni minyaka yoke lalimakhilogremu aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nantathu. 
1Kings10:13 Lokho bekungafaki okulethwa barhwebi nenzuzo efunyanwa bathengisi, nalokho okulethwa makhosi woke we-Arabhiya kanye nabaphathi benarha." 
1Kings10:14 Ikosi uSolomoni yenza amakhulu amabili weenhlangu ezikhandwe ngegolide elisipara. Isihlangu ngasinye besenziwe pheze ngamakhilogremu alikhomba wegolide. 
1Kings10:15 Godu wakhanda namakhulu amathathu wamakhande ngegolide elisipara. Ikhande ngalinye belingaba makhilogremu amabili wegolide. Ikosi yawabeka esigodlweni seHlathi leLibhanoni. 
1Kings10:16 Ikosi yenza isihlalo sobukhosi esikhulu yasikghabisa ngamazinyo wendlovu godu yasembesa ngegolide ecolisiweko. 
1Kings10:17 Isihlalo sobukhosi sasineentepisi ezithandathu, umgogodlho waso gade unehloko eyindulungu. Ngemaqadi kwesihlalo bekunalapha ubeka khona imikhono bese ngapha nangapha kwakhona kujame ibhubezi." 
1Kings10:18 Kwakujame amabhubezi alitjhumi nambili eentepisini ezithandathu, kujame linye ngapha nangapha komqoqo wesitepisi. Akunabukhosi obakhe benzelwa into efana nale." 
1Kings10:19 Zoke iinqoko zekosi uSolomoni gade zenziwe ngegolide, nazo zoke iinsetjenziswa ebezisesigodlweni seHlathi leLibhanoni gade ziyigolide etsengileko. Akunalitho ebegade lenziwe ngesiliva ngombana ngeenkhathi zakaSolomoni isiliva gade lingakaqakatheki." 
1Kings10:20 Ikosi gade inemijeje yemikhumbi yokurhweba elwandle ikhambisana neyakaRhiramu. Njalo ngemva kweminyaka emithathu beyibuya ithwele igolide nesiliva, amazinyo wendlovu, iimfene neenkghabu." 
1Kings10:21 Ikosi uSolomoni gade injinge khulu godu inobuhlakani obukhulu ukudlula woke amakhosi wephasi. 
1Kings10:22 Iphasi loke lafuna ukuzokulotjhisa uSolomoni nokuzwa ngobuhlakani uZimu abubeke emkhumbulwenakhe. 
1Kings10:23 Omunye nomunye wabantwabo gade eza nesibiko, okuyipahla yesiliva negolide, izambatho, amakha neenungo kanye neenjomani neemeyila. Lokhu bekwenzeka umnyaka nomnyaka." 
1Kings10:24 USolomoni wabuthelela iinkarana zepi neenjomani. Gade anamakhulu alitjhumi nane weenkarana zepi neenkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili zeenjomani agade azibeke emadorobheni weenkarana zepi nendawenakhe eJerusalema. 
1Kings10:25 Ikosi yenza bonyana eJerusalema isiliva lijayeleke libe linengi njengamatje, nomsedari ube mnengi njengemithi yamakhiwani wommango eentatjaneni zenarha." 
1Kings10:26 Iinjomani zakaSolomoni zazithethwe eGibhide, khulukhulu eKewe. Zazithengwa barhwebi bekosini eKewe ngentengo ephasi." 
1Kings10:27 Bathenga ikarana yepi eGibhide ngesiliva elingaphasi kwamakhilogremu alikhomba, nenjomani ngesiliva elingaphasi kwamakhilogremu amabili. Godu bazithengisa kiwo woke amakhosi wamaHite newama-Aramiya." 
1Kings11:1 Ngaphandle kwakaNaFaro, ikosi uSolomoni yabuye yathanda nabanye abafazi abanengi abatjhili, okubafazi abamaMowabi, ama-Amoni, ama-Edomu, amaTsidoni namaHite." 
1Kings11:2 Bekungebezizwe uSomnini uZimu athi kuma-Israyeli ngazo: “Ningalingi nihlanganyele nazo ngombana zizakuyengela iinhliziyo zenu kibosingazimu bazo.” Nanyana kunjalo uSolomoni wanamathela ebafazinabo ngethando. 
1Kings11:3 Waba namakhulu alikhomba wabafazi ababelethwa ebukhosini kanye namakhulu amathathu wemingena. Abafazi bakhabo bamkhupha endleleni. 
1Kings11:4 Kuthe uSolomoni lokha nathoma ukuluphala, abafazi bakhe bayengela ihliziywakhe kibosingazimu. Yeke ihliziywakhe azange inamathele ngokupheleleko kuSomnini uZimakhe njengekayise uDavida." 
1Kings11:5 Walandela u-Atjhitaroti usingazinyanakazi wamaTsidoni noMilikomu usingazimu onyenyisako wama-Amoni. 
1Kings11:6 Ngalokho uSolomoni wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini, azange alandele uSomnini ngokupheleleko njengombana kwenza uyise uDavida." 
1Kings11:7 USolomoni wakhela uKemotjhi usingazimu onyenyisako wamaMowabi, noMoleki usingazimu onyenyisako wama-Amoni, indunduma phezu kombundu ongepumalanga yeJerusalema." 
1Kings11:8 Wabenzela njalo boke abafazi bakhe abatjhili ebebatjhisa ipepho bebenzele nabosingazimu babo imihlabelo. 
1Kings11:9 USomnini wathukuthelela uSolomoni ngombana ihliziywakhe yasele ifulathele uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli owaziveza kabili kuye. 
1Kings11:10 USomnini naziveza kuSolomoni wamyala bonyana angadlhemadlhemi ngemva kwabosingazimu, kodwana azange awulalele umyalo kaSomnini." 
1Kings11:11 Yeke uSomnini wathi kuSolomoni: “Ngebanga lesenzo sakho sokungaphethi isivumelwano sami kanye nemithethwami engakuyala ngayo, ngiqinisile ngithi ngizokurharhabula umbuso ngiwususe ezandleni zakho bese ngiwunikela omunye wabangaphasi kwakho." 
1Kings11:12 Nokho ngebanga lakayihlo uDavida, angeze ngakwenza lokho ngesikhathi sokuphila kwakho. Ngizawurharhabula ngesikhathi sokubusa kwendodanakho." 
1Kings11:13 Nalapho angizuwurharhabula woke ezandleni zayo, kodwana ngizayinikela ikoro yinye ngebanga lakaDavida incekwami nangebanga leJerusalema engayikhethako.”" 
1Kings11:14 USomnini wavusela uSolomoni umjamelani, uHadadi umEdomu ovela ebukhosini baka-Edomu." 
1Kings11:15 Kwathi lokha uDavida naseduze ne-Edomu, uJowabi umphathibutho wenyuka bona ayokubulunga abahlongakalele e-Edomu. Ngemva kwalokho warhadla woke amadoda e-Edomu." 
1Kings11:16 Kwabathatha iinyanga ezisithandathu bonyana uJowabi nawo woke ama-Israyeli abhubhise woke amadoda e-Edomu. 
1Kings11:17 Kodwana uHadadi wabalekela eGibhide kanye neenkhulu ezinye ze-Edomu ebegade zisebenzela uyise. Ngesikhatheso ubasese msana. 
1Kings11:18 Basuka eMidiyani baya eParana. Bathatha amadoda eParana bakhamba nawo eGibhide kuFaro ikosi yeGibhide owanikela uHadadi ikumba nenarha bewamondla nangokudla. 
1Kings11:19 UFaro wathabela uHadadi kangangobana wabe wamendisela nomlamakhe, wekhabo lendlovukazi, umma wesizwe." 
1Kings11:20 Umntazana wekhabo lendlovukazi wabelethela uHadadi umsana, wamthiya bona nguGenubathi. Indlovukazi yamkhulisela esigodlweni. Nje-ke uGenubathi wakhula nabentwana bakaFaro." 
1Kings11:21 Kwathi uHadadi asese seGibhide, wezwa bonyana uDavida sele aye kiboyisemkhulu nokuthi uJowabi umphathibutho naye sele alele. Wathi kuFaro: “Bengithi yewungivumele ngibuyele enarhenekhethu.”" 
1Kings11:22 UFaro wabuza wathi: “Uzakuthi utlhogeni lapha bona ungaze ubuyele enarhenekhenu?” UHadadi wathi: “Awa, abe angitlhogi litho, nokho bese ngithi ngivumela ngikhambe!”" 
1Kings11:23 Godu uZimu wavusela uSolomoni omunye umjamelani, uRezoni umsa ka-Eliyada, owabalekela isikhulu sakhe uHadadi-Ezeri ikosi yeTsoba." 
1Kings11:24 Wabuthelela amadoda bona amsingathe bewaba mrholi wesiqhema semigulukudu. Lokha uDavida nalinga ukubarhayila, banqomba eDamaseku lapha bafika banzinza khona bebabeka uRezoni bona abe yikosi." 
1Kings11:25 URezoni waba mjamelani waka-Israyeli ngesikhathi soke sokuphila kwakaSolomoni, wangezelela imiraro eyabangwa nguHadadi. URezoni wabusa e-Aramu begodu gade akghabhudlheka nabona u-Israyeli." 
1Kings11:26 NoJerobhowamu umsa kaNebathi wajamelana noSolomoni. Gade angomunye weenkhulu zakaSolomoni, umEfrayimu weTsereda, unina gade amhlolokazi ekwakuthiwa nguTseruwa." 
1Kings11:27 Nanti ibanga elamenza bonyana ajamelane nekosi: USolomoni gade akhe indunduma begodu wapara nesikhala ebegade sisebodeni loMuzi kaDavida uyise," 
1Kings11:28 uJerobhowamu waziveza bonyana uyindoda emadodeni. Kwathi lokha uSolomoni nabona bonyana isokaneli liwenza kuhle kangangani umsebenzalo, walibeka bona liqale woke umsebenzi wokukatelela owenziwa yikoro kaJosefa." 
1Kings11:29 Ngesikhatheso uJerobhowamu gade aphuma eJerusalema, wahlangana no-Arhiya umphorofidi weTjhilo endleleni embethe iphuraphura etja. Gade babobabili njalo kwaphela emmangwenapho," 
1Kings11:30 u-Arhiya wathatha iphuraphura etja agade ayembethe leya wayirathurathula yaba ziinqetjhana ezilitjhumi nambili. 
1Kings11:31 Wathi kuJerobhowamu: “Zithathele iinqetjhana ezilitjhumi ngombana lokhu ngokwatjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu ka-Israyeli wathi, ‘Qala, ngizokurharhabula umbuso ezandleni zakaSolomoni bese ngikupha iinkoro ezilitjhumi." 
1Kings11:32 Kodwana yena uzakubusa ikoro eyodwa ngebanga lencekwami uDavida kanye nedorobho iJerusalema engalikhetha hlangana nazo zoke iinkoro zakwa-Israyeli. 
1Kings11:33 Ngizakwenza lokhu ngombana uSolomoni ungihlanukile walotjha u-Atjhiterothi usingazimukazi wamaTsidoni, uKemotjhi usingazimu wamaMowabi noMilikomu usingazimu wama-Amoni. Azange akhambe eendleleni zami, enze okulungileko phambi kwami begodu aphethe imithethwami neemiso zami njengombana kwenza uDavida uyise." 
1Kings11:34 Nokho angeze ngawuthatha woke umbuso ezandleni zakaSolomoni. Ngizamenza abe liduna amalanga woke wokuphila kwakhe ngebanga lakaDavida incekwami, engayikhethako neyaphetha imiyalo nemithethwami." 
1Kings11:35 Ngizakuthatha umbuso ezandleni zendodanakhe bese ngikunikela iinkoro ezilitjhumi. 
1Kings11:36 Ngizakunikela indodanakhe ikoro eyodwa ukuze uDavida incekwami ikghone ukuhlala inesibani phambi kwami eJerusalema, idorobho lapha ngakhetha ukubeka khona ibizo lami." 
1Kings11:37 Wena-ke ngizakuthatha bese ubusa phezu kwakho koke okuthandwa yihliziywakho, uzakuba yikosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli." 
1Kings11:38 Nawenza koke engikuyala ngakho bese ukhamba eendleleni zami, wenze okulungileko phambi kwami ngokuphetha imithetho nemiyalwami njengombana kwenza uDavida incekwami, ngizakuba nawe. Ngizakwakhela ubukhosi obuqine njengalobo engabakhela uDavida bese ngikunikela u-Israyeli." 
1Kings11:39 Ngizakululaza iinzukulwana zakaDavida ngebangeli, nokho kube ngokwesikhatjhana.’ ”" 
1Kings11:40 USolomoni walinga ukubulala uJerobhowamu, kodwana uJerobhowamu wabalekela kuTjhitjhakhi ikosi yeGibhide, wahlala lapho uSolomoni bewakhothama." 
1Kings11:41 Zoke ezinye zezehlakalo zakaSolomoni nakho koke akwenzako kanye nobuhlakani ayenabo kutlolwe encwadini yemilando kaSolomoni. 
1Kings11:42 USolomoni wabusa woke u-Israyeli iminyaka ematjhumi amane eJerusalema. 
1Kings11:43 Ngemva kwalokho waya kiboyisemkhulu, wafihlwa eMzini kayise uDavida. URerhobhowamu indodanakhe yathatha iintambo zobukhosi emva kwakhe." 
1Kings12:1 URerhobhowamu waya eTjhekemu ngombana woke ama-Israyeli aya lapho kobana ambeke abe yikosi. 
1Kings12:2 UJerobhowamu umsa kaNebathi wezwa ngendaba le asese seGibhide lapha abalekela khona uSolomoni. Wahlala eGibhidapho," 
1Kings12:3 nje-ke kwathunyelwa abantu kuye bonyana abuye. UJerobhowamu nomkhambathi woke wakwa-Israyeli baya kuRerhobhowamu bafese bathi kuye: 
1Kings12:4 “Uyihlo gade asithwese ijogi elibudisi. Yeke wena gedlisa umsebenzi obudisi kayihlo lo bewunyefise nejogi asithwese loneli; khona-ke sizakulotjha.” 
1Kings12:5 URerhobhowamu wathi: “Khambani bese nibuya elangeni lesithathu.” Awa, yeke abantu bakhamba-ke." 
1Kings12:6 Ikosi uRerhobhowamu yabonana neengwevu zabaphathi ezazilotjha uyise uSolomoni ngesikhathi sokuphila kwakhe yathi: “Ningangeluleka bonyana ngithini ebantwinapha na?” 
1Kings12:7 Bathi kiyo: “Nawungakhe ube yinceku ebantwinaba namhlanjesi, ubenzele kuhle bese ubanikela ipendulo ehle, bazakuhlala baziinceku zakho.”" 
1Kings12:8 Kodwana uRerhobhowamu wala iseluleko asinikelwa ziingwevu, wayokubonana neentanga zakhe nebegade sele bamlotjha." 
1Kings12:9 Wababuza wathi: “Umbono wenu uthini? Singabaphendula njani abantwaba abathi kimi angigedlise ijogi abalithweswe ngubaba na?” 
1Kings12:10 Iintanga zakhe zamphendula zathi: “Tjela abantu abathe kuwe batjho bafuna ukugedliselwa ijogi elibudisi abalithweswa ngubabakho uthi, “ ‘Utsetserwanami umabhombo kunedini lakababa." 
1Kings12:11 Ubaba wanethwesa ijogi elibudisi; mina-ke ngizalenza libe budisi ukudlula. Ubaba bekaniritha ngeembebhu; mina ngizonirhadla ngomrwedla.’ ” 
1Kings12:12 Elangeni lesithathu uJerobhowamu nabantu boke babuyela ekosini uRerhobhowamu njengombana wayethe: “Yenibuye elangeni lesithathu.” 
1Kings12:13 Ikosi yalahla iseluleko eyasinikelwa baphathi, yaphendula abantu ngobukhali" 
1Kings12:14 ngombana yalandela iseluleko seentanga zayo yathi: “Ubaba wenza ijogi lenu laba budisi; kimapha-ke nizokubhesa. Ubaba waniritha ngeembebhu; mina ngizonirhadla ngomrwedla.” 
1Kings12:15 Yeke ikosi azange ilalele abantu ngombana isenzekwesi sasiyintando kaZimu, ukuzalisa amagama awakhuluma kuJerobhowamu umsa kaNebathi ngo-Arhiya umTjhilo." 
1Kings12:16 Kuthe lokha woke u-Israyeli nabona bonyana ikosi ayimuphi indlebe, waphendula ikosi wathi: “Asinasabelo noDavida, asithintani ndawo nomsa kaJese! Ayigubhe Israyeli! Uzazibona ukuqeda wena ndlu kaDavida!” Yeke ama-Israyeli aphadlhalala, agoduka." 
1Kings12:17 Kodwana nakuma-Israyeli agade ahlala emadorobheni wakwaJuda wona, uRerhobhowamu wawabusa." 
1Kings12:18 Ikosi uRerhobhowamu yathumela u-Adoniramu owayegade ayinduna yomsebenzi okatelelako, kodwana woke u-Israyeli wamkhanda ngamatje bewahlongakala. Nokho ikosi uRerhobhowami yakghona ukuphunyurha yakhwela ekaranenayo yabalekela eJerusalema." 
1Kings12:19 Ngalokho u-Israyeli wathoma ukujamelana nendlu kaDavida bekwaba kunamhlanje. 
1Kings12:20 Kuthe bona woke u-Israyeli ezwe bonyana uJerobhowamu ubuyile, kwaphuma igama lokobana abizelwe emkhambathini azokubekwa bonyana abe yikosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli woke. Yikoro yakwaJuda yodwa eyathembekako endlini kaDavida." 
1Kings12:21 Lokha uRerhobhowamu nafika eJerusalema, wabutha yoke indlu kaJuda kanye nekoro kaBhenjamini, kwaba ziinhlabani zeenkakaramba ezilikhulu namatjhumi abunane weenkulungwana kobana zilwe nendlu ka-Israyeli nokubuyisa ubukhosi bakaRerhobhowamu umsa kaSolomoni." 
1Kings12:22 Kodwana kwafika ilizwi lakaZimu kuTjhemaya umuntu kaZimu lathi: 
1Kings12:23 “Yewuthi kuRerhobhowamu umsa kaSolomoni ikosi yakwaJuda, kiyo yoke indlu kaJuda noBhenjamini, nakibo boke abantu," 
1Kings12:24 nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Ningenyuki bona niyokulwa nabafowenu, ama-Israyeli. Godukani, omunye nomunye anqombe kwakhe ngombana lokhu kusisenzo sami.’ ” Yeke balalela ilizwi lakaSomnini babuyela emakhaya njengombana uSomnini bekabatjelile." 
1Kings12:25 UJerobhowamu waqinisa iTjhekemu ngembundwini we-Efrayimu bewahlala lapho. Ukusuka lapho waphuma wayokwakha iPenuweli. 
1Kings12:26 UJerobhowamu wazitjela wathi: “Kwanjesi umbuso ungahle ubuyele endlini kaDavida. 
1Kings12:27 Nange abantwaba bangalokhu benyuka bayokwenza imihlabelo ethempelini lakaSomnini eJerusalema, iinhliziyo zabo zizakubuyela ekosinabo uRerhobhowamu ikosi yakwaJuda. Bazangibulala bese babuyela kuRerhobhowamu.”" 
1Kings12:28 Ikosi uJerobhowamu yafuna iseluleko, yenza amathole amabili wegolide. Yathi ebantwini: “Sekwanele kwanje bonyana nilokhu nenyukela eJerusalema. Napa musi abozimu bakho, wena Israyeli abakukhupha eGibhide.”" 
1Kings12:29 Elinye lamathole lawo walibeka eBhethe-Eli, elinye walibeka eDani." 
1Kings12:30 Lokhu kwaba sisono. Abantu bakhamba bebayokufika eDani ukuze balotjhe itholelo lapho. 
1Kings12:31 UJerobhowamu wakha amathempedlana emibundwini bewabeka nabaphristi abakhethe ebantwini abahlukahlukileko nanyana gade bangasi maLevi. 
1Kings12:32 Wasungula umnyanya elangeni letjhumi nahlanu lenyanga yobumnane, okumnyanya ofana nowawuphele ubanjwe kwaJuda, wenza imihlabelo e-aldarini. Lokhu wakwenza eBhethe-Eli, wenzela namathole awenzileko imihlatjelo. NeBhethe-Elapho wabeka abaphristi ethempelini alenze emibundwini." 
1Kings12:33 UJerobhowamu wakhwelela e-aldarini alenze eBhethe-Eli. Lokhu wakwenza elangeni letjhumi nahlanu lenyanga yobumnane, okuyinyanga azikhethela yona ehliziywenakhe kobana enzele ama-Israyeli umhlatjelo. UJerobhowamu wakhwelela e-aldarinapho kobana enze umhlabelo." 
1Kings13:1 Gade asatjhisa umhlabelo lokha nakuthi veliyani umuntu kaZimu obuya kwaJuda nelizwi elivela kuSomnini uZimu. 
1Kings13:2 Umuntu loyo warhuwelela i-aldari ngelizwi lakaSomnini wathi: “Maye aldari, aldari-ke! Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Kuzakubelethwa umsana okuthiwa nguJosiya endlini kaDavida. Uzakwenza umhlabelo ngabaphristi beendunduma phezu kwakho. Iye, abaphristi abenza umhlabelo kuwapha. Kuzakutjhiswa amathambo wabantu phezu kwakho.’ ”" 
1Kings13:3 Khona mhlokho umuntu kaZimu wenza itshwayo wathi: “Leli litshwayo elizaliselela amezwi akhulunywe nguSomnini: I-aldari lizakuphadlhuka phakathi bese umsizalo onamafutha urhatjheke.” 
1Kings13:4 Kuthe bona ikosi uJerobhowamu izwe amezwi umuntu kaZimu arhuwelele ngawo i-aldari leBhethe-Eli, yelula isandla sayo ise-aldarini yathi: “Bambani intwele!” Kodwana isandleso akhombe ngaso umuntu kaZimu somelela bewabhalelwa kusibuyisa." 
1Kings13:5 Ne-aldari laphadlhuka kabili, umsizalo onamafutha warhatjheka njengokwetshwayo elivezwe mumuntu kaZimu ngokwelizwi lakaSomnini." 
1Kings13:6 Ikosi uJerobhowamu yathi emuntwini kaZimu: “Yewungirabhelele kuSomnini uZimakho bese uyangithandazela bonyana isandla sami sibuyele esigeni.” Yeke umuntu kaZimu warabhela kuSomnini, ngambala isandla sekosi sabuyela esigeni." 
1Kings13:7 UJerobhowamu wathi emuntwini kaZimu: “Namba siye ekhaya ukuze ufunyane okugonywako, ngizakukhunga ngesipho.”" 
1Kings13:8 Kodwana umuntu kaZimu waphendula ikosi wathi: “Ngitjho nanyana bewungangipha isiquntu salokho onakho kwakho, bengingeze ngakhamba nawe, namkha ngigome isikwa nanyana ngisele amanzi endaweni le." 
1Kings13:9 Ngombana ngilaywe lilizwi lakaSomnini lathi, ‘Ungagomi isikwa namkha usele amanzi walapho begodu ungabuyeli emva ngendlela oze ngayo.’ ”" 
1Kings13:10 Nje-ke wathatha enye indlela, azange asakhamba ngendlela eze ngayo eBhethe-Eli." 
1Kings13:11 Gade kunomphorofidi othileko omdala ahlala eBhethe-Eli. Amadodanakhe ambikela ngalokho okwenziwe mumuntu kaZimu mhlokho. Bamtjela nokuthi umuntu kaZimu loyo utheni ekosini. 
1Kings13:12 Uyise wawabuza wathi: “Uthethe yiphi indlela nakhambako?” Amadodanakhe amkhombisa indlela eyathathwa mumuntu kaZimu ovela kwaJuda. 
1Kings13:13 Wathi-ke emadodanenakhe: “Ngibophelani udumbana.” Kuthe nabaqeda ukubophela udumbana, wakhwelela wakhamba," 
1Kings13:14 walandela umuntu kaZimu. Wamfumana ahlezi ngaphasi komuthi we-owuku, wambuza wathi: “Umumuntu kaZimu ovela kwaJuda na?” Umuntu loyo wathi: “Iye, nginguye.”" 
1Kings13:15 Yeke umphorofidi omdala wathi kuye: “Namba siye ekhaya uyokugoma.” 
1Kings13:16 Umuntu kaZimu wathi: “Awa, angeze ngiphenduke nawe namkha ngigome isikwa namkha ngisele amanzi nawe endaweni le." 
1Kings13:17 Ngombana uSomnini ungidose ngendlebe wathi, ‘Ungalingi ugome isikwa namkha usele amanzi walapho, godu ungabuyi ngendlela oze ngayo.’ ”" 
1Kings13:18 Umphorofidi omdala wathi: “Nami ngimphorofidi njengawe. Ingilozi ithe kimi ngelizwi lakaSomnini, ‘Mbuyise eze kwakho ukuze agome isikwa abe asele namanzi.’ ” Kodwana bekamrhwala." 
1Kings13:19 Yeke umuntu kaZimu waphenduka nomphorofidi loya waya endlinakhe wafike wagoma isikwa bewasela namanzi. 
1Kings13:20 Kuthe basahlezi etafulenapho, ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kumphorofidi omdala ojikise umuntu kaZimu." 
1Kings13:21 Warhuwelela umuntu kaZimu obuya kwaJuda loya wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Ngombana ungazange ulalele ilizwi lakaSomnini bewangaphetha umyalo kaSomnini uZimakho akuyale ngawo," 
1Kings13:22 ujikile wagoma isikwa bewasela namanzi endaweni lapha uZimu athe ungagomi bewusele khona, nje-ke isidumbu sakho angeze sangcwatjwa emazindleni waboyihlomkhulu.’ ”" 
1Kings13:23 Kuthe bona umuntu kaZimu aqede ukugoma nokusela, umphorofidi omjikisileko loya wambophela udumbana." 
1Kings13:24 Kwathi asakhamba endleleni abuyela emuva, wasahlelwa libhubezi lambulala. Isidumbu sakhe sasimadlheke endleleni siphahlwe libhubezi nodumbana." 
1Kings13:25 Ngambala abantu abadlula lapho babona isidumbu sirabhalele phasi senganyelwe libhubezi. Bakhamba bayokubika edorobheni lapha kuhlala khona umphorofidi omdala. 
1Kings13:26 Kuthe lokha umphorofidi omjikisileko nezwa indaba le, wathi: “Mumuntu kaZimu ongazange alalele umyalo kaSomnini. USomnini umnikelele ngebhubezi elifike lamdabudabula belambulala njengombana ilizwi lakaSomnini belikhulumile ngaye.”" 
1Kings13:27 Umphorofidi wathi emadodanenakhe: “Ngibophelani udumbana.” Ngambala benza njalo. 
1Kings13:28 Waya lapho wafunyana isidumbu sirabhalele endleleni, siphahlwe ngudumbana nebhubezi. Ibhubezi azange lidle isidumbu namkha lisahlele udumbana." 
1Kings13:29 Umphorofidi wathatha isidumbu somuntu kaZimu, wasilayitjha kudumbana, weza naso edorobheni lekhabo bona azosililela abe asibulunge." 
1Kings13:30 Wabulunga isidumbu ezindleni lakhe, basililela bathi: “Maye, umfowethu!”" 
1Kings13:31 Ngemva kobana sele asibulungile wathi emadodanenakhe: “Nangihlongakalako, ningibulunge lapha kubulungwe khona umuntu kaZimu lo, nilinganise amathambami newakhe." 
1Kings13:32 Ngombana umlayezo awukhulume ngokuthunywa lilizwi lakaSomnini ngokujamelana namathempedlana asemibundwini emadorobheni weSamariya, nakanjani uzokuphetheka.”" 
1Kings13:33 Ngitjho nangemva kwesigemegemesi, uJerobhowamu azange alise iindlela zakhe ezimbi. Kunalokho wabeka abaphristi beendunduma abakhetha kiyo yoke imihlobo yabantu. Nanyana ngubani ogade afuna ukuba mphristi, gade amhlukanisela ubuphristi beendundumobo." 
1Kings13:34 Lokhu sisono sendlu kaJerobhowamu esabangela ukubhujiswa nokurhayilwa kwayo ephasini. 
1Kings14:1 Ngesikhatheso u-Abiya umsa kaJerobhowamu wagula. 
1Kings14:2 UJerobhowamu wathi kumkakhe: “Khamba, uzitjhatjhanise ukuze kungabonakali bona umfazi kaJerobhowamu. Iya eTjhilo, uzakufumana lapho u-Arhiya umphorofidi owathi kimi ngizakuba yikosi phezu kwabantwaba." 
1Kings14:3 Uthathe nezikwa ezilitjhumi, amabhagwana anentunja nomjeka weliju, uye kuye. Uzafese akutjele bonyana kuzakwenzakalani ngomsana lo.”" 
1Kings14:4 Ngambala umkaJerobhowamu wenza njengombana ayaliwe waya ku-Arhiya eTjhilo. U-Arhiya ubasele aphophele ngebanga lokuluphala. 
1Kings14:5 USomnini gade atjele u-Arhiya wathi: “UmkaJerobhowamu usendleleni, uzokubuza ngomsanakhe ngombana uyagula. Uzafese umphendule ngokuthi nokuthi. Nafikako uzozenza inga ngomunye umuntu.”" 
1Kings14:6 Kuthe lokha u-Arhiya nezwa izigi zeenyawo zakhe emnyango, wathi: “Ngena mkaJerobhowamu. Uzitjhatjhaniseleni? Ngithunywe kuwe ngeendaba ezimaphorodlha." 
1Kings14:7 Khamba ufese utjele uJerobhowamu kobana nakhu okutjhiwe nguSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ‘Ngambala ngakuphakamisa hlangana nabantu bengakwenza umrholi phezu kwabantu bami u-Israyeli." 
1Kings14:8 Ngadabula umbuso ngawususa endlini kaDavida owaphetha imiyalwami bewangilandela ngehliziywakhe yoke, asenza lokho okulungileko kwaphela phambi kwami." 
1Kings14:9 Wena wenze ubumbi obudluleleko kunabo boke obalamako. Uzenzele abosingazimu; iye, abosingazimu ababazwe bebanamekwa ngesimbi kobana ungithukuthelise. Mina wangifuthela ngemva kwakho." 
1Kings14:10 Ngebanga lalokhu, ngizakwehlisela ihlekelele phezu kwendlu kaJerobhowamu. Ngizakurhayila koke okuduna, okukhulu nokuncani, okusendlini kaJerobhowamu kwa-Israyeli. Ngizakurhurhula indlu kaJerobhowamu njengamanzi narhurhula amabibi kufikela lapha itjhabalala khona nya." 
1Kings14:11 Abantu bakaJerobhowamu abafele emadorobheni bazakudliwa zizinja, kuthi abafele emrhuleni badliwe madlanga. USomnini ukhulumile.’" 
1Kings14:12 “Wena-ke, sikima, ubuyele ekhaya. Uzakuthi nawubeka inyawo lakho edorobheni, umsana ahlongakale." 
1Kings14:13 Woke u-Israyeli uzamlilela abe amngcwabe. Nguye kwaphela ongewakaJerobhowamu ozakungcwatjwa ngombana nguye kwaphela endlini kaJerobhowamu uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli afunyene kuye okulungileko. 
1Kings14:14 UZimu uzazivusela ikosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli ezakutjhabalalisa umndeni kaJerobhowamu. Namhlanje kunamhlanje phezu kwendlu kaJerobhowamu, okukhulu kuseza ku-Israyeli!" 
1Kings14:15 USomnini uzakumadlha u-Israyeli kube inga mhlanga nawubhecenyeka emanzini. Uzakusiphula u-Israyeli enarheni ehle ayinikela aboyisemkhulu le bese abaphadlhalaje ngaphetjheya komlambo iYufrathe ngombana bathukuthelise uSomnini ngokwenza imifanekiso yabo-Atjhera. 
1Kings14:16 USomnini uzakulahla u-Israyeli ngebanga lezono ezenziwe nguJerobhowamu abangela ngazo bonyana u-Israyeli one.” 
1Kings14:17 UmkaJerobhowamu wasikima wakhamba waya eTiritsa. Kuthe lokha nagadanga emnyango wendlu, umsana wahlongakala." 
1Kings14:18 Bamngcwaba, woke u-Israyeli wamlilela njengombana uSomnini bekatjhwile ngencekwakhe umphorofidi u-Arhiya." 
1Kings14:19 Ezinye izehlakalo zombuso kaJerobhowamu, izipi azilwileko nokobana wabusa njani, koke kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Kings14:20 Wabusa amatjhumi amabili nambili weminyaka, wahlongakala. Indodanakhe uNadaba yaba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Kings14:21 URerhobhowamu umsa kaSolomoni gade ayikosi kwaJuda. Bekaneminyaka ematjhumi amane nanye lokha nathatha iintambo zobukhosi, wabusa iminyaka elitjhumi nekhomba eJerusalema, idorobho uSomnini alikhetha hlangana nazo zoke iinkoro zakwa-Israyeli kobana abeke khona ibizo lakhe. UNoRerhobhowamu gade kunguNama umAmoni." 
1Kings14:22 UJuda wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini. Ngezono abazenzako batlhorholoja uSomnini ukudlula aboyise. 
1Kings14:23 Nabo bazakhela iindunduma, babeka amatje akhethekileko kanye nemifanekiso yabo-Atjhera komunye nomunye umbundu ophakamileko nangaphasi komuthi omunye nomunye ohlaza." 
1Kings14:24 Kwabe kwaba khona ngitjho neentjhatjha zethempeli ezimadoda enarheni, abantu abenza woke amanyala afunyanwa ezizweni uSomnini aziqotjha phambi kwama-Israyeli." 
1Kings14:25 Emnyakeni wesihlanu wokubusa kwekosi uRerhobhowamu, uTjhitjhaga ikosi yeGibhide wasahlela iJerusalema." 
1Kings14:26 Wathumba umnotho wethempeli lakaSomnini kanye nomnotho wesigodlo. Wakhukhula yoke into, ngitjho neenhlangu zegolide ezenziwa nguSolomoni." 
1Kings14:27 Ikosi uRerhobhowamu yenza iinhlangu zekoporo ukujamiselela ezithethweko yazibeka esandleni seenduna zamavulandlela agade agada isango lesigodlo. 
1Kings14:28 Njalo lokha ikosi nayiya ethempelini lakaZimu, amavulandlela gade athwala iinhlangu bese ngemva kwalokho azibuyisele endlwaneni esesangweni lesigodlo." 
1Kings14:29 Zoke izehlakalo ezinye zokubusa kwakaRerhobhowamu zitlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwaJuda. 
1Kings14:30 Kwaba khona ipi phakathi kwakaRerhobhowamu noJerobhowamu emihleni yoke yokubusa kwabo. 
1Kings14:31 URerhobhowamu wahlongakala wabulungwa kiboyisemkhulu eMzini kaDavida. UNoRerhobhowamu gade kunguNama umAmoni. U-Abiya indodanakhe yaba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe. 
1Kings15:1 Emnyakeni wetjhumi nobunane wokubusa kwakaJerobhowamu umsa kaNebathi, u-Abiya waba yikosi yakwaJuda." 
1Kings15:2 Wabusa iminyaka emithathu eJerusalema. UNo-Abiya gade kunguMakha indodakazi ka-Abitjhalomu. 
1Kings15:3 Wenza zoke izono ezazenziwa nguyise phambi kwakhe, ihliziywakhe yayingakanamatheli ngokupheleleko kuSomnini uZimakhe njengombana kwakunjalo ngehliziyo kaDavida uyisemkhulu." 
1Kings15:4 Nokho-ke uSomnini uZimu waba nomusa kuDavida wamvusela isibani eJerusalema ngokumnikela isizukulwana esamelamako ebukhosini nangokuqinisa iJerusalema. 
1Kings15:5 USomnini wenza lokhu ngombana uDavida wenza okulungileko emehlwenakhe. Epilwenakhe yoke azange akhe aphambuke emiyalweni yoke uSomnini amyala ngayo, kwase kwaba yindaba ka-Uriya umHite." 
1Kings15:6 Ipi eyathoma phakathi kwakaRerhobhowamu noJerobhowamu yaragela phambili ngitjho nangesikhathi soke sokubusa kwaka-Abiya. 
1Kings15:7 Zoke izehlakalo ezinye zokubusa kwaka-Abiya nakho koke akwenzako, nepi eyaba phakathi kwakhe noJerobhowamu kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwaJuda." 
1Kings15:8 U-Abiya wahlongakala, wabulungwa eMzini kaDavida. U-Asa indodanakhe waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Kings15:9 Emnyakeni wamatjhumi amabili wokubusa kwakaJerobhowamu ikosi yakwa-Israyeli, u-Asa waba yikosi yakwaJuda." 
1Kings15:10 Wabusa eJerusalema iminyaka ematjhumi amane nanye. Ugogwakhe gade kunguMakha indodakazi ka-Abitjhalomu. 
1Kings15:11 U-Asa wenza okulungileko phambi kwakaSomnini njengokhokhwakhe uDavida. 
1Kings15:12 Waqotjha iintjhatjha zethempeli ezimadoda enarheni wathanyela nawo woke amanyala wabosingazimu ebegade enziwe boyisemkhulu. 
1Kings15:13 Wabe wehlisa nogogwakhe uMakha ekubeni yindlovukazi ngombana wenza umfanekiso onyenyisako waka-Atjhera. U-Asa wagawula umfanekiso lowo wawutjhisa esikhisini iKhidroni. 
1Kings15:14 Nanyana angazange asuse iindunduma, ihliziyo ka-Asa yayinamathele ngokupheleleko kuSomnini ipilwakhe yoke." 
1Kings15:15 Waletha isiliva negolide ethempelini lakaSomnini kanye nenye ipahla yena noyise abayihlukanisela umsebenzi kaSomnini. 
1Kings15:16 Kwakunepi phakathi kwaka-Asa noBhatjha ikosi yakwa-Israyeli esikhathini soke sokubusa kwabo. 
1Kings15:17 UBhatjha ikosi yakwa-Israyeli wenyuka wayokulwa noJuda bewakha nomthangala magegana neRama ukuze u-Asa ikosi yakwaJuda akhandeleke ngenarhenakhe. 
1Kings15:18 U-Asa wathatha loke isiliva negolide elalisele endlini yamagugu ngethempelini lakaSomnini nendlini yamagugu esigodlweni sakhe. Walinikela iinkhulu zakhe, wazithuma kuBhen-Hadadi umsa kaThabrimoni, omsa kaRheziyoni, ikosi ye-Aramu, owayebusa eDamaseku, wathi:" 
1Kings15:19 “Kunesivumelwano phakathi kwami nawe njengombana kwakunjalo phakathi kwakababa nobabakho. Qala, ngikuthumelela isipho sesiliva negolide. Nje-ke qeda isivumelwano sakho noBhatjha ikosi yakwa-Israyeli ukuze angigadunge.”" 
1Kings15:20 UBhen-Hadadi wavumelana nekosi u-Asa bewathumela abaphathi bamabuthwakhe bona asahlele amadorobho wakwa-Israyeli. Wahlula i-Iyoni, iDani, i-Abela-Bhethe-Makha nayo yoke iKineretha kanye neNafitali." 
1Kings15:21 Kuthe bona uBhatjha ezwe, walisa ukwakha iRama wabalekela eTiritsa." 
1Kings15:22 Ngomyalo wekosi u-Asa owawembatha woke umuntu kilo loke lakwaJuda, kwathathwa amatje neengodo ebezisetjenziswa nguBhatjha eRama. Ikosi u-Asa yakha ngazo iGeba kwaBhenjamini neMitsipha." 
1Kings15:23 Ezinye izehlakalo zokubusa kwaka-Asa, koke akwenzileko, ukuhlula kwakhe kanye namadorobho awakhileko kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwaJuda. Kuthe u-Asa naluphalako wabanjwa kugula okwamrhwahlaphaza iinyawo;" 
1Kings15:24 wahlongakala bewabulungwa kiboyisemkhulu eMzini kayisemkhulu uDavida. UJehotjhafathi waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe. 
1Kings15:25 UNadaba umsa kaJerobhowamu waba yikosi kwa-Israyeli emnyakeni wesibili wokubusa kwaka-Asa ikosi yakwaJuda. Wabusa iminyaka emibili kwa-Israyeli. 
1Kings15:26 Wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini, wakhamba emtlhaleni kayise, wamfuza nangokona, abangela ngakho bonyana u-Israyeli one." 
1Kings15:27 UBhatjha umsa ka-Arhiya omunye wekoro ka-Isakari, wamakhela uNadaba ubukhwebetjhana bewamumadlha eGibhethoni, idorobho lamaFilista ngesikhathi uNadaba naye woke u-Israyeli bebalivimbezele." 
1Kings15:28 UBhatjha wabulala uNadaba emnyakeni wesithathu wokubusa kwaka-Asa ikosi yakwaJuda bewathatha isikhundla sakhe waba yikosi. 
1Kings15:29 Kuthe nathoma ukubusa, wabulala zoke iinzukulwana zakaJerobhowamu. Azange ababalele nakhunye okuphefumulako kwakaJerobhowamu. Wabulala koke ukuya ngelizwi lakaSomnini alikhuluma ngencekwakhe u-Arhiya umTjhilo," 
1Kings15:30 ngebanga lezono zakaJerobhowamu abangela ngazo bonyana u-Israyeli one, nangebanga lokuthukuthelisa kwakhe uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Kings15:31 Ezinye izehlakalo zokubusa kwakaNadaba, nakho koke akwenzileko, kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Kings15:32 Kwakuhlala kulwiwa njalo phakathi kwaka-Asa noBhatjha ikosi yakwa-Israyeli esikhathini soke sokubusa kwabo. 
1Kings15:33 Emnyakeni wesithathu wokubusa kwaka-Asa ikosi yakwaJuda, uBhatjha umsa ka-Arhiya waba yikosi yakwa-Israyeli woke eTiritsa, wabusa iminyaka ematjhumi amabili nane." 
1Kings15:34 Wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini, wakhamba emtlhaleni kaJerobhowamu nezonweni zakhe abangela ngazo bonyana u-Israyeli one." 
1Kings16:1 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kuJehu umsa kaRhanani lijamelene noBhatjha lathi: 
1Kings16:2 “Ngakudobha ethulini ngakwenza umrholi wabantu bami u-Israyeli, kodwana ukhambe eendleleni zakaJerobhowamu bewabangela bona abantu bami u-Israyeli nabo bone, wangithukuthelisa ngezono zabo." 
1Kings16:3 Nje-ke ngizakurhurhula indlwakho, wena Bhatjha, njengamanzi narhurhula amabibi; ngiyenze ifane neyakaJerobhowamu umsa kaNebathi." 
1Kings16:4 Abantu bakho abafele emadorobheni bazakudliwa zizinja, kuthi abafele emrhuleni badliwe madlanga.”" 
1Kings16:5 Zoke izehlakalo zokubusa kwakaBhatjha, koke akwenzileko nokuhlula kwakhe, kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Kings16:6 UBhatjha wahlongakala, wabulungelwa eTiritsa. U-Ela indodanakhe yaba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Kings16:7 Umlayezo uSomnini awuphathisa umphorofidi uJehu umsa kaRhanani gade unqophe kuBhatjha neenzukulwana zakhe, ngebanga lakho koke okumbi akwenza phambi kwakaSomnini. Wathukuthelisa uSomnini ngezenzo zakhe, waba njengendlu kaJerobhowamu. Elinye ibanga kukobana uBatjha wabhubhisa indlu kaJerobhowamu." 
1Kings16:8 Emnyakeni wamatjhumi amabili nathandathu wokubusa kwaka-Asa ikosi yakwaJuda, u-Ela umsa kaBhatjha waba yikosi kwa-Israyeli. Wabusa eTiritsa iminyaka emibili." 
1Kings16:9 Omunye weenkhulu zakhe okuthiwa nguZimri ogade amphathi wengcenye yeenkarana zakhe wamakhela ubukhwebetjhana. Ngesikhatheso u-Ela gade aseTiritsa, azinikelele ngotjwala kwa-Aritsa, induna egade yeluse isigodlo seTiritsa." 
1Kings16:10 UZimri wangena, wamdula phasi bewambulala. Lokhu kwenzeka emnyakeni wamatjhumi amabili nekhomba wokubusa kwaka-Asa ikosi yakwaJuda. UZimri wathatha ubukhosi." 
1Kings16:11 Kuthe nathoma ukubusa, sele abekiwe esihlalweni sobukhosi, wabulala boke endlini kaBhatjha. Azange atjhiye namunye omduna, wabulala kwasihlobo namngani." 
1Kings16:12 Iye, uZimri wabhubhisa woke umndeni kaBhatjha kwaba njengokutjho kwelizwi lakaSomnini alikhuluma kuJehu ngokujamelana noBhatjha." 
1Kings16:13 Ngebanga lazo zoke izono ezenziwa nguBhatjha nendodanakhe u-Ela, ngokubangela bonyana no-Israyeli one ngabosingazimu abangatjho litho, bathukuthelisa uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Kings16:14 Ezinye izehlakalo zokubusa kwaka-Ela, nakho koke akwenzako kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Kings16:15 Emnyakeni wamatjhumi amabili nalikhomba wokubusa kwaka-Asa ikosi yakwaJuda, uZimri wabusa eTiritsa amalanga alikhomba. Kwakunamabutho agade avimbezele iGibhethoni, idorobho lamaFilista." 
1Kings16:16 Kuthe lokha ama-Israyeli asekampeni nezwa bonyana uZimri ubophele ikosi ubukhwebetjhana, bewambulala, athatha u-Omri umphathibutho amenza ikosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli khona mhlokho ekampenapho." 
1Kings16:17 U-Omri nawo woke ama-Israyeli agade anaye lapho baphuma eGibhethoni bavimbezele iTiritsa. 
1Kings16:18 Lokha uZimri nabona bonyana idorobho liragelelwe, wanqomba esiphephelweni sesigodlo, wafese wasithungelela ngomlilo ngehla kwakhe, wahlongakala." 
1Kings16:19 Wafa ngebanga lezono azenzileko ngombana wenza okumbi phambi kwakaSomnini ngokukhamba eendleleni zakaJerobhowamu nezonweni azenzako, nabangela ngazo u-Israyeli bona one." 
1Kings16:20 Ezinye izehlakalo zokubusa kwakaZimri kanye nobukhwebetjhana bakhe ngo-Ela kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwa-Israyeli. 
1Kings16:21 Abantu bakwa-Israyeli bahlukana iinqhema ezimbili, esinye isiquntu sasekela uTibni umsa kaGinathi kobana abe yikosi, esinye sasekela u-Omri." 
1Kings16:22 Kodwana abalandeli baka-Omri bebanamandla ukudlula bakaTibni umsa kaGinathi. Kuthe uTibni selahlongakele, u-Omri waba yikosi." 
1Kings16:23 Emnyakeni wamatjhumi amathathu nanye wokubusa kwaka-Asa ikosi yakwaJuda, u-Omri wathatha iintambo kwa-Israyeli. Wabusa iminyaka elitjhumi nambili; iminyaka esithandathu wayibusela eTiritsa." 
1Kings16:24 Wathenga intatjana yeSamariya kuTjhemeri ngamakhilogremu amatjhumi asithandathu nobunane wesiliva. Wakha nomuzi phezu kwentatjanapho, wawuthiya bona yiSamariya, awuthiyelela ngoTjhemeri ogade amnikazi waphambilini wentatjana leyo." 
1Kings16:25 Kodwana u-Omri wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini, wathuwelela ukudlula boke ababuse phambi kwakhe." 
1Kings16:26 Wakhamba kizo zoke iindlela zakaJerobhowamu umsa kaNebathi ngitjho nezonweni zakhe, abangela ngazo bonyana u-Israyeli one, bekwafika lapha bathukuthelisa khona uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli ngabosingazimu abangatjho litho." 
1Kings16:27 Ezinye izehlo zokubusa kwaka-Omri, koke akwenzileko nokuhlula kwakhe, kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Kings16:28 U-Omri waphumula kiboyisemkhulu, wabulungwa eSamariya. U-Arhabi indodanakhe waba yikosi emva kwakhe." 
1Kings16:29 Emnyakeni wamatjhumi amathathu nobunane wokubusa kwaka-Asa ikosi yakwaJuda, u-Arhabi umsa ka-Omri waba yikosi yakwa-Israyeli. Wabusa eSamariya phezu kwaka-Israyeli iminyaka ematjhumi amabili nambili." 
1Kings16:30 U-Arhabi umsa ka-Omri wathuwelela khulu ukudlula boke ababuse phambi kwakhe ngokwenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini. 
1Kings16:31 Wabona inga akukaneli ukudlhemadlhema eendleleni zokona kwakaJerobhowamu umsa kaNebathi, watjhada no-Izebeli indodakazi ka-Ethi-Bhali ikosi yamaTsidoni, bewakhamba alotjha uBhali wamkhothamela." 
1Kings16:32 Wajamisela uBhali i-aldari ethempelini lakaBhali alakha eSamariya. 
1Kings16:33 U-Arhabi godu wenza umfanekiso ka-Atjhera begodu wathuwelela ngokuthukuthelisa uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli kunawo woke amakhosi abuse ngaphambi kwakhe. 
1Kings16:34 Ngesikhathi saka-Arhabi, uHiyeli weBhethe-Eli wavuselela iJerikho. Waleya isisekelo sayo ngomphefumulo wezibulo lendodanakhe u-Abiramu, wajamisa amasangwayo ngomphefumulo wobuphetjani bendodanakhe uSegubhi, kwaba njengelizwi lakaSomnini alikhuluma ngoJotjhuwa umsa kaNuni." 
1Kings17:1 U-Eliya owavela eTitjhibe yeGiliyadi wathi ku-Arhabi: “Ngifunga uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli engimlotjhako ngithi, akuzukuba nombethe nazulu eminyakeni ezako kufikela lapha ngitjho khona bona akube njalo.”" 
1Kings17:2 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika ku-Eliya lathi: 
1Kings17:3 “Suka lapha, jikela ngepumalanga uzifihle emlanjaneni weKerithe, ngepumalanga yeJordani." 
1Kings17:4 Uzakusela emlanjanenapho begodu ngilayele amagubulu bonyana akondle.” 
1Kings17:5 Yeke wenza njengombana uSomnini amyalile. Wanqopha emlanjaneni weKerithe ngepumalanga yeJordani, wahlala lapho." 
1Kings17:6 Amagubulu amlethela isikwa nomlibhani ekuseni nantambama, wasela emlanjanenapho." 
1Kings17:7 Ngokukhamba kwesikhathi umlanjana lowo woma ngombana gade kunganazulu enarheni. 
1Kings17:8 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kuye lathi: 
1Kings17:9 “Khamba khona nje uye eTsarifathi yeTsidoni uyokuhlala khona. Qala ngilayele umhlolokazi lapho bonyana akondle.” 
1Kings17:10 Wasikima khonokho waya eTsarifathi. Kuthe lokha nafika esangweni ledorobhelo, wathi vumbu phezu komhlolokazi atheza iinkuni. Wambiza, wambuza wathi: “Ungakhe ungizele amanzana ngesikurwana ngisuse ithuli na?”" 
1Kings17:11 Kuthe umhlolokazi nasathi uyokukha amanzi lawo, u-Eliya wathi kuye: “Usale sewusiza negedzwana lesikwa, ngiyakurabhela.”" 
1Kings17:12 Umhlolokazi waphendula wathi: “Ngifunga uSomnini uZimu, abe anginalitho mntabantu. Selirhotjhana leflowuru neqobho lamafutha. Ungibona ngithezatheza amaqobotjhwana nje, kokwakho bengithi ngiyokwenzela mina nomsanyanami iqebelengwanyana, sesisule umlomo ngaphambi kobana kuphume isikhohlela.”" 
1Kings17:13 U-Eliya wathi kuye: “Ungesabi. Khamba uye ekhaya ufese wenze njengombana utjhwile. Kodwana uthome ngokwenzela mina iqebelengwanyana ngalokho onakho ukulethe kimapha bese-ke uzenzela wena nomsanyanakho 
1Kings17:14 ngombana nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli: “Irhotjhana leflowuru angeze laba dududu neqobho lamafutha angeze loma, bekube kumhlana uSomnini anisa izulu enarheni.”" 
1Kings17:15 Wakhamba-ke, wenza njengombana u-Eliya amtjelile. Yeke ngamalanga kwaba nokudla okwanele u-Eliya nomhlolokazi nendlwakhe." 
1Kings17:16 Ngambala irhotjhana leflowuru azange libe dududu neqobho lamafutha azange lome, kwaba njengombana ilizwi lakaSomnini latjho ngo-Eliya." 
1Kings17:17 Kwathi ngemva kwalokho indodana yomhlolokazi u-Eliya afikela kuye loya, yagula. Kwembulwa kwembeswa ngendodana leyo bekwafika lapha ingasaphefumuli khona." 
1Kings17:18 Umhlolokazi wathi ku-Eliya: “Akhusuthi uyaqala bona ungenzeleni, wena muntu kaZimu! Uze lapha bona uzongikhumbuza ngesono sami bewubulale indodanami?”" 
1Kings17:19 U-Eliya wathi: “Lethapha indodanakho leyo.” Wayithatha emathangenakhe, wayisa elawini eliphezulu lapha agade alala khona, wayilalisa embhedenakhe." 
1Kings17:20 Wabiza uSomnini wathi: “Somnini Zimami, wehlisele nomhlolokazi engikhonze kwakhe lo ihlekelele ngokubangela bonyana indodanakhe ihlongakale na?”" 
1Kings17:21 Wabhambalala phezu komntwana kathathu walila kuSomnini wathi: “Maye Somnini Zimami, buyisela umphefumulo womsana lo!”" 
1Kings17:22 USomnini wezwa isililo saka-Eliya, umphefumulo womntwana wabuyela kuye, waphila." 
1Kings17:23 U-Eliya waguga umntwana loyo weza naye asuka elawini eliphezulu wamletha ngendlini. Wamnikela unina wathi: “Qala, indodanakho iyaphila!”" 
1Kings17:24 Yeke umhlolokazi wathi ku-Eliya: “Gadesi sengiyazi bonyana umumuntu kaZimu nokobana ilizwi lakaSomnini eliphuma emlonyenakho liliqiniso.” 
1Kings18:1 Ngemva kwesikhathi eside, emnyakeni wesithathu wesomiso, ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika ku-Eliya lathi: “Khamba ufese uziveze ku-Arhabi ukuze ngithumele izulu enarheni godu.”" 
1Kings18:2 Nje-ke u-Eliya waya bona ayoziveza ku-Arhabi. Indlala gade ibhokile ngesikhatheso eSamariya. 
1Kings18:3 U-Arhabi wabiza u-Obadiya umelusi wesigodlo. U-Obadiya lo, gade kumumuntu owesaba uZimu." 
1Kings18:4 Kwathi lokha u-Izebeli nabulala abaphorofidi bakaSomnini, u-Obadiya wathatha abalikhulu wabafihla emarholweni amabili, kwaba matjhumi amahlanu erholweni ngalinye, wabapha ukudla namanzi." 
1Kings18:5 U-Arhabi wathi ku-Obadiya: “Khamba udabule inarha uye kiyo yoke imithombo nemilanjana. Mhlamunye kungaba notjanyana bokulonda iinjomani neemeyila zethu bona zingafi ukuze singabulali ezithileko zazo.” 
1Kings18:6 Nje-ke bahlukanisa inarha ebegade bafanele bayikhambe, u-Arhabi waya ngapha no-Obadiya waya ngale." 
1Kings18:7 Kuthe u-Obadiya nasakhamba njalo, u-Eliya wamhlangabeza. U-Obadiya wamlemuka bonyana nguye, wahloma ihloko phasi wathi: “Kosami Eliya, ngambala nguwe lo na?”" 
1Kings18:8 Waphendula wathi: “Iye ngimi. Yeke khamba uyokutjela ikosakho bonyana mina Eliya sele ngilapha.” 
1Kings18:9 U-Obadiya walila wathi: “Kazi ngoneni kangaka bona sewungaze unikelele incekwakho ngo-Arhabi kobana ayihlukanise namabele na? 
1Kings18:10 NgoZimu ngiqinisile ngithi uSomnini uyangizwa, akunasizwe namkha umbuso lapha ikosami ingazange ithumele khona umuntu bonyana ayokufuna. Bekuthi lokha isizwe namkha umbuso nawukulandulako bese uyawufungisa bona ngambala azange ufumaneke kiwo." 
1Kings18:11 Nje-ke wena kosami uthi angiye ekosinami fese ngithi, ‘Kazi u-Eliya ulapha’." 
1Kings18:12 Ngizakuthi nangifulathela lapha bese uMoya kaSomnini uyakuthwala ukuse kwandawo. Ngifike-ke mina ngibikele u-Arhabi ngawe, athi nathi uyakugola afumane ngesikhundla, ngizakuba mumuntu wokufa. Khibe mina ncekwakho ngathoma ukwesaba uZimu kusukela ebutjheni bami." 
1Kings18:13 Ikosami ayikezwa bonyana ngenzani lokha u-Izebeli nabulala abaphorofidi bakaSomnini? Ngafihla ikhulu labaphorofidi bakaSomnini emarholweni amabili, kwaba matjhumi amahlanu erholweni ngalinye, ngabondla ngokudla nangamanzi." 
1Kings18:14 Gadesi wena kosami uthi angiye ku-Arhabi fese ngithi, ‘Kazi u-Eliya ulapha.’ Uzongibulala!”" 
1Kings18:15 U-Eliya wathi: “NgoZimu uMninimandlawoke engimlotjhako, ngithi ngambala ngizoziveza ku-Arhabi namhlanjesi.”" 
1Kings18:16 Yeke u-Obadiya wakhamba wayokubona u-Arhabi wafese wamtjela-ke, u-Arhabi wasuka wayokuhlangabeza u-Eliya." 
1Kings18:17 Kuthe lokha u-Arhabi nabona u-Eliya, wathi kuye: “Sihlola ndina, nguwe lo? Mtlhorholoji ka-Israyeli!”" 
1Kings18:18 U-Eliya wathi: “Afeke! Azange khengitlhorholoje u-Israyeli mina. Nguwe nendlu kayihlo enenza njalo. Nilahle imiyalo kaSomnini nalandela aboBhali. 
1Kings18:19 Nje-ke biza abantu kilo loke lakwa-Israyeli bona bazokuhlangana nami entabeni iKarameli. Uze nabaphorofidi abamakhulu amane namatjhumi amahlanu bakaBhali nebaka-Atjhera abamakhulu amane abagoma etafuleni laka-Izebeli.” 
1Kings18:20 Yeke u-Arhabi wathumela ilizwi kilo loke lakwa-Israyeli wabuthelela abaphorofidi entabeni iKarameli. 
1Kings18:21 U-Eliya wajama phambi kwabantu wathi: “Kuzabe kube nini nilokhu nilotjha amakhosi amabili? Nangabe uSomnini nguye onguZimu, mlandeleni; kodwana nangabe nithi nguBhali onguZimu, mlandeleni-ke.” Kodwana abantu bathi du." 
1Kings18:22 Yeke u-Eliya wathi kibo: “Ngimi ngedwa oseleko ebaphorofidini bakaSomnini, kodwana uBhali unamakhulu amane namatjhumi amahlanu woke wabaphorofidi." 
1Kings18:23 Lethani iinkunzi ezimbili. Abazikhethele yinye, bayihlahlele bese bayibeke phezu kweenkuni kodwana bangathungeleli umlilo. Nami ngizakuhlahlela ikunzi enye bese ngiyibeka phezu kweenkuni ngingathungeleli umlilo." 
1Kings18:24 Nina baphorofidi nizabe seniyathoma-ke nibize ibizo lakazimenu, nami ngizakubiza ibizo lakaSomnini. Uzimu ozakuphendula ngokuthungelela umlilo, nguye uZimu wamambala.” Boke abantu bathi: “Ufike kuhle.”" 
1Kings18:25 U-Eliya wathi ebaphorofidini bakaBhali: “Thomani ntangi nikhethe enye yeenkunzi bese niyayihlahlela ngombana niliwoma. Bizani ibizo lakazimenu, kodwana ningathungeleli umlilo.”" 
1Kings18:26 Bathatha ikunzi abayinikelweko leyo bayihlahlela. Bathoma-ke babiza ibizo lakaBhali ukusuka ekuseni bekwaba semini ekulu. Barhuwelela bathi: “Siyakubawa Bhali, yewusiphendule!” Kodwana do ipendulo, sekwathi tse. Bagida magegana ne-aldari abalenzileko." 
1Kings18:27 Kwathi phakathi kwemini ekulu u-Eliya wathoma ukubatshima wathi: “Rhuwelelani khulu! Angithi nibiza uzimu na! Mhlamunye usatshwenyekile, usazibuza ayedwa nanyana usendleleni. Uthi akakalali nje? Mhlambe ufuna ukuphatjhanyiswa.”" 
1Kings18:28 Bathoma-ke barhuwelela bazirhaya ngeensabula nangemikhonto bebathelwa ziingazi njengombana gade kumkhubabo ukwenza njalo. 
1Kings18:29 Imini yadlula, baragela phambili ngokuba semmoyeni wokuphorofida bekwafika isikhathi somnikelo wantambama; kodwana kwathi tse, do ipendulo, kwangenzeka litho." 
1Kings18:30 Yeke u-Eliya wathi ebantwini boke: “Bandamelani kimapha.” Ngambala abantu babandamela kuye. Wavuselela i-aldari lakaSomnini ebegade sele ligirikile: 
1Kings18:31 Wathatha amatje alitjhumi nambili, ilitje ngalinye lijamele ikoro yesizukulwana sakaJakopo, okwafikela kuye ilizwi lakaSomnini elathi ibizo lakhe kuzakuba ngu-Israyeli." 
1Kings18:32 Wakha i-aldari ngamatje lawo ebizweni lakaSomnini, wemba umsedlana magegana ne-aldari. Umsedlana lo bewungamumatha imbewu engaba ligagogo nesiquntu." 
1Kings18:33 Waqaba iinkuni. Wahlahlela ikunzi, wayibeka phezu kweenkunapho." 
1Kings18:34 Wathi kibo: “Zalisani imijeka emine ngamanzi bese niwathela phezu komhlabelo naphezu kweenkuni.” Yeke wathi: “Thelani godu.” Ngambala bawathela. Godu wathi: “Buyelelani kwesithathu nithele.” Bawadlhuwelela kwesithathu. 
1Kings18:35 Amanzi ageleza azombeleza i-aldari. U-Eliya naye wazalisa umsedlana lowo ngamanzi. 
1Kings18:36 Kuthe nakufika isikhathi sokwenza umnikelo, umphorofidi u-Eliya watjhidela ngaphambili wathandaza wathi: “Maye Somnini, Zimu ka-Abrahamu, ka-Isaka no-Israyeli, akwazeke namhlanjesi bonyana unguZimu kwa-Israyeli nokobana ngiyincekwakho begodu koke lokhu engikwenzileko ngikwenze ngokulayelwa nguwe." 
1Kings18:37 Ngiphendule Somnini, ngiphendule ukuze abantwaba bazi bonyana wena Somnini unguZimu nokobana utjhugululela iinhliziyo zabo kuwe.”" 
1Kings18:38 Yeke umlilo kaSomnini wehla waqothula umhlabelo, iinkuni, amatje kanye nehlabathi, bewakhotha namanzi agade angemsedlaneni." 
1Kings18:39 Kuthe lokha abantu nababona koke lokhu, bawa ngamadolo bahloma iinhloko phasi bathi: “USomnini nguye onguZimu! USomnini nguZimu!”" 
1Kings18:40 U-Eliya wathi kibo: “Bambani boke abaphorofidi bakaBhali! Kungaphunyurhi noyedwa!” Yeke bababamba, u-Eliya wathi abalethwe emlanjaneni weKhidroni, wababulalela lapho." 
1Kings18:41 U-Eliya wathi ku-Arhabi: “Khamba, ufese ugome bewusele ngombana kunomrhubo wezulu.”" 
1Kings18:42 Kwathi u-Arhabi nayokugoma abe asele, u-Eliya yena wenyukela esiqongolweni seKarameli. Wahlala phasi wahloma ihloko hlangana namadolwakhe." 
1Kings18:43 Wathi encekwinakhe: “Khamba uqale ncaya ngelwandle.” Yakhamba-ke yayokuqala, yathi: “Akunalitho.” U-Eliya wathi: “Buyela emuva ufese uqale kakhomba.”" 
1Kings18:44 Kuthe ehlandleni lekhomba inceku yathi: “Kunelifu elincani elilingana nesandla somuntu elenyuka ngelwandle.” U-Eliya wathi: “Arha-ke, khamba ufese utjele u-Arhabi uthi, ‘Bophela iinjomani uthewuke ukuze izulweli lingakuvaleli.’ ”" 
1Kings18:45 Ngokuphazima kwelihlo umkayi wathi kupe ngamafu anzima tshu, kwavuka ummoya, kwaqubuka izulu elikhulu. U-Arhabi wakhwela ekaranenakhe wanqomba eJizriyela." 
1Kings18:46 Amandla kaSomnini embatha u-Eliya, wakhwezelela ingubakhe ebhandeni, wagijima phambi kwaka-Arhabi bekwaba sendleleni eya eJizriyela." 
1Kings19:1 U-Arhabi wadembela u-Izebeli yoke into eyenziwe ngu-Eliya nangendlela abulele ngayo boke abaphorofidi ngesabula. 
1Kings19:2 U-Izebeli wathumela isithunywa ku-Eliya bonyana sithi: “Ngiyafunga ngithi abozimu abangikghame nange kusasa ngeenkhathezi ngingenzi ipilwakho ifane neyomunye wabaphorofidaba.” 
1Kings19:3 U-Eliya wesaba u-Izebeli, khonokho wabaleka. Kuthe lokha nafika eBheritjheba kwaJuda, watjhiya incekwakhe lapho." 
1Kings19:4 Yena waragela phambili nekhambo elamthatha ilanga erhalawumbeni. Wafika wahlala ngaphasi kwesithukghwana somuthi wafisa ngathi angafa wathi: “Somnini, ngiyisuthi ipilo. Thatha ummoyami, ngizakuthi ngingcono ngani nje kunabokhokho bami?”" 
1Kings19:5 Wazitjhutheka ngaphasi kwesithukghwaneso, wabanjwa buthongo. Khonokho ingilozi yamthinta yathi: “Vuka ugome.”" 
1Kings19:6 Wathalaza, wabona isikwa esibhagwe emalahleni atjhisako nomjekana wamanzi. Wagoma bewasela wabuya walala godu." 
1Kings19:7 Ingilozi kaSomnini yabuya kwesibili yamthinta yathi: “Vuka ugome ndoda, usesenekhambo elide.”" 
1Kings19:8 Yeke wavuka wagoma bewasela. Ukudlokho kwamqinisa, wakhamba amalanga amatjhumi amane nobusuku bakhona bewafika entabeni kaZimu iRhorebe." 
1Kings19:9 Wafika wangena ngerholweni bona alale ubusukobo lapho. Nje-ke kwafika ilizwi lakaSomnini kuye lathi: “Ufunani lapha Eliya?” 
1Kings19:10 Waphendula wathi: “Gade ngitjhisakalela wena Somnini Zimu Mninimandlawoke. Ama-Israyeli aphayele isivumelwano sakho eqadi, agiriza ama-aldarakho abe abulala nabaphorofidi bakho ngesabula. Ungibona nginje, sekusele mina ngedwa. Nje-ke bafuna ukungikgharidlhela.”" 
1Kings19:11 USomnini wathi: “Phuma ujame phezu kwentaba phambi kwami ngombana mina Zimu ngizasuke ngidlula lapho.” Khonapho kwavuka ummoya omkhulu nonamandla warharhabula iintaba waqeqebula amadwala phambi kwakaSomnini, kodwana uSomnini gade angekho phakathi kommoya lowo. Ngemva kommoya lowo kwaba nokudengezela kwephasi, kodwana nalapho uSomnini gade angekho." 
1Kings19:12 Ngemva kokudengezela kwephasi kwavela umlilo, kodwana nemlilwenapho uSomnini gade angekho. Ngemva komlilo lowo kwaba nokutjhitjhiza okuzothileko." 
1Kings19:13 Kwathi lokha u-Eliya nezwa lokho, wazigubuzesa ngenaka lakhe waphumela ngaphandle wajama emnyango werholo. Ilizwi lathi kuye: “Ufunani lapha Eliya?”" 
1Kings19:14 U-Eliya wathi: “Gade ngitjhisakalela wena Somnini Zimu Mninimandlawoke. Ama-Israyeli aphayele isivumelwano sakho eqadi, agiriza ama-aldarakho abe abulala nabaphorofidi bakho ngesabula. Ungibona nginje, sekusele mina ngedwa. Nje-ke bafuna ukungikgharidlhela.”" 
1Kings19:15 USomnini wathi kuye: “Buyela emuva ngendlela oze ngayo bese uya erhalawumbeni leDamaseku. Nawufika lapho, uzese uRhazayeli abe yikosi yama-Aramu." 
1Kings19:16 Godu uzese uJehu umsa kaNimtjhi abe yikosi kwa-Israyeli, uzese no-Elitjha umsa kaTjhafathi we-Abela-Merhola bonyana athathe iintambo zobuphorofidi emva kwakho." 
1Kings19:17 Ophunyurha esabuleni kaRhazayeli uzakubulawa nguJehu, kuthi ophunyurha esabuleni kaJehu abulawe ngu-Elitjha." 
1Kings19:18 Nokho ngizakubabalela abaziinkulungwana ezilikhomba kwa-Israyeli: boke abangazange bakhothamele uBhali nabangazange bamncwange.” 
1Kings19:19 Yeke u-Eliya wasuka lapho wafumana u-Elitjha umsa kaTshafathi. Gade kuneempani ezilitjhumi nambili zeenkabi zilima ngaphasi kwelihlo lakhe, yena gade atjhayela ezimbili zokugcina. U-Eliya wanqomba kuye wafese wamembesa ngenaka lakhe emahlombe." 
1Kings19:20 U-Elitjha watjhiya iinkabezo walandela u-Eliya ngebelo wathi: “Angilayelise ubaba nomma bese ngiyakulandela-ke.” U-Eliya wathi: “Buyela emuva, kodwana ungalibali engikwenze kuwe.”" 
1Kings19:21 Awa, u-Elitjha wajika-ke. Wathatha iinkabi ezimbili agade alima ngazo wazihlaba. Ngeentlabagelo zokulima wapheka inyama wayiphakela iinsebenzi, zazinikelela. Wasuka lapho walandela u-Eliya waba msizakhe." 
1Kings20:1 UBhen-Hadadi ikosi yama-Aramu wahlanganisa loke ibutho lakhe. Wakhuphuka aphekelelwa makhosi amatjhumi amathathu nambili akhamba ngeenjomani kanye neenkarana. Bavimbezela iSamariya ngokuthoma ipi. 
1Kings20:2 Wathumela iinthunywa ngedorobheni ku-Arhabi ikosi yakwa-Israyeli wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguBhen-Hadadi," 
1Kings20:3 ‘Isiliva negolide lakho kungekwami, iintandokazi ezibafazi bakho kanye nabantwabakho, ngebami.’ ”" 
1Kings20:4 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yaphendula yathi: “Ndabezitha, sekunjengombana ikosami isitjho. Mina nakho koke enginakho singebakho.”" 
1Kings20:5 Iinthunywa zabuya godu zathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguBhen-Hadadi, ‘Namhlanje ngithumele umlayezo bonyana kulandwe isiliva negolide lakho kanye nabafazi bakho nabantwabakho." 
1Kings20:6 Kodwana kusasa ngeenkhathezi ngizokuthumela iinkhulu zami bonyana zizokubhenyegula isigodlo sakho kanye nezindlu zeenkhulu zakho. Zizakuhlwitha yoke into eligugu kuwe zimuke nayo.’ ” 
1Kings20:7 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yabiza boke abaphathi benarha yathi kibo: “Nithi niyambona umrhali lo bonyana uphehla inturhu na? Ngimvumele nathi ufuna ngimnikele abafazi bami, abantwabami kanye nesiliva negolide lami. Kodwana kwanje khona sekwedlulele!”" 
1Kings20:8 Abaphathi nabo boke abantu bathi ekosini: “Alale alahlile! Ungavumi!” 
1Kings20:9 Yeke ikosi yaphendula iinthunywa zakaBhen-Hadadi yathi: “Fikani nithi ekosinami, ‘Incekwakho izakwenza koke okufune ekuthomeni, kodwana lokhu osele ukufuna gadesi; uzakufumana ngifile.’ ” Zakhamba iinthunywa zayokutjela uBhen-Hadadi umlayezo lowo." 
1Kings20:10 UBhen-Hadadi wathumela omunye umlayezo ku-Arhabi wathi: “Ngiyafunga ngithi abozimu abangikghame nange ngingalisa iSamariya ngingayiphenduli iqutjana leququ elingeze lafunjathwa ngitjho mabuthwami.” 
1Kings20:11 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yaphendula yathi: “Mtjeleni bonyana angazibethi isifuba ngokuhlanza ithunga ikomo ingakazali.” 
1Kings20:12 Umlayezo lo wafika kuBhen-Hadadi lokha yena namakhosi basaditjhe ngamarhalibogo ebandla, wathi ebantwini bakhe: “Hlomani!” Yeke bahloma bona basahlele idorobho." 
1Kings20:13 Qala kwafika omunye wabaphorofidi ku-Arhabi ikosi yakwa-Israyeli wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Uyasibona isinyokotho samabuthwesi na? Ngizosinikela esandleni sakho namhlanje, uzakwazi-ke bonyana mina nginguSomnini.’ ”" 
1Kings20:14 U-Arhabi wathi: “Kuzokwenziwa ngubani lokho?” Umphorofidi wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Kuzakwenziwa ziinkhulu ezincani zabalawuli beemfunda.’ ” Yeke wabuza wathi: “Ngubani ozokuthoma ipi leyo?” Umphorofidi wathi: “Nguwe.”" 
1Kings20:15 U-Arhabi wahlela iinkhulu ezincani zabalawuli beemfunda: Kwaba madoda amakhulu amabili namatjhumi amathathu namabili. Ngemva kwalapho wahlela woke u-Israyeli: Waba ziinkulungwana ezilikhomba. 
1Kings20:16 Baphuma phakathi kwemini ekulu lokha uBhen-Hadadi namakhosi amatjhumi amathathu nambili aqheme naye baburhiqwa ngamarhalibogo ebandla. 
1Kings20:17 Iinkhulu ezincani zabalawuli beemfunda zaphuma qangi. UBhen-Hadadi gade asabalalise iinhloli ezabuya nomlayezo othi: “Kunamadoda aphuma ngeSamariya.” 
1Kings20:18 Wathi: “Nangabe eze ngokuthula, abambeni ningawabulali. Nangabe eze ngepi nakhona abambeni ningawabulali.”" 
1Kings20:19 Iinkhulu ezincani zabalawuli beemfunda zajokola zaphuma edorobheni ziqabelelwe libutho. 
1Kings20:20 Esinye nesinye isikhulu samadlha umjamelanaso phasi. Ama-Aramu abaleka, ama-Israyeli awalala eenthendeni. UBhen-Hadadi ikosi ye-Aramu yaphunyurha ikhwelele injomani iphahlwe mabuthwayo weenjomani." 
1Kings20:21 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yatjhidela beyahlula iinkarana neenjomani zama-Aramu, yawalobisa khulu." 
1Kings20:22 Ngemva kwalapho kwafika umphorofidi ekosini yakwa-Israyeli wathi: “Khwezelela amabuthwakho, utjheje bonyana uzokuthathani uhlanganise nani ngombana ekuthomeni komnyaka ozako ikosi yama-Aramu izokusahlela godu.”" 
1Kings20:23 Iinkhulu zekosi ye-Aramu zayiluleka zathi: “Abozimu babo babozimu beentaba. Kungebangelo babenamandla khulu kunathi. Kodwana nange singalwela nabo egagadwini, nakanjani singababinda." 
1Kings20:24 Yenza lokhu: Susa woke amakhosi lapha aphethe khona bese uwajamiselela ngezinye iinkhulu. 
1Kings20:25 Zakhele ibutho elifana naleliya olilobileko. Libe neenjomani neenkarana ezilingana poro nezokuthoma. Asilwe nabo egagadwini, ngalokho sizakuba namandla kunabo.” Yavumelana nabo, yenza njengombana batjhwile." 
1Kings20:26 Ekuthomeni komnyaka olandelako uBhen-Hadadi wahlomisa ama-Aramu bonyana akhuphukele e-Afeki ukuyokulwa no-Israyeli. 
1Kings20:27 Ngesikhatheso ama-Israyeli nawo ahlonyiswa abe aphiwa nemiphako, aphuma ayokuhlangabezana nama-Aramu. Ama-Israyeli ahloma amatendawo aqalana nama-Aramu. Gade anzunzwana inga mihlanjana emibili yeembuzana ukube ama-Aramu wona azele ummango woke." 
1Kings20:28 Umuntu kaZimu wafika wathi ekosini yakwa-Israyeli: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Njengombana ama-Aramu adlumbana bonyana uSomnini unguzinyana weentaba ingasi wemirhoba, ngizakunikela soke isinyokotho samabuthwesi esandleni sakho, nje-ke wena uzakulemuka bonyana nginguSomnini.’ ”" 
1Kings20:29 Baqeda amalanga alikhomba baqalene ngamehlo abomvu, kwathi elangeni lekhomba yatholana phezulu. Ama-Israyeli akhubaza iinkulungwana ezilikhulu zamajoni weenyawo wama-Aramu ngelanga elilodwa." 
1Kings20:30 Amanye aphunyurha abalekela e-Afeki ngedorobheni. Khonapho umthangala wedorobho wagirikela amajoni aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nekhomba. UBhen-Hadadi wabalekela edorobheni wazifihla elawini elisemsamo. 
1Kings20:31 Iinkhulu zakhe zathi kuye: “Qala, sizwile bonyana amakhosi agade abusa indlu yakwa-Israyeli bekanesirhawu. Nambani siye ekosini yakwa-Israyeli sembethe imigodla emadininethu, sibophe neentambo eenhloko zethu. Mhlamunye ingababalela ipilwakho.”" 
1Kings20:32 Bembatha imigodla emadininabo, babopha neentambo eenhloko zabo, banqomba ekosini yakwa-Israyeli bafika bathi: “Ithi incekwakho uBhen-Hadadi, ‘Ngiyakubawa, yewungibabalele.’ ” Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yathi: “Kanti usaphila? Musi mfowethu loyo!”" 
1Kings20:33 Amadoda la athatha ikulumo le njengetshwayo elihle abe arhaba ukuyihlanganisa athi: “Iye, sitjho umfowenu uBhen-Hadadi!” Ikosi yathi: “Khambani niyomthatha.” Kwathi lokha uBhen-Hadadi nafikako, u-Arhabi wathi akakhwelele ekaranenakhe." 
1Kings20:34 UBhen-Hadadi wathi: “Ngizakubuyisa amadorobho ubaba awathatha kubabakho. Ungahloma iindawo zerhwebo eDamaseku njengombana nobaba enza njalo eSamariya.” U-Arhabi wathi: “Nawulungele ukwenza lokho okutjhoko, mina ngizakutjhaphulula.” Yeke benza isivumelwano, wamthukulula." 
1Kings20:35 Ngokulayelwa nguSomnini omunye wabafundi bomphorofidi wathi kumkhambisanakhe: “Ngimadlha!” Kodwana umkhambisanakhe wala. 
1Kings20:36 Yeke umfundi loyo wathi: “Ngebanga lokobana wale ukulalela uSomnini, kuzakuthi nawuqeda ukusuka kimapha, kuvele ibhubezi likurathurathule.” Ngambala uthe bona asuke, veliyani ibhubezi lambamba lambulala." 
1Kings20:37 Umfundi wafumana omunye umuntu wathi kuye: “Akhese ungimadlhe ngiyakurabhela.” Umuntu loyo wamumadlha-ke, wamlimaza." 
1Kings20:38 Yeke umfundi wakhamba wayokujama endleleni walindela ikosi. Wazitjhatjhanisa ngokuzitateja ngebhanditjhi esiphongweni. 
1Kings20:39 Kuthe lokha ikosi nayidlulako, umfundi wazililisa wathi: “Incekwakho yangena ekabeni yepi, yeke kwaba nomunye oza kimi nethunjwa wathi, ‘Yelusa umuntu lo. Wathi sithe, uzomkhokhela ngepilwakho, nakungasinjalo uzakubhadela amakhilogremu amatjhumi amathathu nane wesiliva.’" 
1Kings20:40 Kuthe incekwakho nayisadibadiba ngokhunye, umrhali loya walahleka.” Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yathi: “Naso-ke isigwebo sakho. Uzigwebe ngokwakho.”" 
1Kings20:41 Khonokho umfundi wasusa ibhanditjhi ebusweni bakhe; ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yambona bonyana ngomunye wesiqhema sabaphorofidi. 
1Kings20:42 Wathi ekosini: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Utjhaphulule umuntu ebengiqunte bonyana afe. Nje-ke uzakufa esikhundleni sakhe, nabantu bakho bafe esikhundleni sabantu bakhe.’ ”" 
1Kings20:43 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yabuyela esigodlweni sayo eSamariya idanile begodu igcwele ipotjwana. 
1Kings21:1 Emva kwalokho kwaba nesigemegeme esilandelako: UNabhothi umJizriyela gade anesidiribe. Isidiribesi gade siseJizriyela hlanu kwesigodlo saka-Arhabi ikosi yeSamariya. 
1Kings21:2 U-Arhabi wathi kuNabhothi: “Nginikela isidiribe sakho ngifuna ukusenza isivande semirorho ngombana sihlanu kwakwami. Esikhundleni sesidiribe sakho ngizakunikela esingcono, namkha nawuthandako ngizakukhokhela sona ngentengo elingeneko.”" 
1Kings21:3 Kodwana uNabhothi wathi: “UZimu angeze avuma bonyana ngikunikele ilifa labobamkhulu.” 
1Kings21:4 U-Arhabi waya kwakhe adanile begodu agcwele ipotjwana ngebanga lamezwi wakaNabhothi umJiziriyela nathi: “Ulale ulahlile ngelifa labobamkhulu.” Walala embhedenakhe aqumbelene bewala nokugoma. 
1Kings21:5 Umkakhe u-Izebeli wangena wambuza wathi: “Udaniswe yini? Awugomilini?” 
1Kings21:6 Waphendula wathi: “Ngombana ngithe kuNabhothi umJizriyela, ‘Ngithengisela isidiribe sakhwesi; nawuthandako, ngizakunikela esinye isidiribe esikhundleni salesi.’ Kodwana wathi kimi, ‘Ulale ulahlile.’ ”" 
1Kings21:7 U-Izebeli umkakhe wathi: “Njengekosi, angithi unamandla phezu kwaka-Israyel? Vuka ugome! Yenama! Mina ngizakufumanela isidiribe sakaNabhothi umJizriyela.”" 
1Kings21:8 Watlola iincwadi ebizweni laka-Arhabi, bewazifaka netshwayo lakhe, wazithumela kubaphathi neenkhulu ezihlala noNabhothi edorobheni lakhe." 
1Kings21:9 Eencwadinapho watlola ukuthi: Memezelani ilanga lokuzila ukudla bese nibeka uNabhothi endaweni ephakamileko hlangana nabantu. 
1Kings21:10 Kodwana bekani iinrhwirirhwiri ezimbili ngaphambi kwakhe bese nithi azifakaze zithi, “UNabhothi uthuke uZimu kanye nekosi.” Ngemva kwalokho bese nimkhuphela ngaphandle komuzi, nimkghadlhe ngamatje nimbulale." 
1Kings21:11 Yeke abaphathi kanye neenkhulu ezihlala edorobheni lakaNabhothi zenza njengombana u-Izebeli atjhwile eencwadini abatlolele zona. 
1Kings21:12 Bamemezela ukuzila ukudla bese babeka uNabhothi endaweni ephakamileko hlangana nabantu. 
1Kings21:13 Kwase kuza iinrhwirirhwiri ezimbili zazokuhlala phambi kwakhe zammangalela phambi kwabantu zathi: “UNabhothi uthuke uZimu kanye nekosi.” Bamdumela-ke bamkhuphela ngaphandle kwedorobho bamkghadlha ngamatje bambulala. 
1Kings21:14 Bathumela ilizwi ku-Izebeli bathi: “UNabhothi ukghadlhwe ngamatje begodu uhlongakele.” 
1Kings21:15 Kuthe ngemva kobana u-Izebeli ezwe bonyana uNabhothi ukghadlhwe ngamatje bewahlongakala, wathi ku-Arhabi: “Sikima khona nje, uthathe isidiribe sakaNabhothi umJizriyela owala ukukuthengisela sona. Akasaphili, selahlongakele.”" 
1Kings21:16 Kwathi bona u-Arhabi ezwe bonyana uNabhothi uhlongakele, weqa, wehlela esidiribeni sakaNabhothi umJizriyela, wasithatha." 
1Kings21:17 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika ku-Eliya umTitjhibe lathi: 
1Kings21:18 “Yeqa khona nje uyokuhlangabeza u-Arhabi ikosi yakwa-Israyeli, obusa eSamariya. Gadesi nje usesidiribeni sakaNabhothi, lapha ehlele khona kobana asithathe." 
1Kings21:19 Ufike uthi kuye, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: Angithi ubulele umuntu bewamthathela nepahlakhe?’ Bese uthi kuye godu, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: Lapha izinja ziqabhe khona iingazi zakaNabhothi, zizakuqabha nezakho, iye ngitjho iingazi zakho!’ ”" 
1Kings21:20 Kuthe u-Arhabi nabona u-Eliya wathi: “Sewungifumene-ke njalo sitha sami ndina!” Waphendula wathi: “Vele ngikufumene ngombana uzithengisile ngokwenza okumbi phambi kwakaSomnini. 
1Kings21:21 USomnini uthi, ‘Ngizokwehlisela ihlekelele. Ngizakurhurhula iinzukulwana zakho njengamanzi narhurhula amabibi. Ngirhayile koke okuduna, okukhulu nokuncani kwaka-Arhabi kwa-Israyeli." 
1Kings21:22 Indlwakho ngizayenza njengeyakaJerobhowamu umsa kaNebathi neyakaBhatjha umsa ka-Arhiya ngombana ungisilingile bewabangela no-Israyeli bonyana one.’ 
1Kings21:23 Malungana no-Izebeli uthi uSomnini, ‘Izinja zizakurhiribidela u-Izebeli endundumeni yeJizriyela.’" 
1Kings21:24 Abantu baka-Arhabi abafele edorobheni bazakudliwa zizinja, kuthi abafele emrhuleni badliwe madlanga.”" 
1Kings21:25 Iye, azange khekube nendoda efana no-Arhabi owazithengisa ngokwenza okumbi phambi kwakaSomnini ahlohlolozelwa ngu-Izebeli umkakhe." 
1Kings21:26 Wazirhubutjha khulu ngokudlhemadlhema ngemva kwamanyala wabosingazimu, njengama-Amori uSomnini awaqotjha phambi kwama-Israyeli." 
1Kings21:27 Lokha u-Arhabi nezwa amagama lawo, wadabula izambatho zakhe, wembatha inzilo bewazila nokudla. Walala ngazo wazulazula athobekile." 
1Kings21:28 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika ku-Eliya umTitjhibe lathi: 
1Kings21:29 “Umbonile u-Arhabi bonyana uzithobe kangangani phambi kwami? Njengombana azithobe kangaka nje, angeze ngisamehlisela ihlekelele epilwenakhe, esikhundleni salokho ngizayehlisela endlinakhe emalangeni wokubusa kwendodanakhe.”" 
1Kings22:1 Kwaba minyaka emithathu kunganapi phakathi kwama-Aramu nama-Israyeli. 
1Kings22:2 Kodwana kwathi emnyakeni wesithathu uJehotjhafathi ikosi yakwaJuda wehla wayokuthekela ikosi yakwa-Israyeli. 
1Kings22:3 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yayithe eenkhulwini zayo: “Anazi bonyana iRamothi eGiliyadi ingeyethu na? Kodwana sihlezi asilubalubeli ukuyibuyisa ezandleni zekosi ye-Aramu!” 
1Kings22:4 Kwathi lokha uJehotjhafathi nafikako, ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yambuza yathi: “Uzakwehla nami siyokulwa neRamothi eGiliyadi na?” UJehotjhafathi wathi ekosini yakwa-Israyeli: “Ngithi nginawe! Amajonami ngewakho neenjomani zami ngezakho!”" 
1Kings22:5 Kodwana uJehotjhafathi godu wathi ekosini yakwa-Israyeli: “Buza kuSomnini mantange.” 
1Kings22:6 Yeke ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yabizela abaphorofidi ndawonye, babamadoda amakhulu amane. Wababuza wathi: “Nithi angiphume ngiyokulwa neRamothi eGiliyadi, namkha ngihlale na?” Baphendula bathi: “Khamba ngombana uSomandla uzoyinikela ezandleni zekosi.”" 
1Kings22:7 Kodwana uJehotjhafathi wabuza wathi: “Akunamphorofidi kaZimu eduzapha esingabuza kuye na?” 
1Kings22:8 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yathi: “Awa, usekhona yena ongasibuzela kuZimu, into nje mina uyangikghabhudlha ngombana akunanto ehle akhe ayiphorofide ngami, uhlala angikhuluma kumbi njalo. Batjho nguMikaya umsa kaYimla.” UJehotjhafathi wathi: “Akusikuhle bonyana ikosi ikhulume njalo.”" 
1Kings22:9 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yabiza esinye seenkhulu zayo yathi: “Rhaba uze noMikaya umsa kaYimla loyo.” 
1Kings22:10 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli noJehotjhafathi ikosi yakwaJuda babembethe izambatho zabo zobukhosi bahlezi eenhlalweni zobukhosi eselelweni ngaphandle kwesango leSamariya, kuthe swi abaphorofidi phambi kwabo basemmoyeni wokuphorofida." 
1Kings22:11 UTsedekhiya umsa kaKenana wenza iimpondo zesimbi wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Ngeempondwezi, uzakutlhofoza ama-Aramu abe aphele nya.’ ”" 
1Kings22:12 Boke abaphorofidi abanye bebaphorofida bakhuluma into eyodwa basithi: “Sahlela iRamothi eGiliyadi bewuhlule ngombana uZimu uzayinikela ezandleni zekosi.” 
1Kings22:13 Isithunywa ebesiyokubiza uMikaya sathi kuye: “Qala, abaphorofidaba bakhuluma ngalizwi linye, boke baboniswa okuhle ngekosi. Nawe-ke zwana nabo ukhulume okuhle njengabo.”" 
1Kings22:14 Kodwana uMikaya wathi: “Ngiyaqinisa phambi kwakaSomnini ngithi, ngizokukhuluma kwaphela lokho uSomnini akukhuluma kimi.”" 
1Kings22:15 Kwathi nafikako ikosi yambuza yathi: “Mikaya, ngiye epini ukuyokulwa neRamothi eGiliyadi, namkha ngilise na?” Yena wathi: “Iye, khamba uyokusahlela bewuhlule ngombana uSomnini uZimu uzayinikela ezandleni zekosi.”" 
1Kings22:16 Ikosi yathi kuye: “Ufuna ngikufungise kangaki bonyana ungitjele iqiniso kwaphela ebizweni lakaSomnini na?” 
1Kings22:17 Yeke uMikaya wathi: “Ngibone woke u-Israyeli asabalaliswe emibundwini njengezimvu ezinganamelusi. UZimu wathi, ‘Abantwaba abanamelusi. Omunye nomunye akaziyele kwakhe ngokuthula.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yathi kuJehotjhafathi: “Uyezwa-ke! Angithi ngikutjelile bonyana abe akunabuhle angabuphorofida ngami. Into ayaziko sekungikhuluma kumbi!” 
1Kings22:19 UMikaya waragela phambili wathi: “Yeke lalela okwatjhiwo nguSomnini nangimbona ahlezi esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi aphahlwe mkhambathi woke wezulwini, ngesigomeni nangesinceleni sakhe" 
1Kings22:20 asithi, ‘Ngubani ungayokuyenga u-Arhabi bonyana asahlele iRamothi eGiliyadi ukuze aziphekelele yena ekufeni na?’ Omunye watjho lokhu nomunye watjho lokhuya." 
1Kings22:21 Khonapho kwavela omunye womkhambathi wajama phambi kwakaSomnini wathi, ‘Ngizamyenga.’" 
1Kings22:22 USomnini wabuza wathi, ‘Uzamyenga njani?’ Yena wathi, ‘Ngizakuphuma bese ngiba mummoya wamala emilonyeni yabo boke abaphorofidi bakhe.’ USomnini wathi, ‘Khamba uyomyenga, uzakuphumelela.’" 
1Kings22:23 Nje-ke, qala uSomnini ubeke ummoya wamala emilonyeni yabo boke abaphorodi bakhwaba. USomnini ukuhlelele ihlekelele.”" 
1Kings22:24 UTsedekhiya umsa kaKenana wakhuphuka wafika wawahla uMikaya emhlathini wathi: “Kuzenjani bonyana ummoya obuya kuSomnini usuke kimi uzokukhuluma kuwe?” 
1Kings22:25 UMikaya wathi: “Uzakwazi mhlana uyokubhaca elawini elisemsamo.” 
1Kings22:26 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yathi: “Thathani uMikaya lo nimbuyisele ku-Amoni oyinduna yedorobho nakuJowatjhi umntwanekosi 
1Kings22:27 bese nithi, ‘Ikosi ithi: Phoselani umrhali lo ngesikhungweni, nimuphe isikwana nethosana lamanzi ngamalanga kufikela bengibuye ngisaphephile.’ ”" 
1Kings22:28 UMikaya wathi: “Nange ngambala ungabuya uphephile, uZimu uzabe angakakhulumi ngami.” (Umphorofidi lo ufaniswa nowathi: “Yizwani noke nina bantu!”)" 
1Kings22:29 Yeke ikosi yakwa-Israyeli noJehotjhafathi ikosi yakwaJuda bakhuphukela eRamothi eGiliyadi. 
1Kings22:30 Ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yathi kuJehotjhafathi: “Ngizakungena epini ngokuzitjhatjhanisa, kodwana wena yembatha izambatho zakho zobukhosi.” Yeke ikosi yakwa-Israyeli yazitjhatjhanisa, yangena epini." 
1Kings22:31 Ikosi yama-Aramu gade iyale iinduna zeenkarana ezimatjhumi amathathu nambili yathi: “Ningalwi nananyana ngubani ngaphandle kwekosi yakwa-Israyeli.” 
1Kings22:32 Kuthe lokha iinduna zeenkarana nazibona uJehotjhafathi zathi: “Sayibamba inyamazana! Ngiyo ikosi yakwa-Israyeli!” Zajika bonyana zimthelekele. UJehotjhafathi warhuwelela afuna isizo. 
1Kings22:33 Iinduna zeenkarana zalemuka bonyana akusiyo ikosi yakwa-Israyeli, zajika." 
1Kings22:34 Khonapho kwase kwaba nodumuza ngomsebe angakanqophi muntu, wanemba ikosi yakwa-Israyeli hlangana nomphetho wesiphanga sembaji yepi. Ikosi leyo yathi kumtjhayeli wekaranayo: “Jikisa ikarana ungikhuphe epinapha, nakhu sele ngilimele khulu.”" 
1Kings22:35 Ipi yadlondlobala mhlokho. Ikosi yayilokhu isekelwe ekaranenayo iqalene nama-Aramu. Yayiphopha iingazi encebeni zigelezela phezu kwekaranayo, yahlongakala ilanga nalitjhingako." 
1Kings22:36 Khonokho kwahlatjwa umkhosi kiwo woke amabutho kwathiwa: “Omunye nomunye akabuyele ekhabo, buyelani eenarheni zenu!”" 
1Kings22:37 Ikosi yahlongakala ngaleyondlela, yalethwa eSamariya bona ibulungelwe khona." 
1Kings22:38 Bahlanza ikarana esizibeni esiseSamariya, lokha iingwadla nazihlambako. Izinja zaqabha iingazi zaka-Arhabi njengombana ilizwi lakaSomnini lalitjhwile." 
1Kings22:39 Zoke izehlakalo zokubusa kwaka-Arhabi, nakho koke akwenzileko, isigodlo asakhileko bewasikghabisa ngamazinyo wendlovu, namadorobho awaqinisileko, kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Kings22:40 U-Arhabi wabulungwa kiboyisemkhulu. Indodanakhe u-Arhaziya yathatha iintambo esikhundleni sakhe. 
1Kings22:41 UJehotjhafathi umsa ka-Asa waba yikosi yakwaJuda emnyakeni wesine wokubusa kwaka-Arhabi ikosi yakwa-Israyeli. 
1Kings22:42 UJehotjhafathi bekaneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu nahlanu lokha nathatha iintambo zobukhosi, wabusa eJerusalema iminyaka ematjhumi amabili nahlanu. Ibizo lakanina bekungu-Azubha indodakazi kaTjhilirhi." 
1Kings22:43 Wakhamba emtlhaleni kayise u-Asa kikho koke, azange aphambuke; wenza ubuhle ebusweni bakaSomnini." 
1Kings22:44 Nokho azange asuse iindunduma, ngebangelo abantu baragela phambili nokuletha imihlabelo nokutjhisa ipepho lapho." 
1Kings22:45 UJehotjhafathi naye gade anokuthula nekosi yakwa-Israyeli. 
1Kings22:46 Zoke izehlakalo zokubusa kwakaJehotjhafathi, ukuhlula kwakhe, okutjho izipi azilwileko, kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwaJuda." 
1Kings22:47 Wathanyela enarheni iintjhatjha zethempeli ebegade zisele lapho soloko kwangesikhathi kusabusa uyise u-Asa. 
1Kings22:48 Kwahlala kunganakosi kwa-Edomu; kwabusa umjaphethe. 
1Kings22:49 UJehotjhafathi wakha imijeje yemikhumbi yokurhweba kobana akghone ukuya e-Ofira ukufunyana igolide, kodwana imikhumbi leyo azange beyilinge nokuthaya, yaphahlazeka e-Etsiyoni-Gebere." 
1Kings22:50 Ngesikhatheso u-Arhaziya umsa ka-Arhabi wathi kuJehotjhafathi: “Vumela abantu bami bathaye nebakho.” Kodwana uJehotjhafathi wala. 
1Kings22:51 UJehotjhafathi wahlongakala, wabulungelwa eMzini kayisemkhulu uDavida. UJehoramu indodanakhe yathatha ubukhosi emva kwakhe." 
1Kings22:52 U-Arhaziya umsa ka-Arhabi waba yikosi yakwa-Israyeli eSamariya emnyakeni wekhomba wokubusa kwakaJehotjhafathi ikosi yakwaJuda. Wabusa u-Israyeli iminyaka emibili. 
1Kings22:53 Wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini ngombana wakhamba emtlhaleni kayise nonina nemtlhaleni kaJerobhowamu umsa kaNebathi, abangela ngawo bonyana u-Israyeli one." 
1Kings22:54 Walotjha bewakhothamela uBhali, ngaleyondlela wathukuthelisa uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, walingisa uyise weyi." 
2Kings1:1 Emva kokuhlongakala kwaka-Arhabi, uMowabi wahlubuka u-Israyeli." 
2Kings1:2 U-Arhaziya warhohlomela efesidereni-mluko lelawu elingaphezulu lesigodlo sakhe eSamariya, wamadlheka phasi, wazilimaza. Yeke wathumela iinthunywa wathi kizo: “Khambani niyokuthukula kuBhali-Zebhubi, uzinyana we-Ekroni nizwe bona ngizokuphola ekulimalenokhu na?”" 
2Kings1:3 Kodwana ingilozi kaSomnini yathi ku-Eliya umTitjhibe: “Khuphuka uhlangabeze iinthunywa zekosi yeSamariya uzibuze uthi, ‘Kungenca yokobana kunganaZimu kwa-Israyeli bonyana ningaze niyokuthukula kuBhali-Zebhubi uzinyana we-Ekroni na?" 
2Kings1:4 Yeke nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “ ‘Angekhe usasuka embhedeni olele kiwo. Ngiqinisile uzokufa!’ ” U-Eliya wakhamba-ke. 
2Kings1:5 Iinthunywa zabuyela ekosini. Ikosi yazibuza yathi: “Nibuya ngaliphi?” 
2Kings1:6 Zaphendula zathi: “Kunomuntu osihlangabezileko wafese wathi kithi, ‘Buyelani ekosini enithumileko nithi kiyo: Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, “Kungenca yokobana kunganaZimu kwa-Israyeli bonyana ungaze uthumele abantu bona bayokuthukula kuBhali-Zebhubi, uzinyana we-Ekroni na? Yeke angekhe usasuka embhedeni olele kiwo. Ngiqinisile uzokufa!” ’ ”" 
2Kings1:7 Ikosi u-Arhaziya yazibuza yathi: “Gade kumhlobo bani umuntu ofese wanihlangabeza lo, wanitjela lokhu?”" 
2Kings1:8 Zaphendula zathi: “Bekuyindoda enesambatho soboya nebhetjha edinini lakhe.” Ikosi yathi: “Ngu-Eliya umTitjhibe loyo.” 
2Kings1:9 Yeke yathumela induna nesiqhema sayo sabantu abamatjhumi amahlanu ku-Eliya. Induna yakhuphukela ku-Eliya ogade ahlezi esiqongolweni sombundu yafese yathi kuye: “Muntu kaZimu, ikosi ithi, ‘Yewehle!’ ”" 
2Kings1:10 U-Eliya wayiphendula wathi: “Nakubanyana ngimumuntu kaZimu, akwehle umlilo ezulwini uqothule wena nabantu bakho abamatjhumi amahlanu.” Mbala kwehla umlilo ezulwini waqothula induna nabantu bayo." 
2Kings1:11 U-Arhaziya wathumela godu enye induna nabantu bayo abamatjhumi amahlanu. Induna yakhuphuka yafika ku-Eliya yathi: “Muntu kaZimu, nakhu okutjhiwo yikosi u-Arhaziya, ‘Yehla masinyana!’ ”" 
2Kings1:12 U-Eliya wathi: “Nakubanyana ngimumuntu kaZimu, akwehle umlilo ezulwini uqothule wena nabantu bakho abamatjhumi amahlanu!” Kwehla umlilo kaZimu ezulwini waqothula induna nabantu bayo abamatjhumi amahlanu." 
2Kings1:13 Godu u-Arhaziya wathumela kwesithathu induna nabantu bayo abamatjhumi amahlanu. Induna yesithathu yona yenyuka yafese yaguqa phambi kwaka-Eliya yamrabhela yathi: “Muntu kaZimu, ngiyakurabhela akhese ubabalele ipilwami kanye neempilo zabantu abamatjhumi amahlanwaba!" 
2Kings1:14 Qala-nje, kwehle umlilo ezulwini waqothula iinduna ezimbili nabantu bazo boke. Kodwana njesi akhese ubabalele ipilwami.”" 
2Kings1:15 Nje-ke ingilozi kaSomnini yathi ku-Eliya: “Yehla naye, ungesabi.” Yeke u-Eliya wasikima wehlela nayo ekosini." 
2Kings1:16 U-Eliya wathi ekosini: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu, ‘Ngebanga lokobana uthumele iinthunywa kobana ziyokuthukula kuBhali-Zebhubi uzinyana we-Ekroni, kwanga akunaZimu kwa-Israyeli ongabuza kuye ngelizwi lakhe, ngalokho-ke awuzukwehla embhedeni olele kiwo. Ngiqinisile uzokufa.’ ”" 
2Kings1:17 Wahlongakala njalo-ke u-Arhaziya ngokuya ngelizwi lakaZimu agade alikhulume ngo-Eliya. Ngebanga lokobana gade anganandodana, umnakwabo uJoramu waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe emnyakeni wesibili wokubusa kwakaJehoramu umsa kaJehotjhafathi ikosi yakwaJuda." 
2Kings1:18 Zoke izehlakalo zokubusa kwaka-Arhaziya nalokho akwenzileko, kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwa-Israyeli." 
2Kings2:1 Nakhu okwenzeka mhlana uSomnini ahlwithela u-Eliya ezulwini ngesiwuruwuru: U-Eliya bano-Elitjha gade basendleleni ephuma eGiligali," 
2Kings2:2 u-Eliya wathi kuye: “Akhe uje usele lapha ngombana uSomnini usangithume eBhethe-Eli.” Kodwana u-Elitjha wathi: “NgoZimu ngiqinisile ngithi phila ngiphile, ngizokuba sithunzi sakho.” Yeke bewuka baya eBhethe-Eli."
