2Kings17:22 Ama-Israyeli aragela phambili nezono zakaJerobhowamu; akhange aphambuke kizo 
2Kings17:23 bekwaba kulokha uSomnini awasusa phambi kwakhe njengombana ayelelisa ngazo zoke iinceku zakhe abaphorofidi. Yeke u-Israyeli waya ekudingisweni, wasuka enarheni yekhabo wasiwa e-Asiriya, useselapho nanamhlanje." 
2Kings17:24 Ikosi ye-Asiriya yathatha abantu beBhabheli, beKhutha, be-Ava, beRhamathi nabeSefarivayimu yabahlalisa eSamariya esikhundleni sama-Israyeli. Bathumba idorobho iSamariya bebahlala nakamanye amadorobho wesifunda." 
2Kings17:25 Ekufikeni kwabo endaweni leyo, akhange besabe bebalotjhe uSomnini; yeke uSomnini wabathumela ngeengwenyama zafese zabulala abanye babo." 
2Kings17:26 Kwabikwa ekosini ye-Asiriya kwathiwa: “Izizwe ozithumbe bewazihlalisa emadorobheni weSamariya, aziyazi imiyalo kazimu olotjhwa enarheni le. Yeke uzinikelele ngeengwenyama; qala, ziyaziqeda ngombana aziyazi imiyalo kazimu olotjhwa enarheni le.”" 
2Kings17:27 Nje-ke ikosi ye-Asiriya yakhupha naku umyalo yathi: “Thumelani munye wabaphristi enamthumba enarheni leyo abuyele lapho ukuze afundise abantu imiyalo kazimu olotjhwa enarheni le.” 
2Kings17:28 Yeke omunye wabaphristi ogade alithunjwa leSamariya weza wazokuhlala eBhethe-Eli wabafundisa indlela yokulotjha uSomnini. 
2Kings17:29 Kodwana izizwe ezahlukahlukeneko zaragela phambili ngokuzenzela iinthombe zabozinyana bazo. Zabajamisa emathempedlaneni aseendundumeni egade zakhiwe babantu beSamariya: 
2Kings17:30 Amadoda weBhabheli azenzela isithombe sakaSukothi-Bhenothi, weKhutha enza isithombe sakaNerigali, kwathi weRhamathi wona azenzela saka-Atjhima;" 
2Kings17:31 ama-Ava enza isithombe sakaNibhirhazi noTaritakhi. AmaSefarivayimu wona anikela abantabawo emlilweni njengomhlabelo ku-Adramelekhi naku-Anameleki abozinyana babo. 
2Kings17:32 Godu balotjha uSomnini uZimu, kodwana bazikhethela abantu babo abahlukahlukeneko bona babe baphristi beendundumeni. Abaphristabo benzela abantwabo imihlabelo emathempedlaneni aseendundumeni." 
2Kings17:33 Yeke besaba uSomnini uZimu, kodwana basalotjha nabozinyana babo njengomkhuba wezizwe zalapho bebasuswe khona." 
2Kings17:34 Ama-Israyeli agade asele enarheni aragela phambili nemikhubawo yakade bekube namhlanjesi. Akhange esabe uSomnini uZimu begodu akhange aphethe iimiso, imithetho, isiyeleliso kanye nomyalo uSomnini awunikela iinzukulwana zakaJakopo bewamthiya bona ngu-Israyeli." 
2Kings17:35 USomnini gade enze isivumelwano nama-Israyeli bewawayala wathi: “Ningesabi abozinyana, ningabakhothameli, ningabalotjhi begodu ningabenzeli imihlabelo." 
2Kings17:36 Kodwana uSomnini owawenyula eGibhide ngamandla amakhulu nangesiphanga sakhe, nguye yedwa ekufuze nimesabe: Khothamani kuye begodu nenze imihlabelo kuye." 
2Kings17:37 Tjhejani bona epilweni yenu yoke niphetha iimiso, imithetho, isiyeleliso kanye nomyalo anitlolela wona. “Ningalotjhi abozinyana" 
2Kings17:38 begodu ningakhohlwa isivumelwano engasenza nani. Ningabalotjhi abozinyana," 
2Kings17:39 kodwana yesabani uSomnini uZimenu. Nguye yedwa ozanisindisa esandleni sezitha zenu zoke.” 
2Kings17:40 Nalapho akhange balalele, kodwana bakhunyalala benza imikhubabo yakade." 
2Kings17:41 Izizwe ezalethwa enarhenezo zesaba uSomnini uZimu, kodwana zaragela phambili nokukhothamela iinthombe zazo. Bekube namhlanje iinzukulu neenzukulwana zazo zisaragela phambili nokwenza njengaboyisemkhulu." 
2Kings18:1 Ngomnyaka wesithathu kaHosiya umsa ka-Ela ikosi yakwa-Israyeli, uHezekhiya umsa ka-Arhazi ikosi yakwaJuda wathoma ukubusa." 
2Kings18:2 Gade aneminyaka ematjhumi amabili nahlanu lokha nakathoma ukubusa. Wabusa eJerusalema iminyaka ematjhumi amabili nethoba. Ibizo lakanina bekungu-Abi indodakazi kaZakariya. 
2Kings18:3 Wenza okulungileko phambi kwakaSomnini njengoyisemkhulu uDavida. 
2Kings18:4 Yena wabhuruza iindunduma, waphihliza amatje akhethekileko kanye nemifanekiso yabo-Atjhera. Wafahlaza inyoka yekoporo uMosi agade ayenzile yaba ziinquqwana ngombana bekube sikhatheso abantu bakwa-Israyeli gade basayitjhisela itjhwalo. Inyoka leyo beyibizwa bona nguNerhutjhitani." 
2Kings18:5 UHezekhiya wathemba uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli. Gade kungekho onjengaye phakathi kwawo woke amakhosi wakwaJuda, kungaba ngaphambili namkha ngemuva kwakhe." 
2Kings18:6 Wabambelela kuSomnini, akhange aphele amandla ekumlandeleni; walonda imiyalo uSomnini ayinikela uMosi." 
2Kings18:7 USomnini gade anaye, aphumelela kikho koke akwenzako. Wahlubuka ikosi ye-Asiriya, akhange avume ukuyilotjha." 
2Kings18:8 Kusukela esithaleni sabalindi ukuya edorobheni elinemithangala wahlula amaFilista bekwaba seGaza nemikhawulweni yalo. 
2Kings18:9 Ngomnyaka wesine wekosi uHezekhiya, okwakumnyaka wekhomba kaHosiya umsa ka-Ela ikosi yakwa-Israyeli, uTjhalimaneseri ikosi ye-Asiriya wasahlela iSamariya wayivimbezela." 
2Kings18:10 Ekupheleni kweminyaka emithathu wayithumba. Njalo-ke iSamariya yathunjwa ngomnyaka wesithandathu wekosi uHezekhiya, okwakumnyaka wethoba kaHosiya ikosi yakwa-Israyeli." 
2Kings18:11 Ikosi ye-Asiriya yathumba ama-Israyeli yawathumela ekudingisweni e-Asiriya, yawahlalisa eRhalarhi, neGozani magegana nomlambo iRhabhori nemizini yamaMede." 
2Kings18:12 Lokhu kwenzeka ngombana akhange balalele ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimabo. Kodwana beqa isivumelwano sakhe, lokhu kutjho koke uMosi inceku kaSomnini eyabayala ngakho. Akhange balalele imiyalo namkha bayenze." 
2Kings18:13 Ngomnyaka wetjhumi nane wokubusa kwekosi uHezekhiya, uSanirheribu ikosi ye-Asiriya wasahlela amadorobho anemithangala wakwaJuda bewawathumba." 
2Kings18:14 Nje-ke uHezekhiya ikosi yakwaJuda, wathumela umlayezo ekosini ye-Asiriya eLakitjhi wathi: “Ngonile. Yewungilise, ngizakukhokhela nanyana yini oyifuna kimi.” Ikosi ye-Asiriya yafuna kuHezekhiya ikosi yakwaJuda amakhilogremu wesiliva aziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nekulungwana yamakhilogremu wegolide." 
2Kings18:15 Yeke uHezekhiya wayinikela loke isiliva egade lingethempelini lakaSomnini neligade lingendlini yamagugu wesigodlo. 
2Kings18:16 Ngesikhatheso uHezekhiya ikosi yakwaJuda wanamathulula igolide egade linamekwe eminyango neengosenini zethempeli lakaSomnini, walinikela ikosi ye-Asiriya." 
2Kings18:17 Khonapho ikosi ye-Asiriya yathumela indunayo yebutho, induna ekulu kanye nomkhulumelayo. Iindunezi zasuka eLakitjhi zaya kuHezekhiya eJerusalema nebutho elikhulu lepi. Ibuthwelo lafika eJerusalema lafese lajama emseleni ovela esizibeni esingehla, endleleni eya endaweni lapha kuhlanzwa khona iimpahla." 
2Kings18:18 Lokha iindunezi nazibiza ikosi, u-Eliyakhimu umsa kaRhilikhiya umphathi wesigodlo, noTjhebina ongumabhalana kanye noJowarhi ongusosiba baphuma bazihlangabeza." 
2Kings18:19 Umkhulumeli wekosi ye-Asiriya wabatjela bona batjele uHezekhiya bathi: “Nakhu ekutjhoko ikosi ekulu, ingwenyama ye-Asiriya ithi, ‘Ulibeke kuphi ithemba lakho?" 
2Kings18:20 Ucabanga bona amagamakho amumoya lawo angajamelana namaqhinga webutho kanye namandla na? Uzakuthi uthembele kubani nawuhlubuka mina nje? 
2Kings18:21 Kuyabonakala bonyana uthembe iGibhide efana nomhlanga ophukileko ohlaba ulimaze isandla somuntu odzimelela kiwo! Kuba njalo-ke nakiloyo oziseka ngoFaro, ikosi yeGibhide." 
2Kings18:22 Nanyana ufuna ukungitjela bona uthembele kuSomnini uZimenu? Kanti akusuye uzinyana loyo uHezekhiya abhuruze iindunduma nama-aldarakhe lokha natjela abantu bakwaJuda nebeJerusalema bonyana balotjhe e-aldarini eJerusalema kwaphela?’ 
2Kings18:23 “Ngikubhejela ngekosami ye-Asiriya: Nanyana ngingakunikela iinkulungwana ezimbili zeenjomani, angeze bewaba nabantu abangazikhwela." 
2Kings18:24 Alo-ke, ungajamelana njani namunye wabaphathi abancani beensebenzi zekosami nakusahlelako? Nanyana uthembe iGibhide bona izakulethela iinkarana nabakhweli bazo na?”" 
2Kings18:25 Umkhulumeli wamtshima godu wathi: “Ngaphezu kwalokho, ucabanga bona ikosami ize lapha ukuzokubhubhisa indawo le ngaphandle kwelizwi lakaSomnini uZimenu? NguZimenu loyo oyithumele lapha bona ibhubhise inarha le.”" 
2Kings18:26 Nje-ke u-Eliyakhimu umsa kaRhilikhiya, uTjhebina noJowarhi bathi kumkhulumeli: “Sibawa bona ukhulume neenceku zakho ngesi-Aramu ngombana sona siyasizwa. Sibawa ungakhulumi nathi ngesiJuda phambi kwabantu abaphezu komthangala wedorobho.”" 
2Kings18:27 Kodwana umkhulumeli waphendula wathi: “Kanti nidlumbana bona ngithunywe bonyana ngikhulume izintwezi ekosinenu nakini kwaphela, kungabi nebantwini abahlezi phezu komthangalaba? Nabo njengani kuzakufanela bona badle uthuvi babo bebasele nomhlambulukwabo!”" 
2Kings18:28 Yeke umkhulumeli wasikima, warhuwelela ngesiJuda wathi: “Lalelani ilizwi lekosi ekulu, ingwenyama ye-Asiriya!" 
2Kings18:29 Nakhu ekutjhoko ithi, ‘Ningavumeli uHezekhiya anikhohlise ngombana angekhe anisindise esandleni sami." 
2Kings18:30 Ningamvumeli bona aniyenge nithembele kuSomnini uZimu ngokuthi athi kini: “ ‘USomnini uzasisindisa nedorobheli angekhe lanikelwa esandleni sekosi ye-Asiriya.’ 
2Kings18:31 “Ningamlaleli uHezekhiya ngombana nakhu ekutjhoko ikosi ye-Asiriya ithi, ‘Zinikeleni! Niphume edorobheni nize kimi! Omunye nomunye kini uzazidlela esidiribeni sakhe nemakhiwaninakhe bese uziselela amanzi womthombo azenzele wona." 
2Kings18:32 Nje-ke ningenza lokho bengifike nginithathe nginise enarheni efanele nina, okuyinarha yekoroyi neyewayini elitjha, inarha yamabele nesidiribe, okuyinarha yemithi ye-oliva neliju. Nizakuphila ningafi! Yeke ningamlaleli uHezekhiya ngombana uyanihlohlozela kwaphela lokha nakanitjela bona uSomnini uZimenu uzanisindisa." 
2Kings18:33 Kukhona uzinyana wananyana ngisiphi isizwe owakhe wasindisa inarhakhe esandleni sekosi ye-Asiriya na? 
2Kings18:34 Baphi abozinyana beRhamathi ne-Ariphadi? Baphi abozinyana beSefarivayimu, beHena ne-Ava? Bayisindisa iSamariya esandleni sami na?" 
2Kings18:35 Ngiwuphi kibo boke abozinyana bamazwe la owakghona ukusindisa inarhakhe esandleni sami? Alo, uZimenu loyo yena angayisindisa njani iJerusalema esandleni samesi?’ ”" 
2Kings18:36 Kodwana abantu bazithulela bathi du, akhange batjho litho ngombana ikosi uHezekhiya gade ibayalile yathi: “Ningathomi nimphendule.”" 
2Kings18:37 Nje-ke u-Eliyakhimu umsa kaRhilikhiya umphathi wesigodlo, uTjhebina umabhalana kanye noJowarhi usosiba omsa ka-Asafa, baya kuHezekhiya izambatho zabo zitlebhukile, bafese bamtjela koke umkhulumeli akutjhwileko." 
2Kings19:1 Kuthe lokha ikosi uHezekhiya nayizwa lokhu, yatlebhula izambatho zayo yembatha iinzilo yangena ngethempelini lakaSomnini." 
2Kings19:2 Yathumela u-Eliyakhimu umphathi wesigodlo, noTjhebina umabhalana kanye nabaphathi babaphristi ku-Isaya umphorofidi, omsa ka-Amosi. Boke bebembethe iinzilo." 
2Kings19:2 Yathumela u-Eliyakhimu umphathi wesigodlo, noTjhebina umabhalana kanye nabaphathi babaphristi ku-Isaya umphorofidi, omsa ka-Amosi. Boke bebembethe iinzilo." 
2Kings19:3 Bafese bathi kuye: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguHezekhiya, ‘Ilanga lanamhlanje lilanga elidanisako lokuhlunguphazwa nokurhubutjhwa. Linjengalokha nakufanele kubelethwe abantwana bese kutlhogeka amandla wokubabeletha." 
2Kings19:4 Mhlamunye uSomnini uZimakho uwezwile woke amezwi akhulunywe mkhulumeli ogade athunywe mphathakhe ikosi ye-Asiriya bonyana azokuphoqa uZimu ophilako. Kungenzeka bona uSomnini uZimakho uzibuyiselele ngamezwi awezwileko lawo. Yeke wena thandazela abantu abaseleko.’ ” 
2Kings19:5 Kuthe lokha iinkhulu zakaHezekhiya nazifika ku-Isaya nomlayezo lo," 
2Kings19:6 u-Isaya wathi kizo: “Tjelani ikosenu bona nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu, ‘Ungethukwa ngalokho okuzwileko, okumamezwi iinkhulu zekosi ye-Asiriya ezingithuke ngawo." 
2Kings19:7 Qala-ke! Ngizokudlharumisa ikosi ye-Asiriya, izwe amahemuhemu bese ibuyela enarhenayo, ibulawe ngesabula khonapho.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Kuthe lokha umkhulumeli nakezwa bona ikosi ye-Asiriya isukile eLakitjhi, naye wajika wafunyana ikosakhe isilwa neLibhina." 
2Kings19:9 USanirheribu wezwa bonyana uTirihakha ikosi yeKutjhe uyeza ukuzomsahlela. Nje-ke wabuye wathumela godu iinthunywa kuHezekhiya wathi: 
2Kings19:10 “Tjelani uHezekhiya ikosi yakwaJuda bona angavumeli ukukhohliswa nguzinyanakhe athembele kuye ngokuthi athi, ‘IJerusalema angeze yanikelwa esandleni sekosi ye-Asiriya.’" 
2Kings19:11 Nginesiqiniseko sokobana uzizwele ngokwakho bona enzeni amakhosi we-Asiriya ngeenarha ezinye lokha nazirhayilako. Alo, wena uzakusinda na?" 
2Kings19:12 Abozinyana bezizwe ezabhujiswa bobamkhulu bakhe bazisindisa na? Ngitjho izizwe zeGozani, zeRharani, zeRetsefu nabantu be-Edeni abagade baseTelasari." 
2Kings19:13 Iphi ikosi yeRhamathi, ye-Ariphadi neyedorobho leSefarivayimu namkha yeHena nanyana ye-Ava?”" 
2Kings19:14 UHezekhiya wamukela incwadi eenthunyweni wayifunda. Yeke waya ethempelini lakaSomnini wafese wayendlala phambi kwakaSomnini. 
2Kings19:15 Wathandaza kuSomnini wathi: “Awu, wena Somnini Zimu wakwa-Israyeli ohlala phezu kwamakerubhi, wena wedwa onguZimu ngaphezu kwemibuso yoke yephasi. Wena wenze izulu nephasi." 
2Kings19:16 Awu Somnini, akhese ubeke indlebe ulalele, uvule namehlwakho Somnini, bese uyabona. “Akhese uthi ulalela amezwi uSanirheribu awathumele bona aphoqe uZimu ophilako." 
2Kings19:17 Iye, kuliqiniso Somnini, amakhosi we-Asiriya, azirhayilile izizwe kanye neenarha zazo." 
2Kings19:18 Aphosela abozinyana bazo emlilweni ababhubhisa ngombana bebanganabujamo bakaZimu kodwana bebaziingodo namatje, izinto ezibunjwe ngezandla." 
2Kings19:19 Nje-ke Somnini Zimethu, sisindisa esandleni sekosi ye-Asiriya ukuze yoke imibuso yephasi yazi bona wena Somnini, nguwe wedwa uZimu.”" 
2Kings19:20 Yeke u-Isaya umsa ka-Amosi wathumela umlayezo kuHezekhiya wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ‘Iye, ngiwuzwile umthandazwakho mayelana noSanirheribu ikosi ye-Asiriya.’" 
2Kings19:20 Yeke u-Isaya umsa ka-Amosi wathumela umlayezo kuHezekhiya wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ‘Iye, ngiwuzwile umthandazwakho mayelana noSanirheribu ikosi ye-Asiriya.’" 
2Kings19:21 “Nanti ilizwi uSomnini alikhulume ngaye wathi, “Itlawana eliyindodakazi yeZiyoni liyakunyaza beliyakukhwinyisela wena Sanirheribu. Indodakazi yeJerusalema ikuthintithela ihloko nawufulatheleko." 
2Kings19:22 Ngubani omphoqileko bewamthuka na? Bewurhuwelela bani bewumphakamisele iinhlonze? Uziphakamise ngoCwengileko wakwa-Israyeli! 
2Kings19:23 Ngeenthunywa zakho uphoqe uSomandla! Uzitjele wathi, ‘Ngeenkarana zami ezinengi sengiphakamele eenqongweni zeentaba, eendaweni ezingangenekiko zeLibhanoni. Ngiqunte imisedari emide nemithi ekhethekileko yomsayipurusi; ngangena erharheni layo nesiminyaminyeni samahlathayo." 
2Kings19:24 Ngimi owembe imithombo bengasela namanzi avinyilikileko. Ngomise yoke imilambo yeGibhide ngebhadulo lami.’ 
2Kings19:25 Awukezwa na? Ngakuhlela kade lokho. Ngakujamisa emihleni yekadeni, nje-ke ngikuphumelelisile, kobana amadorobho anemithangala, uwenze aba liqubi lewiliwili, iye, iinqorho zenyakanyaka." 
2Kings19:26 Abantu bawo baphelelwe mamandla begodu bakhenile ngokurhubutjhwa. Babe njengeentjalo zommango nanjengamahlumela asathambileko. Babe njengotjani etatawini obubuniswa lilanga busahluma. 
2Kings19:27 Kodwana ngazi ukusuka nokuhlala kwakho nokuthi ungibhevumulela kangangani. 
2Kings19:28 Njengombana ungibhevumulela nje nokuzikhakhazisa kwakho ngikulemukile, ngizokufaka isikghopholo sami epumulwenakho netomu lami ngemlonyenakho. Ngizokwenza ubuyele emuva ngendlela oze ngayo." 
2Kings19:29 “Nakhu okuzakuba litshwayo kuwe, Hezekhiya: “Nonyaka uzazidlela amakhakhazela, ngomnyaka wesibili udle okuzimilelako. Kodwana ngomnyaka wesithathu uzakutjala uvune, uzakuhloma iindiribe bewudle iinthelo zazo." 
2Kings19:30 Abasindileko nabaseleko endlini kaJuda bazokuba nemirabhu bese bahloma iinthelo. 
2Kings19:31 Ngambala abaseleko eJerusalema bazakusabalala nabasinde entabeni yeZiyoni banabe. Ukutjhisakalela kwakaSomnini uMninimandlawoke kuzakuphelelisa lokhu. 
2Kings19:32 “Yeke nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini mayelana nekosi ye-Asiriya: “Angekhe yangena edorobheneli namkha idumuze umsubela la. Asoze yalisahlela ngokuzivikela ngesihlangu namkha ilakhele isiqabo esiqhube magegana nomthangala. 
2Kings19:33 Izakubuyela emuva ngendlela eze ngayo. Asoze yangena kilelidorobho. 
2Kings19:34 Ngizolivikela idorobheli bengilisindise ngenca yami nangenca kaDavida incekwami.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
2Kings19:35 Ngobusukobo ingilozi kaSomnini yasahlela ekampeni yama-Asiriya yabulala abantu abalikhulu namatjhumi abunane nahlanu weenkulungwana. Kwathi abantu nabavuka ekuseni ngakusasa, iindumbu bezilele ubujadajada!" 
2Kings19:36 Nje-ke uSanirheribu ikosi ye-Asiriya wadiliza ikampa wabuyela eNiniva wayokuhlala khona. 
2Kings19:37 Kwathi ngelinye ilanga asalotjha ethempelini lakazinyanakhe uNisiroki, amadodanakhe u-Adrameleki noSaretseri bambulala ngesabula bebabalekela enarheni ye-Ararathi. U-Esarirhadoni indodanakhe waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings20:1 Emihleni leyo uHezekhiya wagula wabangwa neenzibi. Umphorofidi u-Isaya umsa ka-Amosi waya kuye wafese wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Lungisa iindaba zomzakho ngombana uzokufa, awukazukuphola.’ ”" 
2Kings20:1 Emihleni leyo uHezekhiya wagula wabangwa neenzibi. Umphorofidi u-Isaya umsa ka-Amosi waya kuye wafese wathi: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Lungisa iindaba zomzakho ngombana uzokufa, awukazukuphola.’ ”" 
2Kings20:2 UHezekhiya waphendulela ubuso bakhe ebodeni wathandaza kuSomnini wathi: 
2Kings20:3 “Awu Somnini, ngibawa ukhumbule bona ngakhamba phambi kwakho ngokwethembeka nangehliziyo epheleleko, ngenza okulungileko ebusweni bakho.” UHezekhiya walila kabuhlungu." 
2Kings20:4 Kuthe u-Isaya angakaphumi ngitjho nemabaleni wesigodlo, ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kuye lathi:" 
2Kings20:5 “Buyela emuva ufese utjele uHezekhiya umrholi wabantu bami bonyana uSomnini uZimu kayise uDavida uthi, ‘Ngiwuzwile umthandazwakho ngabona neenyembezi zakho. Nje-ke ngizokupholisa, kuthi ngelanga lesithathu kusukela nje, ukhuphukele ethempelini lakaSomnini." 
2Kings20:6 Ngizokungezelelela iminyaka elitjhumi nahlanu epilwenakho. Begodu wena nedorobheli, ngizonisindisa esandleni sekosi ye-Asiriya. Idorobheli ngizolivikela ngenca yami nangenca kaDavida incekwami.’ ”" 
2Kings20:7 Yeke u-Isaya wathi: “Lethani isitjhuba samakhiwani.” Basiletha bafese basibeka ethumbeni lakaHezekhiya, walulama." 
2Kings20:8 UHezekhiya wabuza u-Isaya wathi: “Siyini isiboniso sokobana uSomnini uzongiphilisa nokobana ngizokhuphukela ethempelini lakaSomnini ngelanga lesithathu na?” 
2Kings20:9 U-Isaya waphendula wathi: “Isiboniso sakaSomnini kuwe sokobana uzokwenza lokho akuthembisileko nasi: Isithunzi sizakululekeleka phambili namkha sibuyele emuva ngamagadango alitjhumi.” 
2Kings20:10 UHezekhiya wathi: “Kulula esithunzini bona siluleke amagadango alitjhumi, ngcono sibuyele emuva amagadango alitjhumi.”" 
2Kings20:11 Nje-ke umphorofidi u-Isaya wathandaza kuSomnini, uSomnini wenza isithunzi bona sibuyele emuva amagadango alitjhumi lapha besele sehle khona phezu kwesitepisi saka-Arhazi." 
2Kings20:12 Ngesikhatheso uBherodaki-Bhaladani umsa kaBhaladani ikosi yeBhabheli gade athumele incwadi nesipho ngombana ezwile ngokugula kwakaHezekhiya. 
2Kings20:13 UHezekhiya wamukela umlayezo weenthunywa bewazitjengisa koke okugade kungendlinakhe yamagugu: isiliva, igolide, iinungo namakha. Wabatjengisa nalokho ekugade kusendlini yeenkhali nakho koke okwafunyanwa eendlini zakhe zokubeka ipahla. Akukho angakhange abatjengise khona esigodlweni namkha embuswenakhe woke." 
2Kings20:14 Nje-ke u-Isaya umphorofidi waya ekosini uHezekhiya wabuza wathi: “Abantwaba bafunani kuwapha? Njekhona, babuyaphi?” UHezekhiya waphendula wathi: “Bavela khatjhana, eBhabheli.”" 
2Kings20:15 Umphorofidi wabuza wathi: “Alo, ubatjengiseni ngesigodlweni sakho?” UHezekhiya wathi: “Akukho into engingakhange ngibatjengise yona eendlini zami zokubeka ipahla.”" 
2Kings20:16 Yeke u-Isaya wathi kuHezekhiya: “Lalela-ke bona ilizwi lakaSomnini lithini," 
2Kings20:17 ‘Kwamambala isikhathi siyeza lapha koke okusesigodlweni sakho, nakho koke aboyihlo abakhe bakubulunga bekube namhlanje, kuzakuthathwa khona kusiwe eBhabheli. Akukho okuzakutjhiywa.’ “Godu uSomnini uthe:" 
2Kings20:18 ‘Abanye bamadodanakho, abaziingazi nenyamakho, obabelethileko, bazakuba bathunjwa bebalotjhe esigodlweni sekosi yeBhabheli babaphakulwa.’ ”" 
2Kings20:19 UHezekhiya wathi ku-Isaya: “Liyazwakala ilizwi lakaSomnini alikhulumileko.” Gade azibuza athi: “Lokhu kutjho bona kuzakuba nokuthula nokuvikeleka kiso soke isikhathi sepilwami.” 
2Kings20:20 Zoke izehlakalo zokubusa kwakaHezekhiya, koke ukuhlula kwakhe kanye nendlela enza ngayo isiziba nomsele wokuletha amanzi ngaphakathi kweJerusalema, kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwaJuda." 
2Kings20:21 UHezekhiya wahlongakala. UManase indodanakhe waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe. 
2Kings21:1 UManase gade aneminyaka elitjhumi nambili lokha nakabekwa bona abe yikosi. Wabusa eJerusalema iminyaka ematjhumi amahlanu nahlanu. Ibizo lakanina bekunguRhefitsiba. 
2Kings21:2 Wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini njengeenkghabhudlho ezenziwa zizizwe uSomnini aziqotjha phambi kwama-Israyeli. 
2Kings21:3 Wabuye wakha iindunduma uyise uHezekhiya agade azibhuruzile; wakhela uBhali ama-aldari, wenza nomfanekiso waka-Atjhera njengombana u-Arhabi ikosi yakwa-Israyeli gade enzile. Wakhothamela zoke iinkwekwezi zomkayi, wazilotjha." 
2Kings21:4 Wakha ama-aldari ethempelini lakaSomnini, lapha uSomnini gade athe khona: “Ibizo lami ngizalibeka eJerusalema.”" 
2Kings21:5 Iye, wakha ama-aldari wokulotjha iinkwekwezi zomkayi eenrhodlweni zombili zethempeli lakaSomnini." 
2Kings21:6 Wanikela indodanakhe bona ibe mhlabelo. Waba ngophengulako nofuniselako, wabeka izangoma neenyanga. Wenza ubumbi obunengi phambi kwakaSomnini, wamthukuthelisa." 
2Kings21:7 Wathatha umfanekiso waka-Atjhera agade awenzile wawubeka ngethempelini uSomnini akhuluma ngalo kuDavida nakuSolomoni indodanakhe wathi: “Kilelithempeli neJerusalema engilikhethileko kizo zoke iinkoro zakwa-Israyeli, ibizo lami ngizalibeka khona isiphelani." 
2Kings21:8 Angisoze ngenze bona iinyawo zabakwa-Israyeli zizule enarheni engayinikela aboyisemkhulu, nakube kwaphela bazakutjhejisisa benze koke engabayala ngakho, nokobana bazakugcina woke umthetho incekwami uMosi eyabayala ngawo.”" 
2Kings21:9 Kodwana abantu akhange balalele: UManase naye wabaphambukisa, baze benza okumbi ukudlula izizwe uSomnini azibhubhisa phambi kwama-Israyeli." 
2Kings21:10 USomnini bekakhulumile ngeenceku zakhe abaphorofidi. Abaphorofidaba bathi: 
2Kings21:11 “Ngombana uManase ikosi yakwaJuda enze iinkghabhudlhwezi, iye, wenze okumbi khulu ukudlula ama-Amori agade akhona ngaphambi kwakhe begodu uwisele noJuda ezonweni ngamanyala wabosingazimu bakhe," 
2Kings21:12 yeke nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ‘Yelelani, ngizokwehlisela ihlekelele phezu kweJerusalema noJuda kangangobana kuzakuthi lokha abantu nabezwa ngayo bahlahlathelwe mzimba." 
2Kings21:13 Ngilinganisile iJerusalema ngalihlola. Yeke isibetho salo sizakuba njengeSamariya nanjengesibetho engabetha ngaso indlu ka-Arhabi. Isitja esisilapheleko siyasulwa sigutjuzwe. Ngizokwenza okufanako ngeJerusalema: Ngizoyithanyela ngiyiphendukezele! 
2Kings21:14 Abaseleko abalilifa lami ngizobafulathela bengibanikele ezandleni zezitha zabo. Bazokuthunjwa bebaphangwe zizitha zabo 
2Kings21:15 ngombana benze okumbi khulu emehlwenami begodu bangithukuthelisile kusukela mhlana aboyisemkhulu baphuma eGibhide bekube namhlanje.’ ” 
2Kings21:16 Ngaphezu kwalokho, uManase wathulula iingazi ezinengi khulu zabantu abanganamlandu. Wagcwalisa yoke iJerusalema ngeengazi. Lokhu bekungaphandle kwezono zakhe abangela ngazo bonyana uJuda one. Nguye owabangela uJuda enze ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini." 
2Kings21:17 Zoke izehlakalo zokubusa kwakaManase, koke akwenzileko ngitjho nezono azenzako, kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwaJuda." 
2Kings21:18 UManase wahlongakala wabekwa esivandeni sesigodlo sakhe, isivande saka-Uza. U-Amoni indodanakhe waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings21:19 U-Amoni gade aneminyaka ematjhumi amabili nambili lokha nakathoma ukubusa. Wabusa eJerusalema iminyaka emibili. Ibizo lakanina bekunguMetjhulemethi indodakazi kaRharutsi weJothiba. 
2Kings21:20 Wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini njengoManase uyise. 
2Kings21:21 Wakhamba kizo zoke iindlela ezakhanjwa nguyise: Walotjha bewakhothamela amanyala wabosingazimu uyise agade awalotjha. 
2Kings21:22 Wahlubuka uSomnini uZimu waboyisemkhulu, akhange akhambe eendleleni zakaSomnini." 
2Kings21:23 Iinduna zaka-Amoni zamakhela ubukhwebetjhana zambulalela esigodlweni sakhe. 
2Kings21:24 Kodwana abantu bendawo babulala boke abagade benze ubukhwebetjhana ngekosi u-Amoni. Babeka uJosiya indodanakhe bona abe yikosi esikhundleni sakhe. 
2Kings21:25 Zoke izehlakalo zokubusa kwaka-Amoni nakho koke akwenzileko kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwaJuda. 
2Kings21:26 Wabekwa ethuneni lakhe esivandeni saka-Uza. UJosiya indodanakhe waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe. 
2Kings22:1 UJosiya gade aneminyaka ebunane lokha nakathoma ukubusa. Wabusa eJerusalema iminyaka ematjhumi amathathu nanye. Ibizo lakanina gade kunguJedida indodakazi ka-Adaya weBhotsikhati. 
2Kings22:2 Wenza okulungileko phambi kwakaSomnini, wakhamba endleleni kayisemkhulu uDavida, akhange abe namabatha." 
2Kings22:3 Emnyakeni wetjhumi nabunane wokubusa kwekosi uJosiya, wathumela umabhalana uTjhafani umsa ka-Atsaliya omsa kaMetjhulami ethempelini lakaSomnini, wathi:" 
2Kings22:4 “Yenyukela kuRhilikhiya umphristi omkhulu, umtjele alungise imali eyalethwa ethempelini lakaSomnini, abalindi besango abayibuthelela ngokuyithatha ebantwini." 
2Kings22:5 Akayibeke ezandleni zamadoda aziinsebenzi ezengamele umsebenzi wethempeli lakaSomnini ukuze akhokhele iinsebenzi ezivuselela ithempeli," 
2Kings22:6 okutjho abafuleli, abakhi nababeki bamatje; godu athenge iingodo namatje acoziweko bona kuvuselelwe ithempeli." 
2Kings22:7 Kodwana akhange bebazitshwenye ngokwenza ilandelelo ngemali leyo ngombana benza koke ngokwethembeka.” 
2Kings22:8 URhilikhiya umphristi omkhulu wathi kuTjhafani umabhalana: “Ngifunyene nasi incwadi yomthetho ethempelini lakaSomnini.” Yeke wayinikela uTjhafani bona ayifunde. 
2Kings22:9 UTjhafani umabhalana waya ekosini wafese wabika wathi: “Iinceku zakho ziyikhuphile imali ngekasini egade lingethempelini, zayinikela iinsebenzi nabaphathi ethempelini.”" 
2Kings22:10 Godu wabikela ikosi wathi: “URhilikhiya umphristi unginikele incwadi.” Nje-ke wafunda incwadi leyo phambi kwakaJosiya ikosi. 
2Kings22:11 Kuthe lokha ikosi nayizwa amezwi wencwadi yomthetho, yatlebhula izambatho zayo." 
2Kings22:12 Yayala uRhilikhiya umphristi, u-Arhikhamu umsa kaTjhafani, u-Akibori umsa kaMikaya, uTjhafani umabhalana kanye no-Asaya isandla sekosi yathi:" 
2Kings22:13 “Khambani niyongibuzela kuSomnini, nibuzele abantu kanye noJuda woke ngalokho okutlolwe encwadini efunyenweko le. Ubukhali bakaZimu buyavutha phezu kwethu ngenca yabobaba abangakhange balalele amezwi wencwadi le. Akhange benze njengombana kutlolwe lapho bona sikwenze.”" 
2Kings22:14 URhilikhiya umphristi kanye no-Arhikhamu, u-Akibori, uTjhafani kanye no-Asaya baya bayokukhuluma nomphorofidikazi uRhulda ogade amfazi kaTjhalumu umphathi wompherho. (UTjhalumu gade amsa kaTikhiva omsa kaRharirhasi.) URhulda gade ahlala engcenyeni etja yeJerusalema. Kuthe sele bamtjele koke," 
2Kings22:15 wabathumela emuva kobathumileko nomlayezo naku obuya kuSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli wathi: 
2Kings22:16 “Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu, ‘Ngizokwehlisela ihlekelele phezu kwendawo le naphezu kwabantu bayo, ukuya ngakho koke okutlolwe encwadini ikosi yakwaJuda eyifundileko." 
2Kings22:17 Ngizokwenza lokhu ngombana bangihlubukile bebatjhisela abosingazimu itjhwalo ukuze bangithukuthelise ngazo zoke iinthombe abazenze ngezandla zabo. Yeke ubukhali bami ngendawo le buyavutha begodu abusoze bacinywa mumuntu.’ 
2Kings22:18 “Ikosi yakwaJuda enithumileko leyo bona nizoyibuzela kuSomnini uZimu, itjeleni naku umlayezwayo: Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ‘Uwalalele kuhle amezwi wencwadi le." 
2Kings22:19 Ihliziywakho ithintekile bewazithoba phambi kwami, mina Somnini, lokha nawuzwa lokho engikutjhwileko ngendawo le nangabantu bayo, okutjho bona kuzokuba yindawo eligagadu ngendlela abantu abayihlolozela ngayo. Iye, utlebhulile izambatho zakho bewalila phambi kwami. Njengombana wenze lokhu, ngehlangothini lami, umthandazwakho uzwakele.’ La mamezwi kaSomnini." 
2Kings22:20 “Begodu uSomnini wathi, ‘Lokha nangizokubuthelela naboyihlomkhulu, ngiqinisile bona uzokubulungwa ngokuthula. Amehlwakho akasoze abona yoke ihlekelele engizoyehlisela phezu kwendawo le.’ ” Nje-ke bathatha umlayezo womphorofidikazi loyo babuyela nawo ekosini." 
2Kings23:1 Ikosi uJosiya wabiza boke abaphathi bakwaJuda neJerusalema. 
2Kings23:2 Wakhuphukela ethempelini lakaSomnini nabantu boke bakwaJuda nezakhamuzi zoke zeJerusalema; bekubaphristi nabaphorofidi kanye nabo boke abantu kusukela kwabakhulu ukuya kwabancani. Wabafundela bona bezwe woke amezwi wencwadi yesivumelwano eyayigade ifunyenwe ethempelini lakaSomnini. 
2Kings23:3 Ikosi yajama hlanu kwesika yenza isivumelwano phambi kwakaSomnini uZimu bona izakulandela uZimu nokobana izakulonda imiyalwakhe, iimfuno neemiso zakhe ngehliziywayo nangomphefumulwayo woke. Ngalokho beyiqinisa bona izakukhamba ngokwamezwi wesivumelwano agade atlolwe encwadini leyo. Nje-ke boke abantu bazibandakanya nesivumelwaneso." 
2Kings23:4 Ikosi yatjela uRhilikhiya umphristi omkhulu, abaphristi abangaphasi kwakhe nabalindi besango bona basuse ethempelini lakaSomnini zoke izintwana ezenzelwe uBhali no-Atjhera kanye nazo zoke iinkwekwezi zomkayi. Yazitjhisela ngaphandle kweJerusalema emathaleni womrhoba iKidroni, yathatha umlothazo yawusa eBhethe-Eli." 
2Kings23:5 Yaqotjha boke abaphristi babosingazimu ebegade bajanyiswe yikosi yakwaJuda bona batjhise itjhwalo eendundumeni zemizi yakwaJuda nakileyo ebhode iJerusalema. Yasusa nalabo ebegade batjhisa itjhwalo kuBhali, ilanga, inyanga, imithala yeenkwekwezi, iye neenkwekwezi zoke." 
2Kings23:6 Yasusa umfanekiso waka-Atjhera ethempelini lakaSomnini. Yawusa esikhisini iKhidroni ongaphandle kweJerusalema yawutjhisela lapho. Yawusila waba yipuphu, yawurhatjha phezu kwamathuna wabantu nje." 
2Kings23:7 Yabhuruza amalawana weentjhatjha zethempeli ezimadoda asethempelini lakaSomnini, lapha abafazi gade balukela khona imimada ka-Atjhera." 
2Kings23:8 Ikosi uJosiya yaletha boke abaphristi abasemizini yakwaJuda, beyarhubutjha neendunduma ukusukela eGeba ngetlhagwini ukuya eBheritjheba ngesewula, lapha abaphristi gade batjhisa khona itjhwalo. Yephula iindawo zemihlabelo egade zingekungeneni ngesinceleni sesango lakaJotjhuwa umbusi weJerusalema." 
2Kings23:9 Abaphristi beendunduma bebangakavunyelwa ukuza e-aldarini lakaSomnini eJerusalema. Nokho bebavunyelwe ukudla isikwa esinganangumelo kanye nabaphristi ababozakwabo. 
2Kings23:10 Ikosi uJosiya yarhubutjha iTofeti egade ingemrhobeni wamadodana kaHinomi, ukuze kungasaba noyedwa onikela emlilweni indodana namkha indodakazakhe bona ibe mhlabelo kuMoleki." 
2Kings23:11 Yasusa iinthombe zeenjomani neenkarana amakhosi wakwaJuda agade azihlukanisele ilanga. Iinthombezi gade zibekwe ukusukela ekungeneni kwethempeli ngepumalanga ukuya ngelawini lakaNathani-Meleki induna ekulu. Ilaweli gade lakhiwe ngemathurini ahlonywe ethempelini nca ngetjingalanga. Ikosi uJosiya yazitjhisa iinthombezo. 
2Kings23:12 Yabhuruza ama-aldari amakhosi wakwaJuda agade awakhe ngehla kwephahla lelawu laka-Arhazi elingaphezulu. Yabhuruza nama-aldari uManase agade awakhe ngeenrhodlweni ezimbili zethempeli lakaSomnini. Yasusa lapho masinyana iququ lama-aldari lawo yayolithela ngesikhisini iKidroni. 
2Kings23:13 Godu ikosi yarhubutjha neendunduma egade zingepumalanga yeJerusalema, ngesewula yentaba ye-Oliva. Iindundumezo uSolomoni gade azakhele u-Atjhitarothi usingazinyanakazi onyenyisako wamaTsidoni, uKemotjhi uzinyana onyenyisako wakwaMowabi noMilikomu uzinyana okghabhudlhako wabantu bakwa-Amoni." 
2Kings23:14 UJosiya waphadlha amatje akhethekileko, wagawula nemifanekiso yabo-Atjhera bewazalisa iindawo zabo ngamathambo wabantu." 
2Kings23:15 Ngitjho nendunduma ye-aldari eBhethe-Eli eyayakhiwe nguJerobhowami umsa kaNebathi, enza ngayo bona u-Israyeli one, indawo yomhlabelo leyo wayibhuruza: Wenza umlilo phezu kwayo bewayitlhifirija; watjhisa no-Atjhera." 
2Kings23:16 Kuthe uJosiya asenza lokhu watjhuguluka, amehlwakhe aphoseka phezu kwamaliba agade asemaqadi kwentatjana. Wathumela abantu bona balethe amathambo asemalibeni lawo. Nawo wawatjhisela phezu kwendunduma leyo. Ngendlela le warhubutjha i-aldari. Kwaba njengelizwi lakaSomnini elamenyezelwa phambilini mumuntu kaZimu izintwezi zingakabi ukwenzeka." 
2Kings23:17 Ikosi uJosiya yabuza yathi: “Ilitje leliba engilibonakweli lingelani?” Amadoda womuzi ayiphendula athi: “Lisibekiso sethuna lomuntu kaZimu owavela kwaJuda nowaphorofida nge-aldari leBhethe-Eli mayelana nazo zoke izinto osele uzenze kilo.” 
2Kings23:18 Bona izwe lokho yathi: “Awa, akaziphumulele. Ningaphazamisi amathambakhe.” Nje-ke balisa amathambo womuntu kaZimu kanye nawomphorofidi owavela eSamariya." 
2Kings23:19 UJosiya waragela phambili ngokwenza njengombana gade enze eBhethe-Eli: Wabhuruza amathempedlana aseendundumeni agade akhiwe makhosi wakwa-Israyeli emizini yeSamariya, okwakuzizinto ezathukuthelisa uSomnini uZimu." 
2Kings23:20 UJosiya wahlahlela boke abaphristi beendundumezo phezu kwama-aldari bewatjhisa amathambo wabantu phezu kwawo. Emuva kwalokho wabuyela eJerusalema. 
2Kings23:21 Ikosi uJosiya yakhupha umyalo oya ebantwini boke yathi: “Gidingelani uSomnini uZimenu umnyanya wePhasika njengombana kutlolwe encwadini yesivumelwano le.” 
2Kings23:22 Akhange khekube nePhasika elakhe lagidingwa njengaleli, kusukela ngeenkhathi zabagwebi bakwa-Israyeli nemihleni yoke yamakhosi wakwa-Israyeli newakwaJuda." 
2Kings23:23 IPhasikeli, lagidingelwa uSomnini uZimu eJerusalema ngomnyaka wetjhumi nabunane wokubusa kwakaJosiya." 
2Kings23:24 Ngaphezu kwalokho uJosiya wathanyela izangoma neenyanga, imihlalandlini, amanyala wabosingazimu nakho koke okunyenyisako okwafunyanwa kwaJuda neJerusalema. Lokhu wakwenza ukuze kuqinisekiswe amezwi womthetho agade atlolwe encwadini eyavunjululwa nguRhilikhiya umphristi endlini kaSomnini." 
2Kings23:25 Akhange khekube nekosi eyafana neyenza njengoJosiya ngaphambi kwakhe nangemuva kwakhe, ngokobana iphendukele kuSomnini uZimu ngayo yoke ihliziywayo, umphefumulwayo nangamandlayo ngokulandela woke umthetho kaMosi." 
2Kings23:26 Nanyana kunjalo, uSomnini uZimu akhange atjhuguluke ebukhalini bakhe obukhulu, wavutha ngoJuda ngenca yakho koke uManase akwenza ngokumtlhorha ngelihlweni." 
2Kings23:27 USomnini wathi: “UJuda naye ngizomthanyela phambi kwami njenganyana ngathanyela u-Israyeli. IJerusalema idorobho engalikhethako ngilidelile kanye nethempeli engatjho ngalo ngathi, ‘Ibizo lami lizakuba lapho.’ ”" 
2Kings23:28 Zoke izehlakalo zokubusa kwakaJosiya nakho koke akwenzileko kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwaJuda. 
2Kings23:29 Ngesikhathi uJosiya aseseyikosi, uFaro Nekho ikosi yeGibhide wenyukela emlanjeni iYufrathe bona ayokusiza ikosi ye-Asiriya. Ikosi uJosiya yarhwanta yayomhlangabeza epini, kodwana ekuhlanganeni kwabo uNekho wamsahlela wambulalela eMegido." 
2Kings23:30 Iinceku zakaJosiya zaletha isidumbu sakhe zisithwele ngekarana ukusuka eMegido ukuya eJerusalema, zafese zamfihla ethuneni lakhe. Abantu bendawo bathatha uJehowarhazi umsa kaJosiya bamzesa, bambeka waba yikosi esikhundleni sakayise." 
2Kings23:31 UJehowarhazi gade aneminyaka ematjhumi amabili nantathu lokha nakathoma ukubusa. Wabusa eJerusalema iinyanga ezintathu. Ibizo lakanina bekunguRhamuthali indodakazi kaJoromiya, weLibhina." 
2Kings23:32 UJehowarhazi wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini njengaboyisemkhulu. 
2Kings23:33 UFaro Nekho wamvalela eRibhila okuyinarha yeRhamathi ukuze angabusi eJerusalema. Wahlawulisa nenarha yakwaJuda bona ithele umthelo oziinkulungwana ezintathu namakhulu amane wamakhilogremu wesiliva namakhilogremu wegolide elimatjhumi amathathu nane. 
2Kings23:34 UFaro Nekho wabeka u-Eliyakhimu umsa kaJosiya bona abe yikosi esikhundleni sakayise uJosiya, watjhugulula nebizo laka-Eliyakhimu laba nguJehoyakhimu. Wasusa uJehowarhazi wamusa eGibhide. Wahlongakalela lapho." 
2Kings23:35 UJehoyakhimu wahlawulela uFaro ngesiliva negolide. Kodwana ukuze aphumelele ukukhokha inani lemali uFaro ayifunako, kwakufuze aveze indaba yomthelo. Lokho wakwenza ngokuthelisa abantu bendawo. Nje-ke, omunye nomunye umuntu watheliswa ngokuya ngomnotho anawo." 
2Kings23:36 UJehoyakhimu gade aneminyaka ematjhumi amabili nahlanu lokha nakathoma ukubusa. Wabusa eJerusalema iminyaka elitjhumi nanye. Ibizo lakanina bekunguZebida indodakazi kaPedaya weRuma. 
2Kings23:37 Wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini, kwaba njengakho koke okwenziwa boyisemkhulu." 
2Kings24:1 Ngesikhathi sokubusa kwakaJehoyakhimu, uNebukadinetsari ikosi yeBhabheli wasahlela inarha. UJehoyakhimu waba yikosi ngaphasi kwakhe iminyaka emithathu. Kodwana wajika wavukela uNebukadinetsari." 
2Kings24:2 USomnini uZimu wathumela iinqhema ezimigulukudu zamaKasidi, zama-Aramu, zamaMowabi nama-Amoni bona zijamelane noJehoyakhimu. Wazithumela bona zirhayile uJuda ngokuya ngamezwi awamemezela ngeenceku zakhe abaphorofidi." 
2Kings24:3 Mbala izintwezi zenzeka kuJuda ukuya ngomyalo kaSomnini ukuze abasuse phambi kwakhe ngenca yezono zakaManase nangakho koke akwenzako," 
2Kings24:4 kanye nokuthulula kwakhe iingazi ezinganamlandu. Ngenca yokobana uManase gade azalise iJerusalema ngeengazi ezinganamlandu, uSomnini uZimu bekangakazimiseli bona athethelele." 
2Kings24:5 Zoke izehlakalo zokubusa kwakaJehoyakhimu nakho koke akwenzileko kutlolwe encwadini yemilando yamakhosi wakwaJuda. 
2Kings24:6 UJehoyakhimu wahlongakala. UJehoyakini indodanakhe waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe. 
2Kings24:7 Ikosi yeGibhide akhange isaphumela ngaphandle kwenarhayo godu ngombana ikosi yeBhabheli gade sele ithethe imikhawulwayo kusukela emlanjaneni weGibhide bekwaba semlanjeni iYufrathe. 
2Kings24:8 UJehoyakini gade aneminyaka elitjhumi nabunane lokha nakathoma ukubusa. Wabusa eJerusalema iinyanga ezintathu. Ibizo lakanina bekunguNerhutjhita indodakazi ka-Elinathani weJerusalema. 
2Kings24:9 Wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini, kwaba njengakho koke okwenziwa boyisemkhulu." 
2Kings24:10 Ngesikhatheso, iinduna zakaNebukadinetsari ikosi yeBhabheli zakhuphuka zavimbezela iJerusalema." 
2Kings24:11 Kwathi lokha iinduna zisazombeleze iJeruselema, uNebukadinetsari ngokwakhe wakhuphukela kiyo." 
2Kings24:12 UJehoyakini ikosi yakwaJuda wazinikela ekosini yeBhabheli: yena, unina, iinsebenzi zesigodlo, iinduna zepi kanye neenkhulu zesigodlo. Ikosi yeBhabheli yabopha uJehoyakini lokha nayineminyaka ebunane ibusa." 
2Kings24:13 UNebukadinetsari wasusa woke amagugu ethempelini lakaSomnini nesigodlweni. Wanamathulula nezinto zoke zegolide uSolomoni ikosi yakwa-Israyeli agade azenzele ithempeli lakaSomnini, wakhamba nazo. Kwaba njengombana uSomnini uZimu atjho." 
2Kings24:14 Wathumba loke iJerusalema: zoke iinduna zepi nazo zoke iingorho zokulwa ebeziziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi, abososino kanye nabosodzila boke. Kwatjhiywa kwaphela iinkhwahla zabantu bendawo." 
2Kings24:15 Wadingisela uJehoyakini eBhabheli. Godu wathumba eJerusalema unina lekosi, abomkakhe, iinsebenzi zesigodlo nabosaziwako emphakathini." 
2Kings24:16 Godu wathumba abantu bakwaJuda: Woke amadoda anamandla, aziinkulungwana ezilikhomba, boke abososino nabosodzila, abaziinkulungwana, iye zoke iintsitsirimba ezazingakghona ukulwa zathunjelwa eBhabheli yikosi uNebukadinetsari." 
2Kings24:17 Wabeka uMataniya usonghwanakhe lakaJehoyakini bona abe yikosi esikhundleni sakaJehoyakini, wamtjhugulula nebizo bona abe nguTsedekhiya." 
2Kings24:18 UTsedekhiya gade aneminyaka ematjhumi amabili nanye lokha nakathoma ukubusa. Wabusa eJerusalema iminyaka elitjhumi nanye. Ibizo lakanina bekunguRhamuthali indodakazi kaJoromiya weLibhina. 
2Kings24:19 Wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini njengoJehoyakhimu. 
2Kings24:20 Kwaba ngenca yokusilingeka kwakaSomnini uZimu bona koke lokhu kwenzeke eJerusalema nakwaJuda. Ekugcineni wabathanyela phambi kwakhe. UTsedekhiya wayihlubuka ikosi yeBhabheli. 
2Kings25:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wethoba wokubusa kwakaTsedekhiya, inyanga yetjhumi nayinamalanga alitjhumi, uNebukadinetsari ikosi yeBhabheli nebutho lakhe loke warhwanta asahlela iJerusalema. Waliragelela bewakha iinqabo mazombe nalo." 
2Kings25:2 Idorobheli lavinjezelwa bekwaba mnyaka wetjhumi nanye wokubusa kwekosi uTsedekhiya. 
2Kings25:3 Indlala beyirhagele khulu ngedorobheni kangangobana abantu bendawo gade bangasenalitho elidliwako. Kwathi ngelanga lethoba lenyanga yesine 
2Kings25:4 amaKasidi aphundlukela ngedorobheni ngomthangala. Woke amajoni abaleka afahla ngesango elihlangana nemithangala emibili eya esivandeni sekosi. Nanyana amaBhabheli gade azombeleze idorobho loke, amajoni kanye nekosi abaleka ngendlela yangemrhobeni weJordani." 
2Kings25:5 Kodwana ibutho lamaKasidi layilala nje ikosi uTsedekhiya, belayifunyana emrhobeni weJordani hlanu kweJerikho. Woke amajonayo asuswa kiyo aphadlhalajwa." 
2Kings25:6 Yona yathunjwa yasiwa ekosini yeBhabheli eRibhila, lapha isigwebo sayo sakhutjhwa khona." 
2Kings25:7 Amadodana kaTsedekhiya abulawa phambi kwakhe aqalile. Emva kwalokho bagobhodlha amehlwakhe, bambopha ngamakhamandela wekoporo bamusa eBhabheli." 
2Kings25:8 Ngomnyaka wetjhumi nethoba wokubusa kwakaNebukadinetsari ikosi yeBhabheli, lokha inyanga yesihlanu inamalanga alikhomba, uNebuzaradani umphathi wobuzimba oyinduna yekosi yeBhabheli, weza eJerusalema." 
2Kings25:9 Wafese wathungelela ithempeli lakaSomnini, isigodlo nezindlu zoke zeJerusalema ngomlilo. Waqothula nezakhiwo zoke eziqakathekileko." 
2Kings25:10 Ibutho lamaKasidi elalingaphasi komphathi wobuzimba lephula umthangala ozombeleze iJerusalema. 
2Kings25:11 Labo abazinikela ekosini yeBhabheli ngesikhathi sokuvinjezelwa kweJerusalema, iinhlabani zamadoda egade zisasele ngedorobheni kanye nenengi labantu badingiswa nguNebuzaradani umphathi wobuzimba." 
2Kings25:12 Watjhiya enarheni abanye balabo abakhwahlileko bona babe balimi nabatjheji besidiribe. 
2Kings25:13 AmaKasidi ephula iinsika zekoporo, iinjamiso zezitja zokuhlambela kanye nebhada ekulu yekoporo okwakugade kusethempelini lakaSomnini, athwala ikoporwelo alisa eBhabheli." 
2Kings25:14 Athwala ngitjho neempoto, iintjhefula, iinquntapete, izitjana nakho koke kwekoporo okusetjenziselwa ukulotjha ngethempelini." 
2Kings25:15 Umphathi wobuzimba wathatha izitja zokutjhisela itjhwalo nezitja zokunyenyeza, zoke zazenziwe ngegolide nangesiliva elitsengileko." 
2Kings25:16 Ikoporo yeensika ezimbili, yebhada ekulu neyeenkoloyana uSolomoni azenzela ithempeli lakaSomnini, zazingaphezu kwesilinganiso." 
2Kings25:17 Enye nenye ikoporo beyimamitha alithoba ukuphakama. Phezu kwayo kunepundu yekoporo elimitha nesiquntu ukuphakama, ikghatjiswe yoke mazombe ngemiluko nangamarharinada wekoporo. Isika yesibili nayo gade ifana neyokuthoma ngomluko." 
2Kings25:18 Umphathi wobuzimba wathumba uSeraya umphristi omkhulu, uZefaniya ongaphasi kwakhe ngesikhundla kanye nabalindi besango abathathu njengeembotjhwa." 
2Kings25:19 EJerusalema wathatha isikhulu samajoni nabeluleki abahlanu bekosi ebegade basese ngedorobhenapho, umabhalana womphathibutho ogade abizela abantu bendawo epini kanye namatjhumi asithandathu wabantu bendawo nabo ebegade basese ngedorobheni." 
2Kings25:20 UNebuzaradani umphathi wobuzimba wabathatha boke abantwaba wabaletha ekosini yeBhabheli eRibhila. 
2Kings25:21 Ikosi yeBhabheli yabamadlha beyababulalela khona eRibhila, enarheni yeRhamathi. Nje-ke uJuda wathunjelwa kude nendawo yekhabo." 
2Kings25:22 UNebukadinetsari ikosi yeBhabheli wakhetha uGedaliya umsa ka-Arhikhamu omsa kaTjhafani bona abuse boke abantu ebegade batjhiywe emuva kwaJuda. 
2Kings25:23 Kwathi lokha zoke iinkhulu zebutho namadoda anazo nazizwa bona ikosi yeBhabheli ikhethe uGedaliya bonyana abe mbusi, zeza kuGedaliya eMitsipha. Zona bekungu-Itjhimayeli umsa kaNetaniya, uJorhanani umsa kaKhareyarhi, uSeraya umsa kaTanirhumethi omNethofathi, uJazaniya umsa kaMakathi kanye namadoda akhamba nazo." 
2Kings25:24 UGedaliya wenza isifungo kizo nemadodeni anazo wabaqinisekisa wathi: “Ningesabi iinkhulu zamaKasidi. Nanihlala enarheni, nilotjhe ikosi yeBhabheli, kuzanikhambela kuhle.”" 
2Kings25:25 Kodwana kwathi ngenyanga yekhomba, u-Itjhimayeli umsa kaNathaniya omsa ka-Elitjhama ongoweengazi zebukhosini, weza namadoda alitjhumi wasahlela bewabulala uGedaliya, amadoda wakwaJuda namaKasidi agade anaye eMitsipha." 
2Kings25:26 Ngalokhu, boke abantu kusukela kwabakhulu ukuya kwabancani kanye neenduna zebutho, barhaba babalekela eGibhide ngebanga lokwesaba amaKasidi." 
2Kings25:27 Mhla amalanga amatjhumi amabili nekhomba enyangeni yetjhumi nambili womnyaka wamatjhumi amathathu nekhomba wokudingiswa kwakaJehoyakini ikosi yakwaJuda, u-Evili-Merodaki nakathoma ukubusa eBhabheli, watjhaphulula uJehoyakini esikhungweni." 
2Kings25:28 Wakhuluma kuhle naye bewamnikela isikhundla esihloniphekako esingaphezu kwamanye amakhosi agade anaye eBhabheli," 
2Kings25:29 nje-ke uJehoyakini akhange asembatha izambatho zangesikhungweni. Soke isikhathi sokuphila kwakhe wagoma njalonjalo etafuleni lekosi yeBhabheli. 
2Kings25:30 Ilanga nelanga ikosi yanikela uJehoyakini isibonelelo ipilwakhe yoke. 
1Chronicles1:1 U-Adamu, uTjhethi, u-Enotjhi," 
1Chronicles1:2 uKhenani, uMarhalalela, uJaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 u-Inoko, uMetutjhelarhi, uLameka," 
1Chronicles1:4 uNowarhi, uTjhemu, uRhamu noJafethi." 
1Chronicles1:5 Amadodana kaJafethi bekunguGomeri, uMagogi, uMadayi, uJavana, uTubali, uMetjheki noTirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Amadodana kaGomeri kungu-Atjhikenazi, uDifathi noTogarima." 
1Chronicles1:7 Iinzukulwana zakaJavana bekungu-Elitjha, uTaratjhitjhi, amaKithi namaRodani." 
1Chronicles1:8 Amadodana kaRhamu bekunguKutjhe, uGibhide, uPhuthi noKanana." 
1Chronicles1:9 Amadodana kaKutjhe kunguSeba, uRhavila, uSabita, uRama noSabiteka. Amadodana kaRama kunguTjheba noDedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 UKutjhe wabeletha uNimrodi owaba yindlhondlho yokuthoma ephasini. 
1Chronicles1:11 UGibhide wabeletha amaLudi, ama-Anami, amaLerhabi, amaNafiturhi," 
1Chronicles1:12 amaPatrusi, amaKasilurhi (lapha amaFilista avela khona) namaKafitori." 
1Chronicles1:13 UKanana wabeletha uTsidoni olizibulo lakhe, noRhethi;" 
1Chronicles1:14 godu gade angukhokho wamaJebusi, ama-Amori, amaGirigatjhi," 
1Chronicles1:15 amaRhivi, ama-Arikhi, amaSini," 
1Chronicles1:16 ama-Arivadi, amaTsemari namaRhamathi." 
1Chronicles1:17 Amadodana kaTjhemu bekungu-Elamu, u-Atjhuri, u-Aripakitjhadi, uLudi, u-Aramu, u-Utsi, uRhuli, uGeteri noMetjheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 U-Aripakitjhadi wabeletha uTjhelarhi; uTjhelarhi wabeletha u-Ebhere. 
1Chronicles1:19 U-Ebhere wabeletha amadodana amabili, enye beyibizwa bona nguPelegi ngombana ngeenkhathi zakhe izizwe zephasi bezihlukene. Umnakwabo gade abizwa bona nguJokhithani." 
1Chronicles1:20 UJokithani wabeletha u-Almodadi, uTjhelefi, uRhatsarimavethi, uJerarhi," 
1Chronicles1:21 uHadoramu, u-Uzali, uDikhila," 
1Chronicles1:22 u-Ebhali, u-Abimayeli, uTjheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 u-Ofiri, uRhavila noJobabi. Boke labo bekumadodana kaJokhithani." 
1Chronicles1:23 u-Ofiri, uRhavila noJobabi. Boke labo bekumadodana kaJokhithani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Yeke abokhokho baka-Abramu owabizwa bona ngu-Abrahamu ngilaba: UTjhemu, u-Aripakitjhadi, uTjhelarhi, u-Ebhere, uPelegi, uRewu, uSerugu, uNarhori noTherarhi." 
1Chronicles1:25 Amadodana ka-Abrahamu bekungu-Isaka no-Itjhimayeli. 
1Chronicles1:26 Nanzi iinzukulwana zawo: Izibulo laka-Itjhimayeli bekunguNebayothi bese kuba nguKhedari, u-Adibiyeli, uMibisamu," 
1Chronicles1:27 uMitjhima, uDuma, uMasa, uRhadadi, uTema," 
1Chronicles1:28 uJethuri, uNafitjhi noKhedema. Boke laba bekumadodana ka-Itjhimayeli." 
1Chronicles1:29 Amadodana abelethwa nguKhethura umngena waka-Abrahamu bekunguZimrani, uJokhitjhani, uMedani, uMidiyani, uYitjhibhakhi noTjhuwarhi. Amadodana kaJokhitjhani bekunguTjheba noDedani." 
1Chronicles1:30 Amadodana kaMidiyani bekungu-Efa, u-Eferi, uRhanoki, u-Abida no-Elidaya. Boke laba bekuziinzukulwana zakaKhethura." 
1Chronicles1:31 U-Abrahamu wabeletha u-Isaka. Amadodana ka-Isaka bekungu-Esewu no-Israyeli. 
1Chronicles1:32 Amadodana ka-Esewu kungu-Elifazi, uRewuyeli, uJewutjhi, uJalamu noKhorarhi." 
1Chronicles1:33 Amadodana ka-Elifazi kunguTemani, u-Omari, uTsefi, uGatamu, uKhenazi, uTimna no-Amalekhi." 
1Chronicles1:34 Amadodana kaRewuyeli kunguNarhathi, uZerarhi, uTjhama noMiza." 
1Chronicles1:35 Amadodana kaSeyiri kunguLothani, uTjhobali, uTsibiyoni, u-Ana, uDitjhoni, u-Etseri noDitjhani." 
1Chronicles1:36 Amadodana kaLothani kunguRhori noHomamu. UTimna angudadwabo lakaLothani. 
1Chronicles1:37 Amadodana kaTjhobali kungu-Aliyani, uManarhathi, u-Ebhali, uTjhefi no-Onamu. Amadodana kaTsibiyoni kungu-Aya no-Ana." 
1Chronicles1:38 Indodana ka-Ana kunguDitjhoni. Amadodana kaDitjhoni kunguRhamrani, u-Etjhibhani, uJitirani noKerana." 
1Chronicles1:39 Amadodana ka-Etseri bekunguBhilihani, uZavani noJakhani. Amadodana kaDitjhoni kungu-Utsa no-Arani." 
1Chronicles1:40 Lawa kwaba makhosi abusa kwa-Edomu ngaphambi kokobana ikosi yakwa-Israyeli ibuse naphezu kwama-Edomu: UBhela umsa kaBhewori ovela edorobheni leDinihaba. 
1Chronicles1:41 Lokha uBhela nakahlongakalako, uJobabi umsa kaZerarhi weBhotsira waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:41 Lokha uBhela nakahlongakalako, uJobabi umsa kaZerarhi weBhotsira waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:42 Kwathi nakuhlongakala uJobabi, uRhutjhamu wenarheni yamaTemani waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:42 Kwathi nakuhlongakala uJobabi, uRhutjhamu wenarheni yamaTemani waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:43 Nakuhlongakala uRhutjhamu, uHadadi umsa kaBhedadi owasahlela bakwaMidiyani emmangweni wakwaMowabi, waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe. Idorobho avela kilo bekuyi-Avithi." 
1Chronicles1:44 Lokha uHadadi nakahlongakalako, uSamla weMasirekha waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Kwathi lokha nakuhlongakala uSamla, uSawula weRerhobhothi magegana nomlambo waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:46 Nakuhlongakala uSawula, uBhali-Rhanani umsa ka-Akibhori waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:47 Lokha uBhali-Rhanani nakahlongakalako, uHadadi waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe. Idorobho lakhe labizwa bona yiPayi; ibizo lomkakhe bekunguMehethabheli indodakazi kaMathiredi oyindodakazi kaMezahabu." 
1Chronicles1:48 Lokha uHadadi nakahlongakalako, amakhosana alandelako la, abusa kwa-Edomu: ikosana uTimna, ikosana u-Aliva, ikosana uJetethi," 
1Chronicles1:49 ikosana u-Oholibama, ikosana u-Ela, ikosana uPinoni," 
1Chronicles1:50 ikosana uKhenazi, ikosana uTemani, ikosana uMibitsari," 
1Chronicles1:51 ikosana uMagidiyeli, nekosana u-Iramu. Lawo bekumakhosana wakwa-Edomu." 
1Chronicles2:1 Naka amadodana ka-Israyeli: nguRubeni, uSimiyoni, uLevi, uJuda, u-Isakari, uZebuloni," 
1Chronicles2:2 uDani, uJosefa, uBhenjamini, uNafitali, uGadi no-Atjheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Amadodana kaJuda bekungu-Eri, u-Onani noTjhela. Amadodana amathathu wawabelethelwa nguBhathi-Tjhuwa umKanana. U-Eri izibulo lakaJuda bekanobukhohlakali phambi kwakaSomnini, yeke uSomnini wamnikelela ekufeni." 
1Chronicles2:4 UTamari umalukazana kaJuda, wambelethela uPeretsi noZerarhi. Amadodana kaJuda gade amahlanu nasele awoke." 
1Chronicles2:5 Amadodana kaPeretsi bekunguRhetsironi noRhamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Amadodana kaZerarhi bekunguZimri, u-Etani, uHemani, uKalikoli noDara; sele awoke bekamahlanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 Umsa kaKarimi bekungu-Akari, owabangela bona ama-Israyeli ehlelwe yihlekelele ngokuthatha lokho ebegade kuzilwa bona kuthintwe." 
1Chronicles2:8 Umsa ka-Ethani bekungu-Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Amadodana abelethelwa uRhetsironi bekunguJerarhimiyeli, uRamu noKalebi." 
1Chronicles2:10 URamu wabeletha u-Aminadabi, u-Aminadabi wabeletha uNarhitjhoni umrholi wabantu bakwaJuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 UNarhitjhoni wabeletha uSalima, uSalima wabeletha uBhowazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 uBhowazi wabeletha u-Obede, u-Obede wabeletha uJese." 
1Chronicles2:13 UJese wabeletha u-Eliyabu olizibulo lakhe; wesibili kungu-Abinadabi, wesithathu kunguTjhimeya," 
1Chronicles2:14 wesine kunguNathaneli, wesihlanu kunguRadayi," 
1Chronicles2:15 wesithandathu kungu-Otsemu bese kuba nguDavida wekhomba. 
1Chronicles2:16 Abodadwabo bekunguTseruya no-Abigeyili. U-Abitjhayi noJowabi kanye no-Asayeli bekumadodana amathathu kaTseruya. 
1Chronicles2:17 U-Abigeyili wabeletha u-Amasa. Uyise ka-Amasa kunguJeteri umItjhimayeli. 
1Chronicles2:18 UKalebi umsa kaRhetsironi wabeletha abantwana no-Azuba umkakhe. Godu wabeletha abantwana noJeriyothi. Naka-ke amadodana ka-Azuba: nguJetjheri, uTjhobabi no-Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Ekuhlongakaleni kwaka-Azuba, uKalebi wathatha u-Efrata owambelethela uRhuri." 
1Chronicles2:20 URhuri wabeletha u-Uri, u-Uri wabeletha uBhetsaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Emva kwalokho uRhetsironi wathatha indodakazi kaMakiri umsunguli weGiliyadi. Gade ineminyaka ematjhumi asithandathu lokha nayithathako bona ibe mkakhe. Yona yambelethela uSegubi. 
1Chronicles2:22 USegubi wabeletha uJayire. (UJayire waba nemizi ematjhumi amabili nantathu enarheni yakwaGiliyadi. 
1Chronicles2:23 Wangenela inarha yeGetjhuri ne-Aramu, wathumba imizi yamatende kaJayire, iKhenathi kanye nemizayo. Kwaba mimizi ematjhumi asithandathu sele iyoke.) Boke labo bekuziinzukulwana zakaMakiri umsunguli weGiliyadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Kodwana emva kokobana uRhetsironi ahlongakalele eKalebi-Efrata, u-Abiya umkakhe wasala ambelethela u-Atjhirhuri umsunguli weTekhowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Amadodana kaJerarhimiyeli olizibulo lakaRhetsironi bekunguRamu izibulo kulandele uBhuna, u-Orene, u-Otsemu no-Arhiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 UJerarhimiyeli gade anomunye umfazi, ibizo lakhe kungu-Athara angunina laka-Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Amadodana kaRamu olizibulo lakaJerarhimiyeli bekunguMatsi, uJamini no-Ekheri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Amadodana ka-Onamu kunguTjhamayi noJada. Amadodana kaTjhamayi kunguNadabi no-Abitjhuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Ibizo lomka Abitjhuri bekungu-Abihayili. Yena wambelethela u-Arhibhani noMolidi. 
1Chronicles2:30 Amadodana kaNadabi bekunguSeledi no-Apayimu. USeledi wahlongakala anganamntwana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Umsa ka-Apayimi bekunguYitjhi, umsa kaYitjhi kunguTjhetjhani, umsa kaTjhetjhani kungu-Arhilayi." 
1Chronicles2:32 Amadodana kaJada umnakwabo lakaTjhamayi bekunguJeteri noJonathani. UJeteri wahlongakala anganamntwana. 
1Chronicles2:33 Amadodana kaJonathani bekunguPelethi noZaza. Boke labo, bekuziinzukulwana zakaJerarhimiyeli." 
1Chronicles2:34 UTjhetjhani bekanganamadodana kodwana anabentazana kwaphela. Gade anesisebenzi somGibhide ibizo laso kunguJarirha. 
1Chronicles2:35 UTjhetjhani wanikela indodakazakhe bona ithathwe sisebenzi sakhe uJarirha. Yona yambelethela u-Atayi. 
1Chronicles2:36 U-Atayi wabeletha uNathani, uNathani wabeletha uZabadi." 
1Chronicles2:37 UZabadi wabeletha u-Efilali, u-Efilali wabeletha u-Obede." 
1Chronicles2:38 U-Obede wabeletha uJehu, uJehu wabeletha u-Azariya." 
1Chronicles2:39 U-Azariya wabeletha uRheletsi, uRheletsi wabeletha u-Eliyasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 U-Eliyasa wabeletha uSisimayi, uSisimayi wabeletha uTjhalumu." 
1Chronicles2:41 UTjhalumu wabeletha uJekhamiya, uJekhamiya wabeletha u-Elitjhama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Amadodana kaKalebi ongumnakwabo lakaJerarhimiyeli bekunguMetjha izibulo lakhe. UMetjha waba msunguli weZifu, indodanakhe kunguMaretjha umsunguli weRhebroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Abantu beRhebroni bekunguKhorarhi, uTapuwarhi, uRekhemu noTjhema." 
1Chronicles2:44 UTjhema wabeletha uRarhamu umsunguli weJorokhowamu. URekhemu wabeletha uTjhamayi. 
1Chronicles2:45 Umsa kaTjhamayi bekunguMawoni umsunguli weBhethe-Tsuri. 
1Chronicles2:46 Umngena wakaKalebi, u-Efa, wambelethela uRharana, uMotsa noGazezi. URharana wabeletha uGazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Amadodana kaJodayi bekunguRegemu, uJotamu, uGetjhana, uPelethi, u-Efa noTjhafu." 
1Chronicles2:48 Umngena omunye wakaKalebi, uMaka, wambelethela uTjhebheri noTirirhana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Wabuya wambelethela uTjhafu umsunguli weMadimana, noTjheva umsunguli weMakibhena neGiba. Indodakazi kaKalebi bekungu-Aksa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ezinye iinzukulwana zakaKalebi bekumadodana kaRhuri olizibulo laka-Efrata: uTjhobali amsunguli weKhiriyathi-Jeyarimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 uSalima amsunguli weBhethe-Lehema noRharefu umsunguli weBhethe-Gaderi. 
1Chronicles2:52 Iinzukulwana zakaTjhobali umsunguli weKhiriyathi-Jeyarimu, bekunguReyaya kanye nengcenye yamaManarha." 
1Chronicles2:53 Imindeni yeKhiriyathi-Jeyarimi bekumaJiteri, amaPuthi, amaTjhuma namaMitjhira. Esizukulwanenesi kulapha kwavela khona amaTsora nama-Etjhitawuli." 
1Chronicles2:54 KuSalima kwadabuka amaBhethe-Lehema, amaNethofa, ama-Athirothi-Bhethe-Jowabi, ingcenye yamaManarha, amaTsori" 
1Chronicles2:55 nemindeni yabatloli abagade bahlala eJabetsi, okutjho amaTira, amaTjhimiya namaSuka. Lawa bekumaKhena adabuka kuRhamathi umsunguli wesigungu samaRekabi." 
1Chronicles3:1 Amadodana kaDavida awabelethelwa eRhebroni ngilawa: Izibulo bekungu-Amnoni ku-Arhinowamu weJizriyela; yesibili kunguDanyela ku-Abigeyili weKarameli; 
1Chronicles3:2 yesithathu bekungu-Absalomu kuMaka indodakazi kaTalimayi ikosi yeGetjhuri; wesine kungu-Adoniya kuRhagithi; 
1Chronicles3:3 yesihlanu bekunguTjhefathiya ku-Abithali, kuthi yesithandathu kube nguJitriyamu ku-Egila umkakhe." 
1Chronicles3:4 Amadodana amathandathu la uDavida wabelethelwa wona eRhebroni, lapha abusa khona iminyaka elikhomba neenyanga ezithandathu. UDavida wabusa eJerusalema iminyaka ematjhumi amathathu namithathu." 
1Chronicles3:5 Napa-ke abelethelwa bona eJerusalema: NguTjhimeya, uTjhobabi, uNathani noSolomoni. Abane labo bebabelethwe nguBhathi-Tjhuwa indodakazi ka-Amiyeli." 
1Chronicles3:6 Gade kunamanye amadodana alithoba: Wona kunguJibirhari, u-Elitjhuwa, u-Elifelethi, uNoga, uNefegi, uJafiya, u-Elitjhama, u-Eliyada no-Elifelethi." 
1Chronicles3:7 Woke lawo bekumadodana kaDavida, kungasabalwa amadodana wemingena. UTamari gade kungudadwabo." 
1Chronicles3:8 USolomoni gade anguyise kaRerhobhowamu onguyise ka-Abiya uyise ka-Asa onguyise kaJehotjhafathi," 
1Chronicles3:9 uyise kaJehoramu onguyise ka-Arhaziya, uyise kaJowatjhi onguyise" 
1Chronicles3:10 ka-Amatsiya, uyise ka-Azariya onguyise kaJotamu, uyise" 
1Chronicles3:11 ka-Arhazi onguyise kaHezekhiya, uyise kaManase onguyise" 
1Chronicles3:12 ka-Amoni, uyise kaJosiya." 
1Chronicles3:13 Amadodana kaJosiya bekunguJorhanani izibulo, yesibili kunguJehoyakhimu, yesithathu bekunguTsedekhiya, yesine kunguTjhalumu." 
1Chronicles3:14 Amadodana kaJehoyakhimu bekunguJekoniya uyise kaTsedekhiya. 
1Chronicles3:15 Amadodana kaJekoniya ngesikhathi sokuthunjwa kwakhe bekunguTjheyalitiyeli," 
1Chronicles3:16 uMalikiramu, uPedaya, uTjhenatsari, uJekhamiya, uHotjhama noNedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:17 Amadodana kaPedaya bekunguZerubhabheli noTjhimeyi. Amadodana kaZerubhabheli kunguMetjhulamu noRhananiya. UTjhelomithi bekungudadwabo. 
1Chronicles3:18 Gade kukhona abahlanu godu: bona kunguRhatjhubha, u-Oheli, uBherekiya, uRhasadiya kanye noJutjhabi-Rhesedi." 
1Chronicles3:19 Iinzukulwana zakaRhananiya bekunguPelathiya no-Isaya onguyise kaRefaya, uyise ka-Arinani onguyise ka-Obadiya, uyise kaTjhekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:20 Iinzukulwana zakaTjhekaniya kunguTjhemaya namadodanakhe uRhathutjhi, uJigali, uBhariyarhi, uNeyariya noTjhafathi; bebabathandathu sebaboke." 
1Chronicles3:21 Amadodana kaNeyariya kungu-Elijowenayi, uHezekhiya no-Azrikhamu; bebabathathu sebaboke." 
1Chronicles3:22 Amadodana ka-Elijowenayi kunguHodaviya, u-Eliyatjhibu, uPelaya, u-Akhubu, uJorhanana, uDelaya no-Anani; bebalikhomba sebaboke." 
1Chronicles4:1 Iinzukulwana zakaJuda bekunguPeretsi, uRhetsironi, uKarimi, uRhuri noTjhobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 UReyaya indodana kaTjhobali wabeletha uJarhata; uJarhata wabeletha u-Arhumayi noLarhadi. Labo bekumindeni yamaTsora. 
1Chronicles4:3 UJizriyela, uYitjhima noJidibhatjhi bekubasunguli be-Ethamu. Udadwabo bekunguHatsileliponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 UPhenuweli waba msunguli weGedori no-Ezeri waba msunguli weRhutjha. Lezi bekuziinzukulwana zakaRhuri olizibulo laka-Efrata. URhuri waba ngukhokho wamaBhethe-Lehema. 
1Chronicles4:5 U-Atjhirhuri umsunguli weTekhowa gade anabafazi ababili, uRhela noNara." 
1Chronicles4:6 UNara wambelethela u-Arhuzamu, uRheferi nabokhokho bamaTemeni kanye nama-Arhatjhitari. Lezo bekuziinzukulwana zakaNara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Amadodana kaRhela bekunguTserethi, uTsorhari no-Etinani." 
1Chronicles4:8 UKotsi wabeletha u-Anubi noTsobeba. Godu waba ngukhokho womndeni waka-Arharirheli umsa kaHarumu. 
1Chronicles4:9 UJabetsi gade ahlonipheka khulu kunabafowabo. Unina wamthiya ibizo lakaJabetsi asitjho ukuthi: “Ngambeletha ngiseenhlungwini.” 
1Chronicles4:10 UJabetsi wathandaza kuZimu wakwa-Israyeli wathi: “Hawu Somnini, kwanga ungangibusisa khulu wandise nemikhawulwami! Beka isandla sakho phezu kwami, ungivikele eengozini bonyana ngibe kude neenhlungu.” Ngambala uZimu wezwa isibawo sakhe." 
1Chronicles4:11 UKelubi umnakwabo lakaTjhurha wabeletha uMerhiri onguyise ka-Etjhitoni. 
1Chronicles4:12 U-Etjhitoni wabeletha indlu yakaRafa, uPaseyarha noTerhina umsunguli wedorobho iNarhatjhi. Labo bekubabantu beReka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Amadodana kaKenazi bekungu-Otiniyeli noSeraya. Amadodana ka-Otiniyeli kunguRhatathi 
1Chronicles4:14 noMewonotayi owabeletha u-Ofira. USeraya wabeletha uJowabi umsunguli womrhoba wabososino. Bathiyelelwa bunje ngombana bekubabantu ababososino. 
1Chronicles4:15 Amadodana kaKalebi umsa kaJefune bekungu-Iru, u-Ela noNamu. Umsa ka-Ela kunguKenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Amadodana kaJehaleleli bekunguZifu noZifa, uTiriya no-Asariyeli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Amadodana ka-Ezra bekunguJeteri, uMeredi, u-Eferi noJaloni. UMeredi wathatha uBhitiya indodakazi kaFaro, wambelethela uMiriyamu, uTjhamayi no-Yitjhibharhi umsunguli we-Etjhitemowa. Labo bekubantwana bakaBhithiya. Umkakhe weJudiya wambelethela uJeredi umsunguli weGedori, uRheberi umsunguli weSoko noJekhutiyeli umsunguli weZanuwarhi." 
1Chronicles4:17 Amadodana ka-Ezra bekunguJeteri, uMeredi, u-Eferi noJaloni. UMeredi wathatha uBhitiya indodakazi kaFaro, wambelethela uMiriyamu, uTjhamayi no-Yitjhibharhi umsunguli we-Etjhitemowa. Labo bekubantwana bakaBhithiya. Umkakhe weJudiya wambelethela uJeredi umsunguli weGedori, uRheberi umsunguli weSoko noJekhutiyeli umsunguli weZanuwarhi." 
1Chronicles4:18 UHodiya wathatha udadwabo kaNarhamu. Iinzukulwana zakhe bekumaGarimu abahlali beKheyila, namaMaka abahlali be-Etjhitemowa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Amadodana kaTjhimoni bekungu-Amnoni, uRina, uBhen-Rhanani noTiloni. Iinzukulwana zakaYitjhi bekunguZorhethi noBhen-Zorhethi." 
1Chronicles4:20 Amadodana kaTjhela umsa kaJuda bekungu-Eri onguyise kaLeka noLada umsunguli weMaretjha kanye nemindeni yesigungu sabaluki belineni eBhethe-Atjhibeya. 
1Chronicles4:21 Godu gade anguyise kaJokhimu nabantu beKozeba, kanye noJowatjhi noSarafu abatjhada emndenini wamaMowabi bebahlala khona; kodwana babuyela eBhethe-Lehema godu, ukuya ngokwesiko lakade." 
1Chronicles4:22 Bekubabumbi egade bahlala eNethayimu neGedera, basebenzela ikosi yakhona." 
1Chronicles4:23 Iinzukulwana zakaSimiyoni bekunguNemuweli, uJamini, uJaribi, uZerarhi noSawula." 
1Chronicles4:24 USawula gade anguyise kaTjhalumu onguyise kaMibisamu uyise kaMitjhima. 
1Chronicles4:25 Iinzukulwana zakaMitjhima kunguRhamuweli, uyise kaZakuru onguyise kaTjhimeyi." 
1Chronicles4:26 UTjhimeyi gade anamadodana alitjhumi nathandathu namadodakazi asithandathu. Kodwana abafowabo akhange babe nabentwana abanengi. Nje-ke, ikoro yakwaSimiyoni akhange ibe yinengi njengeyabantu bakwaJuda." 
1Chronicles4:27 Gade bahlala eBheritjheba, eMolada, eRhatsari-Tjhuwali," 
1Chronicles4:28 eBhilirha, e-Etsemu, eToladi," 
1Chronicles4:29 eBhethuweli, eRhorima, eTsikhilagi," 
1Chronicles4:30 eBhethe-Marikabothi, eRhatsari-Susimu, eBhethe-Bhiri neTjharayimu. Lawo bekumadorobho kanye nemizawo bekwaba sikhathi sokubusa kwakaDavida. Godu bebanamadorobho amanye amahlanu: i-Ethamu, i-Ayini, iRimoni, iTokeni ne-Atjhani," 
1Chronicles4:31 kanye nemizana yoke ewabhodileko bekube seBhali. Lezi-ke, bekuziindawo zabo zokuhlala. Amabizo agade aserhelweni leenzukulwana zabo bekungilawa:" 
1Chronicles4:32 uMetjhobabi, uJamleki, uJotjha umsa ka-Amatsiya," 
1Chronicles4:33 uJuweli, uJehu, umsa kaJotjhibiya omsa kaSeraya, umsa ka-Asiyeli," 
1Chronicles4:34 u-Eliyowenayi, uJakhobha, uJetjhorhaya, u-Asaya, u-Adiyeli, uJesimiyeli, uBhenaya," 
1Chronicles4:35 uZiza, umsa kaTjhifi omsa ka-Aloni, umsa kaJedaya omsa kaTjhimri, umsa kaTjhemaya." 
1Chronicles4:36 Boke ababaliwekwabo gade babarholi bemindenabo. Kwathi lokha imindenabo nayikhula ngamandla," 
1Chronicles4:37 baya esangweni lomrhoba weGedoro ukuya ngepumalanga yawo, bafunela izimvu neembuzi zabo amadlelo." 
1Chronicles4:38 Bafunyana bonyana amadlelo anothile, inarha isithabathaba nokobana inokuthula godu izothile ngombana ngesikhatheso amaRhamu amanye gade ahlala lapho." 
1Chronicles4:39 Bekusemihleni kaHezekhiya, ikosi yakwaJuda lokha amadoda aserhelweni ngehla nakangenela inarha. Abhubhisa imizi yamatende wabahlali kanye nemithombo yamanzi; abe amadlha nabantu egade bahlala lapho kangangobana akhange basabuya. Ahlala endawenabo ngombana gade inamadlelo aneleko wezimvu neembuzi zawo." 
1Chronicles4:40 Amakhulu amahlanu wabantwaba okungebekoro kaSimiyoni baphuma baya eentabeni zeSeyira barholwa nguPelatiya, uNiyariya, uRefaya no-Uziyeli okumadodana kaYitjhi." 
1Chronicles4:41 Babulala ama-Amalekhi agade asasele lapho asindile, nanamhlanje basahlala lapho." 
1Chronicles5:1 URubeni gade alizibulo laka-Israyeli. Kodwana wasilaphaza umbhede kayise, yeke amalungelo wobuzibulo bakhe anikelwa amadodana kaJosefa umsa ka-Israyeli nanyana yena gade angabalwa ebuzibulweni. UJuda waba namandla ukudlula abafowabo, khulukhulu umrholi owavela kuye, kodwana ilungelo lobuzibulo laba ngelakaJosefa. Amadodana kaRubeni izibulo laka-Israyeli bekunguRhanokhi, uPalu, uRhetsironi noKarimi." 
1Chronicles5:2 Iinzukulwana zakaJuweli ngilezi: uJuweli anguyise kaTjhemaya onguyise kaGogi, uyise kaTjhimeyi" 
1Chronicles5:3 onguyise kaMikha, uyise kaReyaya onguyise kaBhali," 
1Chronicles5:4 uyise kaBhera owadingiswa nguTigilathi-Pileseri ikosi ye-Asiriya. UBhera lo, gade amrholi wekoro yakwaRubeni." 
1Chronicles5:5 Abafowabo kaBhera ngokuya ngemindenabo njengombana itlolwe ngokulandelana kwayo bekungilaba: uJehiyeli oyihloko, uZakariya" 
1Chronicles5:6 noBhela umsa ka-Azazi omsa kaTjhema umsa kaJuweli. Umndeni kaBhela wahlala enarheni ye-Aroweri ukuya eNebo neBhali-Mewoni. 
1Chronicles5:7 Ngepumalanga ikoro kaRubeni yahlala ukuyela ngemkhawulweni werhalawumba nganeno komlambo iYufrathe ngombana ifuywayo beyandile sele iminyana enarheni yeGiliyadi. 
1Chronicles5:8 Bekusemihleni kaSawula lokha bakwaRubeni nabasahlela amaHagari bebawahlula. Bahlala emizinawo yamatende esifundeni soke sangepumalanga yeGiliyadi. 
1Chronicles5:9 Iinzukulwana zakaGadi gade zihlala eBhatjhani ukuya ngeSaleka endaweni eseduze nebakwaRubeni. 
1Chronicles5:10 UJuweli gade ayihloko eBhatjhani, kulandele uTjhafamu bese kuza uJanayi noTjhafathi." 
1Chronicles5:11 EGiliyadi u-Arhi umsa ka-Abidiyeli omsa kaGuni gade ayihloko yemindeni egade irholwa nguMikhayeli, uMetjhulamu, uTjheba, uJorayi, uJakani, uZiya no-Ebhere, bebalikhomba sebaboke. Labo bekumadodana ka-Abirhayili umsa kaRhuri omsa kaJarowarhi umsa kaGiliyadi omsa kaMikhayeli umsa kaYetjhitjhayi omsa kaJarhido umsa kaBhuzi." 
1Chronicles5:12 AmaGadi gade ahlala emizaneni yeGiliyadi neBhatjhani kanye nemirhuleni yeTjharoni ukuya ngemaphethelwenayo. 
1Chronicles5:13 Yoke imindeni le beyitloliswe erhelweni leenzukulwana ngesikhathi sokubusa kwakaJotamu ikosi yakwaJuda noJerobhowamu ikosi yakwa-Israyeli. 
1Chronicles5:14 BakwaRubeni, bakwaGadi nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase gade baneengorho ezibandulelwe ukulwa ngesabula nesihlangu kanye nangomsebe; banekghono lepi. Bebanamatjhumi amane nane weenkulungwana namakhulu alikhomba anamatjhumi asithandathu wabantu ebebalungele ipi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Balwa nebakwaHagari, okutjho iinkoro zamaJethuri, amaNafitjhi namaNodabi." 
1Chronicles5:16 UZimu wabasiza wanikela bakwaHagari nabo boke abanabo ezandleni zabo ngombana balila kuye ngesikhathi sepi. Waphendula imithandazwabo ngombana gade bamthemba. 
1Chronicles5:17 Bathumba ifuyo yabakwaHagari: iinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu weenkamela, iinkulungwana ezimakhulu amabili namatjhumi amahlanu wezimvu, iinkulungwana ezimbili zabodumbana kanye nabantu abalikhulu leenkulungwana." 
1Chronicles5:18 Inengi labantu laradlhwa phasi lafa ngombana ipi beyingeyakaZimu. Bahlala enarheni leyo bekwaba sikhathi sokuthunjwa kwabo. 
1Chronicles5:19 Isiquntu sekoro yakwaManase besisinengi khulu. Besihlala enarheni yeBhatjhani ukuya ngemikhawulweni yangetlhagwini yeBhali-Rherimoni, neentabeni zeSeniri neRherimoni." 
1Chronicles5:20 Iinhloko zemindenaso bekungu-Eferi, uYitjhi, u-Eliyeli, u-Azriyeli, uJoromiya, uHodaviya noJarhidiyeli. Bekuziingorho, iinhloko zemindeni ezinedumo." 
1Chronicles5:21 Kodwana bebangakathembeki kuZimu waboyisemkhulu, badlhemadlhema ngemva kwabosingazimu babantu benarha leyo, abantu uZimu ababhubhisa phambi kwabo." 
1Chronicles5:22 Nje-ke uZimu wakwa-Israyeli wavusa ummoya kaPhuli ikosi ye-Asiriya (ogade asaziwa ngelikaTiligathi-Pilineseri). UPhuli wadingisa bakwaRubeni, bakwaGadi nesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase wabahlalisa eRhalarhi, eRhabori, eHara nangemlanjeni iGozani. Basese lapho nanamhlanje." 
1Chronicles6:1 Amadodana kaLevi bekunguGeritjhoni, uKhehathi noMerari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Amadodana kaKhehathi kungu-Amramu, uJitsihari, uRhebroni no-Uziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Abantwana baka-Amramu kungu-Aroni, uMosi noMiriyamu. Amadodana ka-Aroni kunguNadabi, u-Abihu, u-Elazara no-Itamara." 
1Chronicles6:4 U-Elazara wabeletha uFiniyasi; uFiniyasi wabeletha u-Abitjhuwa. 
1Chronicles6:5 U-Abitjhuwa wabeletha uBhukhi; uBhukhi wabeletha u-Uzi. 
1Chronicles6:6 U-Uzi wabeletha uZerarhiya; uZerarhiya wabeletha uMerayothi. 
1Chronicles6:7 UMerayothi wabeletha u-Amariya; u-Amariya wabeletha u-Arhithubi. 
1Chronicles6:8 U-Arhithubi wabeletha uTsadokhi; uTsadokhi wabeletha u-Arhimahatsi. 
1Chronicles6:9 U-Arhimahatsi wabeletha u-Azariya; u-Azariya wabeletha uJorhanana. 
1Chronicles6:10 UJorhanana wabeletha u-Azariya. (Yena waba mphristi wokuthoma ethempelini elakhiwe nguSolomoni eJerusalema.) 
1Chronicles6:11 U-Azariya wabeletha u-Amariya; u-Amariya wabeletha u-Arhithubi. 
1Chronicles6:12 U-Arhithubi wabeletha uTsadokhi; uTsadokhi wabeletha uTjhalumu. 
1Chronicles6:13 UTjhalumu wabeletha uRhilikhiya; uRhilikhiya wabeletha u-Azariya. 
1Chronicles6:14 U-Azariya wabeletha uSeraya; uSeraya wabeletha uJehotsadakhi. 
1Chronicles6:15 UJehotsadakhi wathunjwa ngesikhathi uSomnini anikela uJuda neJerusalema esandleni sakaNebukadinetsari. 
1Chronicles6:16 Amadodana kaLevi bekunguGeritjhomu, uKhehathi noMerari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Lawa mabizo wamadodana kaGeritjhomu: uLibini noTjhimeyi. 
1Chronicles6:18 Amadodana kaKhehathi bekungu-Amramu, uJitsihari, uRhebroni no-Uziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Amadodana kaMerari bekunguMarhili noMutjhi. Laba bekumindeni yamaLevi ukuya ngabokhokhwabo: 
1Chronicles6:20 UGeritjhomu gade anguyise kaLibini onguyise kaJarhathi, uyise kaZima onguyise" 
1Chronicles6:21 kaJowarhi, uyise ka-Ido onguyise kaZerarhi, uyise kaJeyathirayi." 
1Chronicles6:22 UKhehathi gade anguyise ka-Aminadabi onguyise kaKhorarhi, uyise ka-Asiri onguyise" 
1Chronicles6:23 ka-Elikhana, uyise ka-Ebiyasafu onguyise ka-Asiri, uyise" 
1Chronicles6:24 kaTarhathi onguyise ka-Uriyeli, uyise ka-Uziya onguyise kaSawula." 
1Chronicles6:25 Amanye amadodana ka-Elikhana bekungu-Amasayi no-Arhimothi. 
1Chronicles6:26 U-Arhimothi gade anguyise ka-Elikhana onguyise kaTsofayi, uyise kaNarhathi onguyise" 
1Chronicles6:27 ka-Eliyabu, uyise kaJerorhamu onguyise ka-Elikhana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Amadodana kaSamyela bekunguJuweli izibulo, yesibili kungu-Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Iinzukulwana zakaMerari bekunguMarhili onguyise kaLibini, uyise kaTjhimeyi onguyise ka-Uza, uyise" 
1Chronicles6:30 kaTjhimeya onguyise kaRhagiya, uyise ka-Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 UDavida wabeka amadoda bona aphathe zomvumo endlini kaSomnini emva kokobana umfaji wesivumelwano uhlaliswe lapho. 
1Chronicles6:32 Alotjha ngomvumo phambi kwethaberinakeli okulitende lokuhlanganela, bekwaba sikhathi lapha uSolomoni akha khona ithempeli lakaSomnini eJerusalema. Enza imisebenzawo ngokuya ngomyalo abekelwa wona." 
1Chronicles6:33 Naka amadoda enza umsebenzi lo ngokumukeza aboyise: KebakwaKhehathi umkhaleli bekunguHemani, umsa kaJuweli omsa kaSamyela," 
1Chronicles6:34 umsa ka-Elikhana omsa kaJerorhamu, umsa ka-Eliyeli omsa kaTowarhi," 
1Chronicles6:35 umsa kaTsufi omsa ka-Elikhana, umsa kaMarhathi omsa ka-Amasayi," 
1Chronicles6:36 umsa ka-Elikhana omsa kaJuweli, umsa ka-Azariya omsa kaTsefaniya," 
1Chronicles6:37 umsa kaTarhathi omsa ka-Asiri, umsa ka-Ebijasafu omsa kaKhorarhi," 
1Chronicles6:38 umsa kaJitsirhari omsa kaKhenathi, umsa kaLevi omsa ka-Israyeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 U-Asafa umfowabo kaHemani wajama ngesidleni sakhe. U-Asafa bekuyindodana kaBherekiya, umsa kaTjhimeya" 
1Chronicles6:40 omsa kaMikayeli, umsa kaBaheseya omsa kaMalikiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 umsa ka-Ethini omsa kaZerarhi, umsa ka-Adaya" 
1Chronicles6:42 omsa ka-Etana, umsa kaZima omsa kaTjhimeyi," 
1Chronicles6:43 umsa kaJarhathi omsa kaGeritjhomu, umsa kaLevi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Abafowabo bangekhohlo bekumadodana kaMerari: U-Etana umsa kaKhitjhi omsa ka-Abidi, umsa kaMaluki" 
1Chronicles6:45 omsa kaRhatjhabiya, umsa ka-Amatsiya omsa kaRhilikhiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 umsa ka-Amitsi omsa kaBhani, umsa kaTjhemeri" 
1Chronicles6:47 omsa kaMarhili, umsa kaMutjhi omsa kaMerari, umsa kaLevi." 
1Chronicles6:48 AmaLevi amanye anikelwa eminye imisebenzi ethaberinakelini okuyindlu kaSomnini uZimu. 
1Chronicles6:49 Kodwana u-Aroni neenzukulwana zakhe bebaqalene nomsebenzi we-aldari lokutjhisa imihlabelo kanye ne-aldari lokutjhisa itjhwalo. Godu gade baqalene nomsebenzi wendawo ecwenge khulu nokwenzela u-Israyeli itethelelo kuZimu ngokuya ngendlela uMosi inceku kaZimu agade ayale ngayo. 
1Chronicles6:50 Nanzi-ke iinzukulwana zaka-Aroni: U-Aroni gade anguyise ka-Elazara onguyise kaFiniyasi uyise ka-Abitjhuwa onguyise 
1Chronicles6:51 kaBhukhi uyise ka-Uzi onguyise kaZerarhiya uyise 
1Chronicles6:52 kaMerayothi onguyise ka-Amariya uyise ka-Arhithubi onguyise 
1Chronicles6:53 kaTsadokhi uyise ka-Arhimahatsi. 
1Chronicles6:54 AmaKhehathi, aziinzukulwana zaka-Aroni, akhethwa ngefumbe bona amukele nanzi iimfunda ezilandelako kobana ahlale kizo:" 
1Chronicles6:55 Enarheni yakwaJuda amukeliswa iRhebroni namadlelo ayibhodileko," 
1Chronicles6:56 kodwana amasimu nemizana yeRhebroni besele yabelwe uKhalebi umsa kaJefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Iinzukulwana zaka-Aroni zabelwa amadorobho wobuphephelo: iRhebroni, iLibhina namadlelwayo, iJatiri, i-Etjhitemowa namadlelwayo," 
1Chronicles6:58 iRhilezi namadlelwayo, iDebiri namadlelwayo," 
1Chronicles6:59 i-Atjhani namadlelwayo, iBhethe-Tjhemetjhi namadlelwayo." 
1Chronicles6:60 Esifundeni sekoro yakwaBhenjamini iinzukulwana zaka-Aroni zabelwa iGeba namadlelwayo, i-Alemethi namadlelwayo kanye ne-Anatothi namadlelwayo. Sele awoke amadorobho wemindeni le bekalitjhumi nantathu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Amadorobho alitjhumi wesiquntu sekoro kaManase abelwa ngefumbe labo ebebahlobene neenzukulwana eziseleko zakaKhehathi. 
1Chronicles6:62 Amadorobho alitjhumi nantathu ngeemfundeni zekoro ka-Isakari, ka-Atjheri, kaNafitali nekoro kaManase eBhatjhani abelwa imindeni yeenzukulwana zakaGeritjhomu." 
1Chronicles6:63 Amadorobho alitjhumi nambili ngeemfundeni zekoro kaRubeni, kaGadi neyakaZebuloni abelwa ngefumbe imindeni yeenzukulwana zakaMerari." 
1Chronicles6:64 Nje-ke bakwa-Israyeli babela amaLevi amadorobho la kanye namadlelwawo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Amadorobho eemfundeni zakwaJuda, kwaSimiyoni nakwaBhenjamini abalwe ngehla nawo abiwa ngefumbe." 
1Chronicles6:66 Abanye bemindeni yamaKhehathi bebabelwe imizi nemikhawulwayo ngesifundeni sekoro ka-Efrayimu. 
1Chronicles6:67 Bebamukeliswe iindawo ezilandelako njengamadorobhabo wobuphephelo: iTjhekemu eentatjaneni zakwa-Efrayimu namadlelwayo, iGezeri namadlelwayo," 
1Chronicles6:68 iJokimeyamu namadlelwayo, iBhethe-Rhoroni namadlelwayo," 
1Chronicles6:69 i-Ayaloni namadlelwayo, iGathi-Rimoni namadlelwayo." 
1Chronicles6:70 Godu ezinye zeenzukulwana eziseleko zakaKhehathi zabelwa esifundeni sesiquntu sekoro yakwaManase i-Aneri namadlelwayo, iBhiliyamu namadlelwayo." 
1Chronicles6:71 AmaGeritjhomu abelwa lokhu: Esifundeni sesiquntu sekoro kaManase iGolani engeBhatjhani namadlelwayo, i-Atjhitarothi namadlelwayo." 
1Chronicles6:72 Esifundeni sekoro ka-Isakari iKhedetjhi namadlelwayo, iDaberathi namadlelwayo," 
1Chronicles6:73 iRamothi namadlelwayo, i-Anemu namadlelwayo." 
1Chronicles6:74 Esifundeni sekoro ka-Atjheri iMatjhala namadlelwayo, i-Abidoni namadlelwayo," 
1Chronicles6:75 iRhukhokhi namadlelwayo, iRerhobi namadlelwayo." 
1Chronicles6:76 Esifundeni sekoro kaNafitali iKhedetjhi engeGalile namadlelwayo, iRhamoni namadlelwayo, iKhiriyatayimu namadlelwayo." 
1Chronicles6:77 Iinzukulwana eziseleko zamaMerari zabelwa: Esifundeni sekoro kaZebuloni iRimoni namadlelwayo, iThabori namadlelwayo." 
1Chronicles6:78 Esifundeni sekoro yakwaRubeni ngaphetjheya kweJordani nangepumalanga yeJerikho iBhetseri engerhalawumbeni namadlelwayo, iJarhitsa namadlelwayo," 
1Chronicles6:79 iKhedemothi namadlelwayo, iMefahathi namadlelwayo." 
1Chronicles6:80 Esifundeni sekoro yakwaGadi iRamothi engeGiliyadi namadlelwayo, iMarhanayimu namadlelwayo," 
1Chronicles6:81 iRhetjhiboni namadlelwayo, iJazeri namadlelwayo." 
1Chronicles7:1 Amadodana ka-Isakari bekunguTola, uPuwa, uJatjhubi noTjhimroni; babane sebaboke." 
1Chronicles7:2 Amadodana kaTola kungu-Uzi, uRefaya, uJeriyeli, uJarhimayi, uJibisamu noSamyela; bebaziinhloko zemindenabo. Eenzukulwaneni zomndeni kaTola bekunamadoda wepi. Ngesikhathi sokubusa kwakaDavida bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nambili namakhulu asithandathu ngesibalo." 
1Chronicles7:3 Umsa ka-Uzi bekunguJizrarhiya. UJizrarhiya namadodanakhe uMikayeli, u-Obadiya, uJuweli noYitjhiya bebaziinhloko zemindeni; babahlanu sebaboke." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ngokuya ngokomlando weenzukulwana zabo, bebamadoda aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nathandathu alungele ukulwa ngombana gade banesithembu nabantwana abanengi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Yoke eminye imindeni yekoro ka-Isakari beyinesibalo samadoda wepi aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi abunane nalikhomba. Yoke njalo itlolwe erhelweni leenzukulwana. 
1Chronicles7:6 Amadodana amathathu kaBhenjamini bekunguBhela, uBhekeri noJediyayeli." 
1Chronicles7:7 Amadodana kaBhela kungu-Etsibhoni, u-Uzi, u-Uziyeli, uJerimothi no-Iri. Amadoda amahlanu la gade aziinhloko zemindeni begodu aziingorho. Iinzukulwana zabo bezinesibalo esimatjhumi amabili nambili weenkulungwana namatjhumi amathathu nane wamadoda wepi." 
1Chronicles7:8 Amadodana kaBhekeri bekunguZemira, uJowatjhi, u-Eliyezeri, u-Eliyowenayi, u-Omri, uJeremothi, u-Abiya, u-Anatothi no-Alemethi. Woke lawo bekumadodana kaBhekeri," 
1Chronicles7:9 neenzukulwana zawo egade zitloliswe ngokweenhloko zemindeni kumadoda wepi aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili namakhulu amabili. 
1Chronicles7:10 Umsa kaJediyayeli bekunguBhilirhana. Amadodana kaBhilirhana kunguJewutjhi, uBhenjamini, u-Ehudi, uKenana, uZetani, uTaratjhitjhi no-Arhitjharhari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Woke lawo bekumadodana kaJediyayeli, neenzukulwana zawo ngokweenhloko zemindeni kumadoda wepi aziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nalikhomba namakhulu amabili alungele ukulwa." 
1Chronicles7:12 AmaTjhufi namaRhufi bekuziinzukulwana zaka-Iri, amaRhutjhi kuziinzukulwana zaka-Arheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Amadodana kaNafitali bekunguJarhitsiyeli, uGuni, uJetseri noTjhalumu. Labo bekuziinzukulwana zakaBhilirha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Umsa kaManase bekungu-Asriyeli obelethwa mngena omAramu. Godu wabeletha uMakiri uyise kaGiliyadi. 
1Chronicles7:15 UMakiri wathatha umfazi emindenini yamaRhufi namaTjhufi. Ibizo lomkakhe ogade ayintandokazi kuye bekunguMaka. UTselofirhadi ogade angowesizukulwana sesibili bekanamadodakazi kwaphela. 
1Chronicles7:16 UMaka umkaMakiri wambelethela umsana wamthiya ibizo bona nguPeretjhi. Umnakwabo wamthiya bona nguTjheretjhi. Iinzukulwana zakaGiliyadi bekungu-Ulamu noRekhemu.
