1Chronicles7:17 Umsa ka-Ulamu bekunguBhedani. Lezo-ke bekuziinzukulwana zakaGiliyadi umsa kaMakiri omsa kaManase. 
1Chronicles7:18 Udadwabo lakaGiliyadi bekunguMolekethi owabeletha u-Itjhihodi, u-Abiyezeri noMarhala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Amadodana kaTjhemida bekungu-Arhiyana, uTjhekemu, uLikhirhi no-Aniyamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Iinzukulwana zaka-Efrayimu bekunguTjhuthelarhi uyise kaBeredi onguyise kaTarhathi uyise ka-Eliyada onguyise kaTarhathi," 
1Chronicles7:21 uyise kaZabadi onguyise kaTjhuthelarhi. Abahlali bendawo okumadoda weGathi babulala u-Ezeri no-Eliyadi amadodana ka-Efrayimu lokha nabalinga ukuthatha ifuywabo. 
1Chronicles7:22 Uyise u-Efrayimu wabalilela amalanga amanengi, iinhlobo zakhe bezeza bona zizomtjhiriya." 
1Chronicles7:23 Wayama umkakhe, wazithwala wabeletha indodana. Wayithiya ibizo lakaBheriya ngombana umndenakhe bewunesinyama." 
1Chronicles7:24 Indodakazi ka-Efrayimu bekunguTjhera owasungula iBhethe-Rhoroni engenzasi neBhethe-Rhoroni engehla kanye ne-Uzeni-Tjhera. 
1Chronicles7:25 U-Efrayimu gade anenye indodana okuthiwa nguRefarhi uyise kaRetjhefu onguyise kaTelarhi, uyise kaTarhana" 
1Chronicles7:26 onguyise kaLadani, uyise ka-Amihudi onguyise ka-Elitjhama," 
1Chronicles7:27 uyise kaNuni onguyise kaJotjhuwa. 
1Chronicles7:28 Iinarha zabo nemizabo bekuyiBhethe-Eli nemizanayo. Ngepumalanga isifunda sabo besinabela emkhawulweni weNarana, ngetjingalanga sinabela emikhawulweni yeGezeri nemizanayo. Isifundesi sifaka iTjhekemu nemizanayo besinabele nemikhawulweni ye-Aya nemizanayo." 
1Chronicles7:29 BakwaManase bebalawula iBhethe-Tjhani nemizanayo, iTanaki nemizanayo, iMegido nemizanayo kanye neDori nemizanayo. Iinzukulwana zakaJosefa umsa ka-Israyeli bezihlala emizini le." 
1Chronicles7:30 Amadodana ka-Atjheri bekunguJimna, uYitjhiva, uYitjhivi noBheriya. Udadwabo kunguSerarhi." 
1Chronicles7:31 Amadodana kaBheriya kunguRhebere noMalikiyeli ogade anguyise kaBhirizayithi. 
1Chronicles7:32 URhebhere wabeletha uJafilethi, uTjhomeri, uRhotamu nodadwabo uTjhuwa." 
1Chronicles7:33 Amadodana kaJafilethi kunguPasaki, uBhimirhali no-Atjhivathi. Lawo bekumadodana kaJafilethi." 
1Chronicles7:34 Amadodana kaTjhomeri bekungu-Arhi, uRohega, uRhuba no-Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Amadodana kamnakwabo lakaRhotamu kunguTsofarhi, uJimna, uTjheletjhi no-Amala." 
1Chronicles7:36 Amadodana kaTsofarhi kunguSuwarhi, uRharineferi, uTjhuwali, uBheri, uJimra," 
1Chronicles7:37 uBhetseri, uHodi, uTjhama, uTjhilitjha, uJitirani noBhera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Amadodana kaJeteri bekunguJefune, uPisipa no-Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Amadodana ka-Ula bekungu-Ararhi, uRhaniyeli noRitsiya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Boke labo bekuziinzukulwana zaka-Atjheri. Bebaziinhloko zemindeni, amadoda ahloniphekako, iingorho nabarholi abaphezulu. Isibalo samadoda wepi gade siziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nathandathu." 
1Chronicles8:1 UBhenjamini wabeletha uBhela olizibulo lakhe, wesibili kungu-Atjhibeli, wesithathu kungu-Arhirarhi," 
1Chronicles8:2 wesine kunguNorha, wesihlanu kunguRafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Amadodana kaBhela bekungu-Adari noGera onguyise ka-Ehudi. 
1Chronicles8:4 U-Abitjhuwa, uNamani, u-Arhowarhi," 
1Chronicles8:5 uGera, uTjhefufani noRhuramu" 
1Chronicles8:6 bekumadodana ka-Ehudi. Gade baziinhloko zemindeni egade ihlala eGeba kodwana uNamani no-Arhowarhi bafuduselwa eManarhathi ngekani. UGera nguye owabafudusako. Emva kwesikhathi uGera wabeletha u-Uza no-Arhirhudi. 
1Chronicles8:7 UTjharharayimu wabelethelwa amadodana enarheni yakwaMowabi emva kokobana atlhale abafazi bakhe uRhutjhimu noBhara. 
1Chronicles8:8 URhodetjhi umkakhe wambelethela uJobabu, uTsibiya, uMetjha, uMalikamu," 
1Chronicles8:8 URhodetjhi umkakhe wambelethela uJobabu, uTsibiya, uMetjha, uMalikamu," 
1Chronicles8:9 uJewutsi, uSakiya noMirima. Lawo bekumadodanakhe, baziinhloko zemindeni." 
1Chronicles8:10 NgoRhutjhimu gade abelethelwe u-Abithubi no-Elipali. 
1Chronicles8:11 Amadodana ka-Elipali bekungu-Ebhere, uMitjhamu noTjhemedi. UTjhemedi lo ngowakha i-Ono neLodi nemizanayo." 
1Chronicles8:12 Amanye amadodana ka-Elipali kunguBheriya noTjhema. Bebaziinhloko zemindeni ehlala e-Ayaloni; ngibo abaqotjha izakhamuzi zeGathi. 
1Chronicles8:13 U-Arhiyo, uTjhatjhakhi, uJeremothi," 
1Chronicles8:14 uZebadiya, u-Aradi, u-Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:15 uMikayeli, uYitjhipa noJorha gade bamadodana kaBheriya." 
1Chronicles8:16 UZebadiya, uMetjhulamu, uRhizikhi, uRhebhere," 
1Chronicles8:17 uYitjhimerayi, uJiziliya noJobabi bamadodana ka-Elipali." 
1Chronicles8:17 uYitjhimerayi, uJiziliya noJobabi bamadodana ka-Elipali." 
1Chronicles8:18 UJakimu, uZikiri, uZabidi," 
1Chronicles8:19 u-Eliyenayi, uTsiletayi, u-Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:20 u-Adaya, uBheraya noTjhimrathi bamadodana kaTjhimeyi." 
1Chronicles8:21 UYitjhipani, u-Ebhere, u-Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:22 u-Abidoni, uZikiri, uRhanani," 
1Chronicles8:23 uRhananiya, u-Elamu, u-Anitotiya," 
1Chronicles8:24 uJifideya noPenuweli bamadodana kaTjhatjhakhi. 
1Chronicles8:25 UTjhamitjherayi, uTjherhariya, u-Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:26 uJaretjhiya, u-Eliya noZikiri bamadodana kaJerorhamu." 
1Chronicles8:27 Labo bekuziinhloko zemindenabo, bahlala eJerusalema ngokuya ngeenzukulwana zabo." 
1Chronicles8:28 Umsunguli weGibiyoni gade ahlala eGibiyoni. Ibizo lomkakhe bekunguMaka. 
1Chronicles8:29 Indodanakhe elizibulo kungu-Abidoni, alanywe nguTsuri, kulandele uKhitjhi, uBhali, uNeri, uNadaba," 
1Chronicles8:30 uGedori, u-Arhiyo, uZekeri" 
1Chronicles8:31 bese kuba nguMikilothi owabeletha uTjhimeya. Nabo gade bahlala eduze kweenhlobo zabo eJerusalema. 
1Chronicles8:32 UNeri wabeletha uKhitjhi, uKhitjhi wabeletha uSawula. USawula wabeletha uJonathani, uMaliki-Tjhuwa, u-Abinadaba no-Etjhi-Bhali." 
1Chronicles8:33 Umsa kaJonathani bekunguMeribhali. UMeribhali wabeletha uMikha. 
1Chronicles8:34 Amadodana kaMikha kunguPitoni, uMeleki, uTariya no-Arhazi." 
1Chronicles8:35 U-Arhazi wabeletha uJehowada, uJehowada wabeletha u-Alemethi, u-Azimavethi noZimri. UZimri wabeletha uMotsa," 
1Chronicles8:36 uMotsa wabeletha uBhina onguyise kaRafa uyise ka-Eliyasa onguyise ka-Atseli. 
1Chronicles8:37 U-Atseli gade anamadodana amathandathu. Wona bekungu-Azrikhamu, uBhokeru, u-Itjhimayeli, uTjheyariya, u-Obadiya noRhanani. Boke labo bekumadodana ka-Atseli." 
1Chronicles8:38 Amadodana womnakwabo u-Etjhekhi bekungu-Ulamu olizibulo lakhe, wesibili kunguJewutjhi, wesithathu kungu-Elifelethi." 
1Chronicles8:39 Amadodana ka-Ulamu bekuziingorho ezikwazi ukusebenzisa umsebe. Gade zinamadodana nabazukulu abanengi; balikhulu namatjhumi amahlanu sebaboke. Boke labo bekuziinzukulwana zakaBhenjamini. 
1Chronicles9:1 Boke bakwa-Israyeli gade batlolwe erhelweni egade lisemtlolweni wamakhosi wakwa-Israyeli. Abantu bakwaJuda gade bathunjwe basiwa eBhabheli ngenca yokungathembeki kwabo. 
1Chronicles9:2 Ababa ngebokuthoma ukubuyela eendaweni zabo ngemadorobheni bekungabanye bama-Israyeli, abaphristi, amaLevi neensebenzi zethempeli." 
1Chronicles9:3 EJerusalema kwahlala abanye bakwaJuda, bakwaBhenjamini, bakwa-Efrayimu nebakwaManase. Bona bekungilaba:" 
1Chronicles9:4 u-Utayi, umsa ka-Amihudi omsa ka-Omri, umsa ka-Imri omsa kaBhani osizukulwana sakaPeretsi, umsa kaJuda;" 
1Chronicles9:5 kebakwaTjhiloni kungu-Asaya olizibulo namadodanakhe; 
1Chronicles9:6 kebakwaZerarhi kunguJehiyeli. Isibalo semindeni le besimakhulu amathandathu namatjhumi alithoba. 
1Chronicles9:7 BakwaBhenjamini kunguSalu, umsa kaMetjhulamu omsa kaHodaviya, umsa kaHasenuwa;" 
1Chronicles9:8 uJibineya, umsa kaJerorhamu; u-Ela, umsa ka-Uzi omsa kaMikiri noMetjhulamu, umsa kaTjhafathiya omsa kaRewuyeli, umsa kaJibiniya." 
1Chronicles9:9 Iinzukulwana zabantwaba, bezimakhulu alithoba namatjhumi amahlanu nathandathu. Bona bebaziinhloko zemindeni." 
1Chronicles9:10 Abaphristi abagade bahlala eJerusalema kunguJedaya, uJehoyaribi, uJakini, u-Adaya, umsa kaJerorhamu omsa kaPatjhirhuri, umsa kaMalikiya, uMasayi, umsa ka-Adiyeli omsa kaJarhizera, umsa kaMetjhulamu omsa kaMetjhilemithi, umsa ka-Imeri. U-Azariya, umsa kaRhilikiya omsa kaMetjhulamu, umsa kaTsadokhi omsa kaMerayothi, umsa ka-Arhithubi gade asikhulu sendlu kaZimu. Abaphristaba gade baziinhloko zemindeni. Bekumadoda anetlha nanekghono lokwenza umsebenzi wendlu kaZimu. Isibalo semindenabo besiyikulungwana namakhulu alikhomba namatjhumi asithandathu." 
1Chronicles9:11 AmaLevi agade ahlala eJerusalema kunguTjhemaya, umsa kaRhatjhubi omsa ka-Azrikhamu, umsa kaRhatjhabiya okuziinzukulwana zakaMerari," 
1Chronicles9:12 uBhakhibhakhari, uRheretjhi, uGalali, uMataniya, umsa kaMika omsa kaZikiri, umsa ka-Asafa," 
1Chronicles9:13 u-Obadiya, umsa kaTjhemaya omsa kaGalali, umsa kaJedutuni noBherekiya, umsa ka-Asa omsa ka-Elkhana ogade ahlala emizini yamaNethofathi." 
1Chronicles9:14 Abalindisango abagade bahlala eJerusalema kunguTjhalumu, u-Akhubu, uThalimoni, u-Arhimani nabozakwabo. Ihlokwabo kunguTjhalumu." 
1Chronicles9:15 Bekube namhlanje basese balindisango ababekwe esangweni lekosi ngepumalanga yethempeli. Lo bekumndeni wabalindisango ukusukela ngesikhathi sokujanyiswa kwekampa yamaLevi erhalawumbeni. 
1Chronicles9:16 Yeke uTjhalumu umsa kaKhore omsa ka-Ebiyasafu umsa kaKhorarhi nabafowabo abamaKhorarhi, gade baphethe isikhundla sokugada imibunjwana yethempeli njengaboyisemkhulu abagade baqalene nokugada isango lethaberinakeli lakaSomnini." 
1Chronicles9:17 Erhalawumbeni uFiniyasi umsa ka-Eliyazari gade amrholabo noSomnini anaye. 
1Chronicles9:18 UZakariya umsa kaTjhalumu gade amlindisango esangweni elikhulu lethempeli. 
1Chronicles9:19 Sebaboke labo abakhethwa bona babe balindisango emibunjwaneni yethempeli, bebamakhulu amabili anetjhumi nambili. Gade bahlala emizanenabo lapha bebatloliswe khona. UDavida nomboni uSamyela ngibo abenza isikhundla somlindisango bona sibe ngesesiphelani ethempelini." 
1Chronicles9:20 Ukusukela ngesikhatheso amaKhorarhi gade agada amasango wendlu kaSomnini ngokuya ngedlhego lawo. 
1Chronicles9:21 Abalindisango bebangemahlangothini womane wethempeli: ngepumalanga, ngetjingalanga, ngesewula nangetlhagwini." 
1Chronicles9:22 Abarholi abane babalindisango ababalwe ngehla gade baneenkhundla ezisiphelani ethempelini, kodwana abalindisango abangemizaneni bekumelwe banande beza ethempelini amalanga alikhomba ukuzokusizana nabarholabo. Labo-ke bekumaLevi begodu bebanikelwe ukuqala amarhayisi namadladla wendlu kaZimu." 
1Chronicles9:23 Bekuthi nabatjhayisako balale endlini kaZimu ngombana bebamele bayigade bebavule namasangwayo njalo ekuseni. 
1Chronicles9:24 Abanye babo gade baqale ipahla egade isetjenziselwa ukulotjha ethempelini. Gade babala iimpahlezo lokha nazingeniswako nalokha nazikhutjhwako. 
1Chronicles9:25 Abanye bebanikelwe umsebenzi wokutjheja enye ipahla yangethempelini okutjho ipahla ecwengileko, iflowuru esefiweko, iwayini, amafutha we-oliva, itjhwalo namakha." 
1Chronicles9:26 Kodwana bekubaphristi abathileko kwaphela ebegade bavunyelwe ukwenza umvango wamakha. 
1Chronicles9:27 UMatitiya umLevi olizibulo lakaTjhalumu umKhorarhi, gade abekwe bona abe mukiniyi wesikwa somnikelo." 
1Chronicles9:28 Abanye babomnakwabo abamaKhehathi gade baphethe umsebenzi wokulungisa isikwa esibekwa etafuleni qobe liSabatha. 
1Chronicles9:29 Labo abagade babavumi, baziinhloko zemindeni yamaLevi, bebahlala emalawini wethempeli lokha nabatjhayisileko ngombana gade kufuze bafunyanwe eduze nabafunwako ubusuku nemini." 
1Chronicles9:30 Boke labo bebaziinhloko zemindeni yamaLevi. Ngokuya ngokweenzukulwana, iinhloko zemindenezi bezihlala eJerusalema." 
1Chronicles9:31 EGibiyoni gade kuhlala uJehiyeli umsunguli weGibiyoni. Ibizo lomkakhe bekunguMaka. 
1Chronicles9:32 Amadodanakhe bekungu-Abidoni izibulo, uTsuri, uKhitjhi, uBhali, uNeri, uNadabi," 
1Chronicles9:33 uGedori, u-Arhiyo, uZakariya noMikhilothi." 
1Chronicles9:34 UMikhilothi wabeletha uTjhimiyamu. Nabo gade bahlala eduze kweenhlobo zabo eJerusalema. 
1Chronicles9:35 UNeri wabeletha uKhitjhi; uKhitjhi wabeletha uSawula. USawula wabeletha uJonathani, uMaliki-Tjhuwa, u-Abinadaba no-Etjhi-Bhali." 
1Chronicles9:36 Indodana kaJonathani bekunguMeribi-Bhali. UMeribi-Bhali wabeletha uMika. 
1Chronicles9:37 Amadodana kaMika kunguPitoni, uMeleki, uTarhireya no-Arhazi." 
1Chronicles9:38 U-Arhazi wabeletha uJara; uJara wabeletha u-Alemethi, u-Azimavethi noZimri. UZimri wabeletha uMotsa." 
1Chronicles9:39 UMotsa wabeletha uBhiniya onguyise kaRefaya uyise ka-Eliyasa onguyise ka-Atseli. 
1Chronicles9:40 U-Atseli gade anamadodana asithandathu, amabizwawo bekungu-Azrikhamu, uBhokeru, u-Itjhimayeli, uTjheyariya, u-Obadiya noRhanani. Boke labo bekumadodana ka-Atseli." 
1Chronicles10:1 AmaFilista gade alwa nama-Israyeli. Ama-Israyeli abaleka phambi kwamaFilista. Inengi lama-Israyeli lafa ngokurajalaliswa entabeni iGilibowa. 
1Chronicles10:2 AmaFilista amlala nje uSawula, abe abulala amadodanakhe uJonathani, u-Abinadaba noMaliki-Tjhuwa." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ipi yamrhagalela uSawula. Abadumuza ngemisubi bamfikela bamkhubaza okwesabekako. 
1Chronicles10:4 Nje-ke uSawula wathi kusonkhandakhe: “Rhwatjha isabulakho ungitlhofoze, kungabe kufike abarhedenaba bangirhubutjhe.” Kodwana usonkhande loyo wesaba khulu ukwenza lokho. Yeke uSawula wathatha isabulakhe wazidlhunya phezu kwayo." 
1Chronicles10:5 Kuthe lokha usonkhande nakabona bonyana uSawula ufile, naye wazidlhunya phezu kwesabula, wafa." 
1Chronicles10:6 USawula namadodanakhe amathathu bahlongakala. Yeke umndenakhe wahlongakala ngendlwana. 
1Chronicles10:7 Kuthe lokha ama-Israyeli agade ahlala ngemrhobeni nakabona bonyana ipi yawo ibalekile nokobana uSawula namadodanakhe bahlongakele, atjhiya imizawo woke abaleka. Kwaba kungena kwamaFilista azihlalela emizini leyo-ke." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ilanga emva kwepi amaFilista ahlubulisa iindumbu. Afunyana uSawula namadodanakhe barabhalele phezu kwentaba iGilibowa. 
1Chronicles10:9 Amhlubulisa aqunta ihlokwakhe ayithatha kanye neenkhande zakhe, athumela umlayezo enarheni yoke yamaFilista abika iindabezi kibosingazimu nebantwini bawo." 
1Chronicles10:10 Afaka iinkhande zakhe ngethempelini labosingazimawo, ihlokwakhe yona ayilengisa ngethempelini lakaDagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Kuthe bona kuzwakale kibo boke abantu beJabetjhi-Giliyadi lokho amaFilista akwenze ngoSawula," 
1Chronicles10:12 kwaphuma woke amadoda anesibindi ayokuthatha isidumbu sakaSawula nezamadodanakhe aziletha eJabetjhi. Bangcwaba iindumbezo ngaphasi komuthi omkhulu eJabetjhi, bebazila amalanga alikhomba balila." 
1Chronicles10:13 USawula wahlongakala ngombana angakhange athembakale kuSomnini, akhange abulunge ilizwi lakaSomnini. Ukudlula lapho waya esangomeni bonyana ayokuthukula." 
1Chronicles10:14 Akhange abuze indlela kuSomnini. Yeke uSomnini wamnikela ekufeni, bewathatha ubukhosi wabunikela uDavida umsa kaJese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Woke ama-Israyeli eza kuDavida eRhebroni afese athi kuye: “Siziingazi zakho. 
1Chronicles11:2 Eenkhathini ezidlulileko, uSawula asese yikosi, nguwe ogade udosa u-Israyeli ukuya epini. USomnini uZimakho wathi kuwe, ‘Nguwe ozakwelusa abantu bami u-Israyeli begodu nguwe ozakubusa abantu bami u-Israyeli.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Ngaleyondlela boke abaphathi bakwa-Israyeli beza ekosini uDavida eRhebroni. UDavida wenza isivumelwano nabo eRhebroni phambi kwakaSomnini; base bayamzesa-ke waba yikosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli njengombana uSomnini bekathembisa ngaphambilini ngoSamyela. 
1Chronicles11:4 UDavida nama-Israyeli woke barhwantela eJerusalema okuyiJebusi. AmaJebusi okubahlali bendawo leyo ngendabuko gade asese lapho. 
1Chronicles11:5 Izakhamuzi zeJebusezo zathi kuDavida: “Awuzukungena la!” Khonapho, uDavida wathumba ubuphephelo beZiyoni, okwathi ngemva kwesikhathi baba muMuzi kaDavida." 
1Chronicles11:6 UDavida gade athe: “Nanyana ngubani ozakusahlela amaJebusi qangi uzakuba yinduna ekulu yepi.” UJowabi umsa kaTseruya wenyuka qangi, yeke waba yinduna." 
1Chronicles11:7 UDavida wangena wahlala ebuphephelweni, kungalokho babizwa bona muMuzi kaDavida." 
1Chronicles11:8 Wakha izindlu kiyo yoke indawo ukusukela endundumeni ezombeleze ubuphephelo. Kanti-ke uJowabi yena, wavuselela idorobho elidala." 
1Chronicles11:9 UDavida wadlondlobala ngombana uSomnini uMninimandlawoke gade anaye. 
1Chronicles11:10 Lezi bekuziingorho ezibomaqhuzu zakaDavida ezahlala zithembekile embuswenakhe. Ngizo kanye no-Israyeli woke ezamenza bona abe yikosi njengombana uSomnini uZimu athembisa u-Israyeli. 
1Chronicles11:11 Nanti irhelo leengorho zakaDavida: UYatjhobiyamu umsa kaRhakimoni gade amrholi wesiqhema sabathathu esaziwako. Yena-ke wabulala amadoda amakhulu amathathu epini yinye ngomkhontwakhe. 
1Chronicles11:12 Hlanu kwakhe bekungu-Eliyazari umsa kaDodo umArhorhi ogade angomunye wesiqhema sabathathu. 
1Chronicles11:13 Yena gade anoDavida ePasi-Damimi lokha amaFilista ahlangene lapho ngepi. Kuyindawo lapha bekunesimu egcwele ibhali. Amabutho wama-Israyeli athi lokha nabalekela amaFilista," 
1Chronicles11:14 u-Eliyazari wajama phakathi kwesimu wayivikela. Wamadlha amaFilista phasi ngapha nangapha. USomnini wakwehlisa njalo-ke ukuhlula okukhulu. 
1Chronicles11:15 Ngelinye ilanga kwaphuma iingorho ezintathu kezimatjhumi amathathu, zehlela kuDavida edwaleni eliserholweni le-Adulamu, khonapho ipi yamaFilista yayihlome emrhobeni wamaRafa." 
1Chronicles11:16 UDavida gade angerholweni ngesikhatheso, umkhambathi wamaFilista useBhethe-Lehema." 
1Chronicles11:17 Nje-ke uDavida womela amanzi bewathi: “Uthi ngomile na, inga kungaba nomuntu ongayongikhelela amanzi wokusela emthonjeni ohlanu kwesango leBhethe-Lehema!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Yeke iingorho ezintathwezo zaratha hlangana kwamaFilista, zafese zakha amanzi emthonjeni ohlanu kwesango leBhethe-Lehema, zawaletha kuDavida. Kodwana uDavida wala ukuwasela, esikhundleni salokho wawathulula phambi kwakaSomnini," 
1Chronicles11:19 wathi: “Somnini, angeze bengithome! Kuzakuba ngathi ngisela iingazi zabantu abadele ukuphila kwabo. Iye, babeke ubuphilo babo engozini ngokungilethela wona.” Yeke uDavida akhange awasele. Zazinjalo-ke iindaba zeengorho ezintathwezi." 
1Chronicles11:20 U-Abitjhayi umnakwabo kaJowabi bekayikulu yesiqhema samatjhumi amathathu. Wabulala abantu abamakhulu amathathu ngomkhontwakhe. Ngalokho waduma njengeengorho ezintathu ezakhelela uDavida amanzi. 
1Chronicles11:21 Waduma khulu bewadlula iingorho ezimatjhumi amathathu. Waba yindunazo, kodwana idumo lakhe akhange lidlule lezintathu." 
1Chronicles11:22 UBhenaya weKhabitsiyeli umsa kaJehoyada, isihlabani sengorho, gade adume ngezinto ezinengi. Yena wamadlha amadoda amabili okuthiwa “mabhubezi wakwaMowabi.” Nguye godu owangena ngemgodini wabulala ibhubezi mhlana kukhithika igabhogo." 
1Chronicles11:23 Godu wamadlha itsitsirimba yomGibhide, ipesewula yendoda ephakeme ngamamitha amabili nesiquntu. UmGibhide gade anomkhonto owawufana nompherho womaluki esandleni sakhe, kodwana uBhenaya wamdumela kunjalo ngentonga. Wahluthula umkhonto esandleni somGibhide wambulala ngawo." 
1Chronicles11:24 Zazinjalo-ke iindaba zakaBhenaya umsa kaJehoyada; naye waduma njengeengorho ezintathu. 
1Chronicles11:25 Wahlonitjhwa khulu phakathi kwabamatjhumi amathathu, kodwana akhange abalwe kilabo abathathu. UDavida wambeka bonyana alawule amancusakhe." 
1Chronicles11:26 Ezinye zeengorho bekungu-Asayeli umnakwabo kaJowabi, u-Elirhanana umsa kaDodo weBhethe-Lehema," 
1Chronicles11:27 uTjhamothi umHarori, uRheletsi umPeloni," 
1Chronicles11:28 u-Ira umsa ka-Ikhetjhi weTekhowa, u-Abiyezeri we-Anatothi," 
1Chronicles11:29 uSibekayi umRhutjhathi, u-Ilayi umArhorhi," 
1Chronicles11:30 uMaherayi umNethofathi, uRheledi umsa kaBhana umNethofathi," 
1Chronicles11:31 u-Itayi umsa kaRibayi weGibeya kwaBhenjamini, uBhenaya umPiratoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 uRhurayi wemilanjaneni yeGatjhi, u-Abiyeli umAribhathi," 
1Chronicles11:33 u-Azimavethi umBharharumu, u-Eliyarhiba umTjhaliboni," 
1Chronicles11:34 uHatjhemu umGizoni, uJonathani umsa kaTjhage umHarari," 
1Chronicles11:35 u-Arhiyamu umsa kaSakari umHarari, u-Elifali umsa ka-Uri," 
1Chronicles11:36 uRheferi umMekera, u-Arhija umPeloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 uRhetsiro umKarameli, uNarayi umsa ka-Ezibhayi," 
1Chronicles11:38 uJuweli umnakwabo kaNathani, uMibirhari umsa kaHagiri," 
1Chronicles11:39 uTselekhi umAmoni, uNarharayi umBerothi usonkhande kaJowabi umsa kaTseruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 u-Ira umJitri, uGarebi umJitri," 
1Chronicles11:41 u-Uriya umHethi, uZabadi umsa ka-Arhilayi," 
1Chronicles11:42 u-Adina umsa kaTjhiza ogade ayihloko yakwaRubeni oweza namadoda amatjhumi amathathu," 
1Chronicles11:43 uRhanani umsa kaMaka, uJotjhafathi umMitini," 
1Chronicles11:44 u-Uziya umAtjhitera, uTjhama noJehiyeli amadodana kaRhothamu umAroweri," 
1Chronicles11:45 uJediyeli umsa kaTjhimri, nomnakwabo uJorha umTitsi," 
1Chronicles11:46 u-Eliyeli umMarhavi, uJeribhayi noJotjhaviya amadodana ka-Elinamu, uJitima umMowabi," 
1Chronicles11:47 u-Eliyeli, u-Obede noJasiyeli umTsoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Lawa-ke madoda eza kuDavida eTsikhilagi lokha nasazithukusileko ngenca kaSawula umsa kaKhitjhi. Wona bekaphakathi kweengorho ezazibasizi bakhe epini. 
1Chronicles12:2 KebakwaBhenjamini emndenini kaSawula kweza amadoda abosomisubela akwaziko ukudumuza ngomsebe begodu nakghona ukujikijela ngesarwayi ngazo zombili. 
1Chronicles12:3 Iinduna zabo bekungu-Arhiyezeri noJowatjhi okumadodana kaTjhema umGibeya. Abanye abeza kuDavida bekunguJezuweli noPelethi amadodana ka-Azimavethi, uBheraka, uJehu umAnatothi," 
1Chronicles12:4 uYitjhimaya umGibiyoni, ayingorho phakathi kwamatjhumi amathathu, godu amrholi wabamatjhumi amathathu. Abanye bekunguJoromiya, uJarhaziyeli, uJorhanana, uJozabadi umGedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 u-Eluzayi, uJerimothi, uBhehaliya, uTjhemariya noTjhefathiya umRharufi," 
1Chronicles12:6 u-Elikhana, uYitjhiya, u-Azareli, uJowezeri, uYatjhobiyamu umKhorarhi," 
1Chronicles12:7 uJuweli noZebadiya amadodana kaJerorhamu weGedori. 
1Chronicles12:8 Abanye bamaGadi batlherela kuDavida ebuphephelweni bakhe erhalawumbeni. Gade kuziingorho, ezinelemuko lepi begodu zihlome ngeenhlangu nemikhonto. Bezisabeka njengamabhubezi, zeqa njengamaqina eentabeni." 
1Chronicles12:9 U-Ezeri gade ayihloko, u-Obadiya kungowesibili ngokwesikhundla, wesithathu kungu-Eliyabu," 
1Chronicles12:10 uMitjhimana kungowesine, wesihlanu kunguJoromiya," 
1Chronicles12:11 u-Atayi kungowesithandathu, wekhomba kungu-Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles12:12 uJorhanani kungowobunane, wethoba kungu-Elizabhadi," 
1Chronicles12:13 uJoromiya kungowetjhumi, kuthi uMakibhanayi abe ngowetjhumi nanye." 
1Chronicles12:14 AmaGadi la bekuziinduna zepi: iinduna zekhulu neenduna zekulungwana. 
1Chronicles12:15 Kwaba ngiwo ayama iJordani ngenyanga yokuthoma mhlana igcwele ithwele iingodo. Abalekisa boke abantu abagade bahlala ngemrhobeni, abatjhingisa ngepumalanga nangetjingalanga yomlambo." 
1Chronicles12:16 BakwaBhenjamini abathileko namanye amadoda wakwaJuda beza kuDavida ebuphephelweni bakhe. 
1Chronicles12:17 UDavida waphuma wayobahlangabeza wafese wathi kibo: “Nakube nize kimi ngokuthula bona nizongisiza, khona sizakuba yirhara nomncamo. Kodwana nakube nize bona ningiyengele esitheni sami ukube izandla zami azinamlandu, sengasuthi uZimu wabobaba angakubona lokho anigwebe.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Nje-ke, kwehlela uMoya phezu kwaka-Amasayi induna yamatjhumi amathathu, wathi: “Davida, singabakho! Msa kaJese sinawe! Nako umnono, umnono phezu kwakho! Umnono phezu kwabasizi bakho! Iye, uZimakho akusize!” Yeke uDavida wabamukela wabenza abarholi beviyo lakhe lokusahlela." 
1Chronicles12:19 Amanye amadoda wakwaManase atlherela kuDavida lokha nakakhamba namaFilista bona alwe noSawula. (Eqinisweni uDavida nabantu bakhe akhange awasize amaFilista ngombana kwathi ngemva kokobana ababusi beemfunda zamaFilista sebakhulumisene bambuyisela emuva. Badlumbana bathi: “Phela nange umrhali lo angatlherela ekosinakhe uSawula, soke sifile.”)" 
1Chronicles12:20 Naka amadoda wakwaManase atlherela kuDavida lokha nakaya eTsikhilagi: ngu-Adinarha, uJozabadi, uJediyeli, uMikayeli, uJozabadi, u-Elihu noTsiletayi ebegade kuziinduna zekulungwana zakwaManase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ngibo abasiza uDavida ukusahlela isiqhema semigulukudu ngombana gade baziingorho boke begodu baziinduna zebutho. 
1Chronicles12:22 Imihla ngemihla amadoda eza bonyana asize uDavida, bekwafika lapha sele kunebutho elikhulu, iye ibuthokazi elingangobaba." 
1Chronicles12:23 Naka amanani wamadoda eza ahlomile kuDavida eRhebroni bona azokuphendulela umbuso kaSawula kuye njengombana uSomnini atjhwile: 
1Chronicles12:24 KebakwaJuda abagade bahlomele ipi ngesihlangu nomkhonto, bebaziinkulungwana ezisithandathu namakhulu abunane;" 
1Chronicles12:25 kebakwaSimiyoni ekuziingorho zepi bebaziinkulungwana ezilikhomba nekhulu; 
1Chronicles12:26 kebakwaLevi kuziinkulungwana ezine namakhulu asithandathu; 
1Chronicles12:27 sekufakwe noJehoyada omrholi womndeni wakwa-Aroni anamadoda aziinkulungwana ezintathu namakhulu alikhomba 
1Chronicles12:28 noTsadokhi isokana lengorho anabarholi abamatjhumi amabili nambili bomndenekhabo; 
1Chronicles12:29 kebakwaBhenjamini emndenini kaSawula bebaziinkulungwana ezintathu (bekube sikhatheso inengi labakwaBhenjamini lathembeka endlini kaSawula); 
1Chronicles12:30 kebakwa-Efrayimu ekuziingorho ezidumileko emindenini yekhabo, bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili namakhulu abunane;" 
1Chronicles12:31 kebakwaManase, okutjho isiquntu sabo, bebaziinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nabunane; bathunywe ngokomthetho bonyana bazokubeka uDavida abe yikosi;" 
1Chronicles12:32 kebakwa-Isakari, bebaziinduna ezimakhulu amabili zineenhlobo ezingaphasi kwazo; iindunezi bezinelemuko leenkhathi zokwenza izinto;" 
1Chronicles12:33 kebakwaZebuloni, ebebalungele ukuya epini, bebahlome ngemihlobohlobo yeenhlabano, babilelwa ziingazi begodu banehloso yinye yokusiza uDavida; bona gade kumadoda aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amahlanu;" 
1Chronicles12:34 kebakwaNafitali gade kuziinduna eziyikulungwana, zinamadoda aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nalikhomba ahlome ngeenhlangu nemikhonto;" 
1Chronicles12:35 kebakwaDani ebebalungele ukuya epini bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nabunane namakhulu asithandathu; 
1Chronicles12:36 kebakwa-Atjheri ebebalungele ukuya epini, bebaziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amane;" 
1Chronicles12:37 kebakwaRubeni, bakwaGadi nesiquntu sabakwaManase ukusuka ngepumalanga yeJordani bekumadoda aziinkulungwana ezilikhulu namatjhumi amabili, ahlome ngemihlobohlobo yeenhlabano." 
1Chronicles12:38 Woke lawo gade kumadoda wepi, alungele ukulwa; eza eRhebroni azinikele ngeenhliziyo kobana azokubeka uDavida abe yikosi ngaphezu kwaka-Israyeli woke. Nenengi loke lakwa-Israyeli belinehliziyo yinye yokubeka uDavida bona abe yikosi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Amadoda lawo ahlala eRhebroni amalanga amathathu aditjhe noDavida, asidla begodu asela ngombana abafowabo bakwaJuda bebabenzele imiphako." 
1Chronicles12:40 Ngitjho nabafowabo ababuya kude njengakwa-Isakari, kwaZebuloni nakwaNafitali beza baletha ukudla ngabodumbana, ngamakamela, ngemimeyila nangeenkabi. Bekunikelwe ngokwaneleko iflowuru, amakwapa wamakhiwani, amakhekhe wamakwapa wediribe, iwayini, amafutha we-oliva, iinkomo nezimvu ngombana gade kunokuthokoza kwa-Israyeli." 
1Chronicles13:1 UDavida wakhulumisana neenduna zakhe zeenkulungwana nezamakhulu, nazo zoke iinhloko." 
1Chronicles13:2 Kiyo yoke ihlangano yeenhloko zakwa-Israyeli wathi: “Nakube kuhle kini nebusweni bakaSomnini uZimethu, asiphadlhalaleni sifikise ilizwi kilo loke inengi labafowethu abasemikhawulweni yoke yakwa-Israyeli, nebaphristini nakumaLevi asemizini abelwe yona bona beze bazozihlanganisa nathi." 
1Chronicles13:3 Asihlanganeni ukuze sibuyisele umfaji kaZimu ngakithi ngombana emihleni kaSawula akhange siwukhathalele.” 
1Chronicles13:4 Ihlangano yavumelana yoke nesiphakamisweso ngombana abantu boke basibona silungile. 
1Chronicles13:5 Ngalokho uDavida wahlanganisa woke u-Israyeli ukusukela ephakgheni lomlambo weGibhide ngesewula ukuya eLebo-Rhamathi ngetlhagwini bona kususwe umfaji kaZimu eKhiriyathi-Jeyarimu. 
1Chronicles13:6 UDavida nabantu boke bakwa-Israyeli baya eBhala okuyiKhiriyathi-Jeyarimu yakwaJuda bona bakhuphule lapho umfaji kaZimu onguSomnini ohlala phezu kwamakerubhi; umfaji ogade umanyaniswa nebizo lakhe. 
1Chronicles13:7 Bathwala umfaji kaZimu bawususa endlini ka-Abinadaba ngekoloyana etja. U-Uza no-Arhiyo bekubatjhayeli bekoloyana leyo. 
1Chronicles13:8 UDavida nawo woke ama-Israyeli gade bagidinga ngamandlabo woke phambi kwakaSomnini. Bebavuma lokha nabancinza imihlobohlobo yamaharibha, bebabetha abosotjherere neewahlo begodu balilisa neemporompita." 
1Chronicles13:9 Nabafika eselelweni seKidoni, u-Uza welula isandla bona abambe umfaji ngombana ikoloyana yakhahlumezeka lokha iinkomo nazifika edwalenapho." 
1Chronicles13:10 Ubukhali bakaSomnini uZimu bavuthela u-Uza, wamradlha phasi ngombana gade athinte umfaji. Wafela khonapho phambi kwakaZimu." 
1Chronicles13:11 UDavida wakhathazeka ngombana uSomnini uphahlaze u-Uza. Yeke wathiya indawo leyo bona yiPeretsi-Uza. Ibizwelo lisajamile nanamhlanjesi. 
1Chronicles13:12 Mhlokho uDavida wesaba uZimu bewadlumbana wathi: “Alo, ngingawuletha njani umfaji kaZimu kwamapha?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Akhange asathatha umfaji bona uye kwakhe, eMzini kaDavida. Kunalokho wawuphambukisela endlini ka-Obede-Edomu umGathi." 
1Chronicles13:14 Umfaji kaZimu wahlala khonapho nomndeni ka-Obede-Edomu iinyanga ezintathu. Nje-ke uSomnini uZimu wabusisa umndenakhe nakho koke anakho. 
1Chronicles14:1 URhiramu ikosi yeTirosi wathumela iinthunywa kuDavida kanye neengodo zomsedari, abacozi belitje nababazi beengodo bona bakhele uDavida isigodlo." 
1Chronicles14:2 UDavida walemuka bona uSomnini uZimu umjamise bona abe yikosi kwa-Israyeli nokobana uphakamise umbuswakhe ngebanga labantu bakaSomnini, u-Israyeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 EJerusalema uDavida wathatha abanye abafazi bambelethela amadodana nabentazana abanye. 
1Chronicles14:4 Naka amabizo wabantwana abelethelwa bona eJerusalema: NguTjhamuwa, uTjhobabi, uNathani, uSolomoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 uJibirhari, u-Elitjhuwa, u-Elifelethi," 
1Chronicles14:6 uNoga, uNefegi, uJafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 u-Elitjhama, uBheliyada no-Elifelethi." 
1Chronicles14:8 Kuthe lokha amaFilista nakezwa bona uDavida uzeswe waba yikosi yama-Israyeli woke, aphuma ngendlwana bona ayomzuma. Lokha uDavida nakezwa ngalokho, waphuma bona awahlangabeze." 
1Chronicles14:9 Kwathi amaFilista sele afikile bona amlalele emrhobeni wamaRafa," 
1Chronicles14:10 uDavida wabuza kuZimu wathi: “Ngingawasahlela amaFilista la na? USomnini uzowanikela esandleni sami na?” USomnini wamphendula wathi: “Iye, yewukhambe ngizowanikela esandleni sakho.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Nje-ke uDavida neviyo lakhe bakhuphukela eBhali-Peratsimu, wafese wawahlula lapho. Wabe wathi: “Ngesandla sami uSomnini urhurhule izitha zami njengamanzi agobhoza arhurhule koke.” Ngebangelo, indawo leyo yabizwa bona yiBhali-Peratsimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 AmaFilista abaleka atjhiya abosingazimu bawo lapho; uDavida wayala bona babatjhise ngomlilo. 
1Chronicles14:13 AmaFilista abuya godu alalela uDavida emrhobeni. 
1Chronicles14:14 UDavida wabuza kuZimu godu, uZimu wamphendula wathi: “Ungakhuphuki unqophe kiwo, kodwana yewuwazombe ngemuva bese uwasahlela ngaphambi kwemithi yebhalisamu." 
1Chronicles14:15 Masinyana-nje nawizwa itjhada lamagadango ngaphezu kwemithi yebhalisamu, nje-ke phuma usahlele ngombana uZimu uzabe akhamba phambi kwakho bona amadlhe ibutho lamaFilista.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 UDavida wenza njengombana uZimu amyalile, barhayila amaFilista yoke indlela ukusukela eGibiyoni bekwaba seGezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Lanaba njalo-ke idumo lakaDavida enarheni yoke, noSomnini wenza bonyana izizwe zoke zimesabe." 
1Chronicles15:1 UDavida wazakhela izindlu eMzini kaDavida, walungisa nendawo yomfaji kaZimu bewawuhlomela netende." 
1Chronicles15:2 Nje-ke wathi: “Akakho namunye ongathwala umfaji kaZimu ngaphandle kwamaLevi ngombana uSomnini wakhetha wona bonyana athwale umfaji kaZimu nokobana alotjhe phambi kwakhe isiphelani.” 
1Chronicles15:3 UDavida wahlanganisa woke ama-Israyeli eJerusalema ngombana bekafuna ukuletha umfaji kaZimu eJerusalema lapha gade asele awulungisele khona. 
1Chronicles15:4 Wabiza iinzukulwana zaka-Aroni namaLevi bona zihlangane ndawonye: 
1Chronicles15:5 emndenini kaKhehathi bekunamadoda alikhulu namatjhumi amabili arholwa ngu-Uriyeli; 
1Chronicles15:6 emndenini kaMerari bekunamadoda amakhulu amabili namatjhumi amabili arholwa ngu-Asaya; 
1Chronicles15:7 emndenini kaGeritjhomu bekunamadoda alikhulu namatjhumi amathathu arholwa nguJuweli; 
1Chronicles15:8 emndenini ka-Elitsafani bekunamadoda amakhulu amabili arholwa nguTjhemaya; 
1Chronicles15:9 emndenini kaRhebroni bekunamadoda amatjhumi abunane arholwa ngu-Eliyeli; 
1Chronicles15:10 emndenini ka-Uziyeli bekunamadoda alikhulu netjhumi nambili arholwa ngu-Aminadaba. 
1Chronicles15:11 Nje-ke uDavida wabiza uTsadokhi no-Abiyatari abaphristi, kanye no-Uriyeli, u-Asaya, uJuweli, uTjhemaya, u-Eliyeli no-Aminadaba amaLevi," 
1Chronicles15:12 wathi kibo: “Ngini iinhloko zemindeni yamaLevi. Nje-ke nina nabafowenu amaLevi, zihlambululeni bonyana nilethe umfaji kaSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli lapha ngiwulungiselele khona." 
1Chronicles15:13 Ngombana akhange niwuthwale bona niwulethe kwekuthomeni, yeke uSomnini uZimethu usibhokele ngobukhali. Iye, akhange sibuze kuye bona singenza njani njengombana kujanyisiwe.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Nje-ke abaphristi namaLevi bazihlambulula ukuze bakhuphule umfaji kaSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli. 
1Chronicles15:15 AmaLevi athwala umfaji kaZimu ngeengodo emahlombawo, kwaba njengombana uMosi awayalile ngokuya ngelizwi lakaSomnini." 
1Chronicles15:16 Godu uDavida watjela iinhloko zamaLevi bona zikhethe abafowazo ababavumi bonyana bakhalele iingoma zethabo, babethe neenliliswa okumihlobohlobo yamaharibha neewahlo." 
1Chronicles15:17 Nje-ke amaLevi akhetha uHemani umsa kaJuweli, u-Asafa umsa kaBherekiya no-Etani umsa kaKhutjhaya. U-Asafa gade angewomndeni kaHemani. U-Etani umfowabo gade angewomndeni kaMerari. Abavumi abathathwaba gade bafanele balilise iiwahlo zekoporo. Isiqhema sesibili naso esimndeni gade kunguZakariya umsa kaJaziyeli, uTjhemiramothi, uJerhiyeli, u-Uni, u-Eliyabu, uBhenaya, uMaseya, uMatitiya, u-Elifelehu, uMikhiniya, u-Obede-Edomu noJehiyeli, abalindi. Esiqhemenesi, uZakariya, uTjhemiramothi, uJerhiyeli, u-Uni, u-Eliyabu, uMaseya noBhenaya gade bafanele balilise amaharibha ngesinara esiphezulu. UMatitiya, u-Elifelehu, uMikhineya, u-Obede-Edomu, uJehiyeli kanye no-Azaziya bekufuze basize ukudlala iharibha elinye elineenara ezibunane." 
1Chronicles15:18 UKenaniya ongomunye wabarholi bamaLevi gade amyeleli oqalene nokuthuthwa komfaji. Wanikelwa umsebenzi lo ngombana gade anelemuko lawo. 
1Chronicles15:19 UBherekiya no-Elkhana gade babalindi bomfaji. 
1Chronicles15:20 Abaphristi uTjhebaniya, uJotjhafathi, uNetaneli, u-Amasayi, uZakariya, uBhenaya no-Eliyezeri gade kufuze bavuthele iimporompita phambi komfaji kaZimu. U-Obede-Edomu noJerhiya nabo gade kufuze babe balindi bomfaji." 
1Chronicles15:21 Yeke uDavida nabaphathi bakwa-Israyeli kanye neenduna zekulungwana, bakhamba bayokunyusa umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini endlini ka-Obede-Edomu ngegido elikhulu." 
1Chronicles15:22 UZimu wasiza amaLevi kikho koke. AmaLevi agade athutha umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini, enza umhlabelo weenkunzi ezilikhomba namaqama angako." 
1Chronicles15:23 UDavida gade ambethe iphuraphura yelineni njengawo woke amaLevi athwala umfaji, nanjengabavumi noKenaniya ogade amyeleli wabavumi abathutha umfaji. Godu uDavida gade aleke ngenaka lobuphristi." 
1Chronicles15:24 Nje-ke woke u-Israyeli waletha umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini ngomkhulungwana wehlokomo, ngomdumo wepalapala neporompita, isiwahlo nangeenliliswa zemihlobohlobo yamaharibha." 
1Chronicles15:25 Kwathi lokha umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini nawusangena eMzini kaDavida, uMikali indodakazi kaSawula wahlola ngefesidere. Uthe nakabona ikosi uDavida igida ithamba, wayinyaza." 
1Chronicles16:1 Bathatha umfaji kaZimu bawungenisa ngetendeni uDavida agade alihlomele wona. Banikela ngemihlabelo yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano phambi kwakaZimu. 
1Chronicles16:2 Kuthe lokha uDavida nakaqeda ukunikela ngemihlabelo yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano, wabusisa abantu ebizweni lakaSomnini." 
1Chronicles16:3 Wanikela omunye nomunye umuntu wembaji nowengubo kwa-Israyeli isikwa esindulungu, amakwapa wesundu nawediribe." 
1Chronicles16:4 Wakhetha amanye amaLevi bona alotjhe phambi komfaji wakaSomnini, abonge, akhalele abe adumise uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 U-Asafa gade ayihloko, alandelwe nguZakariya. UJehiyeli, uTjhemiramothi, uJerhiyeli, uMatitiya, u-Eliyabu, uBhenaya, u-Obede-Edomu noJehiyeli bekufuze badlale imihlobohlobo yamaharibha. U-Asafa gade kufuze azwakalise iiwahlo;" 
1Chronicles16:6 uBhenaya noJarhaziyeli abaphristi bebafuze bavuthele njalonjalo iimporompita phambi komfaji wesivumelwano sakaZimu. 
1Chronicles16:7 Bekumhlokho lokha uDavida nanikela kokuthoma u-Asafa nesiqhema sakhe irhubo lokudumisa uSomnini elithi: 
1Chronicles16:8 Dumisani uSomnini, nibize ibizo lakhe; nazise izenzo zakhe phakathi kwezizwe." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mvumeleni ingoma, nimdlalele; babazani zoke izenzo zakhe ezikarisako." 
1Chronicles16:10 Zikhakhaziseni ebizweni lakhe elicwengileko; yenzani iinhliziyo zabafuna uSomnini zithokoze. 
1Chronicles16:11 Funani uSomnini namandlakhe; nifunisise ubuso bakhe njalonjalo. 
1Chronicles16:12 Khumbulani iimangaliso azenzileko, imikarisomraro neemiso azikhulumileko" 
1Chronicles16:13 nina nzukulwana zaka-Israyeli inceku kaSomnini, nina madodana kaJakopo okhethiweko wakhe." 
1Chronicles16:14 USomnini unguZimethu; iimiso zakhe zembethe iphasi loke. 
1Chronicles16:15 USomnini ukhumbula isivumelwano sakhe isiphelani, nelizwi ayala ngalo iinzukulwana eziziinkulungwana:" 
1Chronicles16:16 isivumelwano asenza no-Abrahamu, nesifungo asenza no-Isaka." 
1Chronicles16:17 Wasiqinisa kuJakopo saba mthetho, ku-Israyeli saba sivumelwano isiphelani." 
1Chronicles16:18 Wathi: “Jakopo ngizakunikela iKanana ibe sisabelo selifa lakho.” 
1Chronicles16:19 Lokha basesembalwa ngesibalo, iye, baseselidlanzana begodu baziinkhonzi kilo" 
1Chronicles16:20 bazulazula izizwe ngezizwe, bandinda nemibuso ngokuhlukahlukana." 
1Chronicles16:21 USomnini akhange avumele noyedwa bona abagandelele; nangebanga labo wakhalima amakhosi," 
1Chronicles16:22 wathi: “Ningathinti abazesiweko bami, ningahlunguphazi abaphorofidi bami.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Khalelani ingoma kuSomnini nina phasi loke, memezelani isindiswakhe imihla ngemihla." 
1Chronicles16:24 Zwakalisani iphazimulwakhe ezizweni, iimangaliso zakhe phakathi kwabantu boke;" 
1Chronicles16:25 ngombana mkhulu uSomnini, mbala ufanele ukudunyiswa, wesatjwa ngaphezu kwabo boke abozinyana." 
1Chronicles16:26 Iye, boke abozinyana bezizwe babosingazimu, kodwana uSomnini yena wenza amazulu." 
1Chronicles16:27 Iphazimulo nobukhosi kuphambi kwakhe, amandla netokozo kusesigodlweni sakhe." 
1Chronicles16:28 Nina zizwe, hloniphani uSomnini, nivume iphazimulo namandlakhe;" 
1Chronicles16:29 ninikele ibizo lakhe ihlonipho emfaneleko. Lethani umnikelo bese niza phambi kwakhe; khothamelani uSomnini nembethe izambatho ezihloniphekileko; 
1Chronicles16:30 thuthumelani phambi kwakhe nina zizwe zoke zephasi. Iye, iphasi linzinzile, angekhe lasikinywa," 
1Chronicles16:31 nje-ke amazulu akathokoze, iphasi lihlokome; izizwe azitjelwe kuthiwe: “USomnini uyabusa!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Ilwandle alibhodle nakho koke okungendenalo; ummango awujekezele nakho koke okukiwo. 
1Chronicles16:33 Nje-ke imithi yehlathi izakukhalela phambi kwakaSomnini, ngombana uyeza bona abuyisele koke esigeni." 
1Chronicles16:34 Dumisani uSomnini ngombana ulungile; iye, ithando lakhe ngelanini nanini." 
1Chronicles16:35 Yeke thandazani nithi: “Sisindisa Zimu wesindiswethu! Senyule hlangana nezizwe bonyana sidumise ibizo lakho elicwengileko, sibabaze iphazimulwakho." 
1Chronicles16:36 USomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli akaphakanyiswe bekube nini nanini.” Boke abantu bathi: “Amen! USomnini akadunyiswe!” 
1Chronicles16:37 UDavida watjhiya u-Asafa nabafowabo phambi komfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini bonyana balotjhe uZimu lapho isiphelani. Bekufuze balotjhe ngokweendingo zemihla ngemihla. 
1Chronicles16:38 Watjhiya no-Obede-Edomu anabafowabo abamatjhumi asithandathu nabunane. U-Obede-Edomu umsa kaJedutuni noRhosa bekubalindi. 
1Chronicles16:39 UDavida watjhiya uTsadokhi umphristi nabanye abaphristi abakanye naye phambi kwethaberinakeli lakaSomnini elisendundumeni eGibiyoni," 
1Chronicles16:40 kobana banikele imihlabelo yokutjhiswa kuSomnini phezu kwe-aldari njalo ekuseni nantambama mlibe. Bekufuze kwenziwe koke okutlolwe emthethweni kaSomnini ayala ngawo u-Israyeli. 
1Chronicles16:41 Abanye abagade banabo bekunguHemani noJedutuni nenengi labagade bakhethwe ngokomthetho bonyana babe ngabazokudumisa uSomnini bathi: “Iye, ithando lakhe lijame isiphelani.”" 
1Chronicles16:42 UHemani noJedutuni gade baneemporompita neewahlo kanye nemihlobohlobo yeenliliswa ebegade babhinela ngazo uZimu. Amadodana kaJedutuni gade abalindisango lethaberinakeli. 
1Chronicles16:43 Yeke boke abantu baphadlhalala kwaba ngiloyo naloyo waya kwakhe, uDavida naye wabuyela kwakhe bonyana abusise indlwakhe." 
1Chronicles17:1 Kuthe lokha uDavida nasele ahlezi anzinzile esigodlweni sakhe, wathi kuNathani umphorofidi: “Akhusuqale, mina ngihlezi ngesigodlweni somsedari ukube umfaji wesivumelano sakaSomnini wona usele ngetenjaneni.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 UNathani waphendula uDavida wathi: “Ikosami ayenze ngokubona kwayo ngombana uZimu unayo.” 
1Chronicles17:3 Ngobusukobo ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kuNathani lathi: 
1Chronicles17:4 “Khamba uyokutjela incekwami uDavida bonyana nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Akusuwe ozongakhela indlu kobana ngihlale kiyo." 
1Chronicles17:5 Mina akhange khengihlale ngendlini kusukela mhlana ngikhupha u-Israyeli eGibhide bekube namhlanje. Bengiseze ngigega netende kusukela kwelinye ukuya kwelinye, ngigelagela ethaberinakelini." 
1Chronicles17:6 Kiyo yoke indawo lapha bengikhamba khona no-Israyeli, nakhe nangizwa ngikhuluma komunye wabarholi engabayala bona beluse abantu bami ngambuza bonyana kubayini angangakheli indlu yomsedari na?’" 
1Chronicles17:7 Nje-ke tjela incekwami uDavida uthi, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimadlawoke: Mina ngakususa emadlelweni, ekweluseni umhlambi, ngakwenza bona ube mphathi wabantu bami u-Israyeli." 
1Chronicles17:8 Ngibe nawe nanyana kukuphi lapha uya khona, ngaphelisa nezitha zakho zoke phambi kwakho. Nje-ke ube ngomunye wabadumileko ephasini." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ngizokulungiselela isizwe sami u-Israyeli indawo, ngisinzinzise ukuze sibe nekhaya laso singasaphazamiseki. Iinkhohlakali azisoze zisasigandelela njengombana zenza ekuthomeni," 
1Chronicles17:10 nanjengombana zenza soloku ngakhetha ababusi phezu kwabantu bami u-Israyeli. Nezitha zakho zoke ngizaziguqisa. Ngimemezela kuwe bona ngimi engizakwakhela indlu. 
1Chronicles17:11 Lokha amalangakho sele aphelile sewuphumule kiboyihlomkhulu, ngizakuvusa isizukulwana sakho, omunye wamadodanakho. Ngizakuqinisa ubukhosi bakhe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Nguye-ke ozangakhela indlu, ngizakunzinzisa isihlalo sakhe isiphelani." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ngizakuba nguyise yena abe yindodanami. Angisoze ngasusa ithando lami kuye njengombana ngalisusa kiloyo okhambe ngaphambi kwakho. 
1Chronicles17:14 Ngizambeka ngaphezu kwabantu bami nangaphezu kombuswami isiphelani. Nesihlalo sakhe sizakujama isiphelani.’ ” 
1Chronicles17:15 UNathani wabikela uDavida woke amezwi wesambulo. 
1Chronicles17:16 Nje-ke uDavida wangena ngetendeni wahlala phasi phambi komfaji kaSomnini wathi: “Hawu Somnini, Zimami! Bengiyini mina nomndenami bonyana ungabe ungibeke ezingeni elingaka?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Kwangasuthi lokho bekungakaneli phambi kwakho, wena Zimu, wakhuluma godu nangelikusasa lomndeni wencekwakho. Iye, ungikhethile mina, thuli lehlabathi njengombana kutjho incwadi yomyalwakho, wangiphakamisa Somnini, Zimami." 
1Chronicles17:18 Alo-nje, incekwakho uDavida beyingathini okhunye ngehlonipho engaka ngombana wena, Somnini nguwe owazi incekwakho." 
1Chronicles17:19 Ngebanga lencekwakho nangentandwakho wenze izinto ezikulwezi bewenza bona zazeke. 
1Chronicles17:20 Akakho onjengawe! Njengombana sezwa ngeendlebe zethu, akakho uZimu ngaphandle kwakho." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ngubani-ke onjengabantu bakho u-Israyeli, isizwe ekukuphela kwaso ephasini uZimu aphuma ukuyosihlenga bonyana sibe babantu bakhe? Wazenzela idumo ngokwenza imikarisomraro emikhulu neyesabekako ngokuqotjha izizwe phambi kwabantu bakho owabahlenga eGibhide." 
1Chronicles17:22 Wenza u-Israyeli bonyana abe sisizwe sakho isiphelani begodu wena Somnini, waba nguZimakhe." 
1Chronicles17:23 Nje-ke Somnini, qinisa isithembiso owasenza ngencekwakho kanye nendlwayo isiphelani; wenze njengombana wathembisa." 
1Chronicles17:24 Ibizo lakho lizakunzinza belibe likhulu isiphelani bese abantu bathi, ‘USomnini uMninimandlawoke, obizwa bona unguZimu ka-Israyeli, mbala nguye uZimu ka-Israyeli!’ Nendlu yencekwakho uDavida izakujama inzinze phambi kwakho." 
1Chronicles17:25 Wena Zimami, wembulile encekwinakho bonyana uzayakhela indlu. Ngalokho incekwakho ifunyene isibindi sokuthandaza phambi kwakho." 
1Chronicles17:26 Iye, wena Somnini unguZimu! Incekwakho uyithembise intwehle le." 
1Chronicles17:27 Njengombana kube kuhle ukubusisa indlu yencekwakho, akube njalo phambi kwakho isiphelani. Lokha wena Somnini nawuyibusisako, izakubusiseka nini nanini.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Kwathi emva kwalokho uDavida wamadlha amaFilista bewawabusa. Wathumba iGathi nemizanayo wayikhupha ezandleni zamaFilista. 
1Chronicles18:2 UDavida waragela phambili wamadlha namaMowabi, aba ziinsebenzi zakhe, athela nemithelo kuye." 
1Chronicles18:3 Ngaphezu kwalokho wamadlha nekosi yeTsoba uHadadi-Ezeri hlanu kweRhamathi, lokha uHadadi-Ezeri nasendleleni bona ayokusungula umbuswakhe magegana nomlambo iYufrathe." 
1Chronicles18:4 UDavida wathumba kuye iinkulungwana zeenkarana zepi, iinkulungwana ezilikhomba zabakhweli beenkarana kanye neenkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili zamajoni weenyawo. Waqunta imisipha yeenjomani wazitjhiyela kwaphela ikhulu leenjomani ezibotjhelwako." 
1Chronicles18:5 Kuthe lokha ama-Aramu weDamaseku nakeza bonyana azokusiza uHadadi-Ezeri ikosi yeTsoba, uDavida wamadlha phasi iinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nambili zawo." 
1Chronicles18:6 Wajamisa iinqhema zamajoni embusweni wama-Aramu eDamaseku. Ama-Aramu asebenzela uDavida abe athela nemithelo kuye. USomnini wapha uDavida ukuhlula koke lapha akhamba khona. 
1Chronicles18:7 UDavida wathatha iinlanda zegolide egade kungezeenduna zakaHadadi-Ezeri waziletha eJerusalema. 
1Chronicles18:8 Ukusukela eThibirhathi neKuni ekumimizi egade ingeyakaHadadi-Ezeri, uDavida wabutha lapho ikoporo enengi kwamambala. Emva kwesikhathi ngekoporo leyo uSolomoni wenza ilwandle lekoporo, iinsika zethempeli nezitjana zoke zekoporo." 
1Chronicles18:9 Kuthe lokha uTowu ikosi yeRhamathi nakezwa bonyana uDavida uhlule loke ibutho lakaHadadi-Ezeri ikosi yeTsoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 wathumela uHadoramu indodanakhe ekosini uDavida uyokumbingelela nokumthokozisa ekwahluleni kwakhe ipi kaHadadi-Ezeri ngombana uHadadi-Ezeri bekahlala alwa naye. UHadoramu waphathela uDavida imihlobohlobo yezipho zegolide, zesiliva nezekoporo." 
1Chronicles18:11 Ikosi uDavida yanikela iziphezo kuZimu njengombana bekenzile ngesiliva negolide agade alithumbe kizo zoke izizwe azihlulileko. Izizwezi gade kuma-Edomu, amaMowabi, ama-Amoni, amaFilista nama-Amalekhi." 
1Chronicles18:12 U-Abitjhayi umsa kaTseruya wamadlha phasi itjhumi nabunane leenkulungwana zabakwa-Edomu ngemrhobeni weTswayi. 
1Chronicles18:13 Wajamisa iinqhema zamajoni kwa-Edomu. Ama-Edomu woke asebenzela uDavida. Ngambala uSomnini uZimu wapha uDavida ukuhlula koke lapha akhamba khona. 
1Chronicles18:14 UDavida wabusa phezu kwaka-Israyeli woke, wagweba ngokulungileko boke abeza kuye ngemiraro." 
1Chronicles18:15 UJowabi umsa kaTseruya gade amphathi webutho; uJehotjhafathi umsa ka-Arhiludi kungusosiba; 
1Chronicles18:16 uTsadokhi umsa ka-Arhitubi no-Abimeleki umsa ka-Abiyatari bekubaphristi; uTjhavitjha angumabhalana; 
1Chronicles18:17 uBhenaya umsa kaJehoyada gade aphethe amaKereti namaPeleti; amadodana kaDavida wona bekaziinkhulu ngehlangothini lakayise. 
1Chronicles19:1 Kwathi emva kwalokho uNarhatjhi ikosi yakwa-Amoni wahlongakala, uRhanuni indodanakhe waba yikosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles19:2 UDavida wadlumbana wathi: “Kungcono ngibe nomusa kuRhanuni umsa kaNarhatjhi ngombana uyise waba nomusa kimi.” Yeke uDavida wathumela abazenda bona bayomtjhiriyela uRhanuni ngoyise. Kodwana kuthe lokha abazenda bakaDavida nabafika kuRhanuni enarheni yama-Amoni bona bazomtjhiriya," 
1Chronicles19:3 abarholi bama-Amoni bathi kuRhanuni: “Ikosi icabanga bona uDavida uhlonipha usokosi kangangobana angabe athumele abantwaba bona bazokutjhiriya? Uthi amadoda la, akakezi nje bonyana azokuba botamlana abazokuhlola inarha kuthi emva kwesikhathi ayibhubhise?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Yeke uRhanuni wabamba abantu bakaDavida wabarhuna iinlevu. Waqunta izambatho zabo ngehla kwedini iinkhondo zaba semtarini, wabalisa-ke bakhamba." 
1Chronicles19:5 Kuthe lokha omunye nakatjela uDavida ngamadoda lawo, uDavida wathumela isigijimi bonyana sibahlangabeze ngombana gade barhubutjhwe kabuhlungu. Ikosi uDavida yathi: “Hlalani eJerikho iintjebe zenu bezikhule, emuva kwalokho nibuye-ke.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Lokha ama-Amoni nakalemuka bona atlhorholoje uDavida ngesidunwini, uRhanuni nama-Amoni wathumela isiliva elimakhilogremu aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nane eMesopotamiya, e-Aramu-Maka neTsoba bonyana kuyokucatjhwa iinkarana zepi nabakhweli bazo." 
1Chronicles19:7 Bacatjha iinkarana eziziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nambili, abakhweli bazo kanye nekosi yeMaka namabuthwayo. Labo beza bazokuhloma amatendabo hlanu kweMedeba, ukube ama-Amoni wona gade asahlanganisa amabutho ngemizinawo bonyana aphume ipi." 
1Chronicles19:8 Kuthe bonyana uDavida ezwe lokhu, wathumela uJowabi nebutho loke leengorho zamajoni." 
1Chronicles19:9 Ama-Amoni aphuma azihlela ngeenqhema esangweni ledorobho lawo, ukube amakhosi agade eze bona azokusiza asazihlalele emmangweni." 
1Chronicles19:10 UJowabi wabona bonyana ubhodwe yipi ngaphambili nangemuva, yeke wakhetha abomakadebona beembilinga kwa-Israyeli, wabahlela bona baqalane nama-Aramu." 
1Chronicles19:11 Wabeka inengi lamadoda ezandleni zaka-Abitjhayi umnakwabo bona liqalane nebakwa-Amoni. 
1Chronicles19:12 UJowabi wathi ku-Abitjhayi: “Nakube ama-Aramu anamandla kunami, ubuye uzongisiza; kodwana nakube ama-Amoni anamandla kunawe, ngizakusiza." 
1Chronicles19:13 Qina ndoda, silwele abantu bekhethu namadorobho wakaZimethu. USomnini uZimu uzakwenza akubona kulungile emehlwenakhe.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Yeke uJowabi nebutho lakhe baphuma basahlela ama-Aramu, bawahlula abe abaleka." 
1Chronicles19:15 Lokha ama-Amoni nakabona bonyana ama-Aramu ayabaleka, nawo abaleka phambi kwaka-Abitjhayi umnakwabo kaJowabi aziphosela ngaphakathi kwedorobho. Nje-ke uJowabi wabuyela eJerusalema." 
1Chronicles19:16 Emva kobana ama-Aramu abone bona ahlulwe ma-Israyeli, athumela iinthunywa bonyana ziyokuthatha amanye ama-Aramu angaphetjheya komlambo. Ama-Aramu la, arholwa nguTjhofaki induna kaHadadi-Ezeri." 
1Chronicles19:17 Lokha uDavida nakatjelwa lokhu, wahlanganisa woke ama-Israyeli wayama umlambo iJordani. Kuthe lokha uDavida nakafika kiwo, wahlela amabuthwakhe bona aqalane nama-Aramu. Kwathi lokha uDavida nasele alungele ukuwasahlela, ama-Aramu angena epini." 
1Chronicles19:18 Kodwana ama-Aramu abaleka phambi kwaka-Israyeli. UDavida wabulala iinkulungwana ezilikhomba zabakhweli beenkarana namajoni weenyawo amatjhumi amane weenkulungwana. Wabulala noTjhofaki indunabo yepi. 
1Chronicles19:19 Kuthe lokha amakhosi agade angaphasi kwakaHadadi-Ezeri nakabona bonyana ahlulwe ma-Israyeli, enza ukuthula noDavida bona abe ngaphasi kwakhe. Nje-ke ama-Aramu akhange asathanda ukusiza bakwa-Amoni godu." 
1Chronicles20:1 Kwathi nakuthoma umnyaka lokha amakhosi naphuma ipi, uJowabi waphuma nebutho lamajoni ukuyokulwa. Wabhubhisa inarha yakwa-Amoni, waragela phambili wavimbezela iRabha. UDavida yena wasala eJerusalema. UJowabi wasahlela iRabha wayitjhiya imarubhi." 
1Chronicles20:2 UDavida wathatha isihlohlo ebegade sisehloko yekosi yakwa-Amoni. Ubudisi baso bebumakhilogremu amatjhumi amathathu nane begodu ngaphakathi kwaso bekunelitje eliligugu. Sathweswa uDavida. UDavida wathatha ipango enengi yedorobhelo. 
1Chronicles20:3 Wakatelela abantu bedorobhelo bona bamsebenzele: Wabasebenzisa ngeensarha, ngamapeke wesimbi nangamazembe. Wenza lokhu kiwo woke amadorobho wama-Amoni. UDavida nebutho lakhe loke babuyela eJerusalema." 
1Chronicles20:4 Emva kwalokho kwaqubuka ipi namaFilista eGezeri. Ngesikhatheso uSibekayi weRhutjha wabulala uSipayi owabe ayitsitsirimba. Ngalokho amaFilista aguqiswa. 
1Chronicles20:5 Kenye ipi namaFilista, u-Elirhanani umsa kaJayiri wabulala uLarhimi ongumnakwabo kaGoliyathi umGathi. Umphini womkhontwakhe wawufana nompherho womaluki." 
1Chronicles20:6 Nakenye godu ipi eyaba seGathi, kwakunendoda ede enemino esithandathu esandleni ngasinye namazwani asithandathu enyaweni ngalinye, okumatjhumi amabili nane sekukoke. Naye gade ayitsitsirimba." 
1Chronicles20:7 Wathi lokha natlhorholoja ama-Israyeli, uJonathani umsa kaTjhimeya omnakwabo kaDavida wayibulala." 
1Chronicles20:8 Lezo bekuziinzukulwana zakaRafa weGathi, ezabulawa nguDavida neenduna zakhe." 
1Chronicles21:1 Umjamelani ogade afuna ukubangela u-Israyeli inyakanyaka watjitjizela uDavida bona abale ama-Israyeli. 
1Chronicles21:2 UDavida wathi kuJowabi neenduna zamabutho: “Khambani niyokubala ama-Israyeli kusukela eBheritjheba ngesewula ukuya eDani ngetlhagwini. Nibuye-ke nizongitjela umphumela bona ngazi bonyana mangaki.” 
1Chronicles21:3 Kodwana uJowabi wathi: “Kubayini-ke ikosami ifune ukwazi lokhu? UZimu angandisa isibalo samabuthwakhe sibuyelelwe ngamakhulukhulu kunalokhu esingikho kwanje? Kosami, Ndabezitha, amabutho lawo akasisesandleni sakho na? Alo, kubayini u-Israyeli kufuze athwale umlandu ngebanga lesenzwesi?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Kodwana uJowabi wabindeka ngependulo yekosi uDavida. Yeke waphuma wadabula kilo loke lakwa-Israyeli, emva kwalokho wabuyela eJerusalema." 
1Chronicles21:5 UJowabi wabikela uDavida isibalo samadoda wepi: Kilo loke lakwa-Israyeli bekunesigidi nekhulu leenkulungwana lamadoda akwazi ukulwa ngesabula, sekuhlanganiswe neenkulungwana ezimakhulu amane namatjhumi alikhomba wakwaJuda." 
1Chronicles21:6 Kodwana uJowabi akhange afake bakwaLevi nebakwaBhenjamini esibalweni sakhe ngombana gade akghabhudlhwa myalo wekosi uDavida. 
1Chronicles21:7 Begodu into leyo yaba yimbi phambi kwakaZimu; ngebangelo wamadlha u-Israyeli. 
1Chronicles21:8 Nje-ke uDavida wathi kuZimu: “Maye mina, ngone khulu ngokwenza into enje. Maye mina, ngonile ngesenzo samesi. Ngiyabawa, libalela umlandu wencekwakho. Ubudlhadlha abelatjhwa.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 USomnini uZimu wathi kuGadi umboni kaDavida: 
1Chronicles21:10 “Khamba uyokutjela uDavida bonyana nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Ngikwendlalela nanzi izinto ezintathu, khetha yinye yazo ekufuze ngikuhlunguphaze ngayo.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Nje-ke uGadi waya kuDavida wafese wathi kuye: “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Zikhethele:" 
1Chronicles21:12 iminyaka emithathu yendlala namkha iinyanga ezintathu usoloko ubaleka izitha zakho zikutsepunya ngesabulazo, nanyana amalanga amathathu wesabula kaSomnini okutjho isifo esizakwembatha inarha lokha ingilozi kaZimu ibhubhisa yoke imikhawulo yakwa-Israyeli.’ Yeke khetha ndoda bonyana kufuze ngibuyisele liphi kongithumileko.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 UDavida wathi kuGadi: “Ngisenyakanyakeni nanginje. Kungcono ngiwele ezandleni zakaSomnini ngombana yena umusakhe mkhulu; ngingaba yini ezandleni zabantu.” 
1Chronicles21:14 Yeke uSomnini warhadla u-Israyeli ngesifo, kwabhubha iinkulungwana ezimatjhumi alikhomba zamadoda." 
1Chronicles21:15 Nje-ke uZimu wathumela ingilozi ebhubhisako bonyana ibhubhise iJerusalema. Kodwana kwathi ingilozi isathi yenza lokho, uZimu wacabanga godu. Warhawuka ngebanga lamatlhuwo wathi engilozini leyo: “Kahle! Kwanele kwanjesi.” Ngesikhatheso ingilozi kaSomnini beyijame eselelweni saka-Orinani umJebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 UDavida waqala phezulu wabona ingilozi kaSomnini ijame emkayini phakathi kwezulu nephasi, iphethe isabulayo erhwatjhwiweko iyelulele eJerusalema. Nje-ke uDavida kanye nabaphathi bomuzi bembatha iinzilo bawa ngobuso ehlabathini." 
1Chronicles21:17 UDavida wathi kuZimu: “Zimami, ngimi oyale bonyana kubalwe amadoda wepi. Yeke ngimi okhohlakeleko ngokwenza isono esingaka. Abantwaba sezizimvu nje. Boneni kangaka? Maye Somnini, Zimami, yeke isandla sakho asibe phezu kwami nomndenami, kodwana isifo asingehleli abantu bakaZimu.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Ingilozi kaSomnini yatjela uGadi bonyana ayokutjela uDavida akhuphuke ayokwakhela uSomnini i-aldari eselelweni saka-Orinani umJebusi. 
1Chronicles21:19 Yeke uDavida wakhuphukela eselelweni saka-Orinani njemgombana uGadi amtjelile ngokuya ngelizwi lakaZimu. 
1Chronicles21:20 U-Orinani gade abhula ikoroyi, uthe lokha najika ngesileyi wabona ingilozi. Amadodanakhe amane agade anaye esaba, azifihla." 
1Chronicles21:21 Wathi u-Orinani nakaqalako wabona uDavida asiza kuye. Wasuka eselelweni wehla wafese waguqa phambi kwakaDavida wahloma ihloko phasi. 
1Chronicles21:22 UDavida wathi kuye: “Ngithengisela iselelo sakhwesi ukuze ngakhele uSomnini uZimu i-aldari khonapho. Ngalokho isifo sizakusuka ebantwini. Mina ngizakukhokhela sona ngemali ezeleko.” 
1Chronicles21:23 Kodwana u-Orinani wathi kuDavida: “Awa, ikosi ingasithatha. Begodu ikosi ingenza njengombana ithanda. Mina ngizakunikela iinkabi bona zibe mhlabelo wokutjhiswa bese kuthi iingodo zeenleyi ngizinikele zibe ziinkuni, nekoroyi yona ibe mnikelo weenthoro. Koke lokhu kuzakuba sisipho.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Ikosi uDavida yamphendula yathi: “Awa mntabantu! Ngizakukhoka inani elipheleleko. Angikwazi ukuthathela uSomnini uZimu okungokwakho nanyana nginikele umhlabelo wokutjhiswa ngalokho engikufunyene ngesihle.” 
1Chronicles21:25 Yeke uDavida wakhokhela indawo leyo ku-Orinani ngamakhilogremu alikhomba wegolide. 
1Chronicles21:26 UDavida wakhela uSomnini i-aldari lapho bewanikela imihlabelo yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano. Wathandaza kuSomnini, uSomnini wamphendula ngomlilo ovela ezulwini wehlela e-aldarini lokutjhisa imihlabelo." 
1Chronicles21:27 Nje-ke uSomnini wakhuluma nengilozi, yona yabuyisela isabulayo ngesikhwameni sayo." 
1Chronicles21:28 Ngesikhatheso uDavida nakalemuka bonyana uSomnini uphendule umthandazwakhe ngeselelweni saka-Orinani umJebusi, wathoma ukunikela imihlabelo khonapho." 
1Chronicles21:29 Itende lokuhlanganela egade lenziwe nguMosi erhalawumbeni, ne-aldari lokutjhisa imihlabelo bekusese sendundumeni eGibiyoni," 
1Chronicles21:30 kodwana uDavida akhange aphumelele ukuya lapho bonyana abuze kuZimu ngombana gade esaba isabula yengilozi kaZimu. 
1Chronicles22:1 UDavida wathi: “Nasi indawo yendlu kaSomnini uZimu neye-aldari lokutjhisa imihlabelo yakwa-Israyeli.” 
1Chronicles22:2 Yeke uDavida walayela bonyana kubizwe iinkhonzi egade zisenarheni yakwa-Israyeli. Wazikhetha bonyana zibe bacozi bamatje ukuze zilungise amatje abaziweko ukwenzela bona kwakhiwe ithempeli lakaZimu. 
1Chronicles22:3 Waletha isimbi enengi bona kwenziwe iinkhonkhwani zesango neenghamelo, kanye nekoporo enengi enobudisi obungalinganisekiko." 
1Chronicles22:4 Godu waletha iingodo zomsedari ezingangobaba ezathulwa maTsidoni namaTirosi ngobunengi kuDavida. 
1Chronicles22:5 UDavida wenza lokhu ngombana wadlumbana wathi: “Indodanami uSolomoni isakhula begodu isengakabi nelizwi. Ithempeli elizakwakhelwa uSomnini kufuze libabazeke ngobukhulu libe nedumo belikarise emehlweni wezizwe. Yeke ngimi ozakwenza amalungiselelo walo.” Ngalokho uDavida wancama wabhinca ngaphambi kobana ahlongakale. 
1Chronicles22:6 Nje-ke uDavida wabiza indodanakhe uSolomoni wayiyala bona yakhele uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli ithempeli," 
1Chronicles22:7 wathi: “Ndodanami, uyazi bekusehliziywenami bonyana ngakhe ithempeli ebizweni lakaSomnini uZimami." 
1Chronicles22:8 Kodwana kufike nanti ilizwi lakaSomnini lathi, ‘Wena sewuthulule iingazi ezinengi ephasini phambi kwami begodu izipi ozilwileko zinengi khulu. Ngebangelo awuzukwakha ithempeli ebizweni lami." 
1Chronicles22:9 Ngalokho uzakubeletha indodana; yona izakuba yindoda yokuthula ngombana ngizayinikela ukuphumula kizo zoke izitha zayo mahlangothi woke. Iye ibizo layo kuzakuba nguSolomoni, ngombana emihlenakhe ngizakwehlisela ukuthula nokuzotha phezu kwaka-Israyeli." 
1Chronicles22:10 Nguye-ke ozakwakha ithempeli ebizweni lami. Yena uzakuba yindodana kimi, mina ngibe nguyise kuye. Begodu ngizakunzinzisa ubukhosi bombuswakhe phezu kwaka-Israyeli isiphelani.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 Nje-ke ndodanami, inga uSomnini angaba nawe ukuze uphumelele wakhe indlu kaSomnini uZimakho njengokutjho kwakhe." 
1Chronicles22:12 Kwanga uSomnini angakupha ukuhlakanipha nokuzwisisa lokha nakakubeka bona wengamele u-Israyeli ukuze uphethe umthetho kaSomnini uZimakho. 
1Chronicles22:13 Nawuphetha iimiso nemithetho kaSomnini ayinikela uMosi ngebanga lama-Israyeli, uzakuba nepumelelo. Qina, ungapheli amandla; ungabi nevalo wesabe ukuragela phambili." 
1Chronicles22:14 Qala, ngithwele boke ubunzima kobana ngibonelele ithempeli lakaSomnini ngamakhilogremu aziingidi ezintathu namakhulu amane namatjhumi amabili nekhomba weenkulungwana zegolide, ngamakhilogremu aziingidi ezimatjhumi amathathu nane namakhulu amabili namatjhumi alikhomba weenkulungwana zesiliva, nangomhlumba wekoporo nesimbi enengi engalinganisekiko. Godu ngibonelele ngeengodo kanye namatje. Nawe-ke kufuze ungezelele kilokhu." 
1Chronicles22:15 Unamadoda amanengi ongawasebenzisa: abacozi bamatje, abakhi ngamatje, abafuleli kanye nenengi labososino bemihlobohlobo yemisebenzi yegolide, yesiliva, yekoporo nesimbi. Nje-ke thoma umsebenzi, uSomnini uzakuba nawe.”" 
1Chronicles22:16 Yeke uDavida wayala boke abarholi bakwa-Israyeli bona basize indodanakhe uSolomoni," 
1Chronicles22:17 wathi: “USomnini uZimenu unani ngombana uninikele ukuphumula mahlangothi woke. Iye, unikele izakhamuzi zendawo le esandleni sami, nje-ke abantu benarha le baseenyaweni zakaSomnini nabantu bakhe." 
1Chronicles22:18 Yeke funani uSomnini uZimenu ngeenhliziyo nangemiphefumulwenu. Thomani ngokwakha indawo ecwengileko kaSomnini uZimu ukuze kulethwe umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini neentlabagelo ezikhethekileko zakaZimu ngethempelini elizabe lakhelwe ibizo lakaSomnini.” 
1Chronicles23:1 Kuthe lokha uDavida nasele amdala angasakhanuki litho, wabeka indodanakhe uSolomoni bona ibe yikosi yakwa-Israyeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 Wahlanganisa boke abarholi bakwa-Israyeli, abaphristi kanye namaLevi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Wabala amaLevi abasele aneminyaka ematjhumi amathathu nokudlula. Bekuziinhloko zamadoda aziinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amathathu nabunane. 
1Chronicles23:4 UDavida wathi: “Phakathi kwamadoda la, iinkulungwana ezimatjhumi amabili nane zizakuqalana nokulotjha ngethempelini lakaSomnini, iinkulungwana ezisithandathu kube ziinkhulu nabagwebi," 
1Chronicles23:5 iinkulungwana ezine zibe balindisango bese kuthi iinkulungwana ezine zona zidumise uSomnini ngeenliliswa engazenzela bona adunyiswe ngazo.” 
1Chronicles23:6 UDavida wahlukanisa amaLevi ngeenqhema ukuya ngokwemindeni kaGeritjhoni, uKhehathi noMerari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Emndenini kaGeritjhoni kwavela imindeni kaLadani noTjhimeyi. 
1Chronicles23:8 Iinzukulwana zakaLadani bekumindeni kaJehiyeli ogade angoqakatheke khulu, uZethamu noJuweli; kwaba mindeni emithathu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Endodaneni kaJuweli enguTjhimeyi kwavela imindeni kaTjhelomithi, uRhaziyeli noHarana; kwaba mindeni emithathu." 
1Chronicles23:10 Iinzukulwana zakaTjhimeyi bekumindeni kaJarhathi, uZina, uJewutjhi noBheriya. Imindeni emine le gade iziinzukulwana zakaTjhimeyi." 
1Chronicles23:11 Umndeni kaJarhathi gade ungoqakathekileko, ulandelwe ngewakaZina. UJewutjhi noBheriya akhange babe namadodana amanengi, yeke babalwa njengomndeni munye banikelwa umsebenzi munye." 
1Chronicles23:12 Iinzukulwana zakaKhehathi bekumindeni emine elandelako: u-Amramu, uJitsihari, uRhebroni no-Uziyeli." 
1Chronicles23:13 Amadodana ka-Amramu kungu-Aroni noMosi. U-Aroni wahlukaniselwa bonyana esikhathini soke yena nesizukulwana sakhe baphathe iminikelo ezilwako. Bebamele batjhise itjhwalo phambi kwakaSomnini, bamlotjhe bebamemezele isibusiso ebizweni lakhe isiphelani." 
1Chronicles23:14 Iinzukulwana zakaMosi umuntu kaZimu zabalwa nengcenye yekoro yakaLevi. 
1Chronicles23:15 Amadodana kaMosi bekunguGeritjhomu no-Eliyezeri. 
1Chronicles23:16 Eenzukulwaneni zakaGeritjhomu, uTjhebuyeli gade angoqakatheke khulu." 
1Chronicles23:17 URerhabiya gade ayihloko yeenzukulwana zaka-Eliyezeri. U-Eliyezeri gade anganawo amanye amadodana, kodwana uRerhabiya waba namadodana amanengi." 
1Chronicles23:18 Eenzukulwaneni zakaJitsihari, uTjhelomithi gade angoqakatheke khulu." 
1Chronicles23:19 Eenzukulwaneni zakaRhebroni, uJeriya gade angoqakatheke khulu, wesibili kungu-Amariya, wesithathu kunguJarhaziyeli, uJekhameyamu angowesine." 
1Chronicles23:20 Eenzukulwaneni zaka-Uziyeli, uMika gade angoqakatheke khulu, kulandele uYitjhiya." 
1Chronicles23:21 Iinzukulwana zakaMerari bekumindeni kaMarhili noMutjhi. Amadodana kaMarhili bekungu-Eliyazari noKhitjhi. 
1Chronicles23:22 U-Eliyazari wahlongakala anganawo amadodana, anabentazana kwaphela. Abentazanabo bathathwa bomnakwabo okumadodana kaKhitjhi." 
1Chronicles23:23 Iinzukulwana zakaMutjhi bekumindeni kaMarhili, u-Ederi noJeremothi; kwaba mindeni emithathu." 
1Chronicles23:24 Laba-ke bekumindeni yamaLevi ebekumele basebenze ngethempelini lakaSomnini. Boke ebebangaphezu kweminyaka ematjhumi amabili ubudala babalwa, amabizwabo abe atloliswa eenqhemeni zomsebenzi ngaphasi kweenhloko zemindeni." 
1Chronicles23:25 Kwaba njalo ngombana uDavida wathi: “USomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli unikele abantu bakhe ukuphumula begodu uhlala eJerusalema isiphelani," 
1Chronicles23:26 yeke amaLevi nawo akusafuneki ahlale athwele ithaberinakeli nanyana enye into esetjenziselwa ukulotjha uSomnini.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Ngokuya ngomyalo wokugcina kaDavida, amaLevi gade abalwe kusukela kwabaneminyaka ematjhumi amabili ubudala nanyana ukudlula." 
1Chronicles23:28 Umsebenzi wamaLevi bekukusiza iinzukulwana zaka-Aroni ekulotjheni ngethempelini lakaSomnini: ukutjheja iinrhodlo zethempeli namarhayisi, ukuhlanza zoke izinto ezikhethekileko nokwenza eminye imisebenzi ephathelene nokulotjha endlini kaZimu." 
1Chronicles23:29 Bebatjheja izikwa ezibekwa etafuleni, iflowuru esefiweko yomnikelo weenthoro, izikwa ezirhwamuzelako, izikwa zedendeleko, ihlama nokulinganisa iinthako." 
1Chronicles23:30 Bekufuze njalo ekuseni bathokoze bebadumise uSomnini, nantambama benze soneso." 
1Chronicles23:31 Godu bekufuze benze njalo ngaso soke isikhathi lokha nakutjhiselwa uSomnini imihlabelo yokutjhiswa, ngamaSabatha, ngeminyanya yokuthwasa kwenyanga nangemigidi ejanyisiweko. Bekumele njalo nje isibalo esibekiweko samaLevi silotjhe ngethempelini lakaSomnini." 
1Chronicles23:32 Ngendlela leyo amaLevi enza imisebenzawo ngetendeni lokuhlangana nangendaweni ecwengileko. Enza lokhu asiza abafowabo okuziinzukulwana zaka-Aroni malungana nokulotjha ngethempelini lakaSomnini. 
1Chronicles24:1 Iinzukulwana zaka-Aroni gade zihlelwe ngeenqhema bunje: Amadodana ka-Aroni bekunguNadabi, u-Abihu, u-Eliyazari no-Itamara." 
1Chronicles24:2 UNadabi no-Abihu bahlongakala ngaphambi kokobana uyisabo ahlongakale. Gade banganabantwana, nje-ke u-Eliyazari no-Itamara balotjha njengabaphristi." 
1Chronicles24:3 Ngokusizwa nguTsadokhi isizukulwana saka-Eliyazari no-Arhimeleki isizukulwana saka-Itamara, uDavida wabahlukanisa ngokweenqhema zokulotjha." 
1Chronicles24:4 Iinzukulwana zaka-Eliyazari gade zineenhloko ezinengi zemindeni kunezaka-Itamara. Yeke iinzukulwana zaka-Eliyazari zahlukaniswa zaba ziinhloko zemindeni ezilitjhumi nesithandathu, kwathi iinzukulwana zaka-Itamara zaba ziinhloko zemindeni ezibunane." 
1Chronicles24:5 Bazihlukanisa ngefumbe ngokungakhethi ngombana bekunabarholi bezekolo, iinceku zakaZimu hlangana kweenzukulwana zaka-Eliyazari no-Itamara." 
1Chronicles24:6 Umabhalana uTjhemaya umsa kaNetaneli umLevi watlola amabizwabo ebukhoneni bekosi uDavida, iinkhulu, uTsadokhi umphristi, u-Arhimeleki umsa ka-Abiyatari naphambi kweenhloko zemindeni yabaphristi namaLevi. Kwakhethwa babili ngefumbe emndenini ka-Eliyazari, kwakhethwa munye emndenini ka-Itamara." 
1Chronicles24:7 Ifumbe yokuthoma yadla uJehoyaribi, yesibili uJedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 yesithathu yadla uRharimu, yesine uSeworimu," 
1Chronicles24:9 yesihlanu yadla uMalikiya, yesithandathu uMijamini," 
1Chronicles24:10 yekhomba yadla uRhakhotsi, yobunane u-Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 yethoba yadla uJetjhuwa, yetjhumi uTjhekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 yetjhumi nanye yadla u-Eliyatjhibu, yetjhumi nambili uJakhimu," 
1Chronicles24:13 yetjhumi nantathu yadla uRhupha, yetjhumi nane uYetjhebabi," 
1Chronicles24:14 yetjhumi nahlanu yadla uBhiliga, yetjhumi nesithandathu u-Imeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 yetjhumi nalikhomba yadla uRheziri, yetjhumi nabunane uHaphitsetsi," 
1Chronicles24:16 yetjhumi nethoba yadla uPetarhiya, yamatjhumi amabili uJerhezikheli," 
1Chronicles24:17 yamatjhumi amabili nanye yadla uJakini, yamatjhumi amabili nambili uGamulu," 
1Chronicles24:18 yamatjhumi amabili nantathu yadla uDelaya, yamatjhumi amabili nane uMazeya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Leli-ke lidlhego abahlelwa ngalo lokha nabangena ethempelini lakaSomnini uZimu bona balotjhe. Kwaba ngendlela uyise u-Aroni abayala ngayo, ukuya ngomyalo kaSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli." 
1Chronicles24:20 Iinzukulwana ezinye zakaLevi nazo bezihlelwe ngeenqhema: eenzukulwaneni zaka-Amramu kwakhutjhwa isiqhema sakaTjhubayeli, emadodaneni kaTjhubayeli kwakhutjhwa sakaJerhideya;" 
1Chronicles24:21 eenzukulwaneni zakaRerhabiya kwakhutjhwa isiqhema sakaYitjhiya oyihloko yomndeni; 
1Chronicles24:22 eenzukulwaneni zakaJitsihari kwakhutjhwa isiqhema sakaTjhelomothi, emadodaneni kaTjhelomothi kwakhutjhwa sakaJarhathi;" 
1Chronicles24:23 eenzukulwaneni zakaRhebroni kwakhutjhwa isiqhema sakaJeriya oyihloko, alanywe ngu-Amariya, wesithathu kunguJarhaziyeli, wesine kunguJekhamamu;" 
1Chronicles24:24 eenzukulwaneni zaka-Uziyeli kwakhutjhwa isiqhema sakaMika, emadodaneni kaMika kwakhutjhwa sakaTjhamiri;" 
1Chronicles24:25 eenzukulwaneni zakaYitjhiya umnakwabo kaMika, kwakhutjhwa isiqhema sakaZakariya." 
1Chronicles24:26 UMarhili noMutjhi bekumadodana kaMerari; eenzukulwaneni zakaJaziya umzukulu kaMerari, kwakhutjhwa iinqhema zakaTjhohamu, uZakuri no-Ibri;" 
1Chronicles24:27 u-Eliyazari bekuyindodana kaMarhili, kodwana gade anganamadodana;" 
1Chronicles24:28 eenzukulwaneni zakaKhitjhi kwakhutjhwa isiqhema sakaJerarhimiyeli; 
1Chronicles24:29 eenzukulwaneni zakaMutjhi kwakhutjhwa iinqhema zakaMarhili, u-Ederi noJerimothi. Ngilezo-ke iinqhema zamaLevi ngokwemindenawo." 
1Chronicles24:30 Nawo-ke aphosa ifumbe njengabomnakwabo okuziinzukulwana zaka-Aroni benza lokho ebukhoneni bekosi uDavida, uTsadokhi, u-Arhimeleki naphambi kweenhloko zemindeni yabaphristi namaLevi. Lokhu bekwenziwa ngokungakhethi phakathi komndeni waloyo oyihloko nowabamlamako." 
1Chronicles25:1 UDavida kanye neenduna zebutho bahlukanisela amadodana ka-Asafa, uHemani noJedutunu bona aphorofide ancinze imihlobohlobo yamaharibha neewahlo. Nanti-ke irhelo lamadoda agade enza umsebenzi lo:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Emadodaneni ka-Asafa bekunguZakuru, uJosefa, uNetaniya no-Asarela. Amadodana ka-Asafa aphekelela uyise ngomvumo lokha naphorofida ngaphasi kwelihlo lekosi uDavida." 
1Chronicles25:3 Emadodaneni kaJedutunu bekunguGedaliya, uTseri, u-Isaya, uTjhimeyi, uRhatjhabiya noMatitiya, babathandathu sebaboke. Baphekelela uyise uJedutunu ngamaharibha lokha naphorofida ngokuthokoza nangokudumisa uSomnini uZimu." 
1Chronicles25:4 Emadodaneni kaHemani bekunguBhukhiya, uMathaniya, u-Uziyeli, uTjhebuweli, uJerimothi, uRhananiya, uRhanani, u-Eliyata, uGidalithi, uRomamithi-Ezeri, uYotjhibekhatjha, uMalothi, uHotiri noMarhaziwothi." 
1Chronicles25:5 Woke lawo bekumadodana kaHemani umboni wekosi uDavida. UZimu wathembisa uHemani bonyana uzamphakamisa, yeke wamupha amadodana alitjhumi nane namadodakazi amathathu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Woke amadodana lawo aphekelela uyise ethempelini lakaSomnini uZimu ngomvumo ancinza iiwahlo nemihlobohlobo yamaharibha kobana kulotjhwe ngethempelini lakaZimu. U-Asafa, uJedutunu noHemani bona bebangaphasi kwelihlo lekosi uDavida." 
1Chronicles25:7 Bona sebahlangene neenhlobo zabo ebezibanduliwe begodu zinekghono lokukhalelela uSomnini uZimu, bebamakhulu amabili namatjhumi abunane nabunane." 
1Chronicles25:8 Kwenziwa ifumbe malungana nomsebenzabo ngaphandle kokukhetha omkhulu nomncani, umfundisi nomfundi." 
1Chronicles25:9 Ifumbe yokuthoma emndenini ka-Asafa yadla uJosefa. Yesibili yadla uGedaliya. Yena nabafowabo kanye namadodanakhe bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke. 
1Chronicles25:10 Yesithathu yadla uZakuru, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:11 Yesine yadla uJitsiri, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:12 Yesihlanu yadla uNetaniya, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:13 Yesithandathu yadla uBhukiya, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:14 Yekhomba yadla uJesarela, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:15 Yobunane yadla u-Isaya, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:16 Yethoba yadla uMataniya, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:17 Yetjhumi yadla uTjhimeyi, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:18 Yetjhumi nanye yadla u-Azariyeli, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:19 Yetjhumi nambili yadla uRhatjhabiya, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:20 Yetjhumi yadla uTjhubayeli, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:21 Yetjhumi nane yadla uMatitiya, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:22 Yetjhumi nahlanu yadla uJerimothi, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:23 Yetjhumi nathandathu yadla uRhananiya, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:24 Yetjhumi nalikhomba yadla uYotjhibekhatjha, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:25 Yetjhumi nabunane yadla uRhanani, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:26 Yetjhumi nethoba yadla uMalothi, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:27 Yamatjhumi amabili yadla u-Eliyata, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:28 Yamatjhumi amabili nanye yadla uHotiri, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:29 Yamatjhumi amabili nambili yadla uGidalithi, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:30 Yamatjhumi amabili nantathu yadla uMarhaziwothi, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles25:31 Yamatjhumi amabili nane yadla uRomamithi-Ezeri, amadodanakhe nabafowabo, bebalitjhumi nambili sebaboke." 
1Chronicles26:1 Iinqhema zabalindisango bezijame bunje: Emndenini kaKhorarhi bekunguMetjhelemiya umsa kaKhore osizukulwana saka-Asafa. 
1Chronicles26:2 Amadodana kaMetjhelemiya bekunguZakariya izibulo, alanywa nguJediyaheli, wesithathu kunguZebadiya, wesine kunguJatiniyeli," 
1Chronicles26:3 wesihlanu kungu-Elamu, wesithandathu kunguJehorhanani wekhomba kungu-Eliyehowenayi." 
1Chronicles26:4 Amadodana ka-Obede-Edomu bekunguTjhemaya olizibulo alanywa nguJehozabadi, wesithathu kunguJowarhi, wesine kunguSakari, wesihlanu kunguNetaneli," 
1Chronicles26:5 wesithandathu kungu-Amiyeli, wekhomba kungu-Isakari noPewuletayi wobunane. UZimu gade ambusisile u-Obede-Edomu." 
1Chronicles26:6 UTjhemaya umsa ka-Obede-Edomu naye gade anamadodana. Amadodana lawo bekabarholi emndenini kayise ngombana gade kuziingorho. 
1Chronicles26:7 Amadodana kaTjhemaya bekungu-Otini, uRefayeli, u-Obede no-Elizabadi; iinhlobo zakaTjhemaya u-Elihu noSemakiya bekumadoda anekghono." 
1Chronicles26:8 Zoke iinzukulwana zaka-Obede-Edomu lezo, zona namadodanazo nabafowazo bekumadoda anetlha nanamandla ekusebenzeni. Sezizoke bezimatjhumi asithandathu nambili." 
1Chronicles26:9 UMetjhelemiya gade anamadodana nabafowabo, kumadoda anekghono. Bebalitjhumi nabunane sebaboke." 
1Chronicles26:10 URhosa osizukulwana sakaMerari gade anamadodana alandelako: uTjhimri (owathi nanyana angasilo izibulo, uyise wamenza ihloko yomndeni)," 
1Chronicles26:11 alanywa nguRhilikhiya, wesithathu kunguThebaliya, wesine kunguZakariya. Amadodana nabafowabo kaRhosa bebalitjhumi nantathu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Iinqhema zabalindisangwezi, ngokurholwa ziinduna zazo, gade zenza imisebenzi yokulotjha ethempelini lakaSomnini njengombana gade kwenza iinhlobo zazo." 
1Chronicles26:13 Isango nesango lenzelwa ifumbe ngokwemindeni emikhulu nemincani ngokufanako. 
1Chronicles26:14 Kwathi lokha nakuphoswa iimfumbe, zawa ngendlela le: Ifumbe yesango langepumalanga yadla uTjhelemiya. Ifumbe yesango langetlhagwini yadla indodana kaTjhelemiya uZakariya obegade amluleki ohlakaniphileko." 
1Chronicles26:15 Ifumbe yesango langesewula yadla u-Obede-Edomu. Ifumbe yeenlulu yadla amadodanakhe. 
1Chronicles26:16 Ifumbe yesango langetjingalanga nendleleni ekhuphukela esangweni leTjhalekethi yadla uTjhupimu noRhosa. Iindlwana zabalindaba bezisemaduzana. 
1Chronicles26:17 Imihla ngemihla bekugada amaLevi asithandathu ngepumalanga yethempeli, amane ngetlhagwini, amane ngesewula. Isilulu ngasinye besigadwa babantu ababili." 
1Chronicles26:18 Abane bagada indlela eya emathurini ngetjingalanga yethempeli, ababili bagada ngemathurini." 
1Chronicles26:19 Labo-ke bekuziinqhema zabalindisango ebegade baziinzukulwana zakaKhorarhi noMerari. 
1Chronicles26:20 AmaLevi amanye gade aqalene nokuphathwa kweenlulu zethempeli lakaZimu neenlulu zeminikelo ekhethekileko. 
1Chronicles26:21 Iinlulwezi bezisesandleni seenhloko zomndeni kaLadani osizukulwana sakaGeritjhoni ngoJerhiyeli. 
1Chronicles26:22 UZetamu umsa kaJerhiyeli noJuweli umnakwabo gade balawula iinlulu zethempeli lakaSomnini. 
1Chronicles26:23 Godu bezisesandleni semindeni ka-Amrami, uJitsihari, uRhebroni no-Uziyeli:" 
1Chronicles26:24 UTjhebuyeli isizukulwana sakaGeritjhoni umsa kaMosi gade asikhulu esengamele amagugu. 
1Chronicles26:25 U-Eliyezeri umnakwabo kaTjhebuyeli bekunguyise kaRerhabiya onguyise ka-Isaya, uyise kaJoramu, onguyise kaZikiri, uyise kaTjhelomithi." 
1Chronicles26:26 UTjhelomithi lo neenhlobo zakhe gade bengamele yoke iminikelo ekhethekileko eyahlukaniselwa yikosi uDavida, iinhloko zemindeni, iinduna zeenkulungwana, iinduna zamakhulu kanye nezinye iinduna zamabutho." 
1Chronicles26:27 Enye yepango eyahlangulwa epini bayinikelela ukutjhejwa kwethempeli lakaSomnini. 
1Chronicles26:28 Yoke into eyahlukaniselwa nguSamyela umboni, noSawula umsa kaKhitjhi, u-Abineri umsa kaNeri noJowabi umsa kaTseruya nazo zoke izinto ezazihlukaniselweko, gade zisesandleni sakaTjhelomithi neenhlobo zakhe." 
1Chronicles26:29 Emndenini kaJitsihari uKenaniya neenzukulwana zakhe gade banikelwe umsebenzi ongaphandle kwethempeli kilo loke lakwa-Israyeli kobana babe batjheji nabagwebi. 
1Chronicles26:30 Emndenini kaRhebroni uRhatjhabiya neenhlobo zakhe okumadoda anekghono ayikulungwana namakhulu alikhomba, gade batjheje umsebenzi wezokuphathwa kwa-Israyeli ngetjingalanga yeJordani okutjho ukuphelelisa yoke imisebenzi kaZimu neyekosabo." 
1Chronicles26:31 Emndenini kaRhebroni uJeriya gade ayihloko. Kwathi ngomnyaka wamatjhumi amane wokubusa kwakaDavida, kwenziwa irhubhululo, kwafunyanwa hlangana kweenzukulwana nemindeni yakwaRhebroni amadoda aziingorho eJazeri eGiliyadi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Iinhlobo zakaJeriya gade kumadoda anekghono. Iinhloko zemindenazo beziziinkulungwana ezimbili namakhulu alikhomba. Wona-ke ikosi uDavida yawabeka phezu kwebakwaRubeni, bakwaGadi naphezu kwesiquntu sekoro yabakwaManase mayelana nazo zoke iindaba zakaZimu nekosabo." 
1Chronicles27:1 Kwenziwa irhelo lama-Israyeli ngokweenhloko zemindeni, iinduna zeenkulungwana, zamakhulu kanye nabatjheji bazo.
