Job5:21 Uzakuvikeleka elimini elinesihlungu, ungesabi ukubhujiswa nakukufikelako." 
Job5:22 Uzakuhleka ukubhujiswa nendlala, angeze waba nevalo ngeembandana zephasi;" 
Job5:23 ngombana uzakuba nesivumelwano neenlwana, iimbandana zommango zilawulwe nguwe." 
Job5:24 Uzakwazi bonyana itende lakho liphephile, nawuhlola ipahlakho, kungabikho elahlekileko." 
Job5:25 Godu uzakwazi bona iinzukulwana zakho zizakwanda, nabantwabakho bahlume njengotjani ehlabathini." 
Job5:26 Ithuna lakho lizakwamukela sele ukhulile, kube njengesithala sekoroyi nasiwela eselelweni ngesikhathi sakhona." 
Job5:27 Iye, sikuhlolile lokhu, yeke kuliqiniso. Kulalele, ulemuke bese uyakusebenzisa.”" 
Job6:1 UJobho waphendula wathi: 
Job6:2 “Maye, thana isizi lami liyalinganiseka! Nehlekelelami ibekwe esilinganisweni sinye!" 
Job6:3 Kokubili bekuzakuba budisi kunetjhwabatjhwaba yelwandle! Kungebangelo ngikhuluma ngehliziyo ebuhlungu: 
Job6:4 Ngambala imisubela kaZimu oSabekako ingihlabile, ummoyami urhamula isihlungu sayo, ukwesabeka kwakaZimu kuyangiqoba." 
Job6:5 Udumbana webaleni uyalila nakunotjani na? Nekomo iyalila nayinefuru na? 
Job6:6 Okunganandiphiko kungagomeka kunganatswayi na? Kunokunandipha ebumhlopheni beqanda na? 
Job6:7 Umphimbami uyala ukukwamukela, amezwenu afana nokugoma okungigonyulukisako." 
Job6:8 “Inga ngingazwakalisa isibawo sami, uZimu angiphe engikurhuluphelako." 
Job6:9 Kwanga uZimu angangipitliza asuse isandla sakhe, uqunte intambo yepilwami!" 
Job6:10 Lokho-ke kuzangiduduza godu; ngithabe nanyana ngisebuhlungwini. Akazukungibabalela ngombana azange ngigodle amezwi woCwengileko. 
Job6:11 Anginamandla wokulinda, anginasikhathi sokwelula ipilwami!" 
Job6:12 Ngiqine njengelitje na? Inyamami yikoporo na? 
Job6:13 Ngambala anginamdlandla nepumelelo itjhabalalisiwe kimi. 
Job6:14 “Kulihlazo emuntwini onyelelela umnganakhe, onjalo udela ukwesaba uZimu oSabekako." 
Job6:15 Abafowethu abathembeki, banjengomlanjana wesikhatjhana, iye, bamilanjana egeleza ebusika:" 
Job6:16 Balithunzi elimnyama nerhwaba, kibo kuzifihla iliqhwa." 
Job6:17 Kuthi nakuthoma ukutjhisa banyamalale, nakutjhisako banyelele endawenabo." 
Job6:18 Imilanjana leyo iphumbutha indlelayo, iphelele erhalawumbeni bese iyanyamalala." 
Job6:19 Imilandelande yeTema yazuma imilanjana leyo; idwendwe elisuka eTjheba larhuluphela amanzayo. 
Job6:20 Ladana ethembeni lalo, lafika lapho lakhungatheka." 
Job6:21 Ninjalo-ke nina kimi: Lokha nanibona ihlekelele, niyacimela." 
Job6:22 “Nikhe nangizwa ngitjho okulandelako na? ‘Yeningiphe okuthileko! Ngisikelani emnonwenenu ukuze ngifumbathise! 
Job6:23 Ngenyelani esandleni somjamelani!’ namkha, ‘Ngihlengani ezandleni zeenrhonga!’" 
Job6:24 Yeke ngifundisani, khona ngizakuthula, ningibonise bona ngiyitjhaphe kuphi." 
Job6:25 Iqiniso alibulali! Kodwana ukungisola kwenu akusizi. 
Job6:26 Nidlumbana bona ningakhalima ngamezwi lokha nanithatha amezwi womuntu odangeleko njengommoya na? 
Job6:27 Nenza ifumbe ngentandani, nenaniselane ngomnganenu!" 
Job6:28 Akhe ningiqale emehlweni. Ngiyafunga, angeze nganikhohlisa!" 
Job6:29 Akhe niphenduke ngiyanibawa, akungabi nobumbi. Iye, phendukani! Indabami inetlha," 
Job6:30 akukho ukonakala elimini lami, ngiyizwile ihlekelele bona injani!”" 
Job7:1 “Umuntu obhubhako akadosi emhlweni ephasinapha na? Amalangakhe akasinjengowomqatjhwa? 
Job7:2 Iye, unjengekhoboka elirhuluphela ukuphola kwelanga, nomqatjhwa olubalubela umrholwakhe." 
Job7:3 Ngaleyondlela, nami ngabelwe iinyanga ezinganamvuzo, ngalinganiselwa amatshwenyeko ubusuku nobusuku." 
Job7:4 Nangilalako ngithi, ‘Kazi ngiyokuvuka nini?’ Ubusuku bungilethele ukuwurubajeka ngihlubayele bekube ngamarimarima." 
Job7:5 Inyamami yembethwe ziimbungu nesila; isikhumba sami siyakokorana, sikhune." 
Job7:6 Amalangami ayarhaba ukuphela kunentambo yomluki, iye, afika ekupheleni kunganathemba." 
Job7:7 “Khumbula bona ipilwami semuphefumulo; amehlwami angeze asabona ubuhle. 
Job7:8 Ilihlo elingiqalileko alisazongibona; amehlwakho azangifuna angasangifumani. 
Job7:9 Njengelifu nalinyamalalako, unjalo nowehlela ethuneni, akasabuyi." 
Job7:10 Akasabuyeli ekumbenakhe, abantu bekhabo angeze basambona." 
Job7:11 “Ngalokho angeze ngavala umlomami; ngifuna ukukhuluma esizini lomphefumulwami, nginghonghoyile ebumunywini behliziywami." 
Job7:12 Ngililwandle nanyana unomrhaso welwandle kobana ungabeze ungibekele umlindi na? 
Job7:13 Nangithi, ‘Icasi lami lizangiduduza, umbhedami unciphise isinghonghoyilo sami’," 
Job7:14 wena ungisabisa ngamabhudango, ungihlunguphaze ngemibono." 
Job7:15 Ngalokho ngikhethe ukukghanywa nokufa kunomzimbami lo. 
Job7:16 Kwanje sengiphosele itewu, angeze ngisaphila ukuyaphi. Akhe ungisuduke ngombana amalanga ayile." 
Job7:17 Kubayini obhubhako aqakathekile kuwe, kobana ungabeze umtjheje na?" 
Job7:18 Umkhambela njalo ekuseni, umzizinye umzuzu nomzuzu!" 
Job7:19 Uzongirhudulela amehlo bekube nini, ngaphambi kobana ungigadunge ngikhokhe ummoya na?" 
Job7:20 Ngikone ngani na? Ngikwenzeni wena hloli yabantu? Kubayini unemba mina? Ngimthwalo kuwe na? 
Job7:21 Alo, kubayini ungacoleli isiphambeko sami, ususe isono sami na? Qala, sele ngizaziyela kwamhlaba, uzangifuna kodwana ngizabe ngingasekho.”" 
Job8:1 UBhilidadi umTjhurhi waphendula uJobho wathi: 
Job8:2 “Kuzabe kube nini ulokhu ukhuluma njalo? Umlomakho ukhuluma ilize lakolize! 
Job8:3 UZimu uyahlanakezela ubulungiswa na? OSabekako uyahlanakezela okulungileko na? 
Job8:4 Nakube abantwabakho bonile kuye, ubanikele emandleni wesiphambeko sabo." 
Job8:5 Wena nawungafunisisa uZimu, wenze isibawo sakho koSabekako," 
Job8:6 nakube umsulwa begodu ulungile, ngambala yena uzakuphakamela kuwe, abuyisele umuzi wakho esigeni." 
Job8:7 Nanyana isithomo sakho sibe sincani, isiphetho sakho sizakuba sikhulu kwamambala." 
Job8:8 “Yeke, buza kabadala, ubeke ihliziywakho efundisweni yaboyise," 
Job8:9 ngombana thina singebayizolo, yeke abe akunanto esiyaziko namalangethu ephasini asithunzi." 
Job8:10 Bona bazakufundisa, bakuhlahle, bakuyale ngelwazi labo." 
Job8:11 “Incinini ingamila lapha kunganachibi na? Umgaba ungahluma lapha kunganamanzi na? 
Job8:12 Kuzakuthi kungakaphalazi begodu kungakasikwa nokusikwa, kutjhwabe msinyana kunabo boke utjani." 
Job8:13 Zinjalo iindlela zaloyo okhohlwa uZimu, irhuluphelo yonganaZimu iyatjhabalala." 
Job8:14 Ithemba lakhe linjengentambo yesiswebu nesisekelo sakhe siyindlwana yeswebu. 
Job8:15 Naziyama ngekumbakhe, iyawa, nayikakarelako, ayidzimeleli." 
Job8:16 Ufana nomgade omila endaweni enelanga, onamahlumela anabela esivandeni." 
Job8:17 Imirajanawo irarela isiqorho, ihlala hlangana namatje." 
Job8:18 Kodwana nawuruthulwako endawenawo, indawo leyo ayitjho bona kwakhe kwamilani kiyo." 
Job8:19 Lokho kukukwenama kwepilwawo: Equlwanenapho kuzakumila omunye. 
Job8:20 “UZimu akasoze alahle umuntu omsulwa begodu angeze asekele abenza ubumbi. 
Job8:21 UZimu angazalisa umlomakho ngesihleko godu neembhena zakho ngokuhlokoma. 
Job8:22 Labo abakuzondako bazakwembathwa mahloni namatende wabakhohlakeleko atjhabalale.” 
Job9:1 UJobho waziphendulela wathi: 
Job9:2 “Ngambala, ngiyazi bonyana kunjalo: Obhubhako angeze aba ngolungileko kuZimu." 
Job9:3 Nakube umuntu ufuna ukujamelana noZimu ebandla, akunambuzo namunye angawuphendula phakathi kweyikulungwana." 
Job9:4 UZimu unobuhlakani obukhulu, uqinile emandleni. Ngubani owakhe wajamelana naye waphumelela?" 
Job9:5 Nguye otjhidisa iintaba, zona zingazi, azigubude ngetukuthelwakhe." 
Job9:6 Unyakazisa iphasi alisuse endawenalo, kuthuthumele iinsika zalo." 
Job9:7 Uyala ilanga bona lingakhanyi, agubuzese iinkwekwezi." 
Job9:8 Yena yedwa weneka amazulu, agadange amaza welwandle." 
Job9:9 Wenza iinkwekwezi zeBhere nezesiRuthwana, zesiLimela neendawo lapho zicimela khona ngesewula." 
Job9:9 Wenza iinkwekwezi zeBhere nezesiRuthwana, zesiLimela neendawo lapho zicimela khona ngesewula." 
Job9:10 Wenza izinto ezikulu ezingahlathululekiko neemangaliso ezinganakubalwa. 
Job9:11 Qala, udlula ngakimi ngingamboni, iye, uyadlula ngingayeleli." 
Job9:12 Nahlwithako, ngubani ongamkhandela? Ngubani ozakuthi kuye, ‘Wenzani?’" 
Job9:13 “UZimu angeze abuyisela itukuthelwakhe emuva, ngaphasi kwakhe abasizi bakaRahabu bathotjisiwe." 
Job9:14 Alo, ngingamphendula njani na? Ngiwathathephi amezwi wokujamelana naye?" 
Job9:15 Nanyana ngimsulwa, angeze ngamphendula, kwaphela ngingazibawela umusa kumjamelanami." 
Job9:16 Ngitjho nanyana bengingalila, angiphendule; angikholwa bona ubezakulalela amezwami." 
Job9:17 Kunalokho ubezangiwurubaja ngesiwuruwuru, andise imivuvu yami ngaphandle kwesizathu." 
Job9:18 Ubengazukuvuma bona ngikhokhe ummoya, kodwana ubezangizalisa ngomunyu." 
Job9:19 Nakube kuyindaba yamandla, nguye odlondlobeleko! Nakuyindaba yomthetho, ngubani obezambizela ebandla?" 
Job9:20 Nanyana ngimsulwa nje, ngakhuluma ngimlandu; noma nginganamlandu nje, umlomami ungibeka icala." 
Job9:21 Emanyeni ngimsulwa! Yeke ipilwami ililize, ngiyihlobokile." 
Job9:22 Sekuyafana koke, kungakho ngisithi, ‘UZimu ubhubhisa omsulwa nokhohlakeleko ngokufanako.’" 
Job9:23 Lokha isikhukhula nasiletha ukufa msinyana, sinyefula ukuqobeka kwabanganamlandu." 
Job9:24 Nakuliphasi, uZimu ulinikele ezandleni zabakhohlakeleko; usitha ubuso babagwebi balo. Nakube akusuye, alo, kungaba ngubani?" 
Job9:25 “Amalangami ayarhaba kunomgijimi, ayaphephuka, angaboni ubuhle." 
Job9:26 Athaya njengesithayamanzi somgaba, anjengekhozi nalidzwebula ukudla kwalo." 
Job9:27 Nakube bengingalibala isililo sami, ngilise ukunyukubala ngename," 
Job9:28 bengizokuba nevalo lakho koke ukuhlupheka kwami, ngombana ngiyazi bonyana angeze wahlala ungangibeki icala." 
Job9:29 Mina vele sengahlala nginomlandu! Alo, ngizakuthi ngisasebenzelani nje?" 
Job9:30 Nangihlamba ngeliqhwa, ngiqophe izandla zami ngesoda," 
Job9:31 uzangidlhunya ngemgodini onedaka, benginyenywe zizambatho zami." 
Job9:32 UZimu akasimumuntu njengami kobana ngingabangisana naye, nokobana ngingajamelana naye ebandla." 
Job9:33 Thana bekunomlamuli phakathi kwethu obengasilawula sobabili," 
Job9:34 ukuze uZimu asuse intongakhe kimi, nokumesaba kwami kungasabi khona." 
Job9:35 Khona-ke bengizakukhuluma ngaphandle kokumesaba, ngombana ngiyazi bona anginamlandu.”" 
Job10:1 “Ngiyayinyenya ipilwami; ngifuna ukuzwakalisa isililo sami ngitjhaphulukile, ngikhulume ebumunywini bomphefumulwami." 
Job10:2 Yeke ngizakuthi kuZimu, ‘Ungangibeki icala, ngazisa bonyana kubayini ujamelene nami." 
Job10:3 Kghani uyakareka nawumgandeleli, ulahle umsebenzi wezandla zakho na? Ingabe uthanda amaqhinga weenkhohlakali?" 
Job10:4 Uthi unamehlo wenyama nje? Ubona ngendlela obhubhako abona ngayo? 
Job10:5 Imihla yakho ifana neyobhubhako na? Iminyakakho ifana neyomuntu na? 
Job10:6 Kubayini ubhenyegulula imitjhaphami, urhubhulule izono zami," 
Job10:7 nanyana wazi bonyana anginamlandu, begodu akakho ongasindisa esandleni sakho?" 
Job10:8 Izandla zakho zangibumba, zangitshidza, ngemva kwalokho wangijikela, wangirhayila." 
Job10:9 Khumbula bonyana ungenze ngomdaka, nje-ke uzangibuyisela ethulini." 
Job10:10 Azange ungithulule njengebisi, wangitjhujisa njengetjhizi na?" 
Job10:11 Wangembathisa inyama nesikhumba, wangiluka ngokuhlanganisa amathambo nemisipha." 
Job10:12 Wangipha ipilo ngokwethembeka kwakho, netjhejo lakho labulunga umphefumulwami." 
Job10:13 Izinto engihlupheka ngazo wazifihla ehliziywenakho; kodwana manje ngiyazi bonyana lokhu kuyihloswakho ngami: 
Job10:14 Nakube bengingona, wena bewuzangelusa, bewungeze wathethelela ukona kwami." 
Job10:15 Nakube benginomlandu, maye mina! Nabe gade ngilungile, bengingeze ngavusa ihloko ngombana ngizele ihlazo ngobuhlungu engibuzwako." 
Job10:16 Nakube bengingaphakamisa ihlokwami, bewuzangizuma njengebhubezi, godu ungigandelele ngamandlakho amakhulu!" 
Job10:17 Uvusa abofakazi abatjha abajamelene nami, wandisa itukuthelwakho kimi, ukuhlupheka kwami kuza ngokudlhegana." 
Job10:18 Alo, wangikhuphelani esibelethweni? Ngathana ngafa ngingakabonwa nangelihlo," 
Job10:19 ngaba njengongazange abe khona, ngithathwe esibelethweni ngisiwe ezindleni." 
Job10:20 Amalanga wokuphila kwami ambalwa. Yeke akhese ungigadunge! Lisa ukunginaka ukuze ngithabe kwesikhatjhana; 
Job10:21 ngaphambi kobana ngiye kwamgodi uyagcina, enarheni enobumnyama obunzima tshu;" 
Job10:22 iye, inarha enethunzi elinzima nesiyaluyalu, lapha umkhanyo wakhona inga bumnyama.’ ”" 
Job11:1 Yeke uTsofara umNama waphendula wathi: 
Job11:2 “Amezwi amanengi kangaka akazukuphendulwa na? Ukuphophotha kangaka kuzakwenza oqinisileko na? 
Job11:3 Ikulumakho engazisiko leyo izakuthulisa abantu na? Ukuhlahlatha kwakhokho akuzukukuveza emtarini na? 
Job11:4 Uthi, ‘Indabami inetlha’, begodu uthi kuZimu, ‘Ngimsulwa kuwe’." 
Job11:5 Maye, kwanga uZimu angakhuluma, iye, akhulume nawe umlomo nomlomo!" 
Job11:6 Inga angakwembulela iimfihlakalo zokuhlakanipha! Ukuhlakanipha kwakhe kunepumelelo epheleleko. Nje-ke, uzakwazi bona isibetho sakaZimu kuwe sincani kunomlandwakho." 
Job11:7 Ungazifunyana iimfihlakalo zakaZimu na? Sewuyifikelele imikhawulo yoSabekako na? 
Job11:8 Iphakeme ngaphezu kwamazulu! Yini nje into ongayenza wena ngalokho? Itjhinge khulu kunendawo yabafileko! Lilwazana bani ongaba nalo wena? 
Job11:9 Isilinganiso sayo sinabile kunephasi, begodu sibanzi kunelwandle." 
Job11:10 UZimu nadlulako, ufaka umuntu ekufeni, bese kuthi omunye amgcine aphilile. Akakho ongamkhandela kilokho." 
Job11:11 Nguye owazi abaphehli benturhu, ubona ubukhohlakali akude. Akadingi ukutjhidela eduze azokuphenya!" 
Job11:12 Njengomjeka ofakwa emlilweni uphekwe unganalitho, injalo nehloko yomuntu. Iye, ubelethwa anjengodumbana wommango." 
Job11:13 “Wena-ke nawulungisa ihliziywakho, uzakwelulela izandla zakho kuZimu." 
Job11:14 Nakube kunesono esandleni sakho, silahle! Ungavumeli ubukhohlakali emzinakho!" 
Job11:15 Nawenze njalo, uzakuphakamisa ubuso bakho umsulwa, ube ngoqinileko, ungabi nevalo." 
Job11:16 Mbala uzakukhohlwa amatshwenyekwakho; uzawakhumbula inga mamanzi ageleze adlula. 
Job11:17 Ipilwakho izakuphakama kunelanga eminekulu, izakuphazima njengelanga lekuseni." 
Job11:18 Uzakuba nesibindi ngombana ithemba likhona; uzakuqaphela ipahlakho, uphumule uphephile." 
Job11:19 Uzakulala uzigedle, kunganamuntu okusabisako. Abanengi bazazincengela kuwe," 
Job11:20 kodwana amehlo wabakhohlakeleko azokufifiyela. Bangabi nendawo yokuphephela, ithemba labo lizakuba kuphelelwa mamandla.”" 
Job12:1 UJobho waphendula wathi: 
Job12:2 “Ngambala nibabantu bekhethu! Nanihlongakalako nokuhlakanipha kuzokunyelela! 
Job12:3 Nami nginomkhumbulo njengani; angisingaphasi kwenu. Ngubani ongakwaziko okutjhwileko? 
Job12:4 Ngiyihlekisa emnganinami, uthi, ‘Qala, ubiza uZimu, akamphendule-ke.’ Kunjalo-ke ukunyefula konganamlandu nomsulwa!" 
Job12:5 Umbono wozigedlileko lo uthi, ‘Ungatshwenyeki ngehlekelele! Ilungiselelwe abangakhambi kuhle.’" 
Job12:6 Kodwana ngithi, ‘Abarhayilako baphila ngokuthula, nabatlhorholoja uZimu bavikelekile, ngitjho labo uZimu abanikele amandla ezandleni zabo!’" 
Job12:7 Iye, buzani iinlwana, zizanifundisa, nibuze neenyoni zomkayi, zizanitjela." 
Job12:8 Yelelani iinunwana zequlwani, zizanifundisa, neenhlambi zelwandle zinidembele." 
Job12:9 Ngisiphi sazo zoke iinlwanezo esingaziko bonyana sisandla sakaSomnini esenza lokhu. 
Job12:10 Esandleni sakhe kunepilo yakho koke okuphilako, kanye nomphefumulo womuntu woke." 
Job12:11 Indlebe izizinya amezwi, njengelimu linandipha ukugoma." 
Job12:12 Ukuhlakanipha kusebantwini abadala na? Nokwazi kusekuphileni isikhathi eside na? 
Job12:13 Awa, ukuhlakanipha namandla kukuZimu, nguye oneseluleko nokwazi." 
Job12:14 Nagirizako, akunamuntu ongavuselela; navalela umuntu, akakho ongamvulela." 
Job12:15 Lokha nagodla izulu, amanzi ayatjha nalithumelako, amanzi akhukhula inarha." 
Job12:16 UZimu nguye onamandla nohlosa koke, ulawula odurhileko nodurhisako." 
Job12:17 Nguye okhambisa abeluleki bahlubule, enze abakhokheli iindlhadlha." 
Job12:18 Unikela amakhosi ezitheni zawo esangweni awabophe ngebhande letjhila emadinini. 
Job12:19 Ukhambisa nabaphristi bahlubule; aphelise iinkhundla zabo zeminyaka neminyaka. 
Job12:20 Uthulisa iseluleko sabathembekileko, amuke abaphathi umbono." 
Job12:21 Uthela amakhosana ngehlazo, onamandla amthukulule ibhande." 
Job12:22 Wembula amaqhinga afihlakeleko, okwenziwe ebumnyameni akulethe ekukhanyeni." 
Job12:23 Wandisa izizwe, abuye azibhubhise, azinabise, azirholele ekuthunjweni." 
Job12:24 Wemuka amakhosi wephasi ukwazi, awenze azulazule ebhudwini elinganandlela." 
Job12:25 Aphumbutha ebumnyameni kunganamkhanyo, awenze atherezele njengesidakwa." 
Job13:1 “Amehlwami abone koke lokhu, neendlebe zami zakuzwa zakulemuka." 
Job13:2 Enikwaziko nami ngiyakwazi, angisingaphasi kwenu." 
Job13:3 Kodwana mina ngizakhuluma noSabekako, ngiphikisane noZimu." 
Job13:4 Nakungini khona, ningininda ngamanga, niziinyanga ezingazisiko nokanyana nje." 
Job13:5 Kwangathi ningathula nithi du, lokho kuzakuba kuhlakanipha kini!" 
Job13:6 Akhese nizwe ipikiswanami, nilalele ukusola komlomami." 
Job13:7 Ningakhulumela uZimu ngobumbi na? Ningamkhulumela ikohliso na? 
Job13:8 Ningakhetha ubuso nanisebandla, nikhulume esikhundleni sakaZimu na?" 
Job13:9 Nizakuba yini nange anganihlola na? Nizamkhohlisa njengalokha nanikhohlisa umuntu na? 
Job13:10 Ngambala uzanisola, nakube nikhetha ubuso ngemsitheleni." 
Job13:11 Ubukhosi bakhe abuzunethusa na? Ukumesaba kwenu akuzunembatha na? 
Job13:12 Iinkolelo zenu zizizaga zomlotha, iimpendulo zenu ngezomdaka." 
Job13:13 Thulani phambi kwami! Mina ngizakukhuluma. Nanyana ngingehlelwa yini, akusenandaba." 
Job13:14 Ngizakubeka intamami esigodweni, iye, ngibeke ipilwami esandleni sami." 
Job13:15 Nanyana uZimu azangibulala, angizukulinda, kodwana ngizakuvikela iindlela zami kuye." 
Job13:16 Lokhu kungaba yisindiswami, ngombana onganaZimu angeze ajama phambi kwakhe." 
Job13:17 Lalelani kuhle amezwami, ihlathululwami izwakale eendlebeni zenu." 
Job13:18 Qala-ke, ngibeke indabami ngokuhlelekileko, ngiyazi bonyana anginamlandu." 
Job13:19 Ngubani wenu ongaphikisana nami? Nakunjalo, ngizakuthula ngithi du, bekube kumhla ngifako.”" 
Job13:20 “Zimu, nginikela izinto ezimbili kwaphela, khona-ke angeze ngazifihlela wena:" 
Job13:21 Isandla sakho asibe kude nami, ukwesabeka kwakho kungangethusi." 
Job13:22 Nje-ke nawungibizela ebandla, ngizaziphendulela, namkha kukhulume mina, wena-ke uziphendulele." 
Job13:23 Zingangani iimphoso nezono zami na? Yewungilemukise isiphambeko nesono sami. 
Job13:24 Kubayini ufihla ubuso bakho, ungithathe njengesitha sakho?" 
Job13:25 Wethusa ikari eliphetjhulwa mumoya, ugijimise ihlanga elomileko na?" 
Job13:26 Utlola imilandwami ibe munyu safuthi, ungigomise ilifa lezono zobutjha bami." 
Job13:27 Ubophelela iinyawo zami ngesimbi esigodweni, uqalisise zoke iindlela zami, ubeke amatshwayo wasafuthi etendeni yeenyawo zami." 
Job13:28 Lokho ukwenza emuntwini obola njengesibozi, iye, njengesambatho esigonywa mvunya." 
Job14:1 Umuntu obelethwe mfazi, imihlakhe mifitjhani begodu izele ngomtlhago." 
Job14:2 Uyavela njengethuthumbo, abuye atjhwabe; uyabaleka njengesithunzi esingajamiko." 
Job14:3 Konje ungakhe uqalelele onjalo, umlethe phambi kwakho kobana umgwebe na?" 
Job14:4 Ngubani ongaveza okuhlambulukileko kokusilapheleko na? Akakho do! 
Job14:5 Njengombana amalangakhe abaliwe, nesibalo seenyanga zakhe sikuwe, wambekela umkhawulo angeze aweqa," 
Job14:6 ungamqali, yewumlise, ukuze azithokozise ngelanga lakhe njengomqatjhwa." 
Job14:7 Mbala kunethemba emthini, nakube uyagawulwa ukuze uhlume godu, namahlumelawo akapheli." 
Job14:8 Nanyana umrabhawo uluphalela equlwanini, nesirumula sawo sifela ehlabathini," 
Job14:9 nasizwa amanzi sizakuhluma siveze iimpande njengesitjalo esincani. 
Job14:10 Kodwana indoda nayifako, iphela amandla! Umuntu nadlula ephasini, akasabonwa!" 
Job14:11 Njengamanzi nanyamalala elitsheni, nomlambo uye ngokoma kere," 
Job14:12 ngokunjalo nomuntu uyalala, angasavuka: Kuzakudlula isibhakabhaka alele njalo, angavuswa ebuthongweni bakhe." 
Job14:13 “Inga ungangifihla endaweni yabafileko, ungithukuse bekudlule itukuthelwakho, ungibekele isikhathi esibekiweko, ungikhumbule!" 
Job14:14 Nakube umuntu nafako ubengabuye aphile, bengizakulinda soke isikhathi engibekelwe sona, bekufike idlhego lokuphunyuzwa kwami." 
Job14:15 Bewuzakubiza, mina ngikuphendule, ngombana ulangazelela imisebenzi yezandla zakho." 
Job14:16 Nje-ke, mbala uzakubala amagadangwami, awuzukuhlala weluse isono sami," 
Job14:17 uzakuvalela isiphambeko sami ngembadeni, usibekele ukona kwami." 
Job14:18 Kodwana njengentaba nayiwako igirike, kususwe idwala endawenalo," 
Job14:19 iye, njengamanzi narhubha amatje, iinkhukhula zikhukhule itjhwabatjhwaba, ngokunjalo ubhubhisa ithemba lomuntu." 
Job14:20 Uyamhlula nini nanini, adlule: Urhohlomeza ubuso bakhe, umlise anjalo." 
Job14:21 Amadodanakhe ayaphakanyiswa, nokho yena angazi litho, namkha ehliselwe phasi, yena angayeleli litho." 
Job14:22 Uzwa ubuhlungu bomzimbakhe kwaphela, begodu uzililela yena kwaphela.”" 
Job15:1 U-Elifasi umTemana waphendula wathi: 
Job15:2 “Mumuntu ohlakaniphileko na, ozwakalisa ilwazi elingazisiko, nakhulumako abhodle ummoya?" 
Job15:3 Uzakuphikisana ngekulumo engatjho litho, nangamezwi anganabubhadekelo na?" 
Job15:4 Wena nguwe owonakalisa ukwesaba uZimu, unciphisa ukuzindla ngaye." 
Job15:5 Iimphambeko zakho zifundisa umlomakho, ukhetha ilimu labanobuqili." 
Job15:6 Akusimi okulahlako, kodwana mlomakho lowo; iye, iimbhena zakho zifakaza ngokujamelana nawe." 
Job15:7 Umumuntu wokuthoma owabelethwako na? Kghani wavela ngaphambi kweentaba? 
Job15:8 Wakuzwa okwaquntwa emkhandlwini kaZimu na? Wazithathela ingcenye yokuhlakanipha kwakaZimu na? 
Job15:9 Yini oyaziko thina esingayazi? Yini oyilemukako thina esingayizwisisiko? 
Job15:10 Phakathi kwethu kunabathukgheleko nabadala, abadala ngitjho nakuyihlo." 
Job15:11 “Kuncani kuwe ukududuzwa nguZimu, okutjho ilizwi elikhuluma nawe ngesizotha na?" 
Job15:12 Kubayini ihliziywakho ikukhohlisa, amehlwakho wona akudurhiselani," 
Job15:13 ummoyakho bewufulathele uZimu, kuphume amezwi anjalo emlonyenakho na?" 
Job15:14 Uyini obhubhako kobana angabamsulwa nobelethwe mfazi kobana angaba ngolungileko? 
Job15:15 Nakube uZimu akathembi ngitjho neengilozi zakhe namazulu angakahlanzeki phambi kwakhe," 
Job15:16 kangangani-ke emuntwini onyenyisako nowonakeleko, orhuqa izono inga usela amanzi!" 
Job15:17 “Ngilalela, ngikutjele! Ngifuna ukukucocela ngengikubonileko." 
Job15:18 Ngikutjele lokho okwadenjwa ngabahlakaniphileko, ngegunya laboyise bangakufihlela." 
Job15:19 Ngitjho labo abanikelwa inarha bodwa, kwangabakhona amaphandle adlula hlangana nabo." 
Job15:20 Okhohlakeleko uphila ngokwesaba ngaso soke isikhathi neminyaka ebekelwe isirhonga ilibinzana. 
Job15:21 Eendlebeni zakhe uzwa ngathi kunemidumo esabekako, umbhubhisi uzomfikela asanethezekile." 
Job15:22 Akalingi asuke ebumnyameni emsamo, ngombana abantu bayamhlola bese bathi ufanelwa yisabula." 
Job15:23 Uyazi bonyana uzakuzulazula afunane nesikwa athi, ‘Sikuphi?’ Uyazi kobana ilanga lobumnyama limlindele." 
Job15:24 Ngokunjalo ukutshwenyeka nokutlhuwa kuyamethusa, kumembatha njengekosi elindele ukusahlelwa." 
Job15:25 “Ngebanga lokobana gade ajugujela uZimu iguduva, aziphakamisa ajamelene noSabekako," 
Job15:26 godu nokobana gade aqinise ihloko wamdumela, athembe bona isihlangu sakhe siqinile begodu simabhombo," 
Job15:27 ngalokho wembesa ubuso bakhe ngamafuthakhe, warephuzela ngamafutha emadininakhe!" 
Job15:28 Umuntu loyo uzakuhlala emadorobheni amarubhi, ngeenkumbeni ezingakameli ukuhlalwa mumuntu, ebezimele zibe liqubi leququ." 
Job15:29 Yena uzakuloba ipahlakhe nomnonwakhe awuzukubambelela; ilifa lakhe angeze lamlandela ethuneni. 
Job15:30 Akazukuphunyurha ebumnyameni, umlilo uzotjhwabisa amahlumelakhe, atjhiswe kuphefumula kwakaZimu." 
Job15:31 Umuntu angathembeli kokungekho, azikhohlise, ngombana uzakuzuza ilize lakolize." 
Job15:32 Uzakufana nepande etjhwaba kungakabi sikhathi namakarayo angasese lihlaza. 
Job15:33 Iye, njengesidiribe esithintithwe iinthelo zingakavuthwa, nomuthi we-oliva orhulula amathuthumbo." 
Job15:34 Mbala abanganaZimu abatheli nomlilo uqothula ipahla ezuzwe ngekohliso. 
Job15:35 Bakhulelwa ihlekelele, babelethe ubumbi, iye, isisu sabo sikhulisa ikohliso.”" 
Job16:1 UJobho waphendula wathi: 
Job16:2 “Ngizwe izinto ezinengi ezinjalo; nibaduduzi abambi nokanyana njalo. 
Job16:3 Lesi sikhathi samezwenu amumoya na? Nakungasinjalo, nitjhiswa yini beniphikise na?" 
Job16:4 Nami bengingakhuluma njengani nje, nabegade kungini lapha ngikhonapha; bengingabumba amezwi ngiphikisane nani, nami ngithintithe ihloko nanginiqalako." 
Job16:5 Benginganikhuthaza ngomlomami kwaphela, induduzo yeembhena zomlomami inibangule." 
Job16:6 Madoda, ukukhuluma ngobuhlungu bami, akubenzi budambe, begodu nangithulako nakhona abusuki kimi." 
Job16:7 “UZimu lo, nguye ongiqede amandla, wakhenisa woke umkhambathami." 
Job16:8 Ungenze ngaba sibonelo sehlekelele, ukonda kwami kujamelene nami, kufakazela amanga wabantu ngami." 
Job16:9 Itukuthelo kaZimu ingirathule, ngombana ungibambele ivunda; wangisinela amazinywakhe, umjamelanami wangiqala ngamehlo abukhali." 
Job16:10 Abantu bangikhamisela imilomo, bangiphoqa ngokungiwakala emhlathini, bangihlalela isicathana." 
Job16:11 UZimu unginikelele ngemigulukudu, wangilahlela ezandleni zeenkhohlakali." 
Job16:12 Bengizihlalele, wangiqovaqova, wangithi bhi ngentanyana wangidabudabula. Wangijamisa ngaba sinenjwa," 
Job16:13 imisubelakhe yawela ngapha nangapha kwami, yangihlaba iziso. Ngaphandle kwesirhawu yachithela inyongwami equlwanini." 
Job16:14 Ungivula iintunja ngeentunja, angithelekele njengengorho." 
Job16:15 “Ngithungelele umgodla esikhumbeni sami, ihlokwami izele ngomlotha." 
Job16:16 Ubuso bami buba bumbi ngesililo neenkopheni zami kunobumnyama obunzima tshu," 
Job16:17 nanyana kungananturhu ezandleni zami, nomthandazwami uhlambulukile." 
Job16:18 Wena phasi, ungafihli iingazi zami, isililo sami asingafumani ukuphumula." 
Job16:19 Nanyana ngingaba njengombana nginje, kwanga ngingaba nofakazi phakathi kweendalwa zezulu, ozokukhuluma indabami keliphezulu," 
Job16:20 iye, umkhulumelami, omnganami, lokha amehlwami achiphizela uZimu ngeenyembezi." 
Job16:21 Yena uzakuncengela obhubhako phambi koZimu, njengomuntu nancengela umnganakhe." 
Job16:22 Mbala, sekusele iminyakana embalwa ngaphambi kobana ngikhambe indlela engabuyiko." 
Job17:1 Ummoyami wephukile, amalangami aphelile, sengilungele ithuna." 
Job17:2 Nakungasinjalo, ukukokomejwa kusisabelo sami namehlwami ahlala atjheje ilunya labantu." 
Job17:3 Zimu, beka isibambiso sami kuwe ngombana ngubani ozangijamela na?" 
Job17:4 Mbala usithe imikhumbulo yabangani bami ekuzwisiseni, ngalokho angeze ubavumele ebandleni lezulwini. “Isaga sithi," 
Job17:5 ‘Othengisa ngomnganakhe kobana afumane isabelo, amehlo wabantwabakhe azakufifiyela.’" 
Job17:6 Kodwana uZimu wenze mina ngaba siphoqo sabantu, nabangibonako batsaka amathe." 
Job17:7 Amehlwami sese afifiyela ngebanga lesizi, angikondi ngimathambo." 
Job17:8 Abazenza qotho bayarareka ngalokhu, nokuthiwa bamsulwa badanile ngonganaZimu! “Godu isaga sithi," 
Job17:9 ‘Olungileko unamathela endlelenakhe, nonezandla ezihlanzekileko uyandlondlobala.’" 
Job17:10 Kodwana nina noke niqhiqha kimapha, nokho angifunyani noyedwa onobuhlakani kini." 
Job17:11 “Imihla yami idlulile, amasu wami aphelile, iye, iimfiso zehliziywami zitjhabalele." 
Job17:12 Abangani bami bathi ubusuku yimini lokha nakuba mnyama bathi kuyasa. 
Job17:13 Ithemba lami linye, indawo yabafileko yindlwami! Sengendlale umkghadami ebumnyameni!" 
Job17:14 Nakube ngibiza ithuna ngithi, ‘Baba’, iimpethu ngizibize ngithi, ‘Mma nabodadwethu’," 
Job17:15 likuphi-ke ithemba lami? Ngubani ongabona ithemba lami? 
Job17:16 Kghani lizakwehlela nami endaweni yabafileko? Sizakwehlela kanyekanye ethulini na?” 
Job18:1 UBhilidadi umTjhurhi waphendula wathi: 
Job18:2 “Uzakuratharatha kuze kube nini? Buyela emikhumbulwenakho! Emva kwalokho singakhuluma. 
Job18:3 Kubayini usithathe njengeenkomo, sibe bokeke emehlwenakho?" 
Job18:4 Wena ozirathula ngetukuthelwakho. Utjho bona inarha ingalahlwa ngebanga lakho, namkha kususwe idwala linye endawenalo na?" 
Job18:5 Ngambala umkhanyo weenkhohlakali uzakucinywa, iye, amalahle womlilo wokhohlakeleko amthuthu." 
Job18:6 Umkhanyo ufiphele ngetendeni lakhe nesibani sakhe lapho akhona siyacima. 
Job18:7 Ancitjhisiwe amabhadulwakhe anamandla, amaqhingakhe ayamkhuba." 
Job18:8 Iinyawo zakhe zimrholela ngenedeni, urhohlomela ngemgodini." 
Job18:9 Isithiyo simbamba ngesithende, isifu siyamurhorheja." 
Job18:10 Ufihlelwe ikawule equlwanini, iye, ubekelwe unoqhaka endleleni." 
Job18:11 Ivalo limethusa ngapha nangapha, limhlala eenthendeni." 
Job18:12 Amandlakhe aqothulwa yindlala, ihlekelele imlele nje, eqadi kwakhe;" 
Job18:13 iqothula isikhumba sakhe izibulo lokufa liqede amalungu womzimbakhe. 
Job18:14 Udzwetjulwa ebuphephelweni betende lakhe, alethwe ekosini yevalo." 
Job18:15 Etendeni lakhe kunomlilo, isibabuli sisabalele endawenakhe yokuhlala." 
Job18:16 Imirabhakhe ngaphasi iyomelela neempande zakhe ngehla ziyabuna. 
Job18:17 Ukukhunjulwa kwakhe kuyaphela ephasini, ibizo lakhe alisaphathwa enarheni." 
Job18:18 Ususwa ekukhanyeni, aphoselwe ebumnyameni, aqotjhwe ephasini." 
Job18:19 Akanabantwana namkha isizukulwana ebantwini bakwabo, sekutlhogeka ngitjho noseleko lapha gade ahlala khona." 
Job18:20 Bangetjingalanga bayakhena mhlana awako, bepumalanga bangenwa kukwesaba," 
Job18:21 bathi, ‘Unje-ke umuzi womgulukudu! Le, bekuyindawo yomuntu ongazi uZimu!’ ”" 
Job19:1 Yeke uJobho waphendula wathi: 
Job19:2 “Nizangizwisa ubuhlungu bekube nini, nilokhu ningiqoba ngamezwi na?" 
Job19:3 Ningirhubutjhe kalitjhumitjhumi! Aninanhloni zokungiwurubaja na? 
Job19:4 Nanyana bekuliqiniso bonyana ngiphosisile, ukuphosisa kwami yindabami." 
Job19:5 Nakube ngambala nizikhukhumezela mina, nenze ihlazo lami libe yinto yokungiphikisa," 
Job19:6 yazini bonyana uZimu ungibeke ngemmoyeni, yinedakhe engirhobele ngaba nje." 
Job19:7 Nanyana ngirhuwelela ngithi, ‘Ngoniwe!’ akakho ophendulako. Nangimemeza ngifuna isizo, nalapho akukho ukulunga." 
Job19:8 Ungakhele isiqabo emzilenami angikghoni ukudlula, wabeka ubumnyama eendleleni zami." 
Job19:9 Ungihlubulise idumo lami, wangemuka isihlohlo ehloko." 
Job19:10 Ungirhiriza mahlangothi woke, angisekho, wasiphula ithemba lami njengomuthi." 
Job19:11 Ungivuthelise ngetukuthelwakhe, wangibalela kabajamelene naye." 
Job19:12 Amabuthwakhe ahlangana ndawonye, ahloma amatendawo angizombeleza, angivimbezela njengedorobho." 
Job19:13 “Umndenami ubekwe kude nami, engijayelene nabo bami bangihlamukile." 
Job19:14 Iinhlobo zami nabangani bami bangilahlele izandla, sengilibelwe" 
Job19:15 naziimvakatjhi ekumbenami. Iincekukazi zami zingithatha njengomyeni, sese nginjengephandle emehlwenazo." 
Job19:16 Nangibiza incekwami, iyazithulela, bengisuke mina ngincengane nayo." 
Job19:17 Ummoyami usivunda kumkami, ngisinyenyiso ebantwaneni bakwethu." 
Job19:18 Sese nginyazwa naziinratjhana, nangikhuluma nazo, ziyangifulathela." 
Job19:19 Boke abakhozi bami bayanginyenya, iye, labo engibathandako sebangijikele." 
Job19:20 Umphefumulwami uhlulukela abaziingazi zami, kodwana angisenabani." 
Job19:21 Akhese ningirhawukele hle! Ngirhawukelani bangani bami, ngombana ngigandelelwe sisandla sakaZimu." 
Job19:22 Kubayini nani ningigijimise njengoZimu? Ananeliswa ngenyamami na? 
Job19:23 Maye, kubethana amezwami lawa gade atloliwe! Iye, ngathana gade atlolwe emsongweni!" 
Job19:24 Atlolwe ngesimbi elitjeni, kuzaliswe imisele yakhona ngomthofi, ngaleyondlela agobhodlhwe unomphela!" 
Job19:25 Mina ngathana bengazi bonyana umhlengami uyaphila, asikime ebandla ajamelane nabasephasini;" 
Job19:26 nasele asikimile, babone amabono. Nje-ke, ngizambona ongiphathele iindaba ezihle, iye, osidalwa sezulu." 
Job19:27 Kwanga mina ngingambona ngamehlwami la, iye, abonwe ngimi ngenyama. Umphefumulwami ukomele lokho!" 
Job19:28 Lokha nanithi, ‘Utjhiswa yini, nakube isisusa sendaba silele kuye?’" 
Job19:29 yelelani isabula ngombana lezo zizono ezifanela ukufa! Nje-ke, nizakwazi bonyana kunesigwebo.”" 
Job20:1 UTsofara umNama waphendula wathi: 
Job20:2 “Mbala, imikhumbulo engikhathazako ingenza bona ngiphendule, ngebanga lokungabi nokuhlaliseka ngaphakathi kwami." 
Job20:3 Ngizwa ukusolwa okungihlambalazako, nomqondo engingawuzwisisiko ongenza ngiphendule." 
Job20:4 Angithi uyakwazi lokhu: Kusukela kade, ekubekweni komuntu ephasini," 
Job20:5 ukujabula kwabakhohlakeleko kufitjhani nokuthokoza konganaZimu kungokwesikhatjhana. 
Job20:6 Nanyana ukuziphakamisa kwakhe kufika emkayini, nehlokwakhe ithinta emafini," 
Job20:7 uzakubhubha isiphelani njengothuvi bakhe. Labo abambonileko bazakuthi, ‘Uphi nje?’" 
Job20:8 Uphapha njengebhudango, angasabonwa, agijinyiswe njengombono webusuku." 
Job20:9 Ilihlo elakhe lamrhedlula, alisoze lisambona, angeze lisambona endawenakhe." 
Job20:10 Abantwabakhe bazakubuyisela umnothwakhe kabadududu, iye, kube sisandla sakhe esibuyisela akuthethe kibo." 
Job20:11 Amathambakhe gade anamandla wobutjha, kodwana amandla lawo azakulala naye ethulini." 
Job20:12 “Izenzo ezimbi zinjengeliju ngemlonyenakhe, azifihle ngaphasi kwelimu lakhe." 
Job20:13 Iye, zinjengeliju alimumethe angalikhafuli, alibambe ngerhwalabha lakhe." 
Job20:14 Kodwana ukudlokho nasele kungendeni kuyajika: Kube sihlungu senyoka ngaphakathi kwakhe. 
Job20:15 Uhlanza umnono awuginyileko, uZimu amgonyulukise wona." 
Job20:16 Uphila ngokumunya isihlungu seenyoka, nje-ke, uzakubulawa lilimu lesiqandani." 
Job20:17 Akangathabeli imisele, iye, imilanjana egeleza iliju nemilaza:" 
Job20:18 Uzakubuyisa akukhandlekeleko angakakugomi, anganandiphi ngitjho nenzuzo yerhwebo lakhe." 
Job20:19 Nanyana agandelele bewalahla abadududu, iinkumba abemuke zona angeze azivuselela." 
Job20:20 “Ngebanga lokobana amarhamaru, umnonwakhe angeze wamsindisa." 
Job20:21 Ngenca yokurhiribidela kwakhe, ubunjinga bakhe angeze badzimelela." 
Job20:22 Uzakuthi asadakwe mnono, afikelwe lisizi, iye, amatlhuwo amthelekele ngamandla." 
Job20:23 Uzakuzalisa isisu sakhe ngesizi! Iye, uZimu amvuthele ngetukuthelwakhe, imnethe njengezulu eliwulukela phezu kwakhe." 
Job20:24 Nanyana athi ubalekela isibulawo sesimbi, uzakuhlatjwa msebe onetlobo yekoporo." 
Job20:25 Kuzakuthi nawutsomulako kobana uphume emhlanakhe, itlobo leyo imanyazele inyongo. Uzakwehlelwa livalo lokufa!" 
Job20:26 Bumnyama bodwa obubekelwe amagugwakhe, umlilo ongakabaswa mumuntu uzamtjhwamadela, uqothule nokuseleko emzinakhe." 
Job20:27 Amazulu azakwambula isono sakhe, nephasi lijamelane naye." 
Job20:28 Iinkhukhula zizakukhukhula nekumbakhe, iye, amadlambi wamanzi ngelanga letukuthelo kaZimu." 
Job20:29 Sinjalo-ke isiphetho uZimu asibekele isikhohlakali, iye, ilifa elimenyezelwe nguZimu.”" 
Job21:1 UJobho waphendula wathi: 
Job21:2 “Lalelisisani amezwami, kube yinduduzo evela kini." 
Job21:3 Ngibekezelelani khengikhulume, kuthi nangiqedako, nihlekise ngami-ke." 
Job21:4 Isinghonghoyilo sami asikaqaliswa ebantwini. Alo-ke, kubayini kumele ngibekezele?" 
Job21:5 Nange ningalalela engikutjhoko, nizakumangala, nje-ke nizakuthula nithi du." 
Job21:6 Nangicabanga ngalokhu, ngehlelwa kukwesaba, umzimbami uyathuthumela." 
Job21:7 “Kubayini iinkhohlakali ziphila isikhathi eside, ziluphale godu zidlondlobale zibe namandla?" 
Job21:8 Abantwabazo baphumelela phambi kwazo, iye, imindeni neenzukulwana zikanye nazo." 
Job21:9 Amakhayazo aphephile, akunavalo kiwo, iswazi lakaZimu alikho phezu kwazo." 
Job21:10 Iinkunzi zazo azibhalelwa kumithisa, iinkomo zazo ziyabamba, aziphunzi." 
Job21:11 Iinkhohlakali zikhupha abantwabazo njengemihlambi, iye, baphuma, bajekezele ngaphandle." 
Job21:12 Zibhina ngokulilisa abosotjherere namaharibha, zithabele itjhada lamanghwani." 
Job21:13 Zizwa kuhle ipilwazo yoke, ziziyele kabafileko ngokuthula." 
Job21:14 Zithi kuZimu: ‘Hlukana nathi! Asikhanuki ukwazi iindlela zakho. 
Job21:15 Bekayini oSabekako loyo bonyana singabeze simlotjhe? Sizakubuyelwa yini nasimthandazako?’ 
Job21:16 “Nakube umnono weenkhohlakali awusisezandleni zazo, amaqhingazo akude noZimu," 
Job21:17 kukangaki isibani sazo sicinywa na? Kukangaki zehlelwa yihlekelele ezifaneleko? Ingabe uZimu uyazabela ukubhujiswa etukuthelwenakhe na? 
Job21:18 Kukangaki zifana neenhlanga eziphetjhulwa mumoya, njengamawunguwungu akhukhulwa siwuruwuru na?" 
Job21:19 Namkha uZimu wehlisela isibetho sesikhohlakali emadodanenaso? Awa, uZimu akabethe isikhohlakaleso ukuze sazi nakusasa!" 
Job21:20 Amehlwaso akabone ukubhujiswa kwaso, sisele itukuthelo yoSabekako," 
Job21:21 ngombana asinandaba nomndenaso esiwutjhiyako lokha nakufika ukuphela kwamalangaso! 
Job21:22 “Ngubani ongafundisa uZimu ilwazi, onguye ogweba iindalwa zezulu na?" 
Job21:23 Omunye umuntu ufa asaqinile, aphephile begodu azigedlile," 
Job21:24 iinqwebu zakhe zihlala zigcwele namathambakhe anommongo. 
Job21:25 Omunye umuntu ufa alisizi angazange akhe abone ubuhle. 
Job21:26 Bobabili balala ngokufanako ethulini, iimpethu zibembese." 
Job21:27 “Ngiyakwazi enikucabangako namazungu eningona ngawo 
Job21:28 ngombana nithi, ‘Iphi-ke gadesi ikumba yomuntu omkhulu? Liphi ikhaya leenkhohlakali?’" 
Job21:29 Kubayini ningabuzi abantu bemilandelande? Angeze naphikisana nobufakazi ababulethako," 
Job21:30 okutjho ngomhla wehlekelele iinkhohlakali ziyasinda, ngelanga letukuthelo ziphunyurha zingakalimali." 
Job21:31 Ngubani ongasola uZimu tjhatjhalazi ngalokhu na? Ngubani ongamhlawulisa ngalokho akwenzileko? 
Job21:32 “Isikhohlakali sisiwa emathuneni wekhabo, sigadwe liqubi lequlwani." 
Job21:33 Iye, amagade emlonyeni werholo asisithe kuhle; boke abantu bekhabo bazasilandela, begodu sizakuba kanye nabanengi abakhamba phambi kwaso." 
Job21:34 Alo-ke nakunjalo, ningangiduduza njani ngenyakanyakenu leyo? Aninazo iimpendulo ngaphandle kwekohliso kwaphela.”" 
Job22:1 Yeke u-Elifasi umTemani waphendula wathi: 
Job22:2 “UZimu angasizwa mumuntu na? Nohlakaniphileko angaba lisizo kuye na? 
Job22:3 OSabekako ujatjuliswa kulunga kwakho na? Uzuzani ngobumsulwa beendlela zakho? 
Job22:4 Kungebanga lokuzithoba kwakho kobana uZimu akusole, abe akuse ebandla na?" 
Job22:5 Ukukhohlakala kwakho kukhulu! Izono zakho azinasiphetho," 
Job22:6 ngombana ufune isibambiso kubafowenu, ngokuncani abakubamba khona. Bewubahlubulisa izambatho." 
Job22:7 Azange ubaphe amanzi abadiniweko, watima abalambileko ukudla." 
Job22:8 Kodwana onamandla bewumnikela inarha, iye, omthandako bekahlala kiyo." 
Job22:9 Wajikisa abahlolokazi bamkhonoze nabanganaboyise wabaqeda amandla. 
Job22:10 Kungebangelo iinthiyo zikuzombelezile, ivalo eliza ungakatjheji liyakubhudungela." 
Job22:11 Kghani awuboni ubumnyama, neenkhukhula zamanzi ezikugubuzesako na?" 
Job22:12 “UZimu akahlali ekuphakameni kwezulu na? Qala iinkwekwezi ezisekabeni yomkayi: Maye, ziphakeme kangangani!" 
Job22:13 Khonapho wena uthi, ‘UZimu wazini nje? Angagweba asebumnyameni obunjalo na?" 
Job22:14 Amafu anzima tshu ayamsitha kobana angaboni lokha nakhamba esibhakabhakeni.’ 
Job22:15 Uzakukhamba endleleni yekadeni, eyakhanjwa ngabakhohlakeleko," 
Job22:16 abadudulwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi, iinsekelo zabo zakhukhulwa ziinkhukhula na?" 
Job22:17 Ngibo abathi kuZimu, ‘Hlukana nathi!’ Godu bathi, ‘Yini engenziwa ngoSabekako kithi na?’" 
Job22:18 Khisibe nguye oSabekako ozalise iinkumba zabo ngokuhle. Kodwana amaqhinga weenkhohlakali akude noZimu! 
Job22:19 Abalungileko bayakubona lokho bese bajabule, abamsulwa babakokomeje" 
Job22:20 ngokuthi, ‘Iye, abajamelene nathi bayatjhabalaliswa, nomlilo uqothule amasalelabo.’" 
Job22:21 “Nawubuyisana noZimu, uzakuba nokuthula; ngaleyondlela ipumelelo izakuza kuwe." 
Job22:22 Yamukela ifundiso ephuma emlonyenakhe, ubeke amezwakhe ehliziywenakho." 
Job22:23 Nawubuyela koSabekako, uzakuvuselelwa. Tjhidisela ikohlakalo kude nomzakho." 
Job22:24 Lahlela igade legolidakho ethulini, igolide elicolisakeleko emadwaleni wemilanjana." 
Job22:25 Nje-ke, oSabekako uzakuba ligade lakho legolide, godu abe yisilivakho ephazimako." 
Job22:26 Khona-ke uzakuthaba kuye, uphakamisele ubuso bakho kuZimu." 
Job22:27 Nawumncengako, uzakuzwa, yeke uzakghona ukuphetha iinthembiso zakho." 
Job22:28 Okuquntileko kuzakwenzeka, neendlela zakho zizakukhanya," 
Job22:29 ngombana wehlisa amehlo aziphakamisako, kodwana usindisa amehlo azithobileko." 
Job22:30 Ngomsulwa kwaphela amtjhaphululako, iye, usindiswa kuhlanzeka kwezandla zakhe.”" 
Job23:1 UJobho waphendula wathi: 
Job23:2 “Ilanga loke isinghonghoyilo sami simunyu, nanyana ngibubula, isandla sakaZimu sinzima phezu kwami." 
Job23:3 Nangathana bengazi bonyana ngingamfunyanaphi, bengizakuya ebandla alilungiseleleko." 
Job23:4 Bengizakwendlala indabami phambi kwakhe, umlomami bewuzakuzala amezwi wokuzivikela." 
Job23:5 Bengizakufumana kobana ubezangiphendula njani; iye, bengizakwazi lokho agade azokutjho kimi." 
Job23:6 Ubezakujamelana nami ngamandla amakhulu na? Awa, gade azongitjheja yena ngokwakhe." 
Job23:7 Ebandlapho olungileko ubezakubeka indabakhe phambi kwakhe, iye, ngirarulule indabami isiphelani." 
Job23:8 Kodwana nangiya epumalanga, yena akakho lapho, nangiya etjingalanga, angimtholi." 
Job23:9 Emsebenzinakhe ngetlhagwini, angimboni, najikela ngesewula, angimboni nakancani." 
Job23:10 “Nabe angayelela iindlela zami, nabe angangizizinya, bengizakuphuma nginjengegolide." 
Job23:11 Iinyawo zami zinamathele iinthende zakhe, ngihlezi endlelenakhe ngangaphambuka." 
Job23:12 Azange ngisuke emiyalweni yomlomakhe, amezwakhe ngawafihla esifubeni sami." 
Job23:13 Kodwana yena ufana yedwa. Ngubani ongamtjhugulula? Wenza lokho akuthandako. 
Job23:14 Ufeza akuqunte ngami, ngaleyondlela uneminqopho enjalo ngabanengi." 
Job23:15 Kungalokho ngiyathuthumela phambi kwakhe. Nangicabanga ngakho koke lokhu, ngifikelwa livalo." 
Job23:16 UZimu unyamise ihliziywami, oSabekako ungithuthumelisile." 
Job23:17 Mbala angikathuliswa bumnyama, namkha ubujamo obunzima engikibo." 
Job24:1 Kubayini oSabekako angabeki iinkhathi zokugweba? Kubayini labo abamaziko bafune amalanga anjalo bangawafumani? 
Job24:2 Kukhona abatjhidisa iinkhonkhwani, belusa imihlambi abayithumbileko." 
Job24:3 Bathumba abodumbana beentandani, bemuke umhlolokazi ikomakhe ngesibambiso." 
Job24:4 Bafuqula abadududu endleleni, abakhwahlileko enarheni bayabhaca nabezako." 
Job24:5 Abachakileko banjengabodumbana, iye, abodumbana bommango erhalawumbeni: Baphuma baye emsebenzini wemihla, bazumane neenquqwana zokudla ebhudwini, kobana kube kukudla kwabantwababo." 
Job24:6 Emasimini babuthelela amakhikhizela wakhona, baburuje eendiribeni zeenkhohlakali." 
Job24:7 Ngokutlhoga iingubo, balala lize, baswele kokuzembesa emakhazeni." 
Job24:8 Bathambiswa lizulu leentaba, bazisitha edwaleni kobana baphephe." 
Job24:9 Kukhona abahlwitha onganayise ebeleni, benze isibambiso ngesana lochakileko." 
Job24:10 Iinkhwahla zikhamba hlubule, azinazambatho; zithwala iintjherefu zekoroyi ngendlala." 
Job24:11 Emini zihlala emkghotheni wendlela; zigadange amadiribe ngomrhawu. 
Job24:12 Ngedorobheni kuquma abahlongakalako, imiphefumulo esebuhlungwini bamanceba ifuna isizo, kodwana uZimu akasoli namunye ngobumbi." 
Job24:13 “Kunalabo abahlubuka ukukhanya, abangazi iindlela zakhona, begodu abahlali emizileni yakhona." 
Job24:14 Lokha nakuhlwako umbulali uyavuka, abulale ochakileko noswelako, iye, ebusuku unanaba njengesela." 
Job24:15 Ilihlo lesihlobongi ligada ukuhlwa, sizitjele sithi, ‘Angingabonwa’, nje-ke, sifihla ubuso baso." 
Job24:16 Ebusuku iinkumba ziyagqekezwa, emini abagqekezi bayazivalela, ngombana abazwani nomkhanyo." 
Job24:17 Ilanga labo lithoma nakumnyama tshu, bajayelene nokwesabeka kobumnyama." 
Job24:18 “Nina nithi, ‘Abantwabo bakhukhulwa mamanzi, isabelo sabo senarha sizakuba sisethuko, akunamuntu ozakunaka iindiribe zabo." 
Job24:19 Isomiso nomtjhiso ziginya amanzi werhwaba, ngokunjalo nethuna lirhiribidela abonileko." 
Job24:20 Umbelethakhe uzamkhohlwa, iimpethu zimudle, angeze asakhunjulwa nakanye, iye, ubumbi bephulwa njengeenkuni." 
Job24:21 UZimu uzakondla inyumba, iye, umfazi onganamntwana, kanye nomhlolokazi ongaphathwa kuhle." 
Job24:22 Ngamandlakhe uzakukhukhula iinrhonga, amele onganathemba epilweni." 
Job24:23 Uzamnikela ukuphepha ukuze ename ngombana amehlwakhe aseendleleni zeenrhonga. 
Job24:24 Iinrhonga ziphakanyiswa kwesikhatjhana kodwana zibuye zinyamalale; zibuna njengotjani bezibuthelelwe ndawonye; mbala, zigwetjwa njengeenqwambe zekoroyi.’" 
Job24:25 “Amezwami aliqiniso! Ngubani ongangiphikisa, awenze abe lilize na?”" 
Job25:1 Yeke uBhilidadi umTjhurhi waphendula wathi: 
Job25:2 “Igunya nokwesabeka kungekwakaZimu, yena ugcina ukuthula ekuphakameni kwezulu lakhe." 
Job25:3 Ngubani ongabala amabuthwakhe? Ukukhanya kwakhe kukiyo yoke indawo. 
Job25:4 Alo, obhubhako angaba ngolungileko njani phambi kwakaZimu? Angaba msulwa njani obelethwe mfazi?" 
Job25:5 Nakube ngitjho nenyezi ayikacwebi neenkwekwezi azikhanyeli emehlwenakhe," 
Job25:6 kangangani-ke obhubhako, oziimpethu kwaphela, iye, indodana yomuntu esibungu sakosibungu!”" 
Job26:1 UJobho waphendula wathi: 
Job26:2 “Maye, umsize kangangani obogabogako! Wanceda ingalo enganamandla!" 
Job26:3 Wanikela ongakahlakaniphi iseluleko! Wazisa okungaveza imiphumela emihle! 
Job26:4 Ngubani okufundise amezwi lawo? Uwakhulume ngommoya kabani? 
Job26:5 Iintsitsirimba zithuthumela ekuzikeni kwelwandle, iye, amanzi nokukiwo kuyazamazama." 
Job26:6 Indawo yabafileko yembulekile kuZimu, indawo yokubhujiswa isepepeneneni." 
Job26:7 Wendlala isibhakabhaka esingetlhagwini njengetende elinganansika, alembelelise umhlaba phezu kwelize." 
Job26:8 Uphuthela amanzi ngamafu wakhona, kodwana amafu lawo akaphadlhuki." 
Job26:9 Wembesa ilingaphambili lesihlalo sakhe sobukhosi, aqhise amafu phambi kwaso." 
Job26:10 Uthala isiyingi somkayi ebusweni bamanzi, sibe mkhawulo okude wepelamehlo phakathi kobumnyama nokukhanya." 
Job26:11 Iinsekelo zamazulu zihlengezele, zethuswe kukhalima kwakhe." 
Job26:12 Ngamandlakhe wathulisa ilwandle, ngekghono lakhe waphihliza uRahabu." 
Job26:13 Iye, isandla sakhe sahlaba inyoka etjhelelako, ngokuphefumula kwakhe umkayi wacweba." 
Job26:14 Lokhu seziinquqwana zomsebenzakhe; amahlebezi ngaye siwazwela kude. Ngubani ongazwisisa umdumo wamandlakhe?” 
Job27:1 UJobho waragela phambili ngekulumakhe wathi: 
Job27:2 “NguZimu obekele indabami eqadi, iye, ngoSabekako owenze umphefumulwami waba munyu," 
Job27:3 ngiyafunga ngithi, qobana ummoyami usahlangene nenyama, iye, nomphefumulo engiwuphiwe nguZimu useempumulweni zami," 
Job27:4 umlomami angeze wakhuluma okuphambeneko, nelimu lami alizukuba nekohliso." 
Job27:5 Angeze bengivume bonyana nineqiniso, ngizabe ngiyokufa ngilokhu ngimsulwa." 
Job27:6 Ngizakukakarela ekulungeni kwami, ngingavumi bona kungiphunyurhe. Imihla yoke yokuphila kwami, akukho lapha ihliziywami ingisola khona." 
Job27:7 Izitha zami sese zifana nabakhohlakeleko, abajamelene nami banjengabonakeleko." 
Job27:8 Liyini ithemba lomzenzisi, lokha uZimu naqunta ipilwakhe iye, nasele athatha umphefumulwakhe na?" 
Job27:9 UZimu uyasilalela isililo sakhe na, lokha nehlelwa matshwenyeko?" 
Job27:10 Onjalo uyathokoza koSabekako na? Uyambiza uZimu ngeenkhathi zoke na? 
Job27:11 Nginifundisa njalo lokho uZimu akwenze kimi, angifihli iindlela zoSabekako!" 
Job27:12 Qalani, noke nizibonele lokhu! Alo, yikulumo yani-ke engazisiko le?”" 
Job27:13 “Awa, nasi isiphetho uSomnini asibekele isikhohlakali, nelifa elifunyanwa migulukudu koSabekako:" 
Job27:14 Nanyana abantwabaso bangaba banengi, bazakuphelela esabuleni, iinzukulwana zaso ziswele ukudla." 
Job27:15 Eziseleko ziye ethuneni ngebanga lesifo, abahlolokazi abanaso baphelelwe ziinyembezi." 
Job27:16 Nanyana singabuthelela isiliva inga lithuli, sidindele izambatho njengendunduma yomdaka," 
Job27:17 abalungileko bazakwembatha nasilokhu sidindela njalo, nabamsulwa bahlukanise isilivelo." 
Job27:18 Ikumba esiyakhako ifana nendlelwana yomvunya, injengomthunzi wamatjhwaba owakhiwe mlindi esivandeni." 
Job27:19 Silala singonjingileko, sivuke singanalitho, nasivula amehlwaso, koke kutjhabalele." 
Job27:20 Ukwesaba kusibhudungela njengeenkhukhula, ebusuku siphetjhulwe siwuruwuru." 
Job27:21 Ummoya wepumalanga uyasiphephula, sikhambe, usidudule, sitjhide endawenaso." 
Job27:22 Usithelekela ngaphandle kwesirhawu, silinga ngakho koke ukubalekela amandlawo." 
Job27:23 Iye, wenza itjhada lokuwahla phezu kwaso, uvunguze ngehla kwaso, besibaleke endawenaso.”" 
Job28:1 Ngambala kunomgodi wesiliva nendawo lapha kuhlungwa khona igolide. 
Job28:2 Isimbi ikhutjhwa equlwanini ephadlhiweko, ikoporo incibilikiswa elitjeni lakhona." 
Job28:3 Umuntu uyabuphelisa ubumnyama, abhenyegule abe ayokufika emaphethelweni, afunisise elitjeni lapha kufifiyela khona, ngitjho nalapha kunzima tshu." 
Job28:4 Ulembeleliselwa ngemgodini ngomutja, aqeqebule umkghotha edwaleni, iinyawo zisemmoyeni; ulengela emgodini, kude nabantu." 
Job28:5 Umhlaba okuvela kiwo ukudla, ngaphasi uphendulelwa ngomlilo" 
Job28:6 edwaleni lawo kuvela amatje wesafaya nethuli lakhona linegolide. 
Job28:7 Indlela eya emikghotheni leyo ayaziwa madlanga, namakhozi akayiboni." 
Job28:8 Iinkhakhabi azingeni emikghothwenapho nebhubezi alitjhideli lapho. 
Job28:9 Umuntu ubeka isandla sakhe elitjeni eliqinileko; apewule iintaba emirabhinazo. 
Job28:10 Wemba imikghotha edwaleni, amehlwakhe abone woke amagugu." 
Job28:11 Uvala imithambo yamanzi, okufihliweko akuveze emkhanyweni." 
Job28:12 Kodwana kufunyanwaphi ukuhlakanipha? Ilwazi lona lihlala kuphi na? 
Job28:13 Umuntu akazwisisi ukuqakatheka kwalo, ngombana alifunyanwa emphakathini." 
Job28:14 Ukuzika kuthi: “Akukho kimi.” Ilwandle nalo lithi: “Akukho kimapha.” 
Job28:15 Akuthengwa ngegolidembala, namkha kulinganiswe isiliva njengenani lakhona." 
Job28:16 Akukhokhelwa ngegolide le-Ofira, namkha ngamatje aligugu we-oniksi newesafaya." 
Job28:17 Igolide nerhalasi azilinganiseki nokuhlakanipha, namkha kwenaniswe ngezitja zegolide." 
Job28:18 Ungalingi ukukhokhele ngekorali nekhristali, ngombana inani lokuhlakanipha lingaphezu kwamaparele." 
Job28:19 Akulinganiswa nethophazi kaKutjhe, godu angeze kwathengwa ngitjho nangegolidembala." 
Job28:20 Alo, kubuyaphi-ke ukuhlakanipha? Ukuzwisisa khona kuhlala kuphi?" 
Job28:21 Kufihlakele emehlweni wakho koke okuphilako, kufihlakele ngitjho neenyonini zomkayi." 
Job28:22 Ukubhujiswa nokufa kuthi: “Nathi siyakuzwela ukuhlakaniphokho.” 
Job28:23 UZimu nguye owazi indlela eya kikho, nguye kwaphela owaziko bona kuhlalaphi." 
Job28:24 Iye, yena ubona amaphethelo womhlaba, abone koke okungaphasi komthunzi welanga." 
Job28:25 Lokha nanikela ummoya amandla, walinganisa ubukhulu bamanzi," 
Job28:26 lokha nenzela izulu isimiso namafu anzima indlelawo," 
Job28:27 waqala ukuhlakanipha wakubuka, wakuhlela bewakuhlolisisa." 
Job28:28 Wathi emuntwini: “Ukwesaba uSomandla kukuhlakanipha! Ukutjhida ebumbini kukuzwisisa!” 
Job29:1 UJobho wabuyela endabenakhe godu wathi: 
Job29:2 “Maye, ngubani nje ongangibuyisela eenyangeni ezadlulako, emihleni lokha uZimu nagade angelusa!" 
Job29:3 Isibani sakhe besikhanyisa ehlokwami, ngokukhanya kwakhe ngikhambe ebumnyameni!" 
Job29:4 Maye, ngikhumbula nakusese ngimokha, lokha umuzami usavikelwa nguZimu," 
Job29:5 oSabekako nasese nami nabantwabami bangibhodile," 
Job29:6 iinyawo zami ngizihlamba ngomlaza negagadu lingigelezela imisele yamafutha we-oliva. 
Job29:7 “Lokha nangikhuphukela etatawini ledorobho. ngibeke isihlalo sami ebandla," 
Job29:8 amasokana nangibonako bekadeda, amaqhegu asikime, ajame." 
Job29:9 Iinkhulu bezithula zithi du, zibambe umlomo;" 
Job29:10 nakumele kukhulunywe, abosaziwako bebajamela ncanye, amalimabo anamathele erhwalabheni." 
Job29:11 Woke ogade angizwa bekangibuka, nalabo abangibonako bebangikhakhazisa," 
Job29:12 ngombana bengenyela okhwahlileko nonganayise, onganabani ongamsiza ezandleni zeenjinga ezimarhamaru." 
Job29:13 Uzulani nangibusisako bengibusiseka bese ngijabulise ihliziyo yomhlolokazi. 
Job29:14 Bengembatha ukulunga, nakho kungembathe; ubulungiswa kimi bebunjengenaka nomtjhotjho." 
Job29:15 Bengililihlo kongaboniko, ngiziinyawo zorholopheleko." 
Job29:16 Iye, bengingubaba kabakhwahlileko, ngijamela ngitjho nendaba yesikhambi." 
Job29:17 Nje-ke, ngikhamisise abakhohlakeleko, ngahlwitha abongazimbi emazinywenabo." 
Job29:18 “Ngadlumbana ngathi, ‘Ngizakufela hlangana namadzinyanami, amalangami azakuba manengi, abe njengetjhwabatjhwaba yelwandle." 
Job29:19 Ngemirabhami emanzini nombethe eempandeni zami ebusuku," 
Job29:20 ngizakuhlala ngidunyiswa njalo, negunya lami livuselelwe.’" 
Job29:21 Ebandla abantu bebathula bangilalele, iye, bebathula balalele izeluleko zami." 
Job29:22 Ngemva kwekulumami, bebangasabi nelizwi; amezwami befumbentela phezu kwabo." 
Job29:23 Bebangilinda kwanga balinde izulu, bavule imilomabo inga bakhamisele izulu lesilimela." 
Job29:24 Bengimomotheka lokha nabanganathemba, ukuhleka kwami bekubakhuthaza." 
Job29:25 Bengibakhethela indlela, ngibe ngusihlalo ebandla ngihlale inga ngiyikosi hlangana namabuthwayo, nginjengomduduzi wabalilako kibo." 
Job30:1 Kodwana gadesi bahlekisa ngami, ngitjho nabantu abancani kimi ngeminyaka! Iye, abantwana balabo egade ngingabatjheji kobana ngingabahlalisa nezinja zomhlambami." 
Job30:2 Amandla wezandla zabo bekazakuba yini kimi? Umdlandlabo uyile," 
Job30:3 ngebanga lokuswela nangendlala ebhokileko! Ebusuku bakhuma ihlabathi eyomileko: Ebhudwini nendaweni emumango 
Job30:4 bakha imirorho emunyu emahlatjhaneni, banqothula nemirabhu yemithi yomthanyelo ukuze baziphilise." 
Job30:5 Bayaqotjhwa emphakathini, kurhuwelelwe emva kwabo inga masela." 
Job30:6 Bakatelelekile ukuhlala emadongeni wemilanjana, iye, emipharwini yomhlaba neyamadwala." 
Job30:7 Babongolela hlangana namahlatjhana, babuthane hlangana neentjhutha." 
Job30:8 Basizukulwana esinganamikghwa nesinganabizo, ngilabo abaqotjhiweko enarheni!" 
Job30:9 “Nje-ke, gadesi ngisiphoqo sengomabo! Sese ngiphenduke isiga kibo!" 
Job30:10 Bayanginyenya, bakhambela kude nami, abananhloni zokungikhafula phambi kwami." 
Job30:11 Njengombana uZimu angitjhiye ngingakavikeleki bewangithobisa, bona-ke sese bazenzela phezu kwami." 
Job30:12 Ngesigomeni sami ngivukelwa yicubevange, bangenza bona ngibaleke, bangisahlela kobana bangibhubhise." 
Job30:13 Bavimba indlelami yokuphuma ukuze bangiqedelele, onganamsizi kumele abhace." 
Job30:14 Bangithelekela njengamanzi agobhozako, beza njengeenkhukhula zezulu elinamandla." 
Job30:15 Ngehlelwa kukwesabeka, isithunzi sami siyaphephuka inga mumoya, njengelifu ukwaziwa kwami kuyatjhabalala." 
Job30:16 Nakungimi yena, ipilwami iyathuluka, ngikakarelwa malanga wokuhlunguphazwa kwami." 
Job30:17 Ubusuku buqhoboza amathambami, ubuhlungu obungiququdako abupheli." 
Job30:18 Ngamandla amakhulu uZimu ubamba isambatho sami, iye, ungitjhubelela ngentamo yenaka lami," 
Job30:19 ungijikijela edakeni, sengaba njengethuli nomlotha." 
Job30:20 “Ngiyakubiza Zimu, kodwana awungiphenduli, ngiyasikima ngithandaze, awungitjheji!" 
Job30:21 Ungiphendukele ngokunganasirhawu, ngesandla sakho esinamandla, wangiphatha njengesitha." 
Job30:22 Ungidzwebule, wangikhweza ummoya, wangivunguzela hlangana nesiwuruwuru." 
Job30:23 Ngiyazi uzongehlisela phasi kabafileko, endaweni ebekelwe boke abaphilako." 
Job30:24 Akunamuntu ongatjhejana newiliwili, ingode engasenakuhlengwa!" 
Job30:25 Mina ngabalilela abasesizini, ummoyami wazwelana nabakhwahlileko," 
Job30:26 kodwana nangilindele okuhle, kuvela ubumbi, nangiqalelela umkhanyo, kuvela ubumnyama." 
Job30:27 Ukuwurubajeka okungaphakathi kwami akuthuli, ngehlelwa malanga wamahlungu." 
Job30:28 Ngikhamba ngitjhile, kodwana ingasi ngokutjhiswa lilanga. Ebandla ngiyasikima ngizibike." 
Job30:29 Sese ngimfowabo leempungutjha, umngani weenciliba." 
Job30:30 Isikhumba sami sese sinzima begodu siyakaruka, ngiyatjha emzimbeni ngomgomani." 
Job30:31 Iharibha lami liphenduke isililo nenghwani lami isirhahlawulo. 
Job31:1 Ngenze isivumelwano namehlwami, kobana ngingaqali itlawu ngokulikhanukela." 
Job31:2 Siyini isabelo somuntu kuZimu ongaphezulu, ilifa alifumana koSabekako ekuphakameni na?" 
Job31:3 Lokho kuyihlekelele yokhohlakeleko, nelitjhwa kabenza okuphambeneko." 
Job31:4 Ingabe uZimu akaboni iindlela zami, abe abale woke amagadangwami na?" 
Job31:5 Ngiyafunga bona akhange ngikhambe magwegwe, namkha inyawo lami lirhabele ikohliso!" 
Job31:6 Nakube uZimu ungibeke esilinganisweni seqiniso, uzakubona ubuqotho bami." 
Job31:7 Ngiyafunga bona amagadangwami akhange aphambuke endleleni, ihliziywami akhange ilandele amehlwami nezandla zami akhange zichaphazelwe yisila." 
Job31:8 Nakungasinjalo, engikutjalileko akugonywe ngabanye, iye, basiphule ngitjho nesivuno sami." 
Job31:9 Ngiyafunga bona ihliziywami akhange iyengwe mfazi, akhange nginanabele umkamakhelwanami." 
Job31:10 Nakungasinjalo, umkami akasilele omunye, angenwe nanyana ngiyiphi indoda." 
Job31:11 Ngambala ukuyengwa mfazokho, bekuzakuba lihlazo lakohlazo, kube sisono sokwahlulelwa;" 
Job31:12 iye, kube mlilo ongatjhisa ubulale, kungibize isivuno sami soke!" 
Job31:13 Ngiyafunga bona akhange ngilahle indaba yekhoboka neyekhobokakazi lami, lokha nanghonghoyila kimi." 
Job31:14 Bengizokwenza njani lokha uZimu nasikima ngokujamelana nami na? Bengizokuphendula ngithini nagade angiphenya? 
Job31:15 Owangibumba esibelethweni, nguye owabumba nekhoboka. Nguye yedwa owasidala esiswini." 
Job31:16 Ngiyafunga bona azange ngigodle iinrhuluphelo zabadududu, namkha ngifiphaze amehlo womhlolokazi." 
Job31:17 Godu azange ngigome isikwa sami ngedwa, kodwana nentandani yaba nesabelo kiso," 
Job31:18 ngombana ukusukela ebutjheni bami uZimu wangiphatha njengobaba, iye, wangihlahla ukusukela esibelethweni sakamma." 
Job31:19 Ngiyafunga bona akhange ngithi nangibona uzulani aswela izambatho namkha otlhagileko akhamba hlubule, ngimlise." 
Job31:20 Imizimbabo beyithokoza ngami, nasele ifuthumele ngoboya bezimvu zami." 
Job31:21 Ngiyafunga bona akhange ngikhombe omsulwa ngeguduva, lokha nangizibona nginabasekeli ebandla." 
Job31:22 Nakungasinjalo, isiphanga sami asiwohloke ehlombe lami, umkhonwami ukhwamuke esiphangeni." 
Job31:23 Ngambala, benginevalo ngehlekelele evela kuZimu; bengingeze ngakwazi ukujamelana nephazimulwakhe!" 
Job31:24 Ngiyafunga bona akhange ngibeke ithemba lami egolideni, namkha ngathi egolidenimbala, ‘Wena usibambelelo sami’." 
Job31:25 Akhange ngename ngomnonwami ongangobaba, namkha ngamandla wenzuzo yawo." 
Job31:26 Ngiyafunga bona akhange ngiqale ilanga ekukhanyeni kwalo, namkha inyezi nayikhamba ekuphazimuleni kwayo." 
Job31:27 Godu ihliziywami akhange iyengeke buntumba, namkha ngincwange isandla sami." 
Job31:28 Ngambala lokho bekuzakuba sisono ekumele sahlulelwe, bengizabe ngingakathembeki kuZimu ophezulu." 
Job31:29 Ngiyafunga bona akhange ngithabele ihlekelele eyehlela ongizondako, namkha ngibukise ngobumbi obumehleleko." 
Job31:30 Akhange ngivumele umlomami bona wone, ngokumhlolozela ngamanikelela wokufa." 
Job31:31 Ngiyaqinisa bona amalunga womzami gade ahlala asithi, ‘Ngubani ongazange azisuthise etafuleni lakaJobho na?’" 
Job31:32 Ngambala akunasikhonzi esakhe salala ebaleni, iminyangwami beyihlala ivulekele isikhambi." 
Job31:33 Ngiyafunga bona, nanyana ngimumuntu wenyama, akhange ngisibekele isono sami. Azange ngifihle umlandwami esifubeni," 
Job31:34 ngebanga lokwesaba isiqubuthu. Akhange ngesabe kobana imindeni izangirhubutjha bese ngathula, ngangaphumela tjhatjhalazi." 
Job31:35 “Ngiphetha ikulumami ngokutlikitla! Inga uZimu angangizwa, oSabekako angiphendule! Kwanga ongimangalelako angatlola phasi indabakhe!" 
Job31:36 Ngiyafunga bona lokho ngizakutjatha emahlombe, ngikuthwale njengesihlohlo." 
Job31:37 Ngizamnikela imininingwana yelinye nelinye igadango lami, njengalokha bengizakunikela umgwebi ngokunjalo ngizamnikela yona." 
Job31:38 Ngiyafunga bona amasimami azange akhe angimangalele, imisedlanayo akhange ilile phambi kwakaZimu." 
Job31:39 Iye, akhange ngigome iinthelo zawo simahla, azange ngibangele bona iinsebenzi zawo zidose nzima." 
Job31:40 Nakungasinjalo, akumile ameva esikhundleni sekoroyi, kumile ikhula esikhundleni sebhali.” Aphelela lapha-ke amezwi kaJobho." 
Job32:1 Yeke amadoda amathathu lawo alisa ukuphendulana noJobho ngombana gade azibona amsulwa. 
Job32:2 Kodwana u-Elihu umsa kaBharakeli, umBhuzi womndeni kaRama, wathukuthelela uJobho khulu. Wamthukuthelela ngebanga lokuzithethelela kwakhe phambi koZimu." 
Job32:3 Godu wathukuthelela abangani abathathu ngombana bahlulwa kufumana ipendulo kuJobho kodwana khonapho baragela phambili nokumsola ngobukhohlakali. 
Job32:4 Ngebanga lokobana amadoda lawo bekamakhulu kuye, u-Elihu walinda ngaphambi kobana akhulume noJobho." 
Job32:5 Nje-ke, kuthe lokha nabona bonyana amadoda amathathu lawo akasenapendulo, kwathi akafe ngetukuthelo." 
Job32:6 Yeke u-Elihu umsa kaBharakeli umBhuzi wathi: “Mina ngisese mutjha ngeminyaka, nina sele nibadala. Kungalokho ngibe nevalo, ngesaba ukunitjela engikwaziko." 
Job32:7 Ngadlumbana ngathi, ‘Akukhulume isikhathi, iminyaka ifundise ukuhlakanipha.’" 
Job32:8 Kuhlekuhle mumoya osemuntwini, iye, mphefumulo woSabekako onikela abantu ukwazi." 
Job32:9 Ubudala abumenzi umuntu ahlakaniphe nokuluphala akumenzi azi okufaneleko. 
Job32:10 Kungalokho ngithe, ‘Ngilalelani! Nami ngizanitjela engikwaziko.’" 
Job32:11 Qala, fengalinda amezwenu, ngalalela imibonwenu. Nanilokhu nifunana namagama," 
Job32:12 bengiseze nginilalele kuhle. Kodwana akakho okghone uJobho, iye, phakathi kwenu akakho okghone ukuphendula amezwakhe." 
Job32:13 Ningeze nathi, ‘Sifumene ukuhlakanipha kwamambala, nje-ke akube nguZimu oqalana noJobho, kungabi mumuntu.’" 
Job32:14 UJobho nahlela indabakhe ubangakayiqalisi kimi, ngalokho angizumphendula ngamezwenu.”" 
Job32:15 “Abangani bakho bakhenile, baphelelwe begodu abasenamezwi abangawatjho." 
Job32:16 Iye, bathule bathe du, bajamile, abasenapendulo! Alo, ngilinde na?" 
Job32:17 Awa, kwanje-ke lithuba lami lokuphendula, iye, ngitjho engikwaziko." 
Job32:18 Ngiyaphuphuma ngamezwi, ngisunduzwa mumoya ongaphakathi kwami." 
Job32:19 Ngambala, ngaphakathi kwamapha kunjengewayini elivalwe lisabila, iye, njengeenkhumba ezidatjulwa liwayini elitjha." 
Job32:20 Ngimele ngikhulume ngihlambuluke, ngivule umlomami ngiphendule." 
Job32:21 Angizukukhetha ibala, namkha ngiyenge umuntu," 
Job32:22 ngombana angikwazi ukutshima. Nagade ngikwazi, umBumbami ubezangisusa msinyana." 
Job33:1 Nje-ke Jobho, akhe ulalele amezwami, ulalelisise koke engikutjhoko." 
Job33:2 Qala, ngivula umlomami, ilimu lami ngemlonyeni lifuna ukukhuluma." 
Job33:3 Amezwami avuthiweko azakuveza ubuqotho behliziywami, umlomami ukhulume okumsulwa kwaphela." 
Job33:4 UMoya kaZimu uyangenzisa, umphefumulo woSabekako ungenza ngikhulume." 
Job33:5 Ngiphendula-ke, nakube uyakghona, zilungiselele uqalane nami." 
Job33:6 Phambi kwakaZimu sengizifanela nawe, nami ngabunjwa ngomdaka." 
Job33:7 Ngalokho ukungesaba kungakwethusi, nesandla sami singakudisibezi." 
Job33:8 “Kodwana ngikuzwe kuhle, namezwakho ngisawezwa eendlebeni zami lokha nawusithi," 
Job33:9 ‘Ngihlanzekile, anginasiphambeko, ngimsulwa, anginasono." 
Job33:10 Qala, uZimu uyangitjhijila, ungithatha njengesitha sakhe." 
Job33:11 Ubophelela iinyawo zami ngesimbi esigodweni, uqalisisa zoke iindlela zami.’" 
Job33:12 Kodwana ngokutjho njalo kwakho, uphambukile. Ipendulwami kilokho ithi, ‘UZimu mkhulu kunobhubhako.’" 
Job33:13 Kubayini usolane naye, uthi akaphenduli nalinye ilizwi lomuntu?" 
Job33:14 Phela uZimu uyakhuluma, kungaba ngalendlela namkha ngenye, nanyana umuntu angakuboni lokho." 
Job33:15 Kungaba ngebhudango, umbono webusuku: Lokha abantu nababanjwe buthongo, barhona emikghadinabo," 
Job33:16 yena uvula iindlebe zabo, abaphazamise ngeeyeleliso," 
Job33:17 ukuze atjhidise umuntu ekoneni kwakhe, ahlunge ukuzitjhaya kuye," 
Job33:18 amphephise emlonyeni wethuna, iye, ipilwakhe ekubhujisweni ngomkhonto." 
Job33:19 Godu umuntu angakhalinywa ngesihlabi asemkghadini, okukuqaqamba kwamathambo okungapheliko," 
Job33:20 ihliziywakhe ithitjhelwe kugoma, angabi nendeni emhlophe ngeenkhanakhana." 
Job33:21 Umzimbakhe uyawohloka angasaqaleka, namathambakhe ebegade angabonakali, abonakale avele ngaphandle." 
Job33:22 Umphefumulwakhe utjhidela ethuneni, ipilwakhe ibandamela kabafileko." 
Job33:23 “Nakunengilozi yinye phakathi kwekulungwana ebeyingamsekela, imkhulumele, imemezele ukulunga ngaye," 
Job33:24 ibe nomusa kuye ithi, ‘Zimu, msindise emlonyeni wethuna, ngimfumanele isihlengo’," 
Job33:25 umzimbakhe uzakwenziwa butjha ube ngaphezu kwebutjheni bakhe iye, uzakuphuluka ube namandla wobutjha." 
Job33:26 Uzakuthandaza kuZimu, uZimu amamukele, uzazizwela ubukhona bakaZimu ngokuhlokoma, uZimu abuyisele obhubhako esimeni sokulunga." 
Job33:27 Umuntu loyo uzakusuka aye ebantwini athi, ‘Ngonile, ngahlanakezela okulungileko, azange ngifumane okungifaneleko." 
Job33:28 UZimu uhlenge umphefumulwami ekufeni, yeke ngizakuphila ngithokozele ukukhanya.’" 
Job33:29 “UZimu wenzela umuntu koke lokhu, kube kabili, bekube kathathu," 
Job33:30 abuyise umphefumulwakhe ekufeni, ukuze umkhanyo wokuphila ukhanye kuye." 
Job33:31 Yelela-ke Jobho, ungilalelisise, thula uthi du, ngikhulume." 
Job33:32 Nakube kunento ofuna ukuyitjho, ngiphendula, khuluma ndoda, ngombana ngifuna ukuvumelana nawe." 
Job33:33 Kodwana nakube akunalitho, khona-ke yewungilalele, thula uthi du, ngikufundise ukuhlakanipha.”" 
Job34:1 U-Elihu wathatha wathi: 
Job34:2 “Lalelani amezwami nina nhlakaniphi, bekani indlebe kimi nina zazi ndina." 
Job34:3 Mbala, indlebe izizinya amezwi njengombana nelimu linandipha ukugoma." 
Job34:4 Asikhetheni thina lokho okulungileko, siqunte ngokwethu lokho okuhle." 
Job34:5 Njengombana uJobho lo athe, ‘Ngimsulwa! UZimu ungimuke ilungelo lami." 
Job34:6 Nanyana ngineqiniso nje, ngibonwa njengomleyimala; nanyana nginganamlandu, umsubela okimi ungibangele isilonda esingapholiko.’" 
Job34:7 Mumuntu onjani ofana noJobho, ozikholisa ngokunyefula uZimu inga mumuntu osela amanzi na?" 
Job34:8 Ukhozisana nabenza okumbi, azihlanganise neenkhohlakali," 
Job34:9 ngombana uthi, ‘Akumsizi ngalitho umuntu lokha nalinga ukujabulisa uZimu.’" 
Job34:10 Yeke yeningilalele nina madoda anokwazi: Kukude noZimu ukwenza okumbi, kukude noSabekako ukwenza okuphambeneko." 
Job34:11 Unikela umuntu umvuzo ngokwezenzo zakhe, amehlisele okukhambisana nokuziphatha kwakhe." 
Job34:12 Mbala, uZimu akenzi ubukhohlakali, oSabekako akahlanakezeli ubulungiswa." 
Job34:13 Ngubani owambeka bona aphathe umhlaba? Ngubani owambeka phezu kwelizwe loke? 
Job34:14 Nabegade angahlosa ukuthatha ummoyakhe nomphefumulwakhe," 
Job34:15 koke okuphilako gade kuzakubhubha, umuntu abuyele ethulini." 
Job34:16 “Nakube unelwazi wena Jobho, lalela lokhu, yelela amezwami!" 
Job34:17 Ozonda ukulunga angabusa na? Ungasola olungileko nonamandla ngokungalungi na? 
Job34:18 Nguye ongathi emakhosini, ‘Niziinrhwirirhwiri’, bese athi emakhosaneni, ‘Niziinkhohlakali’," 
Job34:19 ongakhethi ubuso beenkhulu, ongabeki abanothileko phambi kwabadududu ngombana boke bamsebenzi wezandla zakhe." 
Job34:20 Msinyana bayabhubha, ngokurhabileko abanjingileko bayadlula banyamalale, abanamandla bayasuswa kungengasandla somuntu." 
Job34:21 Amehlwakhe aseendleleni zabantu, ubona amagadangwabo woke." 
Job34:22 Akunandawo emnyama, ngitjho nobumnyama obunzima tshu, lapha abenza okumbi bangabhaca khona." 
Job34:23 UZimu akadingi ukubeka isikhathi sokobana umuntu avele phambi kwakhe ebandla. 
Job34:24 Ngaphandle kokubuza, ususa abanamandla, ajamise abanye eenkhundleni zabo," 
Job34:25 ngombana uyelela izenzo zabo. Msinyana angabehlisela ihlekelele bese bayabhubha. 
Job34:26 Ubahlunguphazela ukukhohlakala kwabo, emtarini babonwe mumuntu woke." 
Job34:27 Umphumela wokuhlubuka kwabo nokungayeleli iindlela zakhe," 
Job34:28 kukukobana isililo sodududu sizwakala kuye, begodu uzwa isililo sabagandelelweko." 
Job34:29 Lokha uZimu nathulileko, ngubani ongamsola ngokungalungi? Nange afihla ubuso bakhe, ngubani ongamkhalimela? Yena ulawula izizwe nomuntu ngamunye" 
Job34:30 ukuze onganaZimu angabusi, angabi sisifu ebantwini." 
Job34:31 Akhe sithi umuntu onjalo uthi kuZimu, ‘Nginomlandu, nokho angeze bengisona;" 
Job34:32 ngizakuyelela, yewungifundise, nakube ngiphosisile, angeze bengisathoma.’" 
Job34:33 Alo, utjho bona uZimu ahlunguphaze onjalo ngebanga lokobana wena umlahlile na? Nguwe owenze isiqunto elinjalo, ingasi mina! Nje-ke, veza umbonwakho ndoda!" 
Job34:34 Amadoda anelwazi azakuvumelana nami, iye, indoda ehlakaniphileko izakuthi kimi," 
Job34:35 ‘UJobho ukhuluma anganalwazi, amagamakhe akakavuthwa.’" 
Job34:36 “Madoda! Kwangathi uJobho lo angahlala ahlolisiswa, ngombana iimpendulo zakhe ngezabantu abakhohlakeleko." 
Job34:37 Uthi anezono angezelele ngokuba lihlubuka, uthintitha izandla ngokunyefula phakathi kwethwapha, abe namagama amdlulako kuZimu.”" 
Job35:1 Godu u-Elihu wathatha wathi: 
Job35:2 “Wena Jobho, udlumbana bona lokhu kulungile lokha nawuzitjela uthi, ‘Anginamlandu ngehlangothini lakaZimu’," 
Job35:3 nalokha nawubuza uthi, ‘Kungisizani nje? Ngizathi ngizuzani nangingoniko?’" 
Job35:4 Mina ngizakuphendula-ke, wena nabangani bakhwabo:" 
Job35:5 Qala phezulu emazulwini uyelele, ubone amafu aphakeme ngehla kwakho." 
Job35:6 Nawonako, lokho kumthinta ngani uZimu? Nakube iimphambeko zakho ziba zinengi, kumgugunaphi yena?" 
Job35:7 Nakube wena ulungile, yini oyiletha kuye? Wamukela ini kuwe na?" 
Job35:8 Ubukhohlakali bakho buthinta kwaphela umuntu onjengawe, nokulunga kwakho kuthinta kwaphela indoda efana nawe." 
Job35:9 “Abantu bayarhahlawula ngabagandeleli abanengi, balila ngebanga lamandla wabanengi," 
Job35:10 esikhundleni sokuthi, ‘Uphi uZimu, umDalami ongikhoselisa ebumnyameni," 
Job35:11 osenze sehluka eembandaneni zephasi, nosihlakaniphise kuneenyoni zomkayi na?’" 
Job35:12 Ebandlapho baliliswa kuziphakamisa kwabambi, kodwana uZimu akaphenduli." 
Job35:13 Ngambala uZimu akasilaleli isililo esingatjho litho, oSabekako akasinaki." 
Job35:14 Nanyana ungamboni asenza ilitho, yazi bonyana indabakho iphambi kwakhe. Wena mlindele nje kwaphela." 
Job35:15 Nawungenzi njalo, itukuthelwakhe izakwehlela; yena akayeleli umuntu oqoqomako." 
Job35:16 UJobho lo ukhuluma ummoya, wande ngamezwi aqinileko anganangqondo.”" 
Job36:1 U-Elihu wangezelela wathi: 
Job36:2 “Akhe ningibekezelele kancani, kunengi engingakutjho ukumela uZimu." 
Job36:3 Ilwazi enginalo libuya kudanyana, ngizakhuluma ukulunga ngoMdalami." 
Job36:4 Ngambala, amezwami akasimamala, nangumuntu onelwazi elipheleleko phakathi kwenu." 
Job36:5 Qalani, uZimu unamandla begodu akanyazi umuntu, yena unamandla amakhulu ekuzwisiseni." 
Job36:6 Abakhohlakeleko akabagcini baphila, kodwana umela abagandelelweko." 
Job36:7 Akawasusi amehlwakhe kabalungileko, ubahlalisa namakhosi esihlalweni sawo; bagcinekile begodu bayaphakanyiswa." 
Job36:8 Nakube abantu babotjhwe ngeenketani, bakhungwa ngeentambo zobuhlungu," 
Job36:9 uZimu ubatjela lokho abakwenzileko, ngitjho neemphambeko zabo kobana banezenzo zelunya." 
Job36:10 Ubenza bayelele bonyana uyabakhalima, abayale kobana baphenduke kokumbi." 
Job36:11 Nakube bayamlalela bebamlotjhe, bazakuhlala emnonweni imihlabo yoke, bakhombe ngophakathi iminyakabo yoke." 
Job36:12 Kodwana nakube abalaleli, bazakubhubha ngomkhonto, bafe ngokuswela ilwazi." 
Job36:13 AbanganaZimu ehliziyweni bakghubelela itukuthelwakhe, abalileli isizo kuye lokha nababophako." 
Job36:14 Bafa basese batjha, ipilwabo isathambile." 
Job36:15 UZimu usindisa ngobuhlungu abahlunguphaziweko, iye, uvula iindlebe zabo ngegandelelo." 
Job36:16 “UZimu bekangakuphunyurhisa hlangana nemihlathi yesizi, akuse endaweni ebanzi. Bekangagcwalisa isithebe sakho ngeenkhanakhana zokudla godu." 
Job36:17 Kodwana wena ulungelwe sigwebo sesikhohlakali, sewembethwe kugwetjwa kanye nokulunga." 
Job36:18 Umuntu kufuze atjheje angayengwa mnono, angavumeli ukufunjathiswa okunengi kumphambukise." 
Job36:19 Idumo lakho belingalinganiswa negolide, ngitjho nepahlakho yoke na?" 
Job36:20 Ebusuku bewungakameli ukutjhidisa abantu eendaweni zabo. 
Job36:21 Bewufanele utjheje, ungaphambukeli ekohlakalweni, ngombana ngalokho uzizinywe yihlupheko." 
Job36:22 Nakube uZimu uziveza aphakeme emandlenakhe ngubani ongafundisa njengaye na? 
Job36:23 Ngubani omkhokhela eendleleni zakhe, namkha athi kuye, ‘Lapha utjhaphile’ na?" 
Job36:24 “Khumbula ukudumisa imisebenzakhe, abantu ababhina ngayo." 
Job36:25 Boke abantu bakubonile lokho, obhubhako ukubukela akude." 
Job36:26 Maye uZimu mkhulu! Ungaphezu kokwazi kwethu! Inani leminyakakhe aliphenyeki. 
Job36:27 Wenyusa amathosi wamanzi, awatsenge ekungwini kube lizulu," 
Job36:28 elehliselwa mamafu ehlabathini nombethe okhithikela phezu kwabantu. 
Job36:29 Godu ngubani ongalemuka bona amafu endlaleka njani nokuduma kwesibhakabhaka sakhe na? 
Job36:30 Qala, uhlakaza umbanakhe phezulu, ngawo embese amaphethelo welwandle." 
Job36:31 Ngezulu nangombani ugweba abantu, abe anikele ngokudla okunengi." 
Job36:32 Izandla zakhe zifumbethe umbani, uyawuyala bona urarambe kuphi." 
Job36:33 Umdumo womkhosakhe uyambika, itukuthelwakhe ilwa nokonakala." 
Job37:1 Ngalokho ihliziywami iyathuthumela, yeqayeqa endawenayo ngebanga lomdumakhe." 
Job37:2 Lalela ukundonda kwelizwi lakhe nokundindiza okuvela emlonyenakhe," 
Job37:3 uthukulula umdumo usabalale nephasi loke. Umbanakhe uphazima emaphethelweni wephasi," 
Job37:4 ngemva kwalapho kurarambe umdumo, iye, adume ngelizwi lobukhosi bakhe. Akagodli ukunyazima kwakhe ukuze azwakalise ilizwi lakhe." 
Job37:5 Iphimbo lakaZimu lithuthumba ngeendlela ezibabazekako, wenza izinto ezikulu ngaphezu kokwazi kwethu:" 
Job37:6 Uyala iliqhwa athi, ‘Yehlela ephasini!’, umwuluko wezulu, iye, umwuluko ukhombisa amandlakhe." 
Job37:7 Ujamisa boke abantu ekusebenzeni, ukuze bazi imisebenzakhe." 
Job37:8 Iinyamazana zibhaca eenkhundleni zazo, zihlale emiphandwinazo." 
Job37:9 Isiwuruwuru sivela ngesewula nemimoya ihlakaza amakhaza. 
Job37:10 Ukuphefumula kwakaZimu kuveza iliqhwa, ngaphezu kwamanzi kulale irhwaba." 
Job37:11 Uzalisa amafu ngomswakama, amafu wezulu asabalalise imibanakhe." 
Job37:12 Umbani ugijima mazombe, ngokuhlahlwa nguZimu, kobana wenze koke ayala ngakho, wehlele phasi ehlabathini yoke indawo." 
Job37:13 Ngamafu anzima uhlunguphaza iphasi, namkha ngesisa sakhe, abusise ngawo." 
Job37:14 “Lalela lapha wena Jobho, akhe ujame, uyelele iimangaliso zakaZimu." 
Job37:15 Uyazi bonyana uZimu ulawula njani imibani, akhanyise njani amafu wakhe na?" 
Job37:16 Ingabe uyalemuka bona imimoya iphephula njani amafu na? Kuziimangaliso zopheleleko ngelwazi 
Job37:17 lokha izambatho zakho nazifuthumalako, iphasi nalithulileko kunganamsikinyeko ngebanga lomtjhiso otjhwabisako." 
Job37:18 Ungamsiza uZimu ekwendlaleni isibhakabhaka, sona esiqine inga siboniboni sekoporo na?" 
Job37:19 Sitjela-ke bonyana sithini kuZimu. Ngebanga lokobana sisebumnyameni, angeze sakghona ukwendlala indabethu." 
Job37:20 Udlumbana bona kufuze atjelwe engikutjhoko, namkha kukhona ozakuthi indaba le ayibikwe na?" 
Job37:21 “Ehlobo umbani awusabonwa uphazima emafini, ngombana ummoya sewudlulile wembula isibhakabhaka," 
Job37:22 watjhiya umkayi wangetlhagwini uphazima njengegolide. UZimu wembethwe bukhosi obesabekako," 
Job37:23 nje-ke asikwazi ukufikelela koSabekako. Omkhulu ngamandla nangokulunga akadingi ukuphendula. 
Job37:24 Ngalokho, inga abantu bangamesaba, boke abahlakaniphileko bamhloniphe!”" 
Job38:1 Khonapho uZimu waphendula uJobho asesiwuruwurwini wathi: 
Job38:2 “Ungubani yena lo, ofiphaza ihlelo ngamezwi abe anganalwazi na?" 
Job38:3 Zilungiselele njengendoda: Ngizakufaka imibuzo bese uyangiphendula. 
Job38:4 Wawukuphi lokha nangendlala isisekelo sephasi? Khuluma nakube unelwazi. 
Job38:5 Ngubani owahlosa ubukhulu bakhona? Ngiyethemba bonyana uyazi! Ngubani owelula intambo yokulinganisa lapha kufuze usekeleke khona? 
Job38:6 Wanzinziswa phezu kwani na? Ngubani owabeka ilitje lawo elisisekelo," 
Job38:7 lokha iinkwekwezi zokusa nazibhina ndawonye, namadodana woke kaZimu narhuwelela ngethabo?" 
Job38:8 Ngubani owavalela ilwandle ngamasango amabili, lokha nalithumbuka esibelethweni na?" 
Job38:9 Bewukuphi nangenza amafu abe sisambatho salo, nangilisonga ngamafu anzima," 
Job38:10 nangibeka iinkhonkhwani zalo, ngilivalela ngeminyango emibili nesiqabo na?" 
Job38:11 Ngathi kilo, ‘Nakhu lapha uzakuphelela khona, ungayi phambili. Lapha ngibeka umkhawulo wamadlambakho azigqajako.’" 
Job38:12 “Wakhe wayala itathakusa bona ivele, namkha ukhombise ukusa indawo yakhona," 
Job38:13 kobana kubambe umhlaba ngomphetho, kuthintithe kiwo abakhohlakeleko na?" 
Job38:14 Umhlaba utjhugululwa ube njengomdaka nawugitjiweko, uba nemibala njengesambatho nasitjhugululwe umbala." 
Job38:15 Abakhohlakeleko baselwe, amandlabo adanjiswa kukusa." 
Job38:16 “Ukhe wangena esiyalwini selwandle, namkha wakhamba ekuzikeni kwamanzi amanengi na?" 
Job38:17 Amasango wokufa akhe embulwa kuwe, wabona abalindisango bobumnyama obunzima tshu?" 
Job38:18 Uyalemuka bonyana kwenzakalani phezu kwephasi na? Yitjho nakube unelwazi ngawo woke! 
Job38:19 Iphi indlela eya ekhabo lomkhanyo begodu unelwazi bona ubumnyama buhlalaphi," 
Job38:20 ukuze ububeke endawenabo bese ukhombisa ukukhanya indlela yekhabo na? 
Job38:21 Ngambala uyazi, angithi besele ubelethiwe! Iye, namalanga wokuphila kwakho manengi!" 
Job38:22 “Ukhe wangena eenlulwini zeliqhwa, namkha wabona ububulungelo besinanja" 
Job38:23 engibubekele iinkhathi zamatshwenyeko okumalanga wepi nokulwa na? 
Job38:24 Ngiyiphi indlela eya endaweni lapha umkhanyo uhlakazwa khona kube mibani, nalapha ummoya wepumalanga uhlakazeka khona ephasini na?" 
Job38:25 Ngubani owemba umsele weenkhukhula zezulu nendlela yamafu anzima," 
Job38:26 alethe izulu enarheni engahlalwa mumuntu, ekulirhalawumba elinganabantu," 
Job38:27 anelise inarha eligagadu nelibhudu, nokuyimilisa utjani na?" 
Job38:28 Ngubani uyise wezulu, amathosi wombethe abelethwe ngubani na?" 
Job38:29 Irhwaba liphuma esibelethweni sakabani, isithwathwa esivela emkayini sibelethwa ngubani na?" 
Job38:30 Amanzi aqina njengelitje, ilingaphezulu lamanzi amanengi liyarhwaba." 
Job38:31 “Ungabophela iinkwekwezi zesiLimela, namkha utjhaphulule iintambo zesiRuthwana na?" 
Job38:31 “Ungabophela iinkwekwezi zesiLimela, namkha utjhaphulule iintambo zesiRuthwana na?" 
Job38:32 Ungakhupha iinkwekwezi ezinguFezela ngesikhathi sazo, namkha urhole eziliBhere nabantwabalo na?" 
Job38:33 Uyazazi iimiso zobujamo beenkwekwezi na? Ungajamisa umlawuli wesibhakabhaka na? 
Job38:34 Ungayala amafu ngelizwi elidumako, ukuze iinkhukhula zamanzi zikwembese na?" 
Job38:35 Ungayithuma imibani bona ikhambe bese ithi, ‘Sisemsenakho’ na?" 
Job38:36 Ngubani obeke ukuhlakanipha emafini amhlophe, wawanikela ilwazi kobana athaye njengeenthayamanzi na?" 
Job38:37 Ngubani onobuhlakani bokukhupha isibalo samafu, atjhikamise imijeka yezulu leyo," 
Job38:38 ukuze ithuli liphenduke idaka namagade ahlangane na? 
Job38:39 “Ungazumela ibhubezi inyamazana, wanelise iphango lamabhubezana," 
Job38:40 lokha nabadalala endawenawo, azilungiselela ukubhudungela asemthunzini kobana akhukhuthele na?" 
Job38:41 Ngubani onikela igubulu ukudla nalizulazula liswele okugonywako namadzinyanalo atsiyozela uZimu na? 
Job39:1 Uyazi bona iimbuzi zeentaba zizala nini na? Utjhejile ukuzala kweenhlangukazimataka? 
Job39:2 Vane uzibalele iinyanga bezizale, uhlose isikhathi sokuzala kwazo na?" 
Job39:3 Ziyakoropana bese abantwabazo bayaphundluka, okubanga imirhelwazo kuyawuluka." 
Job39:4 Abantwabazo baqine, bakhule baziphe inarha, bangasabuya kizo." 
Job39:5 “Ngubani otjhaphulule udumbana wommango; iye, omvulele ummango wokuziphilela?" 
Job39:6 Ngimi owahlosa bona irhalawumba libe likhaya lakhe nenarha enetswayi kube yindawakhe yokuhlala. 
Job39:7 Akakhathali ngetjhada ledorobheni, akezwa ukurhuwelela komtjhayeli." 
Job39:8 Ukhamba eentabeni athalaza amadlelo, afunafune nanyana yini elihlaza." 
Job39:9 “Inyathi ingavuma ukukusebenzela na? Ihlale eqadi kwekerebhakho ebusuku? 
Job39:10 Ungayibophela bona ilime, uyibambe emseleni ngentambo na? Ingavuma ukulalisa amasoyi emva kwakho?" 
Job39:11 Ungayirhuluphela ngebanga lamandlayo amakhulu, uliselele umsebenzakho obudisi kiyo na?" 
Job39:12 Ungayithemba bona ingabuya ikulethele amabelakho eselelweni na? 
Job39:13 “Amaphiko wenciliba abhakuza ngethabo, kodwana amaphikwayo afana newakadoyi namkha wakapekwa na?"
