Job39:14 Ngebangelo ibekela amaqandayo ehlabathini, iwafuthumeze ngetjhwabatjhwaba." 
Job39:15 Iyakhohlwa bonyana angapitlizwa linyawo, iye, angagadangwa ziinyamazana." 
Job39:16 Iphatha amadzinyanayo makghwakghwa, kwanga akusiwo wayo; ayikhathali bonyana isebenzela ilize." 
Job39:17 Mbala uZimu uyidime ukuhlakanipha, azange ayiphe isabelo ekwazini," 
Job39:18 kodwana nayiphakamisa ihlokwayo kobana igijime, ihleka injomani nomkhwelayo." 
Job39:19 “Uyayinikela injomani amandlayo namkha wembathise intamayo ngomdlwenga na? 
Job39:20 Uyenza bona ithiyelele njengewoma leentethe na? Ukuduma kokuthimula kwayo kuyayethusa," 
Job39:21 igige phasi ngeenqatha, ijabule, isuke ngamandla ihlangabezane nepi." 
Job39:22 Ayikhathali ngengozi, ayinavalo ngalitho, ayidedi ngebanga lesabula," 
Job39:23 lokha imisubela nayivuruza ngehla kwayo, nalokha kumekeza umkhonto nezenjana." 
Job39:24 Ngokuduma kweenqatha zayo iphasi liyadengezela. Ayijiki lokha ipalapala nayijamisa ipi. 
Job39:25 Nakulila ipalapala, iyathimula ithi, ‘Nakho-ke!’ Ithi isese khatjhana izwelele ipi nokurhuwelela kweenduna kanye nomkhosi wepi." 
Job39:26 “Ngelwazi lakho ukholo uyathiyelela, anabululele amaphikwakhe ngesewula na?" 
Job39:27 Kungomyalwakho bona idlanga liphaphe phezulu, lakhe isidleke salo ekuphakameni na?" 
Job39:28 Lihlala empharwini, lilale emaweni wamadwala kube buphephelo balo." 
Job39:29 Khonapho lithalaza ukudla kwalo, amehlwalo akubona likude." 
Job39:30 Amadzinyanalo arhubula iingazi, nakunokubuleweko, nalo liba lapho.”" 
Job40:1 USomnini waragela phambili wathi kuJobho: 
Job40:2 “Ophikisana noSabekako angabuye amkhombise indlela na? Akuthi loyo osola uZimu amphendule!” 
Job40:3 Yeke uJobho waphendula uSomnini wathi: 
Job40:4 “Qala, ngimncani khulu, uSomnini ngizamphendula ngithini? Nje-ke ngivala phetjheya." 
Job40:5 Ngibe nomlomo omude, angisazokulinga ukuphendula; ngikhulume okungidlulako, angeze bengisathoma.”" 
Job40:6 Yeke uSomnini waphendula uJobho asesiwuruwurwini godu wathi: 
Job40:7 “Zilungiselele njengendoda: Ngizakufaka imibuzo bese uyangiphendula. 
Job40:8 Ufuna ukuphazamisana nelungelo lami na? Ufuna ukungenza inga ngisikhohlakali ukuze wena ube msulwa na? 
Job40:9 Unengalo enjengeyakaZimu na? Ungaduma ngephimbo elinjengelakhe na? 
Job40:10 Nakunjalo-ke, zihlobise ngedumo nangephazimulo, uzembathise ngokuhlonitjhwa nangobukhosi." 
Job40:11 Nje-ke thuthumba ngobukhali bakho phezu kwesinye nesinye isikhohlakali. Hlolisisa boke abaziphakamisako bese uyabehlisa. 
Job40:12 Iye, hlolisisa boke abaziphakamisako bese uyabathobisa, uphihlize boke abakhohlakeleko lapha bakhona." 
Job40:13 Bangcwabe ndawonye ethulini, ubophe abanjalo ngaphakathi kwezindla." 
Job40:14 Yeke mina ngokwami ngizakudumisa, ngombana isandla sakho sokugoma sikwenza bona uhlule." 
Job40:15 “Akhese uqale imvubu engayidala kanye nawe: Yona idla utjani njengekomo. 
Job40:16 Mbala, amandlayo asedinini, ubukunzi bayo busemisipheni yesisu sayo." 
Job40:17 Iqinisa umsilayo njengomsedari, imisipha yesidunu sayo iyararamala." 
Job40:18 Amathambayo amhlanga wekoporo, iimbambo zayo zimigqala yesimbi." 
Job40:19 Iphuma phambili eendalweni zakaZimu, isidalwa esiziphathele iinsabula." 
Job40:20 Ilethelwa isibiko seentaba, zoke iinlwana zommango zidlala phambi kwayo." 
Job40:21 Ilala emthunzini wemithi eseqadi komlambo, izifihle emgabeni wesitete." 
Job40:22 Imithi leyo iyembesa ngomthunzi, izombelezwe miyezani esemilanjaneni." 
Job40:23 Lokha umlambo nawuthwala iingodo, yona ayiphazami, iyazigedla lokha iJordana nayigobhoza phezu kwayo." 
Job40:24 Ukhona ongayibamba ngamehlo, ayihlabe ngesigodo epumulweni na?" 
Job41:1 Ungakhupha ingwenya ngemanzini ngesikghopholahlambi, uvalele ilimu layo ngokubopha umlomayo ngentambo na?" 
Job41:2 Ungaphundlusa ipumulwayo ngomgaba, namkha ubhoboze umhlathayo ngesikghopholahlambi na?" 
Job41:3 Izalokhu ikuncenga, ikhulume kuwe amezwi athambileko na?" 
Job41:4 Izakubawa ukwenza nawe isivumelwano, sokobana uyithathe ibe likhoboka lakho isiphelani na?" 
Job41:5 Ungayenza ifuyosithandwa njengenyoni ebotjhwa ngomtiya enyaweni, ukuze umntazanakho adlale ngayo na?" 
Job41:6 Abarhwebi bangaphalisana ngentengwayo, abathengi babelane ngayo na?" 
Job41:7 Ungazalisa isikhumba sayo ngamasungulo nehlokwayo ngemikhonto yokubamba iinhlambi na? 
Job41:8 Nawubeka isandla sakho phezu kwayo, uzakhumbula bona ipi injani; angeze bewusathoma!" 
Job41:9 Loke ithemba lokuyibamba lililize. Ukuyibona nje kwaphela uyaketuka! 
Job41:10 Akakho noyedwa onesibindi sokuyiphaphamisa, abuye ajame phambi kwayo!" 
Job41:11 Ngubani ongayisahlela ahlale angalimali na? Ngaphasi komthunzi welanga, ngimi ngedwa oyilawulako." 
Job41:12 “Yithi ngikutjele ngengubayo, ngamandlayo ababazekako begodu ayifaniseki:" 
Job41:13 Ngubani ongayembula isambatho esingaphakathi, ayihlubulise imbajayo yepi na?" 
Job41:14 Ngubani ongagabaza ayivule umlomo, ogegwe mazinyokazi asabekako?" 
Job41:15 Umhlanayo unomsele ophahlwe marhururhuru, abophene aba mlukuluku" 
Job41:16 abekwa aminyaniswa kangangobana akunammoya ongadlula hlangana. 
Job41:17 Ahlanganiswe ndawonye, aqiniswa, anamathelene begodu angeze ahlukaniswa." 
Job41:18 “Nayithimulako umrhwamuko uyaphazima, amehlwayo afana nemisebe yokusa." 
Job41:19 Emlonyenayo kuphuma iinhlothi ezivuthako, kusabalale iinsahlela zawo." 
Job41:20 Eempumulweni zayo kuphuma isikhutha, inga siphuma embizeni ebilako emalahleni avuthako." 
Job41:21 Ukuphefumula kwayo kungavuthisa amalahle namalangabi aphuma emlonyenayo. 
Job41:22 Amandla alele entanyenayo, ukwesabeka kukhamba phambi kwayo." 
Job41:23 Amakghwakghwa womzimbayo anamathelene, akghamathele phezu kwayo, akasuki." 
Job41:24 Ihliziywayo iqine njengedwala, iye, iqine njengelitje lokusila." 
Job41:25 Lokha nayiphuma ngemanzini, abanamandla bayathuthumela, nayiphundluka esizibeni, bayahlehla." 
Job41:26 Isabula efika kiyo ayiyenzi litho, ngitjho nomkhonto, neminye imihlobo yeenkhali." 
Job41:27 Kiyo isimbi iba ngathi ziinhlanga, ikoporo ifane nesigodo esinepehli." 
Job41:28 Imisubela ayiyenzi ibaleke, amatje wesarwayi afana neenhluba kiyo." 
Job41:29 Iye, ngitjho nesibhuku sifana nehlanga kiyo; ihleka ukukhecezela kwezenjana phezu kwayo." 
Job41:30 Ilingaphasi layo lifana neenkghedlhu zembiza, liveza umtlhala edakeni inga lidosa isileyi sokubhula." 
Job41:31 Yenza ukuzika kubile njengembiza, inyakazise isiziba inga yimbiza yeenthako." 
Job41:32 Ngemva kwayo kunomthala ophazimako ngemanzini, kube ngathi ukuzika kuthukghele." 
Job41:33 “Akunalitho emhlabenapha elilingana nayo, mbala isidalwa esinganavalo." 
Job41:34 Ikuqalela phasi koke okuziphakamisako, iyikosi phezu kwakho koke okuzikhukhumezako.”" 
Job42:1 Yeke uJobho waphendula uZimu wathi: 
Job42:2 “Ngiyazi bonyana ungenza yoke into, nokobana ihloswakho angeze yaphazanyiswa." 
Job42:3 Ubuze wathi, ‘Ungubani yena lo, ofiphaza ihlelo ngamezwi abe anganalwazi na?’ Ngambala, ngikhulume ngezinto engingazaziko, izinto ezimangazako enginganalwazi lazo." 
Job42:4 Godu uthe, ‘Lalela-ke, ngizakukhuluma, ngizakufaka umbuzo, bese ungiphendule.’" 
Job42:5 Bengikuzwa ngamahlebezi, kodwana gadesi sengiyakwazi." 
Job42:6 Ngalokho ngizisola ngengikukhulumileko, ngiyaphenduka, ngizilahla ethulini nemlotheni.”" 
Job42:7 Ngemva kobana uSomnini akhulume koke lokhu kuJobho, wathi ku-Elifasi umTemani: “Ngikuthukuthelele wena nabangani bakho ababili ngombana azange nikhulume kuhle ngami njengombana uJobho incekwami enzile." 
Job42:8 Yeke ngalokho thatha iinkunzi ezilikhomba namaqama alikhomba uye encekwinami uJobho bese nizenzela umhlabelo wokutjhiswa. Incekwami uJobho izanithandazela, yeke ngizakwamukela umthandazwakhe ukuze ngingazikhohlwa ngani. Azange nikhulume okulungileko ngami njengombana kwenze incekwami uJobho.”" 
Job42:9 Yeke u-Elifasi umTemani, uBhilidadi umTjhurhi noTsofara umNama benza njengombana uSomnini abatjelile. USomnini wamukela umthandazo kaJobho." 
Job42:10 Ngemva kobana uJobho athandazele abangani bakhe, uSomnini waphendulela ubujamo bakhe: Wamupha lokho agade anakho ngokubuyelelwe kabili." 
Job42:11 Boke abafowabo nabodadwabo kanye nabo boke ebebamazi ngaphambilini, beza emzinakhe bazogoma naye. Bamduduza bebamqinisa kiwo woke amatshwenyeko ebegade awehliselwe nguSomnini. Omunye nomunye wabo wamupha isipaparu sesiliva nesongo legolide." 
Job42:12 USomnini wabusisa ingcenye yokugcina yepilo kaJobho ukudlula yekuthomeni. Gade aneenkulungwana ezilitjhumi nane zezimvu neembuzi, iinkulungwana ezisithandathu zamakamela, iinkulungwana ezimbili zeenkomo ezibotjhelwako kanye nekulungwana yabodumbana abasikazi." 
Job42:13 Godu gade anamadodana alikhomba namadodakazi amathathu. 
Job42:14 Indodakazi yokuthoma gade ayithiye bona nguJemima, yesibili kunguKhetsiya bese yesithathu kunguKhereni-Hapuku." 
Job42:15 Alikho nalinye ilizwe elakhe lafunyanwa linamadodakazi amahle njengewakaJobho. Uyise wawabela ilifa kanye nabafowawo. 
Job42:16 Ngemva kwalokhu, uJobho waphila iminyaka elikhulu namatjhumi amane. Wabona abantwabakhe kanye nesizukulwana sabo." 
Job42:17 Yeke wahlongakala sele amdala khulu ngeminyaka. 
Psalms1:1 Ubusisiwe loyo ongangeni esiqhemeni seenkhohlakali, ongajami endleleni yezoni namkha ongahlali esicathaneni sabanyefulako." 
Psalms1:2 Kodwana ifundiso kaSomnini ikuthaba kwakhe, uyihumuza imini nobosuku." 
Psalms1:3 Unjengomuthi otjalwe emiseleni: Uthela ngesikhathi esifaneleko namakarawo akatjhwabi. Umuntu onjalo uyaphumelela kikho koke akwenzako. 
Psalms1:4 Iinkhohlakali azisinjalo, kodwana zinjengomungu ophetjhulwa mumoya." 
Psalms1:5 Ngalokho iinkhohlakali azizukujama ebandla nezoni emkhambathini wabalungileko. 
Psalms1:6 Mbala, uSomnini uyelela indlela yabalungileko, kodwana indlela yeenkhohlakali iyanyelela." 
Psalms2:1 Kubayini bezizwe bayaluza nabantu bahumuzela na? Kungelize! 
Psalms2:2 Amakhosi wephasi ayazihlela, nababusi baluka amaqhinga ngoSomnini nangozesiweko wakhe ngokuthi:" 
Psalms2:3 “Asivuthuleni iintambo zayo, silahle iimbopho zayo kude nathi.”" 
Psalms2:4 Yena ohlezi emazulwini uyahleka, uSomandla uyabakokomeja." 
Psalms2:5 Nje-ke ubakhalimela ngobukhali bakhe, abethuse ngelaka lakhe, athi:" 
Psalms2:6 “Ngimi obeke ikosi ekungeyami eZiyoni, entabenami ecwengileko.”" 
Psalms2:7 Umzeswa kaSomnini umemezela isimiso sakhe: “USomnini wathi kimi, ‘Uyindodanami wena; namhlanje ngiyakuvuselela." 
Psalms2:8 Bawa kimi, ngikunikele bezizwe babe lilifa lakho, nemikhawulo yephasi ibe sisabelo sakho." 
Psalms2:9 Uzabaphihliza ngentonga yesimbi, ubaphahlaze njengomjeka.’ ”" 
Psalms2:10 Ngalokho, makhosi hlakaniphani; khalimekani nina babusi bephasi." 
Psalms2:11 Lotjhani uSomnini ngokwesaba, nename ngehlonipho." 
Psalms2:12 Ncwangani iinyawo zendodanayo, nakungasinjalo uZimu uzakuthukuthela bese niyabhubha endleleni. Mbala, ilaka lakhe livutha masinyana. Babusisiwe boke abaphephela kuye." 
Psalms3:1 Irhubo lakaDavida lokha nabalekela u-Absalomu indodanakhe. 
Psalms3:2 Maye Somnini, izitha zami zinengi! Banengi abangivukelako," 
Psalms3:3 iye, banengi abathi kimi: “UZimu angeze amsindise.” Sela" 
Psalms3:4 Wena Somnini usihlangu mazombe kimi, ubuyise isithunzi sami, waphakamisa ihlokwami." 
Psalms3:5 Ngilila kuSomnini ngelizwi elikhulu; yena ungiphendula asentabenakhe ecwengileko. 
Psalms3:6 Lokha nangilalako, ngizunywe buthongo; ngivuka ngombana uSomnini ungisingathile." 
Psalms3:7 Amatjhumi aziinkulungwana wamajoni angiwesabi, iye, lawo angivimbezele nca zoke." 
Psalms3:8 Sikima Somnini, ungisindise, Zimami! Wawahla zoke izitha zami emhlathini, wephula namazinyo wabakhohlakeleko." 
Psalms3:9 Ukusindiswa kuvela kuSomnini. Isibusiso sakho asibe phezu kwabantu bakho. 
Psalms4:1 Kumkhaleli; ngesililiso seenara; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms4:2 Lokha nangikubizako ngiphendule, wena Zimu welungelo lami. Wangipha isibanga ekubandezelekeni. Yeke yiba nesirhawu kimi, uzwe umthandazwami." 
Psalms4:3 Nina bantu, kuzabe kube nini ukuhlonitjhwa kwami kudelelwa na? Kuzabe kube nini nithanda ikohliso begodu nilandelelana namanga na?" 
Psalms4:4 Yazini bonyana uSomnini, uphatha othembekileko kuhle; uSomnini uyangizwa lokha nangilila kuye." 
Psalms4:5 Lokha nanithathekileko, ningoni; zindlani ngalokho emikghadinenu nibe nokuthula." 
Psalms4:6 Nikelani imihlabelo efaneleko, nethembe uSomnini." 
Psalms4:7 Banengi abathi: “Ngathana singabona okuhle! Somnini, yewusikhanyisele!”" 
Psalms4:8 Kodwana kimi mina Somnini, uzalise ihliziywami ngokwenama ukudlula ukwenama kwabo lokha nabavuna iinthoro nalokha iwayini labo livamile." 
Psalms4:9 Ngokuthula ngizakulala ngizunywe buthongo ngombana nguwe wedwa Somnini ongenza ngihlale ngiphephile. 
Psalms5:1 Kumkhaleli; livunywa ngamafludu; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms5:2 Hawu Somnini, beka indlebe emezwinami, uzwe ukububula kwami." 
Psalms5:3 Yelela ilizwi lesililo sami, wena Kosami noZimami ngombana ngithandaza kuwe." 
Psalms5:4 Kosami, ulalela ilizwi lami ekuseni; kuthi ngamasa ngendlale isibawo sami phambi kwakho ngiyalindele." 
Psalms5:5 Wena awusuye uZimu ozwana nekohlakalo, okumbi angeze kwahlala kuwe." 
Psalms5:6 Abazitjhayako angeze bajama phambi kwakho, boke abenzi bobumbi uyabazonda." 
Psalms5:7 Abakhuluma amanga uyababhubhisa. Iye, uSomnini uyamnyenya umbulali nomkhohlisi." 
Psalms5:8 Kodwana mina, ngomusakho omkhulu ngingangena endlinakho, ngokukuhlonipha ngizakukhothama ngethempelini lakho elicwengileko." 
Psalms5:9 Somnini, ngebanga lezitha zami, ngirhole ngokulunga kwakho, yenza indlelakho ihlelembe phambi kwami." 
Psalms5:10 Ngambala akunaqiniso emlonyenazo, imizindlwazo igcwele ukubhubhisa, umphimbazo ulithuna elivulekileko, ilimu lazo likabili." 
Psalms5:11 Zimu, zenze zithwale icala lazo, amaqhingazo abe kukuwa kwazo. Ziqotjhe ngebanga leemphambeko zazo ezinengi ngombana zikuhlubukile." 
Psalms5:12 Yenza boke abaphephela kuwe bathabe, benze bahlale bavuma iingoma ngokwenama. Yembesa isivikelo sakho phezu kwabo, abakhathalela ibizo lakho basase kuwe." 
Psalms5:13 Mbala Somnini, nguwe obusisa abalungileko, umusakho ubavikela mazombe njengesihlangu." 
Psalms6:1 Kumkhaleli; ngesililiso seenara; ngeTjheminithi; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms6:2 Somnini, ungangikhalimi ngobukhali bakho, ungangibethi uselakeni lakho." 
Psalms6:3 Yiba nomusa kimi, Somnini ngombana ngibuthakathaka. Yewungipholise Somnini ngombana ngisebuhlungwini," 
Psalms6:4 iye, umphefumulwami ukhathazeke khulu. Awu Somnini, kuzabe kube nini na?" 
Psalms6:5 Phenduka Somnini! Hlenga ipilwami! Ngisindise ngenca yokwethembeka kwakho 
Psalms6:6 ngombana akukho ukukulotjha kwabafileko. Ngubani okudumisako endaweni yabafileko na? 
Psalms6:7 Sengidiniwe ngesibibithwana sami: Ubusuku boke ngithambisa umsamelwami; iye, ngimanzisa umsemami ngeenyembezi." 
Psalms6:8 Amehlwami avuvukile ngebanga lesizi, ayafiphala ngenca yezitha zami zoke." 
Psalms6:9 Dedani kimi noke nina benzi bobumbi ngombana uSomnini usizwile isililo sami; 
Psalms6:10 uSomnini usizwile isibawo sami sesirhawu, iye, uSomnini uwamukele umthandazwami." 
Psalms6:11 Zoke izitha zami zizakukhena, zikhathazeke khulu, zibuyele emuva, zidane masinyana." 
Psalms7:1 ITjhigayoni kaDavida ayirhubela uSomnini ngenca yamezwi kaKutjhe umBhenjamini. 
Psalms7:2 Somnini Zimami, ngiphephela kuwe, ngisindise kwabangizumako ungihlenge," 
Psalms7:3 bangangidabudabuli njengebhubezi, bangitlebhule iinquqwana, kungekho ongilamulelako." 
Psalms7:4 Somnini, Zimami, kukhona okumbi engikwenzileko na? Kunokungakalungi ezandleni zami?" 
Psalms7:5 Ngenze ubumbi kengikhambisana naye na? Ngidlelezele umjamelanami ngaphandle kwesizathu? 
Psalms7:6 Nakunjalo, vumela isitha sami sizumane nami besingifumane, sigandelele ipilwami phasi, iye, sigadangele isithunzi sami ethulini." 
Psalms7:7 Sikima ngelaka lakho Somnini! Phakama ujamelane nokuvutha kwabajamelani bami! Yeqa Zimu ungenyele! Uyale bona kube nesigwebo," 
Psalms7:8 nje-ke vumela umhlangano wezizwe ukuphahle, buyela esikhundleni sakho esiphakamileko wengamele." 
Psalms7:9 Iye, uSomnini nguye ogweba abantu. Nje-ke Somnini, yewungigwebe ngokulunga kwami nangokuya ngobuqotho obukimi." 
Psalms7:10 Inga kungapheliswa ubumbi beenkhohlakali! Somnini, inga ungaqinisa abalungileko! Mbala, ohlola iinhliziyo neziso nguZimu olungileko." 
Psalms7:11 Isihlangu sami sikuZimu osindisa abaqotho ngehliziyo. 
Psalms7:12 UZimu ungumgwebi olungileko, uhlala aphambene nokumbi imihla yoke." 
Psalms7:13 Ngambala uzakubuya godu, alole isabulakhe, acuphe umsebe wakhe kobana ulunge." 
Psalms7:14 Ulungise iinhlabano zakhe zokubulala, wenza imisubelakhe ibe masungulo avuthako." 
Psalms7:15 Lokha umuntu namitha okumbi, akhulelwe umonakalo, uzakubeletha ikohliso." 
Psalms7:16 Iye, owemba umgodi wesifu, akhuphe ihlabathawo, uzakuwela ngaphakathi komlindi awenzileko lowo." 
Psalms7:17 Umonakalwakhe uzakubuyela phezu kwehlokwakhe, ubudlova bakhe behlele ekhakhayini lakhe." 
Psalms7:18 USomnini ngizamthokoza ngokulunga kwakhe, ngizakuvuma ngidumise ibizo lakaSomnini ongoPhezulu." 
Psalms8:1 Kumkhaleli; livunywa ngeenodo zeGathi; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms8:2 Kosethu, Somandla, maye likhulu kangangani idumo lakho ephasini loke! Ubukhosi bakho bubatjazwa ukufikela emazulwini!" 
Psalms8:3 Ngemilomo yabantwana namasana wendlale iinsekelo zesivikelo ngokujamelana namanabakho; iye, ngokususa izitha nabazibuyiselelako." 
Psalms8:4 Nangiqala isibhakabhaka sakho okumsebenzi weminwakho inyezi neenkwekwezi, ozinameke eendaweni zazo," 
Psalms8:5 ngithi uyini-ke obhubhako bona ungabe umtjheje, ubayini umuntu wephasinapha bona ungambeka abe mphathi na?" 
Psalms8:6 Mbala umenze waba ngaphasana kweendalwa zezulu wamthwesa ukuhlonitjhwa nobukhosi! 
Psalms8:7 Wamenza waba mphathi womsebenzi wezandla zakho; wabeka koke ngaphasi kweenyawo zakhe: 
Psalms8:8 zoke izimvu neembuzi kanye neenkomo, ngitjho neembandana zommango," 
Psalms8:9 iinyoni zesibhakabhaka neenhlambi zelwandle ezivundla ngemizila yamalwandle. 
Psalms8:10 Kosethu, Somandla, maye likhulu kangangani idumo lakho ephasini loke!" 
Psalms9:1 Kumkhaleli; ngeenodo zengoma ethi, “Ukufa kwendodana”; irhubo lakaDavida." 
Psalms9:2 USomnini ngizamdumisa ngehliziywami yoke. Somnini, ngizakukhuluma ngeemangaliso zakho zoke." 
Psalms9:3 Ngizakwenama, ngisase kuwe; ngidumise ibizo lakho, Zimu ongoPhezulu." 
Psalms9:4 Lokha izitha zami nazibalekako, ziyawa, zibhubhe phambi kwakho." 
Psalms9:5 Iye, uvikele ilungelo lami nendabami uhlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi, wena mGwebi olungileko." 
Psalms9:6 Ukhalimele izizwe; wabhubhisa iinkhohlakali; ibizo lazo ulisulile isiphelani. 
Psalms9:7 Izitha uzitjhabalalisile, wasiphula amadorobhazo, sele ayiququ isiphelani; iye, ukukhunjulwa kwazo kuphelile. Zipheliswe njalo-ke zona" 
Psalms9:8 ngombana uSomnini ubusa isiphelani. Unzinzise nesihlalo sakhe sobukhosi bona agwebe. 
Psalms9:9 Ngiyo obusa iphasi ngokulunga, igwebe abantu ngokufaneleko." 
Psalms9:10 USomnini usiphephelo sabagandelelweko, iye, usiqongolo ngeenkhathi zokubandezelwa." 
Psalms9:11 Abalaziko ibizo lakho babeka ithemba labo kuwe ngombana abakufunako azange ubafulathele, Somnini." 
Psalms9:12 Rhubelani uSomnini ohlala eZiyoni, nimemezele izenzo zakhe ezizweni." 
Psalms9:13 Obuyiselela iingazi, wabakhumbula abazwiswa ubuhlungu, azange akhohlwe isililo sabo." 
Psalms9:14 Yiba nomusa kimi, Somnini! Yelela isizi lami engilibangelwe ngabangizondako! Nguwe ongihlenga emasangweni wokufa," 
Psalms9:15 ukuze ngibabaze idumo lakho begodu ngijabule esindiswenakho emasangweni weZiyoni. 
Psalms9:16 Bezizwe bawele ngemgodini abazembele wona, inyawo labo libanjwe esifwini abasithiyileko." 
Psalms9:17 USomnini uzazisile, bewabeka isigwebo; iinkhohlakali zicutjhwe emsebenzini wezandla zazo. Higayoni" 
Psalms9:18 Inga iinkhohlakali zingaya endaweni yabafileko, iye, zoke izizwe ezikhohlwa uZimu." 
Psalms9:19 Kodwana ngesikhathi soke odududu angakhohlweki, nethemba labachakileko lingafeleli nini nanini." 
Psalms9:20 Sikima Somnini, ungavumeli umuntu adlondlobale! Izizwe azigwetjwe phambi kwakho!" 
Psalms9:21 Faka ivalo kabezizwe, Somnini, ubenze bazi bonyana bangababhubhako!" 
Psalms10:1 Somnini, kubayini ujamele kude na? Ufihlelani ubuso ngeenkhathi zokubandezelwa?" 
Psalms10:2 Ngokuzigqaja iinkhohlakali zizumana nabadududu! Inga zingabanjwa emaqhingenazo eziwalukileko. 
Psalms10:3 Isikhohlakali sikhuzela iimfiso zaso, sibongelele inzuzwaso, sinyefule uSomnini." 
Psalms10:4 Isikhohlakali siyazitjhaya, asinandaba noSomnini; woke amahlelwaso akanaZimu." 
Psalms10:5 Iindlela zaso ziyabambelela ngesikhathi soke, siqoqomele, iingwebo zakho zikude naso, sitsakela boke abajamelani baso amathe." 
Psalms10:6 Sithi ehliziywenaso: “Angeze ngasikinywa; ngesikhathi soke angisoze ngehlelwa yingozi.” 
Psalms10:7 Umlomaso ugcwele ukuthukana, ikohliso nenturhu; ngaphasi kwelimu laso kukhona ukonakala nekohlakalo." 
Psalms10:8 Sizifihla emizaneni ukuze sikhukhuthele, sibulale onganacala eendaweni ezisithekileko. Amehlwaso ahlala aqaphele ungazimbi;" 
Psalms10:9 sibadalala njengebhubezi nalithiyelela emphandwinalo, sibadalala bona sibambe ohluphekileko. Iye, sibamba ohluphekileko ngokumyengela ngenedenaso." 
Psalms10:10 Sisunduza besiwise abanganamenyeli ngamandlaso; 
Psalms10:11 nanyana kunjalo sithi ehliziywenaso: “UZimu ukhohliwe, ubuso bakhe ubusithezile, yeke akasoze akubone lokhu.”" 
Psalms10:12 Sikima Somnini! Phakamisa isandla sakho, Zimu! Ungabakhohlwa abahluphekileko!" 
Psalms10:13 Kuyangani bonyana isikhohlakali sinyefule uZimu, ngokudlumbana bona wena awunaki na?" 
Psalms10:14 Kodwana wena Somnini, uyabona! Wena ngokwakho uyelela umonakalo nesizi ukuze lokho kube sesandleni sakho. Yeke ungazimbi uzinikela kuwe, iye, wena umsizi wentandani." 
Psalms10:15 Yephula ingalo yesikhohlakali nesoni; urhubhulule iimphambeko zomoni kungasali litho! 
Psalms10:16 Mbala, uZimu uyikosi nini nanini; izizwe zizakubhujiswa enarhenakhe." 
Psalms10:17 Wena Somnini, ulalela ukulangazela kwabathobileko, iye, ihliziywabo uyayikhuthaza nendlebakho uyibeke kibo," 
Psalms10:18 kobana wenze ukulunga entandaneni nakogandelelweko. Isikhohlakali asingahlali sihlukumeza onganabani ngokumqotjha enarheni. 
Psalms11:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. Ngiphephela kuSomnini. Alo, ningatjho njani kimi nithi, “Balekela eentabeni njengenyoni,” na?" 
Psalms11:2 Mbala iinkhohlakali ziqupha umsebe, zithiya umsubela emsebeni ukuze ebumnyameni zidumuze abaqotho ngehliziyo!" 
Psalms11:3 Nakube iinsekelo ziyasitjhulwa, olungileko angenzani na?" 
Psalms11:4 USomnini usethempelini lakhe elicwengileko, USomnini usezulwini esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi; amehlwakhe ayaphenyisisa, ukuqala kwakhe kuqaphela abantu." 
Psalms11:5 USomnini uqaphela olungileko nomumbi, uyamnyenya othanda inturhu." 
Psalms11:6 Phezu kwabakhohlakeleko unisa amalahle avuthako, umlilo nesibabuli, iye, isivunguvungu sizakuba sisabelo sabo." 
Psalms11:7 Njengombana uSomnini alungile, uthanda izenzo zokulunga. Oqotho uzakulemuka ubukhona bakhe." 
Psalms12:1 Kumkhaleli; ngeTjheminithi irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms12:2 Siza Somnini! Abathembekileko abasekho! Ngambala, abaqotho banyamalele ebantwini!" 
Psalms12:3 Bakhohlisana bodwa, banamalimu ambaqambili begodu babomalakazi." 
Psalms12:4 Kwanga uSomnini angaqunta amalimu ambaqambili, iye, umlomo okhuluma ngokuzigqaja," 
Psalms12:5 walabo abathi: “Ngelimu lethu sinamandla, thina sinomlomo wokuzikhulumela, ngubani osiphetheko na?”" 
Psalms12:6 USomnini uthi: “Ngebanga lokobana abadududu bayadlelezelwa, abachakileko bayabubula, mina ngizakusikima kwanjesi, ngizabanikela isindiso abayifisako.”" 
Psalms12:7 Amezwi kaSomnini atsengileko, anjengesiliva elicoliswe emgodini wekehla yomlilo, iye, elihlanjululwe kalikhomba." 
Psalms12:8 Wena Somnini, uzakulondoloza abadududu, uzabavikela esizukulwanenesi nini nanini." 
Psalms12:9 Iinkhohlakali zizula yoke indawo namanyala akhulile hlangana nabantu. 
Psalms13:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms13:2 Kuzabe kube nini Somnini usoloko ungikhohliwe? Uzakusitha ubuso bakho kimi bekube nini? 
Psalms13:3 Kuze kube nini ngiwurubajekile, nginesizi ehliziywenami ilanga loke na? Kuzabe kube nini isitha sami singidlondlhomalela na?" 
Psalms13:4 Somnini Zimami, akhese uyelele, ungiphendule! Khanyisa amehlwami ukuze ngingalali ubuthongo bokufa," 
Psalms13:5 isitha sami singathi, “Ngimhlulile” namanabami angathabi ngombana ngigeba amadolo." 
Psalms13:6 Kodwana mina ngibambelele ekwethembekeni kwakho, ihliziywami iyathaba ngesindiswakho. USomnini ngizamrhubela ngombana ungenzele okuhle." 
Psalms14:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. Iindlhayela zizitjela zithi: “UZimu akakho.” Zikhohlakele, zenza izinto ezinyenyisako; akakho noyedwa owenza okulungileko." 
Psalms14:2 USomnini usezulwini uyabaqala abantu bephasini ukubona bonyana kukhona ohlakaniphileko, orhuluphela uZimu na." 
Psalms14:3 Kodwana boke baphambukile, boke bonakele ngokufanako; akakho noyedwa owenza okulungileko, akakho ngitjho namunye." 
Psalms14:4 Kanti boke abenzi bobumbi abalemuki na? Labo abatla abantu bami inga badla isikwa, abambizi uSomnini." 
Psalms14:5 Nje-ke bazakuba nevalo khulu ngombana uZimu usesizukulwaneni esilungileko. 
Psalms14:6 Nina nkhohlakali, isiqhema sabadududu ningasihlazisa, kodwana uSomnini usiphephelo songanalitho." 
Psalms14:7 Kwanga isindiso ka-Israyeli ingavela eZiyoni! Lokha uSomnini natjhugulula ubujamo babantu bakhe, uJakopo uzakurhuwelela ngethabo, iye, u-Israyeli uzakujabula." 
Psalms15:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Somnini, ngubani ongakhosela ngetendeni lakho? Ngubani ongaqupha entabenakho ecwengileko na?" 
Psalms15:2 Ngiloyo okhamba ngobuqotho nowenza okulungileko, okhuluma iqiniso ngokupheleleko;" 
Psalms15:3 ongahlebi abanye, ongenzi okumbi kubafowabo nongahlazisi iinhlobo zakhe." 
Psalms15:4 Ngiloyo onyaza abaninwa nguZimu, kodwana ahloniphe abesaba uSomnini; ongephuli isifungo nanyana sibuhlungu," 
Psalms15:5 ongabolekisi imalakhe ngenzalo nongafunjathiswa bona alahle onganamlandu. Owenza izintwezi, angeze anyakaziswa." 
Psalms16:1 IMikitamu lakaDavida. Ngivikela Zimu ngombana ngiphephela kuwe. 
Psalms16:2 Mina ngathi kuSomnini: “Wena uyiKosami, anginakho okuhle ngaphandle kwakho.”" 
Psalms16:3 Abosingazimu enarheni, labo okuthiwa ngabanamandla, angikareki nakancani ngabo." 
Psalms16:4 Abazikhethela abosingazimu bazandisela isizi; angeze nganikela kibo iminikelo yeengazi, namkha ngiphathe amabizwabo ngeembhena zami." 
Psalms16:5 USomnini usisabelo sami, iye, ulilifa lami nekaphami, wena Somnini ungilondele ifumbe yami." 
Psalms16:6 Ngisikelwe umkhawulo eendaweni ezihle, iye, ilifa elinganelisako." 
Psalms16:7 Ngidumisa uSomnini ongilulekako, ngitjho nebusuku ihliziywami iyangikhalima." 
Psalms16:8 Ngesikhathi soke ngibeka uSomnini phambi kwami njengombana angesidleni sami angeze nganyakaziswa. 
Psalms16:9 Ngalokho ihliziywami yenamile; ngihlokoma ngamandla ngombana umzimbami ulondekile. 
Psalms16:10 Esikhundleni sokobana ungilahlele endaweni yabafileko, namkha uvumele othembekileko wakho abone ithuna," 
Psalms16:11 wena ungikhombisa indlela yokuphila. Ukujabula okwanelisako kuphambi kwakho nokwenama kungesidleni sakho isiphelani. 
Psalms17:1 Umthandazo kaDavida. Akhese ulalele, wena Somnini ogcina ukulunga! Beka indlebakho esililweni sami, uzwe umthandazwami, ovela eembheneni ezinganakohliso." 
Psalms17:2 Ilungelo lami alivele kuwe, amehlwakho abone okuliqiniso." 
Psalms17:3 Lokha nawuzizinya ihliziywami nalokha nawungihlolisisako ebusuku, iye, nawungihlahlubako angeze ufunyane ihlazo kimi: Umlomami awuphambuki." 
Psalms17:4 Mayelana nezenzo zabantu: Ngokwamezwi womlomakho ngiyelele iindlela zobudlova. 
Psalms17:5 Yeke, amagadangwami anamathele emitlhalenakho; iinyawo zami akhange zitjhelele." 
Psalms17:6 Mina ngibiza wena Zimu ngombana uzangiphendula, beka indlebakho kimi, uzwe amezwami." 
Psalms17:7 Tjengisa ukukhathalela kwakho okumangalisako. Wena usindisa ngesandla sakho sokudla labo abafuna isiphephelo ebajamelanini babo. 
Psalms17:8 Ngilonde njengehlavu yelihlo, ungifihle emthunzini wamaphikwakho," 
Psalms17:9 iye, ungifihle eenkhohlakalini ezinenturhu kimi, okuzizitha zepilwami ezingizombileko." 
Psalms17:10 Zivale iinhliziyo zazo esirhawini, imilomazo ikhuluma ngokuzitjhaya." 
Psalms17:11 Zilandelele umtlhalami, nje-ke sezingizombile; amehlwazo anqophe ukungirabhalalisa." 
Psalms17:12 Zinjengamabhubezi arhalele ukudabudabula inyamazana nanjengamabhubezana akhukhuthako. 
Psalms17:13 Sikima Somnini! Qalana nazo, uziguqise! Ngesabulakho sindisa ipilwami eenkhohlakalini," 
Psalms17:14 iye, Somnini, ngesandla sakho ebantwinabo. Ababulalako abanapilwede, lokho kusisabelo sabo epilweni ngombana uzalisa izisu zabo ngesibetho obabekele sona. Abantwababo bazakusutha ngaso bebanikele iinzukulwana zabo iinsalela." 
Psalms17:15 Kodwana mina ngizazizwela ubukhona bakho ngisendawenakho yokulunga. Lokha nangivukako ngizakwaneliswa kuzibonakalisa kwakho. 
Psalms18:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida, inceku kaSomnini. UDavida wakhuluma amezwi wengoma le lokha uSomnini namsindisa esandleni sazo zoke izitha zakhe ngitjho nakuSawula." 
Psalms18:2 Wathi: Ngiyakuthanda Somnini, umamandlami." 
Psalms18:3 USomnini ulidwala lami, isiphephelo nomsindisami. UZimami ulirholo lami engiphephela kilo; usihlangu sami namandla wesindiswami. Usiqongolo sami" 
Psalms18:4 ufanele ukudunyiswa: Nangilila kuSomnini, ngisindiswa ezitheni zami." 
Psalms18:5 Ngenganyelwa misinga yokufa, iinkhukhula ezibhubhisako zangethusa." 
Psalms18:6 Iinkawule zezindla bezingirarele; ngabandamelwa zizifu zokufa. 
Psalms18:7 Ematlhuwenami ngalilela uSomnini, ngarhuwelela uZimami. Wezwa ilizwi lami asesigodlweni sakhe, ukulila kwami kuye kwafika eendlebeni zakhe." 
Psalms18:8 Iphasi ladedemela begodu lahlengezela, iinsekelo zeentaba zasikinyeka, zathuthumela ngombana gade asilingekile." 
Psalms18:9 USomnini nasilingekileko ufana nentabamlilo ethunya intuthu nekhafula amalangabi nekehla. 
Psalms18:10 Wavula amazulu wehlela phasi; ngaphasi kweenyawo zakhe bekunamafu anzima tshu. 
Psalms18:11 Kwaba ngathi uphapha ngekerubhi, ebeliphapha belithiyelele emaphikweni wommoya." 
Psalms18:12 Ubumnyama wabenza isigubuzeso sakhe, ubusithelo bakhe baba mamafu anzima wezulu." 
Psalms18:13 Ebuphaziphazini bobukhona bakhe kwakhithika isinanja emafini, kwamekeza nemibani." 
Psalms18:14 USomnini uyaduma usemafini, kwezwakala ilizwi lakaZimu ongoPhezulu." 
Psalms18:15 Wadubula imisubela kwaphadlhalala izitha, waphosa imibani kwahlangahlangana amanaba." 
Psalms18:16 Somnini, lokha nawuvuthela ummoya ngeempumulo, ukuzika kwelwandle kwambuleka; iinsekelo zephasi zanekeka ebaleni ngebanga lokukhalima kwakho." 
Psalms18:17 Welula isandla sakhe aphezulu, wangidzwebula; wangenyula emagwimbini wamanzi." 
Psalms18:18 Wangisindisa esitheni sami esinamandla nakilabo abangizondako bangigabisela ngeenkhwepha. 
Psalms18:19 Bangithelekela ngelanga lami lehlekelele, kodwana uSomnini waba msekelami." 
Psalms18:20 Wangikhupha emkghothweni wangibeka etjhatjhalazini, wangisindisa ngombana angithanda." 
Psalms18:21 USomnini wangivuza ngombana nginganamlandu; wangikhokhela ngombana nginezandla ezimsulwa. 
Psalms18:22 Iye, ngilondile iindlela zakaSomnini; azange ngenze okumbi ngokuhlanuka uZimami." 
Psalms18:23 Ngihlala ngikhumbula imithethwakhe; azange ngilahle iimiso zakhe. 
Psalms18:24 Bengisoloko ngimsulwa kuye, ngizilondile esonweni." 
Psalms18:25 USomnini wangivuza ngombana nginganamlandu, ngokuya ngobumsulwa bezandla zami phambi kwakhe." 
Psalms18:26 Somnini, uziveza uthembekile kabathembekileko, uziveza umsulwa kabamsulwa," 
Psalms18:27 nakohlanzekileko uziveza uhlanzekile, kodwana koneengwegwe uzibonakalisa uliqili." 
Psalms18:28 Iye, wena usindisa abazithobileko, abazigqajako ubehlise." 
Psalms18:29 Mbala, Somnini, nguwe okhanyisa isibani sami, utjhugulula ubumnyama engikibo ubenze ukukhanya." 
Psalms18:30 Ngesizo lakho ngingathelekela ibutho, ngoZimami ngingeqa umthangala wedorobho." 
Psalms18:31 UZimu lo, ngoneendlela ezipheleleko, ilizwi lakaSomnini alisoleki. USomnini usihlangu sabo boke abaphephela kuye." 
Psalms18:32 Ngubani uZimu ngaphandle kwakaSomnini? Ngubani idwala ngaphandle kwakaZimu na? 
Psalms18:33 NguZimu ongihlomisa ngamandla nowenza indlelami iphephe. 
Psalms18:34 Uqinisa imilenzami njengeyehlangumataka angenze ngijame ngokuphepha eenqongolweni. 
Psalms18:35 Ubandulela izandla zami ukulwa, imikhonwami ikghona ukugoba umsebe wekoporo." 
Psalms18:36 Ukungisekela kwakho kube sihlangu kimi, isandla sakho sokudla singilondile nawuphendula imithandazwami ngiqina idolo." 
Psalms18:37 Ugangadela indlelami bonyana ngingatshinyeki iingogoriyana. 
Psalms18:38 Ngagijimisa izitha zami ngazifunyana; azange ngijike zingakafi nya. 
Psalms18:39 Ngaziphihliza zangasavuka; zarabhalala ngaphasi kweenyawo zami. 
Psalms18:40 Wangihlomisa ngamandla wokulwa, wathobisa amanabami phambi kwami." 
Psalms18:41 Wenza izitha zami zifulathele ipi, ngarhayila abangizondako." 
Psalms18:42 Barhuwelela bafuna isizo, kodwana bangaba nomsizi. Balilela uSomnini, kodwana azange abaphendule." 
Psalms18:43 Ngabatshidlha basileka kwanga ziintuli emmoyeni; ngabagadanga njengedaka leendledlana. 
Psalms18:44 Somnini, ungisindisile nangisahlelwa babantu, wangenza ngaba yihloko yezizwe ezitjhili. Abantu bakosobantu bayangikhothamela," 
Psalms18:45 nabezwako ngami, bayangithobela, imiqhamuka iyazincengela." 
Psalms18:46 Imiqhamuka iyakoropana, iza itatazela kusukela esiphephelweni sayo." 
Psalms18:47 USomnini uyaphila! Alidunyiswe idwala lami! Akaphakanyiswe uZimu omsindisami! 
Psalms18:48 UnguZimu ongibuyiselelako, obeka izizwe ngaphasi kwami," 
Psalms18:49 ongithukulula ezitheni zami. Mbala, ungiphakamisa ngaphezu kwabajamelani bami, angihluthule ebantwini benturhu." 
Psalms18:50 Ngalokho ngizakudumisa Somnini, hlangana nezizwe; ngibhine iindumiso ebizweni lakho." 
Psalms18:51 UZimu unikela ikosi ayibekileko ukuhlula okukhulu; akhombise ukwethembeka kozesiweko wakhe, iye, kuDavida neenzukulwana zakhe isiphelani." 
Psalms19:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms19:2 Isibhakabhaka sibika iphazimulo kaZimu iye, umkayi umemezela umsebenzi wezandla zakhe." 
Psalms19:3 Ilanga libikela elinye umlayezo nobusuku bulandisa obulandelako ngelwazi. 
Psalms19:4 Nanyana kungekho ikulumo namezwi nelizwi lazo lingazwakali," 
Psalms19:5 umlayezwazo urhatjheka iphasi loke nombikwazo emaphelelweni womhlaba, ukuya phezulu etendeni lelanga." 
Psalms19:6 Ilanga linjengomkhwenyana naphuma ngelawini lakhe, lithaba njengengorho ekhamba ibanga layo." 
Psalms19:7 Liphuma ngakelinye ihlangothi lesibhakabhaka, libuyele emuva ngakelinye. Akukho okungafihleka ekutjhiseni kwalo." 
Psalms19:8 Umthetho kaSomnini uphelele, uvuselela ipilo. Ubufakazi bakaSomnini buthembekile, bunikela ubuhlakani kabanganalwazi." 
Psalms19:9 Ifundiso kaSomnini ilungile, yenamisa ihliziyo. Imiyalo kaSomnini imsulwa, ikhanyisa amehlo." 
Psalms19:10 Ukuzithoba kuSomnini kuhlambulukile kunzinzile ngeenkhathi zoke. Iingwebo zakaSomnini ziliqiniso, zifanelekile." 
Psalms19:11 Koke lokho kuthandeka ukudlula igolide, iye, ukudlula igolidembala elinengi. Kunandipha ukudlula iinyosi, iye, ukudlula iliju lesihlaka." 
Psalms19:12 Incekwakho nayo ilulekwa ngikho; ukukulonda lokho kunomvuzo omkhulu. 
Psalms19:13 Akakho noyedwa owazi imitjhapho efihlakeleko; nje-ke, Somnini, ungangibethi ngebanga lemitjhapho leyo!" 
Psalms19:14 Khandela incekwakho ingenzi izono ngabomu. Ungazivumeli zingibuse. Khona ngizahlala ngimsulwa begodu nginganacala lesiphambeko esikhulu. 
Psalms19:15 Sengathi amezwi womlomami nemikhumbulo yehliziywami ingamukeleka kuwe Somnini, Dwala lami nomHlengami." 
Psalms20:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms20:2 Kwanga uSomnini angakuphendula ngesikhathi sokubandezelwa, ibizo lakaZimu wakaJakopo likuvikele." 
Psalms20:3 Inga angakuthumelela isizo elisuka endaweni ecwengileko, akusekele aseZiyoni;" 
Psalms20:4 akhumbule yoke iminikelwakho, amukele imihlabelwakho yokutjhiswa." 
Psalms20:5 Inga angakupha okufiswa yihliziywakho, aphelelise woke amaswakho." 
Psalms20:6 Kwanga singahlokoma ngokuhlula kwakho, siphakamise itshwayo ebizweni lakaZimu; iye, inga uSomnini angaphumelelisa zoke iimbawo zakho." 
Psalms20:7 Nje-ke mina ngiyazi bona uSomnini usiza ozesiweko wakhe, amuphe ipendulo asezulwini lakhe elicwengileko, ngesindiso enamandla evela ngesandleni sakhe sokudla." 
Psalms20:8 Abanye baqina ngeenkarana zepi, abanye ngeenjomani, kodwana thina siqina ngebizo lakaSomnini uZimethu." 
Psalms20:9 Abanjalo bazakuguqa, bawe, kodwana thina sizakusikima, sijame." 
Psalms20:10 Somnini, yipha ikosethu ukuhlula! Usiphendule lokha nasilila kuwe." 
Psalms21:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms21:2 Zimu, emandlenakho ikosethu iyathaba, ekuhluleni kwakho idumisa ngamandla!" 
Psalms21:3 Iye, uyiphile isifiso sehliziywayo nesibawo seembhena zayo akhange usigodle." 
Psalms21:4 Uyihlangabeze ngeembusiso ezihle, wayithwesa isihlohlo segolidembala." 
Psalms21:5 Yabawa ukuphila kuwe, wayinikela khona; iye, wayipha amalanga amanengi, isikhathi eside." 
Psalms21:6 Idumo layo likhulu ngenca yokuhlula kwakho, ubeke ukuhlonitjhwa nobukhosi phezu kwayo." 
Psalms21:7 Mbala, ubeke kiyo iimbusiso nini nanini, wayijabulisa khulu ngobukhona bakho." 
Psalms21:8 Ngebangelo ikosi yethemba uZimu, nje-ke, ngokwethembeka kwakaZimu ongoPhezulu, angeze yazanyazanyiswa." 
Psalms21:9 Ngwenyama, isandla sakho sizozifunyana zoke izitha zakho; sokudla sakho sizabafunyana abakuzondako." 
Psalms21:10 Lokha nawubonakalako, uzazenza zibe njengekehla yomlilo. UZimu uzaziginya ngelaka lakhe, ziqothulwe mlilo." 
Psalms21:11 Inzalwazo uzoyitjhabalalisa ephasini, iye, isizukulwana sazo hlangana nabantu." 
Psalms21:12 Lokha nazikuphendukela ngobumbi, zikubophele izungu, angeze zaphumelela." 
Psalms21:13 Mbala, uzazenza zibaleke, lokha nawuzinemba ngemisebakho ebusweni bazo." 
Psalms21:14 Phakama Zimu, emandlenakho! Thina sizakuvuma, sidumise imisebenzakho emikhulu." 
Psalms22:1 Kumkhaleli; nge-Ayelethi-Hatjharhari irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms22:2 Zimami, Zimami, ungitjhiyeleni na? Kubayini ukude ungangisizi, iye, ukude namezwi wesililo sami na?" 
Psalms22:3 Zimami, ngilila emini, kodwana awuphenduli nebusuku kodwana angifunyani ukuthula." 
Psalms22:4 Wena ongocwengileko, uhlezi eembongweni zaka-Israyeli." 
Psalms22:5 Abobamkhulu bathembela kuwe; bakwethemba, wabasindisa." 
Psalms22:6 Kuwe balila, wabasindisa; kuwe bathembela, bangadaniswa." 
Psalms22:7 Mina ngiyipethu nje, angisuye umuntu, ngisithuko sabantu, ngidelelwa zizizwe." 
Psalms22:8 Boke abangibonako bayanginyefula, bayangikokomeja, bebathintithe iinhloko" 
Psalms22:9 bathi: “Uzinikele kuSomnini, uSomnini akamsindise, amenyule, angithi uyamthanda!”" 
Psalms22:10 Somnini, nguwe owangikhupha esibelethweni, wangikhoselisa emabeleni wakamma." 
Psalms22:11 Kuwe ngalahlelwa ngisabelethwa, kwasesibelwethweni sakamma, waba nguZimami." 
Psalms22:12 Ungabi kude nami ngombana imbandezelo iseduze begodu akakho ongangisiza. 
Psalms22:13 Iinkunzi ezinengi zingizombelezile, iye, iinkunzi ezinamandla zeBhatjhani zingibungelele." 
Psalms22:14 Zingikhamisele imilomazo njengengonyama ebhodlako efuna ukudabudabula. 
Psalms22:15 Ngithululiwe njengamanzi, woke amalungami akhwamukile; ihliziywami injengamanyephe, iyancithika ngaphakathi kwami." 
Psalms22:16 Amandlami omile njengedengela, ilimu lami linamathela eensinini zami. Ungilalisa ethulini lokufa." 
Psalms22:17 Izinja zingizombelezile, ijima labenzi bobumbi lingibungelele; izandla neenyawo zami zilinyaziwe," 
Psalms22:18 amathambami ngingawabala woke. Abantwabo bangirhudulele amehlo ngokungikokomeja," 
Psalms22:19 babelana iimpahla zami zokwembatha, benzelana ifumbe ngesambatho sami." 
Psalms22:20 Nakunguwe Somninini, ungabi kude; wena Sizo lami, tjhidela masinyana kimi ungisize." 
Psalms22:21 Sindisa umphefumulwami ekembeni, ipilwami eligugu emandleni wezinja." 
Psalms22:22 Ngisindisa emlonyeni wengonyama neempondweni zekukhama! Wangizwa, wangiphendula," 
Psalms22:23 nje-ke ngizakumemezela ibizo lakho kubafowethu, ngikudumise phakathi kwebandla lamakholwa." 
Psalms22:24 Nina enesaba uSomnini, mdumiseni, noke nina nzukulwana zakaJakopo, mkhakhaziseni; iye, noke nina nzukulwana zaka-Israyeli, msikimeleni ngokumhlonipha." 
Psalms22:25 Mbala uSomnini azange akhe anyaze, namkha adelele ukuhlupheka kodududu; akhange afihle ubuso bakhe kuye, kodwana umzwile lokha nalila kuye." 
Psalms22:26 Somnini, kuwe kuvela ukudumisa kwami ebandleni elikhulu! Ngizaziphumelelisa iinthembiso zami phambi kwabayesabako." 
Psalms22:27 Abathobekileko bazakudla basuthe. Abafuna uSomnini bazamdumisa bathi: “Uyaphila!” Iinhliziyo zenu ngesikhathi soke 
Psalms22:28 zizakukhumbula. Boke abasemaphethelweni wephasi bazakuphendukela kuSomnini. Iye, zoke iinkoro zezizwe zizakhothama phambi kwakhe" 
Psalms22:29 ngombana umbuso ungowakaSomnini obusa phezu kwezizwe," 
Psalms22:30 iye, yena yedwa. Boke abamajadu bazamkhothamela; phambi kwakhe boke abafako bazakuguqa. Onganapilo uzakuvuseleleka!" 
Psalms22:31 Iinzukulwana zizakulotjha uSomnini, imindeni ezako ibikelwe ngoSomandla; ukuhlula kwakhe kuzakutjelwa abangakabelethwa, kuthiwe: “Lokhu kwenziwa nguSomnini!”" 
Psalms23:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. USomnini ungumelusami, angizukuhlonga litho." 
Psalms23:2 Ungilalisa emadlelweni alihlaza, angidosele hlanu kwamanzi endaweni epholileko." 
Psalms23:3 Uvusa umphefumulwami, angirholele endleleni efaneleko." 
Psalms23:4 Nanyana ngikhamba ngerharheni lethunzi elesabekako, angizukwesaba okumbi ngombana wena ukimi; intonga nedondolo lakho kuyangiduduza." 
Psalms23:5 Uqhisa isithebe phambi kwami, amanabami angiqalile. Uzesa ihlokwami ngamafutha we-oliva ikaphami iyaphuphuma." 
Psalms23:6 Ngambala okuhle nokwethembeka kuyangilandela imihla yoke yokuphila kwami. Ngizakubuyela ngekumbeni kaSomnini qobana ngisaphila. 
Psalms24:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Iphasi lingelakaSomnini nakho koke okukilo, ilizwe nabakhileko kilo" 
Psalms24:2 ngombana yena walisekela phezu kwamalwandle, yalijamisa phezu kwemilambo." 
Psalms24:3 Ngubani ongakhuphukela entabeni kaSomnini? Ngubani ongajama endawenakhe ecwengileko na? 
Psalms24:4 Ngiloyo onezandla ezinganacala, nehliziyo ehlanzekileko, ongakhulumeli butjhilweni ngoSomnini nongafungi ngekohliso." 
Psalms24:5 Uzakwamukela isibusiso kuSomnini nokulunga kuZimu, omsindisakhe." 
Psalms24:6 Leso sizukulwana esimfunako; iye, esifuna ubuso bakaZimu wakaJakopo." 
Psalms24:7 Phakamisani iinhloko zenu, nina masango! Iye, ziphakamiseni nina minyango yekadeni kobana umBusi ohloniphekileko angene!" 
Psalms24:8 Ungubani umBusi ohloniphekileko loyo na? UnguSomnini onamandla noyingorho, iye, nguSomnini oyingorho yepi!" 
Psalms24:9 Phakamisani iinhloko zenu, nina masango! Iye, ziphakamiseni nina minyango yekadeni, kobana umBusi ohloniphekileko angene!" 
Psalms24:10 Ungubani umBusi ohloniphekileko loyo na? UnguSomnini uMninimandlawoke; nguye emBusi ohloniphekileko. 
Psalms25:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Somnini, umphefumulwami uyakulangazelela." 
Psalms25:2 Zimami, ngithembele kuwe, ungavumeli bona ngingene ehlazweni; ungavumeli izitha zami ziqhanase ngami." 
Psalms25:3 Ngambala boke abaqalelele kuwe angeze badaniswa. Labo abakuhlubukako ngelize bazakuhlaziswa. 
Psalms25:4 Ngazise iindlela zakho Somnini; ungifundise imizilakho. 
Psalms25:5 Ngikhambisa eqinisweni lakho, ungifundise ngombana wena unguZimu wesindiswami, ngithembele kuwe ngesikhathi soke." 
Psalms25:6 Somnini, khumbula izenzo zesisa nezokwethembeka kwakho ngombana zibekhona ekadeni." 
Psalms25:7 Ungakhumbuli izono zobutjha bami namkha iimphambeko zami; ngikhumbule ngokwethembeka kwakho ngebanga lezenzo zakho ezihle. 
Psalms25:8 USomnini ulungile begodu uqotho, ngalokho ukhombisa izoni indlela." 
Psalms25:9 Urholela abathobekileko kokulungileko, iye, abathobekileko ubafundisa indlelakhe." 
Psalms25:10 Zoke iindlela zakaSomnini zikukwethembeka, ziliqiniso kilabo abalonda isivumelwano nobufakazi bakhe." 
Psalms25:11 Ngebanga lebizo lakho Somnini, colela icala lami ngombana likhulu." 
Psalms25:12 Ngimuphi umuntu wesaba uSomnini na? Yena uzamfundisa indlela azayikhetha. 
Psalms25:13 Umuntu loyo uzakuhlala aphumelela, isizukulwana sakhe sizakuzuza inarha." 
Psalms25:14 USomnini wenza isikhozi nabamesabako, azise isivumelwano sakhe kibo." 
Psalms25:15 Nini nanini amehlwami ahlala akuSomnini ngombana nguye ophephisa inyawo lami esifwini. 
Psalms25:16 Phendukela kimi Somnini, ube nomusa kimi ngombana nginesizungu, ngihluphekile." 
Psalms25:17 Iinhlupheko zehliziywami zingikhulele, yewungikhuphe esizini lami." 
Psalms25:18 Yelela ukuhlupheka nokubandezelwa kwami, ungicolele zoke izono zami." 
Psalms25:19 Akhusuthi uyaqala, izitha zami zinengi, uqale nelunya ezingizonda ngalo." 
Psalms25:20 Londoloza ipilwami, ungenyule; ungavumeli bona ngingene ehlazweni ngombana ngiphephela kuwe." 
Psalms25:21 Kwanga ubuqotho nokulunga kungangilondoloza ngombana ngiqalelele kuwe, Somnini." 
Psalms25:22 Zimu, akhese ukhuphe u-Israyeli kizo zoke iinhlupheko zakhe." 
Psalms26:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Ngihlambulula Somnini ngombana ngikhambe ngobuqotho, ngathemba uSomnini ngokungazazi." 
Psalms26:2 Ngizizinye Somnini, ungiphenye; uhlolisise iziso nehliziywami." 
Psalms26:3 Ngebanga lokwethembeka kwakho ngikhamba eqinisweni lakho. 
Psalms26:4 Angihlali neengilamkhuba, namkha ngizihlanganise nabazenzisi." 
Psalms26:5 Ngiyawuzonda umhlangano wabenzi bobumbi begodu angeze ngahlala neenkhohlakali. 
Psalms26:6 Ngihlamba izandla zami, ngimsulwa, iye, ngizombeleza i-aldari lakho Somnini," 
Psalms26:7 ngokuphakamisa ilizwi lokuthokoza nangokumemezela zoke iimangaliso zakho. 
Psalms26:8 Somnini, ngiyayithanda indlu ohlala kiyo, iye, lapha kuhlala khona iphazimulwakho." 
Psalms26:9 Ungangithanyeli nezoni, namkha ipilwami nabantu abomele iingazi." 
Psalms26:10 Ungangithanyeli nabanezandla zokonakala, iye, labo isidla sabo esigcwele ukufunjathiswa." 
Psalms26:11 Kodwana mina, ngikhamba ngobuqotho, yeke, ngihlenge ube nomusa kimi." 
Psalms26:12 Inyawo lami lijame ehlabathini elelezekileko; iye, emkhandlwini omkhulu ngizakudumisa uSomnini." 
Psalms27:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. USomnini ukukhanya nesindiswami, ngizakwesaba bani na? USomnini ubuphephelo bokuphila kwami; alo, ngizakuba nevalo ngobani na?" 
Psalms27:2 Lokha abenzi bobumbi nabatjhidela kimi kobana bangidle ngiphila, iye, izitha nabajamelani bami, ngibo abakhutjhwa bebawe." 
Psalms27:3 Nanyana ibutho lingivimbezela, ihliziywami ayinavalo; nalokha ngivukelwa yipi, nalapho nginethemba." 
Psalms27:4 Kunye engikubawa kuSomnini begodu ngizakulandelela lokho: Kukobana ngihlale ngekumbeni kaSomnini, amalanga woke wokuphila kwami, nje-ke ngizazizwela umusa kaSomnini nokuhlahlwa ethempelini lakhe." 
Psalms27:5 Yena uzongibhacisa emtlhatlhanenakhe ngelanga elimbi, angifihle ekusithekeni kwetende lakhe, iye, uzongibeka ekuphakameni phezu kwedwala." 
Psalms27:6 Yeke ihlokwami iphakamile ngehla kwezitha zami ezingizombelezileko; ngizakunikela iminikelo yokuhlokoma etendeni lakhe, ngizakuvuma, ngidumise uSomnini." 
Psalms27:7 Ngizwe Somnini lokha nangilila ngelizwi elikhulu; yiba nesirhawu kimi, ungiphendule!" 
Psalms27:8 Ihliziywami ikhumbula bona uthe: “Funani ubuso bami!” Nje-ke, ubuso bakho Somnini, ngizabufuna," 
Psalms27:9 ngalokho ungabufihli kimi. Ungayiqotjhi incekwakho ngetukuthelo; wena ube lisizo lami, ungangilahli; ungangitjhiyi, wena Zimu wesindiswami." 
Psalms27:10 Ubaba nomma bangangitjhiya, kodwana uSomnini uzangamukela." 
Psalms27:11 Somnini, ngifundise indlelakho, ngirhole emzileni olelezekileko ngenca yezitha zami." 
Psalms27:12 Unganginikeleli entandweni yamanabami ngombana abofakazi bamanga bangivukele, iye, bafuthekile ngenturhu." 
Psalms27:13 Mbala ngiyakholwa bonyana ngizazizwela ukulunga kwakaSomnini ngisesephasinapha. 
Psalms27:14 Qalelela uSomnini, uqine, ihliziywakho ibe nesibindi; iye, qalelela uSomnini." 
Psalms28:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Ngilila kuwe Somnini, Dwala lami, ungabi njengesithulu kimi ngombana nawuthulileko kimi, ngizakufana nabehlela endaweni yabafileko." 
Psalms28:2 Yizwa ilizwi lesibawo sami, lokha nangilila kuwe Somnini; iye, lokha nangiphakamisela izandla, endawenakho ecwenge khulu." 
Psalms28:3 Ungangirhurhuli nabakhohlakeleko, nabababenzi bobumbi, labo abakhuluma kuhle nabanye abantu, khisibe babakhohlisi eenhliziyweni." 
Psalms28:4 Bavuze njengokwemisebenzabo, iye, njengobumbi bezenzo zabo; bakhokhele njengokomphumela wezandla zabo, ubabuyisele umvuzwabo, obafaneleko." 
Psalms28:5 Njengombana banganaki okwenziwa nguSomnini, namkha umsebenzi wezandla zakhe, uSomnini uzabadiliza, angasabavusi." 
Psalms28:6 Akadunyiswe uSomnini ngombana uzwile ilizwi lokuncenga kwami. 
Psalms28:7 USomnini umamandlami nesihlangu sami, ihliziywami ithembela kuye; ngalokho ngisizakele nehliziywami isasile; nje-ke, ngengomami ngizamdumisa." 
Psalms28:8 USomnini umamandla wabantu bakhe, ulirharha lesindiso kozesiweko wakhe." 
Psalms28:9 Somnini, sindisa abantu bakho, ubusise ilifa lakho; yiba mumelusabo, ubathwale isiphelani." 
Psalms29:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Nina madodana kaZimu, nikelani uSomnini, iye, mnikeleni iphazimulo namandla!" 
Psalms29:2 Nikelani uSomnini iphazimulo yebizo lakhe! Mkhothameleni nembethe izambatho ezicwengileko. 
Psalms29:3 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lingaphezu kwamanzi, uZimu wephazimulo uyararambisa; iye, uSomnini ungaphezu kwamanzi amanengi." 
Psalms29:4 Ilizwi lakaSomnini linamandla; ilizwi lakaSomnini linobukhosi. 
Psalms29:5 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lephula imithi yemisedari; iye, uSomnini uphohloza imisedari yeLibhanoni." 
Psalms29:6 USomnini wenza iintaba zitjekule njengekonyana, iye, iLibhanoni neSiriyoni njengekunzana yekukhama." 
Psalms29:7 Ilizwi lakaSomnini libabela amalangabi womlilo. 
Psalms29:8 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lizamazamisa irhalawumba; iye, USomnini uzamazamisa irhalawumba leKhadetjhi." 
Psalms29:9 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lithintitha imithi ye-owuku lenza amahlathi asale awohlokile. Ngesigodlweni sakhe boke bathi: “Iphazimulo!” 
Psalms29:10 USomnini uhlezi ngaphezu kwamanzi wesibhakabhaka; iye, uSomnini uyabusa, uyikosi isiphelani." 
Psalms29:11 Kwanga uSomnini anganikela abantu bakhe amandla! Kwanga angababusisa ngokuthula. 
Psalms30:1 Ingoma yokwahlukaniselwa ithempeli; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms30:2 Ngiyakuphakamisa Somnini ngombana ungenyulile, akhange uvume bonyana izitha zijabule ngami." 
Psalms30:3 Somnini, Zimami, ngilile kuwe, wangipholisa." 
Psalms30:4 Wena Somnini ungenyule endaweni yabafileko, wangihlenga phakathi kwabehlela emgodini." 
Psalms30:5 Khalelani nidumise uSomnini nina bathembekileko bayo, thokozani ibizo layo elicwengileko" 
Psalms30:6 ngombana itukuthelo kaSomnini ingeyesikhatjhana, kodwana umusayo ungowepilo yoke. Nanyana kungaba nesililo ebusuku, nokho amasa eza nesihleko." 
Psalms30:7 Ekwenameni kwami mina ngathi: “Angisoze nganyakaziswa.” 
Psalms30:8 Somnini bekungomusakho kobana ungenze nganzinza njengentaba eqinileko; kodwana lokha nawufihla ubuso bakho, ngathoma ukukakamala." 
Psalms30:9 Ngalila kuwe Somnini, iye, ngazincengela kuSomandla, ngathi:" 
Psalms30:10 “Ingabe kukhona okuzuzako ngokufa kwami, lokha nangehlela emgodini na? Ithuli lona lizakudumisa, lidembe ngokwethembeka kwakho na?" 
Psalms30:11 Yizwa Somnini, ube nomusa kimi, yiba msizami Somnini!”" 
Psalms30:12 Uphendule isililo sami saba ligido, wangihlubulisa izambatho zami zesililo, wangembathisa ukujabula," 
Psalms30:13 ukuze ngikudumise ngamandla, ngingathuli. Somnini Zimami, ngizakuthokoza nini nanini." 
Psalms31:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms31:2 Kuwe Somnini, ngiyaphephela, nini nanini ungavumi ngingene ehlazweni ngisindise ngokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms31:3 Beka kimi indlebakho, ungenyule masinyana. Yiba lidwala lobuphephelo kimi, ube yindawo yokukhosela kobana ngilondeke." 
Psalms31:4 Mbala wena ulidwala lami nobuphephelo bami; yeke ngirhole, ungihlahle ngenca yebizo lakho;" 
Psalms31:5 ungikhuphe esithiyweni ebesifihlelwe mina ngombana wena usiphephelo sami. 
Psalms31:6 Esandleni sakho ngibeka ummoyami, uyangihlenga Somnini, Zimu othembekileko." 
Psalms31:7 Ngiyabazonda abalotjha abosingazimu abalilize ngombana mina ngethemba uSomnini. 
Psalms31:8 Ekuthembekeni kwakho ngizakuthaba, ngijabule ngombana ukuhlupheka kwami ukubonile, wanaka iinhlupheko zomphefumulwami." 
Psalms31:9 Akhange unginikele esandleni sesitha, kunalokho ujamise iinyawo zami endaweni ebanzi." 
Psalms31:10 Somnini, yiba nomusa kimi ngombana ngibandezelekile. Amehlwami avuvukile ngebanga lesizi, umphefumulwami nomzimbami uyanyefa." 
Psalms31:11 Mbala, ipilwami ihlala iseenhlungwini neminyakami inesibibithwana, amandlami adambile ngebanga lesono sami, iye, nginyefe ummongo." 
Psalms31:12 Ngibe siphoqo sawo woke amanabami, kibomakhelwana bami khona angisakhulumi, iye, sese ngisisethuso eenhlobeni zami, abangibona ngaphandle bayangibaleka." 
Psalms31:13 Nginjengofileko: angisakhumbuleki; ngaba ngofana nesitja esephukileko. 
Psalms31:14 Ngizwile abanengi bangihleba, ukwesaba kungizomba mahlangothi woke, lokha nabahlala isicathana ngami. Bahlosa ukungibulala" 
Psalms31:15 kodwana mina ngithemba wena Somnini, ngithi: “UnguZimami.”" 
Psalms31:16 Esandleni sakho kuneenkhathi zami; ngitjhaphulule esandleni sezitha zami nakilabo abangizumako. 
Psalms31:17 Khanyisa ubuso bakho phezu kwencekwakho; ngisindise ngokwethembeka kwakho. 
Psalms31:18 Somnini, ungavumi ngingene ehlazweni ngombana ngibiza wena. Yenza iinkhohlakali ziphoqeke, ziye endaweni yabafileko zithulile." 
Psalms31:19 Ayithuliswe imilomo ekhuluma amanga, iye, ekhuluma ngokuzazi ngabalungileko nangokuzigqaja nokunyaza." 
Psalms31:20 Maye, kuvamile okuhle okwenzako, okulondele labo abakwesabako, okulungisile phambi kwabantu kilabo abaphephela kuwe." 
Psalms31:21 Ubafihla ekusithekeni kobukhona bakho, ekuhlebeni kwabantu. Ubasitha emtlhatlhanenakho ekuphikisweni kweenkulumo." 
Psalms31:22 USomnini akadunyiswe ngombana ungibonisile ukukhathalela kwakhe okumangalisako, lokha nangivinjezelwe njengedorobho." 
Psalms31:23 Mina-ke ngaba namawala ngokuthi: “Ngiqotjhiwe ebusweni bakho, Somnini.” Kodwana wezwa isibawo sokuncenga kwami, lokha nangilila kuwe." 
Psalms31:24 Thandani uSomnini noke nina bathembekileko bayo! USomnini uyabalondoloza abaqotho, kodwana ozigqajako umbuyiselela kanzima." 
Psalms31:25 Qinani, ihliziywenu ibe nesibindi nina noke eniqalelele kuSomnini." 
Psalms32:1 Irhubo lakaDavida; iMaskili. Ubusisiwe othethelelwe isiphambeko, iye, osono sakhe sisibekelweko." 
Psalms32:2 Ubusisiwe umuntu uSomnini angambaleli icala onehliziyo enganakohliso. 
Psalms32:3 Kwathi nangithulileko, umzimbami wanyefa ngokububula kwami ilanga loke" 
Psalms32:4 ngombana ubusuku nemini isandla sakho besinzima phezu kwami, amandlami adamba njengalokha kunomtjhisokazi ehlobo." 
Psalms32:5 Ngasivuma isono sami kuwe necala lami akhange ngilifihle. Ngathi: “Ngizazivuma iimphambeko zami kuSomnini.” Wena wathethelela icala lesono sami. 
Psalms32:6 Ngebangelo woke othembekileko uthandaza kuwe. Ngesikhathi sokugcwala komlambo, iye, lokha nahlangana nesikhukhula, amanzi angeze amfikelela." 
Psalms32:7 Wena uyindawo yokubhaca kimi, uyangilondoloza eengozini; ungizombeleza ngokuhlokoma kwetjhaphuluko." 
Psalms32:8 USomnini wathi: “Ngizakufundisa, ngikubonise indlela ozakukhamba ngayo; ngikweluleke, ngikuphose ilihlo." 
Psalms32:9 Ungabi njengenjomani namkha imeyila enganangqondo, ekufuze ilawulwe ngetomu, ingafuni ukusondela kuwe.”" 
Psalms32:10 Isikhohlakali sineenhlupheko ezinengi, kodwana othemba uSomnini uzakuzombelezwa kukwethembeka." 
Psalms32:11 Thakasani kuSomnini, nithabe nina balungileko! Hlokomani nina baqotho ngehliziyo!" 
Psalms33:1 Hlokomani kuSomnini nina balungileko! Iye, ukudumisa kungokwabaqotho!" 
Psalms33:2 Dumisani uSomnini ngeharibhana, nimbethele iharibha leenara ezilitjhumi!" 
Psalms33:3 Mrhubeleni ingoma etja, niyibethe kuhle ngeenara, nihlokome!" 
Psalms33:4 Mbala, ilizwi lakaSomnini liliqiniso, zoke izenzo zakhe zikukwethembeka." 
Psalms33:5 Uthanda okufaneleko nokulungileko, iphasi ligcwele ukwethembeka kwakaSomnini." 
Psalms33:6 Ngelizwi lakaSomnini, kwadaleka umkayi, iye, ngokukhuluma kwakhe kwenzeka koke okukiwo." 
Psalms33:7 Wabuthelela amanzi welwandle kwanga angemgqomini; wabeka amanzi amanengi ngeenlulwini. 
Psalms33:8 Iphasi loke alimesabe uSomnini; kuthi zoke izakhamuzi ephasini, zithuthumele ngaye" 
Psalms33:9 ngombana wakhuluma, kwadaleka, wayala, kwaba khona." 
Psalms33:10 USomnini uhlangahlanganisa iinhloso zezizwe, araranise amaqhinga wabantu." 
Psalms33:11 Iinhloso zakaSomnini zijame isiphelani, iqhinga lakhe lingelanini nanini." 
Psalms33:12 Sibusisiwe isizwe uZimaso kuSomnini, isizwe uSomnini azikhethele bona sibe lilifa lakhe." 
Psalms33:13 USomnini ubona phasi asezulwini, aqale woke umuntu." 
Psalms33:14 Esihlalweni sakhe uyelela boke bephasi. 
Psalms33:15 Yena owadala iinhliziyo zabo boke, uqaphela zoke izenzo zabo." 
Psalms33:16 Amakhosi akahluli ngobunengi bebutho lawo neengorho azisindi ngobukhulu bamandlazo. 
Psalms33:17 Iinjomani zepi zilithemba elililize ekusindiseni begodu azihlengi ngobukhulu bamandlazo. 
Psalms33:18 Kwamambala, ilihlo lakaSomnini liphezu kwabamesabako, iye, phezu kwabaqalelele ukwethembeka kwakhe," 
Psalms33:19 kobana atjhaphulule ipilwabo ekufeni, abalonde baphilile ngesikhathi sendlala." 
Psalms33:20 Umphefumulwethu ulindela uSomnini; yena ulisizo nesihlangu sethu. 
Psalms33:21 Iinhliziyo zethu zenamile kuye ngombana sithemba ibizo lakhe elicwengileko. 
Psalms33:22 Somnini, ukwethembeka kwakho akube phezu kwethu ngombana siqalelele wena." 
Psalms34:1 Irhubo lakaDavida; ngemva kokusuka kwakhe esigodlweni saka-Abimeleki ngombana azenze ihlanya, nje-ke waqotjhwa." 
Psalms34:2 USomnini ngizamdumisa ngeenkhathi zoke; ngizakuhlala ngimbabaza njalo ngomlomami. 
Psalms34:3 Mina ngizazikhakhazisa ngoSomnini, abathobekileko abezwe lokho, bajabule." 
Psalms34:4 Phakamisani uSomnini kanye nami, sikhulise ibizo lakhe kanyekanye." 
Psalms34:5 Ngathandaza kuSomnini, wangiphendula; wangitjhaphulula kikho koke ukwesaba kwami." 
Psalms34:6 Qalelelani uSomnini, niyamomotheke, yeke ubuso benu abusoze badana!" 
Psalms34:7 Nasi isihlupheki esalilako, uSomnini wasizwa, wasisindisa kizo zoke iinhlupheko." 
Psalms34:8 Abesaba uSomnini, baphahlwa yingilozi mazombe, ibenyule." 
Psalms34:9 Yizwani benibone bonyana uSomnini muhle, ubusisiwe umuntu ophephela kuye." 
Psalms34:10 Mesabeni uSomnini nina bacwengileko bakhe ngombana abamesabako abasweli litho. 
Psalms34:11 Amabhubezana ayadinga abe aphathwe yindlala, kodwana labo abafuna uSomnini abasweli litho." 
Psalms34:12 Nina bantwana, izani nizongilalela, nje-ke ngizonifundisa ukwesaba uSomnini:" 
Psalms34:13 Ngubani kini othanda ukuphila, nofisa amalanga amanengi wokwenama na?" 
Psalms34:14 Akalonde ilimu lakhe ekohlakalweni, neembhena zakhe ekukhulumeni ikohliso." 
Psalms34:15 Akahlukane nobumbi, enze okuhle; afune ukuthula akurhuluphele." 
Psalms34:16 Amehlo wakaSomnini aphezu kwabalungileko, neendlebe zakhe zivulekele isililo sabo." 
Psalms34:17 Ubuso bakaSomnini bujibile phezu kweengilamkhuba, uphelisa ukukhunjulwa kwazo ephasini." 
Psalms34:18 Abalungileko nabanesililo, uSomnini uyabezwa, abatjhaphulule kizo zoke iinhlupheko zabo." 
Psalms34:19 USomnini useduze nabanehliziyo ephukileko, usindisa abanommoya odanileko." 
Psalms34:20 Zinengi iinhlupheko zolungileko, kodwana uSomnini uyamtjhaphulula kizo zoke;" 
Psalms34:21 alonde woke amathambakhe, kungabikho nelilodwa kiwo elizakwephulwa." 
Psalms34:22 Okumbi kuyambulala okhohlakeleko, abazonda olungileko bazakuhlawuliswa." 
Psalms34:23 USomnini uhlenga ipilo yeenceku zakhe; akakho noyedwa ophephela kuye ozakuhlawuliswa. 
Psalms35:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Somnini, phikisana nabaphikisana nami, ulwe nalabo abalwa nami." 
Psalms35:2 Hloma ngekhande nesihlangu, usikime kobana ungisize." 
Psalms35:3 Rhwatjha umkhonto nesilembe, uqalane nabalandelana nami. Yithi kimi: “Ngiyisindiswakho.”" 
Psalms35:4 Akuthi labo abazumana nami badane, barhubutjheke bebabaleke; iye, abangisongelako bakhene." 
Psalms35:5 Ababe njengomungu ophetjhulwa mumoya, lokha ingilozi kaSomnini nayibadudulako;" 
Psalms35:6 indlelabo ibe mnyama, itjhelele, lokha ingilozi kaSomnini nayibagijimisako." 
Psalms35:7 Bangembele umgodi ngaphandle kwesizathu, bawufihla ngokuwembesa ngenedabo; iye, bangembele wona kunganabanga." 
Psalms35:8 Ukubhujiswa akubehlele bangakanaki, kuthi isifu abasithiyileko sibambe bona; bawele ngemgodinapho babhubhe." 
Psalms35:9 Khona-ke ngizakuthaba kuSomnini, ngename ngokusindisa kwayo." 
Psalms35:10 Ngamandlami woke ngizakuthi: “Somnini, ngubani onjengawe? Wena osindisa ohluphekileko kilabo abanamandla kunaye, iye, ohluphekileko nodududu kilabo abamdlelezelako.”" 
Psalms35:11 Kuvuka abofakazi abanelunya bangibuza izinto engingazaziko. 
Psalms35:12 Bangibuyiselela okumbi ngokuhle; ngizizwa inga ngilahliwe. 
Psalms35:13 Kodwana nakugula bona, mina ngembatha izambatho zokuzila, ngazikhandla ngokuzila ukudla; ngaqinisela ekubathandazeleni." 
Psalms35:14 Kwaba sengathi ngililela umngani namkha umfowethu. Ngembatha iinzilo, ihlokwami ikhotheme, ngakhamba njengotlhuwileko ngonina." 
Psalms35:15 Kodwana ekukhutjhweni kwami bona bajabula babuthana ndawonye. Babuthana kobana bangibethe ngingakatjheji, bangidabula bangasakhawula." 
Psalms35:16 Ekuhluzeni kwami abaphoqi bangiphoqa, bangigugudela amazinyo." 
Psalms35:17 Somnini, lokho uzakubukela bekube nini na? Ngisindise elunyeni labo, iye, ipilwami eligugu emabhubezini." 
Psalms35:18 Ngizakuthokoza ebandleni elikhulu, ngikudumise phakathi kwesiqubuthu." 
Psalms35:19 Ungavumeli izitha zami, iye, abakhohlisi bajabule ngami nabangizonda kunganasizathu bona bangikhwinyisele." 
Psalms35:20 Ngambala abakhulumi ukuthula begodu kilabo abahlezi ngokuthula enarheni basopha izinto eziyikohliso. 
Psalms35:21 Bangikhamisela imilonyanabo bathi: “Arha! Arha! Sizibonele ngawethu.” 
Psalms35:22 Somnini, uyakubona lokho, nje-ke ungathuli; ungabi kude nami, Somnini." 
Psalms35:23 Zimami, Somandla, phakama! Sikima umele indabami, ungivikele!" 
Psalms35:24 Somnini, Zimami, ngimela ngokulunga kwakho! Ungabavumeli bajabule ngami." 
Psalms35:25 Ungabavumeli bathi eenhliziyweni zabo: “Arha, nakho-ke ebesikufisa!” Ungabavumeli bathi: “Simginyile.”" 
Psalms35:26 Akuthi boke abathakasa ngesizi lami badaniswe bebakhene; labo abazikhukhumeza ngami, bembathiswe ihlazo neenhloni." 
Psalms35:27 Kuthi abathokoza ngobumsulwa bami, bahlokome, bajabule. Njalonjalo bathi: “Mkhulu uSomnini othatjiswa kuthula kwencekwakhe.”" 
Psalms35:28 Nje-ke ilimu lami lizakumemezela ukulunga kwakho, iye, ilanga loke idumo lakho." 
Psalms36:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida, inceku kaSomnini." 
Psalms36:2 Phakathi kwehliziyo yesikhohlakali, kubusa isiphambeko. Ngokubona kwaso akunasidingo sokwesaba uZimu." 
Psalms36:3 Emehlwenaso sizitjhaya khulu kobana singabona icala laso besilizonde. 
Psalms36:4 Amezwaso amamala nekohliso; silise ukuhlakanipha nokwenza okuhle. 
Psalms36:5 Embhedenaso sisopha ikohliso sidzimelele ekwenzeni okumbi asinyenyi ukonakala. 
Psalms36:6 Somnini, ukwethembeka kwakho kunabele emazulwini, nobuqotho bakho bufika emkayini." 
Psalms36:7 Ukulunga kwakho kunjengeentaba ezikulu, ubulungiswa bakho bunjengamalwandle azikileko. Wena Somnini, usindisa abantu neenlwana." 
Psalms36:8 Maye, kuligugu elingangani ukwethembeka kwakho Zimu! Boke abantu bakhosela emthunzini wamaphikwakho." 
Psalms36:9 Bayaqabuleka endlinakho, ubakholisa ngamanzi womlambo ohlobileko" 
Psalms36:10 ngombana kuwe kunomthombo wokuphila; iye, ekukhanyeni kwakho sibona ukukhanya." 
Psalms36:11 Yenabisa ukwethembeka kwakho kilabo abakwaziko nokulunga kwakho kilabo abaqotho ngehliziyo. 
Psalms36:12 Ungavumeli inyawo lozigqajako lingigadange, namkha isandla seenkhohlakali singiqotjhe." 
Psalms36:13 Qala bona ziwe njani iingilamkhuba; iye, zimadlheke phasi, asoze zisavuka." 
Psalms37:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Ungathakasi ngabenzi bobumbi, ungazikhathazi ngabangakalungi" 
Psalms37:2 ngombana bazakutjhwaba msinyana njengotjani, iye, babune njengeemila ezilihlaza." 
Psalms37:3 Nawethemba uSomnini, wenze okulungileko, khona-ke uzakuhlala enarheni, wename unzinzile." 
Psalms37:4 Thaba kuSomnini, uzakunikela iimfiso zehliziywakho." 
Psalms37:5 Nikela indlelakho kuSomnini, umethembe, yena uzakwenzela okulandelako:" 
Psalms37:6 Uzakwenza ukulunga kwakho kukhanye njengokusa nobumsulwa bakho njengelanga emini. 
Psalms37:7 Thula phambi kwakaSomnini, uqalelele kuye; ungathakasi ngophumelelako endlelenakhe, iye, ngomuntu owenza okuphambeneko." 
Psalms37:8 Lisa ukuhluthuleka, utjhide elakeni, ungathakasi ngabenzi bobumbi! Lokho sekubanga ukona kwaphela." 
Psalms37:9 Abenzi bobumbi bazakususwa, kodwana abarhuluphela uSomnini bazakuzuza inarha." 
Psalms37:10 Kuzakuba muzuzwana isikhohlakali singasabi khona nalokha uhlola indawaso, awusoze usasifunyana." 
Psalms37:11 Kodwana abathobekileko bazakuzuza inarha, bathabele ukuthula okukhulu." 
Psalms37:12 Isikhohlakali sisongela olungileko, simgugudela amazinyo," 
Psalms37:13 kodwana uSomandla uyasihleka, uyazi bonyana ilanga laso liyeza." 
Psalms37:14 Iinkhohlakali zirhwatjha isabula, zigobe imisubazo, kobana ziwise abachakileko nabadududu bezirhayile abaneendlela eziqotho." 
Psalms37:15 Isabulazo izakuhlaba iinhliziyo zazo nemisubi yazo iphohloke. 
Psalms37:16 Okuncani anakho olungileko, kungcono kunomnono weenkhohlakali ezinengi." 
Psalms37:17 Mbala, imikhono yeenkhohlakali izakwephulwa, kodwana uSomnini uyabasekela abalungileko." 
Psalms37:18 USomnini uyawazi amalanga walabo abamsulwa nelifa labo lizakuhlala bekube nini nanini. 
Psalms37:19 Ngesikhathi sobunzima angeze badaniswa, emalangeni wendlala bazakusutha," 
Psalms37:20 kodwana iinkhohlakali zizakubhubha; izitha zakaSomnini zizakunyamalala njengobuhle bamadlelo anyamalala entuthwini. 
Psalms37:21 Isikhohlakali siyaboleka, singasabuyiseli, kodwana olungileko unesirhawu, uyaphana." 
Psalms37:22 Labo ababusiswe nguSomnini, bazakuzuza inarha, kodwana abanikelelwe nguye, bazakujutjwa." 
Psalms37:23 Lokha uSomnini nathokoziswa yindlela yomuntu, uqinisa amagadangwakhe." 
Psalms37:24 Nanyana akhutjhwa, akasoze awele phasi ngombana uSomnini uhlala ambambe ngesandla sakhe." 
Psalms37:25 Gade ngimutjha, manje sengimdala, nokho angizange ngibone olungileko atjhiyiwe nesapho lakhe ligogela ukudla." 
Psalms37:26 Yena ungophanako nobolekisanako nesapho lakhe lisibusiso kuye. 
Psalms37:27 Deda kokumbi, wenze okuhle ukuze nini nanini uhlale enarhenakho." 
Psalms37:28 Ngambala uSomnini uthanda ukulunga, akabatjhiyi abathembekileko bakhe. Iye, abalungileko bazakulondolozwa isiphelani, kodwana isapho leenkhohlakali lizakujutjwa." 
Psalms37:29 Abalungileko bazakuzuza inarha, bahlale kiyo nini nanini." 
Psalms37:30 Umlomo wolungileko uveza ukuhlakanipha; kuthi ilimu lakhe likhulume ukulunga. 
Psalms37:31 Umthetho kaZimakhe usehliziywenakhe neenyawo zakhe azitjheleli. 
Psalms37:32 Isikhohlakali selusa olungileko ngombana simsongele ukumbulala. 
Psalms37:33 USomnini akasoze aliselela olungileko esandleni sesikhohlakali: Angeze avume alahlwe lokha nadoselwa ebandla. 
Psalms37:34 Rhuluphela uSomnini, ukhambe endlelenakhe, yena uzakuphakamisa, uzuze inarha; ubone ukususwa kweenkhohlakali." 
Psalms37:35 Ngisibonile isikhohlakali sinobudlova, siziphakamisa njengomuthi wendabuko onamakari," 
Psalms37:36 kodwana nawudlulako godu, qala, umuthi lowo awusekho; nasifuna isikhohlakaleso, akhange sisatholakala." 
Psalms37:37 Qalisisa omsulwa, ubeke ilihlo koqotho: Kunelikusasa emuntwini onokuthula." 
Psalms37:38 Kodwana abaphambukileko bazakubhujiswa ndawonye nelikusasa leenkhohlakali lizakususwa. 
Psalms37:39 Ukusindiswa kwabalungileko kuvela kuSomnini, isiphephelo sabo esikhathini sobunzima." 
Psalms37:40 USomnini uyabasiza abe abaphephise; iye, ubaphephisa eenkhohlakalini; ubasindisa ngombana baphephela kuye." 
Psalms38:1 Irhubo lakaDavida; livunywa emnikelweni wesikhumbuzo. 
Psalms38:2 Somnini ungangikhuzi ngelaka lakho, namkha ungikhalimele ngobukhali" 
Psalms38:3 ngombana imisubelakho ingenile kimi nesandla sakho sesehlele phezu kwami. 
Psalms38:4 Akusenapilo emzimbenami ngebanga lelaka lakho; akukho ukuthula emathanjenami ngenca yesono sami. 
Psalms38:5 Mbala amacalami adlula ihlokwami, njengomthwalo obudisi khulu ayangidisibeza." 
Psalms38:6 Amancebami ayabhibhidlha, anuke ngebanga lobudlhayela bami." 
Psalms38:7 Sese ngigobene, ngikoropene khulu; ngikhamba ngeenzilo imini yoke." 
Psalms38:8 Iye, idini lami liqaqamba khulu nepilo ayikho enyamenami." 
Psalms38:9 Ngibuthakathaka begodu ngivithikile; ngiyabubula ngenca yokubibitheka ehliziywenami. 
Psalms38:10 Somandla, koke ukufisa kwami kuphambi kwakho; ukubalabala kwami akukafihleki kuwe." 
Psalms38:11 Ihliziywami iyadukuza namandlami angitjhiyile, ngitjho nokukhanya kwamehlwami kukhambile." 
Psalms38:12 Abangani nabakhozi bami bajamela kude neenhlungu zami; ngitjho neenhlobo zami zijamele kude nami. 
Psalms38:13 Abantu abafuna ipilwami bangibekela isifu, kuthi abasophe ukungilimaza, bakhulume ngokungisongela, bahumuze ikohliso ilanga loke." 
Psalms38:14 Kodwana mina nginjengesithulu, angibalaleli! Nginjengesimumu esingavuli umlomo;" 
Psalms38:15 iye, nginjengomuntu ongezwako nonganakuphikisa emlonyenakhe." 
Psalms38:16 Kodwana ngiqalelele kuwe Somnini, nguwe Somandla Zimami ozangiphendula." 
Psalms38:17 Ngikubawe ngathi: “Labo abazikhukhumeza ngami, ungabavumeli bajabule lokha inyawo lami nalitjhelelako.”" 
Psalms38:18 Emanyeni, sengiseduze nokuwa nesihlabi singinamathele." 
Psalms38:19 Ngiyalivuma icala lami, ngibuhlungu ngesono sami." 
Psalms38:20 Kodwana izitha zami ziphilile, zinamandla begodu banengi abangizonda ngokungakafaneli." 
Psalms38:21 Babuyiselela okuhle ngokumbi, bayangisola nanyana ngiqotho." 
Psalms38:22 Somnini ungangitjhiyi! Zimami, ungabi kude nami!" 
Psalms38:23 Somandla, Sindiswami, rhaba ungisize!" 
Psalms39:1 Kumkhaleli; kuJedutuni; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms39:2 Mina ngathi: “Iindlela zami ngizaziqaphela ukuze ngingoni ngelimu lami, mlunga okhohlakeleko asesephambi kwami, ngizakulonda umlomami ngesifonyo.”" 
Psalms39:3 Bengisimumu, ngizithulele, kodwana ukuthula kwami akhange kusize litho; ubuhlungu bami bakhambelela," 
Psalms39:4 ihliziywami yavutha ngaphakathi kwami, kuthe ngisabubula, ngezwa kutjhisa, nje-ke ngatjhaphulula umlomami ngathi:" 
Psalms39:5 “Somnini ngazise ukuphela kwami, nokobana siyini isilinganiso samalangami; ngazise bona ngingodlulako." 
Psalms39:6 Qala, wenze amalangami aba yikereketjhana, ukuphila kwami kulilize phambi kwakho; mbala, woke umuntu umuphefumulo nje." 
Psalms39:7 “Kwamambala, umuntu ukhamba njengethunzi; iye mbala, uzikhathaza ngelize; uyabuthelela, kodwana akamazi ozokuhlomula." 
Psalms39:8 “Yeke Somnini, yini okhunye engisakuqaleleleko? Ithemba lami likuwe." 
Psalms39:9 Ngisindise kizo zoke iimphambeko zami, ungavumi ngibe siphoqo sabokeke." 
Psalms39:10 Ngizazithulela, ngingawuvuli umlomami ngombana nguwe Somnini owenzileko." 
Psalms39:11 Susa kimi isibetho sakho ngombana sengifile mivimbo yesandla sakho. 
Psalms39:12 Ufundisa umuntu ngokumkhalimela ngecala; njengomvunya ovithizako, wena uqeda okuligugu kuye: Mbala, woke umuntu umuphefumulo nje." 
Psalms39:13 “Yizwa umthandazwami Somnini, ubeke indlebe esililweni sami, ungathuli ngeenyembezi zami ngombana kuwe ngisikhonzi, ngisithekeli njengabo boke abokhokho." 
Psalms39:14 Susa amehlwakho kimi, ukuze ngikwazi ukumomotheka ngaphambi kobana ngigoduke, ngingasabakhona.”" 
Psalms40:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms40:2 Ngaqalelela bengaqalelela uSomnini, wabeka indlebe, wezwa isililo sami." 
Psalms40:3 Wangikhupha ngemgodini wokufa, iye, edakeni elimodzako; wajamisa iinyawo zami edwaleni, wangikhambisa endaweni eqinileko." 
Psalms40:4 Wabeka ingoma etja emlonyenami, indumiso yokubabaza uZimu. Abanengi bazakubona lokho besabe, bathembele kuSomnini." 
Psalms40:5 Ubusisiwe othembela kuSomnini, ongaphendukeli ezitheni nakwabadlhemadlhema ngemva kwabosingazimu." 
Psalms40:6 Wena Somnini Zimami, akakho ongafaniswa nawe: Uzandisile iimangaliso nemizindlwakho ngathi. Nangifuna ukuyitjho engikhuluma ngayo, iba minengi khulu kobana ingabalwa." 
Psalms40:7 Imihlabelo neminikelo yeenthoro awuyithokozeli; iye, imihlabelo yokutjhiswa neyehlambululo awuyibizi. Ukotakote iindlebe zami," 
Psalms40:8 nje-ke ngithe: “Qala, ngizile njengombana ngitlolelwe njalo emsongweni." 
Psalms40:9 Ngiyathanda ukwenza intandwakho, Zimami nomthethwakho ungaphakathi kwami.”" 
Psalms40:10 Ngimemezele ebandleni elikhulu iindaba ezihle zokulunga. Mbala, akhange ngivale umlomami njengombana wazi wena, Somnini." 
Psalms40:11 Akhange ngigodle ubulungiswa bakho ehliziywenami, ngikhulume ngobuqotho nangesindiswakho; ukwethembeka neqiniso lakho akhange ngikufihle ebandleni elikhulu." 
Psalms40:12 Yeke Somnini, ungagodli umusakho kimi; kwanga ukwethembeka neqiniso lakho kungangilonda isiphelani." 
Psalms40:13 Ngiphahlwe zizinto ezimbi ezingabalekiko, iye, amacalami angitholile, manengi kuneenhluthu zehlokwami; ngitjho nokubona angisaboni, sengiphelelwe mamandla." 
Psalms40:14 Somnini, kwanga ungathokozela ukungisindisa; ube masinyana Somnini ekungisizeni." 
Psalms40:15 Boke labo abafuna ukuhlwitha ipilwami, kwanga bangadaniswa bebakhene, kuthi labo abangifisela okumbi, bakhahlamezelwe emuva bebaphoqeke." 
Psalms40:16 Abakakamale ngenca yokuphoqeka, labo abathi kimi: “Arha! Uswinakele!”" 
Psalms40:17 Kodwana boke abakufunako abajabule bename ngawe; kwanga abathabela isindiswakho, bangatjho njalonjalo bathi: “USomnini uyababazeka!”" 
Psalms40:18 Nakungimi yena, ngichakile ngiyaswela, nokho uSomandla uyangikhumbula. Wena ungumsizami nomsindisami, yeke, ungariyadi wena, Zimami." 
Psalms41:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms41:2 Ubusisiwe onakekela odududu; uSomnini uzamsindisa mhlana kukumbi. 
Psalms41:3 USomnini uzamvikela abe amlonde, enarheni uzakubizwa bona ngothakasileko; angeze amnikele entandweni yezitha zakhe." 
Psalms41:4 USomnini uzamsekela ekuguleni alele. Wena, Somnini uzakuguqula umkghadakhe, aphile ngokupheleleko." 
Psalms41:5 Nakungimi ngithi: “Ngirhawukele Somnini, ungiphulukise ngombana ngonile kuwe.”" 
Psalms41:6 Izitha zami zikhuluma okumbi ngami, zithi: “Njekhona uzakufa nini ukuze ibizo lakhe liphele na?”" 
Psalms41:7 Lokha naziza kimi, zikhuluma ilize; ihliziywazo igaya iimbozi. Nazisuka lapho, zikhambe zicacatha ngazo." 
Psalms41:8 Boke abangizondako bahleba ngami; bangihlolozela okumbi, bathi:" 
Psalms41:9 “Unanyathelwe ngokumbi, angekhe asavuka lapha alele khona.”" 
Psalms41:10 Ngitjho nomkhozami engimethembako, iye, loyo onghwatha nami ungiphendukele waba mkhapheli." 
Psalms41:11 Kodwana wena Somnini, yewungirhawukele, ungivuse ukuze ngizibuyiselele kibo." 
Psalms41:12 Nawenamileko ngami, ngizakwazi ngalokhu: Izitha zami azingathabi ngami," 
Psalms41:13 kodwana ngebanga lobuqotho bami ungiqinise, ungijamise phambi kwakho njalo." 
Psalms41:14 Akadunyiswe uSomnini uZimu ka-Israyeli, kusukela nini nanini bekube siphelani. Amen, iye, Amen." 
Psalms42:1 Kumkhaleli; iMaskili lamaKhorarhi. 
Psalms42:2 Njengehlangumataka ilangazelela amanzi wemilanjana, ngokunjalo umphefumulwami ulangazelele wena, Zimu." 
Psalms42:3 Umphefumulwami womele uZimu, iye, uZimu ophilako. Ngizakuya nini ngethempelini ngiyozizwela ubukhona bakaZimu na?" 
Psalms42:4 Ubusuku nemini, iinyembezi zami zikukudla kwami ngombana soke isikhathi abantu bathi kimi: “Njekhona uphi uZimakho?”" 
Psalms42:5 Lezi zizinto engizikhumbulako lokha nangithulula umphefumulwami: Ngakhamba newoma, ngaya endlini kaZimu ngokuhlokoma nokudumisa, isiqubuthu sagidinga umnyanya." 
Psalms42:6 Umphefumulwami udaneleni, uyaluzelani ngaphakathi kwami na? Angiqalelele kuZimu ngombana ngizamdumisa godu, yena omsindisami" 
Psalms42:7 noZimami. Umphefumulwami udanile! Ngalokho ngiyakukhumbula ngisemisukeni yeJordani, eentabeni zeRherimoni, esiqongolweni seMitsari." 
Psalms42:8 Ukuzika kumemeza ukuzika lapha kuhlokoma khona iimphoroma zakho! Woke amagagasi namagwimbakho eqe ngaphezu kwami! 
Psalms42:9 Emini uSomnini uyaleza ukwethembeka kwakhe, kuthi ebusuku ingomakhe ibe kimi, iye, umthandazo kuZimu wepilwami." 
Psalms42:10 Ngithi kuZimu olidwala lami: “Ungikhohlweleni na? Kubayini kufuze ngikhambe ngeenzilo, ngebanga lokugandelelwa zizitha na?”" 
Psalms42:11 Ukungikhola kwezitha zami kungihlaba ehliziyweni, nazisoloko zithi kimi: “Njekhona uphi uZimakho?”" 
Psalms42:12 Umphefumulwami udaneleni, uyaluzelani ngaphakathi kwami na? Angiqalelele kuZimu ngombana ngizamdumisa godu, yena omsindisami noZimami." 
Psalms43:1 Ngihlambulule Zimu, ujamele indabami ebantwini abangakholwako; ungisindise kabakhohlisako nabangakalungi" 
Psalms43:2 ngombana wena unguZimu engiphephela kuye. Alo, ungilahleleni na? Kubayini kufuze ngikhambe ngeenzilo, ngebanga lokugandelelwa zizitha na?" 
Psalms43:3 Thuma ukukhanya neqiniso lakho, ukwenze kungirhole. Kungirholele entabenakho ecwengileko, okuyindawakho yokuhlala" 
Psalms43:4 ukuze ngiye e-aldarini lakaZimu, iye, kuZimu wokuhlokoma kwami. Nje-ke ngizakudumisa ngeharibha, wena Zimu onguZimami." 
Psalms43:5 Umphefumulwami udaneleni, uyaluzelani ngaphakathi kwami na? Angiqalelele kuZimu ngombana ngizamdumisa godu, yena omsindisami noZimami." 
Psalms44:1 Kumkhaleli; iMaskili lamaKhorarhi. 
Psalms44:2 Zimu, sizwile ngeendlebe zethu, abokhokho bethu basitjelile, ngemisebenzi oyenzileko emihleni yabo, iye, emihleni yakade." 
Psalms44:3 Nguwe owaqotjha bezizwe ngesandla sakho, kodwana abokhokho wabatjala. Nguwe owahlunguphaza izizwe, kodwana abokhokho wabatjhaphulula." 
Psalms44:4 Ngambala ngeenhlabano zabo, azange bathumbe inarha, namkha bahlule ngeenkhwepha zabo. Kwaba ngesidla sakho nangengalwakho nokukhanya kobukhona bakho ngombana bewubathanda." 
Psalms44:5 Wena Zimu, uyiKosami, yeke layeza ukuhlula kwakaJakopo." 
Psalms44:6 Ngesizo lakho sizakutlhofoza izitha zethu; ngebizo lakho sizakugadangela abasivukelako. 
Psalms44:7 Angithembeli emsebenami nesabulami angeze yangisindisa. 
Psalms44:8 Ngambala, wena usisindisile ezitheni zethu bewaphoqa abasizondako." 
Psalms44:9 Woke amalanga sazigqaja ngawe, Zimu, sadumisa ibizo lakho ngesikhathi soke." 
Psalms44:10 Nokho sewusilahlile, bewasirhubutjha begodu awusaphumi nezipi zethu." 
Psalms44:11 Usenze sabalekela izitha nabasizondako bazizuzele ipango. 
Psalms44:12 Usenze safana nezimvu zokuhlatjwa bewasihlakazela ezizweni. 
Psalms44:13 Uthengise isizwe sakho ngetupurujwana, akhange usibize inani eliphezulu nawusithengisako." 
Psalms44:14 Usenze isiphoqo sabomakhelwana bethu, isithuko nesinyefulo kilabo abasiphahlileko." 
Psalms44:15 Usenze isaga hlangana nabezizwe nehlekiso phakathi kwabantu. 
Psalms44:16 Ilanga loke ihlazo lami liphambi kwami nobuso bami bugcwele iinhloni," 
Psalms44:17 ngebanga lamezwi wabangiphoqako nabangithukako, iye, nokobana ngiphambi kwesitha nakumbuyiseleli." 
Psalms44:18 Koke lokho kusehlele; nokho asikakukhohlwa wena, namkha sibe bakhohlisi esivumelwaneni sakho." 
Psalms44:19 Ihliziywethu akhange ihlanuke namagadangwethu akhange asuke endlelenakho," 
Psalms44:20 kobana ungabeze usiphahlazele edzabeni labophagana bewusigubuzese ngethunzi elesabekako. 
Psalms44:21 Nangathana besikhohlwe ibizo lakaZimethu, namkha selulela izandla zethu kuzinyana othileko," 
Psalms44:22 uZimu gade angekhe akubone lokho na? Angitjho yena wazi iimfihlo zehliziyo! 
Psalms44:23 Ngebanga lakho sibulawa imihla yoke, sesesifana nezimvu zokuhlatjwa." 
Psalms44:24 Somandla, akhe uvuke! Ulaleleni kanti? Sikima, musa ukusilahla isiphelani!" 
Psalms44:25 Ubufihlelani ubuso bakho na? Kubayini ukhohlwe iinhlungu nokugandelelwa kwethu? 
Psalms44:26 Ngambala, umphefumulwethu unyelela ethulini; imizimbethu inamathele ehlabathini." 
Psalms44:27 Sikima, uze kobana usisize! Yewusihlenge ngebanga lokwethembeka kwakho." 
Psalms45:1 Kumkhaleli; ngeTjhotjhanimu; kumaKhorarhi; iMaskili; ingoma yethando. 
Psalms45:2 Ihliziywami iyaphuphuma ngamezwi amahle; ngizakwethula amezwi wekondlwami engwenyameni, ilimu lami lifana nesiba lakasosiba onobukghoni." 
Psalms45:3 Uyaqaleka wena kunabantu boke; isisa sithululelwe eembheneni zakho ngombana uZimu ukubusise isiphelani. 
Psalms45:4 Wena ngorho, hloma isabulakho enyonga, lokho kube lidumo nobukhosi bakho," 
Psalms45:5 iye, ubukhosi bakho. Yiba nepumelelo nawuphumako ngenca yeqiniso nokujamela ukulunga! Isandla sakho sokudla asikwenzise imisebenzi eyesabekako." 
Psalms45:6 Ngwenyama, imisubela yakho ibukhali, ihlaba ehliziyweni yezitha zakho, ziwe ngaphasi kwakho." 
Psalms45:7 Isihlalo sakho Ngwenyama, ngesanini nanini; intongakho yobukhosi ingeyokulunga;"
