Psalms45:8 uthanda ukulunga, uzonda okumbi. Ngalokho Ngwenyama, uZimakho ukuzese ngamafutha wokwenama ngaphezu kwabangani bakho." 
Psalms45:9 Zoke izambatho zakho zifufuzelwe, ngemire, iqolo lesikghopha namakhwa wesinamoni. Eengodlweni ezikghatjiswe ngamazinyo wendlovu kubethwa imitjingo eyenza wename." 
Psalms45:10 Amakhosazana azihlobise ngobuphaziphazi bakho, ngesidleni sakho kujame indlovukazi, ihlobe ngegolide le-Ofiri." 
Psalms45:11 Lalela wena ndodakazi! Phosa amehlo ubeke indlebe, ukhohlwe abantu bekhenu nendlu kayihlo." 
Psalms45:12 Lokha ingwenyama nayikhangwa bubuhle bakho, kumele uyikhothamele ngombana iyikosakho." 
Psalms45:13 Kosazana yeTirosi, abanjingileko bazakuncenga umusakho ngezipho." 
Psalms45:14 Ngevunulo kanokutjho ikosazana leyo ilinde ngelawini, ingubayo irutjelwe ngegolide." 
Psalms45:15 Ilethwa ekosini yembethe imibalabala, ilandelwa matlawana, iimpelesi zayo. Iye, balethwa kuwe, Ngwenyama." 
Psalms45:16 Ngokulilizela nokwenama, bayahlahlwa ekungeneni kwabo ngesigodlweni." 
Psalms45:17 Amadodanakho Ngwenyama, azakuhlala esikhundleni saboyihlo. Uzawenza abe makhosana enarheni yoke." 
Psalms45:18 Ngizakwenza ibizo lakho lidunyiswe eenzukulwaneni zoke, ngalokho abantu bazakudumisa ngokungapheliko." 
Psalms46:1 Kumkhaleli; kumaKhorarhi; ngesinara esiphezulu; ingoma. 
Psalms46:2 UZimu ubuphephelo namandlethu; mbala ufumaneka alisizo ngeenkhathi zobudisi. 
Psalms46:3 Yeke angekhe sesaba, ngitjho nanyana iphasi lizamazama, iintaba zisikinyeka ekuzikeni kwamanzi;" 
Psalms46:4 namtjhana amanzi welwandle arhuba, abhubhudlha amagwebu neentaba zidengezeliswa kubhodla kwalo." 
Psalms46:5 Kukhona umlambo onemisele ethabisa umuzi kaZimu, indawo ecwengileko, lapha kuhlala khona ongoPhezulu." 
Psalms46:6 UZimu uhlala ngemzini lowo, angekhe wasikinywa uZimu uzawuhlenga ngetathakusa." 
Psalms46:7 Izizwe ziyavungama, imibuso iyazamazama; uZimu nazwakalisa ilizwi lakhe, iphasi liyancibilika." 
Psalms46:8 USomnini uMninimandlawoke, unathi; uZimu kaJakopo ubuphephelo bethu." 
Psalms46:9 Yizani nizobona imisebenzi kaSomnini, obanga izehlakalo ezethusako ephasini:" 
Psalms46:10 Uthulisa izipi ephasini loke, aphokghoze imisebe, aphohloze imikhonto, aphosele iinhlangu ngemlilweni." 
Psalms46:11 Uthi: “Thulani! Yazini bona nginguZimu, ngimkhulu phezu kwezizwe, ngimkhulu phezu kwephasi.”" 
Psalms46:12 USomnini uMninimandlawoke, unathi; uZimu kaJakopo ubuphephelo bethu." 
Psalms47:1 Kumkhaleli; kumaKhorarhi; irhubo. 
Psalms47:2 Wahlani izandla, noke nina zizwe! Hlokomelani uZimu ngamezwi wokuthaba." 
Psalms47:3 Mbala uSomnini ongoPhezulu, uyasabeka, umbusi omkhulu ngaphezu kwephasi loke." 
Psalms47:4 Wathobisa izizwe ngaphasi kwethu, iye, iinkoro ngeenkoro ngaphasi kweenyawo zethu." 
Psalms47:5 Wasikhethela ilifa lethu, igugu lakaJakopo alithandako." 
Psalms47:6 UZimu wenyuka ngokuhlokoma, iye, uSomnini ukhuphuka ngomdumo wepalapala." 
Psalms47:7 Dumisani uZimu, dumisani! Iye, dumisani iKosethu, dumisani!" 
Psalms47:8 Mbala uZimu unguSomnini wephasi loke, mdumiseni ngokuzwisisa!" 
Psalms47:9 UZimu ubusa ngaphezu kwabantu. UZimu uhlezi esihlalweni sakhe esicwengileko. 
Psalms47:10 Amakhosana wezizwe ayabuthana, abe nesizwe sakaZimu ka-Abrahamu ngombana kuZimu aziinhlangu zephasi; ngalokho uphakanyiswa khulu." 
Psalms48:1 Ingoma; irhubo; kumaKhorarhi. 
Psalms48:2 Mkhulu uSomnini uZimethu, ubabazeka khulu emzinakhe. Intabakhe ecwengileko," 
Psalms48:3 yihle ngejamo layo, ikujabula kwenarha yoke. Le yintaba yeZiyoni engetlhagwini yomuzi kaSomnini omkhulu." 
Psalms48:4 UZimu ongaphakathi kwemibhotjhongo yomuzi lo, waziwa bona ubuphephelo." 
Psalms48:5 Lokha amakhosi nabuthanako, arhwanta ndawonye." 
Psalms48:6 Kodwana nabona lokho, akhena, abethwa livalo, abhebhula iinthende." 
Psalms48:7 Lapho gade angenwe mamanzi emadolweni, aba neenhlungu njengomfazi obelethako," 
Psalms48:8 nanjenganyana ummoya wepumalanga uphadlha imikhumbi yokurhweba. 
Psalms48:9 Njengombana sizwile, ngokunjalo sibonile emzini kaSomnini uMninimandlawoke, ekumumuzi kaZimethu: UZimu uwunzinzisa isiphelani." 
Psalms48:10 Zimu, sizindla ngokwethembeka kwakho, lokha nasingaphakathi kwethempeli lakho." 
Psalms48:11 Njengebizo lakho Zimu, kunjalo ukudunyiswa kwakho: Kufikelela emikhawulweni yephasi. Isandla sakho sokudla sigcwele ukulunga!" 
Psalms48:12 Ngalokho intaba yeZiyoni ayijabule, imizana yakwaJuda yename ngebanga leengwebo zakho." 
Psalms48:13 Zombani iZiyoni, niyibhode mazombe nibale nemitlomogwayo." 
Psalms48:14 Qalisisani kuhle imibundu yomthangalayo, nitlaye emibhotjhongwenayo, ukuze nibikele iinzukulwana ezizako," 
Psalms48:15 nithi: “Lo, nguZimu wamambala! UnguZimethu nini nanini. Usivikela ekufeni.”" 
Psalms49:1 Kumkhaleli; kumaKhorarhi; irhubo. 
Psalms49:2 Yizwani lokhu noke nina zizwe, iye, noke nina enakhileko ephasini. Bekani indlebe" 
Psalms49:3 nina bantukazana neenkhulu, nani njinga nabadududu noke." 
Psalms49:4 Umlomami uzakukhuluma ukuhlakanipha, ukuzindla kwehliziywami ngizakwenza kuzwisiseke." 
Psalms49:5 Izaga ngizilalelisisa kuhle, ngirarulule iinrarejo zami ngomvumo weharibha." 
Psalms49:6 Alo, kubayini kufuze ngesabe ngesikhathi esimbi, lokha ubukhohlakali babakhohlisi nabungizombileko," 
Psalms49:7 okutjho labo abathemba umnothwabo, nabazigqaja ngobukhulu bobunjinga babo na?" 
Psalms49:8 Mbala, umnotho lowo angeze wahlenga umuntu. Umuntu angeze awunikela uZimu kobana ube sihlengo sakhe." 
Psalms49:9 Isihlengo sepilo yabantu sibiza khulu, yeke umuntu akakhohlwe nokukhohlwa" 
Psalms49:10 kobana angaphila ngaso isiphelani ukuze angasaboni ukufa. 
Psalms49:11 Ngambala kuyakhanya: Abahlakaniphileko bafa ngokufanako neendlhadlha neeyila. Bayabhubha, umnothwabo usalele abanye." 
Psalms49:12 Amathuna alikhaya labo nini nanini, iye, bazakuhlala kiwo iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana, nanyana banamasimu abizwa ngamabizwabo." 
Psalms49:13 Umuntu angeze ahlala namagugwakhe isiphelani, ufana neembandana ezibhubhako." 
Psalms49:14 Injalo indlela yabazethembako nalabo abathokozele amezwabo ngemva kokufa kwabo. 
Psalms49:15 Njengezimvu babuthelelwe endaweni yabafileko ukufa kuyabelusa. Ekuseni abaqotho bagadanga phezu kwabo, isibumbeko sabo sitjhabalaliswa yipethu, indawo yabafileko izakuba likhaya labo." 
Psalms49:16 Kodwana uZimu uzakuhlenga umphefumulwami esandleni sokufa, iye, angisuse." 
Psalms49:17 Ungadani lokha omunye nanjingako, nalokha umnotho wendlwakhe nawukhulako" 
Psalms49:18 ngombana nafako akazukuthatha litho, umnothwakhe angekhe wehle naye." 
Psalms49:19 Abantu bayamdumisa umuntu lokha nazenzela okuhle. Kodwana nanyana aziphakamisa epilwenakhe," 
Psalms49:20 uzakuya kiboyisemkhulu, abangeze basabona ukukhanya nini nanini." 
Psalms49:21 Umuntu onomnotho kodwana anganalwazi ufana neembandana ezifako. 
Psalms50:1 Irhubo laka-Asafa. UZimu ongaphezu kwabosingazimu okutjho uSomnini, uyakhuluma; ubiza iphasi kusukela epumalanga bekube setjingalanga." 
Psalms50:2 Kusukela eZiyoni elipheleleko ngobuhle, uZimu ukhanya ngokudarhileko." 
Psalms50:3 UZimethu uyeza begodu angeze athula, phambi kwakhe kunomlilo oqothulako, uphahlwe siwuruwuru esesabekako." 
Psalms50:4 Ubiza amazulu phezulu kanye nephasi kobana agwebe abantu bakhe," 
Psalms50:5 athi: “Ngibuthelani abathembekileko bami, labo abenza isivumelwano nami ngomhlabelo.”" 
Psalms50:6 Amazulu amemezela ukulunga kwakhe, athi: “Mbala, uZimu umugwebi!”" 
Psalms50:7 UZimu uthi: “Yizwani nina bantu bami, ngizakukhuluma, wena Israyeli, ngizakufakaza ngokujamelana nawe. NginguZimu, uZimakho." 
Psalms50:8 Angikukhalimi ngebanga lemihlabelwakho, Israyeli. Imihlabelwakho yokutjhiswa ihlala iphambi kwami njalo." 
Psalms50:9 Angidingi ukuthatha ikunzi emizinenu, namkha iimbuzi eembayeni zenu" 
Psalms50:10 ngombana zingezami zoke iinyamazana zehlathi neenkomo ezisemibundwini eyikulungwana. 
Psalms50:11 Ngazi zoke iinyoni zeentatjana neenkhakhabi zommango zingezami. 
Psalms50:12 Ibe thana bengilamba, bengingeze nganitjela ngombana iphasi nakho koke okukilo kungekwami." 
Psalms50:13 Kanti mina ngidla inyama yeenkunzi, ngisele iingazi zeembuzi na?" 
Psalms50:14 Yenzani ukuthokoza kwenu kube mhlabelo kuZimu, niphethe iinthembiso zenu kongoPhezulu." 
Psalms50:15 Ngibizani ngelanga lembandezeleko, mina ngizanitjhaphulula, nina nizangihlonipha.”" 
Psalms50:16 Kodwana kokhohlakeleko uZimu uthi: “Unelungelo liphi lokumemezela iimiso zami bewukhulume ngesivumelwano sami na? 
Psalms50:17 Wena uzonda ukusolwa namezwami uwaphayela ngemva kwakho. 
Psalms50:18 Lokha nawubona isela, uvumelana nalo; umdibi munye neenhlobongi." 
Psalms50:19 Uliselela umlomakho kibo boke ubumbi, ubophele ilimu lakho ekohlisweni." 
Psalms50:20 Uditjha ngokunyefula umfowenu, uhlebe umntwanakwenu." 
Psalms50:21 Nawenza lokhu, kufuze ngithule na? Udlumbana bona nami ngifana nawe? Awa, ngiyakukhalima, ngibeke iimphambeko zakho phambi kwakho." 
Psalms50:22 “Yelelani indaba le, nina enikhohlwa uZimu, nakungasinjalo ngizanidabula, kutlhogeke nomenyeli." 
Psalms50:23 Loyo oletha ukuthokoza njengomnikelwakhe, uyangihlonipha; owenza ngendlela leyo, ngizomambulela isindiso kaZimu.”" 
Psalms51:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida 
Psalms51:2 ekufikeni komphorofidi uNathani emva kokungena kwakaDavida kuBhathi-Tjheba. 
Psalms51:3 Ngirhawukele Zimu, ngokwethembeka kwakho; sula iimphambeko zami ngokwesisa sakho esikhulu." 
Psalms51:4 Ungihlanzisise ecaleni lami, ungihlambulule esonweni sami." 
Psalms51:5 Ngambala ngiyazazi iimphambeko zami nesono sami siphambi kwami mlibe. 
Psalms51:6 Ngonile kuwe, iye, kuwe wedwa; ngenze ameswe phambi kwakho. Wena ulungile nawuthwesa umlandu, awusoleki nawukhupha isigwebo sakho." 
Psalms51:7 Ngambala, ngabelethwa nginecala, ngibe sisoni umma asangibamba." 
Psalms51:8 Wena uthanda ngibe neqiniso ngaphakathi, nje-ke, ungifundisa ukuhlakanipha ehliziyweni." 
Psalms51:9 Ngirhuhle ngehisophi ukuze ngihlambuluke, ungihlanze ngibe mhlophe kunogabhogo." 
Psalms51:10 Ngenze ngizwe ithabo nenjabulo godu, wenze umzimba owufihlizileko uhlokome." 
Psalms51:11 Fihla ubuso bakho ezonweni zami, usule koke ukonakala kwami." 
Psalms51:12 Zimu, ngidalela ihliziyo ehlanzekileko, uvuselele ummoya oqinileko ngaphakathi kwami." 
Psalms51:13 Ungangilahli ebukhoneni bakho, ungangemuki uMoyakho oCwengileko." 
Psalms51:14 Buyisela kimi ukwenama kwesindiswakho, ungisekele ngommoya wokuzimisela." 
Psalms51:15 Ngifuna ukufundisa abaphambukako iindlela zakho ukuze izoni ziphendukele kuwe. 
Psalms51:16 Zimu, ngephule ecaleni leengazi, iye, wena Zimu wesindiswami, khona ilimu lami lizakukhalela ngokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms51:17 Somandla, vula iimbhena zami ukuze umlomami umemezele idumo lakho." 
Psalms51:18 Mbala awuthandi umhlabelo. Nanyana benginganikela ngomhlabelo wokutjhiswa bewungeze wawukarekela. 
Psalms51:19 Umnikelo owamukelekako kuZimu umumoya ophukileko. Iye Zimu, ihliziyo ephukileko nedabukileko, angekhe wayiqalela phasi." 
Psalms51:20 Yenzela iZiyoni okuhle ngethando lakho, uvuselele imithangala yeJerusalema." 
Psalms51:21 Ngalokho uzakujabulela imihlabelo efaneleko, iye, imihlabelo yokutjhiswa njengeminikelo etjhiswa yoke; nje-ke, e-aldarini lakho kuzakunikelwa ngeenkunzi." 
Psalms52:1 Kumkhaleli; iMaskili; lakaDavida 
Psalms52:2 ekufikeni kwakaDowegi umEdomu oweza kuSawula wafese wathi: “UDavida ufikile endlini ka-Arhimeleki”. 
Psalms52:3 Ngorho, uzigqajelani ngobumbi na? Lokhu kulihlazo kuZimu! Ilanga loke" 
Psalms52:4 usophe ukubhubhisa, ilimu lakho linjengotjhevana omutjha, wena menzi wekohliso ndina!" 
Psalms52:5 Uthanda ikohlakalo khulu kunokuhle namanga kunokukhuluma okulungileko. 
Psalms52:6 Uthanda woke amezwi ayingozi, unelimu elikhohlisako." 
Psalms52:7 Kodwana uZimu ngokwakhe uzakuphohloza mlibe. Uzakususa akuse kude, akudzwebule etendeni lakho, akusiphule enarheni yabaphilako." 
Psalms52:8 Abalungileko bazakubona lokho, besabe, bazakuhleka isikhohlakali, bathi:" 
Psalms52:9 “Qala, ingorho engazange yenze uZimu bona abe siphephelo sayo! Yathemba ubunjingakazi bayo, yaqinelela ekubhujisweni kwayo!”" 
Psalms52:10 Kodwana mina endlini kaZimu, nginjengomuthi ohlaza we-oliva; ngethemba ukwethembeka kwakaZimu nini nanini." 
Psalms52:11 Zimu, ngizakuthokoza isiphelani, ngenca yezinto ozenzileko. Ngibeka ithemba lami ebizweni lakho phambi kwabathembekileko ngombana lona lihle." 
Psalms53:1 Kumkhaleli; ngeMarhalathi; iMaskili; lakaDavida. 
Psalms53:2 Iindlhayela zizitjela zithi: “UZimu akakho.” Zikhohlakele, zenza izinto ezinyenyisako; akakho noyedwa owenza okulungileko." 
Psalms53:3 UZimu usezulwini, uqala abantu ephasini ukubona bonyana kukhona ohlakaniphileko, orhuluphela uZimu na." 
Psalms53:4 Kodwana boke baphambukile, boke bonakele ngokufanako; akakho noyedwa owenza okulungileko, akakho ngitjho namunye." 
Psalms53:5 Kanti abenzi bobumbi abalemuki na? Labo abatla abantu bami inga badla isikwa, abambizi uZimu." 
Psalms53:6 Nje-ke bazakuba nevalo khulu, babe nevalo ebangazange khebabenalo ngombana uZimu uzokusabalalisa amathambo walabo abakuvimbezelako. Uzabarhubutjha ngombana uZimu ubalahlile." 
Psalms53:7 Kwanga isindiso ka-Israyeli ingavela eZiyoni! Lokha uZimu natjhugulula ubujamo babantu bakhe, uJakopo uzakurhuwelela ngethabo, iye, u-Israyeli uzakuthaba." 
Psalms54:1 Kumkhaleli; ngesililiso seenara; iMaskili; lakaDavida 
Psalms54:2 ekufikeni kwamaZifu lokha nathi kuSawula: “UDavida ubhace hlangana nathi na?”. 
Psalms54:3 Zimu, ngisindise ngebizo lakho, umele amalungelwami ngamandlakho." 
Psalms54:4 Yizwa umthandazwami, Zimu, ubeke indlebe emezwini womlomami" 
Psalms54:5 ngombana imiqhamuka ingivukele, iindlova zizumana nomphefumulwami, zona azimbeki phambili uZimu." 
Psalms54:6 Mbala, uZimu umsizami, uSomandla umsekeli wepilwami." 
Psalms54:7 Uzakubuyisela okumbi ezitheni zami, ngeqiniso lakhe uzazibhubhisa." 
Psalms54:8 Ngizakunikela kuwe ngomhlabelo wesihle, ngidumise ibizo lakho, Somnini, ngombana lona lihle." 
Psalms54:9 Mbala, uSomnini ungisindise kiwo woke amatshwenyeko; ilihlo lami liqalela izitha zami phasi." 
Psalms55:1 Kumkhaleli; ngesililiso seenara; iMaskili; lakaDavida. 
Psalms55:2 Zimu, beka indlebe emthandazwenami, ungazifihli esibaweni sami." 
Psalms55:3 Ngizwe, ungiphendule, ekububuleni kwami ngigandelelekile. Ngiwurubajekile" 
Psalms55:4 ngebanga letjhada lezitha, nokutlewula kweenkhohlakali: Zingethusela ngobumbi, ngelaka zingibambela ivunda." 
Psalms55:5 Ihliziywami iyathuthumela, ukwesabeka kokufa kungehlele." 
Psalms55:6 Ngingenwe livalo nokuqhaqhazela, ngembathwe kuhlengezela." 
Psalms55:7 Ngithi: “Ngathana bengingaba namaphiko njengezuba, bengizokuphaphela kude ngihlale khona." 
Psalms55:8 Iye, bengizokubalekela kude, ngiyozihlalela erhalawumbeni." 
Psalms55:9 Bengizakurhabela ukuzifunyanela isiphephelo, kude nesivunguvungu nesiwuruwuru.”" 
Psalms55:10 Somandla, bararanise, uhlangahlanganise ikulumabo ngombana ngiyibonile inturhu nombango edorobheni;" 
Psalms55:11 ubusuku nemini ulizombelezile, ngitjho naphezu kwemithangalalo. Ubukhohlakali nomonakalo kungaphakathi kwalo;" 
Psalms55:12 iye, ngaphakathi kwalo kunokubhujiswa; ukubandezela nekohliso akusuki ecabazini lalo." 
Psalms55:13 Nangabe bekusisitha esinginyefulako bengizokuthwala lokho; nangabe bekungongizondako, oziphakamisa phezu kwami bengizombhacela." 
Psalms55:14 Kodwana manje nguwe ntangami, mnganami nomkhozami," 
Psalms55:15 iye, wena ebenginobudlelwano obuhle nawe, siya endlini kaZimu kanye nebandla elithabileko." 
Psalms55:16 Kwanga ukufa kungazehlela izitha zami, zehlele endaweni yabafileko zisezwa ngombana ubumbi buseenhliziyweni zazo, iye, ngaphakathi kwazo." 
Psalms55:17 Mina ngilila kuZimu, nje-ke uSomnini uzangisindisa." 
Psalms55:18 Ntambama, ekuseni nemini ngithulula isililo sami, ngibubule; yona iyalizwa ilizwi lami." 
Psalms55:19 Epini engiqalene nayo uzangihlenga ngingalimali, nanyana babanengi abajamelene nami." 
Psalms55:20 UZimu obusa nini nanini, uzakwizwa, athobise izitha. Yena akaphenduki, khonapho azimesabi." 
Psalms55:21 Untangami ungibeke isandla, wephula isivumelwano." 
Psalms55:22 Ilimu lakhe libutjhelelezi kunamafutha wepehlo, kodwana ihliziywakhe inelunya; amezwakhe athambile kunamafutha, kodwana ayisabula erhwatjhiweko." 
Psalms55:23 Phosa umthwalwakho kuSomnini, yena uzakusekela, angekhe avumela olungileko asikinywe." 
Psalms55:24 Kodwana nakuzizitha zona, wena ngokwakho Zimu uzaziphosela emgodini wethuna. Abomele iingazi nabakhokhobeli angeze baphile ngitjho ingcenye yemihla yabo. Nakungimi, ngethemba wena Somnini." 
Psalms56:1 Kumkhaleli; livunywa ngeenodo zeZuba lama-Owuku asemaJukujukwini; lakaDavida; iMikitamu, lokha nabhudungelwe maFilista eGathi." 
Psalms56:2 Ngirhawukele Zimu ngombana abantu bayangibhozomela. Ilanga loke bangigandelela ngokulwa. 
Psalms56:3 Iye, ilanga loke izitha zami ziyangibhozomela! Ngambala banengi abalwa nami. Wena ongoPhezulu," 
Psalms56:4 lokha nanginokwesaba, ngibeka ithemba lami kuwe." 
Psalms56:5 UZimu engidumisa ilizwi lakhe, nguZimu engimethembako. Nje-ke angeze ngibe nevalo. Alo, umuntu nje angangenzani na?" 
Psalms56:6 Ilanga loke abangethuselako badunga ummoyami; yoke imikhumbulwabo igaya iimbozi ngami. 
Psalms56:7 Baphehla inturhu, bakhukhuthe. Batjheja imikhambo yami, ngethemba lokuqeda ipilwami." 
Psalms56:8 Kukhona ukuphunyurha ebumbini na? Ngobukhali bakho Zimu, guqisa izizwe." 
Psalms56:9 Wena ngokwakho ukutlolile ukuzulazula kwami. Faka iinyembezi zami ngekwanenakho yesikhumba, kufuze zitlolwe encwadinakho." 
Psalms56:10 Mhlana ngikubizako, izitha zami zizakudeda isinyava. Mina ngiyakwazi lokho: UZimu unami." 
Psalms56:11 UZimu engidumisa ilizwi lakhe, iye, uSomnini engidumisa ilizwi lakhe," 
Psalms56:12 nguZimu engimethembako. Nje-ke angeze ngibe nevalo. Alo, umuntu angangenzani na?" 
Psalms56:13 Zimu, kuwe ngenze iimfungo; ngizakunikela kuwe imihlabelo yokuthokoza" 
Psalms56:14 ngombana ungisindise ekufeni neenyawo zami kobana ngingakhutjwa ukuze ngikhambe phambi kwakaZimu ekukhanyeni kokuphila. 
Psalms57:1 Kumkhaleli; “Ungatjhabalalisi”; lakaDavida; iMikitamu, lokha nabalekela uSawula ngerholweni." 
Psalms57:2 Ngirhawukele Zimu, ngirhawukele ngombana kuwe umphefumulwami uyaphephela; ngikhosela emthunzini wamaphikwakho, kufikela lapha kudlula khona ubhubhani." 
Psalms57:3 Ngilila kuZimu ongoPhezulu, iye, kuZimu ongenyelako." 
Psalms57:4 Uzakuthumela isizo lisuka ezulwini, angisindise. Uzakuraranisa labo abangiwalazelako. UZimu uzakuthumela ukwethembeka neqiniso lakhe." 
Psalms57:5 Ipilwami iphakathi kwamabhubezi, kufuze ngilale neendlamuntu. Amazinywazo amikhonto nemisubela, amalimu wazo ayisabula ebukhali." 
Psalms57:6 Zimu, phakama ngaphezu kwamazulu, iphazimulwakho ayibe ngaphezu kwephasi loke." 
Psalms57:7 Abantu babekele amagadangwami isifu; ummoyami wephukile. Bangembele umgodi emzilenami, kodwana kukhalakathele bona." 
Psalms57:8 Zimu, ihliziywami inzinzile, iye, ihliziywami inzinzile; ngizakuvuma, ngidumise." 
Psalms57:9 Vuka, mphefumulwami, vuka! Ngeenara zamaharibha ngizakuphaphamisa ukusa." 
Psalms57:10 Somandla, ngizakudumisa hlangana nabantu, ngikhalele ingoma kuwe phakathi kwezizwe." 
Psalms57:11 Ukwethembeka kwakho kuphakeme njengamazulu neqiniso lakho lelulekele emafini. 
Psalms57:12 Zimu, phakama ngaphezu kwamazulu, iphazimulwakho ayibe ngaphezu kwephasi loke." 
Psalms58:1 Kumkhaleli; “Ungatjhabalalisi”; lakaDavida; iMikitamu. 
Psalms58:2 Nina abanamandla, niyazikhupha iinqunto ezilungileko, nigwebe abantu ngokufaneleko na?" 
Psalms58:3 Awa! Eenhliziyweni zenu nisopha okumbi; izandla zenu ziphehla inturhu ephasini. 
Psalms58:4 Iinkhohlakali ziphambuke zisabikwa; abakhohlisi bonakele basabelethwa. 
Psalms58:5 Isihlungu sabo sinjengesenyoka; bavala iindlebe zabo inga lirabi elisithulu," 
Psalms58:6 ukuze bangezwa ilizwi labosomlingo, ngitjho nosomlingo ongumakadebona." 
Psalms58:7 Zimu, yephula amazinyo ngemlonyenabo! Somnini, phohloza imihlathi yamabhubezana!" 
Psalms58:8 Abanyelele njengamanzi ehlabathini, batjhwabe njengotjani obugadangiweko." 
Psalms58:9 Ababe njengomhlobo wesibungu oncithika uphele, babe njengombungu orhulukileko ongazange ubone ilanga." 
Psalms58:10 Ngokuzuma okukhulu uZimu uzabasusa, abavuthele njengommoya otjhisako basaphila." 
Psalms58:11 Abalungileko bazakuthaba nababona ukubuyiselela, bahlanze iinyawo zabo eengazini zeenkhohlakali." 
Psalms58:12 Abantu bazakuthi: “Ngambala kukhona umvuzo wabalungileko, iye, ukhona uZimu ogwebako ephasini.”" 
Psalms59:1 Kumkhaleli; “Ungatjhabalalisi”; lakaDavida; iMikitamu; lokha uSawula nathumela amadoda kobana agade indlu kaDavida ukuze ambulale. 
Psalms59:2 Zimami, ngisindisa ezitheni zami, ungivikele kabangivukelako." 
Psalms59:3 Ngenyule eengilamkhubeni, ungisindise ebantwini abomele iingazi." 
Psalms59:4 Qala, bakhukhuthela ipilwami! Iingorho ziyangitlhorholoja kungekho isiphambeko Somnini, iye, kungekho sono kimi." 
Psalms59:5 Nanyana nginganacala zehla zenyuka kobana zizilungiselele. Sikima Somnini, uzizele ngokwakho uzokubona!" 
Psalms59:6 Wena unguSomnini, uZimu uMninimandlawoke, iye, unguZimu wakwa-Israyeli. Vuka, uhlole zoke izizwe, ungarhawukeli namunye wabakhohlisi." 
Psalms59:7 Njalo ngantambana bayabuya, babethe umule njengezinja, bazombeleze umuzi." 
Psalms59:8 Emilonyenabo kugeleza ubukhali, amezwabo ayisabula elimazako, bathi: “Ngubani osizwako?”" 
Psalms59:9 Kodwana wena Somnini uyabahleka, unyefula boke bezizwe." 
Psalms59:10 Somnini, kuqina kwami, ngiqale kuwe; mbala, Zimu, usiphephelo sami." 
Psalms59:11 UZimu wokwethembela kwami uzangenyela; iye, uZimu, uzangenza ngiqalele phasi izitha zami." 
Psalms59:12 Somandla, sihlangu sethu, ungazibulali izithezo, ukuze abantu bekhethu bangakukhohlwa. Zisikinye ngamandlakho, uzimadlhe phasi!" 
Psalms59:13 Nazivula imilomo, ziyona ngamezwazo. Nje-ke zenze zibanjwe ekuzikhukhumezeni kwazo, nangebanga lokuthukana namangazo eziwakhulumako." 
Psalms59:14 Ziqede ngobukhali bakho! Ziqede ukuze zingasabakhona! Khona-ke kuzakwazeka emajukujukwini wephasi kobana uZimu ubusa kwaJakopo. 
Psalms59:15 Njalo ngantambama ziyabuya, zibethe umule njengezinja, zizombeleze umuzi." 
Psalms59:16 Zizulazule zifunana nokudla; lokha nazingakasuthi, ziyakhwabitha." 
Psalms59:17 Kodwana mina ngizakuvumela phezulu ngamandlakho nakusako ngihlokome ngokwethembeka kwakho ngombana wena ube siphephelo sami nesiviko ngesikhathi sokubandezeleka. 
Psalms59:18 Wena kuqina kwami, ngizakukhalelela ingoma ngombana wena Zimu, usiphephelo sami, iye, uZimu wokwethembela kwami." 
Psalms60:1 Kumkhaleli; ngeenodo zengoma ethi, “iLikhwa lobuFakazi”; iMikitamu; irhubo lakaDavida ekufundiseni," 
Psalms60:2 lokha nalwa nama-Aramu weMesopotamiya nama-Aramu weTsoba nalokha uJowabi nabuya ekubhubhiseni iinkulungwana ezilitjhumi nambili zama-Edomu ngemrhobeni weTswayi. 
Psalms60:3 Zimu, usilahlile! Wasibhavumulela ngokufutheka! Nje-ke sivuselela!" 
Psalms60:4 Wenze inarha yadengezela, wayidabula. Lungisa iphadlhuka ngombana inarha ihlephukile." 
Psalms60:5 Uthwalise abantu bakho nzima, wasipha iwayini elisitherezelisako." 
Psalms60:6 Kilabo abakwesabako uphakamise iphawu, ukuze babuthanele kilo kude nemisebe." 
Psalms60:7 Sindisa ngesidla sakho, ukuze abathandekako kuwe batjhaphuluke. Siphendule!" 
Psalms60:8 UZimu uthembisile endawenakhe ecwengileko wathi: “Ngokuthakasa ngizohlukanisa iTjhekemu, ngilinganise umrhoba weSukothi." 
Psalms60:9 Ngeyami iGiliyadi, ngeyami iManase! I-Efrayimu iyingwanami, iJuda iyintongami yobukhosi." 
Psalms60:10 IMowabi isisitja sami sokuhlambela; phezu kwe-Edomu ngiphosa ipatlagwana lami; ngikuhlokomela ngokwenama wena Filistiya!” 
Psalms60:11 Ngubani ozangisa edorobheni elinemithangala? Ngubani ozangihlahla angise kwa-Edomu na? 
Psalms60:12 Angitjho nguwe Zimu osilahlileko, wangasaphumi ipi namabuthwethu?" 
Psalms60:13 Akhese usincede esitheni ngombana isizo lomuntu lililize. 
Psalms60:14 NgoZimu sizakuba nesibindi, uZimu ngokwakhe uzazigadangela phasi izitha zethu." 
Psalms61:1 Kumkhaleli; ngesililiso seenara; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms61:2 Zimu, yizwa umkhosi wesililo sami, ulalele umthandazwami." 
Psalms61:3 Ngilila kuwe ngisepelazwe, lokha ummoyami nawuphasi. Ngirholele edwaleni eliphakemeko kunami" 
Psalms61:4 ngombana kimi bewusoloko usiphephelo, umbhotjhongo oqinileko kude nezitha." 
Psalms61:5 Ngifisa ukuhlala etendeni lakho nini nanini, ngikhosele ngekhwapheni lamaphikwakho." 
Psalms61:6 Mbala, wena Zimu uzwile iimfungo zami, waphetha isibawo salabo abesaba ibizo lakho." 
Psalms61:7 Yeleka ubude bepilo yekosethu, welulele iminyakayo eenzukulwaneni ezinengi." 
Psalms61:8 Kwanga ingahlala esihlalweni sobukhosi phambi kwakaZimu nini nanini. Thumela ukwethembeka neqiniso, kobana kuyilonde." 
Psalms61:9 Ngalokho ngizakudumisa ibizo lakho ngesikhathi soke, lokha nangizalisa iimfungo zami imihla ngemihla." 
Psalms62:1 Kumkhaleli; kuJedutuni; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms62:2 Umphefumulwami uzithulele kuZimu kwaphela; isindiswami ivela kuye. 
Psalms62:3 Nguye yedwa olidwala nesindiswami, iye, isiphephelo sami, angeze ngasikinywa linengi." 
Psalms62:4 Kuzabe kube nini nidumela umuntu kobana nimhlanganyele nimbulale, khisibe unjengeboda eliwako nomthangala obhurukako?" 
Psalms62:5 Baneqhinga lokumketula esihlalweni sakhe esiphakemeko benamela ikohliso: ngemilomabo bayabusisa, kodwana ngeenhliziyo bayathuwelelisa." 
Psalms62:6 Mphefumulwami, ziphumulele kuZimu kwaphela ngombana ithemba lami livela kuye." 
Psalms62:7 Nguye yedwa olidwala nesindiswami, iye, isiphephelo sami, angeze nganyakaziswa." 
Psalms62:8 KukuZimu ukusindiswa nokwaziwa kwami; idwala lobuphephelo nerholo lami nguZimu. 
Psalms62:9 Thembelani kuye ngeenkhathi zoke nina bantu, thululani iinhliziyo zenu phambi kwakhe; uZimu usiphephelo sethu." 
Psalms62:10 Abantukazana bamumoya nje, abantu abaziinkhulu bayikohliso; esilinganisweni bayakhuphuka, boke balula kunommoya." 
Psalms62:11 Ningabeki ithemba ekudlelezeleni, ningabi nethemba elililize lobugebengu. Nanyana umnotho wanda, ningabeki ihliziywenu kiwo." 
Psalms62:12 UZimu ukhulume kanye, ngezwa kabili: Amandla angawakaZimu." 
Psalms62:13 Kukuwe ukwethembeka, Somandla ngombana uvuza umuntu ngokwemisebenzakhe." 
Psalms63:1 Irhubo lakaDavida; lokha naserhalawumbeni lakwaJuda. 
Psalms63:2 Zimu, wena unguZimami! Ngikufuna khulu: Ihliziywami ikomele, umzimbami uyakululukela, ngisenarheni eyomileko nelibhudu, lapho amanzi angekho khona." 
Psalms63:3 Mbala ngikubone endaweni ecwengileko ngokukhangwa mamandla nephazimulwakho. 
Psalms63:4 Iimbhena zami zizakuvuma zikubabaze ngombana ukwethembeka kwakho kungcono kunepilo. 
Psalms63:5 Kwamambala ngizakudumisa qobe ngisaphila, ngizakuphakamisa izandla zami, ngithandaze ebizweni lakho." 
Psalms63:6 Umphefumulwami uyaneliswa, kubengathi ngidle amanoni nommongo; ngikudumisa ngomlomami ngithabile," 
Psalms63:7 lokha nangikukhumbula ngilele emsemenami, ubusuku boke ngihumuza ibizo lakho." 
Psalms63:8 Ngambala wena ube lisizo lami, emthunzini wamaphikwakho ngiyahlokoma." 
Psalms63:9 Umphefumulwami uyakunamathela nesandla sakho sokudla siyangibamba. 
Psalms63:10 Kwanga labo abazumana nokuphelisa ipilwami, bangakhalakathela ekuzikeni kwephasi;" 
Psalms63:11 banikelwe esandleni sesabula, babe kukudla kwabophagana." 
Psalms63:12 Kodwana ikosethu izakuthaba ngoZimu boke abafunga ngebizo lakaZimu bazazikhakhazisa ngombana imilomo enamanga izakuvalwa. 
Psalms64:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms64:2 Zimu, yewungizwe ekububuleni kwami, londoloza ukuphila kwami ekwethuselweni sisitha." 
Psalms64:3 Ngifihle esicathaneni sabenzi bobumbi, iye, ekutjitjizeleni kweengilamkhuba;" 
Psalms64:4 kilabo abalola ilimu labo njengesabula, abasophe amezwi anesihlungu njengemisubela," 
Psalms64:5 kilabo abadumuza onganacala ngokukhukhuthela, bamdumuze angakalindeli. Abantwaba abanavalo;" 
Psalms64:6 bakhuthazana ngehloso embi, babonisana ngokufihla izifu, bathi: “Akungabi nokubonako lokhu." 
Psalms64:7 Izenzo ezimbi azibonakali, thina simsulwa, isitjhatjhaniso siphethekile!” Omunye nomunye wabo utjhidela ngesibindi." 
Psalms64:8 Kodwana uZimu uzobadumuza ngomsubela, masinyana balimale." 
Psalms64:9 Ilimu labo lizabenza bakhutjwe; boke abababonako bathintithe iinhloko," 
Psalms64:10 iye, boke bazakubethwa livalo. Bazakukhuluma lokho uZimu akwenzileko, balemuke izenzo zakhe." 
Psalms64:11 Olungileko uzakuthaba kuSomnini begodu aphephele kuye. Boke abaqotho ngehliziyo bazamdumisa. 
Psalms65:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida; ingoma. 
Psalms65:2 Zimu, nguwe ofanele ukudunyiswa eZiyoni! Kuwe kufuze kuzaliswe iimfungo," 
Psalms65:3 iye, kuwe ozwa imithandazo. Abantu boke beza kuwe" 
Psalms65:4 neendaba zamacalabo. Lokha iimphambeko zethu nazisidizibezako, nguwe osithethelelako." 
Psalms65:5 Ubusisiwe omenyulako wena, omtjhideza kobana ahlale eenrhodlweni zakho. Sanelisekile ngobuhle bendlwakho, iye, ngokucwengeka kwethempeli lakho." 
Psalms65:6 Usiphendule ngokulunga nangezinto ezethusako, wena Zimu wesindiswethu! Ulithemba lemikhawulo yoke yephasi nelamajukujuku welwandle." 
Psalms65:7 Ngamandlakho wanzinzisa iintaba, wena uvunule amandla," 
Psalms65:8 uthulisa ukurhuba kwamalwandle, ukuhlokoma kwamagagasawo netjhada lezizwe." 
Psalms65:9 Labo abahlala epelazwe bayathuthumela ngeembonakaliso zakho; wena ubangela ukumangala, ukusuka epumalanga ukuya etjingalanga." 
Psalms65:10 Uthekela iphasi bewulithelelele, ulivundisa khulu; mbala, isiziba sakaZimu sizele amanzi, abantu ubabonelela ngamabele, iye, ngendlela leyo uyababonelela:" 
Psalms65:11 Uzalisa imisele yamasimu ngamanzi, ulalisa amasoyawo; uyithambisa ngomvimbi, ubusise iintjalo zakhona." 
Psalms65:12 Uhlobisa umnyaka ngobuhle bakho, lapha ukhambe khona kuncithika umnono." 
Psalms65:13 Amadlelo werhalawumba ayaphuphuma, imibundu izivunulise ukuthakasa." 
Psalms65:14 Imirhula izembathise imihlambi; imirhoba izisibekele ngamabele, iyavuma, ihlabe umkhosi wokwesasa." 
Psalms66:1 Kumkhaleli; ingoma; irhubo. Hlokomani kuZimu, noke nina bantu bephasi!" 
Psalms66:2 Dumisani ukuhlonipheka kwebizo lakhe, nibabaze idumo lakhe!" 
Psalms66:3 Yenithi kuZimu: “Imisebenzakho iyesabeka ngebanga lamandlakho amakhulu, izitha zakho zizakutjhotjhobana phambi kwakho." 
Psalms66:4 Loke iphasi lizakukhothama kuwe, lidumise wena, iye, lidumise ibizo lakho.”" 
Psalms66:5 Yizani nizokubona izenzo zakaZimu, kuyesabeka ukwenza kwakhe phakathi kwabantu:" 
Psalms66:6 Uphendule ilwandle walenza ihlabathi eyomileko, abantu beyama umlambo ngeenyawo. Nje-ke asithakaseni kuye," 
Psalms66:7 kuye obusa ngeenkhwepha isiphelani, onamehlo ahlala eluse izizwe. Ngalokho abakhunyaleleko abangaziphakamisi." 
Psalms66:8 Babazani uZimethu nina zizwe, akuzwakaliswe ilizwi lobukhulu bakhe," 
Psalms66:9 yena osilonde hlangana nabaphilako, akhange avume bona iinyawo zethu zitjhelele." 
Psalms66:10 Mbala wena Zimu, usizizinyile; wasihlola njengesiliva nalihlungwako." 
Psalms66:11 Wasingenisa esifwini, wasithwesa iinhlupheko." 
Psalms66:12 Wavumela abantu bakhwela phezu kweenhloko zethu; sakhamba emlilweni nemanzini, kodwana wena wasikhuphela ebukhosini." 
Psalms66:13 Ngizakungena ethempelini lakho nemihlabelo yokutjhiswa, ngizalise kuwe iimfungo zami," 
Psalms66:14 iye, iimfungo engiziphimise ngeembhena zami; ekuhluphekeni ngathembisa ngomlomami ngathi:" 
Psalms66:15 “Ngizakunikela kuwe imihlabelo yokutjhiswa yezimvu ezinonisiweko kanye nomnuko wemihlabelo yamaqama; godu ngizakunikela ngeenkunzi nangeempongo.” 
Psalms66:16 Yenize nizokulalela noke nina enesaba uZimu, ngizonibikela lokho angenzele khona:" 
Psalms66:17 Kuye ngalila ngomlomami indumiso iselimini lami. 
Psalms66:18 Ngathana bengisophe okumbi ehliziyweni, uSomandla ubangeze angizwa." 
Psalms66:19 Kodwana mbala uZimu ungizwile, wabeka indlebe emezwini womthandazwami." 
Psalms66:20 UZimu akadunyiswe ngombana akhange awale umthandazwami, namkha asuse ukwethembeka kwakhe kimi." 
Psalms67:1 Kumkhaleli; ngesililiso seenara; irhubo; ingoma. 
Psalms67:2 Kwanga uZimu angaba nomusa kithi, asibusise, asikhanyisele." 
Psalms67:3 Kwanga indlelakho ingaziwa ephasini nesindiswakho kibo boke bezizwe. 
Psalms67:4 Kwanga izizwe zingakudumisa Zimu, iye, boke abantu abadumise wena." 
Psalms67:5 Izizwe azithakase, zihlokome ngombana awukhethi ubuso ekugwebeni nezizwe uyazihlahla ephasini." 
Psalms67:6 Kwanga izizwe zingakudumisa Zimu, iye, boke abantu abadumise wena." 
Psalms67:7 Ihlabathi ithelile iinthelo zayo; uZimu, iye uZimethu usibusisile." 
Psalms67:8 Kwanga uZimu angasibusisa njalonjalo; ukuze imikhawulo yoke yephasi imesabe. 
Psalms68:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida; ingoma. 
Psalms68:2 UZimu uzakusikima, izitha zakhe zisabalale; abamzondako babaleke phambi kwakhe." 
Psalms68:3 Zimu, baqotjhe njengentuthu nayiphephethwako. Mbala, njengokuncithika kwamanyephe ahlanu komlilo, ngokunjalo iinkhohlakali zizakubhubha phambi kwakaZimu." 
Psalms68:4 Kodwana abalungileko bazakuthaba basase phambi kwakaZimu; bathakase ngokujabula. 
Psalms68:5 Rhubelani uZimu, nidumise ibizo lakhe, hlokomani kiloyo okhwele amafu; ibizo lakhe nguSomnini, nililizele phambi kwakhe." 
Psalms68:6 Unguyise weentandani nomjameli wabahlolokazi, unguZimu ohlezi endawenakhe ecwengileko." 
Psalms68:7 UZimu upha abadududu ikhaya, arholele iimbotjhwa ekuthakaseni, kodwana abahlubukileko bahlala ebhudwini." 
Psalms68:8 Zimu, nawuphuma ipi phambi kwabantu bakho, iye, lokha nawukhamba erhalawumbeni leJetjhimoni," 
Psalms68:9 iphasi lahlengezela. Amazulu anisa izulu phambi kwakaZimu, onguZimu weSinayi, iye, phambi kwakaZimu, uZimu wakwa-Israyeli." 
Psalms68:10 Zimu, wawululela izulu phezu kwelifa lakho." 
Psalms68:11 Umhlambakho wanzinza kilo, ngokulunga kwakho Zimu, walilungiselela labo abadududu." 
Psalms68:12 USomandla ukhupha umyalo; abafazi abanengi bamemezela iindaba," 
Psalms68:13 bathi: “Amakhosi ayabaleka! Amabuthwawo nawo ayabaleka! 
Psalms68:14 Ngitjho nani eniseembayeni nifumana amaphiko wezuba atshidzwe ngesiliva, iye, iinsiba zakhona zinegolide elidarhileko!”" 
Psalms68:15 Lokha oSabekako nahlakaza amakhosi enarheni, igabhogo likhithikela ngeTsalimoni." 
Psalms68:16 Wena ntaba enamandla, ntaba yeBhatjhani, iye, neenqongo zentaba yeBhatjhani," 
Psalms68:17 ngitjho nina ntaba ezineenqongo ezinengi, kubayini ninomona naniqala intaba uZimu ayikhethe kobana ahlale kiyo na? USomnini uzakuhlala lapho isiphelani!" 
Psalms68:18 Ngeenkarana ezinamandla, eziziinkulungwana ngeenkulungwana, iye, iinkulungwana ebuphaziphazini, uSomandla uvele eSinayi ngokucwenga." 
Psalms68:19 Ngemva kobana uthumbe abathunjwa, wathatha izipho ebantwini, ngitjho nakilabo abahlubukileko, wakhuphukela ekuphakameni, kobana uhlale lapho, wena Somnini, Zimu." 
Psalms68:20 Akudunyiswe uSomnini, osisingatha imihla ngemihla, iye, uZimu oyisindiswethu." 
Psalms68:21 Mbala, uZimethu unguZimu wesindiso; ukuphepha ukufa, kukuSomnini uSomandla." 
Psalms68:22 UZimu uzakuphahlaza iinhloko zezitha zakhe, iye, ifokotho eneenhluthu yalabo abaphikelela ekoneni." 
Psalms68:23 USomandla wathi: “Ngizabehlisa eBatjhani, ngibenyuse ekuzikeni kwelwandle," 
Psalms68:24 ukuze nihlanze iinyawo zenu eengazini, namalimu wezinja zenu afunyane isabelo ezitheni.”" 
Psalms68:25 Zimu, iinqhema zakho ziyabonakala, nazingena endaweni ecwengileko, iye, iinqhema zakho Zimami, Kosami." 
Psalms68:26 Ngaphambili kukhamba abavumi, phakathi kube matlawu aphethe abosotjherere, ngemva kube ngababetha iinara," 
Psalms68:27 bavuma bathi: “Dumisani uZimu emihlanganweni emikhulu; nidumise uSomnini emthonjeni ka-Israyeli.” 
Psalms68:28 Ngemva kwabo uBhenjamini ongomncani, urhola phambili; ulandelwa liviyo leenkhulu zakwaJuda neenkhulu zakwaZebuloni kanye nezakwaNafitali." 
Psalms68:29 Zimu, bonakalisa amandlakho, iye, amandla owasikhombisa wona, Zimu," 
Psalms68:30 usethempelini lakho ngehla kweJerusalema. Amakhosi kumele alethe iimbiko kuwe. 
Psalms68:31 Khalimela isibandana emhlangeni, okuziinkunzikazi ezibhodlela abantu, inga bamathole. Gadangela labo abathanda isiliva; uhlakaze abantu abakarekela ipi." 
Psalms68:32 Akuze abazenda abasuka eGibhide, amaKutjhe akarhabe alethe izipho kuZimu." 
Psalms68:33 Nina mibuso yephasi, rhubelani uZimu, nidumise uSomandla," 
Psalms68:34 iye, yena okhwele amafu emkayini wakade. Qalani, uzwakalisa ilizwi lakhe, iye, ilizwi elinamandla." 
Psalms68:35 Yamukelani amandla kaZimu, yena obukhosi bakhe buphezu kwaka-Israyeli namandlakhe asemafini." 
Psalms68:36 UZimu uyesabeka endawenakhe ecwengileko, unguZimu wakwa-Israyeli; upha abantu bakhe amandla nesibindi. Akadunyiswe uZimu!" 
Psalms69:1 Kumkhaleli; ngeenodo zengoma ethi, “amaKhwa”; irhubo lakaDavida." 
Psalms69:2 Zimu, ngisindise ngombana sengivele ngehloko ngemanzini!" 
Psalms69:3 Ngiminza edakeni elitjhingako, sengifike emanzini azikileko neenkhukhula ziyangigubuzesa." 
Psalms69:4 Ngidiniwe ngokulila kwami, umphimbami uyarhoroza, amehlwami selafiphele ngokuqalelela uZimami." 
Psalms69:5 Abangizonda ngelize banengi ukudlula iinhluthu ehlokwenami. Abangiqedako banamandla, iye, labo abajamelana nami ngamanga. Ngikatelelwa ukubuyisela engingakakudlelezeli." 
Psalms69:6 Zimu, wena uyabazi ubudlhayela bami, amacalami abhamba kuwe." 
Psalms69:7 Somnini, Somandla, Mninimandlawoke, abaqalelela kuwe, abangadaniswa ngenca yami. Zimu ka-Israyeli, abakufunako abangarhubutjhwa ngebanga lami." 
Psalms69:8 Ngenca yakho ngithwele ihlamba, ihlazo lembese ubuso bami." 
Psalms69:9 Sengiphenduke otjhili ngakwethu, ngimqhamuka ebantwaneni bakababa." 
Psalms69:10 Ukutjhisakalela indlwakho kungidlile; iinhlamba zabakuthukako zehlele kimi: 
Psalms69:11 Ngazithobisa ngokuzila, kwaba yihlamba kimi." 
Psalms69:12 Ngembatha izambatho zokuzila nalapho ngaba siphoqo kibo. 
Psalms69:13 Abahlezi esangweni bathamba ngami neengomeni zeendakwa kunjalo. 
Psalms69:14 Kodwana mina, ngithandaza kuwe, Somnini, akube sikhathi sokwamukeleka kuwe, Zimu: Ngiphendule ngokwethembeka kwakho okukhulu! Ngeqiniso lesindiswakho" 
Psalms69:15 ngikhuphe edakeni! Angifuni ukutjhinga phasi; ngifisa ukwenyulwa kabangizondako, ngitjho nekuzikeni kwamanzi." 
Psalms69:16 Ungavumeli isikhukhula singigubuzese, ungavumeli ukuzika kungiginye namkha umgodi wethuna ungibhibhe." 
Psalms69:17 Ngiphendule Somnini ngombana ukwethembeka kwakho kukhulu; phendukela kimi ngesirhawu sakho esikhulu," 
Psalms69:18 ungayifihleli incekwakho ubuso bakho ngombana ngihluphekile. Rhaba ungiphendule! 
Psalms69:19 Tjhidela kimi, ungihlenge, ngitjhaphulule ngenca yezitha zami." 
Psalms69:20 Wena uyayazi ihlamba engethukwa ngayo, ihlazo nokurhubutjhwa kwami; zoke izitha zami ziyazeka kuwe." 
Psalms69:21 Iinhlamba ziyephulile ihliziywami, ayiselapheki. Ngalindela ukutlhuwelwa, kodwana do nokurhawukelwa, kodwana akhange ngikufunyane." 
Psalms69:22 Banginikela inyongo esikhundleni sokudla nangomileko bangiseza isibharha. 
Psalms69:23 Itafula labo alibe sisifu phambi kwabo, libe sithiyo ebakhozini babo." 
Psalms69:24 Amehlwabo akaphophale ukuze bangaboni; wenze amadinabo ahlale agedla. 
Psalms69:25 Thululela ilaka lakho phezu kwabo, ubukhali bakho obuvuthako bubafikele." 
Psalms69:26 Kwanga ikampabo ingaba dududu kungabikhona ohlala ematendenabo 
Psalms69:27 ngombana bazumana nalabo obabethileko, bakhuluma ngalabo obalimazileko." 
Psalms69:28 Ngezelela icala ecaleni labo, ungababali emsenakho." 
Psalms69:29 Abasulwe encwadini yabaphilako, bangatlolwa erhelweni labalungileko." 
Psalms69:30 Ngihluphekile, ngineenhlungu; yeke isindiswakho ayingivikele!" 
Psalms69:31 Ibizo lakaZimu ngilidumisa ngengoma, iye, ngimphakamisa ngokuthokoza!" 
Psalms69:32 Lokhu kuzamthabisa uSomnini ukudlula umhlabelo wekomo, iye, ikunzi eneempondo neenqatha ezihlukene kabili." 
Psalms69:33 Abathobekileko bayabona, bajabule, abafuna uZimu bayathaba. Nje-ke iinhliziyo zenu azename!" 
Psalms69:34 Ngambala, uZimu uyabalalela abanesidingo, akabadeleli abangabakhe abasekuthunjweni." 
Psalms69:35 Akadunyiswe lizulu nephasi, ilwandle nakho koke okuphila kilo." 
Psalms69:36 Ngambala uZimu uzakusindisa iZiyoni, avuselele amadorobho wakwaJuda. Abangabakhe bazakuhlala lapho bawathumbe;" 
Psalms69:37 iye, iinzukulwana zeenceku zakhe zizakuzuza inarha, abathanda ibizo lakhe bazakuhlala kiyo." 
Psalms70:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida; livunywa emnikelweni wesikhumbuzo. 
Psalms70:2 Zimu, yewungiphephise; Somnini, ngisize masinyana!" 
Psalms70:3 Akuthi abazumana nepilwami bakhene, barhubutjheke bebabaleke; iye, abangisongelako badane." 
Psalms70:4 Labo abathi, “Arha! Arha!” babuyiselwe emuva ngebanga lokudana kwabo." 
Psalms70:5 Kuthi abakufunako bathabe bebathakase; abathanda isindiswakho ngesikhathi soke bathi: “Mkhulu uZimu.” 
Psalms70:6 Mina ngichakile begodu ngidududu, yeke, rhaba uze kimi, Zimu. Wena ulisizo nomhlengami, nje-ke Somnini, ungariyadi!" 
Psalms71:1 Kuwe Somnini, ngiyaphephela, yeke ungavumi ngingene ehlazweni." 
Psalms71:2 Ngokulunga kwakho ngenyule, ungihlenge, beka indlebakho kimi, ungisindise." 
Psalms71:3 Yiba lidwala kimi, irharha lokuphephela ngesikhathi soke. Uyaleze bonyana ngisinde! Mbala, ulidwala nerholo lami!" 
Psalms71:4 Zimami, ngisindise esandleni seenkhohlakali, iye, ekubanjweni ngabangakalungi nabagandeleli" 
Psalms71:5 ngombana ulithemba lami, Somnini, Somandla. Kwebutjheni bami ngithembele kuwe;" 
Psalms71:6 ngizesame kuwe kwekubelethweni kwami. Nguwe owaqunta inongo nangibelethwako. Ukudumisa kwami kukuwe soke isikhathi. 
Psalms71:7 Ngibe sibonelo kabanengi ngombana wena usiphephelo sami esiqinileko. 
Psalms71:8 Umlomami uzele idumo nokukubabaza ilanga loke. 
Psalms71:9 Ungangilahli esikhathini sokuluphala, ungangitjhiyi lokha amandlami naphelako" 
Psalms71:10 ngombana izitha zami zikhuluma ngami nalabo abeluse ipilwami bazwana ngami," 
Psalms71:11 bathi: “UZimu umtjhiyile! Mlandeleni, nimbambe ngombana akanamenyeli!”" 
Psalms71:12 Zimu, ungabi kude nami! Zimami, rhaba ungisize!" 
Psalms71:13 Abajamelene nami abakhene bebapheliswe, abangisongelako bembeswe ihlamba nehlazo." 
Psalms71:14 Mina ngizakuhlala ngethemba, ngirhagala ekukudumiseni." 
Psalms71:15 Umlomami uzakukhuluma ngokulunga kwakho nesindiswakho ilanga loke ngombana angibazi ubukghwari bokutlola. 
Psalms71:16 Ngize kobana ngikhulume godu ngezenzo zakho ezikulu, Somnini, Somandla, iye, isindiso eyenziwe nguwe wedwa." 
Psalms71:17 Kwasebutjheni bami Zimu, ungifundisile; nanje, ngisamemezela iimangaliso zakho." 
Psalms71:18 Njengombana sengimdala ngithukghele, ungangitjhiyi Zimu bengikhulume ngamandlakho eenzukulwaneni, okutjho ubungorho bakho kibo boke abazakubelethwa." 
Psalms71:19 Mbala, ukulunga kwakho Zimu, kufika emazulwini aphakamileko. Kukhulu okwenzileko Zimu! Ngubani onjengawe na?" 
Psalms71:20 Wena ungibonise iinsizi ezinengi kanye neenhlekelele. Yeke vuselela ipilwami godu, ubuye ungenyule ekuzikeni kwethuna." 
Psalms71:21 Dlondlobalisa idumo lami, ujike ungitjhiriye." 
Psalms71:22 Mina-ke ngizakudumisa ngeharibha; iye, ngidumise iqiniso lakho, Zimami, ngikukhalelele ngeharibhana, wena ongocwengileko wakwa-Israyeli." 
Psalms71:23 Lokha nangikhalela iindumiso kuwe, iimbhena zami zizakuhlokoma, ngokunjalo nomphefumulwami owuhlengileko." 
Psalms71:24 Iye, nelimu lami lizakuhumuza ngokulunga kwakho imini yoke ngombana labo abangisongeleko babekwe ekukheneni nehlazweni." 
Psalms72:1 Irhubo lakaSolomoni. Zimu, yipha umbusi imithethwakho nokulunga kwakho kozesiweko." 
Psalms72:2 Kwanga angagweba abantu bakho ngokulunga, iye, abeyame kuwe ngokufaneleko." 
Psalms72:3 Kwanga iintaba zingakhiqiza ukuthula ebantwini nemibundu ithele ukulunga. 
Psalms72:4 Kwanga angajamela indaba yabazeyame ngawe; iye, asindise abachakileko; kodwana aphohloze ogandelelako." 
Psalms72:5 Inga kungathi kusakhanya nenyanga isadarhile, abantu bakho bakwesabe, iye, iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana." 
Psalms72:6 Inga umbusi angafana nezulu eliwulukela etjanini obusikiweko nanjengomfefezwana othambisa iphasi. 
Psalms72:7 Kwanga emihlenakhe kunganda ukulunga, kuvame ukuthula, inyanga ingasabikhona." 
Psalms72:8 Kwanga angabusa ukusuka elwandle ukuya kelinye, kusukela emlanjeni omkhulu ukuya epelazwe;" 
Psalms72:9 abahlali berhalawumbeni bakhothame phambi kwakhe, izitha zakhe zikhothe ithuli." 
Psalms72:10 Kwanga amakhosi weTharatjhitjhi neweligwini angaletha kuye umthelo; amakhosi weTjheba neSeba amlethele izipho; 
Psalms72:11 iye, woke amakhosi aguqe phambi kwakhe; zoke izizwe zizinikele kuye." 
Psalms72:12 Yena wenyela abadududu nabalilako, iye, abakhwahlileko nabanganabani." 
Psalms72:13 Ukhathalela ababuthakathaka nabadududu; asindise nabatlhogako. 
Psalms72:14 Ekugandelelweni nenturhwini uyabahlenga, ipilwabo iligugu emehlwenakhe." 
Psalms72:15 Kwanga angasiphilela! Inga angaphiwa igolide leTjheba, athandazelwe njalonjalo, ahlale abusisekile ilanga loke." 
Psalms72:16 Inga kungabakhona inala enarheni, ngitjho neenqongweni zeentaba, iinthelo zakhona ziyathazele njengemithi yeLibhanoni, abantu emadorobheni baphalaze njengotjani emmangweni." 
Psalms72:17 Kwanga ibizo lakhe lingahlala mlibe, idumo lakhe lijame ije kusakhanya; kwanga zoke izizwe zingakhanukela ukubusiswa njengaye, zimbize bonyana ungobusisekileko." 
Psalms72:18 Akadunyiswe uSomnini uZimu, iye, uZimu ka-Israyeli, okunguye yedwa owenza iimangaliso." 
Psalms72:19 Alidunyiswe isiphelani ibizo lakhe eliphazimulako; kwanga iphazimulwakhe ingazala iphasi loke. Amen, iye, Amen." 
Psalms72:20 Ukuphela kwemithandazo kaDavida indodana kaJese. 
Psalms73:1 Irhubo laka-Asafa. Ngambala uZimu umlungele u-Israyeli, iye, labo abanehliziyo ehlanzekileko." 
Psalms73:2 Kodwana nakungimi yena, iinyawo zami zapheze zatjhelela, kwasala kancani bona ziphambuke" 
Psalms73:3 ngombana ngakhanukela abazikhukhumezako, nangibona itjhudu labakhohlakeleko." 
Psalms73:4 Bona abananhlungu bekube sekufeni, izisu zabo zihlala zitatamele." 
Psalms73:5 Abatjhabatjheki njengabantukazana, abahlunguphazwa njengabanye." 
Psalms73:6 Yeke ukuzigqaja kungunongoro entanyenabo, bambethe ubudlova njengengubo." 
Psalms73:7 Amehlwabo abimbekile ngokunona, imicabango yehliziywabo iyaphuphuma." 
Psalms73:8 Bayaphoqa bakhulume ngokukhohlakala, ngokuziphakamisa bagandelela abanye." 
Psalms73:9 Imilomabo inyefula izulu namalimabo ahlambalaza iphasi. 
Psalms73:10 Iwoma liyabalandela, lirhuqa amezwabo inga mamanzi," 
Psalms73:11 lokha nabathi: “UZimu wazi njani na? OngoPhezulu unelwazi na?” 
Psalms73:12 Qalani, zinjalo-ke iinkhohlakali: Zihlala zikhomba ngophakathi, zikhule ngomnono." 
Psalms73:13 Kube lilize kobana ngihlambulule ihliziywami, ngahlamba izandla zami ngimsulwa" 
Psalms73:14 ngombana ngakhathazwa ilanga loke, njalo ekuseni ngahlunguphazwa." 
Psalms73:15 Nakube bengithe, “Ngizakuhlala ngikhuluma njalo”, bengizokuba mkhohlisi esigungwini sabantwabakho." 
Psalms73:16 Kodwana ngathi nangilinga ukuzwisisa lokhu, kwabonakala kuyinto ebudisi kimi," 
Psalms73:17 bekwaba kulapha ngingena khona ngethempelini lakho Zimu, lokha nangilemuka isiphetho sabo:" 
Psalms73:18 Mbala ubeka iinkhohlakali eendaweni ezibutjhelelezi, uzenze bona ziwele ebhudwini." 
Psalms73:19 Maye, zibhujiswa ngesikhatjhana! Zitjhabalaliswa nya ngevalo!" 
Psalms73:20 Zinjengebhudango elimbi ekuphaphameni komuntu: Somandla, lokha nawuvukako uzithalalisa njengombono webhudangwelo." 
Psalms73:21 Lokha ihliziywami imunyu nemizwami idungekile," 
Psalms73:22 mina ngaba siyila nongalemukiko; iye, ngaba njengesibandana kuwe." 
Psalms73:23 Nokho mina bengiseze nginawe; ubambe isandla sami sokudla. 
Psalms73:24 Ungirhola ngeseluleko sakho, ungamukele ebukhoneni bakho." 
Psalms73:25 Ngubani enginaye ezulwini ngaphandle kwakho na? Ngaphandle kwakho ephasini akunanto engiyikhanukelako. 
Psalms73:26 Umzimbami nehliziywami zingaphelelwa, kodwana uZimu ulidwala lehliziywami nesabelo sami ngokungapheliko." 
Psalms73:27 Mbala, abadeda kuwe bazakubhubha; uphelisa boke abangakathembeki kuwe." 
Psalms73:28 Kodwana nakungimi, kuhle ukuba seduze noZimu; ngenze uSomnini uSomandla isiphephelo sami ukuze ngikhulume ngakho koke akwenzileko." 
Psalms74:1 IMaskili laka-Asafa. Awu Zimu, usilahleleni isiphelani na? Kubayini ilaka lakho livuthe phezu komhlambakho?" 
Psalms74:2 Khumbula ibandla lakho owalizuza ekadeni, ikoro yelifa lakho owayihlengako nentaba yeZiyoni ohlala kiyo." 
Psalms74:3 Yewize emarubhini wesiphelani; endaweni ecwengileko isitha sone yoke into. 
Psalms74:4 Amanabakho arore ekabeni yehlanganwakho, ajamisa amatshwaywawo khonapho." 
Psalms74:5 Njengabaphakamisa iinlembe ukuze bakghedlhe ihlathi eliminyeneko," 
Psalms74:6 amanaba eza njalo ngamazembe nemigqala, aphohloza nya umsebenzayo obaziweko." 
Psalms74:7 Okhele indawakho ecwengileko ngomlilo, ayitjhisa ngokuyidula phasi; asilaphaza indawo lapha kuhlala ibizo lakho." 
Psalms74:8 Adlumbana athi: “Asiqedeni koke!” Nje-ke atjhisa zoke iindawo zemihlangano kaZimu enarheni. 
Psalms74:9 Amatshwaywethu asiwaboni; njengombana kungekho umphorofidi akakho kithi owaziko bona kuzabe kube nini kunjalo. 
Psalms74:10 Zimu, umjamelani uzasiphoqa bekube nini? Isitha sizakuhlambalaza ibizo lakho isiphelani na?" 
Psalms74:11 Kubayini ugodla isandla sakho? Rhotjha isidla sakho usiqede! 
Psalms74:12 Zimu, kwakade wena uyiKosami, wenza imisebenzi yokusindisa phakathi kwenarha." 
Psalms74:13 Nguwe owaphehla ilwandle ngamandlakho, waphohloza iinhloko zeembandana ezikulu zemanzini." 
Psalms74:14 Iye, nguwe owaphihliza iinhloko zakanomrhaso welwandle, wamenza bona abe kukudla kweendalwa zerhalawumba." 
Psalms74:15 Nguwe owabhoboza imithombo nemilanjana, godu nguwe owomisa imilambo ehlala igeleza." 
Psalms74:16 Ngeyakho imini, godu nobusuku ngebakho; nguwe owabeka inyezi nelanga." 
Psalms74:17 Nguwe owajamisa yoke imikhawulo yephasi, iye, nguwe owenza ihlobo nobusika." 
Psalms74:18 Khumbula lokhu, Zimu: Izitha ziphoqe wena, Somnini neendlhayela zihlambalaze ibizo lakho." 
Psalms74:19 Unganikeli izuba lakho eembandaneni; iye, ipilo yabeyame kuwe, ungayikhohlwa nini nanini." 
Psalms74:20 Khumbula isivumelwano ngombana iindawo ezimnyama enarheni, zigcwele ubudlova." 
Psalms74:21 Ungajikisi ogandelelweko adanile! Yenza isichaka nodududu badumise ibizo lakho. 
Psalms74:22 Sikima Zimu, jamela indabakho; khumbula, iindlhayela ziyakuphoqa imihla yoke." 
Psalms74:23 Ungakhohlwa itjhada lamanabakho, iye, umkhosi wabajamelani bakho, ohlala ukukholile." 
Psalms75:1 Kumkhaleli; ngeenodo zengoma ethi, “Ungatjhabalalisi”; irhubo laka-Asafa; ingoma." 
Psalms75:2 Siyakudumisa Zimu, siyakudumisa! Ibizo lakho liseduze nathi; iimangaliso zakho kufuze kukhulunywe ngazo." 
Psalms75:3 Wena uthi: “Ngesikhathi esifaneleko, ngizakugweba ngeqiniso." 
Psalms75:4 Nanyana iphasi lidengezela nabahlali balo, ngimi obambe iinsika zalo zijame." 
Psalms75:5 Ngithi kwabazigqajako, ‘Ningazikhukhumezi!’ Kwabakhohlakeleko ngithi, ‘Ningabi nelunda!" 
Psalms75:6 Ningabi nelunda kophezulu, namkha nibe nentanyana nanikhulumako.’ ”" 
Psalms75:7 Iye, ukuphakanyiswa komuntu akuveli epumalanga namkha etjingalanga, ngitjho nerhalawumbeni," 
Psalms75:8 kodwana nguZimu ogwebako: Omunye uyamehlisa, omunye amphakamise." 
Psalms75:9 Ngambala esandleni sakaSomnini kukhona ikapho, iye, ikapho enewayini elibilako nelengezwe ngeembiliso. Uqathekela boke abakhohlakeleko bephasi, basele bebarhuqe ngitjho nesiminya sehlama yakhona." 
Psalms75:10 Mina ngizakukhuluma isiphelani ngikhalele ngoZimu kaJakopo 
Psalms75:11 ngombana wathi: “Ngizokususa woke amalunda weenkhohlakali, kodwana wolungileko azakuphakanyiswa.”" 
Psalms76:1 Kumkhaleli; ngesililiso seenara; irhubo laka-Asafa; ingoma. 
Psalms76:2 KwaJuda uZimu uyaziwa, ibizo lakhe likhulu kwa-Israyeli." 
Psalms76:3 Umtlhatlhanakhe wanzinziswa eSalema, iye, indawakhe yokuhlala eseZiyoni." 
Psalms76:4 Lapho wephula imisubela ebenyezelako, isihlangu, isabula neenkhali zepi." 
Psalms76:5 Wena Ziyoni, uyaphazimula, udarhe udlula iintaba ezikuzumako." 
Psalms76:6 Iingorho zemukwe ipangwazo, zisacwile phakathi ebuthongweni; woke amabutho abanjwe izandla." 
Psalms76:7 Ngokukhalima kwakho, Zimu kaJakopo, kukhungatheka umkhweli nenjomani." 
Psalms76:8 Somnini, mbala wena uyesabeka! Ngubani ongajama phambi kwakho lokha nasele ubhoke ngelaka lakho na?" 
Psalms76:9 Lokha nawukhupha isigwebo sakho usezulwini, iphasi lethuka lathula du." 
Psalms76:10 Iye, uZimu wasikima kobana agwebe, asindise boke abagandelelweko benarha." 
Psalms76:11 Ngambala, iRhamathi-Aramu izakudumisa, iye, inengi leRhamathi lizakuphephela kuwe." 
Psalms76:12 Yenzani iinthembiso kuSomnini uZimenu begodu niziphethe. Akuthi zoke izizwe zombelele, zilethe iimbiko koSabekako;" 
Psalms76:13 yena othobisa amakhosana, nowenza amakhosi wephasi athuthumele." 
Psalms77:1 Kumkhaleli; ngeenodo zengoma ethi, “Jeduthuni”; laka-Asafa; irhubo." 
Psalms77:2 Ngilila kuZimu, ngiyarhuwelela; iye, ngilila kuZimu kobana angizwe." 
Psalms77:3 Elangeni lesizi lami ngifuna uSomnini, ebusuku izandla zami zeluliwe, azidinwa; umphefumulwami wala ukududuzwa." 
Psalms77:4 Ngiyabubula nangikhumbula wena Zimu, ngiyazindla nommoyami udambe." 
Psalms77:5 Ungenza ngiphilelwe, iye, ngikhathazekile namezwi anginawo" 
Psalms77:6 lokha nangicabanga amalanga wakade neminyaka eyadlulako. 
Psalms77:7 Ebusuku ngikhumbula iinodo zami; ngibubule ngehliziywami bengiwurubajeke, ummoyami uguduze, ngizibuze:" 
Psalms77:8 USomandla ulahlela safuthi, angasabi nomusa godu na?" 
Psalms77:9 Ukwethembeka kwakhe sekuphelile na? Ilizwi lakhe selikhawukile iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana na? 
Psalms77:10 Ingabe uZimu ukhohlwe ukuba nesirhawu, namkha ngelaka lakhe ususa isisa sakhe na?" 
Psalms77:11 Yeke ngafika esiphethweni sokuthi: Imbangela yenceba lami kukobana isidla songoPhezulu siphendukile! 
Psalms77:12 Kodwana ngizahlala ngikhumbula izenzo zakaSomnini. Mbala ngikhumbule iimangaliso zakho zekadeni," 
Psalms77:13 ngihumuze ngemisebenzakho yoke, ngizindle ngezenzo zakho zamandla." 
Psalms77:14 Zimu, indlelakho icwengile! Ngimuphi uzinyana omkhulu njengoZimu?" 
Psalms77:15 Wena unguZimu owenza iimangaliso, ubonakalise amandlakho phakathi kwabantu." 
Psalms77:16 Ngengalwakho wahlenga abantu bakho, iye, iinzukulwana zakaJakopo noJosefa." 
Psalms77:17 Lokha amanzi abona wena Zimu, iye, lokha nakubonako, ayayaluka; ngitjho namanzi amanengi ayanyakaza." 
Psalms77:18 Amafu athulula amanzi, umphezulu wararamba, kwabenya imibanakho phasi phezulu." 
Psalms77:19 Ukuthuthumba kwakho kwaba njengetjhada levili lekarana; imibanakho yaphazima enarheni yoke, iphasi lanyakaza belazamazama." 
Psalms77:20 Indlelakho beyidabula elwandle, iye, imizilakho isemanzini anamandla, nokho amagadangwakho bekangabonakali." 
Psalms77:21 Warhola abantu bakho njengezimvu, iye, ngesandla sakaMosi no-Aroni." 
Psalms78:1 IMaskili laka-Asafa. Bantu bekhethu, lalelani ukufundisa kwami, nibeke iindlebe zenu emezwini womlomami." 
Psalms78:2 Ngizakuvula umlomami ngomfanekiso, ngiphuphume iimfihlakalo zekadeni." 
Psalms78:3 Izinto esizizwileko nesizaziko, esatjelwa zona bobamkhulu," 
Psalms78:4 angeze sazifihla eenzukulwaneni zabo; sizokutjela nesizukulwana esizako ngemikarisomraro kaSomnini namandlakhe, kanye neemangaliso azenzileko." 
Psalms78:5 Wajamisa ubufakazi kwaJakopo, wabeka umthetho kwa-Israyeli ayala ngawo abobamkhulu kobana bawufundise abantwababo," 
Psalms78:6 ukuze isizukulwana esilandelako siwazi, iye, abantwana abasazakubelethwa. Nabo basikime, batjele abantwababo" 
Psalms78:7 kobana babeke ithemba labo kuZimu. Kumele bangakhohlwa imisebenzi kaZimu, kodwana balonde imiyalwakhe." 
Psalms78:8 Bangabi njengaboyisemkhulu ebekusizukulwana esikhunyaleleko nesihlubukako; iye, isizukulwana ebesinehliziyo enganaqiniso nebesinommoya ongakathembeki kuZimu." 
Psalms78:9 Bakwa-Efrayimu bebahlome ngemisubi nemisubela, nokho bahlehla ngelanga lepi." 
Psalms78:10 Akhange balonde isivumelwano sakaZimu begodu bala ukwenza njengokweemfundiso zakhe. 
Psalms78:11 Iye, bakhohlwa lokho akwenzileko neemangaliso ababonisa zona." 
Psalms78:12 Wenza iimangaliso phambi kwaboyisemkhulu enarheni yeGibhide, emmangweni weTsowana." 
Psalms78:13 Wahlukanisa ilwandle, wabeyamisa, wajamisa amanzi aba njengedonga." 
Psalms78:14 Emini wabarhola ngelifu, ebusuku ngomkhanyo womlilo." 
Psalms78:15 Waqhekeza amadwala erhalawumbeni, wabaseza amanzi inga abuya esizibeni esikhulu." 
Psalms78:16 Wathumbula iinkhukhula edwaleni, wagelezisa amanzi ehla njengemilambo." 
Psalms78:17 Nanyana kunjalo, bathuwelela ngokona kuye, bahlubuka ongoPhezulu ebhudwini." 
Psalms78:18 Bazizinya uZimu eenhliziyweni zabo ngokubawa ukudla ngokukhaluza. 
Psalms78:19 Bakhuluma kumbi ngoZimu, bathi: “UZimu angalungisa isithebe erhalawumbeni na?" 
Psalms78:20 Wabetha idwala, kwaphuma amanzi nemilanjana yagobhoza. Kghani, angapha abantu bakhe ukudla, abalungisele inyama na?”" 
Psalms78:21 Lokha uSomnini nezwa lokho, wabila khulu, waphuphuma, wavutha umlilo ngoJakopo, ilaka lakhe larubha ngo-Israyeli" 
Psalms78:22 ngombana akhange bakholwe kuZimu begodu azange bathembe amandla wesindiswakhe. 
Psalms78:23 Nje-ke wayala umkayi phezulu, wavula iminyango yezulwini," 
Psalms78:24 wanisa imana phezu kwabo bona badle, wabapha amabele wezulwini." 
Psalms78:25 Abantu badla isikwa seengilozi, wabathumela umphako omnengi." 
Psalms78:26 Wavunguzisa ummoya wepumalanga ukusuka phezulu, ngamandlakhe waphephethisa ummoya wangesewula." 
Psalms78:27 Wabehlisela inyama yaba yinengi njengethuli, iinyoni eziphapha njengetjhwabatjhwaba yelwandle." 
Psalms78:28 Wazenza zidoyele ekabeni yekampakhe, iye, ethaberinakelini lakhe zombelele." 
Psalms78:29 Badla bebasutha sentwala! Wabapha ebebakukhanukela. 
Psalms78:30 Kodwana bathi basakhanuka inyama, iye, isesemlonyenabo njalo," 
Psalms78:31 ubukhali bakaZimu babavukela. Wabulala abazimukileko phakathi kwabo, wadula phasi amasokana wakwa-Israyeli." 
Psalms78:32 Ngaphezu kwakho koke lokho baragela phambili nokona; akhange bazethembe iimangaliso zakhe. 
Psalms78:33 Yeke, waphelisa amalangabo njengomphefumulo neminyakabo ekwesabeni." 
Psalms78:34 Lokha nasele ababulalako, bamfuna, baphenduka bafunisisa uZimu." 
Psalms78:35 Bakhumbula bona uZimu ulidwala labo, uZimu ongoPhezulu umhlengabo." 
Psalms78:36 Kodwana bamkhohlisa ngemilomabo, baleya kuye amala ngamalimabo." 
Psalms78:37 Ihliziywabo akhange ibe neqiniso kuye bebangakathembeki esivumelwaneni sakhe. 
Psalms78:38 Phezu kwalokho yena waba nomusa, wacolela ubumenemene babo; iye, akhange ababhubhise, wazibamba kanengi elakeni lakhe, azange aveze boke ubukhali bakhe." 
Psalms78:39 Wakhumbula ukuthi bayinyama nje, bamumoya odlulako nongasabuyiko godu." 
Psalms78:40 Kwaba kanengi kangangani bamhlubuka erhalawumbeni, iye, bamdanisa enarheni elibhudu." 
Psalms78:41 Bazizinya uZimu kanenginengi, barhuga ongoCwengileko wakwa-Israyeli." 
Psalms78:42 Akhange bakhumbule amandlakhe emalangeni abasindisa ngawo esitheni," 
Psalms78:43 lokha enza iimbonakaliso zakhe eGibhide neemangaliso endaweni yeTsowana: 
Psalms78:44 Waphendula imilanjana yeNayili iingazi, azange bakwazi ukusela emilanjenabo." 
Psalms78:45 Wabathumela ngeembawu ezabadlako neenrhwarhwa ezabhubhisako. 
Psalms78:46 Wanikelela iintjalo zabo ngentethe, iinthelo zomsebenzabo ngesikhonyani." 
Psalms78:47 Warhayila iindiribe zabo ngesinanja namakhiwani wommango ngesikhukhula. 
Psalms78:48 Waphobolisa iinkomo zabo ngesinanja nemihlambabo ngombani womphezulu. 
Psalms78:49 Wehlisela phakathi kwabo ilaka lakhe elivuthako: ubukhali, itukuthelo namatshwenyeko; iye, iwoma leenthunywa ezibhubhisako." 
Psalms78:50 Wavula indlela yelaka lakhe, akhange abababalele bona bangafi, kodwana wanikelela ipilwabo ngezifo." 
Psalms78:51 Warhayila woke amazibulo eGibhide, iye, isithelo sokuthoma sobudoda ematendeni kaRhamu." 
Psalms78:52 Nje-ke wakhupha abantu bakhe njengezimvu, wabarhola erhalawumbeni njengomhlambi." 
Psalms78:53 Wabelusa ngokuthula ukuze bangesabi ngombana ilwandle labhibha izitha zabo. 
Psalms78:54 Wabaletha emkhawulwenakhe ocwengileko, enarheni yeentaba ethunjwe sisidla sakhe." 
Psalms78:55 Waqotjha izizwe phambi kwabo; wabahlukanisela inarhazo njengelifa labo, wanzinzisa iinkoro zakwa-Israyeli eendaweni zazo." 
Psalms78:56 Nanyana kunjalo bazizinya uZimu ongoPhezulu; bamhlubuka ngokungalondi iimiso zakhe. 
Psalms78:57 Baba nokungathembeki, bahlehla sinyava njengaboyisemkhulu. Bahluleka njengomsebe ongazisiko." 
Psalms78:58 Bamtlhorholoja ngeendunduma zabo, bamnyenyisa ngeenthombe-mbazwa zabo." 
Psalms78:59 Lokha uZimu nabona lokho, wabila khulu waphuphuma, walahla u-Israyeli ngokupheleleko." 
Psalms78:60 Watjhiya indawakhe ngeTjhilo ekulitende ahlala kilo hlangana nabantu. 
Psalms78:61 Wanikela amandlakhe ekuthunjweni, iye, igugu lakhe esandleni sesitha." 
Psalms78:62 Wanikelela abantu bakhe esabuleni, wabila khulu ngelifa lakhe." 
Psalms78:63 Amasokanabo adliwa mlilo, iintombi zabo azange zivunyelwe irhalani." 
Psalms78:64 Abaphristi babo bawa ngesabula; abahlolokazi babo akhange balile. 
Psalms78:65 Nje-ke uSomandla wavuka inga uvuka ebuthongweni, njengengorho ebeyihlulwe liwayini," 
Psalms78:66 wahlula izitha zakhe ngokuzidedisa, wazithela ngeenhloni ezingapheliko." 
Psalms78:67 Walahla itende lakaJosefa, akhange akhethe ikoro ka-Efrayimu." 
Psalms78:68 Kodwana wakhetha ikoro yakwaJuda nentaba yeZiyoni ayithandako. 
Psalms78:69 Wakha indawakhe ecwengileko yaphakama nanjengephasi wayijamisela iinsekelo isiphelani. 
Psalms78:70 Wakhetha uDavida incekwakhe, wamsusa eembayeni zezimvu." 
Psalms78:71 Ekweluseni izimvukazi ezimunyisako, wamthatha bona eluse abantu bakhe uJakopo nelifa lakhe u-Israyeli." 
Psalms78:72 Wabelusa ngehliziyo eqotho, wabarhola ngekghono lesandla sakhe." 
Psalms79:1 Irhubo laka-Asafa. Awu Zimu, izizwe ziza elifeni lakho, zisilaphaze ithempeli lakho elicwengileko, zenze iJerusalema yaba marubhi." 
Psalms79:2 Zanikela iindumbu zeenceku zakho kobana zibe kukudla kweenyoni zomkayi, iye, inyama yabathembekileko bakho eembandaneni zommango." 
Psalms79:3 Zathulula iingazi zabo njengamanzi eJerusalema yoke, kwangabakhona obembelako." 
Psalms79:4 Sibe siphoqo sabomakhelwana bethu, isithuko nesinyefulo kilabo abasiphahlileko." 
Psalms79:5 Somnini, kuzabe kube nini? Uzakuthukuthela isiphelani na? Isikhwele sakho sizakuvutha njengomlilo na?" 
Psalms79:6 Thela ilaka lakho phezu kwabezizwe abangakwaziko naphezu kwemibuso engabizi ibizo lakho 
Psalms79:7 ngombana sebamdlile uJakopo bebarhayila nendawakhe yokuhlala. 
Psalms79:8 Ungasibeki amacala wekadeni, masinyana yehlisela umusakho kithi ngombana sehliswe khulu." 
Psalms79:9 Sisize, wena Zimu wesindiswethu, ngebanga ledumo lebizo lakho; sisindise, bewusithethelele izono zethu, ngenca yebizo lakho." 
Psalms79:10 Kubayini bezizwe kufuze bathi: “Uphi uZimabo loyo na?” Yenza bona izizwe zazi ukubuyiselelwa kweengazi zeenceku zakho ezathululwako begodu nathi usibonise lokho. 
Psalms79:11 Ukububula kweembotjhwa akufike phambi kwakho; ngamandla wengalwakho, tjhaphulula labo esele benganyelwe kukufa." 
Psalms79:12 Somandla, buyiselela esifubeni sabomakhelwana bethu isiphoqo abakuphoqe ngaso, iye, sibuyelelwe kalikhomba!" 
Psalms79:13 Thina sibabantu bakho, iye, umhlambi wedlelo lakho. Nje-ke, sizakuthokoza isiphelani, sikhulume ngedumo lakho iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana." 
Psalms80:1 Kumkhaleli; ngeTjhotjhanimu; ubufakazi; irhubo laka-Asafa. 
Psalms80:2 Yewusizwe melusi ka-Israyeli, wena orhola uJosefa njengomhlambi! Wena ohlala phezu kwamakerubhi, ziveze ngephazimulo" 
Psalms80:3 phambi kwaka-Efrayimi, uBhenjamini noManase. Vuselela amandlakho, uze uzosisindisa." 
Psalms80:4 Zimu, sibuyise! Khanyisa ubuso bakho, khona sizakusindiswa." 
Psalms80:5 Somnini, Zimu Mninimandlawoke, kuzabe kube nini unevunda ngemithandazo yabantu bakho na?" 
Psalms80:6 Wabondla ngesikwa seenyembezi, wabaseza isiziba seenyembezi." 
Psalms80:7 Wasenza isihlekiso sabomakhelwana bethu nezitha zethu ziyasikokomeja. 
Psalms80:8 Zimu ongoPhezulu, sibuyise! Khanyisa ubuso bakho, khona sizakusindiswa." 
Psalms80:9 Wakhupha isidiribe eGibhide, waqotjha izizwe wasitjala." 
Psalms80:10 Wasilungisela indawaso, senabisa imirabhaso, sazala inarha." 
Psalms80:11 Iintaba zembeswa mthunzaso nemisedari emikhulu mirarelaso; 
Psalms80:12 sanabululela iingala zaso elwandle, amahlumelaso afika emilanjeni iYufrathe." 
Psalms80:13 Kubayini wephule iimbiyelo zaso, kuthi okudlulako kukhe koke na?" 
Psalms80:14 Iwotji yehlathi iyasitlhifirija neenkhakhabi zommango ziyadla. 
Psalms80:15 Awu, wena Zimu ongoPhezulu, yewubuyele kithi godu; usezulwini qala phasi ubone, unake isidiribesi," 
Psalms80:16 iye, ilungu owalitjala ngesidla sakho." 
Psalms80:17 Basitjhise ngomlilo isidiribeso, basiquntile basiwisela phasi. Kwanga bangabhubha ngokukhalima kobukhona bakho." 
Psalms80:18 Kodwana isandla sakho Somnini, asibe phezu kwaloyo ongesidleni sakho, iye, phezu kwaloyo ozikhulisele yena." 
Psalms80:19 Yeke, angeze sisaba ngabangathembekiko kuwe, sivuselele, khona sizakubabaza ibizo lakho." 
Psalms80:20 Somnini, Zimu ongoPhezulu, sibuyise! Khanyisa ubuso bakho, khona sizakusindiswa." 
Psalms81:1 Kumkhaleli; livunywa ngeenodo zeGathi; irhubo laka-Asafa. 
Psalms81:2 Hlokomelani uZimu omamandlethu ngokujabula, rhuwelelani uZimu kaJakopo." 
Psalms81:3 Vumani ingoma, nililise abosotjherere, nibethe iharibha elihle kanye nelincani." 
Psalms81:4 Vuthelani ipalapala ekuthwaseni kwenyanga, iye, nalokha inyanga ihlangene ngelanga lomnyanyethu." 
Psalms81:5 Lokho kusimiso ku-Israyeli, kumyalo kaZimu kaJakopo." 
Psalms81:6 UZimu wenza isimemezelo kuJosefa lokha narhwanta ngokujamelana neGibhide. Ngezwa ilimi ebengingalazi lithi: 
Psalms81:7 “Ngaphumuza ihlombe lakhe emthwalweni, ngasusa isandla sakhe esiqwebini.”" 
Psalms81:8 USomnini wathi: “Israyeli, lokha nawusesizini, wangibiza ngakuhlenga. Ngakuphendula ngisebumnyameni besiwuruwuru. ngakuzizinya emanzini weMeriba." 
Psalms81:9 Yizwani bantu bami, lokha nanginibonisako. Israyeli, kwanga ungangilalela!" 
Psalms81:10 Akungabikhona uzinyana phakathi kwakho, ungakhothameli usingazimu." 
Psalms81:11 Mina Somnini nginguZimakho owakwenyula enarheni yeGibhide. Khamisa umlomakho, ngizawuzalisa.”" 
Psalms81:12 Nje-ke uSomnini wathi: “Abantu bami akhange balalele ilizwi lami, u-Israyeli azange anginake." 
Psalms81:13 Ngalokho ngabaliselela ekanini yehliziywabo kobana bakhambe ngokubona kwabo! 
Psalms81:14 Kwanga abantu bami bangangizwa, inga u-Israyeli angakhamba eendleleni zami." 
Psalms81:15 Nje-ke bengizakuthobisa masinyana izitha zabo, isandla sami sihlanakele amanababo." 
Psalms81:16 Abazonde uSomnini bebazakutjhotjhobana phambi kwakhe, kube sisabelo sabo sanini nanini." 
Psalms81:17 USomnini bekazakupha ikoroyi ehle. Iye, mina Somnini bengizakusuthisa ngeenyosi zemadwaleni.”" 
Psalms82:1 Irhubo laka-Asafa. UZimu wajama ehlanganweni yezulwini kobana agwebe hlangana nabozinyana: 
Psalms82:2 Mina Somnini ngathi kibozinyana, “Kuzabe kube nini nigweba ngokungakalungi, nikhetha ubuso beenkhohlakali na?" 
Psalms82:3 Vikelani amalungelo wohluphekileko nentandani, niphathe isichaka nodududu ngokulunga." 
Psalms82:4 Hlengani ohluphekileko nokhwahlileko, nibenyule esandleni sabakhohlakeleko.”" 
Psalms82:5 “Kodwana abozinyana abanalwazi nokuzwisisa; bakhamba ebumnyameni; yeke zoke iinsekelo zephasi ziyasikinywa. 
Psalms82:6 Ngalokho mina ngathi, ‘Nina nibozinyana, ningaphasi kongoPhezulu noke nje." 
Psalms82:7 Nanyana nibozinyana, nizakufa njengabantu boke; niwe njengazo zoke iinduna.’ ”"

Psalms83:4 Ngabantu bakho balumba amano, bakha isicathana ngalabo obavikeleko." 
Psalms83:5 Bathi: “Izani sibaqedeni ukuze bangasabi sisizwe; ibizo laka-Israyeli lingasakhunjulwa.” 
Psalms83:6 Ngahliziyonye balumbisana amano, benza isivumelwano ngani:"

Psalms83:8 wakaGebali, ama-Amoni nama-Amalekhi, iFilistiya kanye nabahlali beTirosi."

Psalms83:10 Yenza kibo njengeMidiyaneni nanjengakuSisera noJabini emlanjaneni weKhitjhoni: 
Psalms83:11 Bona ababhubhela e-Eni-Dori, baba msuqwa ehlabathini."

Psalms83:13 okungibo ebebathi: “Asizithathele amadlelo kaZimu, abe lilifa lethu.”" 
Psalms83:14 Zimami, benze babe njengekhula elomileko, iye, njengamawunguwungu emuka nommoya." 
Psalms83:15 Njengomlilo otjhisa ihlathi nanjengelangabi elithungelela iintaba," 
Psalms83:16 ngendlela leyo bagijimise, ubarage ngesivunguvungu sakho, ubethuse ngesiwuruwuru sakho." 
Psalms83:17 Thela ubuso babo ngeenhloni ukuze bakwazi ukufuna ibizo lakho, Somnini." 
Psalms83:18 Benze barhubutjheke bebadane nini nanini; bakhene bebabhubhe.

Psalms84:1 Kumkhaleli; livunywa ngeenodo zeGathi; lamaKhorarhi; irhubo.

Psalms84:3 Umphefumulwami uyalangazelela, iye, ufisa ukuba sesirhodlweni sakaSomnini; ihliziywami nomzimbami ululukela uZimu ophilako." 
Psalms84:4 Zimami, Somnini, ngitjho nemirwibili ifunyene ikhaya ema-aldarinakho. Kosami, Mninimandlawoke, nekonjani ifunyene indlwanayo lapha ibeka khona amadzinyanayo." 
Psalms84:5 Babusisiwe abahlala endlinakho ngombana bakudumisa nini nanini. 
Psalms84:6 Babusisiwe abantu amandlabo akuwe, iye, labo abanhliziyo zinomendo weZiyoni."

Psalms84:11 Kwamambala, ilanga ngesirhodlweni sakho lihle kunamalanga ayikulungwana kenye indawo. Kungcono ngibe sembunjwaneni wendlu kaZimami, kunokuhlala ematendeni weenkhohlakali" 
Psalms84:12 ngombana uSomnini uZimu ulilanga nesihlangu; iye, upha umusa nokuhlonipheka. Ayikho into ehle ayigodlako kilabo abakhamba ngobuqotho."

Psalms85:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lamaKhorarhi. 
Psalms85:2 Somnini, wabonisa umusa enarhenakho, wabuyisa itjhudu lakaJakopo." 
Psalms85:3 Wacolela amacala wabantu bakho, wasibekela zoke izono zabo." 
Psalms85:4 Wasusa yoke itukuthelwakho, waphenduka ekuvutheni kwelaka lakho." 
Psalms85:5 Nje-ke, Zimu wesindiswethu, buyela kithi godu, bamba ukusilingeka kwakho phezu kwethu."

Psalms85:7 Wena awuzukusivuselela godu ukuze abantu bakho bathabe kuwe na? 
Psalms85:8 Sitjengise ukwethembeka kwakho, Somnini, usiphe isindiswakho." 
Psalms85:9 Ngifuna ukuzwa lokho uZimu uSomnini azakutjho ngombana uzakukhuluma ukuthula ebantwini, iye, kwabathembekileko bakhe. Bangabuyeli ebudlhayeleni!"

Psalms85:14 Ukulunga kuzakukhamba phambi kwakhe, kwenzele iinyawo zakhe umzila." 
Psalms86:1 Umthandazo kaDavida. Beka indlebakho Somnini, ungiphendule ngombana ngisichaka begodu ngiswele." 
Psalms86:2 Londa ipilwami ngombana ngingothembekileko. Wena unguZimami, sindisa incekwakho ekwethembako." 
Psalms86:3 Ngirhawukele Somandla ngombana ilanga loke ngilila kuwe. 
Psalms86:4 Thabisa umphefumulo wencekwakho ngombana ngilangazelela wena, Somandla." 
Psalms86:5 Mbala, wena Somandla ulungile begodu uyacolela, ukwethembeka kwakho kukhulu kibo boke abalila kuwe." 
Psalms86:6 Somnini, lalela umthandazwami, ubeke indlebe esililweni sesibawo sami." 
Psalms86:7 Ngelanga lesizi lami ngilila kuwe ngombana uyangiphendula. 
Psalms86:8 Kibo boke abozinyana akakho onjengawe Somandla nemisebenzi enjengeyakho ayikho. 
Psalms86:9 Zoke izizwe ozenzileko Somnini, zizakuza ziguqe phambi kwakho, zidumise ibizo lakho"

Psalms86:11 Ngifundise indlelakho Somnini, ukuze ngikhambe eqinisweni lakho; ngiphe ihliziyo epheleleko ukuze ngesabe ibizo lakho."

Psalms86:13 ngombana ukwethembeka kwakho kukhulu kimi: Watjhaphulula umphefumulwami emgodini wokufa. 
Psalms86:14 Zimu, iindeleli zingivukele, ijima leendlova lizumana nepilwami begodu wena azikubeki ndawo." 
Psalms86:15 Kodwana wena Somandla, unguZimu onomusa nesirhawu, ubuthaka ekusilingekeni, uzele ukwethembeka neqiniso." 
Psalms86:16 Phendukela kimi ungirhawukele! Qinisa incekwakho ngamandlakho, usindise indodana yencekukazakho." 
Psalms86:17 Ngibonise iphawu lesisa sakho ukuze abangizondako badane nababona wena Somnini ungisiza, ungiduduza."

Psalms88:1 Ingoma; irhubo lamaKhorarhi; kumkhaleli; ngeMarhalathi; ngokudlhegana; iMaskili; lakaHemani umEzrarhi.

Psalms88:7 Ungibeke ekuzikeni komgodi, eendaweni zobumnyama obutjhingako."

Psalms88:18 Kungizombe njengamanzi imini yoke, kungizombeleze mahlangothi woke." 
Psalms88:19 Wenze bona abangithandako nabomakhelwana bangihlubuke, iinhlobo zami sese kubumnyama."

Psalms89:1 IMaskili laka-Etani umEzrarhi. 
Psalms89:2 Ngizakuvuma ngezenzo zokwethembeka kwakaSomnini nini nanini. Somnini, ngomlomami ngizakumemezela ubuqotho bakho iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana." 
Psalms89:3 Ngambala, ngizakumemezela ngithi: Ukwethembeka kwakho kunzinze isiphelani, uqinise ubuqotho bakho emazulwini."

Psalms89:5 ‘Isizukulwana sakho ngizasiqinisa isiphelani, nginzinzise isihlalo sakho sobukhosi iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana.’ ”" 
Psalms89:6 Iindalwa zezulu azidumise iimangaliso zakho, Somnini; iye, ubuqotho bakho ehlanganweni yabacwengileko" 
Psalms89:7 ngombana hlangana nabaphezulu ngubani ongalinganiswa noSomnini? Iye, ngubani ongafaniswa noSomnini phakathi kwabozinyana?" 
Psalms89:8 USomnini unguZimu osabekako ebandla labacwengileko; mkhulu uyababazeka kibo boke abamzombelezileko. 
Psalms89:9 Somnini, Zimu Mninimandlawoke, ngubani onamandla njengawe? Somnini, ubuqotho bakho bukuzombelezile." 
Psalms89:10 Wena ulawula ilwandle naliphakamako; uthulise amadlambalo nakhiphizelako. 
Psalms89:11 Wena wahlaba uRahabu bewamtshidlha; wahlakaza izitha zakho ngengalwakho enamandla. 
Psalms89:12 Amazulu angawakho nephasi ngelakho; wanzinzisa umhlaba nakho koke okukiwo. 
Psalms89:13 Wena wadala itlhagu nesewula; iTabori neRherimoni ziyahlokoma ebizweni lakho. 
Psalms89:14 Ingalwakho ineenkhwepha, isandla sakho sinamandla, isidla sakho siphakamile." 
Psalms89:15 Ukulunga nobulungiswa kusisekelo sesihlalo sakho sobukhosi; ukwethembeka neqiniso kukhamba phambi kwakho. 
Psalms89:16 Somnini, babusisiwe abantu abazi umkhosi womgidi, labo abakhamba emkhanyweni wobukhona bakho." 
Psalms89:17 Ilanga loke bahlokoma ngebizo lakho begodu baphakamisa ukulunga kwakho. 
Psalms89:18 Mbala, uyiphazimulo yamandlethu, ngomusakho idumo lethu liphakamile." 
Psalms89:19 Umbusi osihlangu sethu, ungowakaSomnini, iye, ubabethu ungowoCwengileko ka-Israyeli." 
Psalms89:20 Kothembekileko wakho wakhe wakhuluma ngombono wathi: “Ngibeke isihlohlo phezu kwengorho, ngaphakamisa loyo okhethwe ebantwini." 
Psalms89:21 Ngifumene incekwami uDavida, ngamzesa ngamafuthami acwengileko." 
Psalms89:22 Isandla sami sizakuhlala simsekele begodu ingalwami izamqinisa. 
Psalms89:23 Akunasitha esizamhlula nesikhohlakali angeze samthobisa. 
Psalms89:24 Ngizakuqova amanabakhe phambi kwakhe, ngimadlhe phasi labo abamzondileko." 
Psalms89:25 Ubuqotho nokwethembeka kwami kuzakuba naye; ngebizo lami idumo lakhe lizakuphakanyiswa. 
Psalms89:26 Ngizakubeka isandla sakhe phezu kwelwandle nesidla sakhe phezu kwemilambo. 
Psalms89:27 Uzangibiza ngokuthi, ‘UnguBaba, unguZimami, nedwala lesindiswami.’" 
Psalms89:28 Ngizamenza izibulo lami, iye, ongehla kwamakhosi wephasi." 
Psalms89:29 Ngizamgcinela ukwethembeka kwami isiphelani, isivumelwano sami naye sizakuhlala siqinile." 
Psalms89:30 Ngizakujamisa isizukulwana sakhe nini nanini, iye, nobukhosi bakhe, ije izulu lisekhona." 
Psalms89:31 “Nakube abantwabakhe bahlubuka umthethwami begodu bangakhambi ngeemfundiso zami," 
Psalms89:32 nalokha nabalulaza neemiso zami begodu bangagcini imiyalwami," 
Psalms89:33 ngizokuphobola ngentonga iimphambeko zabo namacalabo ngamatshwenyeko. 
Psalms89:34 Kodwana angekhe ngasusa ukwethembeka kwami kuye namkha ngiphambukise ubuqotho bami. 
Psalms89:35 Isivumelwano sami asobe ngasilulaza, namkha ngijikele ilizwi engilikhulumileko." 
Psalms89:36 Ngafunga kwaba kanye ngokucwengeka kwami, angeze ngamkhohlisa uDavida:" 
Psalms89:37 Isizukulwana sakhe sizakujama nini nanini, isihlalo sakhe sinzinze phambi kwami njengelanga," 
Psalms89:38 sizakudzimelela isiphelani njengenyezi ebufakazi obuqinileko esibhakabhakeni.” 
Psalms89:39 Kodwana wena Zimu, kwanjesi umlahlile, wamala. Uvuthe ngelaka lakho kumzeswakho," 
Psalms89:40 wajikela isivumelwano sakho nencekwakho, wabhutjhabhutjha isihlohlo sayo ehlabathini." 
Psalms89:41 Uphundluse yoke imithangalayo, wenza iimphephelo zayo zaba liququ." 
Psalms89:42 Boke abadlula ngendlela bayayiphanga; seyiphenduke isiphoqo sabomakhelwana. 
Psalms89:43 Uphakamise isidla samanabayo, wenza zoke izitha zayo zathakasa" 
Psalms89:44 begodu uphendulele ubukhali besabulayo, iye, epini akhange uyisekele." 
Psalms89:45 Ususe isithunzi sayo, waradlha phasi isihlalo sayo sobukhosi." 
Psalms89:46 Urhunyeze amalanga wobutjha bayo, wayithela ngeenhloni." 
Psalms89:47 Kuzabe kube nini Somnini uzifihla? Ilaka lakho livutha njengomlilo isiphelani na? 
Psalms89:48 Khumbula bona ukuphila kwami kungangani: Boke abantu owabadalako imihla yabo mifitjhani. 
Psalms89:49 Ngubani ongaphila angasaboni ukufa? Ngubani ongasinda emandleni wethuna na? 
Psalms89:50 Somandla, kuphi ukwethembeka kwakho kwakade owafunga ngakho ngobuqotho bakho kuDavida na?" 
Psalms89:51 Somandla, khumbula isiphoqo seenceku zakho engisethwele ngaphakathi kwami; khumbula zoke izizwekazi" 
Psalms89:52 eziphoqakwezi, iye, Somnini, izitha zakho eziphoqa amabhadu wozesiweko wakho." 
Psalms89:53 Akadunyiswe uSomnini nini nanini! Amen, iye, Amen." 
Psalms90:1 Umthandazo kaMosi, umuntu kaZimu. Somandla, wena ube siphephelo sethu iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana!" 
Psalms90:2 Wena bewunguZimu nini nanini, iintaba zingakabi khona, iye, ungakavezi iphasi nelizwe." 
Psalms90:3 Ubuyisela obhubhako ethulini ngokuthi kwaphela: “Buyani nina bantu.” 
Psalms90:4 Ngambala, emehlwenakho iminyaka eyikulungwana injengelanga linye, iye, ilanga layizolo elidlulileko; ifana nesikhathi sinye somlindo wobusuku." 
Psalms90:5 Wena uqeda abantu, ekuseni baba njengobuthongo obudlulileko; babe njengotjani obuphelako:" 
Psalms90:6 Iye, ekuseni buyahluma, kodwana ntambama buphetha ngokutjhwaba, bubune." 
Psalms90:7 Itukuthelwakho iyasiqothula, ubukhali bakho buyasethusa." 
Psalms90:8 Wena ubeke amacalethu phambi kwakho, iye, okufihliweko phambi kwakho emkhanyweni." 
Psalms90:9 Amalangethu ayaphela ngelaka lakho neminyakethu siyiphetha ngokububula. 
Psalms90:10 Iminyaka yokuphila kwethu imatjhumi alikhomba, nasiqinileko ibe matjhumi abunane; kodwana ubuhle bayo bunobudisi nesizi. Mbala iminyakethu idlula masinyana bese thina siyaphapha semuke." 
Psalms90:11 Ngubani owazi amandla wetukuthelwakho, njengombana ilaka lakho lilikhulu, lifana nokwesabeka kwakho na?" 
Psalms90:12 Somnini, sifundise ukubala amalangethu ukuze sizuze ihliziyo enokuhlakanipha." 
Psalms90:13 Buya Somnini! Kuzabe kube nini na? Tlhuwela iinceku zakho. 
Psalms90:14 Ekuseni yewusisuthise ngokwethembeka kwakho ukuze sithabe, sename emalangenethu woke." 
Psalms90:15 Siphe amalanga wokujabula, abe ngangalawo owasibetha ngawo; iye, njengeminyakeni esabona ngayo okumbi." 
Psalms90:16 Umsebenzakho awubonakale eencekwini zakho nephazimulwakho ebantwaneni bazo. 
Psalms90:17 Somandla, Zimethu, kwanga isisa sakho singaba phezu kwethu! Nzinzisa umsebenzi wezandla zethu, iye, uqinise umsebenzi wezandla zethu." 
Psalms91:1 Umuntu ohlezi ekusithekeni kongoPhezulu nokhosele emthunzini woSabekako," 
Psalms91:2 uthi kuSomnini: “Ubuphephelo bami nerholo lami, uZimami engimethembako.”" 
Psalms91:3 Ngambala yena uyakuhlenga esifwini somthiyi, iye, kubhubhani orhayilako." 
Psalms91:4 Ukufihla ngeensiba zakhe, ngaphasi kwamaphikwakhe ufunyana ubuphephelo, ubuqotho bakhe busihlangu nomthangala." 
Psalms91:5 Angeze wesaba ukwesabeka kobusuku namkha imisubela ephapha emini," 
Psalms91:6 nanyana ubhubhani ogega ebumnyameni, iye, umbulalazwe obhubhisa emini ekulu." 
Psalms91:7 Ikulungwana ingawa eqadi kwakho, ngitjho netjhumi leenkulungwana ngesidleni sakho, kodwana ubhubhani angeze ehlela kuwe." 
Psalms91:8 Uzamqala kwaphela ngamehlwakho, ubone ukubuyiselelwa kweenkhohlakali." 
Psalms91:9 Ngambala wena Somnini usiphephelo sami! Nakube wenze ongoPhezulu isiphephelo sakho," 
Psalms91:10 akunabumbi obuzakwehlela nemikhokha ezakutjhidela etendeni lakho. 
Psalms91:11 Mbala, uzakuyala iingilozi zakhe ngawe, zikulonde eendleleni zoke zakho;" 
Psalms91:12 zikuthwale ngezandla zazo ukuze inyawo lakho lingakhutjwa lilitje. 
Psalms91:13 Uzakubhadula phezu kwebhubezi nephiphi, ugadange ibhubezana nenyoka." 
Psalms91:14 USomnini uthi: “Ongikhathalelako ngizamsindisa, ngimvikele ngombana wazi ibizo lami." 
Psalms91:15 Lokha nangibizako ngizamphendula; ngibe naye eensizini, ngimhlenge bengimuphe idumo." 
Psalms91:16 Ngizamsuthisa ngepilo ede, ngimbonise isindiswami.”" 
Psalms92:1 Irhubo; ingoma yelanga leSabatha. 
Psalms92:2 Kuhle ukuthokoza uSomnini, iye, ukudumisa ibizo lakho, wena ongoPhezulu," 
Psalms92:3 ukumemezela ukwethembeka kwakho ekuseni nobuqotho bakho ebusuku," 
Psalms92:4 ngomkenenezo weharibha leenara ezilitjhumi nangomvumo weharibhana. 
Psalms92:5 Ngambala, ungithokozisile ngomsebenzakho, Somnini, ngezenzo zezandla zakho ngizakuhlokoma." 
Psalms92:6 Maye, zikulu izenzo zakho Somnini! Imicabangwakho uthi izikile na!" 
Psalms92:7 Isiyila angekhe sakwazi lokhu nesidlhadlha angeze sazwisisa:
