Psalms92:8 Iinkhohlakali zihluma njengotjani neengilamkhuba ziyaqhakaza, kobana zibhujiswe isiphelani." 
Psalms92:9 Wena Somnini, nini nanini uphakeme," 
Psalms92:10 kodwana izitha zakho, Somnini, iye, izitha zakho, qala ziyabhubha; mbala, iingilamkhuba ziyahlakazwa." 
Psalms92:11 Wena uphakamise idumo lami njengephondo leliza, wangithambisa ngamanyephe amatjha." 
Psalms92:12 Amehlwami abonile ukuwa kwamanabami neendlebe zami zizwile ukubhubha kwabajamelani bami. 
Psalms92:13 Abalungileko bahluma njengomdubi, bakhule njengomsedari weLibhanoni." 
Psalms92:14 Bona batjalwe ngendlini kaSomnini, bahluma esirhodlweni sakaZimethu." 
Psalms92:15 Nebudaleni babo basathela iinthelo, balihlaza begodu bahlala baqhakazile" 
Psalms92:16 ukuze batjengise bona uSomnini wethembekile. Yena ulidwala lami begodu akunabukhohlakali kuye. 
Psalms93:1 USomnini uyabusa, wembethe iphazimulo; uvunule bewazithekeleza amandla! Ngalokho wanzinzisa iphasi, nje-ke angeze lanyakaziswa." 
Psalms93:2 Somnini, isihlalo sakho sobukhosi sinzinze mandulondulo; wena ungowanini nanini." 
Psalms93:3 Amanzi amanengi aphakamile, Somnini, iye, iinkhukhula ziphakamise iphimbo lazo; mbala, amalwandle aphakamise ukubhodla kwawo." 
Psalms93:4 Kodwana ngaphezu kwetjhada lamanzi amanengi, iye, itjhada lamadlambi welwandle anamandla, kunoSomnini phezulu onamandla." 
Psalms93:5 Ubufakazi besivumelwano sakho bethembakele khulu, ukucwengeka kuyifanele indlwakho Somnini, bekube nini nanini." 
Psalms94:1 Zimu obuyiselelako, Somnini, iye, wena Zimu obuyiselelako, khanya ngokudarhileko!" 
Psalms94:2 Sikima wena mgwebi wephasi, uphe abazitjhayako okubafaneleko!" 
Psalms94:3 Somnini, kuzabe kube nini iinkhohlakali ziziphakamisa, iye, kuzabe kube nini zidlondlobala na?" 
Psalms94:4 Zikhuluma ngamaganyana wokuzitjhaya iye, zoke iingilamkhuba ziyazikhakhazisa." 
Psalms94:5 Ziqova abantu bakho, Somnini, zigandelela ilifa lakho." 
Psalms94:6 Zibulala umhlolokazi nesikhonzi, iye, zitjhabalalisa iintandani," 
Psalms94:7 zibuye zithi: “USomnini akaboni; uZimu kaJakopo akanaki.” 
Psalms94:8 Yelelani nina bantu abalibeleko! Nina ndlhayela ndina, nizakuhlakanipha nini?" 
Psalms94:9 Owanameka indlebe, akezwa na? Owahlomela ilihlo, akaboni na?" 
Psalms94:10 Okhalimela bezizwe, akabethi na? Mbala ofundisa umuntu ilwazi," 
Psalms94:11 unguSomnini owazi imicabango yomuntu kobana ililize lakolize. 
Psalms94:12 Ubusisiwe omkhalimelako Somnini; iye, loyo omfundisa ngomthethwakho" 
Psalms94:13 ukuze umnikele ukuphumula emalangeni amambi, ukufikela lapha isikhohlakali senjelwa khona umgodi." 
Psalms94:14 Ngambala, uSomnini angeze abatjhiye abantu bakhe, angeze alilahla ilifa lakhe." 
Psalms94:15 Iye, ubulungiswa buzakubuyela kwabalungileko nabaqotho ngehliziyo bazabulandela." 
Psalms94:16 Ngathi: “Ngubani ozangijamela kabenza okumbi? Ngubani ozangenyela eengilamkhubeni na?” 
Psalms94:17 Ngathana uSomnini akhange angisize, ngabe sengibalwa nabaleleko." 
Psalms94:18 Nangidlumbana bonyana inyawo lami liyatjhelela, ukwethembeka kwakho, Somnini, kwangisekela." 
Psalms94:19 Lokha imikhumbulwami nayihlubayezeka khulu, induduzwakho ivuselela umphefumulwami." 
Psalms94:20 Wena angeze waba nehlanganyelo nabagwebi abakhohlakeleko, labo ababumba okumbi ngokujamelana nomthetho." 
Psalms94:21 Baluka ilisu ngepilo yolungileko, balahle onganacala ngesigwebo sokufa." 
Psalms94:22 Kodwana uSomnini ube lirholo lami, iye, uZimami olidwala lobuphephelo bami." 
Psalms94:23 USomnini uzababuyiselela ngesono sabo, abathanyele ngobukhohlakali babo; iye, uSomnini uZimethu uzabathanyela." 
Psalms95:1 Yenize sihlokomele uSomnini; iye, sihlokomalele iDwala lesindiswethu!" 
Psalms95:2 Asitjhideleni phambi kwakhe ngokuthokoza, simhlokomalele ngeengoma!" 
Psalms95:3 Mbala, uSomnini unguZimu omkhulu nombusi omkhulu ngaphezu kwabozinyana." 
Psalms95:4 Esandleni sakhe uphethe ukuzika kwephasi, iinqongo zeentaba nazo zingezakhe." 
Psalms95:5 Ilwandle lingelakhe ngombana walenza nezandla zakhe zabumba indawo eyomileko. 
Psalms95:6 Yizani simlotjhe simkhothamele, siguqe phambi kwakaSomnini umenzethu!" 
Psalms95:7 Mbala, yena unguZimethu, thina sibabantu bedlelo lakhe nomhlambi wesandla sakhe. Namhlanje kwanga ningalalela iphimbo lakhe ngombana wathi:" 
Psalms95:8 “Ningaqinisi iinhliziyo zenu njengeMeriba nanjengelangeni lelo eMasa, erhalawumbeni," 
Psalms95:9 lapha aboyihlomkhulu bangizizinya khona, bangilinga nanyana besele babonile umsebenzami." 
Psalms95:10 Iminyaka ematjhumi amane isizukulwaneso sangikghabhudlha. Nje-ke ngathi, ‘Sibabantu abaphambene ngehliziyo, neendlela zami asiziyeleli.’" 
Psalms95:11 Ngalokho ngafunga elakeni lami ngathi, ‘Angeze bangene ekuphumuleni kwami.’ ”" 
Psalms96:1 Vumani ingoma etja kuSomnini; iphasi loke alivumele uSomnini! 
Psalms96:2 Vumelani uSomnini, nidumise ibizo lakhe, nilethe iindaba ezimnandi zesindiswakhe imihla ngemihla." 
Psalms96:3 Memezelani iphazimulwayo ezizweni neemangaliso zayo hlangana nabantu boke. 
Psalms96:4 Mbala mkhulu uSomnini begodu kumele adunyiswe ngamandla. Yena wesatjwa ngaphezu kwabozinyana boke 
Psalms96:5 ngombana abosingazimu babantu baziinthombe nje kwaphela. USomnini wawenza amazulu," 
Psalms96:6 ukuhlonitjhwa nobukhosi kuphambi kwakhe, iye, amandla nephazimulo kusethempelini lakhe." 
Psalms96:7 Lethani kuSomnini nina nkoro zezizwe; iye, lethani kuSomnini idumo namandla." 
Psalms96:8 Lethani kuSomnini idumo elifanele ibizo lakhe; lethani iminikelo, ningene esirhodlweni sethempeli lakhe." 
Psalms96:9 Lotjhani uSomnini ekucwengeni kwephazimulwakhe; iphasi loke alithuthumele phambi kwakhe. 
Psalms96:10 Memezelani ezizweni nithi: “USomnini uyabusa! Ilizwe lihlezi lanzinza, angeze lanyakaziswa. Uzakugweba izizwe ngokufaneleko.”" 
Psalms96:11 Amazulu akathabe, iphasi lijabule, ilwandle lihlokome nakho koke okukilo." 
Psalms96:12 Ummango awusase nakho koke okukiwo, yoke imithi yehlathi ihlokome" 
Psalms96:13 phambi kwakaSomnini ngombana uyeza, iye, uyeza bona azokugweba iphasi. Uzakugweba ilizwe ngokulunga nezizwe ngeqiniso lakhe." 
Psalms97:1 USomnini uyabusa; iphasi alijabule, iye, zoke iinarha ezingaphetjheya zithabe!" 
Psalms97:2 Amafu nobumnyama kumphahlile; ukulunga nobulungiswa kusisekelo sesihlalo sakhe sobukhosi. 
Psalms97:3 Phambi kwakhe kukhamba umlilo oqothula amanabakhe mazombe. 
Psalms97:4 Imibanakhe ibaneka ilizwe; iphasi libone lokho lithuthumele. 
Psalms97:5 Iintaba zincithika njengamanyephe phambi kwakaSomnini, iye, ngebanga lobukhona bomnikazi wephasi loke." 
Psalms97:6 Amazulu amemezela ukulunga kwakhe nezizwe zoke zibona iphazimulwakhe. 
Psalms97:7 Boke abalotjhi bemifanekiso bakhenile, iye, labo abazigqaja ngeenthombe zabo. Boke abosingazimu bayaguqa phambi kwakhe." 
Psalms97:8 IZiyoni nalizwa lokho liyajabula nemizi yakwaJuda iyathaba, iye, ngebanga leengwebo zakho, Zimu." 
Psalms97:9 Mbala wena Somnini, ephasini loke uphakeme, kibozinyana boke, ungehla khulu." 
Psalms97:10 USomnini uthanda abazonde ubumbi, welusa amaphilo wabathembekileko bakhe, abahlenge esandleni seenkhohlakali." 
Psalms97:11 Umkhanyo usabalele kwabalungileko nokwenama kungokwabaqotho ngehliziyo. 
Psalms97:12 Thakasani kuSomnini nina abalungileko, nithokoze ibizo lakhe elicwengileko!" 
Psalms98:1 Irhubo. Vumani ingoma etja kuSomnini ngombana wenze iimangaliso. Isidla sakhe nengalwakhe ecwengileko kumlethele ukuhlula. 
Psalms98:2 USomnini uzwakalise ukuhlula kwakhe, wembule isigwebo sakhe phambi kwezizwe." 
Psalms98:3 Wakhumbula ukwethembeka nobuqotho bakhe endlini ka-Israyeli. Imikhawulo yoke yephasi yabona ukuhlula kwakaSomnini. 
Psalms98:4 Hlokomelani uSomnini nina bephasi loke! Thabani nihlokome begodu nirhube! 
Psalms98:5 Rhubelani uSomnini ngeharibhana, iye, ngeharibha nomvumo." 
Psalms98:6 Hlokomani phambi kwakaSomnini umbusi ngeemporompita nomdumo wepalapala. 
Psalms98:7 Ilwandle alirhube nokugcwala kwalo, iphasi lidume nabahlali balo," 
Psalms98:8 iinkhukhula ziphorome, iintaba zihlokome kanyekanye" 
Psalms98:9 phambi kwakaSomnini ngombana uyeza uzokugweba iphasi; iye, agwebe ilizwe ngokulunga nezizwe ngokufaneleko." 
Psalms99:1 USomnini uyabusa, izizwe azithuthumele. Uhlezi phezu kwamakerubhi, iphasi alidengezele." 
Psalms99:2 USomnini mkhulu eZiyoni, wengamele izizwe zoke." 
Psalms99:3 Yeke, ibizo lakhe elesabekako alidunyiswe zizizwe. Mbala yena ucwengile!" 
Psalms99:4 Somnini onamandla, mthandi wobulungiswa, wena wabeka ukuhleleka, wenza ubulungiswa nokulunga kwaJakopo." 
Psalms99:5 Phakamisani uSomnini uZimethu; mlotjheni ebunabelweni beenyawo zakhe. Mbala, yena ucwengile!" 
Psalms99:6 UMosi no-Aroni bebaphakathi kwabaphristi bakhe noSamyela kilabo ababiza ibizo lakhe. Nabalilela uSomnini wabezwa; 
Psalms99:7 wakhuluma nabo asesikeni yelifu. Bona balonda ubufakazi neemiso abanikela zona. 
Psalms99:8 Somnini, Zimethu, wabaphendula; waba nguZimu ocolelako kibo, nanyana wababetha ngezono zabo." 
Psalms99:9 Phakamisani uSomnini uZimethu; mlotjheni entabenakhe ecwengileko. Mbala, uSomnini uZimethu ucwengile!" 
Psalms100:1 Irhubo lokuthokoza. Hlokomelani uSomnini nina bephasi loke! 
Psalms100:2 Lotjhani uSomnini ngokuthaba, nize phambi kwakhe ngehlokomo." 
Psalms100:3 Yazini bona uSomnini unguZimu. Nguye owasidalako, singebakhe; thina sibabantu bakhe nefuyo yedlelo lakhe." 
Psalms100:4 Ngenani emasangwenakhe ngokuthokoza nesirhodlweni sakhe ngokudumisa; mthokozeni, nibabaze ibizo lakhe!" 
Psalms100:5 Mbala, uSomnini ulungile, ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani nobuqotho bakhe iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana." 
Psalms101:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Ngizakukhalela ngokwethembeka nangokulunga, ngokurhubela wena, Somnini." 
Psalms101:2 Iye, ngizakuyelela indlela epheleleko. Uzakuza nini kimi na? Ngizakukhambakhamba ngesigodlweni sami ngehliziyo eqotho." 
Psalms101:3 Angekhe ngabekezelela ubukhohlakali phambi kwami. Ngiyayizonda indlela yeemphambeko; angeze ngathatheka ngayo. 
Psalms101:4 Ngizakuba kude nehliziyo eneengwegwe; angeze ngaba nendaba nokumbi. 
Psalms101:5 Loyo ohleba umuntu, ngizamthulisa. Amehlo azitjhayako nehliziyo ezikhukhumezako angeze ngayamukela." 
Psalms101:6 Ngikhetha abaqotho enarheni ukuze bakwazi ukuphila nami; okhamba endleleni epheleleko nguye ongangisebenzela; 
Psalms101:7 owenza ikohlakalo angekhe ahlala esigodlweni sami; okhuluma amanga angeze ajama phambi kwami. 
Psalms101:8 Imihla ngemihla ekuseni ngizakuthulisa iinkhohlakali enarheni, ngisuse zoke iingilamkhuba emzini kaSomnini." 
Psalms102:1 Umthandazo wohluphekileko lokha abuthakathaka godu abubula phambi kwakaSomnini. 
Psalms102:2 Somnini, yizwa umthandazwami; ilizwi lesililo sami alifike kuwe." 
Psalms102:3 Ungafihli ubuso bakho kimi elangeni lesizi lami; beka indlebakho kimi mhlana ngikubizako; ungiphendule masinyana! 
Psalms102:4 Iye, amalangami aphela njengentuthu namathambami avutha njengomlilo eziko." 
Psalms102:5 Ihliziywami iwohlokile begodu ibune njengotjani; sese ngibuthakathaka kobana ngingadla. 
Psalms102:6 Ngebanga lokuquma kwami sese ngikhehlile, ngimathambo." 
Psalms102:7 Nginjengegubulu lerhalawumba nanjengesirhulurhulu semarubhini. 
Psalms102:8 Nangileleko ngiyaphilelwa, nginjengenyoni ehlezi yodwa ephahleni." 
Psalms102:9 Ilanga loke izitha zami ziyangiphoqa; abangithukako bahlolozela ngami. 
Psalms102:10 Ngikhuma umlotha inga ngidla isikwa, ngivange isiselo sami neenyembezi," 
Psalms102:11 ngebanga lobukhali nelaka lakho, iye, ungithethe wangifuthela eqadi." 
Psalms102:12 Amalangami anjengethunzi entambama, ngiyabuna njengotjani." 
Psalms102:13 Kodwana wena Somnini, unobukhosi banini nanini, isinanazelo sakho ngeseenzukulwana ngeenzukulwana." 
Psalms102:14 Yewusikime ngokwakho urhawukele iZiyoni! Kusikhathi somusa ngalo, iye, isikhathi esibekiweko sifikile" 
Psalms102:15 ngombana iinceku zakho ziyawabuka amatje walo begodu zitlhuwela ithuli leZiyonelo. 
Psalms102:16 Izizwe zizalesaba ibizo lakaSomnini, idumo lakhe lihlonitjhwe makhosi woke wephasi" 
Psalms102:17 lokha navuselela iZiyoni. Uzazibonakalisa asephazimulwenakhe," 
Psalms102:18 anake umthandazo wabahlubule begodu angekhe asinyaze isibawo sabo. 
Psalms102:19 Mbala, lokhu kuzakutlolwa phasi kube ngokwesizukulwana esizako nesizwe esizakudaleka sizakudumisa uSomnini" 
Psalms102:20 lokha nasele asiqalile aphezulu ekucwengeni, iye, lokha uSomnini nasele aqale phasi asezulwini," 
Psalms102:21 ukuze alalele ukububula kweembotjhwa nokutjhaphulula labo esele benganyelwe kukufa. 
Psalms102:22 Ibizo lakaSomnini lizakumenyezelwa eZiyoni nedumo lakhe eJerusalema," 
Psalms102:23 lokha abantu nababuthana ndawonye, ngitjho nemibuso ukuze balotjhe uSomnini." 
Psalms102:24 USomnini waqeda amandlami ngisesephakathi kwendlela yepilo, iye, warhunyeza amalangami." 
Psalms102:25 Ngebangelo ngiyancenga ngithi: “Zimami, ungangisusi ngisesephakathi kwamalangami.” Iminyakakho iseenzukulwaneni ngeenzukulwana." 
Psalms102:26 Wabeka iinsekelo zephasi emandulo namazulu amsebenzi wezandla zakho. 
Psalms102:27 Zona izintwezo zizakubhubha, kodwana wena ujamile. Iye, koke lokho kuzakuphela njengengubo; mbala, njengesambatho uzakukuphendulela, ngalokho kuzakuphela." 
Psalms102:28 Kodwana wena unguwe njalo, iminyakakho ayinamkhawulo." 
Psalms102:29 Abantwana beenceku zakho, bazakuhlala baphephile. Iinzukulwana zabo zizakunzinza phambi kwakho." 
Psalms103:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Dumisa uSomnini mphefumulwami! Iye, koke okuphakathi kwami akudumise ibizo lakhe elicwengileko." 
Psalms103:2 Dumisa uSomnini mphefumulwami! Soke isirhawu sakhe ungasikhohlwa! 
Psalms103:3 Yena olibalela woke amacalakho, elaphe zoke izifo zakho," 
Psalms103:4 okuhlenga uphephe emgodini wokufa, akubusise ngokwethembeka nangomusa," 
Psalms103:5 okuzalisa ngokuhle, kufikela lapha waneliseka khona; ubutjha bakho buvuseleleke njengekhozi." 
Psalms103:6 USomnini wenza okulungileko, boke abagandelelweko ubenzela ubulungiswa." 
Psalms103:7 Wazisa uMosi iindlela zakhe, iye, nama-Israyeli izenzo zakhe." 
Psalms103:8 USomnini unomusa nesirhawu, ubuthaka ekusilingekeni, uzele ukwethembeka." 
Psalms103:9 Akahlali asola; akanghaleli kwasafuthi. 
Psalms103:10 Akasiphathi njengokufanele izono zethu; akasibuyiseleli ngokulingene amacalethu. 
Psalms103:11 Njengokuphakama kwezulu ngehla kwephasi, kungako ukwethembeka kwakhe kwabamesabako." 
Psalms103:12 Njengepumalanga idedelene netjingalanga, ngokunjalo ususa iimphambeko zethu kithi." 
Psalms103:13 Njengoyise onesirhawu ebantwaneni bakhe noSomnini unesirhawu kangako kwabamesabako. 
Psalms103:14 Yena uyazi bona sibunjwe ngani, uyakhumbula bonyana silithuli nje." 
Psalms103:15 Amalanga wobhubhako anjengotjani: Uqhakaza njengelikhwa lommango," 
Psalms103:16 kodwana lokha ummoya nawulibethako, liyaphela, indawalo lingasayazi." 
Psalms103:17 Nokho ukwethembeka kwakaSomnini kungokwanini nanini kwabamesabako nokulunga kwakhe kungokweenzukulwana 
Psalms103:18 kilabo abalonda isivumelwano sakhe, iye, labo abakhumbula ukulandela ifundiswakhe." 
Psalms103:19 USomnini unzinzise isihlalo sakhe sobukhosi ezulwini; ubukhosi bakhe bengamele koke. 
Psalms103:20 Dumisani uSomnini nina ngilozi zakhe, iye, nina ngorho ezinamandla eziphelelisa imilaywakhe ngokulalela amezwi wephimbo lakhe!" 
Psalms103:21 Dumisani uSomnini nina noke mabuthwakhe, iye, nina nceku zakhe enenza intandwakhe!" 
Psalms103:22 Dumisani uSomnini nina noke mbunjwa zakhe eendaweni zoke azibusako. Dumisa uSomnini mphefumulwami! 
Psalms104:1 Dumisa uSomnini mphefumulwami! Somnini, Zimami, umkhulu khulu wena, wembethe ukuhlonitjhwa nobukhosi!" 
Psalms104:2 Yena ozisonga ngokukhanya njengengubo; ondlala amazulu njengetende," 
Psalms104:3 owakha amalawakhe angehla emanzini, amafu awenze ikaranakhe, akhambe phezu kwamaphiko wommoya." 
Psalms104:4 Yena owenza imimoya iinthunywa zakhe, umlilo namalangabi kube ziinsebenzi zakhe." 
Psalms104:5 Yena osekela iphasi phezu kweensekelo zalo ukuze lingasanyakaziswa nini nanini. 
Psalms104:6 Wena Somnini, wagubuzesa iphasi ngamanzi amanengi njengengubo, njengombana amanzi ajama ngehla kweentaba." 
Psalms104:7 Ngokukhalima kwakho abaleka, ngokuzwakala kokuduma kwakho asuka masinyana," 
Psalms104:8 anyukela eentabeni, agelezela phasi emikghotheni, endaweni owawajamisela yona." 
Psalms104:9 Wawabekela umkhawulo lapha angeze afahla khona; akhange asagubuzesa iphasi godu. 
Psalms104:10 USomnini wenza iiyalo ziphundluke emirhobeni; zigeleze hlangana neentaba," 
Psalms104:11 ziseze zoke iimbadana zenarha: Abodumbana bommango basuse ukoma kwabo; 
Psalms104:12 iinyoni zesibanga zizakhele ngehla kwamanzi, zibethe imilozi hlangana namakari wemithi." 
Psalms104:13 Uthelelela iintaba ngamanzi asemalawinakhe angehla, iphasi lanelisiwe ngeenthelo zemisebenzakhe." 
Psalms104:14 Yena omilisela ifuyo utjani neentjalo kobana abantu bazilime ukuze bavune ukudla ehlabathini: 
Psalms104:15 Iwayini elithokozisa ihliziyo yomuntu, amafutha we-oliva aphazimulisa ubuso nesikwa esiqinisa ihliziyo yobhubhako." 
Psalms104:16 Imithi yakaSomnini isezelwa kuhle, ngitjho nemisedari yeLibhanoni ayitjalileko," 
Psalms104:17 lapha iinyoni zakha khona iinhlakana; udoyi abe nendlwana emithini yomsayipurusi. 
Psalms104:18 Iintaba eziphakamileko zingezeembuzi zeentaba; amadwala alirharha leembila. 
Psalms104:19 Wenze inyezi kobana kuphawuleke iinkhathi nelanga elazi isikhathi sokutjhinga kwalo. 
Psalms104:20 Uletha ubumnyama kube busuku, khonapho kuphume zoke iinlwana zehlathi." 
Psalms104:21 Amabhubezana ayabhodla afune inyama, abawe ukudla kwawo kuZimu." 
Psalms104:22 Ilanga naliphumako, ayasithela, alale emadzabenawo." 
Psalms104:23 Umuntu uyaphuma aye emsebenzinakhe, iye, emtjhikatjhikeni bekuhlwe." 
Psalms104:24 Maye, minengi kangangani imisebenzakho Somnini! Yoke uyenze ngokuhlakanipha; iphasi ligcwele umnothwakho." 
Psalms104:25 Le, kunelwandle elikhulu begodu libanzi lendlalekile; ligcwele iwoma leemphili ezikhakhabako, iye, iindalwa ezinganakubalwa ezikulu nezincani." 
Psalms104:26 Kilo kukhamba iinthayamanzi nonomrhaso welwandle owamdalako; wamenza bona adlale kilo. 
Psalms104:27 Koke kuqalelele kuwe kobana ukuphe ukudla ngesikhathi. 
Psalms104:28 Lokha nawukunikela ukudla, kuyakudobha; nawuvula isandla sakho kwaneliswe ngokuhle." 
Psalms104:29 Lokha nawusitheza ubuso, kuyakakamala; nawususa ummoya wakho lokho, kuyafa, kubuyele ethulini lapha kubuya khona." 
Psalms104:30 Lokha nawuphefumulela kikho, kuyadaleka; ngendlela leyo uvuselela ubuso bephasi." 
Psalms104:31 Kwanga iphazimulo yakaSomnini ingajama isiphelani! Kwanga uSomnini angathaba emsebenzinakhe; 
Psalms104:32 iye, yena othi naqala iphasi, lidengezele; nathinta iintaba, zithunye intuthu." 
Psalms104:33 Ngizakukhalelela uSomnini ipilwami yoke, ngidumise uZimami qobe ngisekhona." 
Psalms104:34 Kwanga ukuzimisela kwami kungamukeleka kuye, njengombana ngenamile kuSomnini." 
Psalms104:35 Kwanga izoni zingapheliswa ephasini neenkhohlakali zingasabakhona. Dumisa uSomnini mphefumulwami! Haleluya! 
Psalms105:1 Bongani uSomnini, nibize ibizo lakhe; nazise izenzo zakhe phakathi kwezizwe." 
Psalms105:2 Mvumeleni ingoma, nimdumise; babazani zoke iimangaliso zakhe." 
Psalms105:3 Zikhakhaziseni ebizweni lakhe elicwengileko; azithabe iinhliziyo zabafuna uSomnini. 
Psalms105:4 Rhuluphelani uSomnini namandlakhe; nifunisise ubuso bakhe njalonjalo. 
Psalms105:5 Khumbulani iimangaliso zakhe azenzileko, imikarisomraro nemithetho ayikhulumileko," 
Psalms105:6 iye, nina nzukulwana zaka-Abrahamu inceku yakaSomnini, nina bantwana bakaJakopo okhethiweko wakhe." 
Psalms105:7 Yena unguSomnini uZimethu; imithethwakhe yembethe iphasi loke. 
Psalms105:8 Ukhumbula isivumelwano sakhe nini nanini nesithembiso ayala ngaso iinkulungwana zeenzukulwana," 
Psalms105:9 iye, isivumelwano asenza no-Abrahamu nesifungo sakhe ku-Isaka." 
Psalms105:10 Wasiqinisa kuJakopo saba simiso nakuma-Israyeli saba sivumelwano isiphelani; 
Psalms105:11 wathi: “Wena Jakopo ngizakunikela inarha yeKanana, ibe sisabelo selifa lama-Israyeli.”" 
Psalms105:12 Lokha ama-Israyeli nasesembalwa ngesibalo, aba ziinkhonzi kwesikhatjhana eKanana," 
Psalms105:13 nalokha azulazula ezizweni ngezizwe, iye ukusuka emibusweni ukuya komunye," 
Psalms105:14 uZimu akhange avumele noyedwa, bonyana awagandelele. Wabe wakhalima namakhosi ngebanga lawo," 
Psalms105:15 ngokuthi: “Ningathinti abazesiweko bami, ningalimazi abaphorofidi bami.”" 
Psalms105:16 Lokha nawuthumele indlala ephasini, nalokha nawephula umphekgho wesikwa," 
Psalms105:17 wathumela umuntu phambi kwawo: uJosefa owathengiswa njengekhoboka. 
Psalms105:18 Baminyezela iinyawo zakhe ngamakhamandela, intamakhe yafakwa ikholoro yesimbi." 
Psalms105:19 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lamzizinya ukufikela lapha isithembiso sakhe sizaliseka khona. 
Psalms105:20 Ikosi uFaro yathumela kobana athukululwe, umbusi wabantu loyo wamtjhaphulula." 
Psalms105:21 Yena wamenza umengameli wesigodlo sakhe nombusi phezu kwepahlakhe yoke," 
Psalms105:22 kobana ngelizwi nangokuthanda kwakhe abophe iinkhulu zakaFaro, abe afundise nabaphathi ukuhlakanipha." 
Psalms105:23 Ngalokho u-Israyeli weza eGibhide; uJakopo wahlala njengesikhonzi enarheni kaRhamu. 
Psalms105:24 USomnini wandisa abantu bakhe khulu, wabenza babanamandla ngaphezu kwabagandeleli babo." 
Psalms105:25 Waphendula iinhliziyo zabo kobana zizonde abantu bakhe, zibenzele ubukhwebetjhana." 
Psalms105:26 Wathumela uMosi incekwakhe kanye no-Aroni amkhethako. 
Psalms105:27 Benza iimbonakaliso kumaGibhide, iye, imikarisomraro enarheni kaRhamu." 
Psalms105:28 UMosi no-Aroni azange batjhugulule amezwakhe: Lokha uSomnini nathumela ubumnyama, mbala kwaba nzima tshu." 
Psalms105:29 Waphendula amanzawo aba ziingazi, ukuze iinhlambi zabo zife." 
Psalms105:30 Inarhawo yazala swi ngeenrhwarhwa, ngitjho nemalawini wamakhosanawo." 
Psalms105:31 Wakhuluma kwavela iwoma leembawu, kwaba nemiyani emkhawulweni woke." 
Psalms105:32 Wawehlisela isinanja esikhundleni sezulu, kwamanyaza umbani enarhenawo," 
Psalms105:33 waphohloza isidiribe namakhiwanawo, wephula nemithi yenarhawo." 
Psalms105:34 Wakhuluma kwavumbuka intethe, iye, isikhonyani esingangobaba." 
Psalms105:35 Sona sadla zoke iimila zenarhawo, sarhiribidela iinthelo zamasimawo." 
Psalms105:36 Wamadlha woke amazibulo enarhenawo, iye, isithelo sokuthoma sobudoda bawo." 
Psalms105:37 Wakhupha ama-Israyeli aphethe isiliva negolide, akakho noyedwa phakathi kweenkoro zakhe owararejekako." 
Psalms105:38 IGibhide yajabulela ukuphuma kwama-Israyeli ngombana besele yehlelwe kukwesaba. 
Psalms105:39 USomnini wendlala ilifu kobana libe mthunzi ngehla kwawo nomlilo wokuwakhanyisela ebusuku. 
Psalms105:40 Lokha nakhombelako, wawapha iinkwali, iye, wawasuthisa ngokudla okuvela ezulwini." 
Psalms105:41 Wavula idwala, kwageleza amanzi, aba njengomlambo ebhudwini." 
Psalms105:42 Mbala, wakhumbula isithembiso sakhe esicwengileko asinikela ku-Abrahamu incekwakhe." 
Psalms105:43 Wakhupha abantu bakhe ngokujabula, abakhethiweko bakhe ngokuhlokoma." 
Psalms105:44 Wabanikela iinarha zezizwe, iye, bazuza umjuluko wazo" 
Psalms105:45 ukuze balonde iimiso zakhe, bagcine imithethwakhe. Haleluya!" 
Psalms106:1 Haleluya! Dumisani uSomnini ngombana ulungile nokwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani! 
Psalms106:2 Ngubani ongamemezela izenzo zakaSomnini zamandla, namkha azwakalise loke idumo lakhe na?" 
Psalms106:3 Babusisiwe abalonda okufaneleko, benze nokulungileko ngeenkhathi zoke!" 
Psalms106:4 Somnini, ungikhumbule lokha nawuba nomusa ebantwini bakho; ungitjheje nawubasindisako" 
Psalms106:5 ukuze ngibone okuhle kwabakhethiweko bakho, ngijabule ekwenameni kwesizwe sakho, ngizikhakhazise nabalilifa lakho." 
Psalms106:6 Thina njengabobamkhulu sonile; siphambukile, nje-ke sonakele." 
Psalms106:7 Lokha abobamkhulu nabaseseGibhide, akhange banake iimangaliso zakho; azange bakhumbule ukwethembeka kwakho okukhulu. Bahlubuka nabaselwandle, iye, elwandle lomGaba." 
Psalms106:8 Nokho uSomnini wabasindisa ngenca yebizo lakhe, kobana azise amandlakhe amakhulu." 
Psalms106:9 Wakhalimela ilwandle lomGaba, loma, wabayamisa ekuzikeni inga kuserhalawumbeni." 
Psalms106:10 Wabasindisa esandleni sabanezondo, wabahlenga esandleni sezitha." 
Psalms106:11 Amanzi abhibha amanababo, akhange kusinde nelilodwa lawo." 
Psalms106:12 Nje-ke bakholwa amezwakhe, bavuma idumo lakhe." 
Psalms106:13 Kodwana baba masinya ekukhohlweni imisebenzakhe; akhange baqalelele iseluleko sakhe. 
Psalms106:14 Baba nokukhaluza okukhulu nabaserhalawumbeni, bazizinya uZimu khona enarheni elibhudu." 
Psalms106:15 Wabapha abakubawako, kodwana wabehlisela ukugonyuluka." 
Psalms106:16 Ekampeni bafela uMosi umona no-Aroni ocwengileko wakaSomnini. 
Psalms106:17 Iphasi lavuleka laginya uDatani, ladibizesa nejima laka-Abiramu." 
Psalms106:18 Hlangana nejimelo kwaqubuka nomlilo; iinkhohlakalezo zadliwa malangabi. 
Psalms106:19 Benza ikunzana eRhorebe, balotjha isithombesibunjwa." 
Psalms106:20 Benana uZimu oyiphazimulwabo ngomfanekiso wekomo edla utjani! 
Psalms106:21 Bakhohlwa uZimu omsindisabo owenza izinto ezikulu eGibhide," 
Psalms106:22 iye, iimangaliso enarheni kaRhamu nezinto ezesabekako elwandle lomGaba." 
Psalms106:23 Yeke wathi gade azobabhubhisa, kodwana ngetjhudu uMosi, okhethiweko wakhe, wajama esikhaleni phambi kwakhe kobana adambise ilaka lakhe ekubhubhiseni." 
Psalms106:24 Godu banyaza nenarha ekhangako, akhange bakholwe iinthembiso zakaSomnini." 
Psalms106:25 Bakhonona ematendenabo, azange balalele ilizwi lakaSomnini." 
Psalms106:26 Ngalokho waphakamisa isandla, wafunga bona uzobawisa erhalawumbeni," 
Psalms106:27 nokobana uzokusabalalisa iinzukulwana zabo hlangana nezizwe, azihlakaze kizo zoke iinarha." 
Psalms106:28 Nje-ke bazibophelela kuBhali wePewori, badla okuhlatjelwe abafileko." 
Psalms106:29 Ngalokho bathukuthelisa uSomnini ngezenzo zabo, kwaqubuka isifo phakathi kwabo." 
Psalms106:30 UFiniyasi wasikima walamula, isifo saphela;" 
Psalms106:31 wabalelwa lokho njengokulunga, iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana nini nanini." 
Psalms106:32 Godu bathukuthelisa uSomnini emanzini weMeriba, uMosi wehlelwa zizehlo ngebanga labo:" 
Psalms106:33 Lokha nabahlubuka uMoya kaSomnini, umlomo wakaMosi wakhuluma ngamawala." 
Psalms106:34 Godu akhange babhubhise izizwe njengombana uSomnini bekabayalile. 
Psalms106:35 Kodwana bakhozisana nazo bebafunda ukwenza imikhubazo. 
Psalms106:36 Balotjha abosingazimu bazo okwabuye kwaba sisifu kibo. 
Psalms106:37 Benzela imimoya emimbi imihlabelo ngamadodana namadodakazabo. 
Psalms106:38 Bathulula iingazi ezinganamlandu, iye, iingazi zamadodana namadodakazabo. Benzela ngawo abosingazimu beKanana imihlabelo; ngalokho inarha yasilaphazwa ziingazi ezinengi." 
Psalms106:39 Mbala, bazininda ngezenzo zabo, ngemikhubabo leyo bangwadla." 
Psalms106:40 Yeke ilaka lakaSomnini lavutha ngabantu bakhe, wanyenya ilifa lakhe." 
Psalms106:41 Wabanikela esandleni sezizwe ukuze labo ababazondako bababuse. 
Psalms106:42 Izitha zabo zabagandelela, baguqiswa ngaphasi kwesandla sazo." 
Psalms106:43 Wabasindisa kanengi uSomnini, kodwana bona baba namasu wokuhlubuka; ngalokho bacwila ngecala labo." 
Psalms106:44 Nokho wanaka isizi labo lokha nezwa isililo sabo. 
Psalms106:45 Wakhumbula isivumelwano sakhe ngenca yabo, waba nomusa ngokwethembeka kwakhe okukhulu." 
Psalms106:46 Wenza bona barhawukelwe kilabo egade babathumbile. 
Psalms106:47 Somnini, Zimethu, sisindise! Yewusibuthe hlangana nezizwe ukuze sazise ibizo lakho elicwengileko, sibabaze iphazimulwakho." 
Psalms106:48 Akudunyiswe uSomnini uZimu ka-Israyeli kusukela nini nanini bekube siphelani! Abantu abatjho bathi: “Amen!” Haleluya! 
Psalms107:1 Bongani uSomnini ngombana ulungile nokwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani. 
Psalms107:2 Abahlengiweko bakaSomnini abatjho njalo, labo abahlenge esandleni somjamelani," 
Psalms107:3 iye, labo ababuthe emazweni, ukusuka epumalanga netjingalanga nokusuka etlhagwini nesewula." 
Psalms107:4 Abanye bazula erhalawumbeni, ebhudwini bangafunyana indlela eya emzini, iye, indawo yokuhlala;" 
Psalms107:5 balambile begodu bomile, umphefumulwabo udambile." 
Psalms107:6 Nje-ke esizini labo balila kuSomnini, wabatjhaphulula ematlhuwenabo;" 
Psalms107:7 wabarhola ngendlela enqophileko kobana baye emzini, iye, indawo yokuhlala." 
Psalms107:8 Abathokoze uSomnini ngokwethembeka kwakhe nangeemangaliso zakhe ebantwini. 
Psalms107:9 Mbala, wakholisa owomileko, wasuthisa onephango ngokuhle." 
Psalms107:10 Abanye bahlala ebumnyameni, iye, ethunzini elesabekako; baziimbotjhwa ezisesizini, emakhamandeleni" 
Psalms107:11 ngombana bahlubuka amezwi kaZimu, banyenya iinluleko zongoPhezulu." 
Psalms107:12 Badanjiswa kusebenza nzima; bakhutjwa kwangabikhona obasizako. 
Psalms107:13 Nje-ke esizini labo balila kuSomnini, wabasindisa ematlhuwenabo;" 
Psalms107:14 wabakhupha ebumnyameni, iye, ethunzini elesabekako; wavuthula iimbopho zabo." 
Psalms107:15 Abathokoze uSomnini ngokwethembeka kwakhe nangeemangaliso zakhe ebantwini. 
Psalms107:16 Mbala, wafohloza iminyango yekoporo, wephula iinqabo zeensimbi zamasango." 
Psalms107:17 Abanye baphila ngobudlhayela ngebanga lendlela yeemphambeko zabo, bahlupheka ngenca yamacalabo." 
Psalms107:18 Imiphimbabo yanyenya koke ukudla, batjhidela emasangweni wokufa." 
Psalms107:19 Nje-ke esizini labo balila kuSomnini, wabasindisa ematlhuwenabo;" 
Psalms107:20 wathumela ilizwi lakhe wabaphilisa, wabaphephisa emgodini wokufa." 
Psalms107:21 Abathokoze uSomnini ngokwethembeka kwakhe nangeemangaliso zakhe ebantwini. 
Psalms107:22 Abanikele ngemihlabelo yokuthokoza, babike imisebenzakhe ngokuhlokoma." 
Psalms107:23 Abanye behlela elwandle ngeenthayamanzi kobana benze umsebenzi wangemihla emanzini amanengi. 
Psalms107:24 Bona babona imisebenzi kaSomnini, iye, iimangaliso zakhe ekuzikeni:" 
Psalms107:25 Wakhuluma, wavusa isiwuruwuru, wasikimisa amadlambi welwandle." 
Psalms107:26 Abakhuphulela phezulu, abuya abaphosa ekuzikeni; engozini leyo baphakanyelwa ziimbindi," 
Psalms107:27 badiyazela, batherezela njengesidakwa, bafika kwamgodi uyagcina." 
Psalms107:28 Nje-ke esizini labo balila kuSomnini, wabakhupha ematlhuwenabo:" 
Psalms107:29 Wathulisa isiwuruwuru namadlambi arhobha. 
Psalms107:30 Bathaba ngombana athula, wabaletha echwebeni abalifisako." 
Psalms107:31 Abathokoze uSomnini ngokwethembeka kwakhe nangeemangaliso zakhe ebantwini. 
Psalms107:32 Abamphakamise ebandleni elikhulu, bamdumise ehlanganweni yabaphathi." 
Psalms107:33 USomnini wenza imilambo ibe lirhalawumba, iiyalo zibe yihlabathi eyomileko," 
Psalms107:34 inarha enothileko ibe libhudu ngenca yobukhohlakali babahlali bayo. 
Psalms107:35 Uphendula irhalawumba libe midzwela, ihlabathi eyomileko ibe ziiyalo." 
Psalms107:36 Lapho-ke, waphilisa abanephango, bakha khona umuzi, iye, indawo yokuhlala." 
Psalms107:37 Barhatjha imbewu emasimini, batjala iindiribe, bafunyana isivuno esihle." 
Psalms107:38 Lokha nababusisako, banda khulu, akhange avume bona ifuywabo iphunguke." 
Psalms107:39 Kodwana nabangabusisiko bancipha ngesibalo, babhesa ngebanga lokugandelelwa, iinkinga nesizi." 
Psalms107:40 USomnini uthela amakhosana ngehlazo, awenze azulazule ebhudwini elinganandlela," 
Psalms107:41 kodwana uvikela abadududu ekugandelelweni, andise imindenabo njengemihlambi." 
Psalms107:42 Abaqotho bayakubona lokho bajabule; kodwana zoke iinkhohlakali zivala umlomo. 
Psalms107:43 Ohlakaniphileko uzaziyelela izintwezi; acabange ngokwethembeka kwakaSomnini. 
Psalms108:1 Ingoma; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms108:2 Zimu, ihliziywami inzinzile; ngizakuvuma, ngidumise. Mphefumulwami," 
Psalms108:3 vuka! Ngeenara zamaharibha ngizakuphaphamisa ukusa. 
Psalms108:4 Somnini, ngizakuthokoza hlangana nezizwe; ngikudumise phakathi kwabantu." 
Psalms108:5 Ukwethembeka kwakho kuphakeme njengamazulu neqiniso lakho lilulekele emafini. 
Psalms108:6 Zimu, phakama ngaphezu kwamazulu, iphazimulwakho ayibe ngaphezu kwephasi loke." 
Psalms108:7 Sindisa ngesidla sakho ukuze abathandekako kuwe batjhaphuluke. Ngiphendule! 
Psalms108:8 UZimu uthembisile endawenakhe ecwengileko wathi: “Ngokuthakasa ngizohlukanisa iTjhekemu, ngilinganise umrhoba weSukothi." 
Psalms108:9 Ngeyami iGiliyadi, ngeyami iManase! I-Efrayimu iyingwanami, iJuda iyintongami yobukhosi." 
Psalms108:10 IMowabi isisitja sami sokuhlambela; phezu kwe-Edomu ngiphosa ipatlagwana lami; Ngikuhlokomela ngokwenama wena Filistiya!” 
Psalms108:11 Ngubani ozangisa edorobheni elinemithangala? Ngubani ozangihlahla angise kwa-Edomu na? 
Psalms108:12 Angitjho nguwe, Zimu osilahlileko, wangasaphumi ipi namabuthwethu?" 
Psalms108:13 Akhese usisize esitheni ngombana isizo lomuntu lililize. 
Psalms108:14 NgoZimu sizakuba nesibindi, uZimu ngokwakhe uzazigadangela phasi izitha zethu." 
Psalms109:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. Ungathuli Zimu wendumiswami 
Psalms109:2 ngombana imilomo ekhohlisako ivulekile ngokujamelana nami, ikhuluma amanga ngami." 
Psalms109:3 Bangizombeleze ngamezwi wezondo, bangisahlela ngaphandle kwesizathu." 
Psalms109:4 Ngenca yethando lami, bayangisola, ngitjho nanyana ngisemthandazweni." 
Psalms109:5 Bangibuyisela okumbi esikhundleni sokuhle nezondo esikhundleni sethando lami. 
Psalms109:6 Bathi: “Bekani isikhohlakali sifakaze ngokujamelana naye, iye, ummangaleli ajame ngesidleni sakhe." 
Psalms109:7 Lokha nabangiswako, akafunyanwe amlandu; ngitjho nomthandazwakhe awuthathwe njengesono!" 
Psalms109:8 Amalangakhe akancitjhiswe, omunye athathe isikhundla sakhe." 
Psalms109:9 Abantwabakhe ababe ziintandani nomkakhe abe mhlolokazi. 
Psalms109:10 Abantwabakhe ababe bozulani, bakhombele, bafune ukudla emarubhini wekhabo." 
Psalms109:11 Umatjhonisa akamthathele koke anakho nemiqhamuka iphange umsebenzi wezandla zakhe! 
Psalms109:12 Akungabikhona oba nesisa kuye, namkha arhawukele abantwabakhe nabaziintandani." 
Psalms109:13 Iinzukulwana zakhe azijutjwe, iye, amabizwazo asulwe esizukulwaneni esilandelako!" 
Psalms109:14 Icala laboyise beenzukulwanezo alikhumbuleke phambi kwakaSomnini nesono sabonina singasuleki. 
Psalms109:15 Izono zazo azihlale ziphambi kwakaSomnini, yena aphelise ukukhunjulwa kwazo ephasini" 
Psalms109:16 ngombana umuntu loyo akhange akhumbule ukubonisa isisa, kodwana walandelela iinchaka nabadududu kanye nabanehliziyo eyaphukileko bekwaba sekufeni." 
Psalms109:17 Wathanda ukuthuwelelisa ngamanikelela, yeke amanikelela akawele kuye; Akhange athande ukubusisa, nje-ke akube kude naye!" 
Psalms109:18 Iye, amanikelela akamembathe njengengubakhe, angene ngaphakathi kwakhe njengamanzi nanjengamafutha azeswe emzimbenakhe!" 
Psalms109:19 Kuye akabe njengesambatho esimphuthelako nanjengebhande alithekeleza mihla le.” 
Psalms109:20 Kodwana kwanga lokhu kungaba sibetho esivela kuSomnini, salabo abangisolako; iye, salabo abakhuluma okumbi ngepilwami!" 
Psalms109:21 Wena Somnini, Somandla, ngenzela lokho ngebanga lebizo lakho; iye, ungihlenge ngebanga lokwethembeka kwakho!" 
Psalms109:22 Mbala ngichakile, ngiswele nehliziywami ihlabekile ngaphakathi kwami." 
Psalms109:23 Ipilwami inyamalala njengethunzi entambama, ngithintithwa njengentethe." 
Psalms109:24 Amadolwami ayageba ngebanga lokuzila ukudla; umzimbami ukhehlile, ngimathambo." 
Psalms109:25 Sese ngisiphoqo kabangisolako lokha nabangibonako, banikina iinhloko." 
Psalms109:26 Ngisize Somnini, Zimami! Ngisindise ngokwethembeka kwakho!" 
Psalms109:27 Benze bazi bona sisandla sakho, nokobana wena Somnini lokho ukwenzile!" 
Psalms109:28 Bona banganikelela, wena uzakubusisa! Nabaphoqakalako ngemva kobana bangivukele, incekwakho izakuthaba." 
Psalms109:29 Abangisolako abembathwe ziinhloni, baphuthelwe lihlazo labo njengengubo!" 
Psalms109:30 Ngomlomami ngizamthokoza khulu uSomnini; ngimdumise phakathi kwesiqubuthu 
Psalms109:31 ngombana ujame ngesidleni soswelako, kobana amsindise kilabo abalahle ipilwakhe." 
Psalms110:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Naku umlayezo kaSomnini oya ekosinami: “Hlala ngesidleni sami bekube kulokha nangenza izitha zakho zibe sinabelo seenyawo zakho.” 
Psalms110:2 EZiyoni uSomnini uzakwelula intonga ekunikela amandla, ngokuthi: “Busa phakathi kwezitha zakho!”" 
Psalms110:3 Abantu bakho bazimisele ukulandela mhlana amandlakho abonakaliswa ekucwengeni kwephazimulo. Amasokanakho afana nombethe wokudabuka kokusa. 
Psalms110:4 USomnini ufungile begodu angeze azisole, uthi: “Wena umphristi nini nanini, ngokwendlela kaMalkitsedekhi.”" 
Psalms110:5 Somnini, ikosami engesidleni sakho izakumadlha amakhosi ngelanga lelaka layo." 
Psalms110:6 Izakugweba hlangana nezizwe, ezizaliswe ngeendumbu; iye, imadlhe ababusi enarheni ngokunabileko." 
Psalms110:7 Izakusela emlanjaneni ohlanu kwendlela, ngalokho izakuphakamisa ihlokwayo." 
Psalms111:1 Haleluya! Ngizakuthokoza uSomnini ngehliziywami yoke ebandla labaqotho, iye ehlanganweni." 
Psalms111:2 Mikhulu imisebenzi kaSomnini, iphenywa ngibo boke abayijabulelako." 
Psalms111:3 Umsebenzakhe unokuhlonitjhwa nobukhosi nokulunga kwakhe kujame isiphelani. 
Psalms111:4 Iye, uzenzele ibizo ngeemangaliso zakhe. USomnini unomusa nesirhawu:" 
Psalms111:5 Wabela abamesabako ukudla; akhumbule isivumelwano sakhe nini nanini; 
Psalms111:6 atjengise abantu bakhe amandla wemisebenzakhe, ngokubapha ilifa labezizwe." 
Psalms111:7 Imisebenzi yezandla zakhe ithembekile begodu ilungile; yoke ifundiswakhe iliqiniso. 
Psalms111:8 Mbala inzinzile nini nanini ngombana yenziwa ngeqiniso nangobuqotho. 
Psalms111:9 Wathumela abantu bakhe isihlengo; wayala isivumelwano sakhe isiphelani. Ibizo lakhe licwengile beliyesabeka! 
Psalms111:10 Ukwesaba uSomnini kukuthoma kokuhlakanipha; kunikela ukuzwisisa okuhle kibo boke abahlonipha isivumelwaneso. Idumo lakhe lijame isiphelani! 
Psalms112:1 Haleluya! Ubusisiwe loyo owesaba uSomnini, othokozela khulu imiyalwakhe!" 
Psalms112:2 Iinzukulwana zakhe zizakuhlonitjhwa enarheni; iye, abantwana babaqotho bazakubusiswa." 
Psalms112:3 Umnotho nobunjinga kusendlinakhe; nokulunga kwakhe kuzakujama isiphelani. 
Psalms112:4 Umuntu loyo ufana nomkhanyo ebumnyameni kilabo abaqotho: unomusa, isirhawu nokulunga." 
Psalms112:5 Kumkhambela kuhle umuntu ophanako nobolekisako, ophatha iindaba zakhe ngokwethembeka." 
Psalms112:6 Mbala, angeze anyakaziswa; olungileko uzakubongwa ngesikhathi soke." 
Psalms112:7 Angeze esaba umbiko omumbi; ihliziywakhe isekelekile, iqiniswe kuSomnini;" 
Psalms112:8 iye, ihliziywakhe inzinzile. Yeke angeze esaba, ekugcineni uzakuqalela phasi amanabakhe." 
Psalms112:9 Wabela ngesihle, aphe abachakileko; ukulunga kwakhe kujame isiphelani; idumo lakhe liphakanyiswa ngehlonipho." 
Psalms112:10 Isikhohlakali sibona lokho, sitjhibe, sigugude amazinyo, siphele amandla; isifiso seenkhohlakali siyanyelela." 
Psalms113:1 Haleluya! Nina nceku zakaSomnini, dumisani, iye, dumisani ibizo lakaSomnini!" 
Psalms113:2 Alibusiswe ibizo lakaSomnini kusukela nje bekube nini nanini! 
Psalms113:3 Kusukela ekuphumeni kwelanga bekube sekutjhingeni kwalo ibizo lakaSomnini kufuze lidunyiswe! 
Psalms113:4 USomnini uphakeme ngaphezu kwezizwe zoke nephazimulwakhe ngaphezu kwamazulu! 
Psalms113:5 Ngubani onjengoSomnini uZimethu na? Yena uhlezi ekuphakameni phezulu," 
Psalms113:6 uyakhothama aqale umkayi nephasi. 
Psalms113:7 Uvusa abakhwahlileko ebhudwini, asikimise abatlhogileko ezaleni;" 
Psalms113:8 abahlalise namakhosana, iye, namakhosana wabantu bakhe." 
Psalms113:9 Unikela inyumba ikhaya, ayenze unina ojabulileko wabantwana. Haleluya!" 
Psalms114:1 Lokha u-Israyeli naphuma eGibhide, iye, indlu kaJakopo nayiphuma ebantwini belimi elitjhili," 
Psalms114:2 uJuda waba sisabelo esicwengileko sakaZimu, u-Israyeli waba mbuswakhe." 
Psalms114:3 Ilwandle lakubona lokho labaleka, iJordani yajika yabuyela emuva." 
Psalms114:4 Iintaba zatjakadula njengamaqama, imibundu njengeemvana." 
Psalms114:5 Kubayini wena lwandle ubaleka, nawe Jordani ubuyela emuva na?" 
Psalms114:6 Kubayini nina ntaba nitjakadula njengamaqama, nani mibundu njengeemvana na?" 
Psalms114:7 Wena phasi, thuthumela phambi kobukhona bakaSomandla, iye, phambi kwakaZimu wakaJokopo," 
Psalms114:8 owaphendula idwala laba siziba, ilitje eliqinileko laba siyalo." 
Psalms115:1 Akungabi kithi Somnini, iye, akungabi kithi ukuhlonitjhwa; kodwana akube sebizweni lakho ngebanga lokwethembeka nobuqotho bakho." 
Psalms115:2 Kubayini izizwe zithi uphi uZimabo," 
Psalms115:3 khisibe usezulwini, wenza koke akuthandako na?" 
Psalms115:4 Abosingazimu babo balisiliva negolide, okumsebenzi wezandla zomuntu." 
Psalms115:5 Banemilomo kodwana ayikhulumi; banamehlo kodwana akaboni. 
Psalms115:6 Baneendlebe kodwana azizwa; baneempumulo kodwana azinukeleli. 
Psalms115:7 Banezandla kodwana azinamizwa; baneenyawo kodwana azikhambi; imiphimbabo ayikwazi ukuhomuza. 
Psalms115:8 Ababenzileko bafana nabo; banjalo-ke boke abathembela kibo. 
Psalms115:9 Israyeli, thembani uSomnini! Mbala, ulisizo nesihlangu senu." 
Psalms115:10 Ndlu ka-Aroni, thembani uSomnini! Mbala, ulisizo nesihlangu senu." 
Psalms115:11 Nina abesaba uSomnini, thembani kuye! Mbala, ulisizo nesihlangu senu." 
Psalms115:12 USomnini uyasikhumbula: Uyabusisa, iye, abusise indlu ka-Israyeli, abusise indlu ka-Aroni," 
Psalms115:13 abusise labo abamesabako, abakhulu nabancani." 
Psalms115:14 Kwanga uSomnini anganandisa, nina nabantwabenu." 
Psalms115:15 Inga ningabusiswa nguSomnini owenza izulu nephasi! 
Psalms115:16 Amazulu mazulu kaSomnini, iphasi walinikela abantu." 
Psalms115:17 Abafileko abamdumisi uSomnini, iye, noyedwa owehlela kwabathulileko." 
Psalms115:18 Kodwana thina sizamdumisa uSomnini, kusukela nje bekube nini nanini. Haleluya!" 
Psalms116:1 Ngiyamthanda uSomnini ngombana uzwa iphimbo lami, iye, neenlilo zami." 
Psalms116:2 Mbala, ubeka indlebakhe kimi, nje-ke ngizambiza ipilwami yoke." 
Psalms116:3 Ngenganyelwa misinga yokufa, ivalo lendawo yabafileko langifikela; ngehlelwa yimbandezelo nesizi." 
Psalms116:4 Nje-ke ngabiza ibizo lakaSomnini, ngathi: “Awu, Somnini, sindisa ipilwami!”" 
Psalms116:5 USomnini unesirhawu, ulungile, iye, uZimethu unomusa." 
Psalms116:6 USomnini uvikela abathobekileko; wangisindisa nangithotjiswako. 
Psalms116:7 Nje-ke, buyela ekuphumuleni kwakho, mphefumulwami ngombana uSomnini ukondle kuhle." 
Psalms116:8 Mbala wena Somnini, uhlenge ipilwami ekufeni, amehlwami eenyembezini neenyawo zami ekukhutjweni." 
Psalms116:9 Ngikhamba phambi kwakaSomnini enarheni yabaphilako. 
Psalms116:10 Ngiyakholwa, nanyana ngisithi: “Ngihlunguphazwe khulu.”" 
Psalms116:11 Mina-ke ngaba namawala ngokuthi: “Boke abantu banamanga.” 
Psalms116:12 Yini lokho engingakhokhela ngakho uSomnini, ngalokho okuhle angenzele khona na?" 
Psalms116:13 Ngizakutjhidela e-aldarini ngekapho yesindiso, ngibize ibizo lakaSomnini." 
Psalms116:14 Ngizakugcwalisa iimfungo zami kuSomnini, iye, phambi kwabantu bakhe boke." 
Psalms116:15 Ngilemukile bona kuyabiza emehlweni kaSomnini ukufa kwabathembekileko bakhe. 
Psalms116:16 Awu, Somnini, ngiyincekwakho! Njengombana ngiyincekwakho, indodana yencekukazakho, ungitjhaphululile emakhamandeleni." 
Psalms116:17 Kuwe ngizakunikela umnikelo wokuthokoza, ngibize ibizo lakaSomnini." 
Psalms116:18 Ngizakugcwalisa iimfungo zami kuSomnini, iye, phambi kwabantu bakhe boke," 
Psalms116:19 esirhodlweni sethempeli lakaSomnini ngaphakathi kwakho, Jerusalema. Haleluya!" 
Psalms117:1 Dumisani uSomnini, nina zizwe zoke! Mbabazeni noke nina bantu!" 
Psalms117:2 Iye, kukhulu ukwethembeka kwakhe kithi, nobuqotho bakaSomnini bujame isiphelani. Haleluya!" 
Psalms118:1 Thokozani uSomnini ngombana ulungile; ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani. 
Psalms118:2 U-Israyeli akathi: “Ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani.” 
Psalms118:3 Indlu ka-Aroni ayithi: “Ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani.” 
Psalms118:4 Abesaba uSomnini abathi: “Ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani.” 
Psalms118:5 Ekubandezelweni kwami ngalila kuSomnini, wangiphendula, wangibeka esibangeni." 
Psalms118:6 USomnini ungakimi, yeke angesabi. Umuntu angangenzani na?" 
Psalms118:7 USomnini ungakimi, ungumsizami omkhulu; mina ngizakuqalela phasi abangizondako." 
Psalms118:8 Kungcono ukuphephela kuSomnini, kunokwethembela emuntwini." 
Psalms118:9 Kungcono ukuphephela kuSomnini, kunokwethembela emakhosaneni." 
Psalms118:10 Zoke izizwe zingizombelezile! Ebizweni lakaSomnini ngiziphayile! 
Psalms118:11 Zingizombelezile, iye, zingizombelezile! Ebizweni lakaSomnini ngiziphayile!" 
Psalms118:12 Zingizombelezile njengeenyosi, zapheliswa njengomlilo wameva! Ebizweni lakaSomnini ngiziphayile!" 
Psalms118:13 Nina nangidudula ngamandla kobana ngiwe, kodwana uSomnini wangisekela." 
Psalms118:14 USomnini umamandlami neenkhwepha zami begodu ukusindiswa kwami. 
Psalms118:15 Ematendeni wabalungileko kukhona ukuhlokoma kokuhlula ngokuthi: “Sokudla sakaSomnini senze izenzo ezinamandla! 
Psalms118:16 Sokudla sakhe siphakamile, iye, sokudla sakaSomnini senze izenzo ezinamandla!”" 
Psalms118:17 Angeze ngafa kodwana ngizakuphila, ngizakukhuluma ngezenzo zakaSomnini:" 
Psalms118:18 USomnini wangihlunguphaza khulu, kodwana akhange anginikelele ekufeni." 
Psalms118:19 Ngivulele amasango wokulunga ukuze ngingene ngawo, ngithokoze uSomnini." 
Psalms118:20 Leli lisango eliya kuSomnini, abalungileko bazakungena ngalo." 
Psalms118:21 Somnini, ngikuthokoza ngombana ungiphendulile begodu ukusindiswa kwami." 
Psalms118:22 Ilitje eladelwa babakhi libe ngeliqakathekileko ejikeni. 
Psalms118:23 Lokho kuzizenzo zakaSomnini; kusimangaliso emehlwenethu. 
Psalms118:24 Nanti ilanga uSomnini alenzileko; asithabeni sithakase kilo. 
Psalms118:25 Awu, Somnini, sindisa! Awu, Somnini, phumelelisa!" 
Psalms118:26 Ubusisiwe ongenako ebizweni lakaSomnini. Siyanibusisa sisethempelini lakaSomnini. 
Psalms118:27 USomnini unguZimu, usiphe ukukhanya. Thomani umgidi, niphethe amatjhwaba ngezandla; niye eempondweni ze-aldari." 
Psalms118:28 Wena unguZimami, nje-ke ngizakuthokoza, unguZimami ngizakuphakamisa." 
Psalms118:29 Thokozani uSomnini ngombana ulungile; ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani. 
Psalms119:1 Babusisiwe abamsulwa eendleleni zabo, abakhamba ngokuya ngomthetho kaSomnini." 
Psalms119:2 Babusisiwe ababulunga ubufakazi bakhe, iye, abamfuna ngehliziyo epheleleko," 
Psalms119:3 abangenzi litho elimbi, abakhamba eendleleni zakhe." 
Psalms119:4 Somnini nguwe oyale ngeemfundiso zakho kobana zilondwe ngokupheleleko. 
Psalms119:5 Kwanga ukukhamba kwami kunganzinza ukuze ngilonde iimiso zakho! 
Psalms119:6 Angekhe ngaba neenhloni lokha nangitjheja yoke imiyalwakho. 
Psalms119:7 Ngizakuthokoza ngehliziyo eqotho lokha nangifunda imithethwako elungileko. 
Psalms119:8 Ngizakulonda iimiso zakho; yeke, ungangilahleli safuthi." 
Psalms119:9 Omutjha angayihlambulula njani indlelakhe na? Ngokuyilonda ngokwelizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:10 Ngikufuna ngehliziywami yoke; ungavumi ngiphambuke emiyalwenakho. 
Psalms119:11 Ngifihla amezwakho ehliziywenami ukuze ngingoni kuwe. 
Psalms119:12 Akudunyiswe wena Somnini! Ngifundise iimiso zakho. 
Psalms119:13 Ngeembhena zami ngimemezela yoke imithetho yomlomakho. 
Psalms119:14 Ukukhamba ngobufakazi bakho kungijabulisa ngaphezu komnotho woke. 
Psalms119:15 Ngizindla ngeemfundiso zakho, ngiyelele iindlela zakho." 
Psalms119:16 Ngiyathaba ngeemiso zakho, ilizwi lakho angeze ngalidela." 
Psalms119:17 Phatha incekwakho kuhle, khona ngizakuphila, ngilonde amezwakho." 
Psalms119:18 Vula amehlwami kobana ngibone iimangaliso ezisemthethwenakho. 
Psalms119:19 Ngisikhonzi ephasini, ungayifihli imiyalwakho kimi." 
Psalms119:20 Umphefumulwami sewuphodlhekile ngokulangazelela imithethwakho ngesikhathi soke. 
Psalms119:21 Uyazikhalimela iindeleli, okutjho abanikelelweko, labo abaphambuka emiyalwenakho." 
Psalms119:22 Susa kimi isiphoqo nenyazo ngombana ngibubulungile ubufakazi bakho. 
Psalms119:23 Nanyana ababusi bahlangene, bahleba ngami, incekwakho izakuzindla ngeemiso zakho." 
Psalms119:24 Ubufakazi bakho bukuthaba kwami, iye, buziinluleko zami." 
Psalms119:25 Umphefumulwami unamathele ethulini, nje-ke vuselela ipilwami ngesithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:26 Nganeka iindlela zami kuwe, wena wangiphendula, yeke ngifundise iimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:27 Ngiphe ukuzwisisa indlela yeemfundiso zakho, ngalokho ngizakuzindla ngeemangaliso zakho." 
Psalms119:28 Umphefumulwami ulisizi, nje-ke ngiqinise ngokwesithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:29 Susa indlela yamala kimi, ungirhawukele ngokomthethwakho." 
Psalms119:30 Ngikhethe indlela yeqiniso, ngabeka imithethwakho phambi kwami." 
Psalms119:31 Somnini, ngikakarele ebufakazini bakho, yeke ungavumi ngihlazeke." 
Psalms119:32 Ngigijima endleleni yemiyalwakho ngombana welule umkhumbulwami. 
Psalms119:33 Somnini, ngifundise indlela yeemiso zakho, nje-ke ngizayibulunga bekube sekupheleni." 
Psalms119:34 Ngiphe ukuzwisisa ukuze ngibulunge umthethwakho, ngiwulonde ngehliziywami yoke." 
Psalms119:35 Ngihlahle emizileni yemiyalwakho ngombana ngiyathaba ngayo. 
Psalms119:36 Phendulela ihliziywami ebufakazini bakho, kungabi sekufuneni inzuzo." 
Psalms119:37 Fulatheza amehlwami ekuqaleni ilize; ungiphilise endlelenakho. 
Psalms119:38 Zalisa isithembiso sakho encekwinakho ukuze wesatjwe. 
Psalms119:39 Susa ihlazo kimi ngombana liyangilulaza; imithethwakho iyanganelisa. 
Psalms119:40 Maye, ngilangazelela iimfundiso zakho! Yeke yewungiphilise ngokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms119:41 Somnini, kwanga ukwethembeka kwakho kungeza kimi, iye, isindiswakho ngokwesithembiso sakho;" 
Psalms119:42 nje-ke ngizakwazi ukuphendula abangithukako ngombana ngethemba ilizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:43 Ungalisuseli safuthi ilizwi leqiniso emlonyenami ngombana ngiqalelela imithethwakho. 
Psalms119:44 Ngizakulonda umthethwakho ngesikhathi soke, iye, ngizawulonda nini nanini." 
Psalms119:45 Ngizakukhamba petlege ngombana ngifunana neemfundiso zakho. 
Psalms119:46 Ngizakukhuluma ngobufakazi bakho phambi kwamakhosi, angekhe ngaba neenhloni." 
Psalms119:47 Ngiyathaba ngemiyalwakho ngombana ngiyayithanda. 
Psalms119:48 Ngikhongozela imiyalwakho ngombana ngiyayithanda begodu ngifuna ukuzindla ngeemiso zakho. 
Psalms119:49 Khumbula isithembiso sakho encekwinakho ongiphe ngaso ithemba. 
Psalms119:50 Nakhu ukutjhiriyeka kwami esizini lami: Isithembiso sakho sivuselela ipilwami. 
Psalms119:51 Iindeleli zihlalele ukungiphoqa, kodwana angiphambuki emthethwenakho." 
Psalms119:52 Ngikhumbula imithethwakho yakade, Somnini, ngiziduduza ngayo." 
Psalms119:53 Ngebanga leenkhohlakali ngiyanyenya, iye, ngalabo abalahla umthethwakho." 
Psalms119:54 Iimiso zakho zimuvumo kimi endlinami yokugogobala. 
Psalms119:55 Ebusuku ngikhumbula ibizo lakho, Somnini, ngilonda umthethwakho." 
Psalms119:56 Lokhu kusisabelo sami: ukubulunga iimfundiso zakho. 
Psalms119:57 Somnini, sabelo sami, ngiyathembisa bona ngizakulonda amezwakho." 
Psalms119:58 Ngincancabeza kuwe ngehliziywami yoke, yiba nomusa kimi ngokwesithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:59 Iindlela zami ngizicabangisisile, yeke ngizokulandela ubufakazi bakho godu." 
Psalms119:60 Ngirhaba ngingariyadi ukulonda imiyalwakho. 
Psalms119:61 Nanyana iintambo zeenkhohlakali zingirarejile, angeze ngawukhohlwa umthethwakho." 
Psalms119:62 Naphakathi kobusuku ngiyavuka ngikuthokoze ngebanga lemithethwako elungileko. 
Psalms119:63 Ngisinini sabo boke abakwesabako, iye, boke abalonda iimfundiso zakho." 
Psalms119:64 Somnini, iphasi lizele ngokwethembeka kwakho; ngifundise iimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:65 Uphethe incekwakho kuhle ngokwelizwi lakho Somnini. 
Psalms119:66 Ngifundise ilemuko elihle kanye nelwazi ngombana ngikholelwa emiyalwenakho. 
Psalms119:67 Ngingakathotjiswa ngangivame ukuphosisa; kodwana kwanje, ngilonda ilizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:68 Wena ulungile nokwenzako kulungile, nje-ke ngifundise iimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:69 Iindeleli zingininda ngamala, kodwana ngibulunga iimfundiso zakho ngehliziywami yoke." 
Psalms119:70 Njengamafutha iinhliziyo zazo azinamizwa, kodwana nakungimi yena, ngithabela umthethwakho." 
Psalms119:71 Kwaba kuhle kimi kobana ngithotjiswe ukuze ngifunde iimiso zakho. 
Psalms119:72 Umthetho womlomakho muhle kimi, udlula amakhulukhulu weempaparwana zegolide nezesiliva." 
Psalms119:73 Izandla zakho zangenza begodu zangijamisa, nje-ke ngiphe ukuzwisisa ukuze ngifunde imiyalwakho." 
Psalms119:74 Abakwesabako bazangibona, bathabe ngombana ngiqalelela isithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:75 Somnini, ngiyazi bona imithethwakho ilungile begodu ungithobise ngeqiniso." 
Psalms119:76 Ukwethembeka kwakho kube yinduduzwami ngokwesithembiso sakho encekwinakho. 
Psalms119:77 Kwanga umusakho ungeza kimi ukuze ngiphile ngombana umthethwakho ukuthaba kwami. 
Psalms119:78 Kwanga iindeleli zingaphoqeka ngombana zingidlelezela ngamala, kodwana nakungimi yena, ngizakuzindla ngeemfundiso zakho." 
Psalms119:79 Akuthi labo abekwesabako, baphendukele kimi ukuze bazi ubufakazi bakho." 
Psalms119:80 Ihliziywami ayingasoleki mayelana neemiso zakho ukuze ngingahlaziseki. 
Psalms119:81 Umphefumulwami ufisa isindiswakho, ngiqalelela isithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:82 Amehlwami sele afiphele ngokurhuluphela isithembiso sakho, ngizibuza ngithi: “Uzongiduduza nini?”" 
Psalms119:83 Nanyana nginjengesikhumba sewayini emuleni, angizikhohlwa iimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:84 Mangaki amalanga asalele incekwakho na? Uzabagweba nini abazumana nami? 
Psalms119:85 Iindeleli zingembele umgodi, zaphambana nomthethwakho." 
Psalms119:86 Yoke imiyalwakho iliqiniso; ngisize ngombana abantu bangizuma ngamala. 
Psalms119:87 Bapheze bangiqeda ephasini, kodwana mina angikazilahli iimfundiso zakho." 
Psalms119:88 Yewungiphilise ngokwethembeka kwakho ukuze ngilonde ubufakazi bomlomakho. 
Psalms119:89 Somnini, ilizwi lakho lingelanini nanini; lijame liqinile emazulwini." 
Psalms119:90 Ubuqotho bakho bungebeenzukulwana ngeenzukulwana; unzinzise iphasi lajama. 
Psalms119:91 Imithethwakho iseliqiniso nanje, mbala, koke kulotjha wena." 
Psalms119:92 Nangathana umthethwakho bewungasikho ukuthakasa kwami, ngabe sele ngabhubha esizini lami." 
Psalms119:93 Angeze ngazilibala iimfundiso zakho ngombana ngazo uyangiphilisa. 
Psalms119:94 Ngingowakho; ngisindise ngombana ngifunana neemfundiso zakho. 
Psalms119:95 Iinkhohlakali zilindele ukungibhubhisa, kodwana ngicabanga ngobufakazi bakho." 
Psalms119:96 Ngibonile kobana kunomkhawulo kikho koke okuphelelisiweko, kodwana umyalwakho wenabile." 
Psalms119:97 Maye, ngiyawuthanda umthethwakho! Ngizindla ngawo ilanga loke." 
Psalms119:98 Imiyalwakho ingenza ngihlakaniphe ngaphezu kwezitha zami ngombana ihlala ikimi. 
Psalms119:99 Nginelwazi ukudlula abafundisi bami ngombana ngizindla ngobufakazi bakho. 
Psalms119:100 Nginelemuko ukudlula abadala ngombana ngibulunga iimfundiso zakho. 
Psalms119:101 Angibeki inyawo lami eendleleni zobumbi, ngalokho ngilonda ilizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:102 Akhange ngiphambuke emithethwenakho, ngombana nguwe ongifundisileko." 
Psalms119:103 Maye, amezwakho anandipha kurhwalabhami! Amnandi ukudlula iliju emlonyenami!" 
Psalms119:104 Ngeemfundiso zakho ngizuza ukuzwisisa; ngalokho ngizonda indlela yamala. 
Psalms119:105 Ilizwi lakho lisibani eenyaweni zami begodu likukhanya emzilenami. 
Psalms119:106 Ngenze isifungo ngasiqinisa kobana ngilonde imithethwakho yokulunga. 
Psalms119:107 Ngitlhage khulu; ngiphilise Somnini ngokwesithembiso sakho. 
Psalms119:108 Somnini, yamukela iminikelo yesihle yomlomami, ungifundise imithethwakho." 
Psalms119:109 Ipilwami isengozini ngesikhathi soke, nokho angiwukhohlwa umthethwakho." 
Psalms119:110 Iinkhohlakali zingibekele isifu, kodwana akhange ngiphambuke eemfundisweni zakho." 
Psalms119:111 Nini nanini ubufakazi bakho bulilifa lami; mbala, bukuthaba kwehliziywami." 
Psalms119:112 Ihliziywami izimisele ukwenza iimiso zakho bekube sekupheleni. 
Psalms119:113 Ngiyamzonda uhliziyombili, kodwana ngiyawuthanda umthethwakho." 
Psalms119:114 Usiphephelo nesihlangu sami; ngiqalelela isithembiso sakho. 
Psalms119:115 Sukani kimi nina benzi bobumbi ukuze ngibulunge imiyalo kaZimami! 
Psalms119:116 Ngisingathe ngokwesithembiso sakho ukuze ngiphile; ungavumi ithemba lami lihlaziseke. 
Psalms119:117 Ngisekele ukuze ngisinde; iimiso zakho ngizakuhlala ngizinakile. 
Psalms119:118 Udela boke abahlubuka iimiso zakho: Ubukhohlisi babo bulilize. 
Psalms119:119 Zoke iinkhohlakali zephasi, uzengula njengegwebu; ngalokho ngithanda ubufakazi bakho." 
Psalms119:120 Umzimbami uyathuthumela ngokukwesaba begodu nginevalo ngemithethwakho. 
Psalms119:121 Ngenzile okufaneleko nokulungileko, yeke ungangiliseleli ebagandelelini." 
Psalms119:122 Qinisekisa incekwakho ihlalohle; iindeleli zingangigandeleli. 
Psalms119:123 Amehlwami sele afiphele ngokurhuluphela isindiswakho, iye, ukulunga okuthembisileko." 
Psalms119:124 Phatha incekwakho ngokwethembeka kwakho, ungifundise iimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:125 Ngiyincekwakho, ngiphe ukuzwisisa ukuze ngazi ubufakazi bakho." 
Psalms119:126 Somnini, kusikhathi, hlanazela; abantu bephule umthethwakho." 
Psalms119:127 Njengombana ngithanda imiyalwakho, ukudlula igolide, ngitjho igolidembala," 
Psalms119:128 nokobana ngiyelela ngokupheleleko zoke iimfundiso zakho, ngizonda yoke indlela yamanga." 
Psalms119:129 Ubufakazi bakho buyakarisa; ngalokho ngiyabubulunga. 
Psalms119:130 Isambulo selizwi lakho sikukhanya; sinikela ukuzwisisa kwabanganalwazi. 
Psalms119:131 Ngivula umlomo ngikhaluze, iye, ngikhanukela imiyalwakho." 
Psalms119:132 Phendukela kimi, ungirhawukele, njengombana uvame ukwenza kwabathanda ibizo lakho." 
Psalms119:133 Nzinzisa amagadangwami njengokwesithembiso sakho; ungavumi bona ngibuswe nanyana ngibuphi ubumbi. 
Psalms119:134 Ngihlenge ekugandelelweni babantu ukuze ngikwazi ukulonda iimfundiso zakho. 
Psalms119:135 Khanyisela incekwakho; ungifundise iimiso zakho. 
Psalms119:136 Amehlwami ageleza iinyembezi, ngombana abantu abalondi umthethwakho." 
Psalms119:137 Somnini, wena ulungile nemithethwakho iqotho." 
Psalms119:138 Wayala ubufakazi bakho, iye, bulungile begodu buthembeke ngokupheleleko." 
Psalms119:139 Ukutjhisakalela kwami kuyangiqeda, lokha amanabami nadela amezwakho." 
Psalms119:140 Isithembiso sakho sihlolisisiwe, nje-ke incekwakho iyasithanda." 
Psalms119:141 Nanyana ngiphasi ngidelelekile, angizikhohlwa iimfundiso zakho." 
Psalms119:142 Ukulunga kwakho kulunge mlibe nomthethwakho uliqiniso. 
Psalms119:143 Ngehlelwe lisizi nobudisi, kodwana imiyalwakho ikuthaba kwami." 
Psalms119:144 Nini nanini iimfundiso zakho ziliqiniso; yeke ngiphe ukuzwisisa ukuze ngiphile. 
Psalms119:145 Ngilila ngehliziywami yoke, nje-ke ngiphendule Somnini, ngibulunge iimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:146 Ngilila kuwe, ngisindise ukuze ngilonde ubufakazi bakho." 
Psalms119:147 Ngivuka ngamasa, ngibawe isizo; ngiqalelele amezwakho." 
Psalms119:148 Ngemilindo yobusuku ngiyaphilelwa, ngizindle ngesithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:149 Yizwa ilizwi lami ngokwethembeka kwakho; Somnini, ungiphilise ngokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms119:150 Labo abangizuma ngobumbi bayatjhidela, bakude nomthethwakho." 
Psalms119:151 Kodwana wena Somnini, useduze nemiyalwakho yoke iliqiniso." 
Psalms119:152 Bengiseze nginelemuko lobufakazi bakho kwakade: Wabunzinzisa bajama isiphelani. 
Psalms119:153 Yelela isizi lami, ungisindise ngombana akhange ngiwukhohlwe umthethwakho." 
Psalms119:154 Mela indabami, ungihlenge; ngiphilise ngokwesithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:155 Ukusindiswa kukude neenkhohlakali, ngombana azifuni iimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:156 Maye, mkhulu umusakho Somnini! Ngiphilise ngokwemithethwakho." 
Psalms119:157 Banengi abangizumako kanye namanabami, kodwana akhange ngiphambuke ebufakazini bakho." 
Psalms119:158 Nangiqala abahlubuki, ngifikelwa kunyenya, ngombana abalondi isithembiso sakho." 
Psalms119:159 Qala, ngithanda iimfundiso zakho, Somnini, yeke yewungiphilise ngokwethembeka kwakho." 
Psalms119:160 Ummongo welizwi lakho kukwethembeka begodu zoke iimphetho zakho zijame isiphelani. 
Psalms119:161 Ababusi bangizuma kunganabanga, kodwana ihliziywami inevalo ngamezwakho." 
Psalms119:162 Ngiyathaba ngesithembiso sakho njengomuntu ofunyana ipango enengi. 
Psalms119:163 Ngiwazondile amala, iye, ngiyawanyenya; kodwana ngithanda umthethwakho." 
Psalms119:164 Ngikudumisa kalikhomba ngelanga ngebanga lemithethwakho elungileko. 
Psalms119:165 Abathanda umthethwakho banokuthula okukhulu, akukho okungabenza bakhutjwe." 
Psalms119:166 Somnini, ngilindele isindiswakho nemiyalwakho ngiyayilandela." 
Psalms119:167 Ngilonda ubufakazi bakho, iye, ngibuthanda khulu." 
Psalms119:168 Ngilonda iimfundiso nobufakazi bakho: Zoke iindlela zami ziphambi kwakho. 
Psalms119:169 Kwanga isibawo sami singatjhidela kuwe, Somnini; ungiphe ukuzwisisa ngokwelizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:170 Inga isibawo sami sesirhawu singafika phambi kwakho; ungisindise ngokwesithembiso sakho. 
Psalms119:171 Iimbhena zami zizakuphuphuma ngokudumisa, ngombana ungifundisa iimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:172 Ilimu lami lizakuvuma ngesithembiso sakho; mbala, yoke imiyalwakho ilungile." 
Psalms119:173 Kwanga isandla sakho singalungela ukungisiza, ngombana ngikhethe iimfundiso zakho." 
Psalms119:174 Somnini, ngilangazelela isindiswakho, iye, umthethwakho ukuthaba kwami." 
Psalms119:175 Angiphile ukuze ngikudumise nemithethwakho ingisize. 
Psalms119:176 Ngeduke njengemvu elahlekileko. Yewufune incekwakho ngombana angikayikhohlwa imiyalwakho. 
Psalms120:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini. Esizini lami ngiyalila kuSomnini kobana ungiphendule, ngithi:" 
Psalms120:2 “Somnini, sindisa ipilwami emlonyeni okhuluma amanga iye, elimini lekohliso.”" 
Psalms120:3 Wena limu lekohliso, yini ekufuze unikelwe khona? Yini okhunye ekufuze wenzelwe khona na?" 
Psalms120:4 Imisubela ebukhali yengorho, enamalahle avuthako wemithi yomthanyelo!" 
Psalms120:5 Maye kimi, ngombana ngisikhonzi eMetjheki begodu ngihlala hlangana namatende weKhedari!" 
Psalms120:6 Sekusikhathi eside mina ngihlezi phakathi kwabantu abazonda ukuthula. 
Psalms120:7 Mina ngimumuntu wokuthula; kodwana nangikhuluma ukuthula, bona baphehla ipi." 
Psalms121:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini. Ngiqala eentabeni ngizibuze: Isizo lami livelaphi na? 
Psalms121:2 Isizo lami livela kuSomnini owenze izulu nephasi. 
Psalms121:3 Akasoze aliselela inyawo lakho likhutjwe, umlondakho angekhe ayenda." 
Psalms121:4 Mbala, umlondi ka-Israyeli akayendi namkha alale." 
Psalms121:5 USomnini ungumlondakho. USomnini umthunzi ngesidleni sakho. 
Psalms121:6 Ilanga angeze lakulimaza emini, ngitjho nenyanga ebusuku." 
Psalms121:7 USomnini uzakulonda ebumbini boke, alonde nepilwakho." 
Psalms121:8 Iye, uSomnini uzakulonda yoke indawo, kusukela nje bekube nini nanini!" 
Psalms122:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini; irhubo lakaDavida. Ngajabula lokha nabathi kimi: “Asiyeni endlini kaSomnini.” 
Psalms122:2 Iinyawo zethu sezijame emasangwenakho, Jerusalema." 
Psalms122:3 IJerusalema lakhiwe njengedorobho elihlanganiswe ngokuqinileko ndawonye," 
Psalms122:4 lapha iinkoro zikhuphukela khona, iye, iinkoro zakaSomnini. Ukuthokoza ibizo lakaSomnini kubufakazi ku-Israyeli." 
Psalms122:5 EJerusalema kuneenhlalo zokugweba, iye, iinhlalo zendlu kaDavida." 
Psalms122:6 Bawani ukuthula kweJerusalema nithi: “Kwanga abakuthandako bangaba ngabavikelekileko. 
Psalms122:7 Kube nokuthula ngemithangalenakho nokuvikeleka ngemibhotjhongwenakho.” 
Psalms122:8 Ngenca yabafowethu nabangani ngizakuthi: “Ukuthula akube ngaphakathi kwakho, Jerusalema.”" 
Psalms122:9 Ngenca yendlu kaSomnini ngizakufuna okuhle ngawe. 
Psalms123:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini. Ngiphakamisela amehlwami kuwe, wena onesihlalo sobukhosi ezulwini." 
Psalms123:2 Iye, njengamehlo weenceku aqalelele esandleni sekosazo nanjengamehlo wencekukazi aqalelele esandleni sekosikazi, ngokunjalo amehlwethu aqalelele uSomnini uZimethu, kufikela lapha asirhawukela khona." 
Psalms123:3 Sirhawukele Somnini, sirhawukele, ngombana sesanele ngokudelelwa." 
Psalms123:4 Umphefumulwethu wanele ngokunyefulwa ngabazikhukhumezako, iye, nokudelelwa ngabazaziko." 
Psalms124:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini; irhubo lakaDavida. Nangabe uSomnini bekangekho ngakithi , u-Israyeli akatjho lokhu , 
Psalms124:2 iye, nangabe uSomnini bekangekho ngakithi lokha abantu nabajamelana nathi," 
Psalms124:3 bebazasiginya siphila, lokha ilaka labo nalivutha ngathi." 
Psalms124:4 Iinkhukhula bezizosithanyelela kude, iinrhurhula ngabe zisigubuzesile;" 
Psalms124:5 iye, amanzi arhageleko ngabe sele asigubuzesile." 
Psalms124:6 USomnini akadunyiswe ngombana akhange asinikelele njengongazimbi emazinywenabo. 
Psalms124:7 Siphunyuke njengenyoni ephuma esithiyweni sabathiyi: Isithiyo sonakele, thina saphunyuka!" 
Psalms124:8 Isizo lethu lisebizweni lakaSomnini owenze izulu nephasi. 
Psalms125:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini. Abethemba uSomnini bafana nentaba yeZiyoni engeze yanyakaziswa, kodwana ijame isiphelani." 
Psalms125:2 Njengeentaba zizombeleze iJerusalema, ngokunjalo uSomnini uzombeleze abantu bakhe, kusukela nje bekube nini nanini." 
Psalms125:3 Intonga yobukhohlakali angeze yahlala phezu kwelifa elabelwe abalungileko ukuze abalungileko bangabeki isandla sabo ebumbini. 
Psalms125:4 Somnini, phatha abalungileko kuhle, iye, labo abaqotho ngehliziyo." 
Psalms125:5 Kodwana labo abaphendukela eendleleni zamabatha, uSomnini akabaqotjhe neengilamkhuba. Ukuthula akube phezu kwaka-Israyeli." 
Psalms126:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini. Lokha uSomnini natjhugulula ubujamo beZiyoni saba njengababhudangako. 
Psalms126:2 Samomotheka isikhathi soke, ilimu lethu belizele ukuhlokoma. Ezizweni kwathiwa: “USomnini ubenzele izinto ezikulu.”" 
Psalms126:3 Iye, uSomnini usenzele izinto ezikulu, nje-ke sathaba." 
Psalms126:4 Somnini, tjhugulula ubujamo bethu njengamadonga erhalawumbeni nalinako!" 
Psalms126:5 Labo abatjala ngeenyembezi bazakuvuna ngokuhlokoma. 
Psalms126:6 Kwamambala loyo okhamba alila, aphethe umgodla wembewu, uzakubuya ngokuhlokoma, aphethe iintjherefu zakhe zesivuno." 
Psalms127:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini; irhubo lakaSolomoni. Lokha uSomnini nakangakhi indlu, iinthukuthuku zabakhi zililize. Lokha uSomnini nangalindi idorobho, abalindi bagada ilize." 
Psalms127:2 Kulilize bona nivuka ekuseni, niphumule ebusuku ngemva kwesikhathi, nidle ukudla enikujulukeleko. USomnini upha ngokwaneleko amthandako asalele." 
Psalms127:3 Qala, abantwana balilifa elivela kuSomnini; isithelo sesibeletho simvuzo ovela kuye." 
Psalms127:4 Njengemisubela esandleni sengorho, banjalo abantwana bobutjha." 
Psalms127:5 Ibusisiwe indoda ezalise incilayo ngemisubela leyo. Angeze yaba neenhloni lokha nayimangalela amanabayo ebandla. 
Psalms128:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini. Ubusisiwe owesaba uSomnini, okhamba eendleleni zakhe." 
Psalms128:2 Wena uzakudla isithelo somsebenzi wezandla zakho; uzakubusiseka, koke kukukhambele kuhle:" 
Psalms128:3 Umkakho uzakuba njengesidiribe esithelako ngendlinakho. Abantwana bakho bazakuba njengamahlumela wemithi ye-oliva esithebeni sakho sokudlela. 
Psalms128:4 Qala-ke, indoda eyesaba uSomnini izakubusiswa bunjalo." 
Psalms128:5 Kwanga uSomnini angakubusisa aseZiyoni. Kwanga ungabona ubuhle beJerusalema imihla yoke yokuphila kwakho. 
Psalms128:6 Kwanga ungabona iinzukulwana zakho. Ukuthula akube phezu kwaka-Israyeli. 
Psalms129:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini. U-Israyeli akatjho lokhu: Bangisahlela kanengi kwasebutjheni bami 
Psalms129:2 iye, bangisahlela kanengi kwasebutjheni bami, kodwana akhange bangihlule." 
Psalms129:3 Abalimi balime emhlanami, benza imiselabo yaba mide." 
Psalms129:4 Kodwana uSomnini ulungile; uquntile iintambo zeenkhohlakali. 
Psalms129:5 Kwanga boke abahloye iZiyoni bangadaniswa, bakhahlamezelwe emuva." 
Psalms129:6 Sengathi bangaba njengotjani ephahleni obutjhwaba busamila. 
Psalms129:7 Umvuni angeze azalisa ngitjho isandla sakhe nobuthelelako angeze enze isitjherefu ngabo. 
Psalms129:8 Abadlulako angeze bathi, “Isibusiso sakaSomnini asibe phezu kwenu”, namkha, “Sinibusisa ebizweni lakaSomnini.”" 
Psalms130:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini. Somnini, ngilila kuwe ngisekuzikeni!" 
Psalms130:2 Somandla yizwa iphimbo lami, iindlebe zakho azibe bukhali elizwini lesibawo sami!" 
Psalms130:3 Somnini, nabegade ubulunga amacala, ngubani obekangaphila na?" 
Psalms130:4 Kodwana wena unokulibalela ukuze uhlonitjhwe. 
Psalms130:5 Ngiqalelela uSomnini, iye, umphefumulwami uyamqalelela! Sengilindele ilizwi lakhe." 
Psalms130:6 Umphefumulwami ulindela uSomandla ukudlula ukulinda kwabalinde ukusa, iye, ukulinda kwabalinde ukusa." 
Psalms130:7 Israyeli, thembela kuSomnini, ngombana unokwethembeka, iye, unokuhlenga okubuyelelweko." 
Psalms130:8 Nguye ohlenga u-Israyeli emacalenakhe woke. 
Psalms131:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini; irhubo lakaDavida. Somnini, ihliziywami ayizikhukhumezi, amehlwami akaziphakamisi; izinto ezikulu nezimangalisako kimi, angizikhathazi ngazo." 
Psalms131:2 Kunalokho ngizehlisile, ngathulisa umphefumulwami. Njengomntwana okhunyulweko lokha nanonina, unjalo umphefumulwami ngaphakathi kwami." 
Psalms131:3 Israyeli, thembela kuSomnini kusukela nje bekube nini nanini." 
Psalms132:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini. Somnini, cabangela uDavida, ngazo zoke iinhlupheko abekezele kizo," 
Psalms132:2 nangalokho akufunga kuSomnini, iye, lokho akuthembisa kongonamandla kaJakopo," 
Psalms132:3 ngokuthi: “Angisobe ngangena ngendlinami, namkha emalalwenami." 
Psalms132:4 Angizukuvumela amehlwami alale, namkha iinkhopha zami zicimeze" 
Psalms132:5 bengifunyanele uSomnini indawo, iye, ubuhlalo bongonamandla kaJokopo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Qala, sezwa ngomfaji sise-Efrata; sawufunyana esifundeni seJeyarimu." 
Psalms132:7 Ngalokho asiyeni endlinakhe, siguqe esinabelweni seenyawo zakhe." 
Psalms132:8 Sikima Somnini! Yewuye endawenakho yokuphumula, wena nomfaji wamandlakho." 
Psalms132:9 Inga abaphristi bakho bangembathiswa ukulunga nabathembekileko bakho bahlokome. 
Psalms132:10 Ngebanga lencekwakho uDavida, ungafulatheli umzeswakho." 
Psalms132:11 Ngeqiniso uSomnini wafunga kuDavida isifungo angeze asiphendukela. Wathi: “Omunye wamadodana wedini lakho, ngizambeka esihlalweni sakho sobukhosi." 
Psalms132:12 Nangabe amadodanakho agcina isivumelwano sami neemfundiso engizawafundisa zona, khona-ke, amadodanawo, azakuhlala esihlalweni sakho sobukhosi mlibe.”" 
Psalms132:13 Mbala, uSomnini ukhethe iZiyoni; wathanda bona ibe sihlalo sakhe;" 
Psalms132:14 wathi: “Le yindawami yokuphumula isiphelani; lapha, ngizakuhlala khona, ngombana ngikuthandile." 
Psalms132:15 Ngizakubusisa ukudla kwayo ngokuphuphumako; ngisuthise abachakileko bayo ngesikwa. 
Psalms132:16 Abaphristi bayo ngizabembathisa isindiso, abathembekileko bayo bahlokome ngokwethaba." 
Psalms132:17 Lapho-ke ngizakukhulisa amandla kaDavida; ngilungisele umzeswami isibani. 
Psalms132:18 Izitha zakhe ngizazembathisa ihlazo, kodwana isihlohlo sakhe sihlale siqhakazile.”" 
Psalms133:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini; irhubo lakaDavida. Maye kuhle, kumnandi kangangani ukuhlalisana kwabafo ndawonye!" 
Psalms133:2 Kufana nokuzeswa ehloko ngamafutha we-oliva aligugu, ancithikela eendevini, iye, eendevini zaka-Aroni. Ehlela ngitjho nentanyeni yesambatho sakhe." 
Psalms133:3 Kufana nehlobo lombethe weRherimoni okhithikela phezu kweentaba zeZiyoni. Mbala, lapha abafo bahlalisana khona, uSomnini ulayeza isibusiso; okutjho ipilo engapheliko." 
Psalms134:1 Ingoma yekhambo lokuya ethempelini. Dumisani uSomnini, noke nina nceku zakhe; iye, nina enilotjha ubusuku boke, ngendlini kaSomnini!" 
Psalms134:2 Phakamiselani izandla endaweni ecwenge khulu, nidumise uSomnini." 
Psalms134:3 Kwanga uSomnini angakubusisa aseZiyoni, iye, yena owenze izulu nephasi." 
Psalms135:1 Haleluya! Dumisani ibizo lakaSomnini, mdumiseni nina nceku zakhe," 
Psalms135:2 iye, nina enilotjha endlini kaSomnini, esirhodlweni sethempeli lakaZimethu." 
Psalms135:3 Dumisani uSomnini ngombana ulungile, nirhubele ibizo lakhe, ngombana lihle." 
Psalms135:4 Mbala, uSomnini ukhethe uJakopo bona abe ngowakhe, iye, u-Israyeli abe lilifa elingelakhe." 
Psalms135:5 Kwamambala ngiyazi bona uSomnini mkhulu; iye, iKosethu yikulu ngaphezu kwabo boke abosingazimu." 
Psalms135:6 USomnini wenza koke akuthandako ezulwini nephasini, iye, emalwandle nekuzikeni koke." 
Psalms135:7 Nguye okhuphula amafu amhlophe emikhawulweni yephasi; wenzela izulu imibani; nguye ovuthela ummoya eenlulwini zakhe. 
Psalms135:8 Nguye owarhayila amazibulo wamaGibhide, iye, amazibulo wabantu nefuyo." 
Psalms135:9 Wathumela iimbonakaliso nemikarisomraro phakathi kwakho, wena Gibhide, ngokujamelana noFaro neenceku zakhe zoke." 
Psalms135:10 Nguye owamadlha izizwe ezinengi, wabulala amakhosi anamandla:" 
Psalms135:11 uSirhoni ikosi yama-Amori, u-Ogi ikosi yeBhatjhani namakhosi wemibuso yoke yeKanana." 
Psalms135:12 Wanikela inarhawo kobana ibe lilifa, iye, ilifa labantu bakhe, u-Israyeli." 
Psalms135:13 Somnini, ibizo lakho lijame isiphelani, isinanazelo sakho ngeseenzukulwana ngeenzukulwana," 
Psalms135:14 ngombana uSomnini umela abantu bakhe, abe nesirhawu eencekwini zakhe." 
Psalms135:15 Abosingazimu bezizwe balisiliva negolide, benziwe ngezandla zomuntu:" 
Psalms135:16 Banemilomo kodwana ayikhulumi; banamehlo kodwana akaboni. 
Psalms135:17 Baneendlebe kodwana azizwa; banjalo nje abanammoya emilonyenabo. 
Psalms135:18 Ababenzileko bafana nabo; banjalo-ke boke abathembela kibo. 
Psalms135:19 Wena ndlu ka-Israyeli, dumisani uSomnini! Wena ndlu ka-Aroni, dumisani uSomnini!" 
Psalms135:20 Wena ndlu kaLevi, dumisani uSomnini! Nani enesaba uSomnini, mdumiseni!" 
Psalms135:21 Akadunyiswe uSomnini aseZiyoni, iye, yena ohlala eJerusalema. Haleluya!" 
Psalms136:1 Thokozani uSomnini ngombana ulungile , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani! 
Psalms136:2 Thokozani uZimu ophezu koke , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani! 
Psalms136:3 Thokozani uSomandla oyiKosi yamakhosi , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani! 
Psalms136:4 Nguye yedwa owenza iimangaliso ezikulu , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:5 nguye owenza amazulu ngelwazi , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:6 wendlala iphasi phezu kwamanzi , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:7 wadala iinkhanyisi ezikulu , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:8 iye, ilanga kobana libuse imini , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani ," 
Psalms136:9 inyanga neenkwekwezi kobana zibuse ubusuku , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani! 
Psalms136:10 Nguye owamadlha amaGibhide ngokubulala amazibulwawo , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:11 wenyula u-Israyeli hlangana nawo , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:12 wamenyula ngamandla amakhulu nangesiphanga sakhe , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:13 wahlukanisa ilwandle lomGaba phakathi , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:14 wenza u-Israyeli bona ayame phakathi kwalo , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:15 wadlhunya uFaro nebutho lakhe ngaphakathi kwelwandle lomGaba , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:16 warhola abantu bakhe erhalawumbeni , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:17 wamadlha amakhosi amakhulu , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:18 iye, wabulala amakhosi anamandla , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani ," 
Psalms136:19 uSirhoni ikosi yama-Amori , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:20 no-Ogi ikosi yeBhatjhani , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:21 wanikela inarhawo bona ibe lilifa , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:22 iye, ilifa lencekwakhe, u-Israyeli , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani!" 
Psalms136:23 Nguye owasikhumbulako nasisabogabogako , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:24 wasisindisa emanabenethu , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:25 Nguye opha ukudla kikho koke okuphilako , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani , 
Psalms136:26 Thokozani uZimu wezulwini , ukwethembeka kwakhe kujame isiphelani! 
Psalms137:1 Ngemiseleni yeBhabheli sahlala phasi, salila lokha nasikhumbula iZiyoni." 
Psalms137:2 Phezu kwemithi yomdubi saphanyeka amaharibhethu," 
Psalms137:3 ngombana abasithumbileko bathi sibavumele ingoma; iye abaphangi bethu bafuna ingoma yethabo, bathi: “Sivumelani yinye yeengoma zeZiyoni.”" 
Psalms137:4 Sizayivuma njani ingoma kaSomnini enarheni etjhili na? 
Psalms137:5 Nangikhohlwa wena Jerusalema, asizikhohlwe isandla sami sesidla!" 
Psalms137:6 Ilimu lami alinamathele kurhwalabhami, nangabe angikukhumbuli, iye, nakube angilibeki iJerusalema ngaphezu kwesitlhori sokujabula kwami." 
Psalms137:7 Somnini, khumbula okwenziwe ma-Edomu mhlana kuhlakazwa iJerusalema. Athi: “Bhuruzani! Bhuruzani bekube sesisekelweni salo!”" 
Psalms137:8 Wena Bhabheli, ndodakazi ezakubhujiswa, ubusisiwe ozakubuyisela kuwe, lokho owakwenza kithi!" 
Psalms137:9 Iye, ubusisiwe ohlwitha iinratjhana zakho, aziphahlaze edwaleni!" 
Psalms138:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Ngikuthokoza ngehliziywami yoke; ngikudumise phambi kwabosingazimu. 
Psalms138:2 Ngiguqa nca ngethempelini lakho elicwengileko; ngithokoze ibizo lakho ngebanga lokwethembeka neqiniso lakho. Mbala, uphakamise ibizo lakho ngaphezu kwakho koke. Mayelana nesithembiso sakho:" 
Psalms138:3 Ngelanga engakubiza ngalo, wena wangiphendula. Wangiqinisa idolo, wanginikela amandla." 
Psalms138:4 Woke amakhosi wephasi azakuthokoza wena Somnini, lokha nezwa amezwi womlomakho." 
Psalms138:5 Azakuvuma iingoma ngezenzo zakaSomnini, athi: “Yikulu iphazimulo kaSomnini!”" 
Psalms138:6 Nanyana uSomnini aphakamile, uyamtjheja ophasi. Kodwana ozitjhayako umbona akude." 
Psalms138:7 Nanyana ngikhamba phakathi kwamanaba, wena ulonda ipilwami etukuthelweni yezitha zami. Welula isandla sakho, iye, isidla sakho singisindise." 
Psalms138:8 Somnini uyangenyela. Ukwethembeka kwakho, Somnini, kujame isiphelani. Yeke ungalahli umsebenzi wezandla zakho." 
Psalms139:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. Somnini, ungiphenyile, uyangazi." 
Psalms139:2 Wena wazi ukuhlala nokuvuka kwami, ulemuka imizindlwami ukude." 
Psalms139:3 Uhlolisisa ikhambo nokuzigedla kwami, wazana neendlela zami zoke." 
Psalms139:4 Ngitjho ilizwi lingakabi semlonyenami, wena Somnini, ulazi ngokupheleleko." 
Psalms139:5 Ungiphahle ngaphambili nangemuva nesandla sakho singehla kwami. 
Psalms139:6 Ukwazi okunjalo kuyangimangalisa, kuphakeme khulu, angikufikeleli." 
Psalms139:7 Ngizakuyaphi kude noMoyakho? Ngizakubalekelaphi kude nebukhoneni bakho na? 
Psalms139:8 Lokha nangikhuphukela emazulwini, wena ulapho! Lokha nangendlala umkghadami endaweni yabafileko, wena ukhona!" 
Psalms139:9 Lokha nangithatha amaphiko wokusa, ngidoyele emikhawulweni yelwandle," 
Psalms139:10 nalapho isandla sakho sizangirhola, isidla sakho singisingathe." 
Psalms139:11 Lokha nabe ngingathi, “Ubumnyama abungibhudungele, ukukhanya okungizombileko kube busuku”" 
Psalms139:12 nobumnyama abuzukuba mnyama kuwe; ubusuku buzakukhanya njengemini, iye, ubumnyama bufane nokukhanya." 
Psalms139:13 Nguwe owadala iimbindi zami, wangeluka esibelethweni sakamma." 
Psalms139:14 Ngiyakudumisa ngesimangaliso esesabekako sokuba khona kwami! Iye, imisebenzakho iyamangalisa; lokho ngikwazi kuhle khulu!" 
Psalms139:15 Amathambami bekangakafihleki kuwe lokha nangibunjwa ekusithekeni. Lokha ngelukwa ekuzikeni kwesibeletho," 
Psalms139:16 amehlwakho angibona ngisese lihlwili. Koke ukubunjwa kwami kwatlolwa encwadinakho, iye, azange kwatjhiywa nalinye ilanga lakhona." 
Psalms139:17 Zimu, amaqhingakho abudisi kimi! Inani lawo liyababazeka!" 
Psalms139:18 Lokha nangilinga ukuwabala adlula ubunengi betjhwabatjhwaba. Ngitjho nalokha nangivukako, nalapho ngisese nawe ngemizindlo." 
Psalms139:19 Nina abomele iingazi, dedani kimi! Zimu, kwanga bewungabhubhisa iinkhohlakali," 
Psalms139:20 iye, labo abakhuluma ikohliso ngawe. Izitha zakho ziphatha ibizo lakho butjhilweni." 
Psalms139:21 Somnini, ngiyabazonda abakuzondako; ngiyabanyenya abahlubukako." 
Psalms139:22 Ngibazonda ngezondo epheleleko; bazizitha kimi. 
Psalms139:23 Yewungiphenye Somnini, wazi ihliziywami; ngizizinye, wazi imikhumbulwami." 
Psalms139:24 Qala nakube ngisendleleni enesiphetho esinzima, ungirholele endleleni yasafuthi." 
Psalms140:1 Kumkhaleli; irhubo lakaDavida. 
Psalms140:2 Somnini ngisindise eenkhohlakalini, ngivikele ebantwini benturhu;" 
Psalms140:3 labo abahlela okumbi eenhliziyweni zabo nabaphehla ipi isikhathi soke. 
Psalms140:4 Balola ilimu labo libe bukhali njengelenyoka, eembheneni zabo kunesihlungu serabi." 
Psalms140:5 Ngilonde, Somnini, ezandleni zeenkhohlakali; ngivikele ebantwini benturhu, iye, labo abasophe ukungirareja." 
Psalms140:6 Abazigqajako bangifihlele isifu, bangibekela iinrhobelo zeentambo; iye, endleleni yoke bangibekela iinthiyo." 
Psalms140:7 Ngathi kuSomnini: “Wena unguZimami! Beka iindlebe elizwini lesibawo sami. 
Psalms140:8 Somnini, Somandla, msindisami onamandla, usithe ihlokwami ngelanga lepi."
