Psalms140:9 Nje-ke Somnini, ungaphumelelisi iimfiso zeenkhohlakali, ungavumeli zifikelele ihlelo lazo elimbi. Baphakamisa" 
Psalms140:10 iinhloko labo abangizombileko! Ingozi abayikhulumako ayibagubuzese! 
Psalms140:11 Kwanga amalahle avuthako angawela phezu kwabo, baphoselwe emlilweni, iye, ngemgodini bangasaphuma!" 
Psalms140:12 Ungavumeli onelimu alibhade enarheni; ubumbi abuzumane nomuntu onenturhu.” 
Psalms140:13 Ngiyazi bona uSomnini uyabamela abadududu avikele ilungelo labakhwahlileko. 
Psalms140:14 Mbala, abalungileko bazakuthokoza ibizo lakho, Somnini nabaqotho bazakuphila ebukhoneni bakho." 
Psalms141:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Somnini, ngilila kuwe, yewungitjheje; beka indlebe elizwini lami nangilila kuwe." 
Psalms141:2 Umthandazwami awube njengetjhwalo kuwe; izandla engiziphakamisileko zibe njengomnikelo wakusihlwa. 
Psalms141:3 Somnini, bekela umlomami umlindi; ulonde umnyango weembhena zami." 
Psalms141:4 Ungavumeli ihliziywami iphendukele ebumbini kobana ngizibandakanye ezenzweni zobukhohlakali ngokuhlanganyela nabantu abenza ubumbi. Ungavumi ngidle iinkhanakhana zabo. 
Psalms141:5 Nange ngiwakalwa nguwe wena olungileko bekungaba yinto ehle; nakube ngikhalinywa nguwe bekuzakuba njengokuzeswa ngamafutha. Ungavumi ihlokwami ikwale lokho, kodwana umthandazwami awuhlale ujamelene nobumbi beenkhohlakali." 
Psalms141:6 Nanyana abarholi bazo bebangasunduzelwa ngerharheni, bebazakuzwa kobana amezwi womthandazwami mahle." 
Psalms141:7 Lokha amathambethu narhatjheka emlonyeni wethuna njengamasoyi wolimako natlaya ihlabathi," 
Psalms141:8 amehlwami ahlala akuwe Somnini, Somandla; iye, kuwe ngiyaphephela, ungangingeniseleli ngengozi." 
Psalms141:9 Ngiphephise ekubanjweni sisifu abangithiye ngaso, iye, eenthiyweni zeengilamkhuba." 
Psalms141:10 Iinkhohlakali aziwele ezifini zazo, lokha mina ngedwa nangiphunyurhako." 
Psalms142:1 IMaskili lakaDavida; lokha nagade angemrhobeni; umthandazo. 
Psalms142:2 Ngirhuwelela uSomnini, ngelizwi lami ngizincengela kuye." 
Psalms142:3 Ngithululela ukububula kwami kuye, ngibika ikingami phambi kwakhe;" 
Psalms142:4 ngithi: “Wena wazi indlelami lokha ummoyami nawudambileko. Endleleni lapha ngikhamba khona, abantu bangifihlele isifu." 
Psalms142:5 Akhusuthi uqala ngesidleni sami, akakho noyedwa ongiyelelako; abukho ubuphephelo kimi, akakho umuntu ongitjhejako." 
Psalms142:6 “Ngirhuwelela kuwe Somnini ngithi, ‘Wena usiphephelo sami; ungikho koke enginakho enarheni yabaphilako." 
Psalms142:7 Tjheja isililo sami, ngombana ngithotjiswe khulu. Ngephule kwabazumana nami, ngombana banamandla khulu kunami." 
Psalms142:8 Ngikhuphe ngesikhungweni ukuze ngidumise ibizo lakho. Abalungileko bazangizombeleza, ngombana wena ungiphethe kuhle.’ ”" 
Psalms143:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Somnini, yizwa umthandazwami ngobuqotho bakho; beka indlebe esibaweni sami, ungiphendule ngokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms143:2 Incekwakho ungayimangaleli, ngombana akunamuntu ophilako ongolungileko phambi kwakho." 
Psalms143:3 Mbala, isitha sizumene nami, sagandelela phasi ipilwami, sangihlalisa ebumnyameni njengalabo esele bahlongakala kade." 
Psalms143:4 Ngalokho ummoyami ngaphakathi kwami udambile; ihliziywami inevalo. 
Psalms143:5 Ngakhumbula imihla yekadeni, ngazindla ngemisebenzakho yoke, ngayelela okwenziwe zizandla zakho." 
Psalms143:6 Nje-ke ngelulela izandla zami kuwe; umphefumulwami womele wena njengenarha elibhudu. 
Psalms143:7 Somnini, ngiphendule masinyana; ummoyami ulangazelela wena. Ungabufihli ubuso bakho kimi ukuze ngingafani nabawela ngemgodini." 
Psalms143:8 Ngizwise ukwethembeka kwakho ekuseni, ngombana kuwe ngibeka ithemba lami. Ngikhombise indlela ekufuze ngikhambe ngayo, ngombana umphefumulwami uyakulangazelela." 
Psalms143:9 Somnini, ngenyule ezitheni zami; kuwe ngibeka ithemba lami." 
Psalms143:10 Ngifundise ukwenza intandwakho, ngombana wena unguZimami. UMoyakho olungileko akangirhole, angikhambise ehlabathini elelezekileko." 
Psalms143:11 Ngebanga lebizo lakho, Somnini, londa ipilwami. Iye, ngokulunga kwakho ngikhuphe ematshwenyekweni." 
Psalms143:12 Ngokuthembeka kwakho phelisa izitha zami, bewubhubhise boke abajamelani bami, ngombana ngiyincekwakho." 
Psalms144:1 Irhubo lakaDavida. Akadunyiswe uSomnini olidwala lami, yena obandulela izandla zami ipi neminwami ukulwa." 
Psalms144:2 USomnini ulidwala nobuphephelo bami, irharha nomsindisami; usihlangu sami engiphepha ngaso, uthobisa abantu bami ngaphasi kwami." 
Psalms144:3 Somnini, umuntu bekayini kobana umnake, namkha obhubhako kobana umkhumbule?" 
Psalms144:4 Umuntu ufana nomphefumulo nje; imihlakhe ifana nesithunzi esinyamalalako. 
Psalms144:5 Somnini, vula amazulu, wehlele phasi; thinta iintaba ukuze zithunye intuthu." 
Psalms144:6 Phazimisa imibani, uphadlhalaje izizwe; thumela imisubelakho, uzihlangahlanganise." 
Psalms144:7 Yelula isandla sakho uphezulu; ngisindise bewungenyule emanzini amanengi, iye, ezandleni zabatjhili," 
Psalms144:8 abanemilomo ekhuluma amala nabanesidla sekohliso. 
Psalms144:9 Ngizakuvuma ingoma etja kuwe Zimu; ngikubethele iharibha leenara ezilitjhumi! 
Psalms144:10 Nguwe opha amakhosi ukuhlula nosindisa uDavida incekwakho esabuleni yesihluku. 
Psalms144:11 Iye, ngisindise bewungenyule ezandleni zabatjhili abanemilomo ekhuluma amala nabanesidla sekohliso!" 
Psalms144:12 Kwanga amadodanethu ebutjheni bawo angafana nesimila esikhula kuhle; amadodakazethu afane neensika zesikghudlhu ezibazwe njengezesigodlweni. 
Psalms144:13 Kwanga iinlulu zethu zingaphuphuma ngemihlobohlobo yemikhiqizo; izimvu neembuzi zethu zande ngeenkulungwana, iye, ngeenkulungwana ezilitjhumi emirhuleni yamadlelwethu;" 
Psalms144:14 kwanga neenkomo zethu zingamitha. Kungabi nomphundlukelo emithangalenethu, kungabi nesililo sesizi eendledlaneni zethu." 
Psalms144:15 Babusisiwe abantu abehlelwa ngilokho, iye, babusisiwe abantu uZimabo onguSomnini." 
Psalms145:1 Indumiso kaDavida. Ngiyakuphakamisa Zimami, wena Somnini, ngidumisa ibizo lakho nini nanini." 
Psalms145:2 Imihla ngemihla ngizakudumisa, ngibabaze ibizo lakho nini nanini." 
Psalms145:3 USomnini mkhulu, kufuze adunyiswe khulu; ubukhulu bakhe abuphenyeki." 
Psalms145:4 Isizukulwana sizakubabaza imisebenzakho kesinye, simemezele izenzo zakho zamandla." 
Psalms145:5 Ngizakuzindla ngephazimulo yokuhlonitjhwa kobukhosi bakho kanye neemangaliso zakho. 
Psalms145:6 Abantu bazakumemezela amandla wokwesabeka kwakho; nami ngizakufakaza ubukhulu bakho. 
Psalms145:7 Bazakwendlala idumo lobunengi bobuhle bakho, bahlokome ngokulunga kwakho," 
Psalms145:8 bathi: “USomnini unomusa nesirhawu; ubuthaka ekusilengekeni nokwethembeka kwakhe kukhulu. 
Psalms145:9 USomnini ulungile kibo boke nesisa sakhe sengamele koke akudalileko.” 
Psalms145:10 Yoke imisebenzakho izakuthokoza, Somnini nabathembekileko bakho bazakubabaza." 
Psalms145:11 Bazakhuluma ngephazimulo yombuswakho, bamemezele izenzo zakho zamandla," 
Psalms145:12 bazise abantu izenzo zakho zamandla nokuhlonitjhwa kwephazimulo yombuswakho. 
Psalms145:13 Umbuswakho, umbuso wesiphelani nokubusa kwakho kuhlezi iinzukulwana zoke. USomnini uthembekile emezwinakhe woke nezenzweni zakhe zoke unesisa." 
Psalms145:14 Boke abawako uSomnini uyababamba, aphakamise boke abathotjisiweko." 
Psalms145:15 Woke amehlo aqalelele kuwe begodu ubapha ukudla ngesikhathi esifaneleko. 
Psalms145:16 Uvula izandla zakho, wanelise iimfiso zakho koke okuphilako." 
Psalms145:17 USomnini ulungile eendleleni zakhe zoke, unesisa kikho koke akwenzako." 
Psalms145:18 USomnini useduze nabo boke abambizako, iye, boke abambiza ngeqiniso." 
Psalms145:19 Uzalisa iimfiso zabo boke abamesabako, alalele isililo sabo abasindise." 
Psalms145:20 USomnini ulonda boke abamkhathalelako, kodwana uzakubhubhisa zoke iinkhohlakali." 
Psalms145:21 Umlomami uzakukhuluma idumo lakaSomnini nenyama yoke izakudumisa ibizo lakhe elicwengileko nini nanini. 
Psalms146:1 Haleluya! Dumisa uSomnini mphefumulwami! 
Psalms146:2 Iye, ngizakudumisa uSomnini ipilwami yoke, ngivumele uZimami qobe ngisekhona." 
Psalms146:3 Ningabeki ithemba lenu eenkhulwini, iye, emuntwini obhubhako okungekho kuye ukusindisa." 
Psalms146:4 Lokha umphefumulwakhe nawuphumako, yena ubuyela ehlabathini; khona mhlokho aphele amaqhingakhe." 
Psalms146:5 Ubusisiwe umuntu omsizakhe unguZimu kaJakopo, loyo ithemba lakhe likuSomnini uZimakhe," 
Psalms146:6 owenza izulu nephasi, ilwandle nakho koke okukikho, olonda iqiniso isiphelani," 
Psalms146:7 owenzela abagandelelweko ubulungiswa nopha abalambileko ukudla. USomnini utjhaphulula iimbotjhwa; 
Psalms146:8 uSomnini uvula amehlo wabaphopheleko, aphakamise abathotjisiweko, athande abalungileko." 
Psalms146:9 USomnini ulonda iinkhonzi, asekele iintandani nabahlolokazi; kodwana indlela yeenkhohlakali uyayiphambanisa." 
Psalms146:10 USomnini uzakubusa isiphelani, iye, uZimakho, wena Ziyoni, iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana. Haleluya!" 
Psalms147:1 Haleluya! Kuhle ukurhubela uZimethu! Maye kumnandi kangangani! Iye, indumiso imfanele!" 
Psalms147:2 Umakhi weJerusalema nguSomnini, ubuthelela abahlakazekileko bakwa-Israyeli." 
Psalms147:3 Uphulukisa abaneenhliziyo ezaphukileko, abophe amancebabo." 
Psalms147:4 Ubala inani leenkwekwezi, abize enye nenye ngebizo layo." 
Psalms147:5 IKosethu yikulu, namandlayo makhulu, ukwazi kwayo akulinganiseki." 
Psalms147:6 USomnini usekela abathobekileko, athobise abakhohlakeleko." 
Psalms147:7 Vumelani uSomnini ngokuthokoza, nikhalelele uZimethu ngeharibhana!" 
Psalms147:8 Yena osibekela umkayi ngamafu, alungiselele izulu kobana line ephasini, ahlumise utjani eentatjaneni." 
Psalms147:9 Unikela iinlwana ukudla kwazo, ngitjho namadzinyani wegubulu nalilako." 
Psalms147:10 Ukuthaba kwakhe akukho emandleni wenjomani, namkha ukujabula kwakhe eenthumbeni zendoda." 
Psalms147:11 USomnini uthaba ngabamesabako, iye, abaqalelela ukwethembeka kwakhe." 
Psalms147:12 Babaza uSomnini, wena Jerusalema, udumise uZimakho, wena Ziyoni," 
Psalms147:13 ngombana yena uqinisa iinqabo zamasangwakho, abusise abantwabakho abangaphakathi kwakho." 
Psalms147:14 Wenza ukuthula ngemikhawulwenakho, akwanelise ngamabele anonileko." 
Psalms147:15 Uthumela umyalwakhe ephasini, ilizwi lakhe ligijima ngebelo." 
Psalms147:16 Wendlala iliqhwa inga buboya, arhatjhe isithwathwa njengomlotha." 
Psalms147:17 Wehlisa isinanja sakhe njengeroro. Alo, ngubani ongajama phambi kwamakhazakhe na?" 
Psalms147:18 Uthumela ilizwi lakhe lincithikise isinanja, avuse ummoyakhe, amanzi ageleze." 
Psalms147:19 Wembula ilizwi lakhe kuJakopo, imithetho neemiso zakhe ku-Israyeli." 
Psalms147:20 Asikho isizwe akhe enza njalo kiso; imithethwakhe ayaziwa kiso. Haleluya! 
Psalms148:1 Haleluya! Dumisani uSomnini nina enisezulwini, nimdumise kweliphezulu!" 
Psalms148:2 Mdumiseni nina ngilozi zakhe, iye, mdumiseni noke nina butho lakhe!" 
Psalms148:3 Mdumiseni nina langa nenyanga, mdumiseni noke nina nkwekwezi eziphazimako!" 
Psalms148:4 Mdumiseni nina mazulu aphakamileko, nani manzi angehla komkayi!" 
Psalms148:5 Koke lokho akudumise ibizo lakaSomnini, ngombana wayala kwadaleka." 
Psalms148:6 Lokho wakujamisa isiphelani, wakubekela isimiso esingapheliko." 
Psalms148:7 Dumisani uSomnini nina enisephasini, nina mbandana ezikulu zemanzini, nani kuzika kwamalwandle," 
Psalms148:8 nawe mbani nesinanja, liqhwa nawe kungu, nawe mmoya owenza umyalwakhe." 
Psalms148:9 Iye, dumisani nina ntaba nemibundu yoke, nina mithi yeenthelo nemisedari yoke," 
Psalms148:10 mbandana nawe fuyo yoke, nrharhabi nani nyoni." 
Psalms148:11 Dumisani nina makhosi wephasi nani noke zizwe, nina nkhulu nani noke babusi benarha," 
Psalms148:12 nina masokana neentombi, nani abadala nabancani." 
Psalms148:13 Koke lokho akudumise ibizo lakaSomnini, ngombana libizo lakhe lodwa eliphakamileko; iphazimulwakhe ingehla kwephasi nezulu." 
Psalms148:14 Uvusele abantu bakhe isithunzi, idumo kwabathembekileko bakhe boke, iye, kuma-Israyeli, okubabantu abasehliziywenakhe. Haleluya!" 
Psalms149:1 Haleluya! Vumani ingoma etja kuSomnini, idumo lakhe ehlanganweni yabathembekileko." 
Psalms149:2 U-Israyeli akathabe kumenzakhe; abantwana beZiyoni bahlokome eKosinabo. 
Psalms149:3 Abadumise ibizo lakaZimabo ngokugida, bamlilisele abosotjherere namaharibhana." 
Psalms149:4 Mbala, uSomnini uyabathabela abantu bakhe; abathobekileko ubembathisa ukuhlula." 
Psalms149:5 Abathembekileko abalilizele ngehlonipho, bahlokome basemikghadinabo." 
Psalms149:6 Ukuphakamisa uZimu akube semaphinjenabo nesabula ebukhali mahlangothi woke ayibe sesandleni sabo 
Psalms149:7 ukuze bazibuyiselele kebezizwe, bebahlunguphaze nabantu," 
Psalms149:8 babophe amakhosabo ngeenketani nabosaziwako bakhona ngamakhamandela," 
Psalms149:9 baphethe isigwebo kibo sokutloliweko. Lokhu kulidumo kwabathembekileko bakhe boke. Haleluya! 
Psalms150:1 Haleluya! Dumisani uZimu ethempelini lakhe; mdumiseni esibangeni samandlakhe. 
Psalms150:2 Mdumiseni ngezenzo zamandlakhe; nimdumise ngobukhulu bakhe obudluleleko. 
Psalms150:3 Mdumiseni ngomdumo wepalapala, nimdumise ngemihlobohlobo yamaharibha." 
Psalms150:4 Mdumiseni ngabosotjherere nangegido, nimdumise ngemitjingo nangamanghwani." 
Psalms150:5 Mdumiseni ngeewahlo ezinetjhada, nimdumise ngeewahlo ezinomdumo." 
Psalms150:6 Koke okuphilako, akudumise uSomnini. Haleluya!" 
Proverbs1:1 Izaga zakaSolomoni umsa kaDavida ikosi yakwa-Israyeli 
Proverbs1:2 Ngezokwazi ubuhlakani nokuyelelisa, kanye nokuzwisisa amezwi welemuko;" 
Proverbs1:3 iye, ukuzuza ukulaywa okunokuhlakanipha, ukulunga, ubulungiswa nokufaneleko." 
Proverbs1:4 Abanganalwazi zibanikela ilemuko, omncani ilwazi nokuhlukanisa." 
Proverbs1:5 Ohlakaniphileko akalalele, azuze ingqondo nonekghono afumane indlela yoburholi," 
Proverbs1:6 ukuze azwisise isaga nesitjho okutjho amezwi neenrarejo zabahlakaniphileko. 
Proverbs1:7 Ukwesaba uSomnini kukuthoma kokuhlakanipha, kodwana isidlhadlha sinyaza ubuhlakani nokusolwa." 
Proverbs1:8 Ndodanami, lalela isiyeleliso sakayihlo, ungalahli ifundiso kanyoko;" 
Proverbs1:9 mbala, lokho kuzakuba mbhode kufaneze ihlokwakho, kube sigejo entanyenakho." 
Proverbs1:10 Ndodanami, nakube izoni ziyakuyenga, ungaphiki nazo." 
Proverbs1:11 Nakube zithi, “Namba nathi, sikhukhuthele iingazi zothileko, sinanabele umphefumulo omsulwa," 
Proverbs1:12 iye, sibaginye baphila njengokufa, njengalabo abehlela ethuneni basaphelele;" 
Proverbs1:13 sizazifumanela imihlobohlobo yobuphaziphazi, sizalise iinkumba zethu ngepango," 
Proverbs1:14 nawuphosa ifumbakho kanye nathi bese sahlukaniselana isikhwama”," 
Proverbs1:15 ndodanami, ungaphiki nazo. Ungalibhadi emzilenazo," 
Proverbs1:16 ngombana iinyawo zazo, zigijimela ekoneni, ziyarhaba ukuthulula iingazi." 
Proverbs1:17 Akusizi ukubeka isifu khisibe zoke iinyoni zikuqalile. 
Proverbs1:18 Abantwaba bakhukhuthela iingazi zabo, bananabela ipilwabo!" 
Proverbs1:19 Zinjalo iindlela zabo boke abazifunela inzuzo ngokurhabileko: Kuthatha ipilo yabanikazi benzuzo leyo! 
Proverbs1:20 Unokuhlakanipha urhuwelela endledlaneni, uphakamisa iphimbo ematatawini." 
Proverbs1:21 Umemeza ekabeni yeendledlana eziyaluzelako, akhulume amezwi wokuhlakanipha ebungenweni bamasango wedorobho athi:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Kuzabe kube nini nina eninganalwazi nithanda ukungabi nelwazi na? Kuzabe kube nini iinyefuli zijajuliswa kukokomeja neendlhadlha zizonda ilwazi na? 
Proverbs1:23 Nangathana khenalalela ukukhalima kwami, bengizokuthululela ummoya wokuhlakanipha kini, nginazise amezwami." 
Proverbs1:24 Kodwana ngebanga lokobana nalile nangibizako, nangayelela nangelula isandla sami," 
Proverbs1:25 nathalalisa zoke iinluleko zami, nangavuma ukukhalima kwami," 
Proverbs1:26 nami-ke ngizokuhleka ihlekelelenu, ngininyefule nanehlelwa kukwesaba," 
Proverbs1:27 iye, ukwesaba nakunehlela njengesiwuruwuru, ihlekelelenu nayivuthela njengesivunguvungu, nalokha nanembathwa lisizi neenkathazo." 
Proverbs1:28 “Yeke bazangibiza, ngingabaphenduli, bangifunisise, bangangifumani." 
Proverbs1:29 Njengombana bahloye ilwazi, bangakhethi ukwesaba uSomnini," 
Proverbs1:30 bangamukeli iseluleko sami, badelela koke ukukhalima kwami," 
Proverbs1:31 bazakugoma isithelo sendlelabo, bazaliswe ngomphumela wamaqhingabo." 
Proverbs1:32 Ukuphambuka kwabanganalwazi kuyababulala nokuzethemba kweendlhadlha kuyazibhubhisa. 
Proverbs1:33 Kodwana ongilalelako, uzakuphila aphephile, azigedle, angabi nokwesaba ihlekelele.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Ndodanami, nakube wamukela amezwami, ufihle imiyalwami ehliziywenakho," 
Proverbs2:2 indlebakho ilalele ukuhlakanipha, welulele ihliziywakho ekuzwisiseni," 
Proverbs2:3 iye, lokha nawufisa ukwazi, urhuwelele ubize ukuzwisisa," 
Proverbs2:4 nakube lokho ukufuna njengesiliva, ukufunisise njengegugu elifihliweko," 
Proverbs2:5 khona-ke uzakuzwisisa ukwesaba uSomnini, bese ufumana ukumazi uZimu." 
Proverbs2:6 USomnini unikela ukuhlakanipha, emlonyenakhe kuvela ilwazi nokuzwisisa." 
Proverbs2:7 Ubekela abaqotho ipumelelo usihlangu kilabo abaneendlela ezimsulwa," 
Proverbs2:8 ubulunga imizila yokulunga, alonde indlela yabathembekileko bakhe." 
Proverbs2:9 Khona-ke uzakulemuka ukulunga, ubulungiswa nokuhleleka, iye, enye nenye indlela elungileko." 
Proverbs2:10 Mbala, ubuhlakani buzakungena ehliziywenakho, unandiphelwe lilwazi emphefumulwenakho." 
Proverbs2:11 Ukuhlolisisa kuzakulonda nokuzwisisa kukubulunge," 
Proverbs2:12 kukuhlenge endleleni yokonakala, iye, ebantwini abakhuluma okuphambeneko," 
Proverbs2:13 kilabo abaphambuka emizileni elungileko kobana bakhambe eendleleni zobumnyama," 
Proverbs2:14 bajabulele ukwenza okumbi, bathabe ngokuphambukela ebumbini;" 
Proverbs2:15 labo iindlela zabo zimasongesonge, nemizilabo iyalahlekisa." 
Proverbs2:16 Ukuzwisisa kuzakuhlenga kunondindwa, iye, umfazi otjhili onelimu elibutjhelelezi," 
Proverbs2:17 otjhiye umlingani wobutjha bakhe, wakhohlwa isivumelwano sakhe noZimu." 
Proverbs2:18 Ikumbakhe yehlela ekufeni, nemizilakhe iya kabafileko." 
Proverbs2:19 Boke abaya kuye ababuyi, abasayifumani imizila yokuphila." 
Proverbs2:20 Ngalokho khamba ngendlela yabalungileko, unamathele emizileni yabamsulwa." 
Proverbs2:21 Mbala, abaqotho bazakunzinza enarheni nabanganamlandu bahlale kiyo;" 
Proverbs2:22 kodwana iinkhohlakali zizakujutjwa enarheni, nabangathembekiko basitjhulwe kiyo." 
Proverbs3:1 Ndodanami, ungakhohlwa ifundiswami, kodwana ihliziywakho ayibulunge imiyalwami;" 
Proverbs3:2 Mbala izakwelula amalangakho iye, ingezelele iminyaka nokuthula kuwe." 
Proverbs3:3 Nawungatjhiyi ukwethembeka neqiniso, okutjho ukukubophelela entanyenakho, ukutlole emiqebethwini yehliziywakho," 
Proverbs3:4 uzakuzuza umusa, ubukwe nguZimu nabantu." 
Proverbs3:5 Themba uSomnini ngehliziywakho yoke, ungeyami ekwazini kwakho." 
Proverbs3:6 Nawazisa uSomnini kizo zoke iindlela zakho, yena uzakwenza imizilakho ilelezeke." 
Proverbs3:7 Ungaziboni inga uhlakaniphile emehlwenakho, yesaba uSomnini, utjhide ebumbini." 
Proverbs3:8 Lokhu kuzakuletha ipilo emzimbenakho, nokondleka emathanjenakho." 
Proverbs3:9 Nawuhlonipha uSomnini ngomnonwakho, iye, ngesilumo semikhiqizwakho yoke," 
Proverbs3:10 yena uzakuzalisa iinlulu zakho ngokwaneleko neembekelelo zakho ziphuphume ngesitjhidela sewayini. 
Proverbs3:11 Ndodanami, ungadeleli ukusola kwakaSomnini, ungadinwa kukhalima kwakhe," 
Proverbs3:12 ngombana uSomnini uyamkhalima amthandako, njengobaba endodanenakhe ayithandako." 
Proverbs3:13 Ubusisiwe umuntu ofunyana ubuhlakani, iye, umuntu ozuza ukuzwisisa," 
Proverbs3:14 ngombana ingcono inzuzo yakhona kuneyesiliva, iye, imbuyiselo yakhona kuneyegolide." 
Proverbs3:15 Kuligugu ukudlula amaparele; mbala akunalitho olifisako elingafana nakho. 
Proverbs3:16 Ipilo ede ingesigomeni sakanokwazi, ngesinceleni sakhe kunomnono nedumo." 
Proverbs3:17 Iindlela zakhe ngezithokozisako, nemizilakhe ikuthula." 
Proverbs3:18 Umumuthi wokuphila kilabo abamamukelako, abanamathela kuye bazakubizwa bona ngabathakasileko." 
Proverbs3:19 USomnini wendlale iinsekelo zephasi ngobuhlakani, wanzinzisa amazulu ngokuzwisisa," 
Proverbs3:20 ngelwazi lakhe amanzi agobhoza, umkayi wathontisa umbethe." 
Proverbs3:21 Ndodanami, bulunga ubuhlakani nokuhlolisisa, ungavumi kusuke emehlwenakho," 
Proverbs3:22 kuzakuba kuphila emphefumulwenakho, kube mkghabiso entanyenakho." 
Proverbs3:23 Yeke uzakukhamba endlelenakho uphephile, nenyawo lakho angeze lakhutjwa." 
Proverbs3:24 Lokha nawuyokulala, angeze wesaba, iye, nawuleleko, uzakuba nobuthongo obumnandi." 
Proverbs3:25 Ungabi nevalo ngehlekelele yamsinya nangamatshwenyeko lokha nehlela abakhohlakeleko," 
Proverbs3:26 ngombana uSomnini uzakuba seqadi kwakho, alonde inyawo lakho ekubanjweni sisifu." 
Proverbs3:27 Ungathi nawunamandla wokwenza okuhle, ubagodlele labo okufanele ubenzele." 
Proverbs3:28 Ungathi komunye umuntu: “Khamba, ubuye kusasa, ngizakupha”, khisibe unakho lokho akukhombelako." 
Proverbs3:29 Ungeluki amano wokulimaza omunye umuntu ohlezi nawe ngokukwethemba. 
Proverbs3:30 Ungasoli umuntu ngaphandle kwesizathu khisibe akakakoni ngalitho. 
Proverbs3:31 Ungafisi ipumelelo yomuntu onenturhu, ungakhethi nayinye yeendlela zakhe," 
Proverbs3:32 ngombana uSomnini uyamnyenya ophambukela kizo, kodwana unesikhozi nabaqotho." 
Proverbs3:33 Isithuweleliso sakaSomnini siphezu kwekumba yokhohlakeleko, kodwana ubusisa ihlalo yabalungileko." 
Proverbs3:34 Yena unyefula iinyefuli, abazithobileko abaphe umusa." 
Proverbs3:35 Abahlakaniphileko bazuza idumo, kodwana iindlhadlha zizandisela ihlazo." 
Proverbs4:1 Bantwana, lalelani ukuyala kwakababa, niyelele ilwazi lokuzwisisa," 
Proverbs4:2 ngombana ngininikela umqondo omuhle; ngalokho ningalahli ifundiswami. 
Proverbs4:3 Lokha nangisese msana kababa, ngisese manzi ngiyithorwana kamma," 
Proverbs4:4 ubaba wangifundisa wathi kimi: “Ihliziywakho ayibambisise amezwami. Nawulonda imiyalwami, uzakuphila." 
Proverbs4:5 Nawuzuza ubuhlakani, uzakufumana ilwazi. Ungakhohlwa begodu ungaphambuki emezwini womlomami." 
Proverbs4:6 Nawungalahli ukuhlakanipha, kuzakulonda; nawukuthandako, kuzakubulunga ipilwakho." 
Proverbs4:7 Ukuthoma kokuhlakanipha ngilokhu: Zuza ubuhlakani nangepahlakho yoke zuza ilwazi. 
Proverbs4:8 Nawuphatha kuhle ubuhlakani, buzakuphakamisa, buzakudumisa nawubugonako." 
Proverbs4:9 Buzakwethwesa umbhode wokufaneza, bukunikele isihlohlo sedumo.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Lalela ndodanami, nawamukela amezwami, uzakwengezelelelwa iminyaka yokuphila." 
Proverbs4:11 Ngakufundisa indlela yokuhlakanipha, ngakurholela emizileni elungileko." 
Proverbs4:12 Nawukhamba kiyo, angeze wathikamezeka, nalokha nawugijimako, angeze wakhutjwa." 
Proverbs4:13 Bambelela ekuyalweni, ungakulisi, kweluse ngombana kukuphila kwakho." 
Proverbs4:14 Ungakhambi emzileni wabakhohlakeleko, ungabeki inyawo endleleni yabambi." 
Proverbs4:15 Icwaye, ungakhambi kiyo; deda kiyo uhlabele phambili." 
Proverbs4:16 Abambi abalali bangakenzi okumbi; ubuthongo abehli bangakakhubazi umuntu. 
Proverbs4:17 Iye, bagoma isikwa sobukhohlakali, basele iwayini lenturhu." 
Proverbs4:18 Umzila wabalungileko ufana nomkhanyo welanga: Ukusukela ekuphumeni kwalo, umkhanyo lo ukhanya ukuya ngokuya bekube semini." 
Proverbs4:19 Kodwana indlela yabakhohlakeleko, ibumnyama obuphathekako, abazi bona bakhutjwa yini." 
Proverbs4:20 Ndodanami, lalela amezwami; ubeke indlebakho kilokho engikutjhoko." 
Proverbs4:21 Ungavumi kusuke emehlwenakho; kulonde ngehliziywenakho," 
Proverbs4:22 ngombana kuyipilo kabakufunyanako, nokuphiliswa komzimba woke." 
Proverbs4:23 Kikho koke okulondako, yelusa khulu ihliziywakho, ngombana imuthombo wokuphila." 
Proverbs4:24 Susa ikulumo yokonakala kuwe nokuphambana kweembhena kube kude nawe. 
Proverbs4:25 Amehlwakho akaqale phambili, ukugolozela kwakho kube phambi kwakho." 
Proverbs4:26 Utjheje umzila walapha ugadanga khona, ngalokho iindlela zakho zizakunqopha." 
Proverbs4:27 Ungaphambukeli ngesigomeni namkha ngesinceleni, susa inyawo lakho ebumbini." 
Proverbs5:1 Ndodanami, lalelisisa ukuhlakanipha kwami, ubeke indlebakho elemukweni lami," 
Proverbs5:2 ukuze ulonde ingqondo ehle neembhena zakho zimumathe ilwazi. 
Proverbs5:3 Yelela, iimbhena zakanondindwa ziwuluka iliju norhwalabhakhe ubutjhelelezi ukudlula amafutha." 
Proverbs5:4 Kodwana ekugcineni unondindwa loyo ubaba njengomrhalagani, ubukhali ukudlula isabula ebukhali mahlangothi woke." 
Proverbs5:5 Iinyawo zakhe zehlela ekufeni, amagadangwakhe atjhinga endaweni yabafileko." 
Proverbs5:6 Ugobanisa imizilakhe ukuze akulahlekise emtlhaleni wokuphila, wena angeze wakwazi lokho." 
Proverbs5:7 Nje-ke ndodanami, yewungilalele; ungaphambuki emezwini womlomami!" 
Proverbs5:8 Khambela kude naye, ungatjhideli esangweni lekumbakhe," 
Proverbs5:9 ukuze ungazehlisi isithunzi kabanye nejamo lakho ngomfazi osihlola," 
Proverbs5:10 iye, nemiqhamuka ingazisuthisi ngelifa lakho, bese imijulukwakho iphelele ekumbeni yomfazi otjhili." 
Proverbs5:11 Ekupheleni usale ungasenanto, uqume lokha nasele umzimbakho ukhehlile," 
Proverbs5:12 uzakuthi: “Maye, ngazonda ukusolwa! Ihliziywami yanyaza ukukhalinywa!" 
Proverbs5:13 Akhange ngilalele abafundisi, nanyana ngibeke indlebe ebelulekini bami." 
Proverbs5:14 Ngipheze ngabhujiswa nya ehlanganweni nemphakathini.” 
Proverbs5:15 Sela amanzi emphathamanzinakho, uzikholise ngomthombakho ogelezako." 
Proverbs5:16 Kumele imithombakho iphuphumele ngaphandle nemiselakho eendledlaneni na? 
Proverbs5:17 Akube ngokwakho wedwa, ungakwabelani nemiqhamuka." 
Proverbs5:18 Asibusiswe isiyalu sakho, uthokoze emfazini wobutjha bakho," 
Proverbs5:19 ihlangukazimataka ethandekako, iye, imbuzikazi yeentaba! Inga amabelakhe angakwanelisa soke isikhathi, uhlanyiswe lithando lakhe njalo." 
Proverbs5:20 Ndodanami, kubayini uhlanyiswe ngunondindwa? Kubayini ugone isifuba sesihlobongi na?" 
Proverbs5:21 Mbala iindlela zomuntu zisemtarini phambi kwakaSomnini. Yena uhlolisisa yoke imizilayo. 
Proverbs5:22 Isikhohlakali sibanjwa macalaso, iinkawule zesono saso zisibambe tli." 
Proverbs5:23 Sifa ngokuswela ukuzibamba ngombana sibhaduzeliswa budlhayelakazi baso. 
Proverbs6:1 Ndodanami, nawenze isibambiso kumakhelwanakho, wambamba isandla, wazibophelela esikhundleni somqhamuka," 
Proverbs6:2 iye, nakube sewubanjwe yikulumakho, wagolwa mamezwi womlomakho," 
Proverbs6:3 yeke yenza lokhu ndodanami: Zitjhaphulule ngombana uwele ezandleni zakamakhelwanakho. Rhaba, ulandelele umakhelwanakho loyo, umkhole." 
Proverbs6:4 Ungavumeli ubuthongo emehlwenakho, nokuyenda eenkopheni zakho." 
Proverbs6:5 Zithukulule njengetsephe kumzumi, nanjengenyoni esandleni somthiyi." 
Proverbs6:6 Yewuye ebutjhontjhwaneni vila ndina! Uqale iindlela zabo khona uzakuhlakanipha! 
Proverbs6:7 Ubutjhontjhwani abunamrholi, umtjhotjhozeli nombusi," 
Proverbs6:8 kodwana ehlobo buzibekela umphakwabo, bubuthelele ukudla kwabo nakuvunwako." 
Proverbs6:9 Uzokurabhalala lapho bekube nini vila ndina? Uzokuvuka nini ebuthongweni bakhobo? 
Proverbs6:10 Uyalalalala, uyendayende, usongasonge izandla uphumule," 
Proverbs6:11 ngalokho ubuchaka buzakubhudungela njengesela, nokweswela njengendoda ehlomileko." 
Proverbs6:12 Isibhidlamnyanya esonakaleko sikhamba sikhuluma ikohliso," 
Proverbs6:13 sincinze amehlo, sikhombise ngenyawo nangemino;" 
Proverbs6:14 sinomkhumbulo ophambeneko, silumba amano wokulimaza, sihlala sicabanisa." 
Proverbs6:15 Ngalokho uzakwehlelwa yihlekelele msinyana, ubhujiswe ngokuphazima kwelihlo, kungabi nantatha." 
Proverbs6:16 Kunezinto ezisithandathu ezizondwa nguSomnini, iye, ezilikhomba ezisinyenyiso kuye:" 
Proverbs6:17 amehlo aziphakamisako, ilimu elileya amala, izandla eziphalaza iingazi ezimsulwa," 
Proverbs6:18 ihliziyo elumba amano wokonakala, iinyawo ezirhaba ukugijimela ebumbini," 
Proverbs6:19 ufakazi wekohliso ophafuza amanga nomuntu ocabanisako hlangana nabafo. 
Proverbs6:20 Ndodanami, bulunga umyalo kayihlo, ungalahli ifundiso kanyoko." 
Proverbs6:21 Kubophelele ehliziywenakho mlibe, ukuthekeleze entanyenakho." 
Proverbs6:22 Nawukhambako, kuzakuhlahla; nawulalako, kukweluse; nawuvukako, kukukhulumise." 
Proverbs6:23 Mbala umyalo usibani; ifundiso imukhanyo. Ukusolwa ngemiyalo kuyindlela yokuphila," 
Proverbs6:24 ukuze ulondeke emfazini owonakeleko, iye, elimini elibutjhelelezi lesihlobongi." 
Proverbs6:25 Ungakhanuki ubuhle baso ehliziywenakho, ungavumi bona sikuwunge ngeenkophe zaso," 
Proverbs6:26 ngombana ikokhelo yengwadla sisikwa esindulungu, kodwana umfazi wenye indoda uyingozi epilwenakho eligugu." 
Proverbs6:27 Indoda ingathwala umlilo ngesifuba, kodwana izambatho zayo zingatjhi na?" 
Proverbs6:28 Indoda ingakhamba phezu kwamalahle avuthako, kodwana ingatjhi iinyawo na?" 
Proverbs6:29 Unjalo-ke umuntu olalana nomfazi wenye indoda, akunamuntu ongathinta umfazi loyo angahlunguphazwa." 
Proverbs6:30 Abantu abalideleli isela eleba ukuze lizisuthise ngoba lilambile. 
Proverbs6:31 Nakube liyabanjwa lizakukhokha ngokubuyelelwe kalikhomba belinikele ngayo yoke ipahla yekumbalo. 
Proverbs6:32 Kodwana umuntu ohlobongako, uswela ingqondo; owenza njalo uyazibhubhisa." 
Proverbs6:33 Uzakufumana amaduma nehlazo, ukuhlaziseka kwakhe angeze kwasulwa." 
Proverbs6:34 Mbala isikhwele sivusa itukuthelo yendoda, angeze yaba nomusa mhlana izibuyiselelako." 
Proverbs6:35 Angeze yamukela ihlawulo, angeze yavuma ukufunjathiswa, ngitjho nanyana kungaba ngokungangani." 
Proverbs7:1 Ndodanami, londa amezwami, ufihle imiyalwami ehliziywenakho." 
Proverbs7:2 Nawulonda imiyalwami uzakuphila. Iye, ulonde ifundiswami njengehlavu yelihlo lakho;" 
Proverbs7:3 ibophelele eminwenakho, uyitlole emiqebethwini yehliziywakho." 
Proverbs7:4 Yithi ekuhlakanipheni: “Wena ungudadwethu”, bese ubiza ukuzwisisa ngesihlobo sakho." 
Proverbs7:5 Lokho kuzakulonda esihlobongini, iye, emfazini otjhili onamezwi abutjhelelezi." 
Proverbs7:6 Lokha nangisefesidereni lekumbami ngihlola emlukweni wefesidere," 
Proverbs7:7 ngabona hlangana nabanganalwazi, ngayelela hlangana namasokana umuntu omutjha onganangqondo" 
Proverbs7:8 adlula ehla ngendledlana eduze nejika lekumba yesihlobongi, anqombe nca ngekumbenaso," 
Proverbs7:9 nakuhlwako entambama, sele kuthoma ukurhwaqela." 
Proverbs7:10 Qala, nangu umfazi azomhlangabeza, embethe zobungwadla, anobuqili;" 
Proverbs7:11 akhulumela futhi, anganakuthula begodu alunywa ziinyawo:" 
Proverbs7:12 njenje useendledlaneni, njenje usetatawini ledorobho; emajikeni woke ucuphile." 
Proverbs7:13 Wamtjhuba wamumanga, akhange abe neenhloni, wathi kuye:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Namhlanje ngifeza iimfungo zami, yeke nginomhlabelo wetjhebiswano ekhaya." 
Proverbs7:15 Ngalokho ngiphume bona ngikuhlangabeze, bengiseze ngikufuna, nje-ke ngikufumene!" 
Proverbs7:16 Ngendlale umbhedami ngamatjhila iye, amibalabala welineni abuya eGibhide." 
Proverbs7:17 Ngiwufafaze ngemire, iqolo lesikghopha nesinamoni." 
Proverbs7:18 Yewize sizanelise ngomseme bekuse, iye, sizitike ngethando!" 
Proverbs7:19 Qala, indodami ayikho ekhayapha, ithethe ikhambo elide." 
Proverbs7:20 Ibhade imbadayo yemali, izabe ibuye inyanga nayigcweleko.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Wamsomasoma ngelimu elithambileko, wamwunga ngeembhena ezibutjhelelezi." 
Proverbs7:22 Khonapho isidlhadlhakazeso sasuka samlandela, njengekomo isiya ebuhlabelweni nehlokwayo irhobelwe ngomutja," 
Proverbs7:23 kufikela lapha umkhonto uhlaba khona isibindi sayo. Sinjengenyoni irhabela esifini ingalemuki bonyana izakulahlekelwa yipilo. 
Proverbs7:24 Nje-ke ndodanami, yewungilalele yelela amezwami." 
Proverbs7:25 Ungavumeli ihliziywakho iphendukele eendleleni zesihlobongi, ungakhambakhambi emizilenaso." 
Proverbs7:26 Banengi abongazimbi esibawisileko, sibulele iwoma elikhulu." 
Proverbs7:27 Ikumbaso imasango wokuya ekufeni, ehlela phasi emalawini wokufa." 
Proverbs8:1 Ukuhlakanipha akubizi na? Ukuzwisisa akurhuweleli na? 
Proverbs8:2 Kujame embundwini hlanu kwendlela, lapha kuhlangana khona imizila," 
Proverbs8:3 kurhuwelela eqadi kwamatatawu ngedorobheni ebungenweni bamasango kuhlokoma kuthi: 
Proverbs8:4 “Ngiyanibiza nina madoda, ngirhuwelela boke abantu!" 
Proverbs8:5 Nina eninganalwazi, zuzani ilemuko! Nina enidlhayeleko, zuzani ukuzwisisa!" 
Proverbs8:6 Lalelani ngombana nginezinto ezinetlha, iimbhena zami zikhuluma okufaneleko." 
Proverbs8:7 Umlomami umemezela okuliqiniso, ubukhohlakali busikghabhudlho eembheneni zami." 
Proverbs8:8 Woke amezwi womlomami alungile, alikho nalinye lawo eligwegwesileko namkha elonakeleko." 
Proverbs8:9 Woke anqophile kozwisisako begodu alungile kabafumana ilwazi. 
Proverbs8:10 Khethani ukusola kwami kunesiliva, nirhuluphele ilwazi kunegolidembala," 
Proverbs8:11 ngombana ukuhlakanipha kuhle kunamaparele, mbala akunalitho olifisako elingafana nakho." 
Proverbs8:12 “Mina, unokuhlakanipha ngiphila nelemuko; ngihlanganyela nelwazi lengqondo ehle." 
Proverbs8:13 Ukwesaba uSomnini kukuzonda ubumbi, Ngizonda ukuzitjhaya nokuziphakamisa kanye nekulumo ephambeneko." 
Proverbs8:14 Kimi kunokweluleka nepumelelo; mina nginokuzwisisa, nginamandla." 
Proverbs8:15 Ngami amakhosi ayabusa nababusi benza imithetho elungileko. 
Proverbs8:16 Iinkhulu nabosaziwako babusa ngami, iye, boke abaphatha ngokulungileko." 
Proverbs8:17 Ngithanda labo abangithandako, abangifunako bayangifunyana." 
Proverbs8:18 Kimi kunobunjinga nedumo, umnotho othandwako nepumelelo." 
Proverbs8:19 Isithelo sami singcono kunegolide, ngitjho negolidembala nomkhiqizwami ungcono kunesiliva ekhethekileko." 
Proverbs8:20 Ngikhamba emizileni yokulunga, phakathi kweendlela zobulungiswa," 
Proverbs8:21 ukuze ngiphe abangithandako umnotho kube lilifa labo, ngizalise iinlulu zabo.”" 
Proverbs8:22 “USomnini ungidale ekuthomeni kwendalwakhe, ngaphambi kwemisebenzakhe yendulo." 
Proverbs8:23 Ngabunjwa mandulondulo, ekuthomeni, ngaphambi komlando womhlaba." 
Proverbs8:24 Ngabelethwa amanzi amanengi angakabiphi, kungakabiphi nemithombo ephuphuma amanzi;" 
Proverbs8:25 ngaphambi kobana iintaba zinzinziswe, iye, ngaphambi kobana kube nemibundu," 
Proverbs8:26 ngaphambi kobana adale ihlabathi nemimango, ngitjho namathomo weentuli zephasi." 
Proverbs8:27 Ngasele ngikhona lokha uZimu najamisa amazulu, lokha nathala umthala phezu kobuso bamalwandle;" 
Proverbs8:28 nasungula isibhakabhaka phezulu, abeka imikhawulo yeeyalu zamanzi amanengi;" 
Proverbs8:29 nanikela amalwandle amaphethelwawo ukuze amanzi angeqi umyalwakhe. Lokha nathala iinsekelo zephasi 
Proverbs8:30 bengiseqadi kwakhe ngingusosino, ngimthabela imihla ngemihla, ngihlala ngijabulile phambi kwakhe," 
Proverbs8:31 ngijabulile ngelizwe lephasi lakhe, ngithabele abantu." 
Proverbs8:32 “Nje-ke, madodana, yeningilalele; ngithi babusisiwe abalonda iindlela zami." 
Proverbs8:33 Lalelani ukusola kwami. Nakube nihlakaniphile, angeze nakudela." 
Proverbs8:34 Ubusisiwe umuntu ongilalelako, oqapha eminyangwenami imihla ngemihla alinde emathurini wamasangwami." 
Proverbs8:35 Ofumana mina ufumene ipilo begodu uzuza umusa kuSomnini. 
Proverbs8:36 Kodwana ohlulwa kungifumana uzilimaza yena ngokwakhe, boke abangizondako bathanda ukufa!”" 
Proverbs9:1 Unokuhlakanipha uzakhele ikumba, wazibazela iinsika ezilikhomba." 
Proverbs9:2 Uhlabe isitjhebo, wawumela iwayini, wendlala itafula" 
Proverbs9:3 bewathuma iincekukazi zakhe. Ubiza asesiqongolweni sedorobho uthi: 
Proverbs9:4 “Wena onganalwazi jikela lapha!” Abuye athi kabanganangqondo: 
Proverbs9:5 “Yizani nizogoma ukudla kwami, nisele newayini lami engiliwumeleko." 
Proverbs9:6 Fulathelani ubudlhadlha, khona nizakuphila benikhambe endleleni yokuzwisisa." 
Proverbs9:7 Loyo osola isinyefuli, uzibizela ihlamba. Naloyo okhalimela isikhohlakali ufumana ukurhubutjhwa." 
Proverbs9:8 Nawukhalimela isinyefuli sizakuzonda, kodwana nawukhalimela ohlakaniphileko, uzakuthanda." 
Proverbs9:9 Nawunikela ilwazi kohlakaniphileko, uzakwanda ngobuhlakani; nawufundisa olungileko, uzazengezela ingqondo." 
Proverbs9:10 “Ukwesaba uSomnini kukuthoma kokuhlakanipha nokwazi oCwengileko kukuzwisisa. 
Proverbs9:11 Ngami amalangakho azakwanda, kungezelelwe neminyaka yokuphila kwakho." 
Proverbs9:12 Nakube uhlakaniphile, ukuhlakanipha kwakho kuzakuhlomulisa, nakube usinyefuli, uzazithwalela umthwalo wedwa.”" 
Proverbs9:13 Unobudlhadlha unetjhada akakhalimeki begodu akanalwazi. 
Proverbs9:14 Uhlala emnyango wekumbakhe, esihlalweni esisesiqongolweni sedorobho," 
Proverbs9:15 urhuwelela abadlula ngendlela, labo abakhamba ngendlela enqombileko, uthi:" 
Proverbs9:16 “Wena onganalwazi jikela lapha!” Abuye athi kabanganangqondo: 
Proverbs9:17 “Amanzi wokwetjiwa ehla esiphundu, nokugoma kwangemsitheleni kuyanandipha!”" 
Proverbs9:18 Kodwana abalemuki bonyana abafileko balapho neenthekeli zobudlhayela obusamfazi zisekuzikeni kweliba. 
Proverbs10:1 Izaga zakaSolomoni Umntwana ohlakaniphileko ujabulisa uyise, kodwana osidlhadlha ulisizi kunina." 
Proverbs10:2 Umnono wobukhohlakali awunanzuzo, kodwana ukulunga kusindisa ekufeni." 
Proverbs10:3 USomnini akavumi kobana olungileko alambe, kodwana isifiso somumbi uyasiphaya." 
Proverbs10:4 Izandla ezidondako zichakisa umuntu, kodwana zabakhutheleko ziyanothisa." 
Proverbs10:5 Obuthelela isivuno ehlobo uhlakaniphile, kodwana otutumalako nakuvunwako usiphoqo." 
Proverbs10:6 Iimbusiso zisihlohlo ehloko yolungileko, kodwana umlomo weenkhohlakali ufihle inturhu." 
Proverbs10:7 Ukukhunjulwa kolungileko kusibusiso, kodwana amabizo weenkhohlakali asisikgha." 
Proverbs10:8 Ohlakaniphileko engqondweni wamukela imiyalo, kodwana isidlhadlha esipepezako siyabhubha." 
Proverbs10:9 Ophila ngobuqotho uyalondeka, kodwana oziphatha magwegwe usemtarini." 
Proverbs10:10 Oncinza ilihlo ngobukhohlakali ubanga isizi nesidlhadlha esipepezako siyabhubha. 
Proverbs10:11 Umlomo wolungileko umthombo wokuphila, kodwana weenkhohlakali ufihle inturhu." 
Proverbs10:12 Izondo ivusa ukucabana, kodwana ithando lisibekela zoke iimphambeko." 
Proverbs10:13 Ukuhlakanipha kufunyanwa eembheneni zohlolisisako, kodwana iswazi libekelwe umhlana wonganangqondo." 
Proverbs10:14 Abahlakaniphileko babulunga ilwazi, kodwana umlomo wesidlhadlha uzibizela ukonakala." 
Proverbs10:15 Umnono wabanjingileko ulidorobho labo elinemithangala, kodwana abachakileko baqedwa buchaka babo." 
Proverbs10:16 Ikokhelo yolungileko ikuphila, kodwana inzuzo yesikhohlakali sisono." 
Proverbs10:17 Ovuma ukusolwa usendleleni yokuphila, kodwana ongafuni ukuyeleliswa uyadurhisa." 
Proverbs10:18 Ofihla izondo anayo uneembhena zamanga norhatjha amahlebezi usidlhadlha. 
Proverbs10:19 Eenkulumeni ezinengi isiphambeko asitlhogeki, kodwana ogoba ilimu lakhe uhlakaniphile." 
Proverbs10:20 Ilimu lolungileko lilisiliva elikhethekileko, kodwana ingqondo yeenkhohlakali ayisililitho." 
Proverbs10:21 Iimbhena zolungileko zondla abanengi, kodwana iindlhadlha ziyafa ngokungabanangqondo." 
Proverbs10:22 Isibusiso sakaSomnini siletha umnono nomtjhikatjhika awengezi litho kiwo. 
Proverbs10:23 Isidlhadlha sithokoziswa kuziphatha kumbi, kodwana umuntu onehloko uthokoziswa kuhlakanipha." 
Proverbs10:24 Okhohlakeleko wehlelwa ngakusabako, olungileko unikelwa akufisako." 
Proverbs10:25 Nasele isivunguvungu sidlulile okhohlakeleko uyatjhabalala, kodwana olungileko uyanzinziswa nini nanini." 
Proverbs10:26 Njengesibharha emazinyweni nentuthu emehlweni, linjalo-ke nevila kilabo abalithumako." 
Proverbs10:27 Ukwesaba uSomnini kungezelela amalanga wokuphila, kodwana iminyaka yeenkhohlakali iyaphungulwa." 
Proverbs10:28 Abalungileko balindela itokozo, kodwana ithemba leenkhohlakali liyanyelela." 
Proverbs10:29 Indlela kaSomnini isiphephelo koqotho, kodwana ikubhubha kweengilamkhuba." 
Proverbs10:30 Olungileko angeze asikinywa, kodwana iinkhohlakali angeze zahlala ephasini." 
Proverbs10:31 Umlomo wolungileko uyaphumelela ekuhlakanipheni, kodwana ilimu labonakeleko liyaquntulwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Iimbhena zolungileko ziyakwazi okufaneleko, kodwana umlomo weenkhohlakali wazi okuphambeneko." 
Proverbs11:1 Isilinganiso samanga sisinyenyiso kuSomnini, kodwana ujabulela amatje afaneleko wokulinganisa." 
Proverbs11:2 Lokha ukuzikhukhumeza nakufikako kulandela ihlazo, kodwana abazithobako banokuhlakanipha." 
Proverbs11:3 Ukwethembeka kwabaqotho kuyabahlahla, kodwana abangakathembeki babhujiswa buqili babo." 
Proverbs11:4 Umnono awunabubhadekelo ngelanga lelaka, kodwana ukulunga kuhlenga ekufeni." 
Proverbs11:5 Ukulunga kwabamsulwa kubenzela indlela enqophileko, kodwana okhohlakeleko uwiswa bukhohlakali bakhe." 
Proverbs11:6 Ukulunga kwabaqotho kuyabahlenga, kodwana amaqili abhajwa eenkanukweni zawo." 
Proverbs11:7 Lokha okhohlakeleko nafako, ithemba lakhe liyatjhabalala; akulindele emnothwenakhe kuyanyelela." 
Proverbs11:8 Olungileko wenyelwa emirarweni, kuthi okhohlakeleko adlhunyekwe kiyo." 
Proverbs11:9 OnganaZimu ubulala wekhabo ngomlomakhe, kodwana abalungileko benyelwa ngelwazi." 
Proverbs11:10 Lokha olungileko naphumelelako, idorobho liyajekezela, kuthi okhohlakeleko nabhubhako, kube nehlokomo." 
Proverbs11:11 Ngesibusiso sabaqotho, idorobho liyaphakanyiswa, kodwana ngomlomo weenkhohlakali, liyabhujiswa." 
Proverbs11:12 Onyaza wekhabo akanangqondo; ozwisisako ubamba ilimu lakhe. 
Proverbs11:13 Umdlhevezi udlheveza ifihlo, kodwana othembekileko unefihlo." 
Proverbs11:14 Ngokuswela iseluleko isizwe siyawa, kodwana ukuphepha kuza ngabeluleki abanengi." 
Proverbs11:15 Owenzela omunye isibambiso, uba neenhlupheko ezinengi, kodwana ozonda ukufaka isandla esibambisweni uphephile." 
Proverbs11:16 Umfazi onomusa uyahlonitjhwa, kodwana iinrhonga zizuza umnono kwaphela." 
Proverbs11:17 Onomusa uzenzela ubuhle, kodwana onesihluku uzilimaza yena." 
Proverbs11:18 Okhohlakeleko uzuza umvuzo owonakeleko, kodwana otjala ukulunga uvuna umvuzo weqiniso." 
Proverbs11:19 Onzinze ekulungeni uzifumanela ipilo, kodwana olandela ubumbi uzibizela ukufa." 
Proverbs11:20 Abaneenhliziyo ezonakeleko basinyenyiso kuSomnini, kodwana uthokoziswa ngabaneendlela ezimsulwa." 
Proverbs11:21 Nakanjani okhohlakeleko uzakuhlunguphazwa begodu isizukulwana sabalungileko sizakuhlengwa. 
Proverbs11:22 Njengesali legolide epumulweni yewotji, sinjalo-ke nesimomondiya somfazi onganasimilo." 
Proverbs11:23 Isifiso sabalungileko siphelela ebuhleni; ithemba leenkhohlakali liphelela etukuthelweni. 
Proverbs11:24 Omunye unikela ngokutjhaphuluka, nokho azuze khulu, omunye ugodla ngokungakafaneli, kodwana agcine achakile." 
Proverbs11:25 Umuntu ophanako uyaphumelela nokholisa abanye naye uyakholiswa. 
Proverbs11:26 Abantu bathuwelelisa umuntu ogodla ikoroyi, kodwana isibusiso siphezu koyithengisako." 
Proverbs11:27 Ofuna okuhle uyamukeleka, ofuna ubumbi buyamehlela." 
Proverbs11:28 Othembela emnonwenakhe uyawa, kodwana abalungileko batlhurha njengamakari." 
Proverbs11:29 Olimaza umndenakhe uzuza ummoya; isidlhadlha esinjalo siba likhoboka lesihlakaniphi. 
Proverbs11:30 Isithelo solungileko simumuthi wokuphila; ohlakaniphileko ubuthelela abantu kuye. 
Proverbs11:31 Nakube olungileko ufumana okumfaneleko, kangangani-ke okhohlakeleko nesoni!" 
Proverbs12:1 Othanda ukusolwa uthanda ilwazi, ozonda ukukhalinywa usiyila." 
Proverbs12:2 Umuntu olungileko ufumana umusa kuSomnini, kodwana uyamlahla umuntu onobuqili." 
Proverbs12:3 Umuntu akanzinzi ngobukhohlakali; isisekelo sabalungileko sinzinzile. 
Proverbs12:4 Umfazi oqotho unjengesihlohlo endodenakhe, kodwana ohlazisako unjengesidliso emathanjenayo." 
Proverbs12:5 Amano wabalungileko alungile, kodwana iseluleko seenkhohlakali siyikohliso." 
Proverbs12:6 Amezwi weenkhohlakali acuphe iingazi, kodwana umlomo wabaqotho uyabahlenga." 
Proverbs12:7 Abakhohlakeleko bayaketulwa banyamalale, kodwana ikumba yabalungileko iyadzimelela." 
Proverbs12:8 Umuntu udunyiswa ukuya ngokuhlakanipha kwakhe, kodwana onomkhumbulo ophambeneko uyanyazeka." 
Proverbs12:9 Kungcono ukuba phasi khibe nokho unekhoboka, kunobana uzenze umuntu kanti udobha phasi." 
Proverbs12:10 Olungileko unakekela iindingo zefuywakhe, kodwana imizwa yeenkhohlakali ililunya." 
Proverbs12:11 Olima isimakhe uzakufumana ukudla okunengi, kodwana ogijimisana nelize akanangqondo." 
Proverbs12:12 Okhohlakeleko uyakhanuka, iingilamkhuba ziyarhiribidela, kodwana ipande yabalungileko iyathela." 
Proverbs12:13 Omumbi ubanjwa ziimphambeko zomlomakhe, kodwana olungileko uphunyurha emirarweni." 
Proverbs12:14 Esithelweni somlomakhe umuntu utlonyeliswa okuhle, njengombana imisebenzi yezandla zakhe imvuza." 
Proverbs12:15 Indlela yesidlhadlha ibonakala ilungile kiso, kodwana ohlakaniphileko ulalela iseluleko." 
Proverbs12:16 Isidlhadlha siyarhaba ukukhombisa ukunyenya kwaso, kodwana ovuthiweko uyayithalalisa ihlamba." 
Proverbs12:17 Ufakazi weqiniso ukhuluma iqiniso, kodwana wekohliso ubika amanga." 
Proverbs12:18 Kunabantu abanamezwi ahlaba njengesabula, kodwana ilimu labahlakaniphileko liyaphilisa." 
Proverbs12:19 Iimbhena zeqiniso zijame mlibe, kodwana ilimu lamanga ngelesikhatjhana." 
Proverbs12:20 Kunekohliso eenhliziyweni zabahlosa okumbi, kodwana kulithabo kilabo abakhuthaza ukuthula." 
Proverbs12:21 Olungileko angeze ehlelwa ngokumbi, kodwana abakhohlakeleko bazele ngehlupheko." 
Proverbs12:22 Iimbhena ezikhuluma amanga zisinyenyiso kuSomnini, kodwana uthokoziswa mumuntu oneqiniso." 
Proverbs12:23 Umuntu ovuthiweko uzigoba ngengqondo nangelwazi; iindlhadlha zipepeza ubudlhayela. 
Proverbs12:24 Izandla zabakhutheleko zizakubusa, kodwana ubuvila buphelela emsebenzini okatelelako." 
Proverbs12:25 Obalabala ngehliziyo uyawurubajeka, kodwana ilizwi elakhako liyamthabisa." 
Proverbs12:26 Olungileko ukhombisa wekhabo indlela, kodwana indlela yabakhohlakeleko iyabadurhisa." 
Proverbs12:27 Isibozi asiyibasi inyamazana, kodwana ukukhuthala kulilifa eliligugu emuntwini." 
Proverbs12:28 Endleleni yokulunga kunokuphila nokukhamba emzileni wakhona akunakufa. 
Proverbs13:1 Umntwana ohlakaniphileko uyamukela uyise namsolako, kodwana isideleli asilaleli nasikhalinywako." 
Proverbs13:2 Eenthelweni zomlomakhe umuntu uzuza okuhle, kodwana amaqili omela inturhu." 
Proverbs13:3 Olonda umlomakhe ulonda ipilwakhe; okhulumela butjhilweni uyonakala. 
Proverbs13:4 Umphimbo wevila uyakhaluza, kodwana awuzuzi; wabakhutheleko uyaneliswa." 
Proverbs13:5 Olungileko uyalizonda ilizwi lekohliso, kodwana okhohlakeleko uletha iinhloni nehlazo." 
Proverbs13:6 Ukulunga kuyamlondoloza omsulwa, kodwana isiphambeko sihlakaza isoni." 
Proverbs13:7 Kunomuntu ozenza injinga anganalitho; omunye azenze isichaka anjingile. 
Proverbs13:8 Umnono womuntu ungaba yihlawulo yepilwakhe, kodwana isichaka asethuseleki." 
Proverbs13:9 Umkhanyo wabalungileko udarhile, kodwana isibani seenkhohlakali siyacima." 
Proverbs13:10 Ngokuzikhukhumeza, onganahloko ubanga ukucabana; kodwana ukuhlakanipha kuhlala nabamukela izeluleko." 
Proverbs13:11 Umnono ozuzwa ngokuphanga uyaphela, kodwana obuthelelwa kancani kancani uyanda." 
Proverbs13:12 Ithemba eliriyadiswako ligulisa ihliziyo; isifiso esiphumeleliswako simumuthi wokuphila. 
Proverbs13:13 Onyefula umyalo kuzakuba kumbi ngaye, kodwana owuhloniphako yena, uyavuzwa." 
Proverbs13:14 Ifundiso yohlakaniphileko imthombo wokuphila, ibuyisa umuntu ezifwini zokufa." 
Proverbs13:15 Ukuzwisisa okuhle kuveza umusa, kodwana indlela yamaqili iyihlekelele." 
Proverbs13:16 Woke ovuthiweko wenza izinto ngelwazi, kodwana isidlhadlha sizembula ubudlhadlha." 
Proverbs13:17 Isithunywa esikhohlakeleko siwela engozini, kodwana esithembekileko siletha ukuphila." 
Proverbs13:18 Odela ukusolwa wehlelwa buchaka nehlazo, kodwana oyelela ukukhalinywa uyahlonitjhwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Isifiso esiphumelelisiweko simnandi emphefumulweni, kodwana ukudeda kokumbi kusikghabhudlho kwabaziindlhadlha." 
Proverbs13:20 Okhambisana nabahlakaniphileko naye uyahlakanipha, kodwana odlhemadlhema neendlhadlha uyahlupheka." 
Proverbs13:21 Ilitjhwa lilandelela izoni, kodwana abalungileko bavuzwa ngokuhle." 
Proverbs13:22 Olungileko utjhiyela iinzukulwana zakhe ilifa, kodwana umnono wesoni ubekelwa olungileko." 
Proverbs13:23 Isimu etlayiweko yeenhloko zemindeni ingakhiqiza ukugoma okunengi, kodwana ukudlokho kungathathwa ngokungakafaneli." 
Proverbs13:24 Obabalela iswazi uzonda umntwanakhe, kodwana omthandako ukhuthalela ukumkhalima." 
Proverbs13:25 Olungileko ugoma abe aneliseke, kodwana izisu zeenkhohlakali ziyaswela." 
Proverbs14:1 Unokuhlakanipha uzakhela ikumba, kodwana unobudlhadlha uyigiriza ngezandla zakhe." 
Proverbs14:2 Okhamba ngobuqotho wesaba uSomnini, kodwana osendleleni ephambukileko uyamnyaza." 
Proverbs14:3 Umlomo wesidlhadlha usibangela iswazi emhlana, kodwana iimbhena zabahlakaniphileko ziyabavikela." 
Proverbs14:4 Lapha kunganankomo khona, kunekerebhe yamabele kwaphela; kodwana ngamandla weenkomo, kuba nesivuno esinengi." 
Proverbs14:5 Ufakazi weqiniso akaleyi amanga, kodwana wekohliso uphafuza amanga." 
Proverbs14:6 Isinyefuli sifuna ukuhlakanipha, singakufumani; kodwana ilwazi liyazehlela konengqondo." 
Proverbs14:7 Tjhida emuntwini osidlhadlha ngombana akunalwazi eembheneni zakhe. 
Proverbs14:8 Ukuhlakanipha kovuthiweko kumbonisa indlela, kodwana ubuwiliwili beendlhadlha buyazikhohlisa." 
Proverbs14:9 Iindlhadlha zinyefula umnikelo werhobhe, kodwana phakathi kwabaqotho kunommoya omuhle." 
Proverbs14:10 Ihliziyo yazi ubumunyu bayo, nephandle angeze lahlanganyela itokozwayo." 
Proverbs14:11 Indlu yeenkhohlakali izokutjhabalaliswa, kodwana itende labaqotho lizakuphumelela." 
Proverbs14:12 Kunendlela ebonakala ilungile emuntwini, kodwana isiphetho sayo sikukufa." 
Proverbs14:13 Ngaphakathi kwesihleko ihliziyo ingase ibe buhlungu, netokozo ingaphelela esizini." 
Proverbs14:14 Owonakeleko uzakufunyana umvuzo weendlela zakhe nomuntu olungileko avuzwe ngokwekambakhe. 
Proverbs14:15 Onganalwazi ukholwa nanyana yini, kodwana ovuthiweko uyaqaphelisisa amagadangwakhe." 
Proverbs14:16 Ohlakaniphileko uyayelela, atjhide kokumbi, kodwana isidlhadlha siyatepeleka sizilahlele phasi." 
Proverbs14:17 Onguhliziywana wenza ubudlhayela, nomuntu onobuqili uyazondwa." 
Proverbs14:18 Abanganalwazi bazuza ubudlhadlha, kodwana abavuthiweko bathweswa isihlohlo selwazi." 
Proverbs14:19 Abambi bazokuguqa phambi kabalungileko nabakhohlakeleko emasangweni wolungileko. 
Proverbs14:20 Abachakileko bagegedwa ngitjho nababantu bekhabo, kodwana abanjingileko banabangani abanengi." 
Proverbs14:21 Onyaza wekhabo uyona, kodwana ubusisiwe onesisa koswelako." 
Proverbs14:22 Abatlama okumbi bayadurha, kodwana abatlama okuhle bazuza ukwethembeka neqiniso." 
Proverbs14:23 Woke umsebenzi obudisi uletha inzuzo, kodwana ikulumo engayindawo irholela ebuchakeni." 
Proverbs14:24 Umnono wabahlakaniphileko sihlohlo sabo, kodwana ubudlhadlha beendlhadlha budlhadlha." 
Proverbs14:25 Ufakazi weqiniso uhlenga amaphilo, kodwana ophafuza amanga umkhohlisi." 
Proverbs14:26 Ukuhlonipha uSomnini kunikela umuntu isiqiniseko samambala; lokho kubuphephelo ebantwaneni bakhe. 
Proverbs14:27 Ukwesaba uSomnini kumthombo wokuphila, kudedisa umuntu ezifwini zokufa." 
Proverbs14:28 Abantu abanengi balidumo lekosi; ngaphandle kwabantu, isikhulu asinabuyo." 
Proverbs14:29 Obuthaka ekusilingekeni unokuzwisisa okukhulu, kodwana isififana sikhombisa ubudlhadlha." 
Proverbs14:30 Ihliziyo enokuthula ikuphila komzimba, kodwana umrhawu usidliso emathanjeni." 
Proverbs14:31 Ogandelela abachakileko unyaza uMbumbi wabo, kodwana onesisa koswelako uhlonipha uZimu." 
Proverbs14:32 Ophambeneko uwiswa bukhohlakali bakhe, kodwana olungileko uphephela ebuqothweni bakhe." 
Proverbs14:33 Ukuhlakanipha kuhlala ehliziyweni yonengqondo, ngitjho neendlhadlha ziyakwazi lokho." 
Proverbs14:34 Ukulunga kuphakamisa isizwe, kodwana isono silihlazo ebantwini." 
Proverbs14:35 Ikosi ithokoziswa yinceku ehlakaniphileko, kodwana itukuthelwayo iphezu kwelihlazo." 
Proverbs15:1 Ipendulo ethobekileko idambisa itukuthelo, kodwana ilizwi elihlabako livusa ilaka." 
Proverbs15:2 Ilimu labahlakaniphileko liphakamisa ilwazi, kodwana umlomo weendlhadlha uphuphuma ubudlhadlha." 
Proverbs15:3 Amehlo kaSomnini akoke, aqaphele abakhohlakeleko nabalungileko." 
Proverbs15:4 Ilimu elithambileko limumuthi wokuphila, kodwana elinobuqili liqoba umphefumulo." 
Proverbs15:5 Isidlhadlha sidelela ukusolwa nguyise, kodwana olalela ukukhalinywa uvuthiwe." 
Proverbs15:6 Umuzi wolungileko unomnono omkhulu, kodwana inzuzo yokhohlakeleko ilibibi." 
Proverbs15:7 Iimbhena zabahlakaniphileko zifafaza ilwazi, kodwana akusinjalo ngengqondo yeendlhadlha." 
Proverbs15:8 Umhlabelo weenkhohlakali usinyenyiso kuSomnini, kodwana uthokoziswa mthandazo wabaqotho." 
Proverbs15:9 Indlela yokhohlakeleko isinyenyiso kuSomnini kodwana uthanda orhuluphela ukulunga. 
Proverbs15:10 Ukuyelelisa okuqinileko kubekelwe otjhiya indlela elungileko; ozonda ukukhalinywa uzokufa. 
Proverbs15:11 Indawo yabafileko nendawo yokubhujiswa zisemtarini phambi kwakaSomnini; kangangani-ke imizindlo yomuntu! 
Proverbs15:12 Isinyefuli asithandi ukukhalinywa; yeke asiyi kabahlakaniphileko. 
Proverbs15:13 Ihliziyo enamileko yenza ubuso busuleke; iinkathazo zehliziyo ziqoba umphefumulo. 
Proverbs15:14 Ihliziyo ehlolisisako ifuna ilwazi, kodwana umlomo weendlhadlha uphila ngobudlhadlha." 
Proverbs15:15 Woke amalanga wesichaka mambi, kodwana odlhudlhekako uzizwela umgidi njalo." 
Proverbs15:16 Kungcono ukuba nokuncani, khibe nokho wesaba uSomnini, kunokobana ube nomnono omnengi, kodwana uneenkathazo." 
Proverbs15:17 Singcono isabelo semirorho lapha kunethando khona, kunesekunzana enonisiweko, khibe kunezondo." 
Proverbs15:18 Umuntu onehliziywana uvusa ukucabana, kodwana obuthaka ekusilingekeni urhobhisa ukulwa." 
Proverbs15:19 Indlela yevila ifana nomqoqo wameva, kodwana umzila wabaqotho ulelezekile." 
Proverbs15:20 Umntwana ohlakaniphileko ulethela uyise itokozo, kodwana osidlhadlha unyaza unina." 
Proverbs15:21 Onganangqondo ukarwa budlhadlha, kodwana onengqondo ukhamba ngokunqomba." 
Proverbs15:22 Lapha kunganakubonisana khona, amaqhinga ayatjhabalala; kodwana ngabeluleki abanengi ayaphumelela." 
Proverbs15:23 Umuntu ufumana itokozo lokha naphendule kuhle. Maye lihle kangangani ilizwi elifike ngesikhathi! 
Proverbs15:24 Indlela yokuphila irholela ekuphakameni, ukuze umuntu adede endaweni ephasi yabafileko." 
Proverbs15:25 USomnini ubhuruza ikumba yabazitjhayako, kodwana uqinisa imikhawulo yomhlolokazi." 
Proverbs15:26 Amaqhinga wokukhohlakala asinyenyiso kuSomnini, kodwana amezwi amahle ahlambulukile kuye." 
Proverbs15:27 Omarhamaru uletha imiraro emzinakhe, kodwana ozonda ukufunjathiswa uzakuphila." 
Proverbs15:28 Ihliziyo yolungileko ihlolisisa iimpendulo zayo, kodwana umlomo wabakhohlakeleko uphafuza ubumbi." 
Proverbs15:29 USomnini ukude nabakhohlakeleko, kodwana uphendula umthandazo wabalungileko." 
Proverbs15:30 Ubuso obuthokozileko buthabisa ihliziyo neendaba ezimnandi zinepilo emathanjeni. 
Proverbs15:31 Umuntu onendlebe elalela ukukhalinywa okunepilo uzakuba sekhaya hlangana nabahlakaniphileko. 
Proverbs15:32 Odela ukusolwa uzinyaza yena, kodwana olalela ukukhalinywa uzuza ingqondo." 
Proverbs15:33 Ukwesaba uSomnini kufundisa umuntu ukuhlakanipha, nokuzehlisa kulandelwa lidumo." 
Proverbs16:1 Umuntu angahlela amasu engqondweni, kodwana ilizwi lokugcina livela kuSomnini." 
Proverbs16:2 Zoke iindlela zomuntu zimsulwa emehlwenakhe, kodwana uSomnini uhlola iinhloso." 
Proverbs16:3 Nawunikela okwenzako kuSomnini, amasu wakho azakuphumelela." 
Proverbs16:4 USomnini wenze koke kwaba nomnqopho, iye, nokhohlakeleko umenzele ilanga lehlekelele." 
Proverbs16:5 Woke onehliziyo ezikhukhumezako usinyenyiso kuSomnini. Nakanjani onjalo uzakuhlunguphazwa. 
Proverbs16:6 Ngokwethembeka nangeqiniso icala liyahlawuleka, ngokwesaba uSomnini umuntu ugegeda okumbi." 
Proverbs16:7 Lokha iindlela zomuntu nazithokozisa uSomnini, wenza nezitha zakhe ziphile ngokuthula naye." 
Proverbs16:8 Kungcono ukuba nokuncani, khibe nokho kunokulunga, kunokobana ube nesivuno esinengi, kodwana kungekho ukulunga." 
Proverbs16:9 Ehliziywenakhe umuntu utlama indlelakhe, kodwana uSomnini uhlosa amagadangwakhe." 
Proverbs16:10 Lokha isigwebo nasiseembheneni zekosi, umlomayo awuphambanisi isiqunto." 
Proverbs16:11 Isilinganiso namatje wokulinganisa afaneleko abuya kuSomnini; iye, woke amatje wokulinganisa angemgodleni ngewakhe." 
Proverbs16:12 Amakhosi ayasinyenya isenzo esimbi ngombana ubukhosi bakhelwe phezu kokulunga. 
Proverbs16:13 Amakhosi athatjiswa ziimbhena ezithembekileko, anegugu ngomuntu okhuluma iqiniso." 
Proverbs16:14 Itukuthelo yekosi iziinthunywa zokufa, kodwana umuntu ohlakaniphileko uyayidambisa." 
Proverbs16:15 Ukuhlambuluka kobuso bekosi kutjho ukuphila, ukwamukela kwayo kufana nelifu lezulu ngesilimela." 
Proverbs16:16 Kungcono khulu ukufumana ukuhlakanipha kunegolide nokufumana ukuzwisisa kungcono kunokukhetha isiliva. 
Proverbs16:17 Indlela ekulu yabaqotho igegeda ubumbi, owelusa indlelakhe ubulunga ipilwakhe." 
Proverbs16:18 Ukuzikhukhumeza kulandelwa kubhujiswa nokuwa kulandela umphefumulo oziphakamisako. 
Proverbs16:19 Kungcono ukuzehlisa hlangana nabazithobileko, kunokuhlanganyela ipango nabazikhukhumezako." 
Proverbs16:20 Ozwisisa okuthileko uyaphumelela, kodwana othembela kuSomnini ubusisiwe." 
Proverbs16:21 Onehloko waziwa bona unengqondo namezwi amnandi angezelela ukuzwisisa. 
Proverbs16:22 Ukuzwisisa kumthombo wokuphila kilabo abanakho, kodwana ifundiso yeendlhadlha ibudlhayela." 
Proverbs16:23 Ingqondo yohlakaniphileko iphumelelisa ikulumakhe neembhena zakhe zingezelela ukuzwisisa. 
Proverbs16:24 Amezwi amnandi aliliju, anandipha emphinjeni, asihlahla emathanjeni." 
Proverbs16:25 Kunendlela ebonakala ilungile emuntwini, kodwana isiphetho sayo sikukufa." 
Proverbs16:26 Iphango lesisebenzi liyasisebenzela, indlala yaso iyasiqhuba." 
Proverbs16:27 Isibhidlamnyanya sifunana nobumbi, nekulumaso ifana nomlilo oqothulako." 
Proverbs16:28 Isigilamkhuba sivusa inturhu, nokuhleba kwahlukanisa abangani." 
Proverbs16:29 Umuntu onenturhu uyenga wekhabo, amrholele endleleni embi." 
Proverbs16:30 Oncinza ilihlo ngobukhohlakali ugila umkhuba, noluma umlomakhe ufukamele ubumbi." 
Proverbs16:31 Iinhluthu ezimhlophe zisihlohlo sedumo, zifumaneka endleleni yokulunga." 
Proverbs16:32 Kungcono obuthaka ekusilingekeni kunengorho, nokwazi ukuzibamba kunofuna ukuthumba idorobho." 
Proverbs16:33 Ifumbe iphoselwa ngembadaneni yeporiyana, kodwana soke isiqunto sayo sivela kuSomnini." 
Proverbs17:1 Kungcono ukudobhelela iintshutshuru, ube nokuthula, kunekumba ezele idili, kodwana khibe kunenturhu." 
Proverbs17:2 Inceku ehlakaniphileko izakubusa phezu kwendodana enganasimilo, ihlanganyele ilifa njengomunye wabafo." 
Proverbs17:3 Isincibilikiseli senzelwa isiliva nekehla yomlilo ingeyegolide; umhloli weenhliziyo nguSomnini. 
Proverbs17:4 Owenza okumbi ulalela iimbhena ezonakeleko, umleyimanga uyelela ilimu elilimazako." 
Proverbs17:5 Ohlekisa ngesichaka unyaza umenzaso, nohleka ihlekelele uzakuhlunguphazwa." 
Proverbs17:6 Iinzukulwana zisihlohlo ebantwini abadala, nababelethi baligugu ebantwaneni babo." 
Proverbs17:7 Ikulumo ehle ayisifaneli isidlhadlha, kangangani-ke emamanga emlonyeni wesikhulu." 
Proverbs17:8 Isifumbathiso sifana nelitje lomlingo emehlweni wosiphetheko, ucabanga bona uyaphumelela kikho koke akwenzako." 
Proverbs17:9 Ositha isiphambeko ukhuthaza ithando; ovumbulula isikhubekiso wahlukanisa abangani. 
Proverbs17:10 Ukukhalima kuyazika konengqondo, ukudlula imivuvu elikhulu phezu kwesidlhadlha." 
Proverbs17:11 Omumbi nabanga ukuhlubuka, uzakunikelelwa ngesithunywa esinelunya." 
Proverbs17:12 Kungcono ukuqalana nonomrhaso othathelwe abantwana, kunokuqalana nesidlhadlha esiduda ebudlhayeleni baso." 
Proverbs17:13 Nakube umuntu ubuyisela okuhle ngokumbi, ubumbi abusoze baphuma emzinakhe." 
Proverbs17:14 Ukuthoma inturhu, kufana nokubhoboza amanzi, yeke, lisa indaba ngaphambi kobana kuthome ukulwa." 
Proverbs17:15 Omela isikhohlakali bona simsulwa nolahla olungileko bona usikhohlakali, bobabili njalo basinyenyiso kuSomnini." 
Proverbs17:16 Buyini ububhadekelo bemali nayisesandleni sesidlhadlha na? Ingaba kuthenga ukuhlakanipha khibe asinangqondo? 
Proverbs17:17 Umngani uhlala athembekile, iye, ungumfo obelethelwe iinkhathi ezibudisi." 
Proverbs17:18 Umuntu ogijimela ukuzibopha, abe sibambiso somunye, akanangqondo." 
Proverbs17:19 Othanda isiphambeko, uthanda ukucabana; onomlomo omkhulu uzibizela ihlekelele." 
Proverbs17:20 Onehliziyo eyonakeleko akaphumeleli, nonelimu elikhohlisako uwela engozini." 
Proverbs17:21 Obeletha isidlhadlha usesizini, akunathabo kumbelethi wesidlhadlha." 
Proverbs17:22 Ihliziyo enamileko iyintatha ehle, kodwana umphefumulo oqobekileko womisa amathambo." 
Proverbs17:23 Isikhohlakali sizithathela isifumbathiso ngencilini ukuphambanisa iindlela zomthetho. 
Proverbs17:24 Onengqondo ubeka ukuhlakanipha phambi kwakhe, kodwana amehlo wesidlhadlha asepelazwe." 
Proverbs17:25 Umntwana osidlhadlha ulisizi kuyise nobumunyu kombelethileko. 
Proverbs17:26 Akusikuhle ukuhlawulisa umuntu omsulwa namkha ukubetha iinkhulu ngokungakafaneli. 
Proverbs17:27 Owazi ilwazi ulonda amezwakhe nonommoya ophasi umumuntu ozwisisako. 
Proverbs17:28 Ngitjho nesidlhadlha sithathwa inga sihlakaniphile nasizithuleleko, kuthiwe sinengqondo nasivale umlomo." 
Proverbs18:1 Umuntu onganabuntu uzifunela kwakhe, ukhuluma kumbi ngabaphumelelako." 
Proverbs18:2 Isidlhadlha asithandi ukuzwisisa, sizwana nokuveza imibonwaso." 
Proverbs18:3 Nakufika ubukhohlakali nokunyaza, kulapho ihlazo liletha khona ukurhubutjhwa." 
Proverbs18:4 Amezwi womlomo womuntu amamanzi azikileko nomthombo wokuhlakanipha umlanjana ogobhozako. 
Proverbs18:5 Akusikuhle ukukhetha ubuso kokhohlakeleko nokubekela eqadi omsulwa ekugwebeni. 
Proverbs18:6 Iimbhena zesidlhadlha zisifaka epikiswaneni nomlomaso usibangela ukubethwa. 
Proverbs18:7 Umlomo wesidlhadlha usichitho saso neembhena zaso zisisifu kiso. 
Proverbs18:8 Amezwi wohlebako afana neenkhanakhana, ehla ngesiphundu emuntwini." 
Proverbs18:9 Umuntu osidondi emsebenzinakhe, ungumfowabo lesibhidlamnyanya." 
Proverbs18:10 Ibizo lakaSomnini limubhotjhongo oqinileko, olungileko ubalekela kiwo angalalameleki." 
Proverbs18:11 Umnono wonjingileko ulidorobho lobuphephelo kuye, ngokubona kwakhe uwuthatha inga mthangala ophakemeko." 
Proverbs18:12 Ngaphambi kobana kwehle ihlekelele ihliziyo yomuntu inamagugwana, kodwana ukuzithoba kulandelwa lidumo." 
Proverbs18:13 Ophendula angakezwa, kubudlhadlha nehlazo kuye." 
Proverbs18:14 Umphefumulo womuntu uyamsekela nagulako, kodwana ngubani ongathwala umphefumulo oqobekileko?" 
Proverbs18:15 Ihliziyo yonengqondo izuza ilwazi neendlebe zabahlakaniphileko zifuna ukuzwisisa. 
Proverbs18:16 Isipho sivulela ophako indlela, simrholela kabakhulu." 
Proverbs18:17 Obika indabakhe ntange ubonakala aseqinisweni bekufike lapha omunye amfaka khona imibuzo. 
Proverbs18:18 Ifumbe iqeda ipikiswano; ilamule iinrhonga. 
Proverbs18:19 Umfo okhubekileko ulikhuni kunedorobho elinemithangala, iye, ukucabana kufana nesiqabo sombhotjhongo." 
Proverbs18:20 Isisu somuntu sisuthiswa sithelo somlomakhe, waneliswa mkhiqizo weembhena zakhe." 
Proverbs18:21 Ilimu linamandla wokuphila nokufa nabalithandako bazakugoma isithelo sakhona. 
Proverbs18:22 Ofumana umfazi ufumene isipho esihle begodu uzuza umusa kaSomnini. 
Proverbs18:23 Isichaka sikhuluma ngokuncenga, kodwana injinga iphendula ngokukgharameja." 
Proverbs18:24 Umuntu wabangani abanengi uyaphela, kodwana kunomngani wamambala osekela ngcono kunomfo." 
Proverbs19:1 Singcono isichaka esikhamba ngobuqotho kunomontu onomlomo owonakeleko, osidlhadlha." 
Proverbs19:2 Ukuba netjisakalo ngaphandle kwelwazi akusikuhle, nomuntu opharhazelako ulahla indlela." 
Proverbs19:3 Ubudlhadlha bomuntu buhlakaza indlelakhe, ngalokho ihliziywakhe ilwisana noSomnini." 
Proverbs19:4 Umnono uletha abangani abanengi, kodwana isichaka sifulathelwa bangani." 
Proverbs19:5 Ufakazi wamanga uzakuhlunguphazwa, nophafuza ikohliso akazukusinda." 
Proverbs19:6 Abanengi bafuna ukuthandwa sikhulu, woke umuntu umungani wophana ngezipho." 
Proverbs19:7 Boke abafo besichaka bayasigega, nakubangani baso babakude khulu naso. Nanyana sesilandelela umbiko, asifunyani litho!" 
Proverbs19:8 Ozuza ubuhlakani, uthanda ipilwakhe nolonda ukuzwisisa ufumana okuhle." 
Proverbs19:9 Ufakazi wamanga uzakuhlunguphazwa, nophafuza ikohliso uzakubhubha." 
Proverbs19:10 Akusifaneli isidlhadlha ukunethezeka, kangangani-ke ikhoboka nakumele libuse amakhosana!" 
Proverbs19:11 Ohlakaniphileko ubuthaka ekusilingekeni, ukunganaki isikhubekiso kulidumo lakhe." 
Proverbs19:12 Itukuthelo yekosi ifana nokubhodla kwebhubezi, kodwana umusayo ufana nombethe phezu kotjani." 
Proverbs19:13 Umntwana osidlhadlha uchakisa uyise, nomfazi obalabalako ufana nephahla elinethosi." 
Proverbs19:14 Ikumba nomnono kulilifa elibuya kubabelethi, kodwana umfazi ohlakaniphileko uvela kuSomnini." 
Proverbs19:15 Ubuvila bubangela ubuthongo obukhulu, nomuntu obharaleleko ubulawa yindlala." 
Proverbs19:16 Olalela imiyalo ulonda ipilwakhe, kodwana ongakhathali ngendlelakhe uzakufa." 
Proverbs19:17 Onomusa kochakileko, uboleka uSomnini, yeke uzamvuza ngalokho." 
Proverbs19:18 Khalima umntwanakho kusese nethemba, ungavumi bonyana akhambe endleleni yokufa." 
Proverbs19:19 Ovutha ngelaka kumele ahlawuliswe ngombana wamenyela kanye, uzakurhobelela." 
Proverbs19:20 Lalela iseluleko bese wamukela ukusolwa ukuze ekugcineni uzuze ukuhlakanipha. 
Proverbs19:21 Manengi amaqhinga asehliziyweni yomuntu, kodwana ukuphumelela kwawo kusentandweni kaSomnini." 
Proverbs19:22 Ukuba marhamaru komuntu kulihlazo kuye, kungcono ukuba sichaka kunokuba namanga." 
Proverbs19:23 Ukwesaba uSomnini kurholela ekuphileni; onjalo ulala anelisekile, angeze athintwa miraro." 
Proverbs19:24 Ivila lifaka isandla ngesitjeni linghwathe, kodwana livilaphe ukusisa emlonyeni!" 
Proverbs19:25 Manya isinyefuli, ukuze onganalwazi abe ngovuthiweko; sola umuntu onengqondo, uzakuzuza ukuzwisisa." 
Proverbs19:26 Onepehla kuyise, aqotjhe unina usihlola esiletha iinhloni nehlazo." 
Proverbs19:27 Mntwanami, nawungasalaleli ukusolwa, uzakulahlekelwa mamezwi welwazi." 
Proverbs19:28 Ufakazi okhohlakeleko unyefula ukulunga nomlomo wesonakali urhiribidela ubumbi. 
Proverbs19:29 Isibetho senzelwe abanyefuli neswazi lenzelwe imihlana yeendlhadlha. 
Proverbs20:1 Iwayini lisinyefuli notjwala bunetjhada, nanyana ngubani odurhiswa ngilokhu akakahlakaniphi." 
Proverbs20:2 Ilaka lekosi lifana nokubhodla kwebhubezi, oyithukuthelisako ubeka ipilwakhe engozini." 
Proverbs20:3 Kulidumo emuntwini ogegeda irarano, kodwana esinye nesinye isidlhadlha siyarhaba ukulwa." 
Proverbs20:4 Ivila alilimi ngesilimela, ngesikhathi sokuvuna silindela ilitho kodwana asizuzi." 
Proverbs20:5 Amasu engqondweni yomuntu anjengamanzi azikileko, onelwazi uyawakhelela." 
Proverbs20:6 Banengi abantu abathi bathembekile, kodwana angatholakalaphi othembeke ngeqiniso na?" 
Proverbs20:7 Olungileko ukhamba ngobuqotho, babusisiwe abantwabakhe abamlandelako!" 
Proverbs20:8 Ikosi ehlezi esihlalweni sokulunga ihlunga boke ubumbi ngamehlwayo. 
Proverbs20:9 Ngubani ongathi: “Ngihlambulule ihliziywami, ngihlanzekile, anginasono”?" 
Proverbs20:10 Amatje namathungana wokulinganisa ahlukileko, kokubili njalo kusinyenyiso kuSomnini." 
Proverbs20:11 Ngitjho nomntwana uziveza ngezenzo zakhe, kuyabonakala nazimsulwa begodu ziqotho." 
Proverbs20:12 Iindlebe ezizwako namehlo abonako, kokubili kwenziwe nguSomnini." 
Proverbs20:13 Ungathandi ubuthongo, nakungasi njalo uzakuchaka; nawuvula amehlwakho uzakuba nokugoma okwaneleko." 
Proverbs20:14 Umthengi uthi, “Into le yimbi, iye yimbi!”, kuthi nakhambako azibethe isifuba ngakuthengilekokho." 
Proverbs20:15 Kunegolide namaparele amanengi, kodwana iimbhena ezinelwazi ziligugu elingakandi." 
Proverbs20:16 Thatha ingubo yowenzela umqhamuka isibambiso, iye, ithathe ngombana ujamele abatjhili." 
Proverbs20:17 Ukugoma okuzuzwe ngokudlelezela kuyanandipha, kodwana umlomo ugcina ukhume iqulwani." 
Proverbs20:18 Amaqhinga aqiniswa siseluleko, nepi ihlelwa ngamano." 
Proverbs20:19 Ukuhleba kugubulula ifihlo, yeke mgegede umuntu onomlomo." 
Proverbs20:20 Othuka uyise nonina, isibani sakhe sizakucinywa nakurhwalalako." 
Proverbs20:21 Ilifa elizuzwa ngamawala ekuthomeni, angeze labusiswa ekugcineni." 
Proverbs20:22 Ungeze wathi: “Ngizazibuyiselela ngobumbi!” Qalelela uSomnini, yena uzakubonelela." 
Proverbs20:23 Iinlinganiso ezihlukako zisinyenyiso kuSomnini, neenlinganisi zekohliso azisizihle nakancani." 
Proverbs20:24 Amagadango womuntu anqotjhiswa nguSomnini; nje-ke ngubani ongazwisisa indlela yomuntu na? 
Proverbs20:25 Kusisifu emuntwini ukurhaba ukuthi, “Lokhu ngikwahlukanisela uZimu!” bese ngemva kokwenza isithembisweso azisole." 
Proverbs20:26 Ikosi ehlakaniphileko ihlunga iinkhohlakali, izibuyekeza ngevili lesibhulo." 
Proverbs20:27 Umphefumulo usibani sakaSomnini, uhlolisisa ngawo ilingaphakathi lomuntu." 
Proverbs20:28 Ukwethembeka neqiniso kugcina ikosi ibulungekile, iye, isihlalo sayo sobukhosi sinzinze phezu kokwethembeka." 
Proverbs20:29 Idumo labantu abatjha mamandlabo, kodwana ubuhle babadala kuthukghela kwabo." 
Proverbs20:30 Amaduma namanceba athanyela ubumbi, nokubethwa kuphilisa ilingaphakathi lomuntu." 
Proverbs21:1 Ihliziyo yekosi isesandleni sakaSomnini, uyinqophisa njengomsele wamanzi, ayise nanyana kukuphi lapha athanda khona." 
Proverbs21:2 Zoke iindlela zomuntu zibonakala zizihle kuye, kodwana uSomnini uhlola ihliziyo." 
Proverbs21:3 Ukwenza okuhle nokulungileko, kwamukeleke khulu kuSomnini ukudlula imihlabelo." 
Proverbs21:4 Amehlo aziphakamisako nehliziyo ezigqajako kusisono esisibani seenkhohlakali! 
Proverbs21:5 Amaqhinga wokhutheleko aletha inzuzo, kodwana woke opharhazelako uletha ukuswela." 
Proverbs21:6 Umnono ofunyanwa ngelimu elinamanga, umrhwamuko onyelelako; abanjalo bazumana nokufa." 
Proverbs21:7 Inturhu yabakhohlakeleko iyabarhurhula, ngombana bala ukwenza okulungileko." 
Proverbs21:8 Indlela yonomlandu imagwegwe, kodwana omsulwa unezenzo ezilungileko." 
Proverbs21:9 Kungcono ukuhlala ejikeni phezu kwephahla kunokuhlalisana nomfazi onenturhu. 
Proverbs21:10 Umphimbo wokhohlakeleko ukhanukela ubumbi, umuntu wekhabo akafumani umusa kuye." 
Proverbs21:11 Lokha isinyefuli nasihlawuliswako onganalwazi uzuza ukuhlakanipha; lokha umuntu ohlakaniphileko nayalwako uzuza ilwazi. 
Proverbs21:12 USokulunga uyelela ikumba yokhohlakeleko; ahlakazele iinkhohlakali ehlekeleleni. 
Proverbs21:13 Ovala indlebakhe lokha nezwa ukulila kwesichaka, naye uzakulila kodwana angaphendulwa." 
Proverbs21:14 Isipho sangemsitheleni sidambisa itukuthelo, nokufunjathiswa okufihlwe ngesambatho kwehlisa ngitjho nelaka elikhulu." 
Proverbs21:15 Ukwenziwa kobulungiswa kulethela olungileko itokozo; kodwana kabaziingilamkhuba kuletha ukubhujiswa. 
Proverbs21:16 Umuntu odurha endleleni yokwazi uphumula hlangana nomkhambathi wabafileko. 
Proverbs21:17 Othanda ukuzithabisa uzakuswela, iye, othanda iwayini namafutha uzakuchaka." 
Proverbs21:18 Okhohlakeleko utlhaga esikhundleni solungileko, nongakathembeki esikhundleni soqotho." 
Proverbs21:19 Kungcono ukuhlala erhalawumbeni, kunokuhlala nomfazi onenturhu nobanga isizi." 
Proverbs21:20 Emzini wohlakaniphileko kunamagugu akhethekileko namafutha, kodwana isidlhadlha sona sirhiribidela koke lokho." 
Proverbs21:21 Orhuluphela ukulunga kanye nokwethembeka uzuza ipilo, okuhle nedumo." 
Proverbs21:22 Ohlakaniphileko usahlela idorobho leenrhonga, agirize isiphephelo ezithembele kiso." 
Proverbs21:23 Owelusa umlomakhe nelimu lakhe ulonda ipilwakhe ehlekeleleni. 
Proverbs21:24 Osideleli nozitjhayako ubizwa bona “sinyefuli” ngombana uziphatha ngokuziphakamisa okukhulu. 
Proverbs21:25 Isifiso sevila sizakuba kukufa kwaso ngombana izandla zaso azifuni ukusebenza. 
Proverbs21:26 Selihlala lineemfiso ezingapheliko ilanga loke, kodwana olungileko unikela ngokungababaleli." 
Proverbs21:27 Umhlabelo weenkhohlakali usinyenyiso, kangangani-ke nawulethwa ngehloso embi!" 
Proverbs21:28 Ufakazi wamanga uzakubhubha, kodwana ofakaza ngakuzwileko akazukuthuliswa." 
Proverbs21:29 Okhohlakeleko uqinisa ubuso, kodwana oqotho uqinisa iindlela zakhe." 
Proverbs21:30 Akunakuhlakanipha, ukuzwisisa neseluleko okuzakuphumelela ukujamelana noSomnini." 
Proverbs21:31 Injomani ilungiselelwa ilanga lepi, kodwana ukuhlula kungekwakaSomnini." 
Proverbs22:1 Ibizo elihle lithandeka khulu kunomnono omnengi; ukuhlonipheka kungcono kunesiliva negolide. 
Proverbs22:2 Abanjingileko nabachakileko bafana ngalokhu: Boke njalo badalwe nguSomnini. 
Proverbs22:3 Ovuthiweko nabona ingozi uyabhaca, kodwana abanganalwazi bayaragalala, bahlupheke." 
Proverbs22:4 Umphumela wokuzithoba nokwesaba uSomnini uletha umnono, idumo nepilo." 
Proverbs22:5 Endleleni yokonakala kunameva nezifu, kodwana owelusa umphefumulwakhe uba kude nalokho." 
Proverbs22:6 Nawukhulisa umntwana ngendlela azakukhamba ngayo, nasele akhulile, angeze aphambuka kiyo." 
Proverbs22:7 Injinga ibusa phezu kweenchaka, nobolekako ulikhoboka lobolekisanako." 
Proverbs22:8 Otjala okuphambeneko, uvuna ihlekelele neswazi letukuthelwakhe lizakutjhabalaliswa." 
Proverbs22:9 Umuntu onesisa uzakubusiswa, ngombana ukugoma kwakhe ukwabelana nabadududu." 
Proverbs22:10 Nawuqotjha isinyefuli, kuphuma ukucabana, ukumangalelana nehlamba kuyaphela." 
Proverbs22:11 Othanda ihliziyo emsulwa nonekulumo enezwelo, uzakuba mngani wekosi." 
Proverbs22:12 Amehlo kaSomnini aqaphele ilwazi, uphambanisa amezwi wongathembekiko." 
Proverbs22:13 Ivila lithi: “Kunebhubezi ngaphandlapha! Ngizokubulawa eendledlaneni!” 
Proverbs22:14 Umlomo kanondindwa umugodi otjhingako wesifu, onikelelwe nguSomnini urhohlomela ngakiwo." 
Proverbs22:15 Ubudlhadlha bubotjhelelwe ehliziyweni yomntwana, kodwana iswazi lokuyala libutjhidisela kude naye." 
Proverbs22:16 Ogandelela ochakileko ngehloso yokwandisa umnonwakhe, nopha abanjingileko izipho, bobabili njalo bagcina bachakile." 
Proverbs22:17 Yelela bese ulalela izitjho zabahlakaniphileko, beka ingqondwakho kengikufundisako," 
Proverbs22:18 ngombana kuzakarisa nawukubeka ehliziywenakho, kuhlale kulungiselelekile emlonyenakho." 
Proverbs22:19 Nawe ngikwazisa zona namhlanjesi ukuze ithemba lakho libe kuSomnini. 
Proverbs22:20 Angithi ngikutlolele izitjho ezimatjhumi amathathu, iye, izitjho zokweluleka nokuhlakaniphisa," 
Proverbs22:21 bonyana zikufundise iqiniso namezwi wokwethembeka ukuze ube nependulo enqophileko kabakuthumileko. 
Proverbs22:22 Ungadlelezeli ochakileko ngombana umbona achakile begodu ungagadangeli odududu ebandla. 
Proverbs22:23 Mbala uSomnini uzamumela onjalo emlandwini, adlelezele labo abamdlelezelako." 
Proverbs22:24 Ungakhi ubungani nomuntu onehliziywana, ungazimanyanisi nomuntu orhaba ukuthukuthela," 
Proverbs22:25 nakungasinjalo uzakufunda imikhubakhe, ufake ipilwakho engozini yesifu." 
Proverbs22:26 Ungabi hlangana nabenze isibopho ngesiga sokuqhawulana, iye, labo abenza isithembiso malungana neenkolodo." 
Proverbs22:27 Nakube awunalitho lokukhokha, kubayini omkolodako akuthathele umbhedakho uqalile na?" 
Proverbs22:28 Ungatjhidisi isikhonkhwani sekadeni esabekwa boyihlomkhulu. 
Proverbs22:29 Uyambona umuntu onekghono emsebenzinakhe na? Nguye-ke ozakusebenza phambi kwamakhosi, akazukusebenza phambi kwabantukazana." 
Proverbs23:1 Lokha nawuhlala phasi bona ugome nombusi, tjheja khulu loyo ophambi kwakho." 
Proverbs23:2 Bamba umphimbakho, nakube umumuntu okhaluzako." 
Proverbs23:3 Ungakhanukeli iinkhanakhana zakhe ngombana uzazikhupha isithunzi ngazo. 
Proverbs23:4 Ungatjhabatjhekeli ubunjinga, yiba nokuhlakanipha ukuze uzithibe." 
Proverbs23:5 Nawususa amehlwakho kibo, abuzukunyamalala na? Ngambala buzazenzela iimpiko ezinjengezedlanga, buphaphele esibhakabhakeni." 
Proverbs23:6 Ungagomi ukudla komuntu odimanako, ungakhanukeli iinkhanakhana zakhe;" 
Proverbs23:7 ngombana uhlala acabanga ngeendleko. Unje-ke yena, uthi kuwe, “Goma usele!” kodwana khibe uyakutshima." 
Proverbs23:8 Uzakuhlanza ngitjho nokuncani okugomileko, ngalokho uzabe udlale ngamezwi amahle." 
Proverbs23:9 Ungakhulumi nesidlhadlha, ngombana sizakunyefula ubuhlakani bamezwakho." 
Proverbs23:10 Ungatjhidisi isikhonkhwani sekadeni, ungadlelezeli amasimu weentandani," 
Proverbs23:11 ngombana uZimu umHlengazo unamandla; uzazimela emlandwini ophakathi kwakho nazo. 
Proverbs23:12 Beka ihliziywakho ekuyalweni neendlebe zakho emazwini welwazi. 
Proverbs23:13 Ungalisi ukukhalima umntwanakho; akazukufa nawumnunga ngeswazi. 
Proverbs23:14 Wena nawumbetha ngeswazi, uzabe usindisa umphefumulwakhe ekufeni." 
Proverbs23:15 Mntwanami, nakube ihliziywakho ihlakaniphile, yeke nami ngizakujabula ehliziyweni." 
Proverbs23:16 Ilingaphakathi lami lizakujekezela, iimbhena zakho nazikhuluma okufaneleko." 
Proverbs23:17 Ihliziywakho ayingakhanuki beyiyengwe zizoni, kodwana hlala njalo wesaba uSomnini;" 
Proverbs23:18 nje-ke uzakuba nengomuso nethemba lakho angeze lafeleliswa. 
Proverbs23:19 Lalela mntwanami, uhlakaniphe, ubeke ihliziywakho endleleni elungileko." 
Proverbs23:20 Ungahlanganyeli nabarhuqa iwayini nabarhiribidela inyama. 
Proverbs23:21 Mbala iindakwa neenrhiribideli ziyachaka, ukuyenda kuzembathisa amanikiniki." 
Proverbs23:22 Lalela uyihlo owakubelethako, unganyazi unyoko nasele aluphele." 
Proverbs23:23 Zuza iqiniso uligugudlhele, fumana ukuhlakanipha, ukuyalwa kanye nokuzwisisa." 
Proverbs23:24 Uyise wolungileko unetokozo ekulu, obeletha ohlakaniphileko uyathokoza ngaye." 
Proverbs23:25 Inga uyihlo nonyoko bangajekezela ngawe, iye, loyo okubelethileko uyajabula!" 
Proverbs23:26 Mntwanami, nginikela ihliziywakho, amehlwakho uwabeke eendleleni zami," 
Proverbs23:27 ngombana ingwadla imugodi otjhingako wesifu, nonondindwa uyipetsi emkghotha." 
Proverbs23:28 Nguye okhokhobela amadoda endleleni njengesigebengu, andise isibalo salawo angasathembekiko." 
Proverbs23:29 Ngubani othi, “Maye!” nothi, “Wo!”? Ngubani onepikiswano? Ngubani oneenghonghoyilo? Ngubani obengakafanelwa maduma? Ngubani onamehlo abomvu?" 
Proverbs23:30 Ngilabo abalibele ngewayini, abanandipha ngemarhabheni wewayini eliwunyelweko!" 
Proverbs23:31 Ungarhuduleli amehlo iwayini nalibomvu, lokha nalicwazimula ngesiqokweni, lehle butjhelelezi emphinjeni!" 
Proverbs23:32 Ekugcineni liluma njengenyoka, lifakela isihlungu njengerabi." 
Proverbs23:33 Amehlwakho azakubona imihlolo, nengqondwakho ihumuzele ngokuphambeneko." 
Proverbs23:34 Uzazizwa inga ulele elwandle, iye, njengolele phezu kweentambo zomkhumbi." 
Proverbs23:35 Bese uthi: “Ngiduliwe, nokho akhange ngizwe! Ngibethiwe, kodwana angazi bona kwenzeke nini! Kanti ngizakuqaquluka nini na? Ngifuna ukuyoqabula godu!”" 
Proverbs24:1 Ungakhanukeli abantu abakhohlakeleko, ungafisi ukuhlanganyela nabo" 
Proverbs24:2 ngombana iinhliziyo zabo ziphehla inturhu, neembhena zabo zikhuluma umonakalo." 
Proverbs24:3 Indlu yakhiwa ngokuhlakanipha inzinziswe ngokuzwisisa; 
Proverbs24:4 ngelwazi amalawu wayo azaliswe ngomnotho oligugu nomuhle. 
Proverbs24:5 Ingorho ehlakaniphileko inamandla, kodwana umuntu onelwazi udlulele ngeenkhwepha." 
Proverbs24:6 Yeke, yilwa ipi ngamano iye, ukuphepha kuza ngabeluleki abanengi." 
Proverbs24:7 Ukuhlakanipha kuphakeme khulu esidlhayeleni; nakuhlangenwe ebandla asibi nalitho esingalitjho. 
Proverbs24:8 Ophemba ubumbi uzakwaziwa bona mgulukudu. 
Proverbs24:9 Iqhinga lesidlhadlha sisono nesinyefuli sisinyenyiso ebantwini. 
Proverbs24:10 Nawunyefako ngesikhathi sokubandezelwa, umkhawulo wamandlakho uyabonakala." 
Proverbs24:11 Hlenga labo abadoselwa ekufeni, ukhandele abadzimelela banqombe ekubulaweni," 
Proverbs24:12 ngombana nawuthi, “Qala akhange sazi litho ngalokhu”, nje-ke ohlola iinhliziyo, nguye ozakwazi iqiniso; iye, owelusa ipilwakho, nguye olaziko, uzakubuyiselela umuntu ngalokho akwenzileko." 
Proverbs24:13 Goma iliju mntwanami ngombana limnandi, iye, iliju lesihlaka liyanandipha kurhwalabhakho." 
Proverbs24:14 Yazi-ke bona nokuhlakanipha kunjalo emphefumulwenakho, nawukufumanako, uzakuba nengomuso, nethemba lakho angeze lafeleliswa." 
Proverbs24:15 Wena sikhohlakali ndina, ungalindeli ukudla idlelo lolungileko, ungasusi isikhundla sakhe sokuhlala" 
Proverbs24:16 ngombana nanyana olungileko angawa kalikhomba, uyavuka azithathe, kodwana iinkhohlakali zona zizakuguqiswa yihlekelele." 
Proverbs24:17 Ungathabi ngokuwa kwesitha sakho, ihliziywakho ingajekezeli nasikhutjwako." 
Proverbs24:18 Nakungasinjalo, uSomnini uzakubona lokho kube kumbi emehlwenakhe, asuse itukuthelwakhe phezu kwaso." 
Proverbs24:19 Ungakhathazeki ngabenzi bobumbi, ungakhanukeli iinkhohlakali" 
Proverbs24:20 ngombana alikho ilingomuso kowenza okumbi nesibani seenkhohlakali siyacima. 
Proverbs24:21 Mntwanami, yesaba uSomnini, uhloniphe ikosakho, ungahlanganyeli nabahlubukako," 
Proverbs24:22 ngombana behlelwa yihlekelele msinyana. Ngubani owazi isizi elivela kuSomnini nekosi na? 
Proverbs24:23 Nanzi godu ezinye izitjho zabahlakaniphileko: Akusikuhle ukukhetha ubuso ekugwebeni.
