Proverbs24:24 Nanyana ngubani othi konomlandu, “Umsulwa wena”, umphakathi uzamthuwelelisa nabantu bamhlanuke;" 
Proverbs24:25 kodwana kilabo abakhalima onomlandu, kuzakuba kuhle kibo nesibusiso esinothileko sizakwehlela phezu kwabo." 
Proverbs24:26 Ipendulo enqombileko ifana nokuncwangwa eembheneni. 
Proverbs24:27 Ncama ngomsebenzakho wangaphandle, unake umsebenzi wamasimakho; ngemva kwalokho, wakhe ikumbakho." 
Proverbs24:28 Ungafakazi ngomuntu wekhenu kunganasizathu. Kubayini iimbhena zakho zifafaze amanga? 
Proverbs24:29 Ungathi: “Ngizamenza angenze sona; ngizazibuyiselela ngalokho angenze khona.” 
Proverbs24:30 Ngidlule esimini yevila, ngadlula esidiribeni somuntu onganagqondo," 
Proverbs24:31 qala-ke, yoke indawo imile ikhula, iqulwani ivalwe mitjhatjhana nesibiyelo samatje sibhurukile." 
Proverbs24:32 Lokha nangiyelela lokho, ngazibuza, iye, nangibona lokho ngafunda isifundo:" 
Proverbs24:33 Uyalalalala, uyendayende, usongasonge izandla uphumule," 
Proverbs24:34 ngalokho ubuchaka buzakubhudungela njengesela, nokweswela njengendoda ehlomileko." 
Proverbs25:1 Nanzi ezinye izaga zakaSolomoni ezakhuphelwa ziinkhulu zakaHezekhiya ikosi yakwaJuda: 
Proverbs25:2 Kulidumo lakaZimu ukusitheka kwento, kodwana kulidumo lamakhosi ukuhlolisisa ifihlakalo." 
Proverbs25:3 Njengombana izulu liphakamile nephasi lizikile, zinjalo neenhliziyo zamakhosi: Azihlolisiseki." 
Proverbs25:4 Nawususa amanyela esiliveni elincithikiswako, khona-ke usosino uzakukhanda isitja;" 
Proverbs25:5 nawususa isikhohlakali phambi kwekosi, isihlalo sayo sobukhosi sizakunzinziswa ngokulunga." 
Proverbs25:6 Ungaziphakamisi nawuphambi kwekosi, godu ungazibeki phambili nawusebantwini abakhulu;" 
Proverbs25:7 kungcono kube yikosi ethi kuwe: “Yewenyukele lapha”, kunokobana wehliswe phambi kwesikhulu. Okubone ngamehlwakho," 
Proverbs25:8 ungarhabi ukuse ebandla ngombana uzakuthini ekugcineni nasele umuntu wekhenu akurhubutjha? 
Proverbs25:9 Nawubanga umlandu nomuntu wekhenu ungembuli ifihlo yomunye umuntu; 
Proverbs25:10 nakungasinjalo okuzwileko uzakuhlazisa, nezwabatjho ngawe asoze yaphela." 
Proverbs25:11 Ilizwi elikhulunywe ngesikhathi esifaneleko lifana namahabhula wegolide akghabise esitjeni sesiliva. 
Proverbs25:12 Njengesali legolide namkha umkghabiso wegolidembala, kunjalo nokusola kohlakaniphileko endlebeni ezwako." 
Proverbs25:13 Njengokuqanda kweliqhwa ngesikhathi sokuvuna, sinjalo-ke nesithunywa esethembekileko kiloyo osithumileko; siqabula umphefumulo womniniso." 
Proverbs25:14 Njengamafu wekungu kanye nommoya onganazulu, unjalo nomuntu ozidumisa ngezipho azigodlileko." 
Proverbs25:15 Ngokubekezela, umrholi uyancengeka nelimu elithambileko lingephula ithambo." 
Proverbs25:16 Nawufumana iliju, ligome ngokulingeneko; nakungasinjalo uzabhinjidelwa bese uyagonyuluka." 
Proverbs25:17 Ungaqheli ukuya ekumbeni kamakhelwana, uzakanye akusuthe bese uyakunina." 
Proverbs25:18 Njengesibhuku, isabula namkha umsubela obukhali, unjalo nomuntu ofakaza amanga ngomuntu wekhabo." 
Proverbs25:19 Njengezinyo elibuhlungu namkha inyawo elenyeleko, kunjalo nokwethembela kongakathembeki ngeenkhathi zobudisi." 
Proverbs25:20 Njengomuntu ohlubula ingubo mhlana kumakhaza nanjengesibharha esithelwa esilondeni, unjalo nobhina iingoma ngomuntu osesizini." 
Proverbs25:21 Nakube isitha sakho silambile, siphe ukudla sigome; nakube somile, siphe amanzi sisele." 
Proverbs25:22 Ngokwenza njalo, uzabe inga udindela amalahle avuthako ehlokwaso, uSomnini uzakuvuza." 
Proverbs25:23 Njengommoya wetlhagwini nawuletha umwuluko wezulu, nelimu elihlebako liletha ukuqalana kumbi." 
Proverbs25:24 Kungcono ukuhlala ejikeni phezu kwephahla kunokuhlalisana nomfazi onenturhu. 
Proverbs25:25 Njengamanzi aqandako emphinjeni owomileko, zinjalo neendaba ezimnandi ezivela khatjhana." 
Proverbs25:26 Njengesiyalu esinedaka namkha umthombo ongcolisiweko, unjalo olungileko ohlehlela emuva phambi kweenkhohlakali." 
Proverbs25:27 Akusikuhle ukugoma iliju ngokweqileko, kunjalo nokufuna idumo phezu kwedumo." 
Proverbs25:28 Njengedorobho elinemithangala egirikileko, unjalo nomuntu ongakghoni ukuzibamba." 
Proverbs26:1 Njengeliqhwa ehlobo namkha izulu nakuvunwako, linjalo nedumo alifaneli isidlhadlha." 
Proverbs26:2 Njengomrwibili nawuphaphako namkha ikonjani ezulazulako, sinjalo nesithuweleliso esinganasizathu, asenzeki." 
Proverbs26:3 Isibebhu ngesenjomani, itomu ngelakadumbana neswazi ngelomhlana weendlhadlha!" 
Proverbs26:4 Nawungaphenduli isidlhadlha ngobudlhadlha baso, sithatha bona nawe ufana naso." 
Proverbs26:5 Nawuphendula isidlhadlha ngobudlhadlha baso, sithatha bona sihlakaniphile." 
Proverbs26:6 Othumela umlayezo ngesidlhadlha uzibandakanya enturhwini; ufana noziqunta iinyawo. 
Proverbs26:7 Njengemilenze elembeleleko yorholopheleko, sinjalo nesaga emlonyeni weendlhadlha!" 
Proverbs26:8 Njengokubophelela ilitje esarwayini, kunjalo nokuhlonipha isidlhadlha." 
Proverbs26:9 Njengeliva elihlabe isidakwa esandleni, sinjalo nesaga emlonyeni weendlhadlha!" 
Proverbs26:10 Njengomdumuzi womsebe olimaza angakhethi, unjalo nomuntu oqatjha isidlhadlha namkha abadlulingendlela." 
Proverbs26:11 Njengenja ebuyela emahlanzwenayo, sinjalo nesidlhadlha esibuyela ebudlhayeleni baso." 
Proverbs26:12 Ukhe wabona umuntu othatha bona uhlakaniphile na? Kunethemba elikhulu ngesidlhadlha kunaye. 
Proverbs26:13 Ivila lithi: “Kunebhubezi ngaphandlapha, iye, kunengwenyama eendledlaneni!”" 
Proverbs26:14 Njengomnyango ojika ngeenkhonkwani zawo, linjalo nevila lijikajika embhedenalo." 
Proverbs26:15 Ivila lifaka isandla ngesitjeni linghwathe, kodwana livilaphe ukusisa emlonyeni!" 
Proverbs26:16 Ivila lizitjela bona lihlakaniphile kunabantu abalikhomba abaphendula ngokuhlolisisa. 
Proverbs26:17 Njengomuntu obamba inja ekhwabithako ngeendlebe, unjalo nozifaka ekucabaneni okungakamfaneli." 
Proverbs26:18 Njengehlanya elidumuza imisubela evuthako, iye, imisubela eyingozi," 
Proverbs26:19 unjalo nomuntu okhohlisa wekhabo bese athi: “Awa bese ngizidlalela!” 
Proverbs26:20 Ngaphandle kweenkuni, umlilo uyacima; ngaphandle kwehlebo, ukucabana kuyaphela." 
Proverbs26:21 Njengeensahlela ezivuthisa amalahle, nanjengeenkuni emlilweni; unjalo nomuntu othanda ukucabana, uphemba ipikiswano." 
Proverbs26:22 Amezwi wokuhleba afana neenkhanakhana, ehla ngesiphundu emuntwini." 
Proverbs26:23 Njengokutshidzwa komjeka okumanyako, injalo nekulumo yokugugeka esithwe yihliziyo embi." 
Proverbs26:24 Isitha sizifihla ngekulumo, khibe ngehliziywenaso sifukamele ikohliso." 
Proverbs26:25 Nanyana ikulumaso iyenga, ungasikholwa ngombana ehliziywenaso kuzele ukuphelela kweenyenyiso." 
Proverbs26:26 Izondwaso singayembesa ngokuzenzisa, kodwana ubukhohlakali baso buzakwembulwa ebandla." 
Proverbs26:27 Owemba umgodi, uzakurhohlomela ngakiwo; nogeda ilitje, lizakuhlehlela phezu kwakhe." 
Proverbs26:28 Ilimu elinamanga lizonda elibalimazako, nomlomo obutjhelelezi ubanga ihlekelele." 
Proverbs27:1 Ungazikhakhazisi ngengomuso ngombana awukwazi kwamhlokho. 
Proverbs27:2 Akube ngomunye okudumisako, ungazidumisi wena; iye, kube ngotjhili, kungabi mlomakho." 
Proverbs27:3 Ilitje libudisi netjhwabatjhwaba imuthwalo, kodwana ukukholwa sidlhadlha kubudisi ukudlula kokubili." 
Proverbs27:4 Ilaka lililunya nokusilingeka kusikhukhula, kodwana ngubani ongajamelana nesikhwele?" 
Proverbs27:5 Kungcono ukusola okusemtarini kunethando langemsitheleni. 
Proverbs27:6 Amanceba owavezwa mngani ayamukeleka, kodwana ukumangwa sisitha akuthembisi." 
Proverbs27:7 Osuthiko unyelisa isihlaka seliju, kodwana kolambileko nokumunyu kuyanandipha." 
Proverbs27:8 Njengenyoni etjhiya indlwanayo, unjalo umuntu ohlamuka ikhaya lakhe." 
Proverbs27:9 Amakha netjhwalo kuletha ithabo ehliziyweni, kunjalo nokuthandeka komngani; kungokwezeluleko zehliziyo." 
Proverbs27:10 Ungamlahli umnganakho nomngani kayihlo, ungabalekeli kwamfowenu nawehlelwa yihlekelele, kungcono umakhelwana oseduze kunomfo okhatjhana." 
Proverbs27:11 Hlakanipha mntwanami, ulethele ihliziywami ukwenama; ngizakwazi ukuphendula woke umuntu onginyazako." 
Proverbs27:12 Ovuthiweko nabona ingozi uyabhaca, kodwana abanganalwazi bayaragalala, bahlupheke." 
Proverbs27:13 Thatha ingubo yowenzela umqhamuka isibambiso, iye, ithathe ngombana ujamele unondindwa." 
Proverbs27:14 Obingelela umakhelwanakhe ngamasa arhuwelela, kuzakuthathwa bonyana sithuweleliso." 
Proverbs27:15 Umfazi obalabalako, ufana nephahla elinethosi nakuna izulu;" 
Proverbs27:16 ukumvala sekufana nokuvala ummoya namkha ukubamba amafutha we-oliva ngesidla. 
Proverbs27:17 Njengesimbi nayilola enye, nomuntu ulola omunye." 
Proverbs27:18 Onakekela umuthi wamakhiwani, ugoma iinthelo zawo notjheja umphathakhe uzakudunyiswa." 
Proverbs27:19 Njengamanzi nabonisa ubuso, injalo nehliziyo, ibonisa ubunjalo bomuntu." 
Proverbs27:20 Indawo yabafileko neyokubhujiswa ayaneliseki, anjalo namehlo womuntu." 
Proverbs27:21 Isincibilikiseli senzelwa isiliva, ikehla yomlilo ingeyegolide nomuntu uhlolwa ngedumo elimfaneleko." 
Proverbs27:22 Nanyana isidlhadlha ungasigiga ngesigigweni, iye, ngesigigo hlangana namakariya, angeze wabususa ubudlhadlha baso kiso." 
Proverbs27:23 Qinisekisa bonyana wazi ubujamo bezimvu zakho, ubeke ihliziywakho emhlambinakho" 
Proverbs27:24 ngombana umnono awubambeleli, nesihlohlo angeze saphepha iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana." 
Proverbs27:25 Nakususwa utjani bese kuvela obutjha, kubuthwe nefuru eentabeni," 
Proverbs27:26 amaqamana azakupha kokwembatha, neembuzi zikuphe inani lenarha." 
Proverbs27:27 Ube nebisi elaneleko leembuzi, ukuzondla wena nomndenakho kanye neencekukazi zakho." 
Proverbs28:1 Okhohlakeleko ubaleka nanyana kungekho omgijimisako, kodwana abalungileko banesibindi njengebhubezi." 
Proverbs28:2 Ilizwe nalinokuvukelana, vane linababusi abanengi, kodwana onengqondo nelwazi wenza kube nokuthula." 
Proverbs28:3 Ochakileko nagandelela abachakileko, ufana nezulu elirhurhula litjhiye kungasenasivuno." 
Proverbs28:4 Abalahla umthetho badumisa iinkhohlakali, kodwana abawugcinako balwisana nazo." 
Proverbs28:5 Abantu abonakeleko abakuzwisisi ukulunga, kodwana abafuna uSomnini bakuzwisisa ngokupheleleko." 
Proverbs28:6 Singcono isichaka esineendlela ezimsulwa kunenjinga eneendlela ezikhohlakeleko. 
Proverbs28:7 Ogcina umthetho mntwana ozwisisako, kodwana umkhozi wamahlongandlebe uhlazisa uyise." 
Proverbs28:8 Owandisa umnonwakhe ngenzalo ehlukahlukeneko, uyibuthela omunye ozakuba nomusa kabachakileko." 
Proverbs28:9 Ofulatheza indlebakhe kobana angezwa umthetho, ngitjho nemithandazwakhe isinyenyiso." 
Proverbs28:10 Orholela abaqotho eendleleni zobukhohlakali, uzakurhohlomela ngemgodini azenzele wona, kodwana abamsulwa bazakufumana ilifa elihle." 
Proverbs28:11 Injinga ingazitjela bona ihlakaniphile, kodwana isichaka esinokuzwisisa sibona amaqhingayo." 
Proverbs28:12 Abalungileko lokha nabajekezelako, kuba nedumo elikhulu, kodwana abakhohlakeleko nababa barholi, abantu bayabhaca." 
Proverbs28:13 Ofihla iimphambeko zakhe akaphumeleli, kodwana ozivumako abe azitjhiye ufunyana isirhawu." 
Proverbs28:14 Ubusisiwe umuntu ohlala esaba uSomnini njalo, kodwana oqinisa ihliziywakhe uwela engozini." 
Proverbs28:15 Njengebhubezi elibhodlako namkha ibhere elibhozomelako, unjalo nokhohlakeleko nabusa phezu kwabadududu." 
Proverbs28:16 Umbusi onganangqondo udlondlobala ngokususa abantu elifeni labo, kodwana ozonda inzuzo engakalungi uzakwandisa amalangakhe." 
Proverbs28:17 Umuntu owurubajwa sisazela sokubulala, uzakuhlala abalekela ethuneni; akungabi nomuntu omvimbako." 
Proverbs28:18 Onekambo emsulwa uyaphepha, kodwana oneendlela zokonakala uzakuwa msinyana." 
Proverbs28:19 Otjheja amasimakhe uzakuba nenala, kodwana ogijimisana nelize uzakuba nobuchaka." 
Proverbs28:20 Othembakeleko uzakuba neembusiso ezinengi, kodwana opharhazela kobana anjinge, uzakuhlunguphazwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Akusikuhle ukukhetha ubuso ekugwebeni, kodwana umuntu uyaphambuka ukuze afumane igedzwana lesikwa." 
Proverbs28:22 Umuntu odimanako upharhazela bona anjinge, kodwana akayeleli bonyana ubuchaka bumlindele." 
Proverbs28:23 Osola umuntu, ekugcineni uzakufumana umusa ukudlula loyo onelimu elibutjhelelezi." 
Proverbs28:24 Odlelezela uyise nanyana unina bese athi, “Akusiso isiphambeko lokho”, umukhozi waloyo obhubhisako." 
Proverbs28:25 Umuntu omarhamaru uvusa ukucabana, kodwana othembela kuSomnini uzakunotha." 
Proverbs28:26 Othembela ekwazini kwakhe usidlhadlha, kodwana okhamba ngokuhlakanipha uyaphepha." 
Proverbs28:27 Opha abachakileko, angeze aswela litho, kodwana obadima amehlo ufumana amanikelela amanengi." 
Proverbs28:28 Iinkhohlakali naziba barholi, abantu bayabhaca; kodwana nazibhubhako, abalungileko bayanda." 
Proverbs29:1 Umuntu okhunyalala ngekani ngemva kokusolwa, uzakutjhabalaliswa msinyana, angabi nentatha." 
Proverbs29:2 Abalungileko nabandako, abantu bayathaba; kodwana nakubusa isikhohlakali, abantu bayabubula." 
Proverbs29:3 Othanda ukuhlakanipha, ulethela uyise itokozo, kodwana umngani weengwadla uchitha umnono." 
Proverbs29:4 Ngokulunga ikosi inikela inarha idzimelelo, kodwana ethanda iimbiko iyayilulaza." 
Proverbs29:5 Umuntu oyenga umakhelwanakhe, uzibekela isithiyo senede eenyaweni zakhe." 
Proverbs29:6 Kunesithiyo esiphambekweni sesikhohlakali, kodwana olungileko uyabhina, athokoze." 
Proverbs29:7 Olungileko ukhambisana nokuphathwa kuhle kwabachakileko, kodwana okhohlakeleko akanakho ukuyelela okunjalo." 
Proverbs29:8 Iinyefuli ziphehla idorobho, kodwana abahlakaniphileko barhobhisa ilaka." 
Proverbs29:9 Ohlakaniphileko naya ebandla nesidlhadlha, siyadlharuma, senze amahlaya, kungabi nokuthula." 
Proverbs29:10 Abanukelwa ziingazi bazonda omsulwa, kodwana abaqotho bahlenga ipilwakhe." 
Proverbs29:11 Isidlhadlha sigugeka khulu ngemizwaso, kodwana ohlakaniphileko uyasidambisa." 
Proverbs29:12 Lokha umbusi nalalela amanga, zoke iinkhulu zakhe ziba ziinkhohlakali." 
Proverbs29:13 Isichaka nombolekisi bafana ngalokhu: USomnini ubaphe amehlo wokubona bobabili. 
Proverbs29:14 Ikosi egweba abachakileko ngeqiniso, isihlalo sayo sobukhosi sizakunzinziswa isikhathi soke." 
Proverbs29:15 Iswazi nokukhalima kupha ukuhlakanipha, kodwana umntwana ozilawulako uhlazisa unina." 
Proverbs29:16 Iinkhohlakali nazandako nesiphambeko siyanda, kodwana zizakuwa, abalungileko babukele." 
Proverbs29:17 Khalima umntwanakho, uzakunikela ukuthula iye, uzakuletha ithabo ehliziywenakho." 
Proverbs29:18 Lapha kunganambono khona, abantu abalawuleki, kodwana ubusisiwe ogcina umthetho." 
Proverbs29:19 Inceku ayikhalinywa ngamezwi nje kwaphela, nanyana izwisisa, angeze yalalela." 
Proverbs29:20 Ukhe wambona umuntu okhuluma angacabangi na? Kunethemba elikhulu ngesidlhadlha kunaye. 
Proverbs29:21 Umuntu natotosa inceku ebutjheni bayo, ekugcineni izakuragalala." 
Proverbs29:22 Umuntu othukutheleko uvusa ukucabana, nosififana ubanga iimphambeko ezinengi." 
Proverbs29:23 Ukuziphakamisa komuntu kuyamehlisa, kodwana onommoya ophasi uzuza idumo." 
Proverbs29:24 Ohlanganyela nesela uzonda ipilwakhe: Uzwa abaphathi bakhuluma amanikelela, kodwana akanikeli ngelwazi." 
Proverbs29:25 Ukwesaba umuntu kusisifu, kodwana othembela kuSomnini uyaphepha." 
Proverbs29:26 Abanengi bafuna umusa wombusi, kodwana ukulunga kufunyaneka kuSomnini kwaphela." 
Proverbs29:27 Abangakathembeki basinyenyiso kabalungileko; abaqotho basinyenyiso kabakhohlakeleko. 
Proverbs30:1 Amezwi ka-Aguri, umsa kaJakhe Umlayezwakhe Isitjho sendoda le sithi: “Ngiphele amandla, Zimu! Iye, ngiphele amandla! Ngiphelelwe!" 
Proverbs30:2 Mbala, ngisiyila ukudlula boke; anginakho ukuzwisisa komuntu." 
Proverbs30:3 Azange ngifunde ukuhlakanipha, azange ngibe nelwazi loCwengileko." 
Proverbs30:4 Ngubani owakhe wenyukela ezulwini godu wabuya? Ngubani owabuthelela ummoya etendeni yezandla zakhe? Ngubani ogubuzese amanzi ngengubakhe? Ngubani odzimelelise amagumbi wephasi? Ngubani ibizo lakhe nebizo lendodanakhe? Yewungitjele nakube uyazi!” 
Proverbs30:5 Elinye nelinye ilizwi lakaZimu licwebile, usihlangu salabo ababalekela kuye." 
Proverbs30:6 Ungangezeleli emazwinakhe, nakungasinjalo uzakusola akukhombise bonyana umleyimanga." 
Proverbs30:7 Kunezinto ezimbili engizikhombela kuwe, Somnini; ungangigodleli zona nangisaphilako:" 
Proverbs30:8 Dedisa ikohliso namanga kimi; ungangiphi ubuchaka namkha ubunjinga, kodwana ngipha kwaphela okwaneleko." 
Proverbs30:9 Nangingasutha khulu ngizakukhohlwa ngithi: “Konje phana ngubani uSomnini loyo?” Nangingaswela ngizakweba, ngokwenza njalo, ngihlambalaze ibizo lakaZimami." 
Proverbs30:10 Ungakhulumi kumbi ngenceku kumniniyo, nakungasinjalo izakuthuka, ube semlandwini." 
Proverbs30:11 Kunalabo abathuka aboyise, bangabusisi abonina." 
Proverbs30:12 Kunalabo abazibona bamsulwa, kodwana babe bangakahlambuluki ekungcoleni kwabo." 
Proverbs30:13 Kunalabo abazitjhayako, bathwala iimpumulo." 
Proverbs30:14 Kunalabo abanamazinyo aziinsabula nemihlathabo imimikhwa, kobana barhiribidele abachakileko ephasini nabadududu hlangana nabantu." 
Proverbs30:15 Ikhalani linamadodakazi amabili, alila athi: “Sipha! Sipha!” Kunezinto ezintathu ezinganelisekiko, iye, ezine ezingakghoni ukuthi: “Sesanele!”" 
Proverbs30:16 Zona ngilezi: indawo yabafileko, isibeletho esiyinyumba, inarha enganelisekiko ngamanzi nomlilo ongatjhoko uthi: “Nganele!”" 
Proverbs30:17 Amehlo anyefula uyise, adelela ukulalela unina, azakugobolwa magubulu emmangweni, adliwe madlanga." 
Proverbs30:18 Kunezinto ezintathu ezisimanga kimi, iye, ezine engingazizwisisiko:" 
Proverbs30:19 indlela yedlanga esibhakabhakeni, indlela yenyoka emadwaleni, indlela yomkhumbi phakathi kwelwandle nendlela yesokana entombini." 
Proverbs30:20 Nasi indlela yesihlobongi: Siyagoma bese sizisula umlomo, sithi: “Akunanto embi engiyenzileko.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Ngaphasi kwezinto ezintathu inarha iyahlengezela, iye, ezine eziyenza ingabambeleli:" 
Proverbs30:22 inceku nayiba yikosi, iindlhadlha nazisuthako," 
Proverbs30:23 umfazi osisaliwakazi emendweni nencekukazi esele ithathele umniniyo indawo. 
Proverbs30:24 Kunezinto ephasinapha ezincani, kodwana zihlakaniphe ngokweqileko:" 
Proverbs30:25 Abonontsitsinyani balibutho elinganamandla, kodwana ehlobo bazilungiselela ukudla kwabo;" 
Proverbs30:26 iimbila zilibutho elinganamandla, kodwana zakha iinkhundlana zazo emadwaleni;" 
Proverbs30:27 isikhonyani asinakosi, kodwana sizihlela soke ngeenqhema;" 
Proverbs30:28 isibhadwa ungasibamba ngesandla, kodwana sitholakala nesigodlweni." 
Proverbs30:29 Kunezinto ezintathu ezikhamba ngejamo, iye, ezine ezinamaqa anejamo:" 
Proverbs30:30 ibhubezi eliyikosi yeenyamazana elingahlehliswa lilitho; 
Proverbs30:31 mkukurumbu okhambela phezulu, ipongo nekosi ongekhe wajamelana nayo." 
Proverbs30:32 Nakube wenze ubudlhadlha, waziphakamisa, namkha nawutlame ubumbi, beka isandla emlonyenakho!" 
Proverbs30:33 Njengombana ukuphehla amakghamatha kuveza umlaza nokutlhorholoja ipumulo kuveza iingazi, kunjalo nokutlhorholoja ilaka kuveza ukucabana." 
Proverbs31:1 Lawa mamezwi uLemuweli ikosi yeMasa awafundiswa ngunina. 
Proverbs31:2 “Lalela msanami! Lalela ndodana engiyibelethileko! Lalela ndodana yeemfungo zami! 
Proverbs31:3 Ungaziqedi ngabafazi, amandlakho aphelele kababhubhisa amakhosi." 
Proverbs31:4 “Akusikho kwamakhosi, Lemuweli; akusikho kwamakhosi ukurhuqa iwayini, akusikho kwamakhosana ukomela utjwala." 
Proverbs31:5 Nakungasinjalo azakusela abe akhohlwe iimiso, aphambanise amalungelo wabo boke abagandelelweko." 
Proverbs31:6 Thatha utjwalobo ubunikele obhubhako newayini kilabo abamunyu emmoyeni; 
Proverbs31:7 abasele bakhohlwe ubuchaka babo, bangasakhumbula isizi labo." 
Proverbs31:8 “Khulumela abangakwaziko ukuzikhulumela, iye, labo abathintwe ziingameko." 
Proverbs31:9 Khuluma bewugwebe ngeqiniso, jamela amalungelo wochakileko nodududu.”" 
Proverbs31:10 Ngubani ongafumana umfazi onezandla? Inani lakhe lidlula amaparele. 
Proverbs31:11 Indodakhe imethemba ngokuzeleko; ayisweli inzuzo. 
Proverbs31:12 Ipilwakhe yoke wenzela indodakhe okuhle, ingasi okumbi." 
Proverbs31:13 Ukhetha iwulu nelineni, asebenze ngezandla ezivumako." 
Proverbs31:14 Ufana nemikhumbi yabarhwebi evela khatjhana imlethele okugonywako. 
Proverbs31:15 Uvuka ngesamarimarima, alungisele umndenakhe ukugoma, abele neencekukazi zakhe imisebenzazo." 
Proverbs31:16 Uyacabangisisa, athenge isimu, ngesithelo sezandla zakhe utjala isidiribe." 
Proverbs31:17 Ulungele ukwenza nanyana ngimuphi umsebenzi, iingalo zakhe ziqinile emsebenzinakhe." 
Proverbs31:18 Uyalemuka bona ukurhweba kwakhe kunenzuzo, nje-ke isibani sakhe asicimi ebusuku." 
Proverbs31:19 Uthatha iwulu kobana eluke, ngesandla sakhe uphotha iintambo." 
Proverbs31:20 Abachakileko ubavulela izandla, azilulele abadududu." 
Proverbs31:21 Nakukhithika iliqhwa, akesabi litho ngomndenakhe; ngombana boke ubembese ezitlerebede." 
Proverbs31:22 Wenzela umbhedakhe amatjhila, wembatha izambatho ezimhlophe zelineni nezibubende." 
Proverbs31:23 Indodakhe iyahlonitjhwa ebandla lokha nayihlezi hlangana nabaphathi bendawo. 
Proverbs31:24 Wenza izambatho zangaphakathi bese uyazithengisa, anikele abathengi imikhungo yokuthekeleza." 
Proverbs31:25 Wembathiswe amandla nesithunzi, akesabi litho ngelikusasa." 
Proverbs31:26 Ukhuluma ngokuhlakanipha, nomyalo othembekileko uselimini lakhe." 
Proverbs31:27 Utjheja iindaba zomzakhe, akagomi isikwa sobuvila." 
Proverbs31:28 Abantwabakhe nabavukako bayamthokoza; nendodakhe yenza njalo begodu iyambuka ithi: 
Proverbs31:29 “Banengi abafazi abanezandla, kodwana wena mkami, ubadlula boke.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Ukuthandeka kuyikohliso, nobuhle bulilize, kodwana umfazi owesaba uSomnini ufanele ukudunyiswa." 
Proverbs31:31 Mnikeleni umvuzo wezandla zakhe, kuthi imisebenzakhe imdumise esangweni ledorobho." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Lawa mamezwi woMtjhumayeli, indodana kaDavida, ikosi yeJerusalema:" 
Ecclesiastes1:2 “Kulilize lakolize!” Iye, uMtjhumayeli uthi: “Kulilize lakolize! Yoke into ililize!”" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Kumbhadekela ngani umuntu ukutjhabatjheka kwakhe; akujulukela ngaphasi komthunzi welanga na? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Iinzukulwana ziyafika zibuye zidlule, kodwana iphasi linzinzile nini nanini." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ilanga liyaphuma libuye litjhinge; lirhabe libuyele lapha liphume khona. 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Ummoya uphembethela ngesewula, ubuye ujikele ngetlhagwini; ujikeleze njalo njalo, godu ubuyele emzombenawo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Yoke imilambo igelezela ngelwandle, nanyana kunjalo alizali. Lapho imilambo igelezela khona ibuya igelezele lapho." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Zoke izinto ziyakhathaza, azihlathululeki emuntwini. Amehlo akadeli ukubona neendlebe azidinwa kulalela." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Okwakhe kwaba khona, kusazakuba khona godu; nokwakhe kwenziwa kusazakwenziwa godu, akunalitho elitjha ngaphasi komthunzi welanga." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Ingabe ikhona into ekungathiwa ngayo, “Qalani lapha, lokhu kutjha!” Kwabe kukhona kwekadeni, iye, ekadeni ngaphambi kwethu." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Kwekadeni akusakhunjulwa, ngitjho nokusezako asoze kusakhunjulwa ngilabo abalandelako." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Mina Mtjhumayeli nangisese yikosi phezu kwaka-Israyeli eJerusalema," 
Ecclesiastes1:13 ngazinikela ekurhubhululeni nekuhlolisiseni ngokuhlakanipha koke okwenziwa ngaphasi komthunzi welanga. Maye, ubudisi kangangani umthwalo uZimu awethwese abantu kobana abatshwenye ngawo!" 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ngibone koke okwenziwa ngaphasi komthunzi welanga: Yoke into ililize! Kukugijimisa ummoya! 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Okusonganisiweko angeze kwathatjululwa, okutlhayelako angeze kwabalwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ngadlumbana ngathi, “Qala, mina ngikhule benganda nokuhlakanipha ngaphezu kwabo boke abakhe babusa eJerusalema ngaphambi kwami. Nginelemuko elinengi ngokuhlakanipha nangelwazi.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Nje-ke ngazinikela kobana ngazi ukuhlakanipha nokwazi kanye nokutlhoga ingqondo nobudlhadlha. Ngalemuka bonyana nakho lokho kukugijimisa ummoya: 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Ekuhlakanipheni okunengi kunesizi elinengi, nokwanda kwelwazi kukwanda kokuhlupheka." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ngadlumbana ngathi, “Angizizizinye ngokuzithabisa; ngizithokozise.” Kodwana nakho lokho kulilize!" 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Mayelana nesihleko ngathi “Sibudlhadlha!” namayelana nokuzithabisa ngathi “Kunanzuzo bani na?” 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ngazimisela ngehliziyo ukunikela umzimbami ewayinini, khibe umkhumbulwami ungihlahla ngokuhlakanipha. Ngaleyondlela ngathanda ukungena ebudlhayeleni ukuze ngifunyane bonyana yini okuhle abantu abakwenza ngaphasi komthunzi welanga emalangeni ambalwa wokuphila kwabo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ngenza imisebenzi emikhulu: Ngazakhela iinkumba begodu ngatjala neendiribe. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Ngalungisa iimvande neendawo zokuphumula, ngatjala kiyo yoke imihlobo yemithi yeenthelo." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Godu ngazenzela imiphathamanzi kobana ngisezele imithi ehlumako ngemisele. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ngathenga amakhoboka namakhobokakazi begodu benginalawo abelethelwe kwami. Godu gade nginemihlambi eminengi yeenkomo, yeembuzi neyezimvu ukudlula boke abangandulela eJerusalema." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ngazibuthelelela isiliva negolide kanye nepahla evela emakhosini neemfundeni. Ngazifumanela amadoda nabafazi ababhinako kanye nalokho okuthokozisa indoda, okutjho idwendwe leentombi!" 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ngadlondlobala ukudlula boke abangandulela eJerusalema. Kikho koke lokhu ukuhlakanipha kwami kwahlala kukimi. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Azange ngizidime litho elikhanukwa mamehlwami; ihliziywami azange ngiyigodlele ukuzithabisa ngombana yathokozela koke ukutjhabatjheka kwami. Lokhu kwaba yikokhelwami ngawo woke umjulukwami. 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Nje-ke ngaqalisisa woke umsebenzi wezandla zami nokutjhabatjheka koke engikujulukeleko. Qala, koke kulilize! Kukugijimisa ummoya! Akukho okungazuzwa ngaphasi komthunzi welanga." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ngatjhugulula umkhumbulwami kobana ngitjheje ukuhlakanipha, ukutlhoga ingqondo nobudlhadlha: Kuzakuthiwani ngomuntu owandulela ikosi na? Kwaphela, lokho esele kwenziwe!" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ngalemuka bonyana ukuhlakanipha kunenzuzo kunobudlhadlha, njengombana nomkhanyo unenzuzo kunobumnyama:" 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Ohlakaniphileko ukhupha amehlo enyameni, khibe isidlhadlha sona sikhamba ebumnyameni. Godu ngilemukile bonyana bobabili njalo behlelwa sisehlo esifanako." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ngadlumbana ngathi: “Okwehlele isidlhadlha nami kuzangehlela. Alo, ngizuzani-ke ngokuba nokuhlakanipha okukhulu na?” Godu ngadlumbana ngathi: “Nakho lokhu kulilize!”" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Ngambala ekugcineni akukho ukukhunjulwa kohlakaniphileko kanye nosidlhadlha. Emalangeni ezako bobabili njalo bazabe sele balitjalwa. Maye ohlakaniphileko ufa njengesidlhadlha! 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Nje-ke nganyenya ipilo ngombana kimi gade umumbi umsebenzi owenziwa ngaphasi komthunzi welanga. Mbala, yoke into ililize! Ikugijimisa ummoya!" 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Nganyenya koke ukutjhabatjheka kwami engakujulukela ngaphasi komthunzi welanga ekumele ngikutjhiyele engimandulelako. 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ngubani owaziko bonyana uzakuba ngohlakaniphileko nanyana ngosidlhadlha na? Khonapho uzakuba namandla phezu kwakho koke ukutjhabatjheka kwami engikujulukele ngokuhlakanipha kwami ngaphasi komthunzi welanga. Nalokho kulilize! 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Yeke ihliziywami yathoma ukulahla ithemba ngakho koke ukutjhabatjheka kwami engikujulukele ngaphasi komthunzi welanga. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Kunomuntu otjhabatjheka ngokuhlakanipha, ngelwazi nangekghono, kodwana ekugcineni anikele koke lokho njengelifa emuntwini ongazange alijulukele. Nalokho kulilize nelitjhwa elikhulu!" 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Uzuzani umuntu ngakho koke ukutjhabatjheka nangokuzikhandla akujulukela ngaphasi komthunzi welanga na? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Yoke imihla yakhe inobuhlungu nomsebenzakhe unesizi, ngitjho nebusuku uyahlubayela. Nalokhu kulilize!" 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Ayikho into umuntu angayenza ngcono, ngaphandle kokugoma nokusela, azithabise ngokutjhabatjheka kwakhe. Nakho lokho ngalemuka bonyana kusesandleni sakaZimu" 
Ecclesiastes2:25 ngombana ngaphandle kwakhe, ngubani ongabetha esimonyongwana, ajekezele na?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Umuntu othokozisa uZimu, uZimu umupha ukuhlakanipha, ilwazi nethabo; kodwana nakusisoni sona usinikela umsebenzi wokubuthelela nokwenza isithala somnono, kobana awudlulisele kothabisa uZimu. Nalokho kulilize! Kukugijimisa ummoya!" 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Yoke into inesikhathi ebekelwe sona, iye, kunesikhathi sayo yoke into ngaphasi komthunzi welanga:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Kunesikhathi sokubeletha nesikhathi sokufa, isikhathi sokutjala nesikhathi sokusiphula okutjaliweko;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 isikhathi sokubulala nesikhathi sokuphilisa, isikhathi sokugiriza nesikhathi sokwakha;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 isikhathi sokulila nesikhathi sokuhleka, isikhathi sokuzila nesikhathi sokugida;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 isikhathi sokulahla amatje nesikhathi sokuwabuthelela, isikhathi sokugona nesikhathi sokufulathela;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 isikhathi sokufuna nesikhathi sokulahla, isikhathi sokugodla nesikhathi sokusaphaza;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 isikhathi sokudabula nesikhathi sokuthunga, isikhathi sokuthula nesikhathi sokukhuluma;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 isikhathi sokuthanda nesikhathi sokuzonda, isikhathi sepi nesikhathi sokuthula." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Isisebenzi sizuzani ekutjhabatjhekeni kwaso na? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ngibone umthwalo uZimu awethwese abantu kobana abatshwenye ngawo: 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Wenze yoke into yafaneleka ngesikhathi sayo. Godu wanikela abantu ilwazi lokulemuka iinkhathi, kodwana abatlhadlhuleki ngomsebenzi uZimu awenza ekuthomeni bekube sekupheleni." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ngilemukile bonyana ayikho into ethokozisa umuntu ngaphandle kokuzijabulisa nokuzenzela okuhle nasaphilako," 
Ecclesiastes3:13 okutjho bona woke umuntu kufanele agome, asele abe azikholise kikho koke ukutjhabatjheka kwakhe. Lokho kusisipho esibuya kuZimu." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ngilemukile bonyana koke uZimu akwenzako kuzakuhlala isiphelani, akunanto engangezelelwa nanyana iphungulwe kilokho. UZimu wenza lokho ukuze umuntu amesabe." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Okukhona, kwakhe kwaba khona nokusazakuba khona, kukhona. UZimu ubuyekeza okwadlulako." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Godu kukhona engakubona ngaphasi komthunzi welanga: Esikhundleni sokugweba ngeqiniso, kuhlezi ubukhohlakali nesikhundleni sokulunga, kuhlezi ubukhohlakali." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ngadlumbana ngathi: “UZimu uzakugweba olungileko nokhohlakeleko ngombana kunesikhathi sayo yoke into nesawo woke umsebenzi.” 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Godu ngadlumbana ngathi: “Kungebanga labantu kobana uZimu abazizinye ukuze babone bonyana sebayafana neenlwana.” 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Okwehlela iinlwana kwehlela nabantu. Iye, behlelwa sisehlo esifanako: Njengombana iinlwana zifa nabantu bayafa. Koke kunomphefumulo ofanako; umuntu akasingcono kunesilwana ngombana koke kulilize." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Koke kuya endaweni yinye; koke kwavela ethulini, ngokunjalo koke kuzakubuyela ethulini." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ngubani owaziko bonyana umphefumulo wabantu utjhinga phezulu, weenlwana utjhinge phasi na?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Yeke ngabona bonyana akunanto engcono emuntwini kunobanyana azikholise ngomsebenzakhe ngombana lokho kusisabelo sakhe. Ngubani ongambonisa kobana kwenzakalani ngemva kokufa kwakhe na? 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Godu ngaqala ngabona loke igandelelo ebegade lenzeka ngaphasi komthunzi welanga: Qala bekuneenyembezi zabagandelelweko, gade banganamduduzi; amandla alele kubagandeleli, ngalokho abagandelelweko batlhoga umduduzi." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ngadlumbana bona abahlongakala kade, banetjhudu ukudlula abaphilako, iye, ukudlula abasaphilako." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Begodu ongcono kunabo bobabili ngiloyo ongakabi ukuba khona; iye, ongazange akhe abone ubumbi, obenziwa ngaphasi komthunzi welanga." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Godu ngabona bonyana koke ukutjhabatjheka nekghono lomsebenzi: Lokho sesikhwele somunye komunye Nalokho kulilize! Kukugijimisa ummoya! 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Isidlhadlha sisonga izandla, sizimunye iingazi." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Singcono isandla sinye esizele ukuzotha, kunezimbili ezizele ukutjhabatjheka kanye nokugijimisa ummoya." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Godu ngabuye ngabona okuthileko okulilize ngaphasi komthunzi welanga: 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Kwakunendoda enguyedwana, gade inganamnakwabo nanyana indodana. nokho ukutjhabatjheka kwayo gade kunganasiphetho, beyinehliziyo ede inganeliswa mnonwayo. Yabuza yathi: “Ngizakuthi ngijulukela bani bengizidime ubumnandi na?” Nalokho kulilize nomthwalo obudisi!" 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Ububili bubulala inyoka ngombana abantu nabababili, banomvuzo omuhle ngomsebenzabo:" 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Omunye nawako, umnganakhe uyamvusa. Kodwana maye emuntwini othi nawileko, aswele umuntu ongamvusa!" 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Godu ababili nabalele ndawonye, bayafuthumezana, kodwana uyedwana yena angazifuthumeza njani?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Umuntu nakayedwa angahlulwa, kodwana nabababili bayazivikela. Intambo enemitiya emithathu ayiqhusuki lula." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Ungcono umuntu omutjha ochakileko khisibe uhlakaniphile, kunesidlhadlha sekosi elupheleko engasakwazi nokwamukela isiyeleliso." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Omutjha loyo waphuma esikhungweni waba mbusi, ngitjho nanyana abelethwe asichaka embusweni wekosi leyo." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ngabona bonyana boke abaphila ngaphasi komthunzi welanga bebangehlangothini lomutjha owathatha isikhundla sekosi agade angaphasi kwayo. 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Bekunganasiphelo esiqubuthwini sabantu ebegade asirhola; kodwana labo abeze muva azange bamdumise. Nalokho kulilize! Kukugijimisa ummoya! 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Tjheja amagadangwakho nawuya ekumbeni kaZimu. Ukuya kiyo kobana uyokulalela kungcono kunokunikela umhlabelo weendlhadlha ngombana azilemuki bonyana ziyona. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Ungabi namawala ngomlomakho, ungarhabi ehliziywenakho ukukhupha ilizwi phambi kwakaZimu. UZimu usezulwini, wena usephasini, yeke, bala amezwakho." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Njengombana ibhudango liza nemicabango eminengi nekulumo yesidlhadlha iza namezwi amanengi. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Nawenza isithembiso phambi kwakaZimu, ungariyadi ukusifeza. UZimu akathatjiswa ziindlhadlha, ngalokho zalisa isithembiso sakho." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kungcono ukungathembisi kunokwenza isithembiso ungasasigcini. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Ungavumeli umlomakho ukudosele ekoneni; ungathi kumphristi kaZimu “Sekwaba yipazamo” UZimu uzakuthukuthela ngalokho okutjhoko, atjhabalalise umsebenzi wezandla zakho." 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Emabhudangweni amanengi kunemicabango, ngokunjalo amezwi amanengi abanga umonakalo. Ngalokho yesaba uZimu." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ungarareki lokha nawubona ukugandelelwa kochakileko nokwephulwa kokulunga nepatho efaneleko embusweni: Isikhulu esiphezulu sivikelwe ngesingaphezu kwaso godu kunezinye ngaphezu kwazo. 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Ipumelelo yenarha kikho koke lokhu isekosini enakelela amasimu. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Othanda imali akaneliseki ngayo nothanda umnono akaneliseki ngomvuzo. Nalokho kulilize! 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Nakwanda umnono nabawudlako bayanda. Kumbhadekela ngani umniniwo ngaphandle kokuwuqala nje? 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Ubuthongo besisebenzi bumnandi, nanyana sigoma kancani nanyana khulu, kodwana ukusutha kwenjinga kuyenza ingabi nobuthongo." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Kunobumbi obuzwisa ubuhlungu engakhe ngabubona ngaphasi komthunzi welanga: Umnono obulungiweko, oliliva kumniniwo." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Umnono lowo ulahleka ngemisebenzi emimbi, kuthi lokha nabeletha indodana angabi nalitho alitjhiyela yona." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Njengombana umuntu abuya esibelethweni abulanzi, ngendlela enjalo uzakukhamba njengokuza kwakhe. Iye, akunalitho alibutheleleko ngokutjhabatjheka kwakhe azakukhamba nalo." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Mbala lokho bubumbi obuzwisa ubuhlungu! Njengombana ezile uzakukhamba anjalo! Alo, kumsizani umuntu ukujulukela ummoya nje?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Yoke imihla yokuphila kwakhe ugoma kanzima, ngesizi elikhulu, ngokuhlupheka nangokukhathazeka." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Qala, okuhle engakubonako ngilokhu: Kuhle ukugoma, ukusela nokuzithabisa ngezinto ezihle phakathi kokutjhabatjheka kwalokho umuntu akujulukeleko ngaphasi komthunzi welanga, emalangeni ambalwa wokuphila kwakhe awaphiwe nguZimu ngombana lokho kusisabelo sakhe." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Iye, kusisipho esivela kuZimu lokha napha umuntu umnono nelifa, amvumele kobana azanelise ngakho, umuntu loyo akwamukele lokho kube sisabelo sakhe, azithokozise ngokutjhabatjheka kwakhe." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Angeze acabanga khulu ngamalangakhe wokuphila ngombana uZimu uhlala amthabisa ngokwenama kwehliziywakhe. 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Ngibone obunye ubumbi ngaphasi komthunzi welanga, bumuthwalo obudisi ngaphezu kwabantu:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 UZimu unikela umuntu umnono, ilifa nedumo ukuze angasweli litho alifisako. Kodwana uZimu akamvumeli bonyana azanelise ngalokho ngombana kurhiribidelwa ngotjhili. Lokhu kulilize, yihlupheko enesizi." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Lokha umuntu nanabantwana abalikhulu aphile iminyaka eminengi, iye, aphile isikhathi eside, kodwana angazanelisi ngokuhle begodu angabulungwa ngesizotha, ngithi umntwana obelethwe ahlongakele ungcono khulu kunaye." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ufika alilize, anyamalale ebumnyameni nebizo lakhe litjhabalalele futhi." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Nanyana angazange abone ilanga nanyana azi okuthileko, nokho unokuthula okwedlula umuntu loyo." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Kuzamsiza ngani umuntu ukuphila iminyaka eyikulungwana ephindwe kabili, kodwana angakghoni ukuzanelisa ngokuhle na? Angitjho boke njalo baya endaweni yinye?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Koke ukutjhabatjheka komuntu kungekomlomakhe, kodwana iphango lakhe alaneliseki." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Ungcono ngani ohlakaniphileko kunesidlhadlha na? Kusisizani isichaka ukuziphatha kuhle phambi kwabantu na? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kungcono okubonwa mamehlo kunalokho okukhanukelwa ngugilo. Nalokho kulilize! Kukugijimisa ummoya! 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Koke okukhona kwathiywa ibizo nalokho umuntu angikho kuyaziwa: Akakwazi ukujamelana noSomandla. 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ukwanda kwamezwi kukukwanda kokungatjho litho. Kumsiza ngani umuntu lokho? 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ngubani owazi okulungele umuntu epilweni, nakube emalangeni ambalwa nangatjho litho udlula njengesithunzi na? Ngubani ongamtjela bonyana kuzokwenzakalani ngaphasi komthunzi welanga ngemva kokukhamba kwakhe na?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Ibizo elihle lingcono kunamakha akhethekileko nelanga lokufa lingcono kunelokubelethwa. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kungcono ukuya ekumbeni yesililo kunokuya ekumbeni yokugidinga ngombana ikumba yesililo isiphetho sabo boke abantu. Abasaphilako kumele bakucabangisise lokhu. 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Isizi lingcono kunesihleko ngombana ubuso nabunyukubeleko, ihliziyo yenamile." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Ihliziyo yohlakaniphileko ingekumbeni yesililo, kodwana yesidlhadlha ingekumbeni yokwethaba." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kungcono ukulalela ukukhalima komuntu ohlakaniphileko kunokulalela umbhino weendlhadlha. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Njengokuhlihlitha kwameva ngaphasi kwembiza sinjalo nesihleko sesidlhadlha. Nalokhu kulilize: 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ukusabisa kungenisa ohlakaniphileko ebudlhayeleni nokufunjathiswa konakalisa ingqondo. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Isiphetho sendaba singcono kunesithomo sayo, nokubekezela kungcono kunokuziphakamisa." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ungarhabi ukuthukuthela ehliziywenakho ngombana itukuthelo ihlala esifubeni seendlhadlha. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ungabuzi uthi, “Kubayini amalanga waphambilini angcono kunawanjesi?” ngombana akusikho ukuhlakanipha ukubuza lokho." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ukuhlakanipha kanye nepahla kuyinto ehle begodu kububhadekelo kabaphilako 
Ecclesiastes7:12 ngombana ukuhlakanipha kusiphephelo. Imali nayo isiphephelo, kodwana ubuhle belwazi ngilokhu: Ukuhlakanipha kunikela ipilo kilabo abanakho." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Yelela lokho uZimu akwenzileko! Mbala, ngubani ongagobulula lokho akugobanisileko na?" 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Ngesikhathi esihle, jabula, kodwana ngesikhathi esimbi, yelela ngombana uZimu ukwenze kokubili ukuze umuntu angazi litho ngelingomuso lakhe." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Epilwenami engatjho litho le, ngibone koke lokhu: Kukhona olungileko obhubha ngokulunga kwakhe nokhohlakeleko ophila isikhathi eside ngobukhohlakali bakhe." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ungazenzi olunge khulu, godu ungabi ngohlakaniphe ngokweqileko. Uzibhubhiselani na?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ungabi ngokhohlakele khulu, godu ungabi sidlhadlha. Ufelani ngaphambi kwesikhathi sakho na?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kuhle ukukakarela isiyeleliswesi, godu ungalisi lesiya. Owesaba uZimu uzazigega zombili iingozi zakhona." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ukuhlakanipha kwenza ohlakaniphileko abe namandla khulu kunababusi abalitjhumi edorobheni. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Ngambala, akunamuntu olungileko ephasini owenza okuhle kwaphela, angoni nakanye." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ungathatheli ehloko woke amezwi akhulunywa babantu ukuze ungezwa isisebenzi sakho sikuthuka 
Ecclesiastes7:22 ngombana uyazi ehliziywenakho kobana kwawena uthuke abanye kanengana. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Koke lokhu ngikuzizinye ngokuhlakanipha bengathi, “Ngizimisele ukuhlakanipha”, kodwana lokhu kube ngaphezu kwami." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Okwenzekako kukude begodu kuzike kokuzika: Ngubani ongakufumana na? 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Godu ngabuya ngacabangisisa ekwazini kobana ngihlolisise bengirhubhulule ubuhlakani ngifunyane isiphetho; iye, nokwazi ubukhohlakali bobudlhadlha kanye nobudlhadlha bokutlhoga ingqondo." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ngafumana okumunyu khulu kunokufa: umfazi osithiyo, ohliziywakhe isirhurhulanede nezandla zakhe ziziinkhungo. Umuntu okara uZimu uyaphunyurha kuye, kodwana isoni sona sizakubambeka kuye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Mina Mtjhumayeli ngithi: Qala, ngilokho engikufumeneko lokha nangibeka koke ngenaneko, kobana ngifunyane isiphetho." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Lokho ingqondwami ebeyihlala ikufuna ngesikhathi soke, kodwana ingahlathi iqiniso lakhona, ngilokhu: Ngafunyana yinye indoda eqotho hlangana nekulungwana, kodwana azange ngifunyane namunye umfazi onjalo phakathi kwabo boke." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Qala, ngafunyana lokhu kwaphela: UZimu wenze abantu baba qotho, kodwana bona bazifunela amaqhinga amanengi." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ngubani onjengohlakaniphileko na? Ngubani owazi ihlathululo yezinto? Ukuhlakanipha komuntu kukhanyisa ubuso, kubuguqule ekubeni likhuni." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ngithi: Bulunga umyalo wekosi ngebanga lesithembiso esenziwe nguZimu. 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ungarhabi ukuphendula umbusi. Tjhida phambi kwakhe ngombana angenza nanyana yini ayithandako. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Ilizwi lekosi aliphikiswa. Ngubani ongathi kiyo, “Yintobani oyenzako le?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Abahlakaniphileko bathi, “Obulunga umyalo akazukwehlelwa ngokumbi nengqondo yohlakaniphileko iyasazi isikhathi nesiqunto." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Kunesikhathi nekambiso efaneleko kiyo yoke into nanyana isizi lomuntu liba budisi kuye.” 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Kodwana akunamuntu owazi okuzakwenzeka! Ngubani ongamtjela bonyana kuzakwenzeka njani? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Akunamuntu onamandla wokukhandela ummoya begodu akakho onamandla phezu kwelanga lokufa. Akunakutjhaphululwa ngesikhathi sepi nomnono awubahlengi abaniniwo. 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Koke lokhu ngakubona lokha nangizinikela kikho koke okwenziwa ngaphasi komthunzi welanga. Kunesikhathi lapha umuntu aba negunya khona phezu komunye umuntu ngokwenza okumbi. 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ngokunjalo ngabona abakhohlakeleko batjhidela ethempelini, bangena, kwathi labo abenze kuhle kwafanela bona baphume endaweni ecwengileko balitjalwe edorobheni. Nalokho kulilize." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ngebanga lokungakhutjhwa msinyana kwesigwebo sobulelesi, iinhliziyo zabantu zizala iimbozi" 
Ecclesiastes8:12 ngombana isikhohlakali singenza ubelelesi kanenginengi, khonapho siphile isikhathi eside. Nami ngiyazi bona kuthiwa kuzabakhambela kuhle abantu abesaba uZimu, ngombana bayamhlonipha," 
Ecclesiastes8:13 nokobana isikhohlakali angeze kwasikhambela kuhle namalangaso angeze elulwa njengesithunzi ngombana asihloniphi uZimu. 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Kodwana ephasini kwenzeka nanti ilize: Kunabantu abalungileko abehlelwa ngokufanele iinkhohlakali neenkhohlakali ezehlelwa ngokufanele abalungileko. Ngithi nalokho kulilize. 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Nje-ke ngababaza ithabo ngombana ayikho into engcono emuntwini ngaphasi komthunzi welanga ngaphandle kokugoma nokusela, ename. Lokho kufanele kukhambisane naye emtjhikatjhikenakhe emihleni yokuphila, uZimu amuphe yona ngaphasi komthunzi welanga." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Lokha nangizinikela kobana ngazi ukuhlakanipha nokuyelela umsebenzi owenziwa ephasini, okutjho bona amehlo womuntu akabuboni ubuthongo ebusuku nemini," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 nje-ke ngabona woke umsebenzi kaZimu: Umuntu angeze azwisisa okwenziwa ngaphasi komthunzi welanga. Nanyana angajuluka kobana akufunyane angeze azwisisa. Ngitjho nanyana ohlakaniphileko asithi yena uyazi, angeze akghona ukuzwisisa." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Mbala, ngakucabangisisa lokho, kobana ngihlunge yoke indaba le yokuthi abalungileko nabahlakaniphileko kanye nemisebenzabo, ngitjho nethando nezondo kusezandleni zakaZimu. Koke okusezako, umuntu akakwazi." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Koke kuyafana kibo boke; kunesehlo sinye kolungileko nokhohlakeleko, koqotho, kohlambulukileko nongakahlambuluki, kowenza umhlabelo nongawenziko. Njengombana kunjalo kosisoni, kunjalo nakolungileko; njengombana kunjalo kofungako, kunjalo nakowesaba ukufunga." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Lokhu bubumbi kikho koke okwenzeka ngaphasi komthunzi welanga, kobana boke behlelwa yinto efanako. Godu kububumbi kobana iinhliziyo zabantu zizale ngobumbi nokobana epilwenabo batlhoge ingqondo, ngemva kwalapho bahlongakale." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Nanyana ngubani ophakathi kwabaphilako unethemba, ngitjho nenja ephilako ingcono kunebhubezi elifileko!" 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Abaphilako bayazi bonyana bazokuhlongakala, kodwana abahlongakeleko abazi litho; abasenamvuzo ngombana ukukhunjulwa kwabo akusekho." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Ngitjho nethando labo, ukuzonda kwabo nesikhwele sabo, koke sekwanyamalala; angeze bebasaba nesabelo kinanyana yini eyenzeka ngaphasi komthunzi welanga." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Khamba ufese ugome ukudla kwakho ngethabo, bewusele newayini lakho ngokwenama kwehliziywakho ngombana uZimu uyakuvuma lokho okwenzako." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Uhlale wembethe ezimhlophe begodu uzese ihlokwakho njalo ngamafutha. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Zithokozise ngepilo nomkakho omthandako kiwo woke amalanga wepilo engatjho litho le, uZimu akuphe yona ngaphasi komthunzi welanga; iye, ngitjho yoke imihla yakho engatjho litho. Lokho kusisabelo sakho epilweni kanye nekutjhabatjhekeni kwakho ngaphasi komthunzi welanga." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Nanyana yini ofuna ukuyenza ngesandla sakho, yenze ngamandlakho woke ngombana endaweni yabafileko lapha uya khona, akusasetjenzwa, akuhlelwa, akunalwazi namkha ukuhlakanipha." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Godu ngabuye ngabona bonyana ngaphasi komthunzi welanga umgijimo awuyi ngabanebelo, ipi ayiyi ngokweengorho isikwa asisi ngesabahlakaniphileko, umnono awusi ngewabongqondongqondo nomusa awusi ngewabanelwazi ngombana isikhathi nethuba kubehlela boke." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Akunamuntu owaziko bona isikhathi sakhe sizokufika nini: Njengehlambi nayibanjwa ngenede enesihluku namkha iinyoni ezibanjwa ngesithiyo, ngokunjalo abantu babambeka esithiyweni ngesikhathi sehlekelele, lokha nayibehlela msinyana." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Godu ngabona ngaphasi komthunzi welanga isehlakalo sokuhlakanipha ebesiqakathekile kimi: 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Gade kunedorojana elinabahlali abalidlanzana. Kweza ikosi enamandla kilo, yalizombeleza beyakha iinqabo ezikulu ngokujamelana nalo." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Ngedorojanenapho gade kunendoda esichaka begodu ihlakaniphile. Beyingalisindisa idorojanelo ngokuhlakanipha kwayo, kodwana abantu azange basikhumbula isichakeso." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ngakhe ngatjho bona ukuhlakanipha kungcono kunamandla, kodwana ukuhlakanipha kwesichaka kuthathelwa phasi namezwaso akayelelwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Kungcono ukulalela ngesizotha amezwi wabahlakaniphileko, kunokurhuwelela kwenduna phakathi kweendlhadlha." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Ukuhlakanipha kungcono kuneenkhali zepi, kodwana isiphosiso sinye sibhidla okunengi okuhle." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Njengombana iimpukani ezifileko zonakalisa isizeso somdidiyeli kobana sinuke besibe nesivunda, ngokunjalo nobudlhadlha obuncani bubhedlha ukuhlakanipha nedumo." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Ihliziyo yohlakaniphileko inqomba ngesidleni, kodwana yesidlhadlha inqomba ngesinceleni." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Nanyana isidlhadlha sikhamba endleleni, asinambono; sikhamba sikhombisa woke umuntu kobana sidlhayele." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Lokha umbusi nakubhokela ngobukhali, ungasuki endawenakho ngombana ukuzotha kugegeda iimphoso ezinengi." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Kunobumbi engikhe ngabubona ngaphasi komthunzi welanga, okumhlobo wephoso evela kumbusi:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Isidlhadlha sibekwa eenkhundleni eziphezulu, khibe iinjinga ziseenkhundleni eziphasi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ngibone amakhoboka akhwele iinjomani, khibe amakhosana ayabhadula inga makhoboka." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Owemba umgodi, angarhohlomela ngakiwo nogiriza umthangala angalunywa yinyoka." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Okghadlha amatje angalinyazwa ngiwo nophadlhula iinkuni zingaba yingozi kuye. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Nakube izembe libuthuntu, alisalolwa, kudingeka amandla amanengi, kodwana ikghono liletha ipumelelo." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Nakube inyoka iluma ngaphambi kokwenziwa komlingo, khona-ke akusizi ukuba nosomlingo." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Amezwi wohlakaniphileko anesisa, kodwana isidlhadlha siqedwa mlomaso." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Sithoma ngokukhuluma ubudlhadlha; sigcine ngekulumo embi enganangqondo 
Ecclesiastes10:14 begodu sikhuluma khulu. Akunamuntu owaziko okuzokwenzeka. Ngubani ongamtjela bona kuzokwenzakalani ngemva kwakhe na? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Ukutjhabatjheka kweendlhadlha kuzenza zidinwe ngombana azifikeleli emgomenazo. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Maye kuwe narha, nakube ikosakho isese siratjhana nalokha amakhosakho agidinga ekuseni!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Ubusisiwe wena narha nakube ikosakho ingusaziwako nalokha amakhosakho agidinga ngesikhathi esifaneleko, kobana abe namandla ingasi ubudakwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ngebanga lobubozi ibhaluga lekumba liyabhecenyeka, ngokulembelela kwezandla ikumba iyanethela." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Umgidi wenzelwa ukwenama, iwayini lenza ipilo ibe mnandi nemali iyipendulo yakho koke." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Ungathuki ikosi ngitjho nemkhumbulwenakho, nanyana uthuwelelise injinga nawungelawini lakho ngombana inyoni yomkayi ingathatha amezwakho, iye, isiphaphi singabika okutjhwileko." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Nawuthumela inzuzwakho phezu kwamanzi, kungenzeka uyifumane godu ngemva kwamalanga amanengi." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Ipahlakho ungayaba kalikhomba nanyana kabunane, kodwana awuyazi ihlekelele engahle yehlele inarha." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Amafu nazele amanzi, athululela izulu ephasini. Nakube umuthi uzokuwela ngesewula nanyana ngetlhagwini, lapha uzokuwela ngakhona, uzokulalela ngapho." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ophika nommoya angeze atjala, oqala amafu angeze avuna." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Njengombana ungazi ukungena komphefumulo ehlwilini lesibeletho somfazi ozithweleko, ngokunjalo angeze wawuzwisisa umsebenzi kaZimu, owenza izinto zoke." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Tjala imbewakho ekuseni, entambama izandla zakho zingaphumuli ngombana awazi bona ngiyiphi ezakuphumulela, kungaba ngile nanyana kube ngileya, nanyana ziphumelele zombili." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Ukukhanya kumnandi, kuhle emehlweni ukubona ilanga." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Nakube umuntu angaphila iminyaka eminengi, akazithokozise ngayo yoke, nokho akakhumbule imihla yobumnyama kobana izakuba minengi. Koke okusezako kulilize." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Jabula muntu omutjha ebutjheni bakho, ihliziywakho ikuphe ukwenama emalangeni wobutjha bakho. Landela iimfiso zehliziywakho, nalokho okubonwa mamehlwakho, kodwana yazi bona kikho koke lokho uZimu uzakugweba." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Yeke, tjhidisa isizi ehliziywenakho, udlulise woke amahlungu emzimbenakho, kodwana yazi bona ubutjha, iye, ngitjho nobutjha ebuncanini bulilize." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Khumbula umdali wakho emalangeni wobutjha bakho, kungakafiki imihla emimbi nokutjhidela kweminyaka ozakutjho ngayo uthi, “Anginakwenama ngayo.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Iye, ngaphambi kobana ilanga nomkhanyo, inyezi neenkwekwezi kube mnyama, namafu asabuthile ngemva kwezulu," 
Ecclesiastes12:3 mhla abaqaphi bekumba bathuthumelako, neendlakela zithoma ukukhokhoba, nabagayikazi bangasagayi ngebanga lokuba mbalwa, nabahlola ngamafesidere sele bafiphele." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Iye, mhlana iminyango ngaphandle ivaliwe, kunciphe netjhada lokugaya, lokha iphimbo seliphakama njengelenyoni, kodwana ukuzwakala kwalo sekuphasi;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 lokha umuntu angakesabi iindawo eziphakamileko nalokha kunezinto ezethusako endleleni; iye, lokha nakuthuthumba umuthi we-alimondi nentethe sele irhurhuba nomvusakunzi ungasasebenzi. Ngambala, umuntu uya endawenakhe yanini nanini nabalilako behla benyuka endleleni." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Iye, mkhumbule umdali wakho kungakaqhusuki intambo yesiliva, ithunga legolide lingakaphahlaki, umjeka ungakaphadlheki emthonjeni nevili lingakaphukeli ngepetsini," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 ithuli lingakabuyeli equlwanini njengombana lalinjalo nomphefumulo wokuphila ungakabuyeli kuZimu owawunikelako. 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Kulilize lakolize! Iye, uMtjhumayeli uthi: “Yoke into ililize!”" 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Isengezo: UMtjhumayeli gade angakahlakaniphi kwaphela, kodwana gade afundisa nabantu ilwazi. Walinganisa izinto wahlolisisa bewahlela kuhle izaga ezinengi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 UMtjhumayeli wafunisisa kobana afumane amezwi afaneleko nokutlola amezwi weqiniso ngobuqotho. 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Amezwi wohlakaniphileko anjengesitlhorholojakomo nezinto eziqakathekileko, zinjengeenkhonkhwani ezimanyene nesitlhorholojakomo. Lokho kuvela kumelusi munye." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Isengezo esinye: Ndodanami, yewuyelele! Ukwenza iincwadi ezinengi akunasiphetho begodu ukufunda khulu kukhathaza umzimba." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Ekugcineni, koke okuzwakeleko kufanele kunakekelwe: Yesaba uZimu ulonde imiyalwakhe; lokho kungokomuntu woke" 
Ecclesiastes12:14 ngombana uZimu uzokugweba yoke imisebenzi, ngitjho nakho koke okufihlakeleko, nanyana kukuhle, nanyana kukumbi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Ingoma yeengoma zakaSolomoni 
SongOfSongs1:2 Akangimange! Iye, akangimange ngomlomakhe! Sithandwa sami, ithando lakho lidlula iwayini." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Iinthako zamakha wakho zinuka kamnandi; ibizo lakho linjengamakha atsengiweko; akubabali iintombi zikuthanda kangaka! 
SongOfSongs1:4 Yewungithathe, sigijime! Ikosi ingahle ingingenise ngemalawinayo! Sizokwakwazela, sithabe ngawe, sokana! sizodumisa ithando lakho ukudlula iwayini. Kufanele bona iintombi zikuthande!" 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ntombi zeJerusalema, yeningilalele! Nginzima begodu ngimuhle, nginzima njengamatende weKedari, ngimuhle njengamatjhila esigodlweni sakaSolomoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ningaqali ubunzima bami, nginjenjenje, ngifiphazwe lilanga. Abafowethu bangithukuthelele, bangenza bona ngeluse iindiribe; ngalokho ngaliselela isidiribe okungesami." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Akhese ungitjele, wena othandwa mphefumulwami: Weluselaphi umhlambakho, uziphumuzelaphi izimvu zakho emini ekulu na? Kubayini ngifane nomfazi wesiyaya eqadi kwemihlambi yabangani bakho na?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Nakube awazi, wena siphalaphala sakwabo, landela umtlhala wezimvu, udlise iimbuzana zakho eduze namatende wabelusi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Sinini sami, kimi unjengenjomani esikazi hlangana neenjomani zeenkarana zakaFaro." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Imihlathakho mihle hlangana nomkhala wobuphaziphazi, intamakho ikghatjiswe ngemitiya yamagugu." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Sizokwenzela imitiya yegolide kanye namancina wesiliva. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Kwathi ikosi isesetafuleni layo, amakha wami wenaridi aba nephunga." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Isithandwa sami kimi sinjengesikhwanyana semire, esilembelele hlangana namabelami." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Isithandwa sami kimi sinjengamathuthumbo wehena, eendiribeni ze-Eni-Gedi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Maye umuhle kangangani, sinini sami! Maye umuhle kangangani! Amandiyakho anjengamazuba." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Maye uyaqaleka, sithandwa sami! Maye uyaqaleka! Umbhedethu ubutjani obuhlaza," 
SongOfSongs1:17 amabhaluga wekumbethu misedari namabalelo mimithi yomsayipurusi. 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ngililikhwa leTjharoni, ithuthumbo lemirhuleni." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Njengelikhwa hlangana nameva sinjalo isinini sami hlangana neentombi. 
SongOfSongs2:3 Njengomuthi wamahabhula hlangana nehlathi, sinjalo-ke isithandwa sami hlangana namasokana. Maye ngikhanuka kangangani ukuhlala emthunzinaso nesithelo saso sizakuba bulende kurhwalabhami." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Sangingenisa ngekumbeni yewayini, iphawu laso ngehla kwami bekulithando." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Yeningiqabule ngamakwapa wediribe, ningikhuthaze ngamahabhula ngombana ngiyagula ngethando." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Kwanga isandla saso sesincele besingaba ngaphasi kwehlokwami nesidla saso singigone. 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ntombi zeJerusalema, ngithembisani ngeentsephekazi nangeenhlangukazimataka zommango bona angeze nazamazisa namkha nivuse ithando lingakakhanuki ukuvuka." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Lalela! Naso isithandwa sami! Qala! Nasi siza nganeno, siza sijekezela eentabeni, seqayeqa emibundwini." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Isithandwa sami sifana netsephe namkha ihlangumatakana Qala! Nasiya sijame ngemva komthangala wekhethu, sihlola eentunjeni, sitjhaluze emlukweni wamafesidere." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Isithandwa sami sathoma sathi kimi, “Sikima sinini sami, simomothwana sami, yewize sikhambe!" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Qala! Ubusika budlulile nezulu alisekho, likhambile." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Amakhwa emmangweni ayabonakala, isikhathi sokubhina sifikile, ukukukuruza kwamazuba sele kuzwakala enarheni yekhethu." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Amakhiwani athela aboporwana bawo, iindiribe ezithuthumbako zisabalalisa iphunga lazo. Sikima sinini sami, simomothwana sami, yewize sikhambe!" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Zuba lami elisemipharwini yedwala, endaweni esithekileko yeliwa akhese ungitjengise ubuso bakho, ngizwise iphimbo lakho! Kazi iphimbo lakho libutjhelelezi nobuswana bakho buyakarisa." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Sibambelani iimpungutjha, iye, iimpungutjhana ezonakalisa iindiribe zethu, iindiribe zethu ezithuthumbileko.”" 
SongOfSongs2:16 Isithandwa sami ngesami, nami ngingesaso, selusa hlangana namakhwa." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Sithandwa sami, jika, ube yitsephe namkha ihlangumatakana emibundwini ehlukeneko kufikela lapha kubetha khona ummoya wekuseni bekunyamalale imithunzi yobusuku." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ebusuku, embhedenami, ngafuna othandwa mphefumulwami, ngamfuna, kodwana azange ngimfumane." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ebhudangweni ngavuka ngazulazula ngedorobheni, ngehla ngenyuka eendledlaneni nematatawini. Ngathi ngizakufunana othandwa mphefumulwami. Yeke ngamfuna, kodwana azange ngimfumane." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Abaqaphi bangifumana nabalokhu bakhambakhamba ngedorobheni. “Akhange nibone othandwa mphefumulwami na?” 
SongOfSongs3:4 Bengiqeda nje ukudlula abaqaphi, lokha nangifumana othandwa mphefumulwami. Ngamtjhuba, azange ngisamlisa, besayokufika ekumbeni kamma, iye, ngelawini lowangibelethako." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ntombi zeJerusalema, ngithembisani ngeentsephekazi nangeenhlangukazimataka zommango bona angeze nazamazisa namkha nivuse ithando lingakakhanuki ukuvuka." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ngubani lo owenyuka avela erhalawumbeni, njengesikhatha sentuthu elifini lemire neletjhwalo, okukhethwe kizo zoke iimputjhana zabathengisi na?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Qala! Naso isihlalogugwa sakaSolomoni, siphekelelwa ziingorho ezimatjhumi asithandathu, iye, ziphuma eengorhweni zakwa-Israyeli." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Zoke ziphethe iinsabula, zoke zibandulelwe ipi, enye nenye inesabula edinini, ilungele iingozi zobusuku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Ikosi uSolomoni izenzele isihlalogugwa; isenze ngeengodo zeLibhanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Yenze iinsika zaso ngesiliva, ingaphezulu laso ngegolide; ubuhlalo baso buthungwe ngokububende, sikghatjiswe ziintombi zeJerusalema ngeempawu zethando." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Phumani nina ntombi zeZiyoni, nibone ikosi uSolomoni ithwele isihlohlo, iye, isihlohlo eyasethweswa ngunina, mhlana ithathako, iye, mhlana ihliziywayo yeneme." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Maye, umuhle kangangani sinini sami! Maye, umuhle kangangani! Amandiyakho ngemva kwesiyaya amazuba. Iinhluthu zakho ungathi mihlambi yeembuzi ezehla entabeni yakwaGiliyadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amazinywakho anjengomhlambi wezimvu ezisandukurhunwa, ezikhuphuka zibuya emanzini. Enye nenye inephahla layo, kungekho nayinye ekhamba yodwa." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Iimbhena zakho zinjengomtletle otlerebede, umlomakho uyakarisa. Iinhlafunyo zakho zinjengeengcenye zamarharinada ngemva kwesiyaya sakho." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Intamakho ifana nombhotjhongo kaDavida owakhiwe walala kuhle; kiwo kulembelele iinhlangu eziyikulungwana, zoke kuziinhlangu zeengorho." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Amabelakho anjengeentsephana ezimbili, iye, anjengamaphahla wetsephe akarula hlangana namakhwa." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Ngizakuya entabeni yemire nembundwini wetjhwalo, kufikela lapha kubetha ummoya wekuseni bekunyamalale imithunzi yobusuku." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Umuhle ngakho koke, sinini sami! Akunasici nakancani kuwe." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Yewize sikhambe makoti, iye, yewize semuke eLibhanoni. Yehla esiqongolweni se-Amana, iye, esiqongolweni seSeniri neseRherimoni, edzabeni lamabhubezi neentabeni zezingwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Uthumbe ihliziywami dadwabo, wena makoti, iye, uyithumbile ihliziywami, ngokungithi nje rhedlu ngamehlwakho, ngomucu munye womncamo entanyenakho." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Maye, limnandi kangangani ithando lakho, wena dadwabo, wena makoti! Ithando lakho lingcono khulu kunewayini; nomnuko wamakha wakho adlula zoke iinthako." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Iimbhena zakho zithonta iliju, makoti, ibisi neliju kungaphasi kwelimu lakho. Umnuko wengubakho ufana neweLibhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Usivande esikhiyelweko dadwabo, makoti; iye, usivande esikhiyelweko, umthombo ovaliweko." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Wena umthombo wemithi yamarharinada endaweni yokuphumula kanye neenthelo ezimnandi, ihena nenaridi," 
SongOfSongs4:14 iye, inaridi nesafarani, umgaba onuka kamnandi nesinamoni nayo yoke imihlobo yemithi yetjhwalo, imire nesikghopha nazo zoke iinungo eziphambili." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Umthombo wesivande, isiyalu samanzi atlelezako, iye, amanzi ageleza, asuka eLibhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Vuka, mmoya wetlhagwini, yewize, nawe mmoya wesewula! Phembetha phezu kwesivande sami, amakha waso asabalale. Isithandwa sami asize esivandeni saso, sinandiphe iinthelo zaso ezimnandi." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ngizakufika esivandeni sami, dadwabo, makoti; ngikhe imire yami namakha wami; ngigome isihlaka sami kanye neliju; ngisele iwayini lami nebisi. Gomani bangani, selani, nidakwe lithando." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Bengilele, kodwana ihliziywami beyihlubayela. Lalela! Isithandwa sami siyakokoda: “Yewungivulele dadwabo, sinini sami, zuba lami, wena opheleleko wami ngombana ihlokwami yembeswe mbethe iye, umyeko weenhluthu unamathosi webusuku.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Sengiyihlubulile ingubami. Ngingayembatha njani godu na? Sengiqophe iinyawo zami. Ngingabuya ngizingcolise njani na? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Isandla sesithandwa sami singena ngentunja namazizo wami ayagugeka ngaso. 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ngavuka kobana ngivulele isithandwa sami, izandla zami zancinca imire, iminwami yanephuka imire esibambweni somnyango." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ngavulela isithandwa sami, kodwana besele sikhambile, sinyamalele. Umphefumulwami bewukhanukela ukukhuluma kwaso. Ngasifuna, kodwana azange ngisifumane; ngasibiza, kodwana azange sisabele." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Abaqaphi bangifumana nabalokhu bakhambakhamba ngedorobheni. Bangidula, bangikghubula, bangemuka ingubami, iye, abaqaphi abasemthangaleni." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ntombi zeJerusalema, ngithembisani bonyana nange ningafunyana isithandwa sami, ngibawa nisitjele bona ngiyagula ngethando." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Wena siphalaphala sakwabo, isithandwa sakhweso sidlula bani na? Singcono ngani kunabanye kobana ungabe uthi sikuthembise na?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Isithandwa sami siyaphazima begodu siyakhanya, sibonakala hlangana netjhumi leenkulungwana." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Ihlokwaso iligolidembala, iinhluthu zaso zimuyeko, zinzima njengegubulu." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amehlwaso anjengamazuba emilanjaneni egelezako, ahlanzwe ebisini, anamekwe njengobuphaziphazi egolideni." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Imihlathaso injengesitjalelo seenungo esikhiqiza amakha. Iimbhena zaso zimamakhwa, anephuka imire." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Imikhonwaso isitina segolide, efakwe amatje alibherili, Iphango laso liyiphanela yezinyo lendlovu, elikghatjiswe ngamatje wesafaya." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Imilenzaso ziinsika zemabula enzinziswe esinzinzisweni segolidembala. Isibumbeko saso sifana neLibhanoni, sikarisa njengemisedarayo." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Umlomaso ubumnandi ngokwawo; sihle koke. Sinjalo-ke isithandwa sami, unjalo umnganami, nina ntombi zeJerusalema." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Siyephi isithandwa sakho, wena siphalaphala sakwabo? Sitjhingephi isithandwa sakho na? Sizakukhamba nawe sikufunise sona." 
SongOfSongs6:2 Isithandwa sami sehlele esivandeni saso, siye eentjalelweni zeenungo kobana siyokwelusa eemvandeni, sikhe amakhwa." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ngingowesithandwa sami, naso singesami; seluse hlangana namakhwa." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Umuhle sinini sami, unjengeTiritsa, ukhanga njengeJerusalema, umanyazela njengamabutho aphethe iimpawu." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Susa amehlwakho kimapha ngombana ayangihlangahlanganisa. Iinhluthu zakho kwangathi mihlambi yeembuzi, ezehla entabeni yakwaGiliyadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amazinywakho anjengomhlambi wezimvukazi, ezikhuphuka zibuya emanzini. Enye nenye inephahla layo, kungekho nayinye ekhamba yodwa." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Iinhlafunyo zakho zinjengeengcenye zamarharinada ngemva kwesiyaya sakho. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Kuneendlovukazi ezimatjhumi asithandathu, amakhohlo amatjhumi abunane namatlawu amanenginengi," 
SongOfSongs6:9 kodwana izuba lami, opheleleko wami wehlukile, uyindodakazi eyodwa kunina, uyintandokazi yowambelethako. Iintombi nazimbonako zithi ngobusisiweko, iindlovukazi namakhohlo ziyambuka." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ngubani lo olunguza entunjeni omuhle inga yinyezi, okhanya njengelanga nomanyazela njengamabutho aphethe iimpawu na?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ngehlele hlangana nemithi yama-alimoni kobana ngibone imitjhana emrhobeni nokobana iindiribe ziyahloma namarharinada ayathuthumba na. 
SongOfSongs6:12 Azange ngiyelele bonyana umphefumulwami uzangibeka eenkaraneni zabosaziwako bekhethu. 
SongOfSongs6:13 Buya, yewubuye wena mfazi weTjhunemi; buya, yewubuye ukuze sikubukele! Maye, abafazi bathanda ukubukela umfazi weTjhunemi njengegido leMarhanayimu!" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Maye, zihle kangangani iinyawo zakho, ngaphakathi kwamapatlagwanakho, wena ndodakazi yekosana! Amathangakho andulungu njengomjeka, afana nomsebenzi wezandla zakasosino." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Ikabakho isikurwana esiyindulungu, esihlala sinewayini elineenungo. Isisu sakho silitjathwana lekoroyi elizombelezwe mamakhwa." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Amabelakho anjengeentsephana ezimbili, iye, anjengamaphahla wetsephe." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Intamakho injengombhotjhongo wamazinyo wendlovu. Amehlwakho asiziba seRhetjhibhoni, esisesangweni leBhathi-Rabhimu. Ipumulwakho injengombhotjhongo weLibhanoni, oqalene neDamaseku." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Ihlokwakho ikufaneza njengentaba yeKarameli. Umyekwakho unzima begodu uyaphazima nekosi iyakhungatheka ngawo. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Maye, umuhle kangangani, uyakarisa wena othandeka ngokuthokozisa!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Ijamo lakho linjengesundu namabelakho anjengamahlukuzo weenthelo zalo. 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ngathi, “Ngizakhwela umuthi wesundu; ngikhe amathuthumbalo.” Amabelakho akabe njengamahlukuzo wediribe nephunga lokuphefumula kwakho libe njengelamahabhula," 
SongOfSongs7:9 umlomakho ube njengewayini eliphambili. Esithandweni sami iwayini lehla butjhelelezi; iye, litlelezela eembheneni ezitlerebede." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ngingowesithandwa sami, yeke sona siyangilulukela." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Yewize sithandwa sami, namba siye emmangweni, sibe nobusuku emizaneni." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Asivukele ekuseni eemvandeni zesidiribe, siyokubona bonyana iindiribe ziyahluma, amaqumbazo ayahloma nokobana amarharinada ayathuthumba na. Lapho-ke, ngizakunikela ithando lami." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Ikofe iphafuza iphunga layo, emasangwenethu kuneenthelo ezimnandi zodwa, kukhona ezitja nezidala engikubekele zona sithandwa sami." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Ngathana batjho bewunjengomfowethu kimi omunye ebeleni lakamma! Yeke, bekuzakuthi nangihlangana nawe ngaphandle, ngikutjhube bengikuncwange, kungabikhona ongithathela phasi." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Bengizakurhola ngikhambe nawe, ngikuse ekumbeni kamma, ngikukhelele iwayini elineenungo kanye nomhluzi wamarharinada njengombana umma wangifundisa." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Kwanga isandla saso sesincele besingaba ngaphasi kwehlokwami nesidla saso singigone. 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ntombi zeJerusalema, ngithembisani bona angeze nazamazisa namkha nivuse ithando lingakakhanuki ukuvuka." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ngubani lo owenyuka avela erhalawumbeni, oziyame ngesithandwa sakhe na? Ngakuvusa ngaphasi komuthi wamahabhula; lapho unyoko akubambela khona, iye, lapho akubambela khona nalapho akubelethela khona." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Yewungibeke njengesigibo phezu kwehliziywakho, iye, nanjengesigibo emkhonwenakho. Ngambala, ithando linamandla njengokufa, isikhwele sigwame njengendawo yabafileko. Amalangabi wakhona amlilo orubhako, iye, amlilo kaSomnini." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Amanzi amanengi akakghoni ukucima ithando nemilambo ayikghoni ukulirhurhula. Nanyana umuntu bekanganikela woke umnono wekumbakhe ukwenana ithando nalokho bewuzakuba kunyefulwa kwaphela. 
SongOfSongs8:8 Udadwethu usesemncani, amabelakhe asaphuhla. Sizamenzelani nje udadwethu lo, mhlana azokucelwa na?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Nakube useseliboda elibutjhelelezi, sizamakhelela amarhayisi wesiliva. Nakube umnyango, sizamkghabisa ngeengodo zomsedari." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Mina bengiliboda elibutjhelelezi, kodwana kwanjesi amabelami anjengemibhotjhongo. Nje-ke emehlweni wesithandwa sami, ngizuze umusa." 
SongOfSongs8:11 USolomoni gade anesidiribe eBhali-Hamona, wasibeka ngaphasi kwabaqaphi. Umuntu bekangakhokha ikulungwana yeempaparwana zesiliva ngeenthelo zaso." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Isidiribe sami, okungesami, ngesami! Iimpaparwana eziyikulungwana zingezakho Solomoni neempaparwana ezimatjhumi amabili zingaya kubaqaphi besithelo." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Akhese ngizwe ilizwi lakho, wena ohlala eemvandeni; iye, wena olalelwa bangani bakho!" 
SongOfSongs8:14 Sithandwa sami, ube yitsephe namkha ihlangumatakana elakutja emibundwini yeenthako." 
Isaiah1:1 Lo, mbono owabonwa ngu-Isaya umsa ka-Amotsi ngoJuda neJerusalema, ngeenkhathi zokubusa kwaka-Uziya, uJotamu, u-Arhazi noHezekhiya amakhosi wakwaJuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Lalelani nina mazulu! Ubeke indlebe nawe phasi ngombana uSomnini ukhulumile wathi: “Ngikhulise abantwana ngabondla, kodwana bangihlubukile." 
Isaiah1:3 Ikomo iyamazi umniniyo, nodumbana igebhezi lomnikazalo, kodwana u-Israyeli akazi ilitho, abantu bami abazwisisi." 
Isaiah1:4 Sizazizwa isizwe esonako, abantu abadisibezwa licala, inzalo yeenkhohlakali, abantwana bokonakala! Bamtjhiyile uSomnini; badelele oCwengileko ka-Israyeli, bamfulathela." 
Isaiah1:5 Khona nisazakubethwa kuphi nje? Nisaragela phambili ngokuhlubuka, khisibe yoke ihloko ilimele ihliziywenu idanile." 
Isaiah1:6 Kusukela efokothweni ukuya ezwanini akasenabubono, kunalokho maduma, manceba nemivuvu kwaphela ekungazange kukghanywe, kubotjhwe bekuthanjiswe ngamafutha." 
Isaiah1:7 Inarhenu idududu, amadorobhenu aqothuliwe, amasimenu adliwa miqhamuka niqalile; iye, inarhenu ayisenalitho ibhujiswe miqhamuka." 
Isaiah1:8 Indodakazi yeZiyoni seyisele njengomtlhatlhana esidiribeni, njengehlahla lomtlhatlhana esimini yamakomukomu nanjengedorobho elivinjezelweko." 
Isaiah1:9 Ukube uSomnini uMninimandlawoke akhange asitjhiyele abambalwa abaphunyurhileko besizokuba njengeSodoma, sifane neGomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Yizwani amezwi kaSomnini, nina babusi beSodoma; nilalele ifundiso kaZimenu, nina bantu beGomora!”" 
Isaiah1:11 USomnini uthi: “Ubunengi bemihlabelwenu buyini kimi na? Ngidinekile ngemihlabelo yokutjhiswa yamaqama namafutha weembandana! Angithokozi ngeengazi zeenkunzi, zeemvana nezeempongo!" 
Isaiah1:12 Lokha naningena ebukhoneni bami iinlwana zenu zigidizela ngesirhodlweni sami. Ngubani obawe lokho ezandleni zenu? 
Isaiah1:13 Ningasayilethi iminikelo engazisiko! Ukutjhiswa kwetjhwalo kusinyenyiso kimi! Angeze ngisamukela imikhosenu nakube kunokonakala, iye, ukwethwasa kwenyanga, amaSabatha kanye nemihlanganwenu." 
Isaiah1:14 Ngiyayizonda imigidenu yokuthwasa kwenyanga neminyanyenu yeenkhathi enizijamisileko. Kumthwalo phezu kwami begodu sengidiniwe kuyithwala. 
Isaiah1:15 Lokha nanelula izandla zenu nithandaza, Ngizokuvala amehlwami kini nanyana ningenza imithandazo eminengi kangangani angekhe ngiyilalele. Izandla zenu zizele iingazi." 
Isaiah1:16 Hlambani, nizihlambulule! Susani izenzo zenu ezimbi phambi kwamehlwami! Lisani okumbi!" 
Isaiah1:17 Nifunde ukwenza okulungileko; funani ukulunga, nikhuthaze abagandelelweko, jamelani indaba yeentandani, nivikele abahlolokazi." 
Isaiah1:18 “Seningeza-ke, sikhulumisane”, kutjho uSomnini, “Nanyana izono zenu zitlerebede, zizaba mhlophe njengesithwathwa, nanyana zibomvu be, zizakuba mhlophe twa." 
Isaiah1:19 Nakube niyavuma begodu niyalalela, nizakudla okuhle kwenarha," 
Isaiah1:20 kodwana naninghanghabalako nihlubuka, nizakudliwa yisabula.” Iye, umlomo kaSomnini ukhulumile." 
Isaiah1:21 Maye, idorobho ebelithembekile selibe yingwadla! Beligcwele ubulungiswa nokulunga bekungaphakathi kwalo, kodwana kwanjesi, ligcwele ababulali!" 
Isaiah1:22 Isiliva lakho, Jerusalema, seliphenduke amanyela, utjwala bakho sebuqarhwe ngamanzi." 
Isaiah1:23 Ababusi bakho bamahlubuka begodu babangani bamasela. Omunye nomunye uthanda ukufunjathiswa, ugijima ngemva kwezipho. Abasajameli iintandani nendaba yabahlolokazi ayisafiki kibo." 
Isaiah1:24 Yeke, isigwebo sakaSomnini uMninimandlawoke, ongonamandla ka-Israyeli ngilesi: “Maye kibo! Ngizozanelisa ngezitha zami; ngizibuyiselele emanabenami." 
Isaiah1:25 Ngizokuphendulela isandla sami kuwe, Jerusalema; ngicwengise amanyelakho kube njengesoda bengisuse loke ibibi lakho." 
Isaiah1:26 Ngizakubuyisela abagwebi bakho kube njengemihleni yaphambilini, abeluleki bakho njengekuthomeni. Emva kwalokho uzakubizwa bona ulidorobho lokulunga, iye, idorobho elithembekileko." 
Isaiah1:27 IZiyoni lizakuhlengwa ngokufanelekileko nabaphendukako balo ngokulunga," 
Isaiah1:28 kodwana abahlubukako nezoni bazakwephulwa bokanyana njalo nalabo abafulathela uSomnini bazakubhubha. 
Isaiah1:29 Bazakuba neenhloni ngebanga lemithi yama-owuku egade senizithabise ngayo. Nizakudana ngebanga leemvande enizikhethileko. 
Isaiah1:30 Nizakufana ne-owuku elitjhwabelwe makari nanjengesivande esinganamanzi. 
Isaiah1:31 Onamandla uzakuba njengamaqobetjhwana nomsebenzakhe ube ngowehlasi; iye, uzakutjha ndawonye nomsebenzakhe kungabi nomcimi.”" 
Isaiah2:1 Ilizwi elembulwa ku-Isaya umsa ka-Amotsi ngoJuda neJerusalema: 
Isaiah2:2 Kuzakuthi emihleni yokuphela intaba yethempeli lakaSomnini inzinziswe esiqongolweni seentaba. Izakuphakanyiswa ngaphezu kwemibundu nezizwe zoke ziwulukele kiyo. 
Isaiah2:3 Nabantu abanengi bazakuza bathi: “Nambani sikhuphukeleni entabeni kaSomnini, ethempelini lakaZimu kaJakopo ukuze asifundise iindlela zakhe kobana sikhambe ngemizilakhe.” Mbala, umthetho uzakuvela eZiyoni nelizwi lakaSomnini eJerusalema." 
Isaiah2:4 USomnini uzakugweba hlangana nezizwe abe enze kube nokulunga ebantwini abanengi. Bona bazakwenza iinsabula zabo amalembe wokulima nemikhontwabo imikhwa yokuqopha isidiribe. Isizwe angekhe sisaphakamisela esinye iinkhali, iye, ngitjho nokuzibandulela ipi." 
Isaiah2:5 Yewize wena kumba kaJakopo, namba sikhambe ekukhanyeni kwakaSomnini." 
Isaiah2:6 Maye, Somnini! Ulahle abantu bakho, indlu kaJakopo: Bagcwele ukuhlohlozelwa kwepumalanga nokuphengula njengamaFilista ngebanga lokuhlanganisa izandla nabatjhili." 
Isaiah2:7 Inarhabo igcwele isiliva negolide; amagugwabo akapheli. Godu igcwele iinjomani; iinkarana zabo zepi azipheli. 
Isaiah2:8 Inarhabo igcwele abosingazimu; bakhothamela umsebenzi wezandla zabo, lokho okwenziwe miminwabo." 
Isaiah2:9 Ngaleyondlela abantu bayathotjiswa; iye, omunye nomunye wabo arhubutjhwe. Yeke ungabathetheleli Somnini!" 
Isaiah2:10 Ngenani emipharwini, nizifihle ehlabathini, nibalekele ubukhali bakaSomnini nephazimulo yobukhosi bakhe!" 
Isaiah2:11 Inyazo lomuntu ozikhakhazisako lizakuthotjiswa, ukuziphakamisa kwabantu kuguqiswe, nguSomnini kwaphela ozakuphakanyiswa mhlokho." 
Isaiah2:12 USomnini uMninimandlawoke unelanga alijamisele boke abaziphakamisako nabakhukhumeleko, iye, ukuze athobise boke abazitjhayako:" 
Isaiah2:13 yoke imisedari yeLibhanoni emide nephakamileko, yoke imithi yama-owuku yeBhatjhani," 
Isaiah2:14 zoke iintaba eziphakamileko, yoke imibundu edlhodlhomeleko," 
Isaiah2:15 yoke imibhotjhongo emide, yoke imithangala eqinileko," 
Isaiah2:16 yoke imikhumbi yokurhweba nazo zoke iinthayamanzi ezithwele amagugu. 
Isaiah2:17 Inyazo lomuntu ozikhakhazisako lizakuguqiswa, nokuziphakamisa kwabantu kuthotjiswe; nguSomnini kwaphela ozakuphakanyiswa mhlokho." 
Isaiah2:18 Abosingazimu bazakuphela nya. 
Isaiah2:19 Abantu bazakugijimela emipharwini nemigodini yehlabathi, babalekele ubukhali bakaSomnini nephazimulo yobukhosi bakhe, lokha nasikimela ukwethusa iphasi." 
Isaiah2:20 Mhlokho abantu bazakulahlela abosingazimu emakhondlweni nakibonomaphelaphelana; iye, abosingazimu babo besiliva negolide ababenze bona babakhothamele." 
Isaiah2:21 Bazakwenza lokho lokha nabangena emaweni nemipharwini yamadwala, babalekele ubukhali bakaSomnini nephazimulo yobukhosi bakhe, lokha nasikimela ukwethusa iphasi." 
Isaiah2:22 Lisa ukwethembela emuntwini onomphefumulo kwaphela eempumulweni! Njekhona yini into angiyo? 
Isaiah3:1 Qalani, uSomandla onguSomnini uMninimandlawoke sewuzokususa eJerusalema nakwaJuda okwabiwako nokudzinyelelwe kikho; iye, koke okwabiwako kokudla nakho koke kwamanzi:" 
Isaiah3:2 itsitsirimba nejoni, umgwebi nomphorofidi, isangoma nomphathi," 
Isaiah3:3 induna yamatjhumi amahlanu kanye nesikhulu, umeluleki nosoziga ongumakadebona kanye nosomlingo onobuhlakani." 
Isaiah3:4 USomnini uthi: “Ngizakwenza abesana babe makhosanabo neenhlanganahloko zizakubusa phezu kwabo. 
Isaiah3:5 Abantu bazakugandelelana: umuntu ajamelane nomuntu, iye, umuntu ajamelane nomnganakhe. Ilutjha lizakuvukela abadala, abangazisiko bavukele abahlonitjhwa." 
Isaiah3:6 Umuntu uzakugugudlhela umfowabo endlini kayise athi, ‘Wena unephuraphura, yiba mbusethu, lawula nanti iqubi lamawiliwili!’" 
Isaiah3:7 Kodwana mhlokho yena uzakurhuwelela athi, ‘Anginapengu! Ngiswele ngitjho ukudla nezambatho endlinami; yeke, musani ukungenza umbusi wabantu.’" 
Isaiah3:8 “Mbala, iJerusalema ikhutjiwe, uJuda uwile. Ngamezwi nangezenzo bahlanuke uSomnini, badelela nobukhona bephazimulwakhe." 
Isaiah3:9 Ukukhetha kwabo ubuso ebandla kufakaza ngabo; njengeSodoma banegugu ngesono sabo abe abafihli. Bazazizwa ngombana bazehlisele ihlekelele! 
Isaiah3:10 “Babusisiwe abalungileko ngombana kuzabakhambela kuhle. Mbala, bazakudla iinthelo zezenzo zabo." 
Isaiah3:11 Bazazizwa abakhohlakeleko ngombana kuzabakhambela kumbi. Mbala, bazakubethwa ngeentonga zabo!" 
Isaiah3:12 Abantu bami bagandelelwa bahlanguli abomatjhonisa babusa phezu kwabo. Bantu bami, abarholi benu babadukisi: Baphambanisa imizilenu.”" 
Isaiah3:13 USomnini selazilungiselele umlandu, selebe asikimile bona agwebe isizwe." 
Isaiah3:14 USomnini ugweba abaphathi nabarholi babantu bakhe, uthi: “Ngini enidle isidiribe sami; okwetjiwe kwabachakileko kuseendlini zenu." 
Isaiah3:15 Nenzelelani bona nitshidlhe abantu bami nokobana nifihlize ubuso babachakileko na?” Watjho njalo uSomandla onguSomnini uMninimandlawoke. 
Isaiah3:16 USomnini uthi: “Ngebanga lokuzitjhaya kwamadodakazi weZiyoni akhamba elule iintamezi, aphayiza amehlo, akhambela phezulu, kuzwakala nobutjharhatjharha eenyaweni," 
Isaiah3:17 uSomandla uzokuhluthula iiyaya eenhloko zawo; iye, uSomnini uzokwenza iimpandla zawo zibe semtarini." 
Isaiah3:18 Mhlokho uSomandla uzowemuka imikghabiso: amatshega, amatikana, abonongoro," 
Isaiah3:19 amancina, abosotjherere, iiyaya," 
Isaiah3:20 iindugu, abonomathalazana, amacutjana, imithambothi, amagolida," 
Isaiah3:21 iindzilamnwana ezinetshwayo, amasali wepumulo," 
Isaiah3:22 iindanda, iimphika, iimvunulo, iinkhwama zokuphathwa," 
Isaiah3:23 izambatho ezikhanyelako, izambatho zangaphakathi, iindugu nemitshurhwana." 
Isaiah3:24 Esikhundleni seenthako kuzakuba nesivunda; esikhundleni sekhiba kube mtletlana; esikhundleni somphotho kube liphandla; esikhundleni seengungu zethabo kube ziinzilo nesikhundleni sobuhle kube litshwayo lobukhoboka. 
Isaiah3:25 “Wena Ziyoni, amadoda akuwe azakubulawa ngesabula, iintsitsirimba zakho zifele epini." 
Isaiah3:26 Amasango weZiyoni azakulila abibitheke; libe dududu, lihlale phasi ehlabathini.”"
