Isaiah4:1 Mhlokho abafazi abalikhomba bazakunamathela endodeni yinye, bathi kiyo: “Thina sizozondla ngokudla kwethu besizembathise; into nje, sibawa bona sibizwe ngesibongo sakho, ususe ukurhubutjhwa kwethu.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Mhlokho ihlumela lakaSomnini lizakuba lihle liphazime neenthelo zenarha zibe ligugu nedumo labasindileko kwa-Israyeli. 
Isaiah4:3 Labo abatjhiywe eZiyoni, abaseleko eJerusalema, bazakubizwa bona ngabacwengileko, iye, omunye nomunye eJerusalema obekatlolwe kobana aphile." 
Isaiah4:4 Lokha uSomandla nasele ahlangule amanyala wamadodakazi weZiyoni, wahlanza amabala weengazi zeJerusalema ngaphakathi kwalo ngommoya wokugweba nokuqothula," 
Isaiah4:5 uzakudala ilifu emini nesikhatha esinelangabi elibomvu ebusuku phezu kwayo yoke indawo yentaba yeZiyoni, lapha abantu bahlanganyela khona. Iphazimulwakhe izakuba sithala phezu kwakho koke," 
Isaiah4:6 kube njengesidalasi esenza umthunzi ekutjhiseni kwemini nobuphephelo bokubalekela isiwuruwuru nezulu. 
Isaiah5:1 Angivume ingoma esikhundleni somnganami, iye, ingoma yomnganami ngesidiribe sakhe. Umnganami gade anesidiribe embundwini onothileko." 
Isaiah5:2 Wawemba, wasusa woke amatje kiwo, wawutjala isidiribe esikhethekileko. Wakha isithala somlindi phakathi kwawo bewagobhodlha ubutlhodlhelo edwaleni. Walindela bona sihlome amadiribe kodwana sahloma amunyu wommango." 
Isaiah5:3 Nje-ke uSomnini uthi: “Nina zakhamuzi zeJerusalema nani bantu bakwaJuda, gwebani hlangana nami nesidiribe sami." 
Isaiah5:4 Yini-ke, okhunye ebengingakwenza ngesidiribe sami ukudlula lokho esele ngikwenzileko na? Kubayini ngithi lokha nangilindele bona sihlome amadiribe, sona sihlome amunyu na?" 
Isaiah5:5 Nje-ke, ngizonitjela bona ngizokwenzani ngesidiribe samesi: Ngizokususa isibiyelo saso bona sidliwe; ngigirize nomthangalaso bona sirathwe." 
Isaiah5:6 Ngizosenza bona sibe libhudu, singasahlungwa namkha sihlawulelwe, kukhule iminga nameva; ngizokuyala namafu bona angasanisi izulu phezu kwaso.”" 
Isaiah5:7 Isidiribe sakaSomnini uMninimandlawoke siyindlu ka-Israyeli, nabantu bakwaJuda basitjalo sakhe esikhethekileko. Walindela ubulungiswa, kodwana qala, kwaba kukwephulwa komthetho walindela ukulunga, kodwana qala, kwaba sililo sesizi." 
Isaiah5:8 Nizazizwa nina enithumba izindlu ngezindlu, niphange isimu phezu kwamasimu bekungasabi nendawo eseleko, kusale nina nodwa phakathi nenarha." 
Isaiah5:9 Ngimzwile uSomnini uMninimandlawoke afunga athi: “Ngiqinisile izindlu ezinengi zizokuphenduka amarubhi, kuthi ezikulu nezihle zisale zinganabantu." 
Isaiah5:10 Mbala, emasimini alitjhumi wesidiribe kuzakuphuma imigqomu emibili yewayini kwaphela nembewini engangentundu eyodwa kadumbana kuphume upumpana wamabele kwaphela.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Bazazizwa labo abavuka ngamasa, bagelagele ngemva kotjwala; bahlale bekube sebusuku, bafuthunyezwe liwayini." 
Isaiah5:12 Eminyanyenabo kukhona imihlobohlobo yamaharibha, abosotjherere, iinghwani kanye newayini; kodwana izenzo zakaSomnini abaziyeleli nemisebenzi yezandla zakhe abayitjheji." 
Isaiah5:13 Ngalokho abantu bami bazakuthunjwa ngebanga lokutlhoga ilwazi lakaSomnini. Abahloniphekako babo bazokufa yindlala neenqubuthu zabo zizakuphaphatheka kukoma. 
Isaiah5:14 Iye, indawo yabafileko seyikhamise umlomayo beyawukhebelelisa ngokunganeliko. Abahloniphekako neenqubuthu zeJerusalema, labo abenza itjhada lokuzikhakhazisa, bazakwehlela kiyo." 
Isaiah5:15 Ngaleyondlela abantu bazakuthotjiswa, omunye nomunye wabo arhubutjhwe, iye, amehlo wabazikhakhazisako athotjiswe." 
Isaiah5:16 Kodwana uSomnini uMninimandlawoke uzakuphakanyiswa ngomthethwakhe, uZimu ocwengileko azibonakalise ngokulunga kwakhe." 
Isaiah5:17 Iimvana zizakudla emadlelwenazo, izimvu ezinonisiweko zizidlele umathanda hlangana namarubhi." 
Isaiah5:18 Bazazizwa labo abazidosela isibetho ngemitja yekohliso nesono njengomuntu odosa ikoloyana ngentambo; 
Isaiah5:19 iye, labo abathi: “UZimu akarhabe, enze umsebenzakhe masinyana bona siwubone; ilisu loCwengileko wakwa-Israyeli alivele, ukuze nathi silazi.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Bazazizwa labo abathi ukonakala kulunga, ukulunga kukonakala, abenza ukukhanya inga bumnyama, ubumnyama inga kukhanya, ukubaba inga bumnandi, ubumnandi inga kubaba." 
Isaiah5:21 Bazazizwa labo abahlakaniphileko emehlwenabo nabazibona banokwazi ekuboneni kwabo. 
Isaiah5:22 Bazazizwa labo abaziingwenya zokusela iwayini neenkutani zokudidiyela utjwala," 
Isaiah5:23 labo abatjhaphulula onomlandu ngokufunjathiswa bagodle ilungelo labalungileko. 
Isaiah5:24 Ngebangelo-ke, njengamalangabi womlilo naqothula amawunguwungu nanjengotjani obomileko nabubabulwa malangabi, ngokunjalo imirabhabo izakukhuna namakhwa wabo aphephuke njengethuli; ngombana badele umthetho kaSomnini uMinimandlawoke banyaza amezwi woCwengileko wakwa-Israyeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Nje-ke, ubukhali bakaSomnini buyavutha ebantwini bakhe; uzakuphakamisa isandla sakhe abarhadle phasi, bekuhlengezele iintaba. Iindumbu zabo zizakufana neenzibi eendledlaneni. Nangaphezu kwakho koke lokhu ubukhali bakhe abuzukusuka, isandla sakhe sizakuhlala siphakamile:" 
Isaiah5:26 Uzakuphakamisela izizwe ezikude iphawu, abethe ipembe, abize isizwe esisepelazwe, size masinyana nangokurhaba." 
Isaiah5:27 Akakho namunye kiso odinwako namkha okhutjwako, akakho oyendako namkha alale; akunabhande elitjhaphulukako edinini nepatlagwana elinomtjana odabukako." 
Isaiah5:28 Imisubela yaso ibukhali nemisebaso yoke iqutjhiwe, iinqatha zeenjomani zaso zikghwara njengelitje lomlilo, amavili weenkaranyana zaso afana nesivunguvungu." 
Isaiah5:29 Umdumaso unjengokubhodla kwebhubezi, sirora njengamabhubezana, sirhonga bese sibamba inyamazana, siyithwale kusweleke nomenyeli." 
Isaiah5:30 Mhlokho sizakurora ngaphezu kwayo njengokubhodla kwelwandle. Lokha umuntu naqala enarheni abone ubumnyama namatlhuwo; ukukhanya kuzakuphiphazwa mamafu. 
Isaiah6:1 Ngomnyaka okwahlongakala ngawo ikosi u-Uziya, ngabona uSomandla ahlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi esiphezulu nesiphakamileko; nomphetho wephuraphurakhe ugcwele ithempeli." 
Isaiah6:2 Amaserafu bekaphephezela ngehla kwakhe, kungilelo nalelo lineempiko ezintandathu: Ngeempiko ezimbili gade azivale ubuso, ngezimbili iinyawo, ngezimbili aphapha." 
Isaiah6:3 Gade arhuwelelana wodwa, elinye nelinye lithi: “Ucwengile! Ucwengile! Ucwengile uSomnini uMninimandlawoke! Iphasi loke ligcwele iphazimulwakhe!”" 
Isaiah6:4 Ngomdumo wamezwawo kwagedlezela imikhonywana yomnyango nethempeli lagcwala intuthu. 
Isaiah6:5 Ngalila ngathi: “Maye mina, ngiphelile! Ngimumuntu weembhena ezisilapheleko begodu ngihlala phakathi kwabantu abanemilomo esilapheleko. Nanyana kunjalo amehlwami ayibonile iKosi, uSomnini uMninimandlawoke!”" 
Isaiah6:6 Yeke elinye lamaserafu laphaphela kimi liphethe ilahle elivuthako ebelilithethe ngedlawu e-alidarini. 
Isaiah6:7 Lafese lathinta umlomami ngelahlelo lathi: “Qala, njengombana lokhu sekuthinte iimbhena zakho, umlandwakho sewususiwe nezono zakho sezithethelelwe.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Ngabese ngizwa ilizwi lakaSomandla lisithi: “Ngizakuthuma bani? Ozasiyela ngubani?” Ngaphendula ngathi: “Mina ngikhona, thuma mina!”" 
Isaiah6:9 Wathi: “Khamba ufese uthi ebantwinaba, ‘Lalelani njalo abaphorofidi bamanga kodwana anizukuzwisisa! Yelelani njalo imibonwabo kodwana anizukulemuka!’" 
Isaiah6:10 Yenza ihliziyo yabantwaba iyathe neendlebe zabo zibe buthuntu uphophaze namehlwabo ukuze bangaboni ngawo, bezwe ngeendlebe zabo, balemuke ngeenhliziyo zabo bebaphenduke bese bayaphiliswa.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Yeke ngabuza ngathi: “Bekube nini, Somandla na?” Yena wathi: “Bekube kulapha amadorobho aba marubhi khona, kungasahlali muntu, izindlu zisale zinganabantu nenarha ibe mrhula." 
Isaiah6:12 Iye, bekube kulapha uSomnini asuse khona abantu, bube bukhulu ubuze bokutjhiywa kwenarha." 
Isaiah6:13 Ngitjho nanyana enarheni kusele itjhumi ekhulwini, nalo lizakuqothulwa godu. Kodwana njengomuthi we-owuku namkha omunye nomunye omkhulu otjhiya isiphunzi nawugawuliweko, ngokunjalo kuzakusala isiphunzi okutjho isizukulwana esicwengileko.”" 
Isaiah7:1 Ngesikhathi saka-Arhazi, umsa kaJotamu omsa ka-Uziya ikosi yakwaJuda, uRetsini ikosi ye-Aramu noPhekharhi umsa kaRemaliya, ikosi yakwa-Israyeli, bajokola bakhuphuka bona balwe neJerusalema, kodwana akhange bakghone ukuyisahlela." 
Isaiah7:2 Lokha indlu kaDavida nayitjelwako, kwathiwa, “i-Aramu iqheme no-Efrayimu”, u-Arhazi nabantu bakhe bahlengezela ngevalo kwanga mimithi yehlathi lokha nakunommoya." 
Isaiah7:3 Nje-ke, uSomnini wathi ku-Isaya: “Phuma wena nendodanakho uTjheyari-Yatjhubi nihlangabeze u-Arhazi ngemaphelelweni womsele ovela esizibeni esingehla, endleleni eya endaweni lapha kuhlanzwa khona iimpahla." 
Isaiah7:4 Ufese uthi kuye, ‘Yelela, wehlise ummoya, ungesabi begodu ungadani ngenca yemitshwinya emibili yeenkuni nangebanga lobukhali obuvuthako bakaRetsini we-Aramu nomsakaRemaliya." 
Isaiah7:5 Iye, ungesabi i-Aramu, u-Efrayimu nomsakaRemaliya abakusongela ngokuthi:" 
Isaiah7:6 Asikhuphukeleni kwaJuda, asethuse iJerusalema, sizihlulele yona besenze nomsa kaThabiyali abe yikosi khonapho." 
Isaiah7:7 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomandla, uSomnini: Lokho akuzukwenzeka, abe akuzukuphumelela," 
Isaiah7:8 ngombana ihloko ye-Aramu seyiDamaseku nehloko yeDamaseku seyiRetsini kwaphela. (Ngeminyaka ematjhumi asithandathu nahlanu, u-Efrayimu uzabe asele asabalele khulu kobana angaba sisizwe.)" 
Isaiah7:9 Ihloko ye-Efrayimu seyiSamariya nehloko yeSamariya seyindodana kaRemaliya kwaphela. Nawungajami uqine ekukholweni kwakho, vele awusoze wajama.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:10 USomnini wakhuluma no-Arhazi godu wathi: 
Isaiah7:11 “Bawa isibonakaliso kuSomnini uZimakho, kungaba phasi ekuzikeni nanyana phezulu ekuphakameni.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Kodwana u-Arhazi wathi: “Angizukubawa, abe angizukulinga uSomnini.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Yeke u-Isaya wathi: “Lalela la wena ndlu kaDavida! Akukaneli kanti ukukhola umuntu kobana ningabeze nikhole uZimami godu na? 
Isaiah7:14 Ngalokho-ke, uSomandla ngokwakhe uzonenzela isibonakaliso: Qala, iqhakazana lisidisi, lizakubeletha indodana, liyithiye ibizo bona ngu-Imanuweli." 
Isaiah7:15 Izakudla amakghamatha namanembe bekufike lapha yazi khona ukuhlukanisa okuhle nokumbi. 
Isaiah7:16 Kodwana ngaphambi kokobana indodana yazi ukwahlukanisa okuhle nokumbi, inarha yamakhosi amabili owesabako lawo izabe sele itjhiyiwe." 
Isaiah7:17 USomnini uzakuletha phezu kwakho, Arhazi, naphezu kwabantu bakho nendlini kayihlo, isikhathi esingazange khe sibe khona kusukela lapha u-Efrayimu ahlukana khona noJuda, okutjho ikosi ye-Asiriya!”" 
Isaiah7:18 Mhlokho uSomnini uzakubetha ipembe abize iimpukani emaphethelweni wemilanjana yeGibhide neenyosi ezisenarheni ye-Asiriya. 
Isaiah7:19 Zizakubuya zoke zibuthane emirhobeni yamawa nemipharwini yamadwala, phezu kweminga yoke nemithonjeni yoke yamanzi." 
Isaiah7:20 Mhlokho uSomandla uzakusebenzisa utjhefana oqatjhwe ngaphetjheya kweYufrathe, okutjho ikosi ye-Asiriya, agude ngaye imizimba yenu yoke. Iye, utjhefana loyo uzakususa neendevu zenu." 
Isaiah7:21 Mhlokho umuntu uzakufuya ithokazi, imbuzi nemvu." 
Isaiah7:22 Ngebanga lobunengi bebisi uzakudla amakghamatha. Iye, boke abasele enarheni bazakudla amakghamatha namanembe." 
Isaiah7:23 Mhlokho, kiyo yoke indawo lapha bekuneenkulungwana zamadiribe abiza iinkulungwana zeempaparwana zesiliva, kuzakuba khona iminga nameva." 
Isaiah7:24 Umuntu uzakuya lapha aphethe umsebe nemisubela ngombana yoke indawo izakuba miminga nameva. 
Isaiah7:25 Emibundwini yoke eyakhe yahlawulwa ngelembe, akusazokuyiwa kiyo ngokwesaba iminga nameva. Izakuba yindawo yokukghaphela iinkomo, lapha izimvu zizazikhambela khona umathanda." 
Isaiah8:1 USomnini wathi kimi: “Thatha isithetjhelele esikhulu utlole kiso ngokunghwara okujayelekileko bunje: Hlangula masinyana, uphange ngokurhaba." 
Isaiah8:2 Ngibize u-Uriya umphristi noZakariya umsa kaYebherekiya bonyana bangifakazele ngokuthembekileko.” 
Isaiah8:3 Yeke ngangena umphorofidikazi, wazithwala wabeletha umsana. USomnini wathi kimi: “Mthiye ibizo bona nguMhlangulimsinyana-Mphangingokurhaba." 
Isaiah8:4 Phambi kobana umsanyana akwazi ukuthi ‘Babami’ namkha ‘Mmami’, umnotho weDamaseku nepango yeSamariya kuzakusiwa ekosini ye-Asiriya.”" 
Isaiah8:5 USomnini wakhuluma nami godu wathi: 
Isaiah8:6 “Abantwaba bale amanzi weTjhilowarhi ageleza kabuthaka ngombana baphela amandla ngebanga lakaRetsini nomsa kaRemaliya," 
Isaiah8:7 ngalokho-ke uSomandla sele azobehlisela iinkhukhula ezinamandla zeYufrathe, okutjho ikosi ye-Asiriya nabahloniphekileko bayo boke. Izakuphakama ngaphezu kwawo woke amasebayo, iphuphume ngehla kwawo woke amadongayo." 
Isaiah8:8 Izakukhiphizela iphalalele kwaJuda, irhurhule ukufikela entanyeni. Ngambala, amaphethelo wamanzi azakunaba agcwale ububanzi benarhakho, wena Imanuweli!”" 
Isaiah8:9 Abantu bathi: “Lokha nanirhahlawulako nina zizwe, nizokukhena! Lalelani nina bantu abasemaphethelweni wenarha: Nanizilungiselela ipi, nizokukhena! Iye, nanizilungiselela ipi, nizokukhena ngiyanitjela!" 
Isaiah8:10 Ningalumbisana amano, kodwana azakufeleliswa! Nanyana ningathiyisana amaqhinga, anizukuphumelela ngombana uZimu unathi.”" 
Isaiah8:11 Kodwana nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini kimi lokha isandla sakhe esinamandla nasingivimba kobana ngingalandeli imikghwa yabantwaba: 
Isaiah8:12 “Ningase senivume isivumelwano njalo nje lokha abantwaba nabathi, ‘Asenzeni isivumelwano!’ Abakwesabako ningakwesabi, ningabi nevalo ngakho." 
Isaiah8:13 USomnini uMninimandlawoke, akabe nguye yedwa ocwengileko kini. Yena akabe kukwesaba kwenu nevalo lenu." 
Isaiah8:14 Iye, uSomnini uzakuba yindawo ecwengileko yokuphephela, kodwana kizo zombili izindlu zakwa-Israyeli uzakuba lilitje elikhubako nedwala elibawisako. Ebantwini beJerusalema uzakuba sisifu nesithiyo." 
Isaiah8:15 Abanengi babo bazokukhutjwa, bawe bebaphuke; bazagadanga isithiyo babanjwe." 
Isaiah8:16 Songa ubufakazi obutlolilekobo, unamathelise isifundweso phambi kwabafundi bami.”" 
Isaiah8:17 Ngizakulindela uSomnini ositheza ubuso bakhe endlini kaJakopo. Ngizakwethembela kuye. 
Isaiah8:18 Qala, ngilapha mina nabantwana uSomnini angiphe bona kobana babe matshwayo neembonakaliso kwa-Israyeli. Koke lokhu kubuya kuSomnini uMninimandlawoke ohlala entabeni iZiyoni" 
Isaiah8:19 ngombana abantu bazakuthi kini: “Phengulani ezangomeni nakilabo abanemimoya abahlebahlebako nabamumuruzako. Angithi abantu kufuze babuze ebezimini babo; iye, babuze isifundo nesiqiniseko kabafileko malungana nabaphilako.” Nakube abantu abakhulumi okukhambisana nesiphorofidwesi esingeze saqedwa amandla ngomlingo" 
Isaiah8:20 bazakuzulazula ngedorobheni badanile begodu balambile. Lokha nasele banephango, bazakubhoka ngobukhali bathuke ikosabo nabezimu babo. Bazakuthalaza phezulu" 
Isaiah8:21 bafunafune phasi, kodwana kuzakuba kukhungatheka nobumnyama bodwa phezu kwabo. Bazakuqotjhwa basakhungathekile begodu basemnyameni, ngaphandle komkhanyo." 
Isaiah9:1 Akuzokuba nokuphunyurha kilabo ababambeke ebumnyameni ngesikhatheso. Eenkathini ezadlulako wathobisa inarha yakwaZebuloni neyakwaNafthali, kodwana esikhathini esizako uzakuhlonipha iGalile labezizwe endleleni eya elwandle ngaphetjheya kweJordani." 
Isaiah9:2 Abantu abakhamba ebumnyameni babone ukukhanya okukhulu, kilabo abahlala enarheni yethunzi elesabekako ukukhanya kwakhanya phezu kwabo." 
Isaiah9:3 Sewusikhulisile isizwe, wandisa nokuthaba kwaso, sijabulile phambi kwakho njengokujabulela isivuno, iye, nanjengabantu abajabulako nababelana ipango." 
Isaiah9:4 Mbala, njengamhlana kuhlulwa iMidiyani, uliphohlozile ijogi elidisibeza isizwe, okulibhoko elivundle emahlombaso, iye, intonga yabatjhotjhozeli baso." 
Isaiah9:5 Elinye nelinye inyathelo lejoni elibhaduza ngetjhada nenaka lalo elichaphazelwe ziingazi lizakutjhiswa lidliwe mlilo. 
Isaiah9:6 Mbala, sibelethelwe umntwana, siphiwe indodana. Umbuso uzakuba semahlombayo, izakubizwa bona nguMlulekimmangalisi, uZimumandla, uBabasiphelani noKosikuthula," 
Isaiah9:7 ukuze umbuso wenabe nokuthula kungapheli esihlalweni sakaDavida nembuswenakhe. Izawunzinzisa ngokuwusekela ngobulungiswa nokulunga ukusukela ngesikhathesi bekube nini nanini. Itjisakalo kaSomnini uMninimandlawoke izakuphelelisa koke lokhu. 
Isaiah9:8 USomandla uthumele umlayezo kuJakopo, wona wehlela kuma-Israyeli." 
Isaiah9:9 Soke isizwe, okutjho u-Efrayimu nabahlali beSamariya, bazizwela wona, kodwana ngokuziphakamisa nokuzikhakhazisa kwehliziyo bathi:" 
Isaiah9:10 “Iintina ziwele phasi, kodwana sizakwakha ngamatje abaziweko; imithi yamakhiwani igawuliwe, kodwana sizayijamiselela ngemithi yemisedari.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Nje-ke uSomnini wandise izitha zakaRetsini bona zijamelane nama-Israyeli, watlhorholoja namanaba wawo," 
Isaiah9:12 okutjho ama-Aramu ngepumalanga namaFilista ngetjingalanga. Wona agomojela u-Israyeli! Kikho koke lokho ubukhali bakaSomnini akhange busuke nesandla sakhe sahlala siphakamile. 
Isaiah9:13 Khonapho abantu akhange babuyele kobabethileko begodu azange bafune uSomnini uMninimandlawoke. 
Isaiah9:14 Yeke uSomnini waqunta u-Israyeli ihloko nomsila, wamhluba iimpiko." 
Isaiah9:15 Ihloko yaka-Israyeli baphathi neenkhulu, umsila kube baphorofidi abafundisa amanga." 
Isaiah9:16 Iye, abarholi babantwaba bayabalahla nebegade badinga ukuhlahlwa bebakakamele." 
Isaiah9:17 Ngebangelo uSomandla akhange athabe ngamasokanabo, begodu azange arhawukele ntandani namhlolokazi. Mbala, soke isizwe besinganaZimu, siziingilamkhuba nemilomo yoke ikhuluma ubudlhayela. Kikho koke lokho ubukhali bakaSomnini akhange busuke nesandla sakhe sahlala siphakamile." 
Isaiah9:18 Ubukhohlakali buvutha njengomlilo, buqothula iminga nameva, butjhisa isithurha kube sikhatha sentuthu ekhuphukako." 
Isaiah9:19 Ngobukhali bakaSomnini uMninimandlawoke inarha izakuba libhudu nabantu bafane neensahlela zomlilo. Akuzukuba namuntu obabalela wakwabo. 
Isaiah9:20 Barhiribidela ngesidleni, kodwana baba nephango, badla ngesinceleni, kodwana banganeliseka. Iye, omunye nomunye wadla umfowabo:" 
Isaiah9:21 UManase wadla u-Efrayimu no-Efrayimu wadla uManase, bobabili njalo bebajamelene noJuda. Kikho koke lokho, ubukhali bakaSomnini akhange busuke nesandla sakhe sahlala siphakamile." 
Isaiah10:1 UZimu wathi: “Bazazizwa labo abajamisa imithetho emimbi nalabo abatlola iimiso eziyingozi 
Isaiah10:2 ukuze baphambanise amalungelo wabachakileko, bagalaja iimfanelo zabadududu ebantwini bami kobana abahlolokazi babe yipangwabo neentandani zibe bongazimbi babo." 
Isaiah10:3 Nizokwenzani ngelanga lokuhlunguphazwa, lokha kuza isiwuruwuru sivela kude na? Uzokubalekela kubani mayelana nokusizeka, umnothwenu nizowutjhiya nobani?" 
Isaiah10:4 Awa, abantwabo bazakhukhutha hlangana nabathunjwa, bawele hlangana nababuleweko. Kikho koke lokho ubukhali bakaSomnini akhange busuke nesandla sakhe sahlala siphakamile.”" 
Isaiah10:5 Godu uZimu wathi: “Azazizwa ama-Asiriya, okuyintonga yobukhali bami, esandleni sawo kunomtjhiza welaka lami." 
Isaiah10:6 Ngiwathumela esizweni esinganaZimu, ngiwayalele ebantwini abangisilingako ukuze athathe ipango, ahluthule ipahla; abe abagadange njengedaka eendledlaneni." 
Isaiah10:7 Kodwana wona bekangakanqophi ukwenza lokho; lokhu bekungekho emkhumbulwenawo! Kunalokho, eenhliziyweni zawo bekunokubhubhisa, iye, ukurhayila izizwe ezinengi." 
Isaiah10:8 Wona athi, ‘Iinduna zethu azisimakhosi zoke na?" 
Isaiah10:9 IKalino sayiphatha njengeKarikemitjhi, iRhamathi njenge-Ariphadi neSamariya njengeDamaseku." 
Isaiah10:10 Ngezandla zethu sathumba imibuso enabosingazimu neenthombe ezidlula zeJerusalema neSamariya. 
Isaiah10:11 Lokho esakwenza eSamariya nabosingazimu bayo, sizakwenza eJerusalema nabozinyana bayo.’ ”" 
Isaiah10:12 Lokha uSomandla sele alungise indabakhe nentabeni yeZiyoni neJerusalema, uzakuthi: “Ngizokuhlunguphaza ikosi ye-Asiriya ngebanga lemisebenzi yokuzikhukhumeza kwehliziywayo nokuzikhakhazisa kwamehlwayo aziphakamisako" 
Isaiah10:13 nangebanga lokobana ithe, ‘Ngamandla wesandla sami ngenze lokhu iye, ngokuhlakanipha kwami: Ngisuse imikhawulo yezizwe ngaphanga namagugwazo bengaguqisa abanamandla khulu bezakhamuzi zakhona." 
Isaiah10:14 Njengomuntu ofunyana isihlakana senyoni, kunjalo-ke isandla sami sifikelela umnotho wezizwe. Nanjengomuntu obuthelela amaqanda aseleko, nami-ke ngibuthelele iphasi loke. Akhange kube khona ophakuza iphiko namkha ovula umlomo ngokusabisa.’ ”" 
Isaiah10:15 Izembe vane khelizikhukhumeze phezu kogawula ngalo na? Isarha yona iyazikhakhazisa phezu kosarha ngayo na? Umtjhiza wona uyamjuguja owuphakamisako namkha intonga iphakamise ongasiso isigodo na? 
Isaiah10:16 Yeke, uSomandla, uSomnini uMninimandlawoke uzokukhehlisa iimbitjhimbitjhi zekosi ye-Asiriya; iye, uzokuthumela umgomani ovutha njengomlilo hlangana nabahloniphekako bayo." 
Isaiah10:17 Umkhanyo ka-Israyeli uzakuba mlilo, iye, oCwengileko wakhe abe malangabi; ngelanga linye nje umlilo lo uzakutjhisa bewuqothule ameva neminga ye-Asiriya." 
Isaiah10:18 Uzakubhubhisa ubuhle behlathi nemitjhana yakhona, iye, amatjhwaba nesiqu. I-Asiriya izakuba njengokuqobeka kowako." 
Isaiah10:19 Nemithi eseleko yehlathi layo izakuba libinzana ngitjho nomntwana uzayibala abe ayitlole. 
Isaiah10:20 Mhlokho imisalela yakwa-Israyeli, okutjho abasindileko bendlu kaJakopo bazazeyama ngeqiniso kuSomnini, ongoCwengileko wakwa-Israyeli. Angekhe basazeyama ngaloyo owabamukulako." 
Isaiah10:21 Abasindileko bazakubuya iye, imisalela kaJakopo izakubuyela kuZimu onamandla." 
Isaiah10:22 Wena Israyeli, nanyana abantu bakho bangangetjhwabatjhwaba yelwandle, kuzakubuya imisalela kwaphela. Ukubhujiswa kwakho sekumenyezelwe, kuzakupheleliswa ngokulunga." 
Isaiah10:23 USomandla, uSomnini uMninimandlawoke umemezele waqeda: lokho ukwenze elizweni loke." 
Isaiah10:24 Ngalokho-ke, nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomandla, uSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Nina bantu bami enihlala eZiyoni, ningesabi i-Asiriya nayinibetha ngentonga iphakamisela umtjhiza ngakini njengokwenza kweGibhide." 
Isaiah10:25 Masinyana ukusilingeka kwami kini kuzakuphela nobukhali bami buzakunqotjhiswa ekubhujisweni kwe-Asiriya.” 
Isaiah10:26 USomnini uMninimandlawoke uzakujuguja isibebhu ngehla kwama-Asiriya kube njengalokha amadlha amaMidiyani edwaleni le-Orebi. Intongakhe izakuba ngehla kwelwandle uzayiphakamisa njengombana ayiphakamisa eGibhide. 
Isaiah10:27 Mhlokho, umthwalo wekosi ye-Asiriya uzakususwa emahlombenenu nejogi layo entanyenenu lizakwephulwa. Yenyukela phambi kwepango enomnotho," 
Isaiah10:28 yadlula e-Ayathi, yaya eMigroni yatjhiya ipahlayo eMikimatjhi." 
Isaiah10:29 Nje-ke ibutho layo lavundla umrhoba laqupha ubusuku eGeba. IRama iyathuthumela, iGibeya yakwaSawula iyabaleka." 
Isaiah10:30 Rhahlawula wena ndodakazi yeGalimu! Ulalele wena muzi weLayitjha! Phendula wena Anatothi! 
Isaiah10:31 IMadimena ibalekile; izakhamuzi zeGebimu zibuthelela ipahlazo ebubhacweni. 
Isaiah10:32 Namhlanjesi ikosi leyo izabe ijame eNobi ikhombe ngesandla sayo entabeni yethempeli leZiyoni, embundwini weJerusalema." 
Isaiah10:33 Madekhethu! USomandla, uSomnini uMninimandlawoke uzokukghedlha iingala ngamandla amakhulu. Imithi ephakamileko izakugawulwa, iye, emide iwele phasi." 
Isaiah10:34 Izakurhadla iinthurhana ngezembe; iLibhanoni izokuwa phambi koSomandla. 
Isaiah11:1 Nanyana kunjalo ihlumela lizakuvela esidindini sakaJese iye, liqumbe lirarhe emirajenakhe." 
Isaiah11:2 UMoya kaSomnini uzakuba phezu kwalo, uMoya wokuhlakanipha nokuzwisisa, uMoya wokweluleka namandla, uMoya wokwazi nowokwesaba uSomnini." 
Isaiah11:3 Indlela elithatha ngayo izinto izakunzinza ekwesabeni uSomnini. Alizukugweba ngokubona kwalo namkha liqunte ngezwabethi. 
Isaiah11:4 Iye, lizakugweba abadududu ngokulunga, kwabasweleko bephasi liqinte ngokulinganako. Lizakurhadla iphasi ngentonga yeembhena zalo; ngomphefumulo womlomalo libhubhise iinkhohlakali." 
Isaiah11:5 Ukulunga kuzakuba libhande ephangweni lalo, iqiniso libe sithukulo edinini lalo." 
Isaiah11:6 Ipisi izakuphila nemvana, ingwe ilale ndawonye nembuzi; ikonyana, ibhubezana nesilwana esinonisiweko kuzakuba ndawonye kweluswe msanyana." 
Isaiah11:7 Ithole lizakudla mrhula munye nebhere, amakonyana wakhona alale ndawonye, ibhubezi lidle utjani njengekomo." 
Isaiah11:8 Isana lizakuthakasa hlanu komgodi webululu nomntwana omncani afake isandla sakhe ngemgodini wembedla. 
Isaiah11:9 Akakho ozakuba nokulimaza namkha abange umonakalo entabenami ecwengileko ngombana iphasi lizakuzala ilwazi lakaSomnini njengamanzi asibekele ilwandle. 
Isaiah11:10 Mhlokho umrabhu kaJese uzakujama njengephawu ebantwini; izizwe ziwuhlulukele nekhaya lawo libe lidumo. 
Isaiah11:11 Mhlokho uSomandla uzakwelula isandla sakhe kwesibili ukuhlenga imisalela yabantu bakhe abaseleko, abasuse e-Asiriya, eGibhide, ePatrosi, eKutjhe, e-Elamu, eTjhinari, eRhamathi neenhlengeleni zelwandle." 
Isaiah11:12 Uzakuphakamisela izizwe iphawu, abuthelele abahlakazekileko bakwa-Israyeli; abuthe abaphadlhaleleko bakwaJuda kusukela emagumbini womane wephasi." 
Isaiah11:13 Umona ka-Efrayimu uzakunyelela nezitha zakaJuda zipheliswe. Iye, u-Efrayimu angekhe asaba nomona ngoJuda noJuda angasabi sisitha saka-Efrayimu." 
Isaiah11:14 Boke njalo bazakudoyela emehlelweni wemibundu yamaFilista ngetjingalanga, bazakuphanga ipahla yabantu bepumalanga. Bazakulawula i-Edomu neMowabi, ama-Amoni abakhonze." 
Isaiah11:15 USomnini uzakubhubhisa ilwandlana leGibhide; akhombe iYufrathe ngesandla sakhe, ngommoya onamandla ayirhadle, ibe milanjana elikhomba ukuze umuntu akwazi ukweyama khona ngamapatlagwana." 
Isaiah11:16 Kuzabakhona indlela evulekileko yemisalela yabantu bakhe. Kilabo abasele e-Asiriya, kuzakuba njengamhlana ama-Israyeli aphuma enarheni yeGibhide." 
Isaiah12:1 Mhlokho wena Israyeli uzakuthi: “Somnini, ngizakukudumisa. Nanyana bewungisilingakalele, ilaka lakho lisukile wabuye wangiduduza." 
Isaiah12:2 Ngambala uZimu uyisindiswami, ngizamethemba ngingesabi. USomnini, iye uSomnini umamandla neenkhwepha zami begodu uyisindiswami.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Nizakukha amanzi ngokuthaba emthonjeni wesindiso. 
Isaiah12:4 Mhlokho nizakuthi: “Bongani uSomnini, nibize ibizo lakhe; nazise izenzo zakhe phakathi kwezizwe; nimemezele bona ibizo lakhe liphakamile." 
Isaiah12:5 Dumisani uSomnini ngombana wenze izinto ezibabazekako; lokhu akwaziwe ephasini loke. 
Isaiah12:6 Hlokomani, nililizele nina zakhamuzi zeZiyoni, ngombana mkhulu hlangana nani oCwengileko wakwa-Israyeli.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Isimemezelo sakaZimu ngeBhabheli esambulelwa u-Isaya umsa ka-Amotsi: 
Isaiah13:2 Phakamiselani iphawu phezu kwentatjana esipuna, nibarhuwelele ngelizwi elikhulu, nibakhwebe bona bangene emasangweni weenkhulu." 
Isaiah13:3 Mina ngokwami ngiyale ibutho lami elicwengileko, ngabiza iingorho zami kobana zifeze ilaka lami, iye, lezo ezijabula ngobukhosi bami." 
Isaiah13:4 Kunetjhada eentabeni, kwanga ngelesiqubuthu sabantu! Imibuso yephasi ihlokoma ngomkhosi, iye, izizwe zibuthene ndawonye! USomnini uSomandla uhlele ibutho kobana lilwe!" 
Isaiah13:5 Livela enarheni ekude, emaphethelweni wesibhakabhaka. USomnini uza neenkhali zetukuthelwakhe, kobana abhubhise ilizwe loke." 
Isaiah13:6 Rhahlawulani ngombana ilanga lakaSomnini litjhidele; likubhubhisa okuvela koSabekako. 
Isaiah13:7 Yeke zoke izandla zizakunyefa nehliziyo enye nenye yobhubhako iphele amandla. 
Isaiah13:8 Abantu bazakukhungatheka, bembathwe ziinhlungu neenhlabi njengomfazi onemirhelo; baqalane ngokukakamala, ubuso babo buphaphatheke." 
Isaiah13:9 Qalani, ilanga lakaSomnini litjhidele ngelunya, ngobukhali nangelaka elivuthako kobana lenze inarha ibe ligagadu; iye, libhubhise izoni zayo kiyo." 
Isaiah13:10 Iinkwekwezi zesibhakabhaka, ngitjho nezesiRuthwana nemithala yazo azizukukhupha umkhanywazo; ilanga lizakufiphala lisaphuma nenyezi ingavezi umkhanywayo." 
Isaiah13:10 Iinkwekwezi zesibhakabhaka, ngitjho nezesiRuthwana nemithala yazo azizukukhupha umkhanywazo; ilanga lizakufiphala lisaphuma nenyezi ingavezi umkhanywayo." 
Isaiah13:11 Ngizakuhlunguphaza iphasi ngobumbi balo nabakhohlakeleko ngamacalabo. Ngizakuphelisa ukuzitjhaya kweendeleli, ngithobise ukuzigqaja kweenrhonga." 
Isaiah13:12 Ngizakwenza bonyana obhubhako abe yivelakancani kunegolidembala, iye, kunegolide le-Ofiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Ngizakusikinya amazulu ukuze iphasi lihlengezele litjhide ebunzinzweni balo. Lokhu kuzakwenzeka ngetukuthelo kaSomnini uMninimandlawoke elangeni lelaka lakhe elivuthako. 
Isaiah13:14 Njengetsephe ethusiweko nanjengezimvu ezinganambuthi, ngiloyo naloyo uzakuphendukela ebantwini bekhabo, omunye nomunye abalekele enarheni yekhabo." 
Isaiah13:15 Boke abafunyanwako bazakuhlatjwa ngesabula, iye, boke abathunjiweko babulawe ngesikhali." 
Isaiah13:16 Amasana wabo azakuphihlizelwa ehlabathini phambi kwamehlwabo baqalile; iinkumba zabo ziphangwe, abafazi babo bagagadlhelwe." 
Isaiah13:17 Qalani, ngibavusele amaMede, anganamsebenzi nesiliva, nangathatjiswa ligolide." 
Isaiah13:18 Imisebawo izokubulala amasokana, akazukuba nezwelo phezu kwesithelo sesibeletho; amehlwawo akazukurhawukela abantwana." 
Isaiah13:19 NakuyiBhabheli, igugu lemibuso, ubuphaziphazi bedumo lamaKasidi, izakuba njengamadorobho weSodoma neGomora ngelanga uZimu awaketula ngalo." 
Isaiah13:20 Ayisoze beyisaba nezakhamuzi, iye, ingasahlalwa, iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana. Ama-Arabhu asoze ahloma amatendawo nabelusi angeze balalisa imihlambabo lapho." 
Isaiah13:21 Abothurhu berhalawumba bazakulala lapho neenkumba zayo zizale iindalwa ezitlewulako; lapho, kuzakuhlala iinciliba, kweqayeqe iimbandana ezisambuzi." 
Isaiah13:22 Iimpisi zizakubetha umule emibhotjhongweni yeBhabheli nabophagana eengodlweni zemikhuba. Isikhathi seBhabheli sitjhidele, amalangayo angekhe elulwe." 
Isaiah14:1 Ngaleyondlela uSomnini uzakurhawukela uJuda abuye akhethe u-Israyeli, ababuyisele enarhenabo. Abatjhili bazazifaka hlangana nabo bazinamatheze ekumbeni kaJakopo." 
Isaiah14:2 Izizwe zizabathatha zibalethe endawenabo. Ikumba ka-Israyeli izazithumba njengamakhoboka namakhobokakazi enarheni kaSomnini. Bazakuthumba labo ebegade babathumbile, babuse phezu kwalabo ebegade babagandelele." 
Isaiah14:3 Wena Israyeli, mhlana uSomnini akunikela ukuphumula eenhlungwini nekuwurubajekeni kwakho kanye nemsebenzini onzima ebewusetjenziswa wona," 
Isaiah14:4 uzakutjho nasi isiga ngekosi yeBhabheli uthi: “Akhese nithi niyaqala ukuphelelwa komgandeleli! Ubunzima sebuphelile! 
Isaiah14:5 USomnini wephule idondolo labakhohlakeleko, iye, intonga yababusi." 
Isaiah14:6 Elakeni labo, baphobola abantu amaduma anganamkhawulo. Ebukhalini babo, babusa izizwe ngelandelela enganasirhawu." 
Isaiah14:7 Iphasi loke liphumulile begodu linokuthula, abantu bazwakala ngokuhlokoma." 
Isaiah14:8 Ngitjho nemisayipurusi ithabile ngekosi leyo, imisedari yeLibhanoni ithi, ‘Soloko walaliswa phasi, abagawuli abasenyukeli kithi.’" 
Isaiah14:9 “Indawo yabafileko ngaphasi iyasikinywa, kobana ikuhlangabeze nawufikako: ngebanga lakho ivusa iinthunzi; iye, boke ebegade babarholi bephasi. Iphaphamise eenhlalweni zobukhosi boke ebegade bamakhosi wezizwe." 
Isaiah14:10 Boke bazakufakaza bathi kuwe, ‘Nawe sele ubuthakathaka njengathi! Sele ufana nathi patsi!’" 
Isaiah14:11 Idumo lobukhosi bakho lehliselwe endaweni yabafileko kanye netjhada lamaharibhakho. Iimpethu zimuseme ngaphasi kwakho neembungu zimukghadi ngehla kwakho. 
Isaiah14:12 “Maye, ukuwa kwakho ezulwini wena Khwezi, iye, wena ndodana yamarimarima! Wehliselwe equlwanini, wena owise izizwe!" 
Isaiah14:13 Nguwe owathi ehliziywenakho, ‘Ngizakwenyukela ezulwini, ngivuse isihlalo sami sobukhosi ngaphezu kweenkwekwezi zakaZimu; ngizakuhlala entabeni yehlangano yeendalwa zezulu, emajukujukwini wentaba yabozinyana." 
Isaiah14:14 Ngizakwenyukela esitlhorini samafu, ngizithathe njengofana nongoPhezulu.’" 
Isaiah14:15 Kodwana wehliselwe endaweni yabafileko, iye, emajukujukwini welizwe labaleleko." 
Isaiah14:16 Abakubonako bazakugolozela, bakuqalisise kuhle, bathi, ‘Umrhali lo, akusuye loya owanyakazisa iphasi, wasikinya nemibuso na?" 
Isaiah14:17 Nguye owenza ilizwe laba njengerhalawumba, wagiriza amadorobhalo, wangavuma bona abathunjwa bakhe babuyele ekhaya.’" 
Isaiah14:18 Woke amakhosi wezizwe alele ngedumo, enye nenye ethuneni layo," 
Isaiah14:19 kodwana wena ulahlelwe kude nezindla lakho, njengombungu ongabulungwa emathuneni. Wena wembethwe ngabafileko, abahlatjwe ngesabula, abatjhinga phasi emgodini, badibizeswe ngamatje. Njengesidumbu esigadangwako" 
Isaiah14:20 angeze wangcwatjwa njengamakhosi amanye ngombana urhayile inarhakho, wabulala abantu bekhenu. Inga iinzukulwana zabenza okumbi angeze kusakhulunywa ngazo nini nanini." 
Isaiah14:21 Lungisani indawo yokubulalela amadodanakhe, ngebanga lezono zaboyise. “Akangasavuki kobana azuze iphasi namkha agcwalise ubuso belizwe ngamadorobho," 
Isaiah14:22 ngombana ngizakujamelana nawo.” Watjho njalo uSomnini uMninimandlawoke. “Ngizakuqunta eBhabheli ibizo nemisalela, abantwana neenzukulwana.” Watjho njalo uSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Isaiah14:23 “Ngizayenza ibe sitete nendawo yokuhlala abogubudu. Ngizayithanyela ngomthanyelo orhayilako.” Watjho njalo uSomnini uMninimandlawoke. 
Isaiah14:24 USomnini uMninimandlawoke ufunge wathi: “Njengombana ngicabangile, kuzakuba njalo nanjengombana ngitlamile, kuzakwenzeka." 
Isaiah14:25 Ngizakwephula ama-Asiriya enarhenami, ngiwatshidlhe ngeenyawo eentabeni zami. Ijogi lawo lizakususwa ebantwini bami nomthwalwawo emahlombabo." 
Isaiah14:26 Leli liqhinga elihloselwe iphasi loke; iye, sisandla sami esilulekele ngaphezu kwazo zoke izizwe.”" 
Isaiah14:27 Ngambala uSomnini uMninimandlawoke ukuhlosile lokho, nje-ke ngubani ongakutshwilisa na? Isandla sakhe selulekile, ngubani ongasirhunyeza na?" 
Isaiah14:28 Nakhu okwamenyezelwa ngomnyaka okwahlongakala ngawo ikosi u-Arhazi: 
Isaiah14:29 Noke nina eFilistiya ningajekezeli ngokuphuka kwentonga enimadlhako ngombana emsileni wenyoka kuzakuphuma imbedla nesithelo sayo kuzakuba yinyoka emhlwazi, emsinyana inga iyaphapha." 
Isaiah14:30 Abachake khulu kwa-Israyeli bazakufumana amadlelo nabadududu balale baphephile. Kodwana ngizakubulalisa umrabhakho ngendlala, iye, indlala ibulale imisalelakho." 
Isaiah14:31 Lila wena sango; rhahlawula nawe dorobho, phelani amandla noke nina eFilistiya ngombana kuvela intuthu ngetlhagwini begodu akakho otjhiyiweko ekampeni yebutho." 
Isaiah14:32 Izakuthini ipendulo eenthunyweni zamaFilista na? Izakuthi: USomnini usekele iZiyoni nabadududu ebantwini bakhe bazakufumana ubuphephelo kiyo. 
Isaiah15:1 Isimemezelo sakaZimu ngeMowabi: Ngambala ngobusuku bokurhayilwa i-Ari-Mowabi beyibhujisiwe! Ngambala ngobusuku bokurhayilwa neKhiri-Mowabi beyibhujisiwe! 
Isaiah15:2 Ngalokho iDibhoni ikhuphukele ethempelini, iye, eendundumeni yayokurhahlawula; uMowabi ulilela iNebo neMedeba. Zoke iinhloko zigudiwe, kwasuswa zoke iindevu." 
Isaiah15:3 Eendledlaneni abantu bembatha iinzilo; bakhuphukela emaphahleni weenkumba nematatawini, godu woke umuntu wehla alila." 
Isaiah15:4 IRhetjhibhoni ne-Eliyale ziyarhuwelela, amezwazo azwakala ukufikela eJahatsi. Ngalokho amadoda ahlomileko wakwaMowabi ahlaba umkhosi imiphimbawo beyarhotjhoza." 
Isaiah15:5 Ihliziywami irhuwelela ngoMowabi, abaphalali bakhe babalekela eTsowari ne-Egilathi-Tjhelitjhiya. Mbala, emkhuphukeni weLurhithi benyuka barhahlawula; iye, nendleleni eya eRhoronayimu, bazwakalisa isililo sokurhayilwa" 
Isaiah15:6 ngombana amanzi weNimrimu omile, utjani butjhwabile, ihlaza liyatjhabalala, iye, akusenalitho elihlaza elisaseleko." 
Isaiah15:7 Ngalokho umnono abawuzuzileko, nalokho abakubutheleleko, bakuthethe bakhamba nakho ngaphetjheya komlanjana wemidubi." 
Isaiah15:8 Mbala, kuhlatjwe umkhosi enarheni yakwaMowabi; ukurhahlawulokho kufikelele e-Egilayimu bekwafikelela neBheri-Elimu." 
Isaiah15:9 UZimu wathi: “Nanyana amanzi weDibhoni azele ngeengazi nje, ngiyatjho ngizakwehlisela phezu kweDibhoni ngokudluleleko: amabhubezi kilabo abaphunyurhileko beMowabi, iye, kilabo abamisalela yenarha.”" 
Isaiah16:1 Thumelani amaqamana njengesibiko kumbusi wenarha yakwaJuda ukusukela eSela ukuqamula erhalawumbeni, ukuya entabeni yeZiyoni nomlayezo othi:" 
Isaiah16:2 “Njengeenyoni ezizulazulako, lokha naziqotjhwe eenhlakaneni zazo, anjalo namadodakazi wakwaMowabi, emazibukweni we-Arinoni." 
Isaiah16:3 Nje-ke, yiza neqhinga, wenze isiqunto; sigubuzesa ngomthunzakho njengobusuku lokha ilanga nalisefokothweni; ufihle abahlakazekileko, ungembuli abaphalali." 
Isaiah16:4 Vumela abahlakazekileko bethu bakhosele kuwe, ube siphephelo sakaMowabi kiloyo ofuna ukubarhayila. Ngambala, isifuthefuthe lesi sizakuphela, ukurhayila kukhawuke nabagandeleli banyamalale enarheni." 
Isaiah16:5 Angithi isihlalo sakho sobukhosi sinzinze ekwethembekeni begodu phezu kwaso kuhlezi othembekako! Iye, ngetendeni lakaDavida kunombusi othanda ubulungiswa notjhisakalela okulungileko.”" 
Isaiah16:6 Sizwile ngokuziphakamisa kwakaMowabi. Uzikhukhumeza khulu! Ukuzigqaja, ukuziphakamisa, ukuzitjhaya nekulumakhe emumoya kulilize lakolize." 
Isaiah16:7 Kodwana nje uMowabi sewuyazilila. Boke abantu bakhona bayalila ngebanga lamakwapa wamadiribe weKhiri-Rharesethi. Iye, niyahumuza ngombana nibhujiswe nya." 
Isaiah16:8 Ngambala amasimu weRhetjhibhoni atjhwabile, iye, neendiribe zeSibhima. Amakhosi wezizwe arhadla amadiribayo akhethekileko ebekafikelela ngitjho neJazeri, anabele erhalawumbeni; amahlumelawo gade asabalala ayamele ngaphetjheya kwelwandle." 
Isaiah16:9 Ngalokho ngirhahlawula isililo seJazeri ngebanga leendiribe zeSibhima, ngikuthambisa ngeenyembezi, wena Rhetjhibhoni nawe Eliyale ngombana umkhosi wepi uwele esivunweni seenthelo zakho nesamabelakho." 
Isaiah16:10 Itokozo nethabo kususiwe esivandeni seenthelo; eendiribeni akusabhinwa iingoma, akusahlokonywa nomtlhodlhi wewayini akasekho ebutlhodlhelweni. USomnini wathi: “Ngikuthulisile ukuhlokoma!”" 
Isaiah16:11 Ngalokho ihliziywami ilila njengeharibha ngoMowabi, nomphefumulwami utlhuwela iKhiri-Rheresethi." 
Isaiah16:12 Godu uSomnini wathi: “Nanyana uMowabi angazibonakalisa namkha azikhathaze endawenakhe ecwengekileko, aye endundumeni kobana ayokuthandaza, akazukuphumelela.”" 
Isaiah16:13 Lelo bekulilizwi uSomnini alikhuluma ngoMowabi esikhathini esadlulako. 
Isaiah16:14 Gadesi uSomnini uthi: “Eminyakeni emithathu, njengeminyaka yesisebenzi esiqatjhiweko, idumo lakaMowabi lizakuthathelwa phasi phezu kobana anesiqubuthu sabantu. Imisalela izakuba libinzana, ingabi nedumo namandla.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Isimemezelo sakaZimu ngeDamaseku: “Qala, iDamaseku ayisazokuba yidorobho, izokuba liqubi leququ." 
Isaiah17:2 Imizi yomHlangulwa itjhiyiwe; seyingeyemihlambi elala lapho, kungabi nomuntu oyethusako." 
Isaiah17:3 Amadorobho wakwa-Efrayimu anemithangala akasekho nobukhosi beDamaseku bunyelele. Okuseleko kwe-Aramu kuzakunyamalala njengedumo lama-Israyeli.” Watjho njalo uSomnini uMninimandlawoke. 
Isaiah17:4 “Elangeni lakaSomnini idumo lakaJakopo lizakuba lilize ngombana inarha izakuhlangulwa. 
Isaiah17:5 Kuzakuba njengesikhathi sokuvuna lokha nakugwetjwa ikoroyi, ingalo yomgwebi nayikghedla iinqwambi zekoroyi; iye, kube njengoburuja iinqwambi emrhobeni wamaRafa." 
Isaiah17:6 Imisalela enarheni izakuba siburujo kube njengalokha nakutlhutlhurwa umuthi we-oliva: Kusale mabili mathathu ama-oliva avuthiweko esitlhorini abe mane mahlanu emagatjeni womuthi lowo.” Watjho njalo uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli. 
Isaiah17:7 Mhlokho abantu bazakurhuluphela umDali wabo, amehlwabo aqale oCwengileko wakwa-Israyeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Abazukurhuluphela ama-aldari okumsebenzi wezandla zabo begodu abazukuqala okwenziwe miminwabo, okutjho imifanekiso yabo-Atjhera nama-aldari wetjhwalo." 
Isaiah17:9 Mhlokho amadorobhabo azombelezwe mthangala, azakutjhiywa njengeendawo ezisantaba namahlathi, ezatjhiywa babantu lokha ama-Israyeli nafikako. Inarha leyo izakuba dududu" 
Isaiah17:10 ngombana nina bafazi nikhohlwe uZimu wesindiswenu, azange nikhumbule idwala lobuphephelo benu. Ngalokho-ke nanyana nitjala iintjalo ezikhethekileko nihlomelele uzinyana wezizwe ezitjhili iingojwana," 
Isaiah17:11 ngitjho namhlana nizikhulisa ngelanga enazitjala ngalo, nenza bonyana zithuthumbe ngokusa enazihlomela ngakho; isivuno sizakunyelela, ngomhla wesizi nobuhlungu obungalaphekiko." 
Isaiah17:12 Maye! Kuzwakala umrhubo wabantu abanengi, barhuba njengomrhubo welwandle! Kunokuhlokoma kwezizwe, zihlokoma njengokuhlokoma kwamanzi anamandla!" 
Isaiah17:13 Iye, izizwe zihlokoma njengokuhlokoma kwamanzi amanengi, kodwana uZimu uzazikhalima zibaleke ziye kude, zibe njengomungu ophetjhulwa mumoya eentabeni nekhula elomileko eligedwa siwuruwuru." 
Isaiah17:14 Qala, ngokuhlwa zehlelwa kukwesaba! Ngaphambi kokusa ziyatjhabalala! Sinjalo-ke isiphetho sabasiphangako, nesabelo sabasidlelezelako." 
Isaiah18:1 Izazizwa inarha enemikhumbi eneenseyila ngaphetjheya kwemilambo yeKutjhe," 
Isaiah18:2 ithumele abazenda ngeNayili ngeenthayamanzi zephaphirasi emanzini! Khambani nina nthunywa ezinebelo, niye esizweni eside nesibutjhelelezi, ebantwini abesatjwa eduze nakude, isizwe esinamandla nesitshidlhako, esinenarha esezelwa milambo." 
Isaiah18:3 Noke nina zakhamuzi zelizwe, nina enihlala ephasini, yeniqale lokha nakuphakanyiswa iphawu eentabeni! Lalelani lokha nakuvuthelwa ipalapala!" 
Isaiah18:4 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini: “Ngizakuqala phasi ngisendawenami, ngizithulele njengesimuku emini nanjengelifu lehlobo nakutjhisako." 
Isaiah18:5 Ngaphambi kwesivuno samadiribe, isikhathi sokuphalaza sele sidlulile sekulotjha iinthelo ezihlaza, amagatja angakahlomi azakuhlungwa ngemikhwa namahlumela womrabhu aruthulwe, alahlwe." 
Isaiah18:6 Ngokunjalo abantwabo bazakulahlwa boke emadlangeni weentaba neembandaneni zommango. Amadlanga azazitika ngabo ihlobo loke, ngokunjalo neembandana zommango ebusika." 
Isaiah18:7 “Ngesikhatheso kuzakulethwa iimbiko kuSomnini uMninimandlawoke, zivela esizweni eside nesibutjhelelezi ebantwini abesatjwa eduze nakude, isizwe esinamandla nesitshidlhako, esinenarha esezelwa milambo. Zizakulethwa entabeni iZiyoni, lapha kuhlala khona ibizo lakaSomnini uMninimandlawoke.”" 
Isaiah19:1 Isimemezelo sakaZimu ngeGibhide: Qala, uSomnini ukhwele ilifu eligijimako, wehlela eGibhide. Abosingazimu beGibhide bazakuthuthumela phambi kwakhe, abantu beGibhide baphele amandla." 
Isaiah19:2 “Ngizakuvusa umGibhide ajamelane nomGibhide, umuntu alwe nomfowabo umngani alwe nomnganakhe, idorobho lilwe nedorobho, isifunda silwe nesifunda." 
Isaiah19:3 Ummoya wamaGibhide uzakutjharagana ngombana ngizakuphambanisa amaqhingawo. Azakuphengula kibozinyana nebezimini, ezangomeni nakilabo abanemimoya." 
Isaiah19:4 Ngizakunikela amaGibhide esandleni somphathi onesihluku, azakubuswa yikosi enelunya.” Watjho njalo uSomandla onguSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Isaiah19:5 Amanzi weNayili azakutjha, iye, umlambo wome kere;" 
Isaiah19:6 imilanjanawo izakuba nesivunda, imisele yeGibhide inciphe beyome, yoke imihlobohlobo yemigaba ayizukubuna." 
Isaiah19:7 Isiminyaminya somhlanga magegana neNayili nebungenweni bayo elwandle sizakoma; iye, zoke iimila hlanu kweNayili zizakutjhwaba, ziphephuke, zingasaba khona." 
Isaiah19:8 Ababambi beenhlambi bazakulila; boke abaphosa iinkghopholahlambi ngeNayili bazakuthwala imikhono ehloko nalabo abaphosela amanedabo ngemanzini bakhene. 
Isaiah19:9 Abasebenza ngeflaksi bazakukakamala; abafazi abayihlengako nabayelukako baphaphatheke; 
Isaiah19:10 iye, abeluki beGibhide baqobeke, boke abaqatjhiweko babe lisizi." 
Isaiah19:11 Mbala, iinkhulu zeTsowani ziindlhadlha, abeluleki abahlakaniphileko bakaFaro banikela izeluleko zobudlhadlha. Ningatjho njani kuFaro nithi, “Sisizukulwana sabahlakaniphileko, iye, samakhosi wekadeni” na?" 
Isaiah19:12 Gibhide, ziphi-ke iinhlakaniphi zakho? Azikutjele bezikwazise, lokho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke akuhlele ngawe." 
Isaiah19:13 Iinkhulu zeTsowani ziphenduke iinrithirithi, nezeMemfisi zithembela elizeni; labo abasisekelo seenkoro baphambukise amaGibhide." 
Isaiah19:14 USomnini udidiyele phakathi kwabo ummoya wokuhlangahlangana; baphambukisa amaGibhide kikho koke akwenzako ukuze atherezele njengesidakwa esibhadazela emahlanzwenaso. 
Isaiah19:15 Akunanjinga nesichaka, omncani nomdala, ongasiza iGibhide." 
Isaiah19:16 Mhlokho amaGibhide azakufana nabafazi: Azakuthuthumeliswa kukwesaba isandla sakaSomnini uMninimandlawoke lokha nasiphakamako kobana sijamelane nawo. 
Isaiah19:17 Inarha yakwaJuda izakuba sisiga esesabekako kumaGibhide. Woke umuntu ozwa ngayo uzakwesaba ngebanga lalokho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke akuhlele ngokujamelana nabo. 
Isaiah19:18 Mhlokho kuzakuba namadorobho amahlanu enarheni yeGibhide akhuluma isiKanana abe azimanyanise noSomnini uMninimandlawoke. Elinye lamadorobho lawo lizakubizwa bonyana liDorobho leLanga. 
Isaiah19:19 Ngelangelo kuzakuba ne-aldari lakaSomnini ekabeni yenarha yeGibhide nelitje lakhe lesikhumbuzo emikhawulwenayo. 
Isaiah19:20 Lokho kuzakuba njengetshwayo nobufakazi kuSomnini uMninimandlawoke enarheni yeGibhide. Lokha nabalila kiyo ngebanga lomgandeleli, uzabathumelela umsindisi abenyele abe abatjhaphulule." 
Isaiah19:21 USomnini uzazazisa kumaGibhide, namaGibhide azakwazi uSomnini mhlokho. Azamlotjha ngemihlabelo nangeminikelo, enze iimfungo kuye." 
Isaiah19:22 USomnini uzakumadlha amaGibhide, kodwana ngokuwamadlha abe awapholise azakuphendukela kuye. Yena uzakulalela ukuncenga kwawo bese awapholise." 
Isaiah19:23 Mhlokho kuzakuba nendlela ekulu evela eGibhide iya e-Asiriya, lapha kuzakhamba khona ama-Asiriya naya eGibhide namaGibhide naya e-Asiriya. AmaGibhide azakulotjha uSomnini ahlangene nama-Asiriya." 
Isaiah19:24 Mhlokho, ama-Israyeli azakuba ngewesithathu ekuzimanyaniseni namaGibhide nama-Asiriya, babe sibusiso ekabeni yephasi" 
Isaiah19:25 ngombana uSomnini uMninimandlawoke uzababusisa athi: “Akabusiswe amaGibhide abantu bami, ama-Asiriya amsebenzi wezandla zami nama-Israyeli alilifa lami.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Lokho kwenzeka ngomnyaka lokha uSarigoni ikosi ye-Asiriya nayithuma indunayo yebutho e-Atjhidodi. Induna leyo yalwa ne-Atjhidodi beyayithumba. 
Isaiah20:2 Ngesikhatheso uSomnini wakhuluma ngo-Isaya umsa ka-Amotsi wathi: “Thukulula isambatho sokuzila edinini lakho bese uhlubula amapatlagwanakho.” Yeke wenza njalo, wakhamba hlubule neenyaweni angakafaki litho." 
Isaiah20:3 Nje-ke uSomnini wathi: “Incekwami u-Isaya ikhambe hlubule begodu ibhadule iminyaka emithathu njengetshwayo nesibonakaliso sokujamelana neGibhide neKutjhe. 
Isaiah20:4 Ngokunjalo-ke amaGibhide namaKutjhe, abadala nabancani, bazakurholwa yikosi ye-Asiriya njengeembotjhwa nanjengabathunjwa babulanzi, babhadule neenkhondo zabo zingakembeswa; kube lihlazo leGibhide." 
Isaiah20:5 Abahlali benarha eseligwini bazakukhena babe neenhloni ngebanga leKutjhe ithemba labo neGibhide igugu labo. 
Isaiah20:6 Iye, mhlokho bazakuthi, ‘Qalani bonyana kwenzekeni kilabo ebesithembele kibo nefese sabalekela kibo kobana basisize, basisindise ekosini ye-Asiriya! Maye thina! Alo sizophunyurha njani nakunje?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Isimemezelo sakaZimu ngebhudu elihlanu komlambo. Njengeemvunguvungu zangesewula eziza ngokudlhegana, ngokunjalo izitha zizakuza zivela erhalawumbeni, iye, zivela enarheni eyesabekako." 
Isaiah21:2 Ngambulelwa amezwi anzima: “Umkhapheli uyakhaphela nomrhayili uyarhayila. Khuphukani ma-Elamu! Vimbezelani maMediya! Koke ukububula okubangwe yiBhabheli ngizakuphelisa.” 
Isaiah21:3 Ngalokho idini lami liyagedla ngisahlelwe ziinhlungu njengomfazi obelethako; ngiyabinyabinyeka ngebanga lalokho engikuzwako, ngikakamale ngalokho engikubonako." 
Isaiah21:4 Ihliziywami iyathukuza ngethuswa lithunzi elesabekako; ukuhlwa engikuthandako kuphenduke ukuthuthumela kimi. 
Isaiah21:5 Balungisa isithebe, bendlala iincabhana, bayagoma, bayasela. Sikimani nina nduna, nilungise iinhlangu" 
Isaiah21:6 ngombana nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomandla kimi: “Khamba, ufese ubeke umlindi, amemezele lokho akubonako;" 
Isaiah21:7 emini aqaphe iinjomani ezibotjhelwe eenkaraneni zepi namajoni akhwele abodumbana namakamela, ebusuku alalelisise kuhle.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Yeke umlindi warhuwelela wathi: “Somandla, ngijame esithaleni sokulinda imini yoke, ngibekwe endawenami yokulinda ubusuku obunye nobunye." 
Isaiah21:9 Qala, nanguya umuntu asiza, ukhwele ikarana yeenjomani! Wabika wathi, ‘Iwile, ngithi iwile iBhabheli! Zoke iinthombembazwa, zabosingazimu bayo ziphahlazeke phasi!’ ”" 
Isaiah21:10 Bantu bami abagadangiweko, iye, nina enibhuliweko, engikuzwe kuSomnini uMninimandlawoke, uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ngikumemezela kini." 
Isaiah21:11 Isimemezelo sakaZimu ngeDuma: Kunomuntu ongibiza aseSeyiri, uthi: “Mlindi-ke, ubusuku sele bukhambe kangangani? Mlindi-ke, ubusuku sele bukhambe kangangani?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Umlindi wathi: “Ukusa kuyeza bese kuyahlwa godu. Nanisafuna ukubuza, ningabuza; kodwana nibuye lokha godu.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Isimemezelo sakaZimu mayelana nerhalawumba: Nina milandelande yamaDedani nina enihlala eenthukghwini zerhalawumba ebusuku 
Isaiah21:14 lethelani owomileko amanzi. Nina bahlali benarha yeTema, hlangabezani abaphalali ngesikwa" 
Isaiah21:15 ngombana babalekele iinsabula, iye, iinsabula ezirhwatjhiweko nemisebe equtjhiweko, iye, babalekele ukuwurubajwa yipi." 
Isaiah21:16 Ngambala nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomandla kimi: “Eminyakeni, njengeminyaka yesisebenzi esiqatjhiweko, loke idumo lakaKedari lizakunyelela" 
Isaiah21:17 nemisebe eseleko yeengorho zamaKedari izakuba libinzana ngombana uSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli ukhulumile.” 
Isaiah22:1 Isimemezelo sakaZimu ngomrhoba wombono. Ungenwe yini, wena Jerusalema kobana noke nikhuphukele ephahleni?" 
Isaiah22:2 Usiphithiphithi sedorobho esizele itjhada iye, wena umumuzi osiyaluyalu. Kodwana abarhayiliweko bakho abakarhayilwa ngesabula begodu abakabulawelwa epini." 
Isaiah22:3 Ababusi bakho babalekele ndawonye, bathunjwa ngaphandle komsebe. Boke bakho abasalako bathunjwa ndawonye nanyana bebabalekele kude." 
Isaiah22:4 Ngalokho-ke ngithi: “Ningazikhathazi ngami lokha nangilila ngibibitheka. Ningalingi ningiduduze ngokurhayilwa kwebekhethu.” 
Isaiah22:5 Mbala, liyeza ilanga levalo, ukugadangana nokuhlangahlangana; kulilanga lakaSomandla onguSomnini uMninimandlawoke. Emrhobeni wombono kuzakuba nokurhahlawula nokulilela isizo entabeni yeZiyoni." 
Isaiah22:6 I-Elamu sele ihlome ngesilanda namajoni akhwele iinkarana zepi ezibotjhelweko; iKhiri yembule iinhlangu. 
Isaiah22:7 Wena Jerusalema, imirhobakho yekhethelo sele izele iinkarana zepi iye, iinkarana zepi ezibotjhelweko sezijanyiswe emasangweni." 
Isaiah22:8 USomnini ususe isiviko sakwaJuda. Mhlokho nizakufuna iinkhali zeKumba yeHlathi," 
Isaiah22:9 nizakukhathazeka ngemiphundluko emthangaleni womuzi kaDavida, nikhe amanzi wesiziba esisenzasi." 
Isaiah22:10 Nizakukhetha iinkumba zeJerusalema, nigirize ezinye ukuze niqinise ngazo umthangala." 
Isaiah22:11 Nizakwenzela amanzi womthombo wakade umphathamanzi hlangana namaboda amabili. Kodwana azange nifune owenza umthombo lowo namkha nikhathazeke ngowawudala kade. 
Isaiah22:12 Mhlokho, uSomnini uSomandla onguMninimandlawoke wamemezela bona kulilwe bekuzilwe. Bekumele nigude iinhloko benembathe neenzilo," 
Isaiah22:13 kodwana esikhundleni salokho, kwaba nethabo netokozo. Nahlaba iinkomo, izimvu neembuzi nagoma inyama, nasela newayini, nathi: “Asigomeni, sisele ngombana ngomuso sizokufa.”" 
Isaiah22:14 USomnini uMninimandlawoke ukhulume eendlebeni zami: “Ngambala angeze nathethelelwa amacala la kufikela beniyokufa.” Watjho njalo uSomandla onguSomnini uMninimandlawoke. 
Isaiah22:15 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla, onguMninimandlawoke: “Khamba uye enduneni uTjhebhina, omphathi wesigodlo bese uthi kuye," 
Isaiah22:16 “ ‘Ufunani lapha? Unesihlobo lapha bonyana ungabe uzicozele ithuna na? (Nguye owazicozela ithuna endaweni ephakamileko, wazenzela indawakhe yokugcina edwaleni.)" 
Isaiah22:17 “ ‘Sekusele kancani bona mina Somnini ngikufuthele ngaphandle wena ozigqajako! Ngambala ngizakutantela; 
Isaiah22:18 iye, ubuthane njengendulungu yoboya ngikujikijele emajukujukwini. Uzakufela lapho neenkarana zakho zedumo nazo zizakusala khonapho, wena olihlazo ekumbeni yomphathakho!" 
Isaiah22:19 Ngizakusunduza endawenakho, ngikghurhurumeje esikhundleni sakho.’" 
Isaiah22:20 “Mhlokho ngizakubiza incekwami u-Eliyakhimu umsa kaRhilikhiya," 
Isaiah22:21 ngiyembathise ingubakho, ngiyibophelele edinini ngomkhungo wakho. Ngizakubeka igunya lakho esandleni sayo, ibe nguyise wezakhamuzi zeJerusalema nowekumba yakwaJuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Emahlombayo ngizakubeka isilodlhelo sekumba kaDavida. Izakuvula kungabi nomuntu ovalako; ivale kungabi novulako. 
Isaiah22:23 Ngizayibethela njengesikhonkhwani endaweni efaneleko, ibe sihlalo esihlonitjhwako emndenini wakwabo, iye eenzukulwaneni zoke. Kodwana woke umthwalo womndeni wakwabo uzakuphanyekwa esikhonkhwanenapho, ngitjho nazo zoke izitja zomkhaya, ukusukela kezincani ukuya kezikulu." 
Isaiah22:24 “ ‘Mhlokho,’ kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke, ‘isikhonkhwani esasibethelwe endaweni efaneleko sizakugobana, sephuke, siwe bese koke ebegade kukiso kutjhabalale.’ ” Mbala, uSomnini uMninimandlawoke ukhulumile." 
Isaiah23:1 Isimemezelo sakaZimu ngeTirosi: Rhahlawulani nina mikhumbi yokurhweba; aninakhaya ngombana iTirosi irhayiliwe! Kwabonakala lokho nayifika ivela enarheni yamaKithi. 
Isaiah23:2 Thulani, nina bahlali beligwini, nani barhwebi besifunda seTsidoni eneyama ilwandle. Abazenda benu" 
Isaiah23:3 behla basemanzini amanengi. Iinthoro zeTjhirhori, iye isivuno seNayili bekuyinzuzo yeTirosi okuyindawo yerhwebo yezizwe." 
Isaiah23:4 Yiba neenhloni, wena Tsidoni ngombana ilwandle likhulumile, iye, isiphephelo salo sathi: “Angisenamirhele, angibelethi, angikakhulisi amasokana, namkha ngondle amatlawu.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Nakufika umbiko eGibhide baba sesizini, iye, nabezwa umbiko weTirosi" 
Isaiah23:6 babalekela eTharatjhitjhi. Rhahlawulani nina bahlali beligwini! 
Isaiah23:7 Ngikho lokho okuseleko kwedorobho lenu elisiyaluyalu na? Umsuka walo ngewekadeni, abantu balo bakhamba ngerhwebo, bayokhonza emazweni akude." 
Isaiah23:8 Ngubani ohlele lokhu ngokujamelana neTirosi na? Idorobheli belimthwesi weenhlohlo, abarhwebi balo bekumakhosana nabathengisi balo bebabahlonitjhwa ephasini." 
Isaiah23:9 USomnini uMninimandlawoke ukuhlelile lokhu, kobana konakaliswe ukuziphakamisa kwabo boke abaziinkhulu, iye, ukuhlazisa boke abahlonitjhwako bephaseli." 
Isaiah23:10 Bantu beTaratjhitjhi, limani inarhenu njengombana basenza magegana neNayili ngombana abasenzi imikhumbi eTirosi." 
Isaiah23:11 USomnini welulele isandla sakhe ngehla kwelwandle, wasikinya imibuso, wakhupha umyalo mayelana neKanana, kobana kutjhabalaliswe iimphephelo zakhona." 
Isaiah23:12 USomnini wathi: “Angeze bewusayaluzela wena Tirosi, ndodakazi yeTsidoni, tlawu eligagadlhelweko! Ngitjho nanyana ungasikima uyamele kumaKithi nalapho awuzukuphumula.”" 
Isaiah23:13 (Qala inarha yamaKasidi yenze lokhu! Isizwe esingasekhweso, okutjho ama-Asiriya, ngiso esinikelela iTirosi ngabothurhu berhalawumba. Senza iinthala zokuvimbezela, sagiriza iingodlo zayo, sayitjhiya ilirubhi.)" 
Isaiah23:14 Rhahlawulani, nina mikhumbi yokurhweba ngombana isiphephelo senu sitjhabalalisiwe." 
Isaiah23:15 Ngesikhatheso iTirosi lizokulitjalwa iminyaka ematjhumi alikhomba, okusikhathi sokuphila kwekosi. Ekupheleni kweminyaka ematjhumi alikhomba, kuzakwenzeka phezu kweTirosi njengengoma evunywa ngengwadla:" 
Isaiah23:16 Thatha iharibha, uzombeleze idorobho, wena ngwadla elitjelweko! Yenza umkenenezo omnandi, vuma iingoma ezinengi, ukuze ukhunjulwe." 
Isaiah23:17 Ekupheleni kweminyaka ematjhumi alikhomba, uSomnini uzakukhambela iTirosi. Nje-ke ingwadla leyo izakuzuza godu, irhwebe ngokunyariya nayo yoke imibuso yephasi, iye, nayo yoke imibuso ebusweni bephasi." 
Isaiah23:18 Kodwana inzuzwayo kanye nomrholwayo kuzakuhlukaniselwa uSomnini. Lokho angeze kwabekwa namkha kugcinwe, kodwana kuzakuba ngokwabaphila ebukhoneni bakaSomnini. Kuzabondla ngokwaneleko kubahlinzeke nangezambatho zakanokutjho." 
Isaiah24:1 USomnini sele azakugiriza iphasi, alenze libe lirubhi, asonge ilingaphezulu lalo, ahlakaze nabahlali balo." 
Isaiah24:2 Kuzose kufane: Okwenzeka ebantwini, kuzakwenzeka nebaphristini okwenzeka kumakhoboka, kwenzeke nakubanini bawo; okwenzeka encekukazini, kwenzeke nakumphathikazayo; okwenzeka kumthengi, kwenzeke nakumthengisi; okwenzeka kumbolekisi, kwenzeke nakumboleki; okwenzeka kumatjhonisa, kwenzeke nakobolekako." 
Isaiah24:3 Iphasi lizakwenziwa irubhi, liphangwe ngokupheleleko. Mbala, uSomnini ukhulume amezwi la." 
Isaiah24:4 Inarha iyoma beyisasambe, iphasi liyabundana belisasambe, isibhakabhaka sibundana ndawonye nephasi." 
Isaiah24:5 Iphasi lisilaphazwe bahlali balo ngombana beqe imithetho, bangalalela iimiso, bephula isivumelwano sanini nanini." 
Isaiah24:6 Ngalokho amanikelela aginya iphasi, abahlali balo bahlunguphazeka ngomlandwabo, yeke abahlali bephasi bayaphunguka ngesibalo sekusele ibinzana lababhubhako." 
Isaiah24:7 Iwayini liyoma, isidiribe siyatjhwaba, boke abazithokozisako bayabubula." 
Isaiah24:8 Ukuthakasa kwabosotjherere kuthulisiwe, ukuhlokoma kwabayaluzelako kuphelile, ukuthakasa kweharibhana kuthulisiwe." 
Isaiah24:9 Abasaseli iwayini ngokubhina ingoma; amarhugu ayababa kilabo abawaselako. 
Isaiah24:10 Idorobho elitjhiyiweko liyabhuruka, zoke iinkumba zivaliwe, ukuze kungabi nomuntu ongenako." 
Isaiah24:11 Eendledlaneni kulilwa ngewayini, ithabo loke linyelele, ukuthakasa enarheni kuphelile." 
Isaiah24:12 Okusele ngedorobheni kuliququ, amasango aphohloziwe." 
Isaiah24:13 Kodwana ekabeni yephasi, iye, ngaphakathi kwezizwe kuzakuba nje: Njengalokha nakutlhutlhurwa umuthi we-oliva nanjengalokha nakuburujwa ekupheleni kwesivuno samadiribe," 
Isaiah24:14 abantwaba bazakuphakamisa amezwi, bahlokome ngobukhosi bakaSomnini. Bazakwakwazela ukusuka elwandle bathi:" 
Isaiah24:15 “Yeke, nikelani uSomnini idumo ngepumalanga, dumisani ibizo lakaSomnini uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, nina eningeligwini lelwandle." 
Isaiah24:16 Emkhawulweni wenarha sizwa iingoma ezithi, ‘Idumo koLungileko!’ ” Kodwana ngithi: “Ngiphela amandla! Ngiphela amandla! Maye mina! Abanobukhwebetjhana benza ubukhwebetjhana, iye, abanobukhwebetjhana benza ubukhwebetjhana!" 
Isaiah24:17 Ukwesabeka, umgodi nesifu kuyakwehlela, wena sakhamuzi senarha!" 
Isaiah24:18 Nanyana ngubani obalekela itjhada elesabekako, uzakuwela ngemgodini nophuma ngemgodinapho, uzakubanjwa sisifu! Mbala iintunja zezulu zivuliwe neensekelo zephasi ziyadengezela." 
Isaiah24:19 Iphasi liyaphadlheka nokuphadlheka, iphasi lisikinyeka kokusikinyeka, iphasi lizanyazanyiswa kokuzanyazanyiswa." 
Isaiah24:20 Iphasi litherezela njengesidakwa, liyethezela njengehlahla lomtlhatlhana iimphambeko zalo ziyalidisibeza, bese liyawa lingasavuki." 
Isaiah24:21 “Mhlokho uSomnini uzokuhlunguphaza ibutho lezulu ezulwini namakhosi wephasi ephasini. 
Isaiah24:22 Azakuhlanganiswa ndawonye njengeembotjhwa emgodini, avalelwe ngesikhungweni; ngemva kwamalanga amanengi ahlunguphazwe." 
Isaiah24:23 Inyezi egcweleko izakudana, ilanga libe neenhloni ngombana uSomnini uMninimandlawoke uzakubusa, entabeni yeZiyoni neJerusalema, aveze iphazimulwakhe ebaphathini babantu bakhe.”" 
Isaiah25:1 Somnini, wena unguZimami, ngizakuphakamisa, ngidumise ibizo lakho ngombana wenze imikarisomraro, waphumelelisa amahlelo atlanywa ekadeni ngokwethembeka nangeqiniso:" 
Isaiah25:2 Wenze idorobho laba liqubi leququ, idorobho elinemithangala laba marubhi, iye, isiphephelo sabatjhili asisese lidorobho begodu asisoze savuselelwa." 
Isaiah25:3 Yeke iintsitsirimba zizakudumisa wena Zimu, amadorobho wezizwe ezinelunya akwesabe." 
Isaiah25:4 Mbala, ube buphephelo babachakileko iye, ubuphephelo babadududu esizini labo, usiphephelo esiwuruwurwini nomthunzi emtjhisweni. Lokha ukubhavumula kwabanelunya nabekufana nesiwuruwu esitjhayisana neboda" 
Isaiah25:5 nalokha umrhubo wabatjhili nabewufana nomtjhiso wendawo eyomileko, wena wehlisa umtjhiso loyo ngomthunzi welifu ukuze ukubhina kwabanelunya kuthuliswe." 
Isaiah25:6 Entabeni le, uSomnini uMninimandlawoke uzokulungiselela boke abantu umnyanya weenkhanakhana newewayini eliyihleza; iye, iinkhanakhana ezinomhlosi newayini eliyihleza elitsengiweko." 
Isaiah25:7 Entabeni leyo uzakuqeda isigubuzeso, iye, isigubuzeso esisebusweni babantu boke ekuyingubo embese zoke izizwe." 
Isaiah25:8 Uzakuqeda ukufa unomphela. USomandla onguSomnini uzokusula zoke iinyembezi kibo boke ubuso; asuse ihlazo ebantwini bakhe, kilo loke iphasi. Mbala, uSomnini ukhulumile." 
Isaiah25:9 Mhlokho abantu bazakuthi: “Ngambala, uZimethu ula; samqalelela bona asisindise. Iye, nguye-ke uSomnini lo esathembela kuye; yeke asithabeni, sithokoze esindiswenakhe.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Isandla sakaSomnini sizakunzinza entabeni le, kodwana uMowabi uzakugadangelwa phasi njengotjani bugadangelwa emgodini womsuqwa." 
Isaiah25:11 UMowabi uzakwelula izandla zakhe ngemgodinapho, njengomdudi nakelula izandla bonyana athaye. USomnini uzakuthobisa ukuziphakamisa kwakhe, phezu kobana anezandla ezinekghono." 
Isaiah25:12 Imithangalakhe yokuzivikela ephakamileko, uSomnini uzoyibhuruza ayiwise, iye, ayigirize ilale ehlabathini, ibe lithuli." 
Isaiah26:1 Mhlokho, enarheni yakwaJuda kuzakubhinwa ingoma le: “Sinedorobho eliqinileko; UZimu ujamisa isindiso, ibe mithangala neendunduma zakhona." 
Isaiah26:2 Vulani amasango ukuze kungene isizwe esilungileko, iye, isizwe esilonda ukukholwa" 
Isaiah26:3 nesinehliziyo ebambeleleko. Wena Zimu, uzakulonda ukuthula, iye, kunokuthula nawethenjwako." 
Isaiah26:4 Thembela kuSomnini ngeenkhathi zoke ngombana uSomnini, iye, uSomnini ulidwala lanini nanini." 
Isaiah26:5 Mbala, umadlha phasi abahlala ekuphakameni, ugiriza idorobho elingangenekiko, iye, aliwisele ehlabathini, aligirizele ethulini." 
Isaiah26:6 Iinyawo ziyaligidizela, iinyawo zabachakileko, amagadango wabadududu.”" 
Isaiah26:7 Indlela yabalungileko ilelezekile, Somnini wenza umzilabo unqophe." 
Isaiah26:8 Ngitjho nekugwebeni kwakho, Somnini, sisaqalelela kuwe; ukululukela komphefumulwethu, kukuzwa ibizo lakho nokulongwa kwakho." 
Isaiah26:9 Ebusuku umphefumulwami uyakulangazelela, ngitjho nommoyami ngaphakathi uyakufunisisa. Lokha iingwebo zakho nazisephasini, abahlali belizwe bafunda okulungileko;" 
Isaiah26:10 kodwana iinkhohlakali naziphiwa umusa azifundi nakancani okulungileko. Nanyana zisenarheni yobuqotho, ziragela phambili ngobukhohlakali; azinandaba nobukhosi bakaSomnini." 
Isaiah26:11 Somnini, isandla sakho siphakanyisiwe nanyana kunjalo zona azisiboni. Kodwana zizakubona itjisakalwakho ngabantu bakho, bese ziba neenhloni, iye, umlilo obekelwe izitha zakho uzaziqothula." 
Isaiah26:12 Somnini, yewusenzele ukuthula ngombana koke esikuzuzileko, sikwenzelwe nguwe." 
Isaiah26:13 Somnini, Zimethu, sakhe sabuswa ngamanye amakhosi ngaphandle kwakho, kodwana libizo lakho kwaphela esilidumisako." 
Isaiah26:14 Sele afile kwanjesi akasoze asaphila, imimoyawo angeze yabuya iphile godu. Mbala, uwahlunguphazile, wawatjhabalalisa; wenza bona angasakhunjulwa." 
Isaiah26:15 Wena Somnini wandise isizwe sakho, iye, wandise abantu bakho. Uzizuzele idumo, wanabisa yoke imikhawulo yenarha." 
Isaiah26:16 Somnini, eensizini zabo bafune ubuso bakho, bazethula kuwe ngemithandazwabo, lokha ubukhali bakho nabuphezu kwabo." 
Isaiah26:17 Njengomfazi osidisi osele azokubeletha azibinyabinya, aliliswa ziinhlabi besinjalo-ke nathi ngenca yakho, Somnini." 
Isaiah26:18 Besisidisi, sizibinyabinya kodwana sibelethe ummoya. Sibhalelwe kuletha isindiso enarheni, abahlali belizwe basithelekela." 
Isaiah26:19 Abafileko bakho bazakuphila, iye, abafileko bekhethu bazakuvuka. Phaphamani nihlokome nina enihlala ethulini! Mbala, umbethe wakho ungowezulwini; Zimu, uzakubhubhisa indawo yabafileko." 
Isaiah26:20 Yenize bantu bami, ningene ngemalawinenu, nivale iminyango nasele ningenile, zifihleni kwesikhatjhana, bekudlule ilaka lakaZimu." 
Isaiah26:21 Qalani, uSomnini sele azokuphuma endawenakhe, kobana ahlunguphaze abahlali bephasi ngebanga lezono zabo. Iphasi lizakwembula iingazi ezithululwe kilo, angeze lisabafihla ababuleweko balo." 
Isaiah27:1 USomnini unesabula esabekako, ekulu nenamandla. Mhlokho, ngesabulakhe uzohlunguphaza unomrhaso okuyinyoka emsinyana nonomlambo okuyinyoka emasonge. Uzokubulala nenyoka yamanzi." 
Isaiah27:2 Mhlokho abantu bazakuthi: “Maye, isidiribe sihle! Vumani ngaso!" 
Isaiah27:3 Mina Somnini ngiyasitjheja, ngisisezela njalonjalo. Ngiselusa ubusuku nemini ukuze kungabikhona osilimazako." 
Isaiah27:4 Angikathukutheli, kodwana loyo ongibangela iminga nameva, ngizamthelekela ngepi, ngimtjhise nakho koke lokho;" 
Isaiah27:5 nakungasinjalo akeze kimi azokhosela, enze ukuthula nami; iye, kumele enze ukuthula nami.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Siyeza isikhathi lapha uJakopo azakumila khona, u-Israyeli ahlume abe athuthumbe, azalise ubuso bephasi ngeenthelo." 
Isaiah27:7 USomnini akakamadlhi uJakopo ngendlela amadlhe ngayo abamumadlhileko. Azange abulale u-Israyeli ngendlela abulele ngayo abambuleleko. 
Isaiah27:8 Wena Zimu, walungisa icala nabo ngokudunga idorobho nangokubaqotjhela kude; iye, ngelanga lesiwuruwuru sepumalanga uSomnini wabaphephetha ngommoyakhe onamandla." 
Isaiah27:9 Mbala, uzakuhlawula icala lakaJakopo. Ngaleyondlela uzakususa umphumela wesono sakhe: Wenza woke amatje wama-aldari aba njengamatje wepembe aphuphurekako. Imifanekiso yabo-Atjhera nama-aldari wetjhwalo azange atjhiywe asajamile." 
Isaiah27:10 Ngambala, idorobho elalinemithangala alisenabantu, libuhlalo obutjhiyiweko, lilahlwe njengerhalawumba. Lapho kukarula amakonyana, ayalala aphumule khona, aqede amatjhwaba wakhona." 
Isaiah27:11 Nasele iingala zakhona zomile, ziyephuka; abafazi bazitheze bayokubasa umlilo ngazo. Izakhamuzi zedorobheli azinangqondo, yeke owazidalako angeze azirhawukela, owazibumbako angeze aba nomusa kizo." 
Isaiah27:12 Mhlokho uSomnini uzakubhula iinqwambi zekoroyi ukusukela eYufrathe ukuya emlanjaneni weGibhide. Nje-ke nina ma-Israyeli nizakubuthwa ngamunye ngamunye. 
Isaiah27:13 Mhlokho, godu kuzakuvuthelwa ipalapala ekulu, kuthi labo ebegade balahlekile enarheni ye-Asiriya nalabo abaqotjhelwa enarheni yeGibhide beze baguqe phambi kwakaSomnini entabeni ecwengileko eJerusalema." 
Isaiah28:1 Maye ngesihlohlo sokuziphakamisa kweendakwa zakwa-Efrayimu! Umkghabiso wedumo laka-Efrayimu lowo osesiqongweni sombundu womrhoba onothileko, ufana nethuthumbo elibunako eliseenhloko zababhedlhwa liwayini!" 
Isaiah28:2 Qalani, uSomandla unaloyo onamandla noqinileko. Loyo-ke ufana nokuwuluka kwelifu elinesinanja, ihlekelele yesiwuruwuru. Iye, unjengokuwuluka kwelifu lamanzi akhukhula koke, ulalisa koke phasi." 
Isaiah28:3 Isihlohlo sokuziphakamisa kweendakwa zakwa-Efrayimu sizakugadangwa ngeenyawo. 
Isaiah28:4 Umkghabiso wedumo laka-Efrayimu, osesiqongolweni sombundu womrhoba onothileko, ofana nethuthumbo elibunako, uzakuba njengekhiwani lokuthoma elivuthwe ihlobo lingakangeni, nanyana ngubani olibonako, uyalikha alidlele khonapho." 
Isaiah28:5 Mhlokho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke uzakuba sihlohlo sedumo, umbhode wokuhloba kumisalela yabantu bakhe" 
Isaiah28:6 nommoya wokulunga kiloyo osebandla kanye namandla kabaqotjha ipi esangweni. 
Isaiah28:7 Laba nabo bayerayeriswa liwayini, batherezeliswa marhugu, iye, umphristi nomphorofidi bayerayeriswa marhugu ngebanga lewayini bayahlangahlangana, ngebanga lamarhugu bayatherezela; nabayerayera njalo baba nemibono, bayathazele nabakhupha iingwebo." 
Isaiah28:8 Woke amatafula agcwele ngamahlanzo anyenyisako, akunandawo ehlanzekileko." 
Isaiah28:9 Bathi: “Ulinga ukufundisa ubani ilwazi, njekhona uhlathululela ubani umlayezo? Kghani labo abalunyulwe ekumunyeni, abakhunyulwe ebeleni na?" 
Isaiah28:10 Ngombana umrhali lo uthi, ‘Tsavu latsavu, tsavu latsavu, khavu lakhavu, khavu lakhavu! Libinzana lapha nebinzana laphaya!’ ”" 
Isaiah28:11 Ngambala ngeembhena ezingunguzako, nangelimu elitjhili, uZimu uzakhuluma nabantwabo," 
Isaiah28:12 yena owathi kibo: “Lokhu kuphumula. Phumuzani abadiniweko ngombana lobu buledlhelo.” Kodwana bala ukulalela! 
Isaiah28:13 Ngalokho ilizwi lakaSomnini kibo lizakuba ngilokhu: “Tsavu latsavu, tsavu latsavu, khavu lakhavu, khavu lakhavu! Libinzana lapha nebinzana laphaya!” Umphumela walokho kuzakuba kukobana bakhambe, badede sinyava, bephuke; iye, ngokubambeka esifwini bazakutjhotjholozwa." 
Isaiah28:14 Yeke, lalelani ilizwi lakaSomnini nina nyefuli, iye, nina enibusa abantwaba eJerusalema!" 
Isaiah28:15 Ngambala nithe: “Senze isivumelwano nokufa, iye, isibopho nendawo yabafileko: Lokha isiwuruwuru esinamandla nasidlulako asizukuza kithi, ngombana senze amanga ubuphephelo bethu, sabhaca ngekohliso.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Ngalokho nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla: “Qala, nginguloyo obeke ilitje lesisekelo eZiyoni, iye, ilitje elizizinyiweko, ilitje eliqakathekileko lejika elinzinzileko. Onethemba akasoze atatazela.”" 
Isaiah28:17 Ngizakwenza ubulungiswa bube silinganiso, nokulunga kube sinqophisamakho. Isinanja sizakumadlha isiphephelo samala namanzi awulukele phezu kobusithelo." 
Isaiah28:18 Yeke isivumelwano sakho nokufa zakupheliswa, isibopho sakho nendawo yabafileko asizukujama; lokha isiwuruwuru esinamandla nasidlulako, nizakuba yinto yaso yokugadangwa." 
Isaiah28:19 Njalo ekuseni nasidlulako, sizaniphephula, sizakuvunguza ubusuku nemini ngamalanga. Kwesabeka khulu nakuzwakala umlayezo othi:" 
Isaiah28:20 Umbhede mfitjhani khulu, kobana ningathabalala kiwo, nengubo yincani khulu, kobana ningazembesa ngayo." 
Isaiah28:21 USomnini uzakuvela njengentabeni yePeratsimu, avuthe ngetukuthelo njengemrhobeni weGibeyoni, kobana enze izenzo zakhe. Kodwana izenzo zakhe zizakumangalisa! Iye, uzakuvela kobana enze umsebenzakhe, kodwana umsebenzakhe awukajayeleki!" 
Isaiah28:22 Yeke, masani ukunyefula; nakungasinjalo amakhamandelenu azakuqiniswa. Mbala, ngizwe umyalo ovela kuSomandla onguSomnini uMninimandlawoke begodu unzinzile: Inarha izakubhujiswa ngokupheleleko!" 
Isaiah28:23 Lalelani, nizwe ilizwi lami, yelelani, nizwe ikulumami." 
Isaiah28:24 Ingabe umlimi uhlala alimela ukutjala na? Ingabe uhlala abhedula abe aphadlhe amagade wesimakhe na? 
Isaiah28:25 Lokha nasele aleleze isimu, urhatjha imihlobohlobo yekumini atjale ikoroyi, inyaluthi nebhali endaweni efaneleko kanye nomunye umhlobo wamabele ngemaqadi." 
Isaiah28:26 UZimakhe uyamyala amfundise okufaneleko. 
Isaiah28:27 Ikumini ayibhulwa ngesileyi sokubhula nanyana kugedwe ikarana yamavili phezu kwayo. Awa, imihlobohlobo yekumini ibhulwa ngesibhulo namkha ngesigodo." 
Isaiah28:28 Iinthoro zokwenza isikwa ziyasilwa, kodwana akahlali azibhula. Ukhambisa iinjomani nekarana phezu kwazo kodwana azisilisiswa." 
Isaiah28:29 Lokhu nakho kuvela kuSomnini uMninimandlawoke, unezeluleko ezimangalisako begodu unikela ipumelelo ekulu." 
Isaiah29:1 Uzazizwa wena Ariyeli, kehla yomlilo; iye, wena Ariyeli, dorobho elivinjezelwe nguDavida! Ragelani phambili umnyaka nomnyaka, nenze iminyanya ngesikhathi sayo," 
Isaiah29:2 kodwana ngizakuhlunguphaza i-Ariyeli, kube nokulila nokuzila; iye, idorobheli kimi lizakuba yikehla yomlilo." 
Isaiah29:3 Ngizakuvimbezela mahlangothi woke, ngikuragelele mazombe ngeenthala, ngenze imiqaqado magegana nawe." 
Isaiah29:4 Uzakuguqiswa, utjhebe phasi ngomlomo, ukhume ihlabathi, uzakuginya amagama nawukhulumako, ungundaze inga uyathethelela, iye, ilizwi lakho lihlebe ethulini." 
Isaiah29:5 Nokho, ngomzuzwana nje, iwoma lezitha zakho lizakuba njengethudlana, nesiqubuthu sabanelunya sibe njengomungu ophetjhulwa mumoya." 
Isaiah29:6 Uzakukhanjelwa nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke ngomdumo, ukusikinyeka kanye netjhada elikhulu; ngesivunguvungu nangesiwuruwuru kanye namalangabi womlilo oqothulako." 
Isaiah29:7 Isiqubuthu sazo zoke izizwe ezisahlela i-Ariyeli, boke abalwa nayo kanye nesiphephelo sayo nalabo abayibandezelako, bazakufana nebhudango, iye, umbono webusuku." 
Isaiah29:8 Njengomuntu olambileko nabhudanga agoma, aphaphame asaphethwe yindlala, nanyana owomileko nabhudanga asela, aphaphame abogaboga aphethwe mrhawu, sizakuba njalo nesiqubuthu sezizwe zoke, esilwa nentaba yeZiyoni." 
Isaiah29:9 Zimangazeni, nimangale, niziphophaze niphophale! Abaphorofidi bayadakwa, kodwana ingasi ngewayini nabaphristi bayatherezela, kodwana ingasi ngamarhugu!" 
Isaiah29:10 Mbala, uSomnini urhutjhulele phezu kwenu ummoya wobuthongo, uvale amehlwenu, okutjho abaphorofidi, wembese iinhloko zenu, okutjho ababoni." 
Isaiah29:11 Isambulo sakho koke lokhu kini sifana namezwi womtlolo osongiweko. Nawunikelwa abakwazi ukufunda, bayalwe kuthiwe, “Fundani lokhu!”, bathi, “Asikwazi ngombana usongiwe.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Godu nawunikelwa abangakwazi ukufunda kuthiwe, “Siyanikhombela, akhese nifunde lapha!”, bathi, “Thina asikwazi ukufunda!”." 
Isaiah29:13 USomandla uthe: “Ngebanga lokobana abantwaba, batjhidela kimi ngemilomabo, bangidumisa ngeembhena zabo, khisibe iinhliziyo zabo zikude nami, nokungilotjha kwabo kungokweemfundiso zabantu," 
Isaiah29:14 ngalokho ngizakubuyelela godu, ngenze okumangazako ngabantwaba, iye, okurarako nokungakaqheleki: Ukuhlakanipha kweenhlakaniphi zabo kuzakuphupha nengqondo yobuhlakani babo izakunyelela.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Maye kini nina enifihlela uSomnini amano ngokuzikileko, nina eninezenzo zobumnyama, nenithi: “Ngubani osibonako? Ngubani osaziko?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Ukonakala okungaka! Umbumbi angathathwa bona mdaka na? Okudaliweko kungathi kumdali okudalileko, “Akakangidali kuhle!”, namkha okubunjiweko kuthi kokubumbileko, “Umbumbami lo akanangqondo!” na?" 
Isaiah29:17 Ngokukopheza kwelihlo iLibhanoni izakuba yisimu enothileko, iye, isimu enothileko ibonakale seyinjengehlathi." 
Isaiah29:18 Mhlokho iinthulu zizakuzwa amezwi womsongo; kuthi iimphofu zivuleke amehlo ekufifiyeleni nebumnyameni bazo. 
Isaiah29:19 Abazithobileko bazakubuye bathabe kuSomnini nabadududu khulu bahlokome koCwengileko wakwa-Israyeli. 
Isaiah29:20 Onelunya akasazukuba khona, nomnyefuli uzakuphelelwa, boke labo abaquphe ukwenza ubumbi bazakujutjwa," 
Isaiah29:21 iye, labo abadurhisa abantu ngamezwi, babekele umlamuli isifu ebandla, baphayele olungileko ngeqadi ngelize." 
Isaiah29:22 Ngalokho nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini owahlenga u-Abrahamu, malungana nekumba kaJakopo: “UJakopo akasazukuba neenhloni, nobuso bakhe abusazukuphaphatheka" 
Isaiah29:23 ngombana lokha abantwabakhe nababona umsebenzi wezandla zami phakathi kwabo, bazakudumisa ibizo lami, badumise oCwengileko kaJakopo, besabe uZimu ka-Israyeli." 
Isaiah29:24 Labo abadurhileko emmoyeni, bazakuzwisisa, nabanghonghoyilako bazakufunda ukuba nengqondo.”" 
Isaiah30:1 USomnini wathi: “Bazazizwa abantwana abanekani, abenza amano kodwana kungasiwo wami, benze isivumelwano ngaphandle kwentandwami, bangezelele isono phezu kwesono." 
Isaiah30:2 Ngaphandle kokukhombela indlela kimi bayaphuma, behlele eGibhide, kobana bayokukhosela ebuphephelweni bakaFaro, baphephele emthunzini weGibhide." 
Isaiah30:3 Ngalokho ukukhosela ebuphephelweni bakaFaro kuzakuba lihlazo kini nokuphephela emthunzini weGibhide kube kurhubutjhwa kwenu. 
Isaiah30:4 “Lokha iinkhulu zabo naziseTsowani nabazenda babo sele bafike eRhanesi," 
Isaiah30:5 omunye nomunye wabo uzakuba sehlazweni, ngebanga lesizwe esingeze sababhadekela, iye, isizwe esinganasizo nanzuzo, kwaphela ihlazo nokurhubutjhwa." 
Isaiah30:6 Umthwalo obotjhelwe eenlwaneni sewungesewula, iye, enarheni yamahlungu nesizi, lapha kunamabhubezi asikazi naduna abhodlako, iye, inarha yeenqandani neenyoka ezimsinya inga ziyaphapha. Bathwele umnothwabo emhlana wabodumbana namagugwabo emalundeni wamakamela, baya esizweni esinganabubhadekelo." 
Isaiah30:7 Mbala, iGibhide imumoya kwaphela, angeze yaba nobubhadekelo! Ngalokho ngithi ngayo, ‘Ingunomrhaso ongasikinyekiko’." 
Isaiah30:8 Khamba khona nje, ufese ukutlole lokho phambi kwabo emqebethwini, ukutlole ngokugobhodlha ukuze kube ngokwesikhathi esizako, iye, kube bufakazi banini nanini.”" 
Isaiah30:9 Ngambala lesi sisizwe esihlubukako! Babantwana abakhohlisako, abangalaleli iimfundiso zakaSomnini" 
Isaiah30:10 ngombana bathi kubaboni: “Ningaboni!” Kubaphorofidi bathi: “Ningaphorofidi okuliqiniso kithi, kodwana sitjelani okusikarako kwaphela. Phorofidani isilahlekiso!" 
Isaiah30:11 Tjhiyani indlela yekadeni, nisuke kiyo; nisisusele thina ngoCwengileko wakwa-Israyeli.”" 
Isaiah30:12 Ngalokho nakhu okwatjhiwo ngoCwengileko wakwa-Israyeli: “Ngebanga lokobana nilahle ilizwi leli, nabeka ithemba lenu ekugandeleleni nekohlakalweni, nabambelela kikho," 
Isaiah30:13 nje-ke, icala lelo kini lizakuba njengelifa emthangaleni ophakamileko, osele utjhigamele ukubhusuka phasi nokuwa kwawo kwenzeka msinyana.”" 
Isaiah30:14 USomnini uzalisasambisa ngokungalitlhuweli. Njengokwephuka kwembiza yombumbi lizakuphahlaka kungabi neqetjhana hlangana neenquqwana lokokha amalahle eziko namkha lokukha amanzi esizibeni. 
Isaiah30:15 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla ongoCwengileko wakwa-Israyeli: “Nanibuyela kimi nibekezele, nizakusinda, amandlenu azakuba sekuzithobeni nethembeni.” Kodwana nalile," 
Isaiah30:16 nathi: “Awa thina! Sizakubaleka ngeenjomani.” Ngalokho-ke nizakubaleka kwamambala! Godu nathi: “Sizakukhwela iinjomani ezinebelo khulu.” Ngalokho-ke abanigijimisako bazakuba nebelo khulukhulu! 
Isaiah30:17 Ikulungwana izakubaleka ngokwethuselwa ngoyedwa, iye, nibaleke noke ngokwethuselwa ngabahlanu, kufikela benisukelwe ninodwa tere njengesika phezu kwesiqongolo sentaba, iye, njengephawu phezu kombundu." 
Isaiah30:18 Nokho uSomnini ulindele ukuba nomusa kini, yeke, uzakuphakama ube nesisa kini, ngombana uSomnini unguZimu wokulunga. Babusisiwe boke abaqalelela kuye." 
Isaiah30:19 Ngambala, nina bantu beZiyoni, bahlali beJerusalema, anisazukulila. USomnini uzakuba nomusa kini ekuzwakaleni kwesililo senu. Iye, nakasizwako uzasiphendula." 
Isaiah30:20 Nanyana uSomandla aninikela isikwa sesizi namanzi wamatshwenyeko, yena ongumfundisenu angeze asazifihla godu namehlwenu azambona." 
Isaiah30:21 Nanijikela ngesidleni namkha ngesinceleni, iindlebe zenu zizakuzwa ilizwi ngemva kwenu lisithi: “Nasi indlela: Khambani kiyo.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Yeke nizakusilaphaza abosingazimu ababazwe ngesiliva neenthombe zenu ezinamekwe ngegolide. Nizabalahla njengomtjhubelo. Nizakuthi kibosingazimabo: “Sukelani le!” 
Isaiah30:23 UZimu uzakunisa izulu phezu kwembewu oyitjalileko esimini, akunikela ikoroyi okumkhiqizo wequlwani. Umkhiqizo lowo uzakuhloma bewunone. Mhlokho ifuywakho izakukarula emadlelweni abanzi;" 
Isaiah30:24 iinkomo nabodumbana abalima amasimu bazakudla ifuru ethanjisiweko eyaphuma nakweliwa ikoroyi ngetjhefula neforogo. 
Isaiah30:25 Kenye nenye intaba ephakemeko nombundu omude kuzakuba nemilanjana egeleza amanzi ngelanga lokurhayilwa okukhulu lokha nakugirika imibhotjhongo. 
Isaiah30:26 Ukukhanya kwenyezi kuzakufana nokwelanga. Ukukhanya kwelanga kubuyelelwe kalikhomba njengokukhanya kwamalanga alikhomba, mhlana uSomnini abopha amanceba wabantu bakhe, alaphe amaduma avezwe kubetha kwakhe." 
Isaiah30:27 Qala, ibizo lakaSomnini livela kude, ilaka lakhe liyavutha lenza isimukuthu esimabhombo. Iimbhena zakhe zizele itukuthelo, nelimu lakhe lifana nomlilo oqothulako." 
Isaiah30:28 Ukuphefumula kwakhe kufana nomlambo ophuphuma ukufikelela entanyeni. USomnini uyeza kobana ahlunge izizwe, ngesihlungo sokurhayila; iye, nokufaka emihlathini yabantu amatomu abadurhisako." 
Isaiah30:29 Nizakubhina iingoma njengalokha nanizihlambulula ebusuku ngaphambi komnyanya. Kuzakuba nethabo ehliziyweni njengalokha nakubethwa inghwani lekhambo lokukhuphukela entabeni kaSomnini olidwala laka-Israyeli. 
Isaiah30:30 USomnini uzakuzwakalisa ilizwi lakhe elindondako; etukuthelweni evuthako uzakubonisa ukubetha kwengalwakhe ngelangabi lomlilo oqothulako, ngetjhada lezulu, ngesiwuruwuru nangesinanja." 
Isaiah30:31 I-Asiriya izakubethwa ngevalo lokha nayizwa ilizwi lakaSomnini nalokha arhidla ngeswazi lakhe. 
Isaiah30:32 Okhunye nokhunye ukurithwa ngeswazi lokuhlunguphaza uSomnini azakulidosa phezu kwe-Asiriya, kuzakuphekelelwa litjhada labosotjherere namaharibhana negido lokuzahlukanisela. Uzakulwa nama-Asiriya" 
Isaiah30:33 ngombana iziko lalungiselelwa kade; iye, lahlelelwa ikosawo. USomnini wenza umgodi weziko watjhinga begodu waba banzi. Kunamalahle avuthako neenkuni ezinengi, nje-ke ukuphefumula kwakaSomnini sele kuvuthela njengomlandelande wesibabuli." 
Isaiah31:1 Bazazizwa abehlela eGibhide kobana bayokufuna isizo. Bathembele eenjomanini, iye, bathembela eenkaraneni zepi nebakhwelini bazo ngombana zizinengi khulu, kodwana bangaqaleleli koCwengileko ka-Israyeli, namkha bafune uSomnini!" 
Isaiah31:2 Kodwana ungohlakaniphileko yena begodu unekghono lokwehlisa ihlekelele. Yena akatjhuguluki emezwinakhe kodwana uzakujamelana nesigungu seenkhohlakali, nabasizi beengilamkhuba." 
Isaiah31:3 AmaGibhide ababantu, akasinguZimu, iinjomani zawo ziyinyama, azisimumoya. Lokha uSomnini nelula isandla sakhe, umsizi oliGibhide uzakukhutjwa, nosizwako uzakuwa, boke bazakubhubha ndawonye."
