Isaiah55:12 “Ngambala nizakuphuma ngethabo, nihlahlwe ngokuthula. Iintaba nemibundu kuzakuzwakalisa ukuhlokoma phambi kwenu, iye, yoke imithi yommango iwahle izandla zayo." 
Isaiah55:13 Esikhundleni somunga kuzakumila umsayipurusi; esikhundleni sameva kumile imiritlili. Lokhu kuzakuba sikhumbuzo kuSomnini, kube sibonakaliso sanini nanini, nesingeze satjhabalaliswa.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Gcinani ukulunga nenze okufaneleko ngombana isindiswami seyitjhidele nehlalohle yami sele izokwembulwa. 
Isaiah56:2 Ubusisiwe obhubhako owenza lokho, iye, umuntu obambelela kikho, okutjho ukugcina iSabatha, angalisilaphazi, alonde isandla sakhe singenzi okumbi.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Umqhamuka ozibandakanya noSomnini awukameli uthi: “Ngambala uSomnini uzangihlukanisa nabantu bakhe.” Umphakulwa akakameli athi: “Awa, mina sengisigodo esomileko.”" 
Isaiah56:4 Mbala, nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Abaphakulwa abagcina amaSabatha wami nabakhetha ukwenza intandwami, babambelele esivumelwaneni sami," 
Isaiah56:5 ngizabanikela okungcono kunamadodana namadodakazi okutjho isikhumbuzo nebizo ngethempelini lami nangaphakathi kwemithangala yedorobho lami. Iye, ngizabanikela ibizo lanini nanini elingeze lasulwa." 
Isaiah56:6 Imiqhamuka ezibandakanya noSomnini, kobana imlotjhe, beyithande ibizo lakhe kobana ibe ziinceku; iye, yoke egcina iSabatha, ingalisilaphazi, ibambelele esivumelwaneni sami," 
Isaiah56:7 ngizayiletha entabenami ecwengileko, ngiyinikele itokozo ngekumbenami yokuthandaza. Imihlabelwayo yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano izakwamukelwa e-aldarini lami ngombana ikumbami izakuthiwa ‘Yikumba yokuthandaza yezizwe zoke.’ ”" 
Isaiah56:8 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla obuthelela abahlakazekileko bakwa-Israyeli uthi: “Ngizakubuthelela abanye godu, ngaphandle kwalabo esele babuthelelwe.”" 
Isaiah56:9 “Nina mbandana zommango yizani noke nizokurhiribidela, iye, noke nina mbandana zehlathi!" 
Isaiah56:10 Abelusi babantu bami baphophele, boke abanalwazi, boke bazizinja eziziingolwana, iye, ezibhalelwa kukhonkotha, ziyarutharutha khisibe zilele, iye, zithanda ukuyenda." 
Isaiah56:11 Bazizinja ezinephango, abaneliswa lilitho. Kazi babelusi nabanjalo! Boke njalo abanangqondo, omunye nomunye uphendukela eendleleni zakhe iye, sebayafana barhubhela kesabo." 
Isaiah56:12 Omunye nomunye uthi: ‘Yizani, ngisesenewayini! Ngithi asibutupeni utjwalobu! Nakusasa kube ngiswesi, kube ngaphezu kwalokhu.’ ”" 
Isaiah57:1 Abalungileko bayabhubha, akakho ocabangako ngalokho; abantu abathembekileko kuZimu bayahlongakala kungabikhona ozwisisako: Ngebanga lobumbi abalungileko bayahlongakala." 
Isaiah57:2 Labo abakhamba ngobuqotho bazakulala ngokuthula, baphumule emikghadinabo." 
Isaiah57:3 Kodwana nina madodana wesanusi, nzalo yesihlobongi esingwadlako, tjhidelani lapha!" 
Isaiah57:4 Ngubani enimenza ihlaya lo? Ngubani enimkhamisela imilomo, nimkokomeje na? Anisibantwana bokonakala, nenzalo yekohliso na?" 
Isaiah57:5 Ngitjho nina enitjhiswa yikanuko hlangana nemithi ye-owuku, ngaphasi kwayo yoke imithi esitjhutha, nibulala abantwana emirhobeni ngemipharwini yamadwala." 
Isaiah57:6 Isiphetho sakho dorobho, sisematjeni abutjhelelezi emrhobeni, iye, wona ngiwo asisabelo sakho ngombana bewuyawaphahlela, uwanikela neminikelo yeenthoro. Alo, nithi angihlekele koke lokho na?" 
Isaiah57:7 Uqhise amalalwakho embundwini omude nophakemileko, wenyuka kobana unikele imihlabelo." 
Isaiah57:8 Ngemva komnyango negoseni, ubeke itshwayo lakho labosingazimu bembeleko. Lokha nawugade ukude nami, wembule umkghadakho owukhulisileko, wangena kiwo. Uvumelene namadodakho ngekokhelo; wathanda ukuwembulela amabhayi waqalana nobubhunubhunu bawo." 
Isaiah57:9 Watjhemelelela uMoleki uphethe amafutha we-oliva, wandisa amakha wakho. Wathumela abazenda bakho kude, ngitjho nendaweni yabafileko." 
Isaiah57:10 Bewudiniwe ngebanga leendlela zakho, kodwana azange uthi: “Akusizi ngalitho.” Ufumene ukuvuseleleka kwamandlakho, ngalokho azange unyefe." 
Isaiah57:11 Ngubani onevalo nowesabako ngaye kobana ungabeze ukhulume amanga, bewungasangikhumbula, namkha ucabange ngalokho na? Awusangesabi ngombana ngithule isikhathi eside na?" 
Isaiah57:12 Mina ngizakudalula imisebenzakho nalokho okuthiwa kulunga kwakho! Abosingazimu bakho angeze bakubhadekela. 
Isaiah57:13 Isiqhenyana sabosingazimu bakho asikusize nawulila ufuna isizo! Ummoya uzabadudula boke njalo, baphetjhulwe mphefumulo nje kwaphela. Kodwana umuntu ongenza isiphephelo sakhe, uzakuzuza inarha, athumbe intabami ecwengileko njengelifa lakhe." 
Isaiah57:14 USomnini wathi: “Lelezani, lelezani, nilungise indlela! Susani iinliyo endleleni yabantu bami.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Kodwana kwanje, nakhu okutjhiwo nguZimu ophakemeko nophezulu, ophila nini nanini, obizo lakhe licwengile, uthi: “Ngihlala endaweni ephakemeko necwengileko, godu ngihlala naloyo onommoya owephukileko nothobekileko. Ngivuselela ummoya waloyo odanileko, nehliziyo yowurubajekileko." 
Isaiah57:16 Yeke angeze ngalwa mndundu, namkha ngihlale ngitjhuqile, ngombana ummoya womuntu uvela kimi, uzakunyefa, khisibe ngimi owanikela ipilo emuntwini." 
Isaiah57:17 Bengithukuthele ngebanga lecala labantu bami abarhubhela kesabo. Ngabadula bengafihla ubuso bami ngokuthukuthela, kodwana baragela phambili ngokuhlubuka, balandela iinkanuko zehliziywabo." 
Isaiah57:18 Ngizibonile iindlela zabo, nokho ngizabelapha, ngibahlahle, ngibavuze ngenduduzo. Kilabo abalilako" 
Isaiah57:19 ngizakukhuluma amezwi wenduduzo ngithi, ‘Ukuthula, iye, ukuthula kilabo abakude nabaseduze.’ Mbala ngizabelapha.” Watjho njalo uSomnini." 
Isaiah57:20 Iinkhohlakali zinjengelwandle eliyalukako: Alikghoni ukuphumula, amanzalo ayaluka amabibi nedaka." 
Isaiah57:21 UZimami uthi: “Akuzukuba nokuthula eenkhohlakalini.” 
Isaiah58:1 USomnini uthi: “Rhuwelela, ungazibambi! Phakamisa ilizwi lakho njengepalapala. Memezela ebantwini bami iimphambeko zabo nekumbeni kaJakopo izono zayo." 
Isaiah58:2 Imihla ngemihla bafunana nami, bazimisele ukwazi iindlela zami, kwanga basisizwe esenza okufaneleko, nesingakalahli imiyalo kaZimaso. Babuza kimi imithetho efaneleko, bazimisele bona uZimu atjhidele kibo." 
Isaiah58:3 Bathi, ‘Sizakuthi sizileleni ukudla nawungayeleliko nje? Sithe siyazithoba, nalapho azange bewusinake.’ “Bantu bami, qalani la, ngelanga lokuzila kwenu ukudla nizenzela umathanda, nigandelela zoke iinsebenzi zenu." 
Isaiah58:4 Qalani, nizilela ukuphikisana nokulwa kwaphela, iye, ukumadlhana ngamaguduva wobukhohlakali. Ukuzila okufana nokwenu namhlanjesi, angeze kwenza bona isililo senu sizwakale ezulwini." 
Isaiah58:5 Ingabe kuzila engikukhethileko lokho, kube lilanga lokuzithoba na? Kulilanga lokuhloma ihloko phasi njengomgaba nelokulala phezu kweenzilo nomlotha na? Nikubiza bona kuzila lokho nelanga elamukelekako kuSomnini na?" 
Isaiah58:6 Nakhu ukuzila ukudla engikukhethileko: Kunyefisa amakhamandela wobukhohlakali, ukuqhusula imitja yejogi, ukutjhaphulula abagandelelweko nokuqoba woke amajogi." 
Isaiah58:7 Kukwabela abalambileko isikwa sakho, ukunikela abanganamakhaya iphahla, ukwembathisa ombona ahlubule nokungafihli ubuso koziingazi zakho." 
Isaiah58:8 Nje-ke, ukukhanya kwakho kuzakudarha njengokusa, nokuphola kwakho kubonakale masinyana; ukulunga kwakho kukhambe phambi kwakho nephazimulo kaSomnini izakuba ngekwelusileko ngemva kwakho." 
Isaiah58:9 Nje-ke, uzakubiza uSomnini akuphendule, ulilele isizo, athi kuwe, ‘Ngilapha.’ “Nawususa ijogi phakathi kwenu umuno okhombakhombako nekulumo ekhohlakeleko;" 
Isaiah58:10 iye, nawunakekela abalambileko ngeemfiso zakho, okutjho ukwanelisa iimfiso zabagandelelweko, khona-ke isibani sakho sizakukhanya ebumnyameni nobusuku bakho bufane nemini ekulu." 
Isaiah58:11 USomnini uzakuhlahla njalonjalo, asuse umrhawu wakho enarheni enesomiso, akuphe ummongo emathanjenakho. Uzakufana nesivande esisezelwako nanjengomthombo onamanzi angatjhiko." 
Isaiah58:12 Abanye benu bazakuvuselela amarubhi wakade, wena Israyeli uzakwakha kabutjha iinsekelo zakade, ubizwe ngokuthi, ‘Umvali wesikhala somthangala’ nangokuthi, ‘Umvuli weendledlana ukuze abantu bahlale’." 
Isaiah58:13 “Nawulonda iinyawo zakho ekuratheni iSabatha, ngokungazenzeli umathanda ngelanga lami elicwengileko, kodwana ngokubiza iSabatha bona lilanga lokwenama nelanga elicwengileko lakaSomnini kobana lihloniphekile; iye, nawulihloniphako ngokungenzi kwangemihla, nangokungenzi irhwebo, namkha ukukhuluma ngalo," 
Isaiah58:14 khona-ke uzakufumana ithabo kuSomnini. Ngizakwenza bona ulawule inarha bewuzitike ngelifa lakayihlo uJakopo.” Mbala, watjho njalo-ke uSomnini ngomlomakhe!" 
Isaiah59:1 Qalani, ingalo kaSomnini ayisiyifitjhani kobana ingahlala ingasindisi nendlebakhe ayikathundubali, kobana ingahlala ingezwa." 
Isaiah59:2 Kodwana amacalenu anihlukanise noZimenu nezono zenu zisithe ubuso bakhe kini, kobana angezwa." 
Isaiah59:3 Mbala, izandla zenu zisilaphele ngeengazi, nemino yenu ngecala. Iimbhena zenu zikhuluma amala nelimu lenu lihumuza okukhohlakeleko." 
Isaiah59:4 Akakho omangalela ngokulunga, akakho ozivikela ebandla ngobuqotho. Bathembela elizeni, bakhulume amanga; bakhulelwe ngobukhohlakali, bazala ihlekelele." 
Isaiah59:5 Baqoqosela amaqanda werabi, baluke ubulembu besiswebu. Ogoma amaqanda wakhona uyafa, elinye lawo naliphadlhekako, kuvumbuka isiqandani!" 
Isaiah59:6 Ubulembu babo angeze baba ziingubo, angeze bazembathisa ngabakwenzileko. Izenzo zabo ngezehlekelele nemisebenzi yenturhu isezandleni zabo." 
Isaiah59:7 Iinyawo zabo zigijimela ekoneni, bamsinyana ekuphalazeni iingazi ezinganamlandu. Imizindlo yabo iveza ihlekelele, ukonakala nokubhubhisa kuseendleleni zabo." 
Isaiah59:8 Indlela yokuthula abayazi, ukulunga akukho emizilenabo. Iindlela zabo zimasongesonge, okhamba kizo akasoze aba nokuthula." 
Isaiah59:9 Ngaleyondlela ubulungiswa bukude nathi nokulunga akusifikeleli. Siqalelele umkhanyo kodwana kumnyama, iye, ukudarha, kodwana sikhamba ebumnyameni." 
Isaiah59:10 Siphumbutha ebodeni njengesiphofu, iye, siphumbutha njengomuntu onganamehlo; sikhutjwa emini ekulu inga kusebusuku. Ije sinethezeka sifana nabafileko." 
Isaiah59:11 Soke sibhavumula njengamabhubezi sihumuza ngokuhumuza njengeengwayi. Siqalelela ukulunga kodwana akukho, iye, ukusindiswa, kodwana kukude nathi." 
Isaiah59:12 Mbala, iimphambeko zethu zinengi ebusweni bakho, nezono zethu zifakaza ngokujamelana nathi. Ngambala sibhodwe ziimphambeko, iye, namacalethu siyawazi," 
Isaiah59:13 okutjho ukuphambuka nokudela uSomnini, ukufulathela uZimethu, ukukhuluma igandelelo nokuhlubuka, ukumitha amala esiwahumuza ngeenhliziyo." 
Isaiah59:14 Nje-ke, ubulungiswa bubuyiselwa emuva nokulunga kudedile kithi ngombana iqiniso liyalahlwa ebandla nobumsulwa abungeni lapho." 
Isaiah59:15 Iqiniso alisafunyanwa ndawo, nobalekela ubumbi uyaphangwa. USomnini wakuqala lokho, kwaba kumbi kuye ukubona bonyana akunabulungiswa." 
Isaiah59:16 Kwamdanisa ukubona bonyana akunamuntu ojama esikhundleni sakhe; ngalokho ingalwakhe yaba yisindiswakhe nokulunga kwakhe kwamhlohlozela kobana asikime. 
Isaiah59:17 Wembatha ukulunga njengesambatho sepi nesikupuru sesindiso ehlokwakhe; wembatha izambatho zokuzibuyiselela, waziphuthela ngetjisakalo inga linaka." 
Isaiah59:18 Uzakuzibuyiselela ukuya ngabakwenzileko, kube yitukuthelo ezitheni zakhe, ukuzibuyiselela emanabenakhe, abuyisele iinhlengele ngokufanelekileko." 
Isaiah59:19 Ukusuka etjingalanga, abantu bazakwesaba ibizo lakaSomnini, ukusuka epumalanga besabe iphazimulwakhe ngombana uzakuvela njengomlambo otshopako, osunduzwa mumoya kaSomnini." 
Isaiah59:20 “Njengomhlengi uzakuza eZiyoni, kilabo bakaJakopo abaphenduke esiphambekweni sabo.” Watjho njalo-ke uSomnini." 
Isaiah59:21 USomnini uthi: “Ngokuya ngami, lesi sivumelwano nesizwe sami: UMoyami ophezu kwakho namezwami engiwabeke emlonyenakho akazukusuka eembheneni zakho, namkha emilonyeni yabantwabakho, nanyana emilonyeni yeenzukulwana zabo ukusuka gadesi kuya kuyile.” Iye, watjho njalo uSomnini." 
Isaiah60:1 “Vuka ukhanye wena Jerusalema ngombana ukukhanya kwakho kuyeza; iphazimulo kaSomnini idarhile phezu kwakho. 
Isaiah60:2 Qala, ubumnyama busibekela iphasi nobumnyama obumabhombo buphezu kwabantu; kodwana uSomnini wenyukela phezu kwakho nephazimulwakhe ibonakala phezu kwakho." 
Isaiah60:3 Izizwe zizakuza ekukhanyeni kwakho namakhosi ekudarheni kwephazimulwakho. 
Isaiah60:4 “Phakamisa amehlwakho uqale mazombe: Boke bayabuthana, beze kuwe; amadodanakho avela khatjhana namadodakazakho agonwe ngemikhono." 
Isaiah60:5 Nje-ke uzakuqala, uphazimule; ihliziywakho izakweqayeqa, iphuphume ngethabo ngombana ukuphuphuma kwelwandle kuzakulethwa kuwe, iye, umnono wezizwe uze kuwe." 
Isaiah60:6 Umhlambi wamakamela uzakumumela, amakamedlana weMidiyani ne-Efa. Boke abantu beTjheba bazakuza, bathwele igolide netjhwalo, bamemezele iindumiso zakaSomnini." 
Isaiah60:7 Yoke imihlambi kaKedari izakubuthelwa kuwe, amaqama weNebayothi azakuba sesandleni sakho, amukeleke njengomhlabelo e-aldarini lami, yeke ngizakuhlobisa ithempeli lami elibabazekako." 
Isaiah60:8 “Bobani laba abaphapha phezulu njengelifu nanjengamazuba eendlwaneni zawo na? 
Isaiah60:9 Ngambala, iinhlengele ziqalelele kimi. Imikhumbi yokurhweba ingeyokuthoma ukuletha amadodanakho avela khatjhana, aphethe isiliva negolide lawo, ukuhlonipha ibizo lakaSomnini uZimakho ongoCwengileko ka-Israyeli ngombana ukudumisile." 
Isaiah60:10 “Imiqhamuka izakuvuselela imithangalakho, amakhosayo akusebenzele. Ngikumadlhe ngetukuthelo, kodwana ngomusa ngizakukhombisa izwelo." 
Isaiah60:11 Amasangwakho azakuhlala avulekile, angeze avalwa imini nobusuku ukuze izizwe zikulethele umnonwazo, amakhosazo aragwe ngomlandelande wokuhlulwa." 
Isaiah60:12 Mbala, isizwe namkha umbuso ongeze wakulotjha, uzakubhubha; iye, izizwezi zizakupheliswa nya." 
Isaiah60:13 “Iphazimulo yeLibhanoni izakuza kuwe, imithi ye-elimu nemihlobohlobo yemisayipurusi ndawonye, kobana ngihlobise indawo yekumbami ecwengileko, ngibabaze indawo yeenyawo zami." 
Isaiah60:14 Isizukulwana sabakugandelelako sizakuza kuwe sikhokhoba, boke abakunyazako bazaguqa eenyaweni zakho, bakubize bona uyiZiyoni idorobho lakaSomnini, ongoCwengileko ka-Israyeli." 
Isaiah60:15 “Nanyana bewutjhiyiwe begodu uzondiwe, kungekho okhambela ngakuwe, ngizakwenza igugu lesiphelani, iye, itokozo iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana." 
Isaiah60:16 Uzakumunya ibisi lezizwe, iye, ebeleni lobukhosi. Yeke uzakwazi bonyana mina, nginguSomnini, ngiMsindisakho, noMhlengakho ongonamandla kaJakopo." 
Isaiah60:17 Esikhundleni sekoporo ngizakulethela igolide, esikhundleni sesimbi isiliva. Esikhundleni sesigodo ngizakulethela ikoporo, esikhundleni samatje isimbi. Ngizakwenza ukuthula kube mlindakho nokulunga kube baphathi bakho." 
Isaiah60:18 Godu akusazukuzwakala inturhu enarhenakho, iye, ukonakala nokubhubhisa ngaphakathi kwemikhawulwakho. Uzakubiza imithangalakho ngokuthi yisindiso, namasangwakho ngokuthi yindumiso." 
Isaiah60:19 Godu ilanga alisazukuba mkhanywakho emini nokudarha kwenyezi akusazukukhanya kuwe. USomnini uzakuba mkhanyo wesiphelani kuwe, iye, uZimakho uzakuba yiphazimulwakho." 
Isaiah60:20 Godu ilanga lakho alisazukutjhinga nenyezakho ayisazukuncipha. USomnini uzakuba mkhanyo wesiphelani kuwe namalangakho wesililo azakuphela. 
Isaiah60:21 Boke abantu bakho bazakuba ngabalungileko, bazakuzuza inarha isiphelani. Bona baligatja engilitjalileko, umsebenzi wezandla zami ukubonakalisa idumo lami." 
Isaiah60:22 Ophasi ngesibalo uzakuba yikoro nomncani abe sisizwe esinamandla. NginguSomnini. Nje-ke, ngesikhathi esifaneleko ngizakwenza msinyana lokhu.”" 
Isaiah61:1 UMoya kaSomnini uSomandla uphezu kwami, ngombana ungizesile ukuze ngitjhumayele iindaba ezihle kabadududu. Ungithume kobana ngibophe abaneenhliziyo ezaphukileko, ukumemezela ikululeko kabathunjiweko nokukhupha iimbotjhwa," 
Isaiah61:2 ngimemezele umnyaka womusa kaSomnini nelanga lokuzibuyiselela kwakaZimethu, ngiduduze boke abalilako," 
Isaiah61:3 iye, ngibonelele abalilako eZiyoni ngokubapha isihlohlo esikhundleni somlotha, amafutha wokujabula esikhundleni sokulila nengubo yokudumisa esikhundleni sommoya odanileko. Bazakubizwa bona bama-owuku wokulunga nesitjalo sakaSomnini ukuze babonakalise idumo lakhe." 
Isaiah61:4 Bazakuvuselela amarubhi wakade, bakhe kabutjha iindawo ezabhuruka ngaphambilini; balungise amadorobho agirizwako, iye, iindawo ezabhuruka eenzukulwaneni ngeenzukulwana." 
Isaiah61:5 Amaphandle azakuba ziinsebenzi zenu, eluse imihlambenu; imiqhamuka izakuba ziinsebenzi emasimini neendiribeni zenu." 
Isaiah61:6 Nina-ke nizakubizwa bona nibaphristi bakaSomnini, nibizwe bona niziinceku zakaZimethu. Nizazikholisa ngomnotho wezizwe, nizikhakhazise ngomnonwazo." 
Isaiah61:7 UZimu uthi: “Esikhundleni sehlazo abantu bami bazakufumana isabelo esibuyelelweko, esikhundleni sokurhubutjhwa bazakujekezela elifeni labo. Mbala, bazakuzuza isabelo esibuyelelweko enarhenabo, babe netokozo engapheliko." 
Isaiah61:8 Njengombana mina Somnini ngithanda ukulunga, ngizonda ukudlelezela ngobukhohlakali; ekwethembekeni kwami ngizabanikela okungokwabo. Ngizakwenza nabo isivumelwano sanini nanini:" 
Isaiah61:9 Iinzukulwana zabo zizakwaziwa phakathi kwezizwe nabantwababo phakathi kwabantu. Boke abababonako bazakuvuma bonyana basizukulwana esibusiswe nguSomnini.” 
Isaiah61:10 Ngithokoza khulu kwamambala ngoSomnini, umphefumulwami ujekezela kuZimami ngombana ungembathise iingubo zesindiso, wangigubuzesa ngesambatho sokulunga, njengomyeni lokha nathwala ingwani ehloko nanjengomlobokazi nazihlobise ngobuphaziphazi bakhe." 
Isaiah61:11 Njengombana iqulwani iveza amahlumela nesivande senza bona imbewu imile, ngokunjalo uSomnini uSomandla uzakwenza bona ukulunga nedumo kuqhakaze phambi kwezizwe zoke." 
Isaiah62:1 Ngebanga leZiyoni angeze ngathula, ngebanga leJerusalema angeze ngavala phetjheya, kufikela lapha ukulunga kwayo kukhanya khona njengokusa nesindiswayo ibe njengesihlothi esivuthako." 
Isaiah62:2 Jerusalema, izizwe zizakubona ukulunga kwakho nawo woke amakhosi azakubona idumo lakho, uzakubizwa ngebizo elitjha, ozalithiywa nguSomnini ngokwakhe." 
Isaiah62:3 Uzakuba sihlohlo sephazimulo esandleni sakaSomnini, iye, umtjhotjho wobukhosi esandleni sakaZimakho." 
Isaiah62:4 Angeze bewusabizwa “ngolahliwe” namkha inarhakho ithiwe “ingudududu”. Kodwana sele uzakubizwa “othandiweko wami”, inarhakho ithiwe “ngeyendileko” ngombana uSomnini uzakukareka ngawe nenarhakho izakuba nomphathi." 
Isaiah62:5 Njengesokana nalithatha intombi, ngokunjalo amadodanakho azakuba baphathi bakho, njengomyeni nathabele umlobokazakhe, ngokunjalo uZimakho uzakuthaba ngawe." 
Isaiah62:6 Ngibeke abalindi emithangalenakho Jerusalema, angeze bathula ubusuku namkha emini. Nina enibiza uSomnini, ningazinikeli ukuphumula," 
Isaiah62:7 naye ningamnikeli ukuphumula, kufikela lapha ajamisa khona iJerusalema, ayenze ibe lidumo lephasi." 
Isaiah62:8 USomnini ufunge ngesokudla sakhe nangengalo yakhe enamandla wathi: “Godu angeze bengisanikela izitha zakho ikoroyi njengokugonywako, amaphandle angeze asasela iwayini elitjha enilisebenzele nzima;" 
Isaiah62:9 kodwana labo abavunileko bazagoma ikoroyi, badumise uSomnini nalabo ababuthelele amadiribe, bazakusela iwayini, esirhodlweni sendawami ecwengileko.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Yeniphume, phumani emasangweni! Lungiselelani abantu indlela! Lelezani, lelezani indlela evulekileko! Susani amatje. Phakamisani iphawu ezizweni!" 
Isaiah62:11 Qala wena Jerusalema, uSomnini wenze isimemezelo epelazwe uthi: “Yithini endodakazini yeZiyoni, ‘Qala, nangu umSindisakho asiza! Qala, uphethe umvuzwakhe, ipangwakhe iphambi kwakhe.’ ”" 
Isaiah62:12 Bazakubizwa bona “bababantu abacwengileko” begodu “abahlengiweko bakaSomnini”. Wena Jerusalema uzakubizwa bona “ungufunwako”, begodu “ulidorobho elingasatjhiywako”." 
Isaiah63:1 Ngubani lo ovela e-Edomu, iye, eBhotsira onezambatho ezitlerebede na? Ngubani lo ohlobe ngeziphazimako, ohlabela phambili ngamandla amakhulu na? “Ngimi engikhuluma ngokulunga, nenginamandla wokusindisa.”" 
Isaiah63:2 Kubayini izambatho zakho zibomvu njengezomuntu ogadange ngebutlhodlhelweni besidiribe na? 
Isaiah63:3 “Ngigadange ngebutlhodlhelweni ngingedwa, phakathi kwezizwe akakho noyedwa ogade anami. Ngazigadanga ngetukuthelwami, ngazitshidlha ngokufutheka kwami, umhluzi wazo wachaphazela izambatho zami, yeke zoke izambatho zami zinindekile." 
Isaiah63:4 Ilanga lokubuyiselela belisehliziywenami nomnyaka wokuhlenga kwami sewufikile. 
Isaiah63:5 Ngaqala, kodwana bekungekho umenyeli, ngamangala, kodwana akakho owangisekelako. Yeke ingalwami yaba yisindiswami netukuthelwami yangisekela." 
Isaiah63:6 Ngapitliza abantu ngetukuthelwami, ngokufutheka kwami ngabaqoba, ngathululela iingazi zabo phasi.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Ngizakwazisa izenzo zokwethembeka kwakaSomnini, iye, izenzo adunyiswa ngazo, ukuya ngakho koke uSomnini asenzele khona. Kwamambala wenze izinto ezinengi ezihle ekumbeni ka-Israyeli, ukuya ngokuvama kokwethembeka kwakhe." 
Isaiah63:8 Wathi: “Ngambala bababantu bami, babantwana abangeze baba mahlongandlebe.” Ngalokho waba msindisabo." 
Isaiah63:9 Kiwo woke amatshwenyekwabo naye watshwenyeka, ngalokho, ingilozi yobukhona bakhe yabasindisa. Yena ngokwakhe wabahlenga ngethando nangezwelo, wabenyula bewabathwala yoke imihla yaphambilini." 
Isaiah63:10 Kodwana bona bahlubuka bebakhubekisa uMoyakhe oCwengileko. Yena-ke waphenduka isitha sabo, yena ngokwakhe walwa nabo." 
Isaiah63:11 Nje-ke, abantu bakhe bakhumbula imihla yaphambilini, imihla kaMosi, bathi: “Uphi yena owabahlenga elwandle kanye nabelusi bomhlambakhe na? Uphi yena owabeka uMoyakhe oCwengileko phakathi kwabo," 
Isaiah63:12 wathumela ingalwakhe edumileko kobana ibe ngesigomeni sakaMosi, owahlukanisa amanzi phambi kwabo kobana azenzele ibizo lanini nanini" 
Isaiah63:13 nowabadabulisa ekuzikeni na? “Njengenjomani enarheni evulekileko azange bakhutjwe 
Isaiah63:14 nanjengesilwana esehlela emrhobeni, lapha uMoya kaSomnini usiphumuza khona, ngokunjalo warhola abantu bakho Somnini, kobana uzenzele ibizo elidumileko." 
Isaiah63:15 Yehlisa amehlwakho usezulwini, ubone usendawenakho ecwengileko nenedumo. Iphi itjisakalwakho namandlakho na? Isirhawu sakho nomusakho kugodliwe kithi." 
Isaiah63:16 Ngambala ungubabethu! U-Abrahama akasazi, no-Israyeli bekangeze asilemuke, Somnini, wena ungubabethu; kwakade ibizo lakho unguMhlengethu." 
Isaiah63:17 Somnini, usidurhiselani eendleleni zakho, uqinise iinhliziyo zethu kobana zingakwesabi na? Buya ngenca yeenceku zakho, iinkoro zelifa lakho." 
Isaiah63:18 Abantu bakho abakhethekileko bazuze ilifa lakho kwesikhatjhana, kodwana izitha zethu zigadangele phasi indawakho ecwengileko." 
Isaiah63:19 Sifana nabantu ongazange khewubabuse, iye, abangazange babizwe ngebizo lakho.”" 
Isaiah64:1 Kwanga bewungavula amazulu, wehlele phasi, iintaba bezizakuthuthumela phambi kwakho" 
Isaiah64:2 kube njengokuthungelwa kwamaqwabatjhi enze bonyana amanzi abile. Yewehle ukuze wenze ibizo lakho laziwe zizitha zakho nezizwe zithuthumele phambi kwakho! 
Isaiah64:3 Wehla phambilini wenza okwesabekako ebesingakakulindeli, iintaba zathuthumela phambi kwakho." 
Isaiah64:4 Ukusukela ekadeni, akakho owezwako, iye, akunandlebe eyalalela namkha ilihlo elabona uZimu onjengawe osiza labo abamqalelelako." 
Isaiah64:5 Uhlangabeza labo abathokozela ukwenza okulungileko, labo abakukhumbulako balandele iindlela zakho. Qala, wena uthukuthela ngombana sonile. Nangathana besisese seendleleni zakho besizakufumana isizo," 
Isaiah64:6 kodwana soke sesifana nosilapheleko; zoke izenzo zethu zokulunga sezifana nomtjhubelo. Soke sese sitjhwabe njengekari, siphetjhulwa licala lethu njengommoya." 
Isaiah64:7 Akakho obiza ibizo lakho namkha olubalubela ukukakarela kuwe. Ngambala usifihlele ubuso bakho, wasinikelela emandleni wecala lethu." 
Isaiah64:8 Nokho Somnini, ungubabethu. Thina simdaka, wena umbumbi wethu simsebenzi wezandla zakho soke nje." 
Isaiah64:9 Ungathukutheli ngokweqileko Somnini, ungakhumbuli icala lethu mlibe. Yewusitjheje, siyakuncenga! Kazi sibabantu bakho soke nje." 
Isaiah64:10 Imizakho ecwengileko sele iphenduke irhalawumba, ngitjho neZiyoni sese ilirhalawumba, iJerusalema ilirubhi." 
Isaiah64:11 Ithempeli lethu elicwengileko nelidumileko, lapha abobaba bebakudumisa khona, litjhiswe thokgho ngomlilo, koke ebesinegugu ngakho sekonakele." 
Isaiah64:12 Ngemva kwakho koke lokhu Somnini, uzase uhlale uzibuthelele na? Uzakuthula usithobise ngokudluleleko na?" 
Isaiah65:1 UZimu uthi: “Bengitholakala kilabo abangazange bazikhathaze ngami, bengifunyanwa ngabangazange bangifune. Esizweni esingazange sibize ibizo lami, ngathi, ‘Ngilapha, ngilapha.’" 
Isaiah65:2 Imini yoke ngelulele izandla zami ebantwini abanekani, abakhamba eendleleni ezingakalungi, balandela imicabangwabo," 
Isaiah65:3 iye, abantu abahlalele ukungitlhorholoja emtarini: Benza imihlabelo eemvandeni zabosingazimu, batjhise netjhwalo e-aldarini leentina." 
Isaiah65:4 Bahlala ngemathuneni ebusuku baditjha eendaweni ezisithekileko. Bagoma inyama yewotji neembiza zabo zinomhluzi wenyama esinyenyiso," 
Isaiah65:5 Ngibo abathi, ‘Sukela le, ungatjhideli kimapha ngombana ngicwenge khulu kunawe!’ Eempumulweni zami abanjalo bayintuthu evela emlilweni ovutha imini yoke." 
Isaiah65:6 Qala, phambi kwami kutlolwe kwathiwa, ‘Angizukuthula kodwana ngizazibuyisela ngokuzeleko.’ Iye, ngizanibuyisela ngokuzeleko" 
Isaiah65:7 izono zenu nezaboyihlo ndawonye.” Watjho njalo-ke uSomnini. “Godu aboyihlo batjhisa imihlabelo eentabeni, bangiphoqa emibundwini. Ngalokho ngalinganisa ikokhelo ezeleko yezenzo zabo ezandleni zabo.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Njengombana umhluzi usafunyaneka ehlukuzweni lamadiribe bese abantu bathi, ‘Ungawalahli ngombana anobuhle’, nami-ke ngizakwenza njalo ngenca yeenceku zami: Angeze ngazilahla zoke." 
Isaiah65:9 Ngizakuveza iinzukulwana kuJakopo nakuJuda, ezizokuzuza iintaba zami; iye, abantu bami abakhethiweko bazakuthumba inarha, iinceku zami zihlale lapho." 
Isaiah65:10 ITjharoni izakuba mrhula weembuzi nezimvu, umrhoba we-Akori ube yindawo yokuphumula kweenkomo; iye, kube lilifa labantu bami abangifunako." 
Isaiah65:11 “Kodwana nina enifulathela uSomnini nikhohlwe intabami ecwengileko, ngokwendlalela uzinyana uGadi itafula, nizalisela uzinyana uMeni imijeka yewayini elivangiweko," 
Isaiah65:12 ngizanibekela isabula kobana ibe likusasa lenu. Noke nizakugoba kobana nihlatjwe ngombana ngibizile kodwana nangasabeli, ngakhuluma kodwana nangalaleli. Nenze ubumbi emehlwenami, nakhetha engingakuthandiko.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Nje-ke nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla: “Qalani, iinceku zami zizakugoma, kodwana nina nizakulamba. Qalani, iinceku zami zizakusela, kodwana nina nizakoma, Qalani, iinceku zami zizakujekezela, kodwana nina nizakurhubutjhwa." 
Isaiah65:14 Qalani, iinceku zami zizakuhlokoma ngethabo leenhliziyo zazo, kodwana nina nizakurhahlawula ngeenhliziyo ezibuhlungu, nilile ngebanga lokwephuka ummoya." 
Isaiah65:15 Nizakutjhiyela abalungileko bami amabizwenu, bawasebenzise njengesithuko ebantwini, bathi, ‘Ngokunjalo uSomnini uSomandla uzanibulala’. Kodwana eencekwini zami ngizakubeka elinye ibizo" 
Isaiah65:16 okuzakuthi nanyana ngubani obusisako enarheni abusise ngalo ngokuthi, ‘NgoZimu othembekileko’. Godu owenza isifungo enarheni afunge athi, ‘NgoZimu othembekileko’. Mbala, imiraro yaphambilini izakulitjalwa begodu ifihlakale ebusweni bami." 
Isaiah65:17 Qalani, sele ngizokudala izulu elitjha nephasi elitjha: Izinto zaphambilini azisazokukhunjulwa, namkha ziyelelwe emkhumbulweni." 
Isaiah65:18 Ngambala, thokozani nithabe nini nanini kilokho engikudalako: Qalani, sele ngizokudala iJerusalema ibe lithabo nabantu bayo babe yitokozo." 
Isaiah65:19 Ngizakwethaba ngeJerusalema, ngithokoze ngabantu bami; Godu akusazukuzwakala kiyo amatjhada wesililo nokurhuwelela ngokufuna isizo." 
Isaiah65:20 Godu akusazukuba khona kiyo isana eliphila amalangana kwaphela, namkha iqhegu eliluphala belithukghele. Mbala, isana lizakuhlongakala sele lineminyaka elikhulu, umuntu ongafikeleli ekhulwini leminyaka uzakuthathwa njengothuwelelisiweko." 
Isaiah65:21 Abantu beJerusalema bazakwakha iinkumba bebahlale kizo, batjale iindiribe, bagome isithelo sakhona." 
Isaiah65:22 Angeze bakha bese kuhlala omunye, batjale bese kugoma omunye ngombana njengamalanga womuthi azakuba njalo-ke namalanga wabantu bami begodu abakhethiweko bami bazazikholisa mndundu ngomsebenzi wezandla zabo." 
Isaiah65:23 Abazukujulukela ilize namkha babelethele abantwana ihlekelele, ngombana bazakuba ziinzukulwana zababusisiweko bakaSomnini iye, bona nabantwana babo." 
Isaiah65:24 Ngaphambi kobana babize, ngizaphendula, kuthi basakhuluma, mina ngizwe." 
Isaiah65:25 Ipisi nemvu zizakudla ndawonye, ibhubezi lidle utjani njengekomo, ithuli libe kukudla kwenyoka. Angeze zalimaza namkha zitjhabalalise kiyo yoke intabami ecwengileko.” Watjho njalo-ke uSomnini." 
Isaiah66:1 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Izulu sihlalo sami sobukhosi, iphasi lisinabelo seenyawo zami. Alo, yikumba bani-ke enizangakhela yona, indawami yokuphumula ibe yini?" 
Isaiah66:2 Koke lokhu kwenziwe sisandla sami, nje-ke zoke izintwezi zenzeka.” Watjho njalo-ke uSomnini. “Nokho ngiyelela onje: umuntu ogandelelweko, onommoya ozothileko nowesaba ilizwi lami." 
Isaiah66:3 Kodwana ongihlabela ikomo ubulala nomuntu, owenza umhlabelo ngemvana wephula nenja intamo, oletha umnikelo weenthoro unikela ngeengazi zewotji, otjhisa isabelo sesikhumbuzo setjhwalo udumisa nosingazimu! Kunjalo-nje bazikhethele iindlela zabo nomphefumulwabo uthokozela iinyenyiso;" 
Isaiah66:4 ngokunjalo nami ngizakukhetha ukubaphatha kumbi, ngehlisele ihlekelele phezu kwabo, ngebanga lokobana nangibizako, azange kube nophendulako, nangikhulumako, azange balalele, kodwana benza ubumbi emehlwenami, bakhetha lokho engingathokoziko ngakho.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Nina enesaba ilizwi lakaSomnini, lalelani ilizwi lakhe elithi: “Abafowenu abanizondako, baninine ngebanga lebizo lami, banitshima bathi, ‘USomnini akavele ngephazimulwakhe ukuze sibone ithabo lenu’, kodwana ngibo abazakurhubutjhwa.”" 
Isaiah66:6 Yizwani umkhosi wokuhlokoma ovela ngedorobheni! Ilizwi elivela ethempelini! Ilizwi lakaSomnini, libuyiselela izitha zakhe!" 
Isaiah66:7 “Ngaphambi kobana ibe nemirhele, iZiyoni yabeletha, ngaphambi kobana yehlelwe ziinhlungu, yazala indodana." 
Isaiah66:8 Ngubani owakhe wezwa into enjalo? Ngubani owakhe wabona into enjalo? Inarha ingazalwa ngalanga linye na? Isizwe singabelethwa ngasikhathi sinye na? Kuthe bona iZiyoni ibe nemirhele, yazala amadodanayo." 
Isaiah66:9 Ngizakutjhideza bonyana kuzalwe, kodwana ngingakuzalisi na?” Watjho njalo uSomnini. “Mina engenza bonyana kuzale, ngingavala isibeletho na?” Watjho njalo uZimakho, Ziyoni." 
Isaiah66:10 Jekezelani neJerusalema, nilithabele noke nina enilithandako, lithokoziseni khulu noke nina enilila nalo," 
Isaiah66:11 kobana nimunye nizikholise emabelenalo adunduzelako, nokobana nincance nizanelise emabelenalo agcweleko." 
Isaiah66:12 Ngambala, nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Qalani, sele ngizokuvula ukuthula kugelezele eJerusalema njengomlambo nomnono wezizwe njengomlanjana ophuphumako, nimunye benisingathwe edinini lalo, nidunduzelwe emathangenalo." 
Isaiah66:13 Njengomntwana odunduzelwa ngunina, ngokunjalo ngizanidunduzela, nizakudunduzelwa eJerusalema." 
Isaiah66:14 Nizakubona nehliziywenu ithokoze amathambenu ahlume njengotjani.” Kuzakwaziwa bonyana isandla sakaSomnini sineenceku zakhe nokobana itukuthelwakhe ijamelene nezitha zakhe. 
Isaiah66:15 Qalani, uSomnini uzakuza ngomlilo neenkarana zakhe zepi njengesiwuruwuru, ukuze abuyise itukuthelwakhe ngokuvutha nokukhalima kwakhe ngamalangabi womlilo." 
Isaiah66:16 Ngambala, uSomnini uzokukhupha isigwebo ngomlilo nangesabulakhe phezu kwayo yoke inyama; labo ababulewe nguSomnini bazakuba banengi." 
Isaiah66:17 USomnini uthi: “Labo abazicwengisa bebazihlambulule kobana baye eemvandeni, balandelana nophakathi kwabo, bagome inyama yewotji, iinyenyiso kanye nabongozo, bazakubhubha ndawonye" 
Isaiah66:18 ngombana mina ngiyayazi imisebenzabo nemizindlwabo.” “Isikhathi sesifikile sokubuthelela zoke izizwe ngokwamalimi wazo kobana zize, zibone iphazimulwami:" 
Isaiah66:19 Ngizakuthoma ngokubeka iphawu phakathi kwazo. Phakathi kwazo ngizakuthumela abasindileko baye ezizweni, okutjho eTharatjhitjhi, ePhuli neLudi, abantu abarhwatjhe imisubela, baye neTubhali kanye neJavana ukufikela eligwini emaphethelweni lapha bangakezwa khona idumo lami begodu bangakaboni iphazimulwami. Abasindilekwabo bazakumemezela iphazimulwami hlangana nezizwe." 
Isaiah66:20 Kizo zoke izizwe bazakuletha boke abafowenu entabenami ecwengileko eJerusalema njengomnikelo kuSomnini ngeenjomani, iinkarana zepi neenhlalogugwa, iimeyila namakamela. Iye, bazabaletha njengama-Israyeli naletha iminikelo yeenthoro ethempelini lakaSomnini ngezitja ezihlambulukileko.” Watjho njalo-ke uSomnini." 
Isaiah66:21 “Godu ngizakukhetha abanye babafowenu kobana babe baphristi namkha amaLevi.” Watjho njalo-ke uSomnini. 
Isaiah66:22 “Njengezulu elitjha nephasi elitjha engizolidala lizakunzinza phambi kwami, ngokunjalo iinzukulwana zenu nebizo lenu lizakunzinza.” Watjho njalo-ke uSomnini." 
Isaiah66:23 “Ngemva kwalapho, ukusuka emnyanyeni wenyanga etja ukuya kolandelako nokusuka eSabatheni ukuya kelinye, boke abantu bazakuza baguqe phambi kwami.” Watjho njalo-ke uSomnini." 
Isaiah66:24 “Bazakuphuma, baqale iindumbu zabangihlubukileko: Iimpethu zabo azizukufa nomlilwabo asoze wacima. Bazakuba sinyenyiso kibo boke abantu.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Amezwi kaJoromiya umsa kaRhilikhiya, ongomunye wabaphristi be-Anatothi esifundeni sakwaBhenjamini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kuJoromiya emnyakeni wetjhumi nantathu wokubusa kwakaJosiya umsa ka-Amoni ikosi yakwaJuda 
Jeremiah1:3 nangesikhathi sokubusa kwakaJehoyakhimu umsa kaJosiya ikosi yakwaJuda, bekube sekupheleni komnyaka wetjhumi nanye wokubusa kwakaTsedekhiya umsa kaJosiya ikosi yakwaJuda, lokha abantu beJerusalema nabaya ekuthunjweni ngenyanga yesihlanu." 
Jeremiah1:4 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kimi lisithi: 
Jeremiah1:5 “Ngaphambi kobana ngikubumbe ngesibelethweni, besele ngikukhethile, iye, ngaphambi kobana ubelethwe, ngakuhlukanisela, ngakubeka bona ube mphorofidi ezizweni.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Mina ngathi: “Maye mina! Somnini Somandla, qala, angikabi ukwazi ukukhuluma tjhatjhalazi. Ngisesemsana.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Kodwana uSomnini wathi kimi: “Ungeze wathi, ‘Ngisesemsana’, ngombana komunye nomunye engikuthuma kuye, kufanele uye begodu nanyana yini engikuyala ngayo, kufuze uyitjho." 
Jeremiah1:8 Ungabesabi ngombana nginawe kobana ngikwenyele.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Jeremiah1:9 Khonapho uSomnini welula isandla sakhe, bona sikghwathe umlomami bewathi kimi: “Yizwa, ngibeke amezwami emlonyenakho." 
Jeremiah1:10 Yelela, namhlanjesi ngikubeka phezu kwezizwe nemibuso kobana usiphule bewubhuruze, utjhabalalise bewugirize, wakhe bewutjale.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kimi lathi: “Joromiya, ubonani na?” Mina ngathi: “Ngibona igatja lomuthi we-alimondi.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 USomnini wathi kimi: “Awa, ubone kuhle ngombana ngiyelele mayelana nelizwi lami kobana ngilenze.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Ilizwi lakaSomnini leza kimi kwesibili lathi: “Ubonani-ke kwanjesi?” Ngathi: “Ngibona imbiza ekghaphakako, itjhigeme yafulathela itlhagu.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 USomnini wathi kimi: “Ihlekelele izakukghaphaka isuka ngetlhagwini ithulukele phezu kwabo boke abahlali benarha. 
Jeremiah1:15 Mbala, sele ngizokubiza woke amakhosi wangetlhagwini ngokuhlukana kwawo.” Iye, watjho njalo uSomnini. “Azakuza bese abeka iinhlalo zawo zobukhosi ebungenweni bamasango weJerusalema, azakujamelana nayo yoke imithangalayo ezombelezileko kanye nayo yoke imizana yakwaJuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ngizakukhupha isigwebo sami phezu kwabantu beJerusalema nebakwaJuda ngenca yokukhohlakala abakwenzileko ngokungilahla kwabo, batjhisela abosingazimu itjhwalo, bakhothamela okwenziwe zizandla zabo." 
Jeremiah1:17 “Thekeleza! Sikima, ubatjele koke engikuyala ngakho. Ungabesabi, nakungasinjalo ngizakwenza ubesabe." 
Jeremiah1:18 Namhlanjesi ngikwenze waba lidorobho elinemithangala, isika yesimbi kanye nemithangala yekoporo kobana ujamelane nenarha yoke. Iye, ujamelane namakhosi wakwaJuda, iinkhulu zakhona, abaphristi bakhona kanye nabantu benarha leyo." 
Jeremiah1:19 Bazakulwa nawe kodwana angeze bakuhlule ngombana nginawe kobana ngikwenyele.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Jeremiah2:1 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kimi lathi: 
Jeremiah2:2 “Khamba ufese umemezele kilo iJerusalema uthi, nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, “ ‘Ngikhumbula ukwethembeka kwakho usesemutjha, ithando lakho usesemlobokazi, ungilandela erhalawumbeni, enarheni engatjalwa litho." 
Jeremiah2:3 U-Israyeli gade acwengile kuSomnini, asilumo sakhe seenthelo zesivuno. Boke abahlephula kiso baba nomlandu, behlelwa yihlekelele.’ ” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah2:4 Yizwa ilizwi lakaSomnini wena kumba kaJakopo, noke nina nkoro zekumba ka-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah2:5 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Aboyihlo bangisoleni kobana bangabeze badede kimi na? Badlhemadlhema ngemva kwezinto ezililize nabo bagcina sele balilize. 
Jeremiah2:6 Azange bebabuze bathi, ‘Uphi uSomnini owasikhupha eGibhide wasirhola erhalawumbeni, enarheni yebhudu namadonga okuyinarha yesomiso neyethunzi elesabekako nengahlalwa muntu na?’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ngimi enganiletha enarheni evundileko, kobana nizikholise ngeenthelo namanandi wakhona. Kodwana nathi naningenako nasilaphaza inarhami, nenza ilifa lami laba sinyenyiso." 
Jeremiah2:8 Abaphristi azange bebabuze bathi, ‘Uphi uSomnini!’ Labo abafundisako azange bangazi, abelusi bangihlubuka. Abaphorofidi baphorofida ngoBhali, badlhemadlhema ngemva kwezinto ezinganabubhadekelo.”" 
Jeremiah2:9 USomnini uthi: “Ngalokho godu ngiyanimangalela, iye, ngimangalela iinzukulwana zenu." 
Jeremiah2:10 Yamelani eligwini leKitimi, niqale, thumelani eKhedari, niyelele kuhle: Into enjengale yakhe yenzeka na?" 
Jeremiah2:11 Isizwe siyenana ngabozinyana baso, ngitjho nanyana bangasi nguZimu wamambala na? Kodwana abantu bami bona napa, benana uZimu oyiphazimulwabo ngezinto ezinganabubhadekelo!" 
Jeremiah2:12 Rareka wena zulu, ukhene bewumangale khulu!” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah2:13 “Mbala abantu bami benze izinto ezimbi ezimbili: Bangihlubukile mina, iye, mina mthombo wokuphila, bazembela imiphathamanzi, imiphathamanzi esasambileko engeze yamumatha amanzi!" 
Jeremiah2:14 “U-Israyeli lo ulikhoboka, iye, likhoboka lokubelethwa na? Alo, kubayini-ke selaphenduke ipango?" 
Jeremiah2:15 Amabhubezi abhodle phezu kwakhe, iye, abhodle ngelizwi elikhulu. Enze inarhakhe yaba libhudu, imizakhe irhayiliwe, ayinabahlali." 
Jeremiah2:16 Amadoda weMemfisi neweTarhipanirhesi adle woke amadlelwakho. 
Jeremiah2:17 Awukazidoseli amanzi ngomsele lokha nawufulathela uSomnini uZimakho nakurhola endleleni na? 
Jeremiah2:18 Alo, uzakuzuzani endleleni eya eGibhide, kobana uyokusela amanzi weTjhirhori na? Uzakuzuzani endleleni eya e-Asiriya kobana uyokusela amanzi eYufrathe na?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Ubukhohlakali bakho buzakuhlunguphaza, ukuhlubuka kwakho kukukhalime. Yelela-ke ulemuke kobana kumbi begodu kumunyu nawuhlubuka uSomnini uZimakho, iye, nangingasakwenzi kobana ungesabe.” Kutjho uSomnini uSomandla onguMninimandlawoke." 
Jeremiah2:20 “Wephula ijogi lakho kade, wadabula nemitja yakho, wathi, ‘Angizukulotjha!’ Ngambala komunye nomunye umbundu ophakamileko nangaphasi komunye nomunye umuthi ohlaza, walala lapho njengengwadla." 
Jeremiah2:21 Mina ngakutjala usidiribe sekhethelo, uphelele usitjalo esithembekako. Alo, uphenduke njani-ke phambi kwami waba sidiribe sommango esinesivunda na?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Nanyana ungahlamba ngesoda, usebenzise isibha esinengi, ibala lecala lakho lihlala liphambi kwami.” Kutjho uSomnini uSomandla." 
Jeremiah2:23 “Ungatjho njani uthi, ‘Awa, mina angikasilaphali! Akhange ngidlhemadlheme ngemva kwaboBhali’? Qala bona bewuziphethe njani emrhobeni, cabangisisa ngokwenzileko. Ufana nekamela esikazi eyehla yenyuka;" 
Jeremiah2:24 iphundlukela erhalawumbeni ifamula iimpumulo inukelele ummoya. Ngubani ongayivimba nasele ibilelwa ziingazi na? Zoke eziduna eziyifunako azidingi ukuzikhathaza: Ngesikhathi sayo sokuzekwa ziyifunyana ngobuduze. 
Jeremiah2:25 Mina ngathi, ‘Ungagijimi bewudatjukelwe manyathelo, nomphimbakho bewome.’ Kodwana wena wathi, ‘Akusizi ngalitho! Awa, mina ngizithandela abatjhili nje-ke kumele sengidlhemadlheme ngemva kwabo.’" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Njengesela elineenhloni nalibanjiweko, injalo nekumba ka-Israyeli yaba neenhloni, yona, amakhosayo neenkhulu zayo, abaphristi kanye nabaphorofidi bayo." 
Jeremiah2:27 Bathi esigodweni, ‘Wena ungubabami’, elitjeni bathi, ‘Wena wangibeletha’. Bangifulathele, bangifihlela ubuso babo. Kodwana ngesikhathi sesizi labo bathi, ‘Yewize usisindise!’" 
Jeremiah2:28 Baphi-ke abozinyana owazenzela bona wena Juda? Abeze phela nakube bangakusindisa ngesikhathi sesizi lakho! Angithi wena unabozinyana abanengi njengamadorobhakho, Juda." 
Jeremiah2:29 “Kubayini ningisola? Noke nina ningihlubukile.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Jeremiah2:30 “Ngimadlhe phasi abantwabenu ngelize, azange bamukele ukusolwa. Isabulenu irhiribidele abaphorofidi benu njengebhubezi elidabudabulako.”" 
Jeremiah2:31 Isizukulwaneso ngini! Nje-ke, yelelani ilizwi lakaSomnini nalithi: “Ngibe lirhalawumba ku-Israyeli, namkha inarha enobumnyama obukhulu na? Ngitjho ngombana abantu bami bathi, ‘Awa, kwanjesi sesifikile asizukubuyela kuwe erhalawumbeni.’" 
Jeremiah2:32 Intombi vane kheyikhohlwe ubuphaziphazi bayo nomlobokazi ivunulwakhe yomtjhado na? Kodwana napa abantu bami bangikhohliwe, bekwaba malanga angabalekiko." 
Jeremiah2:33 “Maye, unekghono lokufuna ithando! Ngitjho neengwadla zingafunda kuwe!" 
Jeremiah2:34 Ezambathweni zakho kufunyanwa iingazi zabamsulwa, abadududu. Azange ubabambe bagqekeza, kodwana phezu kwakho koke lokhu ube nesandla." 
Jeremiah2:35 Nokho uthi, ‘Awa, mina anginamlandu, itukuthelo kaZimu ikude nami.’ Qala-ke, ngizakugweba ngombana uthi, ‘Mina anginasono.’ ”" 
Jeremiah2:36 Kubayini ugwilike lula na? Uzakudaniswa yiGibhide njengombana udaniswe yi-Asiriya. 
Jeremiah2:37 Godu ukusuka lapho uzakuphuma uthwele imikhono ehloko ngombana uSomnini ubalahlile labo othembele kibo; angeze waphumelela. 
Jeremiah3:1 “Joromiya kufuze uthi kibo, ‘Lokha indoda nayitlhala umkayo, bese uyayitjhiya, ende kenye indoda, kumele indoda leya ibuyele kuye godu na? Inarha ayizukusilaphala khulu ngalokho na? Wena ungwadle neenthandwa ezinengi. Alo, ufuna ukubuyela kimi ije unjalo na?’ ” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah3:2 “Akhe uqale emidzwilini yemilandelande: Kunendawo lapha ungazange uqatjhazwe khona na? Wahlala eqadi kwendlela ulindele iinthandwa zakho, iye, wahlala njengomArabhu erhalawumbeni. Usilaphaze inarha ngobungwadla nangobukhohlakali bakho." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ngalokho-ke izulu elikhukhulako lagodlwa nezulu langaphambi kwesivuno alikani. Khonapho usese netshwayo lengwadla, awufuni ukuba neenhloni." 
Jeremiah3:4 Akusuwe osanda ukungibiza wathi, ‘Baba, mlingani wobutjha bami!’" 
Jeremiah3:5 Bewathi, ‘UZimu uzakuhlala athukuthele na? Ilaka lakhe lizakuba ngelesiphelani na?’ Ukhuluma ngaleyondlela, khibe wenza woke amanyala owakghonako.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Ngesikhathi sokubusa kwekosi uJosiya, uSomnini wathi kimi: “Ubonile lokho u-Israyeli oqoqomako akwenzileko na? Ukhuphukele komunye nomunye umbundu nangaphasi komunye nomunye umuthi ohlaza wayokungwadlela lapho." 
Jeremiah3:7 Ngadlumbana ngathi, ‘Uzakuthi angaqeda ukwenza koke lokho, abuyele kimi.’ Kodwana azange enze njalo nodadwabo, uJuda ongathembekiko, ukubonile lokho." 
Jeremiah3:8 Yeke u-Israyeli oqoqomako lo ngiyomthokoza kwabo, ngimhlome ngencwadi yokumtlhala ngebanga lokuhlobonga kwakhe. Kodwana ngabona bonyana udadwabo, uJuda ongathembekiko lo akanavalo, naye ngokwakhe ukhambile wayokungwadla." 
Jeremiah3:9 Ngebanga lendaba yokungwadla kwaka-Israyeli, inarha yasilaphala, nje-ke abantu bahlobonga nelitje kanye nesigodo." 
Jeremiah3:10 Phezu kwakho koke lokhu, udadwabo uJuda ongathembekiko lo, azange aphendukele kimi ngehliziywakhe yoke, kodwana ngekohliso.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah3:11 USomnini wathi kimi: “U-Israyeli oqoqomako lo, icala lakhe lingcono kunelakaJuda ongathembekiko." 
Jeremiah3:12 Nje-ke, khamba ufese umemezele umlayezo lo ngehlangothini langetlhagwini ngokuthi, “ ‘USomnini uthi: Yewubuye wena Israyeli oqoqomako! Iye, uSomnini uthi: Angeze bengisakubuthela iinhlonze ngombana ngithembekile. Mbala, uSomnini uthi: Angeze ngathukuthela mlibe." 
Jeremiah3:13 Kwaphela vuma icala lakho bonyana uhlubuke uSomnini uZimakho, ukhambe wehla wenyuka nabatjhili ngaphasi kwayo yoke imithi ehlaza, azange ulalele ilizwi lami." 
Jeremiah3:14 Nina ma-Israyeli, uSomnini uthi: Yenibuye nina bantwana abaqoqomako ngombana mina ngimphathenu. Ngizanithatha kube ngoyedwa edorobheni nababili ekorweni nginise eZiyoni." 
Jeremiah3:15 “ ‘Ngizanipha abelusi engibanyulako abazanifunza ngelwazi nangokuzwisisa. 
Jeremiah3:16 Emihleni leyo lokha nasele isibalo senu senyukile enarheni, abantu angeze basathi: Umfaji wesivumelwano sakaSomnini! “ ‘Angeze bekusaba semikhumbulwenabo, iye, angeze bacabanga ngawo. Angeze bawuhlulukela begodu angeze benza omunye, kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah3:17 Ngesikhatheso abantu bakaSomnini bazakubiza iJerusalema bona isihlalo sakhe. Bazakusuka kizo zoke izizwe babuthanele kilo, iye eJerusalema ngebanga lebizo lakaSomnini. Angeze basalandela ubulikhuni beenhliziyo zabo ezikhohlakeleko." 
Jeremiah3:18 Emihleni leyo ikumba kaJuda izakuya ekumbeni ka-Israyeli, zizakuvela ndawonye ngenarheni yangetlhagwini zingene enarheni engayabela aboyihlo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah3:19 “Mina ngokwami ngadlumbana ngathi, “ ‘Ngingenza njani bonyana ngikuthathe wena Israyeli ube mntwanami ngikuphe inarha ethandekako, iye, ilifa elihle neledlula lazo zoke izizwe na?’ Godu ngadlumbana bonyana uzangibiza uthi, ‘Baba’, ungahlubuki ekungilandeleni." 
Jeremiah3:20 Kodwana njengomfazi ongathembekiko endodenakhe, ngokunjalo nawe azange uthembeke kimi, wena kumba ka-Israyeli.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah3:21 “Kuzwakele ukurhuwelela emizileni yemilandelande, ukulila nokuncenga kwabantu bakwa-Israyeli ngombana balahle iindlela zabo, bakhohlwa uSomnini uZimabo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Buyani, nina bantwana abaqoqomako, ngizanelapha ekuqoqomeni kwenu.” Ama-Israyeli athi: “Iye, sizakubuyela kuwe ngombana unguSomnini uZimethu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Ngambala, ukulotjha eendundumeni netjhada eentabeni kuyikohliso. Mbala, uSomnini uZimethu uyisindiso ka-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah3:24 Kusukela ebutjheni bethu, uzinyana osinyenyiso, urhiribidele isithukuthuku sabobaba, iye, izimvu, iimbuzi neenkomo zabo, ngitjho namadodana namadodakazabo." 
Jeremiah3:25 Asilaleni ekunyenyiseni kwethu, ihlazo lethu lisembese. Sonile kuSomnini uZimethu, iye, thina nabobaba, kusukela ebutjheni bethu bekube namhlanjesi azange silalele ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimethu.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 USomnini waphendula wathi: “Nange kunendlela oyithathako, wena Israyeli, akube ngebuyela kimi. Nanisusa iinyenyiso zenu emehlwenami, ningabe nisehla nenyuka," 
Jeremiah4:2 khona-ke nizakufunga ngeqiniso, ngobuqotho nangokulunga nanithi, ‘Sifunga uSomnini ophilako.’ Nje-ke iinkoro zakwa-Israyeli zizakufuna iimbusiso nedumo lazo kimi mina Somnini." 
Jeremiah4:3 “Mbala, nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini kibo boke abantu bakwaJuda nebeJerusalema: “Zikghemeleni ihlabathi engakalinywa, ningatjali hlangana nameva." 
Jeremiah4:4 Zisokeni kube kuSomnini, nisuse amajwabu weenhliziyo zenu nina bantu bakwaJuda nebeJerusalema! Nakungasinjalo itukuthelwami izakuqubuka ngebanga lobumbi enibenzileko bese itjhise njengomlilo kungabi nomcimi.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Bikani kwaJuda, nimemezele eJerusalema nithi: “Vuthelani ipalapala enarheni! Rhuwelelani nithi, ‘Yenibuthane ndawonye! Asibalekeleni emadorobheni anemithangala!’" 
Jeremiah4:6 Phakamiselani iphawu eZiyoni! Phephiselani ipahlenu eJerusalema, ningariyadi! Qalani, uSomnini sele azokuletha ihlekelele evela ngetlhagwini, ngitjho nokurhayilwa okukhulu.”" 
Jeremiah4:7 Ibhubezi liphumile ngedzabeni lalo, umbhubhisi wezizwe ufudukile. Utjhiye indawakhe kobana enze inarhakho ibe libhudu, wena Juda. Amadorobhakho azakuba marubhi atlhoge abahlali." 
Jeremiah4:8 Yeke, yembathani iinzilo, nilile nirhahlawule nithi: Maye, ilaka elivuthako lakaSomnini alikasuki phezu kwethu." 
Jeremiah4:9 USomnini uZimu wathi: “Mhlokho, ikosi kanye neenkhulu izakuphela amandla, abaphristi bakhene, abaphorofidi bakakamale.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Yeke mina ngathi: “Maye Somnini Somandla, ukhohlise kokukhohlisa isizwesi kanye neJerusalema ngokuthi bazakuba nokuthula khisibe isabula isihlezi emphinjeni.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Ngesikhatheso isizwesi kanye neJerusalema bazakutjelwa kuthiwe: “Ummoya otjhwabisako ovela emibundwini eligagadu erhalawumbeni uphembethela ngebantwini bami, kodwana awuzukuphephetha namkha uthanyele." 
Jeremiah4:12 Kumumoya onamandla khulu kunalokho! Ngesikhathesi ubuya kimi. Mina ngokwami ngizakukhupha iingwebo phezu kwabo.” 
Jeremiah4:13 Qalani, uza njengamafu! Ikaranakhe iza njengesiwuruwuru, iinjomani zakhe zigijima khulu kunamadlanga. Maye thina! Siphelile!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Wena Jerusalema, hlamba ubumbi obusehliziywenakho bese uyasinda. Kuzabe kube nini imizindlo emimbi ihlezi kuwe na?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Ilizwi libika ukusuka kwaDani, limemezela ihlekelele eentabeni zakwa-Efrayimu lithi:" 
Jeremiah4:16 “Yazisani iinkoro zakwa-Israyeli, nimemezele eJerusalema nithi: ‘Qalani, napo abavimbezeli beza, basuka enarheni ekhatjhana, baqubula ingoma yepi phezu kwamadorobho wakwaJuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Bazombeleza iJerusalema njengomuntu olinde isimu ngombana lingihlubukile mina Somnini.’ ” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Jeremiah4:18 Ukuziphatha kwakho kanye nezenzo zakho, wena Juda, kulethe lokhu phezu kwakho. Lokhu kumphumela wobukhohlakali bakho. Yizwa bona kumunyu kangangani nabuhlaba ehliziyweni!" 
Jeremiah4:19 Maye iinsizi zami, iinsizi zami! Ngisebuhlungwini! Maye, ukubethela eduze kwehliziywami! Iye, ihliziywami iyathukuza angikwazi ukuthula. Ngizwile ukulila kwepalapala, ngezwa nengoma yepi." 
Jeremiah4:20 Ukubhujiswa phezu kokubhujiswa kuyamenyezelwa; mbala, inarha yoke itlhifiriziwe. Amatendami atjhabalaliswe msinyana, iye, ubusithelo bami ngokuphazima kwelihlo." 
Jeremiah4:21 Kuzabe kube nini ngibona iphawu ngizwe netjhada lepalapala na? 
Jeremiah4:22 USomnini uthi: “Lokhu kwenzeka ngombana abantu bami ziindlhadlha, abangazi. Babantwana abanganangqondo begodu abanalemuko. Banekghono lokwenza ubumbi, kodwana abakwazi ukwenza okulungileko.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Ngabona inarha, qala, beyinganabubono, inganabuphilo ngabona umkayi, qala, bewunganakukhanya." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ngabona iintaba, qala, bezihlengezela, yoke imibundu gade iyethezela." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ngaqala, yelela bekunganamuntu neenyoni zoke zibalekile." 
Jeremiah4:26 Godu ngaqala, yelela, inarha ebeyinothile sele ilirhalawumba; woke amadorobhayo gade amarubhi ngebanga lakaSomnini, iye, ngebanga letukuthelwakhe evuthako." 
Jeremiah4:27 Ngambala nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Yoke inarha izokuba libhudu, nokho angeze ngalisa ukuyibhubhisa." 
Jeremiah4:28 Ngalokho iphasi liyalila namazulu phezulu ayafiphala. Ngebanga lokobana ngikhulumile, ngincamile, ngizakwenza lokho. Angeze ngazisola, asoze ngabuyela emuva.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 Ngetjhada labakhweli beenkarana zepi nabosomsebe boke abantu ngedorobheni bayabaleka. Babalekela eentjhutheni, banyukela ngemipharwini yamadwala. Woke amadorobho atjhiyiwe, akakho ohlala kiwo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Uzokwenzani, wena ophelisiweko na? Nanyana uzembese ngezitlerebede wafaka nobuphaziphazi begolide, iye, nanyana uzitjhatjhe ngeemonyongo zamehlo uzazikghabisela ilize. Labo abakukhanukako bayakudelela, bafunana nepilwakho." 
Jeremiah4:31 Mbala, ngezwa isililo inga ngesomfazi onemirhelo, silisizi njengaloyo obeletha izibulo; iye, isililo sendodakazi yeZiyoni elwela ukuphefumula, yelula izandla isithi: “Maye mina, ngiyatsirimezeka, ipilwami inikelwe esandleni sababulali.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 “Yehlani nenyuke neendledlana zeJerusalema, niqale ngapha nangapha niyelele, nifunisise ematatawini wakhona, nibone bonyana ningafumana umuntu owenza okufaneleko, ophikelela ekwethembekeni, khona-ke ngizakucolela idorobheli." 
Jeremiah5:2 Nanyana abantwabo basithi, ‘Sifunga ngepilo kaSomnini’, basafunga ngekohliso.”" 
Jeremiah5:3 Somnini, wena uqala ukwethembeka! Wabamadlha, kodwana azange bezwe ubuhlungu, wabaqeda, kodwana bala ukusolwa. Benza ubuso babo baqina ukudlula ilitje, bala ukuphenduka." 
Jeremiah5:4 Ngadlumbana ngathi, “Abantwaba ziinchaka, badlhayele ngombana abayazi indlela kaSomnini, iye, umthetho kaZimabo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Yeke ngizakuya eenkhulwini, ngikhulumisane nazo, zona kufuze ziyazi indlela kaSomnini, iye, umthetho kaZimazo.” Kodwana nazo zoke njalo zephula ijogi, zidabula iimbopho." 
Jeremiah5:6 Ngalokho ibhubezi elivela ngehlathini lizazibhozomela, ipisi yerhalawumbeni iziqede. Ingwe izazilalela eduze namadorobhazo, kobana idabule iinquqwana nanyana ngubani ophumako ngombana ukuhlubuka kwazo kukhulu nokuhlehla kwazo kwandile." 
Jeremiah5:7 USomnini uthi: “Kubayini ngifanele ngikucolele, wena Juda? Abantwabakho bangilahlile, bafunga ngozinyana ongekho. Nasele ngibondlile, bahlobonga; bazidlhunya ngekumbeni yesitjhatjha." 
Jeremiah5:8 Baziinjomani eziduna ezondlekileko nezindindako, enye nenye elilela umfazi wenye indoda." 
Jeremiah5:9 Kumele ngingabahlunguphazi ngalokhu na? Kumele ngingazibuyiseleli esizweni esinjalo na?” Kubuza uSomnini. 
Jeremiah5:10 “Khuphukelani embundwini, eendiribeni zakwaJuda bese niyarhayila; ningakhawuli ukubhubhisa. Phulani iingala zeendiribe ngombana abantwaba abasi ngebakaSomnini." 
Jeremiah5:11 Mbala, ikumba ka-Israyeli neyakaJuda, azange yethembeke nakanye kimi.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah5:12 Baphike uSomnini bathi: “Angekhe enze litho! Akunangozi ezasehlela, angeze sabona isabula namkha indlala." 
Jeremiah5:13 Abaphorofidi bazakuba mumoya; ilizwi lakaZimu alikho kibo.” Yeke akuthi abakutjhoko kwenzeke phezu kwabo. 
Jeremiah5:14 Ngalokho-ke nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uZimu uMninimandlawoke: “Ngebanga lokobana abantu bakhulume amezwi la, qala, ngenza amezwami emlonyenakho abe mlilo, abantwaba babe ziinkuni baqothulwe mlilo lowo.”" 
Jeremiah5:15 USomnini uthi: “Wena kumba ka-Israyeli, qala, sele ngizokuletha isizwe esivela kude kobana sijamelane nawe; iye, isizwe sakade nesizakuhlala sikhona, okubabantu abanelimi eningalaziko nabanekulumo eningayizwisisiko." 
Jeremiah5:16 Isilanda saso sifana nethuna elivulekileko, boke bamadoda aziingorho." 
Jeremiah5:17 Bazakugoma isivuno kanye nokudla kwenu, batle amadodana namadodakazenu. Bazakurhiribidela izimvu, iimbuzi neenkomo zenu; bagomojele iindiribe kanye namakhiwanenu. Amadorobhenu anemithangala nenithembele kiwo, bazawalalisa phasi ngesabula.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 USomnini uthi: “Ngitjho nemalangeni la, angeze ngakhawula ukunibhubhisa." 
Jeremiah5:19 Abantu nababuza bathi, ‘Kubayini uSomnini uZimethu enze koke lokhu kithi na?’, uzakuthi kibo, ‘Njengombana ningihlubukile nayokulotjha abosingazimu enarhenenu, ngaleyondlela nizakulotjha imiqhamuka enarheni ekungasi ngeyenu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Bikani lokhu ekumbeni kaJakopo nibuye nikuzwakalise kwaJuda: 
Jeremiah5:21 Lalelani lokhu nina bantu abaziindlhadlha nabanganagqondo, abantu abanamehlo, kodwana bangaboni, abaneendlebe, kodwana bangezwa." 
Jeremiah5:22 USomnini uthi: “Aningesabi na? Anithuthumeli phambi kwami, mina engibeke itjhwabatjhwaba yaba mkhawulo welwandle, isimiso sasafuthi nelingeze laseqa na? Amagagasi angakhephuzela kodwana angeze asitjhidisa, angabhodla kodwana angeze aseqa." 
Jeremiah5:23 Kodwana abantwaba baneenhliziyo eziqinileko nezihlubukako, baphambukile, banyelela." 
Jeremiah5:24 Eenhliziyweni zabo akukho ukuthi, ‘Asesabeni uSomnini uZimethu, onisa izulu ngesikhathi sakhona, iye, lesilimela nelesiruthwana; oqinisekisa ngeemveke ezibekiweko zesivuno.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Kodwana amacalenu akuphambukisile lokho nezono zenu ziniphundise ubuhle. 
Jeremiah5:26 Phakathi kwabantu bami kuneenkhohlakali: Zibadalele njengabantu abacuphe iinyoni, zibeka isifu, zibambe abantu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Njengesiqwebu esigcwele iinyoni, zinjalo neenkumba zazo zigcwele ipahla yekohliso. Ngebangelo ziphenduke iinkhulu neenjinga." 
Jeremiah5:28 Iye, zinonile, zinemikhaba, ziyaphumelela! Ngezenzo zazo ezimbi sezidlulelele! Azisakhuphi iingwebo: Indaba yeentandani nomlandu wabachakileko azisawuyeleli.”" 
Jeremiah5:29 USomnini uthi: “Alo, kumele ngingabahlunguphazi ngalokhu na? Ngingazibuyiseleli phezu kwesizwe esinjengalesi na?" 
Jeremiah5:30 Kunento erarako nethusako eyenzekako enarheni: 
Jeremiah5:31 Abaphorofidi baphorofida ngehloso yamanga, abaphristi babusa ngegunya labo; nje-ke abantu bami bathanda khona lokho. Alo-ke, yini okhunye enizokwenza emva kwalokhu na?”" 
Jeremiah6:1 Nina bantu bakwaBhenjamini, balekani phakathi kweJerusalema! Vuthelani ipalapala eTekhowa! Yenzani itshwayo lentuthu liphakame ngehla kweBhethe-Hakeremu! Nasi ihlekelele iphayiza ivela ngetlhagwini, ngitjho nokurhayilwa okukhulu!" 
Jeremiah6:2 Indodakazi yeZiyoni kimi beyifana namadlelo amahle. 
Jeremiah6:3 Kodwana abelusi nemihlambabo bazakuza kiyo, bahlome amatendabo phezu kwayo mazombe; ngiloyo naloyo adlise isabelo sakhe kiyo." 
Jeremiah6:4 Bathi: “Zilungiseleleni ukulwa neJerusalema! Phakamani, sisahleleni emini ekulu! Heyi! Imini ithoma ukujika nemithunzi yentambama iba mide." 
Jeremiah6:5 Yeke phakamani, asisahleleni ebusuku, sirhayile imibhotjhongwayo!”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Mbala, nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Gawulani imithi, nakhe iinqabo eziqhube magegana nomthangala weJerusalema. Leli lidorobho eligcwele ngezinto zesibambiso, iye, koke kilo zizinto zokudlelezelwa." 
Jeremiah6:7 Njengomthombo olonde amanzi amatjha ngokunjalo nalo lilonde ubukhohlakali balo. Inturhu nokuphangwa kuzwakele kilo, ukugula kanye namancebalo kuphambi kwami njalo." 
Jeremiah6:8 Yelela wena Jerusalema, nakungasinjalo ngizakufulathela ngokukghabhudlheka, iye, nakungasinjalo ngizakwenza ube libhudu, indawo lapho kungahlalwa khona.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Njengombana kwenziwa esidiribeni abantu bazakuburuja amasalela wesivuno kwa-Israyeli iye, wena ovela ngetlhagwini, dlulisa isandla sakho njengomuntu obuthelela amadiribe.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Ngingakhuluma nobani ngimyelelise ukuze ezwe na? Qalani, iindlebe zabo azikakotakotwa ngalokho abezwa. Qalani, ilizwi lakaSomnini bayaliphoqa, abathokozi ngalo." 
Jeremiah6:11 Kodwana ngigcwele ilaka lakaSomnini, yeke angikghoni ukulibamba. USomnini uthi: “Lithululele phezu kwabantwana endledlaneni naphezu kwesiqhema samasokana, umfazi nendoda bazakubambeka bobabili, ngitjho neqhegu kanye nabaluphele khulu." 
Jeremiah6:12 “Iinkumba zabo zizakunikelwa abanye, amasimu kanye nabafazi babo, ngombana ngizakulula isandla sami ngokujamelana nabahlali benarha.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah6:13 “Mbala, kusukela kabancani ukuya kabakhulu babo, boke banehliziyo ede ngenzuzo; ukusukela ebaphorofidini ukuya ebaphristini, boke benza ikohliso." 
Jeremiah6:14 Bahlenga inceba labantu bami ngokulithatha lula, bathi ‘Kunokuthula! Kunokuthula!’ khisibe akunakuthula do." 
Jeremiah6:15 Bayaqobeka ngombana benza izinto ezinyenyisako! Nanyana kunjalo abananhloni nakanye, abakwazi ngitjho nokutjhalazela lokhu. Yeke, bazakuwa hlangana nabawileko, bazakuguqiswa lokha nangisebenza ngabo.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah6:16 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Ngathi, ‘Jamani epambanandlela niqale, buzani ngeendlela zekadeni ukufunyana bonyana ngiyiphi elungileko, nikhambe kiyo, nifumanele imiphefumulwenu ukuphumula.’ Kodwana abantwaba bathi, ‘Abe asizokhamba endleleni yakhona leyo.’" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ngibeke abalindi phezu kwabo ngathi, ‘Lalelani itjhada lepalapala!’ Kodwana bona bathi, ‘Abe asizokulalela.’" 
Jeremiah6:18 Ngalokho, lalelani-ke nina zizwe, yelelani nina mkhambathi ophakathi kwabo," 
Jeremiah6:19 lalela wena narha. Qalani, sele ngizokuletha ihlekelele phezu kwabantwaba; izakuba ziinthelo zamaqhingabo ngombana azange balalele amezwami begodu balahle ifundiswami." 
Jeremiah6:20 Nginandaba bani netjhwalo leTjheba namkha umgaba onuka kamnandi ovela enarheni ekude na? Imihlabelwenu yokutjhiswa ayamukeleki neyetjhebiswano ayingijabulisi.” 
Jeremiah6:21 Ngalokho nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Qalani, sele ngizokubeka iinliyo phambi kwabantwaba, iye, phambi kwaboyise nabantwana ngokufanako, woke umphakathi uzakubhubha.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Qalani, kuza abantu bavela ngenarheni yetlhagwini, iye, kuqubuka isizwe esikhulu emajukujukwini wephasi." 
Jeremiah6:23 Sihlome ngomsebe nangomkhonto, sinesihluku begodu asinasirhawu. Sizwakala inga lilwandle elibhodlako nasikhwele phezu kweenjomani zaso, siza njengamadoda ahlelekele ipi kobana sikusahlele, wena ndodakazi yeZiyoni.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Lokha nasizwa ngemibikwaso sangenwa mamanzi emadolweni. Isizi lisibambile, iye, iinhlungu njengomfazi obelethako" 
Jeremiah6:25 besathi: “Ningaphumi niye emasimini namkha nikhambakhambe eendleleni ngombana isitha sihlome ngesabula, ukwesaba kusizombe mahlangothi woke." 
Jeremiah6:26 Wena Ziyoni, ndodakazi yabantu bami, vunula iinzilo uzibhudabhude emlotheni, uzile ngokurhahlawula okuhlaba ehliziyweni inga ngokomntwana ekukuphela kwakhe, ngombana msinyana sizokuthelekelwa mrhayili.”" 
Jeremiah6:27 USomnini uthi: “Ngikubeke njengomhloli phakathi kwabantu bami, iye, njengomncibilikisi ukuze wazi bewuhlole iindlela zabo." 
Jeremiah6:28 Boke bamahlubuka akhunyaleleko, bakhamba bahleba. Baqine njengekoporo nesimbi, boke babanga umonakalo." 
Jeremiah6:29 Isibhebhedlhisi sibhebhedlhisa ngamandla, kodwana okuncibilikiswako mthofi kwaphela. Umncibilikisi uncibilikisela ilize ngombana abakhohlakeleko abahlungeki.”" 
Jeremiah6:30 Babizwa bona bamanyela wesiliva, ngombana uSomnini ubalahlile." 
Jeremiah7:1 USomnini wakhuluma noJoromiya wamtjela bona 
Jeremiah7:2 ajame esangweni lethempeli lakaSomnini amemezele umlayezo lo lapho athi: “Yizwani ilizwi lakaSomnini noke nina bantu bakwaJuda abangena emasangweni la kobana nimlotjhe. 
Jeremiah7:3 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke, uZimu wakwa-Israyeli uthi, ‘Lokha nanilungisa iindlela nezenzo zenu, khona-ke ngizanenza nihlale enarheni le.’" 
Jeremiah7:4 Ningathembeli emazwini adurhisako athi: “Nanti-ke ithempeli lakaSomnini! Nanti-ke ithempeli lakaSomnini! Nanti-ke ithempeli lakaSomnini! 
Jeremiah7:5 “Nakube ngambala nilungisa iindlela nezenzo zenu bese niphathana ngokulunga 
Jeremiah7:6 okutjho ukungagandeleli isikhonzi, intandani nomhlolokazi, ukungaphalazi iingazi ezinganamlandu enarheni le begodu nokungadlhemadlhemi ngemva kwabosingazimu benizilimaze," 
Jeremiah7:7 khona-ke ngizanivumela kobana nihlale enarheni le, iye inarha engayinikela aboyihlo isiphelani." 
Jeremiah7:8 Kodwana qalani, nithembela emazwini adurhisako nangasizi litho." 
Jeremiah7:9 “Nicabanga bona nizakweba benibulale, nihlobonge benifunge ngekohliso, nitjhisele uBhali itjhwalo benidlhemadlheme ngemva kwabosingazimu ebeningabazi erhalawumbeni" 
Jeremiah7:10 bese nizokujama phambi kwami ethempelini elibizwa ngami nithi, ‘Siphephile!’ khisibe niragela phambili ngokwenza iinyenyiswezi na?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Ithempeli elibizwa ngameli, nicabanga bona sele lilirholo labadlelezeli na? Kodwana yazini bona ngihlala nginiqalile!” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah7:12 “Ningaya khona nje endawenami ebegade iseTjhilo lapha nganzinzisa khona ibizo lami kokuthoma, niyokubona lokho engakwenza kiyo ngebanga lobukhohlakali babantu bami u-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah7:13 “Nje-ke, isigwebo sakaSomnini sithi: Ngebanga lokobana nenze zoke izintwezi begodu ngakhuluma nani imini yoke, kodwana azange nilalele; nganibiza kodwana azange nisabele;" 
Jeremiah7:14 yeke engakwenza eTjhilo ngizakwenza phezu kwethempeli elibizwa ngami, iye, ithempeli enithembele kilo, naphezu kwenarha engayinikela nina naboyihlo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Ngizaniqotjha ebukhoneni bami njengombana ngaqotjha boke abafowenu, iye, zoke iinzukulwana zakwa-Efrayimu." 
Jeremiah7:16 “Ngalokho wena Joromiya, ungabathandazeli abantwaba, ungabalileli namkha ubakhulumele. Ungabancengeli kimi ngombana angeze bengilalele." 
Jeremiah7:17 Kghani awukuboni abakwenza emadorobheni wakwaJuda neendledlaneni zeJerusalema na? 
Jeremiah7:18 Abantwana batheza iinkuni, aboyise baphemba umlilo, abonina babhica ihlama kobana babhagele indlovukazi yomkayi amabhagwana wokulotjha. Baphahlela abosingazimu kobana bangivusele itukuthelo." 
Jeremiah7:19 Bathukuthelisa mina na?” Kutjho uSomnini. “Abazilimazi ngokwabo ngokuzirhubutjha na? 
Jeremiah7:20 Ngalokho-ke nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla, ‘Itukuthelwami nelaka lami lizokuthulukela phezu kwenarha le, phezu kwabantu neenlwana, phezu kwemithi yesivande naphezu kwesithelo semasimini. Izakuvutha ingacimi.’ ”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Godu nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke onguZimu wakwa-Israyeli: “Ragelani phambili ningezelele imihlabelwenu yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano bese nitla inyama yakhona leyo! 
Jeremiah7:22 Mbala, lokha nangikhuluma naboyihlo ngesikhathi ngibakhupha eGibhide, azange sengibanikele nje kwaphela imiyalo emalungana nemihlabelo yokutjhiswa neyetjhebiswano," 
Jeremiah7:23 kodwana ngabadosa ngendlebe ngomyalo lo ngathi, ‘Nanithobela ilizwi lami, khona-ke ngizakuba nguZimenu, nina nibe babantu bami. Khambani ngazo zoke iindlela enginiyala ngazo ukuze kunikhambele kuhle.’" 
Jeremiah7:24 Kodwana aboyihlo azange balalele bebayelele, esikhundleni salokho balandela iindlela zokukhunyalala kweenhliziyokazi zabo ezimbi. Badedela emuva kunobana baye phambili." 
Jeremiah7:25 Kusukela ngesikhathi aboyihlo baphuma eGibhide bekube gadesi, abantwaba ngabathumela iinceku zami, abaphorofidi imihla ngemihla, imini yoke." 
Jeremiah7:26 Kodwana azange bangilalele namkha bayelele. Gade baneentanyana begodu bakhambelela ekwenzeni ubumbi kunaboyise. 
Jeremiah7:27 “Lokha nawubatjela koke lokhu, angeze bakulalela. Lokha nawubarhuwelelako, abazukuphendula." 
Jeremiah7:28 Ngalokho yithi kibo, ‘Lesi sisizwe esingazange sithobele uSomnini uZimaso namkha sizwe lokha nasikhalinywako. Iqiniso liphelile, litjhabalele emilonyenaso.’ ”" 
Jeremiah7:29 Rhuna iinhluthu zakho, wena Jerusalema uzilahle, lila emizileni yemilandelande ngombana uSomnini ulahle bewatjhiya umphakathi owembethwe lilaka lakhe." 
Jeremiah7:30 USomnini uthi: “Abantu bakwaJuda benze ubumbi emehlwenami: Babeke iinyenyiso zabo ngethempelini elibizwa ngami, ngalokho balisilaphaza." 
Jeremiah7:31 Bakhe indunduma yeTofethi emrhobeni weBheni-Hinomu kobana batjhise khona amadodana namadodakazabo njengomhlabelo, okuyinto engingazange ngiyale ngayo namkha ibe semkhumbulwenami." 
Jeremiah7:32 Nje-ke, qalani, ayeza amalanga lapha abantu bangeze basayibiza khona ngeTofethi namkha umrhoba weBheni-Hinomu, kodwana bazakuthi mrhoba wokuHlatjwa ngombana bazakungcwaba abafileko eTofethi kufikela lapha kutlhogeka khona indawo.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah7:33 “Godu iindumbu zabantwaba zizakuba kukudla kweenyoni zomkayi neembandana zommango, kungabi nomuntu ozethusako." 
Jeremiah7:34 Ngizakuphelisa itjhada lokujabula nokuthaba, nephimbo lomlobokazi nomkhwenyana emadorobheni wakwaJuda neendledlaneni zeJerusalema ngombana inarha izabe inganamuntu.”" 
Jeremiah8:1 “Ngesikhatheso, amathambo wamakhosi neenkhulu zakwaJuda, amathambo wabaphristi newabaphorofidi kanye namathambo wabantu beJerusalema azakususwa emazindlenawo.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah8:2 “Amathambo wabantwaba azakunekeka elangeni, enyezini neenkwekwezini zoke zomkayi ebebazithanda bebazilotjha, badlhemadlhema ngemva kwazo bebaphengula kizo, bazikhothamela. Angeze abuthwa namkha angcwatjwe, kodwana azakuba njengomsuqwa emasimini." 
Jeremiah8:3 Kizo zoke iindawo lapha ngizabaqotjhela khona, boke abamisalela bazakwenyula ukufa kunokuphila, iye, labo abaseleko ekorweni ekhohlakeleko le. Abaphunyurhako besizwe esikhohlakelekwesi bazakwenyula ukufa kunokuphila.” Kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Jeremiah8:4 “Wena Joromiya, yithi kibo uSomnini uthe: “Umuntu nawako azakhe avuke na? Umuntu naphambukako azakhe abuye na?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Alo, kubayini-ke abantwaba bahlala baqoqoma? IJerusalema iphila ngokuhlubuka. Banamathela ekohlisweni, abafuni ukubuya." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ngilalelisise kuhle: Abakhulumi okulungileko. Akakho ophendukako ebukhohlakalini bakhe athi, ‘Yintobani engiyenzako le?’ Boke baphambuka masinyana njengenjomani igijimela epini." 
Jeremiah8:7 Ngitjho nodoyi emkayini uyasazi isikhathi sakhe sokubuya, izuba nekonjani ziyazazi iinkhathi zazo zokugoduka. Kodwana abantu bami bona abazazi iimiso zakaSomnini." 
Jeremiah8:8 Ningatjho njani nithi, ‘Sihlakaniphile begodu sinomthetho kaSomnini’ na? Ngambala, isiba labososiba litlole amanga!" 
Jeremiah8:9 Abahlakaniphileko bazokuhlaziswa, bazakukhena bebabambeke. Mbala, balahle ilizwi lakaSomnini! Alo, kuhlakanipha bani-ke abanakho?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Ngalokho abafazi babo ngizabapha amanye amadoda, amasimabo ngiwanikele abahluli. Mbala, kusukela kabancani ukuya kabakhulu, boke banehliziyo ede ngenzuzo; ukusukela ebaphorofidini ukuya ebaphristini, boke benza ikohliso." 
Jeremiah8:11 Bahlenga inceba lendodakazi yabantu bami kwanga alinabuhlungu. Bathi ‘Ukuthula! Ukuthula!’ khisibe akunakuthula do. 
Jeremiah8:12 Bayaqobeka ngombana benza izinto ezinyenyisako! Nanyana kunjalo abananhloni nakanye, abakwazi ngitjho nokutjhalazela lokhu. Yeke, bazakuwa hlangana nabawileko, bazakuguqiswa lokha nangisebenza ngabo.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah8:13 USomnini uthi: “Lokha nangithi ngivuna kibo, kutlhogeka amadiribe esidiribeni namakhiwani emkhiwaneni, ngitjho namakarawo atjhwabile. Nje-ke ngizabanikelela ngabahluli babatshidlhe." 
Jeremiah8:14 Bazakuthi, ‘Sihlaleleni lapha? Asibuthaneni ndawonye, sibalekeleni emadorobheni anemithangala siyokuhlala khona sithule! Kodwana ngithi uSomnini uZimethu sele asithulisile, uzasenza sisele amanzi anobuthi, ngombana sonile kuye." 
Jeremiah8:15 Sirhuluphela ukuthula, kodwana akunalitho elihle. Siqalelela isikhathi sokuphiliswa, kodwana lisizi lodwa.’" 
Jeremiah8:16 Ukuthimula kweenjomani zesitha kwezwakala kusukela eDani etlhagwini. Ngokulila kweenjomani zaso eziduna, kwathuthumela yoke inarha. Size kobana sirhiribidele inarha nakho koke okukiyo, idorobho nabo boke abahlali balo." 
Jeremiah8:17 Qalani, sele ngizokuthumela iinyoka phakathi kwenu, iye, iimbedla ezingenzelwa mlingo, nje-ke zizaniluma.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah8:18 Ngaphandle kokuphiliswa, isizi liqubuka phakathi kwami, iye, ihliziywami iyagula ngaphakathi kwami." 
Jeremiah8:19 Lalela isililo sabantu bekhethu, sizwakala enarheni ekude sithi: “USomnini gade angasi seZiyoni na? Kghani iKosi yalo ayisese ngaphakathi kwalo na?” USomnini uphendula uthi: “Kubayini bangithukuthelise ngeenthombe zabo, iye, ngabosingazimu abanganabubhadekelo na?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 Bona bazakuthi: “Isivuno sidlulile, ihlobo liphelile kodwana thina asikasindi.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Ngebanga lokudabuka kwabantu bekhethu, nami ngidabukile, ngizilile; ukukakamala kungibambile." 
Jeremiah8:22 Akunantatha kwaGiliyadi na? Akunanyanga lapho na? Alo, kubayini kungabi nokwelapheka kwenceba labantu bekhethu na?" 
Jeremiah9:1 Maye, thana ihlokwami beyisiyalu samanzi namehlwami amthombo weenyembezi! Bengizakulila ubusuku nemini ngenca yabantu bekhethu abarhayiliweko." 
Jeremiah9:2 USomnini uthi: “Thana benginendawo erhalawumbeni lapha iinkhambi ziphumulela khona ukuze ngitjhiye abantu bami, ngiye endaweni ekude nabo, ngombana boke baziinhlobongi, iye, ihlangano yabangakathembeki." 
Jeremiah9:3 Balungisa amalimabo njengomsubela emsebeni. Baziinkutani enarheni, kodwana ingasi eqinisweni! Baragela phambili nokonakala; nakungimi yena abangazi.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah9:4 “Yelelani abangani benu, ningathembi nanyana ngubani wabafowenu ngombana omunye nomunye wabafowenu umkhapheli nomunye nomunye umngani umhlebi." 
Jeremiah9:5 Bayaphoqana begodu abakhulumi iqiniso; bajayeza amalimabo ukukhuluma amala. Badurhile," 
Jeremiah9:6 abasabuyi. Kukugandelela phezu kokugandelela nekohliso phezu kwekohliso! Bala ukungamukela.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Jeremiah9:7 Ngalokho-ke nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Qala, sele ngizobancibilikisa bengibahlole. Yini okhunye engingakwenza ngabantu bami na?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Amalimabo amisubela ebhubhisako, akhuluma ikohliso. Ngomlomakhe, omunye nomunye wabo ukhuluma kuhle nomakhelwanakhe, kodwana ehliziywenakhe umbekela isifu." 
Jeremiah9:9 Kumele ngingabahlunguphazi ngalokhu na? Ngingazibuyiseleli phezu kwesizwe esinjengalesi na?” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Jeremiah9:10 Ngizakuthoma ingoma yokukhihla isililo ngililele imibundu; ngizile mayelana namadlelo werhalawumba ngombana sele alifusi. Akusenamuntu odlula lapho; ukulila kweenkomo akusezwakali, iinyoni ngitjho neenlwana sele kumukile." 
Jeremiah9:11 USomnini uthi: “IJerusalema ngizayenza isiqorho samatje, idzaba leempungutjha; ngenze amadorobho wakwaJuda abe libhudu, ukuze kungabi nomuntu ohlala kiwo.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Ngubani ohlakaniphe ngokwaneleko ukwazi lokhu na? USomnini ngokwakhe ukhulume nobani ukuze umuntu loyo akumemezele na? Kubayini inarha irhayilwe beyaba libhudu njengerhalawumba, kwangasaba nomuntu odlula kiyo?" 
Jeremiah9:13 USomnini uthi: “Kungombana balahle umthethwami engiwubeke phambi kwabo. Azange bangilalele namkha balandele umthethwami. 
Jeremiah9:14 Esikhundleni salokho balandele ukukhunyalala kweenhliziyo zabo, balandela aboBhali njengombana bafundiswa boyise.”" 
Jeremiah9:15 Ngalokho-ke nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke, uZimu wakwa-Israyeli uthi: “Qalani, sele ngizokwenza abantwaba bagome iinthelo ezimunyu, basele amanzi anobuthi." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ngizabahlakaza hlangana nezizwe abangazaziko ngitjho naboyisemkhulu abangazange khebazibone. Ngizabagijimisa ngesabula kufikela lapha ngibarhayila khona.” 
Jeremiah9:17 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke wathi: “Yelelani-ke! Bizani abafazi besililo ukuze beze, iye, nifune abanekghono lokulila beze.”" 
Jeremiah9:18 Nje-ke umphorofidi wathi: “Iye, abarhabe bathome basililele, amehlwethu abe atshege iinyembezi, kuwuluke amanzi eenkopheni zethu." 
Jeremiah9:19 Mbala, sele kuzwakele isililo eZiyoni sithi, ‘Maye, sirhayilwe kangangani! Sihlaziswe khulu ngombana bekumele sisukele inarhethu imizethu yaba marubhi!’" 
Jeremiah9:20 “Yeke nina bafazi, yenizwe ilizwi lakaSomnini, vulani iindlebe zenu nilalele ilizwi lomlomakhe. Fundisani amadodakazenu ukukhihla ingoma yesililo iye, ngitjho nabomakhelwana benu." 
Jeremiah9:21 Mbala, ukufa kungene ngamafesiderethu, kwangena ngemibhotjhongwenethu kwabulala abantwana eendledlaneni namasokana ematatawini.”" 
Jeremiah9:22 USomnini uthi: “Wena Joromiya, yithi kibo, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: Iindumbu zabantu zizakurabhalala njengomsuqwa emasimini nanjengekoroyi esikiweko ngemva komvuni. Kodwana akakho ozayibuthelela.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Isihlakaniphi asingazikhakhazisi ngobuhlakani baso, namkha itsitsirimba iziphakamise ngeenqababa zayo nesikhumkani singazigqaji ngomnonwaso," 
Jeremiah9:24 kodwana ozigqajako akazigqaje ngokobana uyangilemuka begodu uyangazi bona nginguSomnini owenza ukwethembeka, ubulungiswa kanye nokulunga ephasini. Iye, ngikho lokho okungijabulisako.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah9:25 USomnini uthi: “Isikhathi siyeza lapha ngizakuhlunguphaza khona boke abasoke enyameni kwaphela," 
Jeremiah9:26 okutjho iGibhide, iJuda, i-Edomu, ama-Amoni, iMowabi nabo boke abahlala erhalawumbeni abagude iinhloko zabo eenhlafunyweni. Njengayo yoke ikumba ka-Israyeli, zoke izizwezi azikasokwa ehliziyweni.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Yizwa ilizwi lakaSomnini alikhulume ngawe, wena kumba ka-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah10:2 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Ningafundi iindlela zabezizwe namkha nibe nevalo ngeenkhanyisi ezisemkayini, njengombana bezizwe banevalo ngazo." 
Jeremiah10:3 Ngambala imikhuba yezizwe ililize lakolize: Zigawula isigodo ngehlathini, usosino asibaze ngezenjana." 
Jeremiah10:4 Zisikghabisa ngesiliva negolide, zisikokodele ngenondo nangeenkhonkhwani kobana singapewuki." 
Jeremiah10:5 Abosingazimu bafana nesethuso: Abakhulumi, bayathwalwa ngombana abakwazi ukukhamba! Ningabesabi ngombana abanangozi begodu akunabuhle ababenzako.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Akakho onjengawe, Somnini; umkhulu begodu nebizo lakho limamandla." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ngubani ongakwesabiko, wena Kosi yezizwe na? Lokhu kukufanele. Hlangana nabo boke abazenza iinhlakaniphi ezizweni nakiyo yoke imibuswabo, akakho noyedwa onjengawe." 
Jeremiah10:8 Kunento eyodwa abadlhayele ngayo khulu: Abamukeli iiyeleliso bona abosingazimu seziingodo nje kwaphela! 
Jeremiah10:9 Isiliva ekhandiweko ithethwe eTaratjhitjhi kanye negolide elicolisiweko. Kumsebenzi kasosino nomncibilikisi! Ngitjho nanyana kwembathiswa okuhlaza komkayi nokububende, koke njalo kwenziwe zizandla zeenhlakani." 
Jeremiah10:10 Kodwana uSomnini unguZimu wamambala; unguZimu ophilako, iKosi yanini nanini. Lokha nathukutheleko, iphasi liyadengezela; izizwe azikwazi ukubhesela ilaka lakhe." 
Jeremiah10:11 Ngabosingazimabo umuntu kufuze athi: “Abosingazimu azange badale izulu nephasi, ngalokho bazokubhubha ephasinapha nangaphasi komthunzi welanga.”" 
Jeremiah10:12 UZimu wenze iphasi ngamandlakhe, wasekela ilizwe ngokuhlakanipha kwakhe, wendlala amazulu ngelwazi lakhe." 
Jeremiah10:13 Lokha nakhupha ilizwi lakhe, kuhlokoma amanzi emazulwini; wenza amafu amhlophe aphume epelazwe. Uthumela imibani ekhambisana nezulu, aphephethe ummoya eenlulwini zakhe." 
Jeremiah10:14 Woke umuntu usidlhayela begodu akanalwazi; woke umncibilikisi uhlaziswa bosingazimu bakhe. Iinthombembunjwa zakhe zimamala, azinamphefumulo ngaphakathi kwazo." 
Jeremiah10:15 Zililize lakolize, ziziinkohliso; isikhathi sokugwetjwa kwazo nasifikako, zizakubhubha." 
Jeremiah10:16 Kodwana osisabelo sakaJakopo akasinjalo, ngombana ungumbumbi wakho koke, ngitjho no-Israyeli, oyikoro engeyakhe. Ibizo lakhe nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Jeremiah10:17 Butha umthwadlanakho enarheni, ukhambe uyokuhlala ekuvinjezelweni" 
Jeremiah10:18 ngombana nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Qalani, kilelihlandla sele ngizokukhupha abahlala enarheni. Ngabehlisela ukubandezeleka ukuze babambeke eJerusalema.”" 
Jeremiah10:19 Inarha yakwaJuda izakuthi: “Maye mina ngebanga lokulimala kwami! Inceba lami alelapheki! Mina ngadlumbana ngathi, ‘Lokhu sekugula nje, yeke ngizakubhesela.’" 
Jeremiah10:20 Kodwana itende lami litjhabalalisiwe, zoke iintambo zalo ziqhusukile. Abantwabami bangitjhiyile, abasekho; akusenamuntu ozakujamisa itende lami, namkha alembelelise amatjhila wami." 
Jeremiah10:21 Mbala abelusi badlhayele ngombana abasabuzi nakuSomnini. Ngalokho abaphumeleli nezimvu zabo ziphadlhalele zoke.” 
Jeremiah10:22 Lalelani! Kunombiko, sele usifikele! Kuza umdumo omkhulu ngetlhagwini! Uzakutjhiya amadorobho wakwaJuda alibhudu abe madzaba weempungutjha." 
Jeremiah10:23 Somnini, ngilemuke bona umuntu akaziphileli; akusisemuntwini ukuzikhambela nokunqophisa amagadangwakhe." 
Jeremiah10:24 Nje-ke, Somnini, ngikhalime, kwaphela kube ngokulunga; ungangibhubhisi ngetukuthelwakho." 
Jeremiah10:25 Thululela itukuthelwakho phezu kwezizwe ezingakwazisiko, iye, phezu kweenkoro ezingabizi ibizo lakho ngombana zirhiribidele uJakopo, iye, zimrhiribidele zamqeda, zatjhabalalisa indawakhe." 
Jeremiah11:1 Nanti ilizwi elafika kuJoromiya libuya kuSomnini: 
Jeremiah11:2 “Lalelani amezwi wesivumelwanesi. Wena Joromiya, khuluma nabantu bakwaJuda nabahlali beJerusalema" 
Jeremiah11:3 ubatjele bonyana nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, uZimu wakwa-Israyeli, ‘Akanikelelwe umuntu ongalaleli amezwi wesivumelwanesi," 
Jeremiah11:4 iye, amezwi engayala ngawo aboyihlo lokha nangibakhupha eGibhide, ekehleni yomlilo wesimbi. Ngabayala ngamezwi la: Lalelani amezwami beniwalandele ngokuya ngakho koke enginiyala ngakho ukuze nibe babantu bami, mina ngibe nguZimenu.’" 
Jeremiah11:5 Ngenza lokhu ukuze ngizalise isifungo engasifunga kiboyihlo sokubanikela inarha egeleza ibisi neliju njengombana kunjalo namhlanje.” Ngaphendula ngathi: “Amen, Somnini!”" 
Jeremiah11:6 USomnini wangiyala bonyana ngimemezele woke amezwi la emadorobheni wakwaJuda neendledlaneni zeJerusalema ngithi: “Lalelani amezwi wesivumelwanesi beniwalandele. 
Jeremiah11:7 Mbala, ngabayelelisa bengabayelelisa aboyihlomkhulu lokha nangibakhupha eGibhide, iye, ngabayelelisa imini yoke ngathi, ‘Lalelani amezwami!’ Ngabayelelisa bekube namhlanjesi," 
Jeremiah11:8 kodwana azange bangilalele bebangitjheje. Iye, omunye nomunye walandela ubulikhuni behliziyokazakhe ekhohlakeleko. Yeke, ngabehlisela woke amanikelela wesivumelwano ebengibayale ngaso kobana basilandele kodwana bangasigcina.”"
