Jeremiah49:33 IRhatsori lizokuba lidzaba leempungutjha, indawo elibhudu nini nanini. Akunamuntu ozakuhlala lapho, namkha umuntu ozakukhonza khona." 
Jeremiah49:34 Ilizwi lakaSomnini elafika kuJoromiya umphorofidi mayelana ne-Elamu ekuthomeni kokubusa kwakaTsedekhiya ikosi yakwaJuda. 
Jeremiah49:35 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Qalani, sele ngizokwephula umsebe we-Elamu, iye, igugu lamandlayo wepi." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ngizokwehlisela imimoya emine phezu kwe-Elamu, kusukela emagumbini womane wephasi. Ngizobasabalalisa mahlangothi woke wemimoya leyo. Abaqotjhiweko be-Elamu bazakufunyanwa ezizweni zoke." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ngizokuhlakaza ama-Elamu phambi kwezitha zawo, iye, phambi kwalabo abazumana nepilwawo; ngizokwehlisela ihlekelele phezu kwawo, okutjho itukuthelwami evuthako.” Kutjho uSomnini. “Ngizowagijimisa ngesabula bengiwaqede nya." 
Jeremiah49:38 Ngizokubeka isihlalo sobukhosi bami e-Elamu, ngibhubhise ikosi yakhona neenduna zakhona.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Kodwana emalangeni ezako ngizokutjhugulula ubujamo be-Elamu.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Jeremiah50:1 Ilizwi uSomnini alikhuluma ngoJoromiya umphorofidi mayelana neBhabheli kanye nenarha yamaKasidi lithi: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Bikani benimemezele hlangana nezizwe, phakamisani iphawu bese niyalimemezela, ningagodli litho, kodwana khulumani, nithi, ‘IBhabheli lithunjiwe! UBhele uzokuhlaziswa, uMerodaki abe nokwesaba. Iinthombembunjwa zalo zizokwesaba.’" 
Jeremiah50:3 Lizakusahlelwa sisizwe sangetlhagwini senze isifunda salo sibe libhudu. Akunamuntu ozakuhlala kiso, abantu neenlwana zalo bazakuzulazula.”" 
Jeremiah50:4 USomnini uthi: “Emihleni leyo ngesikhatheso abantu bakwa-Israyeli; iye, bona nabakwaJuda bazakuza ndawonye. Bazakuza balila, bafune uSomnini uZimabo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Bazakubuza indlela eya eZiyoni baphendukele nganeno bathi, ‘Yizani sizihlanganiseni noSomnini ngesivumelwano sanini nanini esingeze sakhohlweka.’" 
Jeremiah50:6 “Abantu bami babe zizimvu ezilahlekileko. Abelusi bazo bazidurhisile, bazibangela bona zehle zenyuke eentabeni. Zazulazula hlangana neentaba nemibundu, zakhohlwa indawazo yokuphumula." 
Jeremiah50:7 Nanyana ngubani ozifunyanako uzidlela zona. Izitha zazo zathi, ‘Asinamlandu ngombana bonile kuSomnini olidlelo lamambala, iye, uSomnini olithemba laboyise.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Balekani niphume eBhabheli, phumani enarheni yamaKasidi, nibe njengeempongo ezirhola umhlambi" 
Jeremiah50:9 ngombana sele ngizokuvusa umfelandawonye wezizwe ezinamandla. Ngizaziletha zivela enarheni yangetlhagwini. Zizazihlela zijamelane nalo, zilithumbe kusukela ngetlhagwini. Imisubelazo injengeyengorho enekghono engabuyi imkhonoze." 
Jeremiah50:10 Inarha yamaKasidi izakuba yipango, boke abayiphangako bazakusutha.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah50:11 Ngebanga lokobana nina maKasidi niyajekezela benithabile, nina baphangi belifa lami, nituna njengethole nalibhula ikoroyi, nilile njengeenjomani eziduna," 
Jeremiah50:12 unyoko uzakuhlaziswa khulu, owanibelethako uzakurhubutjhwa. Qalani, uzakuba ngomncani ezizweni, abe libhudu, igagadu nerhalawumba." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ngebanga letukuthelo kaSomnini iBhabheli alizukuba nabahlali, lizakuba libhudu lakobhudu. Woke odlula kilo uzakumangala, abe akhuze ngebanga lazo zoke iingemegeme zalo." 
Jeremiah50:14 Zihleleni nijamelane neBhabheli mahlangothi woke nina noke enicuphe umsebe. Lidumuzeni! Ningababaleli imisubela ngombana lonile kuSomnini. 
Jeremiah50:15 Hlokomani kuzwakale ngehla kwalo ncazoke nithi: “Lizinikele, imibhotjhongwalo iwile, amabodalo agiriziwe.” Lokhu kukuzibuyiselela kwakaSomnini. Ngalokho zibuyiseleleni kilo, nenze kilo lokho elakwenza kabanye." 
Jeremiah50:16 Susani otjalako eBhabheli kanye nophethe isegere ngesikhathi sokuvuna. Ngebanga lesabula yonelunya ngiloyo naloyo uzakuphendukela ebantwini bekhabo, omunye nomunye abalekele enarheni yekhabo." 
Jeremiah50:17 U-Israyeli bekayimvu ebalekako egijinyiswe mabhubezi. Owathoma ukuyirhiribidela kwaba yikosi ye-Asiriya, wokugcina owaphohloza amathambayo nguNebukadiretsari ikosi yeBhabheli." 
Jeremiah50:18 Ngalokho-ke nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke, uZimu wakwa-Israyeli: “Ngizokuhlunguphaza ikosi yeBhabheli nenarhayo njengombana ngihlunguphaze ikosi ye-Asiriya." 
Jeremiah50:19 Kodwana ngizokubuyisela u-Israyeli emadlelwenakhe; yeke uzakukarula eKarameli neBhatjhani, iphango lakhe lizakwaneliseka eentatjaneni zakwa-Efrayimu neGiliyadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Emihleni leyo ngesikhatheso, kuzakwenziwa iphenyo ngomlandu ka-Israyeli, kodwana akuzukufunyanwa litho, lenziwe ngezono zakwaJuda, kodwana kungafunyanwa litho ngombana ngizabe ngicolele imisalela engayibabalelako.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Nina zitha, sahlelani inarha yeMeratayimu nalabo abahlala ePekodi! Bagijimiseni ngesabula nangokurhayila kokupheleleko! Yenzani koke enginiyale ngakho.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah50:22 Itjhada lepi sele lisenarheni, itjhada lokutjhabalaliswa okukhulu!" 
Jeremiah50:23 Maye, yephuke beyafahlaka kangangani inondo edule iphasi loke! Maye, libe yiququ kangangani iBhabheli hlangana nezizwe!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Ngakubekela isiqupho wena Bhabheli, wabanjwa ungakatjheji, wafunyanwa esiquphweni bewathunjwa ngombana utjhijile uSomnini." 
Jeremiah50:25 USomnini uvule ikumbakhe yeenkhali wakhupha iinkhali zobukhali bakhe ngombana uSomandla, uSomnini uMninimandlawoke, kunomsebenzi ekumele awenze enarheni yamaKasidi." 
Jeremiah50:26 Ngenani eBhabheli nina noke! Vulani iinlulu zalo! Buthelelani abantu balo njengamaqubi wamabele. Batjhabalaliseni nya ningalitjhiyeli namunye umsalela. 
Jeremiah50:27 Hlabani zoke iinkunzi zalo; zehliseleni ebuhlabelweni! Maye kiwo amaKasidi! Ilanga lawo lifikile, iye, isikhathi sokuhlunguphazwa kwawo." 
Jeremiah50:28 Lalelani! Ababaleke nabaphunyurhe enarheni yeBhabheli bayeza kobana bamemezele eZiyoni ukuzibuyiselela kwakaSomnini uZimethu, iye, ukuzibuyiselela kwakhe ngethempeli lakhe." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Bizelani abosomsebe eBhabheli, iye, boke abacupha umsebe! Livimbezeleni mahlangothi woke, akungabikho namunye ophunyurhako! Libuyiseleleni ngezenzo zalo, nenze kilo lokho elakwenza kabanye ngombana lazikhukhumezela uSomnini, oCwengileko ka-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ngalokho amasokanalo azakufela ematatawinalo, woke amajonalo azakuthuliswa mhlokho.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Qala, ngijamelene nawe, wena ozikhukhumezako!” Kutjho uSomnini oyiKosi uMninimandlawoke. “Ngambala ilanga lakho lifikile, ilanga lokobana ngikuhlunguphaze." 
Jeremiah50:32 Ozikhukhumezako uzakukhutjwa bekawe angabi nomuntu omvusako; ngizakuthungelela umlilo emizinakhe ozakuqothula koke okumzombileko.” 
Jeremiah50:33 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Abantu bakwa-Israyeli bagandelelwe nabantu bakwaJuda ngokunjalo. Boke abathumbi babo babakakarele, bayala ukubatjhaphulula." 
Jeremiah50:34 Kodwana umhlengabo unamandla, ibizo lakhe nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke. Uzakujamela indababo ngamandla ukuze alethe ukuphumula enarheni, kodwana kubahlali beBhabheli alethe umguruguru." 
Jeremiah50:35 “Isabula phezu kwamaKasidi!” Kutjho uSomnini. “Iye, phezu kwabahlali beBhabheli naphezu kweenkhulu zalo kanye nabahlakaniphileko balo!" 
Jeremiah50:36 Isabula phezu kwabaphorofidi bamala ukuze babe ziindlhadlha. Isabula phezu kweengorho zalo ukuze zirhayilwe! 
Jeremiah50:37 Isabula phezu kweenjomani neenkarana zalo! Isabula phezu kwabo boke abantu abayicubevange abaphakathi kwalo ukuze babe njengabafazi. Isabula phezu kwamagugwalo ukuze aphangwe! 
Jeremiah50:38 Ibutho phezu kwamanzalo ukuze ome kere. Mbala, kuyindawo yeenthombembazwa; bazigqaja ngeenthombe ezisabekako." 
Jeremiah50:39 Nje-ke abothurhu berhalawumba bazakuhlala lapho kanye neempisi. Iinciliba nazo zizakuhlala lapho. IBhabheli angeze belisahlalwa godu babantu namkha lakhiwe iinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana. 
Jeremiah50:40 Njengombana iSodoma neGomora zaketulwa kanye nemizana yakhona, ngokunjalo akakho ozakuhlala eBhabhelapho, akunamuntu ozakhonza kilo.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Qalani, kuza abantu bavela ngetlhagwini! Iye, kuqubuka isizwe esikhulu namakhosi amanengi emajukujukwini wephasi." 
Jeremiah50:42 Bahlome ngemisebe nangemikhonto, banesihluku begodu abanasirhawu. Bazwakala inga lilwandle elibhodlako nabakhwele iinjomani zabo; beza njengamadoda ahlelekele ipi kobana bakusahlele, wena ndodakazi yeBhabheli." 
Jeremiah50:43 Lokha ikosi yeBhabheli nayizwa ngemibiko yabo, yangenwa mamanzi emadolweni, isizi liyibambile; iye, iinhlungu njengomfazi obelethako." 
Jeremiah50:44 Njengebhubezi livela ehlathini eliminyeneko elihlanu kweJordani liya edlelweni esebeni lomlanjana, qalani ngizakugijimisa iBhabheli endawenalo msinyana. Nanyana ngubani engimkhethako ngizambeka kilo. Ngubani onjengami? Ngubani ongangitjhijila na? Ngimuphi umelusi ongajama phambi kwami na?”" 
Jeremiah50:45 Ngalokho, yizwani lokho uSomnini akuhlele phezu kweBhabheli, lokho akuhlose ngenarha yamaKasidi: “Kwamambala abesana abelusa imihlambi bazazithathela imihlambi leyo. Iye, uSomnini uzakubangela bonyana amadlelo atjhiywe." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ngetjhada lokuthunjwa kweBhabheli, inarha izakuthuthumela; isililo salo sizakuzwakala hlangana nezizwe.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Qalani, ngizakuvusa ummoya womtjhabalalisi ujamelane neBhabheli nabantu beLebu-Khamayi." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ngizokuthumela abeli eBhabheli kobana bele bebabhubhise inarha yakhona; bazalithelekela ncazoke ngelanga lehlekelele. 
Jeremiah51:3 Umdumuzi ngomsebe angatjhaphululi umsebakhe namkha ahlubule isambatho sakhe sepi. Ningababaleli amasokanalo, bhubhisani loke ibutho lalo." 
Jeremiah51:4 Abahlatjwe ngesabula bazakuwa enarheni yamaKasidi nabalinyaziweko eendledlaneni zeBhabheli. 
Jeremiah51:5 Mbala, u-Israyeli noJuda abanabuhlolokazi, abakasuswa kuZimabo, iye, kuSomnini uMninimandlawoke, nanyana inarhabo yembethwe mlandu phambi koCwengileko ka-Israyeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 “Balekani niphume eBhabheli! Omunye nomunye asindise ipilwakhe. Ningabhujiswa ngebanga lezono zalo. Sele kusikhathi sokuzibuyiselela kwakaSomnini; uzalikhokhela lokho okulifaneleko. 
Jeremiah51:7 IBhabheli beliyikapho yegolide esandleni sakaSomnini, ladakisa loke iphasi. Izizwe zasela iwayinalo, nje-ke, ziyadlharuma." 
Jeremiah51:8 IBhabheli lizakuwa msinyana belephuke. Lilileleni, lifunyaneleni intatha yobuhlungu balo, mhlamunye lingaphola.”" 
Jeremiah51:9 Abakhozi balo bathi: “Besizalelapha iBhabheli, kodwana angeze lelapheka. Asilisukeleni! Omunye nomunye wethu aziyele enarhenakhe ngombana isigwebo salo sifikelela emkayini, siphakeme njengamafu.”" 
Jeremiah51:10 Abathunjwa bathi: “USomnini uvuselele ubuntu bethu! Yeke nambani siyokubika eZiyoni izenzo zakaSomnini uZimethu.” 
Jeremiah51:11 Lolani imisubela, nigcwalise iinlanda ngayo. USomnini uvuse ummoya wamakhosi wamaMede ngombana ihloswakhe kubhubhisa iBhabheli. USomnini uzozibuyiselela, iye, abuyiselele ithempeli lakhe." 
Jeremiah51:12 Phakamisani iphawu emithangaleni yeBhabheli! Qinisani abalindi, bekani ababekilihlo, nizilungiselele ukunanabela! Mbala, uSomnini uhlosile bewafeza lokho akukhulume mayelana nabahlali beBhabheli." 
Jeremiah51:13 Wena ohlala hlanu komlambo omkhulu nonamagugu amanengi, isiphetho sakho sifikile, isikhathi sokobana ujutjwe." 
Jeremiah51:14 USomnini uMninimandlawoke uzifungile: “Ngambala ngikuzalisa ngamadoda kube inga lijuma leentethe; azakuhlaba umkhosi wokuhlula ngawe Bhabheli.” 
Jeremiah51:15 Nguye owenze iphasi ngamandlakhe, wasekela ilizwe ngokuhlakanipha kwakhe, wendlala amazulu ngelwazi lakhe." 
Jeremiah51:16 Lokha nazwakalisa ilizwi lakhe, kuhlokoma amanzi emazulwini; wenza amafu amhlophe aphume epelazwe. Uthumela imibani ekhambisana nezulu, aphephethise ummoya eenlulwini zakhe." 
Jeremiah51:17 Woke umuntu usidlhayela begodu akanalwazi; woke umncibilikisi uhlaziswa bosingazimu bakhe. Iinthombembunjwa zakhe zimamala, azinamphefumulo ngaphakathi kwazo." 
Jeremiah51:18 Zililize lakolize, ziziinkohliso; isikhathi sokugwetjwa kwazo nasifikako, zizakubhubha." 
Jeremiah51:19 Kodwana osisabelo sakaJakopo akasinjalo, ngombana ungumbumbi wakho koke, ngitjho no-Israyeli, oyikoro engeyakhe. Ibizo lakhe nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Jeremiah51:20 “Wena Joromiya uyipinga yami, isikhali sami sepi, ngawe ngiphohloza izizwe, ngawe ngibhubhisa imibuso," 
Jeremiah51:21 ngawe ngiphohloza injomani nomkhwelayo, ngawe ngiphohloza ikarana yepi nomtjhayelayo," 
Jeremiah51:22 ngawe ngiphohloza indoda nomfazi, ngawe ngiphohloza omdala nomutjha, ngawe ngiphohloza isokana nomntazana," 
Jeremiah51:23 ngawe ngiphohloza umelusi nomhlambi, ngawe ngiphohloza umlimi nekomo, ngawe ngiphohloza ababusi neenkhulu." 
Jeremiah51:24 “Ngizakubuyiselela iBhabheli nabo boke abahlali benarha yamaKasidi ngebanga lakho koke okumbi abakwenze phambi kwenu eZiyoni.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Jeremiah51:25 “Qala, ngijamelene nawe, wena ntaba yomrhayili, wena orhayila iphasi loke.” Kutjho uSomnini. “Ngizakwelula isandla sami ngijamelane nawe, ngikuphosele phasi ekuzikeni, ngikwenze ube yintaba etjhisiweko." 
Jeremiah51:26 Akunalitje elizakuthathwa kuwe ukwenza ijika, namkha elinye ilitje kobana kwenziwe isisekelo, ngombana uzakuhlala umarubhi wamlibe.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Phakamisani iphawu enarheni! Vuthelani ipalapala hlangana nezizwe! Cwengisani izizwe kobana ziye epini zilwe neBhabheli. Buthelani ndawonye imibuso le, ijamelane nalo: i-Ararathi, iMini ne-Atjhikenazi. Bekani umlawuli wepi ajamelane nalo, nithumele iinjomani ezembatha inarha yoke njengewoma leentethe." 
Jeremiah51:28 Cwengisani izizwe kobana zilwe nalo: amakhosi wamaMede, ababusi neenkhulu zawo kanye nazo zoke iinarha ezibuswa makhosi lawo." 
Jeremiah51:29 Nje-ke inarha izakuthuthumela beyikoropane ngombana ihloso kaSomnini ngeBhabheli isajamile, ukwenza isifunda seBhabheli sibe libhudu ukuze kungabikho ohlala khona." 
Jeremiah51:30 Iingorho zeBhabheli zilisile ukulwa; zihlezi ngeemphephelweni. Amandlazo aphelile, sese zifana nabafazi. Imizi yeBhabheli ithungelelwe ngomlilo, iinqabo zamasangwayo zephuliwe." 
Jeremiah51:31 Isigijimi sigijima sihlangabeze esinye nesithunywa sihlangabeze isithunywa ukubikela ikosi yeBhabheli bonyana idorobho layo lithunjwe mahlangothi woke. 
Jeremiah51:32 Amazibuko avinjezelwe, umgaba emlanjeni uthungelwe ngomlilo, amajoni anevalo.”" 
Jeremiah51:33 Mbala, nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke, uZimu wakwa-Israyeli: “Indodakazi yeBhabheli ifana neselelo lokha nasigangadelweko, isikhathi sokuvuna sizakufika msinyana.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 “UNebukadiretsari ikosi yeBhabheli ungirhiribidele wangiminyelela ngoma kere, wangifuthela phasi njengomjeka onganalitho. Ungiginye njengenyoka, wazalisa isisu sakhe ngomhlosi wami, wagcina ngokungikhafula." 
Jeremiah51:35 Inturhu nokulinyazwa okwenziwe kimi akube phezu kweBhabheli.” Kutjho iZiyoni. “Iingazi zami zibe phezu kwabahlali benarha yamaKasidi.” Kutjho iJerusalema. 
Jeremiah51:36 Ngalokho nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: “Qalani, ngizokujamela indabakho, ngikubuyiselele wena Jerusalema. Ngizakomisa ilwandle leBhabheli ngitjhise nomthombalo." 
Jeremiah51:37 IBhabheli lizakuba isiqorho samatje, idzaba leempungutjha, ibhudu nento yokurarekelwa, indawo engahlalwa mumuntu." 
Jeremiah51:38 Kwanje abantu balo basabhodla ndawonye njengamabhubezi, iye, barora njengamabhubezana." 
Jeremiah51:39 Kodwana kuzakuthi lokha nabasagugekileko ngibalungiselele umnyanya, ngibadakise ukuze bahlekele phezulu bese balalela safuthi bangasavuka godu.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah51:40 “Ngizabehlisela ebuhlabelweni njengezimvu, iye, njengamaqama neempongo." 
Jeremiah51:41 “Maye, iTjhetjhaki lithunjiwe! Idorobho elikhethekileko ephasini loke, libanjwe! Maye, iBhabheli selibe sinyenyiso hlangana nezizwe!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Ilwandle likhuphukele ngehla kweBhabheli, ukubhodla kwamadlambalo kuligubuzesile." 
Jeremiah51:43 Imizanalo ilibhudu, iye, iyindawo yesomiso nerhalawumba, yindawo engahlalwa mumuntu nalapha kungadluli khona umuntu." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ngizakuhlunguphaza uBhele eBhabheli, ngimkhafulise akuginyileko. Izizwe angeze zisawulukela kuye. “Umthangala weBhabheli uwe bhusu!" 
Jeremiah51:45 Nje-ke, phumani kilo bantu bami! Omunye nomunye asindise ipilwakhe etukuthelweni evuthako kaSomnini." 
Jeremiah51:46 Nakungasinjalo nizakunyefa ummongo benesabe amahlebezi azwakala enarheni; iye, ihlebezana yomnyaka nomnyaka ngenturhu enarheni kanye nangombusi ovukela umbusi." 
Jeremiah51:47 “Ngambala isikhathi siyeza lapha ngizokuhlunguphaza khona iinthombe zeBhabheli. Yoke inarhalo izakuhlaziswa nabahlatjwe ngesabula balo bazakurabhalala ngaphakathi kwalo. 
Jeremiah51:48 Yeke izulu nephasi nakho koke okukikho kuzakuhlokoma ngeBhabheli. Ngambala abarhayili balithelekela bavela ngetlhagwini.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Jeremiah51:49 “IBhabheli nalo kufanele liwe ngebanga labakwa-Israyeli ababuleweko, njengombana ababuleweko bephasi loke bawe ngebanga leBhabheli." 
Jeremiah51:50 Nina abaphunyurhe esabuleni, khambani, ningajami! Khumbulani uSomnini nisenarheni ekude neJerusalema libe semkhumbulwenenu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Nina nithi, ‘Sihlazisiwe, sizizwile iinhlamba nehlazo lembese ubuso bethu lokha abaqhamuki nabangena ngeendaweni ezicwengileko zethempeli lakaSomnini.’" 
Jeremiah51:52 Yeke, qalani isikhathi siyeza lapha ngizakuhlunguphaza khona iinthombe zalo begodu kiyo yoke inarhalo abahlatjwe ngesabula bazakububula.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah51:53 “Ngitjho nanyana iBhabheli lifika emkayini liqinise isiphephelo salo esiphakemeko, abarhayili abavela kimi bazakungena kilo.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Jeremiah51:54 “Itjhada lesililo livela ngeBhabheli, iye, itjhada lokubhujiswa okukhulu enarheni yamaKasidi.”" 
Jeremiah51:55 USomnini uzokurhayila iBhabheli, athulise itjhada lalo elikhulu. Amavili weenkarana zepi zezitha arhaza njengamanzi amanengi; kuzwakala ukuhlokoma kwamezwazo." 
Jeremiah51:56 Umrhayili uthelekela iBhabheli, iye umrhayili ujamelana nalo. Iingorho zalo ziyathunjwa, imisebe yazo iyaphohlozwa ngombana uSomnini unguZimu wokubuyiselela; mbala, nakukubuyiselela, uyabuyiselela." 
Jeremiah51:57 “Ngizakudakisa iinkhulu nabahlakaniphileko balo ababusi, iinduna kanye neengorho zalo ngokunjalo, bazakulalela safuthi bangasavuki.” Kutjho uSomnini oyiKosi, ibizo lakhe elinguMninimandlawoke." 
Jeremiah51:58 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Umthangala obanzi weBhabheli uzakufadalaliswa, amasangwalo aphakemeko athungelelwe ngomlilo. Iye, abantu basebenzela ilize nezizwe iimvuthiso zomlilo, lokho kwaba mtjhikatjhika wazo.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 USeraya umsa kaNeriya omsa kaMarhaseya waya eBhabheli noTsedekhiya ikosi yakwaJuda ngomnyaka wesine wokubusa kwakhe. Gade amphathi weendlela zekosi lokha nayiya eBhabheli. Nje-ke umphorofidi uJoromiya wamnikela umyalo. 
Jeremiah51:60 UJoromiya gade atlole emsongweni owodwa ngayo yoke ihlekelele ebeyizakwehlela iBhabheli, iye, woke amezwi lawo ebekatlolwe ngaphambilini ngeBhabheli." 
Jeremiah51:61 Wathi kuSeraya: “Lokha nawungena eBhabheli, liqalisise bese ufundela phezulu woke amezwi la." 
Jeremiah51:62 Ngemva kwalapho uthi, ‘Somnini, wena ngokwakho ukhulume ngokujamelana nendawo le kobana uzayibhubhisa ukuze kungabi namuntu ngitjho nefuyo ezakuhlala kiyo, ibe marubhi wamlibe.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Nawuqeda ukufunda umsongo lo, ubophelele ilitje kiwo bese uwuphosela ngeYufrathe." 
Jeremiah51:64 Yeke uzakuthi, ‘Ngokunjalo iBhabheli lizakutjhingela lingasavumbuka ngebanga lehlekelele engizalehlisela phezu kwalo.’ ” Amezwi athi “lokho kwaba mtjhikatjhika wazo” bekumamezwi wokugcina kaJoromiya." 
Jeremiah52:1 UTsedekhiya gade aneminyaka ematjhumi amabili nanye lokha nakathoma ukubusa. Wabusa eJerusalema iminyaka elitjhumi nanye. Ibizo lakanina bekunguRhamuthali indodakazi kaJoromiya weLibhina. 
Jeremiah52:2 Wenza ubumbi phambi kwakaSomnini njengoJehoyakhimu. 
Jeremiah52:3 Kwaba ngenca yokusilingeka kwakaSomnini uZimu bona koke lokhu kwenzeke eJerusalema nakwaJuda. Ekugcineni wabathanyela phambi kwakhe. UTsedekhiya wayihlubuka ikosi yeBhabheli. 
Jeremiah52:4 Nje-ke ngomnyaka wethoba wokubusa kwakaTsedekhiya, inyanga yetjhumi nayinamalanga alitjhumi, uNebukadiretsari ikosi yeBhabheli nebutho lakhe loke warhwanta, wavimbezela iJerusalema bewakha iinqabo mazombe nalo." 
Jeremiah52:5 Idorobheli lavinjezelwa bekwaba mnyaka wetjhumi nanye wokubusa kwekosi uTsedekhiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Indlala beyirhagele khulu ngedorobheni kangangobana abantu bendawo gade bangasenalitho elidliwako. Kwathi ngelanga lethoba lenyanga yesine 
Jeremiah52:7 amaKasidi aphundlukela ngedorobheni ngomthangala. Woke amajoni abaleka ebusuku afahla ngesango elihlangana nemithangala emibili eya esivandeni sekosi. Nanyana amaKasidi gade azombeleze idorobho loke, amajoni kanye nekosi abaleka ngendlela yangemrhobeni weJordani." 
Jeremiah52:8 Kodwana ibutho lamaKasidi layilala nje ikosi uTsedekhiya belayifunyana emrhobeni weJordani emrhuleni weJerikho. Woke amajonayo asuswa kiyo aphadlhalajwa. 
Jeremiah52:9 Yona yathunjwa yasiwa ekosini yeBhabheli eRibhila enarheni yeRhamathi, lapha isigwebo sayo sakhutjhwa khona." 
Jeremiah52:10 Lapho eRibhila ikosi yeBhabheli yabulala amadodana kaTsedekhiya phambi kwakhe, godu yabulala nazo zoke iinduna zakwaJuda." 
Jeremiah52:11 Yagobhodlha amehlo kaTsedekhiya, yambopha ngamakhamandela wekoporo, yakhamba naye eBhabheli lapha yafese yamfaka khona ngesikhungweni bekwaba mhlana ahlongakalako." 
Jeremiah52:12 Ngomnyaka wetjhumi nethoba wokubusa kwakaNebukadiretsari ikosi yeBhabheli, lokha inyanga yesihlanu inamalanga alitjhumi, uNebuzaradani umphathi wobuzimba oyinduna yekosi yeBhabheli, weza eJerusalema," 
Jeremiah52:13 wafese wathungelela ithempeli lakaSomnini, isigodlo nezindlu zoke zeJerusalema ngomlilo. Waqothula nezakhiwo zoke eziqakathekileko." 
Jeremiah52:14 Loke ibutho lamaKasidi elalingaphasi komphathi wobuzimba lephula umthangala ozombeleze iJerusalema. 
Jeremiah52:15 Abanye babantu abadududu nalabo abazinikela ekosini yeBhabheli, iinhlabani zamadoda egade zisasele ngedorobheni kanye nabososino, badingiswa nguNebuzaradani umphathi wobuzimba." 
Jeremiah52:16 Watjhiya abanye balabo abadududu benarha bona babe balimi nabatjheji besidiribe. 
Jeremiah52:17 AmaKasidi ephula iinsika zekoporo, iinjamiso zezitja zokuhlambela kanye nebhada ekulu yekoporo okwakugade kusethempelini lakaSomnini, athwala ikoporwelo alisa eBhabheli." 
Jeremiah52:18 Athwala ngitjho neembiza, iintjhefula, iinquntapete, izitja zokunyenyeza, izitjana nakho koke kwekoporo okusetjenziselwa ukulotjha ngethempelini." 
Jeremiah52:19 Umphathi wobuzimba wathatha zoke iinsetjenziswa zegolidembala nezesilivambala, okusankapho, izitja zokutjhisela itjhwalo nezokunyenyeza, iimbiza, ilithi leembani, izitjana kanye neemvubelo." 
Jeremiah52:20 Ikoporo yeensika ezimbili, yebhada ekulu neyeenkunzi ezilitjhumi nambili ebezingaphasi kwebhada leyo, kanye nekoporo yeenjamiso zezitja zokuhlambela uSolomoni azenzela ithempeli lakaSomnini, beyingaphezu kwesilinganiso." 
Jeremiah52:21 Enye nenye isika begade pheze imamitha abunane nesiquntu ukuphakama namamitha pheze abe mahlanu nesiquntu ubundulungu. Beyimrhohlo, inomphetho ongaba mimino emine ububanzi." 
Jeremiah52:22 Phezu kwayo kunepundu yekoporo elimitha nesiquntu ukuphakama, ikghatjiswe yoke mazombe ngemiluko nangamarharinada wekoporo. Isika yesibili beyifana neyokuthoma." 
Jeremiah52:23 Amarharinada ebekabonakala ngemahlangothini wepundu bekamatjhumi alithoba nathandathu. Nasele awoke amarharinada nalawo asemlukweni, gade alikhulu." 
Jeremiah52:24 Umphathi wobuzimba wathumba uSeraya umphristi omkhulu, uZefaniya ongaphasi kwakhe ngesikhundla kanye nabalindi besango abathathu njengeembotjhwa." 
Jeremiah52:25 EJerusalema wathatha isikhulu sesigodlo nabeluleki abalikhomba bekosi ebegade basese ngedorobhenapho, umabhalana womphathibutho ogade abizela abantu bendawo epini kanye namatjhumi asithandathu wabantu bendawo nabo ebegade basese ngedorobheni." 
Jeremiah52:26 UNebuzaradani umphathi wobuzimba wabathatha boke abantwaba wabaletha ekosini yeBhabheli eRibhila. 
Jeremiah52:27 Ikosi yeBhabheli yabamadlha beyababulalela khona eRibhila, enarheni yeRhamathi. Nje-ke uJuda wathunjelwa kude nendawo yekhabo." 
Jeremiah52:28 Lesi sibalo sabantu uNebukadiretsari abasa ekuthunjweni: ngomnyaka wekhomba kwaba maJuda aziinkulungwana ezintathu namatjhumi amabili nantathu," 
Jeremiah52:29 emnyakeni wetjhumi nobunane kaNebukadiretsari, kwaba babantu beJerusalema abamakhulu abunane namatjhumi amathathu nambili;" 
Jeremiah52:30 emnyakenakhe wamatjhumi amabili nantathu, amaJuda amakhulu alikhomba namatjhumi amane nahlanu athathwa nguNebuzaradani umphathi wobuzimba wawasa ekuthunjweni. Kwaba babantu abaziinkulungwana ezine namatjhumi asithandathu sele baboke." 
Jeremiah52:31 Mhla amalanga amatjhumi amabili nahlanu enyangeni yetjhumi nambili womnyaka wamatjhumi amathathu nekhomba wokudingiswa kwakaJehoyakini ikosi yakwaJuda, u-Evili-Merodaki nathoma ukubusa eBhabheli, watjhaphulula uJehoyakini ngesikhungweni." 
Jeremiah52:32 Wakhuluma kuhle naye bewamnikela nesikhundla esihloniphekileko esingaphezu kwaleso samakhosi amanye ebegade anaye eBhabheli. 
Jeremiah52:33 Yeke uJehoyakini akhange asembatha izambatho zangesikhungweni. Soke isikhathi sokuphila kwakhe wagoma njalo etafuleni lekosi yeBhabheli. 
Jeremiah52:34 Imihla ngemihla ikosi yapha uJehoyakini isibonelelo qobe asaphila, iye, bekwaba kumhla ahlongakalako." 
Lamentations1:1 Maye, linesizungu idorobho, elalihlala liphithizela abantu! Awu, sese lifana nomhlolokazi, yena ebegade amkhulu phakathi kwezizwe! Gade liyindlovukazi phakathi kweemfunda, kwanjesi sele lisisembamgodi." 
Lamentations1:2 Ebusuku likhihla isililo, iinyembezi zehle emihlathinalo. Phakathi kwazo zoke iinthandwa zalo, asikho nesisodwa esiliduduzako. Boke abangani balo balirhwalile, baphenduke izitha zalo." 
Lamentations1:3 UJuda uye ekuthunjweni ngeenhlungu nangokusebenza nzima. Gadesi uhlala hlangana nezizwe, angafunyani indawo yokuphumula; boke abamgijimisako bamthelekela aseensizini zakhe." 
Lamentations1:4 Iindlela eziya eZiyoni ziyalila ngombana akakho oza eminyanyeni; woke amasangwalo akanabantu, abaphristi balo bayaquma, amatlawanalo ayabubula, nalo linobumunyu." 
Lamentations1:5 Izitha zalo ziyihloko amanabalo ayaphumelela ngombana uSomnini ulihlunguphazile ngeemphambeko zalo ezinenginengi. Abantwabalo baye ekuthunjweni baragwa sisitha. 
Lamentations1:6 Boke ubukhosi balo busukile endodakazini yeZiyoni. Amakhosanalo afana neenhlangumataka ezingafunyani amadlelo zigijima zinganamandla phambi kwabazigijimisako. 
Lamentations1:7 Emihleni yokuhlunguphazwa nokundinda kwalo, iJerusalema likhumbula zoke izinto ezihle ebekungezalo emihleni yakade. Lokha abantu balo nabawela ezandleni zezitha, azange kwaba khona olisizako, izitha zaliqala zahleka ukuwa kwalo." 
Lamentations1:8 IJerusalema lone khulu, nje-ke, sese liphenduke isihlekiso. Boke ebebalihlonipha sele balidelela ngombana balibonele. Nalo ngokwalo liyaquma, lifulathele." 
Lamentations1:9 Ukusilaphala kwalo bekuseemvunulweni zalo, lokha nalonako azange licabange ngekusasa lalo. Ukuwa kwalo bekuphazamisa khulu ngombana belinganamduduzi. Lathi: “Maye Somnini, akhe uqale iinhlungu zami ngombana isitha singihlulile!”" 
Lamentations1:10 Isitha selulele isandla saso phezu kwawo woke amagugwalo begodu libone izizwe zizingenela endawenalo ecwengileko, wena Somnini owayala kobana zingangeni ehlanganwenakho." 
Lamentations1:11 Boke abantu balo bayabubula nabafunana nesikwa, banana amagugwabo ngokugoma ukuze bavuselele umphefumulo. Qala Somnini, ubone kobana angisenabubhadekelo." 
Lamentations1:12 Noke nina enidlula ngendlela, akutjho litho kini lokhu na? Qalani nibone nakube kunesizi elifana nelameli, engapharwa ngalo, iye, uSomnini angihlunguphaza ngalo ngelanga letukuthelwakhe evuthako." 
Lamentations1:13 Wathumela umlilo uvela phezulu, wawehlisela emathanjenami, wendlalela iinyawo zami inede, wangibuyisela emuva. Wangitjhiya nginganabuyo, imini yoke ngibuthakathaka." 
Lamentations1:14 Wangibophelela ijogi leemphambeko zami, iye, ngesandla sakhe bezibotjhelelwe ndawonye. Zabekwa entanyenami ngaphelelwa mamandla. USomandla wanginikela kilabo engingeze ngajamelana nabo." 
Lamentations1:15 USomandla ulahle abosaziwako bami ngaphakathi kwami; wamemezela isikhathi sokuvuna phezu kwami kobana abhule amasokanami. USomandla ugadange itlawu lakwaJuda, njengebutlhodlhelweni bewayini." 
Lamentations1:16 Ngiyalila ngezintwezi, ilihlo, iye, ilihlo lami liwuluka iinyembezi; mbala, umduduzi ukude nami, okunguye ongavuselela umphefumulo. Abantwabami abanabuyo ngombana isitha sihlulile." 
Lamentations1:17 IZiyoni likhongozele, kodwana alinamduduzi. USomnini uyale ngoJakopo kobana abamzombileko babe zizitha; iJerusalema sele lisinyenyiso phakathi kwabo." 
Lamentations1:18 USomnini ulungile ngombana ngihlubuke ilizwi. Lalelani noke nina zizwe, niyelele isizi lami: Amatlawu namasokanami asiwe ekuthunjweni." 
Lamentations1:19 Ngabiza iinthandwa zami kodwana zona zangihlamuka. Abaphristi nabaphathi bami babhubhela ngedorobheni nabasazifunela kokugoma kobana bavuselele umphefumulwabo. 
Lamentations1:20 Qala Somnini, ngisesizini! Isisu sami siyasika nehliziyo ngaphakathi kwami iwurubajekile ngombana ngihlubuke khulu. Endledlaneni isabula ingilobisele abantwana, ngekumbeni kunokufa kwaphela!" 
Lamentations1:21 Somnini, yizwa ukububula kwami ngombana anginamduduzi. Zoke izitha zami zezwa ngamatshwenyekwami, zajabula kobana nguwe owangehlisela wona. Ilanga owalimemezelako ulilethile. Nazo azibe njengami." 
Lamentations1:22 Akuthi zoke izenzo zazo ezimbi zibe phambi kwakho nazo uzenze owasenza kimi ngebanga lazo zoke iimphambeko zami. Mbala, ukububula kwami kukhulu nehliziywami idanile." 
Lamentations2:1 Maye etukuthelwenakhe uSomandla uyibhibeze kangangani indodakazi yeZiyoni! Kuthe ubuphaziphazi bakwa-Israyeli busemkayini, wabuphosela phasi. Azange akhumbule isenabelo seenyawo zakhe ngelanga letukuthelwakhe." 
Lamentations2:2 USomandla ugomojele woke amadlelo kaJakopo ngaphandle kwesirhawu; ngetukuthelwakhe ugirize zoke iimphephelo zendodakazi yakwaJuda. Umadlhe phasi bewasilaphaza umbuso neenkhulu zawo. 
Lamentations2:3 Ngetukuthelo evuthako uqunte zoke iimpondo zaka-Israyeli. Ususe isidla sakhe lokha isitha nasizako. Uvuthe njengamalangabi kwaJakopo, waqothula yoke indawo." 
Lamentations2:4 Ucuphe umsebakhe njengesitha, ngesidla sakhe wawuthiya njengenaba. Ubulele koke okukara amehlo ngetendeni lendodakazi yeZiyoni; Uthulule ilaka lakhe njengomlilo." 
Lamentations2:5 USomandla ube njengesitha, ugomojele u-Israyeli! Iye, ugomojele yoke imibhotjhongo yeJerusalema, wonakalisa amadorobho anemithangala kwa-Israyeli. Wandisa ukulila nokuzila endodakazini yakwaJuda." 
Lamentations2:6 Utlhifirije ithempeli lakhe inga sidalasi esivandeni; watjhabalalisa indawakhe yomnyanya. USomnini uphelise eZiyoni umnyanya neSabatha. Ngokufutheka kwetukuthelwakhe wadela ikosi nomphristi. 
Lamentations2:7 USomandla unyefule i-aldari lakhe, walahla ikumbakhe ecwengileko. Unikele imithangala yeemphephelo zeJerusalema ezandleni zesitha. Kwahlokonywa ngethempelini lakaSomnini njengamhla womnyanya." 
Lamentations2:8 USomnini wazimisela ukubhuruza umthangala wendodakazi yeZiyoni: Welula umuda, azange agodle isandla sakhe ekutjhabalaliseni, wabanga bonyana umbundu nomthangala kuzile, kwaphela amandla ndawonye." 
Lamentations2:9 Amasango weJerusalema acwila equlwanini, uSomnini watjhabalalisa bewephula iinqabo zalo. Ikosi namakhosanalo aphakathi kwezizwe, akusenamthetho wabaphristi, ngitjho nabaphorofidi bakhona abasafunyani imibono kuSomnini." 
Lamentations2:10 Abaphathi bendodakazi yeZiyoni bahlezi equlwanini bathulile, bazithele ngethuli eenhloko bembatha iinzilo. Amatlawu weJerusalema ahlome iinhloko phasi." 
Lamentations2:11 Amehlwami afiphala ngeenyembezi, isisu sami siyasika, inyongwami ichithekela equlwanini ngebanga lokuphodlheka kwabantu bami: Amasana nabantwana baphela amandla, eendledlaneni zedorobho." 
Lamentations2:12 Balilela abonina, bathi: “Siphi isikwa newayini na?” Baphela amandla njengabahlatjwe ngesabula eendledlaneni zedorobho; bakhuphela imiphefumulwabo eemfubeni zabonina." 
Lamentations2:13 Ngizakufanisa nasiphi isibonelo, ngikulinganise nani, wena ndodakazi yeJerusalema na? Ngizakufanisa nani ukuze ngikududuze wena tlawu leZiyoni na? Ngambala ukuphodlheka kwakho kubanzi njengelwandle. Ngubani ongakwelapha na?" 
Lamentations2:14 Abaphorofidi bakho bakuvezele ikohliso nelize, azange bembule icala lakho kobana batjhugulule ubujamo bakho. Kunalokho bakulethele imilayezo eyikohliso nedurhisako." 
Lamentations2:15 Boke abadlula ngendlela bakuthintithela izandla. Bayakukhuza bebakuthintithele iinhloko wena ndodakazi yeJerusalema, bathi: “Ingabe leli lidorobho ebelibizwa bonyana ngunobuhle, ithabo lephasi loke na?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Zoke izitha zakho zikhuluma khulu ngawe. Ziyababaza, zihline, zirhuwelele zithi: “Siyirhiribidele! Ngambala leli lilanga ebesililindile, sesifikile kilo, sekunjalo-ke!”" 
Lamentations2:17 USomnini wenze akuhlosileko, uphumelelise ilizwi lakhe njengombana alijamisa kade. Ugirizile ngaphandle kwesirhawu; wajabulisa isitha ngawe, waphakamisa iphondo lamanabakho." 
Lamentations2:18 Iinhliziyo zabantwana zililela uSomandla. Wena mthangala wendodakazi yeZiyoni wulula iinyembezi, zehle njengomlanjana ubusuku nemini! Ungaziphi ukuphumula, nethoro yelihlo lakho ingaledlhi." 
Lamentations2:19 Vuka urhahlawule ebusuku, ekuthomeni kwesikhathi sabalindi! Thulula ihliziywakho njengamanzi, phambi kobukhona bakaSomandla! Phakamisela izandla zakho kuye ngebanga lepilo yabantwabakho, abatsirimezwa yindlala emajikeni wazo zoke iindledlana." 
Lamentations2:20 Awu, Somnini, akhe uqale bewuyelele! Ukwenze kubani godu lokhu na? Kumele abafazi badle iinthelo zabo, abantwana ababasingathileko na? Kumele abaphristi nabaphorofidi babulawe endaweni ecwengileko kaSomandla na?" 
Lamentations2:21 Abadala nabatjha balele phasi eendledlaneni, amatlawu namasokanami abulewe ngesabula. Wena wawabulala ngelanga letukuthelwakho, wawarhayila ngaphandle kwesirhawu." 
Lamentations2:22 Umeme abangisahlelako mahlangothi woke kwanga lilanga lomnyanya. Ngelanga letukuthelo kaSomnini akakho namunye owaphunyurha namkha wasinda. Labo engibasingathileko bengabakhulisa, isitha sami sibaqedile." 
Lamentations3:1 Ngimumuntu owazi ubuhlungu beswazi letukuthelo kaSomnini. 
Lamentations3:2 Ungiqotjhile bewangikhambisa ebumnyameni obunganamkhanyo. 
Lamentations3:3 Ngambala, isandla sakhe singiphendukele kanenginengi, imini yoke." 
Lamentations3:4 Ukhehlise isikhumba nenyamami, wafahlaza amathambami." 
Lamentations3:5 Ungivimbezele ngeenqabo, wangizombeleza ngobuthi nangobudisi." 
Lamentations3:6 Ungihlalise eendaweni ezimnyama njengalabo abafa kade. 
Lamentations3:7 Ungibiyele ngeboda ukuze ngingabaleki; wenza amakhamandelami aba budisi. 
Lamentations3:8 Ngitjho nanyana ngirhuwelela ngifuna isizo, uvalela umthandazwami ngaphandle." 
Lamentations3:9 Uqabe iindlela zami ngamatje abaziweko, wasonganisa imizilami." 
Lamentations3:10 Ulibhere elinanabelako, iye, ibhubezi elibadaleleko." 
Lamentations3:11 Uvale iindlela zami, wangidabula; wangenza ihlekelele." 
Lamentations3:12 Wacupha umsebakhe, wangenza isinenjwa semisubelakhe." 
Lamentations3:13 Wahlaba indenami ngemisubela engemgodlenakhe. 
Lamentations3:14 Ngaba sihlekiso sabo boke abantu bekhethu, iye, ingomabo yesiphoqo imini yoke." 
Lamentations3:15 Wangifunza umhlonyani wangiseza isibharha. 
Lamentations3:16 Wenza amazinywami aququda igagadu, wangibhudabhuda emlotheni." 
Lamentations3:17 Umphefumulwami awunakuthula nokuhle angisakwazi. 
Lamentations3:18 Yeke ngathi: “Idumo lami liphelile; iye, ebengilirhuluphele kuSomnini.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Somnini, khumbula isizi nokuzula kwami, iye, isibharha nobuthi." 
Lamentations3:20 Umphefumulwami uhlala ukukhumbula lokhu nommoyami uphasi. 
Lamentations3:21 Kodwana nakhu engizakubeka engqondweni ngalokho nginerhuluphelo: 
Lamentations3:22 Kungebanga lokwethembeka kwakaSomnini kobana singabhujiswa, iye, kungenca yesirhawu sakhe esingapheliko." 
Lamentations3:23 Siba sitjha njalo ekuseni; mbala, bukhulu ubuqotho bakhe." 
Lamentations3:24 Umphefumulwami uthi: “USomnini usisabelo sami, yeke ngizakurhuluphela kuye.”" 
Lamentations3:25 USomnini ulungile kilabo abathembela kuye, iye, kiloyo omfunako." 
Lamentations3:26 Ulungile uSomnini, nje-ke, rhuluphela ngokuthula isindiswakhe." 
Lamentations3:27 Iye, ulungile emuntwini lokha nathwala ijogi asesemutjha." 
Lamentations3:28 Akahlale yedwa athule, ngombana uSomnini umthwese lona." 
Lamentations3:29 Akawe ngobuso phasi, mhlamunye kunethemba lapho." 
Lamentations3:30 Akanikele umhlathakhe kiloyo omwakalako, abe anele ngehlazo." 
Lamentations3:31 Ngambala, uSomandla akalahleli safuthi." 
Lamentations3:32 Nanyana ahlunguphaza, uzakuba nesirhawu ukuya ngokwethembeka kwakhe okukhulu" 
Lamentations3:33 ngombana akuveli ehliziywenakhe ukugandelela nokuhlunguphaza abantu. 
Lamentations3:34 Abantu bathi: “Isitha sigadangele ngaphasi kweenyawo zaso zoke iimbotjhwa zenarha. 
Lamentations3:35 Siphambanisa amalungelo wobuntu ngaphambi kongoPhezulu; 
Lamentations3:36 simdlelezela ilungelo lomthetho. Kodwana uSomandla akakuboni lokho.” 
Lamentations3:37 Ngubani oyale ukwenzeka kwehlekelele? Lokho azange kuvele emlonyeni kaSomandla. 
Lamentations3:38 Emlonyeni wongoPhezulu akuveli okumbi, kodwana okuhle kodwa." 
Lamentations3:39 Kubayini umuntu ophilako anghonghoyila ngomphumela wezono zakhe na? 
Lamentations3:40 Asihloleni iindlela zethu sizizizinye, sibuyeleni kuSomnini." 
Lamentations3:41 Asiphakamiseleni iinhliziyo nezandla zethu kuZimu osezulwini, sithi:" 
Lamentations3:42 “Ngithi esiphambukileko besahlubuka begodu wena azange ukhohlwe. 
Lamentations3:43 “Uzembese ngetukuthelo bewasigijmisa, warhayila ngaphandle kwesirhawu." 
Lamentations3:44 Uzembese ngelifu kobana ungafikelelwa mthandazo. 
Lamentations3:45 Usenze amanyela neenzibi hlangana nezizwe. 
Lamentations3:46 “Zoke izitha zethu zikhulume khulu ngathi. 
Lamentations3:47 Isabelo sethu kukwesaba nethunzi elimnyama, ukubhujiswa nokutjhabalaliswa.”" 
Lamentations3:48 Amehlwami awuluka imilanjana yamanzi ngebanga lokuphodlheka kwabantu bami. 
Lamentations3:49 Amehlwami azakugeleza mlibe, iye, angaqedi" 
Lamentations3:50 kufikela lapha uSomnini aqala khona phasi, abone asezulwini." 
Lamentations3:51 Engikubonako kungilethela isizi ngebanga lawo woke amadodakazi wedorobho lekhethu. 
Lamentations3:52 Izitha zami zangizuma njengenyoni, ngaphandle kwesizathu." 
Lamentations3:53 Zaqeda ipilwami ngemthathamanzini: Zangiphosa ngamatje; 
Lamentations3:54 amanzi angigubuzesa, ngadlumbana bona kuphelile ngami!" 
Lamentations3:55 Ngabiza ibizo lakho wena Somnini, ngisekuzikeni komphathamanzi;" 
Lamentations3:56 wezwa isililo sami lokha nangithi: “Ungavali indlebakho ngokurhitjhwa kwami nalokha ngifuna isizo.” 
Lamentations3:57 Nangikubizako begade useduze nami, wathi kimi: “Ungesabi.”" 
Lamentations3:58 Somandla, wajamela indabami lokha umphefumulwami usengozini, wahlenga ipilwami." 
Lamentations3:59 Somnini, ubonile ukugandelelwa kwami, nje-ke, jamela indabami!" 
Lamentations3:60 Ubonile koke ukuzibuyiselela kwabo, woke amano abanawo ngami." 
Lamentations3:61 Somnini, uzizwile iinhlamba zabo, woke amano wabo ngami," 
Lamentations3:62 ukuhlebeza nokuphoqa kwabajamelani bami imini yoke. 
Lamentations3:63 Yelela koke abakwenzako; sengiyingomabo yesiphoqo. 
Lamentations3:64 Bavuze njengokubafaneleko, Somnini, ngokuya ngemisebenzi yezandla zabo." 
Lamentations3:65 Banikele ihliziyo enesizi, amanikelelakho abe phezu kwabo!" 
Lamentations3:66 Bagijimise ngetukuthelo, ubabhubhise ngaphasi kwamazulwakho, Somnini." 
Lamentations4:1 Maye, igolide elidarhileko lifiphele, iye, igolidembala! Amatje acwengileko arhatjhekile emajikeni wazo zoke iindledlana." 
Lamentations4:2 Amadodana weZiyoni aligugu ebegade alinganiswa negolidembala, gadesi sele afaniswa nemijeka okumsebenzi wezandla zombumbi!" 
Lamentations4:3 Ngitjho neempungutjha ziyehlisa kobana zimunyise imindlwanazo, kodwana amadodakazi wekhethu akanasirhawu njengeenciliba erhalawumbeni." 
Lamentations4:4 Ngebanga lokoma amalimu wamasana anamathela kurhwalabha; abantwana bakhombela isikwa kodwana akunamuntu obahlephulelako. 
Lamentations4:5 Labo abakhe bagoma iinkhanakhana bagelagela eendledlaneni batlhaphile. Iye, labo ebebembatha ezibubende gadesi baphendla ezaleni." 
Lamentations4:6 Isibetho secala labantu bami, sikhulu kunesesono seSodoma eyaketulwa ngomzuzwana ngaphandle kwesandla somuntu." 
Lamentations4:7 Amakhosana wakhona gade adarhe ukwedlula iliqhwa, amhlophe ukwedlula ibisi, imizimbawo ikhanya ukwedlula amarubi, ukuvela kwawo kunjengamasafaya." 
Lamentations4:8 Kodwana kwanjesi sese anzima kunomsizi, akasafaniseki eendledlaneni. Isikhumba sawo sinamathele emathanjenawo, sirhwatjhe inga sigodo." 
Lamentations4:9 Abahlatjwe ngesabula bangcono khulu kunababulawa yindlala; baqedwe liphango, baphela amandla ngokuswela umkhiqizo wemasimini." 
Lamentations4:10 Izandla zabafazi abanesirhawu zapheka abantwababo; ababa kukudla kwabo lokha abantu bami nabaphodlhekako. 
Lamentations4:11 USomnini uphelelise itukuthelwakhe, uthulule ilaka lakhe elivuthako: Uvuthise umlilo eZiyoni oqothule iinsekelo zalo." 
Lamentations4:12 Amakhosi, ngitjho nabo boke abahlali bephasi, azange bakholwe kobana izitha namanaba angangena emasangweni weJerusalema." 
Lamentations4:13 Kwenzeka ngebanga lezono zabaphorofidi balo namacala wabaphristi balo, abathulula iingazi zabalungileko ngaphakathi kwalo." 
Lamentations4:14 Nje-ke bazulazula eendledlaneni, njengabantu abangaboniko. Basilaphazwe ziingazi kangangobana akakho othinta ingubabo." 
Lamentations4:15 “Sukani! Nisilaphele!” Iye, abantu bathi kibo: “Sukani! Sukani! Ningasithinti!” Nje-ke basuka, bazulazula. Hlangana nezizwe abantu bathi: “Bangasakhonza lapha!”" 
Lamentations4:16 USomnini ngokwakhe ubahlakazile, akasazobatjheja. Abantu abasahloniphi abaphristi begodu abasathandi abaphathi." 
Lamentations4:17 Amehlwethu afiphele ngokurhuluphela isizo, kodwana kulilize lakolize. Siseenthaleni zethu saqala isizwe esingasiza, kodwana azange sibe khona esingasindisa." 
Lamentations4:18 Isitha sasihlala eenthendeni besabhalelwa kukhamba eendledlaneni zethu. Isiphetho sethu besele sitjhidele namalangethu sele abaliwe, iye, isiphetho sethu sifikile." 
Lamentations4:19 Abasigijimisako bebanebelo kunamakhozi emkayini, basilandelela basikhweza iintaba, basilalela erhalawumbeni." 
Lamentations4:20 Ozesiweko kaSomnini, okuphila kwethu, wabanjwa emgodini wezifu zabo; iye, esadlumbana ngaye bona emthunzinakhe sizakuhlala hlangana nezizwe." 
Lamentations4:21 Jekezela uthabe ndodakazi ye-Edomu; wena ohlala enarheni ye-Utsi. Kodwana nakuwe ikapho izakufika; uzakudakwa, uzihlubulise." 
Lamentations4:22 Ndodakazi yeZiyoni, isibetho secala lakho siphelele; uSomnini akasazokwembula. Kodwana wena ndodakazi ye-Edomu, uSomnini uzakuhlunguphaza ngecala lakho, embule isono sakho." 
Lamentations5:1 Khumbula Somnini, lokho okwenzeke kithi, qala, uyelele ihlazo lethu." 
Lamentations5:2 Ilifa lethu linikelwe amaphandle, amakhayethu aphiwa imiqhamuka." 
Lamentations5:3 Sese siziintandani, asinabobaba, abomma babahlolokazi." 
Lamentations5:4 Sisela amanzethu ngemali, iinkuni zethu sezitholakala ngentengo." 
Lamentations5:5 Abasigijimisako basihlezi entanyeni sidiniwe begodu asinakuphumula. 
Lamentations5:6 EGibhide sikhongozele, iye, e-Asiriya kobana sisuthiswe ngesikwa." 
Lamentations5:7 Abobaba abonako abasekho, nje-ke thina sibhesele icala labo." 
Lamentations5:8 Amakhoboka abusa phezu kwethu begodu akunamuntu ongasitjhaphulula ezandleni zawo. 
Lamentations5:9 Sifunyana isikwa sethu ngokubeka ubuphilo bethu engozini ngebanga lesabula eserhalawumbeni. 
Lamentations5:10 Isikhumba sethu sitjhisa njenge-ondo ngebanga lokurhwaya kwendlala. 
Lamentations5:11 Abafazi bagagadlhelwe eZiyoni namatlawu emizini yakwaJuda. 
Lamentations5:12 Amakhosana anekwe ngezandla zawo; ukubakhona kwabaphathi akusatjho litho. 
Lamentations5:13 Amasokana agaya esigayweni abesana batherezeliswa yinyanda yeenkuni. 
Lamentations5:14 Abaphathi basukile ebandla, amasokana akasalilisi iinara." 
Lamentations5:15 Ithabo liphelile eenhliziyweni zethu; igido lethu liphenduke isililo. 
Lamentations5:16 Isihlohlo siwile eenhloko zethu. Maye thina ngombana sonile! 
Lamentations5:17 Ngebanga lalokho, iinhliziyo zethu zidanile, ngebanga lezintwezi, amehlwethu afiphele" 
Lamentations5:18 ngentaba yeZiyoni esele ingasenamuntu; iimpungutjha sele zitanasa lapho! 
Lamentations5:19 Kodwana wena, Somnini, ubusa nini nanini, isihlalo sakho sobukhosi ngeseenzukulwana ngeenzukulwana." 
Lamentations5:20 Kubayini usikhohlwa mlibe na? Kubayini usilahle isikhathi eside kangaka na? 
Lamentations5:21 Yewusibuyisele kuwe ukuze sibuye; vuselela imihlethu njengekadeni. 
Lamentations5:22 Kghani usilahlele safuthi na? Usithukuthelele ngaphezu kokwenza na? 
Ezekiel1:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wamatjhumi amathathu, inyanga yesine inamalanga amahlanu, ngangiphakathi kwabathunjwa emlanjeni iKebari, izulu lavuleka ngabona imibono kaZimu." 
Ezekiel1:2 Ngelanga lesihlanu lenyanga, emnyakeni wesihlanu wokuthunjwa kwekosi uJehoyakini," 
Ezekiel1:3 ilizwi lakaSomnini mbala leza kimi, mina mphristi uHezekiyeli umsa kaBhuzi, enarheni yamaKasidi emlanjeni iKebari. Isandla sakaSomnini saba phezu kwami lapho." 
Ezekiel1:4 Kwathi ngisaqalile njalo, kwavela isiwuruwuru ngetlhagwini. Bekulilifu elikhulu elinomlilo osoloko ubaneka njalo; mazombe kwalo bekunobuphaziphazi. Emlilweni lowo bekunento ephazima sasimbi." 
Ezekiel1:5 Phakathi komlilo bekunesibumbeko seemphili ezine. Umfanekiso wazo bewungalendlela: Zinesibumbeko somuntu. 
Ezekiel1:6 Esinye nesinye besinobuso obune neempiko ezine. 
Ezekiel1:7 Imilenzazo eengogoriyaneni beyithabulukile, iinyawo zazo zifana nezeqatha lekonyana, ziphazima njengekoporo emanyako." 
Ezekiel1:8 Emahlangothinazo amanye ngaphasi kwamaphikwazo bezinezandla zomuntu. Zozine bezinobuso neempiko ebezingalendlela: 
Ezekiel1:9 Iimpiko zazo bezithintene elinye kwelinye. Elinye nelinye lanqomba ngqo laya phambili; ekukhambeni kwazo belingajiki. 
Ezekiel1:10 Isibumbeko sobuso bazo besibubuso bomuntu ngaphambili, ngesidleni zinobuso bebhubezi, ngesinceleni zinobuso bekunzi begodu zozine njalo bezinobuso bekhozi ngemuva;" 
Ezekiel1:11 iye, bebunjalo-ke ubuso bazo. Iimpiko zazo bezithabalalele phezulu. Isiphili esinye nesinye besineempiko ezimbili ezithinta iimpiko zesinye, kuthi ezinye ezimbili zivale umzimbazo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Esinye nesinye besikhamba siyaphambili; beziya ngapha kuya khona ummoya; ekukhambeni kwazo bezingajiki. 
Ezekiel1:13 Isibumbeko seemphili godu besinje: Umfanekiso wazo bewunjengamalahle avuthako, iye, bewunjengeenhlothi ezivuthako. Hlangana neemphilapho bekumekeza umlilo. Umlilo lowo bewunomkhanyo begodu phakathi kwawo kwaphuma imibani." 
Ezekiel1:14 Iimphili lezo zehla zenyuka njengombani omekezako. 
Ezekiel1:15 Kwathi ngisaqale iimphili lezo, ngabona ivili elilodwa phasi ngakelinye nelinye ihlangothi kilawo amane wesiphili." 
Ezekiel1:16 Umfanekiso wamavili nokwakheka kwawo bekunje: Bekaphazima njengebherili. Amavili womane bekanesibumbeko esifanako. Ukwakheka kwawo bekungathi kunevili ngaphakathi kwelinye. 
Ezekiel1:17 Nakakhambako bekakwazi ukuya emahlangothini amane, ngaphandle kokujika." 
Ezekiel1:18 Umphetho wamavili bewumkhulu wesabeka begodu yomine imiphetho leyo beyigcwele amehlo mazombe. 
Ezekiel1:19 Lokha iimphili nazikhambako, amavili bekakhamba emaqadi kwazo. Kuthi lokha iimphili nazisikima phasi namavili aphakame." 
Ezekiel1:20 Lapho ummoya bewuya ngakhona, beziya kanye namavili ngemaqadi kwazo ngombana ummoya weemphili bewulawula amavili." 
Ezekiel1:21 Lokha iimphili nazikhambako namavili bekakhamba; nazijamako namavili bekajama. Lokha iimphili nazisikimako namavili bekaphakama nazo; iye, ummoya weemphili bewulawula amavili." 
Ezekiel1:22 Ngehla kweenhloko zeemphili bekunento efana nesigubuzeso, ikhanya njengesiboniboni esiphandlako. Beyindlaleke ngehla kweenhloko zazo." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ngaphasi kwesigubuzeso iimphili beziphurululele iimpiko zazo phezulu kobana iimpikwezo zithintane. Esinye nesinye isiphili besineempiko ezimbili ezivale umzimbaso. 
Ezekiel1:24 Lokha nazikhambako ngezwa itjhada leempiko elifana namanzi amanengi, iye, njengomdumo woSabekako nanjengomkhosi webutho. Nazijamako zehlisa iimpiko zazo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Nje-ke kwathi iimphili lezo nazijamako, zehlisa iimpiko zazo, kwaba nelizwi elivela ngaphezu kwesigubuzeso ebesingehla kweenhloko zazo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Nje-ke ngaphezu kwesigubuzeso ebesingehla kweenhloko zazo bekunomfanekiso wesafaya onesibumbeko sesihlalo sobukhosi. Ngaphezu kwesibumbeko sesihlalo sobukhoseso bekunesibumbeko esinomfanekiso womuntu. 
Ezekiel1:27 Umfanekiso lowo ngawubona uphazima sasimbi: Ukusuka edinini ukuya ehloko yomfanekiso bekumanyazela njengesimbi enga inomlilo ngaphakathi kwayo; ngenzasi kwedini ngabona kungathi mlilo onemisebe. 
Ezekiel1:28 Njengezungu leKosi ngelanga lezulu, beyinjalo koke iphazimulo mazombe. Lokhu bekukubonakala kwephazimulo kaSomnini. Lokha nangibona lokho, ngawa ngobuso ngezwa ilizwi likhuluma." 
Ezekiel2:1 Ilizwi lathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, sikima ujame ngeenyawo zakho, mina ngizokukhuluma nawe.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Kuthe lokha nalikhuluma nami ummoya wangena kimi wangenza ngajama ngeenyawo. Nje-ke ngalizwa likhuluma nami. 
Ezekiel2:3 Lathi: “Ndodana yomuntu, ngikuthuma kuma-Israyeli, isizwe esihlubukako nesele singihlubukile. Wona naboyisemkhulu baphambukile kimi bekube kunamhlanje." 
Ezekiel2:4 Basizukulwana esinentanyana nesinekani, nokho ngikuthumela kiwo. Nje-ke ufese uthi kiwo, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla.’" 
Ezekiel2:5 Ngitjho nanyana ayalalela namkha ayakhunyalala ngombana vele ayindlu ehlubukako, azakwazi nokho bonyana bekukhona umphorofidi phakathi kwawo." 
Ezekiel2:6 Nje-ke wena ndodana yomuntu, ungawesabi ama-Israyeli begodu namezwawo ungawesabi. Ngitjho nanyana uzombelezwe mahlabahlaba nameva, iye, uphila phakathi kwabofezela, amezwawo ungawesabi begodu ungethuswa mamehlwawo wokuhlubuka ngombana vele ayindlu ehlubukako." 
Ezekiel2:7 Wena uzakukhuluma amezwami kibo ngitjho nanyana bayezwa namkha bayakhunyalala ngombana bayindlu ehlubukako. 
Ezekiel2:8 Kodwana wena ndodana yomuntu, yizwa lokho engikutjho kuwe; unganghanghabali njengendlu ehlubukako le. Khamisa, udle lokho engikunikela khona.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Nje-ke ngaqala, ngabona isandla esilulelwe kimi, ngaphakathi kwaso kunomsongo otloliweko." 
Ezekiel2:10 Sawendlala phambi kwami. Wona bewutlowe ngaphambili nangemuva; utlolwe amezwi wesililo, wokuquma nokububula." 
Ezekiel3:1 Godu ilizwi lathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, yidla lokho okuphambi kwakho; yidla umsongo lo bese uyakhamba uyokukhuluma endlini ka-Israyeli.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Nje-ke ngavula umlomami uSomnini wangidlisa umsongo. 
Ezekiel3:3 Wathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, yidla umsongo engikunikela wona lo ugcwalise isisu sakho ngawo.” Yeke ngawudla, ngawizwa ngemlonyenami unandipha njengeliju leenyosi." 
Ezekiel3:4 Wathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, khamba uye endlini yakwa-Israyeli ufese ukhulume kiyo amezwami." 
Ezekiel3:5 Awuthunyelwa ebantwini abanekulumo elikhuni nelimi elingazwakaliko, kodwana endlini ka-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel3:6 Akusibo abantu abanengi nesizwe esinekulumo elikhuni nelimi elingazwakaliko, namezwabo ongeze wawezwisisa. Mbala, nakube ngikuthumele kibo, bona bazakuzwisisa." 
Ezekiel3:7 Kodwana indlu yakwa-Israyeli angekhe yakulalela ngebanga lokobana ayikazimiseli ukungilalela. Ngalokho, yoke indlu yakwa-Israyeli ineempandla eziqinileko neenhliziyo ezilikhuni." 
Ezekiel3:8 Qala-ke, ngenze ubuso bakho baqina njengobuso babo nepandlakho yaqina njengeempandla zabo." 
Ezekiel3:9 Ipandlakho ngiyenze yaba njengedayimani, iye, iqine ukudlula ilitje lomlilo. Ungabesabi namkha umangale ngokuqala kwabo ngombana vele bayindlu ehlubukako.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Godu wathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, woke amezwi engizawakhuluma kuwe, amukele ngehliziyo uwalalele ngendlebe." 
Ezekiel3:11 Nje-ke khamba uye kubathunjwa ufese uthi, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla’; yitjho njalo nanyana bayalalela namkha bayakhunyalala.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Ummoya wangiguga, ngezwa ngemva kwami umdumo wokuraramba okukhulu lokha nakuphakama iphazimulo kaSomnini endawenayo." 
Ezekiel3:13 Bekulitjhada lokuthintana kweempiko zeemphili kanye nomdumo wamavili asemaqadi kwazo; iye, bekumdumo wokuraramba okukhulu." 
Ezekiel3:14 Ummoya wangiguga wangithwala wangisusa lapho. Ngakhamba ngimunyu ekufuthekeni kommoyami. Isandla sakaSomnini saba nzima phezu kwami. 
Ezekiel3:15 Ngeza eTele-Abibi, ebathunjweni ebegade bahlala ngemlanjeni iKebari. Ngahlala lapho phakathi kwabo; ngangimangele amalanga alikhomba." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ekupheleni kwamalanga alikhomba, ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kimi lathi:" 
Ezekiel3:17 “Ndodana yomuntu, ngikubeka bona ube mlindi wendlu yakwa-Israyeli. Ngesikhathi soke lokha nawuzwa ilizwi emlonyenami, ngiyelelisela yona." 
Ezekiel3:18 Lokha nangithi esikhohlakalini, ‘Uzakufa nokufa’ bese wena ungasiyelelisi, iye, ungakhulumi naso kobana usiyelelise ngobukhohlakali baso ukuze usindise ipilwaso, isikhohlakaleso sizakufa ngebanga lecala laso; kodwana iingazi zaso ngizazibiza esandleni sakho." 
Ezekiel3:19 Kodwana wena nakube uyelelisa isikhohlakali bese singaphenduki ebukhohlakalini baso, sona sizakufa ngebanga lecala laso, wena-ke uzabe usindise ipilwakho." 
Ezekiel3:20 Godu nakube olungileko ujika ekulungeni kwakhe enze okumbi bese ngibeka isiliyo phambi kwakhe, yena uzakufa. Ngebanga lokobana ungakhange umyelelise, mbala uzakufa ngenca yezono zakhe nezenzo zokulunga azenzileko angeze zisakhunjulwa; kodwana iingazi zakhe ngizazibiza esandleni sakho." 
Ezekiel3:21 Nokho, nakube wena umyelelisile olungileko kobana angoni bese yena akoni, mbala uzakuphila ngombana uthethe isiyeleliso. Wena uzabe usindise ipilwakho.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Lokha nabe ngihlezi ebathunjweni isandla sakaSomnini besiphezu kwami, nje-ke wathi kimi: “Sikima, uphume uye ngemrhobeni, ngizakukhuluma nawe lapho.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Nje-ke ngasikima ngaya ngemrhobeni. Qala, naso iphazimulo kaSomnini ijame njengaleyo engayibona ngemlanjeni iKebari. Yeke ngawa ngobuso phasi." 
Ezekiel3:24 Ummoya wangena kimi wangisikimisa ngajama. Wakhuluma nami wathi: “Khamba uyozivalela ngendlinakho. 
Ezekiel3:25 Nje-ke, wena ndodana yomuntu, uzakubekwa iintambo, iye, uzakubotjhwa ngazo ukuze ungakghoni ukutjhaphuluka kizo." 
Ezekiel3:26 Ngizakwenza ilimu lakho linamathele kurhwalabhakho, ube simumu uhluleke ukukhalima abantu bakwa-Israyeli ngombana bayindlu ehlubukako." 
Ezekiel3:27 Kodwana nangikhuluma nawe ngizakuvula umlomakho bese uthi kibo, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla’. Akuthi loyo ozwako, ezwe; kuthi loyo ongafuni ukwuzwa, ahlale angezwa ngombana bayindlu ehlubukako.”" 
Ezekiel4:1 Wena ndodana yomuntu, thatha isitina esikhulu usibeke phambi kwakho, kuthi phezu kwaso uthale ngokugobhodlha idorobho, okutjho iJerusalema." 
Ezekiel4:2 Yenza umfanekiso wokuvimbezela idorobhelo: Yakha umbhotjhongo wepi ojamelene nalo, wakhe iinqabo eziqhube emthangalenalo. Godu beka mazombe iinkampa zepi nemigqala yokwephula umthangala." 
Ezekiel4:3 Nje-ke wena thatha idendeleko yesimbi uyibeke njengomthangala wesimbi phakathi kwakho nedorobho olithalileko. Beka idorobhelo ilihlo ulenze libe sebujameni bokuvinjezelwa, iye, ulenze liminyezeleke. Lokhu kuzakuba liphawu endlini yakwa-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 Godu lala ngehlangothi langesinceleni ukuze ihlangothi lakhwelo lizizwele ubudisi becala lendlu yakwa-Israyeli. Ngesibalo samalanga wokulala kwakho ngehlangothi lapho, uzakuthwala isibetho secala layo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Mina ngokwami ngikubekele isibalo samalanga wokuthwala isibetho secala lendlu yakwa-Israyeli. Ngenza lokho ukuya ngesibalo seminyaka yesibetho sayo, okutjho amalanga alikhulu namatjhumi alithoba. Ngendlela enjalo, uzakuthwala isibetho sendlu yakwa-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel4:6 Lokha nasele uqedile lokho, uzakulala kwesibili ngehlangothi langesidleni, uthwale isibetho sendlu yakwaJuda. Ngikujamisele amalanga amatjhumi amane, ilanga linye lijamele umnyaka." 
Ezekiel4:7 Ngengalwakho eyembuliweko uzakubeka ilihlo ekuvimbezelweni kweJerusalema. Ngaleyondlela uzabe uphorofida ngokujamelana nalo. 
Ezekiel4:8 Qala-ke, ngizokubopha ngeentambo kobana ungakghoni ukuphendukela ngakelinye ihlangothi, ukufikela lapha kupheleliswa khona amalanga wokuvimbezela kwakho." 
Ezekiel4:9 Nje-ke thatha ikoroyi nebhali, iimbhontjisi neenhlumaya, inyaluthi kanye nesakoroyi ukuthele ngesitjeni sinye bese uzenzela izikwa. Ngesikhathi senani lamalanga wokulala kwakho ngehlangothi okutjho amalanga alikhulu namatjhumi alithoba, uzakudla izikwezo." 
Ezekiel4:10 Ukudla okudlako kuzakuba budisi besiqunjwana sekhilogremu ngelanga. Uzakukudla iinkhathi ezijanyisiweko. 
Ezekiel4:11 Uzakusela amanzi alingana nesiquntu selitha nawo uzawasela ngeenkhathi ezijanyisiweko. 
Ezekiel4:12 Ukudlokho uzakudla kube inga licebelengwana lebhali kodwana ulibasele phambi kwabantu ngothuvi bomuntu. 
Ezekiel4:13 USomnini wathi: “Ngendlela leyo ama-Israyeli azakudla ukudla kwawo okungakahlambuluki hlangana nezizwe engizawahlakazela kizo.” 
Ezekiel4:14 Yeke ngathi: “Awu, Somnini Somandla! Qala, mina azange khengizisilaphaze. Kusukela ebutjheni bami bekube nje, azange khengidle ingcuba namkha okudatjulwe zimbandana, ngitjho nenyama esinyenyiso azange ingene emlonyenami.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Nje-ke wathi kimi: “Qala, esikhundleni sothuvi bomuntu ngizokunikela ubulongwe ozazilungisela ngabo ukupheka ukudla kwakho.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Godu wathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, ngizokwephula umphekgho wesikwa eJerusalema. Bazakudla izikwana ngokunconcosela nangokuminya namanzi bazawasela ngokutopiza nangokuzibamba." 
Ezekiel4:17 Ngokuswela isikwa namanzi bazakuqalana ngokurareka, bebonde ngebanga lesibetho sabo.”" 
Ezekiel5:1 “Nje-ke wena ndodana yomuntu thatha isabula ebukhali, uyisebenzise njengotjhefana womgudi, ugude ihlokwakho nesilevu sakho. Yeke thatha isilinganiso sokulinganisa uhlukanise iinhluthu." 
Ezekiel5:2 Lokha amalanga wokuvimbezela sele aphelele, uzakutjhisela ingcenye yesithathu yeenhluthu ngaphakathi kwedorobho. Ingcenye enye yesithathu uzayithatha uyiqobe ngesabula yoke indawo edorobheni mazombe, kuthi enye ingcenye yesithathu uyihlakaze esithubeni ngombana ngirhwatjhe isabula ngemva kwabo." 
Ezekiel5:3 Thatha eenhluthwinezo ikereketjhana uyibophelele emphethweni wephuraphurakho. 
Ezekiel5:4 Uzabese uthatha ezinye zazo godu uzithele emlilweni uzitjhise. Umlilo uzakubhebhedlha kusukela lapho ugcwale yoke indlu yakwa-Israyeli. 
Ezekiel5:5 “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla, ‘Leli liJerusalema engalibeka ekabeni yezizwe, neenarha zilibhode mazombe." 
Ezekiel5:6 Kodwana lihlubuke imithethwami neemiso zami, laba nobukhohlakali ukudlula izizwe neenarha zoke ezilizombelezileko. Iye, ladela imithethwami nokulandela iimiso zami.’" 
Ezekiel5:7 Ngalokho nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomadla, ‘Nibe nentanyana ukudlula izizwe ezinizombelezileko, akhange nikhambe ngeemiso zami namkha nilonde imithethwami. Nikhambelele benaphalwa zizizwe zoke ezinizombelezileko.’" 
Ezekiel5:8 Yeke nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla, ‘Qala, mina ngokwami ngijamelene nawe, Jerusalema! Ngizokwehlisela iingwebo phakathi kwakho pambi kwezizwe." 
Ezekiel5:9 Nangebanga lazo zoke iinyenyiso zakho, ngizokwenza into engingazange khengiyenze nengingasobe ngisayenza godu:" 
Ezekiel5:10 Ngaphakathi kwakho ababelethi bazakudla abantwababo nabantwana badle ababelethi. Ngizokwehlisela iingwebo phakathi kwakho bekuthi boke abaseleko kuwe ngibahlakazele emikhakheni yoke. 
Ezekiel5:11 Ngalokho, ngiyafunga ngokuphila kwami mina Somnini Somandla, ngizokuqoba bengikuphungule wena Jerusalema ngebanga lokobana usilaphaze ithempeli lami ngazo zoke iinyenyiso nangazo zoke iinkghabhudlho zakho. Mina ngokwami ngizokurhurhula koke. Amehlwami angeze ababalela begodu angeze ngaba nezwelo." 
Ezekiel5:12 Ingcenye yesithathu yabantu bakho izakufa ngezifo namkha iqedwe yindlala phakathi kwakho. Enye ingcenye yesithathu yabantu bakho izakurhayilwa ngesabula mahlangothi woke wakho, kuthi ingcenye enye yesithathu ngiyihlakazele emikhakheni yoke begodu ngizokurhwatjha isabula ngemva kwayo." 
Ezekiel5:13 “ ‘Ukuthukuthela kwami kuzakwehla nelaka lami libohle ebantwini bakho nasele ngizibuyiselele. Nje-ke bazakwazi bonyana mina Somnini, ngikhulume ngisesikhweleni sami lokha nangivuthela ilaka lami phezu kwabo." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ngaphezu kwalokho ngizokwenza ube lirubhi nesiphoqo hlangana nezizwe ezikuzombelezileko, iye, emehlweni wabo boke abadlula ngendlela." 
Ezekiel5:15 Uzakuba siphoqo nenyazo, isiyeleliso nento ethusako ezizweni ezikuzombelezileko lokha nangehlisela iingwebo zami phezu kwakho ngetukuthelo nangelaka, ngesibetho sokufutheka. Ngikhulumile mina Somnini." 
Ezekiel5:16 Lokha nangithumela imisubela yami emimbi yendlala phakathi kwabo izakuba ngeyokubhubhisa. Iye, ngizayithumela bona iniqede nina bantu beJerusalema lokha nangingezelela indlala, ngephule nomphekgho wesikwa senu." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ngizakuthumela indlala neembandana zommango ngokujamelana nani. “ ‘Zizakudlela abantwabakho wena Jerusalema. Iye, izifo nokuthuluka kweengazi kuzakudabula phakathi kwakho ngombana ngizakuletha isabula phezu kwakho. Ngikhulumile mina Somnini.’ ”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel6:2 “Ndodana yomuntu, beka amehlwakho eentabeni zakwa-Israyeli uphorofide ngokujamelana nazo" 
Ezekiel6:3 uthi, ‘Nina ntaba zakwa-Israyeli, lalelani ilizwi lakaSomnini uSomandla! Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla eentabeni nemibundwini, emilanjaneni nemirhobeni: Mina ngokwami ngizokwehlisela isabula phezu kwenu, ngibhubhise iindunduma zenu zokulotjha." 
Ezekiel6:4 Ama-aldarenu azakubhuruzwa, nama-aldarenu wetjhwalo ephulwe. Ngilahle ababuleweko benu phambi kwamanyalenu okubosingazimu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Iye, ngizakufuthela iindumbu zama-Israyeli phambi kwamanyalawo lawo; amathambenu ngiwahlakaze ema-aldarinenu mazombe." 
Ezekiel6:6 Kizo zoke iindawo zenu enihlala kizo, imizenu izakuba marubhi neendunduma zenu zokulotjha zizakutjhiywa bezibe marubhi. Ama-aldarenu azokurhubutjheka: Azokwephulwa, amanyalenu okubosingazimu azokutjhabalala nama-aldarenu wetjhwalo ephulwe iinquqwana. Umsebenzi wezandla zenu lowo uzakufelela." 
Ezekiel6:7 Ababulawako bazakuwela phakathi kwenu. Nje-ke nizakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini. 
Ezekiel6:8 “ ‘Kodwana labo abasinde esabuleni, ngizanitjhiyela bona hlangana nezizwe, lokha nanihlakazelwa emazweni." 
Ezekiel6:9 Labo abasindileko benu bazangikhumbula bahlangana nezizwe lapha bathunjelwe khona, kobana ngadabula kangangani iinhliziyo zabo ezihlobongako nezingifulatheleko, iye, namehlwabo wekanuko agade adlhemadlhema ngemva kwamanyalabo. Nje-ke bazazinyenya bona ngobumbi ababenzileko, mayelana neenkghabhudlho zabo zoke." 
Ezekiel6:10 Bazakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini; gade ngingethuseli lokha nangithi ngizakwehlisa ihlekelele leyo phezu kwabo.’ 
Ezekiel6:11 “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla, ‘Wahla izandla ugide ngeenyawo phasi uthi: Maye, ngebanga lazo zoke iinkghabhudlho zendlu yakwa-Israyeli ngombana bazokuwa ngesabula, ngendlala nangezifo." 
Ezekiel6:12 Labo abakude bazakufa ngesifo, abaseduze bawe ngesabula. Boke abaseleko nabasindileko bazakufa ngendlala. Leyo-ke, yindlela engizakuvuthela ngayo ilaka lami phezu kwabo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Nje-ke nizakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini lokha ababulawako babo nabarabhalaliswa hlangana namanyalabo ema-aldarinabo mazombe, iye, kuphi nakuphi lapha banikela khona umnikelo okhethekileko kiwo woke amanyalabo phezu kwayo yoke imibundu ephakemeko, phezu kweenqongo zoke zeentaba, ngaphasi komunye nomunye umuthi ohlaza nomunye nomunye umuthi omkhulu wamakari." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ngizakwelula isandla sami ngakibo, ngenze inarha ibe libhudu nethusako kizo zoke iindawo abahlala kizo, kusukela erhalawumbeni ukuya eRibhila. Ngalokho bazakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini.’ ”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel7:2 “Wena ndodana yomuntu, nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla enarheni yakwa-Israyeli, “ ‘Kusiphetho! Mbala isiphetho sifikile emajikeni amane wenarha." 
Ezekiel7:3 Manje isiphetho siphezu kwakho, wena narha! Ngizakuthulula ilaka lami phezu kwakho, ngikugwebe ukuya ngeendlela zakho, ngibeke zoke iinkghabhudlho zakho phezu kwakho." 
Ezekiel7:4 Amehlwami angeze akubabalela namkha ngibe nezwelo. Ngizokubetha ngeentonga zakho iye, iinkghabhudlho zakho zizakuba phakathi kwakho. Nje-ke nizakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini.’" 
Ezekiel7:5 “Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla, “ ‘Qala-ke, ihlekelele phezu kwehlekelele, naso isiza!" 
Ezekiel7:6 Isiphetho sifikile! Iye, isiphetho sifikile! Sivukile ngokujamelana nawe narha! Qala sifikile!" 
Ezekiel7:7 Ukuwa kufikile kuwe wena sakhamuzi senarha! Isikhathi sifikile, ilanga litjhidele, kulitjhada lepi eentabeni, ingasi lokuhlokoma!" 
Ezekiel7:8 Nje-ke masinyana, ngizokuthululela itukuthelwami phezu kwakho narha, ngivuthele ilaka lami phezu kwakho. Ngizakugweba ngokufanele iindlela zakho, ngibeke zoke iinkghabhudlho zakho phezu kwakho." 
Ezekiel7:9 Amehlwami angeze ababalela begodu angeze ngaba nezwelo. Ngizokubetha ngeentonga zakho, iye, iinkghabhudlho zakho zizakuba phakathi kwakho. Nje-ke nizakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini obethako.’" 
Ezekiel7:10 Qala, nanto ilanga! Qala lifikile! Ukuwa kwakho kuyeza. Intonga seyihlumile, ukuzikhakhazisa sekukhahlele." 
Ezekiel7:11 Inturhu ngeyentonga yobumbi. Akakho noyedwa ozakusala, iye, ngitjho umnotho nobunjinga babo; akunabugugu phakathi kwabo!" 
Ezekiel7:12 Isikhathi sifikile, ilanga liyatjhidela; umthengi akangathabi nomthengisi angalili, ngombana ilaka liphezu komnotho woke wenarha." 
Ezekiel7:13 “Mbala, abathengisi angeze babuyele kokuthengisiweko ngitjho nanyana basaphila ngombana umbono ophathelene nomnotho woke wenarha angekhe wabuyiswa. Ngebanga lecala labo, akakho noyedwa ozakulonda ipilwakhe." 
Ezekiel7:14 “ ‘Bavuthele ipalapala, balungisa koke ukuya epini kodwana akakho oya epinapho ngombana ilaka lami liphezu komnotho woke wenarha." 
Ezekiel7:15 Isabula ingaphandle ngaphakathi kunezifo nendlala. Loyo osemasimini ufa ngesabula; osedorobheni ubhujiswa zizifo nendlala. 
Ezekiel7:16 Nakube abanye babo bayaphunyurha basinde, bazakuba seentabeni njengamazuba wemirhoba: Boke njalo bazakulila, omunye nomunye ngecala lakhe." 
Ezekiel7:17 Zoke izandla zizakuba buthakathaka, amadolo woke angenwe mamanzi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Bazakwembatha iinzilo, ukwesaba kubagubuzese. Amahloni azakuba phezu kwabo boke ubuso, nobuphandla phezu kwazo zoke iinhloko zabo." 
Ezekiel7:19 Bazakuphosa isiliva labo endledlaneni, igolide labo lithathwe njengomtjhubelo. “ ‘Isiliva negolide labo angeze labasindisa ngelanga lelaka lakaSomnini. Angekhe banelisa imiphimbabo namkha bagcwalise izisu zabo ngalo ngombana icala labo lisikhubekiso." 
Ezekiel7:20 Bazikhakhazise ngobuphaziphazi begolide nesiliva, benze ngalo iinthombe ezisikghabhudlho, iye izinto ezisinyenyiso; ngalokho ngilenza libe mtjhubelo kibo." 
Ezekiel7:21 “ ‘Ngizalinikela ezandleni zabezizwe njengepango, kwabakhohlakeleko bephasi libe sihlangulo; bona-ke bazalisilaphaza." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ngizokufulathelisa ubuso bami, ukuze abagongodi basilaphaze indawami eligugu; iye, abadlelezeli bazayingena bebayisilaphaze." 
Ezekiel7:23 Lungisa amakhamandela, ngombana inarha igcwele icala leengazi, idorobho lizele inturhu." 
Ezekiel7:24 Ngizokungenisa abakhohlakele khulu bezizwe, badle izindlu zabo. Ngizokuphelisa ukuzazi kwabanamandla, neendawo zabo zisilaphazwe." 
Ezekiel7:25 Lokha nakufika isikhathi sokubotjhwa bazakufuna ukuthula kodwana angekhe kwabakhona. 
Ezekiel7:26 Kuzakuba yihlekelele phezu kwehlekelele, amarhemurhemu alandelwe marhemurhemu; bazasoloko bafuna umbono emphorofidini; ifundiso iphele emphristini neenluleko zabadala." 
Ezekiel7:27 Ikosi izakulila, ikosana yembathwe kukhungatheka, izandla zabantu elizweni zibe nedumbe ngevalo. Ngizabaphatha ngokuya ngeendlela zabo; ngibagwebe ukuya ngokwemikhubabo. Bazakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wesithandathu lokha inyanga yesithandathu inamalanga amahlanu, ngisazihlalele emzinami nabaphathi bakwaJuda baphambi kwami, isandla sakaSomnini uSomandla sehlela phezu kwami khonapho." 
Ezekiel8:2 Nje-ke ngaqala, ngabona isibumbeko esinomfanekiso womuntu. Ukusuka emfanekisweni wamadinaso ukwehla besimlilo, kuthi ngehla kwamadinaso kube njengomfanekiso odarhileko, iye, njengophazima sasimbi." 
Ezekiel8:3 Selula okungathi sisandla, sangibamba ngesihluthu sami ehloko; ummoya wangiphakamisela hlangana nezulu nephasi, wangiletha emibonweni kaZimu eJerusalema, ebungenweni besango lesirhodlo sangaphakathi esiqale ngetlhagwini lapha bekujame khona isithombe esibanga isikhwele sijame khona." 
Ezekiel8:4 Iphazimulo kaZimu ka-Israyeli beyilapho, njengombono engawubona ngemrhobeni." 
Ezekiel8:5 UZimu wathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, phakamisela amehlwakho nca ngetlhangwini.” Nje-ke ngaqala nca ngetlhagwinapho: Qala, ngetlhagwini lesango le-aldari ngabona isithombe esibanga isikhwele ebungenweni." 
Ezekiel8:6 Wathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, uyayibona into abayenzako na? Indlu yakwa-Israyeli yenza iinkghabhudlho ezikulu lapha. Ngalokho ingidedisela kude nendawami ecwengileko. Nokho usazokubona iinkghabhudlho ezikulu.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Wangiletha ebungenweni besirhodlo; lapho ngaqala ngabona bona kunentunja ebodeni. 
Ezekiel8:8 Nje-ke wathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, yemba ibodeli uliphundluse.” Kuthe lokha nangiphundlusa iboda, kwaba khona ubungeno." 
Ezekiel8:9 Wathi kimi: “Ngena, ubone iinkghabhudlho ezimbi abazenza lapha.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Nje-ke ngangena ngaqala, ngabona ebodeni mazombe bekufanekiswe woke umhlobo weemphili ezikhakhabako, iinlwana ezikghabhudlhako nawo woke amanyala okubosingazimu bama-Israyeli." 
Ezekiel8:11 Phambi kwezintwezo bekujame abaphathi abamatjhumi alikhomba bendlu yakwa-Israyeli, noJazaniyahu umsa kaTjhafani ajame hlangana nabo. Omunye nomunye aphethe idengela, kukupeza isikhatha sephunga letjhwalo." 
Ezekiel8:12 Nje-ke wathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, ubonile bona abaphathi bendlu yakwa-Israyeli benzani ebumnyameni na? Iye, omunye nomunye endumbenakhe yemifanekiso ngombana bathi, ‘USomnini akasiboni, iye, uSomnini uyitjhiyile inarha.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Wathi kimi: “Godu usazokubona ngaphezu kwalezi ezinye iinkghabhudlho ezikulu abazenzako.” 
Ezekiel8:14 Nje-ke wangiletha ebungenweni besango langetlhagwini lethempeli lakaSomnini. Abafazi bebahlezi lapho balilela uTamuzi. 
Ezekiel8:15 Wangibuza wathi: “Ndodana yomuntu, ukubonile lokho na? Usazokubona iinkghabhudlho ezikulu ukudlula lezi.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Wase ungiletha ngesirhodlweni esingaphakathi sethempeli lakaSomnini. Lapho-ke ebungenweni bethempeli lakaSomnini, phakathi kwamathuri ne-aldari, bekunamadoda amatjhumi amabili namahlanu, imihlanabo ifulathele ithempeli lakaSomnini, ubuso babo buqale ngepumalanga; bakhothamela ilanga ngepumalangapho." 
Ezekiel8:17 Nje-ke wathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, ukubonile lokhu na? Ingabe kuyinto elula endlini yakwaJuda ukwenza izinto ezikghabhudlhakwezi lapha na? Kufuze bazalise inarha ngenturhu bangitlhorholoje ukuya phambili na? Qala-ke, babeka amahlumela wesidiribe eempumulweni zabo!" 
Ezekiel8:18 Ngalokho, nami ngizokuphendula ngelaka. Amehlwami angeze ababalela begodu angeze ngaba nezwelo. Nanyana bangapongoloza ngesililo esikhulu phambi kwami, angekhe ngibalalele.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Nje-ke ngezwa uZimu amemeza ngelizwi elikhulu athi: “Tjhidelani lapha nina bahlunguphazi bedorobho, omunye nomunye anesikhali sakhe esandleni sakhe.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Kwatjhidela amadoda asithandathu aphuma nca ngesangweni elingehla eliqale ngetlhagwini. Enye nenye beyinesibulawo esandleni sayo. Phakathi kwawo bekunomuntu owembethe ilineni, anepotomende yokutlolela ehlangothini lakhe. Amadoda lawo angena ajama hlangana ne-aldari lekoporo." 
Ezekiel9:3 Iphazimulo kaZimu ka-Israyeli yenyuka ngehla kwamakerubhi ebeyiphezu kwawo, yaya embunjwaneni womnyango wethempeli. Nje-ke uSomnini wabiza umuntu ogade embethe zelineni aphethe nepotomende yokutlola ehlangothini lakhe;" 
Ezekiel9:4 wathi kuye: “Khamba loke idorobho iJerusalema, ubeke iphawu esiphongweni sabantu ababubulako nabalilako ngebanga leenkghabhudlho zoke ezenziwa kilo.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Kwabanye wakhuluma ngimlalele wathi: “Rabhulani idorobho emva kwakhe nibhubhise. Amehlwenu angababaleli begodu ningabi nezwelo. 
Ezekiel9:6 Bulalani nirhayile abadala, amasokana neentombi, abomma nabentwana, kodwana ningathinti noyedwa onephawu. Nithome endawenami ecwengileko.” Nje-ke bathoma ngabaphathi ebegade balapho phambi kwethempeli." 
Ezekiel9:7 Godu wathi kibo: “Silaphazani ithempeli, nizalise iinrhodlo ngababuleweko. Yeke khambani.” Ngalokho bahlabela phambili ngedorobheni babhubhisa." 
Ezekiel9:8 Kuthe basabhubhisa njalo, ngazifunyana ngisele ngedwa, nje-ke ngawa ngobuso ngarhuwelela ngathi: “Awu, Somnini Somandla, ingabe uzakurhayila yoke imisalela yakwa-Israyeli ngokuthulula ilaka lakho phezu kweJerusalema na?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Wabuye wathi kimi: “Icala lendlu yakwa-Israyeli neyakwaJuda selidlulele khulu. Inarha igcwele iingazi nedorobho lizele ukungalungi ngombana bathi, ‘USomnini utjhiye inarha begodu uSomnini akaboni.’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Nje-ke nakungimi, amehlwami angeze ababalela begodu angeze ngibe nezwelo, kodwana ngizobabetha ngeentonga zabo.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Qala, umuntu owembethe ilineni onepotomende yokutlolela ehlangothini lakhe, wabuyisa umbiko wathi: “Zimu, ngenze njengombana ungiyalile.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Nje-ke ngaqala, ngabona phezu kwesigubuzeso ebesingehla kweenhloko zamakerubhi into efana nelitje lesafaya; nento enjengomfanekiso wesibumbeko sesihlalo sobukhosi yaba semtarini ngehla kwakho koke lokho." 
Ezekiel10:2 USomnini wathi emuntwini owembethe zelineni: “Ngena hlangana namavili ngaphasi kwamakerubhi. Zalisa izandla zakho ngamalahle avuthako owathethe phakathi kwamakerubhi, uwarhatjhe ngaphezu kwedorobho.” Nje-ke wangena ngimqalile." 
Ezekiel10:3 Amakerubhi gade ajame ngesewula yethempeli lokha umuntu loyo nakangenako. Ilifu lazalisa isirhodlo esingaphakathi. 
Ezekiel10:4 Iphazimulo kaSomnini yenyuka ngehla kwamakerubhi yaya embunjwaneni wethempeli. Ithempeli beligcwele ilifu, isirhodlo sizele ubuphaziphazi bephazimulo kaSomnini." 
Ezekiel10:5 Kwezwakala itjhada leempiko zamakerubhi ukufikela esirhodlweni esingaphandle, kwaba njengephimbo loSabekako lokha nakhulumako." 
Ezekiel10:6 Wayala umuntu owembhethe ilineni wathi: “Yokha umlilo hlangana namavili phakathi kwamakerubhi.” Nje-ke wangena, wafese wajama eqadi kwevili." 
Ezekiel10:7 Elinye ikerubhi lelulela isandla salo phakathi kwamanye amakerubhi kobana lokhe umlilo liwubeke ezandleni ezikhongozeleko zowembethe zelineni, yena wawuthatha waphuma nawo." 
Ezekiel10:8 Amakerubhi abonakala anesimo sesandla somuntu ngaphasi kweempiko zawo. 
Ezekiel10:9 Nje-ke ngaqala, ngabona amavili amane ngeqadi kwamakerubhi, elinye nelinye ivili belingeqadi kwekerubhi. Amavili lawo bekaphazima njengelitje lebherili." 
Ezekiel10:10 Umfanekiswawo bewunesibumbeko esifanako womane njalo, kubonakala ngathi kulivili ngaphakathi kwelinye." 
Ezekiel10:11 Lokha nakhambako gade anqomba nanyana ngakiliphi ihlangothi kilawo amane, ngaphandle kokujika. Iye, lapha ikerubhi elingaphambili linqomba khona, amavili bekalandela ngaphandle kokujika." 
Ezekiel10:12 Woke umzimba wamakerubhi, imihlanawo, izandla zawo neempiko zawo kanye namavili bekugcwele amehlo mazombe. Elinye nelinye belinevili lalo." 
Ezekiel10:13 Mina ngazizwela ngeendlebe zami kuthiwa amavili abizwa bona “asiyingilizisi”. 
Ezekiel10:14 Womane amakerubhi bekanobuso obune: bokuthoma bekububuso bekerubhi, besibili kungebomuntu, besithathu kungebebhubezi, kuthi besine kube ngebekhozi." 
Ezekiel10:15 Nje-ke amakerubhi aphakama. Lezi bekuziimphili engazibona ngemlanjeni weKebari. 
Ezekiel10:16 Kwathi lokha amakerubhi nakhambako, amavili nawo akhamba emaqadi kwawo. Lokha amakerubhi aphakamisa amaphikwawo kobana aphaphele phezulu ukusuka ephasini, amavili akhange ajike emaqadi kwawo." 
Ezekiel10:17 Kuthi lokha amakerubhi najamako, namavili ajame. Kuthi lokha naphakamako, nawo aphakame ngombana ummoya bewulawula amavili." 
Ezekiel10:18 Iphazimulo kaSomnini yaphuma embunjwaneni wethempeli yafese yajama phezu kwamakerubhi. 
Ezekiel10:19 Nje-ke amakerubhi aphakamisa iimpiko zawo aphaphela phezulu asuka ephasini ngiwaqalile, amavili bekasemaqadi kwawo. Amakerubhi lawo afese ajama ebungenweni besango langepumalanga lethempeli lakaSomnini. Iphazimulo kaZimu wakwa-Israyeli beyiphezu kwawo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Lezo bekuziimphili engazibona ngaphasi kwakaZimu wakwa-Israyeli ngemlanjeni iKebari. Nje-ke bengazi bona zimakerubhi. 
Ezekiel10:21 Esinye nesinye besinobuso obune neempiko ezine bese kuthi ngaphasi kweempiko kube nomfanekiso osasandla somuntu. 
Ezekiel10:22 Mayelana nesibumbeko sobuso bazo: Lobo bekububuso engabubona emlanjeni weKebari, iye, umfanekiswazo lo bekungizo mbala. Esinye nesinye sanqomba ngqo phambili." 
Ezekiel11:1 UMoya wangiphakamisa wangiletha ngesangweni elingepumalanga lethempeli lakaSomnini eliqale ngepumalanga. Qala, ebungenweni besango bekujame amadoda amatjhumi amabili namahlanu. Phakathi kwawo ngabona noJazaniya umsa ka-Azuri noPelathiyahu umsa kaBhenaya ebekuziinkhulu zabantu." 
Ezekiel11:2 UMoya wathi kimi: “Ndodana yomuntu, la ngiwo amadoda aphehla ubumbi nakeluleka ngekohlakalo ngedorobheneli" 
Ezekiel11:3 begodu athi, ‘Isikhathi sokwakha izindlu sisesekude. Idorobheli liyimbiza, thina siyinyama!’" 
Ezekiel11:4 “Ngalokho phorofida ngokujamelana namadoda lawo, iye, phorofida wena ndodana yomuntu.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 UMoya kaSomnini wehlela phezu kwami, wathi kimi: “Yithi, nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini, ‘Nitjho njalo nina ndlu yakwa-Israyeli, ngitjho nalokho enikucabangako, mina ngiyakwazi." 
Ezekiel11:6 Ababuleweko benu nibandisile edorobheneli, iye, ababuleweko bagcwele iindledlana zalo.’" 
Ezekiel11:7 Ngalokho nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini: Ababuleweko benu enababeka phakathi kwalo, ngibo abayinyama! Idorobheli liyimbiza kodwana nina ngizonikhupha ngaphakathi kwalo." 
Ezekiel11:8 Isabula eniyesabako, kuyisabula engizoyiletha phezu kwenu. Kutjho uSomnini uSomandla." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ngizonikhupha ngaphakathi kwalo, ngininikele ezandleni zamaphandle bengehlisele iingwebo phakathi kwenu." 
Ezekiel11:10 Nizokuwa ngesabula, ngizanigweba ngemikhawulweni yakwa-Israyeli. Nje-ke nizakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini." 
Ezekiel11:11 Idorobho angeze libe yimbiza kini namkha nibe yinyama ngaphakathi kwayo. Ngizonigweba ngemikhawulweni yakwa-Israyeli. 
Ezekiel11:12 Ngalokho nizakwazi bonyana nginguSomnini. Iye azange nikhambe ngeemiso zami namkha nilandele imithethwami, kodwana nikhambe ngemithetho yabezizwe abanizombelezileko.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Kwathi ngisaphorofida njalo, uPelathiyahu umsa kaBhenaya wahlongakala. Nje-ke ngawa ngobuso ngarhuwelela ngelizwi elikhulu ngathi: “Awu Somnini, Somandla, ingabe uzokuphelisa imisalela yakwa-Israyeli na?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Nje-ke lizwi lakaSomnini lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel11:15 “Ndodana yomuntu, abafowenu, iye, abafowenu bangendlini, ngitjho nendlu yoke yakwa-Israyeli, boke njalo kungilabo abahlali beJerusalema abathe ngabo, ‘Basukile, bakude noSomnini, nakungithi inarha le inikelwe thina njengelifa.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 Ngalokho yewuthi, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla: Nanyana ngibasuse ngabasa kude hlangana nezizwe godu nanyana ngibahlakazele eenarheni, nokho ngibe yindawo ecwengileko kibo kwesikhatjhana eenarheni abaye kizwezo.’" 
Ezekiel11:17 Yeke yewuthi, ‘Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla: Ngizonibutha hlangana nezizwe, nginikghuthe eenarheni lapha benihlakazelwe khona, ngininikele inarha yakwa-Israyeli.’" 
Ezekiel11:18 Kuzakuthi nabafika lapho basuse zoke iinyenyiso nazo zoke iinkghabhudlho kiyo. 
Ezekiel11:19 Ngizabapha ihliziyo eyodwa, iye, ngifake kibo ummoya omutjha. Ngizakukhupha ihliziyo yelitje phakathi kwabo bese ngibapha ihliziyo ethambileko" 
Ezekiel11:20 ukuze bakhambe ngeemiso zami bebalonde imithethwami bayenze. Bazakuba babantu bami mina ngibe nguZimabo. 
Ezekiel11:21 Kodwana nakungilabo abaneenhliziyo ezilandelelana neenyenyiso neenkghabhudlho zabo, ngizobabetha ngeentonga zabo.” Kutjho uSomnini uSomandla." 
Ezekiel11:22 Nje-ke amakerubhi aphakamisa iimpiko zawo kanye namavili angemaqadi kwawo khibe iphazimulo kaZimu ka-Israyeli beyiphezu kwawo. 
Ezekiel11:23 Iphazimulo kaSomnini yaphakama phakathi kwedorobho, yafese yajama phezu kwentaba engepumalanga yedorobho."
