Daniel11:12 Ikosi yangesewula le izaziphakamisa lokha amabutho wangetlhagwini nasele athunjiwe begodu izakuwisa amatjhumi weenkulungwana, kodwana angekhe ihlale inamandla" 
Daniel11:13 ngombana ikosi yangetlhagwini izakuvusa godu ibutho elikhulu kunelokuthoma. Kuthi emva kweminyakana iphume nebuthokazi elikhulu elibonelelwe ngokwaneleko. 
Daniel11:14 “Eenkhathinezo-ke, abanengi bazakuvukela ikosi yangesewula. Hlangana nabantu bekhenu kuzakuvuka amahlongandlebe ukuze kuzaliseke umbono, kodwana angekhe aphumelela." 
Daniel11:15 Nje-ke ikosi yangetlhagwini izakuza izokwakha umbundu magegana nomthangala wedorobho beyilithumbe. Amabutho wesewula angekhe akwazi ukujama, ngitjho namajoni wekhethelo angekhe aba namandla wokulwa." 
Daniel11:16 Ikosi yangetlhagwini esahlelako leyo izazenzela umathanda ngombana akakho ozakujamelana nayo. Izazinzinzisa enarheni ehle khulu beyibe namandla wokubhubhisa. 
Daniel11:17 Izakulinga bona woke umbuso wangesewula ube ngakiyo ngokwenza isikhozi nekosi yakhona. Izakwendisela indodakazayo ekosini leyo ukuze indodakazi leyo ibhubhise umbuso lowo. Kodwana lokho angekhe kuphumelele ngombana indodakazi ingakhambisani namano kayise. 
Daniel11:18 Emva kwalokho ikosi yangetlhagwini izakujikela ngeenarheni ezingemikhawulweni yelwandle ithumbe ezinengi zazo. Kodwana induna yepi izayilisisa isenzo sayo sokweyisa. Ikosi yangetlhagwini leyo izokuhluleka ukuzibuyiselela emonakalweni owenziwe yinduna. 
Daniel11:19 Nje-ke emva kwalokhu ikosi yangetlhagwini izakuthi iyajika ibalekela eemphephelweni zenarhayo, iwe kube kuphela kwayo." 
Daniel11:20 “Esikhundleni sayo kuzakuvuka omunye ozokuthumela umthelisi esifundeni esihle sombuso. Kodwana emva kwamalanga ambalwa, uzakupheliswa nokho kungabi ngebanga lelaka namkha lepi." 
Daniel11:21 Esikhundleni sekosi yangetlhagwini kuzakuvela umuntu okghabhudlhako ongazange akhe aphiwe ubukhosi. Umuntu loyo uzakuza athathe umbuso ngobuqili, abantu bangakatjheji." 
Daniel11:22 Amabutho azakukhukhuleka bekaphohloke phambi kwakhe kanye nabarholi ebegade banesikhozi naye. 
Daniel11:23 Emva kokobana kwenziwe isikhozi naye, uzakuba nezenzo zekohliso abe namandla nanyana anesiqhema esincani nje." 
Daniel11:24 Kungakalindeleki uzakungena eengcenyeni ezinothileko zesifunda enze okungazange khekwenziwe ngomunye wabamanduleleko ngokwabela ipango nepahla ehlangulwe ebalandelini bakhe. Uzakwakha izungu ngokujamelana neemphephelo, kodwana kuzakuba ngokwesikhatjhana nje." 
Daniel11:25 Uzakuvusa amandlakhe nokuzimisela kwakhe ngokujamelana nekosi yangesewula ngebutho elikhulu. Ikosi yangesewula nayo izakurhwanta nebutho elikhulu nangamandla amakhulu kobana iyokulwa. Kodwana angekhe yaphumelela ngombana kuzabe kunezungu lokujamelana nayo 
Daniel11:26 elenziwe ngitjho nangilabo abadla nayo ukudla kwesigodlweni. Abantwaba bazayiqeda amandla nebutho layo lizakukhukhulwa. Abanengi abalimeleko bawe epini. 
Daniel11:27 Amakhosi amabili lawa azakuhlala ndawonye etafuleni kodwana khisibe afihlelene iinhloso ezimbi. Azakutjelana amala kodwana lokho kungaphumeleli ngombana isiphetho sizakufika ngesikhathi esijanyisiweko. 
Daniel11:28 Ikosi yangetlhagwini izakubuyela enarhenayo nomnotho omkhulu, kodwana ihliziywayo izasoloko ijamelene nabantu besivumelwano esicwengileko. Izakwenza koke okusehliziywenayo lokha nayibuyela enarhenayo." 
Daniel11:29 “Kuzakuthi ngesikhathi esijanyisiweko ibuyele ngesewula. Kodwana ngesikhathesi angeze kwafana nesikhathini sangaphambilini. 
Daniel11:30 Imithayamanzi yamaKiti izakujamelana nayo ukuze yethuseleke. Lokha nayibuyako izakunaka labo abahlubuke isivumelwano esicwengileko. 
Daniel11:31 Amabutho ewathumileko azakungena asilaphaze ithempeli elibuphephelo. Azakuphelisa umhlabelo wokutjhiswa wangemihla bese ajamise isinyenyiso esibhubhisako. 
Daniel11:32 Ngobuqili izakuyenga labo abajamelana nesivumelwano esicwengileko. Kodwana labo abamaziko uZimabo bazakuba namandla bathathe igadango. 
Daniel11:33 Abahlakaniphileko hlangana nabantu bazakuyelelisa abanengi, kodwana bazakukhutjhwa kwesikhatjhana ngebanga lesabula nomlilo, iye, ngebanga lokuthunjwa nokuphangwa." 
Daniel11:34 Kuzakuthi lokha nabakhutjhwako bafunyane isizo elincancani bese kuthi labo ababazenzisi babasekele. 
Daniel11:35 Abanye abahlakaniphileko bazakukhutjhwa ukuze bacwengiswe, bahlungwe bebahlanjululwe bekube kusesikhathini sokuphela ngombana kusesekhona isikhathi esijanyisiweko." 
Daniel11:36 “Ikosi leyo izazenzela umathanda, iziphakamise ngokuzidumisa ngaphezu kwabozinyana begodu nangoZimu ongaphezu kwabozinyana izakukhuluma izinto ekungazange khezizwakale. Izakuphumelela bekube kulapha kuphela khona isikhathi selaka ngombana lokho okuhlosiweko kuzakwenziwa." 
Daniel11:37 Angekhe ihloniphe abozinyana baboyisemkhulu bayo namkha loyo othandwa bomma. Kanti godu angeze ihloniphe nanyana ngimuphi uzinyana; kunalokho izaziphakamisa ngaphezu kwabo boke. 
Daniel11:38 Izakuhlonipha kwaphela uzinyana wobuphephelo okunguzinyana aboyisemkhulu abangazange bamazi. Loyo-ke izamhlonipha ngegolide nangesiliva, ngamatje aligugu nangezipho ezibizako." 
Daniel11:39 Izakusahlela iimphephelo ezinemithangala ngokusizwa nguzinyana otjhili. Labo abamazisako uzinyanayo izabaphathela phezulu: Izababeka babe babusi phezu kwabanengi beyibanikele amasimu njengomvuzwabo. 
Daniel11:40 “Esikhathini sokuphela ikosi yangesewula izayisahlela. Kodwana ikosi yangetlhagwini izayithelekela ngomfutho omkhulu, ngeenkarana zepi, ngeenjomani nangemithayamanzi eminengi. Izakungena eenarheni idlule njengesikhukhula." 
Daniel11:41 Izakungena nenarheni ehle khulu, kuthi abanengi bakhutjwe. Kodwana labo bazakusindiswa esandleni sayo: u-Edomu noMowabi kanye nengcenye ekulu yama-Amoni." 
Daniel11:42 Godu izakwelulela isandla sayo kezinye iinarha neGibhide angeze yasinda. 
Daniel11:43 Iye, ikosi leyo izakuba mbusi phezu komnotho wegolide nesiliva naphezu kwawo woke amagugu weGibhide. AmaLibhiya namaKutjhe azayilandela." 
Daniel11:44 Kodwana imibiko ebuya epumalanga netlhagwini izayethusa. Nje-ke izakurhwanta ngelaka elikhulu kobana iyokuqeda beyibhubhise abanengi. 
Daniel11:45 Izakuhloma amatendayo wobukhosi hlangana nelwandle nentaba ehle khulu necwengileko. Kodwana nanyana kunjalo izakufika esiphethweni sayo kungabi noyisizako. 
Daniel12:1 “Ngesikhatheso uMikayeli ingilozi ekulu, omvikeli wabantu bekhenu uzakusikima. Kuzakubakhona isikhathi sesizi elikhulu esingazange khesibe khona emlandweni wokuphila kwezizwe bekube sikhathi esibekiweko. Kodwana esikhathineso boke abantu bekhenu abafunyanwa batlolwe encwadini, bazakutjhaphululwa." 
Daniel12:2 Inengi lalabo abalele ethulini lehlabathi, lizakuvuka, abanye bavukele ekuphileni okungapheliko, abanye bavukele ehlazweni elisinyenyiso esingapheliko." 
Daniel12:3 Abahlakaniphileko bazakukhanya njengokudarha komkayi, kuthi labo abadosela abanye emthethweni wokulunga, bakhanye nini nanini njengeenkwekwezi." 
Daniel12:4 Kodwana wena Danyela londa amezwi la abe yifihlo, uvale incwadi ngokuyigiba bekube sikhathi sokuphela. Abanengi bazakwenza irhubhululo nelwazi lizakwanda.”" 
Daniel12:5 Nje-ke mina Danyela, ngaqala, napo abanye ababili, omunye ajame ngaphetjheya esebeni lomlambo omunye ajame nganeno." 
Daniel12:6 Omunye wabo wabuza endodeni eyembethe zelineni, kwanjesi ebegade iphezu kwamanzi womlambo wathi: “Kuzokuthatha isikhathi esingangani ukufika kwesiphetho seemangaliswezi na?”" 
Daniel12:7 Indoda eyembethe zelineni egade iphezu kwamanzi womlambo leyo yaphakamisela isidla nesincele sayo ezulwini; ngayizwa ifunga ngaloyo ophila isiphelani yathi: “Kuzakuba sikhathi, iinkhathi nesiqunto sesikhathi. Kuzakuthi lokha ukuqotjwa kwamandla wabantu abacwengileko nasele kuphelile, zoke izintwezi zizaliseke.”" 
Daniel12:8 Ngezwa kodwana akhange ngizwisise; nje-ke ngathi: “Kosami, uzakuba yini umphumela wezintwezi?”" 
Daniel12:9 Yathi kimi: “Danyela, zikhambele mntabantu ngombana amezwi la kufuze ahlale ayifihlo abe avalwe ngokugitjwa bekube sikhathi sokuphela." 
Daniel12:10 Abanengi bazakuhlungwa, bahlanjululwe bebacwengiswe, kodwana abakhohlakeleko bazakuragela phambili nobukhohlakali. Akakho wabakhohlakeleko ozakuzwisisa, kodwana abahlakaniphileko bona bazakuzwisisa." 
Daniel12:11 Kusukela esikhathini sokususwa komhlabelo wokutjhiswa wangemihla nokujanyiswa kwesinyenyiso esibhubhisako kuzakuba yikulungwana namakhulu amabili namatjhumi alithoba wamalanga. 
Daniel12:12 Babusisiwe labo ababekezela bebafikelele ekupheleni kwamalanga ayikulungwana namakhulu amathathu namatjhumi amathathu nahlanu. 
Daniel12:13 Kodwana wena phila bekube sekugcineni; uzakuphumula bese uvukela isiphetho sakho ekupheleni kwamalanga.” 
Hosea1:1 Ilizwi lakaSomnini elafika kuHosiya umsa kaBheri, ngeenkhathi zokubusa kwaka-Uziya, uJotamu, u-Arhazi noHezekhiya amakhosi wakwaJuda nangeenkhathi zokubusa kwakaJerobhowamu umsa kaJowatjhi ikosi yakwa-Israyeli." 
Hosea1:2 Isingeniso samezwi akhulunywa nguSomnini ngoHosiya. USomnini wathi kuHosiya: “Khamba uyokuthatha umfazi oyingwadla nabantwana bokonakala ngombana inarha itjhiye mina Somnini yayokungwadla.” 
Hosea1:3 Waya-ke umphorofidi wafese wathatha uGomere, indodakazi kaDibilayimu; wazithwala wambelethela umntwana womsana." 
Hosea1:4 Yeke uSomnini wathi kuHosiya: “Mthiye bona nguJizriyela ngombana msinyana ngizakuhlunguphaza indlu kaJehu ngebanga lokuphalaka kweengazi eJizriyela, bengiphelise ubukhosi bendlu yakwa-Israyeli." 
Hosea1:5 Kuzakuthi mhlokho ngephule umkhonto ka-Israyeli ngemrhobeni weJizriyela.” 
Hosea1:6 UGomere wazithwala godu, wabeletha indodakazi. USomnini wathi kuHosiya: “Mthiye bona nguLo-Rurhama ngombana angeze ngisarhawukela indlu ka-Israyeli ngokuyithethelela." 
Hosea1:7 Nakuyindlu kaJuda ngizayirhawukela; ngiyisindise. Ngingayisindisi ngeenhlabano, ngepi nanyana ngeenjomani nabakhweli bazo, kodwana ngiyisindise ngokwami mina Somnini uZimayo.”" 
Hosea1:8 UGomere selakhumule uLo-Rurhama ebeleni, wazithwala godu wabeletha umsana." 
Hosea1:9 USomnini wathi kuHosiya: “Mthiye bona nguLo-Ami ngombana anisese babantu bami, nami angisenasivumelwano nani.”" 
Hosea1:10 Nokho isibalo sama-Israyeli sizakufana nehlabathi yelwandle engalinganisekiko nengabalekiko. Esikhundleni sokobana kuthiwe “Anisese babantu bami”, sele kuzakuthiwa “nibantwana bakaZimu ophilako”." 
Hosea1:11 Abantu bakwaJuda nebakwa-Israyeli bazakuhlanganiswa, bakhethe umrholi munye bebathumbe inarha. Ngambala lizaba likhulu ilanga leJizriyela." 
Hosea2:1 Yithini kubafowenu “Bantu bami”, kibodadwenu nithi “Thandiwe”." 
Hosea2:2 “Mangalelani unyoko, nimmangalele ngombana akasese mkami, nami angisese myenakhe! Ubangakameli ukuba namehlo amanengi nokuqoqoma." 
Hosea2:3 Nakungasinjalo bekumele ngimhlubulise abe bhunubhunu njengamhlana abelethwako. Bengizamenza abe njengerhalawumba, athunye njengebhudu, ngimbulalise ngokoma." 
Hosea2:4 Bengingazukuba nesirhawu ebantwaneni bakhe ngombana babantwana bokonakala. 
Hosea2:5 Unina wathuwelela ngobungwadla, wabamitha ngehlazo. Nje-ke umfazi lo wathi: ‘Ngizakulandela iinthandwa zami ezingipha ukudla kwami namanzami, zingembathise ngezoboya nelineni, zingiphe namagugwami’." 
Hosea2:6 Yeke ngaqeda ngokuthi: Ngizakubiyela isivande samesi ngomunga nangomthangala wamatje. Nangenza njalo amaqhingakhe azakufelela: 
Hosea2:7 Iinthandwa zakhe azilandelelako zingameyami, azifune angazifunyani. Khona-ke uzakuqaquluka athi: ‘Awa-yeke, angibuyele kusobentwana ngombana bekangiphethe kuhle.’" 
Hosea2:8 Khonapho umfazi lo akhange avume bonyana ngimi omondla ngamabele, ngewayini nangamafutha we-oliva. Bengamtotosa ngemali enengi nangegolide (abalisebenzisa ukubumba isithombe sakaBhali)." 
Hosea2:9 Nje-ke, ngiseqhingeni lokobana ikoroyi newayini abaseze ayifunyana kimi nakuvunwako le, ngimdime kwanjesi. Nezambatho zoboya nezelineni ebengimupha zonezi, ngizamemuka akhambe bhunubhunu.”" 
Hosea2:10 “Nje-ke ngizomhlubulisa phambi kweenthandwa zakhezo, abe atlhoge nomenyeli." 
Hosea2:11 Ngizakuphelisa koke ukuzithabisa kwakhe: kweminyaka, kweenyanga nekwamalanga. Iye, ngiphelise yoke iminyanyakhe." 
Hosea2:12 Ngizakutjhabalalisa isidiribe namakhiwanakhe athe ngawo: ‘Yikokhelo iinthandwa zami ezingikhokhela ngayo.’ Ngenze isimakhe ifukufuku bese idliwa ziimbandana zommango. 
Hosea2:13 Ngizamhlawulisela amalanga agade atjhisela ngawo aboBhali itjhwalo: Amalanga azimomonda ngawo ngobuphaziphazi, walandelana neenthandwa zakhe. Kodwana mina wangikhohlwa.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Hosea2:14 “Nakanjani ngizamsomasoma, ngimdosele erhalawumbeni, ngikhulume naye kuhle." 
Hosea2:15 Ukusuka lapho ngizambuyisela isidiribe sakhe, ngenze nomrhoba we-Akori isango lethemba. Lapho-ke uzangilalela njengalokha nasesemutjha, njengamhlana aphuma eGibhide.”" 
Hosea2:16 USomnini uthi: “Mhlokho uzangibiza uthi ‘babakwami’; ungasathi ‘Bhalami’. 
Hosea2:17 Ngizamkhafulisa amabizo waboBhali emlonyenakhe, angabe asawabiza." 
Hosea2:18 “Mhlokho ngizakwenzela u-Israyeli isivumelwano neembandana zommango, neenyoni zezulu, neenrhurhubi zephasi. Ngizakwephula imisubela neensabula, neenhlabano zoke zepi enarheni, ukuze nibe nokuphumula nokuthula." 
Hosea2:19 “Ngizakuthatha ube mkami isikhathi soke. Ngikuthathe ube mkami ngikusize, ngikuvikele; ngithembeke bengikurhawukele kube sisipho sami kuwe." 
Hosea2:20 Ngikuthathe ube mkami weenkomo, ube netjhebiswano noSomnini.”" 
Hosea2:21 USomnini uthi: “Mhlokho ngizakuphendula; Ngiphendule izulu, izulu liphendule iphasi." 
Hosea2:22 Iphasi liphendule ikoroyi, isidiribe namafutha we-oliva; zona-ke zizakuphendula uJizriyela." 
Hosea2:23 Ngizazitjalela yena enarheni. Ngirhawukele uLo-Rurhama, ngithi kuLo-Ami ‘Bantu bami’, bese bona bathi ‘Zimethu’.”" 
Hosea3:1 USomnini wathi kimi: “Khamba godu, uthande umfazi ozwana nokonakala nonyariyako njengombana uSomnini athanda ama-Israyeli azwana namakhekhe anediribe nanyariya nabosingazimu.”" 
Hosea3:2 Ngaziqatjhela yena ngamatjhekeli alitjhumi nahlanu wesiliva, nangomgodla webhali." 
Hosea3:3 Yeke ngamtjela ngathi: “Kufanele bona uhlale ngendlinami amalanga amanengi. Ungasangwadla bewulise nokuya emabhayini; nami angizukukweyama.” 
Hosea3:4 Lokhu kuzabalitshwayo bonyana ama-Israyeli kuzawathatha amalanga amanengi anganakosi, anganababusi, anganamihlabelo nanyana amatje akhethekileko, atlhoge nomlayezo wakaZimu." 
Hosea3:5 Ngemuva kwalokho, ama-Israyeli azokubuya afune uSomnini uZimawo noDavida ikosawo. Azakubuyela kuSomnini ngokuzithoba okukhulu; abuyele ebuhleni azabuphiwa nguSomnini emihleni yokuphela." 
Hosea4:1 Lalelani ilizwi lakaSomnini nina ma-Israyeli ngombana uSomnini unesililo ngezakhamuzi zenarha le: “Ngebanga lokobana akusenakwethembeka, neqiniso, nelwazi ngoZimu enarheni," 
Hosea4:2 sekwande ukunikelelana, amanga nokubulala, ukweba nobungwadla. Baphalaza iingazi phezu kweengazi." 
Hosea4:3 Ngebanga lalokhu inarha iyomelela. Zoke izakhamuzi ziyadana, neembandana zommango neenyoni zezulu; ngitjho neenhlambi zitjhelwa mamanzi.”" 
Hosea4:4 “Iye, umuntu akukafaneli bonyana asasuke amangalele omunye ngokumsola, kodwana isigungu sakho wena mphristi, sijamelene nami." 
Hosea4:5 Wena mphristi, uzokuwa namhlanjesi nabaphorofidi bakho bazokuwa nawe ebusuku banamhlanje, nonyoko ngizombhubhisa." 
Hosea4:6 Abantu bami bayabhubha ngokutlhoga ilwazi. Ngebanga lokobana wale ilwazi, nami ngiyakulandula awusimphristami; ngebanga lokobana unina umthetho kaZimu, nami ngizokunina abantwabakho.”" 
Hosea4:7 “Ngokwanda kwabaphristi, kunjalo nokwanda kokona kwabo kimi. Ngizakuphendula ukuhlonitjhwa kwabo kube kurhubutjhwa." 
Hosea4:8 Bazondla ngezono zabantu bami, bathokoziswa kukonakala kwabo." 
Hosea4:9 Kuzose kufane, okwenzeka ebantwini kuzakwenzeka nebaphristini. Ngizokuhlunguphaza abaphristi ngebanga leendlela zabo. Ngibabethe ngentongabo:" 
Hosea4:10 Badlile, kodwana asoze basutha; bangwadlile, kodwana asoze bande. ngebanga lokobana abaphristi batjhiye uSomnini," 
Hosea4:11 bazinikele ebungwadleni, isitjhidela nehlama yewayini, kufiphaze imikhumbulwabo." 
Hosea4:12 Ngebangelo-ke abantu bami sese babuza indlela esithombeni esibaziweko, amadondolwabo abakhombe indlela. Ngebanga lokobana ummoya wobungwadla uphambukise abaphristi, nangebanga lokutjhiya uZimabo ngobungwadla, ngikho" 
Hosea4:13 benza umhlabelo esiqongolweni seentaba, batjhise itjhwalo emibundwini ngaphasi kwemithi emikhulu, lapha kunomthunzi omnandi khona. Ngebanga lezenzo zabezo, amadodakazenu azinikelele ngobungwadla nabomalukazana benu bayahlobonga." 
Hosea4:14 Angizokuhlunguphaza amadodakazenu lokha nazinikelela ngobungwadla nabomalukazana benu nabahlobongako ngombana abapristaba bandinda neengwadla bebenze nemihlabelo neentjhatjha zethempeli. Abantu abangayeleliko bazakubhubha 
Hosea4:15 kanye neengwadla. Nina, ma-Israyeli, nawe Juda ningaziboni umlandu. Ningayi eGiligali, ningenyukeli eBhethe-Aveni. Ningafungi nihle nithi: ‘Sifunga uSomnini ophilako’.”" 
Hosea4:16 Ngambala, ama-Israyeli anekani kadumbana. Alo-ke, uSomnini angawelusa njani njengezimvu nazidla emrhuleni?" 
Hosea4:17 U-Efrayimu uzihlanganise neenthombe ezibunjiweko. Akathuwelele! 
Hosea4:18 Nasele basele, balala nengwadla. Bathokozela ikohlakalo yayo." 
Hosea4:19 Isiwuruwuru sizobawundula, bebakakamale nemihlabelwabo leyo." 
Hosea5:1 “Lalelani lapha nina baphristi! Yelelani nina baphathi bakwa-Israyeli! Ulalele wena Sigodlo! Isigwebo ngesenu: Nibe sisifu eMitsipha, Naba sigolanede eThabhori:" 
Hosea5:2 nibe mlindi ozikileko eSitimu. Kodwana ngizonikhalimela noke. 
Hosea5:3 Ngazi koke ngo-Efrayimu; u-Israyeli akakafihleki phambi kwami. Ngebanga lokobana wena Efrayimu, sewuphendukele ebungwadleni, u-Israyeli wonakele.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Hosea5:4 Izenzo zabo azibavumeli ukubuyela kuZimabo. Abamazi uSomnini ngebanga lommoya wobungwadla ophakathi kwabo. 
Hosea5:5 Ukuzikhukhumeza kuka-Israyeli kujamelene naye. Ama-Israyeli ngitjho no-Efrayimu bararejwa zizono zabo; uJuda unyandanye nabo: 
Hosea5:6 Lokha nabatlhetlha nezimvu nomhlambi wabo bathi bafuna uSomnini, abazomfunyana ngombana uSomnini uzihlukanisile nabo." 
Hosea5:7 Abathembeki phambi kwakaSomnini, babeletha amavezandlebe. Nje-ke, uSomnini uzobatjhabalalisa ngenyanga eyodwa nje; kuzabe kungasenalitho emasiminabo." 
Hosea5:8 Vuthelani ipalapala eGibiya! Nivuthele iporompita eRama! Hlabani umkhosi eBhethe-Aveni! UBhenjamini useenthendeni zakho Efrayimu. 
Hosea5:9 Nje-ke uzokutjhabalaliswa ngelanga lokubuyiswa. Ngikhuluma into ekhona hlangana neenkoro zakwa-Israyeli. 
Hosea5:10 USomnini uthi: “Ababusi bakwaJuda batjhidisa iinkhonkhwani. Ngizabadlhuwelela ngobukhali bami njengeenrhurhula zamanzi. 
Hosea5:11 U-Efrayimu utjhaphile ngokweqa umyalo ngombana uhlalele ukulandela amanyela. 
Hosea5:12 Mina nginjengepehli ku-Efrayimu, njengesidliso endlini kaJuda." 
Hosea5:13 Lokha u-Efrayimu nakezwa ukugula kwakhe, noJuda nakabona inceba lakhe, yeke u-Efrayimu waphendukela e-Asiriya, wabawa isizo ekosini ekulu. Kodwana abe ayinamandla wokunelapha, nokunipholisa emancebenenu." 
Hosea5:14 Ngambala mina nginjengengwenyama ku-Efrayimu, nginjengengwenyama enamandla endlini kaJuda. Mina ngiyarathurathula bengikhambe; ngidudula kutlhogeke nomenyeli." 
Hosea5:15 Yeke ngizakubuyela endawenami ngilinde bebavume umlandwabo. Bazakufuna ubuso bami; esizini labo bazangifuna bebangifunisise.” 
Hosea6:1 Abantu bathi: “Nambani sibuyele kuSomnini, Nanyana asirathulile nje, kodwana uzosipholisa; nanyana asikhubazile nje, kodwana uzakubopha amancebethu." 
Hosea6:2 Ngemva kwamalanga amabili uzasivuselela, elangeni lesithathu asibuyisele esigeni, bonyana siphile ebusweni bakhe." 
Hosea6:3 Asimaziseni uSomnini, asihlabeleni phambili ngokumazisa. Ngiqinisile ngithi uzaziveza kithi njengelanga naliphumako; eze kithi njengezulu lebusika, nanjengezulu lesilimela elithambisa iphasi.”" 
Hosea6:4 Kodwana uSomnini uthi: “Ngizokwenzani ngawe Efrayimu? Ngenzeni ngawe Juda? Ngombana ukwethembeka kwenu kunjengekungu yamasa, kuthintitheka njengombethe wamasa." 
Hosea6:5 Ngikho nginirhayile ngamezwi wabaphorofidi, nganibulala ngamezwi womlomami. Isigwebo sami seza phezu kwenu njengokuhlaba kwelanga" 
Hosea6:6 ngombana ngilulukela ukwethembeka, ingasi umhlabelo; nokwazi ngoZimu kuneminikelo yokutjhiswa.”" 
Hosea6:7 USomnini uthi: “Abantwaba bephule isivumelwano njengebe-Adamu, azange bathembeke kimi lapho." 
Hosea6:8 IGiliyadi mumuzi weenkhohlakali; ezinamabhadulo aneengazi. 
Hosea6:9 Njengewoma lemigulukudu lilalele umuntu, sinjalo nesigungu sabaphristi: Sibulala abantu endleleni eya eTjhekemu. Iye, senza nobugebengu obunyenyisako." 
Hosea6:10 Ngibone into embi endlini ka-Israyeli: U-Efrayimu uzinikelele ngobungwadla begodu u-Israyeli wonakele. 
Hosea6:11 Nawe-ke Juda, uzakugwetjwa njengamabele.” USomnini uthi: “Njalo lokha nangithi ngitjhugulula ubujamo babantu bami;" 
Hosea7:1 iye, nangithi ngipholisa u-Israyeli, izono zaka-Efrayimu zivela emtarini, kwembuleke ikohlakalo yeSamariya: Bayakhohlisana, amasela ayagqekeza angene ebe; imigulukudu idlelezela eendledlaneni!" 
Hosea7:2 Abe abacabangi bonyana yoke ikohlakalwabo ngiyayikhumbula; izenzo zabo ziyabalandela, azikafihleki kimi." 
Hosea7:3 Ikosabo iyabathabela ngokuyibeka kwabo ngekohlakalo; nababusi bayo bayathokoza ngamangabo. 
Hosea7:4 Boke abathembeki. Banjenge-ondo yomlilo etjhisako, ongafuni umbhagi awukhwezelele, kusukela ekubhicweni kwehlama bekube sekukhukhumaleni kwayo." 
Hosea7:5 Ngelanga lomnyanya wekosi yaphambilini benza ababusi bayo badakwe liwayini, abeluleki badakwa bafa." 
Hosea7:6 Ngapha bakhothamela ikosi, ngapha iinhliziyo zitjhisa njenge-ondo ngamaqhinga wokujamelana nekosi. Ilunya labo linjengethuthu lomlilo ebusuku ekuseni libhebhedlhe njengelangabi lomlilo!" 
Hosea7:7 Boke batjhisa njenge-ondo, baqothula ababusi babo. Woke amakhosabo ayawa. Akakho noyedwa ongibizako.”" 
Hosea7:8 USomnini uthi: “U-Efrayimu uhlangana nezizwe ukiniywa ngapha nangapha. U-Efrayimu sese afana nehlama engakaphendulwa phezu komlilo. 
Hosea7:9 U-Efrayimu ukghakghathwe miqhamuka, kodwana yena akakuboni lokho. Sese akhunile, kodwana yena akakuboni lokho." 
Hosea7:10 “Ukuzikhukhumeza kwaka-Israyeli kujamelene naye. Akhange babuyele kuSomnini uZimabo nanyana bamfune phezu kwakho koke lokho. 
Hosea7:11 “U-Efrayimu sese anjengezuba, uyengeka lula, uthithibele: Balilela iGibhide, kodwana babalekela e-Asiriya!" 
Hosea7:12 Kuzakuthi basabaleka njalo, ngiphose igolanedami phezu kwabo; ngizabadosela phasi njengeenyoni zomkayi; ngibabambe njengothiya iwoma lamazuba." 
Hosea7:13 “Bazazizwa ngombana bangihlanukile! Bazakurhayilwa ngombana balwa nami! Ngesingami bengikhanukela ukubahlenga, kodwana bayangirhwayela." 
Hosea7:14 Akhange balile kimi ngeenhliziyo zabo, kodwana barhahlawula isililo basemibhedenabo. Bazirhaya ngebanga lekoroyi newayini." 
Hosea7:15 Bayangihlubuka nanyana ngabakhalima. Ngabaqinisa kodwana bahlala isicathana ngami. 
Hosea7:16 Baphendukela elizeni, baba njengomsebe omtepetepe. Ababusi babo bazokubulawa ngesabula ngebanga lokwephula kwabo iimfungo zabo. Bazakuba yihlekisa nesiphoqo enarheni yeGibhide.”" 
Hosea8:1 USomnini uthi: “Vuthelani ipalapala! Nanti idlanga lizulazula ngehla kwendlu kaSomnini ngombana abantu bephule isivumelwano sami, bavukela umyalwami." 
Hosea8:2 Bayangililela bathi: ‘Maye, Sivumelwano sethu, thina, Israyeli, sinetjhebiswano nawe!’" 
Hosea8:3 Kodwana u-Israyeli ulahle okuhle; nje-ke isitha siseenthendeni zakhe. 
Hosea8:4 Bazibekela amakhosi ngingakatjho, bazikhethela ababusi ngaphandle kwemvumo yami. Bazenzela iinthombe ngesiliva nangegolide labo, kube kubhujiswa kwalo!" 
Hosea8:5 Ithole lakho, Samariya, liyangikghabhudlha! Ubukhali bami buyavutha phezu kwabantwaba. Kuzabe kube nini soloko babhalelwa kuphila msulwa" 
Hosea8:6 nayibe bangu-Israyeli? Itholeli libunjwe sithakgha, senguzimu nje. Yeke lizokwephulwa libe ziinquqwana ithole leSamariyelo." 
Hosea8:7 “Otjala ummoya, uvuna isiwuruwuru. Ihlanga nalinganasiqwambe angeze laba nokudla. Nabe belingaba nokudla, imiqhamuka beyizakurhiribidela." 
Hosea8:8 U-Israyeli urhiribidelwe; sese afana namawunguwungu hlangana nezizwe ezinye 
Hosea8:9 ngombana ababusi bakhona bafuna isizo e-Asiriya. Kodwana u-Efrayimu ufana nodumbana ozulazula emmangweni afuna abangani. 
Hosea8:10 Nanyana angafunyana abangani hlangana nezizwe, akazokuba nobuyo ngombana ngizobabuthelela ndawonye. Masinyana bazakubhesiswa mthwalo wekosi ekulu." 
Hosea8:11 “Lokha u-Efrayimu nakakha ama-aldari amanengi weminikelo yesono, aphenduka ama-aldari wokona." 
Hosea8:12 Nanyana bengingabatlolela kanenginengi ngomthethwami, bebazawuthatha inga yinto etjhili.”" 
Hosea8:13 Benza imihlabelo eyanelisa izisu zabo, bazidlela inyama nje. USomnini akayamukeli imihlabelo enjalo. Nje-ke uSomnini uzobalalamela ngokukhohlakala kwabo, bese ubahlunguphaza ngebanga lezono zabo: Bazakubuyela eGibhide." 
Hosea8:14 U-Israyeli ukhohlwe uMdalakhe, wazakhela iingodlo. UJuda ubiyele amadorobho amanengi. Kodwana uSomnini uzokuthumela umlilo emadorobhenabo bese urhayila iingodlo zabo." 
Hosea9:1 Ungathabi wena Israyeli! Ungajekezeli njengezizwe ezinye ngombana azange uthembeke kuZimakho: Wakhamba unghatulela aboBhali, uthabela abakupha khona eselelweni esinye nesinye." 
Hosea9:2 Izelelo neentlhodlhelo zizakuba dududu, kungabi newayini elitjha." 
Hosea9:3 Abantwaba abazukuhlala enarheni kaSomnini; U-Efrayimu uzakubuyela eGibhide nanyana adle ukudla okuzilwako e-Asiriya. 
Hosea9:4 Abantwaba abazokuletha amaqatheko kuSomnini nemihlabelo yabo abazoyiletha kuye. Koke ukudla kwabo kuzakuba ngokuzilwako njengokudla okudliwa esililweni. Lokho kuzakuba kukudla okusuthisa bona; akuzukulethwa endlini kaSomnini. 
Hosea9:5 Nizobe nikuphi ngelanga leminyanya ezako, ngelanga lemigidi kaSomnini na?" 
Hosea9:6 Abazakuphunyurha ekurhayilweni, iGibhide izababutha, bangcwatjwe eMemfisi. Umnothwabo wesiliva uzakuvalwa likhula, ngeendlini kumile umtjhatjhana." 
Hosea9:7 Amalanga wokuhlunguphazwa afikile; amalanga wokulungisa afikile! U-Israyeli uzazizwela. Nithi: “Umphorofidi udlhayele, umuntu kaZimu uyarhapha!” Vele unjalo, wenziwa zizonokazi zenu ezinengezi, nobutha benu obesabekako!" 
Hosea9:8 Ukuya ngentando kaZimu wesivumelwano umphorofidi ulilihlo phezu kwaka-Efrayimu, kodwana ubekelwe izifu ngandlela zoke nendlini kaSomnini kunobutha;" 
Hosea9:9 benzele umphorofidi umlindi ozikileko. Njengemalangeni weGibeya uSomnini uzobalalamela ngokukhohlakala kwabo bese ubahlunguphaza ngebanga lezono zabo. 
Hosea9:10 USomnini uthi: “Ngathabela ukufunyana u-Israyeli njengomuntu ofunyana amadiribe erhalawumbeni. Mhla ngithoma ukubona aboyihlomkhulu ngaba njengomuntu othabela ukufunyana uporwana wokuthoma wefeyi emthini. Kodwana bona baya kuBhali wePeyori bafese bazinameka entweni edanisako leyo; banyenyeka njengentwabo abayithandako leyo. 
Hosea9:11 Idumo laka-Efrayimu linyelele, lemuke njengenyoni; kungabikhona ukubeletha, ukuzithwala nokubamba." 
Hosea9:12 Iye, nabantwana ababakhulisako ngizobamuka bona kungasali ngitjho noyedwa. Bazazizwa mhlana ngibafulathelako." 
Hosea9:13 “U-Efrayimu ngimbone anjengomuthi wesundu otjalwe endaweni ehle. Kodwana u-Efrayimu uzokukhuphela abantwabakhe umbulali.” 
Hosea9:14 Somnini, baphe lokho ofuna ukubapha khona: Ubaphe isibeletho esirhululako, ubaphe amabele anganamkghado." 
Hosea9:15 USomnini uthi: “Boke ubukhohlakali babo bathoma eGiligali. Lapho-ke ngabalandula ngebanga lezenzo zabo. Ngizobaqotjha endlinami, angisazobathanda. Boke ababusi babo bamaphikakani." 
Hosea9:16 “U-Efrayimu umanyiwe, ipandakhe ibunile; akazukuhloma isithelo. Nanyana abeletha, ngizosibulala isizukulwana sakhe esithandekako.”" 
Hosea9:17 UZimu wesivumelwano uzobafulathela ngombana akhange bamlalele. Bazoba bozulani hlangana nezizwe. 
Hosea10:1 U-Israyeli ube sidiribe esimrarela; isithelo sakhe sanda. Isithelo sakhe nasilokhu sanda, wakha ama-aldari amanengi. Inarhakhe nayilokhu iphumelela, wakghabisa amatjakhe akhethekileko." 
Hosea10:2 Bavuma imilandwabo ngeenhliziyo ezinobuqili, kodwana uSomnini uzakubhidla ama-aldarabo, abe ahlakaze namatjabo akhethekileko." 
Hosea10:3 Yeke bathi: “Thina abesinakosi nasinje ngombana sibhalelwe kuhlonipha uZimethu. Njekhona ikosi leyo, beyizasenzelani nje?”" 
Hosea10:4 Bakhuluma umonyani, bafunga amanga lokha nabenza iimvumelwano. Kodwana ukulunga kuzakuqubuka njengekhula elimila esimini elinyiweko." 
Hosea10:5 Abantu beSamariya bagugunwa yindaba yethole leBhethe-Aveni. Abalotjhi balo bayalililela, nabaphristi ababalotjhi balo bayabubula , babubula ngomnothwalo ngombana lisiwe ekuthunjweni." 
Hosea10:6 Lizokuthathwa lisiwe e-Asiriya libe sibiko sekosi ekulu yakhona. U-Efrayimu uzakurhubutjhwa; u-Israyeli abe neenhloni nabosingazimu bakhe beengodo. 
Hosea10:7 Lokha iSamariya nayibhujiswako, ikosayo izakufana nesigodo esipapamele emanzini." 
Hosea10:8 Iindunduma zobukhohlakali, okusisono saka-Israyeli, zizakubhidlizwa. Kuzakumila ameva nabosotokolo bathi talala phezu kwama-aldarabo. Yeke bazokuthi eentabeni: “Sigubuzesani!” bese bathi emibundwini: “Sigirikelani!”" 
Hosea10:9 Kusukela emihleni yeGibeya, u-Israyeli soloko uyona; sese athuwelele. Kazi ipi ayizukuwafunyana amaphikakani weGibeya na?" 
Hosea10:10 USomnini uthi: “Ngiqede ngokuthi, ngizabahlunguphaza, ngenze izizwe zibahlanganyele, zibabophe ngebanga lezonokazi zabo ezinengi." 
Hosea10:11 “U-Efrayimu lithodlana elibanduliweko nelithanda ukubhula amabele. Yeke ngaqeda ngokuthi angibeke ijogi phezu kwentanyanakhe ehle le. Ngizakubophela u-Efrayimu, uJuda alime, bese uJakopo uphadlha amagade." 
Hosea10:12 Bengithi, ‘Zitjaleleni ukulunga, khona nizakuvuna isithelo sokwethembeka; bese nizikghemela ihlabathi engakalinywa ngombana kusikhathi sokufuna uSomnini, abe afike anise ukulunga phezu kwenu.’" 
Hosea10:13 Kodwana nirhatjhe ubukhohlakali, navuna ubumbi; nje-ke nigome isithelo sekohliso. Ngombana fenathembela emaqhingenenu nemabuthwenenu amanengi," 
Hosea10:14 umdumo wepi uzokusahlela isizwe senu kubhidlike woke amarholwenu. Kuzakuba njengamhlana uSalamani abhidliza iBhethe-Aribele: ngelanga lepi mhlana abomma nabantwababo baphihlizelwa ehlabathini. 
Hosea10:15 USalimani uzanenza soneso eBhethele, ngebanga lobukhohlakali benu obukhulu. Ngokusa kwamhlokho, ikosi yakwa-Israyeli izabe seyabhujiswa nya.”" 
Hosea11:1 USomnini uthi: “Lokha u-Israyeli asesemntwana ngamthanda, godu indodanami ngayibiza ngayenyula eGibhide." 
Hosea11:2 Kodwana lokha aboBhali nabababizako bangifulathela, benzela aboBhali imihlabelo, batjhisela neenthombe ezibaziweko itjhwalo." 
Hosea11:3 Ngimi owafundisa u-Efrayimu ukutataya, ngambamba ngomkhono. Kodwana akhange bathande ukwazi bona ngimi owabahlengako." 
Hosea11:4 Ngababophela ngomutja womusa nethando. Ngasusa ijogi eentanyeni zabo begodu ngehlela kibo bona ngibondle. 
Hosea11:5 Bengingafuni bonyana babuyele enarheni yeGibhide, nokuthi i-Asiriya ibuse phezu kwabo. Kodwana bala ukuphenduka." 
Hosea11:6 Ngebangelo-ke zizokubenya emadorobhenabo, iinqabo zamasangwabo zipheliswe namaqhingabo atjhabalaliswe." 
Hosea11:7 Abantu bami bazakuhlonywa esigodweni ngombana bangifulathele. Abanye bazakuthwala ijogi lobukhoboka , ijogi elingasoze lasuswa. 
Hosea11:8 “Ngizokuliselela njani, wena Efrayimu? Ngikulahleleni, wena Israyeli? Ngizokuphatha njani njenge-Adima? Ngikwenze njani ufane neTseboyimu? Ihliziywami ingiphendukele, isirhawu sami siyavutha." 
Hosea11:9 Angisazokuragela phambili nobukhali bami obesabekako no-Efrayimu angisoze ngisambhubhisa ngombana nginguZimu mina, angifani nomuntu. NgingoCwengileko phakathi kwenu. Angizokuza ngobukhali.”" 
Hosea11:10 Bazakulandela uSomnini; abhodle njengengwenyama. Iye, lokha nabhodlako abantwabakhe bazakuza, bathuthumela bavela etjingalanga." 
Hosea11:11 Bazakuza bathuthumela njengeenyoni zivela eGibhide, nanjengamazuba avela enarheni ye-Asiriya. “Ngizabahlalisa eendlini zabo.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Hosea11:12 USomnini uthi: “U-Efrayimu ungiphara ngamanga koke nje; indlu ka-Israyeli ingininda ngekohliso. UJuda akanaqiniso phambi koZimu, iye, ngitjho nakoCwengileko ongothembekileko." 
Hosea12:1 “U-Efrayimu uzondla ngommoya, udlhemadlhema ngemva kommoya wepumalanga imini yoke. Ngamangakazakhe amanengi uzibangela ukubhujiswa: Wenza isikhozi ne-Asiriya, khibe ngapha ukhungana neGibhide ngamafutha we-oliva.”" 
Hosea12:2 USomnini umangalela uJuda; uzokuhlunguphaza uJakopo ukuya ngeendlela zakhe, ambethe ngeentonga zakhe." 
Hosea12:3 Nasesemanzi uJakopo wabamba isithende sakamfowabo; nasele aqinile wabindana noZimu. 
Hosea12:4 Wabinda ingilozi bewayihlula. Walila, warabhela uSomnini. Nje-ke iinzukulwana zakhe zithi: “EBhethele uSomnini uzosihlangabeza, abuyelele iinthembiso zakhe nakithi" 
Hosea12:5 ngombana uSomnini unguZimu uMninimandlawoke, okulibizo lakhe uSomnini adume ngalo.”" 
Hosea12:6 Awa Israyeli, kuzakufanela bonyana ubuyele kuZimakho: Thembeka ubulunge imiyalwakhe; uthembele kuZimakho ngeenkhathi zoke." 
Hosea12:7 U-Efrayimu unjengomthengisi osebenzisa isilinganiso samanga, uthanda tle ukudlelezela." 
Hosea12:8 Kodwana u-Efrayimu uzibetha isifuba uthi: “Nginjinge tle; umnotho lo, ngizifunyanele wona mina. Ngomnothwami ongaka lo, abe akunamuntu ongafunyana isiphosiso esingako inga sisono.”" 
Hosea12:9 Nje-ke uSomnini uthi: “NginguSomnini uZimakho kusukela emihleni yeGibhide; kodwana ngizakukwenza ubuyele ematendeni godu njengerhalawumbeni. 
Hosea12:10 “Ngakhuluma nabaphorofidi, ngabanikela imibono eminengi bengakhuluma imifanekiso ngabo.”" 
Hosea12:11 BakwaGiliyadi nabo gade banjingile, kodwana babhujiswa! Abantu benza imihlabelo yeenkunzi eGiligali, nokho akhange kusize litho: ama-aldarabo aba njengesiqotjana samatje magegana nesimu." 
Hosea12:12 UJakopo wabalekela enarheni ye-Aramu, u-Israyeli wasebenza nzima nazakuthatha umfazi; wamlobola ngokwelusa izimvu." 
Hosea12:13 USomnini wasebenzisa umphorofidi ukukhupha u-Israyeli eGibhide, iye, wabahlenga ngomphorofidi." 
Hosea12:14 U-Efrayimu uqhukuluze uSomnini okusilingako; iKosakhe-ke izamthwesa umlandu beyimhlawulise ngokuyirhubutjha kwakhe. 
Hosea13:1 Bekuthi lokha u-Efrayimu nakhulumako amadoda atatazele; gade ahlonitjhwa tle kwa-Israyeli. Wazenzela umlandu ngokulotjha uBhali, wafa." 
Hosea13:2 Khonapho abantu bathuwelela ngokona: Bazenzela iinthombe, abosingazimu ababazwe ngesiliva labo okumsebenzi nje owenziwe sithakgha! Ngeenthombezi bathi: “Abantu abenza umhlabelo bamele bancwange amathole la.”" 
Hosea13:3 Yeke bazakufana nekungu yamasa, bafane nombethe wekuseni othintithekako; babe njengomkhwani ophephuka eselelweni, nanjengentuthu ephutjheza entunjeni." 
Hosea13:4 USomnini uthi: “NginguSomnini uZimakho kusukela emihleni yeGibhide. Akhange wazane nomunye uzimu ngaphandle kwami begodu azange kube nomunye umsindisi ngaphandle kwami. 
Hosea13:5 Ngakwelusa nawuserhalawumbeni, enarheni yesomiso." 
Hosea13:6 Kwathi lokha nabafika emadlelweni, badla bebatatamala iziswanezi. Kuthe nasele zitatamele njalo, bazikhukhumeza; kungebangelo bangikhohlwa." 
Hosea13:7 Nje-ke ngaba njengengwenyama kibo, ngabalalela endleleni njengengwe." 
Hosea13:8 Ngizabathelekela njengonomrhaso owemukwe abantwabakhe: Ngibatlhatlhamulule iimfutjanezi. Ngizabarhiribidela njengengwenyama; iimpisi zizabarathurathula. 
Hosea13:9 Ukubhubha kwakho, wena Israyeli, kungebanga lami; mina msizakho." 
Hosea13:10 Iphi ikosakho-ke nje, izakukusindisa kiwo woke amadorobhakho na?" 
Hosea13:11 Ngininikela ikosi ngisilingekile, ngibuye ngiyisuse ngobukhali bami.”" 
Hosea13:12 USomnini uthi: “Umlandu waka-Efrayimu ubulungiwe, izono zakhe zitloliwe." 
Hosea13:13 Nakufika iinhlabi zokubeletha, u-Efrayimu uba mntwana odlhayeleko: Nakufika isikhathi uyarhodobala, angaphumi esibelethweni!" 
Hosea13:14 Ngimsindise emandleni wethuna na? Ngimhlenge ekufeni? Kufa ndina, aphi amanikelelakho? Thuna ndina, kuphi ukubhubhisa kwakho? Angeze ngamrhawukela." 
Hosea13:15 Nje-ke akazukuwadla amabele nabafowabo.” Ummoya wepumalanga ovela kuSomnini, uzakufika, uvuke erhalawumbeni; isiyalu saka-Efrayimu sizakuvaleka nomthombakhe wome kere. Ummoya lowo uzakuhlakaza woke amagugwakhe." 
Hosea13:16 ISamariya izazithwalela umlandwayo ngombana ihlubuke uZimayo. Abantu bazakubulawa ngesabula; abantwababo bazakuphihlizelwa ehlabathini, besifazana babo abasebantwini batlhatlhamululwe!" 
Hosea14:1 Buyela kuSomnini uZimakho, wena Israyeli ngombana izono zakho zikurarejile." 
Hosea14:2 Buyelani kuSomnini, nivume izono zenu nithi: “Somnini, silibalela zoke izono zethu, wamukele ukuvuma kwethu. Sithanda ukunikela ngeenthelo zomlomethu." 
Hosea14:3 I-Asiriya angeze yasisiza; asisazokuthembela eenjomaneni zepi; angeze besisatjho sithi ‘zimethu’ entweni esiyenze ngezandla zethu ngombana kuwe wedwa nentandani ifunyana isirhawu.” 
Hosea14:4 “Ngizakupholisa ukuhlubuka kwabo, ngibathande ngomusa. Njengombana ukusilingeka kwami kungasekho kibo," 
Hosea14:5 ngizakufana nombethe ku-Israyeli; yena athuthumbe njengamakhwa. anabise imirabhakhe ekuzikeni, adzimelele njengeLibhanoni;" 
Hosea14:6 amahlumelakhe azakukhula. Uzakuphazima njengomuthi we-oliva, onuka kamnandi njengehlathi leLibhanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Abantu ebebahlala emthunzinakhe bazakubuya godu batjale ikoroyi. Bazakutlhurha banabe njengesidiribe. Idumo laka-Israyeli libe njengewayini leLibhanoni. 
Hosea14:8 Efrayimu, uthi nginandabani nje neenthombe ezibaziweko? Ngimi owakuthobisako, kodwana ngizakutjheja. Ngifana nomuthi ohlala uhlaza, ukuphumelela kwakho kubuya kimi.”" 
Hosea14:9 Ohlakaniphileko uzayihlatha ikulumo le, onengqondo uzakulemuka; ngombana iindlela zakaSomnini zinqophile. Abalungileko bakhamba kizo, kodwana abaphika ikani ziyabarareja." 
Joel1:1 Ilizwi lakaSomnini elafika kuJuweli umsa kaPetuweli: 
Joel1:2 Yizwani lokhu nina baphathi, nilalele nina noke enakhe enarheni. Into enje, yakhe yenzeka eenkhathini zenu namkha eenkhathini zaboyihlo na?" 
Joel1:3 Nizoyibikela abantwabenu, nabantwabenu babikele abantwababo, nabantwababo babikele isizukulwani esilandelako." 
Joel1:4 Lokho okwatjhiywa sikhonyani kwadliwa yikumbi; okwatjhiywa liwoma lentethe kwadliwa ngelinye iwoma lentethe. 
Joel1:5 Phaphamani, nilile nina ndakwa ndina! Lilani nina nseli zewayini; lilani ngebanga lesitjhidela sewayini esihluthwe emilonyenenu." 
Joel1:6 Isizwe esinamandla nesinganakubalwa sisahlele inarha yakwethu; sinamazinyo nemihlathi enjengeyeengwenyama. 
Joel1:7 Sirhayile isidiribe sakwethu; sahlikiliza nemithi yakwethu yamakhiwani. Sebule amaqolo, sawaphuphura sawatjhwamadela; satjhiya iimpande zimhlophe twa." 
Joel1:8 Lilani njengeqhakazana elembethe iinzilo; lililela ukufa kwendoda ebeyisanda ukulithatha. 
Joel1:9 Umnikelo wamabele noweenselo awusalethwa endlini kaSomnini. Abaphristi, iinceku zakaSomnini, badanile." 
Joel1:10 Ummango urhayiliwe; amasimu omile; amabele ahlikiliziwe; iwayini elitja litjhile namafutha we-oliva akasekho. 
Joel1:11 Kakamalani nina balimi, nilile nina batjali besidiribe. Tlhuwelani ikoroyi nebhali ngombana isivuno samasimu sirhayiliwe." 
Joel1:12 Isidiribe sibunile, nemithi yamakhiwani ithintithekile. Amarharinadi, amasundu nemithi yama-apula kanye nayo yoke imithi yemmangweni itjhwabile. Kwamambala, ithabo labantu linyelele." 
Joel1:13 Baphristi, yembathani iinzilo, nirhahlawule; lilani nina enilotjha phambi kwe-aldari. Yizani nizokulila noke, nina enilotjha phambi koZimu wesivumelwano ngombana iminikelo yamabele neyeenselo ayisalethwa ethempelini lakaZimenu." 
Joel1:14 Bekani ilanga lokuzila; memezelani umhlangano okhethekileko. Bizelani endlini kaSomnini uZimenu, abaphathi boke nezakhamuzi; nilile kuSomnini." 
Joel1:15 Maye mhlokho! Ngambala ilanga lakaSomnini libandamele; liza ngokubhubhisa okukhulu kukaSomandla. 
Joel1:16 Angithi ukudla kurhayiliwe phambi kwamehlwethu? Angithi ukuthokoza nethabo kuphelile ekumbeni kaZimethu? 
Joel1:17 Iimbewu ziyakghora ngaphasi kwamagade. Amadladla amafuhlufuhlu, iinlulu zirhirikile ngombana amabele omile." 
Joel1:18 Maye ukubongolela kweenkomo! Imihlambi ihlakazekile ngombana ayinamadlelo; ngitjho nemihlambi yezimvu isesonweni. 
Joel1:19 Ngilila kuwe Somnini ngombana umlilo utjhise amadlelo emrhuleni, amalangabi arhabule yoke imithi yommango." 
Joel1:20 Ngitjho neembandana zommango zilila kuwe Somnini ngombana imilambo yamanzi yomile. Umlilo utjhise amadlelo emrhuleni. 
Joel2:1 USomnini uthi: “Vuthelani ipalapala eZiyoni; nihlabe umkhosi entatjaneni yami ecwengileko.” Akuthi zoke izakhamuzi zihlengezele ngombana ilanga lakaSomnini liyeza; iye, selitjhidele khulu." 
Joel2:2 Lilanga elimnyama nelifipheleko, ilanga lamafu nesigayegaye. Njengokusa kugubuzesa iintaba, kuza ibutho elikhulu; elingazange khelibekhona elinjalo nekadeni, nelingasoze labakhona eenkhathini ezizako." 
Joel2:3 Phambi kwalo kurhayila umlilo, ngemuva kwalo kurubha ilangabu. Phambi kwalo inarha injengesivande se-Edeni, ngemuva kwalo kube libhudu lerhalawumba. Akunalitho elisindako kilo." 
Joel2:4 Ibuthweli liqaleka njengeenjomani; ligijima njengeenjomani zabakhweli. 
Joel2:5 Lilakutja eenqongweni zeentaba, ngetjhada elinjengeleenkarana zepi. Linjengokuthuthumba komlilo obabula amawunguwungu; linjengepi nayijokola evadleni." 
Joel2:6 Ngokuvela kwalo izizwe ziyavevezela; boke bethuka bomelele. 
Joel2:7 Ibuthweli lisahlela njengeenkutani; bakhuphuka ngomthangala njengamajoni. Boke banqomba rwe, abaphambuki emnqophenabo." 
Joel2:8 Abaliyani endleleni, omunye nomunye unqophe phambili. Nanyana baphoswa ngemikhonto ngapha nangapha, abaphambuki emnqophenabo." 
Joel2:9 Batheleka emzini, bagijime emthangaleni, bakhwela ezindlini, bangene emafesiderini njengamasela." 
Joel2:10 Phambi kwabo kudengezela iphasi, isibhakabhaka sihlengezele. Ilanga nenyanga kufiphale, iinkwekwezi zingasakhanyi." 
Joel2:11 USomnini uzwakalisa ilizwi phezu kwebutho lakhe. Ngambala amabuthwakhe manengi khulu begodu baqinile abalalela imiyalwakhe. Iye, ilanga lakaSomnini likhulu, lesabeka kwamambala. Ngubani ongalijamela na?" 
Joel2:12 USomnini uthi: “Nanjesi buyelani kimi ngehliziywenu yoke, ngokuzila nokulila nokubibitheka.”" 
Joel2:13 Dabulani iinhliziyo zenu, ingasi izambatho zenu kwaphela. Buyelani kuZimu uSomnini, ngombana unomusa nesirhawu, uthathela kude ukusilingeka, uthembeka khulu, uyariyada ekurhayileni." 
Joel2:14 Ngubani owaziko? Mhlamunye angajika atjhugulule umkhumbulo; anitjhiyele isibusiso: umnikelo wamabele nokuselwako kwakaSomnini uZimenu. 
Joel2:15 Vuthelani ipalapala eZiyoni; bekani ilanga lokuzila, nimemezele umhlangano okhethekileko." 
Joel2:16 Bizelani abantu ndawonye, nihlambulule ibandla, hlanganisani abaphathi ndawonye, nibuthelele abantwana, iye, ngitjho nabamunyako. Umkhwenyana akaphume ngelawini lakhe, nomlobokazi ngetendeni lakhe." 
Joel2:17 Abaphristi abalotjha phambi kwakaSomnini, abalile hlangana namathuri wethempeli ne-aldari, bathi: “Hawu Somnini! Rhawukela abantu bakho. Ungavumi bona ilifa lakho lirhubutjhwe libe sisiga hlangana nezizwe. Kubayini abantu bebathi ezizweni: ‘Njekhona uphi uZimabo loyo?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Yeke, uSomnini wamela inarhakhe, warhawukela abantu bakhe." 
Joel2:19 USomnini waphendula wathi ebantwini bakhe: “Nginithumelela amabele, isitjhidela sewayini namafutha we-oliva bona kunisuthise. Angeze ngisavuma bona babe siphoqo ezizweni." 
Joel2:20 Ngizakudedisela ibutho letlhagwini kude nani; ngilihlakazele enarheni eyomileko neligagadu. Ihlokwalo iqale ngepumalanga yelwandle, umsilalo uqale ngetjingalanga yelwandle. Kukhuphuke umnukwalo, kuvuke isivunda salo ngombana benze izinto ezesabekako.”" 
Joel2:21 Ungesabi wena hlabathi, kodwana thaba uthokoze ngombana uSomnini uzokwenza izinto ezikulu." 
Joel2:22 Ningesabi nina mbandana zommango, ngombana amadlelo emrhuleni azokuba lihlaza; nemithi ithele iinthelo zayo; imithi yamakhiwani nesidiribe kuhlome kuphuke." 
Joel2:23 Thabani nani bantu beZiyoni, nithokoze kuSomnini uZimenu ngombana uzanipha labo abazanifundisa indlela efaneleko; uzaninisela izulu, okutjho ikhukhulamungu nesewula njengaphambilini." 
Joel2:24 Izelelo zizakuzala amabele neembekelelo ziphuphume ngesitjhidela sewayini namafutha we-oliva. 
Joel2:25 USomnini uthi: “Ngizanibuyisela amabele adliwa sikhonyani, yikumbi, newoma leentethe, okulibutho lami elikhulu engalithumela phakathi kwenu." 
Joel2:26 Nje-ke, nizakuba nenala nidle nanele; nizakudumisa ibizo lakaSomnini uZimenu, owanenzela imikarisomraro. Isizwe sami angeze sisaphoqeka." 
Joel2:27 Nizakutjho bona ngiphakathi ko-Israyeli, nokuthi nginguSomnini uZimenu akakho omunye. Isizwe sami angeze sisaphoqeka.”" 
Joel2:28 “Kuzakuthi emuva kwalokho ngithululele uMoyami kibo boke abantu. Amadodanenu namadodakazenu azakuphorofida; abadala benu babhudange amabhudango; abatjha benu babone imibono. 
Joel2:29 Iye, emalangeni lawo ngizakuthululela uMoyami naphezu kweenceku neencekukazi." 
Joel2:30 Ngizakuveza amabono ezulwini nephasini: iingazi nomlilo nesimukumuku sentuthu. 
Joel2:31 Lokhu kuzakwenzeka ngebanga lokuza kwelanga lakaSomnini elikhulu nelesabekako; ilanga lizakuphenduka libe nzima nenyezi ibe ziingazi.” 
Joel2:32 Kuzakuthi boke ababiza ibizo lakaSomnini basindiswe, njengombana uSomnini atjho, asithi: “Phezu kwentaba yeZiyoni neJerusalema kuzakubakhona isindiso.” Nalabo uSomnini azababiza phakathi kwezizwe bazakusindiswa." 
Joel3:1 USomnini uthi: “Iye, emalangeni lawo nesikhathineso, lokha nangitjhugulula ubujamo bakwaJuda neJerusalema," 
Joel3:2 ngizakubutha izizwe zoke, ngizilethe emrhobeni kaJehotjhafathi. Lapho-ke ngizazimangalela ngebanga labantu bami, abalilifa lami, u-Israyeli ngombana zibasabalalise hlangana nezizwe, zabahlukanisa nenarhami." 
Joel3:3 Zaphosa ifumbe ngabantu bami, zathenga ukulala neengwadla ngabesana; zathenga umrhamulo wewayini ngabentazana." 
Joel3:4 “Alo-ke, wena Tirosi neTsidoni, nani noke mfunda zeFilista: Ningifunani na? Nifuna ukuzibuyiselela na? Nangabe nifuna ukuzibuyiselela ngizakurhaba, nginibethe ngeentonga zenu." 
Joel3:5 Nithethe igolide nesiliva lami, benathatha namagugwami wakanokutjho nawasa emathempelinenu." 
Joel3:6 Nithengise abantu bakwaJuda nebeJerusalema emaGirigini ukuze nibathumele kude nenarhekhabo. 
Joel3:7 Ngalokho yelelani la: Ngizobaphaphamisa eendaweni enibathengise kizwezo, nginibethe ngeentonga zenu." 
Joel3:8 Ngizokuthengisa amadodana namadodakazenu ebantwini bakwaJuda; bona bawathengisele amaTjheba isizwe esikude.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Joel3:9 “Tjelani izizwe into le, nithi, ‘Zilungiseleleni ipi! Vusani iintsitsirimba! Amabutho woke akahlome asahlele!" 
Joel3:10 Kghadlhani amalembenu wokulima nenze iinsabula, nenze imikhwa yokuqopha isidiribe ibe mikhonto. Obogabogako akazitjho athi: Ngiyitsitsirimba!" 
Joel3:11 Nina zizwe, yizani msinyana noke, nibuthane mazombe emrhobeni kaJehotjhafathi.’ ” Somnini, kwanga ungehlisa amabuthwakho!" 
Joel3:12 USomnini uthi: “Izizwe azivuke, zehlele ngemrhobeni kaJehotjhafathi ngombana lapho ngizokuhlala, ngigwebe izizwe zoke mazombe." 
Joel3:13 Fakani isegere ngombana isivuno sivuthiwe! Yizani nizokugaya abantwaba njengamabele. Ngibasuthi ngobukhohlakali babo, obuphuphuma njengotjwala emarhabheni!”" 
Joel3:14 Iinqubuthu ngeenqubuthu zisemrhobeni wokugwebela ngombana ilanga lakaSomnini litjhidele ngemrhobeni lowo. 
Joel3:15 Ilanga nenyezi zizakufiphala, iinkwekwezi zingasakhanyi." 
Joel3:16 USomnini uzakubhodla aseZiyoni, athuthumbise ngombani aseJerusalema; izulu nephasi zizakuthuthumela. Nokho uSomnini uzakuba lirholo labantu bakhe, abe siphephelo sabantu bakwa-Israyeli." 
Joel3:17 USomnini uthi: “Nizabe seniyazi-ke bona nginguSomnini, uZimenu, ohlala eZiyoni, entabenami ecwengileko. IJerusalema izakuba ngecwengileko; abatjhili angeze basalibeka kiyo." 
Joel3:18 Mhlokho iintaba zizakuthonta isitjhidela sewayini, imibundu itleleze ibisi; yoke imilanjana yakwaJuda igeleze amanzi. Umthombo uzakuvinyilika endlini kaSomnini, usezele umrhoba weTjhithimu." 
Joel3:19 IGibhide izakuba ligagadu, i-Edomu ibe libhudu lerhalawumba ngebanga lomguruguru owenziwe ebantwini bakwaJuda, enarheni abaphalaza kiyo iingazi ezinganamlandu." 
Joel3:20 Kodwana inarha yakwaJuda izakuhlalwa nini nanini, iJerusalema ihlalwe ziinzukulwana ngeenzukulwana." 
Joel3:21 Ngingahlala ngingabagwebi abaphalaze iingazi zakaJuda na? Awa, angeze bengithome.” USomnini uzakuhlala eZiyoni!" 
Amos1:1 La mamezwi waka-Amosi ogade angumelusi wezimvu eTekhowa. Wembulelwa iimphorofidezwi ngo-Israyeli eminyakeni emibili ngaphambi kokuhlengezela kwephasi, lokha u-Uziya asese yikosi yakwaJuda begodu noJerobhowamu umsa kaJowatjhi asese yikosi kwa-Israyeli." 
Amos1:2 U-Amosi wathi: “USomnini ubhodla aseZiyoni; uzwakalisa ilizwi lakhe aseJerusalema. Amasiso wabelusi ayatjhwaba; kuthi isiqongolo seKarameli somelele.” 
Amos1:3 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini: “Angizolicolela iDamaseku ngombana yone kokona: Batshidlha iGiliyadi ngesileyi esinamazinyo wesimbi. 
Amos1:4 Yeke ngizakuthumela umlilo ngaphakathi kwekumba kaRhazayeli, uqothule isigodlo sakaBheni-Hadadi." 
Amos1:5 Ngizakwephula isiqabo seDamaseku; ngibhubhise ikosi yeBikhadi-Aveni ephethe intonga yobukhosi eBhethe-Edeni. Abantu beSiriya bazakusiwa ekuthunjweni eKiri.” 
Amos1:6 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini: “Angizolicolela iGaza ngombana yone kokona. Bathethe woke umuzi bawusa ekuthunjweni bebawuthengisela u-Edomu. 
Amos1:7 Yeke ngizakuthumela umlilo ngaphakathi kwemithangala yeGaza, uqothule isigodlo sakhona." 
Amos1:8 Ngizakubhubhisa ikosi ye-Atjhidodi begodu nophethe intonga yobukhosi be-Atjhikheloni. Ngizakuphendukela abantu be-Ekroni, imisalela yamaFilisti izakubhubha.” Kutjho uSomnini uSomandla." 
Amos1:9 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini: “Angizolicolela iTirosi ngombana yone kokona: Bathumba bebathengisa woke umuzi ku-Edomu. Azange bayelele isivumelwano nabafowabo. 
Amos1:10 Yeke ngizakuthumela umlilo ngaphakathi kwemithangala yeTirosi, uqothule isigodlo sayo.”" 
Amos1:11 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini: “Angizoyicolela i-Edomu ngombana yone kokona: Bagijimisa umfowabo ngesabula, balahla isisa sabo; babilelwa ziingazi, baba nezondo engapheliko." 
Amos1:12 Yeke ngizakuthumela umlilo ngaphakathi kweTemani, uqothule isigodlo seBhozira.”" 
Amos1:13 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini: “Angizoyicolela i-Amoni, ngombana yone kokona: Bakghakghamulula izisu zabesifazana beGiliyadi abasidisi ukuze bangezelele imikhawulwabo." 
Amos1:14 Yeke ngizakuvuthisa umlilo ngaphakathi kwemithangala yeRabha, uqothule isigodlo sakhona. Umkhosi wepi uzakuzwakala njengesiwuruwuru;" 
Amos1:15 ikosabo izakuthunjwa, yona nababusi bayo.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Amos2:1 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini: “Angizoyicolela iMowabi ngombana yone kokona: Batjhise amathambo wekosi yakwa-Edomu aba mlotha. 
Amos2:2 Yeke ngizakuthumela umlilo eMowabi, uqothule isigodlo seKeriyothi. UMowabi uzakufela phakathi kwerawurawu enetjhada lepi nokulila kwepalapala." 
Amos2:3 Ngizakutjhabalalisa umbusi wakhona bengibulale neenkhulu zakhona zoke zife naye.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Amos2:4 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini: “Angizoyicolela iJuda ngombana yone kokona: Balahle umthetho kaSomnini begodu bangalalela imiyalwakhe. Badurhiswa bosingazimu, abosingazimu abalandelwa bokhokho babo." 
Amos2:5 Ngizakuthumela umlilo kwaJuda, uqothule isigodlo seJerusalema.”" 
Amos2:6 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini: “Angizomcolela u-Israyeli ngombana wone kokona: Bathengisa omsulwa ngesiliva nodududu ngamapatlagwana amabili. 
Amos2:7 Babhudabhuda iinhloko zabatlhagileko ebhudwini; bagandelela ababuthakathaka. Umuntu noyise balalana nomntazana munye basilaphaza ibizo lami elicwengileko. 
Amos2:8 Bakhamba barabhalala eqadi kwe-aldari elinye nelinye ngezambatho zesibambiso sesikolodo. Bathatha iwayini abalemuke abantu, balirhamulele ngethempeleni lakaZimabo." 
Amos2:9 “Mina ngawatjhabalalisa ama-Amori phambi kwabo, nanyana ayemade njengomsedari begodu aqine njenge-owuku. Ngawasiphula nesidindi sawo." 
Amos2:10 “Mina nganikhupha eGibhide, benganihlahla iminyaka ematjhumi amane erhalawumbeni bona nginiphe inarha yama-Amori." 
Amos2:11 Godu nganivusela nabaphorofidi phakathi kwamadodanenu benganivusela nabanaziri phakathi kwamasokanenu. Akusinjalo na, bantu bakwa-Israyeli?” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Amos2:12 “Kodwana nirhamulise abanaziri iwayini benatjela nabaphorofidi bonyana bangaphorofidi. 
Amos2:13 “Ngizanenza nibhajwe njengekarana nayilayitjhe intundu yeentjherefu zekoroyi. 
Amos2:14 Nonebelo angeze aphunyurha netsitsirimba izakutekezela nesihlabani sibhalelwe kuzisindisa. 
Amos2:15 Umdumuzi ngomsebe uzakubhalelwa kujama, amajoni weenyawo angeze aphunyurha nokhwele injomani uzakubhalelwa kuzisindisa." 
Amos2:16 Ngitjho netsitsirimba ekuthiwa sihlabani, mhlokho izakugijima ibhunubhunu.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Amos3:1 Yenilalele ilizwi nanti elikhulunywe nguSomnini ngokujamelana nani, nina bantu bakwa-Israyeli, ngokujamelana nomndeni woke awukhipha eGibhide:" 
Amos3:2 “Ngini kwaphela enganikhetha phakathi kwemindeni yoke yephaseli; yeke ngizanihlunguphaza ngebanga lazo zoke izono zenu.” 
Amos3:3 Abantu ababili bangakhamba ndawonye bangakavumelani na? 
Amos3:4 Ingwenyama kheyibhodle emahlathini kungananyamazana na? Ingwenyamana iyalizwakalisa ilizwi layo emphandwinayo kunganalitho na? 
Amos3:5 Nabonaphi inyoni ibanjwa sisifu singakathiywa na? Kghani isifu vane sithankghuluke kungananto esithankghululako na? 
Amos3:6 Nakulila ipalapala edorobheni, abantu abathuthumeli na? Lokha idorobho nalivelelwa yihlekelele, vane kungasi nguSomnini olinikeleleko na?" 
Amos3:7 Ngambala uSomnini uSomandla akenzi izinto angakembuli ifihlo eencekwini zakhe, okubaphorofidi." 
Amos3:8 Ingwenyama ibhodlile-ke! Ngubani ozakuhlala akwakwalale? USomnini uSomandla ukhulumile! Ngubani-ke ozakuhlala angaphorofidi na? 
Amos3:9 Memezelani esigodlweni se-Atjhidodi nesigodlweni seGibhide nithi: “Buthanani nihlangane eentabeni zeSamariya; nibone ukutjharagana okulapho nangendlela kunegandelelo ngakhona ebantwini.” 
Amos3:10 USomnini wathi: “Abantwaba abakwazi ukwenza okulungileko, bazalisa iingodlo zabo ngepahla abayigongodileko nebayizuze ngenturhu.”" 
Amos3:11 Nje-ke, nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla: “Inaba lizakuzombeleza inarhenu, litsomule iinsika beligongode neengodlo zenu.”" 
Amos3:12 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini: “Njengomelusi nakabutha imisalela yemvu, ekumilenze emibili namkha isiqunjwana sendlebe ekutjhiywe yingwenyama, kuzakuba njalo ngama-Israyeli ahlala eSamariya: Amasalela azakufunyanwa lapho kuzase sekube lihlangotjhana lombhede nenyawana lesitulo.”" 
Amos3:13 “Lalelani lapha, nifakaze ngokujamelana nekumba kaJakopo.” Kutjho uSomnini uSomandla, uZimu uMninimandlawoke." 
Amos3:14 “Mhlana ngihlunguphaza u-Israyeli ngebanga lokona kwakhe, ngizokona ama-aldari weBhethe-Eli; iimpondo ze-aldari zizakwephulwa bezikhithikele ehlabathini." 
Amos3:15 Ngizakubhuruza iinkumba zebusika nezehlobo; iinkumba ezikghatjiswe ngamazinyo wendlovu zizakugirizwa nabobhazabhaza beenkumba barhirizwe.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Amos4:1 Lalelani lapha nina bafazi beSamariya, ngokunonakazi inga niziinkomo zeBhatjhani, nina enigandelela abantu abakhwahlileko benitshidlhe nabadududu, nithi emadodenenu “Thelani sisele!”" 
Amos4:2 USomnini uSomandla uzifunge ngokwakhe wathi: “Ngiqinisile ngithi siyeza isikhathi senu lapha nizakutjathwa khona ngeenkghopholo nebamaswaphelo benu barhurhubiswe ngesikghopholahlambi. 
Amos4:3 Omunye nomunye wenu uzakukhutjhwa ngentunja ebodeni, alahlelwe eHarimoni.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Amos4:4 “Bantu bakwa-Israyeli, khambani niye eBhethe-Eli nifike none, iyani eGiligali nithuwelele ngokona. Lethani iminikelwenu qobe kusekuseni, nokwetjhumi kwenu njalo eminyakeni emithathu." 
Amos4:5 Nikelani ngesikwa esiwunyelweko kube mnikelo wokuthokoza. Memezelani iminikelweni yesihle, nizikhakhazise ngombana vele yinto eniyithabelako leyo ma-Israyeli.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Amos4:6 “Mina nganilethela indlala kiwo woke amadorobho; ngatswinya umuzi omunye nomunye ngesikwa. Kodwana azange niphendukele kimi.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Amos4:7 “Ngabuya godu ngabamba izulu iinyanga ezintathu ngaphambi kokuvuna. Ngathumela izulu emzini owodwa, kodwana ngalikhandela keminye. Isimu enye yaba nezulu, kodwana enye yalitlhoga beyoma kere." 
Amos4:8 Kusukela emizini emibili kuya kemithathu abantu bayerayera batjhinga emzini owodwa, bafuna amanzi nabawatholako akhange abanele. Kodwana azange niphendukele kimi.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Amos4:9 “Ngarhadla iimvande neendiribe zenu ngobubori nangokukghora. Kwafika isikhonyani sarhayila imithenu yamakhiwani neye-oliva. Kodwana azange niphendukele kimi.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Amos4:10 “Ngathumela amatshwenyeko phakathi kwenu njengombana ngenza ebantwini beGibhide. Ngabulala amasokanenu ngesabula, iinjomani zenu zathunjwa. Ngazalisa iinkampa zenu ngesivunda seendumbu. Kodwana azange niphendukele kimi.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Amos4:11 “Ngabhubhisa inengi lenu njengombana ngabhubhisa iSodoma neGomora. Benifana nesikhuni esivuthako esirhwatjhwe emlilweni. Kodwana azange niphendukele kimi.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Amos4:12 “Nakhu engizakwenza khona, wena Israyeli. Ngiqinisile ngithi ngizakwenza into: Yeke zihlanganise noZimakho, wena Israyeli.”" 
Amos4:13 Ngambala ngowabumba iintaba, wadala imimoya, wembula imikhumbulwakhe ebantwini; uphendula itathakusa ayenze ubumnyama, agadange iinqongo zephasi , ibizo lakhe nguSomnini uZimu uMninimandlawoke." 
Amos5:1 Lalela ilizweli wena kumba yakwa-Israyeli, ingoma yesililo ngiyikhalelela wena:" 
Amos5:2 “Liwile itlawu elingu-Israyeli, angekhe belisavuka godu, lilahliwe enarheni yekhabo, abe akunamuntu noyedwa olibuthako.”" 
Amos5:3 Iye, nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uSomandla: “Idorobho lakwa-Israyeli elithumela amajoni ayikulungwana epini, kubuya ikhulu kwaphela; elithumela amajoni alikhulu, kubuya itjhumi kwaphela.”" 
Amos5:4 Ngambala nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini ekumbeni ka-Israyeli: “Ngifunani; yeke nizakuphila. 
Amos5:5 Musani ukuya eBhethe-Eli, ningayi eGiligali, ningayameli eBheritjheba. Ngiqinisile ngithi iGiligali izakuthunjwa, kuthi iBhethe-Eli yenziwe ilize lakolize.”" 
Amos5:6 Funani uSomnini ukuze niphile, nakungasi njalo uzakubhebhedlha phakathi kwekumba kaJosefa njengomlilo; uzakurubha eBhethe-Eli, uqothule kutlhogeke umuntu ongawucima." 
Amos5:7 Yelelani nina eniphendula ukulunga nakwenza umhlonyani, nina enikghurumejela umthetho eqadi:" 
Amos5:8 Ongumenzi wekwekwezi yesiLimela nekwekwezi yesiRuthwana; ophendula ubumnyama bube yitathakusa, kuthi imini ibe busuku; ubiza amanzi welwandle awaphalazele ebusweni benarha. Ibizo lakhe nguSomnini." 
Amos5:8 Ongumenzi wekwekwezi yesiLimela nekwekwezi yesiRuthwana; ophendula ubumnyama bube yitathakusa, kuthi imini ibe busuku; ubiza amanzi welwandle awaphalazele ebusweni benarha. Ibizo lakhe nguSomnini." 
Amos5:9 Nguye orhadla isika ngombani, agirize isisekelo sedorobho." 
Amos5:10 USomnini wathi: “Nizonda umuntu okhalimako ekhotho, okhuluma iqiniso niyamnyaza." 
Amos5:11 Kungebangelo nigandelela okhwahlileko benimkatelele bona aniphe amabele. Nakhe abobhazabhazakazi beenkumba zamatje nje, kodwana anizozihlala; nitjele iindiribe, kodwana anizolisela iwayini lakhonelo." 
Amos5:12 Ngombana ngikwazi koke ukona kwenu okunengi nokuthi izono zenu zikulu kangangani. Nigandelele omsulwa ngokufunjathiswa, nemuke odududu ilungelo lakhe ekhotho." 
Amos5:13 Eenkhathini ezinje umuntu ohlakaniphileko uvala phetjheya, ngombana lezi ziinkhathi ezimbi.”" 
Amos5:14 Funani ukulunga, nilise ubukhohlakali, nizakuphila! Yeke uSomnini uZimu uMninimandlawoke uzakuba nani, njengombana nani nisitjho." 
Amos5:15 Zondani ubukhohlakali, nithande ukulunga, nithembeke emakhotho. Mhlamunye uSomnini uZimu uMninimandlawoke angaba nomusa kumisalela kaJosefa." 
Amos5:16 Nakhu-ke okwatjhiwo uSomnini uSomandla, uZimu uMninimandlawoke uthi: “Kuzakurhahlawulwa ematatawini woke, kulilwe isimayemaye kizo zoke iindledlana. Abalimi bazakubizwa bona bazokulila nabafazi besililo kuthiwe barhahlawule." 
Amos5:17 Kuzakurhahlawulwa eendiribeni zoke ngombanyana ngiyeza, ngizokudlula phakathi kwenu.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Amos5:18 Nizazizwa nina enihlulukela ilanga lakaSomnini! Nilihlulukelelani ilanga lakaSomnini na? Ngambala, kuzokuba lilanga elimnyama, kungabi nokukhanya." 
Amos5:19 Kuzakuba ngathi mumuntu othe ubaleka ingwenyama wazithela phezu kwebhere; naphunyurha ebhereni wangena kwakhe, wabeka isandla ebodeni walunywa yinyoka." 
Amos5:20 Ilanga lakaSomnini lizokuba mnyama; kutlhogeke umkhanyo kube lilanga lamatlhuwo. 
Amos5:21 USomnini wathi: “Ngiyayizonda begodu ngiyayinyenya iminyanya yekolo yenu; imihlangano yenu ayinyamezeleleki. 
Amos5:22 Nanyana ningangilethela imihlabelo yokutjhiswa neminikelo yamabele, angeze ngiyamukele; iminikelo yetjhebiswano yamanoni angizoyitjheja." 
Amos5:23 Sukelani le, ngetjhadakazi leengoma zenwezo! Angifuni nokuzizwa iinodo zamaharibhenu." 
Amos5:24 Kodwana ukulunga akugeleze njengamanzi, ukwethembeka kugeleze njengomlambo ongatjhiko!" 
Amos5:25 “Ngakhe nganiyala bonyana ningilethele imihlabelo neminikelo eminyakeni ematjhumi amane eniyihlezi erhalawumbeni nina bantu bakwa-Israyeli na? 
Amos5:26 Ngebangelo uSikuti ikosenu noKiyuni uzimenu wekwekwezi, okumifanekiso yabosingazimu benu enazenzela yona," 
Amos5:27 nizoyithwala lokha nanginiqotjhela ekuthunjweni ngaphetjheya kweDamaseku.” Kutjho uSomnini; ibizo lakhe nguZimu uMninimandlawoke. 
Amos6:1 Nizazizwa nina enihlezi nathabalala eZiyoni, nani enizizwela nivikelekile entabeni yeSamariya; ngitjho nina madoda, aqakathekileko esizweni esikhulu, lapha abantu bakwa-Israyeli bagijimela khona nabanemiraro." 
Amos6:2 Ngithi khambani niye eKaline nifike niyibukele; nanisuka lapho ninqombe eHamati ekulu, nigege njalo beniyokufika enzasi eGati yeFilistiya. Fenizibuze bona iindawezi zingcono kunemibuso yenu emibili na? Kghani zinenarha edlula yenu?" 
Amos6:3 Niphayela ilanga lekohlakalo eqadi, ngezenzo zenu nitjhideza umbuso werawurawu." 
Amos6:4 Nilala emibhedeni ekghatjiswe ngamazinyo wendlovu, nizigedle emasofeni wenu kanokutjho. Nigoma iinkhanakhana zenyama yemvu neyamathole anonisiweko." 
Amos6:5 Nitlama iingoma, nincinze amarhabhu wenu, nibhine njengoDavida." 
Amos6:6 Nisela iwayini ngomjeka, nizimonyonge ngamafutha kanokutjho; kodwana anikuzileli ukurhayilwa kwakaJosefa." 
Amos6:7 Yeke nizakuba hlangana nebokuthoma abazakuya ekuthunjweni; ukukhomba kwenu ngophakathi kuzakuphela. 
Amos6:8 USomnini uSomandla wazifunga ngokwakhe, iye, uSomnini uZimu uMninimandlawoke wathi: “Ngiyakuhloya ukuzigqaja kwabantu bakaJakopo neengodlo zakhe ziyangikghabhudlha. Idorobheli ngizolinikelela ngezitha nakho koke kwalo.”" 
Amos6:9 Nangabe kusele amadoda alitjhumi endlini eyodwa, nawo azokufa." 
Amos6:10 Kuzakuthi isihlobo sabafilekwabo nasifanele bona sikhuphe iindumbu zabo ngendlini bona sizitjhise bese sibuza nanyana ngubani esimfumana lapho sithi: “Kusese nesinye isidumbu lapho na?” Waphendula wathi: “Awa,” bese isihlobeso siyaraga sithi: “Sh! Singalingi siphathe ibizo lakaSomnini.”" 
Amos6:11 Ngambala, lokha uSomnini nakakhupha umyalo, kugirika ikumba ekulu ibe ziinquqwana, kuthi encani ibe ziintshutshurwana." 
Amos6:12 Nakhe nabona iinjomani zirholobha phezu kwamadwala na? Umuntu yena wakhe walima khonapho ngeenkabi na? Kodwana nina niphendule umthetho waba sihlungu; najika isithelo sokulunga nasenza saba mhlonyani. 
Amos6:13 Nina enizigqaja ngokuthumba kwenu umuzi we Lo-Debhara, bese nithi: “IKharanayimi asikazithumbeli yona ngeenkhwepha zethu na?”" 
Amos6:14 “Ngizoninikelela ngesizwe bona sinivukele nina bantu bakwa-Israyeli, sinigandelele ukusuka eLebo-Hamathi kuya emrhobeni we-Arabha.” Kutjho uSomnini uZimu uMninimandlawoke." 
Amos7:1 Nakhu engakuboniswa nguSomnini uSomandla: Ngambona alungisa iwoma lesikhonyani emva kobana ikosi seyilumile; nakuthoma ukumila amakhikhizela. 
Amos7:2 Kuthe lokha isikhonyaneso nasiqeda ukudla sithanyele esimini, ngarabhela ngathi: “Awu, Somnini Somandla, libalela! UJakopo lo uzakusinda njani nanje? Qala bona ubogaboga kangangani!”" 
Amos7:3 USomnini watjhugulula umkhumbulo wakhe wathi: “Lokhu okubonileko angekhe kwenzeka.” 
Amos7:4 Nakhu engakuboniswa nguSomnini uSomandla: USomnini uSomandla wabiza ukwahlulela komlilo; kwafika kwatjhisa amalwandle oma kere, bekwalumatha inarha yoke." 
Amos7:5 Ngathoma godu ngarabhela ngathi: “Awu, Somnini Somandla, ngiyakubawa, akhewujame ngamatje! UJakopo lo uzakusinda njani nanje? Qala bona ubogaboga kangangani!”" 
Amos7:6 USomnini watjhugulula umkhumbulo wakhe wathi: “Lokhu nakho angeze kwenzeka.” 
Amos7:7 USomnini wangibonisa omunye umbono godu: USomini bekajame hlanu kweboda elakhiwe kuhle lanqopha, aphethe isinqophisamakho ngesandla." 
Amos7:8 Yeke uSomnini wangibuza wathi: “Amosi, ubonani na?” Ngaphendula ngathi: “Ngibona isinqophisamakho.” Yeke uSomnini wathi: “Ngibeka isinqophisamakho hlangana nabantu bami bakwa-Israyeli; angekhe ngisabababalela." 
Amos7:9 Iinduli zaka-Isaka zizakubhuruzwa neendawo ezicwengileko zaka-Israyeli zizakurhirizwa. Ngizakuvukela ikumba kaJerobhowamu ngesabulami.” 
Amos7:10 Nje-ke, u-Amaziya umphristi weBhethe-Eli, wathumela umyalezo kuJerobhowamu ikosi yakwa-Israyeli wathi: “U-Amosi uhlala isicathana ngawe esidindini sabantu bakwa-Israyeli. Yeke isizwe angeze sawanyamezelela amagamakhe." 
Amos7:11 Ngombana ukhuluma uthi, ‘UJerobhowamu uzakufa ngesabula kanti u-Israyeli yena ngiqinisile ngithi, uzakusiwa ekuthunjweni enarheni ekude.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 U-Amaziya wathi ku-Amosi: “Sukela le, wena mboni ndina! Khamba ubuyele enarheni yakwaJuda, fewuphorofide bewusebenzele nesikwa sakho lapho." 
Amos7:13 Ungabusathoma uzokuphorofidela eBhethelapha godu ngombana kusesigodlweni sekosi lapha begodu kulithempeli lobukhosi.” 
Amos7:14 U-Amosi waphendula u-Amaziya wathi: “Zange khengibe mphorofidi namkha indodana yomphorofidi, kodwana bengingumelusi begodu bengitlhogomela imithi yamakhiwani." 
Amos7:15 Yeke uSomnini wangithatha ekweluseni wathi kimi, ‘Khamba uyokuphorofida ebantwini bami bakwa-Israyeli.’" 
Amos7:16 Alo-ke, gadesi lalela ilizwi lakaSomnini. Wena uthi kimi, ‘Musa ukuphorofida kumbi ngo-Israyeli bewulise nokutjhumayela kumbi ngekumba ka-Isaka’." 
Amos7:17 “Nje-ke Amaziya, uSomnini uthi kuwe, ‘Umkakho uzakuba yingwadla yedorobheli; amadodana namadodakazakho azakubulawa ngesabula. Inarha yakho izakulinganiswa, yabelwe abanye. Wena uzakufela enarheni engakahlambuluki. U-Israyeli nakanjani uzakusiwa ekuthunjweni enarheni ekude neyekhabo.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Nakhu engakuboniswa nguSomnini uSomandla: Ngabona isiqwebu sizele iinthelo ezivuthiweko. 
Amos8:2 USomnini wangibuza wathi: “Amosi, ubonani na?” Ngaphendula ngathi: “Ngibona isiqwebu seenthelo ezivuthiweko.” USomnini wathi kimi: “Isikhathi sokubabalela isizwe sami u-Israyeli siphelile, angekhe ngisabababalela." 
Amos8:3 Mhlokho iingoma ezibhinwa ngethempeleni zizakuphenduka isililo. Kuzakusabalala iindumbu yoke indawo. Kuzakuthi nghwayi!” 
Amos8:4 Lalelani lapha, nina eniqaqada phezu kwabatlhogako, nirhayile abantu abakhwahlileko benarha le," 
Amos8:5 nibe nisithi: “Kazi umnyanya ocwengileko wokuthwasa kwenyanga lowo uyokudlula nini, ukuze sikghone ukuthengisa amabele! ISabatha lona liyokuphela nini? Sele sifuna ukuthengisa ikoroyi thina!” Nitjho njalo kwabe ninciphisa iinlinganiso, nikhuphula amanani benidlelezele ngokusebenzisa iinlinganiso ngokukhohlakeleko." 
Amos8:6 Nithenga abadududu ngesiliva nabatlhogako ngepara yamapatlagwana. Nithengisa ngitjho namasalela wekoroyi eniyithanyeleko. 
Amos8:7 USomnini ufunge ngeDumo lakaJakopo wathi: “Nanyana yini abayenzileko angeze ngayikhohlwa. 
Amos8:8 Inarha ayizukusikinyeka ngebangeli na, abantu abahlala khona bazile ngomzana? Inarha yoke izakuphuphuma njengomlambo iNayili; izakuzamaziswa, ibohle njengomlambo weGibhide.”" 
Amos8:9 USomnini uSomandla wathi: “Mhlokho ngizakwenza ilanga bona litjhinge emini, bese ephasini kuba mnyama, emini kwa bha." 
Amos8:10 Ngizaphendula imigidi yenu yekolo ibe sizilo nokubhina kwenu koke kube sililo. Ngizanembathisa iinzilo noke nje nirhune iinhloko zenu. Isikhatheso ngizasenza kube ngathi ngesokulilela indodana ebelethwe iyodwa ngakwabo, bese ukuphela kwalo kube munyu.”" 
Amos8:11 USomnini uSomandla wathi: “Isikhathi siyeza lapha ngizakuthumela khona indlala enarheni: kungabi yindlala yokugoma namkha yokomela amanzi, kodwana kube yindlala yokuzwa amezwi kaSomnini." 
Amos8:12 Abantu bazokuyerayera kusukela elwandle bekube selwandle, bayemayeme kusukela etlhagwini bekube sepumalanga, babhenyegula ilizwi lakaSomnini, kodwana abazolifumana." 
Amos8:13 “Mhlokho kuzakuphuma imidzidlha emihle neentsitsirimba zakhona, zigelagele bezitsirimezeke ngebanga lomrhawu." 
Amos8:14 Labo abafunga ngabosingazimu beSamariya nanyana bathi, ‘Ngozimakho uDani, ngiqinisile ngithi,’ nanyana bathi, ‘Ngozimu weBheritjheba, ngiqinisile ngithi,’ abantwabo bazokuduleka phasi, ngiqinisile ngithi angekhe basavuka.”" 
Amos9:1 Ngabona uSomnini ujame e-aldarini, wathi: “Betha iinqongolo zeensika ukuze kusikinyeke imibunjwana yomnyango. Arhirize ukuze awele phezu kweenhloko zabo boke abantu , abaseleko ngizababulalela epini ngesabula. Akakho namunye ozakubaleka, akakho ozakuphunyurha." 
Amos9:2 Nanyana bangemba batjhinge phasi ekuzikeni kwethuna, isandla sami sizabadzwebula khonapho. Nanyana banganyukela phezulu emazulwini, ngizabathatha khonapho ngibehlisele phasi." 
Amos9:3 Nanyana bangabhaca esiqongolweni sentaba iKarameli, ngizabazuma khonapho ngibabambe. Nanyana bangabhaca ekuzikeni kwelwandle, nalapho ngizabanikelela ngenyoka bona ibalume." 
Amos9:4 Nanyana izitha zabo zingabakghurumejela ekuthunjweni, ngizakulayela bona babulawe ngesabula khonapho. Ngizabaphosa ilihlo, ngibaqale kumbi ngingabaqali kuhle.”" 
Amos9:5 USomninni uSomandla uMninimandlawoke, othi nathinta iphasi lincibilike, kuthi boke abahlala kilo batlhuwe; inarha yoke iphuphume njengeNayili, ibohle njengomlambo weGibhide;" 
Amos9:6 nguye owakha isigodlo sakhe esiphakamileko emazulwini bewahloma isisekelo sakhona ephasini, wabiza amanzi welwandle, wawarhatjha ebusweni benarha, ibizo lakhe nguSomnini." 
Amos9:7 USomnini wathi: “Nina ma-Israyeli, kimapha anifani namaKutjhe na? Azange ngikhuphe u-Israyeli eGibhide, namaFilista eKafitori, nama-Arami eKiri?" 
Amos9:8 Ngambala, amehlo kaSomnini uSomandla aphezu kombuso okhohlakeleko. Yeke ngizawubhubhisa nya ebusweni bephasi. Kodwana ikumba kaJakopo nokho angeze ngayibhubhisa.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Amos9:9 “Ngizakukhupha umyalo, ngihlunge ikumba ka-Israyeli hlangana nezizwe zoke, njengamabele nahlungwa esefeni; kodwana akunathorwana nayinye ezakuwela phasi." 
Amos9:10 Zoke izoni ezihlangana nabantu bami zizakubulawa ngesabula, boke labo abathi, ‘Abekunahlekelele ezasehlela nanyana itjhidele kithi.’ ”" 
Amos9:11 “Mhlokho ngizakuvuselela itende lakaDavida eliwileko. Ngilungise iindawo zalo ezonakeleko, ngibuyisele isithunzi salo, ngilakhe libe njengombana gade linjalo phambilini;" 
Amos9:12 ukuze likwazi ukwamukela imisalela yakwa-Edomu nezizwe zoke ezibizwa ngebizo lami.” Kutjho uSomnini ozakwenza koke akutjhwileko. 
Amos9:13 USomnini wathi: “Isikhathi siyeza, lapha ovunako azakubhedlhwa khona ngolimako notjalako abhedlhwe ngotlhodlha amadiribe. Iwayini elitjha lizakuthonta livela eentabeni, ligeleze kiyo yoke imibundu." 
Amos9:14 Ngizakutjhugulula ubujamo babantu bami u-Israyeli: Bazakuvuselela amadorobho agiriziweko, bahlale kiwo. Bazakutjala amadiribe bebasele newayini lakhona; balima iimvande, bagome iinthelo zakhona." 
Amos9:15 U-Israyeli ngizamtjala endawenakhe, ngingabe ngisamtsomula godu endaweni engimnikele yona.” Kutjho uSomnini uZimakho." 
Obadiah1:1 Isambulo saka-Obadiya Watjho nje uSomnini uZimami kumphorofidi ngo-Edomu: “Sizwe ilizwi elibuya kuSomnini ngombana isigijimi sathunywa ezizweni sathi, ‘Nambani sikhambeni siyokusahlela umuzi.’ ”" 
Obadiah1:2 Godu uSomnini wathi ngomphorofidi ku-Edomu: “Yelela, ngizakukwehlisa isithunzi unyazeke ezizweni." 
Obadiah1:3 Ukuzazi kwakho kukurhwalile, wena ohlala emipharwini yedwala, wakhe umuzi wakho esiqongolweni, wena ozitjela uthi, ‘Ngubani ongangihlakazela phasi?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Nanyana indlwanakho ingaba phezulu njengeyedlanga, namkha ibe phezulu hlangana neenkwekwezi, ngizakuhlakaza khonapho." 
Obadiah1:5 “Lokha nakufika amasela ngendlini nabagongodi ebusuku, bathatha abakufunako kwaphela; kodwana wena uzakuhlangulwa. Lokha abavuni nabavuna esidiribeni batjhiya ambalwa; kodwana abantu bakwa-Esewu bazakukhuthuzwa koke;" 
Obadiah1:6 amafa wabo afihliweko azakubhenyegululwa. 
Obadiah1:7 Boke abakhozi bakho bazakukghurumejela emkhawulweni; onokuthula nabo bakurhwale bebakubinde; onghwatha nabo bazakubekela isifu esihlakeni sakho.” Godu uSomnini wathi ngomphorofidi ku-Edomu: “Akukasi kuye! 
Obadiah1:8 Mhlokho mina Somnini ngizokutjhabalalisa iinhlakaniphi kwa-Edomu nokwazi entabeni yakwa-Esewu.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Obadiah1:9 Temana, iintsitsirimba zakho zizakusatjiswa kuthi woke umuntu arhayilwe entabeni yakwa-Esewu. USomnini wathi: “Ngebanga lokubulala" 
Obadiah1:10 nelokobana ube nerawurawu phezu komfowenu uJakopo, uzokuba namatlhuwiso bewutjhabalaliswe isiphelani." 
Obadiah1:11 Wajamela ncanye wabukela mhlana abaqhamuki bathumba ibutho lakaJakopo, namhlana abatjhili bafahla emasangwenakhe; namhlana baphosa ifumbe babelana ngeJerusalema. Wena-ke bewufana poro nabo." 
Obadiah1:12 Bewungakameli ukarwe kubukela umfowenu mhlana asematjhweni, namkha uthabe mhlana kurhayilwa amaJuda, nanyana ube nomlomo omude mhlana kunamahlungu." 
Obadiah1:13 Bewungakameli ufahle emasangweni wabantu bami mhlana bavelelwe lilitjhwa, nanyana ukarwe kubukela ingozi kaJakopo mhlana avelelwe lilitjhwa, nanyana uhlangule ilifa lakhe mhlana avelelwe lilitjhwa." 
Obadiah1:14 Bewungakameli ukuqamulela abaphunyurhileko nababaleka ngeendlela zamakhondlo ubatjhabalalise, nanyana ubakhaphele ezitheni mhlana basemahlungwini." 
Obadiah1:15 “Ngambala, ilanga lakaSomnini selitjhidele ezizweni zoke. Lokho okwenzileko kuzakwenziwa nakuwe, uzakubethwa ngezakho.”" 
Obadiah1:16 “Njengombana nina bantu bakaJakopo nirhamule ikapho yomhlonyani entabenami ecwengileko nje; yeke nezizwezi zoke nje zizayirhamula mndundu. Zizakurhamula zirhubule kube ngathi azange khezibe khona phambilini. 
Obadiah1:17 “Kodwana entabeni yeZiyoni kuzakuba nerholo lokuphephela; intaba le izakuba ngecwengileko, kuthi indlu kaJakopo izuze inarha eyayilobako." 
Obadiah1:18 “Indlu kaJakopo izakuba mlilo, kuthi yakaJosefa ibe lilangabu, kodwana yaka-Esewu yona izakuba mawunguwungu; yeke bazayithungela ngomlilo itjhe thokgho. Akuzokuba khona ophunyurhako endlini ka-Esewu.” Ngambala watjho njalo uSomnini." 
Obadiah1:19 “Abantu besewula yakwaJuda bazazithumbela iintaba zakwa-Esewu, kuthi abasemibundwini engeTjingalanga bazithumbele inarha yamaFilista. Abantu bakwaJuda bona bazazithumbela amasimu wakwa-Efrayimu neweSamariya ngeTlhagwini. UBhenjamini yena azithumbele iGiliyadi ngePumalanga." 
Obadiah1:20 Isiqhema sabathunjwa bakwa-Israyeli sizokuthumba inarha yamaKanana bekube seSerafadi ngeTlhagwini. Abathunjwa beJerusalema baseSefaradi bazakuthumba amadorobho angesewula. 
Obadiah1:21 Abahlengi bazakukhuphukela entabeni yeZiyoni ukuze babuse iintaba zakwa-Esewu. Umbuso uzokuba ngowakaSomnini.” 
Jonah1:1 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kuJona indodana ka-Amitayi, lathi:" 
Jonah1:2 “Khuphuka uye edorobheni elikhulu iNiniva, ufike ubakhalime ngombana ubukhohlakali babo sele benyuke bebafika phambi kwami.”" 
Jonah1:3 Kodwana uJona wabalekela uSomnini wanqomba eTharatjhitjhi. Wehlela eJopha lapha afunyana khona isithayamanzi siya eTharatjhitjhi. Selakhokhe imali yekhambo, wehlela ngaphakathi kwesithayamanzi wakhamba nabathayi eTharatjhitjhi abalekela uSomnini." 
Jonah1:4 USomnini wavusa ummoya omkhulu elwandle, kwaba nesiwuruwuru esinamandla; isithayamanzi safuna ukuhliphilika." 
Jonah1:5 Abathayi bethukwa bekwathi omunye nomunye wabiza uzimakhe. Bajikijela umthwalo ngelwandle ukwenzela bona isithayamanzi sibe lula. Kodwana uJona wehlela endaweni engaphasi yesithayamanzi walala ubuthongo. 
Jonah1:6 Ukapteni wehlela kuye wathi: “Wena ulala ngendlela enjani na? Vuka ubize uzimakho! Mhlamunye uZimu angasicabangela singabhubhi.” 
Jonah1:7 Abathayi bakhuluma bodwa bathi: “Asenzeni ifumbe ukuze sithole bona ngubani umuntu osibangele umhlolokazi ongaka lo.” Benza ifumbe; yadla uJona. 
Jonah1:8 Bambuza-ke bathi: “Akhe usitjele, ngubani osibangele umhlolo ongaka na? Usebenza msebenzi bani wena na? Udabukaphi? Uvela kiyiphi inarha? Njekhona umhlobo bani?”" 
Jonah1:9 Wabaphendula wathi: “NgimHebheru begodu ngithobela uSomnini uZimu osezulwini, okunguye umenzi welwandle nenarha.”" 
Jonah1:10 Amadoda ethukwa khulu abuza athi: “Alo-ke, woneni na?” Abuza nje, begade selasazi bonyana umrhali lo ubalekela uSomnini ngombana ukhe wawadembela." 
Jonah1:11 Ilwandle larhagala ngokukhiphizela. Ambuza athi: “Alo-ke kufanele sikwenzeni ukuze ilwandle lirhobhe na?” Lokhu bakutjho ngombana ilwandle lalirhagele. 
Jonah1:12 Wabaphendula wathi: “Yeningithathe ningijikijele ngelwandle, yeke amagagasi eniphakathi kwawo azakurhobha. Ngiyazi bona ngimi engibangele ukurhagala okungaka kwelwandle.”" 
Jonah1:13 Amadoda la enza koke okusemandlenawo ukubuyela enarheni. Kodwana ahluleka ngombana ilwandle lawarhagalela khulu kunekuthomeni. 
Jonah1:14 Athoma alilela uSomnini athi: “Siyakubawa Somnini, asingafi ngebanga lendoda le. Ungasivumeli ukubulala indoda le ngaphandle komlandu ngombana wena Somnini wenza njengombana uthanda.”" 
Jonah1:15 Ambamba-ke uJona amjikijela ngelwandle; kwathi ilwandle ebegade lirhagele larhobha. 
Jonah1:16 Amadoda ethukwa khulu esaba uSomnini, enzela uSomnini umhlabelo neemfungo." 
Jonah1:17 USomnini waletha ihlambi ekulu eyafika yaginya uJona. UJona wahlala ngemathunjini wehlambi leyo amalanga amathathu nobusuku bakhona. 
Jonah2:1 UJona wathandaza uSomnini uZimakhe angemathunjini wehlambi, wathi:" 
Jonah2:2 “Emahlungwinami ngalilela uSomnini, yeke wangiphendula. Phakathi kokufa ngarhuwelela ngifuna isizo, yeke watjheja isililo sami." 
Jonah2:3 Wangijikijela emajukujukwini, phakathi ekuzikeni kwamalwandle; umsele wangizombeleza, amagagasi angigubuzesa." 
Jonah2:4 Ngathi, ‘Ngiqotjhiwe ebusweni bakho, kodwana ngaqalelela godu ithempela lakho elicwengileko.’" 
Jonah2:5 Amanzi apheze angikghama, ukuzika kwangizombeleza, ikhula lelwandle lararela ihlokwami." 
Jonah2:6 Ngatjhinga phasi esidindini seentaba, iphasi langivalela ngaphakathi kwalo ingunaphakade. Kodwana wena Somnini Zimami, wakhuphula ipilwami emgodini." 
Jonah2:7 Lokha ummoyami nawuphelelwa mamandla, ngakhumbula uSomnini. Umthandazwami wakhuphukela kuwe, wafikelela ethempelini lakho elicwengileko." 
Jonah2:8 Labo abathembela kibosingazimu abanganabubhadekelo, baphunyurhwa ngoThembekileko kibo." 
Jonah2:9 Kodwana mina ngizokuletha umhlatjelo kuwe, ngikubabaze ngesihlabelelo sokudumisa. Engikufungeleko ngizakuphumelelisa, isindiso ivela kuSomnini.”" 
Jonah2:10 USomnini walayela ihlambi bonyana ihlanzele uJona ehlabathini eyomileko. 
Jonah3:1 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kuJona kwesibili lathi: 
Jonah3:2 “Khuphuka uye edorobheni elikhulu iNiniva ufese ubakhalime ngamezwi engikuthume wona.” 
Jonah3:3 UJona wakhuphuka waya eNiniva njengokutjho kwelizwi lakaSomnini. INiniva begade kulidorobho elikhulu kwamambala, bekuthatha amalanga amathathu ukulizombeleza." 
Jonah3:4 UJona kwamthatha ikhambo lelanga ukuqangula ngaphakathi kwedorobho. Wabika wathi: “Kusele amatjhumi amane wamalanga bonyana iNiniva irhayilwe.” 
Jonah3:5 Amadoda weNiniva akholwa kuZimu. Abeka ilanga lokuzila ukudla kusukela komkhulu kuya komncani, embatha iinzilo." 
Jonah3:6 Ikosi yeNiniva yathi ingezwa iindabezi, yasikima esihlalweni sayo, yahlubula iingubo zayo zobukhosi, yazibhibha ngomgodla yahlala phasi ebhudwini." 
Jonah3:7 Yakhupha umbiko eNiniva yathi: “Umyalo ovela ekosini neenduneni zayo uthi: Kungabi nomuntu ogomako noselako, ifuyo ekulu nencani nayo ingadliswa begodu ingasezwa amanzi." 
Jonah3:8 Abantu bazibhibhe ngemigodla kanye nefuywabo. Ababize uZimu ngamandla. Omunye nomunye atjhiye iindlela zakhe zobukhohlakali nenturhu esezandleni zakhe. Ngombana ngubani owaziko," 
Jonah3:9 mhlamunye uZimu angazisola ebukhalini bakhe asirhawukele ukuze singabhubhi.” 
Jonah3:10 UZimu wabona izenzo zabo, nangendlela baphenduke ngayo ebukhohlakalini babo, wabarhawukela azange asababhubhisa njengombana agade atjhwile." 
Jonah4:1 UJona samsilinga khulu isenzwesi bewabibhelana. 
Jonah4:2 Wathandaza uSomnini wathi: “Maye Somnini, akhange ngisole ngisesesenarheni yekhethu na? Kungebangeli-ke mina fengathoma ngokubalekela eTharatjhitjhi. Ngazile bona unguZimu onomusa nesirhawu, ubuthaka ekusilingekeni. Ukwethembeka kwakho kukhulu. UnguZimu oriyadako ukurhayila." 
Jonah4:3 Nje-ke Kosami, dumbana uthathe ipilwami; kungcono ngife kunobana ngiphile.”" 
Jonah4:4 Kodwana uSomnini wamphendula wathi: “Unelungelo lokubibhelana na?”
