Jonah4:5 UJona waphuma ngedorobheni wayokuhlala ngepumalanga yalo, wazenzela umthunzi ngamatjhwaba lapho. Wahlala lapho wakha umkhanyo afuna ukubona bonyana kuzokwenzakalani ngedorobheli." 
Jonah4:6 USomnini uZimu waveza umrarela; bewakhula wanaba wenzela uJona umthunzi ukuze asithe ihlokwakhe. UJona wawuthabela khulu umrarela lowo. 
Jonah4:7 Kodwana kwathi ngomuso ngesamarimarima uSomnini waveza ipehli yadla umrarela lowo bewatjhwaba. 
Jonah4:8 Kwathi nakuphuma ilanga uZimu waletha ummoya otjhisako ovela ngepumalanga, ilanga lanemba uJona ehloko bewatsirimizeka. Wakhanukela ukufa wathi: “Kungcono ngife kunobana ngiphile.”" 
Jonah4:9 Kodwana uZimu wathi kuJona: “Unelungelo lokubibhelana ngebanga lomrarela lo na?” UJona wathi: “Iye, nginelungelo lokubibhelana kangangoba kuthi angife.”" 
Jonah4:10 USomnini wathi kuye: “Wena utshwenyeke ngomrarela lo; nanyana ungazange uwujulukele. Umile ngobusuku bunye begodu watjhabalala ngobusuku bunye. 
Jonah4:11 Alo-ke mina bengingakameli bonyana ngitshwenyekele iNiniva idorobho elikhulu kangaka elinabantu abangaphezu kweenkulungwana ezilikhulu namatjhumi amabili abangazi bonyana emuva kukuphi naphambili kukuphi, nefuyo enengi kangaka na?”" 
Micah1:1 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kuMikha weMoretjheti lokha nakusabusa uJotamu, u-Arhazi, noHezekhiya, amakhosi wakwaJuda. Wembulelwa ngeSamariya neJerusalema." 
Micah1:2 Yizwani noke nina bantu! Lalela nawe phasi nabo boke abakuwe ngombana uSomnini uMninimandlawoke uzanithwesa umlandu; iye, uMninimandlawoke asethempelini lakhe elicwengileko." 
Micah1:3 Yelelani! USomnini uyeza, uvela esigodlweni sakhe, uyehla uzokuthumba iphasi." 
Micah1:4 Iintaba zincibilika ngaphasi kwakhe njengamafutha nezwa umlilo; kuphadlhuka ilwandle ekuzikeni, kuvele isiwamanzi." 
Micah1:5 Koke lokhu kubangelwa mitjhapho kaJakopo, kubangwa zizono zekumba ka-Israyeli. Kungaba ngubani-ke otjhaphisa uJakopo nakungasiyo iSamariya? Iinduli zakaJuda zingaba ngubani nakungasiyo iJerusalema?" 
Micah1:6 USomnini wathi: “Yeke ngizakwenza iSamariya ibe liqubi, ngisunduzele amatje emirhobeni, ngivumbulule iinsekelo zayo, ngiyenze umrhula nendawo yokutjala isidiribe." 
Micah1:7 Zoke iinthombe ezibaziweko zakhona zizakuphahlazwa; zoke izipho zethempeli lakhona zitjhiswe ngomlilo. Ngizokutjhabalalisa boke abosingazimu bayo. Njengombana izuze izipho zethempeli layo ngobungwadla, bazazithatha bangwadle ngazo phambili.”" 
Micah1:8 UMikha wathi: Ngebangeli ngizakuzila ngilile, ngiphatjhume ngeenzilo. Iye, ngizakulila njengeempungutjha, ngibubule njengeenciliba." 
Micah1:9 Ngambala, iSamariya ayizokusinda encebeni elimbeli; nakuJuda kuzakuba njalo. Ubuhlungu balo buzakufika eJerusalema, iye, esangweni labantu bekhethu." 
Micah1:10 Ningayidembi indaba le eGadi, nayikulila ningeze benilile. EBhethe-Le-Afra bazibhudabhuda ebhudwini." 
Micah1:11 Abantu beTjhafira banibethela ipalapala nina bantu beJerusalema. Abantu beTsanana abaphumeli etjhatjhalazini. IBhethe-Ha-Etseli angeze yakusiza Jerusalema ngombana nayo iyalila. 
Micah1:12 Iye, abantu beMarothi batlhuwile, basesizini elikhulu. Ngambala, uSomnini ubehlisele amatlhuwiso la abe ayokufika ngitjho nemasangweni weJerusalema." 
Micah1:13 Nina bantu beLarhitjhi bophelani iinjomani eenkaraneni. Ngini enisisusa sokona kwendodakazi yeZiyoni ngombana nemitjhapho ka-Israyeli ifunyenwe phakathi kwenu. 
Micah1:14 Nina bantu beLarhitjhi hlobokani iMoretjheti-Gathi. Umuzi we-Akziba awuzukuba nobubhadekelo emakhosini wakwa-Israyeli. 
Micah1:15 Godu ngizaninikelela ngezitha nina bantu beMaretjha. Olithemba laka-Israyeli uzazifihla e-Adulama. 
Micah1:16 Gudani iinhloko zenu nina bantu beLarhitjhi; niziphale zibe butjhelelezi njengedlanga, nizilele imizana eniyithandako enibhodileko ngombana izakuthunjwa." 
Micah2:1 Bazazizwa labo abatlama ikohlakalo ebusuku, iye, abogalajanaba! Kuthi ekuseni bayenze ngombana kusemandlenabo." 
Micah2:2 Nabakhanuka amasimu bayawahluthula, nabarhalela izindlu, bayazithatha. Bagalaja isakhamuzi umzaso, basidlelezele ilifa laso." 
Micah2:3 Yeke uSomnini wathi: “Qala, nginitlamela ikohlakalo nina sigungu ndina. Kuzakuphela ukukhambela phezulu ngombana nizabe nibotjhelelwe ejogini isiphelani. Ngambala kuzabe kusikhathi esimasikizi kini.”" 
Micah2:4 Mhlokho, abantu bazaniphoqa, babhine ingoma yesililo ngani bathi: “Siyavuma, sirhurhutjhiwe! USomnini uhlukanisa ilifa labantu bekhethu. Maye, ulihluthule kangangani kithi! Wabela abadududu inarhethu.”" 
Micah2:5 Yeke anizukuba nomjameli phambi kwakaSomnini nakwabiwa inarhenu ngefumbe. 
Micah2:6 “Ningaphikeleli ukuphorofida. Aninalungelo lokuphorofida njalo, isiphoqweso asizukusehlela;" 
Micah2:7 ngombana uSomnini uthembise indlu kaJakopo; uMoya wakaSomnini uyabekezela; uSomnini akenzi izinto ezinjalo.” Awa, amezwami amenzela okuhle olungileko." 
Micah2:8 Kodwana nina nibe sisitha sabantu bekhethu najamelana nabathanda ukuthula. Niwunawune abantu abazidlulela ngendlela abangananturhu namuntu benabahlubulisa, nathatha izambatho zabo." 
Micah2:9 Niqotjha abafazi babantu bekhethu ezindlini abazithandako; nithathela abantwababo isabelo benibatlhagise isiphelani. 
Micah2:10 Zilungiseleleni ukukhamba ngombana akusiyo indawenu yokuphumula le. Ukusilaphala kwenu kuyonile. Maye kubuhlungu kangangani ukonakala kwayo! 
Micah2:11 Nami bengingaphorofida kini ngewayini nangotjwala obunengi; kodwana umuntu kaMoya akaleyi amala. Nokho isigungu sabaphorofidi benwesi sithi: 
Micah2:12 “USomnini wathi: ‘Ngambala ngizababuthelela ndawonye boke abantu bakaJakopo, iinzukulwana zaka-Israyeli. Ngibaragele esibayeni njengezimvu, iye, njengeenkomo emrageni; babe liwoma bahumuzele.’ ”" 
Micah2:13 Begodu bathi: “Loyo oliVulandlela uzabarhola. Bazakufahla baphume esangweni; batjhaphuluke. Ikosabo izabakhomba indlela, ibe yihlokwabo.”" 
Micah3:1 Esiphorofidweni sabo ngaphendula ngathi: Lalelani, nina baphathi bakwaJakopo, nina babusi bekumba ka-Israyeli. Bekungakameli bonyana nazi imiyalo na?" 
Micah3:2 Kodwana nihloya ukulunga, nithanda ikohlakalo. Nirathula abantu bekhethu isikhumba nidabula inyamabo emathanjenabo." 
Micah3:3 Nihlinza abantu bekhethu, nigome inyamabo beniqobelele namathambabo abe ziinquqwana; kwanga niyowafaka kunomaturwana, iye, kwanga niyowafaka kugalaza." 
Micah3:4 Kuzakufika isikhathi lapha nizakubiza khona uSomnini, nokho akazoniphendula; uzanifulathela ngebanga lekohlakalo yenu." 
Micah3:5 Utjho nje uSomnini ngabaphorofidi abakhohlisa abantu bekhethu: “Nabaphiwa esinefutha baphorofida bathi ‘Nizakuba nokuthula’, kodwana umuntu nakangabaphi abakufunako, bayamlwisa." 
Micah3:6 Ngebangelo kuzakuhlwa kini barholi, beningasambulelwa; kube mnyama kini, beningasaphengula nabaphorofidi benwabo lizabatjhingela, bazakuphumbutha emini kwa bha." 
Micah3:7 Abaphorofidabo bazakuba neenhloni; izangoma zenu zitlhuwise. Boke bazakufihla ubuso babo ngombana uZimu angeze abaphendula.” 
Micah3:8 Kodwana mina ngizaliswe ngamandla, nangoMoya kaSomnini, ngokulunga nangegunya; kobana ngitjele uJakopo ngemitjhapho yakhe no-Israyeli ngezono zakhe." 
Micah3:9 Lalelani kuhle-ke nina baphathi bekumba kaJakopo, nani babusi bekumba ka-Israyeli, nina eninyenya ukulunga niphambanise koke okuhle:" 
Micah3:10 IZiyoni seyisisazi sokuphalaza iingazi, iJerusalema seyisisazi sobukhohlakali." 
Micah3:11 Abaphathi bakhona bagweba ngokudizelwa, abaphristi bakhona bafundisa ngokubhadelwa, nabaphorofidi bakhona baphorofidela imali. Bazisama ngoSomnini bathi: “Ngambala uSomnini uphakathi kwethu. Akunamatlhuwo angasehlela.”" 
Micah3:12 Nje-ke, ngebanga lenu, iZiyoni izakulinywa njengesimu, iJerusalema izakuba liqubi leququ, kuthi intatjana yethempela ibe lihlathi." 
Micah4:1 Kuzakufika isikhathi lapha intaba yethempeli lakaSomnini izakunzinza khona esiqongolweni seentaba; izakuphakanyiswa yengamele imibundu yoke; yeke izizwe zizayirhuluphela. 
Micah4:2 Izizwe zoke zizakuhlangana zithi: “Nambani sikhambeni, senyukeleni entabeni kaSomnini, ekumbeni kaZimu wakaJakopo. USomnini uzasifundisa imithetho yakhe; ukuze sikhambe ngeendlela zakhe.” Ngambala kuzakubethwa umthetho eZiyoni, kuphume ilizwi lakaSomnini eJerusalema." 
Micah4:3 USomnini uzakugweba izizwe zoke begodu ararulule imiraro yezizwe ezinengi eziseduze nezikude. Zizakuthatha iinsabula zazo zenze ngazo amalembe wokulima; zithathe nemikhonto yazo zenze imikhwa yokuqopha imithi. Izizwe angeze zisaphakamiselana iinkhali, namkha zizibandulele ipi." 
Micah4:4 Woke umuntu uzazigedla ngaphasi kwesidiribe sakhe, nanyana ngaphasi komuthakhe wamakhiwani. Yeke akunamuntu ozabethusa. Ngambala uSomnini uSomandla ukhulumile." 
Micah4:5 Ngitjho nanyana izizwe zoke zingathembela kibosingazimu bazo, kodwana thina sizakuthembela kuSomnini uZimethu nini nanini." 
Micah4:6 USomnini wathi: “Mhlokho, “ngizakubuthelela abatshinyekileko; ngihlanganise ndawonye abaphadlhalajiweko nalabo engabazwisa ubuhlungu." 
Micah4:7 Abatshinyekileko ngizabenza isizwe esikhulu, abaqotjhiweko ngibenze isizwe esinamandla. USomnini uzakubusa phezu kwabo entabeni yeZiyoni kusuka mhlokho bekube nini nanini." 
Micah4:8 Wena-ke Sithala sokwelusa umhlambi, wena Ntatjana yendodakazi yeZiyoni, umbuso waphambilini uzakubuyiselwa kuwe, ngitjho ubukhosi bendodakazi yeJerusalema.”" 
Micah4:9 Alo, urhahlawulelani-ke gadesi Jerusalema, nangabe unekosi na? Kghani umlulekakho uhlongakele, nawulokhu uzibinyabinya inga umfazi oseenhlungwini zokubeletha nje na?" 
Micah4:10 Yewuzibinyabinye urhuwelele njengomfazi obelethako wena ndodakazi yeZiyoni ngombana ngambala uzakuphuma ngedorobhenapha ukhambe uhloma umtlhatlhana emmangweni bewuyokufika eBhabheli. Lapho uzakwenyulwa; khonapho uSomnini uzakuhlenga esandleni sezitha zakho. 
Micah4:11 Ngambala izizwe ezinengi zihlangene ngawe Ziyoni, zithi: “Ayirhubutjhwe iZiyoni le, ukuze siyibone kuhle!”" 
Micah4:12 Kodwana izizwezi aziwazi umkhumbulo kaSomnini namaqhingakhe aziwalimuki. Ngambala uzazibuthelela njengeenqwambe zekoroyi eselelweni," 
Micah4:13 bese uthi: “Sikima ugadange, ndodakazi yeZiyoni ngombana ngizakuhlomela iimpondo zesimbi, ngikufake iinqatha zekoporo bese upitliza izizwe ezinengi. Ulethe kimi iinzuzo zazo ezizifumene ngobugirikijani, kimi mina Kosi yephasi loke.”" 
Micah4:14 Lokha nawubuthelela amabuthwakho, Dorobho lemigulukudu, izitha zizabe zisizombelezile. Zizakusawula umbusi wakwa-Israyeli emhlathini ngentonga." 
Micah5:1 USomnini wathi: “Kodwana wena, Bhethe-Lehema yakwa-Efratha, nanyana umncani eenkorweni zakwaJuda nje, phakathi kwakho kuzakuphuma othileko ozakuba mbusi kwa-Israyeli ebizweni lami; ondabuko yakhe yavela phambilini ekadeni, ngowakhula inarha isalele.”" 
Micah5:2 Nje-ke uSomnini uzakunikela abantu beJerusalema ezandleni zezitha; kufikela lapha kubelethwa khona othileko, bese abafowabo abasekuthunjweni babuye bazihlanganise namanye ama-Israyeli." 
Micah5:3 Uzakujama begodu eluse abantu bakhe emandleni kaSomnini, ebizweni eliphakamileko lakaSomnini uZimakhe. Abantu bakhe bazakuhlala bavikelekile; ngambala uzakuduma iphasi loke." 
Micah5:4 Awa, umbusethu akazukuthinteka. Nakuma-Asiriya wona, nange angalinga ukungena enarhenethu bese atjhagala emarholwenethu, sizawahlanganisa nabelusi abalikhomba nabarholi ababunane bezizwe ezinye." 
Micah5:5 Bazakudla inarha ye-Asiriya ngesabula, iye, inarha kaNimrodi ngesabula erhwatjhiweko. Yeke umbusethu uzasisindisa ema-Asiriyeni lokha nakalinga ukungena enarhenethu, nanyana atjhagala emkhawulwenethu." 
Micah5:6 Iinzukulwana zakaJakopo phakathi kwezizwe zoke zizakuba njengombethe ovela kuSomnini, njengamathosi wezulu phezu kotjani obuhlaza. Azizukuthembela ebantwini begodu azizukurhuluphela ezizweni ezinye." 
Micah5:7 Awa, iinzukulwana zakaJakopo phakathi kwezizwe zizakufana nengwenyama phakathi kweenyamazana, njengebhubezana hlangana nomhlambi wezimvu. Zizakukhamba zigadanga, zirathula kungabi nosindisako." 
Micah5:8 Yewuphakamise isandla sakho wena muntu kaJakopo ujamelane nezitha zakho ukuze zirhayileke zoke. 
Micah5:9 USomnini wathi malungana nezitha zethu: “Mhlokho ngizakurhayila iinjomani zenu bengibhidlize neenkarana zenu zepi. 
Micah5:10 Ngizakurhayila amadorobho wenarhekhenu bengibhuruze woke amadorobhenu anemithangala. 
Micah5:11 Ngizakurhayila ubuloyi benu beningasaba nababoni. 
Micah5:12 Ngirhayile nabosingazimu benu ababaziweko namatjenu eniwalotjhako; angekhe benisakhothamela izinto enizibumbe ngezandla zenu. 
Micah5:13 Ngizakuruthula nesithombe senu u-Atjhera bengibhidlize neendawo zenu ezicwengileko. 
Micah5:14 Ngizazibuyiselela ngobukhali nangetukuthelo phezu kwezizwe ngendlela ezingazange ziyibone.” 
Micah6:1 Akhese nilalele okutjhiwo nguSomnini. Uthe kimi: “Sikima, umangalele iintaba; imibundu ayizwe ubufakazi bakho." 
Micah6:2 Yizwani nina ntaba ukumangala kwakaSomnini, lalelani nina nsekelo zephasi ezinini nanini. Ngambala uSomnini umangalela abantu bakhe, ubiza u-Israyeli bona azoziphendulela:" 
Micah6:3 ‘Bantu bami, nginone ngani? Kghani nginidisibeze ngani na? Fakazani ngami-ke!" 
Micah6:4 Iye, nganikhupha eGibhide; nganihlenga enarheni yobukhoboka. Nganithumela uMosi, u-Aroni noMeriyamu kobana banirhole." 
Micah6:5 Bantu bami, akhese nikhumbule bona uBhalakhi, ikosi yakwaMowabi, gade arerani ngani; nokobana uBhiliyamu, indodana kaBhewori, wamphendula wathini. Khumbulani bona kwenzekani ngani phakhathi kweTjhitimu neGiligali ukuze namukele imisebenzi elungileko eyenziwa nguSomnini.’ ”" 
Micah6:6 Ngizakulethani kuSomnini nangikhothamela uZimu ophakamileko? Kghani ngizakuletha phambi kwakhe umnikelo wokutjhiswa, ngizibike ngeenkunzana?" 
Micah6:7 USomnini angathabela ikulungwana yamaqama neenkulungwana ezilitjhumi zemilambo yamafutha na? Kghani ngizakunikela ngezibulo lami bona ngihlawule imitjhapho yami, ngithathe indodanami ngihlawule ngayo izono zehliziywami?" 
Micah6:8 USomnini ukwazisile wena muntu lokho okulungileko. Yini-ke okhunye uSomnini akulindele kuwe ngaphandle kokwenza akutjhwileko nokwethembeka esivumelwaneni sakhe bewukhambe noZimakho ngokutjhejisisa na? 
Micah6:9 Ilizwi lakaSomnini likhuluma nedorobho; kukuhlakanipha ukwesaba ibizo lakhe. USomnini wathi: “Lalela wena sephulamthetho ndina, mdlelezeli!" 
Micah6:10 Wenandlu yokonakala benginganyamezelela isilinganiso sakho sobukhohlakali; nginyamezelele isilinganiso segagogo odlelezela ngaso na? 
Micah6:11 Ngingathethelela umuntu okala imilandu yabantu ngesikala samanga nangomgodla onobudisi obuzele ikohliso na? 
Micah6:12 Ngambala, iingwili zedorobho zinenturhu, izakhamuzi zakhona zibomalakazi namalimazo azele ikohliso." 
Micah6:13 Ngebangelo-ke sebengithomile ukukumukula wena dorobho, nokukurhayila ngebanga lezono zakho." 
Micah6:14 Uzakudla, kodwana ungasuthi; (Lokha naniya emabhayini imbewakho ayizukuba nepilo, nakungenzeka ibe nepilo ngizayinikelela ngekemba.)" 
Micah6:15 Uzakutjala ungavuni litho, uminye ama-oliva, kodwana ungazizesi ngamafuthawo, nizakutlhodlha amadiribe kodwana ningarhamuli iwayini lakhona." 
Micah6:16 Neenthombe zabosingazimu baka-Omri zizakususwa, kuthi yoke imisebenzi yezandla yendlu ka-Ahabi isiphulwe ngombana ulandele iinluleko zabo. Ngebangelo-ke mina Somnini ngizakwenza amarubhi, izakhamuzi zakho ngizenze isiga; uzakuthwala isiphoqo esinqophiswe ebantwini bami.”" 
Micah7:1 Maye mina! Nginjengomuntu ofunana namadiribe angawagoma sele kuvuniwe. Ngifunana namakhiwani sele athintithekile. 
Micah7:2 Kunjalo-ke ukufunana nomuntu olungileko enarheni nomuntu kaZimu phakathi kwabantu. Boke baqothele ukuphalaza iingazi, omunye nomunye uzumana nendlela yokugolana nomfowabo ngenede." 
Micah7:3 Iinkhulu zakhona zamukela umlandu ngokukhongozela; abagwebi bakhupha iingwebo ngokufunjathiswa; ngitjho nomgwebi omkhulu akanabulilelo ugweba umathanda. 
Micah7:4 Loyo okuthiwa ngongcono kunabo uhlaba njengomunga, nokuthiwa ulunge khulu unjengesibuya sameva. Imini yokuhlunguphazwa kwabo seyifikile, ababalaleleko bazababamba. Nje-ke bazazizwa inga bayatjha." 
Micah7:5 Ungamethembi umakhelwana, ungabeki ithemba lakho emnganinakho; ngitjho nanyana kungaba ngotjhidelene kangangani nawe, ulonde ikulumakho." 
Micah7:6 Ngombana indodana inyaza uyise, indodakazi iphikisana nonina, umalukazana ukhombana nonosokana ngomuno. Izitha zomuntu kuba babantu bekhabo." 
Micah7:7 Kodwana mina ngiqalelela uSomnini ngethemba, ngilinda uZimu uMsindisami, uZimami uzangitjheja." 
Micah7:8 Ungabukisi ngami wena sitha sami! Nanyana ngiwile nje, kodwana ngizakuvuka. Nanyana ngihlezi ebumnyameni nje, kodwana uSomnini uzakuba kukhanya kwami." 
Micah7:9 Ngebanga lokobana ngitjhaphele uSomnini, ngizakugugubala ngaphasi kobukhali bakhe, bekube kumhla angikhupha emlandwini; mhlana abuyisa ilungelo lami. Uzangikhuphela ekukhanyeni; ngizakubona ukulunga kwakhe." 
Micah7:10 Yeke isitha sami sizakubona lokhu bese siphathwa ziinhloni, njengombana sathi kimi: “Uphi-ke uSomnini uZimakho?” Ngizasiqalela phasi; yeke sizakugadangwa njengedaka eendledlaneni." 
Micah7:11 Imini yokuqinisa imithangalakho izakufika , imini yokurhayilwa ngesihlungu. 
Micah7:12 Mhlokho umdlelezelakho uzakufika azabele wena Asiriya namadorobhakho. Uzakufika azabele iingcenye zoke zenarhakho; iye, ukusuka emlanjeni ukuya emlanjaneni nokusuka entabeni ukuya entatjaneni." 
Micah7:13 Inarha izakuba libhudu ngebanga lezenzo zabahlali bayo. 
Micah7:14 Somnini, yelusa abantu bakho ngentongakho, umhlambi welifa lakho. Uwuvikele emahlathini weentaba zeKarameli; uvumele udle eBhatjhani neGiliyadi njengekadeni." 
Micah7:15 Benze babone imikarisomraro, njengamhlana wena Somnini ubakhupha eGibhide." 
Micah7:16 Izizwe zizakubona lokhu bese ziyakhena, kuphele ukuthi zona zinamandla. Zizakuvala imilomo yazo ngezandla, zivaleke iindlebe." 
Micah7:17 Abantwaba bazakurhurhuba njengenyoka; bakhase njengeembandana ehlabathini. Bazakuphuma batatazela erholweni labo; bahlengezele phambi kwakho Somnini Zimethu, bazakwesaba ngebanga lakho." 
Micah7:18 Ngubani uZimu onjengawe, othethelela isono, ongayeleli imitjhapho yeendlalifa zakhe, nonganamavunda kodwana othabela ukwethembeka," 
Micah7:19 ozasirhawukela godu, agadangele izono zethu ngaphasi kwenyawo na? Iye, uzakujikijela yoke imitjhapho yabantu bakho ekuzikeni kwelwandle." 
Micah7:20 Uzakuba ngoqinisileko kuJakopo nothembekileko ku-Abrahamu, njengombana wafunga kibobaba ekadeni." 
Nahum1:1 Isimemezelo sakaZimu ngeNiniva. Incwadi yesambulo sakaNarhume umElkhotjhi. 
Nahum1:2 USomnini unguZimu onesikhwele nozibuyiselelako; uSomnini uyazibuyiselela begodu uzele ngobukhali. USomnini uzibuyiselela kabajameleni naye begodu uhlala abukhali ezitheni zakhe. 
Nahum1:3 USomnini ubuthaka ekusilingekeni; kodwana unamandla amakhulu begodu akalisi ukuhlunguphaza. Ugadanga kuvuke isivunguvungu nesiwuruwuru, namafu aba libhudu eenyaweni zakhe." 
Nahum1:4 Ukhalimela ilwandle lome kere; enze nemilambo itjhe thokgho. Amasiso weBhatjhani ayoma, amahlathi weKarameli arhabuke, kutjhwabe namakhwa weLibhanoni." 
Nahum1:5 Iintaba ziyahlengezela, imibundu incibilike phambi kwakhe. Iphasi liyahlengezela phambi kwakhe nelizwe nabo boke abahlala kilo." 
Nahum1:6 Ngubani ongajamelana nokukhalima kwakhe? Ngubani onganyamezelela ubukhali bakhe na? Ebukhalini bakhe ujikijela umlilo; amadwala akghephuke phambi kwakhe. 
Nahum1:7 USomnini ulungile kilabo abaphephela kuye ngeenkhathi zamatshwenyeko; Utjheja labo ababalekela kuye ngeenkhathi zeenrhurhula. 
Nahum1:8 Kodwana uzaziphelisa nya izitha zakhe abe aziqotjhele kwalatjha. 
Nahum1:9 Nanyana ngiwaphi amaqhinga izitha eziwenza ngoSomnini, uSomnini uzawaphelisa nya. Iye, amatshwenyeko angeze abuya kwesibili." 
Nahum1:10 Bazakurarejeka njengesidakwa esibhajwe emeveni, batjhiswe njengamawunguwungu." 
Nahum1:11 Umgandeleli othiyela uSomnini amano wobukhohlakali nohlongoza ukonakala, uzakunyelela." 
Nahum1:12 Watjho nje uSomnini: “Nanyana baphelele babanengi ngaleyondlela, bazokukghedlhwa bokanyana njalo baphele nya. Nanyana ngikuthobisile nje wena Juda, nokho angeze bengisakuthobisa godu." 
Nahum1:13 Ngizakwephula ijogi eliphezu kwakho, ngiqhusule imitja abanibophe ngayo.”" 
Nahum1:14 USomnini ukhuphe umlayezo ngawe kosi, wathi: “Ibizo lakho alisazukukhunjulwa. Ngizakutjhabalalisa yoke imifanekiso ebaziweko nebunjiweko esethempelini labosingazimu benu. Ngizakwenza ithuna lakho libe lizala.”" 
Nahum1:15 Qalani laphaya phezu kweentaba, nasiya isithunywa esiletha iindaba ezimnandi, sirhuwelela sithi: “Ukuthula! Gidinga iminyanyakho wena Juda, uzalise iimfungo zakho. Akusenasikhohlakali esizanisahlela; sizakurhayilwa siphele nya." 
Nahum2:1 “Abasabaleleko uzababona lokha nababuyako wena Juda. Yenyukelani esithaleni, nigade indlela! Zilungiseleleni, niziqinise!”" 
Nahum2:2 Ngambala uSomnini uzakubuya ngedumo lakaJakopo, iye, ngedumo laka-Israyeli. Ngambala abarhayili bazabarhayila begodu bazakutjhabalalisa abavikeli babo." 
Nahum2:3 Ngelanga elibekwe nguSomnini, iinhlangu zeentsitsirimba zayo zibomvu; iingorho zakhona zivunule okutlerebede. Iinsimbi zeenkarana zepi ziyamenyezela, abakhweli beenjomani baya ngapha nangapha." 
Nahum2:4 Batjhayela iinkarana inga mahlanya eendleleni, zehla zenyuka nommango woke. Zifana neenhlothi ezivuthako; zigijima zitsekeze njengombani." 
Nahum2:5 Amabutho kaSomnini akhethekileko ziingorho, akhamba ahlula endlelenawo. Agijimela emthangaleni wedorobho; alungisa umgqala wawo ukugiriza umthangala." 
Nahum2:6 Amasango wangemlanjeni avulwe petle, isigodlo siyathuthumela ngevalo." 
Nahum2:7 Indlovukazi isiwa ekuthunjweni ngekoloyana. Amakhobokakazi wayo ayathunjwa; athwala imikhono ehloko, alile irhabiya njengamazuba." 
Nahum2:8 INiniva injengedamu elivulelweko: Amanzi wakhona ayagobhoza. “Valani! Valani!”, kodwana amanzi akavaleki." 
Nahum2:9 Thumbani isiliva! Thumbani igolide! Umgodla uvulekile, umnotho uze ngonina lapha!" 
Nahum2:10 INiniva idlelezelwe, yahlangulwa; yasala ilirubhi! Iinhliziyo zadana, amadolo ayathuthumela, imizimba yoke iyahlengezela; boke ubuso buyaphaphatheka." 
Nahum2:11 Gadesi liphi-ke idzaba leengwenyama, lapha kondlelwa khona imindlwana yeengwenyama, lapha ingwenyama eduna nesikazi zikhambakhamba khona, lapha iingwenyama zizibusa khona na?" 
Nahum2:12 Iphi ingwenyama ebulele ngokwaneleko, ukondla imindlwanayo; ekghamela ukondla ingwenyama esikazi, ezalisa isikhundla sayo ngeenyamazana nedzaba layo ngeendumbu na?" 
Nahum2:13 USomnini uMninimandlawoke uthi: “Ngijamelene nawe kosi. Ngizakutjhisa iinkarana zakho, isabula izakurhayila iingwenyamana zakho. Ngizakutjhabalalisa koke okuhlangule kabanye. Amezwi weenthunywa zakho angeze asazwakala.”" 
Nahum3:1 Lizazizwa idorobho leengazi, lizele ngamala; lizele ngobumarhamaru, alitlhogi elikuthumbileko!" 
Nahum3:2 Lenza lokhu ngokuthuthumbisa iimbebhu, kutswiririze amavili; ligijimise iinjomani, kukhehlezele iinkoloyana!" 
Nahum3:3 Abakhweli beenjomani bahlabela phambili, kumanyazela iinsabula, kumekeza imikhonto! Latjhiya iinkubela ezinengi, kwaba sidumbu phezu kwesidumbu , zaba zinengi zarareja umuntu." 
Nahum3:4 Koke lokhu kungebanga lobungwadla bengwadla, enejamo elilulubezako, umtjhotjhozeli wobuloyi, okhaphela izizwe ukuze azuze, akhaphele abantu ngobuloyi bakhe." 
Nahum3:5 USomnini uMninimandlawoke uthi: “Ngijamelene nawe poro. Ngizakubhenula iinthimba zakho, izizwe zoke zikubonele; nemibuso ibone ukurhubutjheka kwakho." 
Nahum3:6 Ngizakujikijela ngamanyala, ngikunyazise, ngenze ngawe isibonelo." 
Nahum3:7 Boke abakubonako bazakubaleka bathi: ‘INiniva igirikile! Akunamuntu ozayililela, kungabikho noyedwa oyiduduzako.’ ”" 
Nahum3:8 Kghani ungcono kuneThebhesi, esemlanjeni iNayili, ezombelezwe mamanzi? Umlambo begade kusiviko sayo, amanzi aliboda lakhona." 
Nahum3:9 IKutjhe bekusidindi sayo, neGibhide ngobunengi bayo. iPhuthi neLibhiya kusidzimelelo sayo." 
Nahum3:10 Ngitjho neThebhesi beyibekelwe bonyana idingiswe, isiwe ekuthunjweni. Ngitjho namasanayo aphihlizelwa emasangweni wazo zoke iindlela. Iinkhulu zakhona zenzelwa ifumbe, kwathi boke abarholi bakhona babotjhwa ngeenketani." 
Nahum3:11 Nawe-ke Niniva uzakurhamula ikapho yomhlonyani; uzakubaleka uyokubhaca bese ubawa ukukhoseliswa zizitha zakho. 
Nahum3:12 Woke amarholwakho afana nemithi yamakhiwani; amajonakho anjengamakhiwani avuthweko: lokha imithi nayisikinywako, amakhiwani awela emlonyeni wogomako." 
Nahum3:13 Khusuthi uyaqala amajonakho: Woke bafazi! Amasango wesifunda sakho avuleke petle, avulekele izitha zakho; umlilo utjhise thokgho iinqabo zamasangwakho." 
Nahum3:14 Yikha amanzi ngombana uragelelwe, uqinise amarholwakho! Khamba uye edongeni ubhice idaka wenze iintina!" 
Nahum3:15 Umlilo uzakutjhisela khonapho nesabula izakukghedlha; ikuqothule njengokuqothula kwesikhonyani esimini. 
Nahum3:16 Ungezelele isibalo sabarhwebi bakho bebadlula iinkwekwezi zesibhakabhaka. Kodwana bazakwenza seentethe: badle bazikhambele. 
Nahum3:17 Nabalindi bakho bafana nesikhonyani, iinkhulu zakho zifana newoma leentethe, ezikakarela emabodeni nakumakhaza. Kuthi nakuhlaba ilanga zitlharuluke ziphaphe, ziye lapha kungazi muntu khona." 
Nahum3:18 Maye, kosi ye-Asiriya! Abarholi bakho bafile buthongo; amabuthwakho akhethekileko arabhalele. Amajonakho arhatjheke neentaba, atlhoge nomuntu ongawabuthelela." 
Nahum3:19 Akunamuntu ongelapha amancebakho; awuzukusinda ngeduma lakho. Woke umuntu ozwa iindaba zakho, uwahla izandla ngokuwa kwakho. Ngombana akunamuntu ongazange khewumhlunguphaze; ngobukhohlakali bakho obungapheliko." 
Habakkuk1:1 Isimemezelo sakaZimu esambulelwa uRhabakhukhu umphorofidi. 
Habakkuk1:2 Kunini ngibiza, Somnini, ngifunana nesizo, kodwana soloko awuphenduli? Ngakurhuwelela ngathi, “Umguruguru!” kodwana kubayini ungasindisi?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Kubayini ungibonisa ukungalungi, ubekezelela ubumbi? Ukurhayila nomguruguru kuphambi kwami, kwande ukunghunanghunana nerawurawu." 
Habakkuk1:4 Yeke umthetho uyabogaboga, ukugweba ngeqiniso akusekho. Iinkhohlakali ziqaqada phezu kwabalungileko, nje-ke kuhlanakelwa iingwebo." 
Habakkuk1:5 “Qalani izizwe, nizitjhejisise nikakamale benikhungatheke ngombana kunento engizayenza emihleni yenu; eningazukuyikholwa nanyana sele niyitjelwa." 
Habakkuk1:6 Iye, ngizakuvusa amaBhabheli, abantu abamarhamaru nabanganasisa, abatjharhatha iphasi loke, bakhambe bahluthula izindlu okungasi ngezabo." 
Habakkuk1:7 Bababantu abasatjwako nabatatazelelwako nomthetho usezandleni zabo, bazidumisa bona ngokwabo." 
Habakkuk1:8 Iinjomani zabo zigijima ukudlula izingwe, zidlhaduma ukudlula iimpisi ebusuku. Abakhweli bakhona beza bafuthekile; abakhweli bakhona bavela kude. Batheleka njengedlanga nalibhudungela ukudla kwalo;" 
Habakkuk1:9 boke beze ngokurhayila. Amabutho wakhona atheleka njengommoya werhalawumbeni; abuthelela iimbotjhwa njengetjhwabatjhwaba. 
Habakkuk1:10 Banyaza amakhosi, bahlekisa ngababusi. Bahleka woke amadorobho anemithangala; badindela ihlabathi emithangaleni yakhona; bawasahlele bawathumbe." 
Habakkuk1:11 Bese barhurhula badlulele phambili njengommoya; abantwaba benza amandlabo uzimabo.” 
Habakkuk1:12 AwusinguSomnini kusukela nini nanini na? AwusinguZimu wesivumelwano, oCwengileko nophila nini nanini na? Somnini, ukhethe amaBhabheli bona agwebe, Dwala, ubazese bona bahlunguphaze." 
Habakkuk1:13 Amehlwakho acwenge khulu kobana angaqalana nobukhohlakali; angeze wabekezelela ubumbi. Alo-ke kubayini ubekezelela izephulamthethwezi na? Uthuleleni ubona iinkhohlakali zirhiribidela abalunge khulu kinazo? 
Habakkuk1:14 Wenze umuntu waba njengehlambi, waba njengeenrhurhubi zelwandle zona ezinganambusi." 
Habakkuk1:15 AmaBhabheli la, abamba abantu boke; abadose ngeenkghopholahlambi, abagolela ngenedenawo, abarhurhulela ngesirhurhulanedeni sawo. Ngebangelo ayathokoza ajabule." 
Habakkuk1:16 Enzela isirhurhulanede sawo umhlatjelo, atjhisela nesirhobelanede sawo itjhwalo. Yeke, ngeenede zawezo abetha esimonyongwana, agoma iinkhanakhana zokudla." 
Habakkuk1:17 Azakusolo athulula iinede zawo, arhayile izizwe ngesihlungu na?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Ngizakujama esithaleni sami ngibe sesiqongolweni somthangala. Ngizakuqalisisa ngibone bonyana uSomnini uzokuthini kimi; nokuthi uzakuphendula athini ekunghonghoyileni kwamokhu. 
Habakkuk2:2 USomnini wangiphendula wathi: “Tlola isambulwesi phasi sibonakale kuhle emqebethwini ukuze sifundeke lula. 
Habakkuk2:3 Ngambala isambulwesi sizakuzaliseka ngesikhathi esifaneleko; sikhuluma ngesiphetho, angeze savuka simamala. Nanyana siriyada nje, silindele, sizakuzaliseka nakanjani, angeze besiriyade." 
Habakkuk2:4 “Tlola uthi, ‘Ongakalungi uzakubhubha, kodwana olungileko uzakuphila ngokukholwa kwakhe." 
Habakkuk2:5 Ngambala, umnono uyamkhohlisa ozikhukhumezako begodu angeze aphumelela; umarhamaru njengethuna, urhiribidela njengokufa; ubuthelela izizwe zoke kuye, athumbe boke abantu.’" 
Habakkuk2:6 “Ngambala, izizwe zizamphendula ihlaya, zimtlhorholoje ngokumvuma ingoma zithi, ‘Uzazizwa loyo ozidindelela iimpahla zokwetjiwa, azinjingisa ngobugirikijani! Kuzabe kube nini kulokho kwenzeka na?’" 
Habakkuk2:7 Ngambala, abakuhlawulako bazakururhuluka, abakuthuthumelisako bakuvukele, bakuthumbe." 
Habakkuk2:8 Wena waphanga izizwe ezinengi; yeke abantu boke bazakuphanga. Bazakuphanga ngombana nawe waphalaza iingazi zabantu, wabhubhisa iinarha namadorobho naye woke umuntu ohlala lapho." 
Habakkuk2:9 “Uzazizwa loyo ohlawulisa ngobugirikijani, bona azakhele umuzi ophephileko. Umzakhe uzakwehlelwa manikelela." 
Habakkuk2:10 Isigungu osakhileko sirhubutjhe umzakho. Ngokurhayila abantu abanengi, waloba ipilwakho." 
Habakkuk2:11 Ngambala, amatje azakurhuwelela ebodeni, ubuphaziphazi bufakaze." 
Habakkuk2:12 “Uzazizwa loyo owakha idorobho ngokuphalaza iingazi, ajamise umuzi ngobukhohlakali." 
Habakkuk2:13 Ngambala, uSomnini uMninimandlawoke uqunte bonyana ukutjhabatjheka kwabantu kube ziimvuthiso zomlilo, nokuthi izizwe zibhidlangele ilize." 
Habakkuk2:14 Iye, njengelwandle lizele amanzi, iphasi lizakuzala ilwazi, lazise iphazimulo kaSomnini." 
Habakkuk2:15 “Uzazizwa loyo oseza abomakhelwana bakhe utjwala obubukhali, basele badakwe babehlubule ukuze abone ububhunubhunu babo." 
Habakkuk2:16 Ukarekela ukurhubutjha abantu kunobana uhlonitjhwe. Sela nawe bewube bhunubhunu. Ikapho esesandleni sokugoma sakaSomnini inqophe ngakuwe, ukuhlonipheka kwakho kuzakuba lihlazo." 
Habakkuk2:17 Iye, umonakalo owawenza eLibhanoni uzakufikela nokurhayila kwakho iimbandana kuzokwethusa ngombana uphalaze iingazi zabantu, wabhubhisa iinarha namadorobho naye woke umuntu ohlala lapho." 
Habakkuk2:18 “Sizakubhadekela ngani isithombesibazwa njengombana sabazwa mumuntu nje na? Sisiza ngani isithombesibunjwa nomfundisi wamala na? Iye, loyo owasibumbako wethembele emsebenzini wezandla zakhe, ilize lakolize elingakhulumiko!" 
Habakkuk2:19 Uzazizwa loyo othi esigodweni, ‘Phaphama!’ Nanyana athi elitjeni elingakhulumiko, ‘Vuka!’ Intwenje ingakuyala na? Qala nje, yembeswe ngegolide nesiliva, abeyiphili do." 
Habakkuk2:20 Kodwana uSomnini usethempeleni lakhe elicwengileko. Akuthi iphasi lithi du phambi kwakhe.” 
Habakkuk3:1 Umthandazo kaRhabakhukhu umphorofidi. Tjhigiyonotho 
Habakkuk3:2 Somnini, ngizwile ngedumo lakho. Somnini, izenzo zakho zibonakele. Yewuzivuselele neminyakeni le, zenze zaziwe eenkhathini zethwezi. Kodwana ube nomusa nakuvuka irawurawu." 
Habakkuk3:3 UZimu uvele ngeTemana; Ocwengileko uvele ngentabeni iParana. Sela Iphazimulwakhe igubuzesa amazulu; ubuphaziphazi bakhe buzele iphasi. 
Habakkuk3:4 Ukumanyazela kwakhe kunjengokuphuma kwelanga; imisubela iphazima esandleni sakhe. Lapha kufihlakele khona amandlakhe. 
Habakkuk3:5 Izifo zikhamba phambi kwakhe, ukufa kumlandele." 
Habakkuk3:6 Wajama phezu kwephasi ladengezela, warhedlula, izizwe zarurhuluka. Ngendlelakhe wakhamba phezu kwephasi, iintaba zanini nanini zagirika neentatjana zeminyaka zarhunyela." 
Habakkuk3:7 Eenyaweni zakhe ngabona amandla: EKhutjhana kwavunguza amatende, kwaMidiyani kwaphembetha imitjhabo." 
Habakkuk3:8 Awu Somnini, begade usilingekele imilambo na? Ilaka lakho belijamelene nemilambo? Gade usilingwe lilwandle na? Ngambala, ukhwele iinjomani zakho neenkarana zakho zokuhlula." 
Habakkuk3:9 Ulungisa umsebe wakho, ubiza imisubela eminengi. Uphadlhula umhlaba, kuvele imilambo." 
Habakkuk3:10 Iintaba nazikubonako ziyathuthumela; kuvela iinrhurhula zamanzi; kubhodla amanzi ekuzikeni, athwele amagobhoza." 
Habakkuk3:11 Ilanga nenyanga zabuyela endawenazo, ngokuphazima kwemisubela yakho egijimako nangokumanyazela komkhontwakho ophazimako." 
Habakkuk3:12 Wasilingeka wapitliza iphasi, wabibhelana wabhula izizwe." 
Habakkuk3:13 Weza wazokusindisa abantu bakho, wazokusindisa umzeswakho. Warhayila iphahla lesigodlo sobukhohlakali, waphihliza isigodlo bekwaba sesisekelweni." 
Habakkuk3:14 Wahlaba umrholi ngomkhontwakhe, lokha iinkhulu zakhe nazisithelekelako bona zisiphadlhalaje. Inyazo lazo laba lilize: Zoke zaphepha zazifihla." 
Habakkuk3:15 Wagadangela iinjomani zakhe ngelwandle, emanzini amanengi abhodlako." 
Habakkuk3:16 Nangizwa lokho, amathumbami adlhabhaza, iimbhena zomlomami zahlengezela ngetjhadelo, umzimbami wakoropana, amadolwami ageba. Ngarhawuka ngebanga lelanga lamatlhuwo, ngebanga lezehlo ezizokwehlela abasahleli." 
Habakkuk3:17 Nanyana umuthi wamakhiwani ungatlhurhi, kutlhogeka namadiribe esidiribeni; nanyana isivuno se-oliva singahlomi kutlhogeka nokudla emasimini; nanyana kunganazimvu ngesibayeni kutlhogeka neenkomo ngesibayeni;" 
Habakkuk3:18 nokho mina ngizakuthaba kuSomnini, ngizakuthokoza kuZimu uMsindisami." 
Habakkuk3:19 USomnini uSomandla umamandlami; wenza iinyawo zami zibe njengezehlangu, ungenza ngikghone ukweqela imibundu. Libhinwa ngeenliliswa zeenara." 
Zephaniah1:1 Ilizwi lakaSomnini elafika kuZefaniya umsa kaKutjhi, omsa kaGedaliya, umsa ka-Amariya, omsa kaHezekhiya, nakusabusa uJosiya, umsa ka-Amoni ikosi yakwaJuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 “Ngizakurhurhula yoke into esebusweni bephasi.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Zephaniah1:3 “Ngizakurhayila kwasamuntu neembandana; ngisizile iinyoni zezulu neenhlambi zelwandle. Ngiketule iinkhohlakali nangiphelisa abantu ebusweni bephasi.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Zephaniah1:4 “UJuda ngizombeka isandla nazo zoke izakhamuzi zeJerusalema. Ngizakuphelisa yoke imisalela yakaBhali endaweni le namabizo wabaphristi ababalotjhi bakaBhali, angasakhunjulwa." 
Zephaniah1:5 Ngizakuphelisa labo abalotjha iinkwekwezi phezu kwephahla lezindlu nabaguqa phasi bafunge uSomnini bajike godu bafunge uMilkomu. 
Zephaniah1:6 Ngizakuphelisa nabahlanuka uSomnini bangasayifuna ngokungasabuzi kiyo. 
Zephaniah1:7 “Thula phambi kwakaSomnini uSomandla, ngombana ilanga lakaSomnini litjhidele. USomnini ulungise umhlabelo; walungiselela labo abamemileko.”" 
Zephaniah1:8 Ngelanga lomhlabelo lowo, uSomnini wathi: “Ngizakubeka iinkhulu namakhosana umlandu, nabo boke ababahlumisa ngenturhu nangekohliso. Ngibeke umlandu nalabo abavunule iimvunulo ezitjhili nabo boke abagegeda ukugadanga embunjwaneni womnyango.”" 
Zephaniah1:9 USomnini uthi: “Mhlokho kuzakuzwakala umkhosi esangweni leHlambi, kurhahlawulwe ngengcenyeni etja yeJerusalema, kuzwakale ubugidigidi obukhulu ngemibundwini." 
Zephaniah1:10 Rhahlawulani nina enihlala emakethe, ngombana boke abarhwebi bazokutjhabalaliswa nabathengisi barhayilwe." 
Zephaniah1:11 “Ngesikhatheso ngizakubhenyegula iJerusalema ngeenhlothi ezivuthako, bengibeke umlandu labo abazigedlileko, abazitjela bathi, ‘USomnini akenzi litho elimbi nanyana elihle.’" 
Zephaniah1:12 Umnonwabo uzakuphangwa, neenkumba zabo zigirizwe. Bazakwakha iinkumba bangazihlali; batjale iindiribe kodwana bangalirhamuli iwayini lakhona.”" 
Zephaniah1:13 Ilanga elikhulu lakaSomnini litjhidele; ngambala litjhidele begodu liza ngokurhabileko. Ukuzwakala komkhosi wephasi welanga lakaSomnini uzakuba munyu nonesibindi uzakulila okutlhuwisako. 
Zephaniah1:14 Ilangelo lizakuba lilanga lelaka, ilanga lamahlungu namatlhuwiso, ilanga lokubhuruzwa nokurhayilwa, ilanga lokufiphala nobumnyama, ilanga lamafu anzima tshu." 
Zephaniah1:15 Kuzakuba lilanga lepalapala nelokuhlaba umkhosi, wokugasela amadorobho anemithangala nemibhotjhongo yamajika." 
Zephaniah1:16 USomnini uthi: “Ngizakuletha amatlhuwiso ebantwini, yeke bazakubhaduzela njengabangaboniko.” Ngebanga lokobana bonile kuSomnini, ipilwabo izakuba njengeenzibi, nemizimbabo ibe njengobulongwe." 
Zephaniah1:17 Isiliva negolidabo angeze yabasindisa ngelanga lelaka lakaSomnini. Inarha yoke izakuqothulwa ngomlilo wesikhwele sayo. Ngambala uzakurhayila ngokwesabekako boke abaphila enarheni. 
Zephaniah2:1 Zibuthelele wena sizwe esingananhloni ndina," 
Zephaniah2:2 ngaphambi kobana isikhathi sequnto lakaSomnini sizaliseke, iye, isikhatheso siza ngokurhabileko! Zikhalimele ngaphambi kobana ilaka lakaSomnini elivuthako lehlele phezu kwakho!" 
Zephaniah2:3 Funani uSomnini, nina noke bantu benarha enizithobileko, nina enilalela imiyalwayo. Yenzani okulungileko, nifune ukuthobeka; mhlamunye nizakuvikeleka ngelanga lelaka lakaSomnini." 
Zephaniah2:4 Ngambala iGaza izakutjhiywa bese i-Atjhikheloni isukelwa imarubhi. Ama-Atjhidodi azakuqotjhwa emini kwa bha bese i-Akroni iyasitjhulwa. 
Zephaniah2:5 Nizazizwa nina enihlala magegana nelwandle, nina bantu beKerethi. Ilizwi lakaSomnini lijamelene nawe, wena Kanana, narha yamaFilista, lithi: “Ngizakubhubhisa nya, akunamuntu namunye ozakusinda.”" 
Zephaniah2:6 Isifunda seligu sizakuba miraga, indawo yabelusi; siphenduke iimbaya zezimvu." 
Zephaniah2:7 Izakuba yinarha yemisalela yekumba yakwaJuda; izimvu zabo zidle lapho. Ebusuku bazakulala ngemarubhini we-Atjhikheloni. USomnini uZimabo uzabatjheja; atjhugulule ubujamo babo. 
Zephaniah2:8 USomnini uthi: “Ngizizwile iinhlamba zabakwaMowabi namezwi wokuqhukuluza wabakwa-Amoni; abathuke abantu bami bebanyefula nenarhabo.” 
Zephaniah2:9 USomnini uMninimandlawoke, uZimu wakwa-Israyeli uthi: “Ngebangelo-ke ngiyafunga ngithi, kuphila kwami: Ngambala iMowabi izakufana neSodoma, ama-Amoni afane neGomora: indawo yemitjhatjhana nemigodi yetswayi, inarha eligagadu nini nanini. Imisalela yabantu bami izabaphanga, abasindileko esizweni sami bazuze inarhabo.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Ngikhokhu abazakufumana ngokuzikhukhumeza kwabo nokuthuka bebaqhukuluze abantu bakaSomnini uMninimandlawoke. 
Zephaniah2:11 USomnini uzabethusa lokha nabhubhisa boke abosingazimu benarha. Esinye nesinye isizwe sizamdumisa, nezikude zimdumise enarhenazo." 
Zephaniah2:12 USomnini uthi: “Nani, bantu beKutjhe, nizakubulawa ngesabulami.”" 
Zephaniah2:13 USomnini uzawelula isandla sakhe ajamelane netlhagu bese abhubhisa i-Asiriya; atjhiye iNiniva imabhudubhudu begodu yome kere kwanga lirhalawumba. 
Zephaniah2:14 Imihlambi yeembandana izakulala phasi khonapho, iye, imifunda ngemifunda. Ebusuku iinrhulurhulu zizakulinda eentlhorini zeensika. Ukulila kwazo kuzakuzwakala eentunjeni zemithangala. Amagubulu azakurhwarhwaza emibunjwaneni yeminyango ngombana uSomnini ubhuruze imisedari yedorobho." 
Zephaniah2:15 Lizakuba nje-ke idorobho elizikhukhumezako neliphephileko, elizitjela lithi: “Ngimi ngimi, alikho elinye gaphandle kwami.” Maye, lizakuphenduka igagadu, indawo yokulala iimbandana zommango! Boke abadlula nca ngakilo bazalenza ihlaya bebalikokomeje." 
Zephaniah3:1 Lizazizwa idorobho eliphika ikani, elisilapheleko neligandelelako!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Alilaleli muntu, alivumi ukusolwa; alithembeli kuSomnini, alitjhideli hlanu koZimalo." 
Zephaniah3:3 Iinkhulu zalo zimabhubezi abhodlako, abagwebi balo baziimpisi ezikhwabitha ebusuku zirhiribidela zingalisi nanyana sele kusile." 
Zephaniah3:4 Abaphorofidi balo abazisi, bababantu abangathembekiko. Abaphristi balo basilaphaza okucwengileko begodu bephula umyalo." 
Zephaniah3:5 Nanyana uSomnini olungileko angaphakathi kwedorobheli; kunganabumbi abenzako, ngamasa angahluleki, abonakalisa ukulunga kwakhe imihla ngemihla; kodwana khonapho iinkhohlakali abe azinanhloni." 
Zephaniah3:6 USomnini uthi: “Ngirhayile izizwe; imibhotjhongwazo ibhidliziwe. Ngitjhiye iindledlana zazo zithe nghwayi, kwangaba namuntu okhambakhamba kizo. Amadorobhazo arhayiliwe, akukho noyedwa ozakusala, ngitjho noyedwa tere." 
Zephaniah3:7 Bengidlumbana bona: Idorobheli lizangesaba, livume ukusolwa beliyelele koke engikulindele kilo. Kodwana khonapho belisaphikelele ngobukhohlakali kikho koke elikwenzako." 
Zephaniah3:8 “USomnini uthi: “Yeke yewungilindele, ulindele ilanga engizakujama ngalo ngifakaze, lokha mina mgwebi ngihlanganisa izizwe nemibuso bona ngiyimadlhe ngamanikelelami, iye ngetukuthelwami evuthako. Lindelani ilanga mhlana iphasi loke lizakuqothulwa ngomlilo welaka lami.”" 
Zephaniah3:9 “Yeke ngizakuhlambulula iimbhena zabantu ukuze boke babize ibizo lakaSomnini, bamlotjhe, babambisene." 
Zephaniah3:10 Kusukela ngaphetjheya kwemilambo yeKutjhe abalotjhi bami, abantu bami abasabaleleko bazangilethela iminikelo." 
Zephaniah3:11 Mhlokho, wena Jerusalema, angekhe usasoleka ngemitjhapho ongone ngayo ngombana ngizabe ngisuse kuwe boke abantu abathokoza ngokuzitjhaya kwabo. Nje-ke angeze usazigqaja entabenami ecwengileko." 
Zephaniah3:12 Kodwana ngizakutjhiya phakathi kwenu ababubodlhana nabathobekileko, bazakufunyana isiphephelo kuSomnini." 
Zephaniah3:13 “Imisalela yakwa-Israyeli angeze isenza ubumbi nanyana ileye amala nekulumo ekhohlisako angeze yafunyanwa emilonyenayo. Ngambala izakukarula yetjise begodu kungabi nomuntu ozayethusa.” 
Zephaniah3:14 Kwakwazela, wena ndodakazi yeZiyoni! Betha umkhulungwana, wena Israyeli! Jabula uthokoze ngehliziywakho yoke, ndodakazi yeJerusalema!" 
Zephaniah3:15 USomnini usisusile isigwebo sakho, waqotjha nesitha sakho. INgwenyama yakwa-Israyeli, uSomnini ungesirhodlweni sakho, akusenabumbi obuzakwehlela godu." 
Zephaniah3:16 Mhlokho bazakuthi eJerusalema: “Ungesabi, wena Ziyoni, unganyefisi izandla zakho." 
Zephaniah3:17 USomnini uZimakho ungesirhodlweni sakho, unamandla wokusindisa. USomnini uzakukarekela ngethabo elikhulu; akuthande ngesirhawu, akuthakasele" 
Zephaniah3:18 ngokuthamba.” USomnini uthi: “Ngizakubuthelela abantu bakwa-Israyeli ebe bathotjisiwe begodu baphadlhalajiwe, labo abasuka enarhenabo ngamatlhuwo." 
Zephaniah3:19 Sekuseduze bona bangibone kuhle abagandeleli bakho, wena Jerusalema. Ngizakwenyela abarholopheleko bakwa-Israyeli, bengibuthelele nalabo egade baphadlhalele. Esikhundleni sokunyazwa kwabo ngizabaphakamisa babe nedumo nesithunzi kilo loke iphasi." 
Zephaniah3:20 Ngesikhatheso ngizanibutha; ngesikhatheso ngizaniletha ekhaya. Ngizanipha idumo nesithunzi hlangana nabantu boke bephasi lokha nangitjhugulula ubujamo benu niqalile.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Haggai1:1 Ngomnyaka wesibili wekosi uDariyasi, elangeni lokuthoma lenyanga yesithandathu, ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kuZerubhabheli umsa kaTjheyaltiyeli, umbusi wakwaJuda, nakuJotjhuwa umsa kaJehozadaki, umphristi omkhulu, ngomphorofidi uHagayi lathi:" 
Haggai1:2 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Abantwaba bathi, ‘Isikhathi sokobana kwakhiwe indlu kaSomnini asakafiki.’ ”" 
Haggai1:3 Yeke ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika ngomphorofidi uHagayi lathi: 
Haggai1:4 “Kusikhathi sokobana nina nihlale eendlini zakanokutjho, khibe indlu le yona ilokhu ilirubhi njalo na?”" 
Haggai1:5 Nakhu okutjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Yelelani iindlela zenu. 
Haggai1:6 Nitjele khulu, kodwana nivuna kancani. Niyagoma, kodwana anisuthi. Niyasela kodwana anikholwa. Niyembatha, kodwana anifuthumali. Niyarhola bese nifaka umrholo ngembadeni evuzako.”" 
Haggai1:7 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Yelelani iindlela zenu. 
Haggai1:8 Nyukelani eentabeni bese newuka neengodo nakhe indlu ukuze ngizithabise ngayo bengidunyiswe.” kutjho uSomnini. 
Haggai1:9 “Benirhuluphele okunengi, kodwana qalani kujike kwaba yitupurujwana. Lokho ebenithi nikuletha ekhaya, ngakukhafulela. Ngebanga lani-ke?” Kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke. “Ngebanga lendlwami, esolo yajama ilirubhi, ngapha khibe nina omunye nomunye wenu uzithabisa ngendlwakhe." 
Haggai1:10 Nje-ke, ngebanga lenu, amazulu agugudlhele izulu lawo, nephasi lagugudlhela isivuno salo." 
Haggai1:11 Ngehlisele isomiso emasimini neentabeni, phezu kwesivuno samabele, sewayini elitjha, emafutheni we-oliva naphezu kwananyana yini esimila, phezu kwabantu naphezu kwefuyo, naphezu kwemisebenzi yezandla zenu.”" 
Haggai1:12 Yeke uZerubhabheli umsa kaTjheyaltiyeli, uJotjhuwa umsa kaJehozadaki, umphristi omkhulu, nayo yoke imisalela yabantu balalela ilizwi lakaSomnini uZimabo kanye nomlayezo womphorofidi uHagayi ngombana ubagade athunywe nguSomnini uZimabo. Nje-ke abantu besaba uSomnini." 
Haggai1:13 Yeke uHagayi, isithunywa sakaSomnini, wathula umlayezo kaSomnini ebantwini wathi: “Nginani, kutjho uSomnini.”" 
Haggai1:14 Nje-ke uSomnini watlhotlholoja ummoya kaZerubhabheli umsa kaTjheyaltiyeli, umbusi wakwaJuda, nommoya kaJotjhuwa umsa kaJehozadaki, umphristi omkhulu, kanye nommoya wabo boke abantu abimisalela. Bafika bebathoma ukusebenza endlini kaSomnini uMninimandlawoke, uZimabo," 
Haggai1:15 elangeni lamatjhumi amabili nane ngenyanga yesithandathu. Ngomnyaka wesibili wekosi uDariyasi," 
Haggai2:1 elangeni lamatjhumi amabili nanye, ngenyanga yekhomba, ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika ngomphorofidi uHagayi lathi:" 
Haggai2:2 “Khuluma noZerubhabheli umsa kaTjheyaltiyeli, umbusi wakwaJuda, noJotjhuwa umsa kaJehozadaki, umphristi omkhulu kanye nebantwini boke abimisalela, uthi:" 
Haggai2:3 ‘Ngubani kinapha oseleko owabona indlu le isesekazimulwenayo yaphambilini? Naniyiqalako niyibona injani-ke kwanjesi? Ayinifaneli nelize lakolize na? 
Haggai2:4 Nje-ke qina amandla, Zerubhabheli,’ kutjho uSomnini. ‘Qina amandla nawe, Jotjhuwa, umsa kaJehozadaki umphristi omkhulu. Qinani amandla nani noke bantu benarha le,’ kutjho uSomnini. ‘Sebenzani ngombana nginani,’ kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Haggai2:5 ‘Ngikhokhu engakubopha nani lokha naniphuma eGibhide. UMoyami unani njalo, yeke ningesabi.’" 
Haggai2:6 “Ngambala, lokhu ngokwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke, ‘Kuzakuthi msinyazana ngisikinye amazulu nephasi, nelwandle kanye nenarha eyomileko." 
Haggai2:7 Ngizakusikinya zoke izizwe bese kuvela amagugu wezizwe zoke, yeke ngizalise indlu le ngephazimulo,’ kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Haggai2:8 ‘Isiliva ngelami, negolide ngelami,’ kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Haggai2:9 ‘Iphazimulo yendlu yagadesi le izakuba yikulu kuneyendlu yaphambilini,’ kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke. ‘Begodu ngizanipha ukuthula endaweni le,’ kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke.”" 
Haggai2:10 Ngelanga lamatjhumi amabili nane lenyanga yethoba, emnyakeni wesibili wakaDariyasi, ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kumphorofidi uHagayi lathi:" 
Haggai2:11 “Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke, ‘Akhe ubuze abaphristi bonyana umyalwabo uthini:" 
Haggai2:12 Nangabe umuntu utjhubelela inyama ecwengisiweko ngengubakhe bese ingubo leyo ikghwatha isikwa namkha isitjulu, iwayini, amafutha we-oliva nanyana okhunye nje ukudla, inyama leyo isacwengile nayinjalo na?’ ” Abaphristi bamphendula bathi: “Awa”." 
Haggai2:13 Yeke uHagayi wathi: “Lokha umuntu osilaphazwe kuthintana nesidumbu, nathinta enye yezintwezi, nayo iyasilaphala na?” Abaphristi bamphendula bathi: “Iye, iyasilaphala.”" 
Haggai2:14 Yeke uHagayi waphetha ngokuthi: “ ‘Banjalo-ke nabantwaba, nesizwe esiphambi kwamesi,’ kutjho uSomnini. ‘Unjalo-ke nomsebenzi wezandla zabo, nalokho abanikela ngakho lapho kusilaphazekile." 
Haggai2:15 “ ‘Nje-ke, yelelani iindlela zenu kusukela namhlanje, ngomuso nanini, nizibuze bonyana izinto bezikhamba njani nakungakabi ukwakhiwa iboda lethempeleni lakaSomnini." 
Haggai2:16 Bekuthi nanyana ngubani ofika equbini lekoroyi, nakalindele ukufunyana imigodla ematjhumi amabili, afunyane elitjhumi kwaphela. Nanyana ngubani oya ebutlhodlhelweni athi uyokukha iinlinganiso ezimatjhumi amahlanu zewayini, afunyane ezimatjhumi amabili." 
Haggai2:17 Ngarhadla soke isivuno senu ngobori, ngokukghora nangesinanja, kodwana azange niphendukele kimi,’ kutjho uSomnini." 
Haggai2:18 ‘Yelelani iindlela zenu kusuka namhlanjesi, ngomuso nanini, nizibuze bona izinto bezikhamba njani, kusukela elangeni lamatjhumi amabili nane enyangeni yethoba mhlana kukghenywa isisekelo sethempeli lakaSomnini. Yelelani:" 
Haggai2:19 Kusese nembewu eseleko ngesilulwini na? Isidiribe, amakhiwani, amarharinada nanyana imithi ye-oliva ehlomileko. Kodwana kusukela namhlanje, ngizanibusisa.’ ”" 
Haggai2:20 Ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kuHagayi kwesibili elangeni lamatjhumi amabili nane lenyanga lathi: 
Haggai2:21 “Tjela uZerubhabheli, umbusi wakwaJuda: ngizokusikinya amazulu nephasi." 
Haggai2:22 Ngizokuketula iinhlalo zobukhosi bengibhidlize namandla weengodlo zezizwe. Ngizakuketula iinkarana nabatjhayeli bazo; iinjomani nabakhweli bazo bazakurhadleka phasi, omunye nomunye arhadlwe yisabula yomfowabo." 
Haggai2:23 “ ‘Mhlokho,’ kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke, ‘ngizakuthatha wena Zerubhabheli, msa kaTjhelitiyeli, njengencekwami,’ kutjho uSomnini, ‘ngizakwenza ube njengedzilamnwanami, ngombana ngikukhethile,’ kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Ngenyanga yobumnane emnyakeni wesibili wokubusa kwakaDariyasi, ilizwi lakaSomnini lafika kumphorofidi uZakariya umsa kaBherekiya omsa ka-Ido:" 
Zechariah1:2 “USomnini wasilingeka khulu kwamambala ngaboyihlomkhulu. 
Zechariah1:3 Yeke, yewutjele abantu uthi: Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke, “ ‘Buyelani kimi ngombana nami ngifuna ukubuyela kini.’ Lawa, mamezwi kaSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Zechariah1:4 “Ningalingisi aboyihlomkhulu okwathi lokha abaphorofidi baphambilini nabathi kibo: Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke, ‘Phendukani emikhubeni nezenzweni zenu zobukhohlakali.’ Kodwana azange balalele begodu azange bebangithathele ehloko.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Zechariah1:5 “Kwenzekani-ke ngaboyihlomkhulu nabaphorofidi babo bamanga? 
Zechariah1:6 Ngambala amezwami nemiyalwami engayithumezela ngeenceku zami, abaphorofidi, yafika kiboyihlomkhulu. Kwafanela bona baphenduke bebavume bathi, ‘USomnini uMninimandlawoke usenzele okufanelana nemikhuba nezenzo zethu njengombana bekathe uzakwenza.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:7 Elangeni lamatjhumi amabili nane; ngenyanga yetjhumi nanye, okuyinyanga kaTjhebati, ngomnyaka wesibili wokubusa kwakaDariyasi, umphorofidi uZakariya umsa kaBherekiya, omsa ka-Ido wabona umbono ovela kuSomnini." 
Zechariah1:8 Kwathi ebusuku ngehlelwa mbono: Ngabona umuntu akhwele injomani ekofe. Gade ajame hlangana nemithi yemiritlili ngemrhobeni. Ngemva kwakhe kwakujame iinjomani ezinzotho, ezibomvu nezimhlophe." 
Zechariah1:9 Ngabuza ngathi: “Kosami, kutjho ukuthini lokhu?” Isithunywa sakaSomnini ebegade sijame hlangana nemithi yemiritlili sathi kimi: “Ngizakuhlathululela bonyana kutjho ukuthini. Laba ngabathunywe nguSomnini kobana bakhambe iphasi loke.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Base bayabika-ke esithunyweni sakaSomnini esasijame hlangana nemithi yemiritlili bathi: “Sikhambe iphasi loke, safunyana lipholile.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Nje-ke isithunywa sakaSomnini sathi: “Somnini Mninimandlawoke, kuzabe kube nini usitheze isirhawu phezu kweJerusalema nemadorobheni wakwaJuda obegade ulokhu uwathukuthelele iminyaka ematjhumi alikhomba woke poro?”" 
Zechariah1:12 Yeke uSomnini wakhuluma amezwi amahle naduduzako ngesithunywa sakhe. 
Zechariah1:13 Nje-ke isithunywa sakaSomnini sathi: “Memezela amezwi la: “USomnini uMninimandlawoke uthi, ‘Nginesikhwele esikhulu ngeJerusalema neZiyoni" 
Zechariah1:14 begodu ngisilingeke khulu ngezizwe ezizikhakhazisa ngokuzethemba kwazo. Bengisilingeke isikhatjhana esifitjhani kodwana izizwezi zithuwelele ngokonakala.’ 
Zechariah1:15 “Nje-ke nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini, “ ‘Ngizakubuyela eJerusalema ngesirhawu, lapha ithempeli lami lizakwakhiwa khona ngobutjha begodu neJerusalema izakwakhiwa butjha.’" 
Zechariah1:16 “Ragela phambili umemezele uthi: “Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke, ‘Amadorobhami azakuthoma godu aphuphume ngomnotho, yeke uSomnini uzakuthoma godu aduduze iZiyoni abe akhethe iJerusalema.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:17 Ngaqala godu, ngabona kuneempondo ezine." 
Zechariah1:18 Ngabuza isithunywa sakaSomnini ngathi: “Khuyini-ke lokhu?” Sangiphendula sathi: “Lezi ziimpondo ezahlakaza uJuda, u-Israyeli neJerusalema.”" 
Zechariah1:19 Yeke uSomnini wangikhombisa abososino abane. 
Zechariah1:20 Ngabuza ngathi: “Alo, bazokwenzani-ke laba?” Wangiphendula wathi: “Laba baziimpondo ezahlakaza uJuda kangangobana kwatlhogeka noyedwa ovusa ihloko, kodwana abososino beze ukuzobethusa, bebaqede amandla wezizwe ezaphakamisela iimpondo zazo enarheni yakwaJuda kobana zihlakaze abantu bakhona.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Ngaqala, ngabona indoda iphethe isimedo ngesandla." 
Zechariah2:2 Ngayibuza ngathi: “Uyaphi?” Yangiphendula yathi: “Ngiyokumeda iJerusalema ukuze ngibone ubude nobubanzi bayo.” 
Zechariah2:3 Yeke kwavela isithunywa sakaSomnini, godu kwavela nenye ingilozi yasihlangabeza." 
Zechariah2:4 Isithunywa sakaSomnini sathi kiyo: “Gijima, ufese utjele isokana lesimedo leliya bonyana uSomnini uthi, “ ‘IJerusalema izokuba lidorobho elinganamithangala ngombana inesiminyaminya sabantu nefuyo." 
Zechariah2:5 Mina ngokwami ngizokuba liboda lomlilo magegana nayo. Bese ngiyizalisa ngephazimulwami.’ ” 
Zechariah2:6 Isithunywa sakaSomnini sathi: “ ‘Arha-ke! Arha-ke! Phumani ngenarheni yangetlhagwini leyo,’ kutjho uSomnini. Begodu uSomnini wathi, ‘Ngambala ngathembisa bonyana ngizanenza nisabalale emagumbini womane.’" 
Zechariah2:7 “Nje-ke, yenize eZiyoni! Phunyurhani nibaleke nina bantu enihlala eBhabheli!" 
Zechariah2:8 USomnini wangithuma ezizweni ezaniphangako nina bantu beJerusalema. Wangithuma kobana ngibuyisele idumo lakhe ngombana nanyana ngubani othinta nina uhloma uSomnini ngomuno ngelihlweni. 
Zechariah2:9 “Ngiyatjho ngithi ngizakuphakamisa isandla sami, ngijamelane nezizwezi; zizakuphangwa makhobokazo. Nje-ke nizakulemuka bonyana uSomnini uMninimandlawoke ungithumile." 
Zechariah2:10 “Bhina begodu uthabe, wena ndodakazi yeZiyoni ngombana uSomnini wathi, ‘Ngiyeza begodu ngizokuhlala ngesirhodlweni sakho.’" 
Zechariah2:11 “Izizwe ezinengi zizazihlanganisa noSomnini mhlokho bese ziba sisizwe sakhe. Uzakuhlala ngesirhodlweni sakho Jerusalema, wena-ke uzakwazi bonyana uSomnini uMninimandlawoke ungithume kuwe." 
Zechariah2:12 USomnini uzakuzuza iJuda, ilifa lakhe enarheni ecwengileko abe azikhethele neJerusalema godu." 
Zechariah2:13 Zithobeni phambi kwakaSomnini, noke nina bantu ngombana uSomnini selafikile uvela endawenakhe ecwengileko.”" 
Zechariah3:1 Yeke uSomnini wangikhombisa uJotjhuwa umphristi omkhulu ajame phambi kwesithunywa sakaSomnini, nomphikisi ajame ngesidleni sakhe ezele ukuzomphikisa." 
Zechariah3:2 Isithunywa sakaSomnini sathi kumphikisi: “USomnini uyakukhalima wena mphikisi ndina! USomnini okhethe iJerusalema uyakukhalima! UJotjhuwa lo, sikhuni esivuthako esikhutjhwe emlilweni!”" 
Zechariah3:3 Yeke uJotjhuwa gade embethe izambatho ezikghamathele iinsila nakalokho ajame phambi kwesithunywa njalo. 
Zechariah3:4 Isithunywa sathi eengilozini ezijame phambi kwaso: “Mhlubuliseni iindwedwekazi azembethekwezi.” Sase sithi kuJotjhuwa: “Qala, ngisuse isono sakho, nje-ke ngizakwembathisa izambatho zakanokutjho.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Yeke mina Zakariya ngathi: “Mthweseni iqubi lobuphristi elihlanzekileko ehlokwakhe.” Bamthwesa-ke iqubi elihlanzekileko ehlokwakhe bebamembathisa, isithunywa sakaSomnini silokhu sijame eqadi kwakhe." 
Zechariah3:6 Isithunywa sakaSomnini sathembisa uJotjhuwa sathi: 
Zechariah3:7 “USomnini uMninimandlawoke uthi, ‘Nawukhamba eendleleni zami; bese ulonda imiyalwami, utjheje ithempeli lami bewutlhogomele nesirhodlo sethempeli, yeke ngizakwenza ube nehlanganyelo neengilozi zami.’" 
Zechariah3:8 “Lalela, wena mphristi omkhulu Jotjhuwa, kanye nedwendwe lakhwelo, niyelele itshwayeli: Ngizakuletha incekwami ekuthiwa nguHlumela." 
Zechariah3:9 Ngambala idwala engiliphathise uJotjhuwa, okulidwala elikhethekileko lifanekisa ukuba khona kwami, iye, ngizokuvula umthombalo bengirhurhule isono senarha le ngelanga linye tere.” Kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Zechariah3:10 “Mhlokho kuzakwanda ukuthula kangangobana nizakuhlala ndawonye ngaphasi kwesidiribe namakhiwani.” Kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke. 
Zechariah4:1 Yeke isithunywa sakaSomnini sangivusa godu, njengomuntu ovuswa ebuthongweni." 
Zechariah4:2 Sangibuza sathi: “Ubonani?” Ngaphendula ngathi: “Ngibona ilithi leembani eliyigolide koke, phezukwalo kunomakupuru onamazikwana alikhomba, izikwana ngalinye linamathudze alikhomba." 
Zechariah4:3 Begodu kunama-oliva amabili, elinye ngesidleni, elinye ngesinceleni sakamakupuru.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Ngabuza isithunywa sakaSomnini ngathi: “Kuyini-ke lokhu kosami?” 
Zechariah4:5 Isithunywa sakaSomnini sangiphendula sathi: “Awazi bonyana kuyini lokhu?” Ngaphendula ngathi: “Awa, kosami.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Nje-ke sathi kimi: “Leli lilizwi lakaSomnini elinqotjhiswe kuZerubhabheli, lithi, “ ‘Akuyi ngeenkhwepha nanyana ngamandla womuntu, kodwana kuya ngoMoyami, kuzakufezeka’, kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Zechariah4:7 ‘Nanyana kungaba neenqabo ezikulu kangangani, uZerubhabheli uzakuphumelela ngombana uSomnini uzakwenza idwala leZiyoni libe siqongolo seentaba. Ubuhle balo angeze balinganiswa nalitho.’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Ilizwi lakaSomnini leza kimi ngesithunywa lathi: 
Zechariah4:9 “Izandla zakaZerubhabheli zithome ukuvuselela ithempeleleli begodu izandla zakhe zizaliqedelela.” Wena-ke Zakariya, uzakwazi bonyana uSomnini uMninimandlawoke ungithume kini." 
Zechariah4:10 “Ngubani odelela ilanga lezinto ezincani? Abantu bazakujabula lokha nababona uZerubhabheli aphethe isinqophisamakho. “Iimbani ezikhombezi, mamehlo kaSomnini athalaza ephasini loke.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Ngasibuza isithunywa sakaSomnini ngathi: “Atjho ukuthini ama-oliva angesidleni nangesinceleni sesibani la?” 
Zechariah4:12 Ngasibuza godu ngathi: “Alo-ke iimpande ze-oliva ezimbilezi ezinemihlanga emibili yegolide ephazima hlanu kwazo zitjho ukuthini?” 
Zechariah4:13 Sangiphendula sathi: “Awazi bonyana kutjho ukuthini lokhu?” Ngaphendula ngathi: “Awa, kosami.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Nje-ke sathi kimi: “Lokhu kutjho ababili abajame phambi kwakaSomnini, umniniphasi loke begodu baphathiswe amafutha amatjha.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Ngaqala godu ngabona umsongo ophaphako. 
Zechariah5:2 Isithunywa sakaSomnini sangibuza sathi: “Ubonani?” Ngaphendula ngathi: “Ngibona umsongo ophaphako, opheze ube mamitha alitjhumi ubude namamitha amahlanu ububanzi.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Sathi kimi: “Lawa manikelela ehlele inarha yoke. Ukuya ngomsongo lo, woke owebako nofunga ibizo lami ngamanga uzakuhlunguphazwa." 
Zechariah5:4 USomnini uMninimandlawoke uthi, “ ‘Ngizakuthumela amanikelela angene ngendlini yesela nakofunga ibizo lami ngamanga. Azakuhlala ngendlinapho beyigirike.’ ”" 
Zechariah5:5 Nje-ke isithunywa sakaSomnini savela sathi kimi: “Qala bona kuzokuvelani.” 
Zechariah5:6 Ngabuza ngathi: “Yintobani-ke le?” Saphendula sathi: “Lokhu silulu.” Besangezelela sathi: “Mlandu wenarha yoke-ke lo.” 
Zechariah5:7 Nje-ke kwasibukululwa isisibekelo somthofi; agu, qalani: Kazi kuhlezi umfazi ngaphakathi!" 
Zechariah5:8 Sathi kimi: “Umfazi lo, ukukhohlakala.” Samgondela ngesilulwini besasibekela ngesisibekelo somthofi." 
Zechariah5:9 Ngaphakamisa amehlwami, ngabona kuvela abafazi ababili bathiyelele emmoyeni ngeempiko. Iimpiko zabo bezinjengezakanogolantethe. Baphakamisa isilulu saba sesibangeni." 
Zechariah5:10 Ngabuza isithunywa sakaSomnini ngathi: “Abafazaba basisaphi isilulwesi?” 
Zechariah5:11 Sangiphendula sathi: “Kuyokwakhiwa ithempeli eBhabheli, nasele liphelile ukwakhiwa, isilulweso sizakubekwa endundumaneni esemsamo wethempeli.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Ngabuye ngaqala godu ngabona iinkarana ezine zepi zivela hlangana neentaba ezimbili , iintaba zedzila! 
Zechariah6:2 Ikarana yokuthoma beyineenjomani ezinzotho, yesibili inezinzima," 
Zechariah6:3 yesithathu inezimhlophe, kanti yesine beyinezimabalabala , zoke njalo bezinamandla." 
Zechariah6:4 Ngabuza isithunywa sakaSomnini ngathi: “Kuyini lokhu, kosami?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Isithunywa sangiphendula sathi: “Le, mimoya emine yezulwini, ephumako negade ijame phambi kwakaSomnini, umniniphasi loke." 
Zechariah6:6 Ikarana yeenjomani ezinzima iqale ngenarheni yangetlhagwini, eneenjomani ezimhlophe iqale ngetjingalanga bese kuthi emabalabala iqale ngenarheni yangesewula.”" 
Zechariah6:7 Lokha iinjomani ezinamandla naziphumako, gade zitjhabatjheka zifuna ukutjharhalala nephaseli loke nje. Sabese sithi: “Tjharhalalani nephaseli loke nje!” Yeke zatjharhalala nephasi loke." 
Zechariah6:8 Nje-ke isithunywa sangirhuwelela sathi: “Qala, leziya eziya enarheni yangetlhagwini zizakwanelisa uMoyami lapho.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Ilizwi lakaSomnini leza kimi ngesithunywa lathi: 
Zechariah6:10 “URheldayi, uThobiya noJedaya, ababathunjwa babuya eBhabheli baletha izipho kuJosaya umsa kaZefaniya. Lokha nabafikako, wena iya kwaJosaya," 
Zechariah6:11 uthathe isiliva negolide wenze isihlohlo bese usiphathisa umphristi omkhulu uJotjhuwa umsa kaJehozadaki. 
Zechariah6:12 Umtjele uthi, nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke, “ ‘Kunomuntu onebizo ekuthiwa nguHlumela, uzakuhluma endawenakhe bese wakha isigodlo sakaSomnini." 
Zechariah6:13 Nguye ozokwakha isigodlo sakaSomnini begodu uzokwembathiswa ubukhosi bese uhlala esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi abuse. Yeke kuzakuba nomphristi esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi, kube nokuthula phakathi kwababilaba.’" 
Zechariah6:14 “Isihlohlo sizakuba sesigodlweni sakaSomnini, kube sikhumbuzo saboRheldayi, uThobiya noJedaya godu kube yinzuzo kumsa kaZefaniya." 
Zechariah6:15 Labo abakude bazakubuya bazokufaka isandla ekwakhiweni kwesigodlo sakaSomnini. Nje-ke nizakwazi bonyana uSomnini uMninimadlawoke ungithume kini. Lokhu kuzakwenzeka nange nilalela uSomnini uZimenu ngokuncamileko.” 
Zechariah7:1 Ngomnyaka wesine wokubusa kwekosi uDariyasi kwafika ilizwi lakaSomnini kuZakariya elangeni lesine lenyanga yethoba, okuyinyanga kaKhisilevu." 
Zechariah7:2 UBhethel-Sareseri wathuma uRerhemeleki nabantu bakhe bonyana bayokutenda uSomnini," 
Zechariah7:3 bebabuze abaphristi abasethempeleni lakaSomnini uMninimandlawoke nabaphorofidi bathi: “Kufuze ngilile enyangeni yesihlanu ngokuzila ukudla njengombana ngenzile eminyakeni eminengi na?” 
Zechariah7:4 Yeke ilizwi lakaSomnini uMninimandlawoke lafika kimi, mina Zakariya, lathi:" 
Zechariah7:5 “Khuluma nabo boke abantu benarha le nabaphristi ubabuze uthi, ‘Lokha nagade nizilile nilila enyangeni yesihlanu neyekhomba iminyaka ematjhumi alikhomba edlulileko, ngambala benizilele mina na?" 
Zechariah7:6 Lokha nanidla benisele emihlatjelwenenu bekungasi ngekokuzithabisa na?’ 
Zechariah7:7 Lawa akusiwo amezwi uSomnini awamemezela ngabaphorofidi baphambilini lokha iJerusalema isahlezwi ngokuthula, nalokha amaJuda nasahlala kiyo yoke imizi yakwaJuda na?" 
Zechariah7:8 Okumamezwi uSomnini awakhuluma ngabaphorofidi wathi, ‘Gcinani ukulunga okufaneleko emabandla nitjengise ukwethembeka nesirhawu omunye komunye." 
Zechariah7:9 Ningagandeleli umhlolokazi namkha intandani, isikhonzi namkha odududu. Ningazindlelani okumbi.’" 
Zechariah7:10 Kodwana baqinisa iinhloko bebathundubaza neendlebe zabo. 
Zechariah7:11 Lokhu bakwenzela eswilini ukuze bangalaleli ifundiso netjumayelo uSomnini ayimemezela ngoMoyakhe ngabaphorofidi baphambilini. Ngebangelo uSomnini uMninimandlawoke wasilingeka khulu. 
Zechariah7:12 USomnini uMninimandlawoke uthi, ‘Lokha nangibabizako akhange balalele, yeke nami, angizukubezwa nabarhuwelelako." 
Zechariah7:13 Ngabaphephula ngesivunguvungu ngabasa hlangana nezizwe zoke abangazaziko. Inarha yasala inesizungu ngemuva kwabo kangangobana kwakungekho okhambakhamba lapho. Bayenza njalo inarha ethabisako le yaba lirhalawumba.’ ” 
Zechariah8:1 Yeke uSomnini uMninimandlawoke wangembulela lokhu: 
Zechariah8:2 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Nginesikhwele esikhulu ngeZiyoni, ngibuhlungu khulu ngayo.”" 
Zechariah8:3 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini: “Ngizakubuyela eZiyoni, ngibe ngaphakathi kweJerusalema, ngalokho iJerusalema izakuthiwa nguThembekile nentaba kaSomnini uMninimandlawoke izakuthiwa nguNtaba-Cwengekile.”" 
Zechariah8:4 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Godu eentaradeni zeJerusalema kuzakuhlala amaqhegu nezalukazi, bazakuluphala kangangobana omunye nomunye uzakudondolozela." 
Zechariah8:5 Idorobho lizakuphithizela abesana nabentazana badlale eentaradeni zakhona.” 
Zechariah8:6 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Nakube kubonakala kungakghoneki kini nina enisinde ekuthunjweni, alo, nidlumbana bonyana nakimi akuzukukghoneka ngomuso na?”" 
Zechariah8:7 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Ngizakusindisa abantu bami ephasini loke," 
Zechariah8:8 ngibabuyise bona bazokuhlala eJerusalema. Bazakuba babantu bami, mina ngibe nguZimabo ngeqiniso nangokulunga.”" 
Zechariah8:9 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Lokha abantu nabathoma ukuvuselela ukwakhiwa kwethempeli lakaSomnini uMninimandlawoke, abaphorofidi bathi, ‘Ithempeleli kufanele liqedelelwe.’ Yeke nina enezwa amezwi akhulunywa baphorofidi la, qinisani izandla." 
Zechariah8:10 “Ngambala ngaphambi kokuthonywa kokwakhiwa kwethempeli begade kunganakokhelo yabantu nanyana yeembandana. Ngebanga lobujamo obumbi umuntu ozisebenzelako gade anganakuziphilisa. Ngaphendula woke umuntu bona ajamelane nomakhelwanakhe. 
Zechariah8:11 Kodwana kwanjesi angeze ngisaphatha imisalela yabantwaba, njengombana ngenza phambilini,” kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Zechariah8:12 “Iye, imbewu abayitjalileko izakuhluma kuhle, iindiribe zihlome iinthelo zazo namasimu aveze isivuno sawo kuthi izulu line ngesikhathi esifaneleko. Koke lokhu ngizakwenza bonyana kuhlale kukhona njalo kumisalela yabantwaba." 
Zechariah8:13 “Ngizanisindisa, wena ndlu kaJuda nawe ndlu ka-Israyeli. Njengombana gade nisisiga samanikelela, nje-ke nizakuba mkariso wesibusiso. Ningesabi, qinisani izandla.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Ngambala, nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Njengombana ngaqunta ukunehlisela ihlekelele, ngangaba nesirhawu lokha aboyihlo nabangisilingako," 
Zechariah8:15 yeke sengiqunte bona ngenze okuhle eJerusalema nendlini kaJuda. Nje-ke ningesabi. 
Zechariah8:16 Nanzi izinto enifanele nizenze: Khulumani iqiniso omunye komunye. Gcinani iqiniso nokulunga okufaneleko emabandla. 
Zechariah8:17 Ningazindlelani, nigegede ukufunga ngekohliso ngombana ngiyazizonda zoke izinto ezinjalo." 
Zechariah8:18 “Yeke uSomnini uMninimandlawoke wangembulela lokhu: 
Zechariah8:19 “Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Ukuzila ukudla kwenyanga yesine, yesihlanu, yekhomba neyetjhumi kuzakuba kukwenama neenkhathi ezihle nemigidi yokwethaba kwaJuda. Yeke thandani iqiniso nokuthula.”" 
Zechariah8:20 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Ukusuka gadesi, izizwe ezinengi nabahlali bamadorobho amanengi bazakuza." 
Zechariah8:21 Iye, abahlali bedorobho elinye bazakusuka baye kelinye bathi, ‘Nambani siyokutenda uSomnini besifune nomusa kaSomnini uMninimandlawoke. Vele siyaya.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Ngalokho-ke izizwe ezinengi nabantu abanengi bazakuza bazokufuna umusa kaSomnini uMninimandlawoke eJerusalema bebatende uSomnini.” 
Zechariah8:23 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uMninimandlawoke: “Emihleni leyo amadoda alitjhumi kizo zoke izizwe ezihlukeneko azakukakarela umJuda ngomphetho wesambatho sakhe athi, ‘Sifuna ukukhamba nawe ngombana sizwile bonyana uZimu unani.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Isiphorofido. Ilizwi lakaSomnini lijamelene nenarha yeHadraki nedorobho leDamaseku. Idorobho eliligugweli neenkoro zoke zakwa-Israyeli ngezakaSomnini. 
Zechariah9:2 IRhamathi esemkhawulweni weDamaseku, iTirosi neTsidoni nazo zingezakaSomnini. ITirosi ngambala inekghono:" 
Zechariah9:3 Izakhele irholo, yazibuthelelela isiliva njengethuli negolide njengebhudu leendledlana." 
Zechariah9:4 Kodwana uSomandla uzayiqubula, abhubhise iinthayamanzi zayo elwandle; iqothulwe mlilo." 
Zechariah9:5 I-Atjhikeloni izakubona lokho yesabe; iGaza ihlengezele ne-Ekroni iphelelwe lithemba. Ikosi izakunyelela eGaza, i-Atjhikeloni izakutjhiywa." 
Zechariah9:6 USomnini wathi: “Abaphalali bazakuphalala e-Atjhidodi ngombana ngizaliphelisa igugu lamaFilista leli. 
Zechariah9:7 Ngizabakhafulisa inyama eneengazi nokudla okusilapheleko emilonyenabo.” Iye, abantu be-Atjhidodi abazakusinda nabo bazakuba ngebakaZimethu, bazakufana nekoro kaJuda. Abantu be-Ekroni bona bazakufana namaJebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Godu uSomnini wathi: “Ngizakuvikela inarhami epini erhiribidelako. Akusenamgandeleli ozazenzela ebantwini bami ngombana ngizabe ngibelusile ngesikhatheso.” 
Zechariah9:9 Jekezela khulu wena ndodakazi yeZiyoni! Rhuwelela wena ndodakazi yeJerusalema! Qala, ikosakho iza kuwe, ilungile begodu iyahlula. Ithobekile begodu ikhwele udumbana, udumbana wamambala." 
Zechariah9:10 USomnini wathi: “Ngizakurhayila iinkarana zepi neenjomani kwa-Efrayimu neJerusalema. Imisebe yepi izakwephulwa; ikosi leyo izakumemezela ukuthula ezizweni. Umbuswayo uzakuthoma elwandle ukuya elwandle, ukusuka emlanjeni iYufrathe ukuya emaphelelweni wephasi." 
Zechariah9:11 Wena-ke Jerusalema, ngebanga lamatshwenyeko wabantu enginesivumelwano nabo, ngizakutjhaphulula iimbotjhwa zakho ezisemgodini otjhingako.”" 
Zechariah9:12 Buyelani erholweni, nina mbotjhwa ngombana kunethemba! Ngambala namhlanje uSomnini umemezela uthi: “Wena Jerusalema, ngizakunikela umvuzo obuyelelweko." 
Zechariah9:13 Ngizakusebenzisa uJuda njengomsebe wami, u-Efrayimu abe msubela. Ngizakujokola ngamadodanakho, wena Ziyoni, abe mkhontwami wokuhlaba abantu beGirisi.”" 
Zechariah9:14 USomnini uzakuvela ngehla kwabo, umsubela wakhe uzakusubela njengombani; uSomnini uSomandla uzakuvuthela ipalapala eze ngesivunguvungu sangesewula." 
Zechariah9:15 USomnini uMninimandlawoke uzabavikela, bazakumadlha bebarhiribidele izitha zabo ngamatje wesarwayi; bazipitlize. Bazakuzala iingazi inga majika we-aldari lokha nakatlipilijiweko." 
Zechariah9:16 Mhlokho uSomnini uZimabo uzabasindisa ngombana bamhlambi wakhe. Ngambala bazakuphazima enarhenakhe njengamatje aligugu asesihlohlweni. 
Zechariah9:17 Maye bazakuba bahle bebakarise kangangani! Amabele nesitjhidela sewayini kuzakwenza amasokana neentombi zibethe esimonyongwana. 
Zechariah10:1 Nababawa izulu ngesikhathi sesilimela, uSomnini uzakwenza amafu anzima, awulule izulu, lanele zoke iintjalo neemila enarheni." 
Zechariah10:2 Iinsithabuso zikhuluma ikohliso, abaphenguli babona iinsese, amabhudango akhohlisa abantu begodu akaduduzi, ngokunjalo abantu bakwa-Israyeli baba njengezimvu ezinganamelusi, badurha bebawurubajwe." 
Zechariah10:3 USomnini uthi: “Ubukhali bami buyavutha ngabelusi, ngizakuhlunguphaza abarholi.” Iye, uSomnini uMninimandlawoke uzakwelusa umhlambakhe, indlu kaJuda; uzabenza babe njengenjomani yepi ezitjhayako." 
Zechariah10:4 USomnini uzabanikela abarholi abanetlha, iinkhonkhwani eziqinileko, amajoni naye woke umuntu oya epini. Boke njalo," 
Zechariah10:5 bazakuba njengosibindigidi. Epini bazakugadangela izitha ebhudwini leendledlana. Bazakuhlula ngombana uSomnini unabo. Izitha ezikhwele iinjomani zizakubhalelwa nya. 
Zechariah10:6 USomnini wathi: “Njengombana ngiqinise indlu kaJuda, njalo-ke ngizakusindisa indlu kaJosefa. Ngizakubuyisa indlu kaJosefa, ngibe nezwelo kiyo. Izakuba ngathi azange khengiyilahlele izandla. Ngebanga lokobana nginguSomnini uZimabo, ngizabaphendula." 
Zechariah10:7 U-Efrayimu naye uzakufana nosibindigidi, neenhliziyo zabo zizakwenama inga zifunyene ihleza. Abantwababo bazakubona lokhu bajekezele; iinhliziyo zabo zithabele uSomnini." 
Zechariah10:8 Ngizakuraga u-Israyeli angene esibayeni. Ngambala ngizabahlenga babe banengi njengaphambilini. 
Zechariah10:9 Nanyana ngibasabalalise hlangana nezizwe eenarheni ezikude, bazangikhumbula. Bazakuphila nabantwababo bebabuye." 
Zechariah10:10 Ngizababuyisa eGibhide, ngibarage kusuka e-Asiriya. Ngizabaletha eGiliyadi neLibhanoni, bazakuba banengi bebatlhoge nendawo yokuhlala." 
Zechariah10:11 Umlambo we-Asiriya uzakuthuthumela. Ngizakumanya amagagasi welwandle ukuze zoke iindawo zeNayili ezitjhingako zome. Yoke into i-Asiriya ethembele kiyo izakwehliswa, intonga yobukhosi yeGibhide inyelele." 
Zechariah10:12 Ngizakuqinisa u-Efrayimu ukuze abe nobudlelwano obuhle nami.” Kutjho uSomnini. 
Zechariah11:1 Vula iminyangwakho wena Libhanoni ukuze umlilo urhayile imisedarakho! 
Zechariah11:2 Rhahlawula wena msayipurusi ngombana umsedari uwile, imithi ephakamileko irhayiliwe! Rhahlawulani nina ma-owuku weBhatjhani ngombana isiminyaminya sehlathi sikghedlhiwe!" 
Zechariah11:3 Lalelani ukurhahlawula kwabelusi; umrhulabo ononileko urhurhuliwe! Yizwani ukubhodla kweengwenyamana, isiminyaminya seJordani sikghedlhiwe!" 
Zechariah11:4 Nakhu okwatjhiwo nguSomnini uZimami: “Yelusa izimvu zokuhlatjwa. 
Zechariah11:5 Abathengi bazo bazihlaba bebangazizwela umlandu. Labo abazithengisako bathi, ‘Akathokozwe uSomnini, uthi nginjingile na!’ Nabelusi bazo abe abanasirhawu nazo." 
Zechariah11:6 Nange ngingasenasirhawu ngabantu benarha le begodu ngibaliselele bona badlane uboya bengibaliselele nangekosabo, bazakubhubhisa inarha. Kuzakuba njalo nange ngingabasindisi emandlenabo.” Kutjho uSomnini." 
Zechariah11:7 Nje-ke ngathoma ukwelusa izimvu zokuhlatjwa zabathengisi. Ngathatha iintonga ezimbili, enye ngayithiya bona nguMusa enye ngathi nguHlanganani. Ngelusa umhlambi" 
Zechariah11:8 ngemva kobana ngiqotjhe abelusi abathathu. Kuthe ngenyanga yinye ngabe sengidiniwe ngomhlambi lo, kanti nawo wase ukholekile ngami." 
Zechariah11:9 Ngathi kiwo: “Abe angisazonelusa. Akufe efako, kubhubhe ebhubhako. Eziseleko zigadangane zodwa.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Yeke ngathatha intongami ekuthiwa nguMusa ngayephula, ngabhidla isivumelwano uSomnini asenza nabo boke abantwabo." 
Zechariah11:11 Nje-ke sabhidleka khona mhlokho, kwathi abathengisi ngezimvu agade bangiqalile balemuka bonyana gade kulitshwayo lakaSomnini." 
Zechariah11:12 Ngabatjela ngathi: “Nanidlumbana bona kulungile, ngikhokhelani, kodwana nakungasi njalo, yenilise.” Nje-ke bangikhokhela amatjhumi amathathu weempaparwana zesiliva." 
Zechariah11:13 USomnini wathi kimi: “Ifuthele kumncibilikisisimbi, iye, imali ehle ebangikhokhele ngayo leyo!” Yeke ngathatha imali leyo ngayifuthela kumncibilikisisimbi ngendlini kaSomnini." 
Zechariah11:14 Ngephula intongami yesibili ekuthiwa nguHlanganani, ukubhidla ubufo phakathi kwakaJuda no-Israyeli." 
Zechariah11:15 Yeke uSomnini wathi kimi: “Ukusuka gadesi, sebenzisa iinsetjenziswa zomelusi odlhayeleko," 
Zechariah11:16 ngombana ngizokuvusa umelusi enarheni ongeze adlhadlharhele umhlambi olahlekileko, nanyana afunane neziphungukako, nanyana ahlenge ezilimeleko, nanyana ondle eziphilileko. Uzakugoma inyama yezimvu zekhethelo, abe agugude neenqatha zazo.”" 
Zechariah11:17 Uzazizwa umelusi odlhayeleko osukela umhlambi! Inga isabula ingamrharhabula umkhono, imgobhodlhe nelihlo langesidleni! Umkhonwakhe ukokorane kokukokorana nelihlo lakhe langesidleni liphophale phophali!" 
Zechariah12:1 Isiphorofido. Ilizwi lakaSomnini lijamelene no-Israyeli. USomnini oqhisa amazulu, akhe iinsekelo zephasi, udale ummoya womuntu ngaphakathi kwakhe uthi:" 
Zechariah12:2 “IJerusalema ngizoyenza ikapho yesiyeziyezi yabo boke abantu abayizombelezileko. UJuda naye bazamfikela nabathumba iJerusalema. 
Zechariah12:3 Mhlokho, lokha izizwe zoke zephasi nazihlanganyele iJerusalema, ngizakwenza idorobheli libe lidwala elibudisi kizo zoke izizwezi. Boke abalinga ukulisusa bazazikhubaza kwamambala." 
Zechariah12:4 Mhlokho ngizakurhadla enye nenye injomani ngevalo bese ngirhadla nomkhwelayo ngobuhlanya.” Kutjho uSomnini. “Ngizakuthi nangisaphosa ilihlo phezu kwendlu kaJuda njalo, ngiphophaze zoke iinjomani zesizwe." 
Zechariah12:5 Yeke abarholi bakwaJuda bazakuthi eenhliziyweni zabo, ‘Abantu beJerusalema bakakarele kuSomnini uMninimandlawoke uZimabo.’" 
Zechariah12:6 Mhlokho iinkoro zakwaJuda ngizazenza zifane nedengela lamalahle elidlhwinywe hlangana namaqobetjhana, zibe njengesihlothi esivuthako hlangana neentjherefu. Zizakuqothula ngapha nangapha zoke izizwe ezizizombelezileko, kodwana iJerusalema izakuhlala injalo endawenayo.”" 
Zechariah12:7 USomnini uzakusindisa abantu bakwaJuda qangi ukuze idumo lendlu kaDavida nabahlali beJerusalema lingadluli lakwaJuda. 
Zechariah12:8 Mhlokho uSomnini uzakuvikela abantu beJerusalema, norholopheleko hlangana nabo uzakuba nesibindi njengoDavida, kuthi indlu kaDavida ibe njengeendalwa zezulu, iye ibe njengengilozi kaSomnini, irhole abantu beJerusalema." 
Zechariah12:9 Lokha nangibuthela zoke izizwe ezizokusahlela eJerusalema bona ngizibhubhise," 
Zechariah12:10 ngizakuthulula ummoya womusa newokurabhelela phezu kwendlu kaDavida nebantwini abahlala eJerusalema. Bazakufuna isizo kimi, balilele loyo ebamhlabako njengomuntu nalilela ukuhlongakala komntwana okukuphela kwakhe, njengomuntu odabuka abe munyu ngokuhlongakala kwezibulo." 
Zechariah12:11 Mhlokho isililo eJerusalema sizakuba sikhulu, sizakuba ngathi kulilelwa uHadadi-Rimoni emrhuleni weMegido." 
Zechariah12:12 Inarha yoke izakulila, ikoro ngekoro: ikoro yendlu kaDavida, ikoro yendlu kaNathani," 
Zechariah12:13 ikoro yendlu kaLevi, ikoro kaTjhimeyi," 
Zechariah12:14 nazo zoke iinkoro ezinye. Amadoda azakulila wodwa nabafazi balile bodwa. 
Zechariah13:1 Mhlokho umthombo uzakuvulekela indlu kaDavida nabahlali beJerusalema bona ubahlambulule ezonweni nekusilaphaleni. 
Zechariah13:2 “Mhlokho, ngizakuphelisa amabizo wabosingazimu enarheni ukuze bangasakhunjulwa godu. Ngizakususa nabaphorofidi abanommoya osilapheleko enarheni.” Kutjho uSomnini uMninimandlawoke." 
Zechariah13:3 Nakube nanyana ngiwuphi wabaphorofidaba soloko uyaphorofida, uyise nonina abambelethileko bazakuthi kuye: “Ufanele ufe ngombana ukhuluma amala ebizweni lakaSomnini.” Ababelethi bakhe bazamhlaba lokha nakaphorofidako." 
Zechariah13:4 Mhlokho woke umphorofidi wamala uzakuba neenhloni ngombono wesiphorofido sakhe, angeze embatha inaka lakhe bona ayokuleya amala." 
Zechariah13:5 Uzakuthi: “Angisuye umphorofidi mina; ngimlimi; ihlabathi yintwami engayithoma ngisemntwana.” 
Zechariah13:6 Nange umuntu ambuza athi: “Alo, ziimbazi zani lezi, hlangana namahlombakhwapha?” Yeke uzakuthi: “Awa, iimbazezi, ngezokubethwa, ngazithola endlini yeenini zami.”" 
Zechariah13:7 USomnini uMninimandlawoke uthi: “Phaphama wena sabula, ujamelane nomelusami; iye, ujamelane nomrholi webandla lami. Kghedlha umelusi ukuze izimvu ziphadlhalale. Ngizakujika isandla sami sibe naphezu kokuncancazana." 
Zechariah13:8 “USomnini uthi: “Enarheni yoke, iingcenye ezimbili kezintathu zizakurhayilwa bezitjhabalale; nokho isithathu sizakusinda." 
Zechariah13:9 Isithathwesi ngizasidlulisa emlilweni; ngisicwengisise njengocwengisisa isiliva negolide. Sizakubiza ibizo lami, nje-ke ngizasiphendula, ngithi, ‘Bababantu bami,’ bese sona sithi, ‘USomnini nguZimethu.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Qala, kuza ilanga elilethwa nguSomnini, lapha izitha zakho zizakwabelana khona ipahlakho ngaphakathi kwakho, Jerusalema." 
Zechariah14:2 USomnini uthi: “Ngizakubuthelela zoke izizwe bona zilwe neJerusalema; idorobho lizakuthunjwa, izindlu zisahlelwe bese abafazi bayagagadlhelwa. Ingcenye yedorobho izakuya ekuthunjweni, kodwana abaseleko bazakuhlala edorobhenapha.”" 
Zechariah14:3 Yeke uSomnini uzakuvela ahlule izizwezo, njengombana vane ahlule ngamalanga wepi." 
Zechariah14:4 Mhlokho uSomnini uzakubeka iinyawo zakhe phezu kweNtaba ye-Oliva, ngepumalanga yeJerusalema, iNtaba ye-Oliva izakuphadlhuka kabili ukusuka epumalanga ukuya etjingalanga. Ingcenye yentaba izakuya ngetlhagwini bese enye iya ngesewula, yenze umrhoba omkhulu." 
Zechariah14:5 (Umrhoba weKhidroni onabela e-Atshali uzakuqintwa. Uzakuqintwa njengamhla uqintwa kuhlengezela kwephasi emihleni yabo-Uziya ikosi yakwaJuda.) Yeke uSomnini uZimakho uzakufika, kabacwengileko bakho wena Jerusalema." 
Zechariah14:6 Mhlokho akuzukusa, akuzukuba makhaza nanyana kube nelothe." 
Zechariah14:7 Ngesikhatheso, esaziwa nguSomnini, kuzakuba semini kwaphela, kungabi nemini nobusuku. Lokha nakuhlwako, kuzasoloko kunomkhanyo." 
Zechariah14:8 Mhlokho amanzi agelezako azakugobhoza aphuma eJerusalema; ingcenye yawo izakugelezela ngelwandle elingepumalanga bese amanye agelezela ngelwandle elingetjingalanga, ubusika nehlobo." 
Zechariah14:9 USomnini uzakubusa ephasini loke. Mhlokho kuzakuba noSomnini munye, libizo lakhe lodwa elizakubizwa." 
Zechariah14:10 Inarha yoke ukusuka eGeba ukuya eRimoni ngesewula izakufana nomrhoba weJordani. Kodwana iJerusalema izakuphakanyiswa inzinze endawenayo. Ukusuka eSangweni lakwaBhenjamini ukuya ngehlangothini langeSangweni lokuThoma, ukuya eSangweni leJikeni nokusuka eMbhotjhongweni weHananeli ukuya ebutlhodlhelweni besigodlweni," 
Zechariah14:11 yoke indawo leyo izakuba nabahlali. IJerusalema ayisazukurhayilwa godu; izakuvikeleka.
